gept.example_en: My cousin from Australia is visiting our family for the summer holidays.
gept.example_zh: 我來自澳洲的表親要來我們家過暑假。

gept.example_en: She was too shy to speak in front of the entire classroom.
gept.example_zh: 她太害羞，無法在整個教室面前發言。

gept.example_en: My younger brother is too lazy to clean his messy bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟太懶了，不願清理他髒亂的臥室。

gept.example_en: The friendly waiter remembered our names and brought our usual coffee orders.
gept.example_zh: 那位友善的服務生記得我們的名字，並送上我們平常點的咖啡。

gept.example_en: We could not agree on which restaurant to choose for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們無法決定要選哪家餐廳吃晚餐。

gept.example_en: My family supported me throughout my difficult journey toward becoming a doctor.
gept.example_zh: 在我成為醫生的艱難旅程中，我的家人一直支持我。

gept.example_en: She raised her three children alone after her husband passed away.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫過世後，她獨自撫養三個孩子。

gept.example_en: Most teenagers spend many hours on their phones every single day.
gept.example_zh: 大多數青少年每天都花很多小時在手機上。

gept.example_en: They have been dating for six months and seem extremely happy together.
gept.example_zh: 他們約會已經六個月了，在一起看起來非常開心。

gept.example_en: He shouted at his sister for breaking his expensive video game console.
gept.example_zh: 他對妹妹大喊，因為她弄壞了他昂貴的電玩主機。

gept.example_en: My grandfather has a deep laugh that fills the entire room.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父有著深沉的笑聲，能充滿整個房間。

gept.example_en: She always greets her customers with a warm and genuine smile.
gept.example_zh: 她總是以溫暖真誠的微笑問候顧客。

gept.example_en: She nodded in agreement when her father explained the family rules.
gept.example_zh: 當她父親解釋家規時，她點頭表示同意。

gept.example_en: She waved goodbye to her grandparents from the train station platform.
gept.example_zh: 她從火車站月台向祖父母揮手道別。

gept.example_en: My mother always hugs me tightly before I leave on a long trip.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽總是在我長途旅行出發前緊緊擁抱我。

gept.example_en: He kissed his daughter on the forehead before tucking her into bed.
gept.example_zh: 他在女兒上床睡覺前親吻了她的額頭。

gept.example_en: Our friendly neighbor often brings us fresh vegetables from her garden.
gept.example_zh: 我們友善的鄰居常常從她的花園帶新鮮蔬菜給我們。

gept.example_en: His grandmother always bakes him a chocolate cake for his birthday.
gept.example_zh: 他祖母總是為他的生日烤巧克力蛋糕。

gept.example_en: We celebrated my brother's promotion at an elegant downtown restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一家市中心的高雅餐廳慶祝哥哥升職。

gept.example_en: My mother's mood improves significantly after her morning cup of tea.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽喝過晨間的茶之後，心情會大幅改善。

gept.example_en: I had a strange feeling that something was wrong at home.
gept.example_zh: 我有種奇怪的感覺，覺得家裡出了什麼事。

gept.example_en: My little brother hates eating vegetables of any kind.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟討厭吃任何一種蔬菜。

gept.example_en: She thanked her mentor for the years of patient guidance and support.
gept.example_zh: 她感謝她的導師多年來的耐心指導和支持。

gept.example_en: My host family welcomed me warmly when I arrived in Japan.
gept.example_zh: 當我抵達日本時，寄宿家庭熱情地歡迎了我。

gept.example_en: My sister and I have always been very close despite the age difference.
gept.example_zh: 儘管有年齡差距，我和姊姊一直非常親密。

gept.example_en: My cousin has a loud personality and is the life of every party.
gept.example_zh: 我表哥個性很大方，是每場派對的靈魂人物。

gept.example_en: She is quiet but very observant about everything happening around her.
gept.example_zh: 她很安靜，但對周圍發生的一切都很敏銳。

gept.example_en: He stayed silent during the argument between his parents.
gept.example_zh: 在父母的爭吵中，他保持沉默。

gept.example_en: He found the family meeting incredibly dull and wished he could leave.
gept.example_zh: 他覺得這次家族會議非常沉悶，希望能離開。

gept.example_en: My uncle's stories about his old job are quite boring.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔關於他舊工作的故事相當無聊。

gept.example_en: My handsome cousin attracts attention wherever he goes in public.
gept.example_zh: 我英俊的表哥無論在公共場所走到哪都會吸引目光。

gept.example_en: She has a beautiful smile that lights up the entire room.
gept.example_zh: 她有著能照亮整個房間的美麗笑容。

gept.example_en: My tall cousin plays professional basketball for a local team.
gept.example_zh: 我高個子的表哥為一支當地球隊打職業籃球。

gept.example_en: Despite being short, she excels at competitive gymnastics.
gept.example_zh: 儘管身材矮小，她在競技體操方面表現出色。

gept.example_en: She has long straight hair that reaches all the way to her waist.
gept.example_zh: 她有著一頭可垂到腰間的長直髮。

gept.example_en: I miss my grandmother's cooking ever since she moved into a nursing home.
gept.example_zh: 自從祖母搬到養老院後，我就一直想念她做的菜。

gept.example_en: I will always remember my father's advice on the day I graduated.
gept.example_zh: 我永遠會記得父親在我畢業那天給我的建議。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to call your mother on her birthday next Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了下週六在你母親生日時打電話給她。

gept.example_en: My happiest memory is of summers spent at my grandparents' farm.
gept.example_zh: 我最快樂的回憶是在祖父母農場度過的夏天。

gept.example_en: He felt weak and helpless after losing his job and his apartment.
gept.example_zh: 在失去工作和公寓後，他感到軟弱無助。

gept.example_en: She had to be strong for her children after her husband's death.
gept.example_zh: 在丈夫去世後，她必須為孩子們堅強。

gept.example_en: It was brave of him to start a new business at sixty.
gept.example_zh: 他在六十歲時開創新事業真是勇敢。

gept.example_en: She tried to explain her decision to her disappointed parents.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖向失望的父母解釋自己的決定。

gept.example_en: Don't blame me for problems you created with your own decisions.
gept.example_zh: 不要為你自己決定造成的問題責怪我。

gept.example_en: A good parent protects their children from unnecessary emotional harm.
gept.example_zh: 好的父母會保護孩子免於不必要的情感傷害。

gept.example_en: The lifeguard saved the drowning child at the public swimming pool.
gept.example_zh: 救生員在公共游泳池救起了那個快溺水的孩子。

gept.example_en: His unkind words hurt her more than he ever realized.
gept.example_zh: 他不友善的話傷她比他自己意識到的還要深。

gept.example_en: She refused to attend the family dinner because of the ongoing argument.
gept.example_zh: 由於持續的爭吵，她拒絕參加家庭晚餐。

gept.example_en: He finally accepted that his parents would never approve of his career choice.
gept.example_zh: 他終於接受父母永遠不會贊同他職業選擇的事實。

gept.example_en: His mother objected to him moving to a foreign country alone.
gept.example_zh: 他母親反對他獨自搬到外國去。

gept.example_en: My cousins grew up in the countryside surrounded by farm animals.
gept.example_zh: 我表兄妹們在鄉村長大，周圍都是農場動物。

gept.example_en: My grandfather is my hero because of his courage during the war.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父因戰爭期間的勇氣而成為我的英雄。

gept.example_en: She played the role of mother and breadwinner after her husband's death.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫去世後，她兼任母親和家庭支柱的角色。

gept.example_en: As the oldest son, it was his duty to lead the family.
gept.example_zh: 作為長子，帶領家庭是他的義務。

gept.example_en: She kept her promise to visit her grandmother every single Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 她信守承諾，每個星期天都去探望祖母。

gept.example_en: Make sure the lock on the back door is engaged before bedtime.
gept.example_zh: 睡前確認後門的鎖已上好。

gept.example_en: The ceiling fan circulates air and keeps the room comfortable in summer.
gept.example_zh: 吊扇能讓空氣流通，使房間在夏天保持舒適。

gept.example_en: Hang the wet towels outside so they dry quickly in the sun.
gept.example_zh: 把濕毛巾掛到外面，讓它們在陽光下快點曬乾。

gept.example_en: Please clear the table after everyone has finished eating dinner.
gept.example_zh: 大家吃完晚餐後請把桌子清乾淨。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to empty the dishwasher before loading the dirty dishes.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了在放入髒碗盤前先清空洗碗機。

gept.example_en: Let's clean up the living room before our guests arrive tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我們在客人今晚到達前把客廳整理乾淨吧。

gept.example_en: I usually wake up around six thirty on weekday mornings.
gept.example_zh: 我平日早上通常六點半左右起床。

gept.example_en: Children should brush their teeth twice a day for proper oral hygiene.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們應該一天刷兩次牙以維持良好的口腔衛生。

gept.example_en: She dresses quickly because the bus to work arrives at seven.
gept.example_zh: 她快速穿衣，因為上班的公車七點就到。

gept.example_en: Please get dressed quickly; we are already running late for school.
gept.example_zh: 快點穿好衣服，我們上學已經遲到了。

gept.example_en: I shower every night before bed rather than in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每天晚上睡前淋浴，而不是早上。

gept.example_en: She plans her weekly meals on Sunday evening to save shopping time.
gept.example_zh: 她週日晚上規劃每週菜單以節省購物時間。

gept.example_en: I like to relax with a cup of tea after a long workday.
gept.example_zh: 漫長的工作日後，我喜歡喝杯茶放鬆。

gept.example_en: She exercises three times a week at the neighborhood gym.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在社區健身房運動三次。

gept.example_en: The birds outside my window wake me earlier than my alarm clock.
gept.example_zh: 窗外的鳥兒比我的鬧鐘還早把我吵醒。

gept.example_en: Hurry up or we will miss the morning yoga class again.
gept.example_zh: 快一點，不然我們又要錯過早上的瑜伽課了。

gept.example_en: He always tries to arrive at the office ten minutes early.
gept.example_zh: 他總是試著提前十分鐘到辦公室。

gept.example_en: I usually leave home at eight fifteen to avoid heavy traffic.
gept.example_zh: 我通常八點十五分出門以避開塞車。

gept.example_en: She returned home from the gym exhausted but happy.
gept.example_zh: 她運動完從健身房回家，疲憊但開心。

gept.example_en: Take time to rest your eyes during long hours of computer work.
gept.example_zh: 長時間使用電腦時要花點時間讓眼睛休息。

gept.example_en: She walks the dog daily, regardless of the weather conditions.
gept.example_zh: 不論天氣如何，她每天都會遛狗。

gept.example_en: Our family has a weekly movie night every Friday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每週五晚上都有電影之夜。

gept.example_en: I pay my utility bills monthly through automatic bank transfers.
gept.example_zh: 我透過銀行自動轉帳每月繳水電費。

gept.example_en: Dinner will be ready soon, so please come and set the table.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐很快就好，請來擺餐桌。

gept.example_en: It was a perfect sunny day for hanging laundry outside on the line.
gept.example_zh: 這是把衣服掛在外面曬的完美晴天。

gept.example_en: The morning started off cloudy but turned bright by lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 早上天氣多雲，但中午就轉晴了。

gept.example_en: It was so windy that the patio umbrella nearly blew away.
gept.example_zh: 風大到陽台上的傘差點被吹走。

gept.example_en: In spring, we open all the windows to let fresh air into the house.
gept.example_zh: 春天時我們打開所有的窗戶，讓新鮮空氣進入屋內。

gept.example_en: Summer evenings are spent on the porch with cold lemonade.
gept.example_zh: 夏天的夜晚我們會坐在門廊上喝冰檸檬汁。

gept.example_en: Winter mornings are cold, so I always heat up the bathroom first.
gept.example_zh: 冬天早晨很冷，所以我總是先把浴室暖起來。

gept.example_en: Children play soccer in the neighborhood park every Saturday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們每週六下午都在社區公園裡踢足球。

gept.example_en: Our local library hosts free reading sessions every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們當地的圖書館每週六上午舉辦免費讀書會。

gept.example_en: Elderly neighbors often sit on the bench in front of the bakery.
gept.example_zh: 年長的鄰居們常坐在麵包店前的長椅上。

gept.example_en: I always keep a spare key hidden behind the small flower pot.
gept.example_zh: 我總是把備用鑰匙藏在小花盆後面。

gept.example_en: She plants new flowers along the garden path every spring.
gept.example_zh: 她每年春天都會在花園小徑旁種上新花。

gept.example_en: She transplanted the herb seedlings into larger clay pots.
gept.example_zh: 她把香草幼苗移植到較大的陶土花盆裡。

gept.example_en: Each leaf changes color from green to red in the autumn.
gept.example_zh: 秋天時每片葉子都會從綠色變成紅色。

gept.example_en: Pull the wool blanket over your legs while watching a movie.
gept.example_zh: 看電影時把羊毛毯蓋在腿上。

gept.example_en: Hang the wet towel on the rack so it dries quickly.
gept.example_zh: 把濕毛巾掛在架子上，讓它快點乾。

gept.example_en: Take the garbage to the curb every Tuesday and Friday morning.
gept.example_zh: 每週二和週五早上把垃圾拿到路邊。

gept.example_en: The teacher wrote the math problem on the blackboard for everyone to see.
gept.example_zh: 老師把數學題寫在黑板上讓大家看。

gept.example_en: Our classroom has air conditioning and a large interactive screen.
gept.example_zh: 我們的教室有空調和一塊大型互動螢幕。

gept.example_en: My classmate helped me catch up after I missed two weeks of school.
gept.example_zh: 我缺課兩週後，同班同學幫我補上進度。

gept.example_en: Studying history helps us avoid repeating the mistakes of the past.
gept.example_zh: 學習歷史能幫助我們避免重蹈過去的錯誤。

gept.example_en: Mathematics is my favorite subject because I enjoy solving complex problems.
gept.example_zh: 數學是我最喜歡的科目，因為我喜歡解難題。

gept.example_en: Daily practice is the key to mastering any musical instrument.
gept.example_zh: 每日練習是精通任何樂器的關鍵。

gept.example_en: The entrance exam covers math, English, and general knowledge sections.
gept.example_zh: 入學考試包含數學、英文與通識三部分。

gept.example_en: He passed the placement test with an impressively high score.
gept.example_zh: 他以高分通過了分級測驗。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 分數 (動詞) 得分
gept.example_en: She got the highest score in the English speaking test.
gept.example_zh: 她在英文口說測驗中拿到最高分。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 分數；標記 (動詞) 打分數
gept.example_en: The teacher will mark our essays and return them next Wednesday.
gept.example_zh: 老師會批改我們的作文，下週三歸還。

gept.example_en: His paper on renewable energy was published in a respected journal.
gept.example_zh: 他關於再生能源的論文發表在一本知名期刊上。

gept.example_en: Each group will report their research findings at the end of term.
gept.example_zh: 每個小組將在學期末報告他們的研究發現。

gept.example_en: My math homework took me two hours to finish last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚的數學作業花了我兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The teacher assigned a difficult task involving real-world data analysis.
gept.example_zh: 老師指派了一個牽涉真實數據分析的困難任務。

gept.example_en: Write five complete sentences using today's new vocabulary words.
gept.example_zh: 用今天的新單字寫五個完整句子。

gept.example_en: He decided to learn one foreign language every five years.
gept.example_zh: 他決定每五年學一門外語。

gept.example_en: Look up the unfamiliar words in a dictionary as you read.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀時把不熟悉的字查字典。

gept.example_en: She writes neat notes in a small leather notebook every class.
gept.example_zh: 她每節課都在一本小皮製筆記本上工整地寫筆記。

gept.example_en: Calculators are not allowed during the basic arithmetic portion of the exam.
gept.example_zh: 考試的基本算術部分不准使用計算機。

gept.example_en: You will present your group project in front of the class on Friday.
gept.example_zh: 你週五要在全班面前報告小組專題。

gept.example_en: You must submit a written report along with your oral presentation.
gept.example_zh: 除了口頭報告外，你還必須繳交書面報告。

gept.example_en: Refer to the table on page eighty for the complete results.
gept.example_zh: 完整結果請參考第八十頁的表格。

gept.example_en: We collected data from over five hundred students across three schools.
gept.example_zh: 我們從三所學校的五百多名學生那裡蒐集資料。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 對照組 (動詞) 控制
gept.example_en: The control group did not receive any special learning materials.
gept.example_zh: 對照組沒有獲得任何特殊學習材料。

gept.example_en: The results suggest that group projects increase student motivation.
gept.example_zh: 研究結果顯示小組專題能提升學生的動機。

gept.example_en: Try to solve the problem on your own before asking for help.
gept.example_zh: 在求助之前，先試著自己解決問題。

gept.example_en: The textbook ends with twenty practice problems for self-study.
gept.example_zh: 課本最後附有二十道自學練習題。

gept.example_en: Repeat each new word out loud three times to remember it.
gept.example_zh: 每個新單字大聲念三次以幫助記憶。

gept.example_en: Don't be afraid to make mistakes when learning a new language.
gept.example_zh: 學新語言時別怕犯錯。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 正確的 (動詞) 改正
gept.example_en: Please correct any spelling mistakes before you submit your essay.
gept.example_zh: 交作文前請改正任何拼字錯誤。

gept.example_en: The first prize in the math contest was a brand new laptop.
gept.example_zh: 數學競賽的首獎是一台全新的筆記型電腦。

gept.example_en: Reading every day will improve your vocabulary and writing skills.
gept.example_zh: 每天閱讀能改善你的詞彙和寫作能力。

gept.example_en: It is never too late to learn a new skill or hobby.
gept.example_zh: 學習新技能或愛好永遠不嫌晚。

gept.example_en: Active learning leads to better understanding than passive listening.
gept.example_zh: 主動學習比被動聽講能帶來更深的理解。

gept.example_en: A good education opens many doors throughout your career.
gept.example_zh: 良好的教育能在你的職涯中打開許多大門。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me how to write Chinese characters carefully.
gept.example_zh: 我的祖母教我如何仔細寫漢字。

gept.example_en: Teaching young children requires great patience and creativity.
gept.example_zh: 教幼童需要極大的耐心與創意。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 訓練 (名詞) 火車
gept.example_en: Teachers are trained to handle a wide range of classroom situations.
gept.example_zh: 老師受訓以應對課堂上各種狀況。

gept.example_en: Her advice about time management really helped me last semester.
gept.example_zh: 她關於時間管理的建議上學期對我幫助很大。

gept.example_en: He plans to attend college on the other side of the country.
gept.example_zh: 他打算去國家另一端念大學。

gept.example_en: Our university offers more than two hundred different majors.
gept.example_zh: 我們大學提供兩百多種不同主修。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 問題 (動詞) 提問
gept.example_en: Please feel free to ask any question after the presentation.
gept.example_zh: 報告後請放心提出任何問題。

gept.example_en: There isn't always one right answer to a difficult question.
gept.example_zh: 困難的問題不一定只有一個正確答案。

gept.example_en: Please reply to my email about the group project by tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 請在明天前回覆我關於小組專題的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: Setting clear goals helps students stay focused throughout the semester.
gept.example_zh: 設定清楚的目標能幫助學生整學期保持專注。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 完整的 (動詞) 完成
gept.example_en: Please complete the entire questionnaire and check your answers carefully.
gept.example_zh: 請完成整份問卷並仔細檢查答案。

gept.example_en: Finish reading the chapter before our class on Monday.
gept.example_zh: 在週一上課前讀完這一章。

gept.example_en: Let's begin today's class with a quick review of yesterday's material.
gept.example_zh: 今天課程從快速複習昨天教材開始。

gept.example_en: Start each study session by setting a clear and small goal.
gept.example_zh: 每次讀書時先設定一個清楚的小目標。

gept.example_en: You should continue practicing daily even after the test is over.
gept.example_zh: 考完試後你也應該繼續每天練習。

gept.example_en: She received an excellent grade on her final history paper.
gept.example_zh: 她的歷史期末報告得到優異的成績。

gept.example_en: Her poor performance was due to a serious illness during the semester.
gept.example_zh: 她表現不佳是因為學期中生了重病。

gept.example_en: You need to score at least sixty percent to pass this course.
gept.example_zh: 你要至少考六十分才能通過這門課。

gept.example_en: Some chapters were so difficult that I had to read them twice.
gept.example_zh: 有些章節難到我必須讀兩遍。

gept.example_en: The first quiz was easy because the teacher reviewed everything in class.
gept.example_zh: 第一次小考很簡單，因為老師上課時都複習過了。

gept.example_en: Start with simple examples before moving on to harder problems.
gept.example_zh: 從簡單例題開始，再進入較難的題目。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 團體 (動詞) 分組
gept.example_en: The teacher divided the class into groups of four students each.
gept.example_zh: 老師把全班分成每組四人的小組。

gept.example_en: The local museum offers free tours for school groups.
gept.example_zh: 當地博物館為學校團體提供免費導覽。

gept.example_en: Online courses became extremely popular during the global pandemic.
gept.example_zh: 線上課程在全球疫情期間變得極為普及。

gept.example_en: The teacher showed a short video about the history of the printing press.
gept.example_zh: 老師播放了一段關於印刷術歷史的短片。

gept.example_en: This language app makes daily practice fun and game-like.
gept.example_zh: 這個語言學習應用程式讓每日練習變得有趣又像遊戲。

gept.example_en: Most college students take notes on their laptop during lectures.
gept.example_zh: 多數大學生在演講中用筆電做筆記。

gept.example_en: The company president gave a speech at the conference.
gept.example_zh: 公司董事長在會議上發表了演說。

gept.example_en: The printer is out of paper again on the third floor.
gept.example_zh: 三樓的印表機又沒紙了。

gept.example_en: Mark the company holidays on your calendar in advance.
gept.example_zh: 請提前在你的行事曆上標示公司假日。

gept.example_en: She bought a quiet keyboard for shared workspaces.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一個靜音鍵盤，適合共用工作空間。

gept.example_en: The elevator stopped on the fifth floor for maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 電梯在五樓停下進行維修。

gept.example_en: It is never easy to fire a long-time employee.
gept.example_zh: 解雇一位資深員工從來不是件容易的事。

gept.example_en: I have a call with the supplier at three o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 我三點和供應商有個電話會議。

gept.example_en: Feel free to share your ideas with the whole group.
gept.example_zh: 歡迎你和整個團隊分享你的想法。

gept.example_en: The online course covers basic project management skills.
gept.example_zh: 這門線上課程涵蓋基本的專案管理技能。

gept.example_en: The savings account earns interest every six months.
gept.example_zh: 這個儲蓄帳戶每六個月會產生利息。

gept.example_en: The bank raised its interest rate last month.
gept.example_zh: 銀行上個月調升了利率。

gept.example_en: Pay your electricity bill before the end of the month.
gept.example_zh: 請在月底前繳付你的電費帳單。

gept.example_en: Many small shops still prefer cash payments.
gept.example_zh: 許多小店仍然偏好現金付款。

gept.example_en: He wrote a check to pay the landlord.
gept.example_zh: 他開了一張支票支付給房東。

gept.example_en: I keep all my coins in a glass jar at home.
gept.example_zh: 我把所有的硬幣放在家裡的玻璃罐中。

gept.example_en: Don't spend too much on things you don't need.
gept.example_zh: 別在你不需要的東西上花太多錢。

gept.example_en: She earns a good salary at her new job.
gept.example_zh: 她在新工作賺取不錯的薪水。

gept.example_en: I'll pay for lunch today since you paid yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 今天午餐我來付，因為你昨天付了。

gept.example_en: The bank closes at four in the afternoon on weekdays.
gept.example_zh: 這家銀行平日下午四點關門。

gept.example_en: Sign your name on the dotted line at the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 請在底部的虛線處簽名。

gept.example_en: The summer sale starts next Monday in our store.
gept.example_zh: 我們店裡的夏季特賣下週一開始。

gept.example_en: The price of vegetables went up this month.
gept.example_zh: 這個月蔬菜的價格上漲了。

gept.example_en: The cost of running a business has increased.
gept.example_zh: 經營企業的成本已經增加。

gept.example_en: Use a basket if you only need a few items.
gept.example_zh: 如果你只買少數幾樣，請用購物籃。

gept.example_en: The market for second-hand books is growing online.
gept.example_zh: 二手書市場在網路上不斷成長。

gept.example_en: Most workers get two weeks of vacation each year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數員工每年有兩週的假期。

gept.example_en: The office is closed on national holidays.
gept.example_zh: 公司在國定假日休息。

gept.example_en: Most offices are closed during the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 大多數辦公室在週末不營業。

gept.example_en: Office space in the city center is very expensive.
gept.example_zh: 市中心的辦公空間非常昂貴。

gept.example_en: This brand is cheap but the quality is decent.
gept.example_zh: 這個品牌便宜但品質還不錯。

gept.example_en: I always keep my passport in a safe place when traveling abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我出國旅行時總是把護照放在安全的地方。

gept.example_en: She packed her luggage carefully the night before the trip.
gept.example_zh: 她在旅行前一晚仔細打包行李。

gept.example_en: My suitcase was too heavy to lift onto the train.
gept.example_zh: 我的手提箱太重，搬不上火車。

gept.example_en: He carried only a small backpack on his weekend hike.
gept.example_zh: 週末健行時他只背了一個小背包。

gept.example_en: The subway is the fastest way to get to downtown.
gept.example_zh: 搭地鐵是到市中心最快的方式。

gept.example_en: We hailed a taxi to take us back to the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 我們招了輛計程車載我們回飯店。

gept.example_en: We pitched our tent near the river before sunset.
gept.example_zh: 我們在日落前在河邊搭起了帳篷。

gept.example_en: She sent a postcard from every city she visited.
gept.example_zh: 她每去一個城市都寄一張明信片。

gept.example_en: The museum houses ancient artifacts from many cultures.
gept.example_zh: 這座博物館收藏來自許多文化的古文物。

gept.example_en: Tourists love to explore the medieval castle on the hilltop.
gept.example_zh: 遊客喜歡參觀山頂上的中世紀城堡。

gept.example_en: I unfolded the map to find the nearest restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我攤開地圖尋找最近的餐廳。

gept.example_en: Could you give me directions to the train station?
gept.example_zh: 你能告訴我去火車站的方向嗎？

gept.example_en: Heavy traffic delayed our arrival at the meeting.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的交通堵塞延誤了我們開會的抵達時間。

gept.example_en: The old stone bridge dates back four hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 這座古老的石橋已有四百年歷史。

gept.example_en: I'm afraid I lost my wallet on the train.
gept.example_zh: 我恐怕在火車上把錢包弄丟了。

gept.example_en: The lantern festival attracts visitors from around the world.
gept.example_zh: 元宵節吸引來自世界各地的遊客。

gept.example_en: Bake the cake at 350 degrees for thirty minutes.
gept.example_zh: 以攝氏 175 度烤蛋糕三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Spread butter on the toast while it's still warm.
gept.example_zh: 趁吐司還溫熱時抹上奶油。

gept.example_en: Add a spoonful of cream to make the soup richer.
gept.example_zh: 加一匙鮮奶油讓湯更濃郁。

gept.example_en: Add a pinch of salt to balance the sweetness.
gept.example_zh: 加一撮鹽以平衡甜味。

gept.example_en: Freshly ground black pepper makes a big difference.
gept.example_zh: 現磨黑胡椒會帶來很大的不同。

gept.example_en: Reduce the sugar if you prefer less sweet desserts.
gept.example_zh: 如果喜歡較不甜的甜點就減少糖量。

gept.example_en: Crushed garlic adds depth to almost any savory dish.
gept.example_zh: 壓碎的大蒜為幾乎任何鹹味菜餚增添層次。

gept.example_en: Add chili to the dish if you like it spicy.
gept.example_zh: 如果你喜歡辣就加辣椒到菜裡。

gept.example_en: The restaurant offers a wide variety of hot and cold beverages.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳提供各種冷熱飲料。

gept.example_en: The hotel offers an all-you-can-eat buffet for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 這家飯店早餐提供吃到飽自助餐。

gept.example_en: Beef stew is a comforting winter dish.
gept.example_zh: 燉牛肉是溫暖人心的冬日料理。

gept.example_en: Pork is widely used in Chinese cooking.
gept.example_zh: 豬肉在中式料理中廣泛使用。

gept.example_en: Roast lamb is a popular Easter dish in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 烤羊肉是許多國家流行的復活節菜餚。

gept.example_en: Fresh bread smells wonderful coming out of the oven.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的麵包從烤箱裡拿出來時聞起來很香。

gept.example_en: Italian pasta comes in dozens of different shapes.
gept.example_zh: 義大利麵有幾十種不同的形狀。

gept.example_en: The waitress recommended the chef's special.
gept.example_zh: 女服務生推薦主廚特餐。

gept.example_en: I'd like to order the grilled fish with vegetables.
gept.example_zh: 我想點烤魚配蔬菜。

gept.example_en: It's customary to leave a tip of fifteen to twenty percent.
gept.example_zh: 給百分之十五到二十的小費是慣例。

gept.example_en: This dish is a specialty of the local region.
gept.example_zh: 這道菜是當地的特色料理。

gept.example_en: Pour the soup into a deep bowl.
gept.example_zh: 把湯倒進深碗裡。

gept.example_en: Could I have a glass of red wine, please?
gept.example_zh: 可以給我一杯紅酒嗎？

gept.example_en: She drinks coffee from a big red mug every morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上用一個大紅色馬克杯喝咖啡。

gept.example_en: Lemons are too sour to eat by themselves.
gept.example_zh: 檸檬太酸不能單獨吃。

gept.example_en: A hearty breakfast keeps me energized all morning.
gept.example_zh: 豐盛的早餐讓我整個早上精力充沛。

gept.example_en: Smoking damages the lungs over many years.
gept.example_zh: 抽煙多年會損害肺部。

gept.example_en: Find time for relaxation each day to manage stress.
gept.example_zh: 每天找時間放鬆以管理壓力。

gept.example_en: Basketball is one of the most popular sports among American teenagers today.
gept.example_zh: 籃球是當今美國青少年中最受歡迎的運動之一。

gept.example_en: Soccer is the most widely watched sport in the world today.
gept.example_zh: 足球是當今世界上觀看人數最多的運動。

gept.example_en: The children kicked the ball around the field until it got dark.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在球場上踢球直到天黑。

gept.example_en: He kicked the ball powerfully toward the goal but missed by inches.
gept.example_zh: 他用力把球踢向球門，但只差幾英寸沒進。

gept.example_en: Athletes train hard to jump higher and longer than their competitors.
gept.example_zh: 運動員努力訓練，以跳得比競爭對手更高更遠。

gept.example_en: He can throw a baseball farther than anyone else on the team.
gept.example_zh: 他扔棒球比球隊任何人都遠。

gept.example_en: She managed to catch the ball just before it crossed the boundary line.
gept.example_zh: 她設法在球越過邊界線前接到它。

gept.example_en: He hit the ball over the fence for a home run.
gept.example_zh: 他將球擊出圍欄，打出全壘打。

gept.example_en: Players must understand the rules before starting a new game.
gept.example_zh: 玩家必須在開始新遊戲前了解規則。

gept.example_en: A button fell off his shirt during the long uncomfortable meeting today.
gept.example_zh: 在今天漫長又不舒服的會議中他襯衫上的一顆鈕扣掉了。

gept.example_en: Sweet yellow corn was the main side dish at the summer picnic.
gept.example_zh: 甜甜的黃色玉米是夏日野餐的主要配菜。

gept.example_en: Her faith provided strength during the darkest moments of her long medical journey.
gept.example_zh: 她的信仰在她漫長就醫旅程最黑暗的時刻提供了力量。

gept.example_en: The new screen measures exactly twenty-four inches diagonally from corner to corner.
gept.example_zh: 新螢幕對角線從角到角剛好二十四英吋。

gept.example_en: The closest grocery store is about a mile away from our new apartment.
gept.example_zh: 最近的雜貨店離我們的新公寓大約一英里遠。

gept.example_en: Please pick up a dozen fresh eggs from the farmers market this morning.
gept.example_zh: 請今早從農夫市集買一打新鮮雞蛋回來。

gept.example_en: He pulled an old, crumpled receipt out of his coat pocket to check the date.
gept.example_zh: 他從外套口袋裡掏出一張皺巴巴的舊收據以查看日期。

gept.example_en: My uncle taught me how to cut firewood evenly with a hand saw last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 上週末叔叔教我如何用手鋸把柴火鋸得均勻。

gept.example_en: A small metal file helped him smooth the rough edge of the freshly cut pipe.
gept.example_zh: 一把小金屬銼刀幫他把剛切好水管的粗糙邊緣磨平。

gept.example_en: She threaded a fine needle and began stitching the torn pocket back onto the shirt.
gept.example_zh: 她穿好細針，開始把撕開的口袋縫回襯衫上。

gept.example_en: Cotton shirts breathe well and are perfect for hot summer weather and outdoor activities.
gept.example_zh: 棉質襯衫透氣性佳，非常適合炎熱的夏季天氣和戶外活動。

gept.example_en: A fat earthworm wriggled across the wet garden path right after the morning rain.
gept.example_zh: 清晨下過雨後，一條肥肥的蚯蚓在濕潤的花園小徑上扭動爬行。

gept.example_en: A tiny bird built its small soft nest in the apple tree outside my bedroom window.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小鳥在我臥室窗外的蘋果樹上築了一個小巧柔軟的鳥巢。

gept.example_en: A long thin shadow fell across the dusty floor as evening approached the empty room.
gept.example_zh: 當夜晚降臨空蕩的房間時，一道又長又細的影子映在滿是灰塵的地板上。

gept.example_en: Steel bars reinforced the heavy concrete pillars supporting the entire structure of the bridge.
gept.example_zh: 鋼筋強化了支撐整座橋結構的厚重水泥柱。

gept.example_en: He gave her a single red rose wrapped in soft white paper.
gept.example_zh: 他送她一朵用白色軟紙包著的紅玫瑰。

gept.example_en: Each weight in the network is adjusted during backpropagation to minimize the overall training loss.
gept.example_zh: 網路中每個權重在反向傳播時調整以最小化整體訓練損失。

gept.example_en: Higher voltage pushes electric current more strongly through any given circuit element.
gept.example_zh: 較高的電壓能更強地推動電流通過任何電路元件。

gept.example_en: Children in kindergarten learn social skills alongside basic reading and counting.
gept.example_zh: 幼稚園的孩子在學習基礎閱讀和算數的同時也學習社交技能。

gept.example_en: Despite the heavy rain, we managed to arrive at the airport on time.
gept.example_zh: 儘管下著大雨，我們仍設法準時抵達機場。

gept.example_en: The manager scheduled a meeting for nine o'clock tomorrow morning.
gept.example_zh: 經理把會議安排在明天早上九點。

gept.example_en: All students are required to attend the opening ceremony next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 所有學生下週一都必須出席開學典禮。

gept.example_en: Could you recommend a good restaurant near the train station?
gept.example_zh: 你可以推薦一家車站附近不錯的餐廳嗎？

gept.example_en: The package will be delivered to your home by Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 這個包裹將會在週五下午前送到你家。

gept.example_en: Several customers complained about the noise from the construction site.
gept.example_zh: 好幾位顧客抱怨工地的噪音。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad is a great opportunity to improve your language skills.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學是提升語言能力的絕佳機會。

gept.example_en: Working as a tour guide gave me valuable experience in dealing with people.
gept.example_zh: 擔任導遊讓我獲得與人相處的寶貴經驗。

gept.example_en: The new manager has many fresh ideas to improve our department.
gept.example_zh: 新經理有許多新點子可以改善我們的部門。

gept.example_en: Our team is working on an important project for a foreign client.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊正在為一位外國客戶執行一個重要的專案。

gept.example_en: Good service is the best way to keep our customers happy and loyal.
gept.example_zh: 良好的服務是讓顧客滿意並保持忠誠的最佳方式。

gept.example_en: The company's new policy allows employees to work from home twice a week.
gept.example_zh: 公司的新政策允許員工每週在家工作兩天。

gept.example_en: Her excellent performance this year earned her a promotion.
gept.example_zh: 她今年優秀的表現為她贏得了升遷。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可獲得的、有空的
gept.example_en: I'm sorry, but the doctor is not available until next Tuesday.
gept.example_zh: 很抱歉，醫生要到下週二才有空。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 負責的、有責任的
gept.example_en: As a class leader, you are responsible for keeping everyone informed.
gept.example_zh: 身為班長，你有責任讓大家都知道相關訊息。

gept.example_en: She is generous with her time and always helps newcomers feel welcome.
gept.example_zh: 她在時間上很大方，總是讓新人感到受歡迎。

gept.example_en: My grandfather is too stubborn to admit when he makes a mistake.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父太固執了，從不承認自己犯錯。

gept.example_en: He felt frustrated after failing the driving test for the third time.
gept.example_zh: 在第三次駕照考試失敗後，他感到很沮喪。

gept.example_en: She felt anxious about the job interview scheduled for the following morning.
gept.example_zh: 她對隔天早上安排的工作面試感到焦慮。

gept.example_en: I am grateful to my parents for supporting my dream of studying abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我很感激父母支持我出國留學的夢想。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of volunteers helped distribute food to families after the flood.
gept.example_zh: 數百名志工在洪水過後幫忙分發食物給災民家庭。

gept.example_en: The charity provides shelter and counseling for victims of domestic violence.
gept.example_zh: 該慈善機構為家庭暴力的受害者提供庇護和諮詢。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 運動健將的；體格健壯的
gept.example_en: Her athletic build comes from years of competitive swimming and weight training.
gept.example_zh: 她健壯的體格源於多年的競技游泳和重量訓練。

gept.example_en: He tried to comfort his sister after she received the disappointing news.
gept.example_zh: 在妹妹得到令人失望的消息後，他試圖安慰她。

gept.example_en: He proposed to his girlfriend on the bridge where they first met.
gept.example_zh: 他在他們初次相遇的橋上向女友求婚。

gept.example_en: I finally persuaded my father to take a vacation after months of arguing.
gept.example_zh: 在爭論數月後，我終於說服父親去度假。

gept.example_en: He is reliable and always shows up on time for important meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他很可靠，總是準時出席重要會議。

gept.example_en: She is brutally honest and never sugarcoats her opinions about your work.
gept.example_zh: 她非常誠實，從不粉飾她對你工作的意見。

gept.example_en: She is modest about her achievements and never brags to her colleagues.
gept.example_zh: 她對自己的成就很謙遜，從不向同事誇耀。

gept.example_en: Don't be selfish; please share your candy with your younger brother.
gept.example_zh: 不要自私，請把你的糖果分給弟弟。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 體貼的；深思熟慮的
gept.example_en: It was thoughtful of you to remember my birthday with a handwritten card.
gept.example_zh: 你能用手寫卡片記住我的生日，真是體貼。

gept.example_en: The polite child always says please and thank you to her parents.
gept.example_zh: 那個有禮貌的孩子總是對父母說請和謝謝。

gept.example_en: It was rude of him to interrupt while his grandmother was speaking.
gept.example_zh: 他在祖母說話時打斷，真是粗魯。

gept.example_en: He is outgoing and makes new friends easily wherever he travels.
gept.example_zh: 他很外向，無論去哪裡旅行都能輕鬆交到新朋友。

gept.example_en: She remained optimistic about her recovery despite the doctor's warnings.
gept.example_zh: 儘管醫生發出警告，她對自己的康復仍然保持樂觀。

gept.example_en: Her cheerful smile brightens up the entire office every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 她開朗的笑容讓整個辦公室每週一早晨都明亮起來。

gept.example_en: She was delighted to receive the acceptance letter from her dream university.
gept.example_zh: 她很高興收到夢想中大學的錄取通知書。

gept.example_en: I was annoyed by the loud music coming from the apartment upstairs.
gept.example_zh: 我對樓上公寓傳來的大聲音樂感到惱怒。

gept.example_en: He was upset to learn that his favorite teacher was leaving the school.
gept.example_zh: 得知他最喜愛的老師要離開學校時，他感到很心煩。

gept.example_en: He felt lonely after moving to a new city where he knew nobody.
gept.example_zh: 搬到一個誰都不認識的新城市後，他感到孤獨。

gept.example_en: She was embarrassed when she realized her shirt was inside out all morning.
gept.example_zh: 當她意識到整個早上襯衫都穿反時，她感到很尷尬。

gept.example_en: He felt ashamed of lying to his parents about his exam results.
gept.example_zh: 他為對父母謊報考試結果感到羞愧。

gept.example_en: She felt guilty for forgetting her best friend's wedding anniversary.
gept.example_zh: 她為忘記最好朋友的結婚紀念日而感到內疚。

gept.example_en: His parents are proud of his achievements in mathematics and science.
gept.example_zh: 他的父母為他在數學和科學上的成就感到自豪。

gept.example_en: She feels content with her simple life in the small mountain village.
gept.example_zh: 她對自己在小山村裡的簡單生活感到滿足。

gept.example_en: The customers were satisfied with the quick service at the restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 顧客對餐廳快速的服務感到滿意。

gept.example_en: He was nervous about giving a speech in front of three hundred people.
gept.example_zh: 在三百個人面前演講讓他感到緊張。

gept.example_en: The child was scared of the thunder during the heavy storm last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚暴風雨中，那孩子很害怕雷聲。

gept.example_en: My mother was worried when I did not call her for three days.
gept.example_zh: 當我三天沒打電話給母親時，她很擔心。

gept.example_en: She is confident that she will pass the certification exam on her first try.
gept.example_zh: 她有信心能在第一次嘗試就通過認證考試。

gept.example_en: He is determined to finish the marathon despite his injured knee.
gept.example_zh: 儘管膝蓋受傷，他仍決心要完成馬拉松比賽。

gept.example_en: She is very creative and always finds unique solutions to difficult problems.
gept.example_zh: 她非常有創意，總是能為困難的問題找到獨特的解決方案。

gept.example_en: Children are naturally curious about how the world around them works.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們對周圍世界如何運作天生就充滿好奇。

gept.example_en: Teachers must be patient with students who learn at a slower pace.
gept.example_zh: 老師對於學習速度較慢的學生必須有耐心。

gept.example_en: He gets impatient when his computer takes too long to start up.
gept.example_zh: 當他的電腦啟動太久時，他會變得沒耐心。

gept.example_en: She remained calm even when the building's fire alarm went off suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 即使大樓的火警警報突然響起，她仍然保持冷靜。

gept.example_en: He is reserved at first but becomes talkative once he knows you.
gept.example_zh: 他一開始很拘謹，但一旦認識你就會變得健談。

gept.example_en: She is very mature for her age and handles responsibilities like an adult.
gept.example_zh: 她以她的年齡來說很成熟，處理責任像個成年人。

gept.example_en: My grandmother is wise and always gives me valuable life advice.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母很睿智，總是給我寶貴的人生建議。

gept.example_en: It was foolish of him to spend all his savings on a sports car.
gept.example_zh: 他把所有積蓄花在一輛跑車上，真是愚蠢。

gept.example_en: The clever student solved the math problem in just thirty seconds.
gept.example_zh: 那個聰明的學生在僅僅三十秒內就解出了那道數學題。

gept.example_en: She is intelligent and quickly grasps complex scientific concepts.
gept.example_zh: 她很有智慧，能迅速掌握複雜的科學概念。

gept.example_en: She is a talented artist whose paintings are sold in galleries worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位有才華的藝術家，畫作在全球的藝廊中販售。

gept.example_en: My father is hardworking and rarely takes a day off from his business.
gept.example_zh: 我父親很努力，很少從他的事業中請一天假。

gept.example_en: My piano teacher is strict but her students achieve excellent results.
gept.example_zh: 我的鋼琴老師很嚴格，但她的學生取得了優異的成績。

gept.example_en: She has a gentle voice that immediately soothes crying babies.
gept.example_zh: 她有著溫柔的聲音，能立刻安撫哭泣的嬰兒。

gept.example_en: She gave her newborn baby a tender kiss on the forehead.
gept.example_zh: 她在剛出生寶寶的額頭上輕輕地一吻。

gept.example_en: It took years to rebuild trust after he broke his promise.
gept.example_zh: 在他違背承諾後，花了多年時間才重建信任。

gept.example_en: Her kindness toward strangers reminds me of how my grandmother behaved.
gept.example_zh: 她對陌生人的善良讓我想起祖母的待人之道。

gept.example_en: It took her years to overcome the grief of losing her son.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾年才克服失去兒子的悲痛。

gept.example_en: Becoming a grandmother brought her endless joy and a new sense of purpose.
gept.example_zh: 當祖母為她帶來無盡的喜悅和新的人生目標。

gept.example_en: His parents could not hide their pride at his graduation ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 在他的畢業典禮上，他父母無法掩飾他們的自豪。

gept.example_en: He felt great shame for stealing money from his own brother.
gept.example_zh: 他為從自己親兄弟那裡偷錢而感到極大的羞愧。

gept.example_en: The guilt of lying kept her awake for several long nights.
gept.example_zh: 撒謊的內疚讓她連續好幾個漫長的夜晚都失眠。

gept.example_en: She has many regrets about not spending more time with her father.
gept.example_zh: 她對沒有花更多時間陪伴父親感到非常遺憾。

gept.example_en: It takes a strong person to forgive someone who has hurt them deeply.
gept.example_zh: 原諒一個深深傷害自己的人需要堅強的心。

gept.example_en: She accepted his sincere apology and they hugged each other tightly.
gept.example_zh: 她接受了他真誠的道歉，他們緊緊地擁抱了彼此。

gept.example_en: My parents rarely argue but they had a big fight last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我父母很少爭吵，但上個週末他們大吵了一架。

gept.example_en: They tried to resolve the conflict through honest and open communication.
gept.example_zh: 他們試圖透過誠實開放的溝通來解決衝突。

gept.example_en: I disagree with my brother about the best way to invest money.
gept.example_zh: 我和我哥哥對投資金錢的最佳方式意見不同。

gept.example_en: The teacher praised her for finishing the difficult project ahead of schedule.
gept.example_zh: 老師讚美她提前完成了那個困難的專案。

gept.example_en: He criticized his wife's cooking and immediately regretted his thoughtless words.
gept.example_zh: 他批評了妻子的廚藝，並立即後悔自己輕率的話。

gept.example_en: She received many compliments on her elegant dress at the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 她在婚禮上的優雅禮服收到了許多稱讚。

gept.example_en: My piano teacher always encourages me to practice more difficult pieces.
gept.example_zh: 我的鋼琴老師總是鼓勵我練習更困難的曲子。

gept.example_en: Don't let one failure discourage you from pursuing your dreams.
gept.example_zh: 不要讓一次失敗使你氣餒，放棄追求夢想。

gept.example_en: Her courage inspired many other young women to start their own businesses.
gept.example_zh: 她的勇氣激勵了許多其他年輕女性開創自己的事業。

gept.example_en: His coach motivates him to train harder before every important competition.
gept.example_zh: 他的教練在每場重要比賽前都激勵他更努力訓練。

gept.example_en: They decided to adopt a child after trying to have one for years.
gept.example_zh: 在嘗試生孩子多年後，他們決定收養一個小孩。

gept.example_en: All my relatives gather at our house for the Lunar New Year.
gept.example_zh: 我所有的親戚都會在農曆新年聚集到我們家。

gept.example_en: Our family has owned this farm for four generations already.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族擁有這個農場已經四代了。

gept.example_en: She has fond memories of her childhood spent in the countryside.
gept.example_zh: 她對在鄉間度過的童年有著美好的回憶。

gept.example_en: Adulthood brings new responsibilities and many difficult life decisions.
gept.example_zh: 成年期帶來新的責任和許多艱難的人生決定。

gept.example_en: Their wedding took place on a beautiful beach in southern Thailand.
gept.example_zh: 他們的婚禮在泰國南部一個美麗的海灘舉行。

gept.example_en: A successful marriage requires daily effort and excellent communication.
gept.example_zh: 成功的婚姻需要每日的努力和優質的溝通。

gept.example_en: After ten years of marriage, they decided to file for divorce.
gept.example_zh: 在結婚十年後，他們決定提出離婚。

gept.example_en: The couple is going through a difficult trial separation this year.
gept.example_zh: 這對夫妻今年正在經歷艱難的試行分居。

gept.example_en: Their romance began at university and has lasted over twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 他們的戀情始於大學，已經持續了二十多年。

gept.example_en: The breakup was painful but she eventually moved on with her life.
gept.example_zh: 分手很痛苦，但她最終繼續過自己的生活。

gept.example_en: She remains good friends with her ex even after their divorce.
gept.example_zh: 即使在離婚後，她仍與前夫維持著好朋友關係。

gept.example_en: We chatted for hours about our childhood memories and favorite teachers.
gept.example_zh: 我們聊了好幾個小時關於童年回憶和最喜歡的老師。

gept.example_en: She enjoys conversing with strangers and learning about their cultures.
gept.example_zh: 她喜歡與陌生人交談並了解他們的文化。

gept.example_en: The family met to discuss plans for their grandfather's eightieth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 全家聚在一起討論祖父八十大壽的計畫。

gept.example_en: My brother and I debated politics over dinner for two hours.
gept.example_zh: 我和哥哥在晚餐時辯論政治長達兩個小時。

gept.example_en: My mother rarely yells but she was very angry that morning.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽很少大叫，但那天早上她非常生氣。

gept.example_en: My father frowned when I told him about my low test score.
gept.example_zh: 當我告訴父親我考試成績很低時，他皺起了眉頭。

gept.example_en: He let out a deep sigh of relief when the test was over.
gept.example_zh: 考試結束時，他深深地嘆了一口氣，鬆了一口氣。

gept.example_en: He grinned proudly when his teacher praised his creative writing essay.
gept.example_zh: 當老師讚美他富有創意的作文時，他自豪地露齒而笑。

gept.example_en: A kind stranger helped me carry my luggage up the stairs.
gept.example_zh: 一位好心的陌生人幫我把行李搬上樓梯。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 本地人；當地的
gept.example_en: As a native of this city, I can recommend many wonderful local restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 作為這座城市的本地人，我可以推薦許多很棒的當地餐廳。

gept.example_en: Residents of this neighborhood are very concerned about the new construction project.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區的居民對新的建設專案非常擔心。

gept.example_en: Our community comes together every summer for a large outdoor festival.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區每年夏天都會聚在一起舉辦大型戶外節慶。

gept.example_en: Modern society places great pressure on young adults to succeed quickly.
gept.example_zh: 現代社會對年輕人施加了快速成功的巨大壓力。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad helped her understand different cultures and ways of thinking.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學幫助她了解不同的文化和思維方式。

gept.example_en: It is a family tradition to gather for dinner every Sunday evening.
gept.example_zh: 每週日晚上聚餐是我們的家庭傳統。

gept.example_en: It is a local custom to remove shoes before entering someone's home.
gept.example_zh: 進入別人家前脫鞋是當地的習俗。

gept.example_en: The graduation ceremony was attended by hundreds of proud family members.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮有數百位自豪的家人參加。

gept.example_en: Her grandfather's funeral was attended by friends from all over the country.
gept.example_zh: 她祖父的葬禮有來自全國各地的朋友參加。

gept.example_en: He struggled with depression for years before finally seeking professional help.
gept.example_zh: 他與憂鬱症掙扎多年，才終於尋求專業幫助。

gept.example_en: She has suffered from chronic back pain since her car accident.
gept.example_zh: 自從車禍以來，她一直深受慢性背痛之苦。

gept.example_en: He endured many difficult years to provide his family with stability.
gept.example_zh: 他忍受了許多艱難的歲月，只為了讓家人過上安穩的生活。

gept.example_en: She struggles to cope with the demands of work and parenting.
gept.example_zh: 她努力應對工作和育兒的雙重要求。

gept.example_en: It took her several months to recover emotionally from the difficult breakup.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾個月才從艱難的分手中情緒上恢復。

gept.example_en: Time heals most emotional wounds, although the scars sometimes remain.
gept.example_zh: 時間能療癒大多數的情感傷口，雖然疤痕有時會留下。

gept.example_en: It is healthy to express your emotions instead of bottling them up.
gept.example_zh: 表達情緒比壓抑它們要健康得多。

gept.example_en: His positive attitude inspires everyone around him to work harder.
gept.example_zh: 他積極的態度激勵周圍每個人更努力工作。

gept.example_en: Her honest character makes her widely respected throughout the company.
gept.example_zh: 她誠實的品格讓她在整個公司廣受尊敬。

gept.example_en: His cheerful personality makes him very popular at the office.
gept.example_zh: 他開朗的個性使他在辦公室裡非常受歡迎。

gept.example_en: His rude behavior at the meeting surprised everyone on the team.
gept.example_zh: 他在會議上粗魯的行為讓團隊每個人都感到驚訝。

gept.example_en: You should always respect your elders even when you disagree with them.
gept.example_zh: 即使你不同意，也應該永遠尊重長輩。

gept.example_en: I really admire her courage to start over in a foreign country.
gept.example_zh: 我真的很欽佩她在外國重新開始的勇氣。

gept.example_en: I really appreciate everything you have done for our family this year.
gept.example_zh: 我真的很感激你今年為我們家所做的一切。

gept.example_en: He greeted his old friend with a hearty handshake and a smile.
gept.example_zh: 他用熱情的握手和微笑問候老朋友。

gept.example_en: Let me introduce you to my younger sister who just arrived from Taipei.
gept.example_zh: 讓我把你介紹給剛從台北來的妹妹。

gept.example_en: Her face looked familiar but I could not remember her name.
gept.example_zh: 她的臉看起來很眼熟，但我記不起她的名字。

gept.example_en: He has become distant from his old friends since starting his new job.
gept.example_zh: 自從開始新工作後，他和老朋友變得疏遠。

gept.example_en: Her fake compliments did not fool anyone at the dinner party.
gept.example_zh: 她虛假的恭維沒有騙過晚宴上的任何人。

gept.example_en: They share a deep emotional connection that few couples ever experience.
gept.example_zh: 他們有著少數夫妻才能體驗到的深刻情感連結。

gept.example_en: My aunt is talkative and loves sharing stories about her travels.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨很健談，喜歡分享她旅行的故事。

gept.example_en: My chatty neighbor stops me every morning to discuss the weather.
gept.example_zh: 我愛聊天的鄰居每天早上都攔下我討論天氣。

gept.example_en: My easygoing father rarely gets upset about small inconveniences.
gept.example_zh: 我隨和的父親很少為小麻煩生氣。

gept.example_en: The atmosphere at the family dinner felt tense after the argument.
gept.example_zh: 那場爭吵後，家庭晚餐的氣氛感覺很緊張。

gept.example_en: She felt completely relaxed after spending the weekend with her family.
gept.example_zh: 在與家人共度週末後，她感到完全放鬆。

gept.example_en: He has been stressed lately because of problems at work.
gept.example_zh: 他最近因為工作上的問題而感到很有壓力。

gept.example_en: She felt exhausted after caring for her sick mother all night.
gept.example_zh: 她整夜照顧生病的母親後感到筋疲力盡。

gept.example_en: My energetic grandfather still goes hiking every weekend at age seventy.
gept.example_zh: 我精力充沛的祖父七十歲了仍然每個週末去登山。

gept.example_en: The lively conversation continued well past midnight at our family gathering.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族聚會的熱烈對話持續到午夜過後。

gept.example_en: She is an interesting person who has lived in many different countries.
gept.example_zh: 她是個有趣的人，曾在許多不同的國家居住過。

gept.example_en: He has a charming personality that makes everyone feel comfortable.
gept.example_zh: 他迷人的個性讓每個人都感到舒服自在。

gept.example_en: Her warm and attractive smile made him want to learn more.
gept.example_zh: 她溫暖又有吸引力的微笑讓他想了解更多。

gept.example_en: The bride looked absolutely gorgeous in her white wedding dress.
gept.example_zh: 新娘穿著白色婚紗看起來絕對美麗動人。

gept.example_en: She prefers a plain style and rarely wears makeup or jewelry.
gept.example_zh: 她喜歡樸素的風格，很少化妝或戴珠寶。

gept.example_en: Her muscular brother works out at the gym five times each week.
gept.example_zh: 她肌肉發達的哥哥每週去健身房五次。

gept.example_en: She looked pale and tired after staying up all night studying.
gept.example_zh: 熬夜唸書後，她看起來蒼白又疲倦。

gept.example_en: He returned from his beach vacation tanned and noticeably more relaxed.
gept.example_zh: 他從海邊度假回來，曬得很黑，明顯地更放鬆了。

gept.example_en: My father started going bald in his early thirties like his grandfather.
gept.example_zh: 我父親像他祖父一樣，在三十歲出頭就開始禿頭。

gept.example_en: Her curly red hair makes her easy to spot in any crowd.
gept.example_zh: 她捲曲的紅髮讓她在任何人群中都很容易被認出。

gept.example_en: She tried to recall the name of her childhood best friend.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖回想兒時最好朋友的名字。

gept.example_en: She is very emotional and often cries during sad movies.
gept.example_zh: 她非常情緒化，常常在悲傷的電影中哭泣。

gept.example_en: He is sensitive to criticism and often takes comments too personally.
gept.example_zh: 他對批評很敏感，常常把評論看得太個人化。

gept.example_en: My mother is mentally tough and never complains about her difficult life.
gept.example_zh: 我母親心理堅韌，從不抱怨她艱難的生活。

gept.example_en: She made the bold decision to quit her job and travel the world.
gept.example_zh: 她做出大膽的決定，辭去工作環遊世界。

gept.example_en: He followed his instinct and avoided the dark alley on his walk home.
gept.example_zh: 他遵循本能，在回家的路上避開了那條黑暗的小巷。

gept.example_en: We felt an immediate connection the first time we talked at the party.
gept.example_zh: 我們在派對上第一次聊天時就感受到一種立即的連結。

gept.example_en: The country needs unity during these challenging economic times.
gept.example_zh: 國家在這段艱困的經濟時期需要團結。

gept.example_en: They live in harmony despite their many cultural differences.
gept.example_zh: 儘管文化差異很大，他們仍和睦相處。

gept.example_en: The family experienced years of strife before finally finding peace together.
gept.example_zh: 那家人經歷了多年的紛爭，才終於一起找到了平靜。

gept.example_en: There has been tension between the cousins since the inheritance dispute.
gept.example_zh: 自從遺產爭議以來，表兄妹之間就一直存在緊張關係。

gept.example_en: Let me clarify what I meant before we have another big argument.
gept.example_zh: 在我們再次大吵之前，讓我澄清我的意思。

gept.example_en: It takes a strong person to admit when they are wrong.
gept.example_zh: 承認自己錯了需要堅強的人。

gept.example_en: He continued to deny stealing the money despite the clear evidence.
gept.example_zh: 儘管有明確的證據，他仍繼續否認偷錢。

gept.example_en: She accused her brother of reading her private diary without permission.
gept.example_zh: 她指控弟弟未經允許閱讀她私人的日記。

gept.example_en: She defended her younger brother when his friends made fun of him.
gept.example_zh: 當朋友取笑她弟弟時，她為他辯護。

gept.example_en: They sheltered the refugee family for several months until they found housing.
gept.example_zh: 他們收留了那個難民家庭數月，直到他們找到住處。

gept.example_en: He rescued his sister from the difficult situation by lending her money.
gept.example_zh: 他借錢給妹妹，幫她解決了困難的處境。

gept.example_en: She would never intentionally harm anyone in her family.
gept.example_zh: 她絕不會故意傷害家裡的任何人。

gept.example_en: The emotional wound from her parents' divorce took years to heal.
gept.example_zh: 她父母離婚造成的情感創傷花了多年才痊癒。

gept.example_en: I hope I did not offend you with my honest opinion about your work.
gept.example_zh: 希望我對你工作的誠實意見沒有冒犯到你。

gept.example_en: He took great offense at his neighbor's careless remark about his garden.
gept.example_zh: 他對鄰居關於他花園的輕率評論感到非常被冒犯。

gept.example_en: The judge showed mercy to the young man because of his difficult childhood.
gept.example_zh: 法官因為那年輕人艱難的童年而對他展現仁慈。

gept.example_en: I felt pity for the homeless family struggling to find shelter.
gept.example_zh: 我對那個努力尋找住處的無家可歸家庭感到憐憫。

gept.example_en: The publisher rejected her manuscript three times before someone agreed to publish.
gept.example_zh: 出版社拒絕了她的手稿三次，才有人同意出版。

gept.example_en: My father does not approve of my decision to study abroad.
gept.example_zh: 我父親不贊成我出國留學的決定。

gept.example_en: My parents initially opposed my marriage but later changed their minds.
gept.example_zh: 我父母最初反對我的婚姻，但後來改變了想法。

gept.example_en: My twin sister and I look identical but have very different personalities.
gept.example_zh: 我和我的雙胞胎姊妹看起來一模一樣，但個性卻非常不同。

gept.example_en: People of every race should be treated with the same level of respect.
gept.example_zh: 每個種族的人都應該得到相同程度的尊重。

gept.example_en: My friends at school come from over twenty different nationalities.
gept.example_zh: 我學校的朋友來自超過二十個不同的國籍。

gept.example_en: She struggled with her cultural identity after moving abroad as a teenager.
gept.example_zh: 她在青少年時期搬到國外後，與她的文化認同感掙扎。

gept.example_en: He felt a strong sense of belonging in his new community group.
gept.example_zh: 他在新的社區團體中感受到強烈的歸屬感。

gept.example_en: Our school promotes inclusion of students from all cultural backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校提倡包容來自各種文化背景的學生。

gept.example_en: Everyone has some bias, but we should try to recognize and overcome it.
gept.example_zh: 每個人都有一些偏見，但我們應該試著認清並克服。

gept.example_en: The diversity of our team helps us solve problems more creatively.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊的多元化幫助我們更有創意地解決問題。

gept.example_en: They believe in equality between all family members regardless of age.
gept.example_zh: 他們相信家庭成員之間不論年齡都應該平等。

gept.example_en: Loneliness can be a serious problem for elderly people living alone.
gept.example_zh: 對獨居的老年人來說，孤獨可能是個嚴重的問題。

gept.example_en: Networking helped him find his current job through a former classmate.
gept.example_zh: 建立人脈幫助他透過以前的同學找到目前的工作。

gept.example_en: My sister is six months pregnant with her second daughter.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊懷第二個女兒六個月了。

gept.example_en: Taking care of his sick father became his main responsibility.
gept.example_zh: 照顧生病的父親成為他的主要責任。

gept.example_en: He felt a moral obligation to help his cousin pay for college.
gept.example_zh: 他覺得在道義上有義務幫助表弟支付大學費用。

gept.example_en: He converted the garage into a small workshop for his woodworking hobby.
gept.example_zh: 他把車庫改裝成一間小工作室來進行木工嗜好。

gept.example_en: Dad spends every evening in his study reading historical biographies.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每晚都在書房裡閱讀歷史傳記。

gept.example_en: She rents a tiny studio in the city near her art school.
gept.example_zh: 她在藝術學校附近租了一間小套房。

gept.example_en: Water stains on the ceiling suggest there is a leak in the roof.
gept.example_zh: 天花板上的水漬顯示屋頂可能漏水。

gept.example_en: A firm mattress can help prevent back pain during long nights of sleep.
gept.example_zh: 堅固的床墊有助於在長時間睡眠中預防背痛。

gept.example_en: I quickly heated up the leftover pasta in the microwave for lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我用微波爐很快把剩下的義大利麵加熱當午餐。

gept.example_en: Cooking utensils are kept in the top drawer beside the stove.
gept.example_zh: 烹飪用具放在爐子旁邊的最上層抽屜裡。

gept.example_en: The refrigerator hums quietly in the corner of the small kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 冰箱在這個小廚房的角落安靜地嗡嗡作響。

gept.example_en: Preheat the oven to two hundred degrees before placing the chicken inside.
gept.example_zh: 把雞肉放進烤箱前，先預熱到攝氏兩百度。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to leave the gas stove unattended while cooking soup.
gept.example_zh: 煮湯時注意不要讓瓦斯爐沒人看顧。

gept.example_en: We bought a leather sofa that fits four adults comfortably.
gept.example_zh: 我們買了一張能舒適坐下四個大人的皮沙發。

gept.example_en: I cleared the top shelf to display my new collection of figurines.
gept.example_zh: 我清出最上層的架子，用來陳列我新收藏的公仔。

gept.example_en: A small reading lamp stands on the desk next to the laptop.
gept.example_zh: 桌上筆電旁放著一盞小檯燈。

gept.example_en: Be careful with the hot iron; it can burn your fingers in seconds.
gept.example_zh: 小心熱熨斗，幾秒鐘就能燙傷手指。

gept.example_en: She vacuumed the living room carpet thoroughly before the guests arrived.
gept.example_zh: 在客人到來前，她仔細用吸塵器清掃了客廳地毯。

gept.example_en: He dusts the bookshelves once a week to keep allergies under control.
gept.example_zh: 他每週撣一次書架灰塵以控制過敏。

gept.example_en: Wipe the kitchen counter after preparing raw meat to avoid contamination.
gept.example_zh: 處理生肉後擦拭廚房檯面以避免污染。

gept.example_en: Rinse the dishes well to remove all the soap before drying.
gept.example_zh: 把碗盤沖洗乾淨，去除所有肥皂後再晾乾。

gept.example_en: She folds the laundry neatly and stacks it in the linen closet.
gept.example_zh: 她把洗好的衣物整齊摺好，疊放在床單櫃裡。

gept.example_en: I spent the whole afternoon trying to organize the messy garage.
gept.example_zh: 我花了一整個下午想整理那雜亂的車庫。

gept.example_en: Our neighborhood recycles paper, plastic, and glass on different days.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區在不同日子分別回收紙、塑膠和玻璃。

gept.example_en: She asked the kids to pick up their toys before dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她請孩子們在晚餐前把玩具收好。

gept.example_en: After dinner, please put away the dishes in the cupboard.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後請把碗盤收進櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: It is your turn to take out the trash this evening.
gept.example_zh: 今晚輪到你拿垃圾出去倒。

gept.example_en: I will cook tonight if you do the dishes afterward.
gept.example_zh: 如果你飯後洗碗，今晚就由我來煮。

gept.example_en: She tries to do the laundry every Saturday morning before noon.
gept.example_zh: 她盡量在每週六中午前洗衣服。

gept.example_en: My mother taught me to make the bed every morning after waking up.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽教我每天早上起床後要整理床鋪。

gept.example_en: I change the sheets once a week and wash them in hot water.
gept.example_zh: 我每週換一次床單，並用熱水洗。

gept.example_en: He washes the dishes by hand because their dishwasher is broken.
gept.example_zh: 他用手洗碗盤，因為他們的洗碗機壞了。

gept.example_en: Use a clean cloth to dry the dishes before putting them away.
gept.example_zh: 收起碗盤前用乾淨的布把它們擦乾。

gept.example_en: Could you water the plants while I am away on vacation?
gept.example_zh: 我度假時你能幫忙澆花嗎？

gept.example_en: The neighbor agreed to feed the cat while we are out of town.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居答應在我們不在家時幫忙餵貓。

gept.example_en: I walk the dog every morning before going to work.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上上班前都會遛狗。

gept.example_en: He cleaned the bathroom thoroughly using bleach and a sponge.
gept.example_zh: 他用漂白水和海綿徹底打掃了浴室。

gept.example_en: Even though I wake up at six, I rarely get up before seven.
gept.example_zh: 雖然我六點就醒了，但很少七點前起身。

gept.example_en: He undresses in the bedroom and tosses his socks into the basket.
gept.example_zh: 他在臥室脫衣，把襪子丟進籃子裡。

gept.example_en: I prepare the coffee maker the night before so mornings are easier.
gept.example_zh: 我前一晚就把咖啡機準備好，這樣早上比較輕鬆。

gept.example_en: After moving, it took us a month to settle into the new apartment.
gept.example_zh: 搬家後，我們花了一個月才在新公寓安頓下來。

gept.example_en: She rushes through breakfast to catch the seven o'clock train.
gept.example_zh: 她匆匆吃完早餐去趕七點的火車。

gept.example_en: He likes to nap for twenty minutes after a heavy lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在吃完豐盛午餐後小睡二十分鐘。

gept.example_en: I reflect on my day for a few minutes before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 我睡前會花幾分鐘反思一天。

gept.example_en: Many people pray before meals to express gratitude for their food.
gept.example_zh: 許多人會在用餐前祈禱以表達對食物的感謝。

gept.example_en: Could you please set the table while I finish cooking the rice?
gept.example_zh: 可以麻煩你擺餐桌嗎？我把米飯煮完。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to lock up the house before going on vacation.
gept.example_zh: 出門度假前別忘了把房子鎖好。

gept.example_en: Turn off the lights when you leave the room to save energy.
gept.example_zh: 離開房間時請關燈以節省能源。

gept.example_en: Turn on the heater for about ten minutes before showering.
gept.example_zh: 淋浴前先把暖氣機打開大約十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Always switch off appliances at the wall before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前一定要關掉牆上插座的電器開關。

gept.example_en: Remember to plug in your phone charger before you fall asleep.
gept.example_zh: 記得在睡著前把手機充電器插上。

gept.example_en: Unplug the toaster after use to prevent any fire hazard.
gept.example_zh: 使用後拔掉烤麵包機的插頭以防火災。

gept.example_en: We occasionally eat out on Friday nights to take a break from cooking.
gept.example_zh: 我們偶爾在週五晚上外食，讓自己從煮飯中休息一下。

gept.example_en: She frequently visits her grandmother who lives in the next town.
gept.example_zh: 她經常去探望住在隔壁鎮的祖母。

gept.example_en: After many attempts, he eventually fixed the leaking kitchen faucet.
gept.example_zh: 經過多次嘗試，他最終修好了漏水的廚房水龍頭。

gept.example_en: I prepared the salad; meanwhile, my husband grilled the chicken outside.
gept.example_zh: 我準備沙拉，同時我先生在外面烤雞肉。

gept.example_en: Nowadays many people order groceries online instead of going to the store.
gept.example_zh: 如今許多人會在網路上訂購雜貨，而不是去店裡。

gept.example_en: I recently started learning how to bake sourdough bread at home.
gept.example_zh: 我最近開始學在家烘焙酸種麵包。

gept.example_en: She is currently studying for her real estate license while working part-time.
gept.example_zh: 她目前一邊兼職一邊準備房地產經紀人執照考試。

gept.example_en: Previously, the family lived in a small apartment near the city center.
gept.example_zh: 這家人先前住在市中心附近的一間小公寓裡。

gept.example_en: Immediately after dinner, I usually wash the dishes and tidy the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後我通常立刻洗碗並整理廚房。

gept.example_en: The microwave heats up leftover soup almost instantly for a quick meal.
gept.example_zh: 微波爐幾乎即刻就能加熱剩湯，讓你快速用餐。

gept.example_en: The weather gradually warmed up as spring slowly arrived.
gept.example_zh: 隨著春天慢慢來臨，天氣逐漸變暖。

gept.example_en: Suddenly the lights went out and the whole neighborhood was dark.
gept.example_zh: 突然之間燈全滅了，整個社區一片漆黑。

gept.example_en: We rarely use the formal dining room except on holidays.
gept.example_zh: 我們很少使用正式餐廳，只有節日才會用。

gept.example_en: He seldom remembers to take out the recycling on Tuesday mornings.
gept.example_zh: 他很少記得在週二早上把回收物拿出去倒。

gept.example_en: The bus from our neighborhood to downtown runs hourly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區到市區的公車週末每小時一班。

gept.example_en: The repairman arrived right on time to fix the washing machine.
gept.example_zh: 維修工準時到達修理洗衣機。

gept.example_en: Prepare your work clothes ahead of time so mornings feel less rushed.
gept.example_zh: 提前準備好上班衣服，這樣早上比較不慌亂。

gept.example_en: The renovation project is finally back on schedule after the brief delay.
gept.example_zh: 裝修工程經過短暫延誤後終於回到原本進度。

gept.example_en: The new house is several weeks behind schedule due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 由於天氣不佳，新家的工程比原訂進度落後幾週。

gept.example_en: After retirement, they permanently moved to a small fishing village by the sea.
gept.example_zh: 退休後，他們永久搬到海邊的小漁村。

gept.example_en: I stopped by my neighbor's house briefly to drop off a package.
gept.example_zh: 我短暫地去鄰居家放個包裹。

gept.example_en: Lately I have been waking up earlier to enjoy a quiet morning routine.
gept.example_zh: 最近我開始早一點起床來享受安靜的晨間時光。

gept.example_en: We watched a movie and went out for dessert afterward.
gept.example_zh: 我們看完電影後去吃了甜點。

gept.example_en: Wash the rice beforehand so it can soak while you prepare the side dishes.
gept.example_zh: 事先把米洗好，這樣準備配菜時米可以浸泡。

gept.example_en: He repeatedly forgot to lock the back door before leaving the house.
gept.example_zh: 他出門前反覆忘記鎖後門。

gept.example_en: She visits her elderly father regularly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 她週末定期去探望她年邁的父親。

gept.example_en: Once in a while we order pizza instead of cooking dinner ourselves.
gept.example_zh: 偶爾我們會叫披薩而不是自己做晚餐。

gept.example_en: From time to time the old refrigerator makes a strange humming noise.
gept.example_zh: 這台舊冰箱不時會發出奇怪的嗡嗡聲。

gept.example_en: A thin layer of frost covered the lawn early this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天清晨草坪上覆蓋著一層薄霜。

gept.example_en: Thick fog hung over the neighborhood, making it hard to see across the street.
gept.example_zh: 濃霧籠罩社區，讓人很難看清馬路對面。

gept.example_en: Check the weather forecast before planning your weekend hiking trip.
gept.example_zh: 規劃週末健行前先查看天氣預報。

gept.example_en: The temperature dropped sharply overnight and we needed extra blankets.
gept.example_zh: 夜間氣溫驟降，我們得加蓋毛毯。

gept.example_en: It is freezing outside, so wear your warmest winter coat.
gept.example_zh: 外面冷得結冰，穿你最暖的冬季大衣吧。

gept.example_en: The afternoon was boiling, and even the dog refused to go outside.
gept.example_zh: 下午熱得不得了，連狗都不肯出門。

gept.example_en: A powerful storm tore branches off the tree in our backyard.
gept.example_zh: 一場強烈的暴風雨把我家後院樹上的樹枝吹斷了。

gept.example_en: Each season brings different activities and household routines.
gept.example_zh: 每個季節都有不同的活動和家務節奏。

gept.example_en: Autumn leaves cover our entire front lawn within a few days.
gept.example_zh: 幾天之內秋葉就鋪滿了我們整個前院草坪。

gept.example_en: On rainy days, we plan indoor activities like board games and baking.
gept.example_zh: 下雨天我們會安排室內活動，像是桌遊和烘焙。

gept.example_en: Spring is the best season for outdoor barbecues with the whole family.
gept.example_zh: 春天是和全家人一起戶外烤肉的最佳季節。

gept.example_en: A new traffic light was installed at the busy intersection downtown.
gept.example_zh: 市中心繁忙的十字路口新裝了一個紅綠燈。

gept.example_en: The new playground has slides, swings, and a climbing wall for kids.
gept.example_zh: 新遊樂場為孩子們設有滑梯、鞦韆和攀岩牆。

gept.example_en: I do my weekly grocery shopping at the supermarket near the park.
gept.example_zh: 我每週都在公園附近的超市採買雜貨。

gept.example_en: He hammered the loose nails back into the wooden floorboard.
gept.example_zh: 他用鎚子把鬆動的釘子敲回木地板。

gept.example_en: She used a small nail to hang the painting on the wall.
gept.example_zh: 她用一根小釘子把畫掛在牆上。

gept.example_en: One screw on the chair leg came loose and needs tightening.
gept.example_zh: 椅腳上一顆螺絲鬆了，需要鎖緊。

gept.example_en: Use a level to make sure the shelf is straight before drilling.
gept.example_zh: 在鑽孔前用水平儀確保架子是平的。

gept.example_en: Replace the batteries in the smoke detector every six months.
gept.example_zh: 每六個月更換一次煙霧偵測器的電池。

gept.example_en: Keep a pair of kitchen scissors in the top drawer for opening packages.
gept.example_zh: 在最上層抽屜裡放一把廚房剪刀，方便開包裝。

gept.example_en: Use clear tape to fix the torn page back into the notebook.
gept.example_zh: 用透明膠帶把撕破的頁面黏回筆記本。

gept.example_en: A small drop of glue can repair the broken handle of the mug.
gept.example_zh: 一小滴膠水就能修好馬克杯斷掉的把手。

gept.example_en: Tie the package with a piece of string before mailing it.
gept.example_zh: 在郵寄前用一段繩子把包裹綁好。

gept.example_en: He used a thick rope to secure the boxes in the truck.
gept.example_zh: 他用粗繩把箱子固定在卡車上。

gept.example_en: They rent a small apartment near the university to save on transport.
gept.example_zh: 他們在大學附近租了間小公寓以節省交通費。

gept.example_en: We will move in next Saturday once the painting is finished.
gept.example_zh: 油漆工程一完成，我們下週六就搬進來。

gept.example_en: He needs to move out of his parents' house and find his own place.
gept.example_zh: 他需要從父母家搬出來，找個自己的住處。

gept.example_en: I plan to paint my bedroom walls a calming shade of green.
gept.example_zh: 我打算把臥室牆壁漆成令人平靜的綠色。

gept.example_en: Several tiles in the kitchen need to be replaced after the leak.
gept.example_zh: 漏水之後，廚房有幾塊磁磚需要更換。

gept.example_en: He mows the lawn every other Saturday during the summer months.
gept.example_zh: 夏天時他每隔一個週六就會修剪一次草坪。

gept.example_en: Pull the weeds out of the garden before they spread too widely.
gept.example_zh: 在雜草蔓延得太廣之前先把它們拔出來。

gept.example_en: Healthy soil is the foundation of a productive home vegetable garden.
gept.example_zh: 健康的土壤是豐收家庭菜園的基礎。

gept.example_en: Plant the seeds about an inch deep and water them gently.
gept.example_zh: 把種子種在約一英寸深的地方，並輕輕澆水。

gept.example_en: Roses bloom in the front yard from late May through early August.
gept.example_zh: 前院的玫瑰從五月底開到八月初。

gept.example_en: Squirrels run up and down the trunk of the old oak tree.
gept.example_zh: 松鼠在老橡樹的樹幹上跑上跑下。

gept.example_en: A heavy branch fell during the storm and damaged part of the fence.
gept.example_zh: 暴風雨期間一根大樹枝掉落，損壞了部分圍籬。

gept.example_en: She fluffs her pillow every morning while making the bed.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上整理床鋪時都會把枕頭拍鬆。

gept.example_en: The technician comes to read the meter once a month.
gept.example_zh: 技術人員每月來抄一次表。

gept.example_en: Please pick up any rubbish you see in the community park.
gept.example_zh: 請撿起你在社區公園裡看到的任何垃圾。

gept.example_en: Volunteers gathered to pick up litter along the riverbank this morning.
gept.example_zh: 志工們今早集合在河岸邊撿垃圾。

gept.example_en: Rust on the iron fence needs to be sanded and repainted soon.
gept.example_zh: 鐵欄杆上的鏽需要儘快打磨並重新粉刷。

gept.example_en: I removed the coffee stain from the carpet using baking soda.
gept.example_zh: 我用小蘇打粉去除地毯上的咖啡漬。

gept.example_en: Clean up the spill on the floor before someone slips.
gept.example_zh: 在有人滑倒前先把地上的灑出物清理乾淨。

gept.example_en: A small leak under the sink slowly damaged the wooden cabinet.
gept.example_zh: 水槽下的小漏水慢慢損壞了木製櫥櫃。

gept.example_en: A crack in the wall appeared after the recent earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 最近地震後牆上出現了一道裂縫。

gept.example_en: Students took turns solving equations on the whiteboard at the front.
gept.example_zh: 學生們輪流到前面的白板上解方程式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 導師時間；班級教室
gept.example_en: Every morning we meet in homeroom before our first class starts.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上我們在第一堂課前到導師時間集合。

gept.example_en: Children love to play games on the playground during recess.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在下課時間在操場上玩遊戲。

gept.example_en: We conducted our chemistry experiments in the school laboratory this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午我們在學校實驗室進行化學實驗。

gept.example_en: Most students eat lunch in the cafeteria between twelve and one.
gept.example_zh: 大多數學生在十二點到一點之間在自助餐廳吃午餐。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 校長 (形容詞) 主要的
gept.example_en: The principal gave a welcome speech at the start of the semester.
gept.example_zh: 校長在學期開始時致歡迎詞。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 家教；導師 (動詞) 輔導
gept.example_en: She hired a private tutor to help her son improve his English.
gept.example_zh: 她請了一位家教幫助兒子提升英文。

gept.example_en: Professor Lin has published many papers on artificial intelligence and ethics.
gept.example_zh: 林教授發表過許多關於人工智慧與倫理的論文。

gept.example_en: Our driving instructor was patient with every nervous student in the car.
gept.example_zh: 我們的駕駛教練對車裡每一位緊張的學生都很有耐心。

gept.example_en: I bumped into an old schoolmate at the train station yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 我昨天在火車站偶遇一位老校友。

gept.example_en: As a freshman, he felt nervous walking onto campus the first day.
gept.example_zh: 作為大一新生，他第一天走進校園時感到緊張。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大三學生 (形容詞) 年少的
gept.example_en: Most juniors begin preparing for internships in their third year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數大三生在三年級時開始準備實習。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大四學生 (形容詞) 高年級的
gept.example_en: Seniors are required to complete a final project before graduation.
gept.example_zh: 大四生畢業前必須完成一個畢業專題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 畢業生 (動詞) 畢業
gept.example_en: He will graduate from law school with honors next June.
gept.example_zh: 他將於明年六月以優異成績從法學院畢業。

gept.example_en: You don't have to be a genius to succeed; hard work matters more.
gept.example_zh: 成功不必是天才，努力更重要。

gept.example_en: The researcher collected data from over a thousand students nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 這位研究員從全國一千多名學生那裡蒐集資料。

gept.example_en: The librarian helped me find references for my history paper.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館員幫我找到歷史報告的參考資料。

gept.example_en: Statistics shows that reading regularly improves a student's vocabulary significantly.
gept.example_zh: 統計顯示，定期閱讀能顯著提升學生的詞彙量。

gept.example_en: In biology we studied how cells divide and form different tissues.
gept.example_zh: 在生物課我們學習細胞如何分裂並形成不同組織。

gept.example_en: Physics helps us understand how forces and energy work in nature.
gept.example_zh: 物理幫助我們理解自然界中力與能量的運作。

gept.example_en: In geography class we learned about climate zones and population patterns.
gept.example_zh: 地理課上我們學習氣候帶與人口分布。

gept.example_en: She studied psychology to better understand human behavior and emotions.
gept.example_zh: 她念心理學以更了解人類行為與情緒。

gept.example_en: English literature gave me a deep love for novels and poetry.
gept.example_zh: 英國文學使我深愛小說與詩歌。

gept.example_en: Economics teaches us how individuals and nations make choices with limited resources.
gept.example_zh: 經濟學教我們個人與國家如何在有限資源下做選擇。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 主修 (動詞) 主修
gept.example_en: She decided to major in computer science after taking an introductory course.
gept.example_zh: 修了一門入門課後，她決定主修資訊科學。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 輔修 (形容詞) 次要的
gept.example_en: He took economics as a minor alongside his main engineering major.
gept.example_zh: 他在主修工程之外，輔修經濟學。

gept.example_en: The Saturday workshop is optional but highly recommended by the teacher.
gept.example_zh: 週六的工作坊是選修，但老師大力推薦。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 講座 (動詞) 講課
gept.example_en: The visiting scholar gave a fascinating lecture on climate change.
gept.example_zh: 訪問學者發表了一場關於氣候變遷的精彩演講。

gept.example_en: She presented her latest findings at an academic conference in London.
gept.example_zh: 她在倫敦的一場學術會議上發表了最新研究成果。

gept.example_en: Our group had a long discussion about the novel's main characters.
gept.example_zh: 我們小組就小說的主角們進行了長時間的討論。

gept.example_en: Her argument was well-supported by data from several recent studies.
gept.example_zh: 她的論點有許多近期研究的數據支持。

gept.example_en: Studying philosophy taught me how to apply logic in everyday arguments.
gept.example_zh: 學習哲學教我如何在日常爭論中運用邏輯。

gept.example_en: He had to memorize a hundred new vocabulary words before the test.
gept.example_zh: 他必須在考試前背完一百個新單字。

gept.example_en: Please summarize the main points of the article in three sentences.
gept.example_zh: 請用三句話概述這篇文章的重點。

gept.example_en: Write a one-page summary of the chapter before tomorrow's class.
gept.example_zh: 在明天上課前寫一頁該章節的摘要。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大綱 (動詞) 列出大綱
gept.example_en: Before writing the essay, she made a detailed outline of her ideas.
gept.example_zh: 寫文章前，她列了一份詳細的構想大綱。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 強調；劃重點 (名詞) 亮點
gept.example_en: I always highlight key sentences when I read a textbook chapter.
gept.example_zh: 讀課本章節時，我總會把重點句劃起來。

gept.example_en: Underline the words you don't know and look them up later.
gept.example_zh: 把你不認識的字劃線，稍後查詢。

gept.example_en: She reviews her notes every evening to prepare for the exam.
gept.example_zh: 她每晚複習筆記，為考試做準備。

gept.example_en: I need to revise three chapters before tomorrow's biology midterm.
gept.example_zh: 我必須在明天生物期中考前複習三章。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 小測驗 (動詞) 測驗
gept.example_en: The teacher gives us a short quiz every Friday morning.
gept.example_zh: 老師每週五早上都會給我們一個小測驗。

gept.example_en: Finals week is always the most stressful time of the semester.
gept.example_zh: 期末考週總是學期中最緊張的時刻。

gept.example_en: A written examination will be held at the end of this course.
gept.example_zh: 本課程結束時將舉行筆試。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成績；年級 (動詞) 評分
gept.example_en: My grade in chemistry improved after I joined the study group.
gept.example_zh: 加入讀書小組後，我的化學成績進步了。

gept.example_en: He earned a master's degree in environmental engineering last year.
gept.example_zh: 他去年取得了環境工程的碩士學位。

gept.example_en: After finishing the course, students receive an official certificate of completion.
gept.example_zh: 課程結束後，學生會收到正式的結業證書。

gept.example_en: The teacher gave detailed feedback on every student's draft essay.
gept.example_zh: 老師對每位學生的草稿都給予詳細回饋。

gept.example_en: Please write a short comment on each classmate's presentation slide.
gept.example_zh: 請對每位同學的報告投影片寫一段簡短評論。

gept.example_en: My dorm room is small but I share it with a friendly roommate.
gept.example_zh: 我的宿舍房間很小，但室友人很友善。

gept.example_en: We have to write a thousand-word essay on environmental protection.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須寫一篇關於環境保護的千字文章。

gept.example_en: I read an interesting article about learning a second language quickly.
gept.example_zh: 我讀了一篇關於快速學第二語言的有趣文章。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 草稿 (動詞) 起草
gept.example_en: I revised my first draft three times before submitting the final paper.
gept.example_zh: 我把初稿修改了三次才交出最終版論文。

gept.example_en: Einstein's theory of relativity changed our understanding of space and time.
gept.example_zh: 愛因斯坦的相對論改變了我們對時空的理解。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 方法 (動詞) 接近
gept.example_en: She used a creative approach to teach grammar through storytelling.
gept.example_zh: 她用富有創意的方法透過說故事教授文法。

gept.example_en: Different students prefer different methods of learning new vocabulary.
gept.example_zh: 不同學生偏好不同的學習新單字方法。

gept.example_en: This memorization technique works well for long lists of foreign words.
gept.example_zh: 這個記憶技巧很適合用來記長串外語單字。

gept.example_en: Time management is an important strategy for any successful student.
gept.example_zh: 時間管理是任何成功學生的重要策略。

gept.example_en: Her analysis of the survey data revealed surprising patterns among teenagers.
gept.example_zh: 她對問卷數據的分析揭示了青少年中令人驚訝的模式。

gept.example_en: Students must analyze each paragraph to identify the main argument.
gept.example_zh: 學生必須分析每一段以找出主要論點。

gept.example_en: The conclusion of the report summarizes all the key research findings.
gept.example_zh: 報告的結論摘述了所有重要的研究發現。

gept.example_en: From the results, we can conclude that students benefit from group study.
gept.example_zh: 從結果可以得出結論：學生能從小組學習中受益。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 參考資料 (動詞) 參考
gept.example_en: She listed twenty references at the end of her dissertation.
gept.example_zh: 她在論文末尾列出了二十個參考資料。

gept.example_en: Our campus is large and surrounded by beautiful trees and gardens.
gept.example_zh: 我們的校園很大，四周環繞著美麗的樹木和花園。

gept.example_en: This semester I am taking five courses and one elective seminar.
gept.example_zh: 這學期我修五門課加一個選修研討會。

gept.example_en: Some universities divide the school year into four quarters instead of semesters.
gept.example_zh: 有些大學把學年分成四個學季而非學期。

gept.example_en: Her parents flew in from Taiwan to attend her graduation ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 她父母從台灣飛來參加她的畢業典禮。

gept.example_en: Students must register for next term's classes before the end of May.
gept.example_zh: 學生必須在五月底前選好下學期課程。

gept.example_en: He decided to transfer to another university to study marine biology.
gept.example_zh: 他決定轉學到另一所大學念海洋生物學。

gept.example_en: She spent one year on an exchange program in Germany.
gept.example_zh: 她在德國參加交換學生計畫一年。

gept.example_en: Studying abroad helps students develop independence and intercultural skills.
gept.example_zh: 出國留學能幫助學生培養獨立與跨文化能力。

gept.example_en: Please read the third chapter before our next class meeting.
gept.example_zh: 請在下次上課前讀完第三章。

gept.example_en: Each paragraph should focus on one clear main idea.
gept.example_zh: 每個段落都應聚焦於一個清楚的主旨。

gept.example_en: Reading novels in English greatly expanded my vocabulary range.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀英文小說大大擴展了我的詞彙範圍。

gept.example_en: Understanding basic grammar makes learning new languages much easier.
gept.example_zh: 理解基本文法能讓學新語言容易許多。

gept.example_en: Her English pronunciation has improved a lot after just six months.
gept.example_zh: 她的英文發音僅僅半年就進步很多。

gept.example_en: He spoke with a slight British accent that everyone found charming.
gept.example_zh: 他帶著一點英國口音，大家都覺得很迷人。

gept.example_en: Please translate this short passage from English into Chinese.
gept.example_zh: 請把這段短文從英文翻譯成中文。

gept.example_en: Her translation of the novel won an international award last year.
gept.example_zh: 她翻譯的這本小說去年獲得了國際大獎。

gept.example_en: Each student received a new textbook at the start of the year.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生在學年開始時都領到一本新教科書。

gept.example_en: Complete the workbook exercises on pages thirty to thirty-five tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚請完成練習簿三十到三十五頁的習題。

gept.example_en: Keep all your worksheets in this folder for easy reference later.
gept.example_zh: 把所有講義放進這個文件夾以便日後查閱。

gept.example_en: The teacher wrote the new vocabulary on the board with a blue marker.
gept.example_zh: 老師用藍色馬克筆把新單字寫在黑板上。

gept.example_en: There was chalk dust all over the teacher's sleeves after class.
gept.example_zh: 下課後老師的袖子上沾滿了粉筆灰。

gept.example_en: He borrowed my eraser to fix a mistake in his exam.
gept.example_zh: 他借了我的橡皮擦來修改考卷上的錯誤。

gept.example_en: Use a ruler to draw straight lines for your geometry diagrams.
gept.example_zh: 畫幾何圖時請用尺畫直線。

gept.example_en: You'll need a compass and a protractor for tomorrow's geometry test.
gept.example_zh: 明天的幾何測驗你需要圓規和量角器。

gept.example_en: The lecturer used a microphone so everyone in the hall could hear.
gept.example_zh: 講師使用麥克風，讓禮堂裡每個人都能聽見。

gept.example_en: Complete the worksheet during class and turn it in before leaving.
