gept.example_zh: 上課時完成練習單，離開前交出來。

gept.example_en: Each slide should contain only a few key points and one image.
gept.example_zh: 每張投影片只該包含幾個重點和一張圖。

gept.example_en: The audience applauded loudly after the final group presentation.
gept.example_zh: 最後一組報告完畢後，聽眾熱烈鼓掌。

gept.example_en: Tomorrow's guest speaker will discuss careers in environmental science.
gept.example_zh: 明天的客座演講者將討論環境科學的職涯。

gept.example_en: Her graduation speech moved many parents and classmates to tears.
gept.example_zh: 她的畢業演講讓許多家長與同學感動落淚。

gept.example_en: The bar chart compares the test scores of three different classes.
gept.example_zh: 這張長條圖比較了三個不同班級的考試成績。

gept.example_en: Plot the data points on the graph using different colors for each group.
gept.example_zh: 在圖表上用不同顏色繪出每組的數據點。

gept.example_en: The figure below illustrates the relationship between study time and grades.
gept.example_zh: 下圖顯示讀書時間與成績之間的關係。

gept.example_en: Please complete this short survey about your learning preferences.
gept.example_zh: 請完成這份關於你學習偏好的簡短問卷。

gept.example_en: For our project we interviewed ten students about their study methods.
gept.example_zh: 為了專題，我們訪問了十位學生的讀書方法。

gept.example_en: Researchers observe young children to study how language develops naturally.
gept.example_zh: 研究者觀察幼童以了解語言如何自然發展。

gept.example_en: The biology experiment showed how plants respond to different light conditions.
gept.example_zh: 這個生物實驗顯示植物如何對不同光照做出反應。

gept.example_en: The sample included two hundred students from urban and rural schools.
gept.example_zh: 樣本包含兩百名來自城市和鄉村學校的學生。

gept.example_en: Participants were chosen at random from a list of volunteers.
gept.example_zh: 參與者是從志願者名單中隨機挑選的。

gept.example_en: The most important finding was that quiet study spaces improve concentration.
gept.example_zh: 最重要的發現是安靜的讀書空間能提升專注力。

gept.example_en: There is strong evidence that sleep improves long-term memory.
gept.example_zh: 有強而有力的證據顯示睡眠能改善長期記憶。

gept.example_en: Mathematicians demand rigorous proof before accepting any new theorem.
gept.example_zh: 數學家在接受新定理前要求嚴謹的證明。

gept.example_en: The experiment proved that the new teaching method increases retention.
gept.example_zh: 這個實驗證明新的教學法能提升記憶力。

gept.example_en: Her explanation of the formula finally made everything clear to me.
gept.example_zh: 她對公式的解釋終於讓我完全明白。

gept.example_en: In your own words, define what democracy means to you personally.
gept.example_zh: 用你自己的話定義「民主」對你個人意味著什麼。

gept.example_en: Look up the definition of any word you don't recognize.
gept.example_zh: 任何你不認得的字，都去查它的定義。

gept.example_en: The concept of supply and demand is fundamental in economics.
gept.example_zh: 供需的概念是經濟學的基礎。

gept.example_en: There may be more than one correct solution to this math problem.
gept.example_zh: 這道數學題可能不只有一個正確答案。

gept.example_en: The essay contained several grammar errors that lowered his grade.
gept.example_zh: 這篇作文有幾處文法錯誤，降低了他的分數。

gept.example_en: Make sure your data is accurate before drawing any conclusions.
gept.example_zh: 在下任何結論前，確認你的數據準確無誤。

gept.example_en: Group discussion is an effective method for deeper learning.
gept.example_zh: 小組討論是深度學習的有效方法。

gept.example_en: Flashcards are an efficient way to learn new vocabulary quickly.
gept.example_zh: 字卡是快速學新單字的高效方法。

gept.example_en: It can be hard to focus when there are too many distractions around.
gept.example_zh: 周遭太多干擾時很難專注。

gept.example_en: Try to concentrate on one task at a time for best results.
gept.example_zh: 一次專心做一件事以得到最佳結果。

gept.example_en: Pay close attention to the example before attempting the exercises.
gept.example_zh: 做習題前先仔細留意例題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 獎；獎項 (動詞) 授予
gept.example_en: He won an award for the best research paper of the year.
gept.example_zh: 他以最佳年度研究報告獲獎。

gept.example_en: She won a gold medal in the regional science fair last month.
gept.example_zh: 她上個月在區域科展中贏得金牌。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 榮譽 (動詞) 表彰
gept.example_en: Graduating with honors requires consistent excellence over four full years.
gept.example_zh: 以優異成績畢業需要四年持續的優秀表現。

gept.example_en: Her greatest academic achievement was a national mathematics olympiad medal.
gept.example_zh: 她最大的學業成就是國家數學奧林匹亞獎牌。

gept.example_en: You can achieve almost any goal with steady effort and patience.
gept.example_zh: 只要持續努力與耐心，幾乎任何目標都能達成。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 進步 (動詞) 進展
gept.example_en: She has made great progress in her English speaking this semester.
gept.example_zh: 她這學期在英文口說上有很大進步。

gept.example_en: There is clear improvement in his handwriting compared with last year.
gept.example_zh: 和去年相比，他的字跡明顯進步。

gept.example_en: Group projects help students develop teamwork and leadership skills.
gept.example_zh: 小組專題能幫助學生培養團隊合作與領導能力。

gept.example_en: Early childhood development is a popular research area in education.
gept.example_zh: 幼兒發展是教育界熱門的研究領域。

gept.example_en: Personal growth happens both inside and outside the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 個人成長在課堂內外同時發生。

gept.example_en: Lifelong learners stay curious and continue exploring new ideas.
gept.example_zh: 終身學習者保持好奇，持續探索新想法。

gept.example_en: Schools should educate students about emotional health and well-being.
gept.example_zh: 學校應教育學生關於情緒健康與身心福祉。

gept.example_en: New teachers undergo six weeks of professional training before starting.
gept.example_zh: 新老師在上工前接受六週的專業訓練。

gept.example_en: Read all the instructions carefully before starting the exam.
gept.example_zh: 開始考試前請仔細閱讀所有指示。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 指南 (動詞) 引導
gept.example_en: The study guide includes practice questions for each chapter.
gept.example_zh: 這本讀書指南為每章都附有練習題。

gept.example_en: My counselor advised me to take a gap year before university.
gept.example_zh: 輔導老師建議我在上大學前先休學一年。

gept.example_en: The biology department recently hired three young scientists.
gept.example_zh: 生物系最近新聘了三位年輕科學家。

gept.example_en: The class explored different career options during a guest speaker session.
gept.example_zh: 在客座講座中，全班探索不同的職涯選項。

gept.example_en: The teacher's response to his question was clear and helpful.
gept.example_zh: 老師對他問題的回應既清楚又有幫助。

gept.example_en: Students were asked to respond to the article in a short essay.
gept.example_zh: 學生被要求以短文回應這篇文章。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 想知道 (名詞) 驚奇
gept.example_en: Children often wonder why the sky appears blue during the day.
gept.example_zh: 孩子常想知道為什麼白天天空是藍的。

gept.example_en: The teacher asked each student for their personal opinion on the topic.
gept.example_zh: 老師請每位學生說出對這個主題的個人意見。

gept.example_en: With consistent effort, anyone can improve in mathematics over time.
gept.example_zh: 持續努力，任何人都能在數學上逐步進步。

gept.example_en: Teaching young children requires both patience and a sense of humor.
gept.example_zh: 教幼童需要耐心和幽默感。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 目標 (動詞) 旨在
gept.example_en: The aim of this course is to improve academic writing skills.
gept.example_zh: 本課程旨在提升學術寫作能力。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 目標 (動詞) 以...為目標
gept.example_en: My target is to read fifty English books before graduation.
gept.example_zh: 我的目標是畢業前讀五十本英文書。

gept.example_en: It's not enough to survive freshman year; you should thrive in it.
gept.example_zh: 光是熬過大一還不夠，你應該充分發展。

gept.example_en: His outstanding work earned him a full scholarship to graduate school.
gept.example_zh: 他傑出的表現為他贏得了研究所全額獎學金。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人印象深刻的
gept.example_en: Her impressive presentation skills made the complex topic easy to follow.
gept.example_zh: 她令人印象深刻的報告技巧讓複雜主題變得易於理解。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 平均的 (名詞) 平均
gept.example_en: The class average on the final exam was eighty-two percent.
gept.example_zh: 期末考全班平均是百分之八十二。

gept.example_en: He failed the final exam but plans to retake it next semester.
gept.example_zh: 他期末考不及格，但打算下學期重考。

gept.example_en: Don't be afraid of failure; it is part of every learning journey.
gept.example_zh: 別怕失敗，那是每段學習旅程的一部分。

gept.example_en: To succeed academically you must combine talent with consistent effort.
gept.example_zh: 要在學業上成功，必須將天賦與持續努力結合。

gept.example_en: Her academic success came from steady habits over many years.
gept.example_zh: 她學業上的成功來自於多年穩定的習慣。

gept.example_en: Successful students often plan their week in advance.
gept.example_zh: 成功的學生常會提前規劃一週行程。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 挑戰 (動詞) 挑戰
gept.example_en: Writing in a second language is a challenge for most students.
gept.example_zh: 以第二語言寫作對多數學生來說都是挑戰。

gept.example_en: This semester's reading list is challenging but very rewarding.
gept.example_zh: 這學期的閱讀清單具挑戰性，但收穫很大。

gept.example_en: Many international students face language difficulties in their first year.
gept.example_zh: 許多國際生第一年都遇到語言上的困難。

gept.example_en: The instructions for the experiment were too complicated for first-year students.
gept.example_zh: 這個實驗的說明對一年級學生來說太複雜。

gept.example_en: Solving complex problems often requires breaking them into smaller parts.
gept.example_zh: 解決複雜問題常需將其拆成較小部分。

gept.example_en: The general education courses cover history, art, and basic science.
gept.example_zh: 通識教育課程涵蓋歷史、藝術與基礎科學。

gept.example_en: Please give a specific example to support your argument.
gept.example_zh: 請提出具體例子來支持你的論點。

gept.example_en: Pay close attention to detail when copying numbers from one table.
gept.example_zh: 從表格抄寫數字時要特別留意細節。

gept.example_en: Choosing a narrow research topic helps you finish your thesis on time.
gept.example_zh: 選擇較侷限的研究題目能幫助你準時完成論文。

gept.example_en: Each student must participate in at least one group discussion weekly.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生每週至少要參加一場小組討論。

gept.example_en: Teamwork is one of the most important workplace skills students can learn.
gept.example_zh: 團隊合作是學生能學到的最重要職場技能之一。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個人 (形容詞) 個別的
gept.example_en: Each individual student receives a personalized feedback report.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生都會收到一份個別化的回饋報告。

gept.example_en: University encourages students to become independent learners and thinkers.
gept.example_zh: 大學鼓勵學生成為獨立的學習者與思考者。

gept.example_en: Cultural exchange programs build understanding between students from different countries.
gept.example_zh: 文化交流計畫建立不同國家學生間的理解。

gept.example_en: Global education prepares students for careers in international organizations.
gept.example_zh: 全球教育讓學生準備好在國際組織工作。

gept.example_en: International students often live in special university housing.
gept.example_zh: 國際學生通常住在特別的大學宿舍。

gept.example_en: All students should receive equal opportunities to participate in school programs.
gept.example_zh: 所有學生都應有平等機會參與學校計畫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 取得 (動詞) 取得
gept.example_en: Online libraries give students access to thousands of academic articles.
gept.example_zh: 線上圖書館讓學生能取得數千篇學術文章。

gept.example_en: Our school has many learning resources for visual and auditory learners.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校為視覺型與聽覺型學習者提供許多學習資源。

gept.example_en: All course materials are available on the online learning platform.
gept.example_zh: 所有課程教材都可在線上學習平台取得。

gept.example_en: Some students prefer offline reading without digital distractions.
gept.example_zh: 有些學生偏好離線閱讀，避免數位干擾。

gept.example_en: Digital tools have transformed the way we read, write, and study.
gept.example_zh: 數位工具改變了我們閱讀、寫作與學習的方式。

gept.example_en: Our class uses an online platform to share notes and assignments.
gept.example_zh: 我們班用線上平台分享筆記與作業。

gept.example_en: I listen to educational podcasts during my morning commute every day.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上通勤時都會聽教育類播客。

gept.example_en: You can watch the recording of yesterday's lecture on the website.
gept.example_zh: 你可以在網站上看昨天演講的錄影。

gept.example_en: The school provides free statistical software for student research projects.
gept.example_zh: 學校為學生研究專題提供免費的統計軟體。

gept.example_en: She reads textbooks on her tablet to save weight in her backpack.
gept.example_zh: 她在平板上讀教科書，為背包減重。

gept.example_en: A good employer listens to feedback from the staff.
gept.example_zh: 好的雇主會聽取員工的意見回饋。

gept.example_en: The company has over two hundred employees in three countries.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司在三個國家共有兩百多名員工。

gept.example_en: My assistant booked the meeting room and sent out invitations.
gept.example_zh: 我的助理預訂了會議室並發出邀請函。

gept.example_en: The marketing director announced the launch of a new product.
gept.example_zh: 行銷總監宣布推出新產品。

gept.example_en: Our trainer prepared a clear handout for the workshop.
gept.example_zh: 我們的培訓師為工作坊準備了清楚的講義。

gept.example_en: I always check with my teammates before making decisions.
gept.example_zh: 我做決定前總是會和組員確認。

gept.example_en: The clerk at the front desk gave me a visitor pass.
gept.example_zh: 櫃台的職員給了我一張訪客通行證。

gept.example_en: Our accountant reminded us to keep all the receipts.
gept.example_zh: 我們的會計師提醒我們要保留所有收據。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 銀行家；銀行從業人員
gept.example_en: The banker explained the loan terms in simple language.
gept.example_zh: 那位銀行從業人員用淺白的語言解釋貸款條件。

gept.example_en: We always treat each client with care and respect.
gept.example_zh: 我們總是用心並尊重地對待每一位客戶。

gept.example_en: He is looking for a business partner with marketing skills.
gept.example_zh: 他正在尋找一位具有行銷專長的事業夥伴。

gept.example_en: All staff are invited to the year-end party.
gept.example_zh: 全體員工都受邀參加年終派對。

gept.example_en: The film crew worked late into the night.
gept.example_zh: 電影工作人員一直忙到深夜。

gept.example_en: A senior officer signed the contract this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午一位資深主管簽署了合約。

gept.example_en: Talk to your insurance agent about updating the policy.
gept.example_zh: 請和你的保險代理人談談更新保單的事。

gept.example_en: Visitors must sign in at the lobby before entering.
gept.example_zh: 訪客進入前必須在大廳簽到。

gept.example_en: Please use the scanner to copy these contracts.
gept.example_zh: 請用掃描器複製這些合約。

gept.example_en: A second monitor really helps me work more efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 第二台螢幕真的能幫助我更有效率地工作。

gept.example_en: Our customer service team uses a headset all day.
gept.example_zh: 我們客服團隊整天都戴著耳機麥克風。

gept.example_en: You can store your bag in the locker by the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 你可以把包包放在入口旁的置物櫃。

gept.example_en: We ordered more office supplies because we were running low.
gept.example_zh: 因為快用完了，我們又訂了更多辦公用品。

gept.example_en: Place the documents in a sealed envelope before mailing.
gept.example_zh: 寄出前請把文件放進密封的信封裡。

gept.example_en: My inbox is full of unread emails from last week.
gept.example_zh: 我的收件匣裡有滿滿上週未讀的電子郵件。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 桌面（電腦）；桌上型電腦
gept.example_en: I keep only important files on my desktop.
gept.example_zh: 我只把重要的檔案放在桌面上。

gept.example_en: The server will be down for maintenance on Sunday night.
gept.example_zh: 伺服器將在週日晚上進行維護而關閉。

gept.example_en: There is a security guard at the main entrance.
gept.example_zh: 主要入口有一位保全人員。

gept.example_en: I will update you on the project status by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我會在週五前向你更新專案進度。

gept.example_en: Please confirm your attendance by tomorrow noon.
gept.example_zh: 請於明天中午前確認您是否出席。

gept.example_en: I forgot to attach the document to my email.
gept.example_zh: 我忘了在電子郵件中附上文件。

gept.example_en: Please forward the message to the rest of the team.
gept.example_zh: 請把訊息轉發給團隊其他成員。

gept.example_en: Please inform the team about the meeting time change.
gept.example_zh: 請告知團隊會議時間變更。

gept.example_en: I had to cancel the appointment because of a fever.
gept.example_zh: 我因為發燒不得不取消約會。

gept.example_en: Only trained staff may operate this machine.
gept.example_zh: 只有受過訓練的員工才能操作這部機器。

gept.example_en: The company plans to hire ten engineers this year.
gept.example_zh: 公司計畫今年雇用十名工程師。

gept.example_en: My father plans to retire next spring at age sixty-five.
gept.example_zh: 我父親計畫明年春天六十五歲時退休。

gept.example_en: They promoted Jenny to senior account manager last month.
gept.example_zh: 他們上個月把珍妮升為資深客戶經理。

gept.example_en: Lisa took the minutes for the staff meeting today.
gept.example_zh: 今天的員工會議由麗莎做記錄。

gept.example_en: The invitation said the meeting starts at nine sharp.
gept.example_zh: 邀請函上寫會議九點整開始。

gept.example_en: Please report any absence to your supervisor right away.
gept.example_zh: 請立即向你的主管回報任何缺席。

gept.example_en: Your suggestion about flexible hours was well received.
gept.example_zh: 你關於彈性工時的建議獲得了好評。

gept.example_en: The company released a statement about the merger.
gept.example_zh: 公司發布了關於合併案的聲明。

gept.example_en: There will be an announcement about the new CEO tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天會發布關於新執行長的公告。

gept.example_en: I gave two weeks' notice before leaving my job.
gept.example_zh: 離職前我提前兩週通知公司。

gept.example_en: This is a friendly reminder to submit your timesheet.
gept.example_zh: 這是一個善意的提醒，請繳交你的工時表。

gept.example_en: The main topic of today's meeting is customer service.
gept.example_zh: 今天會議的主要主題是客戶服務。

gept.example_en: Let's discuss the shipping issue at the start of the meeting.
gept.example_zh: 我們在會議一開始就討論運送問題吧。

gept.example_en: This is a serious matter that needs urgent attention.
gept.example_zh: 這是需要緊急處理的嚴重事項。

gept.example_en: The final decision will be made by the director.
gept.example_zh: 最終決定將由主任做出。

gept.example_en: Please voice any concerns during the open discussion.
gept.example_zh: 在公開討論時請表達任何疑慮。

gept.example_en: We will address the budget concerns next week.
gept.example_zh: 我們下週會處理預算的問題。

gept.example_en: The plan has three stages and ends in November.
gept.example_zh: 這個計畫有三個階段，到十一月結束。

gept.example_en: We must finish the project within the agreed budget.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須在約定的預算內完成專案。

gept.example_en: The client listed five basic requirements for the app.
gept.example_zh: 客戶列出了應用程式的五項基本需求。

gept.example_en: The status of the order is now "in transit".
gept.example_zh: 這筆訂單目前的狀態是「運送中」。

gept.example_en: We must consider every risk before investing.
gept.example_zh: 投資前我們必須考慮每一項風險。

gept.example_en: The product launch is scheduled for next Friday.
gept.example_zh: 產品發行訂於下週五。

gept.example_en: The hiring process usually takes about three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 招聘流程通常需要三週左右。

gept.example_en: She got a promotion after three years of hard work.
gept.example_zh: 經過三年的努力工作後，她獲得了升遷。

gept.example_en: Update your resume before applying for new jobs.
gept.example_zh: 申請新工作前請更新你的履歷。

gept.example_en: He applied for a position in the design department.
gept.example_zh: 他應徵了設計部門的一個職位。

gept.example_en: I heard about an opening at a tech startup.
gept.example_zh: 我聽說一家科技新創公司有職缺。

gept.example_en: We interviewed five candidates for the assistant role.
gept.example_zh: 我們面試了五位助理職位的候選人。

gept.example_en: She received an offer from two companies last week.
gept.example_zh: 她上週收到兩家公司的錄取通知。

gept.example_en: Please read the contract carefully before signing.
gept.example_zh: 簽約前請仔細閱讀合約。

gept.example_en: The starting salary is competitive for this industry.
gept.example_zh: 在這個行業裡這份起薪很有競爭力。

gept.example_en: Hourly wages in this region went up last year.
gept.example_zh: 去年這個地區的時薪上漲了。

gept.example_en: Most employees received a year-end bonus this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年大多數員工都領到了年終獎金。

gept.example_en: Health insurance is one of the best benefits here.
gept.example_zh: 健康保險是這裡最好的福利之一。

gept.example_en: Strong communication skills are key in every team.
gept.example_zh: 良好的溝通技能在每個團隊中都很關鍵。

gept.example_en: His background in engineering made him a great fit.
gept.example_zh: 他的工程背景讓他非常適合這個職位。

gept.example_en: She switched careers from teaching to design.
gept.example_zh: 她從教學轉換職業到設計。

gept.example_en: Engineering is a respected profession in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 工程在許多國家是受人尊敬的職業。

gept.example_en: Cutting business expenses helped us save money this year.
gept.example_zh: 削減營業費用幫助我們今年省下了錢。

gept.example_en: My monthly income covers all the basic living costs.
gept.example_zh: 我的月收入足以支付所有的基本生活開銷。

gept.example_en: I put part of my savings into a fixed account.
gept.example_zh: 我把部分存款放進定存帳戶。

gept.example_en: She took out a small loan to start her business.
gept.example_zh: 她貸了一筆小額貸款來創業。

gept.example_en: A good credit score helps you get better loan rates.
gept.example_zh: 良好的信用分數有助於獲得較好的貸款利率。

gept.example_en: Most workers must file their tax forms in April.
gept.example_zh: 大多數受薪者必須在四月申報所得稅。

gept.example_en: There is a small fee for late payments.
gept.example_zh: 逾期付款會收取少額的費用。

gept.example_en: The bank added a service charge to my account.
gept.example_zh: 銀行在我的帳戶加收了一筆服務費。

gept.example_en: Your payment was received earlier this morning.
gept.example_zh: 你的付款已在今天稍早收到。

gept.example_en: The total amount on the bill seems too high.
gept.example_zh: 帳單上的總金額看起來太高了。

gept.example_en: Check the balance in your account before transferring.
gept.example_zh: 轉帳前請查看你的帳戶餘額。

gept.example_en: Keep the receipt in case you need to return it.
gept.example_zh: 請保留收據，以防你需要退貨。

gept.example_en: I had to borrow money from my parents this month.
gept.example_zh: 這個月我不得不向父母借錢。

gept.example_en: I can lend you a small amount until payday.
gept.example_zh: 我可以借你一小筆錢直到發薪日。

gept.example_en: He still owes me about fifty dollars from last month.
gept.example_zh: 他上個月還欠我大約五十元。

gept.example_en: Many young people invest in low-cost index funds.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人投資低成本的指數型基金。

gept.example_en: We can't afford a new car this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年我們負擔不起一輛新車。

gept.example_en: Don't waste money on things you'll never use.
gept.example_zh: 別把錢浪費在你永遠用不到的東西上。

gept.example_en: Let me calculate the total cost before we decide.
gept.example_zh: 我們決定前讓我先算總費用。

gept.example_en: I opened a new savings account last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我上週末開了一個新的儲蓄帳戶。

gept.example_en: There is an ATM right outside the convenience store.
gept.example_zh: 便利商店外面就有一台自動提款機。

gept.example_en: The cashier gave me the receipt and my change.
gept.example_zh: 出納員把收據和找零給了我。

gept.example_en: Please wait at the counter to be served.
gept.example_zh: 請在櫃台等候服務。

gept.example_en: Never share your password with anyone.
gept.example_zh: 千萬不要把密碼告訴任何人。

gept.example_en: Enter your PIN to access your bank card.
gept.example_zh: 輸入個人識別碼以使用你的銀行卡。

gept.example_en: Please put your signature at the bottom of the form.
gept.example_zh: 請在表格底部簽名。

gept.example_en: He paid the hotel bill with his credit card.
gept.example_zh: 他用信用卡支付了飯店帳單。

gept.example_en: I want to apply for a credit card from this bank.
gept.example_zh: 我想申請這家銀行的信用卡。

gept.example_en: He's saving up to buy his first car.
gept.example_zh: 他正在存錢買他人生的第一輛車。

gept.example_en: I'll pay you back as soon as I get my salary.
gept.example_zh: 我一拿到薪水就會還你錢。

gept.example_en: We ran out of cash during the trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們在旅行中現金用完了。

gept.example_en: The purchase of new computers improved our work speed.
gept.example_zh: 新電腦的採購提升了我們的工作速度。

gept.example_en: Students can get a ten percent discount on books.
gept.example_zh: 學生買書可以享有百分之十的折扣。

gept.example_en: I have a coupon for a free cup of coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我有一張免費咖啡的優惠券。

gept.example_en: I got a great deal on a new laptop.
gept.example_zh: 我以划算的價格買到了一台新筆電。

gept.example_en: Our most popular product is the wireless speaker.
gept.example_zh: 我們最受歡迎的產品是無線喇叭。

gept.example_en: This brand is known for high quality at fair prices.
gept.example_zh: 這個品牌以高品質和合理價格聞名。

gept.example_en: Read the price label carefully before buying.
gept.example_zh: 購買前請仔細閱讀價格標籤。

gept.example_en: Don't remove the tag before trying it on at home.
gept.example_zh: 在家試穿前別把標籤取下。

gept.example_en: The line at the checkout was very long today.
gept.example_zh: 今天結帳處的排隊隊伍很長。

gept.example_en: My shopping cart is already half full.
gept.example_zh: 我的購物車已經半滿了。

gept.example_en: Compare prices online before making a big purchase.
gept.example_zh: 大筆消費前請先在網路上比較價格。

gept.example_en: The local economy depends mostly on tourism.
gept.example_zh: 當地經濟主要依賴觀光業。

gept.example_en: Demand for electric cars has risen quickly.
gept.example_zh: 電動車的需求迅速增加。

gept.example_en: Trade between the two countries reached a new high.
gept.example_zh: 兩國之間的貿易達到新高。

gept.example_en: The car industry employs thousands of workers here.
gept.example_zh: 汽車產業在這裡雇用了成千上萬名工人。

gept.example_en: There is tough competition in the smartphone market.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機市場的競爭非常激烈。

gept.example_en: The company made a small profit last quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司上季賺取了少量利潤。

gept.example_en: The store reported a loss for the second year.
gept.example_zh: 那家商店連續第二年出現虧損。

gept.example_en: Skilled labor is hard to find in this small town.
gept.example_zh: 在這個小鎮很難找到熟練的勞工。

gept.example_en: Production at the factory increased by twenty percent.
gept.example_zh: 工廠的生產量增加了百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Smart consumers compare prices before buying.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的消費者在購買前會先比較價格。

gept.example_en: She bought stocks in a clean energy company.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一家潔淨能源公司的股票。

gept.example_en: He keeps part of his savings in a mutual fund.
gept.example_zh: 他把部分儲蓄放在共同基金裡。

gept.example_en: The chain plans to expand into Southeast Asia.
gept.example_zh: 這家連鎖店計畫擴展到東南亞。

gept.example_en: He works a part-time job to pay for school.
gept.example_zh: 他做一份兼職工作來支付學費。

gept.example_en: After graduation, she found a full-time job quickly.
gept.example_zh: 畢業後她很快找到了全職工作。

gept.example_en: I have the night shift this week at the hospital.
gept.example_zh: 我這週在醫院上夜班。

gept.example_en: Her morning routine includes coffee and email.
gept.example_zh: 她早上的例行公事是喝咖啡和回信。

gept.example_en: Good work habits lead to long-term success.
gept.example_zh: 良好的工作習慣帶來長期的成功。

gept.example_en: A typical workday here starts at nine.
gept.example_zh: 這裡典型的工作日從九點開始。

gept.example_en: All store staff wear a blue uniform.
gept.example_zh: 所有店員都穿藍色制服。

gept.example_en: Clear communication can prevent many small issues.
gept.example_zh: 清晰的溝通能避免許多小問題。

gept.example_en: Try to keep a professional tone in all emails.
gept.example_zh: 所有電子郵件都試著保持專業的語氣。

gept.example_en: Be flexible about meeting times when working across time zones.
gept.example_zh: 跨時區工作時，會議時間要保持彈性。

gept.example_en: An organized desk helps me think more clearly.
gept.example_zh: 整潔有條理的桌面幫助我思考更清晰。

gept.example_en: Our prices are competitive with major brands.
gept.example_zh: 我們的價格與主要品牌相比具有競爭力。

gept.example_en: We aim to make quality products affordable for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 我們的目標是讓優質產品人人都能負擔得起。

gept.example_en: This is an urgent task that needs attention today.
gept.example_zh: 這是今天就需要處理的緊急任務。

gept.example_en: We hired a temporary worker for the busy season.
gept.example_zh: 我們在旺季雇了一位臨時工。

gept.example_en: After six months, she got a permanent contract.
gept.example_zh: 六個月後，她拿到了正式的長期合約。

gept.example_en: Can you handle this customer complaint, please?
gept.example_zh: 你可以處理一下這個客訴嗎？

gept.example_en: We need to reduce costs without lowering quality.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要在不降低品質的情況下減少成本。

gept.example_en: Our sales increased by twenty percent last year.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年銷售增加了百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Customer complaints decreased after the change.
gept.example_zh: 改變之後客訴減少了。

gept.example_en: I leave sticky notes on my monitor as reminders.
gept.example_zh: 我把便利貼貼在螢幕上作為提醒。

gept.example_en: Use a paperclip to keep the pages together.
gept.example_zh: 用迴紋針把這幾頁夾在一起。

gept.example_en: A small desk lamp makes evening work much easier.
gept.example_zh: 一盞小檯燈讓晚上工作輕鬆許多。

gept.example_en: Safety in the workplace is everyone's responsibility.
gept.example_zh: 工作場所的安全是每個人的責任。

gept.example_en: Can you take over this account while I'm on leave?
gept.example_zh: 我請假期間你可以接手這位客戶嗎？

gept.example_en: Sign up for the safety training by next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 請於下週一前報名安全培訓。

gept.example_en: The price tag was hidden under the box.
gept.example_zh: 價格標籤藏在盒子下面。

gept.example_en: She saves spare change in a small piggy bank.
gept.example_zh: 她把零錢存在一個小撲滿裡。

gept.example_en: She applied for a tourist visa to visit Japan next month.
gept.example_zh: 她申請了觀光簽證下個月去日本。

gept.example_en: Please show your boarding pass at the gate before boarding the plane.
gept.example_zh: 登機前請在登機門出示您的登機證。

gept.example_en: We had to declare our purchases at customs upon arrival.
gept.example_zh: 抵達時我們必須在海關申報購買的物品。

gept.example_en: Keep all your travel documents in one secure folder.
gept.example_zh: 把所有旅行文件放在一個安全的文件夾裡。

gept.example_en: Please collect your baggage at carousel three after the flight.
gept.example_zh: 下飛機後請到三號行李轉盤領取行李。

gept.example_en: We took a ferry across the bay to reach the island.
gept.example_zh: 我們搭渡輪過海灣到達那座島。

gept.example_en: International flights depart from terminal two only.
gept.example_zh: 國際航班只從二號航廈出發。

gept.example_en: Check the departure board for any last-minute gate changes.
gept.example_zh: 查看出發看板以了解最後一刻的登機門變更。

gept.example_en: Family members waited eagerly at the arrival hall.
gept.example_zh: 家人在入境大廳焦急地等候。

gept.example_en: The flight attendant walked through the cabin checking seat belts.
gept.example_zh: 空服員走過客艙檢查安全帶。

gept.example_en: Traffic on the highway was slow due to road work.
gept.example_zh: 由於道路施工，高速公路上交通緩慢。

gept.example_en: We took the freeway to save time on our long drive.
gept.example_zh: 為了在長途駕駛中節省時間，我們走了高速公路。

gept.example_en: Many students ride scooters to school in Taiwan.
gept.example_zh: 台灣許多學生騎機車上學。

gept.example_en: The bus fare went up by ten percent last month.
gept.example_zh: 上個月公車車費漲了百分之十。

gept.example_en: Backpackers often stay in hostels to save money on lodging.
gept.example_zh: 背包客常住青年旅館以節省住宿費。

gept.example_en: Check-in time at most hotels is three in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 大多數飯店的入住時間是下午三點。

gept.example_en: The airline upgraded us to business class for free.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司免費把我們升級到商務艙。

gept.example_en: We stayed at a charming country inn in the village.
gept.example_zh: 我們住在村裡一家迷人的鄉村小旅館。

gept.example_en: The beach resort offers all-inclusive packages.
gept.example_zh: 這家海灘度假村提供全包式套裝行程。

gept.example_en: The waterfall is the main attraction of the national park.
gept.example_zh: 這座瀑布是國家公園的主要景點。

gept.example_en: This bridge is a popular photo spot at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 這座橋是日落時受歡迎的拍照景點。

gept.example_en: The art gallery features paintings by local artists.
gept.example_zh: 這家美術館展出當地藝術家的畫作。

gept.example_en: Visitors must remove their shoes before entering the temple.
gept.example_zh: 遊客進入寺廟前必須脫鞋。

gept.example_en: We chose the scenic route to enjoy the mountain views.
gept.example_zh: 我們選擇了風景路線來欣賞山景。

gept.example_en: She knows a shortcut that avoids the heavy traffic.
gept.example_zh: 她知道一條可避開塞車的捷徑。

gept.example_en: Stay in the right lane to take the next exit.
gept.example_zh: 保持在右車道才能下一個交流道。

gept.example_en: The tunnel cuts the journey time in half.
gept.example_zh: 這條隧道把行車時間縮短一半。

gept.example_en: The flight was delayed due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 這班飛機因天氣不佳而延誤。

gept.example_en: Several passengers filed complaints about the poor service.
gept.example_zh: 幾位乘客對服務不佳提出抱怨。

gept.example_en: After a month abroad, she started to feel homesick.
gept.example_zh: 在國外一個月後，她開始想家。

gept.example_en: Learning a few phrases helps when traveling abroad.
gept.example_zh: 學幾句短語對出國旅行很有幫助。

gept.example_en: Different cultures have different greeting customs.
gept.example_zh: 不同的文化有不同的問候習俗。

gept.example_en: The legend of the lost city has fascinated explorers for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 失落之城的傳奇吸引探險家數百年。

gept.example_en: The eagle is a national symbol of strength and freedom.
gept.example_zh: 老鷹是力量和自由的國家象徵。

gept.example_en: They booked a Mediterranean cruise for their honeymoon.
gept.example_zh: 他們預訂地中海郵輪旅行作為蜜月。

gept.example_en: The ship sailed from Hong Kong to Singapore.
gept.example_zh: 這艘船從香港航行到新加坡。

gept.example_en: The port is busy with cargo ships arriving each day.
gept.example_zh: 港口每天都有貨船抵達非常繁忙。

gept.example_en: The harbor was filled with colorful fishing boats.
gept.example_zh: 海港裡擠滿了色彩繽紛的漁船。

gept.example_en: Boil the water before adding the noodles to the pot.
gept.example_zh: 加麵條到鍋裡前先把水煮沸。

gept.example_en: Fry the onions in oil until they turn golden brown.
gept.example_zh: 用油把洋蔥煎到金黃色。

gept.example_en: Roast the chicken with garlic and rosemary for flavor.
gept.example_zh: 用大蒜和迷迭香烤雞增添風味。

gept.example_en: We grilled steaks and vegetables on the back patio.
gept.example_zh: 我們在後院燒烤牛排和蔬菜。

gept.example_en: Steam the vegetables to preserve their nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 蒸蔬菜以保留營養。

gept.example_en: Slice the bread thin for the sandwich.
gept.example_zh: 把麵包切薄做三明治。

gept.example_en: Mince the garlic and add it to the hot oil.
gept.example_zh: 把大蒜剁碎並加入熱油中。

gept.example_en: Stuff the turkey with bread, herbs, and onions.
gept.example_zh: 在火雞裡填入麵包、香草和洋蔥。

gept.example_en: Yeast makes the bread rise and become fluffy.
gept.example_zh: 酵母讓麵包膨脹變得蓬鬆。

gept.example_en: Use chicken broth to make the rice more flavorful.
gept.example_zh: 用雞高湯讓米飯更有味道。

gept.example_en: Pour maple syrup over the warm pancakes.
gept.example_zh: 在溫熱的鬆餅上倒楓糖漿。

gept.example_en: Greek yogurt is high in protein and low in sugar.
gept.example_zh: 希臘優格高蛋白低糖。

gept.example_en: I love sprinkling cheese on top of my pasta.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在義大利麵上撒起司。

gept.example_en: Fresh ginger gives the soup a warming kick.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的薑讓湯有溫熱的辛辣感。

gept.example_en: Caramelized onions are sweet and full of flavor.
gept.example_zh: 焦糖洋蔥又甜又有味道。

gept.example_en: Fresh basil leaves enhance any Italian dish.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮羅勒葉提升任何義大利菜的風味。

gept.example_en: Let the dough rest for thirty minutes before rolling.
gept.example_zh: 擀麵團前讓它靜置三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Thai cuisine is famous for its spicy and aromatic flavors.
gept.example_zh: 泰國料理以辛辣芳香的味道聞名。

gept.example_en: A bowl of hot soup is perfect on a cold day.
gept.example_zh: 寒冷的日子裡一碗熱湯最棒。

gept.example_en: Poultry includes chicken, duck, and turkey.
gept.example_zh: 家禽包括雞、鴨和火雞。

gept.example_en: The waiter took our order and brought water immediately.
gept.example_zh: 服務生記下我們的點餐並立刻送來水。

gept.example_en: The busboy cleared the table quickly after we finished.
gept.example_zh: 我們吃完後餐廳助理迅速收拾桌子。

gept.example_en: The hostess greeted us and led us to our table.
gept.example_zh: 接待員迎接我們並帶我們到桌位。

gept.example_en: The restaurant has a special seasonal menu in autumn.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳秋天有特別的季節性菜單。

gept.example_en: A service gratuity has already been added to your bill.
gept.example_zh: 服務費已加在您的帳單上。

gept.example_en: The cutlery should be placed neatly on either side of the plate.
gept.example_zh: 餐具應整齊地放在盤子兩側。

gept.example_en: Wash the kitchen utensils right after cooking.
gept.example_zh: 煮完飯立刻清洗廚具。

gept.example_en: Please add us to the waiting list for tonight.
gept.example_zh: 請把我們加到今晚的候位名單。

gept.example_en: Bite into the juicy peach and let the flavor burst.
gept.example_zh: 咬一口多汁的桃子，讓味道在口中爆開。

gept.example_en: Fast food can be greasy and unhealthy if eaten often.
gept.example_zh: 常吃速食可能會油膩且不健康。

gept.example_en: The pineapple is sweet and very refreshing.
gept.example_zh: 這鳳梨又甜又非常清爽。

gept.example_en: Dark chocolate has a bitter aftertaste.
gept.example_zh: 黑巧克力有苦澀的餘味。

gept.example_en: Be careful, that dish is extremely spicy.
gept.example_zh: 小心，那道菜非常辣。

gept.example_en: The tangy sauce complements the fish perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 這酸甜的醬汁完美地搭配魚肉。

gept.example_en: Frozen vegetables retain most of their nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 冷凍蔬菜保留了大部分的營養。

gept.example_en: Some snacks contain artificial preservatives.
gept.example_zh: 有些零食含有人工防腐劑。

gept.example_en: Looking at the screen too long can strain the neck.
gept.example_zh: 長時間看螢幕會使脖子緊繃。

gept.example_en: Drink warm water to soothe a sore throat.
gept.example_zh: 喝溫水可以舒緩喉嚨痛。

gept.example_en: The dentist examined her tongue carefully.
gept.example_zh: 牙醫仔細檢查她的舌頭。

gept.example_en: Regular exercise keeps the heart strong and healthy.
gept.example_zh: 規律運動保持心臟強壯健康。

gept.example_en: Blood carries oxygen throughout the body.
gept.example_zh: 血液把氧氣輸送到全身。

gept.example_en: A dry cough kept her awake most of the night.
gept.example_zh: 乾咳讓她大半夜睡不著。

gept.example_en: I sneeze whenever I'm near flowers in spring.
gept.example_zh: 春天我接近花朵就會打噴嚏。

gept.example_en: Fever often comes with chills and body aches.
gept.example_zh: 發燒常伴隨寒顫和身體痠痛。

gept.example_en: She gets a migraine whenever she skips meals.
gept.example_zh: 她不吃飯就會得偏頭痛。

gept.example_en: Her skin felt itchy after the mosquito bite.
gept.example_zh: 被蚊子叮後她的皮膚感到癢。

gept.example_en: Influenza spreads quickly during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 流行性感冒在冬季月份傳播迅速。

gept.example_en: Swallow the capsule whole with plenty of water.
gept.example_zh: 用大量的水整顆吞下膠囊。

gept.example_en: Good posture helps prevent back pain.
gept.example_zh: 良好姿勢有助於預防背痛。

gept.example_en: The politician promised to lower taxes if she were elected to office.
gept.example_zh: 這位政治人物承諾如果當選將降低稅收。

gept.example_en: Every citizen has the right to express their opinion freely without fear.
gept.example_zh: 每個公民都有權利毫無恐懼地自由表達意見。

gept.example_en: The judge listened carefully to both sides before making her final decision.
gept.example_zh: 法官在做出最終決定之前仔細聆聽雙方的陳述。

gept.example_en: The criminal was sentenced to fifteen years in prison for armed robbery.
gept.example_zh: 這名罪犯因持械搶劫被判處十五年監禁。

gept.example_en: It is not legal to drive without a valid license in this country.
gept.example_zh: 在這個國家無證駕駛是不合法的。

gept.example_en: The eagle soared high above the mountains looking for its next meal.
gept.example_zh: 老鷹在山上高高翱翔，尋找下一餐。

gept.example_en: Students study ecology to understand how living things interact with their surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 學生學習生態學以了解生物如何與環境互動。

gept.example_en: Remember to upload the report to the shared folder before tomorrow's meeting.
gept.example_zh: 記得在明天會議前將報告上傳到共享資料夾。

gept.example_en: Please delete any unnecessary files to free up space on your hard drive.
gept.example_zh: 請刪除任何不必要的檔案以釋放硬碟空間。

gept.example_en: Her latest post on social media received thousands of likes and comments.
gept.example_zh: 她最近在社群媒體上的貼文收到了數千個讚和評論。

gept.example_en: She sent me a DM asking about the recipe I posted last week.
gept.example_zh: 她發了私訊給我詢問我上週發布的食譜。

gept.example_en: He played golf every weekend until his knee injury last winter.
gept.example_zh: 他每週末打高爾夫，直到去年冬天膝蓋受傷。

gept.example_en: Swimming is one of the best exercises for people of all ages.
gept.example_zh: 游泳是各年齡層的人最好的運動之一。

gept.example_en: The volleyball hit the top of the net and bounced back into play.
gept.example_zh: 排球擊中球網頂部後又彈回比賽中。

gept.example_en: He picked up the bat and stepped confidently up to home plate.
gept.example_zh: 他拿起球棒，自信地走向本壘板。

gept.example_en: Golf clubs come in different sizes and shapes for various types of shots.
gept.example_zh: 高爾夫球桿有不同的尺寸和形狀，適合各種類型的擊球。

gept.example_en: Her powerful serve made it difficult for opponents to return the ball.
gept.example_zh: 她強而有力的發球使對手難以接球。

gept.example_en: She dived gracefully from the high board into the pool below.
gept.example_zh: 她從高跳板優雅地跳入下方泳池。

gept.example_en: Their band has been performing together for almost ten years now.
gept.example_zh: 他們的樂團一起表演已經將近十年了。

gept.example_en: He taught himself to play guitar by watching tutorials on the internet.
gept.example_zh: 他通過看網路上的教學自學吉他。

gept.example_en: She has been studying piano with a private teacher for over five years.
gept.example_zh: 她跟著私人老師學鋼琴已經超過五年了。

gept.example_en: The drum solo in the middle of the song impressed the entire audience.
gept.example_zh: 歌曲中段的鼓獨奏讓全場觀眾印象深刻。

gept.example_en: We bought tickets to attend the outdoor jazz concert next Saturday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們買了票參加下週六晚上的戶外爵士樂音樂會。

gept.example_en: Her unique designs have won several awards in international competitions.
gept.example_zh: 她獨特的設計在國際比賽中贏得多項獎項。

gept.example_en: She teaches modern dance to teenagers at the community center.
gept.example_zh: 她在社區中心教青少年現代舞。

gept.example_en: He always wanted to act in movies since he was a teenager.
gept.example_zh: 他從青少年時期就一直想演電影。

gept.example_en: The actor won an award for his powerful performance in the war film.
gept.example_zh: 這位演員因在這部戰爭片中精彩的表演而獲獎。

gept.example_en: The young actress made her film debut in this critically acclaimed movie.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕女演員在這部備受好評的電影中首次亮相。

gept.example_en: Painting helps her relax after a long stressful day at work.
gept.example_zh: 繪畫幫助她在漫長壓力大的工作日後放鬆。

gept.example_en: She has been improving her drawing skills by practicing every single day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天練習，繪圖技巧不斷進步。

gept.example_en: The thousand-piece puzzle took us nearly three weeks to complete.
gept.example_zh: 這個一千片的拼圖花了我們將近三週才完成。

gept.example_en: He spends too many hours playing video games instead of doing homework.
gept.example_zh: 他花太多時間玩電玩遊戲而不做功課。

gept.example_en: I read the newspaper every morning while having my breakfast coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上一邊喝早餐咖啡一邊看報紙。

gept.example_en: The fashion magazine features interviews with famous designers every month.
gept.example_zh: 這本時尚雜誌每月刊登對著名設計師的採訪。

gept.example_en: The newspaper will publish the full investigation next Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 這份報紙將於下週日早上發表完整的調查報告。

gept.example_en: The charity event raised thousands of dollars for the local food bank.
gept.example_zh: 這個慈善活動為當地食物銀行募集了數千美元。

gept.example_en: Radio listeners often call in to share their opinions during talk shows.
gept.example_zh: 廣播聽眾經常在脫口秀節目中打電話分享他們的意見。

gept.example_en: Never give up on your dreams, no matter how difficult the journey becomes.
gept.example_zh: 無論這段旅程變得多麼困難，都不要放棄你的夢想。

gept.example_en: The peaceful valley was dotted with small farms and grazing sheep.
gept.example_zh: 這個寧靜的山谷散布著小農場和吃草的綿羊。

gept.example_en: The strong earthquake shook buildings and caused windows to shatter loudly.
gept.example_zh: 強烈地震震動了建築物並使窗戶大聲破裂。

gept.example_en: He rode his motorcycle through winding mountain roads every Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 他每個星期天早上騎著摩托車穿越蜿蜒的山路。

gept.example_en: The brakes squealed loudly as the bus stopped suddenly at the corner.
gept.example_zh: 公車在轉角突然停下時煞車發出尖銳的聲響。

gept.example_en: Over the past decade, technology has changed the way we communicate.
gept.example_zh: 在過去的十年裡，科技改變了我們的溝通方式。

gept.example_en: This historic temple has stood for more than a century without major damage.
gept.example_zh: 這座歷史悠久的寺廟已矗立超過一個世紀，沒有重大損毀。

gept.example_en: They rose at dawn to watch the sun appear over the calm ocean.
gept.example_zh: 他們在黎明起床觀看太陽出現在平靜的海洋上。

gept.example_en: The clock struck midnight just as the fireworks began over the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 當煙火在港口上方開始綻放時，時鐘正好敲響了午夜。

gept.example_en: We agreed to meet at noon for lunch at the new Italian restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 我們約好中午在新的義大利餐廳碰面吃午餐。

gept.example_en: The hikers reached the peak just in time for a spectacular sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 登山者及時抵達山頂觀看壯麗的日出。

gept.example_en: Couples gathered on the beach to watch the brilliant orange sunset together.
gept.example_zh: 情侶們聚集在海灘上一起觀看燦爛的橙色日落。

gept.example_en: The library is much quieter on a weekday than during the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館在平日比週末安靜得多。

gept.example_en: She gave him a quick wink to signal that everything was alright.
gept.example_zh: 她快速向他眨了眨眼，示意一切都沒問題。

gept.example_en: She wore a beautiful silk dress to the elegant evening reception last night.
gept.example_zh: 她昨晚穿著一件美麗的絲綢洋裝出席優雅的晚宴。

gept.example_en: This sweater is made from soft merino wool from New Zealand sheep.
gept.example_zh: 這件毛衣是用紐西蘭綿羊的柔軟美麗諾羊毛製成的。

gept.example_en: The trumpet solo at the concert moved many audience members to tears.
gept.example_zh: 音樂會上的小喇叭獨奏感動了許多觀眾流下淚水。

gept.example_en: We went bowling with the team to celebrate winning the project bid.
gept.example_zh: 我們和團隊一起去打保齡球慶祝贏得專案的標案。

gept.example_en: She inserted the plug into the outlet to charge her dying phone.
gept.example_zh: 她把插頭插入插座為電量耗盡的手機充電。

gept.example_en: The teacher spun the globe slowly to show students the world's countries.
gept.example_zh: 老師慢慢旋轉地球儀向學生展示世界各國。

gept.example_en: She tied a beautiful red ribbon around the perfectly wrapped birthday gift.
gept.example_zh: 她在包裝完美的生日禮物上綁了一條美麗的紅色緞帶。

gept.example_en: Wear a thick glove when you handle hot pots from the oven.
gept.example_zh: 從烤箱拿熱鍋時要戴上厚手套。

gept.example_en: She wrapped a warm wool scarf around her neck before heading outside.
gept.example_zh: 她在出門前把一條溫暖的羊毛圍巾圍在脖子上。

gept.example_en: He left his umbrella on the train and got completely soaked walking home.
gept.example_zh: 他把雨傘忘在火車上，走回家時全身濕透了。

gept.example_en: She bought a bright yellow raincoat for her daughter to wear to school.
gept.example_zh: 她為女兒買了一件鮮黃色的雨衣去學校穿。

gept.example_en: She wore comfortable leather sandals for the long walk on the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她穿著舒適的皮製涼鞋在沙灘上長距離散步。

gept.example_en: His hiking boots provided excellent ankle support on the rocky uneven trail.
gept.example_zh: 他的登山靴在多岩石不平的小徑上提供了極佳的腳踝支撐。

gept.example_en: He turned his baseball cap backward and ran out for soccer practice.
gept.example_zh: 他把棒球帽反戴並跑出去進行足球練習。

gept.example_en: She forgot her sunglasses at home and squinted in the bright noon sun.
gept.example_zh: 她把太陽眼鏡忘在家裡，在明亮的正午陽光下瞇著眼。

gept.example_en: He realized his leather wallet was missing only after returning from the store.
gept.example_zh: 他從商店回來後才發現他的皮夾不見了。

gept.example_en: They caught several large crab in the wire trap by the rocky shore.
gept.example_zh: 他們在岩岸邊的鐵絲籠裡抓到好幾隻大螃蟹。

gept.example_en: The chef grilled the fresh shrimp with garlic, butter, and chopped parsley.
gept.example_zh: 廚師用大蒜、奶油和切碎的歐芹烤新鮮的蝦。

gept.example_en: They picked baskets of sweet strawberry at the local farm last Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 他們上週六在當地農場採了一籃籃甜美的草莓。

gept.example_en: They cooled off in the summer heat with chilled slices of watermelon.
gept.example_zh: 他們在夏日的炎熱中以冰涼的西瓜片消暑。

gept.example_en: He grilled juicy pineapple rings to serve alongside the spicy pork chops.
gept.example_zh: 他烤了多汁的鳳梨片配著辣味豬排一起上桌。

gept.example_en: She spread peanut butter thickly on warm slices of homemade bread.
gept.example_zh: 她把花生醬厚厚地塗在溫熱的自製麵包片上。

gept.example_en: The revolution overthrew the monarchy and established a republic within just two years.
gept.example_zh: 這場革命推翻了君主制並在短短兩年內建立了共和國。

gept.example_en: Better workplace accommodations help disabled employees contribute their unique talents and skills effectively.
gept.example_zh: 更好的職場便利設施幫助身心障礙員工有效地貢獻其獨特的才能與技能。

gept.example_en: Internal migration from rural villages to growing cities has accelerated dramatically over recent years.
gept.example_zh: 從農村到擴張中城市的內部遷徙近年來大幅加速。

gept.example_en: Rising sea level may displace hundreds of millions of people from coastal regions globally.
gept.example_zh: 上升的海平面可能使全球沿海地區數億人流離失所。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 北大西洋公約組織
gept.example_en: NATO members coordinated their defense strategies amid rising security tensions across the European continent.
gept.example_zh: 在歐洲大陸日益緊張的安全局勢中，北約成員協調了他們的國防戰略。

gept.example_en: I had to dash across the busy street to catch the departing bus.
gept.example_zh: 我必須衝過繁忙的街道才能趕上即將離站的公車。

gept.example_en: The dog can easily leap over the wooden fence in our backyard.
gept.example_zh: 那隻狗可以輕鬆地跳過我們後院的木柵欄。

gept.example_en: The lion's deep roar echoed across the entire safari camp at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 獅子低沉的吼聲在日落時迴盪整個獵遊營地。

gept.example_en: Her face seemed to glow with happiness after hearing the wonderful news.
gept.example_zh: 聽到那個好消息後，她的臉似乎因幸福而散發光彩。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 昏暗的；變暗
gept.example_en: The dim lighting in the restaurant created a romantic atmosphere for our anniversary dinner.
gept.example_zh: 餐廳昏暗的燈光為我們的週年紀念晚餐營造了浪漫氛圍。

gept.example_en: The doctor will be with you shortly, so please take a seat over there.
gept.example_zh: 醫生很快會來看您，請先到那邊就座。

gept.example_en: We watched the movie first and discussed our impressions afterwards over coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我們先看了電影，之後再一邊喝咖啡一邊討論我們的感想。

gept.example_en: This cozy little café is my favorite place to read on rainy weekends.
gept.example_zh: 這家舒適的小咖啡館是我下雨週末最喜歡的閱讀地點。

gept.example_en: The puzzled expression on his face suggested he didn't understand the question at all.
gept.example_zh: 他臉上困惑的表情顯示他完全不理解這個問題。

gept.example_en: The recipe calls for two ounces of melted butter and three eggs.
gept.example_zh: 這份食譜需要兩盎司融化的奶油和三顆雞蛋。

gept.example_en: My old truck consumes about one gallon of fuel every fifteen miles or so.
gept.example_zh: 我的舊卡車大約每行駛十五英里消耗一加侖燃料。

gept.example_en: Please buy a liter of fresh milk on your way home from the office.
gept.example_zh: 請在下班回家的路上買一公升新鮮牛奶。

gept.example_en: Please add fifty grams of dark chocolate to the brownie mixture for richer flavor.
gept.example_zh: 請在布朗尼麵糊中加入五十公克黑巧克力以增加濃郁風味。

gept.example_en: The package weighed approximately three kilograms when it arrived at the post office.
gept.example_zh: 那個包裹抵達郵局時大約重三公斤。

gept.example_en: The fabric store sells this material for eight dollars per yard during sales.
gept.example_zh: 那家布料店在特價期間以每碼八美元的價格出售這種布料。

gept.example_en: Please cut the ribbon into pieces of exactly thirty centimeters in length.
gept.example_zh: 請把緞帶剪成長度剛好三十公分的段。

gept.example_en: The thickness of this paper is just half a millimeter, making it very delicate.
gept.example_zh: 這張紙的厚度只有半公釐，使得它非常脆弱。

gept.example_en: What percentage of your monthly income do you typically save for retirement?
gept.example_zh: 你通常將你每月收入的多少百分比存起來作退休準備？

gept.example_en: Only a small fraction of the original audience remained until the very end.
gept.example_zh: 只有原本觀眾中的一小部分留到了最後。

gept.example_en: The teacher-to-student ratio in this private school is one to twelve.
gept.example_zh: 這所私立學校的師生比例是一比十二。

gept.example_en: Please turn down the volume of the television since the baby just fell asleep.
gept.example_zh: 請把電視的音量調低，因為寶寶剛剛才睡著。

gept.example_en: The documentary's final segment focused entirely on solutions to global climate challenges.
gept.example_zh: 這部紀錄片的最後一段完全聚焦於全球氣候挑戰的解決方案。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 宏偉的；千元
gept.example_en: They held a grand celebration to mark the company's fiftieth anniversary in business.
gept.example_zh: 他們舉辦了一場盛大的慶典來紀念公司成立五十週年。

gept.example_en: Only a handful of students stayed after class to ask the teacher detailed questions.
gept.example_zh: 只有少數學生在下課後留下來向老師問詳細的問題。

gept.example_en: It took a great deal of effort to finish the project before the deadline.
gept.example_zh: 在期限前完成這個專案花費了大量的心力。

gept.example_en: There's plenty of time to finish your homework before the family dinner begins.
gept.example_zh: 在家庭晚餐開始前，你有充足的時間完成你的功課。

gept.example_en: In spite of the heavy rain, the outdoor concert proceeded as originally planned.
gept.example_zh: 儘管下著大雨，戶外音樂會仍按原訂計畫進行。

gept.example_en: She gave a quick glance at her wristwatch before answering the difficult question.
gept.example_zh: 她在回答那個困難的問題之前快速瞥了一眼她的手錶。

gept.example_en: The children couldn't resist taking a peek at their wrapped presents under the tree.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們忍不住偷看了一眼樹下包好的禮物。

gept.example_en: Please roll up your sleeves before washing the dishes after the dinner party.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐派對後請先捲起袖子再洗碗。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 補丁；(動詞) 縫補
gept.example_en: She sewed a colorful patch over the small hole in the knee of her jeans.
gept.example_zh: 她在牛仔褲膝蓋的小破洞上縫了一塊色彩繽紛的補丁。

gept.example_en: After the rain, a tiny snail slowly crawled across the leaf in our backyard.
gept.example_zh: 雨後，一隻小蝸牛緩緩爬過我們後院的葉子。

gept.example_en: Tiny waves washed gently onto the pebbled shore throughout the entire moonlit night.
gept.example_zh: 在月光皎潔的整夜中，細小的浪花輕輕拍打著鵝卵石海岸。

gept.example_en: Every atom in the universe contains protons, neutrons, and rapidly orbiting tiny electrons.
gept.example_zh: 宇宙中每個原子都包含質子、中子和快速繞行的微小電子。

gept.example_en: Stack the fluffy pancakes on a warm plate and pour maple syrup generously over them.
gept.example_zh: 把鬆軟的鬆餅疊在溫熱的盤子上，並豪邁地淋上楓糖漿。

gept.example_en: Children sold homemade lemonade from a small wooden stand on the hot summer sidewalk.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在炎夏的人行道旁，從小木攤上販賣自製的檸檬水。

gept.example_en: Live jazz performances fill the small downtown club every Friday evening throughout the year.
gept.example_zh: 整年每個週五晚上，市中心小俱樂部都會充滿現場爵士樂表演。

gept.example_en: Mist rose dramatically from the powerful waterfall during our scenic afternoon nature hike.
gept.example_zh: 我們下午風景優美的自然健行中，水霧戲劇性地從強勁的瀑布升起。

gept.example_en: She pulled the warm fleece hood over her head as cold rain began falling suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 當冷雨突然開始落下時，她把溫暖的刷毛風帽拉到頭上。

gept.example_en: Bright moonlight lit up the entire backyard path during our peaceful midnight summer walks.
gept.example_zh: 在我們平靜的午夜夏日散步中，皎潔的月光照亮整條後院小徑。

gept.example_en: Old paint sometimes contained dangerous lead, which is now strictly banned in modern home products.
gept.example_zh: 舊油漆有時含有危險的鉛，這在現代家用產品中已被嚴格禁止。

gept.example_en: A rescue helicopter flew low over the mountains looking for the lost hikers all day.
gept.example_zh: 一架救援直升機整天在山區低空飛行，搜尋失蹤的健行者。

gept.example_en: Kids will dip almost anything in ketchup if you let them.
gept.example_zh: 如果你允許，小孩幾乎什麼都會沾番茄醬。

gept.example_en: Spread a thin layer of mustard on the bread before adding the cold cuts.
gept.example_zh: 在麵包上抹一薄層芥末醬，再放上冷切肉片。

gept.example_en: He squeezed a pea-sized amount of toothpaste onto his soft bristled brush.
gept.example_zh: 他在軟毛牙刷上擠了豌豆大小的牙膏。

gept.example_en: His old wind-up alarm clock still wakes him at six every morning.
gept.example_zh: 他那個老舊的發條鬧鐘每天早上六點仍會把他叫醒。

gept.example_en: A baked sweet potato topped with cinnamon makes a comforting cold-weather snack.
gept.example_zh: 烤地瓜撒上肉桂粉是天冷時撫慰人心的小點心。

gept.example_en: Slice the kiwi in half and scoop out the green flesh with a spoon.
gept.example_zh: 把奇異果切半，用湯匙舀出裡面綠色的果肉。

gept.example_en: A perfectly ripe plum is juicy enough that you should eat it over the sink.
gept.example_zh: 完美熟成的李子多汁到應該站在水槽邊吃。

gept.example_en: The scoreboard above center field showed only three minutes remaining.
gept.example_zh: 中外野上方的計分板顯示只剩三分鐘。

gept.example_en: The coach called a timeout to discuss the team's defensive strategy.
gept.example_zh: 教練叫了暫停以討論球隊的防守戰術。

gept.example_en: He calmly slotted the penalty into the bottom corner of the net.
gept.example_zh: 他冷靜地把罰球射進球門下角。

gept.example_en: She always requests a window seat so she can watch the clouds.
gept.example_zh: 她總是要求靠窗座位，這樣她可以看雲。

gept.example_en: On long flights he prefers an aisle seat so he can stretch his legs easily.
gept.example_zh: 長途飛行他偏好走道座位，這樣可以方便伸展雙腿。

gept.example_en: Online banking saves him a trip to the branch every payday.
gept.example_zh: 網路銀行讓他每次發薪日都省下跑分行的時間。

gept.example_en: With the new mobile banking app, you can deposit checks by taking a photo.
gept.example_zh: 用新的行動銀行app拍照就能存入支票。

gept.example_en: Remote work quickly became the new norm during the global health crisis.
gept.example_zh: 全球健康危機期間，遠距工作迅速成為新的常態。

gept.example_en: Long-term planning ensures that resources are used wisely across multiple years.
gept.example_zh: 長期規劃確保資源能在多年間妥善運用。

gept.example_en: Short-term wins helped maintain team motivation during the multi-year project.
gept.example_zh: 短期的勝利在這個跨年度專案中有助於維持團隊動力。

gept.example_en: A logical argument requires both clear premises and valid conclusions to be persuasive.
gept.example_zh: 具有說服力的論證需要清晰的前提和有效的結論。

gept.example_en: The title search revealed no outstanding liens against the historic downtown property.
gept.example_zh: 產權調查顯示市中心歷史建築並無任何未清償的留置權。

gept.example_en: Most children begin attending preschool between the ages of three and four years old.
gept.example_zh: 大多數孩子在三到四歲之間開始上學齡前教育。

gept.example_en: This new shampoo claims to reduce dandruff significantly within just two weeks of use.
gept.example_zh: 這款新洗髮精聲稱能在兩週內顯著減少頭皮屑。

gept.example_en: The loud alarm scared the intruder away before he could steal anything valuable.
gept.example_zh: 響亮的警報聲嚇跑了入侵者，他來不及偷走任何貴重物品。

gept.example_en: They trained their puppy to sleep peacefully in his cozy crate every single night.
gept.example_zh: 他們訓練他們的小狗每晚都安詳地睡在舒適的運輸籠裡。

gept.example_en: They take their friendly golden retriever to the dog park every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 他們每週六早上帶他們友善的黃金獵犬到寵物公園玩。

gept.example_en: She wears a light floral perfume that smells fresh and not overpowering at all.
gept.example_zh: 她噴一款清淡的花香香水，氣味清新而毫不濃烈。

gept.example_en: The new app has a clean interface that even beginners can easily navigate.
gept.example_zh: 新應用程式有簡潔的介面，連新手也能輕鬆操作。

gept.example_en: Please update to the latest version to get the most recent security patches.
gept.example_zh: 請更新到最新版本以取得最新的安全修補。

gept.example_en: Always write a clear message when you make a commit to the shared repository.
gept.example_zh: 向共用儲存庫提交時，務必寫清楚的訊息。

gept.example_en: Each module handles a single responsibility so the code remains organized.
gept.example_zh: 每個模組只處理一項職責，使程式碼保持井然有序。

gept.example_en: They wrapped grilled beef and salsa in a soft taco for a quick lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他們把烤牛肉和莎莎醬包進軟塔可餅當作快速午餐。

gept.example_en: After months of talks, both companies signed a profitable long-term agreement.
gept.example_zh: 經過數月談判，兩家公司簽署了一份有利可圖的長期協議。

gept.example_en: Fatigue is a common symptom of many different illnesses.
gept.example_zh: 疲倦是許多不同疾病的常見症狀。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 動態；資訊流；(動詞) 餵食
gept.example_en: Her social media feed is filled with photos from her recent trip.
gept.example_zh: 她的社群媒體動態被最近一趟旅行的照片塞滿。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 技術堆疊；一疊；(動詞) 堆疊
gept.example_en: The team is comfortable with a modern stack of Go, React, and PostgreSQL.
gept.example_zh: 團隊熟悉以 Go、React、PostgreSQL 組成的現代技術堆疊。

gept.example_en: The festival celebrates the city's diverse ethnic communities through food and music.
gept.example_zh: 這個節慶透過飲食與音樂慶祝城市多元的族群社區。

gept.example_en: She has been fascinated by politics ever since high school debate club.
gept.example_zh: 她自高中辯論社以來就對政治深感興趣。

gept.example_en: The new mayor promised to plant ten thousand trees during her term.
gept.example_zh: 新任市長承諾在任期內種植一萬棵樹。

gept.example_en: The new administration plans to focus on improving public transportation.
gept.example_zh: 新政府計畫專注於改善公共交通。

gept.example_en: She filed a lawsuit against the company for breaking the contract.
gept.example_zh: 她對公司提起訴訟，控告其違反合約。

gept.example_en: Every musician in the band practices for several hours each day.
gept.example_zh: 樂團裡每位音樂家每天都練習好幾個小時。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 曲調；旋律 (動詞) 調音
gept.example_en: She hummed a cheerful tune while washing the dishes.
gept.example_zh: 她洗碗時哼著一首歡快的曲調。

gept.example_en: The painter is famous for his peaceful countryside landscapes.
gept.example_zh: 這位畫家以寧靜的鄉村風景畫聞名。

gept.example_en: There is a brand-new cinema opening near the train station.
gept.example_zh: 火車站附近新開了一家全新的電影院。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 交通運輸；運輸工具
gept.example_en: Public transportation in this city is fast, cheap, and reliable.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市的大眾運輸快速、便宜又可靠。

gept.example_en: Passengers should be at the gate thirty minutes before boarding.
gept.example_zh: 旅客應於登機前三十分鐘抵達登機門。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to pack your swimsuit for the beach vacation.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了為海灘度假打包你的泳裝。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 山峰；頂峰 (動詞) 達到頂峰
gept.example_en: Climbing to the snowy peak takes about three days from base camp.
gept.example_zh: 從基地營攀登到雪峰大約需要三天。

gept.example_en: The huge new stadium can seat sixty thousand cheering fans.
gept.example_zh: 這座巨大的新體育場可容納六萬名歡呼的球迷。

gept.example_en: Concerts and basketball games are both held at the indoor arena.
gept.example_zh: 演唱會和籃球比賽都在這座室內競技場舉行。

gept.example_en: Always do a short warm-up before heavy exercise to prevent injury.
gept.example_zh: 進行劇烈運動前永遠先做短暫暖身以避免受傷。

gept.example_en: The children built a giant snowman in the front garden.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在前院堆了一個巨大的雪人。

gept.example_en: The nightly build failed because two unit tests broke after the refactor.
gept.example_zh: 因為重構後兩個單元測試壞了，每晚的建置作業失敗。

gept.example_en: The release went smoothly because we ran a full smoke test on the staging cluster.
gept.example_zh: 因為我們在預備叢集跑了完整冒煙測試，發佈過程很順利。

gept.example_en: Add the package to our manifest file and lock the version for reproducible builds.
gept.example_zh: 把套件加進清單檔並鎖定版本，確保建置能重現。

gept.example_en: Create a view to expose only the columns customer support agents are allowed to read.
gept.example_zh: 建立一個視圖，只暴露客服人員有權讀取的欄位。

gept.example_en: Push the docker image to our registry, tagged with both latest and the git commit hash.
gept.example_zh: 把 Docker 映像推到我們的登錄處，同時標記 latest 與 git 提交雜湊。

gept.example_en: Each story describes who the user is, what they want, and why the change matters.
gept.example_zh: 每個使用者故事說明使用者是誰、想要什麼，以及這個改動為何重要。

gept.example_en: Each expression evaluates to a single value, while statements perform actions and may have side effects.
gept.example_zh: 每個運算式只會算出單一值，而陳述句則執行動作並可能有副作用。

gept.example_en: Each filter learns to respond to a specific visual pattern such as horizontal edges or curved shapes.
gept.example_zh: 每個濾波器學習對特定視覺模式做出反應，例如水平邊緣或曲線形狀。

gept.example_en: Processing data in a batch lets GPUs exploit parallelism and yields more stable gradient estimates.
gept.example_zh: 以批次處理資料能讓 GPU 利用平行性，並產生更穩定的梯度估計。

gept.example_en: Shaping the reward signal carefully is crucial because agents will exploit any loophole they discover.
gept.example_zh: 謹慎塑造獎勵訊號至關重要，因為代理人會利用任何被發現的漏洞。

gept.example_en: Your session will expire after fifteen minutes of inactivity for security reasons.
gept.example_zh: 基於安全考量，閒置十五分鐘後你的連線階段將會過期。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 瀏覽器小型紀錄檔
gept.example_en: A tracking cookie can follow your browsing behavior across many different websites.
gept.example_zh: 追蹤型 cookie 可以跨許多不同網站追蹤你的瀏覽行為。

gept.example_en: Each microservice should validate input crossing its trust boundary before processing it.
gept.example_zh: 每個微服務在處理跨越其信任邊界的輸入前都應加以驗證。

gept.example_en: Scammers use urgent subject lines as bait to make recipients click malicious links.
gept.example_zh: 詐騙者使用緊急的主旨作為誘餌，誘使收件人點擊惡意連結。

gept.example_en: An email gateway scans every incoming message for spam, phishing, and harmful attachments.
gept.example_zh: 電子郵件安全閘道會掃描每封寄入的訊息以偵測垃圾、釣魚與有害附件。

gept.example_en: High availability design keeps the service running even when one data center goes offline.
gept.example_zh: 高可用性設計使服務在一個資料中心離線時仍能持續運作。

gept.example_en: Every confirmed alert becomes a tracked ticket so nothing slips through unfinished work.
gept.example_zh: 每個被確認的警示都會成為被追蹤的工單，避免任何工作未完成而被遺漏。

gept.example_en: After her MBA, she joined a tech start-up developing artificial intelligence solutions for hospitals.
gept.example_zh: 取得 MBA 學位後，她加入一家為醫院開發人工智慧解決方案的科技新創公司。

gept.example_en: Promoting work-life-balance reduces burnout and helps the company retain talented people for many years.
gept.example_zh: 推廣工作生活平衡可降低過勞，並協助公司多年留住優秀人才。

gept.example_en: The treasury note will reach maturity in ten years and pay back its face value.
gept.example_zh: 這張國庫券將於十年後到期並償還面額。

gept.example_en: The company faced bankruptcy after it defaulted on several large loan payments.
gept.example_zh: 公司在多筆大額貸款違約後面臨破產。

gept.example_en: An aldehyde features a carbonyl group bonded to at least one hydrogen atom.
gept.example_zh: 醛類具有一個與至少一個氫原子鍵結的羰基。

gept.example_en: Modern optics designs lenses that correct distortion across the entire visible color range.
gept.example_zh: 現代光學設計能在整個可見色彩範圍內修正失真的鏡片。

gept.example_en: The tungsten filament inside the bulb glows brightly when heated by passing current.
gept.example_zh: 燈泡內的鎢絲在電流通過加熱時會明亮地發光。

gept.example_en: A steam turbine spins rapidly when hot vapor jets push against curved blade surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 當高溫蒸汽噴流推壓彎曲葉片表面時，蒸汽渦輪機便會快速旋轉。

gept.example_en: Each modern wind tower stands over a hundred meters tall above the rolling hills.
gept.example_zh: 每座現代風機塔架矗立於起伏丘陵之上，高度超過百公尺。

gept.example_en: Workers planned to picket the factory entrance until management agreed to genuine wage negotiations.
gept.example_zh: 工人計畫在工廠門口設立糾察線，直到資方同意進行實質的薪資協商。

gept.example_en: Photographers retain copyright over their images even when commercial clients pay generously to license individual photos.
gept.example_zh: 即使商業客戶支付高額授權使用個別照片，攝影師仍保有對其影像的著作權。

gept.example_en: Primary school builds the foundation of literacy, numeracy, and cooperative behavior.
gept.example_zh: 小學奠定識字、計算與合作行為的基礎。

gept.example_en: Secondary school introduces specialized subjects that prepare students for higher education.
gept.example_zh: 中學引入專門學科，為學生升讀高等教育做準備。

gept.example_en: The director chose to zoom-in slowly on the trembling hand holding the old photograph.
gept.example_zh: 導演選擇慢慢推近鏡頭，對準那隻顫抖、握著舊照片的手。

gept.example_en: After the kiss, the camera began to zoom-out to reveal a cheering crowd.
gept.example_zh: 親吻之後，攝影機開始拉遠鏡頭，揭露一群歡呼的觀眾。

gept.example_en: The music-video told a short cinematic story rather than simply showing the band performing.
gept.example_zh: 這支音樂錄影帶說了一個簡短的電影式故事，而非單純呈現樂團演出。

gept.example_en: He shook the spray-paint can vigorously before adding a final touch to the mural.
gept.example_zh: 他用力搖晃噴漆罐，再為壁畫加上最後一筆。

gept.example_en: In her autobiography the singer revealed the childhood roots of her stage fright.
gept.example_zh: 在她的自傳中，這位歌手揭露了她舞台恐懼在童年時的根源。

gept.example_en: The biography traces the inventor's path from poverty to global recognition.
gept.example_zh: 這本傳記描繪了這位發明家從貧困到享譽全球的歷程。

gept.example_en: The comedy mocked the manners of the wealthy without ever feeling cruel.
gept.example_zh: 這齣喜劇嘲諷了富人的禮儀，卻從不顯得殘酷。

gept.example_en: The author's pen name was a clever anagram of her real surname.
gept.example_zh: 這位作者的筆名是她本姓的巧妙字母重組詞。

gept.example_en: The professor handed out a long reading-list of essays on memory and language.
gept.example_zh: 教授發下一份冗長的推薦書單，全是關於記憶與語言的散文。

gept.example_en: Each session began with a writing-prompt scribbled on the corner of the board.
gept.example_zh: 每堂課都以白板角落上潦草寫下的寫作引子展開。

gept.example_en: The fishmonger displays the freshest catch on ice and can fillet any fish on request.
gept.example_zh: 魚販將最新鮮的漁獲陳列在冰上，並可應要求現場去骨任何魚類。

gept.example_en: This dumpling recipe has been passed down through five generations of our family.
gept.example_zh: 這份水餃食譜已在我們家族中傳承了五代。

gept.example_en: Always read the ingredient label carefully if you have any food allergies or dietary restrictions.
gept.example_zh: 如果你有任何食物過敏或飲食限制，務必仔細閱讀成分標籤。

gept.example_en: Char the bell peppers directly over a flame until their skins blister and blacken evenly.
gept.example_zh: 將彩椒直接在火焰上炙燒，直到外皮均勻起泡並焦黑。

gept.example_en: Rye bread has a dense texture and slightly sour taste that complements smoked meats wonderfully.
gept.example_zh: 黑麥麵包質地紮實，帶微酸味，與燻肉搭配絕佳。

gept.example_en: Soft naan bread is the perfect vehicle for scooping up rich curry sauces.
gept.example_zh: 鬆軟的印度烤餅是舀取濃郁咖哩醬汁的完美工具。

gept.example_en: Linguine with fresh clam sauce is a signature dish at this seaside Italian trattoria.
gept.example_zh: 扁圓麵配新鮮蛤蜊醬是這家海邊義式小館的招牌料理。

gept.example_en: Thick chewy udon noodles taste wonderful in a simple soy-based broth with green onions.
gept.example_zh: 粗厚有嚼勁的烏龍麵配上單純的醬油湯底和青蔥，美味極了。

gept.example_en: Farmers sow seeds in early spring once the soil has warmed sufficiently for germination.
gept.example_zh: 農民在初春時播種，待土壤回暖至足以讓種子發芽。

gept.example_en: Free-range chickens roam outdoors all day, producing eggs with richer flavor and deeper yolks.
gept.example_zh: 放養的雞整天在戶外活動，產下風味更濃郁、蛋黃更深色的雞蛋。

gept.example_en: Blueberries are often labeled as a superfood thanks to their incredibly high antioxidant content.
gept.example_zh: 藍莓因其極高的抗氧化物含量，常被標榜為超級食物。

gept.example_en: Tangy lemon curd makes a delicious filling for tarts or a topping for soft pancakes.
gept.example_zh: 酸甜的檸檬奶醬可做為塔派的內餡或鬆軟煎餅的淋醬。

gept.example_en: The team's brutal preseason camp builds the conditioning needed for the long regular season.
gept.example_zh: 球隊嚴苛的季前訓練營能建立漫長例行賽所需的體能基礎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 季後賽期；賽季結束後
gept.example_en: Three of their starting players sustained injuries during the recent intense postseason run.
gept.example_zh: 他們的三名先發球員在近期激烈的季後賽中受傷。

gept.example_en: Countries near the equator generally enjoy warm temperatures throughout the year with minimal seasonal change.
gept.example_zh: 靠近赤道的國家通常全年享有溫暖氣溫，季節變化極小。

gept.example_en: The Great Pyramid of Giza remains the only surviving wonder of the ancient world today.
gept.example_zh: 吉薩大金字塔仍是當今唯一倖存的古代世界奇蹟。

gept.example_en: My mother asked me to run a few errands at the supermarket after school.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽要我放學後去超市辦幾件雜事。

gept.example_en: Because of the typhoon, the school decided to postpone the sports day.
gept.example_zh: 由於颱風來襲，學校決定將運動會延期。

gept.example_en: The waiter apologized for bringing the wrong dish to our table.
gept.example_zh: 服務生為送錯菜到我們桌上道歉。

gept.example_en: Our teacher gave us a difficult writing assignment over the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 老師給我們一份週末要完成的困難寫作作業。

gept.example_en: Please remember that the deadline for the report is this Friday.
gept.example_zh: 請記得這份報告的截止期限是這週五。

gept.example_en: She prepared the slides carefully for her presentation in class.
gept.example_zh: 她為了課堂上的簡報細心準備投影片。

gept.example_en: My colleagues and I usually have lunch together in the company cafeteria.
gept.example_zh: 我和同事們通常在公司餐廳一起吃午餐。

gept.example_en: He submitted his application for the summer internship last week.
gept.example_zh: 他上週遞交了暑期實習的申請。

gept.example_en: She completed a three-month internship at an international trading company.
gept.example_zh: 她在一家國際貿易公司完成了三個月的實習。

gept.example_en: I made a reservation for two at the new Italian restaurant downtown.
gept.example_zh: 我在市中心那家新開的義大利餐廳預訂了兩人位。

gept.example_en: Kenting is a popular destination for college students during summer vacation.
gept.example_zh: 墾丁是大學生暑假時熱門的旅遊目的地。

gept.example_en: The hotel offers comfortable accommodation at a reasonable price.
gept.example_zh: 這家飯店以合理的價格提供舒適的住宿。

gept.example_en: She bought a small wooden elephant as a souvenir from Thailand.
gept.example_zh: 她從泰國買了一個小木象當作紀念品。

gept.example_en: We spent the whole afternoon sightseeing in the old part of the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們整個下午都在舊城區觀光。

gept.example_en: My younger sibling often borrows my clothes without asking me first.
gept.example_zh: 我的弟弟妹妹經常未經我同意就借走我的衣服。

gept.example_en: We spend every Christmas with my in-laws at their countryside house.
gept.example_zh: 我們每年聖誕節都和姻親在他們的鄉間房子度過。

gept.example_en: Many companies offer health insurance benefits to employees and their spouses.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司為員工及其配偶提供健康保險福利。

gept.example_en: The toddler wobbled across the playground while her mother watched carefully.
gept.example_zh: 那個學步兒童搖搖晃晃地走過遊樂場，母親仔細地看著。

gept.example_en: Infants typically begin to recognize familiar faces around three months old.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒通常在三個月大左右開始認得熟悉的臉孔。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 青少年；青春期的
gept.example_en: Adolescent years can be confusing because of rapid emotional and physical changes.
gept.example_zh: 青春期可能令人困惑，因為情緒和身體變化迅速。

gept.example_en: Many retirees enjoy gardening and traveling now that they have free time.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休人員現在有空閒時間，享受園藝和旅行。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有雄心的；有抱負的
gept.example_en: She is ambitious and hopes to become a company executive before forty.
gept.example_zh: 她很有抱負，希望在四十歲前成為公司高階主管。

gept.example_en: He is considerate and always asks his roommate before turning on music.
gept.example_zh: 他很體貼，總是先詢問室友再打開音樂。

gept.example_en: Her witty remarks made everyone at the dinner table laugh out loud.
gept.example_zh: 她機智的言論讓晚餐桌上的每個人都大笑出聲。

gept.example_en: He felt jealous when his best friend won the scholarship instead of him.
gept.example_zh: 當他最好的朋友贏得獎學金而不是他時，他感到嫉妒。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不知所措的；負荷過重的
gept.example_en: She felt overwhelmed by the amount of work due before the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她對週末前要交的工作量感到不知所措。

gept.example_en: The witness described the suspect's appearance in great detail to police.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者向警方詳細描述了嫌犯的外貌。

gept.example_en: She is a passionate advocate for children's rights in developing countries.
gept.example_zh: 她是發展中國家兒童權利的熱情倡導者。

gept.example_en: She befriended the new student who seemed lonely during the first week.
gept.example_zh: 她與第一週看起來很孤單的新同學交朋友。

gept.example_en: The brothers finally reconciled after not speaking to each other for years.
gept.example_zh: 兄弟倆多年未說話後終於和解了。

gept.example_en: Nothing could console the child after losing her favorite stuffed animal.
gept.example_zh: 在弄丟最心愛的填充玩偶後，沒有什麼能安慰那個孩子。

gept.example_en: My aunts love to gossip about the neighbors during family gatherings.
gept.example_zh: 我的阿姨們喜歡在家庭聚會時談論鄰居的八卦。

gept.example_en: The teacher scolded the students for talking loudly during the exam.
gept.example_zh: 老師責罵學生在考試期間大聲說話。

gept.example_en: She is proud of her cultural heritage and teaches her children traditional songs.
gept.example_zh: 她以自己的文化遺產為傲，並教孩子們傳統歌曲。

gept.example_en: He traced his ancestry back to a small village in northern Italy.
gept.example_zh: 他將自己的血統追溯到義大利北部的一個小村莊。

gept.example_en: After living abroad for ten years, she finally obtained Canadian citizenship.
gept.example_zh: 在國外居住十年後，她終於取得加拿大公民身分。

gept.example_en: My grandmother speaks a dialect that few young people understand today.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母說一種如今很少年輕人聽得懂的方言。

gept.example_en: I bought my nephew a toy train for his fifth birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 我給姪子買了一輛玩具火車作為他五歲生日禮物。

gept.example_en: My niece won first prize at her school's annual art competition.
gept.example_zh: 我姪女在學校年度藝術比賽中贏得了第一名。

gept.example_en: His stepmother has been kind and supportive since she joined the family.
gept.example_zh: 他的繼母自從加入這個家庭以來一直親切又支持他。

gept.example_en: Her stepfather taught her how to ride a bicycle when she was six.
gept.example_zh: 她繼父在她六歲時教她如何騎自行車。

gept.example_en: After their parents died, their uncle became their legal guardian.
gept.example_zh: 父母過世後，他們的叔叔成為他們的法定監護人。

gept.example_en: The charity organization helps orphans find loving foster families nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 該慈善機構幫助孤兒在全國找到充滿愛的寄養家庭。

gept.example_en: The widow received many letters of sympathy after her husband's funeral.
gept.example_zh: 那位寡婦在丈夫葬禮後收到許多慰問信。

gept.example_en: The elderly widower lives alone but his neighbors check on him daily.
gept.example_zh: 那位年長的鰥夫獨自生活，但鄰居每天都會探望他。

gept.example_en: Her fiance gave her a beautiful diamond ring during their anniversary dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她未婚夫在週年紀念晚餐上送給她一枚漂亮的鑽石戒指。

gept.example_en: He introduced his fiancee to his parents at a quiet family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他在一頓安靜的家庭晚餐上把未婚妻介紹給父母。

gept.example_en: The newlyweds are honeymooning in Hawaii for two relaxing weeks.
gept.example_zh: 那對新婚夫婦正在夏威夷度蜜月，享受兩週的放鬆時光。

gept.example_en: He remained a bachelor until he met his future wife at thirty-five.
gept.example_zh: 他一直是單身漢，直到三十五歲遇到他未來的妻子。

gept.example_en: He is just an acquaintance from work, not a close personal friend.
gept.example_zh: 他只是工作上認識的人，不是親密的私人朋友。

gept.example_en: My dog has been my faithful companion for the past twelve years.
gept.example_zh: 過去十二年來，我的狗一直是我忠實的夥伴。

gept.example_en: My mentor helped me develop the confidence to start my own business.
gept.example_zh: 我的導師幫助我培養出創業的信心。

gept.example_en: The two tennis players have been rivals since they were teenagers.
gept.example_zh: 這兩位網球選手從青少年時期就是對手。

gept.example_en: Teenagers are often heavily influenced by their peers in school.
gept.example_zh: 青少年在學校經常深受同儕的影響。

gept.example_en: He has been my best buddy since we met in kindergarten.
gept.example_zh: 自從我們在幼稚園認識以來，他就是我最好的朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 充滿愛的；親切的
gept.example_en: She gave her daughter an affectionate hug before leaving for work.
gept.example_zh: 她在去上班前給女兒一個充滿愛的擁抱。

gept.example_en: The compassionate nurse always took extra time to listen to patients.
gept.example_zh: 那位富有同情心的護士總是花額外的時間傾聽病人的話。

gept.example_en: His sympathetic response made her feel understood and less alone.
gept.example_zh: 他充滿同情的回應讓她感到被理解，不再那麼孤單。

gept.example_en: A good therapist must be empathetic and patient with every client.
gept.example_zh: 一位好的治療師必須對每位個案都有同理心且有耐心。

gept.example_en: He has been a loyal friend through all my difficult times.
gept.example_zh: 在我所有艱難的時刻，他都是一位忠誠的朋友。

gept.example_en: She is trustworthy and never reveals secrets that friends share with her.
gept.example_zh: 她值得信賴，從不洩露朋友與她分享的秘密。

gept.example_en: His sincere apology made it easy for her to forgive him quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他真誠的道歉讓她很容易就快速原諒他。

gept.example_en: Despite his huge success, he remains humble and treats everyone equally.
gept.example_zh: 儘管他取得了巨大的成功，但仍保持謙虛，平等對待每個人。

gept.example_en: His arrogant attitude made it difficult for him to make new friends.
gept.example_zh: 他傲慢的態度讓他很難交到新朋友。

gept.example_en: Introverted people often need quiet time alone to recharge their energy.
gept.example_zh: 內向的人通常需要獨處的安靜時間來恢復精力。

gept.example_en: His extroverted personality makes him perfect for a sales career.
gept.example_zh: 他外向的個性使他非常適合銷售工作。

gept.example_en: He has a pessimistic view and always expects the worst possible outcome.
gept.example_zh: 他抱持悲觀的看法，總是預期最糟糕的結果。

gept.example_en: He has been gloomy ever since his girlfriend moved to another country.
gept.example_zh: 自從女友搬到另一個國家後，他一直很憂鬱。

gept.example_en: She felt miserable after losing her job and her apartment in one week.
gept.example_zh: 在一週內失去工作和公寓後，她感到非常痛苦。

gept.example_en: The children were thrilled when their parents announced the trip to Disneyland.
gept.example_zh: 當父母宣布要去迪士尼樂園時，孩子們興奮不已。

gept.example_en: My father was furious when he discovered the broken kitchen window.
gept.example_zh: 當我父親發現廚房窗戶破了時，他暴怒不已。

gept.example_en: She felt irritated by her brother's constant questions during the movie.
gept.example_zh: 電影播放期間，她對弟弟不斷的問題感到煩躁。

gept.example_en: She felt depressed for several months after her grandmother passed away.
gept.example_zh: 祖母過世後，她有好幾個月感到憂鬱。

gept.example_en: Many elderly people feel isolated when their children move far away.
gept.example_zh: 許多老年人在子女搬到遠處後感到孤立。

gept.example_en: She felt relieved when the doctor said her test results were normal.
gept.example_zh: 當醫生說她的檢驗結果正常時，她鬆了一口氣。

gept.example_en: She was terrified of spiders ever since one crawled on her face.
gept.example_zh: 自從一隻蜘蛛爬到她臉上後，她就極度害怕蜘蛛。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沒自信的；不安全的
gept.example_en: He felt insecure about his appearance throughout his teenage years.
gept.example_zh: 在整個青少年時期，他對自己的外表感到沒自信。

gept.example_en: She was hesitant to accept the job offer because of the long commute.
gept.example_zh: 由於通勤時間長，她對接受工作機會感到猶豫。

gept.example_en: She is a diligent student who reviews her notes every single evening.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位勤奮的學生，每晚都複習筆記。

gept.example_en: My adventurous sister has hiked through over twenty different countries already.
gept.example_zh: 我愛冒險的姊姊已經徒步走過二十多個不同的國家。

gept.example_en: He is cautious with money and saves a portion of every paycheck.
gept.example_zh: 他對金錢很謹慎，每一份薪水都會存下一部分。

gept.example_en: His reckless driving caused a serious accident on the highway last month.
gept.example_zh: 他魯莽的駕駛上個月在高速公路上造成嚴重的車禍。

gept.example_en: The neighbors became hostile after years of disputes about property boundaries.
gept.example_zh: 在多年關於財產邊界的爭議後，鄰居變得敵對。

gept.example_en: The local villagers were hospitable and welcomed us into their homes.
gept.example_zh: 當地村民非常好客，歡迎我們進入他們的家。

gept.example_en: The unfriendly cashier did not greet a single customer all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那位不友善的收銀員整個下午都沒有跟任何一位顧客打招呼。

gept.example_en: She is sociable and enjoys hosting dinner parties for her friends.
gept.example_zh: 她善於社交，喜歡為朋友舉辦晚宴。

gept.example_en: His immature behavior at the meeting embarrassed everyone on his team.
gept.example_zh: 他在會議上不成熟的行為讓他團隊的每個人都感到難堪。

gept.example_en: She was naive to believe the stranger's promise of easy money.
gept.example_zh: 她太天真，竟相信陌生人輕鬆賺錢的承諾。

gept.example_en: The gifted musician started playing piano when he was only three years old.
gept.example_zh: 那位有天賦的音樂家在僅僅三歲時就開始彈鋼琴。

gept.example_en: The judge was lenient because it was the defendant's first offense.
gept.example_zh: 法官寬容處理，因為這是被告的初次犯罪。

gept.example_en: His harsh criticism made the young writer doubt her own talent.
gept.example_zh: 他嚴厲的批評讓那位年輕作家懷疑自己的才華。

gept.example_en: He showed great affection for his elderly mother by visiting weekly.
gept.example_zh: 他每週探望年邁的母親，展現對她深厚的情感。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 聯繫；建立關係
gept.example_en: Twins often share a special bond that other siblings cannot understand.
gept.example_zh: 雙胞胎之間常常有著其他兄弟姊妹無法理解的特殊聯繫。

gept.example_en: Her loyalty to the company was rewarded with a senior management position.
gept.example_zh: 她對公司的忠誠得到了高階管理職位的回報。

gept.example_en: Honesty is the foundation of every healthy long-term relationship.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是每段健康長久關係的基礎。

gept.example_en: The cruelty shown to animals in that video shocked the entire community.
gept.example_zh: 那段影片中對動物的殘忍讓整個社區都感到震驚。

gept.example_en: Jealousy destroyed their friendship after one of them won the promotion.
gept.example_zh: 在其中一人獲得升職後，嫉妒摧毀了他們的友誼。

gept.example_en: She felt a twinge of envy when she saw her friend's new car.
gept.example_zh: 當她看到朋友的新車時，感到一絲忌妒。

gept.example_en: The whole village shared in her sorrow after the tragic accident.
gept.example_zh: 在那場悲劇性的意外後，整個村莊都分擔了她的悲傷。

gept.example_en: The two sisters quarreled over who would inherit the family heirloom.
gept.example_zh: 兩姊妹為誰將繼承家傳寶物而吵架。
