gept.example_en: The neighbors had a dispute about the boundary of their two properties.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們對兩處財產的邊界有爭議。

gept.example_en: A successful marriage requires both partners to compromise on important decisions.
gept.example_zh: 成功的婚姻需要雙方在重要決定上互相妥協。

gept.example_en: He apologized for the insult and promised never to speak that way again.
gept.example_zh: 他為那個侮辱道歉，並承諾再也不會那樣說話。

gept.example_en: My older brother loves to tease me about my taste in music.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥喜歡取笑我的音樂品味。

gept.example_en: It is unkind to mock people for the way they speak English.
gept.example_zh: 嘲弄別人說英文的方式是很不友善的。

gept.example_en: He tried to flatter his boss by complimenting her new haircut.
gept.example_zh: 他試圖透過稱讚老闆的新髮型來奉承她。

gept.example_en: He could never abandon his elderly parents in their time of greatest need.
gept.example_zh: 在年邁父母最需要的時候，他絕不會拋棄他們。

gept.example_en: Good parents nurture their children's interests and unique individual talents.
gept.example_zh: 好的父母會培養孩子的興趣和獨特的個人才能。

gept.example_en: His strict upbringing taught him discipline and respect for elders.
gept.example_zh: 他嚴格的教養讓他學會了紀律和對長輩的尊重。

gept.example_en: There are five people living in our household including my grandparents.
gept.example_zh: 我們家有五個人住在一起，包括我的祖父母。

gept.example_en: His ancestors came to America from Ireland over two hundred years ago.
gept.example_zh: 他的祖先在兩百多年前從愛爾蘭來到美國。

gept.example_en: She is a direct descendant of one of the country's founding leaders.
gept.example_zh: 她是該國其中一位開國領袖的直系後代。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 長輩；年長的
gept.example_en: In our culture, we always show respect for elders in the community.
gept.example_zh: 在我們的文化中，我們總是對社區的長輩表示尊敬。

gept.example_en: The youngsters in our neighborhood organized a charity walk last Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 上週六，我們社區的年輕人組織了一場慈善健走活動。

gept.example_en: Many middle-aged adults start exercising more to maintain their health.
gept.example_zh: 許多中年人開始多運動以維持健康。

gept.example_en: The elderly couple has been married for over fifty years now.
gept.example_zh: 那對年長的夫妻已經結婚超過五十年了。

gept.example_en: Children develop language skills rapidly during the period of infancy.
gept.example_zh: 孩子在嬰兒期語言能力發展迅速。

gept.example_en: They announced their engagement at a small dinner with close family.
gept.example_zh: 他們在與親密家人的小型晚餐上宣布了訂婚。

gept.example_en: She had a secret crush on her classmate throughout high school.
gept.example_zh: 在整個高中時期，她暗戀著一位同班同學。

gept.example_en: He likes to flirt with everyone but never takes anything seriously.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡和每個人調情，但從不認真對待任何事。

gept.example_en: It is rude to interrupt someone when they are speaking to you.
gept.example_zh: 當別人正在跟你說話時打斷他們是很沒禮貌的。

gept.example_en: She whispered a secret into her best friend's ear at lunch.
gept.example_zh: 她在午餐時對最好朋友的耳邊低語了一個秘密。

gept.example_en: He used to stutter as a child but speech therapy helped him.
gept.example_zh: 他小時候曾經口吃，但語言治療幫助了他。

gept.example_en: The little girls giggled when they saw the puppy chasing its tail.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩們看到小狗追自己尾巴時咯咯地笑了。

gept.example_en: She wept silently in her bedroom after reading the heartbreaking letter.
gept.example_zh: 看完那封令人心碎的信後，她在臥室裡默默地哭泣。

gept.example_en: The child sobbed loudly when she could not find her teddy bear.
gept.example_zh: 那個孩子找不到她的泰迪熊時，大聲地啜泣。

gept.example_en: When asked who broke the vase, he just shrugged and stayed silent.
gept.example_zh: 當被問到誰打破花瓶時，他只是聳了聳肩，保持沉默。

gept.example_en: The caregiver visits my grandmother three times every week to help her.
gept.example_zh: 那位照護者每週探訪我祖母三次來幫助她。

gept.example_en: They hired a nanny to look after their twins while they worked.
gept.example_zh: 他們僱了一位保姆在他們工作時照顧雙胞胎。

gept.example_en: Our regular babysitter is a college student who lives next door.
gept.example_zh: 我們經常請的臨時保姆是一位住在隔壁的大學生。

gept.example_en: Their housekeeper has been working for the family for over twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 他們的管家為這個家庭工作已經超過二十年了。

gept.example_en: My college roommate became one of my closest lifelong friends.
gept.example_zh: 我大學的室友成了我最親密的終生朋友之一。

gept.example_en: Many foreigners come to study Mandarin at our local language school.
gept.example_zh: 許多外國人來我們當地的語言學校學中文。

gept.example_en: Many immigrants work hard to give their children a better future.
gept.example_zh: 許多移民努力工作，希望讓孩子有更好的未來。

gept.example_en: The country welcomed thousands of refugees fleeing from the civil war.
gept.example_zh: 該國接納了數千名從內戰中逃出的難民。

gept.example_en: Every morning she follows the same ritual of meditation and prayer.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上她都遵循相同的冥想和祈禱儀式。

gept.example_en: We held a farewell party for our colleague who is moving overseas.
gept.example_zh: 我們為即將搬到海外的同事舉辦了告別派對。

gept.example_en: Our family reunion takes place every five years at our hometown.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家族團聚每五年在故鄉舉辦一次。

gept.example_en: They celebrated their twentieth wedding anniversary with a trip to Paris.
gept.example_zh: 他們以一趟巴黎之旅慶祝結婚二十週年。

gept.example_en: The whole community mourned the loss of their beloved school principal.
gept.example_zh: 整個社區為他們敬愛的校長逝世而哀悼。

gept.example_en: It is healthy to grieve openly after losing a close family member.
gept.example_zh: 在失去親近的家人後，公開地表達悲傷是健康的。

gept.example_en: Her family endured great hardship during the long economic recession.
gept.example_zh: 她的家庭在長期經濟衰退期間經歷了極大的艱難。

gept.example_en: Patience is an important trait for anyone who works with young children.
gept.example_zh: 耐心是任何與幼兒一起工作的人重要的特質。

gept.example_en: She has a calm temperament that helps her handle stressful situations.
gept.example_zh: 她平靜的性情幫助她應對壓力大的情況。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me good table manners when I was little.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母在我小時候教我良好的餐桌禮儀。

gept.example_en: Business etiquette varies significantly between Western and Asian cultures.
gept.example_zh: 商業禮儀在西方和亞洲文化之間有顯著差異。

gept.example_en: My grandparents adore their grandchildren and spoil them with gifts.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母很疼愛孫子們，會用禮物寵壞他們。

gept.example_en: She despises people who are dishonest about their accomplishments.
gept.example_zh: 她鄙視那些對自己成就不誠實的人。

gept.example_en: She resented her parents for forcing her to study medicine instead of art.
gept.example_zh: 她怨恨父母強迫她讀醫科而不是藝術。

gept.example_en: We are not very acquainted but I see him at the gym occasionally.
gept.example_zh: 我們不太熟，但我偶爾會在健身房見到他。

gept.example_en: Everything felt unfamiliar after returning home from twenty years abroad.
gept.example_zh: 在國外住了二十年回到家後，一切都感到陌生。

gept.example_en: They share an intimate friendship built on years of mutual trust.
gept.example_zh: 他們之間有著建立在多年相互信任上的親密友誼。

gept.example_en: The little boy is very attached to his stuffed bear named Charlie.
gept.example_zh: 那個小男孩非常依戀他那隻名叫查理的玩具熊。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 忠誠的；專心致志的
gept.example_en: She is a devoted mother who puts her children before everything else.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位忠誠的母親，把孩子放在一切之前。

gept.example_en: He has been a faithful husband for thirty wonderful years.
gept.example_zh: 三十年來他一直是個忠實的丈夫。

gept.example_en: She filed for divorce after discovering her husband had been unfaithful.
gept.example_zh: 在發現丈夫不忠後，她提出離婚。

gept.example_en: His heartfelt concern for her well-being made her feel deeply loved.
gept.example_zh: 他對她的健康衷心的關懷讓她感到被深深愛著。

gept.example_en: Her insincere smile told me she did not really enjoy the gift.
gept.example_zh: 她不真誠的微笑告訴我她並不真的喜歡這個禮物。

gept.example_en: His genuine interest in her work made her feel valued.
gept.example_zh: 他對她工作的真誠興趣讓她感到被重視。

gept.example_en: Their friendship turned out to be superficial and ended after college.
gept.example_zh: 他們的友誼結果是膚淺的，大學畢業後就結束了。

gept.example_en: He has shallow interests and rarely thinks about deeper philosophical questions.
gept.example_zh: 他的興趣很膚淺，很少思考更深層的哲學問題。

gept.example_en: His fascinating life story could be turned into a successful movie.
gept.example_zh: 他迷人的人生故事可以拍成一部成功的電影。

gept.example_en: The chubby baby giggled when her uncle made silly faces.
gept.example_zh: 那個圓胖的寶寶在叔叔做鬼臉時咯咯地笑。

gept.example_en: My skinny brother eats huge amounts of food without gaining weight.
gept.example_zh: 我瘦弟弟吃大量食物卻不會變胖。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 皺巴巴的；有皺紋的
gept.example_en: My grandmother's wrinkled face tells the story of her long, eventful life.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母布滿皺紋的臉訴說著她漫長且多事的人生故事。

gept.example_en: The blonde child resembles her father more than her mother.
gept.example_zh: 那個金髮的孩子比起母親更像父親。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 深褐色頭髮的女子
gept.example_en: The brunette in the photograph is my older sister at age twenty.
gept.example_zh: 照片中那位深褐色頭髮的女子是我姊姊二十歲時的樣子。

gept.example_en: His red-haired daughter inherited her unique hair color from her grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 他紅髮的女兒從祖母那裡繼承了獨特的髮色。

gept.example_en: The bearded man at the counter looks like a famous movie star.
gept.example_zh: 櫃檯邊那個留鬍子的男人看起來像個有名的電影明星。

gept.example_en: She was heartbroken when her boyfriend of five years moved overseas.
gept.example_zh: 當交往五年的男友搬到海外時，她心碎不已。

gept.example_en: He felt a deep longing for his childhood home in the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 他對山中童年家園感到深切的渴望。

gept.example_en: After years abroad, she yearned to taste her mother's home cooking.
gept.example_zh: 在國外多年後，她渴望嚐到母親的家常菜。

gept.example_en: Pregnant women often crave specific foods like pickles or chocolate.
gept.example_zh: 懷孕的女性常常渴望特定的食物，如醃黃瓜或巧克力。

gept.example_en: Looking at old family photos always makes me feel nostalgic.
gept.example_zh: 看著舊家庭照片總是讓我感到懷舊。

gept.example_en: She keeps every letter her late father wrote for sentimental reasons.
gept.example_zh: 出於感傷的理由，她保留著她過世父親寫的每一封信。

gept.example_en: He felt cowardly for not standing up to defend his younger sister.
gept.example_zh: 他為沒有站出來保護妹妹而感到怯懦。

gept.example_en: The timid puppy hid behind the sofa whenever strangers visited the house.
gept.example_zh: 每當陌生人來訪時，那隻膽怯的小狗就躲在沙發後面。

gept.example_en: The fearless firefighter rushed into the burning building to save the family.
gept.example_zh: 那位無畏的消防員衝進熊熊燃燒的大樓拯救那家人。

gept.example_en: She expressed her sympathy to the family after their tragic loss.
gept.example_zh: 在那家人經歷悲慘的損失後，她表達了同情之意。

gept.example_en: A great counselor must have empathy for clients from all backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 一位優秀的諮商師必須對來自各種背景的個案都有同理心。

gept.example_en: Her mother's intuition told her something was wrong with her teenage son.
gept.example_zh: 她身為母親的直覺告訴她，她青少年兒子有些不對勁。

gept.example_en: The two leading actors had wonderful chemistry on screen together.
gept.example_zh: 兩位主角在螢幕上有著絕佳的默契。

gept.example_en: A good teacher builds rapport with students through patience and respect.
gept.example_zh: 一位好老師透過耐心與尊重，與學生建立融洽的關係。

gept.example_en: The two families formed an alliance through the marriage of their children.
gept.example_zh: 兩個家庭透過孩子的婚姻形成了聯盟。

gept.example_en: Their partnership lasted twenty years before they decided to go separate ways.
gept.example_zh: 他們的合作關係持續了二十年，才決定各自發展。

gept.example_en: The hikers enjoyed the fellowship of fellow travelers along the mountain trail.
gept.example_zh: 登山者在山路上享受著與旅伴的友誼。

gept.example_en: The workers showed solidarity by going on strike together.
gept.example_zh: 工人們以一起罷工的方式展現團結。

gept.example_en: Discord between the brothers ruined many family holidays over the years.
gept.example_zh: 兄弟間的不和多年來毀了許多家庭假期。

gept.example_en: A small misunderstanding caused weeks of unnecessary tension between them.
gept.example_zh: 一個小誤會在他們之間造成數週不必要的緊張。

gept.example_en: Most family conflicts begin with simple miscommunication about everyday matters.
gept.example_zh: 大多數家庭衝突都始於日常事務上簡單的溝通不良。

gept.example_en: He finally confessed that he had broken his sister's antique vase.
gept.example_zh: 他終於承認自己打破了妹妹的古董花瓶。

gept.example_en: She asked for forgiveness after realizing how much pain she had caused.
gept.example_zh: 在意識到自己造成多大的痛苦後，她請求原諒。

gept.example_en: Tolerance for different opinions is essential in any healthy relationship.
gept.example_zh: 容忍不同的意見在任何健康的關係中都是必要的。

gept.example_en: Self-acceptance is the first step toward building healthy relationships.
gept.example_zh: 自我接納是建立健康人際關係的第一步。

gept.example_en: He found it hard to recover from the rejection by his college sweetheart.
gept.example_zh: 他發現很難從大學戀人的拒絕中恢復。

gept.example_en: Her parents strongly disapproved of her relationship with the older man.
gept.example_zh: 她父母強烈反對她與年長男子的戀情。

gept.example_en: She sought her father's approval before accepting the marriage proposal.
gept.example_zh: 她在接受求婚之前尋求父親的贊同。

gept.example_en: My grandmother endorsed my decision to pursue a career in nursing.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母支持我從事護理事業的決定。

gept.example_en: They have fostered over twenty children in the past fifteen years.
gept.example_zh: 在過去十五年中，他們已寄養了二十多個孩子。

gept.example_en: Her lineage can be traced back to the royal family of England.
gept.example_zh: 她的血統可以追溯到英國皇室。

gept.example_en: He invited all of his kin to attend the special anniversary celebration.
gept.example_zh: 他邀請了所有親戚參加特別的週年慶祝活動。

gept.example_en: The two strangers felt an immediate kinship over their shared experiences.
gept.example_zh: 那兩個陌生人因為共同的經歷而立即感到一種親近感。

gept.example_en: Our family clan gathers every five years for a large reunion celebration.
gept.example_zh: 我們家族每五年舉行一次大型團聚慶祝活動。

gept.example_en: The indigenous tribe has preserved its traditional language for many generations.
gept.example_zh: 那個原住民部落已經保留了傳統語言許多代。

gept.example_en: The city's diverse ethnicity is reflected in its many different restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市多元的種族反映在其眾多不同的餐廳中。

gept.example_en: The exclusion she felt at school led to long-lasting confidence issues.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校感受到的排斥導致了長期的自信心問題。

gept.example_en: She faced prejudice when she first moved to the small rural town.
gept.example_zh: 她剛搬到那個小型鄉村小鎮時面臨偏見。

gept.example_en: It is unfair to judge someone based on a cultural stereotype.
gept.example_zh: 根據文化刻板印象來評斷某人是不公平的。

gept.example_en: Discrimination based on age is illegal in most workplaces today.
gept.example_zh: 在當今大多數的職場上，基於年齡的歧視是違法的。

gept.example_en: She enjoys solitude and often takes long walks alone in the forest.
gept.example_zh: 她享受獨處，常常獨自在森林裡長時間散步。

gept.example_en: Months of isolation during the pandemic affected many people's mental health.
gept.example_zh: 疫情期間數月的隔離影響了許多人的心理健康。

gept.example_en: After her husband died, she found companionship through her local book club.
gept.example_zh: 丈夫過世後，她透過當地的讀書會找到了陪伴。

gept.example_en: He prefers to socialize with small groups rather than at large parties.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡與小團體社交，而不是參加大型派對。

gept.example_en: She tried to mingle with the other guests at the wedding reception.
gept.example_zh: 她試圖在婚宴上與其他賓客交際。

gept.example_en: Please reach out to me if you need any emotional support during this time.
gept.example_zh: 在這段時間如果你需要任何情感支持，請主動聯絡我。

gept.example_en: The two old friends drifted apart after one of them moved abroad.
gept.example_zh: 其中一人搬到國外後，兩個老朋友漸行漸遠。

gept.example_en: We promised to keep in touch after graduating from high school.
gept.example_zh: 我們在高中畢業後承諾要保持聯絡。

gept.example_en: The two sisters had a serious fall-out over their mother's inheritance.
gept.example_zh: 兩姊妹因為母親的遺產鬧得很僵。

gept.example_en: They argued last week but made up the following day.
gept.example_zh: 他們上週吵架，但隔天就和好了。

gept.example_en: She decided to break off their engagement after discovering his many lies.
gept.example_zh: 在發現他許多謊言後，她決定取消婚約。

gept.example_en: After years of traveling, he is ready to settle down and start a family.
gept.example_zh: 在多年旅行後，他準備安定下來並組建家庭。

gept.example_en: It took her a long time to move on after the divorce.
gept.example_zh: 離婚後她花了很長時間才繼續前進。

gept.example_en: The childhood friends grew apart after attending different universities.
gept.example_zh: 這些兒時朋友在進入不同的大學後變得疏遠。

gept.example_en: It took her months to open up about her difficult childhood experiences.
gept.example_zh: 她花了幾個月才敞開心扉談論艱難的童年經歷。

gept.example_en: Don't hold back your true feelings during this important family meeting.
gept.example_zh: 在這次重要的家庭會議中，別保留你真實的感受。

gept.example_en: She promised to stand by her husband through all of life's challenges.
gept.example_zh: 她承諾無論生活有什麼挑戰，都會支持她的丈夫。

gept.example_en: My aunt looked after her elderly mother for the last seven years.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨在過去七年裡照顧她年邁的母親。

gept.example_en: Older siblings often take care of younger ones in large families.
gept.example_zh: 在大家庭中，年長的兄姊常常照料年幼的弟妹。

gept.example_en: It is not easy to bring up children while working two part-time jobs.
gept.example_zh: 一邊做兩份兼職工作一邊撫養孩子並不容易。

gept.example_en: My beloved grandfather passed away peacefully at the age of ninety-two.
gept.example_zh: 我敬愛的祖父在九十二歲時安詳地過世了。

gept.example_en: The newborn slept peacefully in her mother's arms after the long delivery.
gept.example_zh: 剛出生的嬰兒在漫長的分娩後在母親懷裡安靜地睡著。

gept.example_en: Parenthood is the most rewarding and challenging journey of my life.
gept.example_zh: 為人父母是我人生中最有回報也最具挑戰的旅程。

gept.example_en: Motherhood completely changed her priorities and view of the world.
gept.example_zh: 母親的身分徹底改變了她的優先順序和世界觀。

gept.example_en: He embraced fatherhood with great enthusiasm after his son was born.
gept.example_zh: 在兒子出生後，他帶著極大的熱情迎接父親身分。

gept.example_en: Being a single parent is challenging but also incredibly rewarding.
gept.example_zh: 當單親家長很具挑戰，但也極具回報感。

gept.example_en: My step-sibling and I became close friends after our parents married.
gept.example_zh: 我和繼手足在父母結婚後成為親密的朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同父異母或同母異父的兄弟
gept.example_en: His half-brother lives in another country but visits during the summer.
gept.example_zh: 他的同父異母兄弟住在另一個國家，但夏天會來探訪。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同父異母或同母異父的姊妹
gept.example_en: She met her half-sister for the very first time last week.
gept.example_zh: 她上週第一次見到她同父異母的姊姊。

gept.example_en: My extended family includes around fifty cousins, aunts, and uncles.
gept.example_zh: 我的大家庭包括大約五十位表親、阿姨和叔叔。

gept.example_en: Only immediate family attended the small private wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 只有直系親屬參加了那場小型的私人婚禮。

gept.example_en: The nuclear family of two parents and two children remains common today.
gept.example_zh: 由兩位父母和兩個孩子組成的核心家庭如今仍很常見。

gept.example_en: As a single mother, she worked hard to provide for her three children.
gept.example_zh: 身為單親媽媽，她努力工作以撫養她的三個孩子。

gept.example_en: As a single father, he learned how to braid his daughter's hair.
gept.example_zh: 身為單親爸爸，他學會了如何幫女兒編辮子。

gept.example_en: He treats his stepchild as if he were his own biological son.
gept.example_zh: 他對待繼子就像對待親生兒子一樣。

gept.example_en: My mother-in-law has been very welcoming since I married her son.
gept.example_zh: 自從我嫁給她兒子以來，我婆婆一直非常熱情。

gept.example_en: His daughter-in-law often helps care for his grandchildren on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 他的媳婦經常在週末幫忙照顧他的孫子們。

gept.example_en: My son-in-law is a kind man who treats my daughter wonderfully.
gept.example_zh: 我的女婿是個善良的人，對我女兒很好。

gept.example_en: My sister-in-law and I have become very good friends since the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 自從婚禮以來，我和嫂嫂變成了很好的朋友。

gept.example_en: My brother-in-law works as a dentist in the nearby coastal town.
gept.example_zh: 我姊夫在附近的沿海小鎮當牙醫。

gept.example_en: My father-in-law gave me valuable advice when I started my new business.
gept.example_zh: 當我開始新事業時，岳父給了我寶貴的建議。

gept.example_en: My mother-in-law taught me how to cook several traditional family recipes.
gept.example_zh: 我婆婆教了我幾道傳統的家族食譜。

gept.example_en: My aunt has been the main caretaker for my elderly grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨一直是我年邁祖母的主要看護者。

gept.example_en: My older brother has been a role model for me since childhood.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥從小就是我的模範。

gept.example_en: My little sister's idol is a famous young singer from Korea.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹的偶像是一位來自韓國的年輕歌手。

gept.example_en: He made a lifelong commitment to his wife on their wedding day.
gept.example_zh: 他在婚禮當天向妻子做出了終生的承諾。

gept.example_en: They exchanged heartfelt vows during their outdoor wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 他們在戶外婚禮上交換了真摯的誓言。

gept.example_en: He took an oath to always protect and provide for his family.
gept.example_zh: 他發誓要永遠保護和供養他的家人。

gept.example_en: We store old photo albums and winter clothes in the attic above the bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 我們把舊相簿和冬衣存放在臥室上方的閣樓裡。

gept.example_en: The basement floods every time there is a heavy rainstorm in our area.
gept.example_zh: 每次我們這一帶下大雨時，地下室就會淹水。

gept.example_en: Please leave your wet umbrella in the hallway before entering the living room.
gept.example_zh: 進客廳前請把濕雨傘放在走廊。

gept.example_en: She grows tomatoes and basil in small pots on her sunny balcony.
gept.example_zh: 她在陽光充足的陽台上用小盆栽種番茄和羅勒。

gept.example_en: The pantry is stocked with rice, pasta, and canned vegetables for emergencies.
gept.example_zh: 食品儲藏室裡備有米、義大利麵和罐裝蔬菜以防萬一。

gept.example_en: My grandparents like to sit on the porch and watch the neighbors walk by.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母喜歡坐在門廊上看鄰居走過。

gept.example_en: The narrow corridor connects the kitchen to the back garden of the house.
gept.example_zh: 這條狹窄的走道連接廚房與屋後的花園。

gept.example_en: The wooden staircase creaks loudly whenever someone walks up to the second floor.
gept.example_zh: 每當有人上二樓時，木製樓梯就會大聲嘎吱作響。

gept.example_en: From the rooftop we can clearly see the city skyline at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 從屋頂上我們能在日落時清楚看到城市的天際線。

gept.example_en: Father keeps the lawn mower and garden tools locked inside the wooden shed.
gept.example_zh: 父親把割草機和園藝工具鎖在木製棚屋裡。

gept.example_en: The wine cellar maintains a cool temperature all year round for proper aging.
gept.example_zh: 酒窖全年保持涼爽溫度以利酒類熟成。

gept.example_en: They painted the nursery a soft yellow before the baby was born.
gept.example_zh: 他們在嬰兒出生前把嬰兒房漆成柔和的黃色。

gept.example_en: The children scattered toys all over the playroom floor again this morning.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們今早又把玩具撒滿遊戲室的地板。

gept.example_en: Our laundry room is small but fits both a washer and a dryer.
gept.example_zh: 我們的洗衣間雖小，但能放下洗衣機和烘衣機。

gept.example_en: The utility room houses the boiler, electric panel, and cleaning supplies.
gept.example_zh: 雜物間裡有鍋爐、電箱和清潔用品。

gept.example_en: Our open dining area connects directly to the kitchen and living room.
gept.example_zh: 我們開放式的用餐區直接連接廚房與客廳。

gept.example_en: We prepared the guest room with fresh sheets before her parents arrived.
gept.example_zh: 她父母到訪前，我們在客房鋪好乾淨的床單。

gept.example_en: The master bedroom features a large window overlooking the quiet backyard.
gept.example_zh: 主臥室有一扇大窗，可俯瞰寧靜的後院。

gept.example_en: She organized her closet by color and donated clothes she no longer wears.
gept.example_zh: 她依顏色整理衣櫃，並把不再穿的衣服捐了出去。

gept.example_en: The antique wardrobe in the corner belonged to my great-grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 角落裡那座古董衣櫥是我曾祖母的。

gept.example_en: His bookshelf is crowded with novels, dictionaries, and travel guides.
gept.example_zh: 他的書架塞滿了小說、字典和旅遊指南。

gept.example_en: They converted the loft into a cozy reading nook with cushions.
gept.example_zh: 他們把閣樓改造成一個放有抱枕的舒適閱讀角落。

gept.example_en: We grilled fish on the patio while the children played in the yard.
gept.example_zh: 我們在露台上烤魚，孩子們則在院子裡玩耍。

gept.example_en: Please park your car in the driveway, not on the public street.
gept.example_zh: 請把車停在私人車道上，不要停在公共道路上。

gept.example_en: He sharpens his tools every Sunday in his backyard workshop.
gept.example_zh: 他每週日都在後院工坊磨利他的工具。

gept.example_en: A small bench in the entryway makes putting on shoes much easier.
gept.example_zh: 入口處的小長椅讓穿鞋變得容易許多。

gept.example_en: The mudroom keeps wet boots and muddy coats out of the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 玄關儲物間可避免濕靴和泥外套被帶進廚房。

gept.example_en: Her walk-in closet is larger than my entire bedroom back home.
gept.example_zh: 她的步入式衣帽間比我家整個臥室還大。

gept.example_en: The powder room near the entrance is only for guests to use.
gept.example_zh: 入口附近的客用洗手間只給訪客使用。

gept.example_en: Each upstairs bedroom has its own en-suite bathroom with a shower.
gept.example_zh: 樓上每間臥室都有自己附淋浴的套房衛浴。

gept.example_en: She paused on the landing to catch her breath before climbing more stairs.
gept.example_zh: 她在樓梯平台稍作停留喘息，再繼續往上爬。

gept.example_en: Voices echo through the stairwell of the old apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 聲音在這棟舊公寓的樓梯間裡迴盪。

gept.example_en: He paused at the threshold before stepping inside the dark room.
gept.example_zh: 他在門檻前停了一下，才走進那個漆黑的房間。

gept.example_en: She stood in the doorway and waved goodbye until the car disappeared.
gept.example_zh: 她站在門口揮手道別，直到車子消失。

gept.example_en: The old floorboards squeak whenever anyone walks across the bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 只要有人走過臥室，舊地板就會發出嘎吱聲。

gept.example_en: The package was left on the doorstep by the delivery driver.
gept.example_zh: 包裹被快遞員放在門前台階上。

gept.example_en: Their broken doorbell still chimes randomly in the middle of the night.
gept.example_zh: 他們壞掉的門鈴半夜還會隨機響起。

gept.example_en: The brass doorknob was loose, so I tightened it with a screwdriver.
gept.example_zh: 黃銅門把鬆了，所以我用螺絲起子把它鎖緊。

gept.example_en: Wipe your shoes on the doormat before stepping onto the carpet.
gept.example_zh: 踩到地毯前請先在門墊上擦鞋。

gept.example_en: The squeaky hinge needs a few drops of oil to stop the noise.
gept.example_zh: 這個吱吱作響的鉸鏈需要幾滴油才能止住噪音。

gept.example_en: Our new washer uses far less water than the old one we replaced.
gept.example_zh: 我們新買的洗衣機用水量比換掉的那台少得多。

gept.example_en: The dryer takes about forty minutes to fully dry a load of towels.
gept.example_zh: 烘衣機要約四十分鐘才能把一整批毛巾烘乾。

gept.example_en: She filled the electric kettle and waited for the water to boil.
gept.example_zh: 她裝滿電熱水壺，等水煮沸。

gept.example_en: All the clean dishes go in the cupboard above the dishwasher.
gept.example_zh: 所有乾淨的碗盤都放在洗碗機上方的櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: I use the blender every morning to make a fruit and yogurt smoothie.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上用果汁機打水果優格奶昔。

gept.example_en: The pop-up toaster browns four slices of bread at the same time.
gept.example_zh: 這台彈跳式烤麵包機可同時烤四片麵包。

gept.example_en: Stack the plates carefully in the dishwasher before starting the cycle.
gept.example_zh: 啟動洗碗機之前先小心地把盤子疊好。

gept.example_en: Frozen berries last several months in the freezer without losing flavor.
gept.example_zh: 冷凍莓果在冷凍庫裡可存放好幾個月而不失風味。

gept.example_en: Turn on the range hood whenever you fry food with strong-smelling oil.
gept.example_zh: 用味道重的油炸食物時請打開抽油煙機。

gept.example_en: Our rice cooker keeps the rice warm for several hours after cooking.
gept.example_zh: 我們的電鍋能在煮好飯後讓飯保溫好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: She uses a cordless vacuum cleaner to quickly clean the living room carpet.
gept.example_zh: 她用無線吸塵器迅速清理客廳地毯。

gept.example_en: The air conditioner needs servicing because it is making strange clicking sounds.
gept.example_zh: 這台冷氣機需要保養，因為一直發出奇怪的喀喀聲。

gept.example_en: Turn off the heater before leaving the house to save electricity.
gept.example_zh: 出門前關掉暖氣機以節省電費。

gept.example_en: A reading lamp and an alarm clock sit on the wooden nightstand.
gept.example_zh: 木製床頭櫃上放著閱讀燈和鬧鐘。

gept.example_en: Folded shirts are stored in the top drawer of the bedroom dresser.
gept.example_zh: 摺好的襯衫放在臥室五斗櫃的最上層抽屜裡。

gept.example_en: Grandpa fell asleep in his favorite armchair watching the evening news.
gept.example_zh: 祖父在他最愛的扶手椅上看晚間新聞時睡著了。

gept.example_en: Magazines and a glass of water rest on the round coffee table.
gept.example_zh: 雜誌和一杯水放在圓形茶几上。

gept.example_en: Our long dining table can seat ten guests for holiday dinners.
gept.example_zh: 我們的長餐桌能在節日晚宴時容納十位客人。

gept.example_en: The twins share a bunk bed, and the older one sleeps on top.
gept.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎共用一張雙層床，年長的睡在上鋪。

gept.example_en: The baby slept peacefully in the crib next to her parents' bed.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶在父母床邊的嬰兒床裡安詳地睡著。

gept.example_en: The tall bookcase is filled with classic novels and history textbooks.
gept.example_zh: 這座高大的書櫃裝滿了古典小說和歷史教科書。

gept.example_en: Medicine should be stored in a locked cabinet away from young children.
gept.example_zh: 藥品應存放在上鎖、遠離幼童的櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: A colorful rug brightens up the otherwise plain living room floor.
gept.example_zh: 一張色彩繽紛的地毯為原本單調的客廳地板增添亮色。

gept.example_en: Heavy curtains block out the morning sunlight on weekend mornings.
gept.example_zh: 厚重的窗簾能在週末早晨擋住晨光。

gept.example_en: She adjusted the blinds to let in a little afternoon sunshine.
gept.example_zh: 她調整百葉窗，讓些許午後陽光灑進來。

gept.example_en: An elegant crystal chandelier hangs above the dining room table.
gept.example_zh: 一盞典雅的水晶吊燈懸掛在餐廳桌子上方。

gept.example_en: The ceiling fan rotates slowly, gently moving the warm summer air around.
gept.example_zh: 吊扇緩慢旋轉，輕輕推動著夏日的熱空氣。

gept.example_en: She placed a small space heater under her desk during cold winter mornings.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬日早晨，她在書桌下放了一台小電暖器。

gept.example_en: I run a humidifier at night to keep my throat from drying out.
gept.example_zh: 我晚上開加濕器，避免喉嚨變乾。

gept.example_en: Our old water heater finally broke and needs to be replaced soon.
gept.example_zh: 我們的舊熱水器終於壞了，必須很快更換。

gept.example_en: The new apartment has an electric stove instead of a gas one.
gept.example_zh: 新公寓裝的是電爐而不是瓦斯爐。

gept.example_en: Test the smoke detector once a month to make sure it works properly.
gept.example_zh: 每個月測試一次煙霧偵測器，確保功能正常。

gept.example_en: The doorbell camera recorded the delivery driver dropping off the package.
gept.example_zh: 門鈴攝影機錄下了快遞員放下包裹的畫面。

gept.example_en: Press the button on the intercom to speak with the building manager.
gept.example_zh: 按對講機上的按鈕就能跟大樓管理員通話。

gept.example_en: She borrowed a hairdryer from her sister to dry her hair faster.
gept.example_zh: 她跟姐姐借了吹風機好讓頭髮乾得快一點。

gept.example_en: She set up the ironing board to press his shirts before work.
gept.example_zh: 她架起燙衣板，準備在他上班前燙好襯衫。

gept.example_en: On sunny days she hangs laundry on the clothesline behind the house.
gept.example_zh: 晴天時她會把洗好的衣物掛在屋後的曬衣繩上。

gept.example_en: Use a wooden hanger so that your suit jacket keeps its shape.
gept.example_zh: 用木製衣架可讓你的西裝外套保持版型。

gept.example_en: Please empty the trash can in the kitchen before it overflows.
gept.example_zh: 請趁廚房垃圾桶滿出來之前先倒掉。

gept.example_en: Plastic bottles and cardboard belong in the blue recycling bin outside.
gept.example_zh: 塑膠瓶和紙板要放在外面的藍色回收桶裡。

gept.example_en: The small waste bin beside my desk is full of paper scraps.
gept.example_zh: 我桌邊的小廢紙簍裡裝滿了紙屑。

gept.example_en: Mom arranged fresh tulips in the tall ceramic vase on the table.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把新鮮鬱金香插在桌上那只高高的陶瓷花瓶裡。

gept.example_en: A wooden frame holds the wedding photo above the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 壁爐上方的木製相框裡放著結婚照。

gept.example_en: A rug pad keeps the carpet from sliding on smooth wooden floors.
gept.example_zh: 防滑墊能讓地毯在光滑的木地板上不易滑動。

gept.example_en: I labeled each storage box clearly so I can find things quickly.
gept.example_zh: 我在每個收納盒上清楚貼上標籤，方便快速找到東西。

gept.example_en: Toss your dirty clothes into the laundry basket, not on the floor.
gept.example_zh: 把髒衣服丟進洗衣籃，不要扔在地上。

gept.example_en: Wet dishes sit on the dish rack until they air-dry completely.
gept.example_zh: 濕碗盤放在瀝水架上直到完全風乾。

gept.example_en: I sweep the kitchen floor every evening before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 我每天晚上睡覺前都會掃廚房地板。

gept.example_en: I plan to declutter my closet this weekend and donate old clothes.
gept.example_zh: 這個週末我打算清理衣櫃並把舊衣服捐出去。

gept.example_en: Grandma loves to polish her silver spoons until they shine like mirrors.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶喜歡把銀湯匙擦亮到像鏡子一樣。

gept.example_en: Please mop the bathroom floor after taking a long shower.
gept.example_zh: 洗完長澡後請拖一下浴室地板。

gept.example_en: She scrubbed the bathtub until every trace of soap residue disappeared.
gept.example_zh: 她把浴缸刷到沒有任何皂垢殘留。

gept.example_en: Soak the stained shirt in cold water overnight before washing it.
gept.example_zh: 把有污漬的襯衫在冷水裡浸泡一晚再洗。

gept.example_en: Disinfect doorknobs and light switches during the cold and flu season.
gept.example_zh: 在感冒和流感季節時要對門把和電燈開關消毒。

gept.example_en: She sanitizes the kitchen counters after preparing chicken or fish.
gept.example_zh: 她在處理雞肉或魚之後會對廚房檯面進行清潔殺菌。

gept.example_en: The children promised to tidy their rooms before watching television.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們答應在看電視前先整理自己的房間。

gept.example_en: Refill the soap dispenser when it gets close to running out.
gept.example_zh: 當洗手乳快用完時就要補充。

gept.example_en: I need to restock the pantry with rice and cooking oil this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這個週末我要把儲藏室的米和食用油補齊。

gept.example_en: Dispose of old batteries at a designated collection point, not in the trash.
gept.example_zh: 舊電池要丟在指定回收點，不要丟進垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: She composts vegetable scraps to use as fertilizer in the garden.
gept.example_zh: 她把蔬菜廚餘做成堆肥，用來當花園的肥料。

gept.example_en: Scour the burnt pan with steel wool to remove the dark stains.
gept.example_zh: 用鋼絲絨用力擦洗燒焦的鍋子，去除黑色污漬。

gept.example_en: Use a plunger to declog the bathroom sink when water drains slowly.
gept.example_zh: 當浴室洗手台排水變慢時，用通樂搋疏通它。

gept.example_en: I had to unclog the kitchen drain after pasta sauce blocked it.
gept.example_zh: 義大利麵醬堵住廚房排水後，我不得不疏通它。

gept.example_en: He plunged the toilet a few times until the water flowed freely again.
gept.example_zh: 他用搋子通了幾下馬桶，直到水又能順暢流動。

gept.example_en: Open the windows to ventilate the bedroom after painting the walls.
gept.example_zh: 油漆完牆壁後打開窗戶讓臥室通風。

gept.example_en: I aired out the closet so the musty smell would disappear.
gept.example_zh: 我把衣櫃打開通風，讓霉味散掉。

gept.example_en: She combs her long hair gently to avoid damaging the ends.
gept.example_zh: 她輕輕地梳她的長髮，以免損傷髮尾。

gept.example_en: He prefers to shave in the shower because the steam softens his beard.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在淋浴時刮鬍子，因為蒸氣能軟化他的鬍鬚。

gept.example_en: She bathes her baby every other day in a small plastic tub.
gept.example_zh: 她每隔一天就用小塑膠浴盆幫寶寶洗澡。

gept.example_en: I commute about forty minutes each way by subway to my office.
gept.example_zh: 我每天搭地鐵單程通勤約四十分鐘到辦公室。

gept.example_en: She packs lunch for her children every weekday morning before school.
gept.example_zh: 她每個平日早上都會為孩子們準備午餐再送他們上學。

gept.example_en: After the long trip, I unpacked my suitcase and started laundry.
gept.example_zh: 長途旅行後，我打開行李箱開始洗衣服。

gept.example_en: She unwinds by reading a novel in bed before falling asleep.
gept.example_zh: 她睡前躺在床上讀小說放鬆心情。

gept.example_en: Grandpa often dozes in his armchair after Sunday lunch.
gept.example_zh: 祖父常在週日午餐後在扶手椅上打盹。

gept.example_en: He snores so loudly that his wife sleeps with earplugs every night.
gept.example_zh: 他打呼太大聲，他太太每晚都得戴耳塞睡覺。

gept.example_en: She yawned widely during the long afternoon meeting.
gept.example_zh: 她在漫長的下午會議中打了個大大的呵欠。

gept.example_en: I stretch for five minutes every morning to wake up my muscles.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上伸展五分鐘來喚醒肌肉。

gept.example_en: He jogs through the park every Sunday rain or shine.
gept.example_zh: 不論晴雨，他每個週日都會在公園慢跑。

gept.example_en: I usually snooze the alarm twice before finally getting out of bed.
gept.example_zh: 我通常會把鬧鐘按掉兩次才終於起床。

gept.example_en: I oversleep almost every Monday after staying up too late on Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 週日熬夜後，我幾乎每個週一都會睡過頭。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 重新充電；恢復精神
gept.example_en: Weekends are when I recharge my energy for the busy week ahead.
gept.example_zh: 週末是我為忙碌一週重新充電的時間。

gept.example_en: She often daydreams about traveling to faraway tropical islands.
gept.example_zh: 她常做白日夢，想去遙遠的熱帶島嶼旅行。

gept.example_en: She journals every evening about the small joys of her day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天晚上寫日記記錄一天中的小確幸。

gept.example_en: He meditates for ten minutes each morning to clear his mind.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早上冥想十分鐘以淨化心靈。

gept.example_en: The kids clear the table together after every family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 每次家庭晚餐後孩子們會一起收拾餐桌。

gept.example_en: The baby cries constantly during the long evenings when she is teething.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶長牙時，整個漫長的傍晚都不停地哭。

gept.example_en: The kitchen tap drips continually until somebody finally tightens the handle.
gept.example_zh: 廚房水龍頭一直滴水，直到有人把水龍頭把手鎖緊。

gept.example_en: The community organizes a clean-up day annually in early spring.
gept.example_zh: 社區每年在初春會舉辦一次清掃日。

gept.example_en: Our recycling truck visits the neighborhood biweekly on Wednesdays.
gept.example_zh: 我們的回收車每兩週三來社區一次。

gept.example_en: She is always punctual, often arriving five minutes before the meeting starts.
gept.example_zh: 她總是準時，常常在會議開始前五分鐘就到。

gept.example_en: We are temporarily living with my parents while our apartment is being renovated.
gept.example_zh: 我們的公寓在裝修期間暫時住在父母家。

gept.example_en: She cooks dinner and helps her son with homework simultaneously every evening.
gept.example_zh: 她每晚同時煮晚餐並指導兒子寫功課。

gept.example_en: The convenience store on our corner operates around the clock.
gept.example_zh: 我們街角的便利商店全天候營業。

gept.example_en: It started to drizzle as we walked home from the grocery store.
gept.example_zh: 我們從雜貨店走回家時開始下起毛毛雨。

gept.example_en: A gentle breeze blew through the open kitchen window all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 整個下午微風從敞開的廚房窗戶吹進來。

gept.example_en: Summers here are extremely humid, so we run the dehumidifier constantly.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的夏天非常潮濕，所以我們不斷開除濕機。

gept.example_en: A fierce blizzard buried the neighborhood under nearly a meter of snow.
gept.example_zh: 一場猛烈暴風雪將社區埋在近一公尺深的雪下。

gept.example_en: A sudden downpour soaked everyone who was waiting at the bus stop.
gept.example_zh: 一陣突如其來的傾盆大雨把公車站等車的人都淋濕了。

gept.example_en: Local farmers worried about their crops during the long summer drought.
gept.example_zh: 當地農民在漫長的夏季乾旱期間擔心他們的作物。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain caused a small flood in our basement last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週的大雨在我們地下室造成了小洪水。

gept.example_en: A light mist hovered over the lake in the early morning hours.
gept.example_zh: 清晨湖面上飄著一層薄霧。

gept.example_en: Marble-sized hail damaged the roofs of several cars in the parking lot.
gept.example_zh: 彈珠大小的冰雹損壞了停車場上幾輛車的車頂。

gept.example_en: A summer thunderstorm knocked out power across the entire neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 一場夏季雷雨使整個社區停電。

gept.example_en: Bright flashes of lightning lit up the sky for several seconds.
gept.example_zh: 明亮的閃電讓天空亮了好幾秒。

gept.example_en: Loud thunder woke the baby in the middle of the night.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的雷聲在半夜把寶寶吵醒了。

gept.example_en: The forecast says it will reach thirty-five degrees Celsius tomorrow afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 氣象預報說明天下午會達到攝氏三十五度。

gept.example_en: She still uses Fahrenheit because she grew up in the United States.
gept.example_zh: 她仍然使用華氏，因為她在美國長大。

gept.example_en: Early mornings in autumn are chilly enough to need a light sweater.
gept.example_zh: 秋天的清晨涼到需要穿件薄毛衣。

gept.example_en: The towels are still damp because the dryer broke yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 毛巾還是濕的，因為烘衣機昨天壞了。

gept.example_en: Autumn brings crisp mornings perfect for long walks in the park.
gept.example_zh: 秋天帶來涼爽清新的早晨，非常適合在公園散步。

gept.example_en: Winters here are mild, with temperatures rarely below freezing.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的冬天很溫和，氣溫很少低於冰點。

gept.example_en: The sky was overcast all morning but cleared up before lunch.
gept.example_zh: 整個早上天空都陰陰的，但中午前轉晴。

gept.example_en: A sudden gust of wind slammed the front door shut.
gept.example_zh: 一陣突如其來的強風把前門用力關上。

gept.example_en: An intense heatwave lasted for nearly two weeks last August.
gept.example_zh: 去年八月有一波強烈熱浪持續了近兩週。

gept.example_en: A cold front is expected to arrive on Friday and lower temperatures sharply.
gept.example_zh: 預計週五將有冷鋒到來，氣溫將大幅下降。

gept.example_en: A beautiful rainbow appeared over the neighborhood after the brief rain.
gept.example_zh: 短暫降雨後，社區上空出現了一道美麗的彩虹。

gept.example_en: Morning dew sparkled on the grass as the sun rose slowly.
gept.example_zh: 太陽緩緩升起時，晨露在草地上閃閃發光。

gept.example_en: The children jumped happily into every puddle on the way home from school.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們放學回家的路上開心地踩著每個水坑。

gept.example_en: They moved from the city to a quieter suburb after their first child.
gept.example_zh: 第一個孩子出生後，他們從市區搬到較安靜的郊區。

gept.example_en: A narrow alley behind the house leads to the community garden.
gept.example_zh: 房子後面的窄巷通往社區花園。

gept.example_en: Be careful at the intersection because cars rarely come to a complete stop.
gept.example_zh: 在這個十字路口要小心，因為車子很少完全停下來。

gept.example_en: Neighbors greet each other as they pass by on the sidewalk.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們在人行道上經過時會互相打招呼。

gept.example_en: A bird built a small nest on top of the lamppost outside.
gept.example_zh: 一隻鳥在外面路燈柱頂上築了一個小巢。

gept.example_en: Please check the mailbox in case the package was delivered today.
gept.example_zh: 請查看信箱，看包裹今天是不是送來了。

gept.example_en: Always use the crosswalk when teaching children how to cross safely.
gept.example_zh: 教孩子安全過馬路時務必使用行人穿越道。

gept.example_en: A wooden fence separates our backyard from the neighbor's garden.
gept.example_zh: 一道木製圍籬把我們的後院和鄰居的花園隔開。

gept.example_en: The garden gate squeaks loudly every time we open it.
gept.example_zh: 每次我們打開花園大門時都會發出大聲的吱嘎聲。

gept.example_en: A thick hedge along the property line gives us extra privacy.
gept.example_zh: 沿著地界的茂密樹籬給了我們額外的隱私。

gept.example_en: Park your car close to the curb so other vehicles can pass.
gept.example_zh: 把車停靠近路緣，讓其他車輛可以通過。

gept.example_en: Cracked pavement on our street needs to be repaired soon.
gept.example_zh: 我們街上裂開的路面需要儘快修補。

gept.example_en: A deep pothole on Main Street damaged the tires of several cars.
gept.example_zh: 主街上一個深坑洞損壞了好幾輛車的輪胎。

gept.example_en: The faded street sign made it difficult to find the right address.
gept.example_zh: 褪色的路牌讓我們很難找到正確的地址。

gept.example_en: Children waited patiently at the zebra crossing for the green light.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在斑馬線旁耐心地等綠燈。

gept.example_en: The bus stop is just two blocks from our front door.
gept.example_zh: 公車站離我們家大門只有兩個街區。

gept.example_en: Our apartment is conveniently located near a major subway station.
gept.example_zh: 我們的公寓位置方便，靠近一個主要地鐵站。

gept.example_en: A small fountain in the town square attracts birds and tourists.
gept.example_zh: 鎮中心廣場的小噴泉吸引了鳥兒和遊客。

gept.example_en: I went to the post office to mail a birthday card to my cousin.
gept.example_zh: 我去郵局寄了一張生日卡給我表妹。

gept.example_en: The convenience store on the corner sells everything from snacks to umbrellas.
gept.example_zh: 街角的便利商店什麼都賣，從零食到雨傘。

gept.example_en: The pharmacy stays open late, which is convenient when someone gets sick at night.
gept.example_zh: 這家藥局營業到很晚，當有人晚上生病時很方便。

gept.example_en: Our family doctor runs a small clinic two blocks from our house.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家庭醫師在離家兩個街區的地方開了一間小診所。

gept.example_en: The community center offers free yoga classes on Tuesday evenings.
gept.example_zh: 社區中心週二晚上提供免費瑜伽課程。

gept.example_en: Our neighborhood watch group meets monthly to discuss safety concerns.
gept.example_zh: 我們的社區守望相助小組每月聚會討論治安問題。

gept.example_en: This is a quiet residential area where children can play safely outside.
gept.example_zh: 這是個安靜的住宅區，孩子們可以安全地在外面玩。

gept.example_en: A commercial district with shops and restaurants is just a short walk away.
gept.example_zh: 商店和餐廳林立的商業區步行不遠就到。

gept.example_en: We sometimes take the bus downtown for dinner and a movie.
gept.example_zh: 我們有時搭公車到市中心吃飯看電影。

gept.example_en: Uptown has many quiet streets and small family-owned shops.
gept.example_zh: 上城區有很多安靜的街道和家族經營的小商店。

gept.example_en: The bakery is just one block away from our apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 麵包店就在離我們公寓大樓一個街區的地方。

gept.example_en: Maple Avenue is lined with tall trees and historic homes.
gept.example_zh: 楓樹大道兩旁種滿高大的樹木，並有許多老房子。

gept.example_en: The wide boulevard becomes a popular place for evening walks in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天時這條寬闊的林蔭大道是傍晚散步的熱門場所。

gept.example_en: Our quiet street ends in a dead end, so traffic is minimal.
gept.example_zh: 我們安靜的街道盡頭是條死路，所以幾乎沒有車。

gept.example_en: The parking lot behind the building fills up quickly on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 週末時大樓後面的停車場很快就停滿。

gept.example_en: The garbage truck comes every Tuesday morning at around six o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 垃圾車每週二早上六點左右會來。

gept.example_en: Never park your car directly in front of a fire hydrant.
gept.example_zh: 千萬不要把車直接停在消防栓前面。

gept.example_en: Soft street lamp light made our evening walk feel safe and pleasant.
gept.example_zh: 柔和的街燈光讓我們的晚間散步感覺安全又愉快。

gept.example_en: Use a Phillips screwdriver to tighten the loose hinge on the cabinet door.
gept.example_zh: 用十字螺絲起子鎖緊櫃門上鬆動的鉸鏈。

gept.example_en: He grabbed the wrench to tighten the dripping kitchen faucet quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他抓起扳手快速鎖緊滴水的廚房水龍頭。

gept.example_en: She swept the leaves off the porch with an old wooden broom.
gept.example_zh: 她用一支舊木掃帚把門廊上的葉子掃乾淨。

gept.example_en: Sweep the crumbs onto the dustpan and dump them in the trash.
gept.example_zh: 把麵包屑掃進畚箕，再倒進垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: He uses a long garden hose to water all the plants quickly.
gept.example_zh: 他用一條長長的花園水管很快地把所有植物澆完。

gept.example_en: The bolt on the garage door rusted and needed to be replaced.
gept.example_zh: 車庫門上的螺栓生鏽了，需要更換。

gept.example_en: He climbed the ladder to change the light bulb in the ceiling.
gept.example_zh: 他爬上梯子去更換天花板上的燈泡。

gept.example_en: Dad keeps his toolbox in the garage right next to the workbench.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸把工具箱放在車庫工作台旁邊。

gept.example_en: Use a tape measure to make sure the new sofa fits through the door.
gept.example_zh: 用捲尺確認新沙發能通過門口。

gept.example_en: He used a cordless drill to install the new curtain rod above the window.
gept.example_zh: 他用無線電鑽在窗戶上方安裝新的窗簾桿。

gept.example_en: I used pliers to remove the bent nail from the doorframe.
gept.example_zh: 我用鉗子從門框上拔出彎掉的釘子。

gept.example_en: Keep a flashlight near the bed in case of nighttime power outages.
gept.example_zh: 在床邊放一把手電筒以備夜間停電之用。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to overload the extension cord with too many devices.
gept.example_zh: 小心不要在延長線上插太多電器超載。

gept.example_en: Plug all your office electronics into one surge-protected power strip.
gept.example_zh: 把你所有的辦公電器都插在一個有突波保護的電源延長排插上。

gept.example_en: She filled a bucket with warm soapy water to mop the floor.
gept.example_zh: 她裝了一桶溫肥皂水準備拖地。

gept.example_en: Use a damp sponge to wipe down the kitchen counter after meals.
gept.example_zh: 用濕海綿在飯後擦拭廚房檯面。

gept.example_en: Keep an old rag handy for cleaning up unexpected spills.
gept.example_zh: 隨手放一塊舊抹布以便清理突發的潑灑。

gept.example_en: Use a strong chain to lock your bike to the rack outside.
gept.example_zh: 用堅固的鎖鏈把腳踏車鎖在外面的車架上。

gept.example_en: She secured the garden shed with a heavy padlock.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把沉重的掛鎖鎖住花園棚屋。

gept.example_en: Her colorful keychain helps her find her keys quickly in the bag.
gept.example_zh: 她色彩繽紛的鑰匙圈讓她能快速從包包裡找到鑰匙。

gept.example_en: A strong magnet holds the shopping list to the refrigerator door.
gept.example_zh: 一塊強力磁鐵把購物清單固定在冰箱門上。

gept.example_en: Use a clip to keep the bread bag tightly closed after opening.
gept.example_zh: 用夾子把開封後的麵包袋夾緊。

gept.example_en: I keep a small nailclipper in the bathroom drawer for weekly trimming.
gept.example_zh: 我在浴室抽屜放一支小指甲剪，方便每週修剪。

gept.example_en: Replace your toothbrush every three months or when the bristles become frayed.
gept.example_zh: 每三個月或刷毛變散時更換牙刷。

gept.example_en: He uses a new razor blade once a week to keep shaving comfortable.
gept.example_zh: 他每週換一次新的剃刀刀片以保持刮鬍舒適。

gept.example_en: A wooden soap dish keeps the bar of soap dry between uses.
gept.example_zh: 木製肥皂盒能讓肥皂在兩次使用之間保持乾燥。

gept.example_en: We buy toilet paper in bulk to save money on monthly expenses.
gept.example_zh: 我們大量購買衛生紙以節省每月開銷。

gept.example_en: Place a tissue box on the nightstand in case anyone wakes up sneezing.
gept.example_zh: 在床頭櫃上放一個面紙盒，以防有人半夜醒來打噴嚏。

gept.example_en: Always tie the trash bag tightly before taking it to the curb.
gept.example_zh: 在把垃圾袋拿到路邊前一定要綁緊。

gept.example_en: Every household should keep a plunger handy in case the toilet clogs.
gept.example_zh: 每個家庭都應該備有一個疏通器以防馬桶堵塞。

gept.example_en: Use a soft scrubber so you do not scratch the nonstick pan.
gept.example_zh: 用軟的菜瓜布以免刮傷不沾鍋。

gept.example_en: Stand on the step stool to reach the items on the top shelf.
gept.example_zh: 站在踏凳上才能拿到最上層架子上的東西。

gept.example_en: The lease for our apartment expires in three months, so we are house hunting.
gept.example_zh: 我們公寓的租約三個月後到期，所以正在找房子。

gept.example_en: Our landlord agreed to repaint the walls before we moved in.
gept.example_zh: 我們搬進來之前，房東答應重新粉刷牆壁。

gept.example_en: The new tenant moved in last weekend and seems very friendly.
gept.example_zh: 新房客上週末搬進來，似乎很友善。

gept.example_en: Our monthly utility bills include water, electricity, and gas.
gept.example_zh: 我們每月的公用事業費包括水、電和瓦斯。

gept.example_en: They are still paying off the mortgage on their first home.
gept.example_zh: 他們還在償還第一間房子的房貸。

gept.example_en: The landlord asked for a security deposit equal to one month's rent.
gept.example_zh: 房東要求一個月租金的保證金。

gept.example_en: She prefers a furnished apartment because she travels often for work.
gept.example_zh: 她偏好附家具的公寓，因為她常常因工作出差。

gept.example_en: An unfurnished apartment is cheaper but requires buying everything yourself.
gept.example_zh: 無家具的公寓比較便宜，但需要自己買所有東西。

gept.example_en: A studio apartment is perfect for one person who doesn't need much space.
gept.example_zh: 套房很適合不需要太大空間的單身人士。

gept.example_en: They moved into a one-bedroom apartment after their roommates moved out.
gept.example_zh: 室友搬走後，他們搬進了一間一房公寓。

gept.example_en: A two-bedroom apartment gives the couple space for a small office.
gept.example_zh: 兩房公寓讓這對夫婦多出空間做小辦公室。

gept.example_en: Their townhouse has three floors and shares walls with the neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 他們的連棟住宅有三層樓，與鄰居共用牆面。

gept.example_en: The condo building has a gym and a swimming pool for residents.
gept.example_zh: 這棟公寓大樓有健身房和游泳池供住戶使用。

gept.example_en: The apartment complex offers free Wi-Fi in all common areas.
gept.example_zh: 這個公寓建築群在所有公共區域提供免費 Wi-Fi。

gept.example_en: As a homeowner, she is responsible for all repairs and maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 身為屋主，她需要負責所有的修繕和維護。

gept.example_en: Many young people are renters because home prices keep rising.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人都是租屋者，因為房價持續上漲。

gept.example_en: My housemate cooks dinner on Mondays and I cook on Thursdays.
gept.example_zh: 我的室友週一煮晚餐，我則在週四煮。

gept.example_en: Co-tenants must each sign the lease before moving in.
gept.example_zh: 共同承租人在搬進來前都必須簽署租約。

gept.example_en: She plans to sublet her apartment while she studies abroad next year.
gept.example_zh: 她計劃明年留學期間把公寓轉租出去。

gept.example_en: The family had to relocate because of his new job in another city.
gept.example_zh: 因為他在另一個城市的新工作，這家人不得不搬遷。

gept.example_en: It usually takes a few weeks to fully settle in a new neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 通常需要幾週的時間才能完全在新社區安頓下來。

gept.example_en: We hosted a small housewarming party to celebrate our new home.
gept.example_zh: 我們舉辦了一個小型喬遷派對來慶祝新家。

gept.example_en: They plan to renovate the kitchen before the holidays arrive.
gept.example_zh: 他們打算在節日來臨前翻修廚房。

gept.example_en: We remodeled the bathroom and added a glass shower enclosure.
gept.example_zh: 我們改建了浴室並加裝了玻璃淋浴間。

gept.example_en: She repainted the living room a soft blue last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她上週末把客廳重新粉刷成柔和的藍色。

gept.example_en: She chose floral wallpaper to brighten up the small powder room.
gept.example_zh: 她選了花卉壁紙來點亮這間小客用洗手間。

gept.example_en: They installed bamboo flooring throughout the first floor of the house.
gept.example_zh: 他們在房子一樓全部鋪了竹木地板。

gept.example_en: Old plumbing in the bathroom causes the water pressure to drop suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 浴室裡老舊的水管系統會讓水壓突然下降。

gept.example_en: Faulty wiring can cause electrical fires if it is not inspected regularly.
gept.example_zh: 如果不定期檢查，故障的線路可能引發電氣火災。

gept.example_en: Home insurance protects you from unexpected expenses due to fires or theft.
gept.example_zh: 房屋保險可保護你免於因火災或竊盜產生的意外開支。

gept.example_en: Property tax is due every year in our city by the end of June.
gept.example_zh: 在我們城市，房地產稅每年六月底前必須繳清。

gept.example_en: Our homeowners association charges a monthly fee for landscaping and maintenance.
gept.example_zh: 我們的屋主協會收取每月費用用於景觀和維護。

gept.example_en: The tenant received an eviction notice after missing three months of rent.
gept.example_zh: 這位房客在連續三個月未繳房租後收到了驅逐通知。

gept.example_en: Tomato seeds usually sprout within seven to ten days after planting.
gept.example_zh: 番茄種子通常在種下後七到十天內發芽。

gept.example_en: Use organic fertilizer to help your vegetables grow strong and healthy.
gept.example_zh: 使用有機肥料能讓你的蔬菜長得茁壯健康。

gept.example_en: Move the seedlings outside once the danger of frost has passed.
gept.example_zh: 等霜害的危險過去後，再把幼苗移到外面。

gept.example_en: She grows tomatoes in a small greenhouse behind the garage all winter.
gept.example_zh: 她整個冬天都在車庫後面的小溫室裡種番茄。

gept.example_en: A row of tulips fills the flowerbed beside the front porch.
gept.example_zh: 一排鬱金香盛開在前廊旁的花圃裡。

gept.example_en: Our backyard vegetable patch produces enough tomatoes for the entire summer.
gept.example_zh: 我們後院的菜圃整個夏天都能產出足夠的番茄。

gept.example_en: Grandfather still works in his small orchard despite being eighty years old.
gept.example_zh: 祖父雖然已經八十歲了，仍在他的小果園裡幹活。

gept.example_en: Cherry trees blossom in early April in our neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區的櫻花樹在四月初開花。

gept.example_en: The flowers began to wither after several days without water.
gept.example_zh: 花朵在好幾天沒澆水後開始枯萎。

gept.example_en: Prune the fruit trees in late winter while they are still dormant.
gept.example_zh: 在冬末果樹還在休眠期時修剪它們。

gept.example_en: He trims the hedge every two weeks to keep it neat and shapely.
gept.example_zh: 他每兩週修剪一次樹籬，讓它整齊美觀。

gept.example_en: She raked the fallen leaves into a pile beside the driveway.
gept.example_zh: 她把落葉耙成一堆放在私人車道旁。

gept.example_en: He used a shovel to dig a hole for the new apple tree.
gept.example_zh: 他用鏟子挖了個洞種新蘋果樹。

gept.example_en: A spade is essential for working in the vegetable garden every spring.
gept.example_zh: 鐵鏟是每年春天在菜園裡工作不可或缺的工具。

gept.example_en: Use a small trowel to plant seedlings in the flowerbed.
gept.example_zh: 用小泥鏟把幼苗種進花圃裡。

gept.example_en: He filled the wheelbarrow with mulch for the rose bushes.
gept.example_zh: 他把獨輪手推車裝滿了給玫瑰叢用的覆蓋物。

gept.example_en: Mom uses an old metal watering can for her indoor plants.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽用一個舊金屬灑水壺澆室內植物。

gept.example_en: The sprinkler waters the lawn automatically each morning at sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 灑水器每天日出時自動為草坪澆水。

gept.example_en: Fresh herbs like basil and mint add flavor to summer salads.
gept.example_zh: 羅勒和薄荷等新鮮香草能為夏季沙拉增添風味。

gept.example_en: Grape vines cover the back wall and provide shade in summer.
gept.example_zh: 葡萄藤蔓覆蓋著後牆，在夏天提供遮蔭。

gept.example_en: Berry bushes along the fence give us fruit throughout the summer.
gept.example_zh: 沿著圍籬的莓果灌木整個夏天都為我們提供水果。

gept.example_en: Trim the shrubs into rounded shapes for a more formal garden look.
gept.example_zh: 把灌木叢修剪成圓形以呈現更正式的花園風格。

gept.example_en: A gentle wind scattered pink petals across the lawn.
gept.example_zh: 微風把粉紅色花瓣吹散在草坪上。

gept.example_en: Cut the rose stems at an angle to help them absorb water.
gept.example_zh: 以斜角剪玫瑰的莖，幫助它們吸水。

gept.example_en: The tree's roots spread far beyond what you can see above ground.
gept.example_zh: 這棵樹的根伸展得遠遠超過你在地面上看到的範圍。

gept.example_en: Our cheerful welcome mat greets every visitor who steps onto the porch.
gept.example_zh: 我們可愛的歡迎踏墊歡迎每位踏上門廊的訪客。

gept.example_en: Always check the peephole before opening the door to a stranger.
gept.example_zh: 在為陌生人開門前一定要先檢查門上的窺視孔。

gept.example_en: The chimney needs to be cleaned before winter to prevent fires.
gept.example_zh: 煙囪需要在冬天前清理以防火災。

gept.example_en: We gathered around the fireplace to enjoy hot chocolate on snowy nights.
gept.example_zh: 下雪的夜晚我們圍在壁爐旁享用熱巧克力。

gept.example_en: Comfortable attire is recommended for the long flight to Europe.
gept.example_zh: 建議穿舒適衣著搭乘長途飛往歐洲的航班。

gept.example_en: She put on a flowered apron before starting to bake cookies.
gept.example_zh: 她在開始烤餅乾前穿上了花圍裙。

gept.example_en: Soft slippers keep your feet warm on cold tile floors in winter.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的拖鞋能讓你冬天在冰冷的磁磚地上保持腳暖。

gept.example_en: She bought matching pajamas for the whole family for the holiday photo.
gept.example_zh: 她為全家買了相配的睡衣拍節日照片。

gept.example_en: He slipped on a warm robe right after stepping out of the shower.
gept.example_zh: 他剛走出淋浴間就穿上了一件溫暖的浴袍。

gept.example_en: My grandmother made a beautiful patchwork quilt for my wedding gift.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母為我做了一條漂亮的拼布棉被當作結婚禮物。

gept.example_en: Change pillowcases weekly to keep your skin and hair clean.
gept.example_zh: 每週更換枕頭套，讓皮膚和頭髮保持乾淨。

gept.example_en: Cotton bedsheets feel cool and comfortable in hot summer weather.
gept.example_zh: 純棉床單在炎熱夏天感覺涼爽舒適。

gept.example_en: A thick comforter keeps us warm during cold winter nights.
gept.example_zh: 厚實的羽絨被在寒冷的冬夜讓我們保持溫暖。

gept.example_en: She wraps herself in a thick bathrobe after a long bubble bath.
gept.example_zh: 她在泡完長時間的泡泡浴後裹著厚浴袍。

gept.example_en: Potted basil and rosemary line the sunny kitchen windowsill.
gept.example_zh: 盆栽的羅勒和迷迭香排列在陽光充足的廚房窗台上。

gept.example_en: Hold onto the railing while walking down the steep wooden stairs.
gept.example_zh: 走下陡峭的木樓梯時請扶著欄杆。

gept.example_en: Clean the dryer vent regularly to prevent lint buildup and fire risk.
gept.example_zh: 定期清理烘衣機通風口以防棉絮堆積和火災風險。

gept.example_en: Set the thermostat to twenty degrees before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前把溫控器設定到二十度。

gept.example_en: A blown fuse can cause appliances in the kitchen to stop working.
gept.example_zh: 一個燒掉的保險絲會讓廚房裡的電器無法運作。

gept.example_en: Construction debris was scattered around the renovated kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 裝修過的廚房周圍散落著建築碎片。

gept.example_en: Mold can grow in damp bathrooms with poor ventilation.
gept.example_zh: 通風不良的潮濕浴室裡可能長黴菌。

gept.example_en: The new curriculum includes more science and technology courses for high school students.
gept.example_zh: 新課程為高中生增加了更多科學與科技課程。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 教學大綱；課程綱要
gept.example_en: The professor handed out the syllabus on the first day of class.
gept.example_zh: 教授在開學第一天發放教學大綱。

gept.example_en: The graduation ceremony will be held in the main auditorium next Friday.
gept.example_zh: 畢業典禮將於下週五在主禮堂舉行。

gept.example_en: The basketball tournament will take place in the new gymnasium tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天籃球比賽將在新體育館舉行。

gept.example_en: The headmaster announced new rules about mobile phones in school.
gept.example_zh: 校長宣布了關於校園手機的新規定。

gept.example_en: The lecturer explained the theory clearly with several real-world examples.
gept.example_zh: 講師用幾個實際例子清楚地解釋了這個理論。

gept.example_en: By her sophomore year, she had already chosen her major.
gept.example_zh: 到了大二，她已經選好了主修。

gept.example_en: She is an undergraduate majoring in biology at a prestigious university.
gept.example_zh: 她是一名生物系大學生，就讀於一所名校。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 研究生；研究所的
gept.example_en: Postgraduate students must submit a research proposal in their first semester.
gept.example_zh: 研究生必須在第一學期提交研究計畫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 學者；獎學金獲得者
gept.example_en: He is a respected scholar in the field of ancient Chinese history.
gept.example_zh: 他是中國古代史領域受人尊敬的學者。

gept.example_en: As an educator, she believes every child deserves equal opportunity.
gept.example_zh: 身為教育工作者，她認為每個孩子都應有平等機會。

gept.example_en: The school counselor helps students plan their academic and career paths.
gept.example_zh: 學校輔導員幫助學生規劃學業與職涯。

gept.example_en: I find algebra difficult because of all the abstract symbols and rules.
gept.example_zh: 我覺得代數很難，因為有許多抽象的符號和規則。

gept.example_en: In geometry class we learned how to calculate the area of triangles.
gept.example_zh: 在幾何課我們學會了如何計算三角形的面積。

gept.example_en: Calculus is required for most engineering majors at our university.
gept.example_zh: 我們大學大多數工程科系都必修微積分。

gept.example_en: Young children learn basic arithmetic such as addition and subtraction.
gept.example_zh: 幼童學習基本算術，例如加法與減法。

gept.example_en: Our geology professor took us on a field trip to study rocks.
gept.example_zh: 我們的地質學教授帶我們去戶外實察岩石。

gept.example_en: Astronomy students often use telescopes to observe distant stars and planets.
gept.example_zh: 天文系學生常用望遠鏡觀察遙遠的星體與行星。

gept.example_en: Sociology examines how groups of people behave and interact within society.
gept.example_zh: 社會學探討群體如何在社會中行為與互動。

gept.example_en: Philosophy encourages students to think critically about life and meaning.
gept.example_zh: 哲學鼓勵學生批判地思考人生與意義。

gept.example_en: Linguistics studies how languages are structured, learned, and used by people.
gept.example_zh: 語言學研究語言如何被組織、學習與使用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 學科；紀律 (動詞) 訓練
gept.example_en: Self-discipline is essential for any student who wants to succeed academically.
gept.example_zh: 自律對任何想在學業上成功的學生都至關重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 選修課；選修的
gept.example_en: Photography is a popular elective among students in the design department.
gept.example_zh: 攝影是設計系學生熱門的選修課。

gept.example_en: English is a compulsory subject in our junior high school.
gept.example_zh: 英文在我們國中是必修科目。

gept.example_en: Attendance at the orientation session is mandatory for all new students.
gept.example_zh: 所有新生都必須參加新生說明會。

gept.example_en: Our weekly seminar covers recent research on language acquisition.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週的研討會討論語言習得的最新研究。

gept.example_en: The online forum allows students to discuss class topics after lectures.
gept.example_zh: 這個線上論壇讓學生在下課後討論課程主題。

gept.example_en: His reasoning was logical and easy for the audience to follow.
gept.example_zh: 他的推理合乎邏輯，聽眾很容易跟上。

gept.example_en: Each student was asked to recite a short poem in class.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生都被要求在課堂上朗誦一首短詩。

gept.example_en: Let's brainstorm some creative ideas for our science project together.
gept.example_zh: 讓我們一起為這個科學專題集思廣益。

gept.example_en: Students are expected to paraphrase sources rather than copy them directly.
gept.example_zh: 學生應改寫資料來源，而非直接抄襲。

gept.example_en: It took me a while to fully comprehend the professor's complicated theory.
gept.example_zh: 我花了一陣子才完全理解教授那複雜的理論。

gept.example_en: Reading comprehension improves with regular practice and varied materials.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀理解力會隨著規律練習與多元素材而提升。

gept.example_en: They rehearsed their group presentation several times before the final delivery.
gept.example_zh: 他們在正式發表前多次排練小組報告。

gept.example_en: I stayed up late studying for my history midterm last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚熬夜準備歷史期中考。

gept.example_en: You need to submit an official transcript when applying for graduate school.
gept.example_zh: 申請研究所時你必須提交正式成績單。

gept.example_en: She proudly hung her diploma on the wall of her new office.
gept.example_zh: 她驕傲地把畢業證書掛在新辦公室的牆上。

gept.example_en: This job requires a teaching qualification and at least three years of experience.
gept.example_zh: 這份工作需要教師資格與至少三年資歷。

gept.example_en: The teacher's evaluation of my project was very positive and encouraging.
gept.example_zh: 老師對我作品的評估非常正面且鼓勵人。

gept.example_en: Professors evaluate students based on tests, projects, and class participation.
gept.example_zh: 教授根據考試、作業與課堂參與來評估學生。

gept.example_en: We use various tools to assess each student's learning progress fairly.
gept.example_zh: 我們用各種工具公平評量每位學生的學習進度。

gept.example_en: Continuous assessment is more accurate than a single end-of-term exam.
gept.example_zh: 持續性評量比單一期末考更精確。

gept.example_en: Constructive criticism helps students improve their work and grow academically.
gept.example_zh: 建設性的批評能幫助學生改進作品並在學術上成長。

gept.example_en: We had to critique a published paper as part of our assignment.
gept.example_zh: 作業的一部分是評論一篇已發表的論文。

gept.example_en: Most freshmen live in the dormitory on campus during their first year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數大一新生第一年住校內宿舍。

gept.example_en: She won a scholarship to study abroad for one full academic year.
gept.example_zh: 她拿到獎學金可出國留學整整一學年。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 補助金 (動詞) 授予
gept.example_en: The research team received a generous grant from the government.
gept.example_zh: 這個研究團隊獲得政府一筆優渥的補助金。

gept.example_en: Tuition fees at private universities have risen dramatically over the years.
gept.example_zh: 私立大學的學費這些年大幅上漲。

gept.example_en: He spent two years writing his master's thesis on urban planning.
gept.example_zh: 他花了兩年時間撰寫關於都市計畫的碩士論文。

gept.example_en: The professor has more than thirty publications in international journals.
gept.example_zh: 這位教授在國際期刊上有三十多篇出版品。

gept.example_en: The scientist tested her hypothesis with a carefully designed experiment.
gept.example_zh: 科學家用一個精心設計的實驗檢驗了她的假設。

gept.example_en: It is important to interpret data accurately before drawing any conclusions.
gept.example_zh: 在得出結論前準確詮釋數據非常重要。

gept.example_en: Her interpretation of the poem differed from the teacher's view.
gept.example_zh: 她對這首詩的詮釋與老師的看法不同。

gept.example_en: Always include a citation when you use someone else's ideas in writing.
gept.example_zh: 寫作中引用他人想法時，務必附上引文。

gept.example_en: The student cited three different sources in her research paper.
gept.example_zh: 這位學生在研究報告中引用了三個不同來源。

gept.example_en: New students attend an orientation session to learn about campus services.
gept.example_zh: 新生參加迎新會以了解校園各項服務。

gept.example_en: Enrollment in online courses has grown rapidly over the past decade.
gept.example_zh: 線上課程的註冊人數在過去十年快速增長。

gept.example_en: I plan to enroll in a Spanish language course next semester.
gept.example_zh: 我打算下學期報名一門西班牙語課程。

gept.example_en: She received admission to three top universities this year.
gept.example_zh: 她今年收到三所頂尖大學的錄取通知。

gept.example_en: Each applicant must submit two letters of recommendation with their forms.
gept.example_zh: 每位申請人必須隨表格附上兩封推薦信。

gept.example_en: These rules are applicable to all students living on campus.
gept.example_zh: 這些規則適用於所有住校的學生。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 實習生 (動詞) 實習
gept.example_en: She works as an intern at a law firm three days a week.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在律師事務所實習三天。

gept.example_en: He started as an apprentice in the workshop at sixteen.
gept.example_zh: 他十六歲時就在工坊裡當學徒。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個別指導課；教學手冊
gept.example_en: I followed an online tutorial to learn how to edit videos.
gept.example_zh: 我跟著線上教學影片學會了如何剪輯影片。

gept.example_en: He finished all his coursework two weeks before the deadline.
gept.example_zh: 他在期限前兩週完成所有課業。

gept.example_en: Daily conversation practice is key to building fluency in any language.
gept.example_zh: 每日對話練習是建立任何語言流利度的關鍵。

gept.example_en: After living in Japan for five years, she became fluent in Japanese.
gept.example_zh: 在日本住了五年後，她的日語變得很流利。

gept.example_en: Many companies require English proficiency for international positions.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司要求國際職位具備英文能力。

gept.example_en: She is proficient in three programming languages used in industry.
gept.example_zh: 她精通三種業界常用的程式語言。

gept.example_en: Digital literacy is just as important as traditional reading skills today.
gept.example_zh: 今日數位識讀能力與傳統閱讀能力同樣重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 識字的；有讀寫能力的
gept.example_en: In her village, most adults are literate thanks to recent education programs.
gept.example_zh: 由於近期教育計畫，她村裡多數成人都識字。

gept.example_en: Bilingual students often perform better on certain cognitive tasks.
gept.example_zh: 雙語學生在某些認知任務上常表現較佳。

gept.example_en: Online encyclopedias have replaced printed ones in most modern classrooms.
gept.example_zh: 線上百科全書在多數現代教室裡已取代紙本版。

gept.example_en: My binder holds handouts from all five of my classes.
gept.example_zh: 我的活頁夾裡裝著五門課的所有講義。

gept.example_en: She used a yellow highlighter to mark important sentences in her notes.
gept.example_zh: 她用黃色螢光筆標出筆記裡的重要句子。

gept.example_en: The teacher connected her laptop to the projector to show slides.
gept.example_zh: 老師把筆電連到投影機放投影片。

gept.example_en: Check the bulletin board for updates about scholarship application deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 請查看佈告欄了解獎學金申請期限的最新資訊。

gept.example_en: The teacher gave us a handout summarizing the main points of the lecture.
gept.example_zh: 老師發給我們一份摘述演講重點的講義。

gept.example_en: The presenter spoke clearly and made eye contact with the audience.
gept.example_zh: 報告人說話清晰，並與聽眾保持眼神接觸。

gept.example_en: The oral exam tests students' speaking and listening abilities at once.
gept.example_zh: 口試同時測驗學生的說與聽能力。

gept.example_en: Her verbal skills improved greatly through participation in the debate club.
gept.example_zh: 參加辯論社讓她的口語能力大幅進步。

gept.example_en: The diagram clearly shows how blood circulates through the human body.
gept.example_zh: 這張圖表清楚顯示血液如何在人體中循環。

gept.example_en: Students filled out a questionnaire about their daily reading habits.
gept.example_zh: 學生填寫了一份關於日常閱讀習慣的問卷。

gept.example_en: Careful observation in the classroom revealed several patterns of behavior.
gept.example_zh: 在教室裡仔細觀察揭示了幾種行為模式。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 實驗的；實驗性的
gept.example_en: The experimental method gave more reliable results than the survey approach.
gept.example_zh: 實驗法比問卷法得出更可靠的結果。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 變數 (形容詞) 多變的
gept.example_en: We changed only one variable at a time during each test.
gept.example_zh: 每次測試我們只改變一個變數。

gept.example_en: The outcome of the program exceeded everyone's original expectations.
gept.example_zh: 這個計畫的成果超出所有人原本的預期。

gept.example_en: The instructor demonstrated how to safely use the chemistry equipment.
gept.example_zh: 指導員示範如何安全使用化學設備。

gept.example_en: Let me illustrate the idea with a simple real-life example.
gept.example_zh: 讓我用一個簡單的生活例子來說明這個概念。

gept.example_en: He challenged the popular notion that talent matters more than practice.
gept.example_zh: 他挑戰了「天賦比練習更重要」這個普遍觀念。

gept.example_en: Honesty is a basic principle in academic writing and research.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是學術寫作與研究的基本原則。

gept.example_en: Memorize this formula carefully because it appears in many physics problems.
gept.example_zh: 仔細記住這個公式，因為它出現在許多物理題中。

gept.example_en: Solve this equation for x and show all your steps clearly.
gept.example_zh: 求出這個方程式的 x，並清楚列出所有步驟。

gept.example_en: Repetition is one of the most effective ways to memorize vocabulary.
gept.example_zh: 重複是記憶詞彙最有效的方法之一。

gept.example_en: The teacher's corrections helped me improve my writing significantly.
gept.example_zh: 老師的修正大大幫助我改進寫作。

gept.example_en: Accuracy matters more than speed when solving complicated equations.
gept.example_zh: 解複雜方程式時，準確比速度更重要。

gept.example_en: Scientific writing requires precise language and clear definitions.
gept.example_zh: 科學寫作要求精確的語言與清晰的定義。

gept.example_en: The measurements were taken with great precision in the laboratory.
gept.example_zh: 這些測量在實驗室裡以極高精確度進行。

gept.example_en: I had a very productive study session at the library today.
gept.example_zh: 我今天在圖書館有一段非常有成效的讀書時間。

gept.example_en: My concentration drops sharply after about ninety minutes of study.
gept.example_zh: 我讀書大約九十分鐘後專注力會明顯下降。

gept.example_en: Loud noises easily distract students during reading time.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的聲音容易讓學生在閱讀時間分心。

gept.example_en: Phones can be a major distraction during long study sessions.
gept.example_zh: 手機在長時間讀書時可能是主要的分心來源。

gept.example_en: Strong motivation is the most important factor for academic success.
gept.example_zh: 強烈的動機是學業成功最重要的因素。

gept.example_en: Her favorite teacher remains a lifelong source of inspiration.
gept.example_zh: 她最喜愛的老師至今仍是她終生的靈感來源。

gept.example_en: A few words of encouragement can change a struggling student's day.
gept.example_zh: 幾句鼓勵的話能改變一位辛苦學生的一天。

gept.example_en: Our school's debate team brought home a tall silver trophy.
gept.example_zh: 我校辯論隊抱回了一座高高的銀色獎杯。

gept.example_en: She accomplished a great deal during her four years at university.
gept.example_zh: 她在大學四年完成了許多事。

gept.example_en: His biggest accomplishment was publishing a paper as an undergraduate.
gept.example_zh: 他最大的成就是大學時就發表了一篇論文。

gept.example_en: The coach instructed the team on the new defensive strategy.
gept.example_zh: 教練向隊員指導新的防守策略。

gept.example_en: With her professor's guidance, she completed a strong senior thesis.
gept.example_zh: 在教授的指導下，她完成了一篇出色的大學畢業論文。

gept.example_en: Each graduate student is paired with a faculty advisor for research.
gept.example_zh: 每位研究生都會配對一位指導教授負責研究。

gept.example_en: The faculty meets once a month to discuss curriculum changes.
gept.example_zh: 全體教職員每月開會一次討論課程變動。

gept.example_en: The research institute focuses on artificial intelligence and robotics.
gept.example_zh: 這個研究機構專注於人工智慧與機器人學。

gept.example_en: This university is among the oldest educational institutions in the country.
gept.example_zh: 這所大學是全國最古老的教育機構之一。

gept.example_en: She attends a private military academy in the southern province.
gept.example_zh: 她就讀南部一所私立軍校。

gept.example_en: His academic performance has been outstanding since elementary school.
gept.example_zh: 他從小學開始學業表現就很傑出。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 智力的 (名詞) 知識分子
gept.example_en: University should challenge students intellectually as well as socially.
gept.example_zh: 大學應在智力與社交兩方面挑戰學生。

gept.example_en: Emotional intelligence is just as important as academic intelligence.
gept.example_zh: 情緒智力與學業智力同樣重要。

gept.example_en: Schools should value creativity as much as memorization and testing.
gept.example_zh: 學校應重視創造力，如同重視背誦與測驗。

gept.example_en: Reading novels helps children develop their imagination from an early age.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀小說能幫助孩子從小發展想像力。

gept.example_en: Curiosity is the engine behind every great scientific discovery.
gept.example_zh: 好奇心是每一項偉大科學發現背後的引擎。

gept.example_en: Self-exploration is an important part of the university experience.
gept.example_zh: 自我探索是大學體驗的重要部分。

gept.example_en: The students investigated water quality in their local river.
gept.example_zh: 學生們調查了當地河流的水質。

gept.example_en: His investigation into local birdlife produced a fifty-page report.
gept.example_zh: 他對當地鳥類的調查產出了一份五十頁的報告。

gept.example_en: Please inquire at the registrar's office about scholarship deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 請向註冊組詢問獎學金的申請期限。

gept.example_en: Inquiry-based learning encourages students to ask their own questions.
gept.example_zh: 探究式學習鼓勵學生提出自己的問題。

gept.example_en: Weekly reflection journals help students process their learning experiences.
gept.example_zh: 每週反思日誌幫助學生整理學習經驗。

gept.example_en: Don't make assumptions about students based on their backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 別根據背景對學生做出假設。

gept.example_en: Let us assume that all students start at the same level.
gept.example_zh: 讓我們假設所有學生起點相同。

gept.example_en: Hearing different perspectives makes a class discussion much richer.
gept.example_zh: 聽到不同觀點能讓課堂討論更加豐富。

gept.example_en: Try to consider the issue from multiple viewpoints before deciding.
gept.example_zh: 做決定前試著從多個觀點思考這個議題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 行為 (動詞) 進行
gept.example_en: Researchers must conduct their studies according to strict ethical rules.
gept.example_zh: 研究者必須依嚴格的倫理規範進行研究。

gept.example_en: Research ethics requires honesty and protection of all participants.
gept.example_zh: 研究倫理要求誠實並保護所有參與者。

gept.example_en: Copying someone else's work is not ethical or acceptable.
gept.example_zh: 抄襲他人作品既不道德也不能接受。

gept.example_en: Persistence is often more important than raw talent in academic success.
gept.example_zh: 在學業成功上，堅持往往比天賦更重要。

gept.example_en: He is persistent in his efforts to master classical guitar.
gept.example_zh: 他堅持不懈地努力精通古典吉他。

gept.example_en: His determination to succeed inspired everyone in the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 他成功的決心激勵了教室裡的每個人。

gept.example_en: Her ambition is to become a leading marine biologist.
gept.example_zh: 她的抱負是成為頂尖的海洋生物學家。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 目標 (形容詞) 客觀的
gept.example_en: Each lesson begins with a clear learning objective on the board.
gept.example_zh: 每堂課都從黑板上一個明確的學習目標開始。

gept.example_en: Please submit your final draft through the online learning system.
gept.example_zh: 請透過線上學習系統繳交期末稿。

gept.example_en: Late submissions will lose ten percent of the total grade.
gept.example_zh: 逾期繳交會扣總成績百分之十。

gept.example_en: Completion of the project earned every student a small certificate.
gept.example_zh: 完成這個專案後，每位學生都獲得一張小證書。

gept.example_en: If you persist with daily reading, your skills will steadily improve.
gept.example_zh: 若你堅持每日閱讀，能力會穩步進步。

gept.example_en: Our school is committed to academic excellence for every student.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校致力於每位學生的卓越學業表現。

gept.example_en: The young scientist has made remarkable contributions to climate research.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕科學家對氣候研究做出了卓越貢獻。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 抽象的 (名詞) 摘要
gept.example_en: Each research paper begins with an abstract of about two hundred words.
gept.example_zh: 每篇研究論文以約兩百字的摘要開頭。

gept.example_en: Use concrete examples to make your abstract ideas easier to understand.
gept.example_zh: 用具體例子讓你的抽象想法更容易理解。

gept.example_en: She did a thorough review of all twelve chapters before the exam.
gept.example_zh: 考試前她徹底複習了所有十二章。

gept.example_en: The textbook offers a comprehensive introduction to modern Chinese history.
gept.example_zh: 這本教科書提供了現代中國史的全面介紹。

gept.example_en: Graduate courses cover topics in much greater depth than undergraduate ones.
gept.example_zh: 研究所課程比大學部更深入地探討主題。

gept.example_en: Liberal arts students receive a broad education in many disciplines.
gept.example_zh: 文理科學生在許多學科上接受廣泛的教育。

gept.example_en: Stay focused during long lectures by taking active notes.
gept.example_zh: 在長時間講座中藉由主動做筆記保持專注。

gept.example_en: It's easy to get distracted when studying near a busy window.
gept.example_zh: 在熱鬧的窗邊讀書很容易分心。

gept.example_en: Students remain more engaged when teachers use interactive activities.
gept.example_zh: 當老師使用互動活動時，學生保持較高的投入度。

gept.example_en: Class participation counts for twenty percent of your final grade.
gept.example_zh: 課堂參與占期末成績的百分之二十。

gept.example_en: Every student is expected to contribute ideas during group work.
gept.example_zh: 小組活動中，每位學生都應貢獻想法。

gept.example_en: Her contribution to the project was both creative and original.
gept.example_zh: 她對這個專題的貢獻既有創意又有原創性。

gept.example_en: Students learn faster when they cooperate with their classmates.
gept.example_zh: 學生與同學合作時學得更快。

gept.example_en: The success of the project depended on the cooperation of all members.
gept.example_zh: 專案的成功取決於所有成員的合作。

gept.example_en: Researchers often collaborate across countries on large studies.
gept.example_zh: 研究者常跨國合作進行大型研究。

gept.example_en: International collaboration has produced many important scientific discoveries.
gept.example_zh: 國際合作產生了許多重要的科學發現。

gept.example_en: Schools should create inclusive classrooms where every student feels welcome.
gept.example_zh: 學校應營造每位學生都受歡迎的包容教室。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可取得的；無障礙的
gept.example_en: All campus buildings are now accessible to students with disabilities.
gept.example_zh: 所有校園建築現在都對身障學生無障礙。

gept.example_en: The virtual classroom lets students attend lectures from anywhere in the world.
gept.example_zh: 虛擬教室讓學生能從世界各地參加講座。

gept.example_en: Remote learning was a new experience for both students and teachers.
gept.example_zh: 遠端學習對師生來說都是新體驗。

gept.example_en: Interactive whiteboards let teachers display videos and live diagrams.
gept.example_zh: 互動白板讓老師能展示影片與即時圖表。

gept.example_en: Multimedia presentations combine text, sound, image, and video together.
gept.example_zh: 多媒體簡報把文字、聲音、影像與影片結合在一起。

gept.example_en: She attended a webinar on time management skills for college students.
gept.example_zh: 她參加了一場關於大學生時間管理技巧的網路研討會。

gept.example_en: She uses flashcards to memorize new vocabulary during her train rides.
gept.example_zh: 她搭火車時用字卡背新單字。

gept.example_en: Please ask your supervisor before making any changes to the report.
gept.example_zh: 在修改報告前請先詢問你的主管。

gept.example_en: Many freelancers prefer working from home instead of an office.
gept.example_zh: 許多自由工作者偏好在家工作，而不是進辦公室。

gept.example_en: All new trainees must complete a three-week orientation program.
gept.example_zh: 所有新進受訓者都必須完成三週的培訓課程。

gept.example_en: We hired a tax specialist to review our annual filings.
gept.example_zh: 我們聘請一位稅務專員審閱年度報表。

gept.example_en: The company brought in a consultant to improve their workflow.
gept.example_zh: 公司請來一位顧問改善工作流程。

gept.example_en: Several executives attended the strategy meeting in Tokyo.
gept.example_zh: 幾位高階主管出席了在東京舉行的策略會議。

gept.example_en: The recruiter contacted me about a job opening last week.
gept.example_zh: 招聘人員上週聯絡我談一個職缺。

gept.example_en: We hired an outside contractor to fix the office wiring.
gept.example_zh: 我們聘請外部承包商來修理辦公室的線路。

gept.example_en: The receptionist greeted us with a warm smile.
gept.example_zh: 接待員用溫暖的微笑迎接我們。

gept.example_en: The janitor cleans every floor of the building each evening.
gept.example_zh: 清潔員每晚會清掃大樓的每一層樓。

gept.example_en: A technician came to repair the broken printer this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今早有位技術員來修理壞掉的印表機。

gept.example_en: The analyst presented quarterly sales data to the board.
gept.example_zh: 分析師向董事會報告了季度銷售數據。

gept.example_en: She became a successful entrepreneur before turning thirty.
gept.example_zh: 她在三十歲前成為一位成功的創業者。

gept.example_en: Several investors showed interest in our new startup idea.
gept.example_zh: 幾位投資者對我們新創公司的點子感興趣。

gept.example_en: The vendor delivered the office supplies a day early.
gept.example_zh: 廠商提早一天送來了辦公用品。

gept.example_en: Our main supplier is based in Vietnam.
gept.example_zh: 我們的主要供應商位於越南。

gept.example_en: The founder of our company started with only two computers.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司的創辦人只用兩台電腦就起家了。
