gept.example_en: A sales representative will visit your office on Monday.
gept.example_zh: 週一會有業務代表拜訪您的辦公室。

gept.example_en: The car dealer offered a generous discount this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 車商這個週末提供了優惠折扣。

gept.example_en: A real estate broker helped us find the right office.
gept.example_zh: 一位房地產仲介幫我們找到合適的辦公室。

gept.example_en: I keep my workspace tidy by filing papers every Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我每週五整理文件，讓工作空間保持整潔。

gept.example_en: We share snacks in the breakroom during lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 午餐時間我們會在員工休息室分享零食。

gept.example_en: Each workstation has two monitors and a docking station.
gept.example_zh: 每個工作站都有兩台螢幕和一個擴充座。

gept.example_en: The photocopier broke down right before the big meeting.
gept.example_zh: 影印機在大會議前正好壞掉了。

gept.example_en: Could you pass me the stapler on your desk?
gept.example_zh: 可以把你桌上的訂書機遞給我嗎？

gept.example_en: The inspector carried a clipboard while checking the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 檢查員拿著書寫板夾巡查倉庫。

gept.example_en: Don't forget your badge or you can't enter the building.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了你的識別證，否則無法進入大樓。

gept.example_en: Check the outbox to make sure the message was sent.
gept.example_zh: 請查看寄件匣以確認訊息已寄出。

gept.example_en: The office router needs to be restarted once a week.
gept.example_zh: 辦公室的路由器需要每週重新啟動一次。

gept.example_en: We need to finalize the proposal before Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須在週五下午前把提案定稿。

gept.example_en: She can multitask better than anyone I know.
gept.example_zh: 她比我認識的任何人都更會同時處理多件事。

gept.example_en: Let's prioritize the urgent tasks first this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上我們先處理優先的緊急事項。

gept.example_en: Please compile the data into one clear report.
gept.example_zh: 請把資料彙整成一份清楚的報告。

gept.example_en: Always proofread your emails before clicking send.
gept.example_zh: 在按下寄出前一定要校對你的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: Good managers know when to delegate small tasks.
gept.example_zh: 好的主管知道何時該交辦小事務。

gept.example_en: I'll coordinate with the design team about the new layout.
gept.example_zh: 新版面的事我會和設計團隊協調。

gept.example_en: Let me recap what we agreed on before we end.
gept.example_zh: 結束前讓我重述一下我們達成的共識。

gept.example_en: Please notify HR if you change your address.
gept.example_zh: 如果你變更地址，請通知人資部門。

gept.example_en: We had to reschedule the meeting due to a conflict.
gept.example_zh: 由於行程衝突，我們必須重新安排會議。

gept.example_en: We will implement the new policy starting next month.
gept.example_zh: 新政策將從下個月開始實施。

gept.example_en: She supervises a small team of designers.
gept.example_zh: 她監督一個小型的設計師團隊。

gept.example_en: She decided to resign after seven years with the company.
gept.example_zh: 她在公司任職七年後決定辭職。

gept.example_en: After repeated mistakes, the team leader was demoted.
gept.example_zh: 在屢次犯錯後，那位組長被降職了。

gept.example_en: Could you send out the agenda before the meeting tomorrow?
gept.example_zh: 你能在明天會議前把議程寄出嗎？

gept.example_en: Please read the memo about the new vacation policy.
gept.example_zh: 請閱讀關於新休假政策的備忘錄。

gept.example_en: We have a short briefing every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週一早上有一個簡短的情況說明。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 線上聚會；視訊聊天
gept.example_en: We use a video hangout when team members work remotely.
gept.example_zh: 團隊成員遠端工作時我們會用視訊聊天。

gept.example_en: Attendance at the annual review is required for all staff.
gept.example_zh: 全體員工都必須出席年度檢討會。

gept.example_en: There were twenty participants in today's training session.
gept.example_zh: 今天的培訓課程有二十位參加者。

gept.example_en: Reaching one million users was a major milestone for us.
gept.example_zh: 達到一百萬使用者對我們來說是重要的里程碑。

gept.example_en: Adding new features is outside the scope of this project.
gept.example_zh: 新增功能不在本專案的範圍內。

gept.example_en: The project timeline shows tasks from January to June.
gept.example_zh: 專案時間表顯示一月到六月的任務。

gept.example_en: We are now entering the testing phase of development.
gept.example_zh: 我們現在正進入開發的測試階段。

gept.example_en: Customer safety must be our top priority.
gept.example_zh: 顧客安全必須是我們的首要任務。

gept.example_en: Please send me a cost estimate for the new website.
gept.example_zh: 請寄給我新網站的費用估算。

gept.example_en: Read the product specification carefully before testing.
gept.example_zh: 測試前請仔細閱讀產品規格說明。

gept.example_en: Use the checklist to make sure nothing is missed.
gept.example_zh: 用這份檢查表確認沒有遺漏。

gept.example_en: Each sprint lasts two weeks in our team.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊每次衝刺持續兩週。

gept.example_en: We improved the workflow to save two hours daily.
gept.example_zh: 我們改進工作流程，每天節省了兩個小時。

gept.example_en: Follow the standard procedure when filing a complaint.
gept.example_zh: 提出投訴時請遵守標準程序。

gept.example_en: We use a simple framework to organize our weekly tasks.
gept.example_zh: 我們用簡單的框架來組織每週的任務。

gept.example_en: Use the company template for all client proposals.
gept.example_zh: 所有客戶提案請使用公司範本。

gept.example_en: Please send your CV and cover letter by email.
gept.example_zh: 請將你的履歷表和求職信以電子郵件寄來。

gept.example_en: There are several vacancies in our marketing team.
gept.example_zh: 我們行銷團隊有幾個職缺。

gept.example_en: The recruitment process can take up to six weeks.
gept.example_zh: 招聘流程可能長達六週。

gept.example_en: He contributes to his pension fund every month.
gept.example_zh: 他每個月都提撥退休金。

gept.example_en: Sales staff earn a commission on every deal closed.
gept.example_zh: 業務員每完成一筆交易都會賺取佣金。

gept.example_en: Workers get a small transportation allowance each month.
gept.example_zh: 員工每月可領取少額的交通津貼。

gept.example_en: Overtime is paid at one and a half times the regular rate.
gept.example_zh: 加班費以正常時薪的一點五倍計算。

gept.example_en: Her expertise in finance helped the company a lot.
gept.example_zh: 她在財務方面的專業知識對公司幫助很大。

gept.example_en: Her recommendation helped me get the interview.
gept.example_zh: 她的推薦幫我爭取到了面試機會。

gept.example_en: Designers usually show a portfolio during interviews.
gept.example_zh: 設計師通常會在面試時展示作品集。

gept.example_en: Networking events can lead to unexpected opportunities.
gept.example_zh: 建立人脈的活動可能帶來意想不到的機會。

gept.example_en: His specialty is solving complex software bugs.
gept.example_zh: 他的專長是解決複雜的軟體錯誤。

gept.example_en: Paying off debt is one of his goals this year.
gept.example_zh: 還清債務是他今年的目標之一。

gept.example_en: Please send the invoice to the accounting department.
gept.example_zh: 請把請款單寄到會計部門。

gept.example_en: Payroll is processed on the last working day each month.
gept.example_zh: 薪資每月於最後一個工作日處理。

gept.example_en: I deposit my paycheck into my bank every two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 我每兩週把薪水支票存進銀行。

gept.example_en: The euro is a strong currency in Europe.
gept.example_zh: 歐元在歐洲是一種強勢貨幣。

gept.example_en: Every transaction is recorded for safety.
gept.example_zh: 每一筆交易都會被記錄以確保安全。

gept.example_en: There is a daily limit on cash withdrawals.
gept.example_zh: 每日現金提款有金額上限。

gept.example_en: I asked for a refund because the shoes did not fit.
gept.example_zh: 因為鞋子不合腳，我要求退款。

gept.example_en: He repaid the loan within two years.
gept.example_zh: 他在兩年內償還了貸款。

gept.example_en: Many companies donate to local charities each year.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司每年都會捐贈給當地的慈善機構。

gept.example_en: I need to withdraw some cash from the ATM.
gept.example_zh: 我需要從自動提款機提一些現金。

gept.example_en: The teller asked for my ID before processing the withdrawal.
gept.example_zh: 銀行櫃員在處理提款前要求看我的身分證。

gept.example_en: Most people no longer carry a checkbook with them.
gept.example_zh: 現在大多數人不再隨身帶支票簿了。

gept.example_en: I prefer to use a debit card for daily shopping.
gept.example_zh: 我日常購物偏好使用金融卡。

gept.example_en: My credit card was declined at the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 我的信用卡在超市被拒絕。

gept.example_en: Please authorize the payment by entering your code.
gept.example_zh: 請輸入您的密碼以授權付款。

gept.example_en: We must verify your identity before opening the account.
gept.example_zh: 開戶前我們必須驗證您的身分。

gept.example_en: She cashed in the savings bond for an emergency.
gept.example_zh: 她因為急用兌現了那張儲蓄債券。

gept.example_en: I want to pay off my student loan next year.
gept.example_zh: 我想明年還清我的學生貸款。

gept.example_en: Try to set aside some money for emergencies.
gept.example_zh: 請試著撥出一些錢以應急。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 便宜貨；划算的買賣
gept.example_en: That second-hand sofa was a real bargain.
gept.example_zh: 那張二手沙發真的很划算。

gept.example_en: She gave me a fifty-dollar gift voucher.
gept.example_zh: 她給了我一張五十元的禮券。

gept.example_en: Use this card to earn cashback on every purchase.
gept.example_zh: 用這張卡每筆消費都能獲得現金回饋。

gept.example_en: The warranty on this phone lasts two years.
gept.example_zh: 這支手機的保固期為兩年。

gept.example_en: We offer a full refund guarantee within seven days.
gept.example_zh: 我們提供七天內全額退款保證。

gept.example_en: The store has a wide range of retail products.
gept.example_zh: 這家店有各種零售商品。

gept.example_en: Buying in wholesale is cheaper than retail.
gept.example_zh: 批發購買比零售便宜。

gept.example_en: All merchandise is sorted neatly on the shelves.
gept.example_zh: 所有商品都整齊地陳列在貨架上。

gept.example_en: Many small shops closed during the recession.
gept.example_zh: 許多小店在經濟衰退期間倒閉了。

gept.example_en: Inflation has made daily groceries more expensive.
gept.example_zh: 通貨膨脹使日常雜貨變得更貴。

gept.example_en: Coffee is one of the country's main exports.
gept.example_zh: 咖啡是該國的主要出口商品之一。

gept.example_en: We rely on imports for most electronic parts.
gept.example_zh: 我們大部分電子零件依賴進口。

gept.example_en: The service sector is growing faster than the rest.
gept.example_zh: 服務業比其他行業成長得更快。

gept.example_en: Our main competitor lowered its prices last week.
gept.example_zh: 我們的主要競爭對手上週降低了價格。

gept.example_en: Annual revenue grew by ten percent this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年年度營收成長了百分之十。

gept.example_en: The growth rate slowed down due to higher prices.
gept.example_zh: 由於物價上漲，成長率放緩。

gept.example_en: GDP measures the total output of a country.
gept.example_zh: 國內生產總值衡量一個國家的總產出。

gept.example_en: Unemployment dropped to a five-year low.
gept.example_zh: 失業率降至五年來的最低點。

gept.example_en: The factory workforce includes over a thousand people.
gept.example_zh: 這座工廠的勞動力包括一千多人。

gept.example_en: Total output exceeded our forecast for this year.
gept.example_zh: 總產出超過了我們今年的預測。

gept.example_en: Energy consumption rises every summer in the city.
gept.example_zh: 城市每年夏天的能源消耗都會上升。

gept.example_en: The exchange rate changes daily on global markets.
gept.example_zh: 全球市場上的匯率每天都會變動。

gept.example_en: The inflation rate reached three percent this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年通膨率達到百分之三。

gept.example_en: Our company moved to a hybrid work model.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司改為混合工作模式。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 自由接案的
gept.example_en: She does freelance writing in the evenings.
gept.example_zh: 她晚上做自由接案的寫作工作。

gept.example_en: The company offers daycare for young children.
gept.example_zh: 公司為年幼的孩子提供日間照護。

gept.example_en: My workload has doubled since the merger.
gept.example_zh: 合併以來我的工作量增加了一倍。

gept.example_en: Take regular breaks to avoid burnout.
gept.example_zh: 定期休息以避免過勞。

gept.example_en: Breaktime is the perfect time to stretch.
gept.example_zh: 休息時間是伸展身體的好時機。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 停工時間；空閒時間
gept.example_en: Use downtime to learn new skills online.
gept.example_zh: 利用空閒時間在線學習新技能。

gept.example_en: Our workweek runs from Monday to Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我們的工作週從週一到週五。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/副詞) 下班後的；下班時段
gept.example_en: Please send after-hours emails sparingly.
gept.example_zh: 請盡量少發送下班時段的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: The dress code at our office is business casual.
gept.example_zh: 我們辦公室的服裝規定是商務休閒。

gept.example_en: A small disagreement turned into a long discussion.
gept.example_zh: 一點小意見不合變成了長時間的討論。

gept.example_en: Strong leadership keeps a team focused on goals.
gept.example_zh: 強而有力的領導力讓團隊專注於目標。

gept.example_en: He has the authority to approve large purchases.
gept.example_zh: 他有權核准大額採購。

gept.example_en: She took the initiative to redesign the website.
gept.example_zh: 她主動重新設計了網站。

gept.example_en: His dedication to the project impressed everyone.
gept.example_zh: 他對專案的投入讓大家印象深刻。

gept.example_en: We need to negotiate the contract terms again.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要重新協商合約條款。

gept.example_en: Let's resolve this matter before going home.
gept.example_zh: 我們下班前解決這件事吧。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 戰略的；策略性的
gept.example_en: We made a strategic decision to enter the Asian market.
gept.example_zh: 我們做了進入亞洲市場的策略性決策。

gept.example_en: The new product line became profitable within six months.
gept.example_zh: 新的產品線在六個月內就開始有利潤。

gept.example_en: This job is entry-level and includes good training.
gept.example_zh: 這份工作是入門級的，包含良好的培訓。

gept.example_en: He is looking for a mid-level marketing position.
gept.example_zh: 他正在找一份中階行銷職位。

gept.example_en: The new system reduced paperwork by half.
gept.example_zh: 新系統把文書工作減少了一半。

gept.example_en: Old contracts are stored in the gray file cabinet.
gept.example_zh: 舊合約存放在灰色的檔案櫃裡。

gept.example_en: Filing the documents took most of the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 整個下午幾乎都在歸檔文件。

gept.example_en: Send a follow-up email to the client by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 週五前寄一封後續追蹤的電子郵件給客戶。

gept.example_en: Our team has a short stand-up every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊每天早上有個簡短的站立會議。

gept.example_en: Let's wrap up the meeting in five minutes.
gept.example_zh: 我們在五分鐘內結束會議吧。

gept.example_en: She stepped up when our team leader was sick.
gept.example_zh: 我們組長生病時她挺身而出。

gept.example_en: Please hand over the project files before leaving.
gept.example_zh: 離開前請移交這個專案的檔案。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to clock in when you arrive.
gept.example_zh: 上班抵達時別忘了打卡。

gept.example_en: Most workers clock out at six in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 大多數員工晚上六點下班打卡。

gept.example_en: They called off the meeting due to bad weather.
gept.example_zh: 他們因為天氣不好而取消了會議。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 人員流動率；營業額
gept.example_en: Low staff turnover means the workplace is healthy.
gept.example_zh: 員工流動率低意味著職場氛圍健康。

gept.example_en: The factory announced a small layoff last week.
gept.example_zh: 工廠上週宣布小規模裁員。

gept.example_en: You need valid identification to check in at the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 在飯店辦理入住手續需要有效的身份證明。

gept.example_en: The immigration officer stamped my passport quickly.
gept.example_zh: 移民官員迅速地在我護照上蓋了章。

gept.example_en: Fill out the customs declaration form before landing.
gept.example_zh: 降落前請填寫海關申報表。

gept.example_en: If you lose your passport, contact your country's embassy immediately.
gept.example_zh: 如果你遺失護照，請立即聯絡你國家的大使館。

gept.example_en: You need a permit to enter the national park during peak season.
gept.example_zh: 旺季進入國家公園需要許可證。

gept.example_en: Liquids in your carry-on must be under 100 milliliters.
gept.example_zh: 隨身行李中的液體必須少於 100 毫升。

gept.example_en: My suitcase was overweight, so I had to pay extra fees.
gept.example_zh: 我的手提箱超重了，所以我必須付額外費用。

gept.example_en: The plane sped down the runway and lifted into the sky.
gept.example_zh: 飛機在跑道上加速並升上天空。

gept.example_en: We had a four-hour layover in Tokyo before our connecting flight.
gept.example_zh: 我們在東京中途停留四小時等轉機。

gept.example_en: I prefer an aisle seat so I can stretch my legs.
gept.example_zh: 我比較喜歡走道座位，這樣可以伸展腿。

gept.example_en: The plane is cruising at an altitude of thirty thousand feet.
gept.example_zh: 飛機正以三萬英尺的高度巡航。

gept.example_en: First-class carriages are at the front of the train.
gept.example_zh: 頭等車廂在火車的最前面。

gept.example_en: Morning commuters fill the trains during rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 上班時間早班通勤者塞滿了火車。

gept.example_en: Pedestrians have the right of way at marked crossings.
gept.example_zh: 在標示的人行道上行人有優先通行權。

gept.example_en: Cyclists must wear helmets for safety on city roads.
gept.example_zh: 為了安全，在城市道路上騎自行車的人必須戴安全帽。

gept.example_en: Rideshare apps are popular among young travelers.
gept.example_zh: 共乘應用程式在年輕旅客間很受歡迎。

gept.example_en: A free shuttle runs between the airport and the hotel.
gept.example_zh: 機場和飯店之間有免費接駁車。

gept.example_en: The bullet train can reach speeds over three hundred kilometers per hour.
gept.example_zh: 高鐵時速可超過三百公里。

gept.example_en: The conductor checked everyone's tickets after the train left.
gept.example_zh: 火車開出後列車長檢查了大家的車票。

gept.example_en: We paid the toll before driving across the bridge.
gept.example_zh: 我們在開車過橋前付了通行費。

gept.example_en: We stopped at a roadside motel for the night.
gept.example_zh: 我們在路邊的汽車旅館停下過夜。

gept.example_en: The price includes breakfast and lodging for two nights.
gept.example_zh: 價格包含兩晚的早餐和住宿。

gept.example_en: We upgraded to a suite for our anniversary trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們的週年旅行升等到套房。

gept.example_en: Housekeeping changes the towels every morning.
gept.example_zh: 客房清潔服務每天早上更換毛巾。

gept.example_en: They rented a villa with a private swimming pool.
gept.example_zh: 他們租了一棟有私人游泳池的別墅。

gept.example_en: The campground is fully booked for the holiday weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這個假日週末露營地已被全部訂滿。

gept.example_en: The monument was built to honor the country's heroes.
gept.example_zh: 這座紀念碑是為了紀念國家的英雄而建。

gept.example_en: The clock tower is a famous landmark in this city.
gept.example_zh: 這座鐘樓是這個城市著名的地標。

gept.example_en: Pick up a brochure to learn about the tour options.
gept.example_zh: 拿一本小冊子了解旅行團選擇。

gept.example_en: The souvenir shop sells handcrafted items from the region.
gept.example_zh: 這家紀念品店販售當地手工製作的物品。

gept.example_en: The scenery along the coast was simply breathtaking.
gept.example_zh: 沿海的風景簡直令人嘆為觀止。

gept.example_en: Pilgrims travel long distances to visit the holy shrine.
gept.example_zh: 朝聖者長途跋涉到神聖的聖殿參拜。

gept.example_en: The cathedral's stained glass windows are over five hundred years old.
gept.example_zh: 這座大教堂的彩繪玻璃窗已有五百多年歷史。

gept.example_en: Archaeologists discovered ancient ruins beneath the modern city.
gept.example_zh: 考古學家在現代城市底下發現古代遺跡。

gept.example_en: I bought a guidebook to plan my trip to Italy.
gept.example_zh: 我買了一本旅遊指南來規劃義大利之旅。

gept.example_en: Backpackers from around the world meet at this hostel.
gept.example_zh: 來自世界各地的背包客在這家青年旅館相遇。

gept.example_en: Construction forced us to take a long detour home.
gept.example_zh: 施工讓我們回家時得繞遠路。

gept.example_en: Modern cars come with built-in navigation systems.
gept.example_zh: 現代汽車內建導航系統。

gept.example_en: Mark your destination point on the digital map.
gept.example_zh: 在電子地圖上標記你的目的地點。

gept.example_en: The signpost pointed to three different villages.
gept.example_zh: 這個路標指向三個不同的村莊。

gept.example_en: Turn right at the crossroads to reach the lake.
gept.example_zh: 在十字路口右轉就能到湖邊。

gept.example_en: Physical therapy helped him walk again after the accident.
gept.example_zh: 物理治療幫助他在意外後再次行走。

gept.example_en: Early treatment is key for many serious conditions.
gept.example_zh: 早期治療對許多嚴重疾病是關鍵。

gept.example_en: Take this medication twice a day with food.
gept.example_zh: 與食物一起每日兩次服用此藥物。

gept.example_en: Antibiotics only work against bacterial infections.
gept.example_zh: 抗生素只對細菌感染有效。

gept.example_en: The new vaccine has shown promising results in trials.
gept.example_zh: 新疫苗在試驗中顯示有希望的成果。

gept.example_en: Schedule a yearly checkup with your doctor.
gept.example_zh: 每年安排一次健康檢查。

gept.example_en: The doctor explained the diagnosis carefully.
gept.example_zh: 醫生仔細解釋了診斷結果。

gept.example_en: An X-ray confirmed there was no broken bone.
gept.example_zh: X 光確認沒有骨折。

gept.example_en: The CT scan showed everything was normal.
gept.example_zh: 電腦斷層掃描顯示一切正常。

gept.example_en: A biopsy is needed to confirm the diagnosis.
gept.example_zh: 需要做切片檢查以確認診斷。

gept.example_en: Anesthesia made the surgery painless.
gept.example_zh: 麻醉讓手術沒有疼痛。

gept.example_en: The nurse wrapped a bandage around his wounded arm.
gept.example_zh: 護士在他受傷的手臂上纏繃帶。

gept.example_en: Take a painkiller if the pain becomes unbearable.
gept.example_zh: 如果疼痛難以忍受就吃止痛藥。

gept.example_en: Apply this ointment three times daily.
gept.example_zh: 每日塗抹此藥膏三次。

gept.example_en: Take one pill before bedtime.
gept.example_zh: 睡前服用一顆藥丸。

gept.example_en: He used crutches for six weeks after the injury.
gept.example_zh: 受傷後他用了六週的拐杖。

gept.example_en: The paramedics carried him on a stretcher.
gept.example_zh: 醫護人員用擔架抬他。

gept.example_en: Mindfulness meditation reduces stress and anxiety.
gept.example_zh: 正念冥想能減輕壓力和焦慮。

gept.example_en: Daily meditation improves focus and reduces stress.
gept.example_zh: 每天冥想能提高專注力並減輕壓力。

gept.example_en: Yoga improves flexibility and inner peace.
gept.example_zh: 瑜伽提升柔軟度和內心的平靜。

gept.example_en: Stretching before exercise prevents muscle injury.
gept.example_zh: 運動前伸展可預防肌肉受傷。

gept.example_en: Adults need seven to nine hours of sleep nightly.
gept.example_zh: 成人每晚需要七到九小時的睡眠。

gept.example_en: Deep breathing exercises can calm the nervous system.
gept.example_zh: 深呼吸運動能讓神經系統平靜。

gept.example_en: Mental health is just as important as physical health.
gept.example_zh: 心理健康和身體健康一樣重要。

gept.example_en: Stretching daily increases flexibility over time.
gept.example_zh: 每日伸展可隨時間增加柔軟度。

gept.example_en: Marathon runners build endurance over months of training.
gept.example_zh: 馬拉松跑者透過數月訓練建立耐力。

gept.example_en: The presidential election will take place next November across the entire country.
gept.example_zh: 總統選舉將於明年十一月在全國各地舉行。

gept.example_en: Many people believe democracy gives ordinary citizens a real voice in government.
gept.example_zh: 許多人相信民主讓普通公民在政府中擁有真正的發言權。

gept.example_en: Young adults should vote in every election to influence the laws that affect them.
gept.example_zh: 年輕人應該在每次選舉中投票，以影響影響他們的法律。

gept.example_en: His campaign focused on improving public transportation and reducing traffic in the city.
gept.example_zh: 他的競選活動著重於改善公共交通並減少城市的交通擁堵。

gept.example_en: The government announced new measures to help small businesses survive the economic crisis.
gept.example_zh: 政府宣布新措施幫助小企業度過經濟危機。

gept.example_en: The health minister visited the hospital to discuss the shortage of medical staff.
gept.example_zh: 衛生部長造訪醫院討論醫護人員短缺的問題。

gept.example_en: Voters dropped their ballot into the box after marking their preferred candidate.
gept.example_zh: 選民在標記他們偏好的候選人後將選票投入箱中。

gept.example_en: The opposition criticized the government's handling of the unemployment problem.
gept.example_zh: 反對黨批評政府處理失業問題的方式。

gept.example_en: Policy makers must consider both economic growth and environmental protection equally.
gept.example_zh: 政策制定者必須同等地考量經濟成長與環境保護。

gept.example_en: The nation celebrated its independence with parades, fireworks, and public concerts.
gept.example_zh: 全國以遊行、煙火和公開音樂會慶祝獨立。

gept.example_en: The constitution guarantees freedom of speech and religion to all citizens.
gept.example_zh: 憲法保障所有公民的言論和宗教自由。

gept.example_en: The case will be heard in court next month before a panel of judges.
gept.example_zh: 此案將於下個月在法院由一組法官審理。

gept.example_en: The jury consists of twelve ordinary citizens selected at random.
gept.example_zh: 陪審團由十二位隨機選出的普通公民組成。

gept.example_en: The trial lasted six weeks and attracted huge media attention nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 審判持續六週，吸引了全國巨大的媒體關注。

gept.example_en: The suspect was arrested at the airport while trying to leave the country.
gept.example_zh: 嫌疑犯在試圖離開該國時於機場被逮捕。

gept.example_en: She insisted she was innocent and demanded to speak with a lawyer immediately.
gept.example_zh: 她堅持自己是無辜的，並要求立即與律師交談。

gept.example_en: The crime rate in this neighborhood has dropped significantly over the past decade.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區的犯罪率在過去十年中大幅下降。

gept.example_en: Many people argue that the punishment should match the seriousness of the crime.
gept.example_zh: 許多人認為懲罰應該與犯罪的嚴重性相符。

gept.example_en: The prison reform program helps inmates learn skills before their release.
gept.example_zh: 監獄改革計劃幫助犯人在釋放前學習技能。

gept.example_en: Her lawyer filed an appeal against the harsh prison sentence last Friday.
gept.example_zh: 她的律師上週五對嚴厲的監禁判決提出上訴。

gept.example_en: Workers have the right to fair pay and safe working conditions by law.
gept.example_zh: 勞工依法擁有公平薪資與安全工作環境的權利。

gept.example_en: A new law banning smoking in restaurants takes effect next month.
gept.example_zh: 禁止在餐廳吸煙的新法律下個月生效。

gept.example_en: Downloading copyrighted music without permission is illegal in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 未經授權下載受版權保護的音樂在許多國家是非法的。

gept.example_en: Many charities work hard to reduce poverty in developing countries around the world.
gept.example_zh: 許多慈善機構努力減少世界各地發展中國家的貧困。

gept.example_en: Income inequality between the rich and poor continues to grow in many nations.
gept.example_zh: 貧富之間的收入不平等在許多國家持續擴大。

gept.example_en: The shelter provides food and beds for homeless people during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 這個收容所在冬季為無家可歸的人提供食物和床位。

gept.example_en: The welfare system supports families who lose their jobs unexpectedly.
gept.example_zh: 福利制度支持那些意外失業的家庭。

gept.example_en: The city's population has doubled in the past twenty years due to migration.
gept.example_zh: 由於移民，這座城市的人口在過去二十年中翻了一倍。

gept.example_en: Homelessness has become a serious problem in many large cities recently.
gept.example_zh: 無家可歸最近在許多大城市成為嚴重問題。

gept.example_en: Residents signed a petition asking the city to build a new park.
gept.example_zh: 居民簽署請願書要求市政府建造一座新公園。

gept.example_en: Wetlands provide critical habitats for migratory birds during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 濕地在冬季為候鳥提供關鍵棲息地。

gept.example_en: The coral reef supports an incredible variety of colorful fish and sea creatures.
gept.example_zh: 珊瑚礁支持著各式各樣令人難以置信的彩色魚類和海洋生物。

gept.example_en: Dolphins are highly intelligent animals that communicate using a variety of sounds.
gept.example_zh: 海豚是高度智慧的動物，使用各種聲音進行交流。

gept.example_en: A small sparrow built its nest in the corner of our balcony.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小麻雀在我們陽台的角落築了巢。

gept.example_en: The garden was full of colorful butterflies fluttering between the flowers.
gept.example_zh: 花園裡到處都是色彩繽紛的蝴蝶在花間飛舞。

gept.example_en: Blue whales are the largest animals that have ever lived on Earth.
gept.example_zh: 藍鯨是地球上有史以來最大的動物。

gept.example_en: We heard frogs croaking loudly near the pond after the heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 大雨過後我們聽到池塘附近青蛙大聲鳴叫。

gept.example_en: Sea turtles travel thousands of miles to lay their eggs on familiar beaches.
gept.example_zh: 海龜跋涉數千英里到熟悉的海灘產卵。

gept.example_en: A squirrel was busy collecting nuts to store for the long winter ahead.
gept.example_zh: 一隻松鼠忙著收集堅果，儲存以度過漫長的冬天。

gept.example_en: The owl is a nocturnal bird that hunts small animals at night.
gept.example_zh: 貓頭鷹是夜行鳥類，夜晚捕獵小動物。

gept.example_en: Bees play a vital role in pollinating crops that humans depend on.
gept.example_zh: 蜜蜂在為人類賴以維生的作物授粉方面扮演著重要角色。

gept.example_en: A line of ants marched across the kitchen floor toward a small piece of bread.
gept.example_zh: 一列螞蟻在廚房地板上向一小塊麵包行進。

gept.example_en: Kangaroos use their powerful back legs to jump long distances quickly.
gept.example_zh: 袋鼠用強壯的後腿快速地跳很遠的距離。

gept.example_en: Penguins cannot fly but they are excellent swimmers in icy ocean waters.
gept.example_zh: 企鵝不會飛，但牠們是冰冷海水中的優秀游泳者。

gept.example_en: Scientists discover new species of insects in the rainforest every year.
gept.example_zh: 科學家每年在雨林中發現新的昆蟲物種。

gept.example_en: A massive oak tree provides shade for the entire backyard during summer.
gept.example_zh: 一棵巨大的橡樹在夏天為整個後院提供蔭涼。

gept.example_en: A graceful willow leaned over the edge of the pond, its branches touching the water.
gept.example_zh: 一棵優雅的柳樹斜倚在池塘邊，枝條垂入水中。

gept.example_en: The hurricane caused widespread damage along the coast last September.
gept.example_zh: 去年九月颶風在沿海地區造成了大面積破壞。

gept.example_en: A powerful typhoon forced schools and offices to close for two days.
gept.example_zh: 強烈颱風迫使學校和辦公室關閉兩天。

gept.example_en: The tornado destroyed several houses but fortunately no one was seriously injured.
gept.example_zh: 龍捲風摧毀了幾棟房屋，幸好沒有人嚴重受傷。

gept.example_en: Car emissions are a major cause of air pollution in big cities.
gept.example_zh: 汽車排放是大城市空氣污染的主要原因。

gept.example_en: Solar and wind power are important sources of renewable energy.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能和風能是可再生能源的重要來源。

gept.example_en: We must develop sustainable farming methods to feed future generations.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須發展永續的耕種方法以餵養後代。

gept.example_en: Air pollution causes serious health problems for people living in big cities.
gept.example_zh: 空氣污染給住在大城市的人們帶來嚴重的健康問題。

gept.example_en: Water contamination from the factory affected the drinking supply of three villages.
gept.example_zh: 來自工廠的水污染影響了三個村莊的飲用水供應。

gept.example_en: Wind power is becoming an increasingly important source of clean electricity.
gept.example_zh: 風力發電正成為越來越重要的清潔電力來源。

gept.example_en: We chose eco-friendly cleaning products for our home and office.
gept.example_zh: 我們為家和辦公室選擇了環保的清潔用品。

gept.example_en: This plug-in allows you to block annoying advertisements while browsing the web.
gept.example_zh: 這個外掛程式允許你在瀏覽網頁時封鎖惱人的廣告。

gept.example_en: The cafe offers free wifi for customers who buy coffee or drinks.
gept.example_zh: 這家咖啡館為購買咖啡或飲料的顧客提供免費無線網路。

gept.example_en: It takes several minutes to download large video files over slow connections.
gept.example_zh: 在慢速連線下載大型視頻檔案需要幾分鐘。

gept.example_en: Computer hardware has become much cheaper and more powerful over the years.
gept.example_zh: 電腦硬體多年來變得便宜得多，性能也強大得多。

gept.example_en: This small device can monitor your heart rate throughout the day.
gept.example_zh: 這個小裝置可以全天監測你的心率。

gept.example_en: You need to install the new program before you can use the printer.
gept.example_zh: 你需要先安裝新程式才能使用印表機。

gept.example_en: His funny retweet of the cat video went viral within just one day.
gept.example_zh: 他轉推那段貓咪影片在一天內就爆紅。

gept.example_en: She gained thousands of new followers after appearing on a popular TV show.
gept.example_zh: 她在出現在熱門電視節目後獲得了數千名新追隨者。

gept.example_en: Use this hashtag so others can easily find your photos about the trip.
gept.example_zh: 使用這個主題標籤，這樣其他人可以輕鬆找到你關於旅行的照片。

gept.example_en: The influencer promoted the new brand to her million online followers.
gept.example_zh: 這位網紅向她的一百萬線上粉絲推廣了新品牌。

gept.example_en: His travel vlog has become very popular among young viewers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 他的旅行影音部落格在全球年輕觀眾中變得非常受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Her dance video went viral and was viewed millions of times worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她的舞蹈影片爆紅，在全球被觀看了數百萬次。

gept.example_en: Make sure your profile picture looks professional for job-related social media.
gept.example_zh: 確保你的個人檔案照片在求職相關的社群媒體上看起來專業。

gept.example_en: Click the button below to subscribe to our weekly newsletter for free.
gept.example_zh: 點擊下方按鈕免費訂閱我們的每週電子報。

gept.example_en: Her photo received over a thousand likes in just one hour.
gept.example_zh: 她的照片在短短一小時內收到超過一千個讚。

gept.example_en: Hackers stole personal information from millions of users last month.
gept.example_zh: 駭客上個月從數百萬用戶那裡竊取了個人資訊。

gept.example_en: The company's firewall blocks unauthorized access to their internal network.
gept.example_zh: 公司的防火牆阻止未經授權訪問其內部網路。

gept.example_en: Two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of security to your account.
gept.example_zh: 雙重認證為你的帳戶增加額外的安全層。

gept.example_en: Enter your username and password to login to the system.
gept.example_zh: 輸入你的使用者名稱和密碼以登入系統。

gept.example_en: Remember to logout from public computers after using them.
gept.example_zh: 記得在使用後從公共電腦登出。

gept.example_en: The photographer used a drone to capture stunning aerial views of the coastline.
gept.example_zh: 攝影師使用無人機拍攝令人驚嘆的海岸線空拍景觀。

gept.example_en: Robotics is changing manufacturing by making production faster and more accurate.
gept.example_zh: 機器人技術通過使生產更快、更準確而改變了製造業。

gept.example_en: The website uses a special algorithm to recommend products you might like.
gept.example_zh: 該網站使用特殊演算法來推薦你可能喜歡的產品。

gept.example_en: Constant innovation is essential for technology companies to stay competitive.
gept.example_zh: 持續創新對科技公司保持競爭力至關重要。

gept.example_en: The engineers built a prototype of the new electric car for testing.
gept.example_zh: 工程師為新電動車製作了原型進行測試。

gept.example_en: The smartphone is one of the most influential inventions of recent decades.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機是近幾十年來最有影響力的發明之一。

gept.example_en: A 3D printer can create complex shapes that traditional methods cannot produce.
gept.example_zh: 3D 印表機可以製作傳統方法無法生產的複雜形狀。

gept.example_en: He trained for six months to complete his first marathon successfully.
gept.example_zh: 他訓練了六個月才成功完成他的第一場馬拉松。

gept.example_en: We played beach volleyball with friends during our summer holiday last year.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年暑假和朋友一起在沙灘上打排球。

gept.example_en: She has tennis lessons twice a week at the local sports club.
gept.example_zh: 她每週在當地體育俱樂部上兩次網球課。

gept.example_en: Baseball games can sometimes last several hours, especially when scores are close.
gept.example_zh: 棒球比賽有時可以持續幾個小時，尤其是當比分接近時。

gept.example_en: Ice hockey is extremely popular in Canada and the northern United States.
gept.example_zh: 冰上曲棍球在加拿大和美國北部極為流行。

gept.example_en: Cycling around the lake on Sunday mornings is my favorite weekend activity.
gept.example_zh: 週日早晨繞湖騎自行車是我最喜歡的週末活動。

gept.example_en: We went skiing in the mountains during the winter break this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年寒假我們去山上滑雪。

gept.example_en: Surfing is popular along the warm beaches of Hawaii and California.
gept.example_zh: 衝浪在夏威夷和加州溫暖的海灘上很流行。

gept.example_en: Boxing requires both physical strength and mental discipline to succeed at high levels.
gept.example_zh: 拳擊需要身體力量和精神紀律才能在高水平上取得成功。

gept.example_en: Wrestling has been part of the Olympic Games since ancient Greek times.
gept.example_zh: 摔角自古希臘時代起就是奧運會的一部分。

gept.example_en: The university rowing team trains on the river at five every morning.
gept.example_zh: 大學划船隊每天早上五點在河上訓練。

gept.example_en: Ice skating in the park is a wonderful winter activity for families.
gept.example_zh: 在公園裡溜冰是家庭極佳的冬季活動。

gept.example_en: He bought a new tennis racket before the tournament next month.
gept.example_zh: 他在下個月比賽前買了一支新網球拍。

gept.example_en: Always wear a helmet when riding a bicycle to protect your head.
gept.example_zh: 騎自行車時始終戴頭盔以保護頭部。

gept.example_en: I need new sneakers because my old ones are completely worn out.
gept.example_zh: 我需要新運動鞋，因為我的舊鞋已經完全磨壞了。

gept.example_en: The football pitch was muddy after three days of heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 經過三天大雨後足球場變得泥濘不堪。

gept.example_en: She received a new pair of ice skates for her birthday this year.
gept.example_zh: 她今年生日收到一雙新冰鞋。

gept.example_en: His skis were carefully packed in the trunk for the trip to the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 他的滑雪板被仔細地放在後車廂裡準備上山旅行。

gept.example_en: Make sure you have all the camping gear before leaving for the trip.
gept.example_zh: 出發旅行前確保你有所有露營裝備。

gept.example_en: The referee blew the whistle to signal the end of the first half.
gept.example_zh: 裁判吹哨示意上半場結束。

gept.example_en: The rookie surprised everyone by scoring the winning goal in his first game.
gept.example_zh: 這名新人在他的首場比賽中進球致勝，讓所有人都很驚訝。

gept.example_en: The coach gathered the team for a motivational speech before the match.
gept.example_zh: 教練在比賽前召集球隊發表激勵性演說。

gept.example_en: The referee made several controversial calls during yesterday's important match.
gept.example_zh: 裁判在昨天的重要比賽中做出了幾個有爭議的判決。

gept.example_en: She is a talented young athlete who has won many regional competitions.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位才華洋溢的年輕運動員，贏得了許多區域性比賽。

gept.example_en: The captain led his team to victory through inspiring leadership and skill.
gept.example_zh: 隊長透過鼓舞人心的領導力和技巧帶領球隊取得勝利。

gept.example_en: Our team's next opponent is the current league champion from last season.
gept.example_zh: 我們球隊的下一個對手是上賽季的現任聯賽冠軍。

gept.example_en: The champion successfully defended her title for the third year in a row.
gept.example_zh: 冠軍連續第三年成功衛冕。

gept.example_en: The runner-up received a silver medal and prize money for second place.
gept.example_zh: 亞軍獲得銀牌和第二名獎金。

gept.example_en: The national squad has been training together for the upcoming tournament.
gept.example_zh: 國家隊一直在為即將到來的比賽一起訓練。

gept.example_en: Their team finished third in the league standings this season.
gept.example_zh: 他們的球隊本賽季在聯盟排名中名列第三。

gept.example_en: The defender bravely tackled the striker before he could shoot.
gept.example_zh: 防守球員在前鋒射門前勇敢地將他阻截下來。

gept.example_en: The player paused for a moment before deciding to shoot at the goal.
gept.example_zh: 球員停頓片刻後決定射門。

gept.example_en: Always warm up properly before doing any heavy exercise to avoid injury.
gept.example_zh: 在做任何劇烈運動前務必好好暖身以避免受傷。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of swimmers came to compete in the international championship last month.
gept.example_zh: 上個月數百名游泳選手前來參加國際錦標賽。

gept.example_en: Our team finally defeated the defending champions after several close matches.
gept.example_zh: 經過幾場激烈比賽後，我們的球隊終於擊敗了衛冕冠軍。

gept.example_en: The melody of that old song still gets stuck in my head for days.
gept.example_zh: 那首老歌的旋律仍然在我腦海裡縈繞好幾天。

gept.example_en: The lyrics of this song tell a touching story about lost love.
gept.example_zh: 這首歌的歌詞講述了一個關於失去愛情的感人故事。

gept.example_en: Everyone in the crowd sang along loudly during the chorus of the song.
gept.example_zh: 人群中的每個人在歌曲副歌部分大聲跟著唱。

gept.example_en: The movie soundtrack became almost as famous as the film itself.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影的配樂變得幾乎和電影本身一樣有名。

gept.example_en: She has played several musical instruments since she was a small child.
gept.example_zh: 她從小就會演奏好幾種樂器。

gept.example_en: The orchestra performed Beethoven's ninth symphony to a packed concert hall.
gept.example_zh: 管弦樂團為座無虛席的音樂廳演奏貝多芬第九交響曲。

gept.example_en: Her new album reached the top of the charts within just one week.
gept.example_zh: 她的新專輯在一週內就登上排行榜首位。

gept.example_en: The band released their latest single online before the full album came out.
gept.example_zh: 樂團在完整專輯發行前先在網上發布最新單曲。

gept.example_en: The violin produces a beautiful sound in the hands of a skilled musician.
gept.example_zh: 在熟練音樂家手中，小提琴能發出美麗的聲音。

gept.example_en: Rock music is just one of many popular musical genres these days.
gept.example_zh: 搖滾樂只是當今眾多流行音樂類型之一。

gept.example_en: Mozart is considered one of the greatest composers in classical music history.
gept.example_zh: 莫札特被認為是古典音樂史上最偉大的作曲家之一。

gept.example_en: The lively rhythm of the music made everyone want to dance.
gept.example_zh: 音樂的活潑節奏讓每個人都想跳舞。

gept.example_en: The marble sculpture in the museum took the artist three years to complete.
gept.example_zh: 博物館裡那座大理石雕塑藝術家花了三年才完成。

gept.example_en: She painted a beautiful portrait of her grandmother for her birthday gift.
gept.example_zh: 她畫了一幅祖母美麗的肖像作為生日禮物。

gept.example_en: The artist stretched a fresh canvas across the wooden frame before starting.
gept.example_zh: 藝術家在開始前在木框上繃了一塊新畫布。

gept.example_en: The famous painter held an exhibition of his recent works downtown.
gept.example_zh: 這位著名畫家在市中心舉辦了他近期作品的展覽。

gept.example_en: The art exhibition will be open to the public for three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 這個藝術展覽將對公眾開放三週。

gept.example_en: Wildlife photography requires patience and a great deal of technical skill.
gept.example_zh: 野生動物攝影需要耐心和大量的技術能力。

gept.example_en: He likes to sketch quick drawings of people he sees in the park.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡為他在公園裡看到的人快速畫素描。

gept.example_en: A bronze statue of the city's founder stands in the central square.
gept.example_zh: 城市創立者的銅像矗立在中央廣場上。

gept.example_en: The drama students performed a Shakespeare play at the school theater.
gept.example_zh: 戲劇學生在學校劇院演出了一齣莎士比亞的戲劇。

gept.example_en: She has practiced ballet since she was just four years old.
gept.example_zh: 她從四歲起就開始練芭蕾。

gept.example_en: The opera tells a tragic love story set in nineteenth-century France.
gept.example_zh: 這部歌劇講述了一個發生在十九世紀法國的悲劇愛情故事。

gept.example_en: The local theater puts on three different plays each season.
gept.example_zh: 當地劇院每季上演三部不同的戲劇。

gept.example_en: Each performer received warm applause for their unique talent.
gept.example_zh: 每位表演者都因其獨特的才華獲得熱烈掌聲。

gept.example_en: Many famous musicals from Broadway have been performed worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 許多來自百老匯的著名音樂劇已在世界各地演出。

gept.example_en: The circus comes to our town for two weeks every summer.
gept.example_zh: 馬戲團每年夏天來我們鎮上兩週。

gept.example_en: The magic show amazed both children and adults with impossible tricks.
gept.example_zh: 這場魔術表演用不可能的把戲讓兒童和成人都驚嘆不已。

gept.example_en: The plot of the movie was so confusing that nobody understood the ending.
gept.example_zh: 電影的情節太混亂，沒人理解結局。

gept.example_en: I watched three episodes of the new series in a row last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚一口氣看了新影集的三集。

gept.example_en: The popular series has been renewed for another two seasons by the network.
gept.example_zh: 這部熱門影集已被電視網續訂兩季。

gept.example_en: The final scene of the movie was filmed on a beach in Hawaii.
gept.example_zh: 電影的最後一幕在夏威夷的海灘上拍攝。

gept.example_en: The script was rewritten several times before the director was happy with it.
gept.example_zh: 劇本被改寫了好幾次，導演才滿意。

gept.example_en: The movie premiere was attended by hundreds of celebrities and journalists.
gept.example_zh: 電影首映禮有數百名名人和記者出席。

gept.example_en: The trailer made the movie look more exciting than it actually was.
gept.example_zh: 預告片讓這部電影看起來比實際上更刺激。

gept.example_en: The cast of the new film includes several award-winning actors.
gept.example_zh: 新電影的演員陣容包括幾位獲獎演員。

gept.example_en: Every great story needs a memorable villain to challenge the hero.
gept.example_zh: 每個偉大的故事都需要一個令人難忘的反派來挑戰主角。

gept.example_en: The documentary explores the lives of fishermen in a small coastal village.
gept.example_zh: 這部紀錄片探索了一個小沿海村莊漁民的生活。

gept.example_en: Modern animation uses computers to create amazingly realistic images.
gept.example_zh: 現代動畫使用電腦製作令人驚嘆的逼真圖像。

gept.example_en: I watch foreign films with English subtitles to understand the dialogue.
gept.example_zh: 我看外國電影時加英文字幕以理解對話。

gept.example_en: The show's ratings dropped sharply in its third season.
gept.example_zh: 這個節目在第三季的收視率急劇下降。

gept.example_en: The summer blockbuster earned millions in its first weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這部夏季大片在首映週末就賺進數百萬美元。

gept.example_en: She enjoys sewing her own clothes in her free time during weekends.
gept.example_zh: 她週末閒暇時喜歡自己縫衣服。

gept.example_en: Baking bread at home has become more popular during recent years.
gept.example_zh: 近年來在家烘焙麵包變得更受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Crafting helps children develop creativity and improve hand-eye coordination.
gept.example_zh: 手工藝幫助孩子發展創造力並改善手眼協調。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to scratch the surface of the wooden table.
gept.example_zh: 小心不要刮到木桌的表面。

gept.example_en: She stitched the torn pocket back together using strong thread.
gept.example_zh: 她用結實的線把破口袋縫好。

gept.example_en: Hiking through the forest is one of my favorite weekend activities.
gept.example_zh: 在森林中健行是我最喜歡的週末活動之一。

gept.example_en: We went camping in the mountains for three nights last summer.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年夏天在山上露營了三晚。

gept.example_en: Fishing at the lake early in the morning is incredibly peaceful and quiet.
gept.example_zh: 清晨在湖邊釣魚非常寧靜安詳。

gept.example_en: Rock climbing builds both physical strength and mental focus simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 攀岩同時鍛鍊體力和精神專注力。

gept.example_en: Gardening helps me relax and forget about the stresses of daily life.
gept.example_zh: 園藝幫助我放鬆並忘記日常生活的壓力。

gept.example_en: We had a wonderful picnic by the river on Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們週日下午在河邊有個美好的野餐。

gept.example_en: The family barbecue brought together relatives from across the country.
gept.example_zh: 家庭烤肉聚會聚集了來自全國各地的親戚。

gept.example_en: The hiking trail leads to a beautiful waterfall hidden deep in the forest.
gept.example_zh: 這條健行步道通往一個藏在森林深處的美麗瀑布。

gept.example_en: We spent the weekend in the peaceful countryside far from the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們在遠離城市的寧靜鄉村度過了週末。

gept.example_en: Their three-week trip to the jungle was a real adventure for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 他們為期三週的叢林之旅對每個人來說都是一次真正的冒險。

gept.example_en: She picked up the paddle and pushed the kayak away from the shore.
gept.example_zh: 她拿起槳，把皮艇推離岸邊。

gept.example_en: Our family plays board games together every Friday evening after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每週五晚餐後一起玩桌遊。

gept.example_en: Chess teaches patience, planning, and strategic thinking to young players.
gept.example_zh: 西洋棋教導年輕玩家耐心、計劃和策略思維。

gept.example_en: Card games have been popular in many cultures for hundreds of years.
gept.example_zh: 紙牌遊戲在許多文化中已流行數百年。

gept.example_en: She enjoys solving crossword puzzles with her morning coffee every day.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上配著咖啡享受解填字遊戲。

gept.example_en: He bought a new controller because the old one stopped working properly.
gept.example_zh: 他買了一個新控制器，因為舊的不能正常工作了。

gept.example_en: The hero must complete a difficult quest to save the kingdom.
gept.example_zh: 主角必須完成一項艱難的任務以拯救王國。

gept.example_en: Each mission in the game gets progressively harder as you advance.
gept.example_zh: 遊戲中的每個任務隨著你的進展逐漸變難。

gept.example_en: After hours of intense play, our team finally achieved victory.
gept.example_zh: 經過幾小時的激烈遊戲，我們的團隊終於取得勝利。

gept.example_en: The chess tournament attracted players from over twenty countries this year.
gept.example_zh: 這場西洋棋錦標賽今年吸引了來自二十多個國家的選手。

gept.example_en: The reporter interviewed several witnesses at the scene of the accident.
gept.example_zh: 記者在事故現場採訪了幾位目擊者。

gept.example_en: The story made the front page headline of every major newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 這則報導成為每份主要報紙的頭版頭條。

gept.example_en: The news broadcast was interrupted by an urgent weather warning.
gept.example_zh: 新聞廣播被緊急天氣警報打斷。

gept.example_en: The reporter refused to reveal the source of her information.
gept.example_zh: 記者拒絕透露她的資訊來源。

gept.example_en: The journalist won an award for her investigation into government corruption.
gept.example_zh: 這位記者因調查政府腐敗而獲獎。

gept.example_en: The editor reviewed the article carefully before approving it for publication.
gept.example_zh: 編輯在批准發表前仔細審查了這篇文章。

gept.example_en: The publisher decided to release the book in both print and digital formats.
gept.example_zh: 出版商決定以印刷和數位兩種形式發行這本書。

gept.example_en: He writes a weekly column about local restaurants for the city newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 他為城市報紙撰寫一個關於當地餐廳的每週專欄。

gept.example_en: Members of the press gathered outside the courthouse waiting for news.
gept.example_zh: 新聞界成員聚集在法院外等待消息。

gept.example_en: The mass media plays an important role in shaping public opinion.
gept.example_zh: 大眾媒體在塑造輿論中扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: The election received extensive coverage from international news organizations.
gept.example_zh: 選舉受到國際新聞機構的廣泛報導。

gept.example_en: The magazine ran a feature about the rise of electric vehicles.
gept.example_zh: 這本雜誌刊登了一篇關於電動車崛起的特寫。

gept.example_en: The political scandal forced the minister to resign from her position immediately.
gept.example_zh: 這次政治醜聞迫使部長立即從她的職位辭職。

gept.example_en: Don't believe every rumor you hear about celebrities on social media.
gept.example_zh: 不要相信你在社群媒體上聽到的關於名人的每個謠言。

gept.example_en: The economic crisis affected millions of families around the world.
gept.example_zh: 經濟危機影響了全世界數百萬家庭。

gept.example_en: The earthquake was the worst natural disaster the region had ever experienced.
gept.example_zh: 這次地震是該地區經歷過的最嚴重自然災害。

gept.example_en: The discovery of ancient ruins surprised archaeologists from around the world.
gept.example_zh: 古代遺跡的發現讓全世界的考古學家感到驚訝。

gept.example_en: The incident at the train station caused major delays during rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 火車站的事件在尖峰時段造成重大延誤。

gept.example_en: The latest trends in fashion are heavily influenced by social media stars.
gept.example_zh: 最新的時尚趨勢受到社群媒體明星的強烈影響。

gept.example_en: Workers went on strike to demand better pay and safer working conditions.
gept.example_zh: 工人罷工要求更好的薪酬和更安全的工作條件。

gept.example_en: Police were called in to control the riot that broke out downtown.
gept.example_zh: 警察被叫來控制市中心爆發的暴動。

gept.example_en: His weekly talk show covers current events and politics in depth.
gept.example_zh: 他的每週脫口秀深入探討時事和政治。

gept.example_en: A large political rally drew thousands of supporters to the city square.
gept.example_zh: 一場大型政治集會吸引了數千名支持者來到城市廣場。

gept.example_en: The dialogue between management and workers led to a successful agreement.
gept.example_zh: 管理層與工人之間的對話促成了一項成功的協議。

gept.example_en: The peace negotiation between the two countries has entered its final stage.
gept.example_zh: 兩國之間的和平談判已進入最後階段。

gept.example_en: Leaders from the major economic powers will attend the summit next month.
gept.example_zh: 主要經濟強國的領導人下個月將出席高峰會。

gept.example_en: The latest poll suggests that the election will be very close.
gept.example_zh: 最新的民調顯示這次選舉將非常接近。

gept.example_en: The spectator stood up to applaud the speaker's important message.
gept.example_zh: 觀眾起立鼓掌讚揚講者的重要信息。

gept.example_en: Television viewers were shocked by the dramatic ending of the popular series.
gept.example_zh: 電視觀眾對這部熱門影集的戲劇性結局感到震驚。

gept.example_en: The streaming service now has over a hundred million subscribers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 這個串流服務現在在全球擁有超過一億訂閱者。

gept.example_en: The newspaper's readership has grown steadily since the redesign last year.
gept.example_zh: 自從去年重新設計以來，這份報紙的讀者群穩定增長。

gept.example_en: The TV show received the highest rating among teenage viewers.
gept.example_zh: 這個電視節目在青少年觀眾中獲得最高評分。

gept.example_en: We need to sort out the scheduling problems before the conference starts next week.
gept.example_zh: 我們得在下週會議開始前解決排程問題。

gept.example_en: The manager promised to look into the customer's complaint by the end of the day.
gept.example_zh: 經理承諾在當天結束前調查那位顧客的投訴。

gept.example_en: I cannot put up with his rude behavior in meetings any longer.
gept.example_zh: 我再也無法忍受他在會議上的無禮行為了。

gept.example_en: She had to go through several rounds of interviews before getting the job.
gept.example_zh: 她得經歷好幾輪面試才得到那份工作。

gept.example_en: She really takes after her mother in both appearance and personality.
gept.example_zh: 她在外貌和個性上都很像她的母親。

gept.example_en: It took him months to get over the disappointment of losing the competition.
gept.example_zh: 他花了好幾個月才從輸掉比賽的失望中走出來。

gept.example_en: Our travel plans fell through when the airline canceled all flights.
gept.example_zh: 當航空公司取消所有航班時，我們的旅行計畫就泡湯了。

gept.example_en: After hours of arguing, she finally gave in to her son's request.
gept.example_zh: 經過幾個小時的爭論，她終於對兒子的要求讓步了。

gept.example_en: Our car broke down on the highway during the heavy rainstorm.
gept.example_zh: 我們的車在暴雨中於高速公路上拋錨了。

gept.example_en: The team carried out the experiment under strictly controlled laboratory conditions.
gept.example_zh: 團隊在嚴格控制的實驗室條件下執行了這項實驗。

gept.example_en: I still cannot figure out how to solve this complicated math problem.
gept.example_zh: 我還是搞不清楚要怎麼解這道複雜的數學題。

gept.example_en: He gets along well with everyone in the office despite their different backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 儘管背景不同，他和辦公室裡的每個人都相處得很好。

gept.example_en: Please hold on for a moment while I transfer your call to the manager.
gept.example_zh: 請稍等一下，我將您的電話轉接給經理。

gept.example_en: It is hard to keep up with the latest trends in technology these days.
gept.example_zh: 現在要跟上最新的科技趨勢很不容易。

gept.example_en: I am really looking forward to seeing you at the reunion next weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我真的很期待下週末在同學會上見到你。

gept.example_en: He bought flowers to make up for forgetting their wedding anniversary last week.
gept.example_zh: 他買了花來彌補上週忘記他們的結婚紀念日。

gept.example_en: She nearly passed out after standing in the hot sun for hours.
gept.example_zh: 她在烈日下站了好幾個小時後差點昏倒。

gept.example_en: The teacher pointed out several errors in my essay that needed correction.
gept.example_zh: 老師指出我作文中好幾個需要修正的錯誤。

gept.example_en: I ran into an old college friend at the bookstore yesterday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我昨天下午在書店偶然遇見一位老大學同學。

gept.example_en: They plan to set up a small business selling handmade jewelry online.
gept.example_zh: 他們打算建立一個在網路上販售手工首飾的小型事業。

gept.example_en: Only half of the invited guests actually showed up to the party.
gept.example_zh: 受邀的客人只有一半真的出席了派對。

gept.example_en: She decided to take up painting as a hobby after retirement.
gept.example_zh: 退休後她決定開始畫畫當作嗜好。

gept.example_en: He turned down the job offer because the salary was too low.
gept.example_zh: 因為薪水太低，他拒絕了那份工作邀約。

gept.example_en: I am sure we can work out a solution that satisfies both parties.
gept.example_zh: 我相信我們可以想出一個讓雙方都滿意的解決方案。

gept.example_en: Always remember to back up your important files before updating the system.
gept.example_zh: 更新系統前務必記得備份你的重要檔案。

gept.example_en: Try not to bring up politics at the family dinner tomorrow night.
gept.example_zh: 明晚家庭聚餐時盡量不要提起政治話題。

gept.example_en: My doctor advised me to cut down on sugar and processed foods.
gept.example_zh: 醫生建議我減少糖和加工食品的攝取。

gept.example_en: Can you drop off these documents at the post office on your way home?
gept.example_zh: 你回家路上能順便把這些文件送到郵局嗎？

gept.example_en: We ended up staying at a cheaper hotel because the original one was full.
gept.example_zh: 因為原本訂的旅館客滿，我們最後住進一間較便宜的旅館。

gept.example_en: Please hand in your assignments before leaving the classroom this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午離開教室前請繳交你的作業。

gept.example_en: She kept on working despite feeling tired and ill all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 儘管整個下午都感到疲倦不適，她仍繼續工作。

gept.example_en: The company had to lay off two hundred workers due to financial difficulties.
gept.example_zh: 由於財務困難，公司不得不解雇兩百名員工。

gept.example_en: I promised myself I would never let down the people who trust me.
gept.example_zh: 我向自己保證絕不讓信任我的人失望。

gept.example_en: Many young athletes look up to her because of her dedication and discipline.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕運動員因為她的奉獻和自律而敬仰她。

gept.example_en: We had to put off the meeting until next Monday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們不得不把會議延到下週一下午。

gept.example_en: We ran out of coffee this morning, so I went to the store.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上我們的咖啡用完了，所以我去了趟商店。

gept.example_en: True friends stand by you even during the most difficult times of life.
gept.example_zh: 真正的朋友即使在你人生最艱難的時刻也會支持你。

gept.example_en: Her creative ideas always stand out during our weekly brainstorming sessions.
gept.example_zh: 她的創意點子在每週的腦力激盪會議中總是特別突出。

gept.example_en: There was so much information that I could not take it all in.
gept.example_zh: 資訊太多了，我沒辦法全部消化吸收。

gept.example_en: Our flight will take off at six in the morning sharp.
gept.example_zh: 我們的班機將於早上六點整準時起飛。

gept.example_en: Do not throw away those old magazines; we might recycle them later.
gept.example_zh: 別把那些舊雜誌丟掉，我們之後可能會回收它們。

gept.example_en: Always warm up properly before doing any intense physical exercise.
gept.example_zh: 做任何劇烈運動前務必先好好暖身。

gept.example_en: Watch out for that car coming around the corner at high speed.
gept.example_zh: 小心那輛高速從轉角衝過來的車。

gept.example_en: Walking through the city all day really wore me out completely.
gept.example_zh: 在城市裡走了一整天讓我筋疲力盡。

gept.example_en: He told a funny story to break the ice at the awkward meeting.
gept.example_zh: 他在尷尬的會議上講了個有趣的故事來打破僵局。

gept.example_en: The math test was a piece of cake compared to last week's quiz.
gept.example_zh: 相較於上週的小考，這次數學測驗簡直易如反掌。

gept.example_en: She has been feeling under the weather since returning from her business trip.
gept.example_zh: 自從出差回來後，她一直覺得身體不太舒服。

gept.example_en: Let us make sure everyone is on the same page before proceeding further.
gept.example_zh: 我們繼續之前先確認大家的想法一致。

gept.example_en: In a nutshell, the project succeeded because of teamwork and careful planning.
gept.example_zh: 簡而言之，這項專案因團隊合作和周詳計畫而成功。

gept.example_en: Can you keep an eye on my luggage while I use the restroom?
gept.example_zh: 我去洗手間時，你能幫我留意一下行李嗎？

gept.example_en: He finally apologized after three weeks, but better late than never.
gept.example_zh: 他過了三週才終於道歉，不過遲做總比沒做好。

gept.example_en: We have worked enough on this report; let us call it a day.
gept.example_zh: 我們已經做這份報告做很久了，今天就到此為止吧。

gept.example_en: Even small daily actions can make a real difference to our environment.
gept.example_zh: 即使是日常的小行動也能對我們的環境產生真正的影響。

gept.example_en: A good leader must always take responsibility for the team's failures and successes.
gept.example_zh: 一位好的領導者必須為團隊的成敗負起責任。

gept.example_en: It is too early to draw a conclusion based on such limited evidence.
gept.example_zh: 根據如此有限的證據就下結論還太早。

gept.example_en: The campaign aims to raise awareness about mental health among young people.
gept.example_zh: 這項活動旨在提高年輕人對心理健康的意識。

gept.example_en: Parents should set a good example for their children in every situation.
gept.example_zh: 父母在任何情況下都應為孩子樹立好榜樣。

gept.example_en: After hours of discussion, the two sides finally reached an agreement.
gept.example_zh: 經過數小時的討論，雙方終於達成協議。

gept.example_en: He worked through the night to meet the tight project deadline.
gept.example_zh: 他熬夜工作以趕上緊迫的專案截止日期。

gept.example_en: We must take into account all relevant factors before making the final decision.
gept.example_zh: 做最終決定前，我們必須考慮所有相關因素。

gept.example_en: Please keep in mind that the deadline is next Friday at noon.
gept.example_zh: 請記住截止日期是下週五中午。

gept.example_en: Genetics plays a significant role in determining a person's overall health.
gept.example_zh: 基因在決定一個人整體健康狀況上扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: You should pay close attention to the safety instructions before starting.
gept.example_zh: 開始之前你應該仔細注意安全須知。

gept.example_en: Climate change will have a profound impact on future generations.
gept.example_zh: 氣候變遷將對未來世代產生深遠的影響。

gept.example_en: He missed the deadline, and as a result, he lost the contract.
gept.example_zh: 他錯過了截止期限，結果失去了這份合約。

gept.example_en: In addition to his salary, he receives generous health and dental benefits.
gept.example_zh: 除了薪水之外，他還享有優渥的健康和牙科福利。

gept.example_en: The company has built a robust system to handle millions of users.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司建立了一個強大的系統來處理數百萬名使用者。

gept.example_en: She has vivid memories of the summer she spent in rural Japan.
gept.example_zh: 她對在日本鄉村度過的那個夏天有著鮮明的回憶。

gept.example_en: His instructions were so vague that nobody knew where to start working.
gept.example_zh: 他的指示太模糊，沒有人知道該從哪裡開始工作。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 詳盡的；詳述
gept.example_en: Could you elaborate on your proposal so the committee understands it better?
gept.example_zh: 你能詳細說明你的提案，好讓委員會更清楚地理解嗎？

gept.example_en: The instructions were explicit about not opening the package before Christmas morning.
gept.example_zh: 這些指示明確規定聖誕節早上之前不能拆開包裹。

gept.example_en: Our company benefits greatly from having a diverse workforce with varied backgrounds.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司因擁有來自不同背景的多元勞動力而受益良多。

gept.example_en: There is a distinct difference between hearing someone and actually listening to them.
gept.example_zh: 聽見某人說話與真正傾聽他們之間存在明顯的差異。

gept.example_en: It is crucial to communicate clearly when working on international team projects.
gept.example_zh: 進行國際團隊專案時，清楚溝通至關重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 重大的；意義深遠的
gept.example_en: The team made significant progress on the project over the past month.
gept.example_zh: 過去一個月團隊在這項專案上取得了顯著的進展。

gept.example_en: It took considerable effort to convince him to change his original decision.
gept.example_zh: 花了相當大的力氣才說服他改變原本的決定。

gept.example_en: Make sure you get adequate sleep before tomorrow's important final examination.
gept.example_zh: 確保你在明天重要的期末考前獲得充足的睡眠。

gept.example_en: We do not have sufficient evidence to support such a serious accusation.
gept.example_zh: 我們沒有足夠的證據來支持如此嚴重的指控。

gept.example_en: The professor asked students to only include relevant information in their essays.
gept.example_zh: 教授要求學生在論文中只納入相關資訊。

gept.example_en: You need to present a valid form of identification to enter the building.
gept.example_zh: 你需要出示有效的身分證明才能進入這棟建築。

gept.example_en: There is an emotional dimension to this problem we should not ignore.
gept.example_zh: 這個問題有情感層面是我們不應忽視的。

gept.example_en: You cannot understand his comment without knowing the full context of the conversation.
gept.example_zh: 不了解對話的完整脈絡，你就無法理解他的話。

gept.example_en: Her years of experience gave her valuable insight into customer behavior patterns.
gept.example_zh: 多年的經驗讓她對顧客行為模式有寶貴的洞察。

gept.example_en: It is important to make a clear distinction between facts and personal opinions.
gept.example_zh: 清楚區分事實與個人意見是很重要的。

gept.example_en: You must accept the consequences of your actions, both good and bad.
gept.example_zh: 你必須承擔自己行為的後果，無論好壞。

gept.example_en: She has a tendency to worry about things she cannot control.
gept.example_zh: 她有種傾向會為她無法掌控的事情擔憂。

gept.example_en: Honesty is the most valuable attribute I look for in close friends.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是我在親密朋友身上最看重的特質。

gept.example_en: Every aspect of the design has been carefully considered by our team.
gept.example_zh: 設計的每個方面都經過我們團隊的仔細考量。

gept.example_en: Trust is a key element in every successful long-term relationship.
gept.example_zh: 信任是每段成功長期關係中的關鍵要素。

gept.example_en: Several factors contributed to the team's surprising success this past year.
gept.example_zh: 多項因素促成了團隊去年令人驚訝的成功。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 特徵；典型的
gept.example_en: Generosity is a characteristic she inherited from her late grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 慷慨是她從已故祖母身上繼承的特質。

gept.example_en: The young athlete exhibits remarkable talent and determination at every competition.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕運動員在每場比賽中都展現出非凡的天賦與決心。

gept.example_en: She acquired excellent language skills during her two years living in France.
gept.example_zh: 她在法國居住兩年期間獲得了優秀的語言能力。

gept.example_en: Children usually adapt to new environments faster than most adults do.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們通常比大多數成年人更快適應新環境。

gept.example_en: We may need to alter our travel plans because of the unexpected weather.
gept.example_zh: 由於意外的天氣狀況，我們可能得改變旅行計畫。

gept.example_en: Nobody could have anticipated the dramatic changes that would occur next year.
gept.example_zh: 沒有人能預料到隔年將發生的劇烈變化。

gept.example_en: The defendant continues to assert his complete innocence despite the overwhelming evidence.
gept.example_zh: 儘管證據確鑿，被告仍堅持主張自己完全無罪。

gept.example_en: It is difficult to convey complex emotions through a short text message.
gept.example_zh: 要透過簡短的文字訊息傳達複雜的情感是很困難的。

gept.example_en: New evidence has emerged that completely changes our understanding of the case.
gept.example_zh: 新的證據浮現，徹底改變了我們對這起案件的理解。

gept.example_en: Regular reading can significantly enhance your vocabulary and overall communication skills.
gept.example_zh: 規律閱讀能大幅提升你的詞彙量和整體溝通能力。

gept.example_en: Solar panels can generate enough electricity to power a small family home.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能板能產生足夠的電力供應一個小家庭使用。

gept.example_en: The government plans to impose stricter regulations on industrial waste disposal.
gept.example_zh: 政府計畫對工業廢棄物處理實施更嚴格的規定。

gept.example_en: He could not justify spending so much money on a single purchase.
gept.example_zh: 他無法為這筆如此昂貴的單筆消費辯解其合理性。

gept.example_en: It is important to maintain a healthy work-life balance for long-term wellbeing.
gept.example_zh: 維持健康的工作與生活平衡對長期福祉而言很重要。

gept.example_en: You must obtain written permission before using any copyrighted images in your essay.
gept.example_zh: 在你的文章中使用任何有版權的圖片前，必須先取得書面同意。

gept.example_en: She decided to pursue a career in environmental science after graduation.
gept.example_zh: 畢業後她決定追求環境科學領域的職業。

gept.example_en: The investigation revealed several serious safety violations at the construction site.
gept.example_zh: 調查揭露了建築工地上幾項嚴重的安全違規行為。

gept.example_en: Please specify the exact time and location when you reply to my email.
gept.example_zh: 請在回信時明確指出確切的時間和地點。

gept.example_en: It is difficult to sustain such a high level of effort indefinitely.
gept.example_zh: 要無限期維持如此高強度的努力是很困難的。

gept.example_en: Technology has transformed the way we communicate with friends and family members.
gept.example_zh: 科技已徹底改變了我們與朋友家人溝通的方式。

gept.example_en: Their research yielded some surprising results that contradicted earlier scientific assumptions.
gept.example_zh: 他們的研究得出了一些與先前科學假設相矛盾的驚人結果。

gept.example_en: My sister enjoys outdoor activities, whereas I prefer to stay inside reading.
gept.example_zh: 我姐姐喜歡戶外活動，而我則偏好待在室內閱讀。

gept.example_en: He failed to submit his paper on time and consequently received a lower grade.
gept.example_zh: 他未能準時繳交論文，因此得到較低的分數。

gept.example_en: The plan is expensive; furthermore, it would take years to fully implement.
gept.example_zh: 這項計畫費用高昂，此外，要完全執行還需要數年時間。

gept.example_en: This restaurant has excellent food; moreover, the service is consistently outstanding too.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳食物極佳，而且服務也始終非常出色。

gept.example_en: It is raining heavily; therefore, we should cancel the outdoor picnic today.
gept.example_zh: 雨下得很大，因此我們今天應該取消戶外野餐。

gept.example_en: He studied very hard and thus achieved excellent results on the final exam.
gept.example_zh: 他非常用功讀書，因此期末考取得了優異的成績。

gept.example_en: The plan had several flaws; nevertheless, the committee decided to approve it.
gept.example_zh: 這項計畫有幾項缺陷，然而委員會仍決定批准它。

gept.example_en: He specifically asked me not to mention anything about the project details.
gept.example_zh: 他特別要求我不要提及任何關於專案細節的事。

gept.example_en: The library is primarily intended for use by registered university students only.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館主要是供註冊在校的大學學生使用。

gept.example_en: His argument is essentially the same as the one we discussed yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 他的論點基本上和我們昨天討論的相同。

gept.example_en: After losing everything, he sank into a deep state of despair.
gept.example_zh: 失去一切之後，他陷入了深深的絕望之中。

gept.example_en: Her enthusiasm for teaching young children inspired everyone in our department.
gept.example_zh: 她對教導年幼孩童的熱情激勵了我們部門裡的每個人。

gept.example_en: Many immigrants make great personal sacrifices for the future of their children.
gept.example_zh: 許多移民為了孩子的未來做出了巨大的個人犧牲。

gept.example_en: Do not hesitate to contact me if you have any further questions later.
gept.example_zh: 如果之後還有任何問題，請不要猶豫聯絡我。

gept.example_en: The teacher continued to emphasize the importance of careful reading every day.
gept.example_zh: 老師持續每天強調仔細閱讀的重要性。

gept.example_en: The new regulations prohibit smoking in all public indoor spaces and parks.
gept.example_zh: 新規定禁止在所有公共室內空間和公園內吸菸。

gept.example_en: Volunteers will distribute warm blankets to the homeless community this winter.
gept.example_zh: 志工今年冬天會將溫暖的毛毯分發給無家可歸的社群。

gept.example_en: Please refer to the manual whenever you encounter problems using this complex machine.
gept.example_zh: 每當你在使用這台複雜機器遇到問題時，請參考說明書。

gept.example_en: The architect designed a stunning glass building overlooking the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 這位建築師設計了一棟俯瞰海港的驚豔玻璃建築。

gept.example_en: We called a plumber to fix the leaky pipe under the kitchen sink.
gept.example_zh: 我們叫了水管工來修理廚房水槽下漏水的水管。

gept.example_en: The electrician rewired the entire house in just three working days.
gept.example_zh: 電工只用了三個工作天就重新接好整棟房子的電線。

gept.example_en: The carpenter built sturdy custom shelves for our small living room.
gept.example_zh: 木匠為我們的小客廳打造了堅固的訂製層架。

gept.example_en: The white cliff dropped sharply into the rough waters below us.
gept.example_zh: 白色懸崖陡峭地落入我們下方洶湧的水中。

gept.example_en: The skiers raced down the steep slope toward the village below.
gept.example_zh: 滑雪者沿著陡峭的斜坡向下方的村莊飛馳而下。

gept.example_en: Small villages were nestled in the green foothill of the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 小村莊坐落在這座山的青翠山麓上。

gept.example_en: We walked along the narrow ridge with stunning views on both sides.
gept.example_zh: 我們沿著狹窄的山脊行走，兩側都有令人驚嘆的景色。

gept.example_en: The volcanic crater filled with rainwater and became a deep clear lake.
gept.example_zh: 這個火山口積滿雨水後變成了一個又深又清的湖。

gept.example_en: The volcanic eruption sent ash high into the atmosphere for many days.
gept.example_zh: 火山爆發將火山灰送入大氣層高處長達好幾天。

gept.example_en: A sudden avalanche trapped several skiers on the mountain that afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 突然的雪崩在那天下午將數名滑雪者困在山上。

gept.example_en: The massive tsunami struck the coastline shortly after the underwater earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的海嘯在海底地震後不久襲擊了沿海地區。

gept.example_en: Heavy rain triggered a landslide that blocked the main mountain road.
gept.example_zh: 豪雨引發山崩，阻斷了主要的山路。

gept.example_en: The wildfire destroyed thousands of acres of forest before being contained.
gept.example_zh: 野火在被控制之前摧毀了數千英畝的森林。

gept.example_en: Heavy smog over the industrial area made it difficult to breathe outdoors.
gept.example_zh: 工業區上空濃重的煙霧讓人在戶外很難呼吸。

gept.example_en: Brush a sweet honey glaze over the ham before placing it inside.
gept.example_zh: 將甜蜜的蜂蜜釉汁刷在火腿上後再放入烤箱。

gept.example_en: The bakery's bread had a crispy golden crust and a soft inside.
gept.example_zh: 這家麵包店的麵包外皮酥脆金黃，內部鬆軟。

gept.example_en: The dumplings had a delicious filling of pork, cabbage, and chives.
gept.example_zh: 這些餃子有著美味的豬肉、白菜和韭菜餡。

gept.example_en: He brushed the cookie crumbs off the table after his afternoon snack.
gept.example_zh: 他在下午點心後把桌上的餅乾屑擦掉。

gept.example_en: She drinks a fruit smoothie every morning with banana, berries, and yogurt.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上喝一杯加香蕉、莓果和優格的水果冰沙。

gept.example_en: She bought a comfortable family sedan with good fuel efficiency last month.
gept.example_zh: 她上個月買了一輛舒適又省油的家庭轎車。

gept.example_en: He drove his red convertible down the coastal highway with the top down.
gept.example_zh: 他開著紅色敞篷車沿著海岸公路行駛，車頂收起。

gept.example_en: The dashboard lit up with a warning when the engine started to overheat.
gept.example_zh: 當引擎開始過熱時儀表板亮起了警告燈。

gept.example_en: Keep both hands firmly on the steering wheel while driving in heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 在大雨中開車時，雙手要牢牢握住方向盤。

gept.example_en: A small stone cracked the windshield as he drove down the gravel road.
gept.example_zh: 他在碎石路上開車時，一顆小石頭撞裂了擋風玻璃。

gept.example_en: The bumper was dented when another car backed into the parking spot.
gept.example_zh: 另一輛車倒車進停車位時撞凹了保險桿。

gept.example_en: Press the clutch fully before shifting into a different gear on hills.
gept.example_zh: 在山坡上換檔之前要完全踩下離合器。

gept.example_en: The thermometer showed her fever had climbed to almost forty degrees Celsius.
gept.example_zh: 溫度計顯示她的發燒已經攀升到將近攝氏四十度。

gept.example_en: The invention of the smartphone marked the beginning of a new digital era.
gept.example_zh: 智慧型手機的發明標誌著新數位時代的開始。

gept.example_en: On the eve of the wedding, the bride felt both nervous and excited.
gept.example_zh: 婚禮前夕新娘感到既緊張又興奮。

gept.example_en: At dusk, the streetlights flickered on and the city began to quiet.
gept.example_zh: 黃昏時路燈閃爍亮起，城市開始安靜下來。

gept.example_en: The garden looked magical bathed in the soft purple twilight of summer.
gept.example_zh: 花園沐浴在夏日柔和的紫色暮光中顯得很夢幻。

gept.example_en: The company publishes a financial report quarterly to inform shareholders of progress.
gept.example_zh: 公司每季發布一份財務報告以告知股東進展。

gept.example_en: The beaver built a sturdy dam across the small forest stream.
gept.example_zh: 那隻海狸在森林小溪上築起了一座堅固的水壩。

gept.example_en: The crocodile lay motionless in the muddy water waiting for unsuspecting prey.
gept.example_zh: 鱷魚一動不動地躺在泥水中等待毫無防備的獵物。

gept.example_en: The hawk soared high above the field searching for small rodents below.
gept.example_zh: 鷹在田野上空高飛盤旋，尋找下方的小型囓齒動物。

gept.example_en: The spotted leopard rested gracefully on a tree branch in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那隻有斑點的豹優雅地下午在樹枝上休息。

gept.example_en: The giraffe used its long neck to reach the highest leaves easily.
gept.example_zh: 長頸鹿用牠的長脖子輕鬆地吃到最高的葉子。

gept.example_en: The ostrich ran across the dry plain at surprisingly fast speeds.
gept.example_zh: 鴕鳥以驚人的速度奔跑穿越乾燥的平原。

gept.example_en: A graceful white swan glided silently across the still surface of the lake.
gept.example_zh: 一隻優雅的白天鵝靜靜地在平靜的湖面上滑行。

gept.example_en: The maple leaves turned brilliant red and gold during the cool autumn days.
gept.example_zh: 楓葉在涼爽的秋日轉為亮麗的紅色和金色。

gept.example_en: A tall cactus stood in the corner of the sunny living room.
gept.example_zh: 一株高大的仙人掌立在陽光充足的客廳角落。

gept.example_en: She arranged a bouquet of white lily flowers for the dining table.
gept.example_zh: 她為餐桌準備了一束白色百合花。

gept.example_en: Bright red tulip blooms filled the public gardens every April morning.
gept.example_zh: 鮮紅的鬱金香花朵在每個四月的早晨布滿了公共花園。

gept.example_en: The little girl picked a daisy and tucked it behind her ear.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩摘了一朵雛菊把它別在耳後。

gept.example_en: The tall sunflower turned its bright yellow face toward the morning sun.
gept.example_zh: 高大的向日葵把它鮮黃色的臉轉向早晨的太陽。

gept.example_en: She painted each fingernail a different bright color for the holiday party.
gept.example_zh: 她為了節日派對把每片指甲塗成不同的鮮豔顏色。

gept.example_en: He prefers wearing comfortable denim jeans for casual weekend activities outside.
gept.example_zh: 他比較喜歡穿舒適的牛仔褲進行週末戶外的休閒活動。

gept.example_en: The expensive leather jacket fit him perfectly and smelled wonderfully rich.
gept.example_zh: 那件昂貴的皮夾克非常合身，並散發出濃郁迷人的氣味。

gept.example_en: The royal robe was made of deep purple velvet with golden embroidery.
gept.example_zh: 皇室長袍以深紫色絲絨製成，並有金色刺繡。

gept.example_en: Linen sheets feel cool and comfortable during the hot humid summer nights.
gept.example_zh: 亞麻床單在炎熱潮濕的夏夜感覺涼爽又舒適。

gept.example_en: The luxurious bathroom featured polished white marble floors and gold fixtures.
gept.example_zh: 這間豪華浴室有著拋光的白色大理石地板和金色配件。

gept.example_en: She collects handmade ceramic bowls from local artisans during her travels.
gept.example_zh: 她在旅行時收集當地工匠手工製作的陶瓷碗。

gept.example_en: An ancient bronze statue stood proudly in the center of the museum hall.
gept.example_zh: 一座古老的青銅雕像驕傲地立在博物館大廳的中央。

gept.example_en: The copper pots in the kitchen needed polishing every couple of weeks.
gept.example_zh: 廚房裡的銅鍋每隔幾週就需要拋光一次。

gept.example_en: The cans are made of lightweight aluminum that can be recycled easily.
gept.example_zh: 這些罐子由輕量的鋁製成，可以輕易回收。

gept.example_en: She tied the bundle of letters together with a thick rubber band.
gept.example_zh: 她用一條粗橡皮筋把這捆信件綁在一起。

gept.example_en: The pencil sharpener sat next to the computer on the student's desk.
gept.example_zh: 削鉛筆機就放在學生書桌上的電腦旁。

gept.example_en: She wrote vocabulary words on each index card for tomorrow's study session.
gept.example_zh: 她在每張索引卡上寫下單字以準備明天的學習。

gept.example_en: The elegant harp produced beautiful, soothing sounds throughout the wedding ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 優雅的豎琴在整個婚禮儀式中發出美妙撫慰的聲音。

gept.example_en: He played the saxophone passionately at the smoky jazz club downtown.
gept.example_zh: 他在市中心煙霧瀰漫的爵士俱樂部熱情地演奏薩克斯風。

gept.example_en: She practiced the cello for two hours every single evening after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她每天晚飯後練習大提琴兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The young girl played a soft melody on her silver flute beautifully.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩用她的銀色長笛優美地吹奏一段輕柔的旋律。

gept.example_en: He cleared every hurdle effortlessly to win the gold medal at the championship.
gept.example_zh: 他輕鬆跨過每個跨欄並在錦標賽贏得金牌。

gept.example_en: He waxed his snowboard carefully before heading to the mountain slopes.
gept.example_zh: 他在前往山坡之前仔細地為他的滑雪板上蠟。

gept.example_en: There are too few electrical sockets in the small old apartment building.
gept.example_zh: 這棟小型老舊公寓裡的電源插座太少了。

gept.example_en: Pull this red lever firmly to stop the conveyor belt immediately.
gept.example_zh: 用力拉這個紅色的槓桿可以立即停止輸送帶。

gept.example_en: He turned the valve clockwise to shut off the gas before the repair.
gept.example_zh: 他在修理前順時針轉動閥門以關閉瓦斯。

gept.example_en: Check the pressure gauge before driving on the highway for long distances.
gept.example_zh: 在高速公路上長途駕駛前要檢查壓力計。

gept.example_en: They observed Saturn's rings through a powerful telescope on the clear summer night.
gept.example_zh: 他們在晴朗的夏夜透過一台強力望遠鏡觀察土星的環。

gept.example_en: She examined the cells under the microscope during the biology laboratory session.
gept.example_zh: 她在生物實驗課上用顯微鏡觀察細胞。

gept.example_en: A bright welcome banner hung above the door for the surprise birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 一條鮮豔的歡迎橫幅掛在門上方為驚喜生日派對而設。

gept.example_en: The zipper on her favorite jacket broke after years of regular use.
gept.example_zh: 她最喜歡的夾克拉鍊在多年定期使用後壞了。

gept.example_en: He adjusted the buckle on his leather belt to fit his slimmer waist.
gept.example_zh: 他調整了皮帶上的帶扣以配合他變瘦的腰圍。

gept.example_en: Bend down to tie your shoelace before tripping over it again today.
gept.example_zh: 在你今天又絆倒之前彎下身把鞋帶綁好。

gept.example_en: The little girl lost one red mitten in the snow yesterday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩昨天下午在雪中弄丟了一隻紅色的連指手套。

gept.example_en: She rummaged through her purse looking for her car keys for ages.
gept.example_zh: 她在手提包裡翻找了好久要找她的車鑰匙。

gept.example_en: She used a small funnel to pour the cooking oil into the bottle.
gept.example_zh: 她用一個小漏斗把食用油倒入瓶子裡。

gept.example_en: She kept a small bottle opener attached to her colorful keyring.
gept.example_zh: 她在彩色鑰匙圈上掛了一個小開瓶器。

gept.example_en: Use the electric can opener to open the large tin of tuna.
gept.example_zh: 用電動開罐器打開那個大鮪魚罐頭。

gept.example_en: They celebrated their anniversary with a luxurious lobster dinner at the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 他們在港口邊享用奢華的龍蝦晚餐慶祝週年紀念。

gept.example_en: The chef prepared steamed clam in white wine and aromatic fresh herbs.
gept.example_zh: 廚師用白酒和芳香的新鮮香草烹製蒸蛤蜊。

gept.example_en: She made a delicious tuna sandwich for lunch with crisp lettuce and mayo.
gept.example_zh: 她做了一個美味的鮪魚三明治當午餐，配上脆生菜和美乃滋。

gept.example_en: Cool cucumber slices add a refreshing crunch to the simple summer sandwich.
gept.example_zh: 涼爽的黃瓜片為簡單的夏日三明治增添清爽的口感。

gept.example_en: He grilled the purple eggplant with olive oil, sea salt, and garlic.
gept.example_zh: 他用橄欖油、海鹽和大蒜烤紫色茄子。

gept.example_en: She baked a sweet pumpkin pie for the autumn holiday family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她為秋季的節日家庭晚餐烤了一個甜甜的南瓜派。

gept.example_en: Fresh spinach contains lots of iron and tastes great with garlic.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的菠菜含有豐富的鐵質，跟大蒜搭配味道很棒。

gept.example_en: She mashed ripe avocado on toast with a sprinkle of sea salt.
gept.example_zh: 她把成熟的酪梨壓在吐司上並撒上一點海鹽。

gept.example_en: She added a handful of blueberry to her yogurt and homemade granola.
gept.example_zh: 她把一把藍莓加入她的優格和自製格蘭諾拉麥片中。

gept.example_en: They drank fresh coconut water straight from the shell on the tropical beach.
gept.example_zh: 他們在熱帶海灘上直接從殼裡喝新鮮椰子水。

gept.example_en: She blended a sweet mango smoothie with yogurt and crushed ice cubes.
gept.example_zh: 她用優格和碎冰塊調出甜美的芒果冰沙。

gept.example_en: She sprinkled chopped walnut over the warm oatmeal for added crunch.
gept.example_zh: 她在溫熱的燕麥粥上撒上切碎的核桃增加口感。

gept.example_en: He drank a glass of almond milk every morning with his breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早上配著早餐喝一杯杏仁奶。

gept.example_en: She added a handful of raisin to the oatmeal cookies for natural sweetness.
gept.example_zh: 她在燕麥餅乾裡加入一把葡萄乾增加自然的甜味。

gept.example_en: She drizzled warm caramel sauce over a generous scoop of vanilla ice cream.
gept.example_zh: 她把溫熱的焦糖醬淋在一大球香草冰淇淋上。

gept.example_en: They sailed their luxurious white yacht along the coast of the Mediterranean.
gept.example_zh: 他們駕著他們豪華的白色遊艇沿著地中海的海岸航行。

gept.example_en: The new legislation on climate change passed after months of heated debate in parliament.
gept.example_zh: 關於氣候變遷的新法律在國會中經過數月激烈辯論後通過。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers proposed an amendment to strengthen consumer protections in the bill.
gept.example_zh: 立法者提出修正案以加強法案中的消費者保護。

gept.example_en: Voters gave the new government a clear mandate to reform the tax system.
gept.example_zh: 選民賦予新政府明確的授權來改革稅務制度。

gept.example_en: The defendant maintained her innocence throughout the entire two-month trial.
gept.example_zh: 被告在整個兩個月的審判中堅稱自己無罪。

gept.example_en: The prosecutor presented compelling evidence linking the defendant to the financial crimes.
gept.example_zh: 檢察官提出令人信服的證據，將被告與金融犯罪連結起來。

gept.example_en: The defendant entered a plea of not guilty during the morning hearing.
gept.example_zh: 被告在上午的聽證會上提出無罪抗辯。

gept.example_en: Police obtained a warrant before searching the suspect's home for stolen property.
gept.example_zh: 警方在搜查嫌疑人住所尋找失竊物品前取得搜查令。

gept.example_en: A controversial clause in the contract allowed the company to terminate employees suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 合約中一條有爭議的條款允許公司突然解僱員工。

gept.example_en: The family sought political asylum after fleeing persecution in their home country.
gept.example_zh: 這家人在逃離原籍國的迫害後尋求政治庇護。

gept.example_en: Successful integration of newcomers requires support from both communities and the government.
gept.example_zh: 新移民的成功融合需要社區和政府雙方的支持。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 賦予權力；增強能力
gept.example_en: Education can empower young women to pursue careers once considered impossible for them.
gept.example_zh: 教育能賦予年輕女性能力去追求曾被認為對她們不可能的職業。

gept.example_en: Racial segregation in schools left lasting scars on generations of children.
gept.example_zh: 學校中的種族隔離在世代孩童心中留下持久的傷痕。

gept.example_en: Long-term sustainability must guide every decision we make about energy and resource consumption.
gept.example_zh: 長期永續性必須引導我們對能源和資源消耗所做的每項決定。

gept.example_en: Companies are racing to reduce their carbon footprint through cleaner manufacturing processes and renewable energy.
gept.example_zh: 企業競相透過更清潔的製造流程和再生能源來減少其碳足跡。

gept.example_en: Cutting greenhouse gas emissions remains essential to limiting catastrophic global temperature increases.
gept.example_zh: 削減溫室氣體排放對於限制災難性的全球氣溫上升仍至關重要。

gept.example_en: Acid rain caused by industrial emissions has damaged countless forests and lakes globally.
gept.example_zh: 工業排放造成的酸雨已損害全球無數的森林和湖泊。
