gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/副詞) 公司內部的
gept.example_en: We built the analytics platform in-house rather than relying on a costly external software vendor.
gept.example_zh: 我們在公司內部建置分析平台，而非仰賴昂貴的外部軟體供應商。

gept.example_en: Our security protocols meet the highest industry-standard requirements established by international regulatory bodies.
gept.example_zh: 我們的資安協定符合國際監管機構訂定的最高業界標準要求。

gept.example_en: Her collaborative leadership-style encourages quiet team members to share opinions during important strategy discussions.
gept.example_zh: 她合作型的領導風格鼓勵安靜的團隊成員在重要的策略討論中表達意見。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 異地的；外部會議
gept.example_en: The leadership team holds an annual off-site to discuss strategy without daily operational distractions.
gept.example_zh: 領導團隊每年舉辦一次異地會議，在沒有日常營運干擾下討論策略。

gept.example_en: Our product team interviewed forty customers to identify the most painful pain-point in current workflows.
gept.example_zh: 我們的產品團隊訪談了四十位客戶，以找出目前工作流程中最痛的痛點。

gept.example_en: We provide every employee a yearly professional-development budget to pursue courses, conferences, or certifications.
gept.example_zh: 我們為每位員工提供年度專業發展預算，可用於課程、研討會或證照。

gept.example_en: The public-relations team carefully managed media coverage during the difficult product recall event.
gept.example_zh: 公共關係團隊在艱難的產品召回事件中審慎管理媒體報導。

gept.example_en: Managing a remote-team requires deliberate communication rituals and trust to keep everyone aligned each week.
gept.example_zh: 管理遠距團隊需要刻意安排的溝通儀式與信任，才能每週讓所有人保持一致。

gept.example_en: The painful restructuring eliminated unprofitable lines but positioned the company for stronger long-term growth.
gept.example_zh: 這次痛苦的重組裁撤了不賺錢的業務，但讓公司具備更強的長期成長動能。

gept.example_en: Communication and empathy are essential soft-skill abilities every modern people manager needs to develop.
gept.example_zh: 溝通與同理心是每位現代帶人主管都需培養的關鍵軟實力。

gept.example_en: Annual strategic-planning sessions force leaders to step back from daily issues and consider broader directions.
gept.example_zh: 年度策略規劃會議迫使領導者從日常事務中退後一步，思考更宏觀的方向。

gept.example_en: Our target-audience for this premium product is professionals aged thirty to fifty with disposable income.
gept.example_zh: 這項高端產品的目標客群是三十至五十歲、有可支配所得的專業人士。

gept.example_en: Effective team-building activities strengthen relationships and help colleagues collaborate more openly during stressful projects.
gept.example_zh: 有效的團隊建立活動能強化關係，幫助同事在高壓專案中更開放地合作。

gept.example_en: Strong time-management habits help busy executives focus on truly important work instead of urgent distractions.
gept.example_zh: 良好的時間管理習慣能讓忙碌的高階主管專注於真正重要的工作，而非緊急的干擾。

gept.example_en: Our manufacturing process is a closely guarded trade-secret that gives us a clear cost advantage.
gept.example_zh: 我們的製造流程是被嚴密保護的商業機密，帶來明顯的成本優勢。

gept.example_en: Venture-capital firms typically expect substantial returns to compensate for the high risk of early-stage investments.
gept.example_zh: 創業投資公司通常期待豐厚的回報，以補償早期投資的高風險。

gept.example_en: Our annual-report summarizes the year's results and outlines plans for sustainable growth ahead.
gept.example_zh: 我們的年度報告總結年度成果，並概述未來永續成長的計畫。

gept.example_en: Adopting industry best-practice in cybersecurity reduced our exposure to common attacks by over eighty percent.
gept.example_zh: 採用業界資安最佳實務，使我們對常見攻擊的暴露程度降低了八成以上。

gept.example_en: The new branding-campaign repositioned the company as a trustworthy partner for premium business customers.
gept.example_zh: 新的品牌行銷活動將公司重新定位為高端企業客戶值得信賴的夥伴。

gept.example_en: The subscription-based business-model generates predictable recurring revenue that investors generally find very attractive.
gept.example_zh: 訂閱制商業模式產生可預測的經常性營收，投資人通常覺得非常吸引人。

gept.example_en: The campaign-launch attracted significant media attention and generated thousands of qualified leads within one week.
gept.example_zh: 這次行銷活動上市吸引大量媒體關注，並在一週內帶來數千個合格客戶名單。

gept.example_en: Each chief-officer reports directly to the board and oversees one major operational function of the company.
gept.example_zh: 每位高階主管直接向董事會報告，並負責公司一項主要的營運職能。

gept.example_en: The CEO decided to refocus on the firm's core-business and sell off unrelated, distracting subsidiaries.
gept.example_zh: 執行長決定重新聚焦於公司本業，並出售不相關、令人分心的子公司。

gept.example_en: A careful cost-benefit analysis showed that automating the warehouse would pay for itself within four years.
gept.example_zh: 謹慎的成本效益分析顯示倉庫自動化將在四年內回本。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 以客戶為中心的
gept.example_en: Building a customer-centric culture requires leaders who consistently put customer needs above internal political concerns.
gept.example_zh: 建立以客戶為中心的文化，需要持續將客戶需求置於內部政治考量之上的領導者。

gept.example_en: Sales representatives should always identify the real decision-maker early in any complex enterprise opportunity.
gept.example_zh: 業務代表在任何複雜的企業客戶機會中，都應及早辨識真正的決策者。

gept.example_en: The painful downsizing reduced staff by twenty percent but allowed the firm to survive the recession.
gept.example_zh: 這次痛苦的裁員縮編使員工減少了百分之二十，但讓公司在衰退中得以存活。

gept.example_en: Investing in early-stage companies offers higher potential returns but also a much greater probability of failure.
gept.example_zh: 投資早期階段公司有更高的潛在報酬，但失敗機率也大得多。

gept.example_en: Heavy fixed-cost burdens make companies struggle when revenues unexpectedly fall during deep economic downturns.
gept.example_zh: 沉重的固定成本負擔讓公司在深度經濟衰退中營收意外下滑時陷入困境。

gept.example_en: Recent globalization-trend reversals encouraged many firms to reshore production back to their domestic countries.
gept.example_zh: 近期的全球化趨勢逆轉，鼓勵許多公司將生產移回國內。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 總部設於；總部
gept.example_en: The company chose to headquarter its Asian operations in Singapore rather than in Hong Kong.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司選擇將亞洲營運總部設於新加坡，而非香港。

gept.example_en: The firm's market-cap doubled after announcing the breakthrough product and stronger-than-expected quarterly earnings results.
gept.example_zh: 在公布突破性產品與優於預期的季度盈餘後，公司市值翻倍。

gept.example_en: Careful market-segmentation lets marketers craft messages that resonate deeply with each distinct customer subgroup.
gept.example_zh: 謹慎的市場區隔讓行銷人員能撰寫深深打動每個不同客戶子群的訊息。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 跳脫框架的；開箱即用的
gept.example_en: We need out-of-the-box thinking to solve the customer churn problem that traditional approaches have failed to address.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要跳脫框架的思考來解決傳統方法未能處理的客戶流失問題。

gept.example_en: Continuous process-improvement initiatives saved the factory over two million dollars during the past calendar year.
gept.example_zh: 持續的流程改善計畫在過去一個日曆年中為工廠節省了超過兩百萬美元。

gept.example_en: Successful rebranding requires consistent execution across products, packaging, advertising, and customer-facing service interactions.
gept.example_zh: 成功的品牌重塑需要在產品、包裝、廣告與面對客戶的服務互動中一致執行。

gept.example_en: Banks invest enormous resources in regulatory-compliance teams to avoid costly penalties and operational restrictions.
gept.example_zh: 銀行投入大量資源於法規遵循團隊，以避免昂貴罰款與營運限制。

gept.example_en: Quarterly risk-assessment reviews help executives spot emerging threats long before they cause material damage.
gept.example_zh: 季度風險評估審查能幫助主管在新興威脅造成實質損害前及早發現。

gept.example_en: The Asian subsidiary contributed over forty percent of total group revenue during the past fiscal year.
gept.example_zh: 亞洲子公司在過去的會計年度貢獻了集團總營收的四成以上。

gept.example_en: Each link in the value-chain offers an opportunity to reduce cost or differentiate through superior service.
gept.example_zh: 價值鏈中的每個環節都是降低成本或透過卓越服務做出差異化的機會。

gept.example_en: The company conducted a study to identify and close any unfair wage-gap between male and female employees.
gept.example_zh: 公司進行了一項研究，以辨識並消除男女員工之間任何不公平的薪資差距。

gept.example_en: A skilled negotiator looks for a win-win outcome that lets both parties celebrate at the end.
gept.example_zh: 技巧高超的談判者會尋求讓雙方在最後都能慶祝的雙贏結果。

gept.example_en: Compound interest can dramatically grow your retirement savings over several decades.
gept.example_zh: 複利能讓你的退休儲蓄在數十年間大幅增長。

gept.example_en: Most car loans use simple interest calculated on the outstanding loan balance.
gept.example_zh: 大多數汽車貸款採用以未償還餘額計算的單利。

gept.example_en: Holders of preferred shares usually receive dividends before common shareholders do.
gept.example_zh: 優先股持有人通常比普通股東優先領取股息。

gept.example_en: Each common share entitles the holder to one vote at the annual meeting.
gept.example_zh: 每股普通股賦予持有人在年度會議上一票的權利。

gept.example_en: Her stockbroker advised her to diversify across several different industries.
gept.example_zh: 她的證券經紀人建議她跨多個行業分散投資。

gept.example_en: He opened a new account at an online brokerage with very low trading fees.
gept.example_zh: 他在一家交易手續費極低的線上經紀公司開了新帳戶。

gept.example_en: Her mutual fund invests in a diversified basket of international companies.
gept.example_zh: 她的共同基金投資於分散的國際公司組合。

gept.example_en: The hedge fund manager uses complex strategies to profit in any market direction.
gept.example_zh: 這位對沖基金經理運用複雜策略以在任何市場方向中獲利。

gept.example_en: Money market accounts typically offer higher interest than ordinary checking accounts.
gept.example_zh: 貨幣市場帳戶的利息通常高於一般支票帳戶。

gept.example_en: She paid tax on the capital gain after selling her shares at a profit.
gept.example_zh: 她在獲利出售股票後就資本利得繳了稅。

gept.example_en: Investors can use a capital loss to offset gains and reduce their tax bill.
gept.example_zh: 投資人可以用資本虧損抵銷收益以減少稅款。

gept.example_en: Your risk tolerance should determine how much of your money goes into equities.
gept.example_zh: 你的風險承受度應決定多少資金投入股票。

gept.example_en: A strong credit rating helps companies borrow money at much lower interest rates.
gept.example_zh: 良好的信用評等有助於公司以低得多的利率借款。

gept.example_en: Paying your bills on time gradually improves your personal credit score.
gept.example_zh: 按時繳費可逐步提升你的個人信用分數。

gept.example_en: The creditor demanded repayment within thirty days or legal action would follow.
gept.example_zh: 債權人要求三十天內還款，否則將採取法律行動。

gept.example_en: The debtor negotiated a new repayment plan to avoid further penalties.
gept.example_zh: 債務人協商新的還款方案以避免進一步罰款。

gept.example_en: Filing for bankruptcy gave the family a fresh start but damaged their credit.
gept.example_zh: 申請破產讓這個家庭重新開始，但損害了他們的信用。

gept.example_en: Liquidation of the store's inventory began once the closing date was announced.
gept.example_zh: 店家公布結束營業日後便開始清算庫存。

gept.example_en: The struggling airline plans to restructure its debt with help from creditors.
gept.example_zh: 陷入困境的航空公司計畫在債權人協助下重組債務。

gept.example_en: The central bank sets monetary policy to control inflation and support employment.
gept.example_zh: 中央銀行制定貨幣政策以控制通膨並支持就業。

gept.example_en: Commercial banks accept deposits from the public and lend money to businesses.
gept.example_zh: 商業銀行接受公眾存款並貸款給企業。

gept.example_en: The investment bank advised the firm on its upcoming initial public offering.
gept.example_zh: 投資銀行就該公司即將進行的首次公開發行提供諮詢。

gept.example_en: Retail banking serves individual customers with everyday products like savings and loans.
gept.example_zh: 零售銀行業務以儲蓄與貸款等日常產品服務個別客戶。

gept.example_en: Her financial advisor suggested increasing contributions to her retirement account.
gept.example_zh: 她的理財顧問建議增加她退休帳戶的提撥金額。

gept.example_en: Generating consistent alpha over many years is the goal of most active fund managers.
gept.example_zh: 多年持續創造超額報酬是大多數主動型基金經理人的目標。

gept.example_en: A stock with a beta greater than one tends to move more than the overall market.
gept.example_zh: 貝他值大於一的股票走勢通常比整體市場波動更大。

gept.example_en: Today's spot price for crude oil rose sharply after fresh supply concerns emerged.
gept.example_zh: 在新的供應憂慮浮現後，今日原油現貨價格大幅上漲。

gept.example_en: Investing in unproven start-ups is generally considered a highly speculative activity.
gept.example_zh: 投資未經驗證的新創公司通常被視為高度投機的行為。

gept.example_en: Many analysts warned that the housing market was forming a dangerous price bubble.
gept.example_zh: 許多分析師警告房地產市場正形成危險的價格泡沫。

gept.example_en: The stock market crash wiped out trillions of dollars in shareholder wealth.
gept.example_zh: 股市崩盤使股東財富蒸發數兆美元。

gept.example_en: Stocks officially entered a bear market after falling over twenty percent from highs.
gept.example_zh: 在從高點下跌超過百分之二十後，股市正式進入空頭市場。

gept.example_en: A long bull market made many ordinary investors comfortable holding risky assets.
gept.example_zh: 長期多頭市場讓許多一般投資人安心持有風險資產。

gept.example_en: The secondary offering let early backers sell some of their existing shares.
gept.example_zh: 二次發行讓早期支持者出售部分既有持股。

gept.example_en: Retirees often shift their savings into fixed income for more predictable cash flow.
gept.example_zh: 退休人士常將儲蓄轉入固定收益，以獲得較可預測的現金流。

gept.example_en: A treasury bond is considered one of the safest investments available to the public.
gept.example_zh: 國庫債券被視為公眾可投資的最安全標的之一。

gept.example_en: A corporate bond typically offers higher yields than government debt of similar length.
gept.example_zh: 公司債的殖利率通常高於相同期限的政府債券。

gept.example_en: Many pension funds may only buy bonds that carry an investment grade rating.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休基金只能購買具投資等級評等的債券。

gept.example_en: The balance sheet shows the company's assets, liabilities, and shareholder equity.
gept.example_zh: 資產負債表呈現公司的資產、負債與股東權益。

gept.example_en: The income statement summarizes revenues and expenses over a fixed reporting period.
gept.example_zh: 損益表彙總固定報導期間內的收入與費用。

gept.example_en: A clear audit trail makes it easy to verify exactly how each transaction was processed.
gept.example_zh: 清晰的稽核軌跡讓人能輕鬆驗證每筆交易確切的處理方式。

gept.example_en: Earning extra income may push some workers into a higher tax bracket this year.
gept.example_zh: 額外收入今年可能把部分工作者推進更高的稅率級距。

gept.example_en: She claimed a tax deduction for the interest paid on her home mortgage.
gept.example_zh: 她就房屋貸款的利息申報了稅務扣除。

gept.example_en: Families with young children can apply for a generous child tax credit each year.
gept.example_zh: 有幼兒的家庭每年可申請優渥的兒童稅額抵免。

gept.example_en: Contributing to a retirement plan can lower your taxable income for the current year.
gept.example_zh: 提撥退休計畫可降低你當年度的應稅所得。

gept.example_en: Many countries charge a value-added tax on goods and services at each sales stage.
gept.example_zh: 許多國家在商品與服務的各銷售環節徵收加值稅。

gept.example_en: The final price on the receipt includes a sales tax of seven percent.
gept.example_zh: 收據上的最終價格包含百分之七的銷售稅。

gept.example_en: Most countries collect income tax from their workers to fund public services.
gept.example_zh: 多數國家向工作者徵收所得稅以資助公共服務。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers pledged to close a loophole that let large firms avoid paying any tax.
gept.example_zh: 立法者承諾堵住讓大企業得以零稅負的漏洞。

gept.example_en: Hiding income in offshore accounts is a serious form of tax evasion in most countries.
gept.example_zh: 在境外帳戶藏匿所得在多數國家屬嚴重的逃稅行為。

gept.example_en: Legal tax avoidance involves arranging your affairs to minimize taxes within the law.
gept.example_zh: 合法的避稅指在法律範圍內安排事務以將稅負最小化。

gept.example_en: Several wealthy individuals routed their earnings through a known offshore tax haven.
gept.example_zh: 數位富有人士將收入透過知名的境外避稅天堂轉移。

gept.example_en: Holding money in an offshore account is legal if it is properly reported each year.
gept.example_zh: 將資金存於境外帳戶若每年妥善申報即屬合法。

gept.example_en: She paid the deposit with a wire transfer directly from her bank to the seller.
gept.example_zh: 她直接由銀行以電匯方式支付訂金給賣方。

gept.example_en: Marketing teams must justify their spending with a measurable return on investment.
gept.example_zh: 行銷團隊必須以可衡量的投資報酬率證明其支出合理。

gept.example_en: Income investors often favor stocks offering a steady and attractive dividend yield.
gept.example_zh: 收益型投資人常偏好提供穩定且具吸引力股息殖利率的股票。

gept.example_en: An improving operating margin shows the firm controls its costs effectively over time.
gept.example_zh: 營業利益率提升顯示公司持續有效控制成本。

gept.example_en: Even with rising sales, the net margin can shrink if costs grow even faster.
gept.example_zh: 即便營收上升，若成本成長更快，淨利率仍可能縮減。

gept.example_en: The cafe reached its break-even point during the third year of operation.
gept.example_zh: 這家咖啡店在營運第三年達到損益兩平點。

gept.example_en: Large factories benefit from economies of scale that lower their cost per unit.
gept.example_zh: 大型工廠受惠於規模經濟，降低每單位成本。

gept.example_en: The opportunity cost of a long vacation is the income you give up by not working.
gept.example_zh: 長假的機會成本就是你因不工作而放棄的收入。

gept.example_en: Essential medicine often shows inelastic demand even when prices rise sharply.
gept.example_zh: 即便價格大漲，必需藥品的需求通常仍缺乏彈性。

gept.example_en: A disruption in the global supply chain delayed deliveries of many electronic goods.
gept.example_zh: 全球供應鏈中斷延遲了許多電子產品的交貨。

gept.example_en: Macroeconomics studies large issues like national output, inflation, and unemployment.
gept.example_zh: 總體經濟學研究國民產出、通膨與失業等大問題。

gept.example_en: Microeconomics focuses on the choices made by individual households and firms.
gept.example_zh: 個體經濟學聚焦於個別家庭與廠商的選擇。

gept.example_en: The gross national product also counts income earned by citizens working abroad.
gept.example_zh: 國民生產毛額也計入公民在海外工作所賺取的收入。

gept.example_en: A rising producer price index often warns that consumer prices will soon climb too.
gept.example_zh: 生產者物價指數上揚通常預警消費者物價也將上升。

gept.example_en: Inflation gradually erodes the purchasing power of money sitting idle in savings.
gept.example_zh: 通膨逐漸侵蝕閒置儲蓄資金的購買力。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers raised the minimum wage to help low-income workers cope with rising rents.
gept.example_zh: 立法者調高最低工資以協助低收入工作者應對租金上漲。

gept.example_en: Strong wage growth gave consumers more confidence to spend on travel and dining.
gept.example_zh: 強勁的工資成長使消費者更有信心在旅行與餐飲上消費。

gept.example_en: A trade deficit happens when a country imports more goods than it exports overall.
gept.example_zh: 當一國進口商品總值超過出口時即出現貿易逆差。

gept.example_en: A persistent trade surplus may strengthen a country's currency over many years.
gept.example_zh: 持續的貿易順差可能在多年間使該國貨幣升值。

gept.example_en: Devaluation of the local currency made exports cheaper for foreign buyers overnight.
gept.example_zh: 本地貨幣貶值使出口品對外國買家一夜之間變得便宜。

gept.example_en: A sharp revaluation of the currency hurt exporters and helped importers significantly.
gept.example_zh: 貨幣大幅升值傷害出口商，但對進口商有顯著好處。

gept.example_en: Daily fluctuation in exchange rates can affect the profit of international companies.
gept.example_zh: 匯率每日波動可能影響跨國公司的獲利。

gept.example_en: Lenders usually limit the loan-to-value ratio to protect themselves from falling prices.
gept.example_zh: 放款機構通常限制貸款價值比以保護自己免受房價下跌影響。

gept.example_en: Regulators try to prevent a single bank's failure from creating systemic risk.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構設法防止單一銀行倒閉引發系統性風險。

gept.example_en: Government rescues of failing banks can encourage moral hazard among future managers.
gept.example_zh: 政府紓困倒閉銀行可能助長未來管理者的道德風險。

gept.example_en: Quantitative easing involves a central bank buying bonds to inject money into the economy.
gept.example_zh: 量化寬鬆指央行買進債券以向經濟體注入資金。

gept.example_en: Governments often use deficit spending to support the economy during a downturn.
gept.example_zh: 政府常以赤字支出支撐經濟以度過衰退。

gept.example_en: The government posted a rare budget surplus thanks to higher than expected tax revenue.
gept.example_zh: 拜稅收高於預期所賜，政府罕見地出現預算盈餘。

gept.example_en: A sovereign bond is debt issued by a national government to finance its activities.
gept.example_zh: 主權債券是一國政府為支應其活動所發行的債務。

gept.example_en: The credit crunch made it very hard for small businesses to obtain new loans.
gept.example_zh: 信用緊縮使小企業很難取得新貸款。

gept.example_en: The business cycle includes alternating phases of expansion and contraction over time.
gept.example_zh: 景氣循環在時間上交替出現擴張與收縮階段。

gept.example_en: Unemployment is a lagging indicator because it changes after the economy already shifts.
gept.example_zh: 失業是落後指標，因為它在經濟轉折後才改變。

gept.example_en: Managers rightsize their teams to match the changing needs of the business.
gept.example_zh: 管理者調整團隊規模以配合業務變化的需求。

gept.example_en: A leveraged buyout uses large amounts of borrowed money to purchase a target company.
gept.example_zh: 槓桿收購使用大量借款資金以買下目標公司。

gept.example_en: Private equity firms often acquire companies, restructure them, and resell them at a profit.
gept.example_zh: 私募股權公司常收購企業、重組後再以獲利出售。

gept.example_en: Venture capital funds young companies that need money to develop new technologies.
gept.example_zh: 創業投資為需要資金開發新技術的年輕公司提供資金。

gept.example_en: An angel investor provided the seed money to help the founders test their idea.
gept.example_zh: 一位天使投資人提供種子資金協助創辦人測試構想。

gept.example_en: Investors negotiated a valuation cap to protect themselves in the next funding round.
gept.example_zh: 投資人協商估值上限以在下一輪募資中保護自己。

gept.example_en: Peer-to-peer lending platforms match borrowers directly with everyday individual lenders.
gept.example_zh: 個人對個人借貸平台直接撮合借款人與一般個人放款人。

gept.example_en: A neobank has no physical branches and offers all its services on a mobile app.
gept.example_zh: 純網銀沒有實體分行，所有服務皆透過手機應用程式提供。

gept.example_en: She paid for the coffee using a digital wallet linked to her main bank account.
gept.example_zh: 她使用連結主要銀行帳戶的數位錢包付咖啡錢。

gept.example_en: Mobile payment is now accepted at most convenience stores in major Asian cities.
gept.example_zh: 如今亞洲主要城市的大多數便利商店都接受行動支付。

gept.example_en: Contactless payment makes checkout faster because customers simply tap their cards.
gept.example_zh: 感應式支付使結帳更快，因為顧客只需感應卡片。

gept.example_en: Every altcoin tries to attract investors with features the largest coin does not provide.
gept.example_zh: 各種替代幣都試圖以最大幣種未具備的功能吸引投資人。

gept.example_en: Decentralized finance services let users borrow and lend without traditional banks.
gept.example_zh: 去中心化金融服務讓使用者無需傳統銀行就能借貸。

gept.example_en: Strict anti-money laundering rules force banks to monitor unusual transactions carefully.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的反洗錢規定強制銀行仔細監控異常交易。

gept.example_en: Know your customer procedures require new clients to provide identification documents.
gept.example_zh: 認識你的客戶程序要求新客戶提供身分證明文件。

gept.example_en: The compliance officer reviews policies to ensure they meet every legal requirement.
gept.example_zh: 法遵長檢視政策以確保符合每一項法律規定。

gept.example_en: A watchdog agency monitors big banks to prevent unfair treatment of their customers.
gept.example_zh: 監督機構監控大型銀行以防止其不公平對待客戶。

gept.example_en: Consumer protection laws give borrowers clear information about loan terms and fees.
gept.example_zh: 消費者保護法令給予借款人清楚的貸款條款與費用資訊。

gept.example_en: Regulators investigated suspicious trading patterns for possible market manipulation.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構就可疑的交易型態調查是否涉及市場操縱。

gept.example_en: A Ponzi scheme pays earlier investors using money taken from later participants.
gept.example_zh: 龐氏騙局以後加入者的資金支付給早期投資人。

gept.example_en: A pyramid scheme collapses once the supply of new recruits suddenly dries up.
gept.example_zh: 當新進加入者突然枯竭時，金字塔騙局便會崩潰。

gept.example_en: Paying your credit card bill before the due date helps you avoid expensive penalty fees.
gept.example_zh: 在到期日前繳清信用卡帳單可避免昂貴的滯納金。

gept.example_en: The loan offers a short grace period before interest begins to accumulate each month.
gept.example_zh: 這筆貸款提供短暫寬限期，之後每月才開始累計利息。

gept.example_en: Asking the bank to raise your credit limit can sometimes improve your credit score.
gept.example_zh: 請銀行調高你的信用額度有時可以提升信用分數。

gept.example_en: Each annuity payment arrives on the same date for many years after retirement.
gept.example_zh: 每筆年金給付在退休後多年於同一日期發放。

gept.example_en: She received a lump sum from her insurance policy after the unexpected accident.
gept.example_zh: 在意外發生後，她從保單一次性領取了一筆款項。

gept.example_en: A credit union is a member-owned cooperative that often charges lower banking fees.
gept.example_zh: 信用合作社為會員共有的合作組織，通常收取較低的銀行費用。

gept.example_en: Another rate hike could make new mortgages noticeably more expensive for buyers.
gept.example_zh: 再一次升息可能使新房貸對買方而言明顯變貴。

gept.example_en: Stocks rallied strongly on hopes of an imminent rate cut by the central bank.
gept.example_zh: 在央行即將降息的期待下，股市強勁上揚。

gept.example_en: The government offered a small tax rebate to households that installed solar panels.
gept.example_zh: 政府向安裝太陽能板的家庭提供小額稅金退費。

gept.example_en: Each card transaction costs a small merchant fee that retailers must build into prices.
gept.example_zh: 每筆刷卡交易都會產生小額商家手續費，零售商必須將其納入定價。

gept.example_en: A credit bureau collects information about how reliably consumers pay back their debts.
gept.example_zh: 徵信機構收集消費者償還債務可靠程度的資訊。

gept.example_en: Strict identity verification helps banks block fraudsters from opening fake accounts.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的身分驗證有助銀行阻止詐騙者開立假帳戶。

gept.example_en: Two-factor authentication makes it much harder for thieves to access your bank account.
gept.example_zh: 雙因素驗證讓竊賊更難進入你的銀行帳戶。

gept.example_en: Buy now pay later services split a purchase into a few interest-free installments.
gept.example_zh: 先買後付服務將一筆消費分為數期免息分期付款。

gept.example_en: Refiners often buy crude oil on the spot market when their long-term supplies run low.
gept.example_zh: 當長期供應不足時，煉油廠常在現貨市場購入原油。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 店頭市場（交易）
gept.example_en: Many bonds trade over the counter rather than on an organized public exchange.
gept.example_zh: 許多債券在店頭市場交易，而不在公開的有組織交易所上市。

gept.example_en: Shareholder activism pressured the company to replace its underperforming board members.
gept.example_zh: 股東行動主義迫使公司更換表現不佳的董事會成員。

gept.example_en: She submitted a proxy vote because she could not attend the annual general meeting.
gept.example_zh: 由於無法出席年度股東大會，她提交了委託投票。

gept.example_en: The annual report summarizes the firm's performance, strategy, and risks for shareholders.
gept.example_zh: 年度報告向股東彙整公司的績效、策略與風險。

gept.example_en: Dividend reinvestment uses each payout to buy more shares rather than taking cash out.
gept.example_zh: 股息再投資將每次配息用於買進更多股票，而非提領現金。

gept.example_en: After the stock split each existing share was divided into four cheaper shares.
gept.example_zh: 股票分割後，每股原股被分割為四股較便宜的股票。

gept.example_en: The parent firm turned its software unit into a separate spinoff company last year.
gept.example_zh: 母公司去年將其軟體部門分拆為獨立的分拆公司。

gept.example_en: A holding company owns shares in other businesses rather than producing goods directly.
gept.example_zh: 控股公司持有其他企業的股份而非直接生產商品。

gept.example_en: Fashion trendsetters often receive samples weeks before items appear on store shelves.
gept.example_zh: 時尚潮流引領者通常會在商品上架前數週收到樣品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 熱門用語；流行術語
gept.example_en: Sustainability has become a marketing buzzword across nearly every consumer goods category today.
gept.example_zh: 永續性已成為今日幾乎所有消費品類別的行銷流行用語。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 話題熱度；熱議聲量
gept.example_en: The teaser trailer generated enormous buzz online within hours of its initial release.
gept.example_zh: 預告片發布後幾小時內就在網路上引發巨大話題熱度。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大肆宣傳；炒作熱度
gept.example_en: Marketing teams build hype around limited releases to drive launch-day urgency.
gept.example_zh: 行銷團隊圍繞限量發售營造炒作熱度，以推動發售當日的急迫感。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公開推薦；點名感謝
gept.example_en: A shoutout from a celebrity tripled the small bakery's online orders overnight.
gept.example_zh: 名人的公開推薦讓這家小烘焙坊的線上訂單一夜之間翻為三倍。

gept.example_en: Our unboxing experience was redesigned to feel like opening a thoughtful personal gift.
gept.example_zh: 我們重新設計開箱體驗，讓人感覺像打開一份貼心的私人禮物。

gept.example_en: Every subscriber received a freebie sample with their first delivery of organic tea.
gept.example_zh: 每位訂戶都收到隨第一次有機茶配送附贈的免費試用品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 贈品活動；抽獎活動
gept.example_en: The giveaway requires participants to follow the page and tag two interested friends.
gept.example_zh: 此抽獎活動要求參加者追蹤該頁面並標註兩位感興趣的朋友。

gept.example_en: Dynamic pricing adjusts the airfare based on demand at any given moment.
gept.example_zh: 動態定價會根據當下需求調整機票價格。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 分級的；階梯式的
gept.example_en: Our tiered membership unlocks additional features as customers spend more each year.
gept.example_zh: 我們的分級會員制度會隨顧客每年消費增加而開啟更多功能。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 組合套裝；綑綁銷售
gept.example_en: The starter bundle includes a moisturizer, cleanser, and travel pouch at substantial savings.
gept.example_zh: 入門組合套裝包含乳液、潔顏與旅行袋，可大幅節省花費。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 回饋點數；獎勵計畫
gept.example_en: Members earn rewards on every purchase and redeem them for exclusive merchandise items.
gept.example_zh: 會員每次消費都可累積回饋點數，並可兌換獨家商品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 造型樣本書；服裝型錄
gept.example_en: The spring lookbook features dreamy pastel outfits photographed in coastal locations.
gept.example_zh: 春季造型樣本書呈現在海岸地點拍攝的夢幻粉彩穿搭。

gept.example_en: The seasonal catalog arrives in mailboxes every quarter to inspire upcoming purchases.
gept.example_zh: 季節性商品目錄每季寄送至信箱，以啟發即將到來的購買。

gept.example_en: Staff handed leaflets to passersby announcing the grand reopening of the renovated store.
gept.example_zh: 工作人員向路人發放傳單，宣布翻新後門市的重新開幕。

gept.example_en: Each mailer arrives with a personalized coupon based on the recipient's purchase history.
gept.example_zh: 每份郵寄廣告都附有依收件人購買紀錄量身打造的個人化優惠券。

gept.example_en: The infographic neatly summarized survey results in colorful charts and simple captions.
gept.example_zh: 這份資訊圖表以彩色圖表與簡潔說明清楚整理了調查結果。

gept.example_en: The creative director approved the storyboard before the agency began filming the commercial.
gept.example_zh: 創意總監先核准故事板，代理商才開始拍攝這支廣告。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 微型網站；活動專屬網站
gept.example_en: The brand built a microsite dedicated entirely to its summer fragrance collection.
gept.example_zh: 該品牌建立了一個微型網站，專門介紹其夏季香水系列。

gept.example_en: The animated banner-ad outperformed the static version across both desktop and mobile users.
gept.example_zh: 動態橫幅廣告在桌機與行動裝置使用者上的表現都超越靜態版本。

gept.example_en: Every sponsored post must clearly disclose the partnership to maintain audience trust.
gept.example_zh: 每篇業配貼文都必須明確揭露合作關係，以維護觀眾信任。

gept.example_en: The shoe brand renewed its sponsorship with the national soccer team for another season.
gept.example_zh: 該鞋類品牌與國家足球隊續簽下一季的贊助合作。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 品牌重塑；重新定位
gept.example_en: Management decided to rebrand the cafe chain to appeal to younger remote workers.
gept.example_zh: 管理層決定將咖啡連鎖品牌重塑以吸引較年輕的遠距工作者。

gept.example_en: The company plans to relaunch its flagship perfume with updated packaging next spring.
gept.example_zh: 公司計畫於明年春季以更新包裝重新上市其招牌香水。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 預告；引人好奇的宣傳
gept.example_en: The teaser campaign showed only fragments of the product before the official reveal.
gept.example_zh: 預告活動在正式揭曉前只展示產品的片段。

gept.example_en: Personalized onboarding became the key differentiator in a crowded software market.
gept.example_zh: 個人化的上手導引成為擁擠軟體市場中的關鍵差異化要素。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 利基市場；小眾市場
gept.example_en: The studio found a profitable niche designing custom typography for boutique restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 這家工作室找到了為精品餐廳設計客製字體的獲利利基。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 顧客人物誌；典型角色
gept.example_en: The team built a detailed persona representing the typical busy working parent shopper.
gept.example_zh: 團隊建立了一份詳細的人物誌，代表典型忙碌的職場家長顧客。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 銷售管道；銷售流程
gept.example_en: Sales managers review the pipeline-sales each Monday to forecast quarterly revenue accurately.
gept.example_zh: 業務經理每週一檢視銷售管道，以準確預測季度營收。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 溫熱潛客；高意向潛客
gept.example_en: A warm-lead converts far more quickly than someone unfamiliar with our brand.
gept.example_zh: 溫熱潛客的轉換速度遠快於不熟悉我們品牌的人。

gept.example_en: A concise cold-email that addresses a specific pain point gets the best response rates.
gept.example_zh: 簡潔的陌生開發郵件針對具體痛點切入，回覆率最高。

gept.example_en: The expanding salesforce now covers every metropolitan region across three neighboring countries.
gept.example_zh: 不斷擴張的銷售團隊如今涵蓋三個鄰國的所有都會區域。

gept.example_en: The drip-campaign sends progressively detailed product information over the course of two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 滴灌式郵件行銷在兩週內逐步寄送越來越詳盡的產品資訊。

gept.example_en: The article generated half a million pageview totals in its first published week.
gept.example_zh: 這篇文章在發布的第一週累積了五十萬的頁面瀏覽總數。

gept.example_en: Every impression counts toward overall brand recall even without an immediate click.
gept.example_zh: 每次廣告曝光都會累積品牌記憶，即使沒有立即點擊。

gept.example_en: Influencer partnerships expanded our reach to demographics we previously struggled to engage.
gept.example_zh: 與網紅合作擴大了我們先前難以接觸到的人口族群的觸及。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 錢包佔有率；消費金額佔比
gept.example_en: Cross-selling premium services increased the share-of-wallet from our loyal subscribers.
gept.example_zh: 交叉銷售高階服務提升了我們忠實訂戶的消費金額佔比。

gept.example_en: A thorough competitive-analysis identifies gaps your brand can credibly fill in customers minds.
gept.example_zh: 完整的競爭分析能找出你品牌可在顧客心中可信填補的空隙。

gept.example_en: Sharp copywriting turns ordinary product features into emotionally compelling buying reasons.
gept.example_zh: 出色的文案撰寫能將平凡的產品功能化為打動人心的購買理由。

gept.example_en: Please tighten the copy on the landing page so it scans more quickly today.
gept.example_zh: 請精簡著陸頁的文案，讓今天讀起來更順眼。

gept.example_en: The tagline-line distills the brand promise into seven memorable, rhythm-driven words.
gept.example_zh: 這句品牌標語把品牌承諾濃縮為七個富有節奏感的難忘字眼。

gept.example_en: The campaign follows a narrative-arc from problem awareness to confident, sustained resolution.
gept.example_zh: 這檔活動以敘事弧線呈現，從察覺問題走向自信且持久的解決。

gept.example_en: The content-calendar maps every post, email, and video planned across the next quarter.
gept.example_zh: 內容行事曆規劃下一季每篇貼文、郵件與影片的安排。

gept.example_en: An informative carousel often outperforms a single image in saved-post metrics on Instagram.
gept.example_zh: 資訊豐富的輪播圖在 Instagram 收藏數上常勝過單張圖片貼文。

gept.example_en: A thirty-second behind-the-scenes reel can introduce the brand to entirely new follower communities.
gept.example_zh: 一支三十秒的幕後短影音可將品牌介紹給全新的追蹤社群。

gept.example_en: The highlight-reel showcases the most powerful customer testimonials from this year's campaign.
gept.example_zh: 這支精華影片呈現今年度活動最動人的顧客見證。

gept.example_en: Behind-the-scenes content humanizes the brand and builds deeper emotional bonds with shoppers.
gept.example_zh: 幕後花絮內容讓品牌更有人情味，建立與顧客更深的情感連結。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 操作教學的；步驟說明的
gept.example_en: How-to videos consistently rank highest in organic search for cooking-related shopper queries.
gept.example_zh: 操作教學影片在烹飪相關購物搜尋的自然排名中始終最高。

gept.example_en: An integrated-campaign delivers a coherent message across television, social media, and print.
gept.example_zh: 整合行銷活動在電視、社群與印刷品上傳遞一致的訊息。

gept.example_en: An omnichannel approach lets shoppers move smoothly between mobile, desktop, and physical stores.
gept.example_zh: 全通路策略讓顧客在行動、桌機與實體店面之間順暢切換。

gept.example_en: A multichannel rollout reaches customers through every platform they already use daily.
gept.example_zh: 多通路鋪展透過顧客日常使用的每個平台觸及他們。

gept.example_en: Every touchpoint, from packaging to support emails, shapes the overall customer impression.
gept.example_zh: 從包裝到客服郵件，每個接觸點都形塑整體的顧客印象。

gept.example_en: Mapping the customer-journey reveals exactly where shoppers feel friction or delight.
gept.example_zh: 繪製顧客旅程能精確揭示購物者在哪裡感到不便或驚喜。

gept.example_en: A simple onboarding-flow guides new users to their first success within minutes.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的新手引導流程在數分鐘內帶領新使用者達成第一次成功。

gept.example_en: Sending a friendly reminder recovered roughly twenty percent of every abandoned-cart we tracked.
gept.example_zh: 寄送友善提醒挽回了我們追蹤的棄置購物車中約兩成。

gept.example_en: Streamlining the checkout-flow to three pages reduced shopping cart abandonment dramatically.
gept.example_zh: 將結帳流程精簡為三頁大幅降低了購物車放棄率。

gept.example_en: Free shipping above sixty dollars lifted average-order-value across every product category measured.
gept.example_zh: 滿六十美元免運讓所有測量類別的平均訂單金額皆有提升。

gept.example_en: Adding social proof beneath the buy button improved the conversion-rate within two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 在購買按鈕下方加入社群好評，兩週內就提升了轉換率。

gept.example_en: Long-term search-engine-optimization investments compound for years after the initial editorial groundwork.
gept.example_zh: 搜尋引擎最佳化的長期投入會在最初編輯打底後持續複利數年。

gept.example_en: A backlink from a respected publication can dramatically improve a page's organic search visibility.
gept.example_zh: 來自知名出版物的反向連結能大幅提升頁面在自然搜尋的能見度。

gept.example_en: A persuasive meta-description acts almost like advertising copy directly beneath the blue heading.
gept.example_zh: 有說服力的中繼描述幾乎像直接在藍色標題下方的廣告文案。

gept.example_en: Thorough keyword-research uncovers the precise phrases customers type when looking for solutions.
gept.example_zh: 完整的關鍵字研究能挖出顧客尋找解方時實際輸入的字詞。

gept.example_en: Pages must match the underlying search-intent or they bounce visitors within seconds.
gept.example_zh: 頁面必須符合背後的搜尋意圖，否則訪客會在幾秒內跳出。

gept.example_en: Organic-traffic now accounts for nearly sixty percent of our highest-quality monthly leads.
gept.example_zh: 自然流量目前佔我們最高品質月度潛在客戶的近六成。

gept.example_en: Paid-traffic delivers results faster but stops the moment your campaign budget runs out.
gept.example_zh: 付費流量見效較快，但廣告預算一用完就會立刻停止。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 每次點擊付費廣告（PPC）
gept.example_en: Running PPC ads on branded terms protects against competitors stealing high-intent traffic.
gept.example_zh: 對品牌關鍵字下 PPC 廣告可防止競爭者搶走高意向流量。

gept.example_en: The display-network reaches readers across thousands of independent publishers and partner websites.
gept.example_zh: 聯播網能在數千家獨立出版商與夥伴網站上觸及讀者。

gept.example_en: Geotargeting lets local restaurants advertise only to diners within a few walking blocks.
gept.example_zh: 地理鎖定投放讓在地餐廳只對步行幾條街內的食客打廣告。

gept.example_en: Smart list-building turns one-time visitors into long-term subscribers who hear from you regularly.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的名單建立把一次性訪客變成長期訂戶，能定期收到你的訊息。

gept.example_en: Segmenting subscribers by interest produced almost double the click-throughs of unsegmented blasts.
gept.example_zh: 依興趣將訂戶分群帶來的點擊數幾乎是未分群群發的兩倍。

gept.example_en: Dynamic-content swaps banner images based on each viewer's location and recent browsing behavior.
gept.example_zh: 動態內容會依每位訪客的所在地與最近瀏覽行為更換橫幅圖片。

gept.example_en: A split-test on the call-to-action color quietly delivered a fifteen percent lift overnight.
gept.example_zh: 對行動呼籲顏色的分流測試在一夜之間悄悄帶來一成五的提升。

gept.example_en: Our net-promoter-score rose twelve points after we redesigned the customer support experience.
gept.example_zh: 我們重新設計客服體驗後，淨推薦值上升了十二分。

gept.example_en: A focus-group of typical commuters tested the packaging redesign before mass production began.
gept.example_zh: 在量產前，一組典型通勤者的焦點團體先測試了包裝重新設計。

gept.example_en: A new regional fulfillment-center cut average delivery times from four days to one.
gept.example_zh: 新的區域物流配送中心將平均送達時間從四天縮短為一天。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 一件代發；託運出貨
gept.example_en: Drop-shipping lets small online stores list products without holding any physical inventory.
gept.example_zh: 一件代發讓小型網店無需囤貨即可上架商品。

gept.example_en: Each subscription-box arrives monthly with curated samples tailored to subscriber taste profiles.
gept.example_zh: 每個訂閱制禮盒每月寄出，內含依訂戶口味檔案精選的試用品。

gept.example_en: The new loyalty-program rewards frequent shoppers with early access to limited collections.
gept.example_zh: 新的會員忠誠計畫獎勵常客優先取得限量系列商品。

gept.example_en: Reaching gold tier-status unlocks free shipping and exclusive previews of upcoming product launches.
gept.example_zh: 達到金級會員身分可解鎖免運及即將上市產品的獨家預覽。

gept.example_en: Members in the VIP-tier receive personal shopping consultations and birthday gifts every year.
gept.example_zh: VIP 等級會員每年都享有個人購物諮詢與生日禮品。

gept.example_en: Our customer-success team checks in proactively to ensure each client gets full value.
gept.example_zh: 我們的顧客成功團隊主動關心，確保每位客戶獲得完整價值。

gept.example_en: Each key account-manager handles roughly twenty enterprise relationships at any given time.
gept.example_zh: 每位重要客戶經理同時負責約二十個企業客戶關係。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 聯盟夥伴；分潤合作者
gept.example_en: Each affiliate earns a percentage commission on every qualifying customer purchase they refer.
gept.example_zh: 每位聯盟夥伴對其推薦的每筆合格訂單可獲百分比佣金。

gept.example_en: Clicking the affiliate-link credits the creator with a commission on any resulting purchase.
gept.example_zh: 點擊聯盟分潤連結後，所產生的任何購買都會給予該創作者佣金。

gept.example_en: A concise PR-pitch lands far more story placements than long, jargon-filled press releases.
gept.example_zh: 簡潔的公關推介信比冗長充滿術語的新聞稿能爭取到更多報導機會。

gept.example_en: Our media-kit includes a fact sheet, founder bios, and high-resolution downloadable product images.
gept.example_zh: 我們的媒體資料包含資料表、創辦人簡介與可下載的高解析度產品圖。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 觀點文章；專欄評論
gept.example_en: The founder's thought-piece on sustainable retail sparked debate among industry analysts and editors.
gept.example_zh: 創辦人關於永續零售的觀點文章在產業分析師與編輯間引發辯論。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 爆紅；快速病毒式傳播
gept.example_en: The simple recipe video managed to go-viral within hours of its initial upload.
gept.example_zh: 這支簡單的食譜影片在最初上傳後幾小時內就爆紅。

gept.example_en: Strong shareability often beats production polish on social platforms driven by recommendation algorithms.
gept.example_zh: 在演算法推薦驅動的社群平台上，強烈的可分享性常勝過精緻製作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 標題殺人法；騙點擊
gept.example_en: Avoid click-bait headlines because readers quickly learn to distrust them and disengage entirely.
gept.example_zh: 避免騙點擊標題，因為讀者很快會學會不信任並完全不再互動。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 錯失恐懼（行銷手法）
gept.example_en: Limited countdown timers tap into shopper FOMO and accelerate decision-making at checkout.
gept.example_zh: 限時倒數計時器觸發購物者的錯失恐懼，加速結帳時的決策。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 限量發售；上架釋出
gept.example_en: Each Friday drop sells out within minutes among the brand's most dedicated streetwear fans.
gept.example_zh: 每週五的限量發售在品牌最死忠的街頭服飾粉絲間幾分鐘內就會售罄。

gept.example_en: Loyalty members received twenty-four hours of exclusive presale access before the public release.
gept.example_zh: 會員在公開發售前獨享二十四小時的預售權。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 軟性上市；低調試水溫
gept.example_en: A soft-launch in two regional cities surfaced bugs before the full national rollout.
gept.example_zh: 在兩座區域城市的軟性上市先找出了問題，才進行全國正式鋪展。

gept.example_en: She needed seven stitches after slicing her finger while chopping vegetables in the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 她在廚房切菜時割傷手指，需要縫七針。

gept.example_en: Annual mammograms are recommended for women over forty to detect breast cancer early.
gept.example_zh: 建議四十歲以上女性每年做乳房攝影以早期發現乳癌。

gept.example_en: The ultrasound clearly showed a healthy baby developing in the second trimester of her pregnancy.
gept.example_zh: 超音波清楚顯示她懷孕第二期的胎兒發育健康。

gept.example_en: His MRI revealed a small herniated disc that was compressing the nerve in his lower back.
gept.example_zh: 他的核磁共振造影顯示一個小的椎間盤突出壓迫到下背部的神經。

gept.example_en: The CT-scan provided detailed cross-sectional images of the patient's lungs after the car accident.
gept.example_zh: 電腦斷層掃描提供了車禍後病患肺部詳細的橫斷面影像。

gept.example_en: The patient was placed on a ventilator to support breathing while recovering from severe pneumonia.
gept.example_zh: 病患被裝上呼吸器以支持呼吸，同時從嚴重肺炎中康復。

gept.example_en: Doctors implanted a pacemaker to regulate his irregular heartbeat and improve his quality of life.
gept.example_zh: 醫師植入心律調節器以調節他不規則的心跳並改善生活品質。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 靜脈內的；靜脈注射的
gept.example_en: Doctors administered intravenous fluids to prevent dehydration during his prolonged hospital stay.
gept.example_zh: 醫師施以靜脈注射液體以防止他長期住院期間脫水。

gept.example_en: The doctor switched him from injections to oral medication once his condition improved significantly.
gept.example_zh: 病情顯著改善後，醫師將他從注射改為口服藥物。

gept.example_en: Asthma patients should always carry their rescue inhaler in case of a sudden attack.
gept.example_zh: 氣喘病患應隨身攜帶急救吸入器以防突發發作。

gept.example_en: Pediatric dosing must be calculated carefully based on the child's weight and overall health.
gept.example_zh: 小兒給藥必須根據兒童的體重和整體健康狀況謹慎計算。

gept.example_en: The pharmacist explained how to take each medication and warned about potential interactions.
gept.example_zh: 藥劑師說明如何服用每種藥物並警告可能的交互作用。

gept.example_en: He waited at the pharmacy-counter for nearly twenty minutes before his prescription was ready.
gept.example_zh: 他在藥局櫃台等了將近二十分鐘才拿到處方藥。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 非處方的；成藥的
gept.example_en: Many over-the-counter medications can relieve mild cold symptoms without needing a doctor's visit.
gept.example_zh: 許多非處方藥可以緩解輕微感冒症狀，不需要看醫生。

gept.example_en: Choosing a generic-drug instead of a brand name can significantly reduce monthly medication costs.
gept.example_zh: 選擇學名藥而非品牌藥可大幅降低每月的藥物費用。

gept.example_en: She lost most of her hair during the first round of chemotherapy for breast cancer.
gept.example_zh: 她在第一輪乳癌化學治療期間掉了大部分的頭髮。

gept.example_en: Immunotherapy harnesses the body's own immune system to identify and attack cancer cells.
gept.example_zh: 免疫治療利用身體自己的免疫系統來辨識並攻擊癌細胞。

gept.example_en: After two years of treatment, her leukemia is finally in complete remission according to recent tests.
gept.example_zh: 經過兩年的治療，根據最近的檢查，她的白血病終於完全緩解了。

gept.example_en: He worried about a relapse of his addiction after going through six months of rehabilitation.
gept.example_zh: 經過六個月的康復治療後，他擔心他的成癮會復發。

gept.example_en: Childhood leukemia has much higher survival rates today thanks to advances in targeted treatments.
gept.example_zh: 由於標靶治療的進步，兒童白血病今日的存活率已大幅提升。

gept.example_en: Modern psychiatry combines medication, therapy, and lifestyle changes to treat various mental health conditions.
gept.example_zh: 現代精神醫學結合藥物、治療和生活方式改變來治療各種心理健康狀況。

gept.example_en: She started weekly psychotherapy sessions to work through the trauma from her recent divorce.
gept.example_zh: 她開始每週心理治療療程，以處理近期離婚帶來的創傷。

gept.example_en: His addiction to prescription painkillers began after a serious back injury two years ago.
gept.example_zh: 兩年前一次嚴重的背傷後，他開始對處方止痛藥成癮。

gept.example_en: After completing a thirty-day rehab program, he committed to attending support meetings every week.
gept.example_zh: 完成三十天的戒治療程後，他承諾每週參加支持團體聚會。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 用藥過量；服藥過量
gept.example_en: The emergency room sees frequent overdose cases involving accidental mixing of prescription medications and alcohol.
gept.example_zh: 急診室經常見到因處方藥與酒精意外混用而引起的用藥過量案例。

gept.example_en: The opioid crisis has prompted doctors to seek safer alternatives for chronic pain management.
gept.example_zh: 鴉片類藥物危機促使醫師為慢性疼痛管理尋找更安全的替代方案。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 雙相情緒障礙的；躁鬱的
gept.example_en: His bipolar disorder causes dramatic mood swings between depressive lows and manic high-energy periods.
gept.example_zh: 他的雙相情緒障礙導致他在憂鬱低潮和躁狂高能量期間出現劇烈情緒波動。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 創傷後壓力症候群
gept.example_en: Veterans with PTSD often benefit from specialized therapy combined with peer support groups.
gept.example_zh: 罹患創傷後壓力症候群的退伍軍人通常受惠於專業治療結合同儕支持團體。

gept.example_en: Her OCD compelled her to wash her hands dozens of times every single day.
gept.example_zh: 她的強迫症迫使她每天洗手數十次。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 注意力不足過動症
gept.example_en: Children with ADHD often struggle to focus in traditional classroom settings without proper accommodations.
gept.example_zh: 罹患注意力不足過動症的兒童在沒有適當輔導下，常難以在傳統教室裡專注。

gept.example_en: Early diagnosis of autism allows children to access supportive interventions at the most critical developmental stages.
gept.example_zh: 自閉症的早期診斷讓兒童能在最關鍵的發展階段獲得支持性介入。

gept.example_en: His grandmother's dementia has progressed rapidly, and she no longer recognizes most family members.
gept.example_zh: 他祖母的失智症進展迅速，她已經認不出大部分家人了。

gept.example_en: Alzheimer's research focuses on slowing cognitive decline through new medications and lifestyle interventions.
gept.example_zh: 阿茲海默症研究專注於透過新藥物和生活方式介入來減緩認知衰退。

gept.example_en: Parkinson's symptoms typically include tremors, rigidity, and gradually worsening difficulty with movement coordination.
gept.example_zh: 帕金森氏症的典型症狀包括顫抖、僵直和逐漸惡化的動作協調困難。

gept.example_en: His doctor advised dietary changes to lower his cholesterol before considering statin medications.
gept.example_zh: 在考慮使用降膽固醇藥物前，他的醫師建議透過飲食改變降低膽固醇。

gept.example_en: An underactive thyroid can cause fatigue, weight gain, and sensitivity to cold temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 甲狀腺功能低下會導致疲倦、體重增加和對低溫敏感。

gept.example_en: His shoulder dislocation required immediate medical attention and weeks of physical therapy afterward.
gept.example_zh: 他的肩膀脫臼需要立即就醫治療，事後還需要數週的物理治療。

gept.example_en: After her stroke, intensive speech-therapy helped her regain the ability to communicate clearly.
gept.example_zh: 中風後，密集的語言治療幫助她重新獲得清楚溝通的能力。

gept.example_en: Custom orthotics inside her shoes corrected her flat feet and eliminated chronic ankle pain.
gept.example_zh: 她鞋內客製化的矯正器具矯正了她的扁平足，並消除了慢性腳踝疼痛。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無障礙的；可使用輪椅進出的
gept.example_en: All entrances to the new hospital are wheelchair-accessible with automatic doors and gentle ramps.
gept.example_zh: 新醫院所有入口都是無障礙設計，配有自動門和平緩斜坡。

gept.example_en: Her grandmother moved into an assisted-living facility when daily tasks became too difficult to manage alone.
gept.example_zh: 當日常事務變得難以獨自處理時，她的祖母搬到輔助式生活照護設施。

gept.example_en: An advance-directive ensures your medical preferences are respected if you become unable to communicate them.
gept.example_zh: 預立醫療指示確保當你無法表達意願時，你的醫療偏好仍會受到尊重。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不施行心肺復甦術指示
gept.example_en: He signed a DNR order after lengthy discussions with his doctors and immediate family members.
gept.example_zh: 在與醫師和近親家人長時間討論後，他簽署了不施行心肺復甦術指示。

gept.example_en: She registered as an organ-donor when she renewed her driver's license last summer.
gept.example_zh: 去年夏天她在更新駕照時登記成為器官捐贈者。

gept.example_en: Lifelong immunosuppressant therapy is required after most solid organ transplant procedures.
gept.example_zh: 大多數實體器官移植手術後都需要終身使用免疫抑制劑治療。

gept.example_en: He visits the clinic three times a week for dialysis treatments lasting four hours each.
gept.example_zh: 他每週到診所三次進行透析治療，每次持續四小時。

gept.example_en: The trauma patient needed an emergency blood-transfusion to replace the significant blood loss.
gept.example_zh: 這名外傷病患需要緊急輸血以補充大量失血。

gept.example_en: Plasma donations help patients with burns, trauma, and certain bleeding disorders recover more quickly.
gept.example_zh: 血漿捐贈幫助燒傷、外傷和某些出血性疾病的病患更快康復。

gept.example_en: She felt constantly tired and was diagnosed as anemic after a routine blood test last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週例行血液檢查後，她被診斷為貧血，這也解釋了為何她一直感到疲倦。

gept.example_en: A high white-blood-cell count usually indicates the body is fighting an infection somewhere.
gept.example_zh: 白血球數量偏高通常表示身體某處正在對抗感染。

gept.example_en: Red-blood-cell production occurs in the bone marrow and provides oxygen transport throughout the body.
gept.example_zh: 紅血球在骨髓中產生，並在全身運輸氧氣。

gept.example_en: His leukemia treatment required a bone-marrow transplant from a carefully matched donor.
gept.example_zh: 他的白血病治療需要從仔細配對的捐贈者那裡進行骨髓移植。

gept.example_en: The neonatal intensive care unit provides specialized treatment for premature and critically ill newborns.
gept.example_zh: 新生兒加護病房為早產兒和病情危急的新生兒提供專業治療。

gept.example_en: Premature-birth before thirty-two weeks often requires intensive medical support for the newborn baby.
gept.example_zh: 三十二週前的早產通常需要為新生兒提供密集的醫療支持。

gept.example_en: She chose midwife-led care for her low-risk pregnancy after researching her local options thoroughly.
gept.example_zh: 在徹底研究當地選項後，她為自己低風險的懷孕選擇了助產士主導的照護。

gept.example_en: The doctor recommended an emergency cesarean section due to signs of fetal distress.
gept.example_zh: 醫師因胎兒窘迫的徵兆而建議緊急剖腹產。

gept.example_en: Amniocentesis can detect certain genetic disorders by sampling fluid surrounding the developing fetus.
gept.example_zh: 羊膜穿刺術可透過採樣胎兒周圍的羊水偵測某些基因疾病。

gept.example_en: Regular prenatal visits help identify and address potential complications early in pregnancy.
gept.example_zh: 規律的產前檢查有助於在懷孕早期辨識並處理潛在併發症。

gept.example_en: The lactation consultant helped her overcome breastfeeding difficulties in the first weeks after delivery.
gept.example_zh: 泌乳顧問幫助她克服分娩後最初幾週的哺乳困難。

gept.example_en: Health experts strongly recommend exclusive breastfeeding for the first six months of a baby's life.
gept.example_zh: 健康專家強烈建議在嬰兒生命前六個月只哺餵母乳。

gept.example_en: Parents should follow the recommended vaccination-schedule to protect children from serious preventable diseases.
gept.example_zh: 家長應遵循建議的疫苗接種時程，以保護兒童免於嚴重可預防的疾病。

gept.example_en: Herd-immunity protects vulnerable individuals who cannot receive vaccines for medical reasons.
gept.example_zh: 群體免疫保護那些因醫療原因無法接種疫苗的脆弱族群。

gept.example_en: Asymptomatic carriers can unknowingly spread infectious diseases even though they themselves feel completely healthy.
gept.example_zh: 無症狀帶原者雖然自己感覺完全健康，卻可能在不知情下傳播傳染病。

gept.example_en: Patients with highly contagious diseases are placed in a special isolation-ward to prevent spread.
gept.example_zh: 高度傳染性疾病的病患被安置在特別的隔離病房以防止傳播。

gept.example_en: Contact-tracing helped public health officials slow the spread of the outbreak during its early stages.
gept.example_zh: 接觸者追蹤幫助公共衛生官員在疫情早期階段減緩傳播速度。

gept.example_en: Healthcare workers must wear full PPE when treating patients with confirmed highly infectious diseases.
gept.example_zh: 醫護人員在治療確診高度傳染性疾病病患時必須穿著完整的個人防護裝備。

gept.example_en: The hospital reinstated its mask-mandate when respiratory virus cases began rising sharply this winter.
gept.example_zh: 當呼吸道病毒病例本冬季開始急劇上升時，醫院重新實施口罩令。

gept.example_en: Patients with high viral-load levels are typically more contagious and may experience more severe symptoms.
gept.example_zh: 病毒量高的病患通常傳染性較強，可能出現較嚴重的症狀。

gept.example_en: An antibody-test can determine whether someone has been previously exposed to a specific virus.
gept.example_zh: 抗體檢測能判定某人之前是否曾接觸過特定病毒。

gept.example_en: The PCR-test detects viral genetic material and is considered the gold standard for accurate diagnosis.
gept.example_zh: PCR 核酸檢測偵測病毒的遺傳物質，被視為準確診斷的黃金標準。

gept.example_en: She used a home rapid-test that gave her results within fifteen minutes of taking the sample.
gept.example_zh: 她使用居家快篩檢測，採樣後十五分鐘內就得到結果。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 化驗結果；檢驗結果
gept.example_en: His lab-result showed elevated liver enzymes, prompting the doctor to order additional follow-up tests.
gept.example_zh: 他的化驗結果顯示肝酵素升高，使醫師決定安排額外的追蹤檢查。

gept.example_en: Her blood-pressure readings have been consistently high, requiring lifestyle changes and possibly medication.
gept.example_zh: 她的血壓讀數一直偏高，需要改變生活方式並可能用藥。

gept.example_en: The nurse checked his vital-signs every two hours throughout the night following the surgery.
gept.example_zh: 手術後整夜，護理師每兩小時檢查他的生命徵象一次。

gept.example_en: The new EMR system allows authorized doctors to access patient records securely from any location.
gept.example_zh: 新的電子病歷系統讓授權醫師能從任何地點安全地存取病患紀錄。

gept.example_en: Through the patient-portal, she could view test results, message her doctor, and schedule appointments.
gept.example_zh: 透過病患入口網站，她可以查看檢驗結果、傳訊息給醫師並預約看診。

gept.example_en: Doctors must obtain informed-consent before performing any surgical procedure or invasive medical test.
gept.example_zh: 在進行任何手術或侵入性醫療檢查前，醫師必須取得知情同意。

gept.example_en: Her family doctor wrote a specialist-referral to a dermatologist for the unusual skin lesion.
gept.example_zh: 她的家庭醫師為這個不尋常的皮膚病灶寫了一張轉診單到皮膚科。

gept.example_en: Having a regular primary-care physician helps coordinate care across different specialists and treatments.
gept.example_zh: 擁有固定的基層醫療醫師有助於協調不同專科醫師和治療之間的照護。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 門診病患；門診的
gept.example_en: Most minor procedures today are performed in outpatient clinics, allowing patients to go home quickly.
gept.example_zh: 如今大多數小型手術都在門診診所進行，讓病患能很快回家。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 住院病患；住院的
gept.example_en: His complex surgery required a five-day inpatient stay for monitoring and post-operative recovery.
gept.example_zh: 他複雜的手術需要五天的住院觀察和術後恢復。

gept.example_en: The doctor planned to discharge her tomorrow morning if her overnight vital signs remained stable.
gept.example_zh: 如果她整晚生命徵象維持穩定，醫師打算明早讓她出院。

gept.example_en: Hospital-admission paperwork includes insurance verification, medical history review, and consent for emergency procedures.
gept.example_zh: 住院手續包括保險查核、病史審閱以及緊急程序的同意書。

gept.example_en: The patient remained in the ICU for nearly a week before being moved to a regular ward.
gept.example_zh: 這名病患在加護病房待了將近一週後才被轉到普通病房。

gept.example_en: When his chest pain became severe, he drove straight to the nearest ER for evaluation.
gept.example_zh: 當胸痛變得嚴重時，他直接開車到最近的急診室進行評估。

gept.example_en: An ambulance arrived within seven minutes and rushed the elderly man to the hospital quickly.
gept.example_zh: 救護車在七分鐘內抵達，迅速將這位老先生送往醫院。

gept.example_en: The EMT stabilized the accident victim's neck before carefully moving him onto the stretcher.
gept.example_zh: 緊急醫療技術員在小心將事故傷者移到擔架上之前先固定了他的頸部。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 醫療急救代碼（心肺停止）
gept.example_en: When the patient's heart stopped, a code-blue was called over the hospital intercom immediately.
gept.example_zh: 當病患心臟停止時，立即透過醫院廣播呼叫醫療急救代碼。

gept.example_en: Cardiopulmonary resuscitation began within seconds of his collapse, eventually restoring his pulse and breathing.
gept.example_zh: 他倒下後幾秒內就開始進行心肺復甦術，最終恢復了脈搏和呼吸。

gept.example_en: Proper wound-care prevents infection and significantly speeds up the natural healing process.
gept.example_zh: 正確的傷口照護可預防感染並大幅加速自然癒合過程。

gept.example_en: Keeping the wound moist and protected can minimize permanent scarring over the following weeks.
gept.example_zh: 保持傷口濕潤並加以保護可在隨後幾週內減少永久性疤痕。

gept.example_en: Concussion-symptoms include headache, confusion, nausea, and sensitivity to bright lights and loud noises.
gept.example_zh: 腦震盪症狀包括頭痛、意識混亂、噁心，以及對強光和噪音敏感。

gept.example_en: Spinal-cord injuries can result in temporary or permanent loss of movement and sensation below the affected area.
gept.example_zh: 脊髓損傷可能導致受傷部位以下動作和感覺的暫時或永久喪失。

gept.example_en: His partial paralysis from the stroke has improved significantly with intensive ongoing rehabilitation therapy.
gept.example_zh: 他因中風造成的部分癱瘓在持續的密集復健治療下已大幅改善。

gept.example_en: MS is an autoimmune disease that affects the protective covering surrounding nerve fibers in the brain.
gept.example_zh: 多發性硬化症是一種自體免疫疾病，影響腦部神經纖維周圍的保護膜。

gept.example_en: Patients with sickle-cell disease experience painful episodes when abnormal red blood cells block small blood vessels.
gept.example_zh: 鐮刀型紅血球疾病患者在異常紅血球阻塞小血管時會經歷疼痛發作。

gept.example_en: Tuberculosis remains a major global health concern despite the availability of effective treatments and vaccines.
gept.example_zh: 儘管有有效的治療和疫苗，肺結核仍是全球重大健康議題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 人類免疫缺乏病毒
gept.example_en: Modern HIV treatments allow patients to live long, healthy lives with undetectable viral loads.
gept.example_zh: 現代愛滋病毒治療讓病患能在病毒量無法檢出的狀態下長壽健康地生活。

gept.example_en: Untreated septicemia can rapidly progress to organ failure and death within just a few hours.
gept.example_zh: 未經治療的敗血病可能在數小時內迅速惡化為器官衰竭和死亡。

gept.example_en: Her insurance requires a twenty-dollar co-pay for every visit to her primary care physician.
gept.example_zh: 她的保險規定每次看基層醫療醫師需自付二十美元的部分負擔。

gept.example_en: His insurance company required preauthorization before approving the expensive new specialty medication.
gept.example_zh: 他的保險公司在批准昂貴新型專科藥物前要求事前授權。

gept.example_en: Vector-borne diseases like dengue fever are spread by mosquitoes and other biting insects.
gept.example_zh: 登革熱等由病媒傳播的疾病是透過蚊子和其他叮咬昆蟲傳播的。

gept.example_en: The WHO coordinates international responses to global health emergencies and provides guidance to member countries.
gept.example_zh: 世界衛生組織協調對全球健康緊急事件的國際回應，並為成員國提供指引。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 美國疾病管制與預防中心
gept.example_en: The CDC publishes updated guidelines for healthcare providers facing emerging infectious disease threats.
gept.example_zh: 美國疾病管制與預防中心為面對新興傳染病威脅的醫療提供者發布最新指引。

gept.example_en: Thousands of volunteers participated in the vaccine-trial to test both safety and effectiveness rigorously.
gept.example_zh: 數千名志願者參與疫苗試驗，嚴格測試其安全性和有效性。

gept.example_en: The mRNA vaccine technology revolutionized how quickly new vaccines can be developed during emerging pandemics.
gept.example_zh: mRNA 疫苗技術徹底改變了新興疫情期間新疫苗開發的速度。

gept.example_en: Health officials recommend an annual booster to maintain protection against the rapidly evolving virus.
gept.example_zh: 衛生官員建議每年接種一次加強針，以維持對快速演變病毒的保護力。

gept.example_en: A wearable-device tracked his heart rhythm continuously and alerted his cardiologist about concerning irregularities.
gept.example_zh: 穿戴式裝置持續追蹤他的心律，並向心臟科醫師發出令人擔憂的不規則警報。

gept.example_en: Digital-health platforms allow patients to track symptoms, medications, and appointments all in one place.
gept.example_zh: 數位健康平台讓病患能在同一個地方追蹤症狀、用藥和看診預約。

gept.example_en: Remote-monitoring of heart failure patients reduces hospital readmissions and improves long-term outcomes significantly.
gept.example_zh: 對心臟衰竭病患進行遠端監測可減少住院再入院率並大幅改善長期結果。

gept.example_en: Minimally-invasive procedures generally result in shorter recovery times and less post-operative pain for patients.
gept.example_zh: 微創手術一般可為病患帶來較短的恢復時間和較少的術後疼痛。

gept.example_en: Annual preventive-screening can detect many serious conditions early when treatment is most likely to succeed.
gept.example_zh: 每年的預防性篩檢可在治療最可能成功時及早發現許多嚴重疾病。

gept.example_en: Bereavement support groups help grieving family members process their loss alongside others with similar experiences.
gept.example_zh: 喪親支持團體幫助悲傷的家人與有類似經歷的人一起處理失落感。

gept.example_en: Her employer's wellness-program offers free gym memberships, mental health resources, and annual health screenings.
gept.example_zh: 她雇主的健康促進計畫提供免費健身房會員、心理健康資源和年度健康篩檢。

gept.example_en: Preventive-medicine focuses on keeping people healthy rather than only treating diseases after they develop.
gept.example_zh: 預防醫學專注於讓人們保持健康，而非僅在疾病發生後才治療。

gept.example_en: She combined conventional treatment with alternative-medicine approaches including acupuncture and herbal supplements.
gept.example_zh: 她將傳統治療與包括針灸和草本補充品在內的替代醫學方法結合。

gept.example_en: She tried a traditional herbal-remedy for her insomnia before considering prescription sleep medications.
gept.example_zh: 在考慮處方安眠藥之前，她嘗試了傳統草藥來治療失眠。

gept.example_en: The registered dietitian designed a personalized meal plan to support her diabetes management goals.
gept.example_zh: 註冊營養師設計了個人化餐食計畫，以支持她的糖尿病管理目標。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 減重的；肥胖治療的
gept.example_en: Bariatric surgery can produce dramatic weight loss for patients struggling with severe obesity.
gept.example_zh: 減重手術可為嚴重肥胖的病患帶來戲劇性的體重減輕效果。

gept.example_en: His BMI placed him in the overweight category, prompting recommendations for lifestyle modifications.
gept.example_zh: 他的身體質量指數讓他屬於過重類別，促使醫師建議改變生活方式。

gept.example_en: A simple screening-test can identify many serious conditions before symptoms become noticeable to the patient.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的篩檢測試可在病患察覺症狀前發現許多嚴重疾病。

gept.example_en: The doctor's differential-diagnosis included three possible conditions that required additional testing to distinguish between them.
gept.example_zh: 醫師的鑑別診斷包括三種可能的病情，需要額外檢查以加以區分。

gept.example_en: Some doctors still make house-call visits for elderly patients who cannot easily travel to the clinic.
gept.example_zh: 有些醫師仍會為不便前往診所的高齡病患進行出診。

gept.example_en: He visited the walk-in-clinic on Saturday morning because his regular doctor's office was closed.
gept.example_zh: 因為他平時的醫師診所沒開，他星期六上午到不需預約的診所就診。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 主治醫師；家庭醫師
gept.example_en: A strong relationship with your primary-physician improves continuity of care across many years of treatment.
gept.example_zh: 與你的主治醫師建立穩固關係，能讓多年治療的照護更具連續性。

gept.example_en: A nurse-practitioner can diagnose conditions, prescribe medications, and manage care for many common health issues.
gept.example_zh: 執業護理師可診斷病情、開立處方並管理許多常見健康問題的照護。

gept.example_en: The physician-assistant performed his routine annual physical exam and addressed all of his health questions.
gept.example_zh: 醫師助理為他進行例行年度健康檢查，並回答他所有的健康疑問。

gept.example_en: Every registered-nurse on the unit was trained to recognize the early warning signs of patient deterioration.
gept.example_zh: 病房裡每一位註冊護理師都受過訓練，能辨識病患病情惡化的早期警訊。

gept.example_en: A double-blind study prevents both patients and researchers from knowing who received the actual treatment.
gept.example_zh: 雙盲研究防止病患和研究人員知道誰接受了實際治療。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 實證醫學的；基於證據的
gept.example_en: Modern medical practice relies on evidence-based guidelines developed from carefully designed clinical research studies.
gept.example_zh: 現代醫療實踐依賴從精心設計的臨床研究發展而來的實證醫學指引。

gept.example_en: She only trusts medical information from peer-reviewed journals rather than random online health websites.
gept.example_zh: 她只信任同儕審查期刊上的醫療資訊，而不是隨意的網路健康網站。

gept.example_en: The unusual case-report described a rare presentation of a condition that doctors rarely encounter.
gept.example_zh: 這份不尋常的病例報告描述了醫師很少遇到的某種疾病罕見表現。

gept.example_en: Patients need clear information about risks and benefits to make a truly informed-decision about treatment.
gept.example_zh: 病患需要清楚的風險和效益資訊，才能對治療做出真正知情的決定。

gept.example_en: Each ribosome reads messenger RNA and assembles amino acids into functional proteins.
gept.example_zh: 每個核糖體讀取信使 RNA 並將胺基酸組裝成功能性蛋白質。

gept.example_en: The cell membrane controls which substances can enter and leave the cell.
gept.example_zh: 細胞膜控制哪些物質可以進出細胞。

gept.example_en: Scientists analyzed the genotype of the mice to predict their resistance to disease.
gept.example_zh: 科學家分析了小鼠的基因型以預測牠們對疾病的抵抗力。

gept.example_en: The phenotype of an organism reflects how its genes interact with the environment.
gept.example_zh: 生物的表現型反映其基因與環境的交互作用。

gept.example_en: Gregor Mendel laid the groundwork for our modern understanding of heredity through pea experiments.
gept.example_zh: 孟德爾透過豌豆實驗為我們對遺傳的現代理解奠定基礎。

gept.example_en: Brown eye color is generally considered a dominant trait in humans.
gept.example_zh: 棕色眼睛通常被認為是人類的顯性性狀。

gept.example_en: A recessive trait only appears when both parents pass on the corresponding gene.
gept.example_zh: 隱性性狀只有在父母雙方都遺傳對應基因時才會表現出來。

gept.example_en: The zygote forms immediately after a sperm cell fertilizes an egg cell.
gept.example_zh: 受精卵在精子與卵子結合後立即形成。

gept.example_en: The embryo undergoes rapid cell division during the earliest stages of development.
gept.example_zh: 胚胎在發育最早期階段經歷快速的細胞分裂。

gept.example_en: Meiosis reduces the chromosome number by half to create reproductive cells.
gept.example_zh: 減數分裂將染色體數目減半以產生生殖細胞。

gept.example_en: Through photosynthesis, plants convert carbon dioxide and water into glucose and oxygen.
gept.example_zh: 植物透過光合作用將二氧化碳和水轉化為葡萄糖和氧氣。

gept.example_en: Water passes through cell membranes by osmosis from low to high solute regions.
gept.example_zh: 水透過滲透作用從低溶質區域穿過細胞膜進入高溶質區域。

gept.example_en: Lymph carries immune cells throughout the body to fight infections effectively.
gept.example_zh: 淋巴液將免疫細胞輸送到全身以有效對抗感染。

gept.example_en: The main artery near the heart pumps oxygen-rich blood to other organs.
gept.example_zh: 心臟附近的主動脈將富含氧氣的血液輸送到其他器官。

gept.example_en: Each vein returns deoxygenated blood from the body back to the heart.
gept.example_zh: 每條靜脈將去氧的血液從身體送回心臟。

gept.example_en: Air travels down the trachea before reaching the bronchi inside the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 空氣在到達肺部的支氣管之前先沿著氣管向下流動。

gept.example_en: The diaphragm contracts and relaxes to draw air into and out of the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 橫膈膜收縮和放鬆以將空氣吸入和呼出肺部。

gept.example_en: Food travels from the mouth through the esophagus to reach the stomach.
gept.example_zh: 食物從口腔經過食道到達胃部。

gept.example_en: The pancreas produces insulin to regulate blood sugar levels in the body.
gept.example_zh: 胰臟產生胰島素以調節體內的血糖水平。

gept.example_en: The pituitary is a small gland at the base of the brain controlling many hormones.
gept.example_zh: 腦下垂體是位於腦底部的小腺體，控制許多激素。

gept.example_en: The adrenal glands release stress hormones during dangerous or exciting situations.
gept.example_zh: 腎上腺在危險或興奮的情況下釋放壓力激素。

gept.example_en: Insulin helps cells absorb glucose from the bloodstream after meals.
gept.example_zh: 胰島素幫助細胞在餐後從血液中吸收葡萄糖。

gept.example_en: A rush of adrenaline can increase heart rate and prepare you for action.
gept.example_zh: 腎上腺素激增可以提高心率並讓你準備好行動。

gept.example_en: Estrogen plays a major role in regulating the female reproductive cycle.
gept.example_zh: 雌激素在調節女性生殖週期方面發揮主要作用。

gept.example_en: Testosterone influences muscle growth and many other male physical characteristics.
gept.example_zh: 睪固酮影響肌肉生長和許多其他男性的身體特徵。

gept.example_en: A dendrite receives signals from other neurons and passes them to the cell body.
gept.example_zh: 樹突從其他神經元接收訊號並將其傳遞到細胞體。

gept.example_en: A spinal injury can result in partial or complete loss of muscle control.
gept.example_zh: 脊髓損傷可能導致部分或完全喪失肌肉控制。

gept.example_en: Each vertebra in the spine protects the delicate nerves running through the column.
gept.example_zh: 脊椎中的每塊脊椎骨都保護貫穿脊柱的脆弱神經。

gept.example_en: Cartilage cushions joints and prevents bones from grinding against each other.
gept.example_zh: 軟骨為關節提供緩衝並防止骨頭相互摩擦。

gept.example_en: Bone marrow produces new red and white blood cells essential for life.
gept.example_zh: 骨髓產生新的紅血球和白血球，是維持生命所必需的。

gept.example_en: The dermis lies beneath the epidermis and contains blood vessels and nerves.
gept.example_zh: 真皮位於表皮下方，包含血管和神經。

gept.example_en: Each hair grows from a tiny follicle embedded in the skin's dermal layer.
gept.example_zh: 每根頭髮都從嵌入皮膚真皮層的小毛囊中生長。

gept.example_en: Sweat glands secrete fluid to help cool the body during intense exercise.
gept.example_zh: 汗腺分泌液體以幫助身體在劇烈運動時降溫。

gept.example_en: Mucus secretion in the nasal passages helps trap dust and harmful microbes.
gept.example_zh: 鼻腔中的黏液分泌物幫助困住灰塵和有害微生物。

gept.example_en: Carnivores ingest large amounts of protein when they feed on their prey.
gept.example_zh: 肉食動物在獵食時會攝入大量蛋白質。

gept.example_en: Kidneys excrete waste products by filtering them out of the bloodstream.
gept.example_zh: 腎臟透過從血液中過濾廢物來排泄它們。

gept.example_en: Excretion of urea is one of the primary functions of the urinary system.
gept.example_zh: 尿素的排泄是泌尿系統的主要功能之一。

gept.example_en: The small intestine can absorb most nutrients from food during digestion.
gept.example_zh: 小腸能在消化過程中吸收食物中的大部分養分。

gept.example_en: Proper absorption of vitamins requires healthy intestinal walls and adequate enzymes.
gept.example_zh: 維生素的正常吸收需要健康的腸壁和足夠的酶。

gept.example_en: Plants can synthesize their own food using sunlight, water, and carbon dioxide.
gept.example_zh: 植物可以利用陽光、水和二氧化碳合成自己的食物。

gept.example_en: Carbohydrate molecules provide the main source of energy for most living organisms.
gept.example_zh: 碳水化合物分子為大多數生物提供主要能量來源。

gept.example_en: Glucose levels in blood are tightly regulated by hormones from the pancreas.
gept.example_zh: 血液中的葡萄糖水平由胰臟的激素嚴格調控。

gept.example_en: Enzymes act as a catalyst to speed up biochemical reactions inside cells.
gept.example_zh: 酶作為催化劑，加速細胞內的生化反應。

gept.example_en: High temperatures can denature proteins and destroy their normal biological function.
gept.example_zh: 高溫會使蛋白質變性並破壞它們正常的生物功能。

gept.example_en: Yeast can ferment sugars to produce alcohol and carbon dioxide in bread dough.
gept.example_zh: 酵母可以將糖發酵成酒精和二氧化碳，用於麵團發酵。

gept.example_en: Every drop of pond water contains millions of microbes invisible to the eye.
gept.example_zh: 每滴池塘水中含有數百萬肉眼看不見的微生物。

gept.example_en: A single bacterium can divide and multiply rapidly under favorable conditions.
gept.example_zh: 單個細菌在有利條件下可以快速分裂繁殖。

gept.example_en: Beneficial bacteria in the gut help humans digest food and absorb nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 腸道中的有益細菌幫助人類消化食物和吸收養分。

gept.example_en: Many fungi decompose dead plants and return essential nutrients to the soil.
gept.example_zh: 許多真菌分解枯死的植物，並將重要的養分歸還土壤。

gept.example_en: An amoeba moves and feeds by extending temporary projections of its cytoplasm.
gept.example_zh: 變形蟲透過伸出細胞質的暫時性突起來移動和進食。

gept.example_en: A parasite lives on or inside a host organism and obtains nutrients from it.
gept.example_zh: 寄生蟲生活在宿主生物體上或體內，並從中獲取養分。

gept.example_en: Symbiosis between clownfish and sea anemones benefits both species simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 小丑魚和海葵之間的共生關係同時使兩個物種受益。

gept.example_en: Commensalism allows one species to benefit while the other remains unaffected.
gept.example_zh: 片利共生讓一個物種受益，而另一個不受影響。

gept.example_en: A predator must adapt its hunting strategy to catch its preferred prey species.
gept.example_zh: 掠食者必須調整其狩獵策略以捕捉偏好的獵物物種。

gept.example_en: Small rodents are common prey for owls and other nocturnal birds of flight.
gept.example_zh: 小型囓齒動物是貓頭鷹和其他夜行性飛禽的常見獵物。

gept.example_en: A herbivore such as a cow feeds exclusively on grasses and leafy plants.
gept.example_zh: 像牛這樣的草食動物只以草和葉子植物為食。

gept.example_en: Lions are a typical carnivore that hunts large mammals across the African savanna.
gept.example_zh: 獅子是典型的肉食動物，在非洲草原上獵捕大型哺乳動物。

gept.example_en: Bears are an omnivore, eating both fish and berries depending on the season.
gept.example_zh: 熊是雜食動物，根據季節吃魚或漿果。

gept.example_en: A scavenger feeds primarily on the remains of dead animals it finds.
gept.example_zh: 食腐動物主要以牠們找到的死亡動物殘骸為食。

gept.example_en: An ecotone marks the transition zone between two different ecological communities.
gept.example_zh: 生態交會帶標誌著兩個不同生態群落之間的過渡區。

gept.example_en: Ecological succession describes how a community changes gradually over many decades.
gept.example_zh: 生態演替描述群落如何在數十年中逐漸變化。

gept.example_en: Scientists traced the lineage-bio of modern whales back to ancient land mammals.
gept.example_zh: 科學家將現代鯨魚的譜系追溯到古代陸生哺乳動物。

gept.example_en: Paleontology helps us understand how ancient life evolved across geological eras.
gept.example_zh: 古生物學幫助我們了解古代生命如何在地質時代中演化。

gept.example_en: A mass extinction-event wiped out the dinosaurs around sixty-six million years ago.
gept.example_zh: 大約六千六百萬年前的大規模滅絕事件消滅了恐龍。

gept.example_en: Every mammal nurses its young with milk produced by mammary glands.
gept.example_zh: 每種哺乳動物都用乳腺產生的奶水哺育幼崽。

gept.example_en: A marsupial like the koala carries its young inside a pouch on the mother's body.
gept.example_zh: 像無尾熊這樣的有袋動物將幼崽放在母親身上的育兒袋裡。

gept.example_en: An arthropod has a hard external skeleton and jointed legs for movement.
gept.example_zh: 節肢動物具有堅硬的外骨骼和用於移動的關節腳。

gept.example_en: A butterfly goes through complete metamorphosis from egg to caterpillar to adult.
gept.example_zh: 蝴蝶經歷從卵到毛蟲到成蟲的完整變態。

gept.example_en: Inside its pupa, a caterpillar transforms slowly into a fully formed butterfly.
gept.example_zh: 在蛹內，毛蟲慢慢轉變成完整成形的蝴蝶。

gept.example_en: The thorax of an insect supports both pairs of wings and all six legs.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲的胸部支撐兩對翅膀和全部六條腿。

gept.example_en: Each appendage on a crab serves a specific purpose like walking or feeding.
gept.example_zh: 螃蟹的每個附肢都有特定功能，例如行走或進食。

gept.example_en: Fish use each gill to extract dissolved oxygen directly from the water.
gept.example_zh: 魚用每片鰓直接從水中提取溶解的氧氣。

gept.example_en: A fish moves its fin to steer and propel its body through the water.
gept.example_zh: 魚移動牠的鰭來引導和推進身體穿過水中。

gept.example_en: Every feather provides insulation and helps a bird stay aloft during flight.
gept.example_zh: 每根羽毛提供保暖並幫助鳥類在飛行中保持懸浮。

gept.example_en: The shape of a bird's beak reveals what kind of food it usually eats.
gept.example_zh: 鳥喙的形狀顯示牠通常吃什麼食物。

gept.example_en: An eagle uses its sharp talon to grasp and carry away fish from a lake.
gept.example_zh: 老鷹用牠鋒利的鷹爪從湖中抓取並帶走魚。

gept.example_en: Birds and mammals are warm-blooded animals that regulate their own body heat.
gept.example_zh: 鳥類和哺乳動物是調節自身體溫的溫血動物。

gept.example_en: Cold-blooded reptiles must bask in the sun to warm their bodies efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 冷血爬蟲類必須曬太陽以有效溫暖身體。

gept.example_en: The body produces antibodies that recognize and neutralize specific harmful viruses.
gept.example_zh: 身體產生抗體來識別和中和特定的有害病毒。

gept.example_en: A bacterial infection often responds well to a prescribed course of antibiotics.
gept.example_zh: 細菌感染通常對處方抗生素療程反應良好。

gept.example_en: Researchers incubate the bacterial samples for forty-eight hours before analysis.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員在分析前將細菌樣本孵育四十八小時。

gept.example_en: Each gene contains the instructions for building a specific protein in the cell.
gept.example_zh: 每個基因都包含在細胞中構建特定蛋白質的指令。

gept.example_en: Modern genetics has revolutionized how scientists understand and treat hereditary diseases.
gept.example_zh: 現代遺傳學徹底改變了科學家理解和治療遺傳性疾病的方式。

gept.example_en: Doctors carefully match each recipient-bio with a compatible donor to reduce rejection risk.
gept.example_zh: 醫生仔細為每位受贈者配對相容的捐贈者，以降低排斥風險。

gept.example_en: The cochlea inside the inner ear translates sound vibrations into nerve impulses.
gept.example_zh: 內耳中的耳蝸將聲音震動轉換為神經衝動。

gept.example_en: Each heart contraction pumps a measured volume of blood into the main arteries.
gept.example_zh: 每次心臟收縮都將測定量的血液泵入主動脈。

gept.example_en: A deciduous tree drops all its leaves in autumn to conserve water during winter.
gept.example_zh: 落葉樹在秋天落下所有葉子，以在冬天保存水分。

gept.example_en: Fertilization typically takes place inside the fallopian tube in human reproduction.
gept.example_zh: 在人類生殖中，受精通常發生在輸卵管內。

gept.example_en: A mammal mother begins to lactate shortly after giving birth to her offspring.
gept.example_zh: 哺乳動物母親在生下後代後不久開始分泌乳汁。

gept.example_en: A native-bio plant is naturally adapted to the local climate and soil conditions.
gept.example_zh: 原生植物天生適應當地的氣候和土壤條件。

gept.example_en: An ant colony-bio can contain millions of individuals working together cooperatively.
gept.example_zh: 螞蟻群落可以包含數百萬隻合作工作的個體。

gept.example_en: A wild herd-bio of buffalo moves slowly across the savanna in search of grass.
gept.example_zh: 野生水牛群在草原上緩慢移動尋找草料。

gept.example_en: A wolf pack-bio hunts together to bring down prey much larger than any individual.
gept.example_zh: 狼群一起狩獵以擊倒比任何個體都大得多的獵物。

gept.example_en: Territorial animals defend their living area aggressively against any unwelcome intruders.
gept.example_zh: 領域性動物積極保衛牠們的生活區域，對抗任何不受歡迎的入侵者。

gept.example_en: A female elephant raises her offspring carefully for many years before independence.
gept.example_zh: 母象在後代獨立前細心照顧牠們許多年。

gept.example_en: Every hatchling must rely on its instincts to survive its very dangerous first days.
gept.example_zh: 每隻剛孵化的幼仔必須依靠本能來度過極度危險的最初幾天。

gept.example_en: Salmon make an instinctive return to their birth stream after years out at sea.
gept.example_zh: 鮭魚在海上度過多年後，本能地回到牠們出生的溪流。

gept.example_en: The solution had a molarity of two moles of solute per liter.
gept.example_zh: 該溶液的莫耳濃度為每公升兩莫耳溶質。

gept.example_en: Thermodynamics explains how heat, work, and energy interact in engines and refrigerators.
gept.example_zh: 熱力學解釋熱、功和能量在引擎與冰箱中如何相互作用。

gept.example_en: A wrench provides extra torque, making it easier to loosen a tight bolt.
gept.example_zh: 扳手提供額外的力矩，使鬆開緊螺栓變得更容易。

gept.example_en: The pendulum swings back and forth at a period determined by its length.
gept.example_zh: 鐘擺以其長度決定的周期前後擺動。

gept.example_en: Red light has a longer wavelength than blue light in the visible spectrum.
gept.example_zh: 可見光譜中，紅光的波長比藍光更長。

gept.example_en: Heisenberg's uncertainty principle limits how precisely both position and momentum can be measured.
gept.example_zh: 海森堡不確定性原理限制了位置和動量同時可被精確測量的程度。

gept.example_en: The wavefunction describes probabilities of finding a particle at various positions in space.
gept.example_zh: 波函數描述在空間中各位置找到粒子的機率。

gept.example_en: Carbon fourteen has a halflife of about five thousand seven hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 碳十四的半衰期約為五千七百年。

gept.example_en: A nuclear reactor controls fission reactions to generate steady electricity for nearby cities.
gept.example_zh: 核反應爐控制裂變反應，為鄰近城市穩定發電。

gept.example_en: The reactor uses pressurized water as both a coolant and a neutron moderator.
gept.example_zh: 該反應爐使用加壓水同時作為冷卻劑和中子減速劑。

gept.example_en: Electric current measures the rate at which charge flows past a fixed point.
gept.example_zh: 電流衡量電荷通過固定點的速率。

gept.example_en: Thin wires have greater electrical resistance and therefore generate more heat when conducting.
gept.example_zh: 細導線的電阻較大，因此導電時會產生更多熱量。

gept.example_en: A capacitor stores electrical energy temporarily and releases it quickly when needed.
gept.example_zh: 電容器能暫時儲存電能，並在需要時迅速釋放。

gept.example_en: An electromagnet becomes strongly magnetic only while current passes through its coiled wire.
gept.example_zh: 電磁鐵只有在電流通過其線圈時才會具有強磁性。

gept.example_en: Rubber bands demonstrate high elasticity, returning to original shape after being stretched temporarily.
gept.example_zh: 橡皮筋展現了高彈性，被暫時拉伸後會恢復原狀。

gept.example_en: Diamond has the highest known hardness among naturally occurring solid mineral substances.
gept.example_zh: 在自然存在的固態礦物中，鑽石擁有目前已知最高的硬度。

gept.example_en: Skilled technicians weld pipe joints carefully to prevent any future high pressure leaks.
gept.example_zh: 熟練技術人員仔細焊接管接頭，以防止未來任何高壓洩漏。

gept.example_en: Industrial electrolysis splits water into pure hydrogen gas and oxygen gas separately.
gept.example_zh: 工業電解將水分解為純氫氣與純氧氣。

gept.example_en: A hydrocarbon contains only carbon and hydrogen atoms in its molecular skeleton structure.
gept.example_zh: 碳氫化合物的分子骨架中僅含有碳原子和氫原子。

gept.example_en: An amine contains a nitrogen atom and can act as a weak organic base.
gept.example_zh: 胺類含有一個氮原子，可作為弱有機鹼起作用。

gept.example_en: Each actinide is radioactive, including elements such as uranium and thorium found naturally.
gept.example_zh: 每種錒系元素都具放射性，包括天然存在的鈾與釷等元素。

gept.example_en: The periodic table arranges elements so similar chemical behaviors appear in vertical columns.
gept.example_zh: 週期表將元素排列，使相似化學性質出現在同一垂直欄。
