gept.example_en: A ligand donates electron pairs to bond firmly with a central metal ion.
gept.example_zh: 配位基提供電子對，與中心金屬離子穩固結合。

gept.example_en: Pharmaceutical companies require exceptional purity in chemicals used as drug active ingredients.
gept.example_zh: 製藥公司對作為藥物主成分的化學品要求極高的純度。

gept.example_en: Even a tiny contaminant in the sample can ruin sensitive analytical instrument readings completely.
gept.example_zh: 樣品中即使微量的污染物也可能完全破壞靈敏分析儀器的讀數。

gept.example_en: A convex lens converges parallel light rays to a focal point behind it.
gept.example_zh: 凸透鏡將平行光線匯聚到其後方的焦點上。

gept.example_en: A glass prism disperses white light into separate colors due to wavelength dependent refraction.
gept.example_zh: 玻璃稜鏡因波長相關的折射，將白光分散成各個獨立色彩。

gept.example_en: The rocket engines produced enormous thrust to lift the vehicle off its launch pad.
gept.example_zh: 火箭引擎產生巨大推力，將載具自發射台升空。

gept.example_en: Aerodynamic drag slows a moving car and reduces its overall fuel economy significantly.
gept.example_zh: 空氣動力阻力會減慢行駛中的汽車，並顯著降低其整體油耗表現。

gept.example_en: Air flowing over curved wings produces lift that supports the entire airplane weight.
gept.example_zh: 氣流流過彎曲機翼時產生升力，足以支撐整架飛機的重量。

gept.example_en: Internal combustion engines burn gasoline to push pistons and drive vehicle wheels forward.
gept.example_zh: 內燃機燃燒汽油，推動活塞並帶動車輪向前。

gept.example_en: An open flame can act as an ignition-source for flammable fumes near gasoline tanks.
gept.example_zh: 明火可作為汽油罐附近易燃蒸氣的點火源。

gept.example_en: Store flammable chemicals in vented cabinets far from any potential ignition source nearby.
gept.example_zh: 易燃化學品應存放在通風櫃中，遠離任何可能的點火源。

gept.example_en: The propeller pushes water backward, which drives the boat forward across the lake.
gept.example_zh: 螺旋槳將水向後推，使船在湖面上向前航行。

gept.example_en: The new assembly-line can produce one finished car every fifty seconds.
gept.example_zh: 新的裝配線每五十秒就能生產出一輛完整的車。

gept.example_en: Stainless steel resists corrosion and is therefore ideal for kitchens and hospitals.
gept.example_zh: 不鏽鋼抗腐蝕，因此非常適合用於廚房與醫院。

gept.example_en: A modern jet-engine combines turbines, compressors, and combustion chambers in one unit.
gept.example_zh: 現代噴射引擎將渦輪、壓縮機與燃燒室整合在同一機件中。

gept.example_en: Heavy trucks rely on a powerful diesel-engine to haul cargo over long distances.
gept.example_zh: 重型卡車依靠強大的柴油引擎長途運送貨物。

gept.example_en: Always fasten your seatbelt before the vehicle starts moving on any road.
gept.example_zh: 車輛在任何道路上行駛前，務必先繫上安全帶。

gept.example_en: The speedometer needle climbed past one hundred as he accelerated onto the highway.
gept.example_zh: 當他加速進入高速公路時，速度表指針爬過了一百。

gept.example_en: A handheld jigsaw is ideal for cutting curved lines through plywood and thin sheets.
gept.example_zh: 手持線鋸非常適合在膠合板與薄板上切出曲線。

gept.example_en: Proper drainage around the building prevents rainwater from damaging the foundation.
gept.example_zh: 建築周圍良好的排水系統可防止雨水損害地基。

gept.example_en: After smelting, further refining removes the last impurities and improves metal quality.
gept.example_zh: 熔煉後再經精煉，可去除最後的雜質並提升金屬品質。

gept.example_en: A small surface defect in the casing was enough to fail the inspection.
gept.example_zh: 外殼上一個小小的表面缺陷便足以未通過檢驗。

gept.example_en: The cabinet latch must be replaced because the spring inside has finally worn out.
gept.example_zh: 櫥櫃的卡榫必須更換，因為裡面的彈簧終於失效了。

gept.example_en: Fly ash from coal combustion can be reused as a binding ingredient in concrete.
gept.example_zh: 煤炭燃燒產生的飛灰可作為混凝土中的黏結成分再利用。

gept.example_en: Each wind turbine blade is longer than a soccer field and weighs many tons.
gept.example_zh: 每片風機葉片比足球場還長，重達數噸。

gept.example_en: Wind technicians replaced sensors at the hub to improve performance during low wind speeds.
gept.example_zh: 風電技術人員更換輪轂處感測器，以提升低風速時的性能。

gept.example_en: Floating wind platforms can be deployed in deep ocean waters far from shore.
gept.example_zh: 漂浮式風電平台可部署於遠離海岸的深海海域。

gept.example_en: The aging boiler was swapped for an efficient electric heatpump powered by solar panels.
gept.example_zh: 老舊鍋爐被換成由太陽能板供電的高效熱泵。

gept.example_en: Tiny plastic pellet spills have polluted beaches around the world over recent decades.
gept.example_zh: 近數十年來，微小塑膠顆粒外洩污染了世界各地的海灘。

gept.example_en: Green hydrogen produced from renewable electricity could decarbonize heavy industry and shipping.
gept.example_zh: 以再生能源電力產生的綠氫可使重工業與航運脫碳。

gept.example_en: Diesel trucks contribute to harmful nitrogen oxide emissions in city centers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 柴油卡車造成全球市中心有害的氮氧化物排放。

gept.example_en: Demand for lithium has surged because of the rapid expansion of electric vehicle production.
gept.example_zh: 由於電動車生產快速擴張，鋰的需求量大幅增加。

gept.example_en: Most battery manufacturers seek alternatives to cobalt due to ethical and supply concerns.
gept.example_zh: 由於倫理與供應疑慮，多數電池製造商尋找鈷的替代品。

gept.example_en: Nickel-rich cathodes can extend the driving range of modern electric vehicles significantly.
gept.example_zh: 富鎳正極可大幅延長現代電動車的續航里程。

gept.example_en: Manganese plays a critical role in stabilizing the chemistry of lithium-ion batteries.
gept.example_zh: 錳在穩定鋰離子電池化學上扮演關鍵角色。

gept.example_en: Most lithium-ion batteries use graphite anodes paired with various cathode chemistries.
gept.example_zh: 大多數鋰離子電池使用石墨負極搭配各種正極化學體系。

gept.example_en: A modular battery-pack design lets technicians replace damaged modules rather than entire systems.
gept.example_zh: 模組化電池包設計讓技師可更換損壞模組，而非整套系統。

gept.example_en: Drivers are encouraged not to idle their engines while waiting outside busy school zones.
gept.example_zh: 鼓勵駕駛人在繁忙的學校區外等候時不要讓引擎怠速運轉。

gept.example_en: Kelp forests are vital habitats and may help sequester carbon in coastal waters.
gept.example_zh: 海帶森林是關鍵棲地，並可能協助沿海水域封存碳。

gept.example_en: Restoring coral nurseries provides a glimmer of hope for severely damaged tropical reefs.
gept.example_zh: 復育珊瑚苗圃為嚴重受損的熱帶珊瑚礁帶來一線希望。

gept.example_en: Salmon return to their birth streams to spawn after spending years at sea.
gept.example_zh: 鮭魚在海中度過多年後回到出生溪流產卵。

gept.example_en: The city plans to pedestrianize the historic district to reduce traffic and air pollution.
gept.example_zh: 市府計畫將歷史街區行人化，以減少交通與空氣污染。

gept.example_en: The environmental cost of fast-fashion includes massive textile waste and high water consumption.
gept.example_zh: 快時尚的環境成本包括巨大的紡織廢棄物與高耗水量。

gept.example_en: Satellite remote-sensing reveals illegal deforestation almost in real time across remote regions.
gept.example_zh: 衛星遙測幾乎即時揭露偏遠地區的非法砍伐。

gept.example_en: Reducing food-waste at home is one of the simplest ways to lower personal emissions.
gept.example_zh: 在家中減少食物浪費是降低個人排放最簡單的方式之一。

gept.example_en: The Montreal Protocol successfully helped the ozone-layer heal after decades of human-caused damage.
gept.example_zh: 蒙特婁議定書在數十年人為破壞後成功協助臭氧層復原。

gept.example_en: Modern air conditioners use a refrigerant with a much lower global warming potential.
gept.example_zh: 現代空調使用全球暖化潛勢低得多的冷媒。

gept.example_en: A city ordinance now restricts fireworks within all densely populated residential zones.
gept.example_zh: 一項市政條例現在限制在人口密集住宅區內燃放煙火。

gept.example_en: The two states signed a compact to share water resources during severe drought years.
gept.example_zh: 兩州簽署了一項協定，在嚴重乾旱年份共享水資源。

gept.example_en: Negotiators reached a tentative accord on emissions targets after weeks of intense talks.
gept.example_zh: 經過數週密集會談，談判代表就排放目標達成初步協議。

gept.example_en: Investigators concluded that the hospital's negligence directly contributed to the patient's injury.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員認定醫院的疏忽直接造成病患受傷。

gept.example_en: The jury awarded the family substantial damages for the wrongful termination of employment.
gept.example_zh: 陪審團裁定該家庭因不當解雇獲得鉅額損害賠償。

gept.example_en: Outside counsel advised the firm to settle rather than face an uncertain jury verdict.
gept.example_zh: 外部律師建議公司和解，而非面對結果不確定的陪審團裁決。

gept.example_en: Federal authorities decided to prosecute several executives for orchestrating the elaborate accounting scheme.
gept.example_zh: 聯邦當局決定起訴數名主管，因其策劃了複雜的會計造假計畫。

gept.example_en: The prosecution presented financial records that contradicted the defendant's earlier sworn testimony.
gept.example_zh: 檢方提出與被告先前宣誓證詞相矛盾的財務紀錄。

gept.example_en: Customs officers along the mountainous frontier struggle to detect every smuggling route in winter.
gept.example_zh: 山區邊境的海關人員在冬季難以查獲每一條走私路線。

gept.example_en: The military occupation lasted nearly seven years before a negotiated withdrawal was finally agreed.
gept.example_zh: 在最終達成協議撤軍之前，軍事佔領持續了近七年。

gept.example_en: The country celebrates its liberation each year with parades, ceremonies, and public speeches.
gept.example_zh: 該國每年以遊行、典禮與公開演說來慶祝其解放紀念日。

gept.example_en: Every sovereign nation has the right to set its own immigration and visa policies.
gept.example_zh: 每個主權國家都有權制定自己的移民與簽證政策。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers must ratify the trade agreement before it can take legal effect domestically.
gept.example_zh: 立法者必須批准該貿易協議，它才能在國內取得法律效力。

gept.example_en: Students staged a sit-in at the administration building to demand transparent tuition fee decisions.
gept.example_zh: 學生在行政大樓舉行靜坐抗議，要求透明的學費決策。

gept.example_en: The export embargo-trade on advanced semiconductors reshaped global supply chains within a single year.
gept.example_zh: 對先進半導體的出口禁運在短短一年內重塑了全球供應鏈。

gept.example_en: The populist movement promised to deliver power back to ordinary citizens from distant urban elites.
gept.example_zh: 這個民粹主義運動承諾將權力從遙遠的都會菁英手中歸還給普通公民。

gept.example_en: The inspector-general published findings suggesting widespread accounting irregularities within the regional housing authority.
gept.example_zh: 監察長發布的調查結果指出該地區房屋管理局內部存在普遍的會計違規現象。

gept.example_en: Police uncovered a trafficking ring exploiting vulnerable migrant workers from neighboring regions.
gept.example_zh: 警方破獲一個剝削鄰近地區弱勢移工的販運集團。

gept.example_en: Community groups organized voter-registration drives to help newly naturalized citizens prepare for upcoming elections.
gept.example_zh: 社區團體舉辦選民登記活動，幫助新歸化公民為即將到來的選舉做準備。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 市民大會；居民座談會
gept.example_en: The senator held a town-hall in each district to gather feedback on the proposed infrastructure plan.
gept.example_zh: 這位參議員在每個選區舉辦市民大會，蒐集對擬議基礎建設計畫的回饋意見。

gept.example_en: The inventor obtained a patent covering both the device and its essential underlying manufacturing process.
gept.example_zh: 該發明人獲得了一項涵蓋裝置及其關鍵基礎製造流程的專利。

gept.example_en: A registered trademark allows the company to prevent competitors from using a confusingly similar brand name.
gept.example_zh: 註冊商標讓公司能阻止競爭者使用容易混淆的相似品牌名稱。

gept.example_en: Several human-rights organizations published reports documenting the treatment of detainees during the prolonged emergency period.
gept.example_zh: 數個人權組織發布報告，記錄了在長期緊急時期被拘留者所受到的對待。

gept.example_en: Robust freedom-of-speech protections allow journalists to investigate sensitive subjects without fear of governmental retaliation.
gept.example_zh: 強有力的言論自由保障讓記者能在不必擔心政府報復的情況下調查敏感議題。

gept.example_en: Upward mobility allows children to attain a higher social class than their parents.
gept.example_zh: 向上流動讓孩子能達到比父母更高的社會階層。

gept.example_en: A self-fulfilling prophecy occurs when low expectations actually cause the predicted poor outcome.
gept.example_zh: 當低期望實際導致預期的不良結果時，便發生了自我應驗的預言。

gept.example_en: The Pygmalion effect shows that high teacher expectations can boost student achievement significantly.
gept.example_zh: 比馬龍效應顯示教師的高期望能顯著提升學生的成就。

gept.example_en: Attachment parenting encourages frequent physical closeness and responsive caregiving from infancy.
gept.example_zh: 親密育兒法鼓勵從嬰兒期開始頻繁的身體接近與回應式照顧。

gept.example_en: A clear lesson plan outlines objectives, activities, and ways to check student understanding.
gept.example_zh: 清晰的教案勾勒出教學目標、活動以及檢核學生理解的方式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 拼圖式合作學習法
gept.example_en: In the jigsaw method, each student becomes an expert on one piece and teaches the others.
gept.example_zh: 在拼圖式合作學習法中，每位學生成為某個部分的專家並教導其他人。

gept.example_en: Episodic memory stores personal experiences along with the times and places where they happened.
gept.example_zh: 情節記憶儲存個人經驗以及這些經驗發生的時間與地點。

gept.example_en: Semantic memory holds general facts and concepts, such as the capitals of countries.
gept.example_zh: 語意記憶保存一般事實與概念，例如各國的首都。

gept.example_en: Longer wait time after a question gives students space to think rather than guess quickly.
gept.example_zh: 提問後較長的等待時間讓學生有空間思考而非快速猜測。

gept.example_en: Active learning replaces long lectures with discussion, problem solving, and frequent practice.
gept.example_zh: 主動學習以討論、解題和頻繁練習取代冗長的講授。

gept.example_en: Scaffolded writing offers sentence frames that beginners can complete with their own ideas.
gept.example_zh: 鷹架式寫作提供句型框架，讓初學者用自己的想法完成句子。

gept.example_en: An anti-bullying program teaches bystanders concrete steps to safely interrupt cruel behavior.
gept.example_zh: 反霸凌計畫教旁觀者具體步驟以安全地制止殘忍行為。

gept.example_en: Cyberbullying can follow a student home through phones and social media at any hour.
gept.example_zh: 網路霸凌可能透過手機和社群媒體在任何時刻跟著學生回家。

gept.example_en: Better healthcare can significantly reduce the infant mortality rate within a generation.
gept.example_zh: 更好的醫療照護能在一個世代內大幅降低嬰兒死亡率。

gept.example_en: Digital citizenship lessons cover online safety, respectful posting, and managing one's digital footprint.
gept.example_zh: 數位公民素養課程涵蓋網路安全、尊重的張貼禮儀和管理個人數位足跡。

gept.example_en: Lifelong learning has become essential as careers change more often than in past generations.
gept.example_zh: 由於職涯變化比過去世代更頻繁，終身學習已變得不可或缺。

gept.example_en: Early childhood programs that emphasize play strongly support cognitive and social development.
gept.example_zh: 重視遊戲的幼兒教育課程能強而有力地支持認知和社會發展。

gept.example_en: An after-school program offered homework help, snacks, and quiet supervised play.
gept.example_zh: 課後計畫提供功課輔導、點心以及安靜的有人看管的遊戲時光。

gept.example_en: The achievement gap reflects unequal access to early education and family resources.
gept.example_zh: 學業成就落差反映出早期教育與家庭資源取得的不平等。

gept.example_en: The director spent hours on blocking so every actor would hit precise marks on stage.
gept.example_zh: 導演花了好幾個小時安排走位，讓每位演員都能準確踏到舞台上的位置。

gept.example_en: Her collage combined magazine clippings, fabric scraps, and pressed flowers from her garden.
gept.example_zh: 她的拼貼作品結合了雜誌剪貼、布料碎片以及她花園裡的壓花。

gept.example_en: She was invited to curate a special exhibition on emerging female sculptors this autumn.
gept.example_zh: 她受邀今年秋季策劃一場關於新銳女性雕塑家的特展。

gept.example_en: The film opens with a slow fade-in revealing an empty desert at dawn.
gept.example_zh: 電影以緩慢的淡入開場，呈現出黎明時分的空曠沙漠。

gept.example_en: After the final embrace, the screen used a gentle fade-out to end the scene.
gept.example_zh: 最後一個擁抱之後，畫面以溫柔的淡出結束這場戲。

gept.example_en: The Sunday service was lifted by gospel singers whose harmonies filled every corner.
gept.example_zh: 週日禮拜因福音歌手而充滿生氣，他們的和聲填滿了每個角落。

gept.example_en: We bought cheaper tickets for the Sunday matinee instead of the evening performance.
gept.example_zh: 我們買了較便宜的週日日場票，沒選晚間場次。

gept.example_en: The monochrome photograph captured the rainy street with striking emotional depth.
gept.example_zh: 這張單色照片以動人的情感深度捕捉了雨中的街道。

gept.example_en: Ancient mosaic-tile floors still survive in many Mediterranean archaeological sites today.
gept.example_zh: 古代的馬賽克磁磚地板至今仍保存於許多地中海考古遺址。

gept.example_en: The documentary's calm narration guided viewers through complex scientific explanations.
gept.example_zh: 紀錄片冷靜的旁白引導觀眾理解複雜的科學解說。

gept.example_en: Slow panning across the crowd built suspense before revealing the suspect's hidden face.
gept.example_zh: 緩慢橫搖鏡頭掃過人群，營造懸疑感後才揭露嫌犯隱藏的臉孔。

gept.example_en: The children loved the pantomime, especially when actors invited them to shout suggestions.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們很喜歡這齣默劇，尤其是演員邀請他們大聲提建議的時候。

gept.example_en: She smudged the soft pastel with her finger to create a gentle fading effect.
gept.example_zh: 她用手指將柔軟的粉彩筆塗抹開，創造出溫和的淡化效果。

gept.example_en: Pop-art transformed familiar advertising images into bold and colorful gallery pieces.
gept.example_zh: 普普藝術將熟悉的廣告影像轉化為大膽而色彩鮮明的畫廊作品。

gept.example_en: Months of post-production polished the rough footage into a smooth final cut.
gept.example_zh: 歷時數月的後期製作將粗剪畫面打磨成流暢的成片。

gept.example_en: Leonardo perfected sfumato by blending tones so gradually that hard edges seem to vanish.
gept.example_zh: 達文西完善了暈塗法，他將色調漸層融合，讓硬邊彷彿消失。

gept.example_en: She sent her showreel to several agencies hoping for new commercial directing opportunities.
gept.example_zh: 她把作品集影片寄給數家經紀公司，希望爭取新的廣告執導機會。

gept.example_en: He carries a small sketchbook everywhere to capture interesting faces and street scenes.
gept.example_zh: 他隨身帶著一本小速寫本，捕捉有趣的臉孔與街景。

gept.example_en: Early silent films relied heavily on slapstick humor with pratfalls and exaggerated chases.
gept.example_zh: 早期默片大量仰賴鬧劇式喜劇，充滿滑倒摔跤與誇張的追逐。

gept.example_en: Her still-life of fruit and ceramics won first prize at the regional art fair.
gept.example_zh: 她描繪水果與陶器的靜物畫在區域藝術博覽會贏得首獎。

gept.example_en: Producing a single minute of stop-motion can take several days of patient careful work.
gept.example_zh: 製作短短一分鐘的定格動畫可能要好幾天耐心仔細的工作。

gept.example_en: A skilled stunt-double performed the dangerous motorcycle jump shown in the trailer.
gept.example_zh: 預告片裡那段危險的摩托車跳躍由技藝精湛的特技替身完成。

gept.example_en: The producer layered a glowing synth over the drums to give the track a futuristic feel.
gept.example_zh: 製作人在鼓組上疊加一層閃爍的合成器，讓曲子有未來感。

gept.example_en: The famous terracotta army was discovered by farmers digging a well decades ago.
gept.example_zh: 知名的兵馬俑赤陶軍團是幾十年前農夫挖井時意外發現的。

gept.example_en: The choir's clear treble-voice rose above the orchestra in the final chorus.
gept.example_zh: 合唱團清亮的高音聲部在最後的合唱中凌駕於管弦樂團之上。

gept.example_en: A soft underscore-music heightened the tension during the long courtroom confrontation.
gept.example_zh: 輕柔的襯底配樂提升了漫長法庭對峙中的張力。

gept.example_en: Friendly ushers handed out programs and guided guests to their assigned theater seats.
gept.example_zh: 親切的引位員發放節目單，並引導觀眾到指定的劇院座位。

gept.example_en: The new department combines visual-arts with technology to encourage experimental student projects.
gept.example_zh: 新成立的科系結合視覺藝術與科技，鼓勵學生進行實驗性創作。

gept.example_en: The wide-shot of the empty highway emphasized just how alone the traveler really was.
gept.example_zh: 空曠公路的遠景鏡頭凸顯出旅人有多麼孤單。

gept.example_en: After every take, the actors gathered around the monitor to watch the playback together.
gept.example_zh: 每次拍完一鏡，演員們就圍到監看螢幕前一起看回放。

gept.example_en: The first rough-cut ran nearly three hours before the editor trimmed it down significantly.
gept.example_zh: 第一版粗剪將近三小時，剪輯師後來大幅縮短了片長。

gept.example_en: The director earned the right to final-cut after winning a major international film award.
gept.example_zh: 導演在獲得重大國際電影獎之後爭取到終剪權。

gept.example_en: Animators draw the key-frame poses first and then fill in the in-between motion later.
gept.example_zh: 動畫師先畫出關鍵影格的姿勢，之後再補上中間的動作。

gept.example_en: The respected art-critic wrote a glowing review of the young sculptor's debut exhibition.
gept.example_zh: 這位備受尊敬的藝評家為這位年輕雕塑家的首展寫下盛讚的評論。

gept.example_en: Studying art-history helps viewers understand why certain paintings were once revolutionary works.
gept.example_zh: 學習藝術史能幫助觀者理解為何某些畫作曾經是革命性作品。

gept.example_en: Every major art-movement reacts in some way to the styles that came before it.
gept.example_zh: 每一個重要的藝術運動都對之前的風格做出某種回應。

gept.example_en: She adjusted her music-stand to the perfect height before beginning to warm up.
gept.example_zh: 她把樂譜架調到剛好的高度後才開始暖手。

gept.example_en: Practicing with a metronome helped him build a steady internal sense of musical time.
gept.example_zh: 用節拍器練習幫助他建立穩定的內在音樂時間感。

gept.example_en: The pianist prepared a short encore-piece in case the audience demanded one more song.
gept.example_zh: 鋼琴家準備了一首簡短的安可曲，以防觀眾再要求一首。

gept.example_en: The arranger turned the simple guitar demo into a sweeping orchestral version for the album.
gept.example_zh: 編曲者把簡單的吉他試聽帶改編為氣勢恢宏的管弦樂版本收錄專輯。

gept.example_en: The veteran songwriter has written hits for many of the country's biggest pop stars.
gept.example_zh: 這位資深的詞曲創作者為許多國內最紅的流行巨星寫過熱門歌曲。

gept.example_en: Local songwriters gather at the cafe every Tuesday for an informal open-mic event.
gept.example_zh: 當地的詞曲創作者每週二都在那家咖啡店聚會，舉辦輕鬆的開放麥克風之夜。

gept.example_en: The band built a passionate fanbase through years of constant small-venue touring.
gept.example_zh: 這個樂團多年來不斷在小場地巡演，建立起一批熱情的粉絲群。

gept.example_en: The tiny indie-film surprised everyone by winning the top prize at the festival.
gept.example_zh: 這部小成本獨立電影出乎意料地在影展拿下首獎。

gept.example_en: The annual film-festival draws filmmakers and journalists from dozens of different countries.
gept.example_zh: 這個年度電影節吸引來自數十個國家的電影人與記者。

gept.example_en: Photographers crowded the red-carpet to capture the stars arriving for the gala premiere.
gept.example_zh: 攝影師擠滿紅毯，捕捉明星抵達首映晚會的畫面。

gept.example_en: The play opened to rave-review pieces in every major newspaper across the country.
gept.example_zh: 這部戲開演後在全國各大報紙上獲得一片好評。

gept.example_en: Despite a harsh pan-review, the new musical still sold out every performance.
gept.example_zh: 儘管獲得嚴厲的負評，這部新音樂劇仍場場售罄。

gept.example_en: The lighting-designer used warm amber tones to suggest a long summer afternoon outdoors.
gept.example_zh: 燈光設計師運用溫暖的琥珀色調，營造夏日漫長午後的戶外感。

gept.example_en: The costume-designer researched historical fashion magazines for months before sketching any outfits.
gept.example_zh: 服裝設計師研究歷史時尚雜誌數個月之後才開始繪製任何服裝。

gept.example_en: The makeup-artist aged the young actor decades using only careful shading and prosthetic pieces.
gept.example_zh: 化妝師只用細膩的陰影與特殊化妝就讓年輕演員老了幾十歲。

gept.example_en: The stage-manager keeps every cue running smoothly while the director watches from out front.
gept.example_zh: 舞台監督讓每個提示流暢運作，導演則在前台觀看。

gept.example_en: The famous art-collector donated her entire modernist collection to the national museum.
gept.example_zh: 這位知名藝術收藏家把她整批現代主義藏品捐給了國立博物館。

gept.example_en: Galleries from around the world set up booths at the international art-fair last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 上週末來自世界各地的畫廊在國際藝術博覽會擺設展位。

gept.example_en: The auction-house expects the rare painting to fetch a record-breaking final hammer price.
gept.example_zh: 拍賣行預期這幅稀有畫作會以打破紀錄的成交價落槌。

gept.example_en: The careful restoration-art revealed colors hidden beneath centuries of dirt and old varnish.
gept.example_zh: 細心的藝術修復讓深埋在百年塵垢與舊漆下的色彩重現。

gept.example_en: The band recorded their new studio-album in an old church with naturally warm acoustics.
gept.example_zh: 樂團在一座具有自然溫暖音響效果的古老教堂錄製了他們的新錄音室專輯。

gept.example_en: The energetic live-album captured the magic of the band's stadium concerts perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 這張充滿能量的現場專輯完美捕捉了該樂團體育場演唱會的魔力。

gept.example_en: The new concert-hall features acoustic panels carefully engineered for orchestral performances.
gept.example_zh: 新音樂廳裝設了專為管弦樂演出精心設計的聲學板。

gept.example_en: Her supportive talent-agent negotiated a much better deal for her next major film role.
gept.example_zh: 她支持她的演藝經紀人為她的下一個主要電影角色談下更好的條件。

gept.example_en: The tour-manager coordinates transportation, accommodations, and rehearsal venues for the entire band.
gept.example_zh: 巡演經理為整個樂團安排交通、住宿與排練場地。

gept.example_en: Fans queued at the merchandise-stand to buy posters, shirts, and signed concert programs.
gept.example_zh: 粉絲在周邊販售區排隊購買海報、T 恤與簽名演唱會節目單。

gept.example_en: The historic playhouse on the corner has staged Shakespeare for over a century.
gept.example_zh: 街角這座歷史悠久的戲劇院上演莎士比亞作品已超過一個世紀。

gept.example_en: The ghost appeared suddenly through a hidden trapdoor in the center of the stage.
gept.example_zh: 幽靈從舞台中央隱藏的暗門突然出現。

gept.example_en: The outdoor art-installation invited visitors to walk through curtains of softly flowing colored fabric.
gept.example_zh: 這件戶外藝術裝置邀請訪客穿越柔和飄動的彩色布幔。

gept.example_en: Audiophiles claim that a vinyl-record offers a richer warmer sound than digital streaming.
gept.example_zh: 音響發燒友主張黑膠唱片的聲音比數位串流更豐厚溫暖。

gept.example_en: He carefully cleaned the turntable needle before placing the precious old vinyl onto the platter.
gept.example_zh: 他小心清潔唱盤機的唱針，才把珍貴的舊黑膠唱片放到轉盤上。

gept.example_en: The sound-engineer balanced the levels carefully so every instrument could be heard clearly.
gept.example_zh: 音效工程師仔細調整音量大小，讓每件樂器都能被清晰聽見。

gept.example_en: She practices in a soundproof booth so her late-night sessions never disturb sleeping neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 她在隔音間練習，深夜練習時不會打擾到隔壁睡覺的鄰居。

gept.example_en: He prefers the natural sound of an acoustic-guitar for quiet performances in coffee shops.
gept.example_zh: 他偏愛木吉他自然的音色，適合在咖啡廳的安靜演出。

gept.example_en: The teenager spent his savings on a shiny new electric-guitar and a small practice amplifier.
gept.example_zh: 這位青少年花光積蓄買了一把閃亮亮的新電吉他與小型練習音箱。

gept.example_en: He plugged his guitar into the vintage amplifier to recreate that classic warm rock tone.
gept.example_zh: 他把吉他接上復古的擴大機，重現經典溫暖的搖滾音色。

gept.example_en: The choir distributed a thick songbook containing every piece planned for the season.
gept.example_zh: 合唱團發了一本厚厚的歌本，裡面收錄了整季預計演唱的所有曲目。

gept.example_en: After art-school, many graduates struggled to find studio space they could comfortably afford.
gept.example_zh: 從藝術學院畢業後，許多人很難找到負擔得起的工作室空間。

gept.example_en: The performing-arts center hosts dance, theater, and concerts throughout the entire calendar year.
gept.example_zh: 這座表演藝術中心整年舉辦舞蹈、戲劇與音樂會。

gept.example_en: She used the art-grant to buy supplies and rent a small studio for the project.
gept.example_zh: 她用這筆藝術補助金購買材料並租了一間小工作室來進行創作。

gept.example_en: The teacher distributed basic art-supplies including brushes, watercolors, and thick textured paper.
gept.example_zh: 老師發放基本美術用品，包括畫筆、水彩與厚實有紋理的紙張。

gept.example_en: The young dancer became the choreographer's muse for the next three groundbreaking works.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕舞者成為編舞家接下來三部突破性作品的繆思。

gept.example_en: She trained in dance, acting, and singing to prepare for a musical-theater career.
gept.example_zh: 她接受舞蹈、表演與歌唱訓練，為的是發展音樂劇事業。

gept.example_en: Modern-dance often rejects the rigid postures of classical ballet for freer expressive movement.
gept.example_zh: 現代舞往往拋棄古典芭蕾的僵硬姿態，採用更自由的表達性動作。

gept.example_en: Contemporary-art often blends video, sound, and traditional materials within a single ambitious piece.
gept.example_zh: 當代藝術經常在單一企圖宏大的作品中融合影像、聲音與傳統媒材。

gept.example_en: The exhibition celebrated regional folk-art including hand-painted toys, embroidered cloth, and carved figurines.
gept.example_zh: 這場展覽展示當地民俗藝術，包括手繪玩具、刺繡布料與雕刻小像。

gept.example_en: The city now welcomes street-art and has commissioned several large murals around the old neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市現在接納街頭藝術，並在老社區委託創作了幾幅大型壁畫。

gept.example_en: Recognized graffiti-art pieces now sell for high prices in respected international galleries.
gept.example_zh: 獲認可的塗鴉藝術作品現在能在受敬重的國際畫廊賣出高價。

gept.example_en: Stencil-art lets artists reproduce sharp identical images quickly across many different surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 模板印刷藝術讓藝術家能快速在多個不同表面上重現銳利一致的圖像。

gept.example_en: The director chose a haunting still-frame of the empty playground for the official film poster.
gept.example_zh: 導演挑了空蕩遊樂場那張令人難忘的定格畫面作為電影正式海報。

gept.example_en: A brief cut-away to the worried child added unexpected emotional depth to the argument scene.
gept.example_zh: 短暫切換到擔憂孩童的鏡頭為爭吵場景增添出乎意料的情感深度。

gept.example_en: A clever match-cut transitions smoothly from a spinning bicycle wheel into a giant clock face.
gept.example_zh: 巧妙的匹配剪接從轉動的腳踏車輪平順過渡到巨大的鐘面。

gept.example_en: The energetic jump-cut style made every chase scene feel intense and tightly compressed.
gept.example_zh: 充滿能量的跳接風格讓每場追逐戲都顯得緊湊強烈。

gept.example_en: A tight close-shot revealed the single tear sliding slowly down her trembling cheek.
gept.example_zh: 緊湊的特寫鏡頭呈現她顫抖臉頰上緩緩滑下的那滴淚。

gept.example_en: A creative split-screen showed both ends of the phone conversation at the very same time.
gept.example_zh: 創意的分割畫面同時呈現電話兩端的對話。

gept.example_en: He recorded a cheap demo-tape in his bedroom and sent it to several local labels.
gept.example_zh: 他在臥室錄了一捲簡陋的試聽帶，寄給幾家本地唱片公司。

gept.example_en: The famous music-critic gave the band's debut album an enthusiastic five-star review.
gept.example_zh: 這位知名樂評給予樂團首張專輯熱情的五顆星評價。

gept.example_en: A trusted film-critic can either save or sink a small art-house movie's box office.
gept.example_zh: 受信任的影評可以拯救或扼殺一部小型藝術電影的票房。

gept.example_en: Actors share the cramped dressing-room while making last-minute adjustments to their makeup.
gept.example_zh: 演員們共用擠迫的化妝室，做最後的妝容調整。

gept.example_en: Guests waited nervously in the green-room before their televised live appearance began.
gept.example_zh: 來賓在候場休息室裡緊張地等待現場電視直播開始。

gept.example_en: She listened to a long audiobook during her daily commute on the suburban train.
gept.example_zh: 她在每天搭郊區火車通勤時聽一本長篇有聲書。

gept.example_en: The children's library hosts a free puppet-show every Saturday morning during the school year.
gept.example_zh: 兒童圖書館在學年期間每週六上午都會免費演出木偶戲。

gept.example_en: The massive exhibition-hall held over forty separate booths for the international design show.
gept.example_zh: 這座大型展覽館為國際設計展容納了超過四十個獨立展位。

gept.example_en: The heavy hardcover art-book gathered her favorite portraits from museums across three continents.
gept.example_zh: 這本厚重的精裝藝術書彙集了她在三大洲博物館裡最喜愛的肖像畫。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of bands play across many stages during the summer music-festival each year.
gept.example_zh: 每年夏天的音樂節，數百個樂團在多個舞台輪番演出。

gept.example_en: Organizers announced an impressive lineup that included three Grammy-winning headlining acts.
gept.example_zh: 主辦單位公布了一份令人驚豔的演出陣容，包含三組曾獲葛萊美獎的壓軸表演者。

gept.example_en: The festival's headliner closed the long weekend with a fireworks-filled outdoor performance.
gept.example_zh: 音樂節的壓軸表演者以煙火齊放的戶外演出結束了漫長的週末。

gept.example_en: The unknown opening-act surprised everyone with a confident performance that earned an encore.
gept.example_zh: 原本沒沒無聞的開場表演者以自信的演出讓所有人驚艷，還贏得了一首安可曲。

gept.example_en: A talented supporting-cast often elevates an otherwise ordinary script into a memorable production.
gept.example_zh: 出色的配角群常能把原本普通的劇本提升為令人難忘的作品。

gept.example_en: She won the lead-role after a long audition process spanning several stressful months.
gept.example_zh: 她經過長達數月、令人緊張的試鏡過程後贏得了主角。

gept.example_en: He played the title-role of Hamlet in three different productions over his long career.
gept.example_zh: 他在漫長的演藝生涯中三度於不同製作中飾演哈姆雷特這個同名主角。

gept.example_en: A famous guest-star appeared in only one episode but boosted ratings dramatically that week.
gept.example_zh: 一位知名客串明星只出現一集，當週收視卻大幅提升。

gept.example_en: Her natural stage-presence captures audience attention before she has spoken a single word.
gept.example_zh: 她渾然天成的舞台魅力在尚未開口前就已抓住觀眾的注意力。

gept.example_en: The ballad unfolds as a series of quatrains telling the tragic love story.
gept.example_zh: 這首民謠以一連串四行詩節展開，訴說悲慘的愛情故事。

gept.example_en: A haiku must capture a single seasonal moment within seventeen syllables.
gept.example_zh: 俳句必須在十七個音節內捕捉一個季節性的瞬間。

gept.example_en: He wrote a silly limerick about a goat that wandered into the library.
gept.example_zh: 他寫了一首傻氣的打油詩，講一隻山羊闖進圖書館。

gept.example_en: She composed an ode to autumn that praised every shade of falling leaf.
gept.example_zh: 她創作一首頌歌獻給秋天，讚美每一片落葉的色彩。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 抒情的 (名詞) 抒情詩
gept.example_en: Her lyric verse explores private grief with delicate, song-like phrasing.
gept.example_zh: 她的抒情詩以細膩如歌的語句探索私人的悲傷。

gept.example_en: The young novelist signed copies of her debut book at the bookstore.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕小說家在書店為她的處女作簽名。

gept.example_en: Classical tragedy usually ends with the downfall of a noble but flawed hero.
gept.example_zh: 古典悲劇通常以一位高貴但有缺陷的英雄走向毀滅作結。

gept.example_en: The chapter ended on a cliffhanger that forced readers to start the next one.
gept.example_zh: 這一章以懸念結局收尾，逼著讀者馬上翻開下一章。

gept.example_en: A tender subplot about the neighbor balanced the novel's darker main story.
gept.example_zh: 一條關於鄰居的溫柔副線平衡了這本小說陰暗的主線。

gept.example_en: An unreliable narrator forces readers to question every recollection in the book.
gept.example_zh: 一位不可靠的敘事者迫使讀者質疑書中每一段回憶。

gept.example_en: The editor-in-chief approved the front page minutes before the press began running.
gept.example_zh: 總編輯在印刷機啟動前幾分鐘批准了頭版。

gept.example_en: She finally went on-the-record after months of careful background interviews.
gept.example_zh: 在數月謹慎的背景採訪後，她終於同意公開接受引述。

gept.example_en: A background-source confirmed the rumor without agreeing to be named.
gept.example_zh: 一位背景消息來源證實了這個傳聞，但不同意被具名。

gept.example_en: She finally received a front page byline-credit after years of quiet reporting.
gept.example_zh: 在多年默默報導後，她終於獲得頭版署名榮譽。

gept.example_en: The ebook included extra footnotes that did not fit in the printed paperback.
gept.example_zh: 電子書版收錄了平裝本放不下的額外註腳。

gept.example_en: Online fanfiction lets readers imagine new lives for characters they already love.
gept.example_zh: 網路同人小說讓讀者為自己喜愛的角色想像新的人生。

gept.example_en: The dystopian novel pictures a future where reading aloud is criminalized.
gept.example_zh: 這部反烏托邦小說描繪一個朗讀被定為犯罪的未來。

gept.example_en: The utopian sketch describes a town where every child has a poet mentor.
gept.example_zh: 這篇烏托邦式的素描描寫一座每個孩子都有詩人導師的小鎮。

gept.example_en: A gothic atmosphere fills the manor with creaking doors and stormy nights.
gept.example_zh: 哥德風氛圍讓莊園充滿咯吱作響的門與暴風雨之夜。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 黑色小說/電影風格的
gept.example_en: The noir mystery follows a cynical detective through neon soaked alleys.
gept.example_zh: 這部黑色推理小說跟著一位憤世嫉俗的偵探穿越霓虹斑斕的小巷。

gept.example_en: The thriller keeps readers turning pages well past midnight every single night.
gept.example_zh: 這部驚悚小說讓讀者每晚都翻頁翻到午夜過後。

gept.example_en: Reviewers called the debut a true page-turner about a missing translator.
gept.example_zh: 評論家稱這部關於失蹤譯者的處女作為真正引人入勝的書。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 讓人感覺愉快的
gept.example_en: Her feel-good column each Sunday celebrates small kindnesses around town.
gept.example_zh: 她每週日的暖心專欄都讚揚城裡的小善行。

gept.example_en: Open-access journals let any curious reader download the full article for free.
gept.example_zh: 開放取用期刊讓任何好奇的讀者都能免費下載完整文章。

gept.example_en: His grandmother repeated a familiar maxim about honest work and quiet pride.
gept.example_zh: 他的祖母重複著一句關於誠實工作與安靜驕傲的熟悉處世格言。

gept.example_en: Her preface thanks the readers who first encouraged the strange opening chapter.
gept.example_zh: 她的前言感謝那些最早鼓勵這奇異開頭章節的讀者。

gept.example_en: The cozy book-launch filled the indie store with friends, students, and one cat.
gept.example_zh: 這場溫馨的新書發表會把獨立書店塞滿了朋友、學生和一隻貓。

gept.example_en: Their book-club spent two months arguing about a single ambiguous ending.
gept.example_zh: 他們的讀書會花了兩個月爭論一個模稜兩可的結局。

gept.example_en: Ten minutes of freewriting helped her break through a stubborn morning block.
gept.example_zh: 十分鐘的自由書寫幫她突破了頑固的清晨寫作障礙。

gept.example_en: Her outline-draft already named every chapter and the song behind each scene.
gept.example_zh: 她的大綱草稿已經為每一章命名，並標示每一場景背後的歌曲。

gept.example_en: The rough-draft was messy but already held the novel's emotional center.
gept.example_zh: 這份初稿凌亂，但已包含小說的情感核心。

gept.example_en: After twelve revisions the final-draft was finally sent to the typesetter.
gept.example_zh: 經過十二次修改後，定稿終於送到排版員手中。

gept.example_en: Each revision-round trimmed clutter and sharpened the novel's quiet voice.
gept.example_zh: 每一輪修稿都修剪掉雜亂，並讓小說安靜的聲音更為鮮明。

gept.example_en: A careful line-edit smoothed every awkward rhythm in the final chapter.
gept.example_zh: 細膩的逐行細修撫平了最後一章中每一處不順的節奏。

gept.example_en: Critics received an early galley-proof months before the official release.
gept.example_zh: 評論家在正式發行前數月就收到了早期的校樣。

gept.example_en: His seminar surveys criticism-theory from formalism to postcolonial readings.
gept.example_zh: 他的研討課從形式主義到後殖民解讀全面概覽評論理論。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 口語詩；口述表演詩
gept.example_en: He performed spoken-word at a tiny basement venue every Thursday night.
gept.example_zh: 他每週四晚都在一個小小的地下室場地表演口語詩。

gept.example_en: The village baker rises at three in the morning to prepare fresh loaves before sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 村裡的烘焙師凌晨三點起床，在日出前準備新鮮的麵包。

gept.example_en: Soy sauce and chili paste are essential condiments on every table at this restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 醬油和辣椒醬是這家餐廳每張桌上必備的調味料。

gept.example_en: The chicken requires at least four hours of marination for the spices to fully penetrate.
gept.example_zh: 雞肉需要至少四小時的醃製，香料才能完全滲入。

gept.example_en: Steep the tea leaves in hot water for exactly three minutes to release their full flavor.
gept.example_zh: 將茶葉在熱水中浸泡剛好三分鐘，以釋放完整的風味。

gept.example_en: My father wakes up early every morning to brew a fresh pot of coffee for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 我父親每天早起為大家沖泡一壺新鮮咖啡。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 醃漬；(名詞) 醃菜
gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me how to pickle cucumbers using vinegar, salt, and fresh dill.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母教我如何用醋、鹽和新鮮蒔蘿醃漬黃瓜。

gept.example_en: Salt is used to cure meat and preserve it for several months without refrigeration.
gept.example_zh: 鹽用來醃製肉類，無需冷藏即可保存數月。

gept.example_en: They smoke the salmon over alder wood chips for twelve hours to create a delicate flavor.
gept.example_zh: 他們用赤楊木屑燻製鮭魚十二小時，創造出細緻的風味。

gept.example_en: Broil the cheese topping for two minutes until it turns bubbly and golden brown.
gept.example_zh: 上火烤起司配料兩分鐘，直到變得冒泡並呈現金棕色。

gept.example_en: We plan to barbeque ribs in the backyard with friends this Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們計劃這週日下午與朋友在後院燒烤肋排。

gept.example_en: Thread the marinated chicken onto each skewer along with chunks of pepper and onion.
gept.example_zh: 將醃好的雞肉串到每根烤肉串籤上，搭配彩椒和洋蔥塊。

gept.example_en: The whole chicken slowly turned on the rotisserie, dripping fragrant juices onto the coals below.
gept.example_zh: 整隻雞在旋轉烤架上緩緩轉動，香氣四溢的肉汁滴落到下方的炭火上。

gept.example_en: The new cafe invested in a commercial espresso-machine that produces consistently smooth and creamy shots.
gept.example_zh: 新咖啡館投資了一台商用義式咖啡機，能穩定產出滑順濃郁的咖啡。

gept.example_en: A pressure-cooker can tenderize tough cuts of meat in less than an hour.
gept.example_zh: 壓力鍋可在不到一小時內將堅韌的肉塊燉到軟嫩。

gept.example_en: I love using my slow-cooker to prepare hearty stews while I am away at work.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡用慢燉鍋在上班時準備豐盛的燉菜。

gept.example_en: A convection-oven circulates hot air evenly, producing crispier results than a conventional model.
gept.example_zh: 對流烤箱能均勻循環熱空氣，做出比傳統烤箱更酥脆的成品。

gept.example_en: Cook pancakes evenly on a flat griddle-pan over medium heat for fluffy results.
gept.example_zh: 在平煎烤盤上以中火均勻煎鬆餅，可做出蓬鬆口感。

gept.example_en: She ladled the rich pumpkin soup from the porcelain tureen into each guest's bowl.
gept.example_zh: 她從瓷湯盅中舀出濃郁的南瓜湯，倒入每位客人的碗裡。

gept.example_en: Learning to use chopsticks properly takes practice, but the technique becomes natural over time.
gept.example_zh: 學習正確使用筷子需要練習，但這個技巧會隨時間變得自然。

gept.example_en: Mushrooms, parmesan, and soy sauce all contribute a deep umami flavor to many dishes.
gept.example_zh: 蘑菇、帕馬森起司和醬油都為許多料理增添濃郁的鮮味。

gept.example_en: Some aged cheeses have a hard rind that develops natural flavors during the maturation process.
gept.example_zh: 有些陳年起司有堅硬的外皮，在熟成過程中發展出天然風味。

gept.example_en: Squeeze the orange and strain out the pulp if you prefer a smoother juice.
gept.example_zh: 擠壓柳橙並過濾果肉，如果你偏好較滑順的果汁。

gept.example_en: Remove the bitter pith from the citrus peel before adding it to the dessert.
gept.example_zh: 在加入甜點前，先去除柑橘皮上苦澀的白色內皮。

gept.example_en: Traditional farmers separated the chaff from the grain by tossing it in the wind.
gept.example_zh: 傳統農民會將穀物拋向風中，以分離穀糠與穀粒。

gept.example_en: Millet is a drought-resistant grain widely cultivated in arid regions of Africa and Asia.
gept.example_zh: 小米是耐旱穀物，廣泛種植於非洲和亞洲的乾旱地區。

gept.example_en: A bowl of warm lentil soup with crusty bread makes a satisfying winter lunch.
gept.example_zh: 一碗溫熱的扁豆湯配上酥皮麵包，是令人滿足的冬日午餐。

gept.example_en: A bowl of salted edamame makes a perfect appetizer at most Japanese-style restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 一碗鹽味毛豆是大多數日式餐廳的完美開胃菜。

gept.example_en: Navy-bean soup with smoked ham is a comforting classic on cold winter evenings.
gept.example_zh: 海軍豆湯配燻火腿是寒冷冬夜的經典暖心料理。

gept.example_en: Split open a warm pita pocket and fill it with falafel, lettuce, and tahini sauce.
gept.example_zh: 將溫熱的皮塔餅口袋切開，填入炸鷹嘴豆球、生菜和芝麻醬。

gept.example_en: Each ravioli is hand-stuffed with creamy ricotta cheese and fresh chopped spinach.
gept.example_zh: 每個義式餃都用手工填入滑順的瑞可塔起司和新鮮切碎的菠菜。

gept.example_en: Toss fresh fettuccine with a creamy alfredo sauce and freshly grated parmesan cheese.
gept.example_zh: 將新鮮的寬麵與滑順的奶油白醬和現磨帕馬森起司拌勻。

gept.example_en: Cook the spaghetti until it reaches the perfect al-dente texture, firm yet tender.
gept.example_zh: 將義大利麵條煮到完美的彈牙口感，紮實卻又軟嫩。

gept.example_en: Penne pasta holds chunky tomato sauce beautifully thanks to its ridged tubular shape.
gept.example_zh: 筆管麵因其有紋的管狀形狀，能完美吸附濃稠的番茄醬。

gept.example_en: Soak the rice vermicelli briefly in hot water until softened, then drain it thoroughly.
gept.example_zh: 將米線細麵在熱水中短暫浸泡至軟化，再徹底瀝乾。

gept.example_en: Chilled soba noodles served with dipping sauce make a refreshing summer meal in Japan.
gept.example_zh: 冰鎮蕎麥麵搭配沾醬是日本清爽的夏日料理。

gept.example_en: After months of patient cultivation, the farmer can finally reap the rewards of his hard labor.
gept.example_zh: 歷經數月耐心的栽培，農夫終於能收割辛勤勞動的成果。

gept.example_en: Plant the seeds along each furrow at evenly spaced intervals for the best yield.
gept.example_zh: 在每條犁溝中以均勻間距種下種子，可獲得最佳產量。

gept.example_en: Leaving a field fallow for one season allows the soil to naturally replenish its nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 讓田地休耕一季，可使土壤自然補充養分。

gept.example_en: Crop-rotation prevents soil depletion and helps reduce pest populations between successive growing seasons.
gept.example_zh: 輪作可防止土壤養分枯竭，並幫助降低連續種植季節間的害蟲數量。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of cattle grazed peacefully across the rolling green hillsides at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 夕陽下，數百頭牛在起伏的綠色山坡上安詳地吃草。

gept.example_en: Each dairy-cow on this farm produces approximately twenty-five liters of milk every single day.
gept.example_zh: 這個農場的每頭乳牛每天約產出二十五公升的牛奶。

gept.example_en: The rancher rises before dawn each morning to check on his herd and mend fences.
gept.example_zh: 牧場主每天黎明前起床，查看牛群並修補圍欄。

gept.example_en: The sheep grazed contentedly across the lush green pasture during the warm summer afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 在溫暖的夏日午後，綿羊們在翠綠豐美的牧場上滿足地吃著草。

gept.example_en: Rotational grazing improves pasture health and reduces the need for chemical fertilizers significantly.
gept.example_zh: 輪牧能改善牧場健康，並大幅減少對化學肥料的需求。

gept.example_en: The farmer stockpiled hay and silage as winter fodder for his cattle and horses.
gept.example_zh: 農夫儲備乾草和青貯飼料，作為他的牛馬冬季的飼料。

gept.example_en: Chickens and ducks roamed freely around the busy barnyard pecking for scattered grain.
gept.example_zh: 雞鴨在熱鬧的農場院子裡自由漫步，啄食散落的穀粒。

gept.example_en: She collected fresh eggs from the chicken coop every morning before preparing breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上在準備早餐前，從雞舍收集新鮮雞蛋。

gept.example_en: Each pig pen on this farm is cleaned thoroughly twice every day for hygiene.
gept.example_zh: 這個農場的每個豬欄為了衛生，每天徹底清潔兩次。

gept.example_en: Grass-fed beef tends to be leaner and contains higher levels of beneficial omega-three fatty acids.
gept.example_zh: 草飼牛肉通常較為精瘦，並含有較高量的有益 omega-3 脂肪酸。

gept.example_en: Pasture-raised eggs come from hens that spend most of their day foraging outside in open fields.
gept.example_zh: 牧場放養的雞蛋來自大部分時間在開闊草地上覓食的母雞。

gept.example_en: We toured a local dairy-farm last weekend and watched the cows being milked twice daily.
gept.example_zh: 上週末我們參觀了當地的酪農場，觀察乳牛每天被擠奶兩次。

gept.example_en: The local craft brewery produces over twenty unique seasonal beers throughout each calendar year.
gept.example_zh: 當地的精釀啤酒廠每年生產超過二十款獨特的季節限定啤酒。

gept.example_en: The whisky distillery has been producing its signature single malt for over one hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 這家威士忌蒸餾酒廠生產招牌單一麥芽威士忌已超過一百年。

gept.example_en: The chef paired the lamb course with a special cuvee from a small family-owned estate.
gept.example_zh: 主廚將羊肉這道菜搭配一款來自小家族莊園的特調混釀酒。

gept.example_en: Concerns about herbicide residues have led many consumers to seek out organic produce options.
gept.example_zh: 對除草劑殘留的擔憂，促使許多消費者尋找有機農產品的選項。

gept.example_en: Rich topsoil takes hundreds of years to form but can be destroyed within just a few seasons.
gept.example_zh: 肥沃的表土需數百年才能形成，但可能在短短幾季內就被破壞殆盡。

gept.example_en: Loam is considered the ideal garden soil because it balances sand, silt, and clay perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 壤土被視為理想的菜園土壤，因為它完美平衡了沙、淤泥和黏土。

gept.example_en: Improper storage causes rapid spoilage of meat, dairy products, and tender leafy greens.
gept.example_zh: 儲存不當會導致肉類、乳製品和嫩葉菜快速變質。

gept.example_en: Always check the expiration-date on dairy products before purchasing them at the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 在超市購買乳製品前，請務必檢查有效期限。

gept.example_en: Most commercial dairies pasteurize milk to eliminate harmful bacteria while preserving most of its nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 大多數商業乳品廠對牛奶進行巴氏殺菌，以消滅有害細菌同時保留大部分營養素。

gept.example_en: Processors homogenize milk by breaking down fat globules so the cream stays evenly distributed.
gept.example_zh: 加工業者透過分解脂肪球來均質化牛奶，使奶油均勻分布。

gept.example_en: Whole-grain bread retains the bran and germ, providing more fiber and nutrients than white bread.
gept.example_zh: 全穀麵包保留了麥麩和胚芽，比白麵包提供更多纖維和營養素。

gept.example_en: Carbohydrates, fats, and protein are the three macronutrient categories essential to a balanced diet.
gept.example_zh: 碳水化合物、脂肪和蛋白質是均衡飲食必需的三大巨量營養素類別。

gept.example_en: International agencies coordinated famine-relief efforts to deliver emergency food supplies to remote drought-stricken villages.
gept.example_zh: 國際機構協調飢荒救助工作，向偏遠的乾旱災區村莊運送緊急食物物資。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 美食家；高級美食的
gept.example_en: The gourmet shop specializes in imported truffles, aged balsamic vinegar, and artisanal chocolate.
gept.example_zh: 這家高級美食店專營進口松露、陳年巴薩米克醋和手工巧克力。

gept.example_en: A true wine connoisseur can identify the grape variety and region from a single sip.
gept.example_zh: 真正的葡萄酒鑑賞家可以從一小口酒就辨認出葡萄品種和產區。

gept.example_en: Heirloom-variety tomatoes come in unusual colors and shapes with remarkably complex and intense flavors.
gept.example_zh: 傳家寶品種番茄有著不尋常的色澤和形狀，並擁有極為複雜濃郁的風味。

gept.example_en: This apple cultivar was developed specifically for its disease resistance and excellent storage qualities.
gept.example_zh: 這個蘋果栽培品種專為其抗病性和優異的儲存特性而培育。

gept.example_en: Members of the food co-op share ownership and receive discounts on organic groceries and bulk goods.
gept.example_zh: 食物合作社的成員共同擁有股權，並可在有機雜貨和散裝商品上享有折扣。

gept.example_en: This Jewish delicatessen has been serving authentic pastrami sandwiches for more than seventy years.
gept.example_zh: 這家猶太精緻熟食店供應道地的煙燻牛肉三明治已超過七十年。

gept.example_en: The street-vendor grills skewers of chicken right on the sidewalk for hungry passing commuters.
gept.example_zh: 街頭攤販在人行道上現烤雞肉串，供飢腸轆轆的通勤族購買。

gept.example_en: Singapore's hawker-stall culture brings together affordable food from many different ethnic culinary traditions.
gept.example_zh: 新加坡的小販攤位文化匯集了許多不同族裔烹飪傳統的平價美食。

gept.example_en: I asked the server for a doggy-bag so I could enjoy the leftovers for tomorrow's lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我向服務生要了個外帶剩菜袋，這樣我就能把剩菜當作明天的午餐。

gept.example_en: The all-you-can-eat sushi restaurant attracts long queues every Friday and Saturday night.
gept.example_zh: 這家吃到飽的壽司餐廳每週五、六晚上都吸引大排長龍的人潮。

gept.example_en: The chef's prix-fixe tasting menu features seven courses paired with carefully chosen regional wines.
gept.example_zh: 主廚的套餐品嚐菜單包含七道菜，搭配精心挑選的地方葡萄酒。

gept.example_en: A multi-course tasting-menu allows the chef to showcase seasonal ingredients in many creative ways.
gept.example_zh: 多道菜的品嚐套餐讓主廚能以多種創意方式展示時令食材。

gept.example_en: The fast-food industry has been adapting its menus to meet the growing demand for healthier options.
gept.example_zh: 速食業正在調整菜單以滿足對健康選項日益增長的需求。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人欲罷不能的
gept.example_en: These salted caramel cookies are so moreish that I cannot stop eating them once started.
gept.example_zh: 這些鹽味焦糖餅乾令人欲罷不能，我一旦開始吃就停不下來。

gept.example_en: Bitter orange marmalade spread on warm buttered toast is a classic British breakfast tradition.
gept.example_zh: 苦橙果醬塗在溫熱的奶油吐司上，是經典的英式早餐傳統。

gept.example_en: He scored with a stunning volley from twenty meters out that left the keeper helpless.
gept.example_zh: 他在二十公尺外以一記驚人的凌空抽射破門，門將完全無能為力。

gept.example_en: Her two-handed backhand has become one of the most feared shots on the women's tour.
gept.example_zh: 她的雙手反拍已成為女子巡迴賽中最令人畏懼的擊球之一。

gept.example_en: She caught him at the net with a delicate lob that just dropped inside the baseline.
gept.example_zh: 她以一記精巧的高吊球抓到他靠網的時機，球剛好落在底線內。

gept.example_en: The badminton player ended the rally with a powerful smash that her opponent could not return.
gept.example_zh: 羽球選手以一記強而有力的扣殺結束多拍，對手無法回擊。

gept.example_en: The score reached deuce five times before she finally converted her break point.
gept.example_zh: 比分五度進入平分，她才終於把握住破發點。

gept.example_en: She prefers singles because the longer matches reward her superior physical conditioning.
gept.example_zh: 她偏好單打，因為更長的比賽能凸顯她優異的體能。

gept.example_en: Her flat groundstrokes barely cleared the net but consistently landed deep in the court.
gept.example_zh: 她平擊的底線抽球幾乎貼網而過，卻能持續落在場地深處。

gept.example_en: He fired twenty-three aces in the four-set quarterfinal and never faced a break point.
gept.example_zh: 他在四盤的八強賽轟出二十三記發球得分，從未面臨破發點。

gept.example_en: Her first serve was called a fault when the ball clipped the top of the net.
gept.example_zh: 她的第一發被判失誤，因為球擦到了網頂。

gept.example_en: He covers the outfield with remarkable speed and rarely lets a fly ball drop in.
gept.example_zh: 他以驚人的速度防守外野，幾乎不讓飛球落地。

gept.example_en: The infield is playing in to try to cut down the runner at home plate.
gept.example_zh: 內野手往前站位，準備在本壘阻殺跑壘員。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (棒球場) 球員休息區
gept.example_en: The manager paced the dugout nervously while watching his closer try to protect the lead.
gept.example_zh: 總教練在休息區緊張地踱步，看著終結者投手試圖守住領先。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (棒球) 牛棚；候補投手練投區
gept.example_en: Two relievers were already warming up in the bullpen by the seventh inning.
gept.example_zh: 到了第七局，牛棚裡已有兩名後援投手在熱身。

gept.example_en: She missed an easy layup at the buzzer and her team lost by a single point.
gept.example_zh: 她在終場前錯失一個輕鬆的上籃，球隊以一分之差落敗。

gept.example_en: He drained a clutch three-pointer from the corner with two seconds left on the clock.
gept.example_zh: 他在比賽剩兩秒時從底角投進一記關鍵三分球。

gept.example_en: Missing both freethrow attempts in the final seconds cost the team the championship.
gept.example_zh: 在最後幾秒兩罰不中，讓球隊痛失冠軍。

gept.example_en: The center grabbed nineteen rebound-ball totals and dominated the paint all night.
gept.example_zh: 中鋒抓下十九個籃板球，整晚主宰禁區。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 變向過人；交叉運球
gept.example_en: His lightning crossover left the defender stumbling and opened a clear lane to the basket.
gept.example_zh: 他閃電般的變向讓防守者踉蹌，瞬間開出一條進攻路線。

gept.example_en: The team's fast-break offense averaged nearly twenty transition points per game this season.
gept.example_zh: 球隊的快攻進攻本季平均每場拿下將近二十分。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 全場的；全場壓迫的
gept.example_en: They applied fullcourt pressure for the entire fourth quarter and forced numerous turnovers.
gept.example_zh: 他們整個第四節都採取全場壓迫，迫使對手多次失誤。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (橄欖球) 邊線球；界外球
gept.example_en: The hooker threw the ball perfectly into the lineout and his teammates rose to catch it.
gept.example_zh: 勾鋒精準地將球擲入邊線爭球區，隊友躍起接住。

gept.example_en: He dived over the tryline in the last minute to secure a famous comeback victory.
gept.example_zh: 他在最後一分鐘衝過達陣線，拿下一場著名的逆轉勝。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (冰球) 多打少優勢；強攻
gept.example_en: They scored twice during the second-period powerplay to take a commanding lead.
gept.example_zh: 他們在第二節的強攻時段攻入兩球，取得壓倒性領先。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (游泳) 自由式；自由式運動
gept.example_en: Her freestyle stroke is so efficient that she barely seems to splash through the water.
gept.example_zh: 她的自由式划水效率極高，幾乎看不見水花。

gept.example_en: Pull your swimcap firmly down over your ears to reduce drag in the water.
gept.example_zh: 把泳帽用力往下拉，蓋住耳朵以降低水中阻力。

gept.example_en: A quick flipturn at each wall can shave seconds off her total race time.
gept.example_zh: 在每面池壁的快速翻滾轉身能為她的總成績省下數秒。

gept.example_en: She crouched on the starting-block waiting for the gun, every muscle ready to explode.
gept.example_zh: 她蹲在起跑器上等待槍響，每一條肌肉都蓄勢待發。

gept.example_en: The lanerope absorbs waves so that each swimmer competes in calmer water.
gept.example_zh: 水道繩會吸收波浪，讓每位選手都能在較平靜的水中比賽。

gept.example_en: The starting-pistol fired and eight athletes exploded out of their blocks down the track.
gept.example_zh: 起跑槍響起，八位選手從起跑器中沿著跑道爆發衝出。

gept.example_en: One false-start results in immediate disqualification under the current sprinting rules.
gept.example_zh: 依照現行短跑規則，一次偷跑就會立即被取消資格。

gept.example_en: He wore protective spectacles-sport during basketball games to shield his recovering eye.
gept.example_zh: 他在籃球比賽時戴著運動護目鏡以保護仍在恢復的眼睛。

gept.example_en: The boxer adjusted his mouthpiece before answering the bell for the championship round.
gept.example_zh: 拳擊手在冠軍回合的鈴聲響起前調整了護齒套。

gept.example_en: Celebrities filled the ringside seats hoping to witness a historic title fight.
gept.example_zh: 名人們坐滿場邊席，希望親眼見證一場歷史性的爭冠戰。

gept.example_en: A sharp jab kept his opponent at distance and set up the powerful right cross.
gept.example_zh: 犀利的刺拳讓對手保持距離，並為強而有力的右交叉拳鋪路。

gept.example_en: A perfectly timed uppercut caught him under the chin and ended the fight instantly.
gept.example_zh: 一記時機完美的上鉤拳擊中他的下巴，比賽瞬間結束。

gept.example_en: The two wrestlers grapple for several seconds before one secures a takedown.
gept.example_zh: 兩名摔角手扭打了好幾秒，其中一人才完成壓制。

gept.example_en: He shot for a double-leg takedown and drove his opponent straight onto the mat.
gept.example_zh: 他發動雙腿擒抱，將對手直接壓在墊上。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (武術) 段位；腰帶等級
gept.example_en: Earning a black belt-rank typically requires at least five years of dedicated training.
gept.example_zh: 取得黑帶段位通常需要至少五年的專心訓練。

gept.example_en: Saber fencers can score with cuts as well as thrusts, unlike epee competitors.
gept.example_zh: 軍刀劍手既可用劈砍也可用刺擊得分，與重劍選手不同。

gept.example_en: Foil fencers must hit only the torso of their opponent to score a valid touch.
gept.example_zh: 鈍劍選手必須擊中對手的軀幹才能算有效得分。

gept.example_en: Her arrow split the previous bullseye and gave her an insurmountable lead.
gept.example_zh: 她的箭把先前射中的靶心一分為二，讓她取得無法追趕的領先。

gept.example_en: She drew an arrow from her quiver and nocked it smoothly to the bowstring.
gept.example_zh: 她從箭袋中抽出一支箭，流暢地搭在弓弦上。

gept.example_en: Modern target crossbow shooting is increasingly popular at recreational shooting ranges.
gept.example_zh: 現代十字弓靶射項目在休閒射擊場越來越受歡迎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (高爾夫) 球座；發球台
gept.example_en: He placed the ball on the tee and surveyed the long par-five fairway ahead.
gept.example_zh: 他把球放上球座，俯瞰前方漫長的標準桿五桿球道。

gept.example_en: Hit the ball straight down the fairway and avoid the deep bunkers on the left.
gept.example_zh: 把球直直擊向球道，避開左側深陷的沙坑。

gept.example_en: His tee shot landed in a fairway bunker and forced a careful recovery from soft sand.
gept.example_zh: 他的開球落在球道沙坑中，必須小心地從鬆軟的沙裡救球。

gept.example_en: She rolled in a twenty-foot putt across a sloping green to save par on the eighteenth hole.
gept.example_zh: 她在傾斜的果嶺上推進一個二十英尺長的推桿，在第十八洞保住標準桿。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (高爾夫) 推桿；輕擊入洞
gept.example_en: A short downhill putt slid past the cup and cost him the tournament championship.
gept.example_zh: 一個短距下坡推桿滑過洞口，讓他輸掉了賽事冠軍。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (高爾夫) 博蒂；少一桿
gept.example_en: She made an unbelievable birdie on a long par-four after a brilliant approach shot.
gept.example_zh: 她在一個漫長的標準桿四桿洞憑藉精彩的進攻球抓下一隻難以置信的博蒂。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (高爾夫) 柏忌；多一桿
gept.example_en: Three consecutive bogey scores on the back nine dropped him out of contention.
gept.example_zh: 後九洞連續三次柏忌讓他失去爭冠的機會。

gept.example_en: His longtime caddie suggested a five iron instead of the four he had originally chosen.
gept.example_zh: 他多年的桿弟建議使用五號鐵桿，而非他原本選的四號。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (高爾夫) 開球木桿；一號木
gept.example_en: He swapped his old driver for a new model that added twenty yards to every drive.
gept.example_zh: 他把舊一號木換成新型號，每次開球距離多了二十碼。

gept.example_en: A delicate flop shot with her sand wedge stopped the ball inches from the hole.
gept.example_zh: 她用沙坑楔形鐵桿打出一記精緻的高吊球，球停在離洞口僅幾英寸的地方。

gept.example_en: European handball is fast-paced and combines elements of basketball and soccer indoors.
gept.example_zh: 歐洲手球節奏快速，結合了室內籃球與足球的元素。

gept.example_en: The bowler took five wickets in a single innings, an exceptional individual performance.
gept.example_zh: 投球手在單局拿下五個三柱門，個人表現極為出色。

gept.example_en: Fast bowler delivery speeds in international cricket regularly exceed ninety miles per hour.
gept.example_zh: 國際板球賽中快速投球手的球速經常超過時速九十英里。

gept.example_en: The opening batsman scored a brilliant century to set up his side's eventual win.
gept.example_zh: 首棒擊球員打出一記精彩的百分，為球隊最終勝利奠定基礎。

gept.example_en: Each team has two innings in a traditional test match format of cricket.
gept.example_zh: 在傳統的板球測試賽中，每隊各打兩局。

gept.example_en: Tourists rented a snowmobile and explored the frozen lake on a guided afternoon tour.
gept.example_zh: 遊客租了雪上摩托車，在嚮導帶領的下午行程中探索結冰的湖面。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 高山的；高山滑雪的
gept.example_en: Her alpine racing career was launched by a surprise victory at the junior world cup.
gept.example_zh: 她的高山滑雪生涯因在青少年世界盃意外奪冠而展開。

gept.example_en: She reached over a hundred miles per hour during the men's downhill on the final descent.
gept.example_zh: 她在男子速降賽的最後一段下坡時速超過一百英里。

gept.example_en: The children love to iceskate on the outdoor rink that opens every winter downtown.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡在市區每年冬季開放的戶外溜冰場溜冰。

gept.example_en: The figure-skater completed a quadruple jump that brought the audience to its feet.
gept.example_zh: 花式溜冰選手完成了一個四周跳，讓觀眾起立喝采。

gept.example_en: Dutch speedskater dominance on long-track events spans more than five decades.
gept.example_zh: 荷蘭競速滑冰選手在長道項目上的優勢已超過五十年。

gept.example_en: The neighborhood rink hosts youth hockey tournaments throughout the long winter season.
gept.example_zh: 社區溜冰場在漫長的冬季舉辦各種青少年冰球賽事。

gept.example_en: Her first tandem skydive convinced her to immediately enroll in solo jumping lessons.
gept.example_zh: 她第一次雙人跳傘後便立刻報名了單人跳傘課程。

gept.example_en: The instructor checked the parachute straps three times before they boarded the small plane.
gept.example_zh: 教練在他們登上小飛機前檢查了降落傘背帶三次。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (攀岩) 安全吊帶；身體吊帶
gept.example_en: Tighten the leg loops of the harness until they fit snugly around your upper thighs.
gept.example_zh: 把吊帶的腿環收緊，直到貼合大腿上部為止。

gept.example_en: A thick wetsuit keeps surfers warm even in cold winter water along the northern coast.
gept.example_zh: 厚實的防寒衣讓衝浪者在北部海岸寒冷的冬季海水中仍能保暖。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (衝浪) 長板；長板滑板
gept.example_en: Riding a longboard suits beginners because of its stability and easier paddling motion.
gept.example_zh: 由於穩定性高且划水容易，騎乘長板很適合初學者。

gept.example_en: Competition surfers prefer a shortboard for its responsiveness on critical wave sections.
gept.example_zh: 競賽衝浪手偏好短板，因為它在關鍵浪段反應更靈敏。

gept.example_en: Every rower in the boat must synchronize their stroke for maximum hull speed.
gept.example_zh: 船上每位划手都必須同步動作，才能讓船身達到最大速度。

gept.example_en: He pulled the heavy wooden oar through the water with smooth controlled strokes.
gept.example_zh: 他用平穩可控的動作將沉重的木槳划過水面。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 風帆衝浪選手；風浪板
gept.example_en: A skilled windsurfer can sail upwind by tacking back and forth across the breeze.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的風帆衝浪選手可透過迎風來回切風航向上風。

gept.example_en: Calm dawn waters are perfect for a relaxed stand-up-paddle outing across the bay.
gept.example_zh: 黎明時平靜的水面非常適合悠閒地划立式槳板橫渡海灣。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (河上) 漂橡皮圈活動
gept.example_en: Lazy river tubing is a popular family activity throughout the hot summer weekends.
gept.example_zh: 在悠閒的河流上漂橡皮圈是炎熱夏季週末非常受歡迎的家庭活動。

gept.example_en: The forest canopy ziplining tour gave breathtaking views over the misty rainforest below.
gept.example_zh: 森林樹冠層滑索之旅讓人能俯瞰下方雲霧繚繞的雨林，景色壯觀。

gept.example_en: Competitive trampolining requires precise body awareness during multiple twists and somersaults.
gept.example_zh: 競賽彈簧床運動需要在多次扭轉和翻滾中保持精確的身體感知。

gept.example_en: A heavy kettlebell swing trains the posterior chain and improves explosive hip power.
gept.example_zh: 重壺鈴擺盪可訓練身體後鏈，並提升爆發性的髖部力量。

gept.example_en: He set a personal record in the deadlift by pulling two hundred forty kilograms cleanly.
gept.example_zh: 他在硬舉中乾淨地拉起兩百四十公斤，創下個人最佳紀錄。

gept.example_en: Always use a spotter when attempting a maximum bench-press in the weight room.
gept.example_zh: 在重訓室嘗試最大重量的臥推時務必使用補手。

gept.example_en: Powerlifting meets feature three lifts: squat, bench press, and conventional deadlift.
gept.example_zh: 健力比賽包含三項動作：深蹲、臥推和傳統硬舉。

gept.example_en: Competitive bodybuilding demands strict nutrition and hours of daily training year-round.
gept.example_zh: 競技健美需要嚴格的飲食控制和全年每天數小時的訓練。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 混合健身；CrossFit 訓練
gept.example_en: The local crossfit gym programs varied workouts that combine weightlifting and gymnastics.
gept.example_zh: 本地的混合健身館設計多元化的訓練，結合舉重與體操動作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 飛輪健身；室內單車課
gept.example_en: The early spinning class is always packed with commuters squeezing in a sunrise workout.
gept.example_zh: 清晨的飛輪課程總是擠滿了趕著做晨間運動的通勤族。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 尊巴舞蹈健身；佐巴有氧
gept.example_en: She teaches an evening zumba class every Tuesday at the community recreation center.
gept.example_zh: 她每週二晚上在社區休閒中心教授尊巴舞蹈健身課。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Tabata 高強度間歇訓練
gept.example_en: A four-minute tabata workout can produce significant cardiovascular and metabolic adaptations.
gept.example_zh: 四分鐘的 Tabata 間歇訓練即能帶來顯著的心血管與代謝適應。

gept.example_en: His coach added an interval session twice a week to sharpen his finishing speed.
gept.example_zh: 教練每週加入兩次間歇訓練課程，以提升他的終點衝刺速度。

gept.example_en: Circuittraining alternates strength stations with short bursts of cardio for full-body conditioning.
gept.example_zh: 循環訓練在力量站和短暫有氧之間交替，達成全身體能訓練。

gept.example_en: A simple resistance-band routine can be performed anywhere and requires very little storage.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的阻力帶訓練幾乎可以隨地進行，且收納空間極小。

gept.example_en: She rolled out her yogamat near the window to catch the warm morning sunshine.
gept.example_zh: 她在窗邊鋪開瑜珈墊，沐浴在溫暖的晨光中。

gept.example_en: A flowing vinyasa sequence links each pose with a coordinated inhale or exhale.
gept.example_zh: 流暢的流瑜珈序列將每個體式與一次吸氣或呼氣相互連結。

gept.example_en: The slow precise movements of taichi promote balance and joint health in older adults.
gept.example_zh: 太極緩慢精確的動作有助於改善年長者的平衡感與關節健康。

gept.example_en: A sudden musclecramp in his calf forced the runner to slow down at the twenty-mile mark.
gept.example_zh: 小腿突如其來的肌肉抽筋迫使這名跑者在二十英里處放慢腳步。

gept.example_en: He tore his ACL during a routine cutting drill and missed the entire upcoming season.
gept.example_zh: 他在一次例行變向訓練中撕裂前十字韌帶，整個下個賽季都無法上場。

gept.example_en: A pulled hamstring kept the sprinter out of the relay final on Sunday evening.
gept.example_zh: 拉傷的大腿後肌讓這名短跑選手缺席了週日晚上的接力決賽。

gept.example_en: Strong quadriceps protect the knees during landing and absorb the impact of jumps.
gept.example_zh: 強健的股四頭肌能在著地時保護膝蓋並吸收跳躍衝擊。

gept.example_en: Sprinters with powerful glutes generate more force with every stride down the track.
gept.example_zh: 擁有強壯臀肌的短跑選手在每一步跨步中都能產生更大力量。

gept.example_en: Good core-strength is essential for balance, posture, and injury prevention in nearly every sport.
gept.example_zh: 良好的核心力量是幾乎所有運動中平衡、姿勢與預防傷害的關鍵。

gept.example_en: She monitors her resting heartrate every morning to track her overall recovery and fitness.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上監測靜止心率，以追蹤整體恢復狀況和體能。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 賽前減量；漸減訓練
gept.example_en: Marathon runners begin tapering their training volume three weeks before race day.
gept.example_zh: 馬拉松跑者通常在比賽日前三週開始減少訓練量。

gept.example_en: She was unanimously voted league mvp after leading her team to the championship final.
gept.example_zh: 她在帶領球隊闖入冠軍決賽後，全票當選聯盟最有價值球員。

gept.example_en: The team traded their first-round draftpick to acquire an experienced veteran shooter.
gept.example_zh: 球隊交易掉首輪選秀順位以換取一名經驗豐富的老將射手。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自由球員；自由經紀人球員
gept.example_en: As a freeagent this summer he can sign with any team in the entire league.
gept.example_zh: 作為今夏的自由球員，他可以與聯盟中任何一支球隊簽約。

gept.example_en: Her shoe endorsement-deal is reportedly worth more than her actual playing salary.
gept.example_zh: 據報導她的球鞋代言合約價值超過她的實際球員薪資。

gept.example_en: The fluffy team mascot entertained the crowd during every break in the action.
gept.example_zh: 毛茸茸的球隊吉祥物在比賽空檔中為觀眾帶來歡樂。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 球賽前停車場聚餐；尾門派對
gept.example_en: Loyal fans tailgate in the stadium parking lot for hours before every home game.
gept.example_zh: 忠實球迷在每場主場賽事前都會在球場停車場舉行尾門派對好幾個小時。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (體育場) 步行廣場；公共通道
gept.example_en: The stadium concourse was packed with fans buying snacks during the halftime break.
gept.example_zh: 中場休息時球場步行廣場擠滿了購買點心的球迷。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關注他隊比分；緊盯比分
gept.example_en: Late in the season every team begins scoreboard-watching to track playoff implications.
gept.example_zh: 賽季末段每支球隊都開始緊盯其他隊的比分以掌握季後賽形勢。

gept.example_en: They sneaked into the playoffs as the final wildcard team in the conference.
gept.example_zh: 他們以聯盟最後一張外卡身分驚險擠進季後賽。

gept.example_en: Their improbable comeback-victory from twenty points down was the moment of the year.
gept.example_zh: 他們從落後二十分逆轉勝出的不可思議時刻成為年度最佳瞬間。

gept.example_en: The expected close match turned into a thirty-point blowout by the third quarter.
gept.example_zh: 原本預期勢均力敵的比賽，到第三節已演變成相差三十分的大勝。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (籃球) 終場前壓哨進球
gept.example_en: His half-court buzzer-beater sent the championship final into overtime in dramatic fashion.
gept.example_zh: 他從中線投進的壓哨球以戲劇性的方式把總冠軍戰拖入延長賽。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (足球) 補時；傷停補時
gept.example_en: She scored deep into stoppage-time and snatched all three points for the visiting side.
gept.example_zh: 她在補時末段攻入進球，為客場球隊奪走全部三分。

gept.example_en: Long throw-in deliveries can be as dangerous as corner kicks near the opponent's box.
gept.example_zh: 長距離界外擲球在對方禁區附近可與角球同樣具有威脅。

gept.example_en: Two yellow-card cautions in one match automatically result in a red and an ejection.
gept.example_zh: 同一場比賽兩張黃牌警告即自動轉為紅牌並被罰下。

gept.example_en: The defender received a straight red-card for the dangerous tackle from behind.
gept.example_zh: 防守球員因從後方危險鏟球被直接出示紅牌。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 影像助理裁判 (Video Assistant Referee)
gept.example_en: The goal was disallowed after a long var review for a marginal offside infraction.
gept.example_zh: 經過漫長的影像助理裁判複審，因細微的越位犯規而判進球無效。

gept.example_en: After ninety minutes of stalemate the cup tie went to extra-time and eventually penalties.
gept.example_zh: 九十分鐘戰平後盃賽進入延長賽，最後甚至要靠十二碼點球分勝負。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (足球) 點球大戰；射門對決
gept.example_en: Penalty shootout drama always provides unforgettable moments at major international tournaments.
gept.example_zh: 十二碼點球大戰的戲劇性總能在重大國際賽事中製造難忘時刻。

gept.example_en: Professional esports tournaments now fill major stadiums and offer multi-million-dollar prize pools.
gept.example_zh: 職業電子競技賽事如今填滿大型體育場，並提供數百萬美元的獎金池。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 電玩玩家；遊戲玩家
gept.example_en: She is a competitive gamer who streams her live training sessions every weekday evening.
gept.example_zh: 她是一名競技玩家，平日每晚都會直播她的訓練實況。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 釣魚者；垂釣愛好者 (複數)
gept.example_en: Local anglers gather along the bridge at dawn to fish for migrating salmon.
gept.example_zh: 當地釣客在黎明時分聚集橋邊，垂釣洄游中的鮭魚。

gept.example_en: His tackle-box was stuffed with lures, hooks, line, and tiny brightly colored floats.
gept.example_zh: 他的釣具盒裡塞滿了假餌、魚鉤、釣線以及小巧鮮豔的浮標。

gept.example_en: Flyfishing in remote mountain streams requires patience, careful casting, and quiet movement.
gept.example_zh: 在偏遠的高山溪流飛蠅釣需要耐心、精準甩竿和安靜的動作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 露營活動；過夜露營
gept.example_en: The scout group planned a weekend campout near the river to practice survival skills.
gept.example_zh: 童軍隊計畫在河邊舉行週末露營，以練習野外生存技能。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 棉花糖烤食；烤棉花糖
gept.example_en: Every successful campout ends with stories and a marshmallow-roast around the glowing fire.
gept.example_zh: 每次成功的露營都會以故事和圍著篝火的烤棉花糖作為收尾。

gept.example_en: She wore a powerful headlamp for the early morning trail run before sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 她戴著一盞強力頭燈，在日出前進行清晨山徑跑步。

gept.example_en: Study the topomap closely so you know what elevation gains lie ahead of you.
gept.example_zh: 仔細研讀地形圖，這樣你就會知道前方會有多少海拔提升。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 之字形山路；之字彎
gept.example_en: The trail climbed steeply through a dozen switchback turns before reaching the rocky summit.
gept.example_zh: 山徑經過十幾個之字形彎道陡峭爬升，最後抵達岩石山頂。

gept.example_en: We hiked along the exposed ridgeline as a cold wind blew across the open peaks.
gept.example_zh: 我們沿著裸露的山脊線健行，冷風掠過開闊的山頂。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 偏遠野外；荒野地區
gept.example_en: Backcountry skiers must always carry avalanche beacons and know how to use them properly.
gept.example_zh: 野雪滑雪者必須隨身攜帶雪崩信標，並懂得正確使用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (登山) 徒手攀爬；岩坡攀登
gept.example_en: Easy scrambling sections require both hands but generally do not need climbing ropes.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的徒手攀爬路段需要雙手並用，但通常不需使用攀登繩索。

gept.example_en: Snowshoeing through fresh powder offers a peaceful alternative to busy ski resort slopes.
gept.example_zh: 在新鮮粉雪上穿雪鞋健行，是繁忙滑雪場雪道之外的寧靜選擇。

gept.example_en: They iceclimb frozen waterfalls every January in the canyons of the northern range.
gept.example_zh: 他們每年一月都到北部山脈的峽谷攀爬結凍的瀑布。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 水流漂浮；隧道漂流
gept.example_en: The lazy tubeflow ride wound through tropical foliage on the resort's main water feature.
gept.example_zh: 悠閒的隧道漂流穿過熱帶植被，是度假村主要的水上設施。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 迷你高爾夫；小型推桿球
gept.example_en: They spent a fun summer evening together playing miniaturegolf on the seaside boardwalk.
gept.example_zh: 他們度過了一個愉快的夏日傍晚，在海濱木棧道上一起玩迷你高爾夫。

gept.example_en: Birthday parties often include a paintball session at the wooded outdoor field nearby.
gept.example_zh: 生日派對常常會在附近的林間戶外場地包含一場漆彈活動。

gept.example_en: The kids ran around the dark arena playing lasertag for almost two solid hours.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在昏暗的場地裡跑來跑去玩雷射槍戰遊戲，幾乎玩了整整兩個小時。

gept.example_en: The outdoor gocart track features a long straight and several tricky hairpin turns.
gept.example_zh: 戶外卡丁車賽道有一段長直道以及好幾個棘手的髮夾彎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 擲斧運動；丟斧活動
gept.example_en: The new axethrow bar downtown has become an unexpectedly popular date-night destination.
gept.example_zh: 市區新開的擲斧酒吧意外成為熱門的約會夜去處。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 飛碟射擊；定向飛靶射擊
gept.example_en: Competitive trapshoot events require concentration, fast reflexes, and a perfectly mounted shotgun.
gept.example_zh: 競賽飛碟射擊需要專注、快速反應以及完美握持的霰彈槍。

gept.example_en: Skeetshoot stations release clay targets from two opposing towers at unpredictable angles.
gept.example_zh: 雙向飛碟站從兩座相對的飛靶塔以不可預測的角度釋放黏土飛靶。

gept.example_en: Grandfather still beats everyone at horseshoe at every family reunion picnic each summer.
gept.example_zh: 每年夏天的家族聚會野餐上，爺爺玩套蹄鐵遊戲依然能贏過所有人。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 沙弧球；推圓盤遊戲
gept.example_en: The retirees enjoy a relaxed shuffleboard tournament every Wednesday afternoon at the community center.
gept.example_zh: 退休族每週三下午在社區中心享受輕鬆的沙弧球比賽。

gept.example_en: Traditional lawnbowl clubs remain extremely popular across small towns in southern Australia.
gept.example_zh: 傳統的草地滾球俱樂部在澳洲南部的小鎮依舊極為盛行。

gept.example_en: Backyard cornhole boards have become a fixture at American summer barbecues and tailgates.
gept.example_zh: 後院的玉米袋投擲遊戲板已成為美式夏日烤肉和賽前派對的固定配備。

gept.example_en: An ultramarathon covers any race distance longer than the standard marathon of forty-two kilometers.
gept.example_zh: 超級馬拉松指任何超過標準馬拉松四十二公里距離的賽事。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鐵人三項；超鐵賽事
gept.example_en: Completing an ironman requires months of dedicated cycling, swimming, and long running training.
gept.example_zh: 完成一場鐵人三項需要好幾個月專心的自行車、游泳和長跑訓練。

gept.example_en: The weekend orient-race tested both navigational skill and pure physical endurance equally.
gept.example_zh: 週末的定向越野賽同時考驗導航技巧與純粹的體能耐力。

gept.example_en: Teams competing in adventureracing combine trekking, paddling, biking, and navigation over many days.
gept.example_zh: 參加越野探險賽的隊伍會在多天賽程中結合健行、划水、騎車和導航。

gept.example_en: Footgolf combines large soccer balls with adapted golf courses for a fun casual game.
gept.example_zh: 足球高爾夫將大型足球結合改造過的高爾夫球場，是一項有趣的休閒運動。

gept.example_en: Free discgolf courses in public parks have rapidly grown across cities in recent years.
gept.example_zh: 公園裡的免費飛盤高爾夫球場近年在各城市快速增加。

gept.example_en: Ultimate is a fast non-contact sport played on a field with a flying disc.
gept.example_zh: 終極飛盤是一項在場地上使用飛盤進行的快速無身體接觸運動。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 滾輪溜冰競賽；旱冰競技
gept.example_en: Rollerderby leagues attract enthusiastic crowds in cities across the country every weekend.
gept.example_zh: 全國各城市的滾輪溜冰聯賽每週末都吸引熱情的觀眾。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 四輪溜冰鞋；穿四輪溜冰鞋滑行
gept.example_en: She loves to rollerskate along the beach boardwalk on warm Sunday afternoons in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏日溫暖的週日下午她喜歡穿著四輪溜冰鞋沿著海邊木棧道滑行。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 直排輪；穿直排輪
gept.example_en: Inlineskate hockey leagues remain popular in cities without enough natural ice surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 直排輪曲棍球聯賽在缺乏天然冰面的城市仍然非常受歡迎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 越野單車；BMX 小輪車
gept.example_en: He started racing bmx tracks at six and turned professional before his eighteenth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 他六歲就開始參加BMX越野單車賽，十八歲生日前就成為職業選手。

gept.example_en: Skilled trickbike riders perform tail whips, bar spins, and flips during outdoor competitions.
gept.example_zh: 技巧高超的特技單車車手在戶外比賽中表演甩尾、轉把和翻轉動作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 攀岩自行車；技巧車
gept.example_en: Trial-bike riders hop over enormous boulders without ever placing their feet on the ground.
gept.example_zh: 技巧車車手能跳過巨大的岩石，全程雙腳不落地。

gept.example_en: Heavy duty downhillbike frames absorb massive impacts on rough technical mountain descents.
gept.example_zh: 重型下坡越野車車架能在崎嶇技術性的山地下坡中吸收巨大衝擊。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (自行車) 前輪急停翻摔
gept.example_en: He clipped a hidden root and went into a slow endo over the handlebars.
gept.example_zh: 他撞到一條隱藏的樹根，慢慢從車把上空翻摔了出去。

gept.example_en: He can hold a clean wheelie down the entire length of the long park pathway.
gept.example_zh: 他能在整條公園長步道上保持乾淨的翹孤輪動作。

gept.example_en: The ollie is the foundation skateboarding trick from which countless other moves develop.
gept.example_zh: 豚跳是滑板的基礎技巧，無數其他動作都是從它衍生出來。

gept.example_en: Landing his first kickflip in the driveway felt like winning a major skateboarding championship.
gept.example_zh: 在家門前車道上第一次成功踢翻板，感覺就像贏得了一場大型滑板冠軍。

gept.example_en: The local rampskate park hosts a small but passionate community of teenage riders.
gept.example_zh: 本地的斜坡滑板公園聚集了一群人數雖少卻充滿熱情的青少年車手。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (滑板/單車) 垂直坡道
gept.example_en: Vert competitions challenge skaters to launch high above the lip of a vertical ramp.
gept.example_zh: 垂直坡道比賽挑戰滑手在垂直坡道頂端高高騰空。

gept.example_en: The concrete bowlskate basin behind the school is a magnet for local boarders.
gept.example_zh: 學校後方的混凝土碗池滑板場吸引了當地許多滑板愛好者。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 直排輪愛好者；直排輪溜冰者
gept.example_en: An older rollerblader cruised past us with unbelievable speed and apparent ease.
gept.example_zh: 一位年長的直排輪愛好者以難以置信的速度從容地從我們身邊滑過。

gept.example_en: Increasing his stride-length without sacrificing cadence helped him drop his five-kilometer time.
gept.example_zh: 在不犧牲步頻的情況下增加步幅，幫助他縮短了五公里的成績。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 觸地方式；著地姿勢
gept.example_en: Switching to a midfoot footstrike pattern reduced the chronic pain in her knees.
gept.example_zh: 換成中足著地的觸地方式後，她膝蓋的慢性疼痛獲得改善。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 壓縮衣；機能壓縮服飾
gept.example_en: Compression-wear apparently improves circulation and may speed up recovery after intense workouts.
gept.example_zh: 壓縮衣據說能改善血液循環，並可能加速激烈運動後的恢復。

gept.example_en: The trainer applied kinesiotape to his strained shoulder before allowing him to start practice.
gept.example_zh: 防護員在讓他開始練習前，為他拉傷的肩膀貼上肌內效貼布。

gept.example_en: After grueling matches many athletes immerse themselves in an icebath to reduce muscle inflammation.
gept.example_zh: 經歷艱苦比賽後，許多運動員會浸泡在冰浴中以減輕肌肉發炎。

gept.example_en: Pro players use cryotherapy chambers to accelerate recovery during congested match schedules.
gept.example_zh: 職業球員利用冷凍治療艙在密集賽程中加速身體恢復。

gept.example_en: A short sauna session after training helps her relax sore tired muscles and unwind mentally.
gept.example_zh: 訓練後短暫的桑拿浴有助於放鬆她痠痛疲憊的肌肉並舒緩心情。

gept.example_en: Travelling athletes pack a portable massagegun to manage stiffness during long road trips.
gept.example_zh: 經常出差的運動員會帶著便攜式按摩槍，以應付長途旅行中的肌肉僵硬。

gept.example_en: Her trusted physio detected the small tear before it could turn into something serious.
gept.example_zh: 她信任的物理治療師在小撕裂演變成嚴重傷害前就發現了問題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 運動醫學；運動傷害科 (口語)
gept.example_en: The team's sportsmed clinic offers everything from imaging to surgery and structured rehabilitation.
gept.example_zh: 球隊的運動醫學診所提供從影像檢查到手術以及完整復健的所有服務。

gept.example_en: After the hard hit he entered the concussion-protocol and was held out of practice.
gept.example_zh: 在那次猛烈撞擊後，他進入腦震盪處置流程，並暫停參加訓練。

gept.example_en: International antidoping agencies coordinate testing across borders to protect fair competition worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 國際反禁藥機構跨國協調檢測工作，以保護全球公平競爭。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公平競爭；運動精神
gept.example_en: Coaches drill the value of fairplay into their players from the very first practice.
gept.example_zh: 教練從第一次練習就向球員灌輸公平競爭的價值。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 球員名單席位；正式名額
gept.example_en: The rookie fought all training camp long for the final open rosterspot.
gept.example_zh: 這名新秀整個訓練營都在為最後一個正式名單席位奮戰。

gept.example_en: Preseason-camp lasted six weeks and included two-a-day practices in the summer heat.
gept.example_zh: 季前訓練營持續了六週，並包含夏季炎熱中一天兩次的練習。

gept.example_en: Securing homefield advantage throughout the playoffs was the team's main regular season goal.
gept.example_zh: 在季後賽全程保有主場優勢是球隊例行賽的主要目標。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 計分表；比分紀錄表
gept.example_en: The official scoresheet showed she had recorded a hat trick in the third period.
gept.example_zh: 官方計分表顯示她在第三節完成了帽子戲法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 帽子戲法；一場攻入三球
gept.example_en: His hattrick in the final propelled the underdogs to an unexpected championship victory.
gept.example_zh: 他在決賽的帽子戲法推著這支黑馬球隊獲得了意外的冠軍。

gept.example_en: A Saturday doubleheader gave the team a chance to climb the standings in one day.
gept.example_zh: 週六的連場比賽讓球隊有機會在一天內提升排名。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 觀賽派對；一起看球聚會
gept.example_en: Friends hosted a championship watchparty with snacks, decorations, and a huge projection screen.
gept.example_zh: 朋友們舉辦了一場冠軍觀賽派對，準備了零食、裝飾以及一個巨大的投影螢幕。

gept.example_en: He keeps every ticketstub from championship games in a special leather scrapbook at home.
gept.example_zh: 他把每一張冠軍戰的票根都保存在家裡一本特別的皮革剪貼簿中。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 體育館；室內運動館
gept.example_en: The newly built sportshall hosts community badminton, basketball, and indoor soccer leagues nightly.
gept.example_zh: 新落成的體育館每晚都舉辦社區羽球、籃球和室內足球聯賽。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 多功能體育場；訓練館
gept.example_en: The university fieldhouse contains a banked indoor track and several full basketball courts.
gept.example_zh: 大學的多功能體育場內有一座傾斜室內跑道和好幾個完整的籃球場。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 比分報導；賽果報告
gept.example_en: Every morning he scans the newspaper scoresreport before he even has breakfast at home.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上他甚至在家吃早餐之前就會先掃過報紙上的比分報導。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 個人數據；數據紀錄行
gept.example_en: Her stat-line of thirty points, ten rebounds, and eight assists was a true triple-double.
gept.example_zh: 她三十分、十籃板、八助攻的個人數據幾乎是一場真正的大三元。

gept.example_en: Recording a triple-double in only twenty-four minutes confirmed his all-star credentials.
gept.example_zh: 在僅僅二十四分鐘內就拿下大三元，證明了他全明星級別的實力。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 比賽數據統計表；戰況數據
gept.example_en: The detailed boxscore showed she had played all forty-eight minutes without a single substitution.
gept.example_zh: 詳細的比賽數據統計表顯示她全場四十八分鐘從未被換下。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 精彩集錦；精華影片
gept.example_en: His monster dunk immediately became the most replayed clip on every late-night highlightreel.
gept.example_zh: 他那記巨砲灌籃立刻成為每個深夜精華節目重播最多次的片段。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 沙發球迷；只看電視的球迷
gept.example_en: Every armchair-fan suddenly becomes an expert coach during the playoff broadcasts each spring.
gept.example_zh: 每年春季季後賽轉播時，每個沙發球迷都瞬間變身專家教練。

gept.example_en: Holding a season-ticket since childhood, he never missed a single home game opening night.
gept.example_zh: 他從小就持有季票，從未錯過任何一個主場開幕戰之夜。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 擔任裁判；執法比賽
gept.example_en: Retired professionals often officiate youth tournaments to give back to the community.
gept.example_zh: 退役職業選手經常擔任青少年賽事裁判，以回饋社區。

gept.example_en: The young ballboy hustled across the court to deliver a fresh ball between every point.
gept.example_zh: 年輕的球僮在每分之間飛快地穿越球場，把新球遞給選手。

gept.example_en: The linesman raised his flag and signaled an offside that the referee quickly waved off.
gept.example_zh: 線審舉旗示意越位，但主裁判很快就揮手取消了該判罰。
