gept.example_en: The topography of the region varies dramatically, from coastal plains to rugged mountain ranges in the north.
gept.example_zh: 該地區的地形變化劇烈，從沿海平原到北部崎嶇的山脈。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 地圖製作學；製圖術
gept.example_en: Ancient cartography reveals how early civilizations understood and represented their surrounding world.
gept.example_zh: 古代地圖製作學揭示了早期文明如何理解和表現他們周圍的世界。

gept.example_en: The cartographer spent decades documenting remote islands that had never appeared on any official map.
gept.example_zh: 這位製圖師花了數十年記錄從未出現在任何官方地圖上的偏遠島嶼。

gept.example_en: The southern hemisphere experiences summer in December when northern countries are in winter.
gept.example_zh: 南半球在十二月時是夏天，而北方國家正值冬季。

gept.example_en: Travelers visiting the tropics should prepare for intense humidity and frequent afternoon thunderstorms.
gept.example_zh: 前往熱帶地區的旅客應該為強烈濕度和頻繁的午後雷雨做好準備。

gept.example_en: The subtropical climate of southern Taiwan supports lush vegetation and abundant tropical fruit cultivation.
gept.example_zh: 台灣南部的亞熱帶氣候支持茂密植被和豐富的熱帶水果栽培。

gept.example_en: The arid landscape of central Australia challenges any traveler unprepared for the harsh conditions.
gept.example_zh: 澳洲中部乾旱的地貌對任何未為惡劣條件做好準備的旅客都是挑戰。

gept.example_en: Semiarid regions receive just enough rainfall to support scattered grasses but not dense forests.
gept.example_zh: 半乾旱地區降雨量僅夠支持零星的草地，但不足以形成茂密森林。

gept.example_en: Temperate climates feature four distinct seasons, making them popular destinations for year-round tourism.
gept.example_zh: 溫帶氣候有四個明顯的季節，使其成為全年熱門的旅遊目的地。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 極地的；北極或南極的
gept.example_en: Polar expeditions require specialized equipment and extensive training to survive extreme cold conditions.
gept.example_zh: 極地探險需要專業裝備和密集訓練才能在極端寒冷的條件下生存。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 僑民；居住國外的人
gept.example_en: The expat community in Tokyo organizes monthly gatherings to help newcomers adjust to local life.
gept.example_zh: 東京的僑民社群每月舉辦聚會幫助新來者適應當地生活。

gept.example_en: Anthropologists conduct fieldwork in remote villages to collect firsthand data on cultural practices.
gept.example_zh: 人類學家在偏遠村莊進行田野調查以收集關於文化習俗的第一手資料。

gept.example_en: The cabin crew demonstrated safety procedures before the long-haul flight departed from the airport.
gept.example_zh: 機艙服務員在長途航班從機場起飛前示範了安全程序。

gept.example_en: Long-haul flights from Asia to Europe typically take more than twelve hours and cross multiple time zones.
gept.example_zh: 從亞洲到歐洲的長途航班通常超過十二小時，跨越多個時區。

gept.example_en: Budget airlines specialize in short-haul flights between regional cities at very competitive prices.
gept.example_zh: 廉價航空專營區域城市之間以極具競爭力價格的短程航班。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 紅眼班機；夜間航班
gept.example_en: She booked a redeye to save money but arrived exhausted from the overnight journey.
gept.example_zh: 她預訂了紅眼班機以省錢，但因夜間旅程而疲憊不堪地抵達。

gept.example_en: As a frequent flyer, he earns enough miles each year to take his family on free vacations.
gept.example_zh: 作為飛行常客，他每年賺取的里程足夠帶家人免費度假。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 忠誠計畫；會員獎勵計畫
gept.example_en: Most hotel chains offer a loyalty program with free upgrades and complimentary breakfasts for members.
gept.example_zh: 大多數連鎖飯店為會員提供包含免費升級和早餐的忠誠計畫。

gept.example_en: The all-inclusive resort covers meals, drinks, and most activities in a single upfront price.
gept.example_zh: 這家全包式度假村以單一預付費用涵蓋餐食、飲料和大多數活動。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 寄宿家庭；住家旅遊
gept.example_en: Choosing a homestay rather than a hotel provides deeper insight into authentic daily local life.
gept.example_zh: 選擇寄宿家庭而非飯店能更深入了解真實的當地日常生活。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 沙發衝浪；借宿旅行
gept.example_en: Couchsurfing connects budget travelers with local hosts willing to offer free accommodation.
gept.example_zh: 沙發衝浪讓預算有限的旅客與願意提供免費住宿的當地主人連結。

gept.example_en: The family-run guesthouse provided home-cooked breakfasts and detailed advice on local attractions.
gept.example_zh: 這家家庭經營的民宿提供家常早餐和當地景點的詳細建議。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 提供住宿和早餐的家庭旅館
gept.example_en: Their charming bed and breakfast occupies a restored Victorian house just outside the historic district.
gept.example_zh: 他們迷人的家庭旅館坐落於歷史街區外一棟修復的維多利亞式房屋中。

gept.example_en: The boutique hotel features only twelve uniquely decorated rooms inspired by local artists and craftsmen.
gept.example_zh: 這家精品旅館僅有十二間以當地藝術家和工匠為靈感獨特裝飾的房間。

gept.example_en: During high season, hotel rates in popular coastal towns can triple compared to quieter months.
gept.example_zh: 在旅遊旺季，熱門海濱小鎮的飯店價格可能比淡月貴上三倍。

gept.example_en: Traveling during low season offers significant discounts and far fewer crowds at popular attractions.
gept.example_zh: 在旅遊淡季出行可享受顯著折扣，熱門景點的人潮也少得多。

gept.example_en: The shoulder season between summer and autumn offers pleasant weather and reasonable prices for travelers.
gept.example_zh: 夏秋之間的平季為旅客提供宜人的天氣和合理的價格。

gept.example_en: The hilltop café offered a breathtaking vista of rolling vineyards stretching toward the distant sea.
gept.example_zh: 山頂咖啡館提供令人屏息的遠景，葡萄園連綿伸向遠方的大海。

gept.example_en: Couples and families strolled along the seaside promenade as the sun set over the harbor.
gept.example_zh: 夕陽西下港口時，情侶和家庭沿著海邊散步道悠閒漫步。

gept.example_en: The main thoroughfare through the old town is lined with cafés, shops, and centuries-old monuments.
gept.example_zh: 穿越舊城的主要大街兩旁排列著咖啡館、商店和數百年歷史的紀念碑。

gept.example_en: Hidden behind the main square, a narrow alleyway leads to the best dumpling shop in town.
gept.example_zh: 藏在主廣場後面，一條狹窄的小巷通往鎮上最好的餃子店。

gept.example_en: Walking on the medieval cobblestone streets gave us a real sense of the town's ancient history.
gept.example_zh: 走在中世紀的鵝卵石街道上讓我們真切感受到小鎮悠久的歷史。

gept.example_en: The historic plaza serves as the cultural heart of the city, surrounded by colonial-era buildings.
gept.example_zh: 這座歷史悠久的廣場是城市的文化核心，周圍環繞著殖民時代的建築。

gept.example_en: The ancient bazaar overflows with vendors selling spices, textiles, and handcrafted souvenirs from across Asia.
gept.example_zh: 古老的市集擠滿了販賣來自亞洲各地香料、紡織品和手工紀念品的小販。

gept.example_en: The global marketplace at the festival brought artisans from twenty countries together in one location.
gept.example_zh: 節慶上的國際市集將來自二十個國家的工匠匯集於一處。

gept.example_en: Tourists often buy cheap trinkets as gifts, though local artisans sell more meaningful handcrafted items nearby.
gept.example_zh: 遊客常買廉價小飾物作為禮物，雖然當地工匠在附近販售更具意義的手工製品。

gept.example_en: She kept a small stone from each country as a memento of her around-the-world journey.
gept.example_zh: 她從每個國家保留一塊小石頭，作為環遊世界旅程的紀念品。

gept.example_en: The hand-woven scarf became a treasured keepsake from her trip to the mountain villages.
gept.example_zh: 這條手織圍巾成為她山村之旅的珍貴紀念品。

gept.example_en: The intricately carved jade pendant has been a family heirloom passed down for five generations.
gept.example_zh: 這塊雕工精細的玉佩是傳承五代的家族傳家寶。

gept.example_en: The royal tomb contained gold treasures, ceremonial weapons, and inscriptions detailing the king's reign.
gept.example_zh: 這座皇家陵墓藏有黃金寶物、儀式武器和記載國王統治的銘文。

gept.example_en: Our travel agent emailed us a detailed itinerary for the trip to Japan.
gept.example_zh: 旅行社用電子郵件寄來日本之旅的詳細行程表。

gept.example_en: My godparent gave me a beautiful silver necklace for my eighteenth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 我的教母在我十八歲生日送了我一條漂亮的銀項鍊。

gept.example_en: After his father died, he became the main breadwinner of the family.
gept.example_zh: 父親過世後，他成為家中主要的經濟支柱。

gept.example_en: The dancer had a slender figure and moved across the stage gracefully.
gept.example_zh: 那位舞者身材苗條，優雅地在舞台上移動。

gept.example_en: The freckled girl smiled shyly when the photographer asked her to pose.
gept.example_zh: 那個有雀斑的女孩在攝影師請她擺姿勢時害羞地笑了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 衣著整潔的；打理得宜的
gept.example_en: He always appears well-groomed and dresses neatly for important business meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他總是衣著整潔，在重要商務會議時穿得很整齊。

gept.example_en: She felt heartbroken when her closest friend betrayed her trust completely.
gept.example_zh: 當她最親密的朋友完全背叛她的信任時，她感到心碎。

gept.example_en: Her selfless dedication to the orphanage inspired many people in the community.
gept.example_zh: 她對孤兒院無私的奉獻激勵了社區中的許多人。

gept.example_en: He mumbled an excuse and quickly left the awkward family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他喃喃地說了個藉口，迅速離開那場尷尬的家庭晚餐。

gept.example_en: He loathes confrontation and will go to great lengths to avoid it.
gept.example_zh: 他厭惡衝突，會盡一切努力避免它。

gept.example_en: He was infatuated with her from the moment they first met.
gept.example_zh: 從他們初次見面那一刻起，他就深深迷戀她。

gept.example_en: He was smitten with his new neighbor from the very first conversation.
gept.example_zh: 從第一次對話開始，他就對新鄰居一見鍾情。

gept.example_en: My grandparents love to reminisce about their early years of marriage.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母喜歡回憶他們婚姻初期的日子。

gept.example_en: Our acquaintanceship developed into a close friendship over many years.
gept.example_zh: 我們相識的關係多年來發展成親密的友誼。

gept.example_en: The team showed great camaraderie throughout the long championship season.
gept.example_zh: 球隊在漫長的冠軍賽季中展現出極佳的同志情誼。

gept.example_en: Caring for newborn triplets requires enormous patience and family support.
gept.example_zh: 照顧剛出生的三胞胎需要極大的耐心和家庭支持。

gept.example_en: Her older sister became a surrogate mother after their parents passed away.
gept.example_zh: 父母過世後，她姊姊成為了代理母親的角色。

gept.example_en: My grandmother is the matriarch of our large extended family.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母是我們大家族中的女族長。

gept.example_en: My great-grandfather served as the patriarch of the family for fifty years.
gept.example_zh: 我曾祖父擔任家族男族長長達五十年。

gept.example_en: He researched his family's genealogy and discovered relatives in three countries.
gept.example_zh: 他研究家譜，發現在三個國家都有親戚。

gept.example_en: He is proud to be part of a long bloodline of doctors.
gept.example_zh: 他自豪能成為長久醫師血脈傳承的一員。

gept.example_en: Guests removed their shoes in the foyer before walking on the wooden floor.
gept.example_zh: 客人在踏上木地板前先在門廳脫鞋。

gept.example_en: A small vestibule keeps cold air from rushing into the apartment.
gept.example_zh: 一個小前廳能防止冷空氣灌入公寓。

gept.example_en: The glass conservatory stays warm enough to grow lemons through winter.
gept.example_zh: 這座玻璃溫室在冬天仍夠溫暖，能種植檸檬。

gept.example_en: Grandma lives in the annex behind the main house with her cat.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶和她的貓住在主屋後面的附屬建築裡。

gept.example_en: A reading alcove next to the window catches the afternoon sunlight perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 窗邊的閱讀凹室能完美捕捉午後陽光。

gept.example_en: The dehumidifier helps prevent mold from forming during the rainy season.
gept.example_zh: 除濕機有助於防止雨季時發霉。

gept.example_en: She bleaches the white towels once a month to keep them bright.
gept.example_zh: 她每個月會把白毛巾漂白一次，讓它們保持潔白。

gept.example_en: Tourists struggled to walk through the scorching desert at midday.
gept.example_zh: 遊客們在正午灼熱的沙漠中艱難地行走。

gept.example_en: Tonight feels muggy, so let's keep the bedroom window open.
gept.example_zh: 今晚感覺悶熱，所以我們把臥室窗戶開著吧。

gept.example_en: The hailstorm cracked several windows on the south side of the house.
gept.example_zh: 這場冰雹風暴震裂了房子南側的好幾扇窗戶。

gept.example_en: School was cancelled because of the snowstorm that hit overnight.
gept.example_zh: 由於昨晚的暴雪，學校停課了。

gept.example_en: Long icicles formed under the roof during the cold winter nights.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的冬夜，屋簷下形成了長長的冰柱。

gept.example_en: Walking through the slush on the sidewalk soaked my sneakers completely.
gept.example_zh: 走在人行道上的雪泥裡讓我的運動鞋完全濕透。

gept.example_en: The monsoon season brings heavy rain every afternoon for weeks.
gept.example_zh: 雨季每天下午都會連續好幾週下大雨。

gept.example_en: The cul-de-sac is a safe place for kids to ride their bikes.
gept.example_zh: 這條死巷是孩子們騎腳踏車的安全地方。

gept.example_en: She used a squeegee to leave the bathroom mirror streak-free.
gept.example_zh: 她用玻璃刮刀把浴室鏡子擦得沒有水痕。

gept.example_en: The old house needed to be rewired for modern electrical safety standards.
gept.example_zh: 這棟舊房子需要重新配線以符合現代電氣安全標準。

gept.example_en: Spread mulch around the trees to keep the soil moist in summer.
gept.example_zh: 在樹周圍鋪上覆蓋物，讓土壤在夏天保持濕潤。

gept.example_en: Squirrels gather acorns and bury them throughout the yard.
gept.example_zh: 松鼠在院子各處收集並埋藏橡實。

gept.example_en: A pair of cozy slippers sat on the hearth beside the warm fire.
gept.example_zh: 一雙舒適的拖鞋擺在溫暖的爐火旁的爐床上。

gept.example_en: A row of family photos lined the mantel above the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 壁爐上方的壁爐架上排放著一排家庭照片。

gept.example_en: Use a soft washcloth to gently clean the baby's face after meals.
gept.example_zh: 用柔軟的洗臉巾在飯後輕輕地擦寶寶的臉。

gept.example_en: He marked the children's height on the kitchen doorframe each year.
gept.example_zh: 他每年都在廚房門框上為孩子們量身高做記號。

gept.example_en: Rain streaked down the windowpane all afternoon as we read inside.
gept.example_zh: 下午我們在屋裡看書時，雨水沿著窗玻璃流下。

gept.example_en: She polished the wooden banister until it gleamed in the sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 她把木製樓梯扶手擦得在陽光下閃閃發亮。

gept.example_en: A skylight in the bathroom brings in natural light all day long.
gept.example_zh: 浴室的天窗整天都引入自然光。

gept.example_en: Proper insulation in the walls helps lower the heating bills significantly.
gept.example_zh: 牆壁裡良好的隔熱材料能大幅降低暖氣費用。

gept.example_en: Flip the circuit breaker if the electricity in one room suddenly goes out.
gept.example_zh: 如果某個房間突然停電，請扳動斷路器。

gept.example_en: Wipe shower curtains weekly to keep mildew from forming.
gept.example_zh: 每週擦拭浴簾以防止黴斑形成。

gept.example_en: He is a famous alumnus who donated millions to his old university.
gept.example_zh: 他是一位著名校友，捐了數百萬給他的母校。

gept.example_en: The alumna returned to give a speech about her career journey.
gept.example_zh: 這位女校友回校演講，分享她的職涯歷程。

gept.example_en: The young pianist is considered a musical prodigy across Asia.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕鋼琴家被認為是亞洲的音樂神童。

gept.example_en: Anthropology students often live in distant villages to study local cultures.
gept.example_zh: 人類學學生常住在偏遠村落以研究當地文化。

gept.example_en: Scholars from ten countries attended the international symposium on robotics.
gept.example_zh: 十國學者出席了這場機器人學國際研討會。

gept.example_en: She annotates her textbooks with colorful sticky notes and short comments.
gept.example_zh: 她用彩色便利貼和簡短評論為課本加註。

gept.example_en: Reviewing notes regularly increases the retention of new information.
gept.example_zh: 定期複習筆記能提升對新資訊的記憶力。

gept.example_en: Her doctoral dissertation explores how language develops in bilingual children.
gept.example_zh: 她的博士論文探討雙語兒童的語言發展。

gept.example_en: The author sent her manuscript to the editor for careful review.
gept.example_zh: 作者把她的手稿寄給編輯仔細審閱。

gept.example_en: The researcher described her methodology in great detail in chapter three.
gept.example_zh: 研究者在第三章詳細描述了她的方法論。

gept.example_en: Your bibliography should follow the formatting style required by the journal.
gept.example_zh: 參考書目須依照期刊要求的格式排列。

gept.example_en: Plagiarism is a serious offense that can lead to academic punishment.
gept.example_zh: 剽竊是嚴重違規行為，可能導致學業處分。

gept.example_en: Students who plagiarize will fail the assignment automatically.
gept.example_zh: 剽竊的學生這份作業會直接被當。

gept.example_en: His apprenticeship lasted three years before he became a certified electrician.
gept.example_zh: 他的學徒期持續三年，之後才成為合格電工。

gept.example_en: The mentorship program pairs each student with an experienced professional.
gept.example_zh: 指導計畫為每位學生配對一位資深專業人士。

gept.example_en: He felt embarrassed because he was illiterate well into his thirties.
gept.example_zh: 他直到三十多歲還不識字，深感難為情。

gept.example_en: Growing up in Switzerland, she became a multilingual professional easily.
gept.example_zh: 在瑞士長大，她輕鬆地成為多語專業人士。

gept.example_en: The textbook includes a glossary of all technical terms at the end.
gept.example_zh: 這本教科書在最後附有所有專業術語的詞彙表。

gept.example_en: The speaker stepped up to the podium and adjusted the microphone.
gept.example_zh: 演講者走上講台調整了麥克風。

gept.example_en: Teachers should be aware of nonverbal signals from their students.
gept.example_zh: 老師應留意學生的非語言訊號。

gept.example_en: His scholastic record earned him admission to several top universities.
gept.example_zh: 他的學業成績讓他獲得數所頂尖大學的錄取。

gept.example_en: Playing music can improve cognitive skills in young children.
gept.example_zh: 演奏音樂能提升幼童的認知能力。

gept.example_en: She contemplated changing her major to psychology after taking one class.
gept.example_zh: 修了一門課後，她認真考慮把主修改成心理學。

gept.example_en: We pondered the meaning of the poem for nearly an hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們花了將近一小時仔細思考這首詩的意涵。

gept.example_en: From the clues, you can deduce who solved the puzzle first.
gept.example_zh: 從線索中你可以推論出誰先解開了謎題。

gept.example_en: Scientists try to induce general laws from specific observations.
gept.example_zh: 科學家試圖從特定觀察中歸納出一般定律。

gept.example_en: Readers must often infer the writer's tone from word choice.
gept.example_zh: 讀者常須從用字推斷作者的語氣。

gept.example_en: Drawing inferences from a text is an important reading skill.
gept.example_zh: 從文章中做推論是重要的閱讀技能。

gept.example_en: I presume you have already finished the reading for tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 我猜你已經讀完明天要看的內容了。

gept.example_en: Academic integrity is the foundation of any trustworthy university degree.
gept.example_zh: 學術誠信是任何值得信賴大學學位的基礎。

gept.example_en: His diligence eventually paid off when he won the national prize.
gept.example_zh: 他的勤奮最終在贏得全國大獎時得到回報。

gept.example_en: Learning a difficult language requires great perseverance and daily practice.
gept.example_zh: 學習一門困難的語言需要極大的毅力與每日練習。

gept.example_en: She persevered through tough courses and eventually graduated with honors.
gept.example_zh: 她堅持讀完艱難的課程，最終以優異成績畢業。

gept.example_en: Many young students aspire to study at famous foreign universities.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕學生嚮往就讀知名的外國大學。

gept.example_en: Her aspiration to become a doctor began in elementary school.
gept.example_zh: 她想當醫生的志向從小學就開始了。

gept.example_en: Students thrive when teachers create a warm and supportive environment.
gept.example_zh: 當老師創造溫暖且支持的環境時，學生會茁壯成長。

gept.example_en: Arts programs flourish at schools that value creative education.
gept.example_zh: 重視創意教育的學校，藝術課程蓬勃發展。

gept.example_en: Universities prosper when they invest in both teaching and research.
gept.example_zh: 大學在教學與研究兩方面都投資時才會繁榮。

gept.example_en: He was disappointed with his mediocre performance on the final test.
gept.example_zh: 他對自己期末考試的平庸表現感到失望。

gept.example_en: Modern researchers and teachers are increasingly interdependent across fields.
gept.example_zh: 現代研究者與教師在各領域間日益相互依賴。

gept.example_en: A good leader respects every subordinate on the team.
gept.example_zh: 好的領導者尊重團隊中的每一位下屬。

gept.example_en: My cubicle is next to the window with great natural light.
gept.example_zh: 我的小隔間在窗邊，自然光線很好。

gept.example_en: The boardroom is reserved for senior management meetings.
gept.example_zh: 董事會議室僅供高層會議使用。

gept.example_en: Each new employee receives a lanyard with the company logo.
gept.example_zh: 每位新進員工會領到一條印有公司標誌的識別證掛繩。

gept.example_en: The team reached a consensus after two hours of talks.
gept.example_zh: 經過兩小時的討論後，團隊達成了共識。

gept.example_en: The deliverables are listed in the project plan.
gept.example_zh: 交付項目都列在專案計畫中。

gept.example_en: This document serves as the blueprint for the new system.
gept.example_zh: 這份文件作為新系統的藍圖。

gept.example_en: We had a kickoff meeting on Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們週一早上開了專案啟動會議。

gept.example_en: The rollout of the new software took two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 新軟體推出花了兩週時間。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 待辦事項清單；積壓
gept.example_en: The backlog has grown since the last sprint.
gept.example_zh: 自上次衝刺以來，待辦清單已經增加。

gept.example_en: I received a positive appraisal from my supervisor.
gept.example_zh: 我從主管那裡收到了正面的績效評估。

gept.example_en: Watch your balance to avoid overdraft fees.
gept.example_zh: 注意你的餘額以免被收取透支費用。

gept.example_en: The company wrote off the bad debt last quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司上一季沖銷了那筆壞帳。

gept.example_en: Our small shop finally broke even after one year.
gept.example_zh: 我們的小店一年後終於收支平衡。

gept.example_en: Clearance items are usually marked with a yellow tag.
gept.example_zh: 清倉商品通常會貼上黃色標籤。

gept.example_en: Long-term deflation can also harm an economy.
gept.example_zh: 長期通貨緊縮也會傷害經濟。

gept.example_en: The company pays a dividend twice a year.
gept.example_zh: 這家公司一年發放兩次股息。

gept.example_en: Telework has become more popular since the pandemic.
gept.example_zh: 自從疫情以來，遠端工作變得更普遍。

gept.example_en: Flextime allows me to start work at any time before ten.
gept.example_zh: 彈性工時讓我可以在十點前的任何時間開始工作。

gept.example_en: She took a sabbatical to travel through Europe.
gept.example_zh: 她請了休假進修去歐洲旅行。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 運作時間；正常運轉時間
gept.example_en: Our server has had ninety-nine percent uptime this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年我們伺服器的運作時間達百分之九十九。

gept.example_en: A mediator helped both sides reach an agreement.
gept.example_zh: 一位調解者協助雙方達成協議。

gept.example_en: Team morale rose after the project's success.
gept.example_zh: 專案成功後團隊士氣大增。

gept.example_en: Accountability builds trust within the organization.
gept.example_zh: 當責能在組織內建立信任。

gept.example_en: Workplace harassment must always be reported.
gept.example_zh: 職場騷擾必須立即通報。

gept.example_en: Please escalate the issue to your manager if needed.
gept.example_zh: 如有需要請把問題上報給你的主管。

gept.example_en: HR will mediate the conflict between the two staff.
gept.example_zh: 人資部會調解兩位員工之間的衝突。

gept.example_en: We use hot desks since not everyone comes in daily.
gept.example_zh: 我們使用共享辦公桌，因為不是每個人每天進辦公室。

gept.example_en: The first agenda item is the quarterly results.
gept.example_zh: 第一個議程項目是季度結果。

gept.example_en: Each action item has a clear owner and deadline.
gept.example_zh: 每個待辦事項都有明確的負責人和期限。

gept.example_en: We need a manager's sign-off before shipping.
gept.example_zh: 出貨前我們需要經理的簽核。

gept.example_en: The kickoff meeting set clear expectations for all.
gept.example_zh: 啟動會議為所有人設立了明確的期待。

gept.example_en: After the event we held a quick debrief.
gept.example_zh: 活動結束後我們做了簡短的事後檢討。

gept.example_en: Let's touch base on Friday to review progress.
gept.example_zh: 週五我們聯繫一下檢討進度吧。

gept.example_en: Please loop me in on the design decisions.
gept.example_zh: 請把設計決策的事也通知我一聲。

gept.example_en: We'll circle back to this topic next week.
gept.example_zh: 我們下週再回頭討論這個話題。

gept.example_en: Three remote colleagues will dial in to the call.
gept.example_zh: 會有三位遠端同事撥入這場電話會議。

gept.example_en: Customers complained about the recent price hike.
gept.example_zh: 客戶對最近的漲價有所抱怨。

gept.example_en: The firm had to downsize its workforce last year.
gept.example_zh: 公司去年不得不縮減人力規模。

gept.example_en: Many companies outsource customer service abroad.
gept.example_zh: 許多公司把客服委外到國外。

gept.example_en: The city subsidizes public transport for seniors.
gept.example_zh: 市府補助年長者搭乘大眾運輸。

gept.example_en: The consulate helped the stranded tourists return home.
gept.example_zh: 領事館協助受困的遊客返回家鄉。

gept.example_en: Only authorized crew may enter the cockpit during the flight.
gept.example_zh: 飛行期間只有授權人員可進入駕駛艙。

gept.example_en: We hit some turbulence over the mountains, but it didn't last long.
gept.example_zh: 我們在山區遇到一些亂流，但沒持續多久。

gept.example_en: The old steam locomotive is now displayed in the museum.
gept.example_zh: 這台老舊的蒸汽火車頭現在展示在博物館裡。

gept.example_en: The resort offers many amenities including a pool and spa.
gept.example_zh: 這家度假村提供許多便利設施，包括泳池和水療。

gept.example_en: The concierge helped us book tickets for the show.
gept.example_zh: 禮賓員幫我們訂了表演的票。

gept.example_en: We took an excursion to the nearby vineyard.
gept.example_zh: 我們去附近的葡萄園做了一趟短途旅行。

gept.example_en: The team prepared for a long expedition to the Arctic.
gept.example_zh: 這個團隊為去北極的長期探險做準備。

gept.example_en: The mountaintop offers a stunning panorama of the valley.
gept.example_zh: 山頂可俯瞰山谷壯麗的全景。

gept.example_en: Her passion for archaeology led her to many ancient sites.
gept.example_zh: 她對考古學的熱情帶她去了許多古蹟。

gept.example_en: Digital nomads work remotely while traveling the world.
gept.example_zh: 數位遊牧民族邊環遊世界邊遠端工作。

gept.example_en: Traffic congestion is worse during the morning rush.
gept.example_zh: 早上尖峰時段交通擁塞更嚴重。

gept.example_en: The overpass connects two parts of the city.
gept.example_zh: 這座高架道路連接城市的兩個區域。

gept.example_en: Use the underpass to cross the busy avenue safely.
gept.example_zh: 利用地下道安全地穿越繁忙的大街。

gept.example_en: Airlines sometimes overbook flights, causing problems for passengers.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司有時會超賣機票，給乘客帶來問題。

gept.example_en: The storm stranded thousands of travelers at the airport.
gept.example_zh: 風暴使數千名旅客滯留機場。

gept.example_en: The turbulent flight made many passengers nervous.
gept.example_zh: 這趟亂流的飛行讓許多乘客緊張。

gept.example_en: Dehydration is a real risk on long hikes in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天長時間健行有脫水的真實風險。

gept.example_en: Some business meetings require strict formality.
gept.example_zh: 有些商務會議需要嚴格的正式禮節。

gept.example_en: Local folklore tells of a dragon living in the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 當地民間傳說有一條龍住在山中。

gept.example_en: Indigenous people have lived in this region for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 原住民已在此地區生活數百年。

gept.example_en: Marinate the chicken overnight for the best taste.
gept.example_zh: 雞肉醃製過夜口味最佳。

gept.example_en: Braise the pork shoulder in red wine for several hours.
gept.example_zh: 用紅酒燉煮豬肩肉幾小時。

gept.example_en: Poach the eggs in slightly simmering water.
gept.example_zh: 在微滾的水中水煮蛋。

gept.example_en: Cilantro is essential in many Mexican dishes.
gept.example_zh: 香菜是許多墨西哥菜的必備品。

gept.example_en: Mint leaves give a fresh taste to summer drinks.
gept.example_zh: 薄荷葉為夏日飲品帶來清新的口感。

gept.example_en: Save room for dessert because the chocolate cake is amazing.
gept.example_zh: 留點肚子吃甜點因為巧克力蛋糕很棒。

gept.example_en: I prefer beef cooked medium rare for the best flavor.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡牛肉煮三分熟，味道最好。

gept.example_en: Grilled squid is a popular night market snack.
gept.example_zh: 烤魷魚是受歡迎的夜市小吃。

gept.example_en: The chef trained for years in France before opening his restaurant.
gept.example_zh: 這位主廚開餐廳前在法國受訓多年。

gept.example_en: Please place the napkin on your lap during the meal.
gept.example_zh: 用餐時請把餐巾放在大腿上。

gept.example_en: She served the pasta on a large white plate.
gept.example_zh: 她把義大利麵裝在一個大白盤上。

gept.example_en: I prefer savory snacks over sweet ones.
gept.example_zh: 我比較喜歡鹹的點心勝過甜的。

gept.example_en: The chicken skin came out perfectly crispy.
gept.example_zh: 這雞皮做得完美酥脆。

gept.example_en: She has been a vegetarian since high school.
gept.example_zh: 她從高中開始就是素食者。

gept.example_en: Gluten-free options are now common in most restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 無麩質的選擇現在在大多數餐廳都很常見。

gept.example_en: Use natural seasonings instead of too much salt.
gept.example_zh: 使用天然調味料代替太多鹽。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 低碳水化合物的
gept.example_en: A low-carb diet helped him lose weight quickly.
gept.example_zh: 低碳水化合物飲食讓他快速減重。

gept.example_en: Vitamin supplements can fill nutritional gaps in your diet.
gept.example_zh: 維他命補充品可補足飲食中的營養缺口。

gept.example_en: Drinking water is more hydrating than sugary drinks.
gept.example_zh: 喝水比含糖飲料更能補水。

gept.example_en: Whole grains and vegetables are high in fiber.
gept.example_zh: 全穀類和蔬菜富含纖維。

gept.example_en: Portion control is important for healthy eating.
gept.example_zh: 份量控制對健康飲食很重要。

gept.example_en: I had a strong craving for chocolate last night.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚很想吃巧克力。

gept.example_en: She decided to indulge in a piece of cake after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她決定晚餐後縱情享受一塊蛋糕。

gept.example_en: Don't starve yourself to lose weight; eat balanced meals.
gept.example_zh: 別為了減肥讓自己挨餓，要均衡飲食。

gept.example_en: He raised an eyebrow in surprise at the news.
gept.example_zh: 他聽到消息時驚訝地揚起眉毛。

gept.example_en: She held the coin tightly in the palm of her hand.
gept.example_zh: 她把硬幣緊握在手掌裡。

gept.example_en: The helmet protects the skull during cycling.
gept.example_zh: 這頂安全帽在騎自行車時保護頭骨。

gept.example_en: Good posture supports a healthy spine.
gept.example_zh: 良好姿勢支撐健康的脊椎。

gept.example_en: He bruised a rib falling off his bicycle.
gept.example_zh: 他從自行車上摔下來撞傷了肋骨。

gept.example_en: Yoga helps to keep the hips flexible.
gept.example_zh: 瑜伽有助於保持臀部靈活。

gept.example_en: High heels can cause pain in the heel over time.
gept.example_zh: 高跟鞋久了會引起腳跟疼痛。

gept.example_en: The brain needs rest and sleep to function well.
gept.example_zh: 大腦需要休息和睡眠才能良好運作。

gept.example_en: Drinking lots of water makes the bladder work harder.
gept.example_zh: 喝大量水會讓膀胱更費力。

gept.example_en: Weightlifting builds muscle and strengthens bones.
gept.example_zh: 舉重能增強肌肉並強化骨骼。

gept.example_en: Stretching helps prevent tendon injuries.
gept.example_zh: 伸展有助於預防肌腱受傷。

gept.example_en: Calcium is important for strong bones.
gept.example_zh: 鈣質對強壯的骨骼很重要。

gept.example_en: Chronic fatigue can be a sign of underlying illness.
gept.example_zh: 慢性疲勞可能是潛在疾病的徵兆。

gept.example_en: A toothache can be a sign of a cavity.
gept.example_zh: 牙痛可能是蛀牙的徵兆。

gept.example_en: Apply ice to reduce swelling on the injury.
gept.example_zh: 在傷處敷冰塊以減輕腫脹。

gept.example_en: Shortness of breath can be a serious symptom.
gept.example_zh: 呼吸急促可能是嚴重的症狀。

gept.example_en: She felt palpitations after drinking too much coffee.
gept.example_zh: 喝太多咖啡後她感到心悸。

gept.example_en: Drink water to prevent muscle cramps during exercise.
gept.example_zh: 運動時喝水以預防肌肉抽筋。

gept.example_en: Eating fiber helps with constipation.
gept.example_zh: 吃纖維有助於緩解便祕。

gept.example_en: Stress is a common cause of insomnia.
gept.example_zh: 壓力是失眠的常見原因。

gept.example_en: Spicy food can cause heartburn for some people.
gept.example_zh: 辣的食物會讓某些人胃灼熱。

gept.example_en: Some foods cause uncomfortable bloating.
gept.example_zh: 有些食物會引起不舒服的腹脹。

gept.example_en: Pollen allergies are worst during spring.
gept.example_zh: 花粉過敏在春天最嚴重。

gept.example_en: Get a flu shot every year to stay healthy.
gept.example_zh: 每年接種流感疫苗以保持健康。

gept.example_en: Wash your hands often to prevent infection.
gept.example_zh: 常洗手以預防感染。

gept.example_en: Many older adults suffer from joint pain due to arthritis.
gept.example_zh: 許多年長者因關節炎而關節疼痛。

gept.example_en: Early detection improves cancer survival rates.
gept.example_zh: 早期發現可提高癌症存活率。

gept.example_en: Depression is a serious mental health condition.
gept.example_zh: 憂鬱症是嚴重的心理健康問題。

gept.example_en: Stress can contribute to stomach ulcers.
gept.example_zh: 壓力可能導致胃潰瘍。

gept.example_en: A persistent cough may indicate bronchitis.
gept.example_zh: 持續性咳嗽可能是支氣管炎。

gept.example_en: Eczema causes red, itchy patches on the skin.
gept.example_zh: 濕疹會在皮膚上引起紅癢斑塊。

gept.example_en: Teenagers often experience acne during puberty.
gept.example_zh: 青少年在青春期常出現痤瘡。

gept.example_en: Obesity is linked to many serious health problems.
gept.example_zh: 肥胖與許多嚴重的健康問題有關。

gept.example_en: He suffered a mild concussion from the fall.
gept.example_zh: 他從跌倒中得了輕度腦震盪。

gept.example_en: An X-ray showed a small fracture in her wrist.
gept.example_zh: X 光顯示她手腕有小骨折。

gept.example_en: Rest is essential for healing an ankle sprain.
gept.example_zh: 休息對於腳踝扭傷的痊癒很重要。

gept.example_en: The scar from the surgery faded over time.
gept.example_zh: 手術留下的疤痕隨時間褪去。

gept.example_en: She fully recovered three months after the surgery.
gept.example_zh: 手術後三個月她完全康復了。

gept.example_en: The nurse gave him an injection in his arm.
gept.example_zh: 護士在他的手臂注射了藥物。

gept.example_en: Rehabilitation can take months after a serious injury.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重受傷後復健可能需要數個月。

gept.example_en: The operation took three hours and went smoothly.
gept.example_zh: 這次手術花了三小時，進行順利。

gept.example_en: Her recovery from surgery was quicker than expected.
gept.example_zh: 她從手術中康復比預期快。

gept.example_en: She needs a wheelchair to move around the hospital.
gept.example_zh: 她需要輪椅在醫院中移動。

gept.example_en: Call 911 immediately in case of a medical emergency.
gept.example_zh: 醫療緊急情況請立即打 911。

gept.example_en: Hydration is essential during hot weather.
gept.example_zh: 炎熱天氣補水很重要。

gept.example_en: Wellness includes physical, mental, and emotional health.
gept.example_zh: 健康包括身體、心理和情緒上的健康。

gept.example_en: Cardio workouts strengthen the heart.
gept.example_zh: 心肺運動能強化心臟。

gept.example_en: Strength training builds muscle and burns calories.
gept.example_zh: 力量訓練能增肌並燃燒卡路里。

gept.example_en: Proper nutrition is the foundation of good health.
gept.example_zh: 適當的營養是良好健康的基礎。

gept.example_en: Self-care includes both physical and mental practices.
gept.example_zh: 自我照顧包含身心方面的練習。

gept.example_en: A healthy diet boosts immunity against illness.
gept.example_zh: 健康飲食增強對抗疾病的免疫力。

gept.example_en: Joining a gym helped improve his fitness level.
gept.example_zh: 加入健身房幫助他提升健身水平。

gept.example_en: Good hygiene prevents the spread of disease.
gept.example_zh: 良好衛生可預防疾病傳播。

gept.example_en: The parliament passed a new law to protect workers from unfair treatment last week.
gept.example_zh: 國會上週通過一項保護勞工免受不公平對待的新法律。

gept.example_en: The new law was passed by a clear majority in the senate yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 這項新法律昨天在參議院以明顯多數獲得通過。

gept.example_en: Education reform is needed to prepare students for the rapidly changing job market.
gept.example_zh: 教育改革是必要的，以幫助學生為快速變化的就業市場做準備。

gept.example_en: The two countries signed a peace treaty ending decades of border disputes.
gept.example_zh: 兩國簽署了一項和平條約，結束了數十年的邊境爭端。

gept.example_en: The diplomat worked hard to improve relations between the two nations.
gept.example_zh: 這位外交官努力改善兩國之間的關係。

gept.example_en: The jury reached a verdict after three days of careful discussion.
gept.example_zh: 陪審團經過三天的仔細討論後達成了裁決。

gept.example_en: Her attorney advised her not to say anything to the police without permission.
gept.example_zh: 她的律師建議她未經允許不要對警方說任何話。

gept.example_en: New safety regulations require all factories to install fire alarms by next year.
gept.example_zh: 新的安全法規要求所有工廠在明年之前安裝火警警報器。

gept.example_en: She donates a portion of her salary to a local charity every month.
gept.example_zh: 她每個月將部分薪水捐贈給當地的慈善機構。

gept.example_en: Minority groups have made important contributions to the country's cultural diversity.
gept.example_zh: 少數族群對該國的文化多樣性做出了重要貢獻。

gept.example_en: Youth activism played a key role in pushing for climate change legislation.
gept.example_zh: 青年行動主義在推動氣候變遷立法中扮演了關鍵角色。

gept.example_en: Thousands gathered downtown to protest the rise in housing prices.
gept.example_zh: 數千人聚集在市中心抗議房價上漲。

gept.example_en: The hospital received a generous donation from an anonymous local businessman.
gept.example_zh: 醫院收到了一位匿名當地商人的慷慨捐款。

gept.example_en: The Amazon rainforest is home to millions of plant and animal species.
gept.example_zh: 亞馬遜雨林是數百萬種動植物的家園。

gept.example_en: The desert is surprisingly cold at night despite the burning heat of day.
gept.example_zh: 儘管白天酷熱，沙漠在夜間卻出奇地冷。

gept.example_en: Pollution can damage an entire ecosystem in just a few short years.
gept.example_zh: 污染可以在短短幾年內破壞整個生態系統。

gept.example_en: Many animals lose their natural habitat when forests are cut down for farming.
gept.example_zh: 許多動物在森林為了農業而被砍伐時失去了自然棲息地。

gept.example_en: Grasslands cover large parts of Africa and support many grazing animals.
gept.example_zh: 草原覆蓋了非洲的大片地區，並支持許多吃草的動物。

gept.example_en: Lions and zebras roam freely across the African savanna in search of food.
gept.example_zh: 獅子和斑馬在非洲莽原上自由地漫遊覓食。

gept.example_en: The Arctic tundra has very few trees because of the harsh climate.
gept.example_zh: 由於氣候嚴峻，北極凍原幾乎沒有樹木。

gept.example_en: Protecting biodiversity is essential for the long-term health of our planet.
gept.example_zh: 保護生物多樣性對我們星球的長期健康至關重要。

gept.example_en: The national park preserves a large area of untouched wilderness for future generations.
gept.example_zh: 國家公園為後代保存了一大片未被觸及的荒野。

gept.example_en: The giant panda eats mostly bamboo and is considered an endangered species.
gept.example_zh: 大熊貓主要吃竹子，被認為是瀕危物種。

gept.example_en: Ferns grow well in shady damp places under taller trees.
gept.example_zh: 蕨類在較高樹木下陰涼潮濕的地方生長良好。

gept.example_en: Soft green moss covered the old stones in the forest path.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的綠色苔蘚覆蓋著森林小徑上的老石頭。

gept.example_en: The students planted a small sapling in the schoolyard as a class project.
gept.example_zh: 學生們在校園裡種了一棵小樹苗作為班級專題。

gept.example_en: Bamboo grows extremely fast and can be used to make furniture and floors.
gept.example_zh: 竹子生長極快，可用於製作家具和地板。

gept.example_en: The mountain trail is lined with tall pine trees that smell wonderful.
gept.example_zh: 山徑兩旁排列著高大的松樹，氣味芬芳。

gept.example_en: She received a beautiful orchid as a gift for her birthday last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週她收到一朵美麗的蘭花作為生日禮物。

gept.example_en: The humidity is very high today, making the air feel sticky and uncomfortable.
gept.example_zh: 今天濕度非常高，讓空氣感覺黏膩不舒服。

gept.example_en: Recycling paper and plastic helps reduce the amount of waste in landfills.
gept.example_zh: 回收紙張和塑料有助於減少垃圾填埋場的廢物量。

gept.example_en: Wildlife conservation efforts have helped save many species from extinction.
gept.example_zh: 野生動物保育工作幫助拯救了許多免於滅絕的物種。

gept.example_en: Most of our trash ends up in a landfill outside the city.
gept.example_zh: 我們的大部分垃圾最後都進入城外的垃圾填埋場。

gept.example_en: The ozone layer protects us from harmful ultraviolet radiation from the sun.
gept.example_zh: 臭氧層保護我們免受來自太陽的有害紫外線輻射。

gept.example_en: Solar panels on the roof generate enough electricity for the entire house.
gept.example_zh: 屋頂上的太陽能板產生足以供應整個房子的電力。

gept.example_en: Deforestation has reduced the size of many tropical rainforests significantly.
gept.example_zh: 森林砍伐已大幅減少許多熱帶雨林的面積。

gept.example_en: Soil erosion is a serious problem in areas where forests have been cleared.
gept.example_zh: 土壤侵蝕在森林被清除的地區是一個嚴重問題。

gept.example_en: Biodegradable packaging breaks down naturally and does not harm the environment.
gept.example_zh: 可生物分解的包裝自然分解，不會危害環境。

gept.example_en: Protecting the environment is everyone's responsibility, not just the government's.
gept.example_zh: 保護環境是每個人的責任，而不僅僅是政府的。

gept.example_en: Many animals face extinction due to habitat loss and climate change.
gept.example_zh: 許多動物因棲息地喪失和氣候變化而面臨滅絕。

gept.example_en: The endangered tiger needs urgent protection to survive in the wild.
gept.example_zh: 瀕危的老虎需要緊急保護才能在野外生存。

gept.example_en: The climate in this region has become noticeably warmer in recent decades.
gept.example_zh: 這個地區的氣候在最近幾十年明顯變暖。

gept.example_en: I usually use this browser because it loads pages faster than the others.
gept.example_zh: 我通常使用這個瀏覽器，因為它載入頁面比其他的快。

gept.example_en: He loves buying the latest gadgets even though he rarely uses them.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡買最新的小裝置，儘管他很少使用它們。

gept.example_en: You should update the firmware on your router to fix the recent security issues.
gept.example_zh: 你應該更新路由器的韌體以修復最近的安全問題。

gept.example_en: Most teenagers carry a smartphone everywhere they go these days.
gept.example_zh: 現在大多數青少年到哪都帶著智慧型手機。

gept.example_en: She writes a popular cooking blog with simple recipes for busy people.
gept.example_zh: 她經營一個受歡迎的烹飪部落格，為忙碌的人提供簡單食譜。

gept.example_en: Fans watched the concert through a livestream on their phones and computers.
gept.example_zh: 粉絲們通過手機和電腦上的直播觀看音樂會。

gept.example_en: The hashtag became trending on the platform within just a few hours.
gept.example_zh: 這個主題標籤在短短幾小時內就在平台上成為熱門話題。

gept.example_en: Young people often use emoji to express feelings in text messages.
gept.example_zh: 年輕人經常使用表情符號在簡訊中表達情感。

gept.example_en: The data breach exposed the credit card numbers of thousands of customers.
gept.example_zh: 這次資料外洩使數千名客戶的信用卡號碼曝光。

gept.example_en: End-to-end encryption protects your messages from being read by others.
gept.example_zh: 端對端加密保護你的訊息不被他人讀取。

gept.example_en: Be careful about clicking unknown links that may contain dangerous malware.
gept.example_zh: 小心點擊可能包含危險惡意軟體的未知連結。

gept.example_en: A computer virus can spread quickly through email attachments and infected files.
gept.example_zh: 電腦病毒可以通過電子郵件附件和受感染的檔案快速傳播。

gept.example_en: Install reliable antivirus software to protect your computer from threats.
gept.example_zh: 安裝可靠的防毒軟體以保護你的電腦免受威脅。

gept.example_en: Phishing emails try to trick you into revealing your personal information.
gept.example_zh: 網路釣魚電子郵件試圖誘騙你透露個人資訊。

gept.example_en: Many users worry about the privacy of their personal data on social platforms.
gept.example_zh: 許多用戶擔心他們在社群平台上個人資料的隱私。

gept.example_en: Always backup important files to avoid losing them if your computer crashes.
gept.example_zh: 始終備份重要檔案，以避免電腦當機時遺失。

gept.example_en: Factory automation has reduced the need for human workers on assembly lines.
gept.example_zh: 工廠自動化減少了裝配線上對人工的需求。

gept.example_en: AI can analyze huge amounts of data far faster than any human could.
gept.example_zh: 人工智慧能夠以遠超人類的速度分析大量資料。

gept.example_en: Blockchain technology offers a secure way to record transactions without a central authority.
gept.example_zh: 區塊鏈技術提供了一種無需中央機構就能記錄交易的安全方式。

gept.example_en: Cryptocurrency prices can rise and fall dramatically within just a few hours.
gept.example_zh: 加密貨幣價格在短短幾小時內就可能急劇上漲和下跌。

gept.example_en: Augmented reality games let players see virtual objects in their real surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 擴增實境遊戲讓玩家在真實環境中看到虛擬物體。

gept.example_en: The metaverse promises a new way to socialize, work, and play online.
gept.example_zh: 元宇宙承諾提供一種社交、工作和線上遊戲的新方式。

gept.example_en: Many young people dream of working at an exciting tech startup.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人夢想在令人興奮的科技新創公司工作。

gept.example_en: Biotech companies are developing new treatments for previously incurable diseases.
gept.example_zh: 生物科技公司正在開發以前無法治癒的疾病的新治療方法。

gept.example_en: Nanotechnology has the potential to revolutionize medicine and electronics.
gept.example_zh: 奈米科技有潛力徹底改變醫學和電子產品。

gept.example_en: Electric vehicles produce no exhaust emissions and help reduce urban air pollution.
gept.example_zh: 電動車不產生廢氣排放，有助於減少城市空氣污染。

gept.example_en: We play badminton in the school gym every Tuesday and Thursday evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週二和週四晚上在學校體育館打羽毛球。

gept.example_en: Archery requires steady hands, sharp eyes, and a great deal of patience.
gept.example_zh: 射箭需要穩定的手、敏銳的眼睛和極大的耐心。

gept.example_en: She has practiced gymnastics since she was four years old.
gept.example_zh: 她從四歲開始就練習體操。

gept.example_en: Rugby is a tough sport that requires both speed and physical strength.
gept.example_zh: 橄欖球是一項既需要速度又需要體力的艱苦運動。

gept.example_en: She runs on the treadmill for thirty minutes every morning before breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早餐前在跑步機上跑步三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Light dumbbell exercises can help build strength in your arms gradually.
gept.example_zh: 輕量啞鈴運動可以幫助逐漸鍛鍊手臂的力量。

gept.example_en: Fans wear their team jersey to every important match of the season.
gept.example_zh: 球迷穿著他們球隊的球衣參加賽季每場重要比賽。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to wear goggles when swimming in the chlorinated pool.
gept.example_zh: 在含氯泳池游泳時別忘了戴護目鏡。

gept.example_en: The veteran player retired after twenty successful years in professional football.
gept.example_zh: 這名老將在職業足球生涯成功二十年後退役。

gept.example_en: The striker scored two goals in the second half to win the match.
gept.example_zh: 前鋒在下半場進兩球贏得比賽。

gept.example_en: The goalkeeper made an amazing save in the final minutes of the game.
gept.example_zh: 守門員在比賽最後幾分鐘做出了驚人的撲救。

gept.example_en: The young player dribbled past three defenders before passing the ball.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕球員運球越過三名防守球員後傳球。

gept.example_en: A large mural decorates the wall of the elementary school building.
gept.example_zh: 一幅大型壁畫裝飾著小學建築物的牆壁。

gept.example_en: The Mona Lisa is considered one of the greatest masterpieces in art history.
gept.example_zh: 蒙娜麗莎被認為是藝術史上最偉大的傑作之一。

gept.example_en: His stand-up comedy show made the entire audience laugh out loud.
gept.example_zh: 他的單口喜劇表演讓全場觀眾大笑。

gept.example_en: The cast had three more rehearsals before opening night.
gept.example_zh: 劇組在首演夜之前還有三次排練。

gept.example_en: Fans waited five long years for the sequel to be released in theaters.
gept.example_zh: 影迷們等了漫長的五年才等到續集在電影院上映。

gept.example_en: The film broke all box office records during its opening weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影在首映週末打破了所有票房紀錄。

gept.example_en: The cinematography in this film captures the beauty of the natural landscape.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影的攝影捕捉了自然景觀的美麗。

gept.example_en: The dubbing of the cartoon was done by famous voice actors.
gept.example_zh: 這部卡通的配音由著名的配音演員完成。

gept.example_en: My grandmother taught me knitting when I was just seven years old.
gept.example_zh: 我祖母在我七歲時就教我編織。

gept.example_en: She took a pottery class on weekends and made beautiful bowls and vases.
gept.example_zh: 她週末參加陶藝課，做了漂亮的碗和花瓶。

gept.example_en: Chinese calligraphy requires years of practice to master the proper brush strokes.
gept.example_zh: 中國書法需要多年練習才能掌握正確的筆畫。

gept.example_en: The children learned origami by folding colorful paper into birds and flowers.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們通過將彩色紙摺成鳥和花來學習摺紙。

gept.example_en: Her embroidery work has been displayed in several local craft exhibitions.
gept.example_zh: 她的刺繡作品已在幾個當地工藝品展覽中展出。

gept.example_en: My aunt can crochet a complete blanket within just a few days.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨可以在幾天內鉤完一條完整的毯子。

gept.example_en: Woodworking requires both precision and patience to create quality furniture.
gept.example_zh: 木工需要精確和耐心才能製作高品質的家具。

gept.example_en: Scrapbooking is a creative way to preserve memories with photos and souvenirs.
gept.example_zh: 剪貼簿是一種用照片和紀念品保存記憶的創意方式。

gept.example_en: The quilting club meets every Tuesday afternoon at the community center.
gept.example_zh: 拼布俱樂部每週二下午在社區中心聚會。

gept.example_en: The art teacher introduced her students to basic ceramics techniques last semester.
gept.example_zh: 美術老師上學期向她的學生介紹了基本的陶瓷技術。

gept.example_en: Jewelry making has become a popular hobby for people of all ages recently.
gept.example_zh: 珠寶製作最近成為各年齡層人們流行的愛好。

gept.example_en: Japanese flower arranging follows strict rules about balance and harmony.
gept.example_zh: 日本花藝遵循關於平衡和和諧的嚴格規則。

gept.example_en: Candle making is a relaxing hobby that produces useful and beautiful items.
gept.example_zh: 製作蠟燭是一個放鬆的愛好，可以製作有用又美麗的物品。

gept.example_en: Model building requires careful attention to small details and steady hands.
gept.example_zh: 模型製作需要對細節的仔細關注和穩定的雙手。

gept.example_en: Kayaking down the river gave us amazing views of the canyon walls.
gept.example_zh: 沿河划皮艇讓我們看到峽谷峭壁令人驚嘆的景色。

gept.example_en: White-water rafting is an exciting but somewhat dangerous outdoor activity.
gept.example_zh: 白水泛舟是一項刺激但有些危險的戶外活動。

gept.example_en: Mountain trekking requires good boots, warm clothes, and plenty of water.
gept.example_zh: 山地徒步旅行需要好的靴子、保暖的衣服和大量的水。

gept.example_en: Birdwatching has become a popular hobby among retired people in our neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 觀鳥在我們社區退休人士中已成為流行的愛好。

gept.example_en: A warm sleeping bag is essential for camping in cold mountain areas.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的山區露營時，溫暖的睡袋是必需品。

gept.example_en: I used binoculars to watch the eagles flying high above the cliff.
gept.example_zh: 我用雙筒望遠鏡觀看在懸崖高處飛翔的老鷹。

gept.example_en: Experienced trekkers can hike for ten hours straight without getting too tired.
gept.example_zh: 有經驗的徒步旅行者可以連續健行十小時而不太累。

gept.example_en: The teacher asked the students a clever riddle that puzzled the whole class.
gept.example_zh: 老師問學生一個聰明的謎語，全班都猜不出來。

gept.example_en: Checkers is a simple but strategic game suitable for players of all ages.
gept.example_zh: 跳棋是一個簡單但有策略性的遊戲，適合各年齡層的玩家。

gept.example_en: Monopoly has been a favorite family board game for several generations.
gept.example_zh: 大富翁幾代以來一直是家庭最愛的桌遊。

gept.example_en: She plays solitaire on her phone whenever she needs to relax for a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 每當她需要放鬆幾分鐘時，她就會在手機上玩接龍。

gept.example_en: The bar hosts a trivia night every Wednesday with prizes for winning teams.
gept.example_zh: 這間酒吧每週三晚上舉辦益智問答之夜，獲勝隊伍有獎品。

gept.example_en: Multiplayer games allow friends to play together over the internet.
gept.example_zh: 多人遊戲允許朋友通過網際網路一起玩。

gept.example_en: Players can customize their avatar with different clothes and accessories.
gept.example_zh: 玩家可以用不同的衣服和配件自訂他們的虛擬化身。

gept.example_en: Her name remained at the top of the leaderboard for several weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她的名字在排行榜上保持榜首數週。

gept.example_en: The newspaper's editorial criticized the mayor's recent decisions on public housing.
gept.example_zh: 這份報紙的社論批評了市長最近關於公共住房的決定。

gept.example_en: Our foreign correspondent reports directly from the war zone every evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們的外國通訊記者每晚直接從戰區報導。

gept.example_en: The company issued a press release explaining the recent management changes.
gept.example_zh: 公司發布新聞稿解釋最近的管理層變動。

gept.example_en: Her byline appears on dozens of articles about international politics.
gept.example_zh: 她的署名出現在數十篇關於國際政治的文章上。

gept.example_en: The magazine's circulation has been declining since most readers switched to digital.
gept.example_zh: 自從大多數讀者轉向數位以來，這本雜誌的發行量一直在下降。

gept.example_en: Scientists announced a major breakthrough in cancer research this morning.
gept.example_zh: 科學家今早宣布在癌症研究方面取得重大突破。

gept.example_en: The new law has sparked controversy among many different community groups.
gept.example_zh: 這項新法律在許多不同的社區團體中引發爭議。

gept.example_en: The revelation about hidden documents shocked the public completely.
gept.example_zh: 關於隱藏文件的揭露完全震驚了公眾。

gept.example_en: Important community notices are posted on the bulletin board near the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 重要的社區通知張貼在入口附近的公告欄上。

gept.example_en: The protest movement gained millions of supporters across the country.
gept.example_zh: 這個抗議運動在全國獲得了數百萬支持者。

gept.example_en: The merger of the two companies created the largest firm in the industry.
gept.example_zh: 兩家公司的合併創造了業內最大的公司。

gept.example_en: The court's ruling ended the long legal battle between the two corporations.
gept.example_zh: 法院的裁定結束了兩家公司之間漫長的法律戰。

gept.example_en: The mayor held a press conference to address concerns about public safety.
gept.example_zh: 市長舉行記者會以回應對公共安全的擔憂。

gept.example_en: The company shared its earnings webcast with investors around the world.
gept.example_zh: 公司與全球投資者分享了它的盈利網路直播。

gept.example_en: Witnesses were asked to give detailed testimony to the investigating officer.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者被要求向調查官員提供詳細證詞。

gept.example_en: Sports commentary makes watching games on television more exciting and informative.
gept.example_zh: 體育評論使在電視上觀看比賽更加刺激和有資訊性。

gept.example_en: Her op-ed about education reform sparked discussion across the country.
gept.example_zh: 她關於教育改革的評論專欄在全國引起討論。

gept.example_en: He came down with a nasty flu just before his important presentation.
gept.example_zh: 他在重要簡報前染上了嚴重的流感。

gept.example_en: The new policy will bring about significant changes in the workplace culture.
gept.example_zh: 新政策將為職場文化帶來重大改變。

gept.example_en: Against all odds, the small team managed to pull off an amazing victory.
gept.example_zh: 儘管處於劣勢，這支小隊還是設法贏得了驚人的勝利。

gept.example_en: I just had to bite the bullet and apologize to my boss publicly.
gept.example_zh: 我只得咬緊牙關公開向老闆道歉。

gept.example_en: Stop beating around the bush and tell me what really happened last night.
gept.example_zh: 別再拐彎抹角，告訴我昨晚到底發生了什麼事。

gept.word: cost an arm and a leg
gept.example_en: That designer handbag must have cost her an arm and a leg.
gept.example_zh: 那個設計師包包想必花了她一大筆錢。

gept.word: hit the nail on the head
gept.example_en: Your analysis really hit the nail on the head about our project problems.
gept.example_zh: 你對我們專案問題的分析真的一針見血。

gept.example_en: He visits his elderly grandmother once in a blue moon these days.
gept.example_zh: 他現在很難得才會去探望他的老祖母。

gept.example_en: Do not believe everything he says; he is just pulling your leg.
gept.example_zh: 別相信他說的每句話，他只是在開你玩笑。

gept.example_en: Please do not spill the beans about the surprise party we are planning.
gept.example_zh: 請別洩漏我們正在計畫的驚喜派對的秘密。

gept.example_en: His constant lying was the last straw that ended our long friendship.
gept.example_zh: 他不斷說謊是壓垮我們長久友誼的最後一根稻草。

gept.example_en: Losing that job turned out to be a blessing in disguise for him.
gept.example_zh: 失去那份工作對他來說反而是因禍得福。

gept.example_en: I really need to hit the books this weekend for next week's exam.
gept.example_zh: 為了下週的考試，我這個週末真的得好好用功讀書。

gept.example_en: The contractor cut corners on the construction, and now the walls are cracking.
gept.example_zh: 承包商在施工時偷工減料，現在牆壁都裂了。

gept.example_en: He got cold feet right before the wedding ceremony began that morning.
gept.example_zh: 婚禮儀式即將開始那個早上他臨陣退縮了。

gept.example_en: She is in hot water with her parents for staying out too late.
gept.example_zh: 她因在外面待太晚而和父母陷入麻煩。

gept.example_en: He has been on cloud nine ever since she agreed to marry him.
gept.example_zh: 自從她答應嫁給他後，他一直開心得飄飄然。

gept.example_en: Out of the blue, my old roommate sent me a long heartfelt letter.
gept.example_zh: 我的老室友突然寄給我一封長長的真情流露的信。

gept.example_en: My father and I rarely see eye to eye on political issues these days.
gept.example_zh: 我和父親近來在政治議題上很少能達成共識。

gept.example_en: The mayor has been under fire for his handling of the recent crisis.
gept.example_zh: 市長因處理近期危機的方式而備受批評。

gept.example_en: It took her years to come to terms with the loss of her father.
gept.example_zh: 她花了好幾年才接受失去父親的事實。

gept.example_en: In light of recent events, the company has revised its safety policies.
gept.example_zh: 鑑於近期發生的事件，公司已修訂其安全政策。

gept.example_en: With regard to your request, I will respond within twenty-four hours.
gept.example_zh: 關於您的請求，我會在二十四小時內回覆。

gept.example_en: On behalf of the entire team, I want to thank you sincerely.
gept.example_zh: 我謹代表整個團隊向您致上誠摯的感謝。

gept.example_en: In terms of cost, this option is clearly the most reasonable one.
gept.example_zh: 就成本而言，這個選項顯然是最合理的。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 引人入勝的；令人信服的
gept.example_en: She presented a compelling argument that convinced even the most skeptical members.
gept.example_zh: 她提出了一個有說服力的論點，連最持懷疑態度的成員都被說服。

gept.example_en: The artist created an intricate pattern of flowers and birds on the vase.
gept.example_zh: 這位藝術家在花瓶上創作了錯綜複雜的花鳥圖案。

gept.example_en: His explanation sounded plausible, but I still had some lingering doubts.
gept.example_zh: 他的解釋聽起來合理，但我仍有些揮之不去的疑慮。

gept.example_en: Online shopping has become increasingly prevalent among older consumers in recent years.
gept.example_zh: 近年來網路購物在年長消費者中越來越普遍。

gept.example_en: Clean drinking water remains scarce in many remote rural communities worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 在世界各地許多偏遠農村社區，乾淨的飲用水仍然稀缺。

gept.example_en: His ambiguous answer left everyone wondering what he really meant to say.
gept.example_zh: 他模稜兩可的回答讓每個人都在猜測他真正想表達什麼。

gept.example_en: The witnesses gave contradictory accounts of the accident to the investigators.
gept.example_zh: 目擊者向調查人員提供了對事故相互矛盾的陳述。

gept.example_en: She gave a coherent presentation that clearly explained the complex research findings.
gept.example_zh: 她做了一個連貫的簡報，清楚解釋了複雜的研究發現。

gept.example_en: His teacher had a profound influence on his decision to study philosophy.
gept.example_zh: 他的老師對他決定攻讀哲學產生了深遠的影響。

gept.example_en: There are subtle differences in meaning between these two similar English words.
gept.example_zh: 這兩個相似的英文單字在意義上有微妙的差異。

gept.example_en: The proposal is feasible, but it will require significant financial investment.
gept.example_zh: 這項提案是可行的，但需要大量的財務投資。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可實行的；可生存的
gept.example_en: Solar energy is becoming a viable alternative to traditional fossil fuels.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能正在成為傳統化石燃料的可行替代方案。

gept.example_en: Please give me a concise summary of the meeting's main points.
gept.example_zh: 請給我一份這次會議重點的簡潔摘要。

gept.example_en: There was an implicit understanding that we would not discuss the issue.
gept.example_zh: 我們之間有一種心照不宣的默契不討論這個議題。

gept.example_en: Change is inevitable in any organization that wants to remain relevant.
gept.example_zh: 在任何想保持競爭力的組織中，改變是不可避免的。

gept.example_en: The new policy will require a substantial amount of additional funding to implement.
gept.example_zh: 新政策的實施將需要大量額外的資金。

gept.example_en: She is meticulous about keeping accurate records of every business transaction.
gept.example_zh: 她對於保存每筆商業交易的準確紀錄一絲不苟。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 晦澀的；不為人知的
gept.example_en: The professor referenced an obscure poem that most students had never read.
gept.example_zh: 教授引用了一首大多數學生從未讀過的冷僻詩作。

gept.example_en: Please remove the redundant phrases to make your essay clearer and shorter.
gept.example_zh: 請刪除多餘的詞句，讓你的文章更清楚簡潔。

gept.example_en: Your personal opinions are completely irrelevant to this scientific discussion today.
gept.example_zh: 你的個人意見和今天這場科學討論完全無關。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 多用途的；多才多藝的
gept.example_en: This kitchen tool is versatile enough to handle almost any cooking task.
gept.example_zh: 這個廚房工具用途廣泛，幾乎能應付任何烹飪工作。

gept.example_en: Children are surprisingly resilient when facing difficult life changes and challenges.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在面對艱難的人生變化和挑戰時表現得出奇地有韌性。

gept.example_en: The main criterion for promotion is consistent excellent performance over several years.
gept.example_zh: 升遷的主要標準是多年來持續優異的表現。

gept.example_en: The discovery represented a paradigm shift in how scientists view human consciousness.
gept.example_zh: 這項發現代表了科學家看待人類意識的典範轉移。

gept.example_en: The implications of this research could change medicine for future generations entirely.
gept.example_zh: 這項研究的影響可能徹底改變未來世代的醫學。

gept.example_en: Scientists are still studying this strange weather phenomenon that appeared last summer.
gept.example_zh: 科學家仍在研究去年夏天出現的這種奇特氣象現象。

gept.example_en: The entire argument is based on a flawed premise about human nature.
gept.example_zh: 整個論點是建立在對人性的錯誤前提之上。

gept.example_en: Please explain the rationale behind your decision to leave the company.
gept.example_zh: 請解釋你決定離開公司背後的理由。

gept.example_en: Studies show a strong correlation between exercise and overall mental wellbeing.
gept.example_zh: 研究顯示運動與整體心理健康之間有強烈的相關性。

gept.example_en: There is a noticeable discrepancy between his statements and the actual evidence.
gept.example_zh: 他的陳述與實際證據之間存在明顯的差異。

gept.example_en: We should utilize all available resources to complete this important task efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 我們應該利用所有可用的資源來有效率地完成這項重要任務。

gept.example_en: The company will undertake a major restructuring project starting next quarter.
gept.example_zh: 公司將從下一季度開始進行重大的重組計畫。

gept.example_en: It took me hours to retrieve the deleted files from the old computer.
gept.example_zh: 我花了好幾個小時才從舊電腦中救回被刪除的檔案。

gept.example_en: The committee must allocate the limited budget among several competing departments.
gept.example_zh: 委員會必須在幾個競爭部門之間分配有限的預算。

gept.example_en: This material is strong enough to withstand extreme heat and pressure conditions.
gept.example_zh: 這種材料夠堅固，能承受極端的熱度與壓力。

gept.example_en: It takes years of hard work to attain such a high professional level.
gept.example_zh: 要達到如此高的專業水準需要多年的努力。

gept.example_en: The committee comprises members from various backgrounds and professional fields.
gept.example_zh: 該委員會由來自不同背景與專業領域的成員組成。

gept.example_en: Many English words derive from ancient Latin and Greek root forms.
gept.example_zh: 許多英語單字源自古代拉丁語和希臘語的字根。

gept.example_en: The team devised a clever plan to reduce costs without affecting quality.
gept.example_zh: 團隊想出了一個聰明的計畫，能降低成本而不影響品質。

gept.example_en: His enthusiasm for the project gradually diminished over the past several months.
gept.example_zh: 他對這項專案的熱情在過去幾個月逐漸減弱。

gept.example_en: Traveling to different countries can really enrich your understanding of the world.
gept.example_zh: 到不同國家旅行能真正豐富你對世界的理解。

gept.example_en: We will incorporate your feedback into the next version of the product.
gept.example_zh: 我們將把您的回饋意見納入產品的下一個版本。

gept.example_en: Positive feedback from teachers can reinforce good study habits among young students.
gept.example_zh: 來自老師的正面回饋能強化年輕學生的良好學習習慣。

gept.example_en: The road was difficult; nonetheless, we managed to reach the summit safely.
gept.example_zh: 這條路很難走，儘管如此，我們仍設法安全抵達了山頂。

gept.example_en: The weather has changed dramatically, and we must adjust our plans accordingly.
gept.example_zh: 天氣變化劇烈，我們必須相應地調整計畫。

gept.example_en: Some students enjoy group work; conversely, others prefer studying entirely alone quietly.
gept.example_zh: 有些學生喜歡小組合作，相反地，有些則偏好完全獨自安靜地學習。

gept.example_en: The bridge is closed for repairs; hence the heavy traffic on this side road.
gept.example_zh: 橋樑因維修而關閉，因此這條側道才會出現嚴重交通堵塞。

gept.example_en: She greeted everyone politely, and her brother behaved likewise throughout the dinner.
gept.example_zh: 她有禮貌地向每個人打招呼，而她的弟弟整個晚餐也表現得同樣有禮貌。

gept.example_en: Notwithstanding the challenges, the small team completed the project ahead of schedule.
gept.example_zh: 儘管面臨種種挑戰，這個小團隊仍提前完成了專案。

gept.example_en: You can take the train, or alternatively, we could drive there together.
gept.example_zh: 你可以搭火車，或者我們也可以一起開車過去。

gept.example_en: He has not arrived yet, presumably because of the heavy traffic downtown.
gept.example_zh: 他還沒到，想必是因為市中心交通堵塞的緣故。

gept.example_en: She is arguably the best player on the national women's basketball team.
gept.example_zh: 可以說她是國家女子籃球隊上最出色的球員。

gept.example_en: He felt deep resentment toward his brother for inheriting the family business.
gept.example_zh: 他對哥哥繼承家族事業感到深深的怨恨。

gept.example_en: The children stared in awe at the massive blue whale in the museum.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們驚嘆地凝視著博物館裡那條巨大的藍鯨。

gept.example_en: A sense of melancholy filled her heart as autumn leaves began falling.
gept.example_zh: 當秋葉開始飄落時，一股憂鬱湧上她的心頭。

gept.example_en: She dreaded the thought of speaking in front of a large audience.
gept.example_zh: 她一想到要在一大群觀眾面前演講就感到害怕。

gept.example_en: He found true contentment in simple things like reading and gardening.
gept.example_zh: 他在閱讀和園藝這類簡單的事物中找到了真正的滿足。

gept.example_en: She felt a strong yearning to return to her childhood hometown again.
gept.example_zh: 她對返回兒時故鄉懷有強烈的渴望。

gept.example_en: Sitting by the quiet lake at sunset was pure bliss for him.
gept.example_zh: 在日落時分坐在寧靜的湖邊對他來說是純粹的幸福。

gept.example_en: There is a wonderful serenity in this quiet old garden at dawn.
gept.example_zh: 這座寧靜的古老花園在黎明時分有種美妙的祥和感。

gept.example_en: She showed great compassion toward the homeless people in her community.
gept.example_zh: 她對社區裡的無家可歸者展現了極大的同情心。

gept.example_en: There was clear hostility between the two competing political party leaders.
gept.example_zh: 兩位競爭對手的政黨領袖之間明顯存在敵意。

gept.example_en: He agreed to help with great reluctance and an obvious sigh.
gept.example_zh: 他極不情願地嘆了一口氣後同意幫忙。

gept.example_en: Public sentiment about the new policy has shifted dramatically over recent months.
gept.example_zh: 近幾個月來，公眾對新政策的看法已大幅轉變。

gept.example_en: They will endeavor to complete the construction project before the rainy season.
gept.example_zh: 他們將努力在雨季來臨前完成這項建設工程。

gept.example_en: Language was the biggest obstacle she faced when she first moved abroad.
gept.example_zh: 語言是她剛搬到國外時面臨最大的障礙。

gept.example_en: The team suffered a major setback when their lead developer resigned.
gept.example_zh: 當主要開發人員辭職時，團隊遭遇了重大的挫折。

gept.example_en: Despite his many achievements, he always maintained genuine humility in public settings.
gept.example_zh: 儘管成就斐然，他在公開場合總是保持著真誠的謙遜。

gept.example_en: Please use your discretion when handling such sensitive customer information at work.
gept.example_zh: 在工作中處理這類敏感的客戶資訊時請審慎使用判斷力。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 故意的；仔細考慮
gept.example_en: The committee will deliberate carefully before announcing the final winner tomorrow afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 委員會在明天下午宣布最終得獎者之前會仔細審議。

gept.example_en: We must always strive for excellence in every project we undertake together.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一起進行的每個專案中都必須努力追求卓越。

gept.example_en: The twin sisters resemble each other so closely that even friends confuse them.
gept.example_zh: 這對雙胞胎姐妹長得如此相似，連朋友都會認錯。

gept.example_en: Her latest novel has surpassed all of her previous bestselling works combined.
gept.example_zh: 她最新的小說已經超越了她過去所有暢銷作品的總和。

gept.example_en: This new software will facilitate communication among employees in different time zones.
gept.example_zh: 這款新軟體將促進處於不同時區的員工之間的溝通。

gept.example_en: It is pointless to speculate about what might have happened that fateful night.
gept.example_zh: 猜測那個命運攸關的夜晚可能發生了什麼事是徒勞的。

gept.example_en: Please refrain from using your mobile phone during the live performance tonight.
gept.example_zh: 請在今晚的現場表演期間克制使用手機。

gept.example_en: He decided to abstain from drinking alcohol completely for personal health reasons.
gept.example_zh: 他基於個人健康因素決定完全戒酒。

gept.example_en: The teacher had to intervene when the argument between students became physical.
gept.example_zh: 當學生間的爭吵演變成肢體衝突時，老師不得不介入。

gept.example_en: The pleasant smell of homemade cookies lingered in the kitchen for hours.
gept.example_zh: 自製餅乾的香氣在廚房裡縈繞了好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: I reckon it will take us at least four hours to finish.
gept.example_zh: 我估計我們至少需要四個小時才能完成。

gept.example_en: The lawyer was able to refute every claim made by the opposing side.
gept.example_zh: 那位律師能夠反駁對方所提出的每一項主張。

gept.example_en: There are growing calls to abolish the outdated school dress code policy.
gept.example_zh: 越來越多人呼籲廢除這項過時的學校服裝規定。

gept.example_en: It is the police department's duty to enforce traffic laws fairly and consistently.
gept.example_zh: 警察部門有責任公平且一致地執行交通法規。

gept.example_en: This conference room can comfortably accommodate up to fifty people seated.
gept.example_zh: 這間會議室可以舒適地容納多達五十人就座。

gept.example_en: The airline agreed to compensate passengers for the inconvenience of the long delay.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司同意補償乘客因長時間延誤帶來的不便。

gept.example_en: The two old friends continued to correspond by letter for many decades.
gept.example_zh: 這兩位老朋友持續以書信往來了好幾十年。

gept.example_en: Their wedding anniversary happens to coincide with our annual family vacation.
gept.example_zh: 他們的結婚紀念日剛好與我們每年的家庭度假同一天。

gept.example_en: Two cars collided at the busy intersection during yesterday's evening rush hour.
gept.example_zh: 兩輛汽車在昨晚的尖峰時段於繁忙的十字路口相撞。

gept.example_en: The unexpected storm disrupted all weekend events scheduled at the outdoor festival.
gept.example_zh: 這場突如其來的暴風雨擾亂了戶外節慶安排的所有週末活動。

gept.example_en: All employees must adhere to the new company policies starting from next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 所有員工從下週一起必須遵守新的公司政策。

gept.example_en: He had to resort to borrowing money from his elderly parents reluctantly.
gept.example_zh: 他不得不勉強訴諸向年邁的父母借錢。

gept.example_en: The photo was ruined by too much exposure to bright sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 這張照片因為陽光曝光過度而毀了。

gept.example_en: He mounted the camera on a tripod to keep the shot steady.
gept.example_zh: 他把相機架在三腳架上以保持畫面穩定。

gept.example_en: Always replace the lens cap to protect the glass from scratches.
gept.example_zh: 請隨時蓋上鏡頭蓋以保護鏡片免於刮傷。

gept.example_en: The shutter clicked as he captured the perfect sunset moment.
gept.example_zh: 當他捕捉完美的夕陽瞬間時，快門喀嚓一聲響起。

gept.example_en: She developed her film negatives in the darkroom every weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她每個週末都在暗房沖洗她的底片。

gept.example_en: He used a chisel to carve intricate patterns into the wooden chair.
gept.example_zh: 他用鑿子在木椅上雕刻複雜的圖案。

gept.example_en: Smooth the edges with sandpaper before applying a coat of varnish.
gept.example_zh: 在上清漆之前先用砂紙磨平邊緣。

gept.example_en: He carried a heavy plank of oak into the workshop yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 他昨天把一塊厚重的橡木板搬進工作坊。

gept.example_en: Apply two coats of varnish to protect the wooden surface from moisture.
gept.example_zh: 塗上兩層清漆以保護木質表面不受潮。

gept.example_en: She bought soft wool yarn to knit a winter scarf for her mother.
gept.example_zh: 她買了柔軟的羊毛線，要為母親編織一條冬天的圍巾。

gept.example_en: Her grandmother taught her delicate needlework when she was only seven.
gept.example_zh: 她祖母在她七歲時就教她精緻的針線活。

gept.example_en: The artist set up her easel by the window for natural lighting.
gept.example_zh: 那位藝術家在窗邊架起畫架以利用自然光。

gept.example_en: She used clippers to trim the overgrown hedge along the fence.
gept.example_zh: 她用修枝剪修剪沿著籬笆過長的樹籬。

gept.example_en: The paramedic arrived quickly and stabilized the injured cyclist on the road.
gept.example_zh: 急救員迅速抵達，並在路上穩定了受傷的自行車騎士。

gept.example_en: The veterinarian gave our puppy a checkup and required vaccinations today.
gept.example_zh: 獸醫今天替我們的小狗做了健康檢查和必要的疫苗接種。

gept.example_en: After losing her keys, she called a locksmith to change the lock.
gept.example_zh: 弄丟鑰匙後，她叫了鎖匠來更換門鎖。

gept.example_en: The florist arranged a beautiful bouquet of roses for the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 花商為婚禮準備了一束美麗的玫瑰花。

gept.example_en: The mason laid bricks carefully to construct the new garden wall.
gept.example_zh: 泥水匠小心翼翼地砌磚建造新的花園圍牆。

gept.example_en: The welder joined the steel pipes together using a bright torch flame.
gept.example_zh: 焊工用明亮的焊槍火焰把鋼管焊接在一起。

gept.example_en: The chemist conducted experiments in the laboratory to develop a new compound.
gept.example_zh: 化學家在實驗室進行實驗以研發一種新化合物。

gept.example_en: A surveyor measured the boundary lines before construction of the building began.
gept.example_zh: 在建築物施工開始前測量員測量了邊界線。

gept.example_en: The narrow peninsula juts into the warm blue sea for several miles.
gept.example_zh: 這個狹長的半島延伸入溫暖的蔚藍海中好幾英里。

gept.example_en: The high plateau offered a breathtaking view of the snowy mountain ranges.
gept.example_zh: 這片高原展現了壯觀雪山連綿的景色。

gept.example_en: The narrow gorge was carved by a powerful river over many centuries.
gept.example_zh: 這個狹窄的峽谷是數個世紀以來由一條強力河流刻鑿而成。

gept.example_en: The massive glacier has been slowly retreating due to rising global temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 這片巨大冰河因全球氣溫上升正在慢慢退縮。

gept.example_en: They hiked along the rim of the canyon at sunset for amazing views.
gept.example_zh: 他們在日落時沿著大峽谷邊緣健行以欣賞壯麗景色。

gept.example_en: Wildflowers bloomed across the green meadow throughout the warm spring months.
gept.example_zh: 野花在溫暖的春季月份遍布整片綠色草地綻放。

gept.example_en: The swamp was home to alligators, snakes, and many rare birds.
gept.example_zh: 沼澤是短吻鱷、蛇和許多稀有鳥類的棲息地。

gept.example_en: The clear blue lagoon was perfect for swimming and snorkeling all day.
gept.example_zh: 清澈的藍色潟湖整天都很適合游泳和浮潛。

gept.example_en: Divers explored the colorful coral reef teeming with tropical fish species.
gept.example_zh: 潛水員探索了滿是熱帶魚種色彩繽紛的珊瑚礁。

gept.example_en: Ships pass through the narrow strait between the two large islands daily.
gept.example_zh: 船隻每天穿越兩座大島之間的狹窄海峽。

gept.example_en: Several aftershocks continued to rattle the city for days after the earthquake.
gept.example_zh: 地震後好幾次餘震持續震撼這座城市好幾天。

gept.example_en: Cold sleet pelted the windows during the long winter storm last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚漫長的冬季暴風中冰冷的雨夾雪打在窗戶上。

gept.example_en: A thick haze settled over the city, reducing visibility on the highways.
gept.example_zh: 濃厚的薄霧籠罩著城市，降低了高速公路上的能見度。

gept.example_en: She baked a chicken casserole with vegetables for the family dinner tonight.
gept.example_zh: 她為今晚的家庭晚餐烤了一道有蔬菜的雞肉砂鍋菜。

gept.example_en: The chef prepared a tangy marinade of soy sauce, garlic, and ginger.
gept.example_zh: 廚師調製了一種帶有醬油、大蒜和薑的酸甜醃料。

gept.example_en: He cooked a fluffy omelette stuffed with cheese, mushrooms, and chopped ham.
gept.example_zh: 他煮了一個鬆軟的煎蛋捲，裡面包了起司、蘑菇和切碎的火腿。

gept.example_en: The hatchback is perfect for city driving and weekend grocery trips.
gept.example_zh: 這款掀背車非常適合在城市開車和週末買菜。

gept.example_en: We started a carpool with three coworkers to save on gas money.
gept.example_zh: 我們和三位同事開始共乘以節省油錢。

gept.example_en: He moved the gearshift into reverse and slowly backed out of the driveway.
gept.example_zh: 他把排檔桿打到倒車檔並緩緩從車道倒出來。

gept.example_en: The odometer showed that the old car had traveled over two hundred thousand kilometers.
gept.example_zh: 里程表顯示這輛老車已行駛超過二十萬公里。

gept.example_en: The orthopedics department specializes in treating problems with bones and joints.
gept.example_zh: 骨科部門專門治療骨骼和關節相關的問題。

gept.example_en: She visited the dermatology clinic to treat the persistent rash on her arm.
gept.example_zh: 她到皮膚科診所治療她手臂上持續不退的紅疹。

gept.example_en: The pediatrics ward was decorated with bright colors to comfort young patients.
gept.example_zh: 小兒科病房以鮮豔色彩裝飾以安撫年幼的病人。

gept.example_en: He was referred to cardiology after experiencing chest pain and shortness of breath.
gept.example_zh: 他在出現胸痛和呼吸急促後被轉介到心臟科。

gept.example_en: Childhood immunization protects kids from many serious and preventable diseases.
gept.example_zh: 兒童預防接種能保護孩子免受許多嚴重且可預防的疾病。

gept.example_en: Doctors must sterilize all surgical instruments before any operation begins.
gept.example_zh: 醫生在任何手術開始前必須將所有手術器械消毒。

gept.example_en: The doctor placed the stethoscope on his chest to check his heartbeat.
gept.example_zh: 醫生把聽診器放在他的胸口檢查心跳。

gept.example_en: The nurse filled the syringe carefully before administering the flu vaccine.
gept.example_zh: 護士在施打流感疫苗前小心地把注射器裝滿。

gept.example_en: The fall of the Berlin Wall began a new epoch in European history.
gept.example_zh: 柏林圍牆的倒塌開啟了歐洲歷史的一個新紀元。

gept.example_en: We will be away on holiday for a fortnight starting next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 我們從下星期一開始將出外度假兩週。

gept.example_en: A playful otter floated on its back, cracking open a clam shell.
gept.example_zh: 一隻頑皮的水獺仰躺漂浮著，敲開一顆蛤蜊殼。

gept.example_en: A green mantis sat perfectly still on the leaf waiting to ambush insects.
gept.example_zh: 一隻綠色螳螂一動不動地坐在葉子上等待伏擊昆蟲。

gept.example_en: The small hedgehog curled into a spiky ball when it sensed danger.
gept.example_zh: 當感到危險時，那隻小刺蝟蜷縮成一顆帶刺的球。

gept.example_en: A curious raccoon raided our garbage cans every single night last week.
gept.example_zh: 上週每晚都有一隻好奇的浣熊翻找我們的垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: The huge hippopotamus stayed in the river to cool off during the heat.
gept.example_zh: 那隻巨大的河馬待在河裡以在炎熱中降溫。

gept.example_en: The rhinoceros has been hunted nearly to extinction for its valuable horn.
gept.example_zh: 犀牛因其珍貴的角而被獵殺到近乎絕種。

gept.example_en: A flock of pink flamingo gathered at the shallow lake every evening.
gept.example_zh: 一群粉紅色的紅鶴每天傍晚都聚集在淺湖邊。

gept.example_en: The woodpecker tapped rhythmically against the trunk searching for hidden insects.
gept.example_zh: 啄木鳥有節奏地敲擊樹幹尋找藏身的昆蟲。

gept.example_en: The magnolia tree in our yard produces beautiful white flowers every spring.
gept.example_zh: 我們院子裡的木蘭樹每年春天都開出美麗的白色花朵。

gept.example_en: Thick green ivy climbed up the old stone walls of the historic mansion.
gept.example_zh: 濃密的綠色常春藤爬上了那座歷史豪宅的舊石牆。

gept.example_en: Tall cypress trees lined both sides of the long driveway to the estate.
gept.example_zh: 高大的柏樹排列在通往莊園長車道的兩側。

gept.example_en: The white birch trees stood out against the dark green pine forest.
gept.example_zh: 白色的樺樹在深綠色的松樹林中格外醒目。

gept.example_en: The carpenter chose cedar wood for its pleasant smell and natural durability.
gept.example_zh: 木匠選擇雪松木是因為它宜人的氣味和天然耐用性。

gept.example_en: The piercing on her earlobe healed quickly after just two short weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她耳垂上的穿洞只用了兩個短短的星期就癒合了。

gept.example_en: His charming dimple appeared every time he gave us a wide smile.
gept.example_zh: 每次他露出燦爛笑容時迷人的酒窩就會出現。

gept.example_en: A small freckle appeared on her nose after the long summer holiday.
gept.example_zh: 漫長的暑假後她鼻子上出現了一個小雀斑。

gept.example_en: The polyester shirt dries quickly but does not feel as soft as cotton.
gept.example_zh: 這件聚酯纖維襯衫乾得很快，但摸起來不像棉那麼柔軟。

gept.example_en: They installed a beautiful black granite countertop in their newly renovated kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 他們在新翻修的廚房裡安裝了美麗的黑色花崗岩檯面。

gept.example_en: The delicate porcelain teacups were a wedding gift from her grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 這些精緻的瓷器茶杯是她祖母送的結婚禮物。

gept.example_en: She used a hole punch to prepare the documents for the new binder.
gept.example_zh: 她用打孔器為新文件夾打孔準備這些文件。

gept.example_en: He pinned the schedule to the corkboard with a small red thumbtack.
gept.example_zh: 他用一個小紅圖釘把行程表釘在軟木板上。

gept.example_en: He used correction fluid to cover the mistake in his handwritten essay.
gept.example_zh: 他用修正液蓋住他手寫文章中的錯誤。

gept.example_en: She has been playing the clarinet in the school band for three years.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校樂隊吹單簧管已經三年了。

gept.example_en: The trombone player slid the brass tube smoothly to change musical notes.
gept.example_zh: 長號演奏者順暢地滑動黃銅管來變換音符。

gept.example_en: He carried a small harmonica in his pocket to play during long bus rides.
gept.example_zh: 他口袋裡放著一個小口琴在長途巴士旅程中演奏。

gept.example_en: The child shook the tambourine cheerfully in time with the lively music.
gept.example_zh: 小孩興高采烈地隨著歡快的音樂搖動鈴鼓。

gept.example_en: They rented a kayak to paddle along the calm coastal waters together.
gept.example_zh: 他們租了一艘皮艇沿著平靜的沿海水域一起划行。

gept.example_en: She threw the javelin further than anyone else at the regional competition.
gept.example_zh: 她在區域比賽中投擲標槍的距離比其他人都遠。

gept.example_en: He set a new school record in the shot put event this weekend.
gept.example_zh: 他這個週末在鉛球項目創下了新的學校紀錄。

gept.example_en: She balanced on the paddleboard for the first time without falling off.
gept.example_zh: 她第一次在槳板上保持平衡而沒有掉下去。

gept.example_en: They tossed a colorful frisbee back and forth on the sunny beach.
gept.example_zh: 他們在陽光普照的沙灘上來回拋著彩色飛盤。

gept.example_en: The children bounced happily on the backyard trampoline for an entire afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在後院的彈簧床上開心地彈跳了一整個下午。

gept.example_en: They used a sturdy pulley system to lift heavy materials up the scaffold.
gept.example_zh: 他們用堅固的滑輪系統把重物吊上鷹架。

gept.example_en: Students use a protractor to measure angles precisely in geometry class.
gept.example_zh: 學生在幾何課上使用量角器精確測量角度。

gept.example_en: His grandfather still uses an old wooden abacus to calculate household expenses.
gept.example_zh: 他祖父仍然用一個古老的木製算盤計算家庭開支。

gept.example_en: The old hourglass slowly drained sand from the top chamber to the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 那個古老的沙漏緩緩地把沙從上層流到下層。

gept.example_en: A stone sundial sat in the center of the carefully maintained garden.
gept.example_zh: 一座石製日晷立在精心維護的花園中央。

gept.example_en: He poured the red wine carefully into a tall crystal goblet.
gept.example_zh: 他小心地把紅酒倒進一個高高的水晶高腳杯裡。

gept.example_en: She placed the teacup gently on the matching porcelain saucer.
gept.example_zh: 她輕輕地把茶杯放在配套的瓷茶碟上。

gept.example_en: Drain the cooked pasta in a colander before adding the rich tomato sauce.
gept.example_zh: 在加入濃郁的番茄醬之前先用濾鍋瀝乾煮好的義大利麵。

gept.example_en: She used a wide spatula to flip the pancakes without breaking them.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把寬寬的鍋鏟翻煎餅，沒有把它們弄破。

gept.example_en: He used long metal tongs to turn the steaks on the hot grill.
gept.example_zh: 他用長長的金屬夾子在熱烤架上翻動牛排。

gept.example_en: Use a grater to shred the cheese finely over the pasta before serving.
gept.example_zh: 上菜前用磨碎器將起司細細刨在義大利麵上。

gept.example_en: She used a sharp peeler to remove the skin from each potato quickly.
gept.example_zh: 她用一把鋒利的削皮器快速地把每顆馬鈴薯削皮。

gept.example_en: Sift the flour through a fine sieve to remove any small lumps.
gept.example_zh: 用細篩過篩麵粉以去除任何小結塊。

gept.example_en: He served the hearty vegetable soup with a large wooden ladle.
gept.example_zh: 他用一支大的木製長柄勺盛上豐盛的蔬菜湯。

gept.example_en: He twisted the corkscrew into the wine bottle and pulled out the cork.
gept.example_zh: 他把開瓶器旋入葡萄酒瓶中並拔出軟木塞。

gept.example_en: He caught a large trout in the mountain stream early that morning.
gept.example_zh: 他那天清晨在山溪中釣到一條大鱒魚。

gept.example_en: He spread sardine paste on toasted bread for a quick afternoon snack.
gept.example_zh: 他把沙丁魚醬塗在烤麵包上當作快速的下午點心。

gept.example_en: Barley is one of the oldest grains used to make hearty beer.
gept.example_zh: 大麥是用來釀造豐厚啤酒最古老的穀物之一。

gept.example_en: She eats a warm bowl of oats with honey and berries every morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上吃一碗加蜂蜜和莓果的溫暖燕麥粥。

gept.example_en: She sliced the crisp red radish thinly to add to the fresh salad.
gept.example_zh: 她把脆脆的紅蘿蔔切薄片加入新鮮沙拉中。

gept.example_en: He sautéed zucchini with onions and fresh basil for a light dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他用洋蔥和新鮮羅勒拌炒櫛瓜當作清淡的晚餐。

gept.example_en: He topped the cheesecake with fresh raspberry and a drizzle of chocolate.
gept.example_zh: 他在起司蛋糕上放上新鮮覆盆子並淋上巧克力。

gept.example_en: Ripe papaya is a sweet tropical fruit that aids healthy digestion.
gept.example_zh: 成熟的木瓜是一種能幫助健康消化的甜美熱帶水果。

gept.example_en: The ruby red pomegranate seeds added color and crunch to the salad.
gept.example_zh: 紅寶石般的石榴籽為沙拉增添了色彩和脆感。

gept.example_en: Roasted chestnut tastes wonderful on cold winter evenings near the fireplace.
gept.example_zh: 烤栗子在寒冷的冬夜爐火旁吃起來非常美味。

gept.example_en: He snacked on roasted cashew nuts during the long evening movie session.
gept.example_zh: 他在漫長的晚間電影時段中吃烤腰果當點心。

gept.example_en: He preferred black licorice over chocolate, though most of his friends disagreed.
gept.example_zh: 他比較喜歡黑色甘草糖勝過巧克力，雖然他大多朋友不同意。

gept.example_en: The children roasted marshmallow over the campfire on long wooden sticks.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們用長長的木棍在營火上烤棉花糖。

gept.example_en: He chewed the sticky toffee carefully, worried about damaging his dental work.
gept.example_zh: 他小心地嚼著黏黏的太妃糖，擔心會弄壞他的牙齒治療。

gept.example_en: Citizens voted in a national referendum to decide whether to join the alliance.
gept.example_zh: 公民們在全國公投中投票決定是否加入該聯盟。

gept.example_en: The old statute was finally repealed after decades of public criticism.
gept.example_zh: 那條古老的法規在數十年的公眾批評後終於被廢除。

gept.example_en: The small nation fought hard to protect its sovereignty from foreign interference.
gept.example_zh: 這個小國奮力保護其主權免受外國干涉。
