gept.example_en: A small tremor shook the building but caused no real damage.
gept.example_zh: 一陣輕微的震動搖晃了建築物但未造成實質損害。

gept.example_en: The mountaintop observatory offers visitors a stunning view of the stars.
gept.example_zh: 山頂上的天文台讓訪客欣賞令人驚嘆的星空。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 氣象學家；氣象預報員
gept.example_en: The meteorologist warned of heavy storms later in the week.
gept.example_zh: 氣象預報員警告本週稍晚將有強烈暴風雨。

gept.example_en: Always check your shoes for a scorpion when camping in the desert.
gept.example_zh: 在沙漠露營時，務必檢查鞋裡有沒有蠍子。

gept.example_en: A herd of antelope raced across the open plain at sunset.
gept.example_zh: 一群羚羊在日落時奔馳過開闊的平原。

gept.example_en: The cheetah is the fastest land animal over short distances.
gept.example_zh: 獵豹是短距離內陸地上最快的動物。

gept.example_en: The virtual machine reads bytecode produced by the compiler and runs it efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 虛擬機讀取編譯器產生的位元組碼，並有效率地執行它。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 將分支變基於另一個基底
gept.example_en: Junior engineers often hesitate to rebase because they fear losing local commits.
gept.example_zh: 資淺工程師常常不敢 rebase，因為怕弄丟本機的提交。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 暫存未提交的變更
gept.example_en: Stash your unfinished changes so you can pull the latest fix from main.
gept.example_zh: 先把未完成的變更 stash 起來，這樣才能從 main 拉最新修正。

gept.example_en: Every pull-request needs at least one approval and a green build before merging.
gept.example_zh: 每個合併請求在合併前都需要至少一個核可和綠燈的建置。

gept.example_en: We hit a nasty merge-conflict in the shared config file during the late rebase.
gept.example_zh: 我們在晚一步 rebase 時，在共用設定檔遇到很麻煩的合併衝突。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 摘取特定提交合併
gept.example_en: Just cherry-pick the bug fix into the hotfix branch instead of merging everything.
gept.example_zh: 只要把該修正的提交 cherry-pick 到 hotfix 分支，不需整支合進來。

gept.example_en: The team applied a hotpatch in production to stop the runaway memory leak.
gept.example_zh: 團隊在正式環境套了一個熱修補，止住失控的記憶體外洩。

gept.example_en: We will freeze features and label the next build as a release-candidate tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 我們明天會凍結功能，把下一個建置標記為候選版本。

gept.example_en: Add a milestone-tag so the marketing team can find this build in our archive.
gept.example_zh: 加上里程碑標籤，讓行銷團隊能在封存中找到這個建置。

gept.example_en: The scaffold-cli created the folder structure and config files in under ten seconds.
gept.example_zh: 樣板產生工具在十秒內就建好資料夾結構與設定檔。

gept.example_en: Generators eliminate boilerplate-code so engineers can focus on real business logic.
gept.example_zh: 產生器去掉樣板程式碼，讓工程師專心處理真正的商業邏輯。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 冒煙測試（基本功能檢查）
gept.example_en: Run a quick smoke-test on staging before promoting the build to real customers.
gept.example_zh: 在把建置推給真實顧客前，先在預備環境跑一輪冒煙測試。

gept.example_en: Our integration-test spins up the full container stack and hits real database tables.
gept.example_zh: 我們的整合測試會啟動完整容器堆疊，並真正打到資料庫表。

gept.example_en: A good unit-test runs in milliseconds and never depends on the network or the disk.
gept.example_zh: 好的單元測試只跑幾毫秒，而且不依賴網路或硬碟。

gept.example_en: An end-to-end test simulates a real user clicking through the entire checkout flow.
gept.example_zh: 端到端測試會模擬真實使用者點完整個結帳流程。

gept.example_en: The stress-test pushed five times normal traffic and exposed a slow database query.
gept.example_zh: 壓力測試丟出五倍的正常流量，揭露了一個慢查詢。

gept.example_en: We scheduled the load-test for midnight to avoid disturbing weekday business traffic.
gept.example_zh: 我們把負載測試排在午夜，避免影響平日的業務流量。

gept.example_en: After every bug fix, a new regression-test is added so the same issue never returns.
gept.example_zh: 每修一個錯誤就會加一個回歸測試，確保同樣問題不再出現。

gept.example_en: The test-runner displays nicely colored output and a summary at the end of the run.
gept.example_zh: 測試執行器會印出彩色輸出，並在最後給一份結果摘要。

gept.example_en: Place each spec-file next to the source it tests so the structure stays easy to scan.
gept.example_zh: 把每個規格檔放在它測試的原始碼旁邊，結構才好瀏覽。

gept.example_en: A snapshot-test catches accidental UI changes by comparing rendered output to a saved copy.
gept.example_zh: 快照測試藉由比對渲染結果與已存版本，攔截意外的 UI 變動。

gept.example_en: A test-double can be a mock, a stub, or a fake depending on what the test needs.
gept.example_zh: 依測試需要，測試替身可以是 mock、stub 或 fake。

gept.example_en: Fuzzing the parser uncovered three crashes caused by unusual unicode input strings.
gept.example_zh: 對解析器做模糊測試，挖出三個由奇怪 Unicode 輸入造成的當機。

gept.example_en: Linting catches stylistic problems automatically so reviews can focus on real design issues.
gept.example_zh: 風格檢查自動抓掉樣式問題，讓審查能聚焦在真正的設計議題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 程式碼格式化工具
gept.example_en: Configure the formatter to run on save so every commit lands with consistent styling.
gept.example_zh: 設定格式化工具於存檔時執行，讓每筆提交都保有一致風格。

gept.example_en: The type-checker complained about a nullable field we forgot to handle explicitly.
gept.example_zh: 型別檢查器抱怨我們忘了明確處理一個可為空的欄位。

gept.example_en: Generics let you write a queue that works for strings, numbers, and custom objects.
gept.example_zh: 泛型讓你寫一個能同時服務字串、數字和自訂物件的佇列。

gept.example_en: The decorator wraps the function to log execution time without changing its body.
gept.example_zh: 裝飾器包住函式來記錄執行時間，卻不改動函式本體。

gept.example_en: The inner function forms a closure that captures the counter variable for later use.
gept.example_zh: 內層函式形成一個閉包，捕捉計數變數以供日後使用。

gept.example_en: Hoisting can confuse newcomers because declarations appear to move to the top.
gept.example_zh: 變數提升常讓新手困惑，因為宣告看起來像移到了最上面。

gept.example_en: Reduce accidental bugs by limiting mutability and preferring immutable data structures.
gept.example_zh: 限制可變性、改用不可變資料結構，能減少意外的錯誤。

gept.example_en: The garbage-collector reclaims memory automatically when no references remain alive.
gept.example_zh: 當沒有任何活著的參考時，垃圾回收器會自動回收記憶體。

gept.example_en: A subtle memory-leak in the cache slowly consumed all available heap space overnight.
gept.example_zh: 快取中一個不易察覺的記憶體洩漏，一夜之間吃光所有可用堆積空間。

gept.example_en: We hit a race-condition where two requests updated the counter at the same moment.
gept.example_zh: 我們遇到競態條件：兩個請求在同一瞬間更新了計數器。

gept.example_en: Use a mutex around the shared queue so only one thread can modify it at a time.
gept.example_zh: 用互斥鎖保護共享佇列，讓同一時間只有一個執行緒能修改它。

gept.example_en: The semaphore limits how many workers can access the file system simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 這個號誌限制同時能存取檔案系統的工作者數量。

gept.example_en: Never block the event-loop with heavy work or all incoming requests will pile up.
gept.example_zh: 千萬別用繁重工作阻塞事件迴圈，否則所有進來的請求都會堆積。

gept.example_en: A coroutine pauses voluntarily and lets other tasks run on the same thread efficiently.
gept.example_zh: 協程會主動暫停，讓同一執行緒上的其他任務有效率地執行。

gept.example_en: Use a generator-function to stream millions of rows without loading them all at once.
gept.example_zh: 用生成器函式串流上百萬列資料，免得一次全部載入記憶體。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 可疊代的；可疊代物件
gept.example_en: Any iterable can be expanded into an array with the spread operator in modern syntax.
gept.example_zh: 在現代語法中，任何可疊代物件都能用展開運算子變成陣列。

gept.example_en: A linked-list supports cheap insertion in the middle but slower random index access.
gept.example_zh: 鏈結串列在中間插入很便宜，但隨機索引存取較慢。

gept.example_en: Store user lookups in a hashmap so each access is amortized constant time on average.
gept.example_zh: 把使用者查詢存進雜湊表，平均每次存取均攤是常數時間。

gept.example_en: A well-tuned hashtable resizes lazily and keeps the load factor in a healthy range.
gept.example_zh: 調校良好的雜湊表會延遲重新調整大小，並讓負載因子維持健康。

gept.example_en: Each tree-node holds a value and a list of pointers to its children for traversal.
gept.example_zh: 每個樹節點存著一個值，以及指向子節點的指標清單，方便走訪。

gept.example_en: An in-order traversal visits the left child first, then the node, then the right child.
gept.example_zh: 中序走訪先拜訪左子，再拜訪節點，最後拜訪右子。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大 O 表示法
gept.example_en: Engineers describe scaling behavior in big-o notation when comparing different approaches.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在比較不同做法時，會用大 O 表示法描述擴展性。

gept.example_en: Memoize the expensive function so repeated calls with the same arguments return instantly.
gept.example_zh: 把耗時函式記憶化，相同參數的重複呼叫就能立刻回傳。

gept.example_en: Memoization is especially effective when the dynamic programming subproblems overlap.
gept.example_zh: 當動態規劃的子問題互相重疊時，記憶化特別有效。

gept.example_en: Backtracking explores choices step by step and undoes them whenever the path fails.
gept.example_zh: 回溯演算法逐步嘗試選擇，遇到失敗的路徑就撤回。

gept.example_en: Dynamic-programming shines when a problem has overlapping subproblems and optimal substructure.
gept.example_zh: 當問題具有重疊子問題與最佳子結構時，動態規劃最能發揮。

gept.example_en: Merge sort uses divide-and-conquer to split the array, sort halves, and merge them back.
gept.example_zh: 合併排序用分治法切開陣列、各半排序，再合併回來。

gept.example_en: Make the configuration object a singleton so every module shares the exact same instance.
gept.example_zh: 把設定物件做成單例，讓每個模組共享同一個實例。

gept.example_en: The factory-method hides the concrete class behind an interface every caller can rely on.
gept.example_zh: 工廠方法把具體類別藏在每個呼叫端都能信賴的介面背後。

gept.example_en: The observer-pattern notifies all listeners whenever the underlying data store updates.
gept.example_zh: 觀察者模式會在底層資料變更時通知所有訂閱者。

gept.example_en: An adapter-pattern bridges the new logger API with the legacy interface still in use.
gept.example_zh: 配接器模式銜接新的記錄器 API 與仍在使用的舊介面。

gept.example_en: Introduce a decoupling-layer so swapping the database vendor later becomes much easier.
gept.example_zh: 加上一層解耦層，日後要換資料庫廠商會輕鬆許多。

gept.example_en: Dependency-injection makes the service easier to test because we can supply fake clients.
gept.example_zh: 依賴注入讓服務更好測，因為可以傳入假的用戶端。

gept.example_en: Inversion-of-control lets the framework call our code, instead of us calling the framework.
gept.example_zh: 控制反轉讓框架去呼叫我們的程式碼，而不是我們去呼叫框架。

gept.example_en: Business rules live in the service-layer so controllers stay thin and easy to test.
gept.example_zh: 商業規則放在服務層，控制器就能保持輕薄又好測試。

gept.example_en: The viewmodel exposes only the data the page needs and hides every internal detail.
gept.example_zh: 視圖模型只暴露頁面需要的資料，藏起所有內部細節。

gept.example_en: The repository-layer wraps queries so the service layer never talks to SQL directly.
gept.example_zh: 資料倉儲層包住查詢，讓服務層完全不直接面對 SQL。

gept.example_en: An orm maps database rows to objects so the team can write fewer raw SQL statements.
gept.example_zh: ORM 把資料表列對應到物件，讓團隊能少寫許多原生 SQL。

gept.example_en: Run the seeder to populate the local database with demo accounts and sample orders.
gept.example_zh: 執行種子腳本，把本機資料庫填上示範帳號和範例訂單。

gept.example_en: Wrap the two updates in a transaction-block so partial failure leaves no inconsistent data.
gept.example_zh: 把兩個更新包進交易區塊，部分失敗時不會留下不一致資料。

gept.example_en: Have the rollback-script ready before launch so we can revert quickly if things go wrong.
gept.example_zh: 在上線前準備好回退腳本，出狀況時才能迅速還原。

gept.example_en: A stored-procedure can encapsulate complex business logic close to the data itself.
gept.example_zh: 預存程序能把複雜的商業邏輯封裝在貼近資料的地方。

gept.example_en: Generate a uuid for each request so it can be traced through every downstream service.
gept.example_zh: 為每個請求產生一個 UUID，方便在每個下游服務追蹤。

gept.example_en: Sharding spreads users across servers, but adds complexity for cross-shard transactions.
gept.example_zh: 資料分片把使用者分散到不同伺服器，但跨分片交易會變複雜。

gept.example_en: Replication keeps a standby database in sync so we can fail over within a few seconds.
gept.example_zh: 資料複寫讓備援資料庫保持同步，幾秒內就能切換接管。

gept.example_en: A background indexer rebuilds the search index every hour to keep results fresh.
gept.example_zh: 背景索引服務每小時重建一次搜尋索引，讓結果保持新鮮。

gept.example_en: Adding a search-index for the title column dropped query times from seconds to milliseconds.
gept.example_zh: 為標題欄位建搜尋索引後，查詢時間從幾秒降到幾毫秒。

gept.example_en: A high cache-hit ratio means most reads never reach the slower upstream database.
gept.example_zh: 高快取命中率代表大多數讀取根本不會走到較慢的上游資料庫。

gept.example_en: Every cache-miss triggers a fresh fetch and warms the cache for subsequent requests.
gept.example_zh: 每次快取未命中都會觸發一次重新抓取，並為後續請求預熱快取。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 存活時間（資料有效期）
gept.example_en: Set a short ttl on session tokens so stolen credentials lose value almost immediately.
gept.example_zh: 為登入權杖設定較短的存活時間，被偷的憑證幾乎立刻失效。

gept.example_en: Each browser cookie stores a session-id that the server maps to a user record server-side.
gept.example_zh: 瀏覽器 cookie 存的 session-id，會由伺服器對應到伺服器端的使用者紀錄。

gept.example_en: A signed jwt lets services verify the caller without an extra round trip to the auth server.
gept.example_zh: 簽章過的 JWT 讓服務不需額外打給授權伺服器也能驗證呼叫者身分。

gept.example_en: Use oauth so users can grant access to their data without sharing their actual password.
gept.example_zh: 使用 OAuth，讓使用者授權存取資料卻不用交出真正的密碼。

gept.example_en: After enabling sso, employees can reach every internal tool with just one login a day.
gept.example_zh: 啟用單一登入後，員工每天只需登入一次就能進入所有內部工具。

gept.example_en: Require mfa on production access so a leaked password alone cannot compromise the system.
gept.example_zh: 在正式環境存取要求多因子驗證，光是密碼外洩無法攻陷系統。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 角色基礎存取控管
gept.example_en: Rbac assigns capabilities to roles, then attaches each user to the right role for the job.
gept.example_zh: RBAC 把權限指派給角色，再把使用者掛到合適的角色上。

gept.example_en: Never commit the secret-key to the repository; store it in a vault instead.
gept.example_zh: 千萬別把機密金鑰提交到版控，要放進安全儲存庫。

gept.example_en: The deployment script fetches credentials from the vault at startup instead of reading files.
gept.example_zh: 部署腳本在啟動時從保管庫取憑證，不是直接讀檔。

gept.example_en: Copy the sample env-file, fill in real values, and run the service in your local terminal.
gept.example_zh: 複製範例環境檔，填入真實值，再在本機終端機跑這個服務。

gept.example_en: The config-loader merges defaults, env variables, and command-line flags in that order.
gept.example_zh: 設定載入器會依序合併預設值、環境變數和命令列旗標。

gept.example_en: Hide the experimental flow behind a feature-flag so only beta testers see it for now.
gept.example_zh: 把實驗性的流程藏在功能旗標後，目前只讓 Beta 測試者看到。

gept.example_en: A feature-toggle lets us roll out the new dashboard to one percent of users first.
gept.example_zh: 功能開關讓我們先把新儀表板開放給百分之一的使用者試用。

gept.example_en: We pushed the canary release to two servers and watched the error rate for an hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們把金絲雀版本推到兩台伺服器，觀察錯誤率一小時。

gept.example_en: Blue-green deployment switches traffic from the old version to the new one in one move.
gept.example_zh: 藍綠部署一次就把流量從舊版切到新版。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 暗黑啟動（隱藏式發佈）
gept.example_en: Use a dark-launch so real traffic exercises the new code path without affecting users.
gept.example_zh: 用暗黑啟動讓真實流量跑新程式路徑，但不影響使用者。

gept.example_en: The build-server runs every job inside a clean container to keep results reproducible.
gept.example_zh: 建置伺服器在乾淨容器中執行每個工作，確保結果可重現。

gept.example_en: Keep the dockerfile small and use a multi-stage build to drop development tools at the end.
gept.example_zh: 保持 Dockerfile 簡潔，並用多階段建置在最後丟掉開發工具。

gept.example_en: The container-runtime starts, isolates, and stops each application instance on the host.
gept.example_zh: 容器執行環境負責在主機上啟動、隔離與停止每個應用實例。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Kubernetes 容器編排平台
gept.example_en: Kubernetes restarts crashed pods automatically and helps services discover one another.
gept.example_zh: Kubernetes 會自動重啟壞掉的 pod，並協助服務互相發現彼此。

gept.example_en: A helm-chart bundles all the Kubernetes manifests needed to deploy a service with one command.
gept.example_zh: Helm 範本把部署服務所需的所有 Kubernetes 設定打包成一個指令。

gept.example_en: The ingress routes external traffic to the right service based on hostnames and paths.
gept.example_zh: Ingress 依主機名與路徑把外部流量導向正確的服務。

gept.example_en: A service-mesh handles retries, encryption, and tracing without touching the business code.
gept.example_zh: 服務網格處理重試、加密與追蹤，完全不需動到商業邏輯。

gept.example_en: A sidecar runs next to the main container and ships its logs to the central platform.
gept.example_zh: 邊車容器跟主容器一起跑，負責把日誌送到集中平台。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 基礎設施即程式碼
gept.example_en: With iac, every server and queue is defined in code, reviewed, and tracked in version control.
gept.example_zh: 在基礎設施即程式碼下，每台伺服器與佇列都以程式碼定義、審查並納入版控。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Terraform 基礎設施工具
gept.example_en: Terraform plans the cloud changes before applying them, giving the team a safety net.
gept.example_zh: Terraform 在套用前會先預演雲端變更，給團隊一張安全網。

gept.example_en: Ansible runs the playbook over ssh to configure every node in the cluster identically.
gept.example_zh: Ansible 透過 SSH 執行劇本，把叢集中每個節點設定成相同樣貌。

gept.example_en: Update the runbook whenever the alert thresholds change, otherwise on-call engineers get lost.
gept.example_zh: 告警門檻一變更就要更新維運指南，不然值班工程師會搞不清楚狀況。

gept.example_en: Tune the alerting rules carefully so the on-call rotation does not suffer from noisy pages.
gept.example_zh: 把告警規則調好，值班輪值才不會被吵雜的訊息淹沒。

gept.example_en: Each log-line carries a request id so we can stitch related events back together later.
gept.example_zh: 每行日誌都帶著請求 ID，方便日後把相關事件接回來。

gept.example_en: The profiler revealed that one helper function consumed nearly half of the request time.
gept.example_zh: 效能分析器顯示一個輔助函式吃掉了將近一半的請求時間。

gept.example_en: Run the benchmark-suite after every algorithm change to detect performance regressions early.
gept.example_zh: 每次調整演算法後跑基準套件，提早發現效能退化。

gept.example_en: A throughput-test verifies that the queue handles ten thousand messages per second without lag.
gept.example_zh: 吞吐量測試驗證佇列每秒能處理一萬則訊息而不延遲。

gept.example_en: The frontend-app fetches data from several apis and stores it in a small client-side cache.
gept.example_zh: 前端應用程式從多個 API 取資料，並存進客戶端的小型快取。

gept.example_en: The backend-service exposes a clean rest interface and is fronted by an aggressive cache.
gept.example_zh: 後端服務提供乾淨的 REST 介面，前面還有一層積極的快取。

gept.example_en: Every rest-endpoint must validate inputs before passing them down to the business logic.
gept.example_zh: 每個 REST 端點在把資料丟給商業邏輯前都必須驗證輸入。

gept.example_en: Update the graphql-schema first, regenerate types, and then change the resolvers accordingly.
gept.example_zh: 先更新 GraphQL 結構描述、重新產生型別，再相應地修改解析器。

gept.example_en: Each resolver returns the data for a single field and stays decoupled from the others.
gept.example_zh: 每個解析器只負責回傳單一欄位的資料，彼此保持解耦。

gept.example_en: The rest-client adds the bearer token automatically to every outgoing request header.
gept.example_zh: REST 客戶端會自動在每個外送請求的標頭加上 bearer 權杖。

gept.example_en: A websocket-channel keeps the chat panel updated in real time without polling the server.
gept.example_zh: WebSocket 通道讓聊天面板即時更新，不必輪詢伺服器。

gept.example_en: Before websockets, many sites used long-polling to receive new messages from the server.
gept.example_zh: 在 WebSocket 普及前，很多網站用長輪詢從伺服器接收新訊息。

gept.example_en: The spa loads a single html file and swaps in new views via client-side routing.
gept.example_zh: 單頁應用只載入一個 HTML 檔，透過客戶端路由切換新畫面。

gept.example_en: Ssr ships fully rendered pages, which improves first paint and helps search engines.
gept.example_zh: 伺服器端渲染送出已完整繪製的頁面，能改善首屏速度並幫助搜尋引擎。

gept.example_en: Bundling groups many small files into a few large ones so the browser fetches less often.
gept.example_zh: 打包會把許多小檔合併成少數大檔，瀏覽器才不必抓那麼多次。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 樹搖（移除未用程式碼）
gept.example_en: Tree-shaking drops unused exports so the final bundle stays as lean as possible.
gept.example_zh: 樹搖會丟掉沒用到的匯出，讓最終包檔盡可能精簡。

gept.example_en: Code-splitting loads the admin module only when the user actually opens the admin page.
gept.example_zh: 程式碼分割只在使用者真的打開管理頁面時，才載入管理模組。

gept.example_en: Add a polyfill-script for older browsers that still ship in some enterprise environments.
gept.example_zh: 為某些企業環境還在用的舊瀏覽器加上相容性補丁腳本。

gept.example_en: Manipulating the dom-tree too often can slow the page, so batch your updates whenever possible.
gept.example_zh: 頻繁操作 DOM 樹會拖慢頁面，能合併更新就合併。

gept.example_en: The library diffs the new virtual-dom against the previous one and applies minimal changes.
gept.example_zh: 函式庫比對新舊虛擬 DOM，只套用最少量的變更。

gept.example_en: A shared state-store keeps user preferences accessible from every component in the app.
gept.example_zh: 共用狀態倉儲讓使用者偏好能在 app 的每個元件中存取。

gept.example_en: Redux enforces a strict update pattern, which helps large teams reason about app state.
gept.example_zh: Redux 強制使用嚴格的更新模式，幫助大型團隊釐清應用狀態。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 化簡函式（狀態管理）
gept.example_en: A pure reducer takes the current state and an action, returning a brand-new state object.
gept.example_zh: 純化簡函式接收目前狀態與動作，回傳一個全新的狀態物件。

gept.example_en: A deep-link takes the user straight to a specific screen inside the mobile app.
gept.example_zh: 深層連結把使用者直接帶到行動 app 內的特定畫面。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) App Store 應用商店
gept.example_en: Submission to the appstore was rejected because the privacy policy link was missing.
gept.example_zh: 因為缺少隱私政策連結，這次送 App Store 審核被退件。

gept.example_en: Roll out the new playstore build to ten percent of users to limit potential crashes.
gept.example_zh: 把新的 Play 商店版本先推給百分之十的使用者，限制潛在當機影響。

gept.example_en: Every crash-report includes the stack trace, device model, and operating system version.
gept.example_zh: 每份當機回報都附上堆疊追蹤、裝置型號與作業系統版本。

gept.example_en: Reading the stacktrace from the bottom up usually points you straight at the failing line.
gept.example_zh: 由下往上讀堆疊追蹤，通常能直接指向出錯的那一行。

gept.example_en: A global exception-handler logs the error and shows the user a friendly fallback page.
gept.example_zh: 全域例外處理器會記錄錯誤，並對使用者顯示友善的備援頁面。

gept.example_en: Each worker sends a heartbeat every ten seconds so the controller knows it is still healthy.
gept.example_zh: 每個工作者每十秒送一次心跳訊號，控制器才知道它仍然健康。

gept.example_en: The sla promises that ninety-nine percent of requests will finish under two hundred milliseconds.
gept.example_zh: 服務水準協議承諾百分之九十九的請求在兩百毫秒內完成。

gept.example_en: Our slo for error rate is below one percent, measured across a rolling thirty-day window.
gept.example_zh: 我們的錯誤率服務水準目標是在三十天滾動視窗內低於百分之一。

gept.example_en: The root-cause turned out to be an unbounded retry loop hammering an unhealthy backend service.
gept.example_zh: 根本原因竟然是一個無限制的重試迴圈狂打不健康的後端服務。

gept.example_en: Use an exponential retry-policy with jitter so a failing dependency does not get overwhelmed.
gept.example_zh: 採用帶抖動的指數重試策略，免得失敗的相依服務被打爆。

gept.example_en: Add an exponential backoff between retries so the recovering service has time to breathe.
gept.example_zh: 重試之間加上指數退避，讓正在恢復的服務有喘息空間。

gept.example_en: The circuit-breaker opens after repeated failures and stops sending traffic to the bad service.
gept.example_zh: 斷路器在連續失敗後打開，停止把流量送到壞掉的服務。

gept.example_en: A bulkhead isolates resources so one slow caller cannot exhaust threads needed by others.
gept.example_zh: 隔離艙把資源切開，避免一個慢呼叫者吃光其他人需要的執行緒。

gept.example_en: The fanout-queue delivers each message to several worker pools at exactly the same time.
gept.example_zh: 扇出佇列同時把每則訊息送到多個工作者池。

gept.example_en: We connect microservices through pubsub so producers and consumers stay loosely coupled.
gept.example_zh: 我們以發佈訂閱連接微服務，讓生產者與消費者保持鬆耦合。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 分區（訊息流／資料表）
gept.example_en: Each partition is consumed by exactly one worker, which preserves order within that slice.
gept.example_zh: 每個分區只由一個工作者消費，能維持該切片內的順序。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 萃取轉換載入流程
gept.example_en: The nightly etl pulls raw events, cleans them, and loads them into the analytics warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 每晚的 ETL 拉取原始事件，清洗後再載入分析倉儲。

gept.example_en: We dump raw json into the datalake first and shape it only when analysts actually need it.
gept.example_zh: 我們先把原始 JSON 倒入資料湖，分析師真的要用時才整形。

gept.example_en: A lakehouse combines warehouse-style analytics with the open formats favored by data lakes.
gept.example_zh: 湖倉一體把倉儲式分析和資料湖偏好的開放格式結合在一起。

gept.example_en: Schedule the etl-job to run after midnight so it never competes with peak user traffic.
gept.example_zh: 把 ETL 工作排程在午夜後，才不會與尖峰使用者流量搶資源。

gept.example_en: Each argument-flag has both a long name and a single-letter shortcut for quick typing.
gept.example_zh: 每個命令列旗標都有長名與單字母縮寫，方便快速輸入。

gept.example_en: Pipe stdout into the analyzer and redirect stderr to a separate log file for later review.
gept.example_zh: 把標準輸出導入分析器，並把標準錯誤導到另一個日誌檔備查。

gept.example_en: Warnings should write to stderr so machine pipelines can keep stdout clean for real data.
gept.example_zh: 警告訊息應寫到標準錯誤，機器管線才能讓標準輸出保留給真正資料。

gept.example_en: A solid tooling-suite saves new hires from spending their first week wrestling configuration files.
gept.example_zh: 穩固的工具鏈讓新進同事不用把第一週都耗在搏鬥設定檔上。

gept.example_en: Commit the lockfile so every developer installs exactly the same set of nested dependencies.
gept.example_zh: 把鎖定檔提交進版控，每位開發者都會安裝完全相同的巢狀相依。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 單一倉庫管理工具
gept.example_en: A monorepo-tool runs only the tests affected by the changed files, saving lots of build time.
gept.example_zh: 單一倉庫管理工具只跑受影響的測試，省下大量建置時間。

gept.example_en: Polyrepo gives each team strong ownership but adds friction when sharing common utilities widely.
gept.example_zh: 多倉庫架構讓每個團隊有強烈擁有感，但在廣泛共用工具時會增加摩擦。

gept.example_en: Investing in developer-experience pays off because everyone ships features faster every quarter.
gept.example_zh: 投資開發者體驗會回本，因為每季每個人都能更快交付功能。

gept.example_en: Pair-programming with a senior helped the intern grasp the new pattern within a single afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 與資深同事結對寫程式，讓實習生在一個下午就掌握了新模式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 群體共同程式設計
gept.example_en: We tried mob-programming on the gnarly bug, and the whole group cracked it before lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 我們對棘手 bug 試了一次群體共寫，整組人在午餐前就破解了它。

gept.example_en: Kanban keeps work in progress low and lets the team visualize bottlenecks across the pipeline.
gept.example_zh: 看板方法把在製品控制得很低，並讓團隊看清整條管線的瓶頸。

gept.example_en: The retrospective produced three concrete experiments the team will try in the next sprint.
gept.example_zh: 這次回顧會議產出三個團隊會在下一輪衝刺嘗試的具體實驗。

gept.example_en: The designer shared the high-fidelity mockup so engineers could match spacing pixel by pixel.
gept.example_zh: 設計師分享高擬真視覺稿，讓工程師能逐像素對齊間距。

gept.example_en: Good localization respects local date formats, currency symbols, and address field orderings.
gept.example_zh: 良好的在地化會尊重當地的日期格式、貨幣符號與地址欄位順序。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 事後檢討（無責文化）
gept.example_en: A blameless post-mortem focuses on systemic causes so the team can prevent the next outage.
gept.example_zh: 無責的事後檢討聚焦在系統性原因，讓團隊能預防下一次故障。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) SOLID 物件導向原則
gept.example_en: Teaching solid principles helps interns design classes that are easier to extend and test.
gept.example_zh: 教導 SOLID 原則能幫助實習生設計出更易擴充與測試的類別。

gept.example_en: We scheduled a two-day spike to evaluate three queue libraries before committing to one.
gept.example_zh: 我們排了兩天的探究任務，先評估三套佇列函式庫再決定使用哪一套。

gept.example_en: Design the plugin system to be extensible so partners can add new integrations themselves.
gept.example_zh: 把外掛系統設計成易於擴充，讓合作夥伴可以自行加上新整合。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 符合語言慣例的
gept.example_en: Idiomatic code looks natural to other developers familiar with the same language and community.
gept.example_zh: 符合語言慣例的程式碼，對熟悉同語言與社群的開發者來說會顯得自然。

gept.example_en: A cross-platform framework lets the team ship one codebase to ios, android, and the desktop.
gept.example_zh: 跨平台框架讓團隊用一份程式碼同時出貨到 iOS、Android 與桌面端。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 變換器；變壓器；Transformer 模型架構
gept.example_en: The transformer architecture revolutionized natural language processing by introducing self-attention mechanisms across token sequences.
gept.example_zh: Transformer 架構透過引入跨詞元序列的自注意力機制，徹底改變了自然語言處理領域。

gept.example_en: The encoder transforms raw input text into dense numerical vectors that capture semantic meaning.
gept.example_zh: 編碼器將原始輸入文字轉換為捕捉語義含意的密集數值向量。

gept.example_en: The decoder generates output tokens one at a time using both encoder states and previous predictions.
gept.example_zh: 解碼器使用編碼器狀態和先前預測逐一生成輸出詞元。

gept.example_en: A tensor generalizes matrices to higher dimensions and serves as the fundamental data structure in deep learning.
gept.example_zh: 張量將矩陣推廣至更高維度，是深度學習中的基本資料結構。

gept.example_en: The loss function outputs a single scalar value that quantifies how far predictions stray from labels.
gept.example_zh: 損失函數輸出單一純量值，量化預測偏離標籤的程度。

gept.example_en: The activation function introduces nonlinearity, enabling networks to learn complex relationships beyond linear models.
gept.example_zh: 激活函數引入非線性，使網路能學習超越線性模型的複雜關係。

gept.example_en: Recurrent networks maintain hidden states across time steps to model sequential dependencies in text.
gept.example_zh: 循環網路在時間步間維持隱藏狀態以建模文字中的序列依賴。

gept.example_en: Max pooling downsamples feature maps by retaining only the largest activation within each window.
gept.example_zh: 最大池化僅保留每個視窗內最大的激活值來下採樣特徵圖。

gept.example_en: A three-by-three kernel sweeps across the image to detect edges, corners, and other local patterns.
gept.example_zh: 三乘三的卷積核掃過影像以偵測邊緣、角點與其他局部模式。

gept.example_en: The Adam optimizer adapts learning rates per parameter using running averages of gradients.
gept.example_zh: Adam 優化器使用梯度的滑動平均為每個參數調整學習率。

gept.example_en: Strong generalization means the model performs well on unseen examples drawn from the same distribution.
gept.example_zh: 良好的泛化能力意味著模型在來自相同分佈的未見樣本上表現出色。

gept.example_en: Retrieval augments generation by injecting relevant passages from a knowledge base into the model context.
gept.example_zh: 檢索透過將知識庫中的相關段落注入模型上下文來增強生成。

gept.example_en: Grounding answers in retrieved sources helps reduce hallucinations and improves factual reliability significantly.
gept.example_zh: 將答案接地於檢索來源能減少幻覺並顯著提升事實可靠性。

gept.example_en: Many semantic search systems rank candidates by cosine values between query and document embeddings.
gept.example_zh: 許多語義搜尋系統以查詢與文件嵌入之間的餘弦值對候選排名。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 歐幾里得（距離）的
gept.example_en: Euclidean distance computes the straight-line gap between two points in a continuous vector space.
gept.example_zh: 歐幾里得距離計算連續向量空間中兩點之間的直線間隔。

gept.example_en: Clustering groups unlabeled data points into meaningful segments based on intrinsic similarity patterns.
gept.example_zh: 聚類根據內在相似模式將無標籤資料點分組為有意義的區段。

gept.example_en: Feature normalization rescales inputs to a common range, helping gradient descent converge more reliably.
gept.example_zh: 特徵正規化將輸入縮放到共同範圍，幫助梯度下降更可靠地收斂。

gept.example_en: Thorough preprocessing often determines model success more than the choice of algorithm itself.
gept.example_zh: 徹底的前處理往往比演算法本身的選擇更能決定模型的成敗。

gept.example_en: Supervised learning requires labeled examples that pair raw inputs with the desired correct outputs.
gept.example_zh: 監督式學習需要將原始輸入與期望正確輸出配對的已標註樣本。

gept.example_en: Vast amounts of unlabeled text on the web drive the success of self-supervised language pretraining.
gept.example_zh: 網路上海量的未標註文字推動了自監督語言預訓練的成功。

gept.example_en: Image augmentation applies rotations, crops, and flips so the model becomes robust to natural variations.
gept.example_zh: 影像資料增強套用旋轉、裁切與翻轉，使模型對自然變異具備穩健性。

gept.example_en: Cross entropy compares the predicted probability distribution with the one-hot encoded target labels.
gept.example_zh: 交叉熵比較預測機率分佈與獨熱編碼的目標標籤。

gept.example_en: Severe class imbalance forces practitioners to use weighted losses or oversampling techniques during training.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的類別不平衡迫使實踐者在訓練時使用加權損失或過採樣技術。

gept.example_en: Each decision-tree split chooses the feature and threshold that most reduces impurity at that node.
gept.example_zh: 每個決策樹分割選擇在該節點最能降低不純度的特徵與閾值。

gept.example_en: A random-forest aggregates predictions from hundreds of decorrelated trees for robust tabular classification performance.
gept.example_zh: 隨機森林彙整數百棵去相關樹的預測，在表格分類上展現穩健效能。

gept.example_en: Generative models learn the underlying data distribution and can sample brand-new realistic examples from it.
gept.example_zh: 生成式模型學習資料底層分佈，並能從中採樣出全新且擬真的樣本。

gept.example_en: Modern diffusion models generate stunning images by gradually denoising random noise into coherent pictures.
gept.example_zh: 現代擴散模型透過逐步去除隨機雜訊將其轉化為連貫圖像，產出驚豔影像。

gept.example_en: Alignment research aims to ensure AI systems pursue goals that genuinely match human intentions.
gept.example_zh: 對齊研究旨在確保 AI 系統追求真正符合人類意圖的目標。

gept.example_en: Adversarial examples are inputs designed specifically to fool the model while looking normal to humans.
gept.example_zh: 對抗式樣本是專為欺騙模型而設計、對人類看似正常的輸入。

gept.example_en: Robustness testing measures how performance degrades under noisy inputs and distribution shifts.
gept.example_zh: 穩健性測試衡量模型在雜訊輸入與分佈漂移下的效能退化程度。

gept.example_en: Fairness audits check whether the model produces systematically worse outcomes for protected demographic groups.
gept.example_zh: 公平性稽核檢查模型是否對受保護人口群體系統性地產生較差結果。

gept.example_en: Strong AI governance establishes who is accountable when models cause harm or violate policies.
gept.example_zh: 強健的 AI 治理確立當模型造成傷害或違反政策時的問責主體。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 出處；資料來源紀錄
gept.example_en: Tracking data provenance lets auditors verify exactly which sources contributed to each training example.
gept.example_zh: 追蹤資料出處讓稽核者能精確驗證哪些來源貢獻了每個訓練樣本。

gept.example_en: Real-time ingestion captures events from kafka topics within seconds of their original production.
gept.example_zh: 即時資料攝取在事件原始產出後數秒內從 Kafka 主題擷取它們。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 串流（資料處理）
gept.example_en: A streaming architecture processes unbounded event streams continuously rather than in periodic batch windows.
gept.example_zh: 串流架構持續處理無界事件流，而非以週期性批次視窗處理。

gept.example_en: Transactional guarantees ensure that the entire database update either commits fully or rolls back cleanly.
gept.example_zh: 交易型保證確保整個資料庫更新要麼完整提交，要麼乾淨回滾。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 關鍵績效指標 KPI
gept.example_en: Each quarter the team reviews kpi trends and decides which experiments to prioritize next.
gept.example_zh: 每季團隊檢視關鍵績效指標趨勢，決定接下來優先推進的實驗。

gept.example_en: A scatterplot of feature pairs sometimes exposes nonlinear relationships invisible in summary statistics alone.
gept.example_zh: 特徵配對的散佈圖有時揭示僅靠摘要統計無法看到的非線性關係。

gept.example_en: The boxplot shows the median, quartiles, and outlier candidates in a single compact visual summary.
gept.example_zh: 箱型圖在單一緊湊視覺摘要中顯示中位數、四分位數與離群值候選。

gept.example_en: A correlation heatmap colors each cell by strength so analysts can spot relationships at a glance.
gept.example_zh: 相關性熱圖以強度為每個儲存格上色，讓分析師一眼看出關係。

gept.example_en: Income distributions exhibit heavy right skew because a few extreme earners pull the mean upward.
gept.example_zh: 收入分佈呈現強烈右偏，因為少數極端高收入者把平均值向上拉。

gept.example_en: The ninety-fifth quantile of latency reveals worst-case experiences far better than the average latency.
gept.example_zh: 延遲的第九十五分位數比平均延遲更能揭示最糟糕的使用體驗。

gept.example_en: Reporting the ninety-ninth percentile latency exposes the tail experience that average values quietly conceal.
gept.example_zh: 回報第九十九百分位的延遲揭示了平均值悄然掩蓋的尾端體驗。

gept.example_en: Covariance measures how two variables move together but depends heavily on each variable's individual scale.
gept.example_zh: 共變異數衡量兩個變數共同變動的方式，但極度依賴各變數本身的尺度。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 高斯（分佈）的
gept.example_en: Many statistical tests assume the underlying data follows an approximately gaussian bell-shaped distribution.
gept.example_zh: 許多統計檢定假設底層資料服從近似高斯的鐘形分佈。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 二項分佈的
gept.example_en: The binomial distribution describes the total number of successes in a fixed number of bernoulli trials.
gept.example_zh: 二項分佈描述固定次伯努利試驗中的成功總次數。

gept.example_en: We model rare events such as server crashes per hour using a poisson distribution with average rate lambda.
gept.example_zh: 我們以平均率 lambda 的卜瓦松分佈建模罕見事件，例如每小時的伺服器當機次數。

gept.example_en: Bayesian methods update prior beliefs with observed evidence to obtain a coherent posterior distribution.
gept.example_zh: 貝氏方法以觀察到的證據更新先驗信念，以得到一致的後驗分佈。

gept.example_en: The posterior captures all our updated knowledge about the parameter after observing new data.
gept.example_zh: 後驗分佈在觀察新資料後，刻畫我們對該參數所有更新的知識。

gept.example_en: An unbiased estimator hits the true parameter value on average across many repeated random samples.
gept.example_zh: 無偏估計量在多次重複隨機抽樣中平均命中真實參數值。

gept.example_en: Causal inference distinguishes genuine cause-effect relationships from mere correlation observed in messy historical data.
gept.example_zh: 因果推論將真正的因果關係從雜亂歷史資料中觀察到的單純相關區分開來。

gept.example_en: The control-group continued seeing the original experience to provide a stable performance baseline.
gept.example_zh: 對照組持續看到原始體驗，以提供穩定的效能基線。

gept.example_en: A permutation test shuffles labels many times to build the empirical null distribution of the test statistic.
gept.example_zh: 置換檢定多次打亂標籤以建立檢定統計量的經驗虛無分佈。

gept.example_en: Logistic regression maps a linear combination of features to a probability through the sigmoid function.
gept.example_zh: 邏輯迴歸透過 sigmoid 函數將特徵的線性組合映射為機率。

gept.example_en: Multinomial classification extends logistic regression to settings with more than two possible output classes.
gept.example_zh: 多項式分類將邏輯迴歸延伸到具有兩個以上可能輸出類別的場景。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Apache Spark 分散式運算
gept.example_en: Spark distributes computation across a cluster so multi-terabyte joins finish in minutes rather than hours.
gept.example_zh: Spark 將運算分散至叢集，使多 TB 連接運算能在數分鐘而非數小時內完成。

gept.example_en: Network pruning removes redundant weights so the resulting model runs faster on resource-constrained edge devices.
gept.example_zh: 網路剪枝移除冗餘權重，使最終模型在資源受限的邊緣裝置上運行更快。

gept.example_en: Data parallelism replicates the model across gpus while each replica processes a different batch slice.
gept.example_zh: 資料平行將模型在多顆 GPU 上複製，每個副本處理不同的批次切片。

gept.example_en: The model vocab contains roughly fifty thousand tokens covering common english plus many technical terms.
gept.example_zh: 模型詞彙表約包含五萬個詞元，涵蓋常見英文及許多技術術語。

gept.example_en: Choosing the right decoding strategy can transform mediocre raw model outputs into polished useful responses.
gept.example_zh: 選擇正確的解碼策略可將平庸的原始模型輸出轉變為精煉實用的回應。

gept.example_en: Personalization tailors content ordering for each user based on their unique demonstrated preferences over time.
gept.example_zh: 個人化依使用者隨時間展現的獨特偏好為其量身排序內容。

gept.example_en: Too much exploitation locks the system into a local optimum and starves promising alternative options.
gept.example_zh: 過度利用會將系統鎖在局部最優，並讓有潛力的替代選項得不到機會。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 多臂老虎機（演算法）
gept.example_en: A contextual bandit picks actions based on observed context and learns which choices yield best rewards.
gept.example_zh: 脈絡型多臂老虎機根據觀察脈絡選擇動作，學習哪些選擇帶來最佳獎勵。

gept.example_en: A long passphrase made of random words is harder to crack than a short complex password.
gept.example_zh: 由隨機單詞組成的長通行短語比短而複雜的密碼更難破解。

gept.example_en: Enabling two-factor authentication adds an extra layer of protection to your online accounts.
gept.example_zh: 啟用雙因素驗證為你的線上帳號增加一層額外保護。

gept.example_en: Banks now require multi-factor verification before processing any large fund transfers.
gept.example_zh: 銀行現在要求進行多因素驗證後才會處理任何大額轉帳。

gept.example_en: The airport piloted an iris-scan gate that lets registered travelers pass without showing passports.
gept.example_zh: 機場試行了一個虹膜掃描閘門，讓註冊旅客無需出示護照即可通行。

gept.example_en: Five failed login attempts trigger an automatic lockout to slow down brute-force attacks.
gept.example_zh: 五次登入失敗會觸發自動鎖定機制，以拖慢暴力破解攻擊。

gept.example_en: Whistleblowers often rely on anonymity tools when reporting wrongdoing inside large corporations.
gept.example_zh: 吹哨者在揭發大型企業內部不法行為時通常仰賴匿名工具。

gept.example_en: Memory leakage can sometimes reveal sensitive data to an attacker watching the process.
gept.example_zh: 記憶體外洩有時可能向監看該程序的攻擊者揭露敏感資料。

gept.example_en: Spies attempted to infiltrate the research lab by posing as visiting interns.
gept.example_zh: 間諜試圖偽裝成訪問實習生來滲透該研究實驗室。

gept.example_en: Slow, patient infiltration is the hallmark of an advanced persistent threat group.
gept.example_zh: 緩慢而耐心的滲透是進階持續性威脅組織的特徵。

gept.example_en: Modern defenses no longer trust the network perimeter as the only security boundary.
gept.example_zh: 現代防禦不再將網路周界視為唯一的安全邊界。

gept.example_en: Criminals impersonate company executives to trick staff into wiring money overseas.
gept.example_zh: 犯罪分子冒充公司主管，誘騙員工將款項匯往海外。

gept.example_en: Voice impersonation powered by AI has made phone scams much more convincing recently.
gept.example_zh: 由人工智慧驅動的語音身分冒充近期使電話詐騙更加令人信服。

gept.example_en: The free game installer was actually a trojan that opened a backdoor for attackers.
gept.example_zh: 那個免費遊戲安裝程式其實是為攻擊者開啟後門的木馬程式。

gept.example_en: A massive botnet of home routers launched a flood of traffic against the target site.
gept.example_zh: 由家用路由器組成的大型殭屍網路向目標網站發動了大量流量。

gept.example_en: DNS amplification turns a small query into a huge reply aimed at the victim.
gept.example_zh: DNS 放大攻擊將小型查詢轉變成指向受害者的巨大回應。

gept.example_en: Hash checks help detect tampering with files downloaded from untrusted mirror sites.
gept.example_zh: 雜湊檢查有助於偵測從不可信鏡像站下載檔案時的竄改行為。

gept.example_en: Email header forgery makes a phishing message look as if it came from your boss.
gept.example_zh: 電子郵件標頭偽造使釣魚訊息看起來像是從你的老闆寄出。

gept.example_en: Malware authors obfuscate their code so analysts must spend hours unpacking it.
gept.example_zh: 惡意程式作者混淆程式碼，使分析人員必須花數小時才能解開。

gept.example_en: Heavy obfuscation is one sign that a script may be doing something harmful.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的程式碼混淆是腳本可能正在進行有害行為的一個跡象。

gept.example_en: Role-based access control assigns permissions according to job function rather than individual identity.
gept.example_zh: 角色為基礎的存取控制依工作職能而非個人身分指派權限。

gept.example_en: Strong access-control lists keep ordinary users away from sensitive financial folders.
gept.example_zh: 強大的存取控制清單可使一般使用者遠離敏感的財務資料夾。

gept.example_en: Most companies manage user accounts through a central directory-service like LDAP.
gept.example_zh: 大多數公司透過 LDAP 之類的中央目錄服務管理使用者帳號。

gept.example_en: Automated provisioning creates new accounts the moment an employee joins the company.
gept.example_zh: 自動化的帳號配置在員工加入公司的當下即建立新帳號。

gept.example_en: Asymmetric encryption uses a public key to lock data and a private key to unlock it.
gept.example_zh: 非對稱式加密以公鑰鎖定資料，以私鑰解開資料。

gept.example_en: Symmetric encryption is faster because both parties share the same secret key.
gept.example_zh: 對稱式加密因雙方共用同一把秘密金鑰，因此速度較快。

gept.example_en: Never store passwords as plaintext in any database, no matter how internal it seems.
gept.example_zh: 絕不可將密碼以明文形式儲存在任何資料庫，不論該資料庫看似多麼內部。

gept.example_en: Certificate revocation lists tell clients which keys must no longer be trusted.
gept.example_zh: 憑證撤銷清單告訴用戶端哪些金鑰不應再被信任。

gept.example_en: Mobile apps use certificate pinning to refuse connections that present an unexpected key.
gept.example_zh: 行動應用程式使用憑證固定來拒絕出示非預期金鑰的連線。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加密超文本傳輸協定
gept.example_en: Make sure the address bar shows https before typing any sensitive login information.
gept.example_zh: 在輸入任何敏感登入資訊前，務必確認網址列顯示 https。

gept.example_en: A vpn tunnels your traffic so that nearby attackers on cafe wifi cannot read it.
gept.example_zh: 虛擬私人網路將你的流量打包成隧道，使咖啡店無線網路附近的攻擊者無法讀取。

gept.example_en: A sniffer running on an open network can capture unencrypted passwords flying past.
gept.example_zh: 在開放網路上運作的封包嗅探器可擷取從旁飛過的未加密密碼。

gept.example_en: Strong encryption protects messages from interception during their journey across the internet.
gept.example_zh: 強加密保護訊息在網際網路傳輸過程中不被攔截通訊。

gept.example_en: A single cloud misconfiguration left thousands of customer files open to the public internet.
gept.example_zh: 單一的雲端設定錯誤使數千個顧客檔案對公共網際網路開放。

gept.example_en: System hardening removes unused services so attackers have fewer doors to try.
gept.example_zh: 系統強化設定移除未使用的服務，使攻擊者能嘗試的入口較少。

gept.example_en: A negligent employee who clicks every link is just as dangerous as a malicious one.
gept.example_zh: 點擊每個連結的疏忽員工，其危險程度不亞於惡意員工。

gept.example_en: The caller invented a pretext about an urgent audit to convince staff to share files.
gept.example_zh: 來電者編造了一個關於緊急稽核的假藉口，說服員工分享檔案。

gept.example_en: A supply-chain compromise can spread to every customer using the trusted vendor's update server.
gept.example_zh: 供應鏈攻擊可擴散至使用受信任廠商更新伺服器的每一位客戶。

gept.example_en: Regular tabletop exercises let executives practice decisions before a real incident occurs.
gept.example_zh: 定期的桌上演練讓主管能在真正事故發生前演練決策。

gept.example_en: An incident responder collects evidence carefully so it remains useful in later investigations.
gept.example_zh: 事故應變人員小心收集證據，使其在後續調查中仍具效力。

gept.example_en: Quick containment of an infected laptop stops the malware from spreading across the floor.
gept.example_zh: 快速圍堵受感染的筆電可防止惡意程式擴散到整層樓。

gept.example_en: After scanning, the team produces a remediation plan ranked by severity and ease.
gept.example_zh: 掃描後，團隊會產出一份依嚴重度與容易程度排序的修補補救計畫。

gept.example_en: Attribution is hard because attackers deliberately leave misleading clues inside their tools.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊歸屬之所以困難，是因為攻擊者刻意在工具中留下誤導性線索。

gept.example_en: Reconnaissance against a target may begin months before any actual attack tool is used.
gept.example_zh: 針對目標的偵查蒐集可能在實際使用任何攻擊工具的數月之前就已開始。

gept.example_en: Online harassment campaigns can quickly cross from digital threats into real-world danger.
gept.example_zh: 網路騷擾行動可能迅速從數位威脅演變成現實世界的危險。

gept.example_en: An online predator-online slowly builds trust before asking for private photos or meetups.
gept.example_zh: 網路掠食者會慢慢建立信任，然後才要求私密照片或見面。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 主動同意加入
gept.example_en: Marketing emails should be opt-in rather than added automatically when an account is created.
gept.example_zh: 行銷郵件應採主動同意加入，而非在建立帳號時自動加入。

gept.example_en: A clear opt-out link must appear at the bottom of every promotional email message.
gept.example_zh: 每封促銷郵件底部都必須顯示清楚的選擇退出連結。

gept.example_en: Data minimization means collecting only the fields truly needed for the service to work.
gept.example_zh: 資料最小化意指只收集服務運作真正所需的欄位。

gept.example_en: Data portability lets you take your information to a competing service in a standard format.
gept.example_zh: 資料可攜性讓你能以標準格式將你的資訊帶到競爭服務。

gept.example_en: A complete audit-trail shows exactly who viewed each medical record and at what time.
gept.example_zh: 完整的稽核軌跡精確顯示誰在何時檢視了每筆醫療紀錄。

gept.example_en: Encryption is the basic tool to protect the confidentiality of customer financial records.
gept.example_zh: 加密是保護客戶財務紀錄機密性的基本工具。

gept.example_en: Business continuity plans describe how to keep working if the head office is destroyed.
gept.example_zh: 營運持續計畫描述若總部遭摧毀時如何維持運作。

gept.example_en: Disaster-recovery drills practice restoring services to a backup site within hours.
gept.example_zh: 災難復原演練演習在數小時內將服務還原至備援站點。

gept.example_en: A daily snapshot-backup lets administrators undo accidental file changes from yesterday quickly.
gept.example_zh: 每日快照備份讓管理員能快速還原昨日不慎變動的檔案。

gept.example_en: Keeping a copy in offline-storage protects it from network-based ransomware attacks.
gept.example_zh: 在離線儲存中保留一份副本可保護資料免於網路型勒索攻擊。

gept.example_en: Biometrics offer convenience but raise privacy questions since the data cannot be reset.
gept.example_zh: 生物識別技術提供便利，但因資料無法重設而引發隱私疑慮。

gept.example_en: Apps often request geolocation access even when the feature has no real need for it.
gept.example_zh: 即使功能其實不需要，應用程式仍經常要求地理定位存取權。

gept.example_en: True anonymization is difficult because clever joining of datasets can re-identify many people.
gept.example_zh: 真正的匿名化處理很困難，因為巧妙地結合資料集可重新辨識許多人。

gept.example_en: Some malware takes a screenshot-capture every few seconds to monitor what victims are doing.
gept.example_zh: 有些惡意程式每隔數秒進行一次螢幕截取，以監看受害者的行為。

gept.example_en: A wiper destroys data on purpose rather than holding it for ransom like other malware.
gept.example_zh: 抹除型惡意程式刻意摧毀資料，而不像其他惡意程式那樣扣留資料勒贖。

gept.example_en: A fail-safe design denies access by default when the authentication service is unreachable.
gept.example_zh: 故障安全設計在驗證服務無法連線時，預設拒絕存取。

gept.example_en: A vendor security scorecard compares partners across categories such as patching and exposure.
gept.example_zh: 供應商安全評分卡跨修補、暴露等類別比較合作夥伴。

gept.example_en: Use a maturity-model to plan how your program will grow over several budget cycles.
gept.example_zh: 使用成熟度模型規劃你的計畫如何在數個預算週期中成長。

gept.example_en: An independent attestation gives customers confidence beyond the vendor's own marketing claims.
gept.example_zh: 獨立的安全認證證明能讓客戶對供應商的信任超越其行銷說詞。

gept.example_en: Each control-internal must have an owner who is accountable for keeping it effective.
gept.example_zh: 每項內部控制措施都必須有一名負責確保其有效性的所有者。

gept.example_en: A gap-analysis shows where current practices fall short of the required security standard.
gept.example_zh: 落差分析顯示目前做法在哪些方面未達所要求的安全標準。

gept.example_en: The register-risk lists each known risk along with its owner and current mitigation status.
gept.example_zh: 風險登錄表列出每項已知風險及其所有者與目前的減緩狀態。

gept.example_en: Risk treatment-risk options include accepting, transferring, reducing, or completely avoiding the activity.
gept.example_zh: 風險處理選項包括接受、轉移、降低或完全避開該活動。

gept.example_en: Buying cyber insurance is a common way of risk transfer-risk for residual financial loss.
gept.example_zh: 購買網路保險是處理剩餘財務損失常見的風險轉移方式。

gept.example_en: Insurance-cyber policies may cover legal fees, notification costs, and lost business income.
gept.example_zh: 網路保險保單可能涵蓋法律費用、通知成本與營業損失收入。

gept.example_en: Attackers move funds through many wallet-crypto addresses to hide the trail from investigators.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者透過許多加密貨幣錢包地址移動資金，以掩蓋調查者的追查線索。

gept.example_en: A tumbler service mixes coins from many sources to make criminal funds harder to trace.
gept.example_zh: 混幣器服務混合來自多種來源的硬幣，使犯罪資金更難追蹤。

gept.example_en: Stolen account details often appear for sale on hidden dark-web marketplaces within days.
gept.example_zh: 被竊的帳號資料通常在數天內就會出現在隱藏的暗網市場上待售。

gept.example_en: A skimmer fitted over an ATM card slot can quietly steal card numbers from many users.
gept.example_zh: 裝設在 ATM 卡片插槽上的側錄器可悄悄竊取多名使用者的卡片號碼。

gept.example_en: Tailgating happens when someone follows a badged employee through a secure door politely.
gept.example_zh: 尾隨進入發生在某人禮貌地跟著佩戴識別證的員工通過安全門時。

gept.example_en: Strangers sometimes piggyback on someone else's wifi to commit crimes anonymously.
gept.example_zh: 陌生人有時會搭便使用他人 wifi 來匿名犯罪。

gept.example_en: Lost a building fob immediately so it can be disabled before someone else uses it.
gept.example_zh: 遺失大樓門禁感應卡應立即回報，使其在他人使用前被停用。

gept.example_en: A mobile sandbox-app keeps each program from reading data that belongs to other apps.
gept.example_zh: 行動應用程式沙箱可阻止每個程式讀取屬於其他應用程式的資料。

gept.example_en: A secure enclave inside the chip stores keys that the rest of the system cannot read.
gept.example_zh: 晶片內的安全加密飛地儲存系統其他部分無法讀取的金鑰。

gept.example_en: Secure boot-secure prevents rootkits from loading before the operating system is even running.
gept.example_zh: 安全啟動可在作業系統尚未執行前防止隱蔽程式包被載入。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 韌體基本輸出入系統
gept.example_en: Outdated bios-firmware can hide flaws that survive even a full operating system reinstall.
gept.example_zh: 過時的韌體基本輸出入系統可能隱藏即使完整重灌作業系統仍存在的漏洞。

gept.example_en: You cannot protect a server that does not appear in your asset-inventory list.
gept.example_zh: 你無法保護一台未出現在你資產清冊上的伺服器。

gept.example_en: Administrators can wipe-remote a missing tablet to delete all company files immediately.
gept.example_zh: 管理員可遠端抹除遺失的平板電腦，立即刪除所有公司檔案。

gept.example_en: A bug-bounty program pays outside researchers who report serious flaws responsibly.
gept.example_zh: 漏洞回報獎金計畫支付給以負責方式回報嚴重漏洞的外部研究員。

gept.example_en: An independent researcher-sec spent months quietly studying the device before reporting two flaws.
gept.example_zh: 一名獨立資安研究員在回報兩個漏洞前默默研究該裝置數個月。

gept.example_en: Attackers weaponize a research proof-of-concept into a reliable tool within days sometimes.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者有時會在數天內將研究用的概念驗證武器化開發成可靠的工具。

gept.example_en: The blog post included a proof-of-concept that crashed the test server in two seconds.
gept.example_zh: 該部落格貼文包含一個讓測試伺服器在兩秒內當機的概念驗證。

gept.example_en: A red-team exercise simulates a real attacker to test how defenders react under pressure.
gept.example_zh: 紅隊演練模擬真正的攻擊者，以測試防禦者在壓力下的反應。

gept.example_en: The blue-team studies every red-team report to close gaps in detection and response.
gept.example_zh: 藍隊防禦研究每份紅隊報告，以彌補偵測與回應上的缺口。

gept.example_en: Define a clear scope-test in writing so both sides know which systems may be touched.
gept.example_zh: 以書面方式定義清楚的測試範圍，使雙方都知道哪些系統可被接觸。

gept.example_en: Analysts write sigma rules so other teams can reuse the same detection ideas easily.
gept.example_zh: 分析師撰寫 Sigma 偵測規則，讓其他團隊能輕鬆重用相同的偵測想法。

gept.example_en: Investigators work from a copy and never touch the original image-disk during analysis.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員在分析時使用副本進行作業，絕不接觸原始的磁碟映像。

gept.example_en: Building a clean timeline-event helps responders understand what happened minute by minute.
gept.example_zh: 建立乾淨的事件時間軸有助於應變人員逐分鐘了解所發生的事。

gept.example_en: Machine learning anomaly-detect models flag activity that does not match a learned baseline.
gept.example_zh: 機器學習異常偵測模型會標記不符合所學基準的活動。

gept.example_en: A side-channel attack might read secret keys by measuring tiny changes in chip power use.
gept.example_zh: 旁路攻擊可能藉由量測晶片電源使用上的微小變化來讀取秘密金鑰。

gept.example_en: An executive dashboard-sec shows risk trends without overwhelming leaders with raw technical data.
gept.example_zh: 高階主管的資安儀表板展示風險趨勢，而不會以原始技術資料淹沒領導者。

gept.example_en: Biased training-data may cause the security model to ignore certain unusual but real threats.
gept.example_zh: 有偏差的訓練資料可能讓資安模型忽略某些異常但真實的威脅。

gept.example_en: Data poisoning slips bad examples into the training set to corrupt the final ml-model.
gept.example_zh: 資料投毒將不良範例混入訓練集，以汙染最終的機器學習模型。

gept.example_en: Polymorphic malware rewrites itself slightly each time to avoid matching old signatures.
gept.example_zh: 多型變種惡意程式每次都會稍微改寫自身，以避免符合舊有特徵。

gept.example_en: A spoofed sender address can fool users unless email authentication standards are enforced.
gept.example_zh: 除非執行電子郵件驗證標準，否則偽冒的寄件者地址可能會欺騙使用者。

gept.example_en: Aggressive filter-email rules block most phishing attempts before users ever see them.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的郵件過濾規則可在使用者看到之前封鎖大多數釣魚嘗試。

gept.example_en: Adding a known malicious domain to the blocklist stops every user from reaching it again.
gept.example_zh: 將已知惡意網域加入封鎖清單可阻止每位使用者再度連到該網域。

gept.example_en: An allowlist only lets approved applications run, blocking any unknown program by default.
gept.example_zh: 許可清單只允許已核可的應用程式執行，預設封鎖任何未知程式。

gept.example_en: Many cheap iot-device cameras ship with default passwords that buyers never bother changing.
gept.example_zh: 許多便宜的物聯網裝置攝影機出廠時帶有買家從不更改的預設密碼。

gept.example_en: Engineers reach production servers only through a hardened jump-host that records every command.
gept.example_zh: 工程師僅能透過記錄每個指令的強化跳板主機抵達正式環境伺服器。

gept.example_en: A small bastion server sits at the edge as the only public-facing gateway for admins.
gept.example_zh: 小型堡壘主機位於邊緣，是管理員唯一面向公開的閘道。

gept.example_en: Set a short screen-lock timer so an unattended laptop locks itself quickly after you leave.
gept.example_zh: 設定較短的螢幕鎖定計時器，使無人看管的筆電在你離開後迅速自行上鎖。

gept.example_en: A clean-desk policy makes employees lock papers away before leaving for the day.
gept.example_zh: 桌面淨空政策要求員工下班離開前將文件鎖入抽屜。

gept.example_en: Make sure every employee knows the reporting-channel for suspicious calls or emails.
gept.example_zh: 確保每位員工都知道可疑來電或郵件的通報管道。

gept.example_en: An incident-ticket records who did what during the response from start to final closure.
gept.example_zh: 事故工單記錄從開始到最終結案期間應變過程中誰做了什麼。

gept.example_en: During a major outage, leaders gather in a war-room to coordinate every team's actions.
gept.example_zh: 重大停機事件期間，領導者齊聚戰情室協調各團隊行動。

gept.example_en: A clear communications-plan tells staff what to say and what to avoid during a breach.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的對外溝通計畫告訴員工在外洩事件期間該說什麼、該避免什麼。

gept.example_en: Bank fraud-detection systems pause unusual card charges and call the customer to confirm.
gept.example_zh: 銀行詐欺偵測系統暫停異常的卡片扣款，並致電客戶確認。

gept.example_en: Device-trust checks confirm a phone is up to date before letting it reach sensitive systems.
gept.example_zh: 裝置信任檢查確認手機已更新至最新版，然後才允許其連到敏感系統。

gept.example_en: A yearly transparency-report shows how many government requests for user data were received.
gept.example_zh: 年度透明度報告顯示收到多少來自政府的使用者資料請求。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 標竿管理；比較分析
gept.example_en: Benchmarking against industry leaders helped us identify gaps in our customer service performance.
gept.example_zh: 與業界領導者進行標竿比較幫助我們找出客戶服務表現的落差。

gept.example_en: Our weekly brainstorming-session generates fresh ideas for product improvements and marketing campaigns.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週的腦力激盪會議能激發產品改良與行銷活動的新點子。

gept.example_en: Getting buy-in from senior leadership is critical before launching any organizational change initiative.
gept.example_zh: 在啟動任何組織變革計畫前，取得高階主管的支持至關重要。

gept.example_en: The new factory required a capital-investment of nearly fifty million dollars over three years.
gept.example_zh: 新工廠需要在三年內投入近五千萬美元的資本投資。

gept.example_en: Management decided to centralize purchasing functions to reduce costs and improve supplier negotiations.
gept.example_zh: 管理層決定將採購職能集中化，以降低成本並改善供應商談判。

gept.example_en: She became a respected change-agent by guiding teams through the difficult digital transformation process.
gept.example_zh: 她藉由帶領團隊度過困難的數位轉型過程，成為備受敬重的變革推動者。

gept.example_en: We co-create solutions with key clients to ensure our products truly address their pain points.
gept.example_zh: 我們與重要客戶共同創造解決方案，確保產品真正解決他們的痛點。

gept.example_en: The conglomerate operates over forty subsidiaries across the technology, retail, and finance sectors.
gept.example_zh: 該企業集團在科技、零售和金融領域擁有超過四十家子公司。

gept.example_en: Industry consolidation has accelerated as smaller firms struggle to compete with global giants.
gept.example_zh: 由於小型公司難以與全球巨頭競爭，產業整合正在加速。

gept.example_en: Software engineering remains our company's core-competency despite recent expansion into consulting services.
gept.example_zh: 儘管近期擴展至顧問服務，軟體工程仍是公司的核心競爭力。

gept.example_en: A strong corporate-culture helps attract top talent and reduces turnover among high-performing employees.
gept.example_zh: 強健的企業文化有助吸引頂尖人才並降低高績效員工的流動率。

gept.example_en: Our cross-functional team includes members from marketing, engineering, sales, and customer support.
gept.example_zh: 我們的跨職能團隊成員來自行銷、工程、業務與客戶支援部門。

gept.example_en: We plan to decentralize decision-making so regional managers can respond faster to local market needs.
gept.example_zh: 我們計畫將決策分權，讓區域經理能更快回應當地市場需求。

gept.example_en: Effective delegation frees senior managers to focus on long-term strategy instead of daily operations.
gept.example_zh: 有效的授權讓高階主管能專注於長期策略，而非日常營運。

gept.example_en: Product diversification helped the company survive the downturn in its original core market.
gept.example_zh: 產品多角化幫助公司在原本核心市場低迷時得以生存。

gept.example_en: The acquiring firm spent three months conducting due-diligence before finalizing the takeover deal.
gept.example_zh: 收購方花了三個月進行盡職調查才完成收購案。

gept.example_en: Great leaders empower-team members by trusting them to make important decisions independently.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的領導者藉由信任團隊成員獨立做出重要決策來賦能他們。

gept.example_en: The venture capital firm acquired a twenty percent equity-stake in the promising startup.
gept.example_zh: 創投公司取得這家有潛力新創企業百分之二十的股權。

gept.example_en: Please include an executive-summary so busy directors can grasp the key points in two minutes.
gept.example_zh: 請附上執行摘要，讓忙碌的董事能在兩分鐘內掌握重點。

gept.example_en: Every smart investor develops a clear exit-strategy before committing capital to a new venture.
gept.example_zh: 每位明智的投資人在投入資金到新事業前都會擬定清楚的退場策略。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 快速通道；加速
gept.example_en: The board agreed to fast-track approval of the merger to capture the market opportunity.
gept.example_zh: 董事會同意加速核准併購案，以把握市場機會。

gept.example_en: A thorough feasibility-study revealed that the proposed factory site was too costly to develop.
gept.example_zh: 徹底的可行性研究顯示擬議的廠址開發成本太高。

gept.example_en: Investors questioned the optimistic financial-projection presented in the startup's funding pitch deck.
gept.example_zh: 投資人對新創公司募資簡報中過於樂觀的財務預測提出質疑。

gept.example_en: The founding-team worked seven days a week during the first year to build the prototype.
gept.example_zh: 創始團隊在第一年每週工作七天才把原型做出來。

gept.example_en: The restaurant chain expanded rapidly across Asia using a profitable franchise-model with local partners.
gept.example_zh: 這家連鎖餐廳透過與當地夥伴合作的獲利加盟模式快速擴展至全亞洲。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 市場進入策略
gept.example_en: We refined our go-to-market plan after testing the product with three pilot customer groups.
gept.example_zh: 在以三個試點客戶群測試產品後，我們調整了市場進入策略。

gept.example_en: The governance-board reviews compliance reports each quarter to ensure regulatory standards remain consistently met.
gept.example_zh: 治理委員會每季審查合規報告，以確保始終符合法規標準。

gept.example_en: Companies in the growth-stage often need substantial capital to scale operations and hire talent.
gept.example_zh: 處於成長階段的公司通常需要大量資金來擴展營運並招募人才。

gept.example_en: Investing in human-capital through training and education yields strong returns for forward-looking companies.
gept.example_zh: 透過訓練與教育投資人力資本，能為具前瞻性的公司帶來可觀回報。

gept.example_en: The new sales incentive-plan rewards both individual performance and overall team collaboration outcomes.
gept.example_zh: 新的業務激勵計畫同時獎勵個人表現與整體團隊合作成果。

gept.example_en: Protecting intellectual-property through patents and trademarks gives our firm a sustainable competitive advantage.
gept.example_zh: 透過專利與商標保護智慧財產權，為公司帶來可持續的競爭優勢。

gept.example_en: The two firms formed a joint-venture to share technology and split the development costs.
gept.example_zh: 兩家公司成立合資企業以共享技術並分擔開發成本。

gept.example_en: We must consult every key-stakeholder before announcing significant changes to the operating model.
gept.example_zh: 在宣布營運模式重大變更前，我們必須諮詢每位關鍵利害關係人。

gept.example_en: A robust knowledge-management system helps new employees ramp up much faster than before.
gept.example_zh: 完善的知識管理系統能幫助新員工比以往更快上手。

gept.example_en: Lean-management principles emphasize eliminating waste and continuously improving processes throughout the entire organization.
gept.example_zh: 精實管理原則強調消除浪費，並在整個組織中持續改善流程。

gept.example_en: A clear long-term-vision keeps employees motivated even when short-term obstacles seem overwhelming.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的長期願景能讓員工在短期障礙看似難以克服時仍保持動力。

gept.example_en: Strong managerial-skill is more important than technical expertise once you reach the director level.
gept.example_zh: 一旦升至總監層級，強健的管理技能比技術專長更為重要。

gept.example_en: All consultants must sign a non-disclosure agreement before accessing any sensitive product roadmap details.
gept.example_zh: 所有顧問在接觸任何敏感的產品路線圖細節前都必須簽署保密協議。

gept.example_en: The updated organizational-chart shows how reporting lines changed after last month's restructuring.
gept.example_zh: 更新後的組織圖顯示上個月重組後組織的報告路線如何改變。

gept.example_en: We carefully evaluate each outsourcing-partner to ensure data security and consistent service quality.
gept.example_zh: 我們仔細評估每個外包夥伴，以確保資料安全與一致的服務品質。

gept.example_en: The startup adopted a bold pivot-strategy when its original product failed to attract paying customers.
gept.example_zh: 當原本的產品無法吸引付費客戶時，這家新創採取了大膽的轉型策略。

gept.example_en: The private-equity firm bought the struggling retailer and replaced most of its senior leadership.
gept.example_zh: 這家私募股權公司收購了陷入困境的零售商，並更換了大部分高階主管。

gept.example_en: Our product-roadmap for next year prioritizes mobile features over additional desktop functionality improvements.
gept.example_zh: 我們明年的產品路線圖優先發展行動功能，而非追加桌面功能的改良。

gept.example_en: Each project-lifecycle includes initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, and a structured formal closure phase.
gept.example_zh: 每個專案生命週期包含起始、規劃、執行、監控與正式結案階段。

gept.example_en: Sales managers track progress against quarterly-target numbers using a shared dashboard updated daily.
gept.example_zh: 業務經理透過每日更新的共用儀表板追蹤季度目標的進度。

gept.example_en: We need to ramp-up production quickly to meet the unexpectedly strong holiday season demand.
gept.example_zh: 我們需要迅速提升產量，以滿足出乎意料強勁的假期需求。

gept.example_en: Last year's reorganization eliminated three management layers and pushed authority closer to frontline staff.
gept.example_zh: 去年的重組裁撤了三個管理層級，並將決策權移交給更接近第一線的員工。

gept.example_en: Smart resource-allocation ensures the most strategic projects receive enough funding and skilled people.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的資源分配能確保最具策略意義的專案獲得足夠的資金與優秀人才。

gept.example_en: Our employee retention-rate jumped after we introduced flexible working hours and remote options.
gept.example_zh: 在我們推出彈性工時與遠距工作選項後，員工留任率大幅上升。

gept.example_en: The board defined a moderate risk-appetite to balance ambitious growth with financial stability.
gept.example_zh: 董事會設定了適度的風險偏好，以兼顧積極的成長與財務穩定。

gept.example_en: Scaling-up too quickly without proper systems often causes serious quality and customer service issues.
gept.example_zh: 在缺乏完善制度下太快規模擴張，往往會造成嚴重的品質與客服問題。

gept.example_en: Our contract guarantees a service-level of ninety-nine point nine percent uptime each month.
gept.example_zh: 我們的合約保證每月達到百分之九十九點九的服務水準正常運作時間。

gept.example_en: The CEO emphasized that all major decisions must ultimately enhance long-term shareholder-value growth.
gept.example_zh: 執行長強調所有重大決策最終必須提升長期的股東價值成長。

gept.example_en: Our talent-acquisition team uses data analytics to find candidates who fit both skills and culture.
gept.example_zh: 我們的人才招募團隊運用數據分析尋找兼具技能與文化契合度的人選。

gept.example_en: Healthy team-dynamics encourage open feedback and make members comfortable raising difficult issues quickly.
gept.example_zh: 健康的團隊動能鼓勵開放的回饋，並讓成員能自在地迅速提出棘手問題。

gept.example_en: We help employees upskill through online courses and structured mentoring programs every quarter.
gept.example_zh: 我們每季透過線上課程與結構化的師徒制方案，協助員工提升技能。

gept.example_en: A clear value-proposition explains exactly why customers should choose us over competing alternatives.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的價值主張能精準說明客戶為何要選擇我們而非競爭對手。

gept.example_en: The founder rewrote the vision-statement to better reflect the company's ambition in global markets.
gept.example_zh: 創辦人重寫了願景宣言，更妥善反映公司在全球市場上的雄心。

gept.example_en: Our latest white-paper examines emerging trends and offers practical guidance for finance industry leaders.
gept.example_zh: 我們最新的白皮書檢視新興趨勢，並為金融業領導者提供實務指引。

gept.example_en: Strategic partnerships will accelerate-growth in regions where we previously had minimal market presence.
gept.example_zh: 策略合作關係將加速我們在過去市場份額極少的區域成長。

gept.example_en: The advisory-board includes experienced executives who provide strategic guidance without daily management responsibilities.
gept.example_zh: 顧問委員會由經驗豐富的高階主管組成，提供策略指導但不負責日常管理。

gept.example_en: The new pricing strategy significantly improved our bottom-line without losing any major loyal customer.
gept.example_zh: 新的定價策略顯著改善了我們的淨利，且未流失任何重要忠實客戶。

gept.example_en: The management buyout allowed senior executives to acquire the company from its previous parent firm.
gept.example_zh: 管理層收購讓資深主管得以從原母公司手中買下這家公司。

gept.example_en: Accurate capacity-planning ensures factories can meet demand without holding excessive idle equipment.
gept.example_zh: 精準的產能規劃能讓工廠滿足需求，同時不必持有過多閒置設備。

gept.example_en: Every soldier and corporate employee must respect the chain-of-command when escalating significant issues.
gept.example_zh: 每位士兵與企業員工在上報重大議題時都必須尊重指揮體系。

gept.example_en: We rely on channel-partners to reach small businesses in markets where we lack direct presence.
gept.example_zh: 在我們缺乏直接據點的市場，我們依靠通路夥伴接觸小型企業。

gept.example_en: Our proprietary algorithm gives us a clear competitive-edge in personalized recommendation accuracy and speed.
gept.example_zh: 我們專有的演算法在個人化推薦的準確度與速度上帶來明顯的競爭優勢。

gept.example_en: Strong conflict-resolution skills are essential for project managers leading diverse cross-cultural teams.
gept.example_zh: 強健的衝突解決能力對帶領多元跨文化團隊的專案經理至關重要。

gept.example_en: Every responsible manager prepares a contingency-plan for delays, budget overruns, or sudden personnel changes.
gept.example_zh: 每位負責任的經理都會為延遲、預算超支或突發人事變動準備應急計畫。

gept.example_en: The new credit-line gives our firm flexibility to fund inventory before the busy holiday season.
gept.example_zh: 新的信用額度讓我們公司能在繁忙的假期前彈性地為庫存提供資金。

gept.example_en: Targeting early-adopter customers helps refine the product before pursuing a broader mainstream launch.
gept.example_zh: 鎖定早期採用者客戶有助於在進行更廣泛的主流上市前完善產品。

gept.example_en: The updated employee-handbook clearly explains policies on remote work, vacation, and grievance procedures.
gept.example_zh: 更新後的員工手冊清楚說明遠距工作、休假與申訴程序的相關政策。

gept.example_en: The annual engagement-survey revealed that workload pressure remained the top concern across all departments.
gept.example_zh: 年度敬業度調查顯示，工作量壓力仍是所有部門最關切的問題。

gept.example_en: An executive-coach helps senior leaders identify blind spots and develop more effective communication habits.
gept.example_zh: 高階主管教練協助資深領導者找出盲點，並培養更有效的溝通習慣。

gept.example_en: An independent external-audit confirmed that our financial statements complied with all relevant accounting standards.
gept.example_zh: 獨立的外部稽核確認我們的財務報表符合所有相關的會計準則。

gept.example_en: After years of profitable growth, the firm decided to go-public on the New York exchange.
gept.example_zh: 經過多年獲利成長後，這家公司決定在紐約證券交易所上市。

gept.example_en: Investors closely track each growth-metric, including active users, revenue, and customer acquisition cost trends.
gept.example_zh: 投資人密切追蹤每項成長指標，包括活躍用戶、營收與獲客成本趨勢。

gept.example_en: Identifying and developing each high-performer early helps companies build a strong leadership bench.
gept.example_zh: 及早辨識並培養每位高績效者，有助公司建立堅實的領導梯隊。

gept.example_en: The holding-company owns several different brands but allows each subsidiary to operate quite independently.
gept.example_zh: 這家控股公司擁有數個不同品牌，但讓每家子公司獨立運作。

gept.example_en: Encouraging staff to innovate-process at every level keeps the organization adaptable and resilient.
gept.example_zh: 鼓勵員工在各層級創新流程，能讓組織保持適應力與韌性。

gept.example_en: The dedicated integration-team works with both firms to combine systems after the merger closes.
gept.example_zh: 專責的整合團隊與雙方公司合作，在併購完成後整合系統。

gept.example_en: Every department reports key-performance indicators to the executive committee at the end of each month.
gept.example_zh: 每個部門在每月結束時向執行委員會回報關鍵績效指標。

gept.example_en: Rising macroeconomic uncertainty made many companies postpone large capital projects until the next year.
gept.example_zh: 總體經濟不確定性上升，使許多公司將大型資本專案延至隔年。

gept.example_en: Higher market-penetration in rural regions required adapting both the product features and pricing strategy.
gept.example_zh: 提升在鄉村地區的市場滲透，需要同時調整產品功能與定價策略。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 關鍵的；任務至關重要的
gept.example_en: Backup systems protect mission-critical applications so customer transactions continue during any unexpected hardware failure.
gept.example_zh: 備援系統保護關鍵應用程式，讓客戶交易在任何意外硬體故障時仍能持續。

gept.example_en: A respectful off-boarding process can turn departing employees into loyal alumni and future client referrers.
gept.example_zh: 尊重的離職流程能將離職員工轉化為忠誠的校友，並成為未來的客戶推薦人。

gept.example_en: Banks invest heavily in systems and training to manage operational-risk from internal errors and external threats.
gept.example_zh: 銀行大量投資於系統與訓練，以管理來自內部錯誤與外部威脅的營運風險。

gept.example_en: Choosing to fund the new factory carries an opportunity-cost of delaying the research expansion program.
gept.example_zh: 選擇出資興建新工廠的機會成本，是延後研究擴張計畫。

gept.example_en: The partnership-agreement clearly specifies each party's responsibilities, revenue sharing rules, and dispute resolution procedures.
gept.example_zh: 合作協議清楚規定雙方的責任、營收分配規則與爭議解決程序。

gept.example_en: The investment has an estimated payback-period of three years before generating positive net returns.
gept.example_zh: 這項投資預估的回收期為三年，之後才會產生正向的淨報酬。

gept.example_en: Employees receive a performance-bonus each year based on individual results and overall company profitability.
gept.example_zh: 員工每年根據個人成果與公司整體獲利能力獲得績效獎金。

gept.example_en: Disciplined pipeline-management helps sales leaders forecast revenue more accurately and identify deals at risk.
gept.example_zh: 嚴謹的銷售管道管理能幫助業務主管更準確預測營收，並找出有風險的交易。

gept.example_en: After each major launch, we run a post-mortem-review to capture lessons that improve future projects.
gept.example_zh: 每次重大上市後，我們都會進行事後檢討，以汲取能改善未來專案的教訓。

gept.example_en: Process-mapping helped the team uncover redundant steps that wasted both time and money each week.
gept.example_zh: 流程圖繪製幫助團隊找出每週浪費時間與金錢的重複步驟。

gept.example_en: Detailed profitability-analysis showed that the small business segment generated higher margins than enterprise clients.
gept.example_zh: 詳細的獲利分析顯示，小型企業客群的毛利高於大型企業客戶。

gept.example_en: The prototype-test with twelve users uncovered usability problems we never imagined during internal design reviews.
gept.example_zh: 與十二位使用者進行的原型測試，發現了我們在內部設計檢討中從未想到的可用性問題。

gept.example_en: Qualitative-data from open interviews often reveals motivations that numerical survey results cannot fully explain.
gept.example_zh: 開放式訪談的質性資料常揭露數字問卷結果無法完全解釋的動機。

gept.example_en: Strong quantitative-data persuaded executives to approve the new customer segmentation strategy without further debate.
gept.example_zh: 強而有力的量化資料說服高階主管核准新的客戶區隔策略，毋需進一步辯論。

gept.example_en: Rapid-prototyping lets designers test five ideas in the time it once took to test one.
gept.example_zh: 快速原型製作讓設計師能在過去測試一個構想的時間內測試五個構想。

gept.example_en: The team exceeded its annual revenue-target by fifteen percent thanks to several large enterprise deals.
gept.example_zh: 由於幾筆大型企業訂單，團隊超出年度營收目標達百分之十五。

gept.example_en: Insurance and diversified suppliers are common risk-mitigation strategies adopted by careful global manufacturers.
gept.example_zh: 保險與多元化供應商是審慎的全球製造商常用的風險緩解策略。

gept.example_en: The founders raised one million dollars in seed-funding from friends, family, and one angel investor.
gept.example_zh: 創辦人從朋友、家人與一位天使投資人募得一百萬美元的種子資金。

gept.example_en: At the annual shareholder-meeting, the chairman presented results and answered tough questions about future strategy.
gept.example_zh: 在年度股東會上，董事長報告了業績並回答了關於未來策略的尖銳問題。

gept.example_en: Breaking down silo-mentality requires leaders who reward collaboration across organizational departmental boundaries every quarter.
gept.example_zh: 打破本位主義需要每季都獎勵跨組織部門合作的領導者。

gept.example_en: Our sourcing-strategy balances cost savings with the need for reliable suppliers and ethical labor practices.
gept.example_zh: 我們的採購策略在節省成本、可靠供應商與合乎倫理的勞動實務間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: The successful spin-off allowed the new entity to focus exclusively on its high-growth medical device business.
gept.example_zh: 這次成功的分拆讓新公司能專注於其高成長的醫療器材業務。

gept.example_en: The steering-committee meets monthly to review project progress and remove obstacles requiring senior decisions.
gept.example_zh: 指導委員會每月開會檢視專案進度，並排除需要高階決策的障礙。

gept.example_en: The acquisition target offered a strong strategic-fit with our existing portfolio of premium consumer brands.
gept.example_zh: 這個併購標的與我們現有的高端消費品牌組合具有高度策略契合度。

gept.example_en: The merger generated a real synergy-effect by combining the sales teams and the shared distribution network.
gept.example_zh: 這次合併透過結合業務團隊與共用的配銷網絡，產生真實的綜效。

gept.example_en: Each tactical-plan translates broad strategy into specific quarterly actions with measurable, time-bound performance targets.
gept.example_zh: 每份戰術計畫將宏觀策略轉化為具體的季度行動，並設有可衡量、有時限的績效目標。

gept.example_en: Investors loved the strong top-line growth even though profit margins declined slightly during the quarter.
gept.example_zh: 儘管本季毛利率略為下滑，投資人仍喜愛強勁的營收成長。

gept.example_en: The departing CEO designed a careful transition-plan to ensure his successor would inherit smooth operations.
gept.example_zh: 即將離任的執行長精心設計了過渡計畫，確保繼任者能接手順暢的營運。

gept.example_en: When a business unit consistently underperforms expectations, the leadership team must consider divesting it.
gept.example_zh: 當某個業務單位持續表現不佳，管理團隊就必須考慮將其分割出售。

gept.example_en: Sufficient working-capital is essential for paying suppliers and employees while waiting for customer collections.
gept.example_zh: 充足的營運資金對於支付供應商和員工、同時等待客戶款項至關重要。

gept.example_en: An inverted yield-curve often signals that investors expect an economic recession in the coming months.
gept.example_zh: 倒掛的殖利率曲線通常顯示投資人預期未來幾個月會出現經濟衰退。

gept.example_en: Regulators launched an anti-trust investigation after several smaller rivals complained about unfair competitive practices.
gept.example_zh: 在多家小型競爭對手抱怨不公平競爭行為後，監管機構展開反托拉斯調查。

gept.example_en: Strong business-acumen helps technical leaders translate engineering decisions into clear financial impact for executives.
gept.example_zh: 強健的商業敏銳度能幫助技術領導者將工程決策轉化為對主管清楚的財務影響。

gept.example_en: Smart investors follow the old principle to buy-low and sell when prices significantly recover.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的投資人遵循古老的低買原則，並在價格大幅回升時賣出。

gept.example_en: A transparent career-ladder shows employees exactly what skills they need to reach each promotion level.
gept.example_zh: 透明的職涯階梯讓員工清楚知道達到每個晉升層級所需的技能。

gept.example_en: A strong compliance-program protects the firm from regulatory fines and the reputational damage they can cause.
gept.example_zh: 完善的法遵計畫保護公司免於監管罰款及其可能造成的聲譽傷害。

gept.example_en: Sound corporate-governance practices increase investor confidence and lower the firm's overall cost of capital.
gept.example_zh: 健全的公司治理實務能提升投資人信心，並降低公司整體資金成本。

gept.example_en: Each dashboard-metric updates in real time so managers can spot emerging problems within minutes.
gept.example_zh: 每項儀表板指標即時更新，讓經理可在數分鐘內發現浮現中的問題。

gept.example_en: Each project starts with a clear deliverable-list specifying exactly what must be completed by when.
gept.example_zh: 每個專案都以明確的交付項目清單開始，精確規定何時必須完成哪些事項。

gept.example_en: Accurate demand-forecast data helps factories produce the right quantities and avoid both stockouts and waste.
gept.example_zh: 精準的需求預測資料能幫助工廠生產適當的數量，避免缺貨與浪費。

gept.example_en: Disciplinary actions must follow due-process rules to protect both the employee and the wider organization.
gept.example_zh: 懲處行動必須遵循正當程序規則，以保護員工本人與整個組織。

gept.example_en: A strong employer-brand makes recruiting skilled engineers much easier and significantly reduces hiring costs.
gept.example_zh: 強健的雇主品牌讓招募優秀工程師容易得多，並大幅降低招聘成本。

gept.example_en: Startups often rely on creative growth-hacking tactics because they cannot afford traditional advertising budgets.
gept.example_zh: 新創公司常仰賴具創意的成長駭客手法，因為它們負擔不起傳統廣告預算。

gept.example_en: A horizontal-merger combines two competitors at the same level of the same overall industry.
gept.example_zh: 水平合併是將同一產業中同層級的兩家競爭對手結合在一起。

gept.example_en: Every team sets quarterly kpi-target numbers aligned with the overall corporate strategic priorities.
gept.example_zh: 每個團隊都根據整體公司策略優先事項設定季度 KPI 目標數值。

gept.example_en: Healthy labor-relations require ongoing dialogue between management and employee representatives about working conditions and compensation.
gept.example_zh: 健康的勞資關係需要管理層與員工代表就工作條件與薪酬持續對話。

gept.example_en: Online retailers profit from the long-tail of niche products that physical stores cannot stock.
gept.example_zh: 線上零售商從實體店無法存貨的長尾利基商品中獲利。

gept.example_en: A thorough needs-assessment ensures consulting recommendations actually solve the client's most pressing real problems.
gept.example_zh: 徹底的需求評估能確保顧問建議真正解決客戶最迫切的真實問題。

gept.example_en: She signed a non-compete agreement that prevents her from joining competitors for one year.
gept.example_zh: 她簽署了一份競業條款，使她在一年內不得加入競爭對手公司。

gept.example_en: The factory plans to off-load slow-moving inventory to discount retailers before the new product launch.
gept.example_zh: 工廠計畫在新產品上市前將滯銷庫存轉移給折扣零售商。

gept.example_en: Improving operating-margin requires either lifting prices, controlling expenses, or boosting productivity across the value chain.
gept.example_zh: 改善營業利益率需要提高售價、控制費用，或提升整個價值鏈的生產力。

gept.example_en: The operational-plan translates strategy into specific monthly targets that frontline teams can practically execute.
gept.example_zh: 營運計畫將策略轉化為第一線團隊可實際執行的具體月度目標。

gept.example_en: Thoughtful organizational-design balances clear accountability with the flexibility needed for fast cross-team collaboration daily.
gept.example_zh: 周全的組織設計能在明確當責與快速跨團隊合作所需的彈性之間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: Excellent people-management skills include listening carefully, giving honest feedback, and developing each team member.
gept.example_zh: 卓越的人員管理能力包括用心傾聽、提供誠實回饋與培養每位團隊成員。

gept.example_en: A generous profit-sharing program aligns employee interests with overall company financial performance during strong years.
gept.example_zh: 慷慨的利潤分享計畫在公司表現強勁時，讓員工利益與公司整體財務表現一致。

gept.example_en: Clear reporting-line definitions help employees understand whom to consult before making important operational decisions.
gept.example_zh: 明確的報告路線定義能幫助員工在做出重要營運決策前知道該諮詢誰。

gept.example_en: The phased rollout-plan introduces the new system to one region per month over the year.
gept.example_zh: 分階段推行計畫在一年內每月將新系統導入一個區域。

gept.example_en: The contract defines a detailed scope-of-work and explicit milestones to prevent misunderstandings with the vendor.
gept.example_zh: 合約定義了詳細的工作範圍與明確的里程碑，以避免與供應商發生誤解。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) 列入決選名單
gept.example_en: The hiring committee will short-list five candidates from over two hundred competitive initial applicants.
gept.example_zh: 招聘委員會將從兩百多位競爭激烈的初期應徵者中決選出五位人選。
