gept.example_en: Ambitious stretch-goal targets motivate teams to think bigger than incremental improvements over the prior year.
gept.example_zh: 雄心勃勃的延伸目標激勵團隊思考超越前一年漸進式改善的更宏大可能。

gept.example_en: Investing in long-term supplier-relationship management secures preferential pricing and priority during inevitable shortages.
gept.example_zh: 投資長期供應商關係管理能在無可避免的短缺時取得優惠價格與優先順位。

gept.example_en: A simple swot-analysis identifies strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, and threats that shape strategic planning decisions effectively.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的 SWOT 分析能識別形塑策略規劃決策的優勢、劣勢、機會與威脅。

gept.example_en: Investing heavily in talent-development creates a strong internal pipeline and reduces dependence on external hiring.
gept.example_zh: 大力投資人才發展能建立強健的內部人才庫，並降低對外部招聘的依賴。

gept.example_en: Through vertical-integration, the firm now controls everything from raw materials to direct customer delivery worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 透過垂直整合，這家公司現在掌握從原料到全球客戶直接交付的所有環節。

gept.example_en: Every bondholder will receive a coupon payment at the end of this quarter.
gept.example_zh: 每位債券持有人將於本季末收到一筆票息款項。

gept.example_en: The inverted yield curve has historically signaled an approaching economic downturn.
gept.example_zh: 殖利率曲線倒掛在歷史上往往預示經濟即將下行。

gept.example_en: Compare the annual percentage rate before choosing which credit card to apply for.
gept.example_zh: 申辦信用卡前請先比較年利率。

gept.example_en: The bond pays a coupon rate of five percent semiannually to its investors.
gept.example_zh: 此債券每半年向投資人支付百分之五的票面利率。

gept.example_en: The bond will be redeemed at its face value of one thousand dollars upon maturity.
gept.example_zh: 該債券到期時將按面額一千美元贖回。

gept.example_en: The shares were originally issued at a par value of one dollar each.
gept.example_zh: 這些股票最初以每股一美元的票面金額發行。

gept.example_en: The tech giant's market capitalization surpassed two trillion dollars last week.
gept.example_zh: 這家科技巨頭的市值上週突破兩兆美元。

gept.example_en: Many retirees prefer blue-chip stocks because of their stable dividends and lower risk.
gept.example_zh: 許多退休人士偏好績優股，因為股息穩定且風險較低。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 低價股；雞蛋水餃股
gept.example_en: Trading penny stocks can be very risky due to extreme price swings.
gept.example_zh: 交易低價股因價格劇烈波動而非常具風險。

gept.example_en: An exchange-traded fund lets small investors hold many stocks with one purchase.
gept.example_zh: 指數股票型基金讓小投資人以一次買入持有多檔股票。

gept.example_en: An index fund tracks a benchmark like the broad market without active management.
gept.example_zh: 指數型基金追蹤大盤指標而不進行主動管理。

gept.example_en: Portfolio diversification helps reduce risk by spreading money across many assets.
gept.example_zh: 投資組合分散可將資金散布於多項資產以降低風險。

gept.example_en: Younger investors often choose an asset allocation that favors stocks over bonds.
gept.example_zh: 年輕投資人通常選擇偏重股票而非債券的資產配置。

gept.example_en: Investors demand a higher risk premium when economic uncertainty increases sharply.
gept.example_zh: 當經濟不確定性大幅升高時，投資人會要求更高的風險溢酬。

gept.example_en: The firm filed for insolvency after its main customer suddenly stopped paying.
gept.example_zh: 該公司在主要客戶突然停止付款後申請無力償債。

gept.example_en: Refinancing the mortgage at a lower rate could save the couple thousands yearly.
gept.example_zh: 以較低利率將房貸轉貸可為這對夫妻每年省下數千元。

gept.example_en: Her variable-rate loan became much more expensive after the central bank raised rates.
gept.example_zh: 在央行升息後，她的浮動利率貸款變得貴上許多。

gept.example_en: Major banks raised their prime rate following the latest policy decision.
gept.example_zh: 在最新的政策決議後，主要銀行調高了基準利率。

gept.example_en: The central bank lowered the discount rate to encourage banks to lend more freely.
gept.example_zh: 央行降低貼現率以鼓勵銀行更積極放貸。

gept.example_en: Private banking offers personalized services to wealthy clients with complex finances.
gept.example_zh: 私人銀行業務為財務狀況複雜的高資產客戶提供量身服務。

gept.example_en: She hired a wealth management firm to help plan her family's long-term finances.
gept.example_zh: 她聘請一家財富管理公司協助規劃家庭的長期財務。

gept.example_en: The robo-advisor automatically rebalances his portfolio whenever it drifts from targets.
gept.example_zh: 當投資組合偏離目標時，機器人理財顧問會自動再平衡。

gept.example_en: Most experts recommend you rebalance your portfolio at least once every year.
gept.example_zh: 多數專家建議至少每年將投資組合再平衡一次。

gept.example_en: Short selling allows traders to profit when the price of a stock falls.
gept.example_zh: 放空可讓交易者在股價下跌時獲利。

gept.example_en: She took a long position in technology shares before the strong earnings report.
gept.example_zh: 她在亮眼財報前於科技股建立多頭部位。

gept.example_en: Closing a short position requires buying back the borrowed shares at market price.
gept.example_zh: 結清空頭部位需按市價回補借來的股票。

gept.example_en: Margin trading lets investors borrow money from a broker to amplify potential returns.
gept.example_zh: 融資交易讓投資人向券商借款以放大潛在報酬。

gept.example_en: The trader received a margin call after his shares dropped sharply overnight.
gept.example_zh: 在他的股票一夜大跌後，這位交易員收到追繳保證金通知。

gept.example_en: Regulators monitor each bank's leverage ratio to ensure it can absorb sudden losses.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構監控每家銀行的槓桿比率，以確保其能吸收突發虧損。

gept.example_en: Farmers use a futures contract to lock in a selling price for their crops.
gept.example_zh: 農民利用期貨合約鎖定作物售價。

gept.example_en: An options contract gives the buyer a right but not an obligation to trade shares.
gept.example_zh: 選擇權合約給予買方交易股票的權利但無義務。

gept.example_en: A call option allows the holder to buy shares at a fixed strike price.
gept.example_zh: 買權允許持有人以固定履約價買進股票。

gept.example_en: Buying a put option can protect investors against a sudden drop in the stock.
gept.example_zh: 買進賣權可保護投資人避免股價突然下跌。

gept.example_en: The option becomes profitable once the share price moves past the strike price.
gept.example_zh: 當股價超越履約價時，該選擇權即開始獲利。

gept.example_en: Each options contract has an expiration date after which it becomes worthless.
gept.example_zh: 每份選擇權合約都有到期日，之後即無價值。

gept.example_en: An interest rate swap lets two companies exchange their loan payment obligations.
gept.example_zh: 利率交換合約讓兩家公司交換各自的貸款付款義務。

gept.example_en: Exporters often use a forward contract to lock in tomorrow's foreign exchange rates.
gept.example_zh: 出口商常用遠期合約鎖定未來的匯率。

gept.example_en: A speculator buys assets hoping their price will rise quickly within a short time.
gept.example_zh: 投機者買入資產，期望其價格能在短時間內快速上漲。

gept.example_en: Heavy trading volume often signals strong investor conviction about a price move.
gept.example_zh: 巨額成交量通常代表投資人對價格走勢有強烈信念。

gept.example_en: A market maker provides liquidity by continuously quoting buy and sell prices.
gept.example_zh: 造市者持續報出買賣價以提供流動性。

gept.example_en: A narrow bid-ask spread usually indicates a very liquid and competitive market.
gept.example_zh: 狹窄的買賣價差通常代表市場流動性高且競爭激烈。

gept.example_en: The initial public offering raised five hundred million dollars for the young company.
gept.example_zh: 首次公開發行為這家年輕公司募得五億美元。

gept.example_en: The bond's issuer promised to make payments to investors twice every year.
gept.example_zh: 該債券的發行人承諾每年向投資人付款兩次。

gept.example_en: The value of the derivative depends entirely on the price of its underlying asset.
gept.example_zh: 該衍生性商品的價值完全取決於其標的資產的價格。

gept.example_en: Investors like municipal bonds because the interest is often exempt from federal tax.
gept.example_zh: 投資人喜愛市政債券，因為其利息常免徵聯邦稅。

gept.example_en: A junk bond pays higher interest but carries a much greater risk of default.
gept.example_zh: 垃圾債券利息較高，但違約風險也大得多。

gept.example_en: A cash flow statement reveals how money actually moves into and out of the firm.
gept.example_zh: 現金流量表揭示資金實際如何流入與流出公司。

gept.example_en: The company's accounts receivable grew quickly because customers paid more slowly.
gept.example_zh: 由於客戶付款變慢，公司的應收帳款迅速增加。

gept.example_en: She updated the accounts payable ledger to reflect this month's supplier invoices.
gept.example_zh: 她更新應付帳款分類帳以反映本月的供應商發票。

gept.example_en: Every business transaction is eventually recorded in the company's general ledger.
gept.example_zh: 每筆營業交易最終都會記錄在公司的總帳中。

gept.example_en: The accountant made a journal entry to correct last month's misclassified expense.
gept.example_zh: 會計做了一筆分錄以更正上月分類錯誤的費用。

gept.example_en: Modern accounting uses a double-entry system where every debit has a matching credit.
gept.example_zh: 現代會計採用複式記帳系統，每筆借方都有相對的貸方。

gept.example_en: Accurate bookkeeping helps small businesses prepare reliable tax returns each year.
gept.example_zh: 準確的簿記有助小企業每年準備可靠的稅務申報。

gept.example_en: An external audit is required each year to confirm that the financial statements are fair.
gept.example_zh: 每年都需要外部審計以確認財務報表公允。

gept.example_en: Strong internal control procedures reduce the risk of fraud and accounting errors.
gept.example_zh: 強健的內部控制程序可降低舞弊與會計錯誤的風險。

gept.example_en: Employers handle income tax withholding directly from each worker's regular paycheck.
gept.example_zh: 雇主直接從每位員工的固定薪資中預扣所得稅。

gept.example_en: She owed capital gains tax after selling her investment property at a large profit.
gept.example_zh: 她在以高額獲利出售投資房產後欠下資本利得稅。

gept.example_en: Some families set up trusts to legally reduce the estate tax burden on heirs.
gept.example_zh: 有些家庭設立信託以合法降低繼承人的遺產稅負擔。

gept.example_en: An inheritance tax is paid by people who receive money from a deceased relative.
gept.example_zh: 繼承稅由從已故親屬處獲得款項的人繳納。

gept.example_en: His employer pays his salary by direct deposit on the last day of each month.
gept.example_zh: 他的雇主每月最後一天以直接存款方式支付薪水。

gept.example_en: Routine bill payments often travel through the automated clearing house network overnight.
gept.example_zh: 例行帳單付款常於夜間透過自動清算系統網路完成。

gept.example_en: Analysts often build a valuation model to estimate the fair price of a company.
gept.example_zh: 分析師常建立估值模型以估算公司的合理價格。

gept.example_en: Projects with a positive net present value are usually worth pursuing for shareholders.
gept.example_zh: 淨現值為正的專案對股東而言通常值得推動。

gept.example_en: A consistently high return on equity often indicates a well-managed and profitable business.
gept.example_zh: 持續較高的股東權益報酬率通常代表企業管理良好且具獲利能力。

gept.example_en: Analysts watch earnings per share carefully because it strongly affects stock prices.
gept.example_zh: 分析師密切關注每股盈餘，因為它強烈影響股價。

gept.example_en: A high price-to-earnings ratio may suggest investors expect rapid future growth.
gept.example_zh: 高本益比可能代表投資人預期未來快速成長。

gept.example_en: A very high payout ratio leaves the company little room to reinvest in growth.
gept.example_zh: 極高的配息率使公司幾乎沒有再投資成長的空間。

gept.example_en: The firm used retained earnings to fund a new factory without borrowing money.
gept.example_zh: 公司動用保留盈餘興建新工廠而毋需借款。

gept.example_en: Strong working capital ensures the business can pay its short-term operating bills.
gept.example_zh: 充裕的營運資金確保企業能支付短期經營帳單。

gept.example_en: The current ratio compares short-term assets with short-term obligations of a firm.
gept.example_zh: 流動比率比較公司的短期資產與短期負債。

gept.example_en: A high debt-to-equity ratio means a company relies heavily on borrowed funds.
gept.example_zh: 高負債權益比代表公司高度仰賴借款資金。

gept.example_en: Software firms often enjoy a higher gross margin than traditional manufacturing companies.
gept.example_zh: 軟體公司毛利率通常高於傳統製造業。

gept.example_en: Rising commodity prices pushed the firm's cost of goods sold sharply higher this quarter.
gept.example_zh: 原物料漲價使公司本季銷貨成本大幅上升。

gept.example_en: Reducing overhead such as rent and utilities helped the small store stay profitable.
gept.example_zh: 削減租金與水電等經常費用幫助這家小店維持獲利。

gept.example_en: Rent is a typical fixed cost that companies must pay regardless of monthly sales.
gept.example_zh: 租金是公司無論月銷量如何都必須支付的典型固定成本。

gept.example_en: Variable cost like raw materials usually rises and falls with overall production volume.
gept.example_zh: 如原料等變動成本通常會隨整體生產量上下變動。

gept.example_en: The marginal cost of streaming one more song online is nearly zero for the platform.
gept.example_zh: 對平台而言，多串流一首歌的邊際成本幾乎為零。

gept.example_en: Wise managers ignore sunk cost when deciding whether to keep a struggling project.
gept.example_zh: 明智的管理者在決定是否續推失敗專案時會忽略沉沒成本。

gept.example_en: Luxury goods generally face elastic demand because consumers can easily skip them.
gept.example_zh: 奢侈品通常面對彈性需求，因為消費者很容易不買。

gept.example_en: The country's gross domestic product expanded by three percent last year.
gept.example_zh: 該國去年國內生產毛額成長百分之三。

gept.example_en: The consumer price index measures changes in the cost of a typical household basket.
gept.example_zh: 消費者物價指數衡量典型家庭消費組合成本的變動。

gept.example_en: The cost of living in major cities has climbed faster than average wage growth.
gept.example_zh: 主要城市的生活成本上升速度超過平均薪資成長。

gept.example_en: Stagflation combines slow economic growth with stubbornly high inflation and joblessness.
gept.example_zh: 停滯性通膨同時出現經濟成長緩慢、通膨居高與失業嚴重。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 通貨緊縮性減緩；通膨趨緩
gept.example_en: Disinflation means prices are still rising but at a slower pace than before.
gept.example_zh: 通膨趨緩指物價仍在上漲，但速度較先前慢。

gept.example_en: Headline inflation includes volatile items like food and energy in its calculation.
gept.example_zh: 整體通膨的計算包含食品與能源等波動項目。

gept.example_en: Central banks watch core inflation closely because it excludes the most volatile prices.
gept.example_zh: 央行密切關注核心通膨，因為它排除了波動最大的物價。

gept.example_en: Labor force participation has slowly declined as more people retire from full-time work.
gept.example_zh: 隨著愈多人退出全職工作，勞動參與率緩慢下降。

gept.example_en: The jobless rate fell for the third straight month as hiring continued to strengthen.
gept.example_zh: 在招聘持續走強下，失業率連續第三個月下降。

gept.example_en: Underemployment occurs when skilled workers can only find low-paying or part-time jobs.
gept.example_zh: 當熟練工作者只能找到低薪或兼職工作時即出現就業不足。

gept.example_en: The current account tracks trade, services, and investment income with the rest of the world.
gept.example_zh: 經常帳追蹤與世界各國的貿易、服務與投資收益。

gept.example_en: The balance of payments records every monetary transaction between one nation and others.
gept.example_zh: 國際收支記錄一國與其他國家間的每一筆貨幣交易。

gept.example_en: Foreign direct investment built new factories that created thousands of local jobs.
gept.example_zh: 外國直接投資興建的新工廠創造了數千個在地工作機會。

gept.example_en: Massive capital flight followed the announcement of stricter currency controls.
gept.example_zh: 在宣布更嚴格的外匯管制後，發生大規模資本外逃。

gept.example_en: The country maintained a currency peg to the dollar for nearly twenty years.
gept.example_zh: 該國將其貨幣與美元掛鉤近二十年。

gept.example_en: Strong appreciation of the euro made overseas holidays more expensive for residents.
gept.example_zh: 歐元大幅升值使當地居民出國度假成本上升。

gept.example_en: Companies use hedging to protect themselves from sudden moves in commodity prices.
gept.example_zh: 公司利用避險來保護自己免受原物料價格突然波動的衝擊。

gept.example_en: Many families consider real estate a relatively safe long-term store of value.
gept.example_zh: 許多家庭視不動產為相對安全的長期保值工具。

gept.example_en: Properties in tourist areas often offer a higher rental yield than ordinary suburbs.
gept.example_zh: 觀光區的物件租金報酬率通常高於一般郊區。

gept.example_en: A real estate investment trust lets ordinary investors hold large commercial buildings.
gept.example_zh: 不動產投資信託讓一般投資人得以持有大型商用建築。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 次級的（信用較差的）
gept.example_en: Reckless subprime lending eventually contributed to a serious global financial crisis.
gept.example_zh: 不負責任的次級放款最終導致嚴重的全球金融危機。

gept.example_en: Central banks act as lender of last resort during severe banking crises.
gept.example_zh: 在嚴重銀行危機中，央行扮演最後貸款人的角色。

gept.example_en: Aggressive monetary tightening helped the central bank slow rapidly rising prices.
gept.example_zh: 積極的貨幣緊縮幫助央行抑制快速上漲的物價。

gept.example_en: Many investors expect a new easing cycle once inflation falls back to target levels.
gept.example_zh: 許多投資人預期通膨回到目標水準後將展開新的寬鬆循環。

gept.example_en: An open market operation adjusts the money supply by trading government securities.
gept.example_zh: 公開市場操作透過買賣政府證券調節貨幣供給。

gept.example_en: Banks must keep a fraction of deposits aside to meet the reserve requirement.
gept.example_zh: 銀行必須將部分存款保留以滿足存款準備率。

gept.example_en: A rapid increase in the money supply can eventually push up consumer prices.
gept.example_zh: 貨幣供給快速增加最終可能推升消費者物價。

gept.example_en: Rising national debt could limit future spending on schools and infrastructure projects.
gept.example_zh: 國債上升可能限制未來在學校與基礎建設上的支出。

gept.example_en: Rumors about the bank's losses triggered a panicked bank run by worried customers.
gept.example_zh: 關於銀行虧損的傳言使焦慮的客戶引發恐慌性擠兌。

gept.example_en: Deposit insurance protects most household savings up to a defined legal limit.
gept.example_zh: 存款保險在法定上限內保障多數家庭儲蓄。

gept.example_en: Regulators run a stress test to see if banks can survive a severe economic shock.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構進行壓力測試以檢視銀行能否撐過嚴重經濟衝擊。

gept.example_en: Strong capital adequacy helps banks remain stable during periods of heavy loan losses.
gept.example_zh: 充足的資本適足性有助銀行在大量貸款損失期間維持穩定。

gept.example_en: Each country chooses an exchange rate regime that fits its economic conditions.
gept.example_zh: 每個國家依其經濟情況選擇合適的匯率制度。

gept.example_en: Under a floating exchange rate, supply and demand determine the daily value of currency.
gept.example_zh: 在浮動匯率制度下，貨幣的每日價值由供需決定。

gept.example_en: Purchasing power parity compares incomes by what a typical basket of goods can buy.
gept.example_zh: 購買力平價以典型商品組合可購買量比較不同國家的所得。

gept.example_en: A drop in consumer confidence often leads to weaker retail sales the following months.
gept.example_zh: 消費者信心下滑常導致接下來幾個月零售銷售疲軟。

gept.example_en: Policymakers hope for a soft landing where inflation falls without causing a recession.
gept.example_zh: 決策者希望軟著陸，即通膨下降而不引發衰退。

gept.example_en: Sharp rate hikes raised fears of a hard landing for the once strong economy.
gept.example_zh: 大幅升息引發對曾經強勁經濟硬著陸的憂慮。

gept.example_en: New factory orders are often treated as a useful leading indicator of growth.
gept.example_zh: 新接訂單常被視為衡量成長的有用領先指標。

gept.example_en: Industrial production is a coincident indicator that moves alongside the broader economy.
gept.example_zh: 工業生產是與整體經濟同步變動的同步指標。

gept.example_en: The technology boom in the late nineteen-nineties created huge fortunes very quickly.
gept.example_zh: 一九九零年代末期的科技繁榮在很短時間內創造了巨大財富。

gept.example_en: The startup used its seed funding to build a basic version of the product.
gept.example_zh: 這家新創公司利用種子資金打造產品的基本版本。

gept.example_en: The inventor used crowdfunding to gather money from thousands of online supporters.
gept.example_zh: 這位發明者利用群眾募資從數千名線上支持者處募得資金。

gept.example_en: Many fintech apps let users invest and transfer money straight from their phones.
gept.example_zh: 許多金融科技應用程式讓使用者可直接用手機投資與轉帳。

gept.example_en: Vendors at the night market display a QR payment code for quick small purchases.
gept.example_zh: 夜市攤商展示 QR 碼支付以方便小額快速付款。

gept.example_en: A stablecoin tries to keep a steady value by linking itself to a major currency.
gept.example_zh: 穩定幣藉由連結主要貨幣以維持穩定價值。

gept.example_en: Cryptocurrency mining uses powerful computers and consumes a great deal of electricity.
gept.example_zh: 加密貨幣挖礦使用強大電腦並消耗大量電力。

gept.example_en: Make sure you copy the correct wallet address before sending any digital currency.
gept.example_zh: 在傳送任何數位貨幣前，請確認你複製了正確的錢包地址。

gept.example_en: A non-fungible token represents unique ownership of a digital artwork or collectible.
gept.example_zh: 非同質化代幣代表對某數位藝術品或收藏的獨特所有權。

gept.example_en: Developers build financial applications on top of a smart contract platform.
gept.example_zh: 開發者在智能合約平台之上構建金融應用程式。

gept.example_en: The regulator fined the firm for failing to protect sensitive customer data properly.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構因該公司未妥善保護敏感客戶資料而開罰。

gept.example_en: Insider trading is illegal because it uses secret information for an unfair advantage.
gept.example_zh: 內線交易屬違法，因其利用秘密資訊取得不公平優勢。

gept.example_en: Paying only the minimum payment each month means your debt will grow very slowly.
gept.example_zh: 每月只繳最低應繳金額會讓你的債務減少得非常緩慢。

gept.example_en: Charges made within one billing cycle appear together on your next monthly statement.
gept.example_zh: 在同一帳單週期內的消費會一起出現在下一份月結帳單上。

gept.example_en: Customers can pay in twelve monthly installments instead of one large upfront payment.
gept.example_zh: 顧客可選擇分十二期月付，而非一次預付大筆款項。

gept.example_en: Borrowers may collateralize a loan by pledging real estate or other valuable assets.
gept.example_zh: 借款人可以不動產或其他有價資產作為貸款擔保。

gept.example_en: The contractor placed a lien on the property because the homeowner never paid the bill.
gept.example_zh: 由於屋主一直未付款，承包商在該物業上設定了留置權。

gept.example_en: Her father acted as a guarantor on the apartment lease while she was a student.
gept.example_zh: 她父親在她當學生時擔任公寓租約的擔保人。

gept.example_en: A reliable cosigner can help a young borrower qualify for a much lower loan rate.
gept.example_zh: 可靠的共同簽署人可協助年輕借款人取得更低的貸款利率。

gept.example_en: Dividend stocks tend to hold up better than risky growth shares in a down market.
gept.example_zh: 在下跌市場中，股息股表現往往優於風險較高的成長股。

gept.example_en: Aggressive funds often produce huge gains during a strong and prolonged up market.
gept.example_zh: 在強勁且持續的上漲市場中，積極型基金常產生巨大獲利。

gept.example_en: Investors should know the worst historical drawdown a fund has previously experienced.
gept.example_zh: 投資人應了解某檔基金過去經歷過的最嚴重歷史回撤。

gept.example_en: A stop-loss order automatically sells the stock once it falls to a predetermined price.
gept.example_zh: 停損單會在股價跌至預設價位時自動賣出。

gept.example_en: A limit order only executes when the share price reaches the level you specify.
gept.example_zh: 限價單只在股價達到你指定的價位時才會成交。

gept.example_en: A market order fills almost immediately at the best available price in the market.
gept.example_zh: 市價單幾乎會以市場上當時可得的最佳價格立即成交。

gept.example_en: The trading desk handles huge volumes of bond orders for institutional clients daily.
gept.example_zh: 交易台每日為機構客戶處理大量債券委託單。

gept.example_en: The back office processes paperwork and confirms that every trade has settled correctly.
gept.example_zh: 後勤辦公室處理文書並確認每筆交易都已正確結算。

gept.example_en: High-frequency trading uses powerful computers to execute thousands of orders per second.
gept.example_zh: 高頻交易使用強大電腦每秒執行數千筆委託。

gept.example_en: Algorithmic trading follows rules in computer code to buy and sell financial assets.
gept.example_zh: 演算法交易依電腦程式中的規則買賣金融資產。

gept.example_en: The spread between corporate and government bonds widens when investors fear default.
gept.example_zh: 當投資人擔憂違約時，公司債與政府債的利差會擴大。

gept.example_en: Oil-exporting nations earn vast amounts of petrodollar income when crude prices climb.
gept.example_zh: 當原油價格上升時，產油國賺取大量石油美元收入。

gept.example_en: Mobile phones have boosted financial inclusion in many developing parts of the world.
gept.example_zh: 手機在世界許多開發中地區提升了金融普惠程度。

gept.example_en: Funds with a low expense ratio leave more of the returns in investors' pockets.
gept.example_zh: 費用率低的基金可讓投資人留下更多的報酬。

gept.example_en: She submitted her travel expense report to accounting before the end of the week.
gept.example_zh: 她在週末前向會計部門提交了出差費用報告。

gept.example_en: The office uses petty cash to cover small purchases like stationery and snacks.
gept.example_zh: 辦公室以零用金支付文具與零食等小額採購。

gept.example_en: The club treasurer keeps careful records of every donation and membership fee.
gept.example_zh: 社團財務主管細心保存每筆捐款與會費的紀錄。

gept.example_en: The chief financial officer presented the firm's annual results to a group of analysts.
gept.example_zh: 財務長向一群分析師簡報公司的年度業績。

gept.example_en: The central bank raised its policy rate to slow surging consumer prices.
gept.example_zh: 央行調升政策利率以減緩飆升的消費者物價。

gept.example_en: She filed a chargeback after the seller never delivered the item she paid for.
gept.example_zh: 在賣方一直未交付她付款的商品後，她申請了退款。

gept.example_en: A strong currency reserve helps a country handle sudden outflows of foreign capital.
gept.example_zh: 充裕的外匯存底有助一國因應外資突然外流。

gept.example_en: An exchange traded note is a debt security whose return tracks an underlying index.
gept.example_zh: 指數型債券是一種報酬追蹤標的指數的債務證券。

gept.example_en: Open banking lets third-party apps view your account data with your explicit consent.
gept.example_zh: 開放銀行讓第三方應用程式在你明確同意下檢視你的帳戶資料。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 法人說明會；財報電話會議
gept.example_en: Executives explained the surprise profit miss during the company's quarterly earnings call.
gept.example_zh: 高階主管在公司季度財報電話會議上解釋意外的獲利低於預期。

gept.example_en: The central bank's forward guidance hinted at no rate moves over the next two meetings.
gept.example_zh: 央行的前瞻指引暗示未來兩次會議都不會調整利率。

gept.example_en: A soft commodity such as coffee or cocoa is grown rather than mined from the ground.
gept.example_zh: 如咖啡或可可等軟商品是種植而來，而非自地下開採。

gept.example_en: A hard commodity like gold or iron is usually extracted from natural mineral deposits.
gept.example_zh: 如黃金或鐵等硬商品通常自天然礦床中開採而來。

gept.example_en: An exchange listing lets a company sell shares to a much wider group of investors.
gept.example_zh: 交易所掛牌讓公司能將股票賣給更廣大的投資人群體。

gept.example_en: The delisting of the stock left shareholders with shares that were hard to sell.
gept.example_zh: 該股票下市使股東持有難以出售的股份。

gept.example_en: Public companies release a quarterly report so investors can monitor changes over time.
gept.example_zh: 上市公司發布季度報告以便投資人觀察時序變化。

gept.example_en: The board approved a large share buyback to return surplus cash to shareholders.
gept.example_zh: 董事會核准大規模股票回購以將多餘現金回饋股東。

gept.example_en: The two automakers formed a joint venture to share the high cost of new technology.
gept.example_zh: 這兩家汽車製造商成立合資企業以分擔新技術的高昂成本。

gept.example_en: A consortium of banks provided the loan needed to build the new airport terminal.
gept.example_zh: 由多家銀行組成的財團提供興建新機場航廈所需的貸款。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大型戶外廣告看板
gept.example_en: The new billboard near the highway showcases the brand mascot in vivid colors.
gept.example_zh: 高速公路旁的新看板以鮮豔色彩展示該品牌的吉祥物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 廣告短曲；琅琅上口的廣告歌
gept.example_en: The catchy jingle stayed in shoppers minds long after the commercial ended.
gept.example_zh: 那首朗朗上口的廣告歌曲在廣告結束後仍長久留在消費者腦海。

gept.example_en: Customers browsed the furniture showroom before placing their orders online later that evening.
gept.example_zh: 顧客先在家具展示間瀏覽，當晚稍後再上網下單。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 戰利品開箱影片；購物分享
gept.example_en: Her weekly fashion haul attracts millions of views from teenage shoppers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她每週的時尚購物分享吸引全球數百萬青少年觀眾觀看。

gept.example_en: Attendees of the conference received tote bags filled with branded swag and stickers.
gept.example_zh: 與會者在會議上收到裝滿品牌贈品與貼紙的托特包。

gept.example_en: The sweepstakes attracted entries from nearly every state during the four-week promotion.
gept.example_zh: 這場抽獎活動在四週的推廣期間吸引了幾乎全國各州的人參加。

gept.example_en: The seasonal markdown helped clear excess inventory before the new shipment arrived.
gept.example_zh: 季末降價有助於在新貨抵達前清掉多餘庫存。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加價幅度；零售加成
gept.example_en: Boutique stores typically apply a higher markup on imported designer accessories.
gept.example_zh: 精品店通常對進口設計師配件採用較高的零售加成。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 高價位的；高端定價的
gept.example_en: The premium-priced range targets affluent buyers seeking exclusive materials and craftsmanship.
gept.example_zh: 這個高價位系列鎖定追求獨家用料與工藝的富裕買家。

gept.example_en: The bakery's punchcard offers a free pastry after every ten coffees purchased.
gept.example_zh: 這家麵包店的集點卡每買十杯咖啡即可換一份免費糕點。

gept.example_en: The agency published a case-study showing how rebranding lifted quarterly engagement by sixty percent.
gept.example_zh: 代理商發表案例研究，說明品牌重塑如何讓季度互動率提升六成。

gept.example_en: Visitors must share their email address before downloading the in-depth whitepaper.
gept.example_zh: 訪客需提供電子郵件地址才能下載這份深入的白皮書。

gept.example_en: The colorful flyer listed every discount available during the long holiday weekend.
gept.example_zh: 這張色彩繽紛的傳單列出長假週末所有可用的折扣。

gept.example_en: The new landing-page converted twice as many leads as the previous campaign version.
gept.example_zh: 新的著陸頁轉換的潛在客戶數是上一版本活動的兩倍。

gept.example_en: The postroll teaser previews next week's episode and includes a sponsor mention.
gept.example_zh: 結尾廣告預告下週節目內容，並包含贊助商提及。

gept.example_en: The streetwear collab between the two brands sold out within just thirty minutes online.
gept.example_zh: 這兩個品牌的街頭服飾聯名線上開賣三十分鐘內就售罄。

gept.example_en: Effective tagline-writing distills a brand's promise into a memorable handful of words.
gept.example_zh: 出色的標語撰寫能將品牌承諾凝聚成幾個令人難忘的字句。

gept.example_en: The subhead clarifies the promise made by the bold headline above it.
gept.example_zh: 副標題進一步說明上方粗體大標所做的承諾。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 電梯簡報；極短簡介
gept.example_en: Every founder should prepare an elevator-pitch lasting roughly thirty memorable seconds.
gept.example_zh: 每位創辦人都應準備一段約三十秒令人印象深刻的電梯簡報。

gept.example_en: Lifetime repair coverage became the unique-selling-point of the bag manufacturer.
gept.example_zh: 終身維修保固成為這家包款製造商的獨特賣點。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 漏斗底端；決策階段
gept.example_en: Bottom-of-funnel offers convince hesitant shoppers to finally complete their pending purchase.
gept.example_zh: 漏斗底端的優惠促使猶豫的購物者最終完成尚未下單的購買。

gept.example_en: A warm prospect already knows the brand and shows clear signs of buying intent.
gept.example_zh: 溫客戶已認識品牌，並展現明確的購買意向。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 陌生開發電話
gept.example_en: Effective cold-call scripts open with a relevant question rather than a generic pitch.
gept.example_zh: 有效的陌生開發電話以相關問題開場，而非泛泛的推銷話術。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 簡報投影片；提案簡報
gept.example_en: The investor reviewed the polished pitch-deck before scheduling a longer follow-up meeting.
gept.example_zh: 投資人先審閱這份精緻的提案簡報，才安排較長的後續會議。

gept.example_en: Every representative must hit the monthly quota to qualify for next quarter's bonus.
gept.example_zh: 每位業務都必須達成月配額，才能取得下季的獎金資格。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 抽成制的；佣金制的
gept.example_en: The commission-based role rewards aggressive closers far more than steady paycheck earners.
gept.example_zh: 這個抽成制職位給予積極成交者的回報遠高於穩定領薪者。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 成交高手；結案業務
gept.example_en: She has earned a reputation as the team's most reliable closer on enterprise deals.
gept.example_zh: 她以團隊中最可靠的企業級成交高手而聞名。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 成交；達成交易
gept.example_en: We need just one more concession to close-the-deal with the international buyer.
gept.example_zh: 我們只需再做一個讓步，就能與這位國際買家成交。

gept.example_en: Our weekly newsletter shares industry insights, customer stories, and upcoming product previews.
gept.example_zh: 我們的週電子報分享產業洞察、顧客故事與即將推出的產品預覽。

gept.example_en: Improving the subject line lifted our open-rate by nearly twelve percentage points.
gept.example_zh: 改善主旨將我們的開信率提高了近十二個百分點。

gept.example_en: A high bounce-rate often signals that visitors find your page unhelpful or slow.
gept.example_zh: 高跳出率通常代表訪客覺得你的頁面沒幫助或載入太慢。

gept.example_en: Longer dwell-time generally tells search engines that your content satisfies the visitor.
gept.example_zh: 較長的停留時間通常告訴搜尋引擎你的內容讓訪客滿意。

gept.example_en: Encouraging ugc submissions led to thousands of authentic videos featuring our latest sneakers.
gept.example_zh: 鼓勵 UGC 投稿後，我們收到數千支以最新球鞋為主題的真實影片。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可快速消費的（內容）
gept.example_en: Snackable graphics summarize the research findings in under fifteen seconds of viewing time.
gept.example_zh: 這些易於快速消費的圖像在十五秒內就能讓人讀完研究發現。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 廣告影片；廣告時段
gept.example_en: A thirty-second spot ran nightly across local stations during prime evening viewing hours.
gept.example_zh: 一支三十秒廣告每晚在地方台的晚間黃金時段播出。

gept.example_en: Cohort-analysis showed users acquired through podcasts retained longer than social media counterparts.
gept.example_zh: 同期群分析顯示透過 podcast 獲得的用戶留存期比社群媒體用戶更長。

gept.example_en: A voice-of-customer program collects feedback systematically rather than relying on occasional anecdotes.
gept.example_zh: 顧客聲音計畫有系統地收集回饋，而非倚賴偶發的小故事。

gept.example_en: The hard-launch event included press, influencers, and a thousand carefully invited brand fans.
gept.example_zh: 全面正式上市活動包含媒體、網紅與一千位精心邀請的品牌粉絲。

gept.example_en: The surgeon made a small incision below the navel to begin the laparoscopic procedure.
gept.example_zh: 外科醫師在肚臍下方做了一個小切口，開始進行腹腔鏡手術。

gept.example_en: The doctor used dissolvable sutures to close the wound after removing the appendix.
gept.example_zh: 醫師在切除盲腸後使用可吸收縫線縫合傷口。

gept.example_en: The surgeon picked up the scalpel and carefully began the delicate operation on the patient's heart.
gept.example_zh: 外科醫師拿起手術刀，小心地開始為病患的心臟進行精細手術。

gept.example_en: The nurse handed sterile forceps to the doctor during the minor surgical procedure.
gept.example_zh: 護理師在小型手術過程中將無菌鉗子遞給醫師。

gept.example_en: Researchers discovered a new biomarker that can detect early-stage pancreatic cancer in blood samples.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員發現一種新的生物標記物，可從血液樣本中偵測早期胰臟癌。

gept.example_en: The doctor scheduled an endoscopy to investigate the cause of his persistent stomach pain.
gept.example_zh: 醫師安排了內視鏡檢查以調查他持續胃痛的原因。

gept.example_en: Adults over fifty should get a colonoscopy every ten years to screen for colorectal cancer.
gept.example_zh: 五十歲以上的成人應每十年做一次大腸鏡檢查以篩檢大腸癌。

gept.example_en: Emergency defibrillation can restart a heart that has stopped beating in proper rhythm.
gept.example_zh: 緊急心臟電擊去顫術能讓停止正常跳動的心臟重新啟動。

gept.example_en: Intubation was necessary to keep the patient's airway open during the lengthy surgery.
gept.example_zh: 在漫長的手術過程中，插管以保持病患呼吸道暢通是必要的。

gept.example_en: A urinary catheter was inserted after surgery to drain his bladder while he recovered.
gept.example_zh: 術後插入導尿管以在他康復期間排空膀胱。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 點滴注射；靜脈滴注
gept.example_en: The nurse adjusted the IV-drip to deliver fluids and antibiotics at a steady rate.
gept.example_zh: 護理師調整點滴注射，以穩定速度輸送液體和抗生素。

gept.example_en: The flu vaccine is typically given as an intramuscular injection in the upper arm.
gept.example_zh: 流感疫苗通常以肌肉注射方式打在上臂。

gept.example_en: Insulin is most often delivered through subcutaneous injection just below the surface of the skin.
gept.example_zh: 胰島素最常透過皮下注射方式注入皮膚表面下方。

gept.example_en: The dermatologist prescribed a topical cream to soothe the inflamed patch on her arm.
gept.example_zh: 皮膚科醫師開立外用乳膏舒緩她手臂上發炎的部位。

gept.example_en: The pharmacist recommended a menthol lozenge to soothe his sore throat and persistent cough.
gept.example_zh: 藥師建議使用薄荷喉糖舒緩他的喉嚨痛和持續咳嗽。

gept.example_en: When her fever spiked, the pediatrician suggested a suppository because she could not swallow pills.
gept.example_zh: 當她發高燒時，小兒科醫師因為她無法吞藥丸而建議使用栓劑。

gept.example_en: The placebo-effect can produce real improvements even when patients receive no active medication at all.
gept.example_zh: 即使病患完全未服用有效藥物，安慰劑效應也能產生真實的改善。

gept.example_en: Pregnancy is a contraindication for many common medications including some antibiotics and pain relievers.
gept.example_zh: 懷孕是許多常見藥物的禁忌症，包括某些抗生素和止痛藥。

gept.example_en: Report any adverse-reaction to your doctor immediately, especially severe rashes or breathing difficulties.
gept.example_zh: 請立即向醫師報告任何不良反應，特別是嚴重的皮疹或呼吸困難。

gept.example_en: A dangerous drug-interaction can occur when blood thinners are combined with certain anti-inflammatory medications.
gept.example_zh: 當抗凝血劑與某些抗發炎藥物併用時，可能發生危險的藥物交互作用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 止痛藥；鎮痛的
gept.example_en: The doctor prescribed a mild analgesic to manage his post-operative pain without using opioids.
gept.example_zh: 醫師開立溫和的止痛藥來處理他術後疼痛，避免使用鴉片類藥物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 抗發炎藥；消炎的
gept.example_en: Anti-inflammatory medications help reduce swelling and discomfort in patients with chronic joint problems.
gept.example_zh: 抗發炎藥物有助於減輕慢性關節問題病患的腫脹和不適。

gept.example_en: She took an antihistamine to relieve her seasonal allergies and stop her sneezing fits.
gept.example_zh: 她服用抗組織胺以緩解季節性過敏並停止打噴嚏。

gept.example_en: His psychiatrist gradually increased the dose of his antidepressant over the course of several weeks.
gept.example_zh: 他的精神科醫師在數週內逐漸增加抗憂鬱劑的劑量。

gept.example_en: The anesthesiologist gave him a mild sedative before wheeling him into the operating room.
gept.example_zh: 麻醉師在推他進手術室前給了他溫和的鎮靜劑。

gept.example_en: The doctor added a diuretic to help reduce the swelling in her ankles and legs.
gept.example_zh: 醫師加開利尿劑以幫助減輕她腳踝和腿部的腫脹。

gept.example_en: Radiotherapy targets cancer cells with high-energy beams while attempting to spare surrounding healthy tissue.
gept.example_zh: 放射治療以高能量光束針對癌細胞，同時盡量保護周圍健康組織。

gept.example_en: The biopsy confirmed a small carcinoma on his skin that could be removed in the clinic.
gept.example_zh: 切片檢查確認他皮膚上有一小塊上皮癌，可在診所內切除。

gept.example_en: Lymphoma affects the body's lymphatic system and often presents as painless swollen lymph nodes.
gept.example_zh: 淋巴瘤影響身體的淋巴系統，常表現為無痛性淋巴結腫大。

gept.example_en: Her oncologist explained the proposed treatment plan and answered every question her family had.
gept.example_zh: 她的腫瘤科醫師說明了建議的治療計畫，並回答她家人提出的每一個問題。

gept.example_en: The radiologist carefully reviewed each scan before sending her detailed report to the surgeon.
gept.example_zh: 放射科醫師仔細檢視每張影像，然後將詳細報告送交外科醫師。

gept.example_en: The neurologist ordered additional tests to understand the cause of his frequent unexplained seizures.
gept.example_zh: 神經科醫師安排了額外檢查以了解他頻繁不明癲癇發作的原因。

gept.example_en: His cardiologist scheduled a stress test to evaluate how well his heart performed under physical exertion.
gept.example_zh: 他的心臟科醫師安排了壓力測試，以評估他的心臟在體力活動下的表現。

gept.example_en: Women should visit a gynecologist annually for routine checkups and preventive screening tests.
gept.example_zh: 女性應每年看一次婦科醫師進行例行健檢和預防性篩檢。

gept.example_en: Her obstetrician carefully monitored the pregnancy because she had developed gestational diabetes.
gept.example_zh: 因為她罹患妊娠糖尿病，她的產科醫師仔細監測整個懷孕過程。

gept.example_en: The pediatrician reassured the new parents that their baby's development was completely on track.
gept.example_zh: 小兒科醫師安撫新手父母，孩子的發展完全正常。

gept.example_en: Cognitive-behavioral therapy helps patients identify negative thought patterns and replace them with healthier alternatives.
gept.example_zh: 認知行為治療幫助病患辨識負面思考模式，並以較健康的方式取代它們。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 行為健康；心理健康照護
gept.example_en: The hospital opened a new behavioral-health wing dedicated to mental health and substance abuse treatment.
gept.example_zh: 醫院新開了一個行為健康部門，專門處理心理健康和物質濫用治療。

gept.example_en: Medical detoxification under proper supervision is critical for patients withdrawing from heavy alcohol use.
gept.example_zh: 對於戒除重度酒精使用的病患，在適當監督下進行醫療解毒至關重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 納洛酮（鴉片類解毒劑）
gept.example_en: Paramedics administered naloxone to quickly reverse the effects of the opioid overdose at the scene.
gept.example_zh: 救護員在現場施打納洛酮以迅速逆轉鴉片類藥物過量的影響。

gept.example_en: Early intervention during the first episode of psychosis significantly improves long-term recovery outcomes.
gept.example_zh: 在首次精神病發作期間及早介入可大幅改善長期康復成果。

gept.example_en: Schizophrenia typically emerges in late adolescence and requires lifelong management with medication and support.
gept.example_zh: 思覺失調症通常在青春期晚期出現，需要終身的藥物管理和支持。

gept.example_en: Quick treatment after an infarction can save heart tissue and significantly improve recovery outcomes.
gept.example_zh: 梗塞後迅速治療能挽救心臟組織並大幅改善康復成果。

gept.example_en: He experienced sharp angina chest pain whenever he climbed more than two flights of stairs.
gept.example_zh: 每當他爬超過兩層樓梯時，就會出現劇烈的心絞痛胸痛。

gept.example_en: The cardiologist diagnosed her with arrhythmia after the monitor recorded irregular heartbeat patterns overnight.
gept.example_zh: 在監視器整夜記錄到不規則心跳模式後，心臟科醫師診斷她為心律不整。

gept.example_en: Persistent hyperglycemia can damage blood vessels and nerves throughout the body if left untreated.
gept.example_zh: 持續性的高血糖若未治療，可能損害全身的血管和神經。

gept.example_en: Diabetics must watch carefully for hypoglycemia symptoms such as sudden shakiness, sweating, and confusion.
gept.example_zh: 糖尿病患者必須密切注意低血糖症狀，例如突然顫抖、出汗和意識混亂。

gept.example_en: Insulin-resistance often precedes type two diabetes and can be improved through weight loss and exercise.
gept.example_zh: 胰島素阻抗通常先於第二型糖尿病出現，可透過減重和運動改善。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 甲狀腺功能低下症
gept.example_en: Daily hormone replacement medication effectively manages hypothyroidism for the rest of the patient's life.
gept.example_zh: 每日服用荷爾蒙替代藥物可有效控制甲狀腺功能低下症終身。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 甲狀腺機能亢進症
gept.example_en: Hyperthyroidism speeds up metabolism and often causes unexplained weight loss and rapid heartbeat.
gept.example_zh: 甲狀腺機能亢進症會加速新陳代謝，常導致不明原因體重減輕和心跳加快。

gept.example_en: Postmenopausal women face higher risk of osteoporosis and should consider regular bone density screening.
gept.example_zh: 停經後婦女罹患骨質疏鬆症的風險較高，應考慮定期接受骨密度篩檢。

gept.example_en: Osteoarthritis in her knees made climbing stairs increasingly painful as she grew older.
gept.example_zh: 隨著年齡增長，她膝蓋的骨關節炎讓爬樓梯變得越來越疼痛。

gept.example_en: The soccer player suffered a serious ligament-tear in his knee during the championship final.
gept.example_zh: 這名足球員在冠軍決賽中膝蓋遭受嚴重的韌帶撕裂。

gept.example_en: Six weeks of physiotherapy helped restore full range of motion to his injured shoulder.
gept.example_zh: 六週的物理治療幫助他受傷的肩膀恢復了完整的活動範圍。

gept.example_en: Occupational-therapy helps stroke patients relearn essential daily living skills like dressing and cooking.
gept.example_zh: 職能治療幫助中風病患重新學習穿衣和烹飪等基本日常生活技能。

gept.example_en: The nursing-home staff provided round-the-clock care for residents with serious medical conditions.
gept.example_zh: 安養院員工為有嚴重醫療狀況的住民提供全天候照護。

gept.example_en: Palliative-care focuses on improving quality of life and managing symptoms for patients with serious illnesses.
gept.example_zh: 安寧緩和照護專注於改善生活品質並控制嚴重疾病患者的症狀。

gept.example_en: He received a kidney transplant after waiting on the donor list for nearly three years.
gept.example_zh: 在等待捐贈名單將近三年後，他接受了腎臟移植。

gept.example_en: Low platelet counts can cause excessive bruising and prolonged bleeding from even minor cuts.
gept.example_zh: 血小板數量過低可能導致過度瘀青，甚至從小傷口也會持續流血。

gept.example_en: Her hemoglobin levels were too low, so the doctor recommended iron supplements and dietary changes.
gept.example_zh: 她的血紅素過低，因此醫師建議補充鐵劑並改變飲食。

gept.example_en: Stem-cell research holds promise for treating many previously incurable diseases in the coming decades.
gept.example_zh: 幹細胞研究為未來數十年治療許多以往無法治癒的疾病帶來希望。

gept.example_en: CRISPR technology allows scientists to edit specific genes with remarkable precision in living cells.
gept.example_zh: CRISPR 技術讓科學家能在活細胞中以驚人的精準度編輯特定基因。

gept.example_en: Hereditary conditions like cystic fibrosis run in families and can be identified through genetic testing.
gept.example_zh: 像囊狀纖維化這種遺傳性疾病會在家族中遺傳，可透過基因檢測辨識。

gept.example_en: She requested an epidural to manage the intense pain during the final stage of labor.
gept.example_zh: 她在分娩最後階段要求硬膜外麻醉以處理劇烈疼痛。

gept.example_en: Postnatal depression affects many new mothers and deserves serious medical attention and supportive care.
gept.example_zh: 產後憂鬱症影響許多新手母親，值得認真的醫療關注和支持性照護。

gept.example_en: Symptomatic patients should isolate at home and contact their doctor for guidance about testing.
gept.example_zh: 有症狀的病患應在家隔離，並聯絡醫師詢問檢測的相關指引。

gept.example_en: Frontline healthcare workers wore N95 respirators continuously throughout each long and exhausting shift.
gept.example_zh: 第一線醫護人員在每個漫長疲憊的班次中持續戴著 N95 口罩。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 棉棒；採檢拭子
gept.example_en: The nurse gently inserted a long swab to collect a sample from the back of her throat.
gept.example_zh: 護理師輕輕插入一根長棉棒從她喉嚨深處採集樣本。

gept.example_en: Proper specimen-collection technique is essential to ensure accurate laboratory test results.
gept.example_zh: 正確的檢體採集技術對於確保準確的實驗室檢驗結果至關重要。

gept.example_en: Telehealth appointments allow patients in rural areas to consult specialists without traveling long distances.
gept.example_zh: 遠距醫療看診讓鄉村地區的病患不必長途跋涉就能諮詢專科醫師。

gept.example_en: The doctor sent the e-prescription directly to the pharmacy so it was ready for pickup.
gept.example_zh: 醫師將電子處方箋直接傳送到藥局，這樣藥就可以準備好讓他領取。

gept.example_en: She requested copies of her medical-records before transferring her care to a new physician.
gept.example_zh: 她在將醫療照護轉移到新醫師之前申請了病歷副本。

gept.example_en: After her serious diagnosis, she sought a second-opinion from another specialist before deciding on treatment.
gept.example_zh: 在嚴重診斷後，她在決定治療方式前向另一位專科醫師尋求第二意見。

gept.example_en: Severe accident victims are transported directly to a designated trauma-center capable of advanced surgical care.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重事故傷者會直接送往能進行進階手術治療的指定創傷中心。

gept.example_en: The accident victim was going into shock, requiring immediate intravenous fluids to stabilize his blood pressure.
gept.example_zh: 事故傷者進入休克狀態，需要立即靜脈輸液以穩定血壓。

gept.example_en: The brain aneurysm was detected on imaging and surgically repaired before it could rupture.
gept.example_zh: 腦動脈瘤在影像檢查中被發現，並在破裂前透過手術修復。

gept.example_en: Treatment differs significantly depending on the burn-degree, from minor first-degree to life-threatening third-degree injuries.
gept.example_zh: 治療方式因燒傷度不同而有很大差異，從輕微一度燒傷到危及生命的三度燒傷。

gept.example_en: The climbers suffered serious frostbite-injury to their fingers after spending the night exposed on the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 登山者在山上暴露過夜後，手指遭受嚴重凍傷。

gept.example_en: Hepatitis B vaccination is now routinely included in childhood immunization programs in most countries.
gept.example_zh: B 型肝炎疫苗接種現在已是大多數國家兒童免疫計畫的例行項目。

gept.example_en: Years of heavy drinking eventually led to advanced cirrhosis of his liver requiring transplant evaluation.
gept.example_zh: 多年酗酒最終導致他肝臟出現晚期肝硬化，需要進行移植評估。

gept.example_en: Passing a kidney-stone is often described as one of the most painful experiences a person can endure.
gept.example_zh: 排出腎結石常被形容為一個人所能承受最痛苦的經驗之一。

gept.example_en: Ulcerative colitis specifically affects the large intestine and can cause frequent bloody bowel movements.
gept.example_zh: 潰瘍性結腸炎特別影響大腸，可能導致頻繁血便。

gept.example_en: Sharp pain in the lower right abdomen could indicate appendicitis requiring immediate medical evaluation.
gept.example_zh: 右下腹的劇痛可能表示闌尾炎，需要立即就醫評估。

gept.example_en: Recurring tonsillitis sometimes leads doctors to recommend surgical removal of the tonsils entirely.
gept.example_zh: 反覆發作的扁桃腺炎有時會讓醫師建議完全手術切除扁桃腺。

gept.example_en: Chronic sinusitis causes persistent facial pressure, headaches, and difficulty breathing through the nose.
gept.example_zh: 慢性鼻竇炎會引起持續的臉部壓迫感、頭痛以及鼻腔呼吸困難。

gept.example_en: The singer canceled her concert after developing severe laryngitis that left her completely unable to speak.
gept.example_zh: 這位歌手在罹患嚴重喉炎完全無法說話後，取消了演唱會。

gept.example_en: Viral encephalitis causes inflammation of the brain and can sometimes leave lasting neurological effects.
gept.example_zh: 病毒性腦炎導致腦部發炎，有時會留下持久的神經學影響。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 後天免疫缺乏症候群
gept.example_en: Advances in antiretroviral therapy have transformed AIDS from a fatal disease into a manageable chronic condition.
gept.example_zh: 抗反轉錄病毒療法的進步已將愛滋病從致命疾病轉變為可控制的慢性疾病。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 抗病毒藥物；抗病毒的
gept.example_en: Starting antiviral medication within forty-eight hours of symptom onset shortens flu duration considerably.
gept.example_zh: 在症狀出現後四十八小時內開始服用抗病毒藥物，可顯著縮短流感病程。

gept.example_en: Antibiotic-resistance is a growing global threat caused by overuse of these critically important medications.
gept.example_zh: 抗生素抗藥性是因過度使用這些極重要藥物而日益嚴重的全球威脅。

gept.example_en: Hospital-acquired infections from antibiotic-resistant superbugs can be extremely difficult to treat effectively.
gept.example_zh: 由抗生素抗藥性超級細菌引起的醫院感染極難有效治療。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 自付的；現金支付的
gept.example_en: His out-of-pocket medical expenses last year exceeded eight thousand dollars despite having comprehensive insurance.
gept.example_zh: 儘管他有完整保險，去年自付的醫療費用仍超過八千美元。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 網內的；保險合約醫療院所
gept.example_en: Staying in-network for medical care significantly reduces what you owe after your insurance pays.
gept.example_zh: 在網內就醫可大幅降低保險給付後你需自付的金額。

gept.example_en: Strong public-health systems are essential for detecting and responding to disease outbreaks early.
gept.example_zh: 強健的公共衛生系統對於早期偵測和應對疾病爆發至關重要。

gept.example_en: Outbreak-investigation requires careful interviewing, sample testing, and analysis to identify the source of infection.
gept.example_zh: 疫情調查需要仔細訪談、樣本檢測和分析以找出感染來源。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 美國食品藥物管理局
gept.example_en: The FDA must approve new medications before they can be marketed to American consumers and patients.
gept.example_zh: 美國食品藥物管理局必須批准新藥物，才能向美國消費者和病患銷售。

gept.example_en: The drug-approval process typically requires years of clinical trials demonstrating both safety and efficacy.
gept.example_zh: 藥物審批程序通常需要數年的臨床試驗證明其安全性和有效性。

gept.example_en: Biosimilar medications offer significant cost savings while providing comparable clinical benefits to the original biologics.
gept.example_zh: 生物相似藥提供顯著的成本節省，同時提供與原始生物製劑相當的臨床效益。

gept.example_en: Common side-effects of this medication include mild nausea, dizziness, and temporary fatigue.
gept.example_zh: 這種藥物的常見副作用包括輕微噁心、頭暈和暫時性疲倦。

gept.example_en: The smart-monitor on her wrist alerts her caregiver if she falls or experiences sudden dizziness.
gept.example_zh: 她手腕上的智慧監測器會在她跌倒或突發頭暈時通知照顧者。

gept.example_en: Her favorite health-app reminds her to take medications, drink water, and complete daily exercise goals.
gept.example_zh: 她最喜歡的健康應用程式提醒她按時服藥、喝水並完成每日運動目標。

gept.example_en: Robotic-surgery allows surgeons to operate with greater precision through much smaller incisions than traditional methods.
gept.example_zh: 機器人手術讓外科醫師能透過比傳統方法小得多的切口進行更精準的手術。

gept.example_en: Laparoscopic gallbladder removal has largely replaced traditional open surgery for most uncomplicated cases.
gept.example_zh: 腹腔鏡膽囊切除術在大多數無併發症的病例中已大致取代傳統開腹手術。

gept.example_en: Careful post-operative monitoring helps catch potential complications early when they can still be easily addressed.
gept.example_zh: 仔細的術後監測有助於在潛在併發症仍可輕易處理時及早發現。

gept.example_en: Pre-operative testing confirmed she was healthy enough to safely undergo the major surgical procedure.
gept.example_zh: 術前檢查確認她身體健康足以安全接受這項大型手術。

gept.example_en: Geriatrics focuses on the unique medical, social, and psychological needs of elderly patients.
gept.example_zh: 老年醫學專注於高齡病患獨特的醫療、社會和心理需求。

gept.example_en: Hospice-care prioritizes comfort and quality of life for patients facing terminal illnesses at home.
gept.example_zh: 安寧照護優先考量在家面對末期疾病病患的舒適和生活品質。

gept.example_en: A terminal-illness diagnosis prompted difficult but important conversations with his family about future wishes.
gept.example_zh: 末期疾病的診斷促使他與家人就未來的願望進行了艱難卻重要的對話。

gept.example_en: Grief-counseling provides a safe space to express painful emotions and gradually work through profound loss.
gept.example_zh: 悲傷輔導提供一個安全的空間來表達痛苦情緒，並逐步處理深刻的失落。

gept.example_en: Holistic-care addresses physical, emotional, and social aspects of health rather than focusing on isolated symptoms.
gept.example_zh: 整體照護處理健康的生理、情感和社會層面，而不只關注個別症狀。

gept.example_en: Many patients with chronic back pain report meaningful relief after several weeks of regular acupuncture sessions.
gept.example_zh: 許多慢性背痛的病患在數週定期針灸療程後表示有顯著的緩解。

gept.example_en: A naturopathic doctor recommended dietary changes and herbal remedies for her chronic digestive issues.
gept.example_zh: 自然療法醫師為她的慢性消化問題建議飲食改變和草本療法。

gept.example_en: Her nutritionist emphasized whole foods and balanced macronutrients rather than restrictive fad diets.
gept.example_zh: 她的營養顧問強調全食物和均衡的巨量營養素，而非限制性流行飲食。

gept.example_en: Maintaining steady blood-sugar levels through balanced meals helps prevent both sudden spikes and crashes.
gept.example_zh: 透過均衡飲食維持穩定的血糖濃度，有助於預防突然飆升和下降。

gept.example_en: Reviewing her complete case-history revealed an unusual pattern that finally pointed toward the correct diagnosis.
gept.example_zh: 檢視她完整的病例史揭露了一個不尋常的型態，最終指向正確的診斷。

gept.example_en: Urgent-care centers handle non-life-threatening problems quickly without the long waits common in emergency rooms.
gept.example_zh: 緊急照護診所能快速處理非危及生命的問題，避免急診室常見的長時間等候。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 一般科醫師；家醫科醫師
gept.example_en: Her general-practitioner has known her since childhood and understands her medical history thoroughly.
gept.example_zh: 她的一般科醫師從她童年時期就認識她，徹底了解她的病史。

gept.example_en: The medical-assistant took her vital signs and reviewed her medication list before the doctor arrived.
gept.example_zh: 醫療助理在醫師抵達前測量了她的生命徵象並檢視她的用藥清單。

gept.example_en: The respiratory-therapist taught him breathing exercises to strengthen his lungs after the long hospitalization.
gept.example_zh: 呼吸治療師教他做呼吸運動以強化他長期住院後的肺部。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 住院醫師（負責住院病患）
gept.example_en: The hospitalist coordinated care between specialists while she remained admitted to the medical floor.
gept.example_zh: 住院醫師在她持續住院期間協調各專科醫師之間的照護工作。

gept.example_en: The study was published in a prestigious medical-journal after extensive review by independent experts.
gept.example_zh: 這項研究在獨立專家廣泛審查後刊登於一份具聲望的醫學期刊。

gept.example_en: Shared-decision-making between doctors and patients leads to treatment plans that better reflect personal values.
gept.example_zh: 醫師與病患之間的共同決策能產生更能反映個人價值觀的治療計畫。

gept.example_en: Each human cell typically contains twenty-three pairs of chromosomes that carry inherited genetic information.
gept.example_zh: 每個人類細胞通常含有二十三對染色體，攜帶遺傳訊息。

gept.example_en: Each parent contributes one allele for every gene that determines a particular trait.
gept.example_zh: 父母雙方各為決定某一性狀的每個基因貢獻一個等位基因。

gept.example_en: A capillary is the smallest blood vessel where oxygen and nutrients exchange occurs.
gept.example_zh: 微血管是進行氧氣和營養素交換的最小血管。

gept.example_en: Each axon carries electrical signals away from the cell body of a neuron.
gept.example_zh: 每條軸突將電訊號從神經元的細胞體傳出。

gept.example_en: The amygdala processes emotional responses, especially fear and aggressive reactions.
gept.example_zh: 杏仁核處理情緒反應，特別是恐懼和攻擊反應。

gept.example_en: Protein synthesis is a complex multi-step process that occurs inside every living cell.
gept.example_zh: 蛋白質合成是發生在每個活細胞內的複雜多步驟過程。

gept.example_en: A peptide chain forms when amino acids link together through chemical bonds.
gept.example_zh: 當胺基酸透過化學鍵連接在一起時形成胜肽鏈。

gept.example_en: Every lipid molecule plays an essential role in forming cell membranes.
gept.example_zh: 每個脂質分子在形成細胞膜中扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: Snakes molt by shedding their entire outer skin in a single piece.
gept.example_zh: 蛇透過將整層外皮一次性脫掉來蛻皮。

gept.example_en: An insect uses each antenna to detect smells, vibrations, and air movements.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲用每根觸角來偵測氣味、震動和空氣流動。

gept.example_en: An insect's abdomen contains the digestive and reproductive organs needed for life.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲的腹部包含維持生命所需的消化和生殖器官。

gept.example_en: During hibernation, an animal's metabolism slows down to conserve precious energy.
gept.example_zh: 在冬眠期間，動物的新陳代謝減緩以保存珍貴的能量。

gept.example_en: Some desert frogs estivate underground to survive the hottest months of summer.
gept.example_zh: 一些沙漠青蛙在地下夏眠以度過夏天最熱的月份。

gept.example_en: Many bird species migrate-bio thousands of kilometers between breeding and feeding grounds.
gept.example_zh: 許多鳥類在繁殖地和覓食地之間遷徙數千公里。

gept.example_en: Bats are nocturnal mammals that hunt insects using sound waves at night.
gept.example_zh: 蝙蝠是夜行性哺乳動物，在夜間利用聲波獵捕昆蟲。

gept.example_en: Insect mimicry helps harmless species avoid predators by resembling dangerous animals.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲擬態幫助無害物種透過模仿危險動物來躲避捕食者。

gept.example_en: Several venomous spiders live in tropical regions, and their bites can be deadly.
gept.example_zh: 幾種有毒蜘蛛生活在熱帶地區，牠們的咬傷可能致命。

gept.example_en: A bacterial toxin in spoiled food can cause severe sickness within hours.
gept.example_zh: 變質食物中的細菌毒素可能在數小時內引起嚴重疾病。

gept.example_en: Doctors administered an antitoxin to neutralize the venom in the patient's bloodstream.
gept.example_zh: 醫生施予抗毒素以中和病人血液中的毒液。

gept.example_en: Each lymphocyte is a white blood cell that fights infection in different ways.
gept.example_zh: 每個淋巴細胞都是以不同方式對抗感染的白血球。

gept.example_en: Parents should vaccinate their children against common childhood diseases on schedule.
gept.example_zh: 家長應該按時為孩子接種預防常見兒童疾病的疫苗。

gept.example_en: Public health officials inoculate millions of people during major vaccination campaigns.
gept.example_zh: 公共衛生官員在大型疫苗接種活動中為數百萬人接種。

gept.example_en: The incubation period of the virus can last between two and fourteen days.
gept.example_zh: 該病毒的潛伏期可能持續兩到十四天。

gept.example_en: The bacterial culture-bio grew quickly in the nutrient-rich agar plate overnight.
gept.example_zh: 細菌培養在富含營養素的瓊脂培養皿中一夜之間快速生長。

gept.example_en: Scientists pour warm agar into petri dishes to grow microbial samples easily.
gept.example_zh: 科學家將溫熱的瓊脂倒入培養皿中，以方便培養微生物樣本。

gept.example_en: Genetic engineering allows researchers to modify the DNA of various living organisms.
gept.example_zh: 基因工程讓研究人員能夠修改各種生物的 DNA。

gept.example_en: DNA transcription produces an RNA copy that carries genetic instructions out of the nucleus.
gept.example_zh: DNA 轉錄產生一個 RNA 副本，將遺傳指令帶出細胞核。

gept.example_en: Protein translation-bio happens when ribosomes read messenger RNA sequences to assemble amino acids.
gept.example_zh: 當核糖體讀取信使 RNA 序列以組裝胺基酸時，蛋白質轉譯就會發生。

gept.example_en: Starfish are famous for their ability to undergo regeneration of lost limbs.
gept.example_zh: 海星因其失去肢體後再生的能力而聞名。

gept.example_en: A skin graft can help severely burned patients heal damaged tissue more quickly.
gept.example_zh: 皮膚移植物可以幫助嚴重燒傷的病人更快癒合受損組織。

gept.example_en: Each organ donor-bio has the potential to save several lives through transplantation.
gept.example_zh: 每位器官捐贈者都有透過移植拯救多條生命的潛力。

gept.example_en: Tissue rejection-bio occurs when the immune system attacks transplanted foreign cells.
gept.example_zh: 當免疫系統攻擊移植的外來細胞時，就會發生組織排斥。

gept.example_en: Plant morphology-bio examines the form and structure of leaves, stems, and flowers.
gept.example_zh: 植物形態學研究葉子、莖和花的形態和結構。

gept.example_en: The careful dissection of the specimen revealed the structure of its heart chambers.
gept.example_zh: 對標本的仔細解剖揭示了其心臟腔室的結構。

gept.example_en: Homeostasis keeps the body's internal conditions stable despite changing external environments.
gept.example_zh: 體內平衡在外部環境變化時保持身體內部狀態穩定。

gept.example_en: Sensory stimuli from the environment travel quickly to the brain for processing.
gept.example_zh: 來自環境的感覺刺激迅速傳到大腦進行處理。

gept.example_en: Each sensory neuron carries information from the body's receptors to the spinal cord.
gept.example_zh: 每個感覺神經元將訊息從身體的感受器傳送到脊髓。

gept.example_en: A taste receptor on the tongue detects sweet, sour, salty, bitter, and savory tastes.
gept.example_zh: 舌頭上的味覺受體偵測甜、酸、鹹、苦和鮮味。

gept.example_en: The cornea is the transparent front layer of the eye that focuses light.
gept.example_zh: 角膜是眼睛透明的前層，用於聚焦光線。

gept.example_en: The iris-eye controls how much light enters the pupil at any given moment.
gept.example_zh: 虹膜控制任何時刻有多少光線進入瞳孔。

gept.example_en: The pupil-eye dilates in dim lighting to allow more light to reach the retina.
gept.example_zh: 在昏暗的光線下，瞳孔會擴大以讓更多光線到達視網膜。

gept.example_en: Dogs have an olfactory system far more sensitive than that of human beings.
gept.example_zh: 狗的嗅覺系統遠比人類敏感。

gept.example_en: Auditory nerves carry sound information from the inner ear to the brain rapidly.
gept.example_zh: 聽覺神經將聲音訊息從內耳快速傳送到大腦。

gept.example_en: Salivary glands produce saliva that begins breaking down food in the mouth.
gept.example_zh: 唾液腺產生唾液，開始在口中分解食物。

gept.example_en: Bile produced by the liver helps the small intestine break down dietary fats.
gept.example_zh: 肝臟產生的膽汁幫助小腸分解膳食中的脂肪。

gept.example_en: The gallbladder stores bile and releases it when fatty foods enter the gut.
gept.example_zh: 膽囊儲存膽汁，並在脂肪食物進入腸道時釋放它。

gept.example_en: Chronic renal failure requires either lifelong dialysis treatment or a kidney transplant.
gept.example_zh: 慢性腎衰竭需要終身透析治療或腎臟移植。

gept.example_en: Skeletal muscles attach to bones and enable voluntary movement throughout the body.
gept.example_zh: 骨骼肌附著在骨頭上，使全身能夠進行隨意運動。

gept.example_en: Smooth-muscle tissue lines internal organs and contracts without conscious control.
gept.example_zh: 平滑肌組織排列在內部器官中，在無意識控制下收縮。

gept.example_en: Muscles contract-muscle when they receive electrical signals from connected motor neurons.
gept.example_zh: 肌肉在接收到來自連接的運動神經元的電訊號時收縮。

gept.example_en: An ovary in the female body produces eggs and important reproductive hormones.
gept.example_zh: 女性體內的卵巢產生卵子和重要的生殖激素。

gept.example_en: Each ovule inside a plant's flower develops into a seed after successful fertilization.
gept.example_zh: 植物花朵內的每個胚珠在成功受精後發育成種子。

gept.example_en: Insects pollinate the majority of flowering plants found in temperate forest regions.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲為溫帶森林地區大多數開花植物授粉。

gept.example_en: Strong rooting-bio anchors the plant firmly and absorbs water from the deeper soil layers.
gept.example_zh: 強壯的生根將植物牢牢固定，並從較深的土層吸收水分。

gept.example_en: Ginger grows from a rhizome that spreads horizontally just beneath the soil surface.
gept.example_zh: 薑從根莖生長，這些根莖在土壤表面下水平擴展。

gept.example_en: An annual-plant completes its entire life cycle in a single growing season.
gept.example_zh: 一年生植物在單一生長季節內完成整個生命週期。

gept.example_en: Chlorophyll molecules absorb red and blue light to power photosynthesis in green leaves.
gept.example_zh: 葉綠素分子吸收紅光和藍光，為綠葉的光合作用提供能量。

gept.example_en: When a sperm cell reaches the egg, it can fertilize it and begin development.
gept.example_zh: 當精子細胞到達卵子時，它可以使卵子受精並開始發育。

gept.example_en: The placenta supplies oxygen and nutrients from the mother to her growing fetus.
gept.example_zh: 胎盤將氧氣和養分從母親供應給成長中的胎兒。

gept.example_en: The umbilical cord connects the developing baby to the placenta inside the womb.
gept.example_zh: 臍帶將發育中的嬰兒連接到子宮內的胎盤。

gept.example_en: A baby develops inside the mother's womb-bio for approximately nine full months.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒在母親的子宮內發育大約九個月。

gept.example_en: The Venus flytrap is a carnivorous plant that captures and digests small insects.
gept.example_zh: 捕蠅草是一種捕捉並消化小昆蟲的食肉植物。

gept.example_en: Hummingbirds drink nectar from tubular flowers using their long, slender beaks.
gept.example_zh: 蜂鳥用牠們又長又細的喙從管狀花朵中吸食花蜜。

gept.example_en: Burrowing mammals like moles spend most of their lives beneath the surface of soil.
gept.example_zh: 像鼴鼠這樣的穴居哺乳動物大部分時間生活在土壤表面之下。

gept.example_en: Aquatic animals such as fish must extract dissolved oxygen directly from surrounding water.
gept.example_zh: 魚類等水生動物必須直接從周圍的水中提取溶解的氧氣。

gept.example_en: A terrestrial animal lives mainly on land rather than in water or in trees.
gept.example_zh: 陸生動物主要生活在陸地上，而不是水中或樹上。

gept.example_en: Arboreal monkeys spend most of their lives traveling among the branches of trees.
gept.example_zh: 樹棲猴子大部分時間都在樹枝間穿梭。

gept.example_en: Many freshwater fish cannot survive when placed into a tank of salty seawater.
gept.example_zh: 許多淡水魚在被放入鹹海水的水族箱時無法存活。

gept.example_en: An invasive plant can outcompete native species and damage local ecosystems quickly.
gept.example_zh: 入侵植物可以勝過本地物種，並快速破壞當地生態系統。

gept.example_en: The naturalist spent decades observing bird behavior across many remote islands.
gept.example_zh: 這位博物學家花了數十年在許多偏遠島嶼上觀察鳥類行為。

gept.example_en: Ornithology is the branch of biology specifically dedicated to studying wild birds.
gept.example_zh: 鳥類學是生物學中專門研究野生鳥類的分支。

gept.example_en: Modern neuroscience uses brain imaging to study how thoughts and emotions form.
gept.example_zh: 現代神經科學使用腦部成像來研究思想和情緒如何形成。

gept.example_en: Endocrinology deals with hormones and the glands that produce them in the body.
gept.example_zh: 內分泌學處理激素和體內產生激素的腺體。

gept.example_en: A biological clock regulates many natural rhythms inside every plant and animal.
gept.example_zh: 生物時鐘調節每一種動植物體內的許多自然節律。

gept.example_en: Tropical rainforests harbor extraordinary diversity-bio of plants, insects, and vertebrates.
gept.example_zh: 熱帶雨林孕育著植物、昆蟲和脊椎動物的非凡多樣性。

gept.example_en: An evolutionary advantage often allows certain species to outlast their competitors completely.
gept.example_zh: 演化優勢通常讓某些物種能完全比競爭對手活得更久。

gept.example_en: Bird beaks evolve in shape and size to match their preferred food sources.
gept.example_zh: 鳥喙在形狀和大小上演化以匹配牠們偏好的食物來源。

gept.example_en: An inherited trait-bio can give an animal a clear advantage over rivals in survival.
gept.example_zh: 遺傳的性狀可以讓動物在生存中對競爭對手有明顯優勢。

gept.example_en: The wolf population-bio in the national park has slowly recovered over several decades.
gept.example_zh: 國家公園內的狼族群在數十年中緩慢恢復。

gept.example_en: A swarm of locusts can devour entire fields of crops within just one hour.
gept.example_zh: 一群蝗蟲可以在短短一小時內吞食整片農田的作物。

gept.example_en: A large flock-bio of geese flies south every autumn in an organized formation.
gept.example_zh: 每年秋天，大群的鵝以有組織的隊形向南飛行。

gept.example_en: Elaborate courtship-bio displays help birds attract mates during the breeding season.
gept.example_zh: 精緻的求偶展示幫助鳥類在繁殖季節吸引配偶。

gept.example_en: Selective breeding has produced many varieties of dogs from a common wild ancestor.
gept.example_zh: 選擇性育種從共同的野生祖先培育出許多品種的狗。

gept.example_en: Farmers use an incubator-egg to keep eggs warm until the chicks finally hatch.
gept.example_zh: 農民使用孵蛋器讓蛋保持溫暖，直到小雞最終孵化。

gept.example_en: Sea turtle eggs hatch on warm beaches and the tiny babies crawl toward the ocean.
gept.example_zh: 海龜蛋在溫暖的海灘上孵化，小寶寶們爬向海洋。

gept.example_en: Newly hatched ducklings imprint-bio on the first moving object they see at birth.
gept.example_zh: 剛孵化的小鴨對牠們出生時看到的第一個移動物體產生銘印。

gept.example_en: Bats use echolocation to detect insects and navigate through complete darkness.
gept.example_zh: 蝙蝠使用回聲定位來偵測昆蟲並在完全黑暗中航行。

gept.example_en: Pollination is a vital ecosystem-service performed mostly by bees and other insects.
gept.example_zh: 授粉是主要由蜜蜂和其他昆蟲執行的重要生態系服務。

gept.example_en: Decomposition returns essential elements to the soil for use by new plants.
gept.example_zh: 分解作用將重要元素歸還土壤，供新植物使用。

gept.example_en: Endothermic-bio animals maintain a stable internal temperature despite changes in their surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 內溫動物在周圍環境變化時仍保持穩定的內部溫度。

gept.example_en: Bioengineering combines biology and engineering to design useful new medical devices.
gept.example_zh: 生物工程結合生物學和工程學來設計有用的新醫療設備。

gept.example_en: Bioethics asks difficult questions about the moral limits of modern genetic research.
gept.example_zh: 生物倫理學提出關於現代遺傳研究道德界限的困難問題。

gept.example_en: Taxonomic classification organizes living organisms into nested groups based on shared features.
gept.example_zh: 分類學分類根據共同特徵將生物組織成嵌套的群組。

gept.example_en: Every living organism belongs to a kingdom-bio such as animals, plants, or fungi.
gept.example_zh: 每個生物都屬於一個界，例如動物、植物或真菌。

gept.example_en: A phylum is a major taxonomic group ranked just below a biological kingdom.
gept.example_zh: 門是僅次於生物界的主要分類群。

gept.example_en: The number of protons in an atom uniquely defines what element it is.
gept.example_zh: 原子中質子的數量唯一決定了它是哪種元素。

gept.example_en: A neutron carries no charge but contributes significantly to the overall atomic mass.
gept.example_zh: 中子不帶電荷，但對整體原子質量有顯著貢獻。

gept.example_en: Each orbital can hold at most two electrons with opposite spin directions.
gept.example_zh: 每個軌域最多可容納兩個自旋方向相反的電子。

gept.example_en: Ethylene is the monomer that combines repeatedly to form polyethylene plastic bags.
gept.example_zh: 乙烯是反覆結合形成聚乙烯塑膠袋的單體。

gept.example_en: Ethanol works as an effective solvent for many organic compounds in laboratory work.
gept.example_zh: 乙醇在實驗工作中可作為許多有機化合物的有效溶劑。

gept.example_en: Mayonnaise is an emulsion of oil droplets stably dispersed throughout a watery medium.
gept.example_zh: 美乃滋是油滴穩定分散於水性介質中所形成的乳化液。

gept.example_en: Milk is a colloid containing tiny fat globules suspended within an aqueous phase.
gept.example_zh: 牛奶是含有微小脂肪球懸浮於水相中的膠體。

gept.example_en: A mass spectrometer identifies unknown compounds by measuring the masses of their fragments.
gept.example_zh: 質譜儀透過測量碎片的質量來鑑定未知化合物。

gept.example_en: The change in enthalpy indicates whether a reaction absorbs or releases thermal energy.
gept.example_zh: 焓的變化指示反應是吸收還是釋放熱能。

gept.example_en: A book on a high shelf stores gravitational potential energy due to elevation.
gept.example_zh: 放在高架上的書籍因高度而儲存重力位能。

gept.example_en: Engineers plotted an isotherm to study gas behavior at constant temperature conditions.
gept.example_zh: 工程師繪製等溫線以研究在恆溫條件下的氣體行為。

gept.example_en: A ship floats because the buoyancy force equals the weight of displaced water.
gept.example_zh: 船能浮起是因為浮力等於所排開水的重量。

gept.example_en: Friction between tires and road surface allows vehicles to brake and accelerate safely.
gept.example_zh: 輪胎與路面之間的摩擦力讓車輛能安全地煞車與加速。

gept.example_en: Acceleration measures how quickly an object changes its velocity over a time interval.
gept.example_zh: 加速度衡量物體在一段時間內速度變化的快慢。

gept.example_en: The spring undergoes regular oscillation around its natural equilibrium position when disturbed.
gept.example_zh: 彈簧受到擾動後會圍繞自然平衡位置進行規則振盪。

gept.example_en: Soldiers break step on bridges to prevent dangerous resonance from collapsing the structure.
gept.example_zh: 士兵在橋上會打亂步伐，以防止危險的共振使橋體崩塌。

gept.example_en: A higher frequency wave carries more energy and oscillates more cycles per second.
gept.example_zh: 頻率較高的波攜帶更多能量，每秒振盪的週期數也更多。

gept.example_en: A wave with greater amplitude transports more energy across the medium it travels.
gept.example_zh: 振幅較大的波在所行進的介質中傳遞更多能量。

gept.example_en: Diffraction causes waves to bend slightly around the edges of small openings.
gept.example_zh: 繞射使波在小開口邊緣處略微彎曲。

gept.example_en: Each photon carries discrete energy proportional to the frequency of its associated light.
gept.example_zh: 每個光子攜帶與其對應光頻率成正比的離散能量。

gept.example_en: A quantum represents the smallest indivisible packet of energy in physical theory.
gept.example_zh: 量子在物理理論中代表最小且不可分割的能量單位。

gept.example_en: Enriched uranium serves as fuel in modern commercial nuclear power generation facilities.
gept.example_zh: 濃縮鈾在現代商用核能發電設施中作為燃料使用。

gept.example_en: An inductor resists rapid changes in current by storing energy in magnetic fields.
gept.example_zh: 電感器透過將能量儲存於磁場中來抵抗電流的快速變化。

gept.example_en: Modern microchips contain billions of tiny transistor switches packed onto silicon wafers.
gept.example_zh: 現代微晶片包含數十億個微小的電晶體開關，緊密堆疊在矽晶圓上。

gept.example_en: A diode allows current to flow in one direction only, blocking the reverse.
gept.example_zh: 二極體只允許電流朝一個方向流動，阻擋反向。

gept.example_en: Silicon is the most widely used semiconductor material in modern electronic device manufacturing.
gept.example_zh: 矽是現代電子裝置製造中使用最廣泛的半導體材料。

gept.example_en: Rubber works well as an insulator, preventing dangerous electric current from reaching workers.
gept.example_zh: 橡膠作為絕緣體效果良好，防止危險的電流接觸到工人。

gept.example_en: A superconductor carries current without any resistance once cooled below its critical temperature.
gept.example_zh: 超導體一旦冷卻至臨界溫度以下，便能無電阻地傳輸電流。

gept.example_en: A magnetic field surrounds every wire that carries a steady electric current flow.
gept.example_zh: 每根流通穩定電流的導線周圍都存在磁場。

gept.example_en: A solenoid produces a uniform magnetic field inside when current flows through its turns.
gept.example_zh: 當電流流經匝數時，螺線管內部會產生均勻的磁場。

gept.example_en: Electromagnetic induction generates voltage in a wire whenever the magnetic field is changing.
gept.example_zh: 當磁場變化時，電磁感應會在導線中產生電壓。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 介電質；介電的
gept.example_en: A dielectric layer separates the plates of a capacitor and increases its storage capacity.
gept.example_zh: 介電層分隔電容器的極板，並提升其儲存容量。

gept.example_en: Concrete handles compressive loads well but performs poorly under tension or bending forces.
gept.example_zh: 混凝土能很好地承受壓縮負載，但在張力或彎曲力下表現不佳。

gept.example_en: A shear force acts parallel to a surface, causing layers to slide past each other.
gept.example_zh: 剪力沿表面平行作用，導致各層相互滑動。

gept.example_en: Metal shows plasticity when forces deform it permanently beyond the elastic limit point.
gept.example_zh: 當外力使金屬超過彈性極限而永久變形時，便展現出塑性。

gept.example_en: Turbine blades suffer creep at high temperatures, slowly deforming over many operating hours.
gept.example_zh: 渦輪葉片在高溫下會發生潛變，在許多運作小時內緩慢變形。

gept.example_en: Toughness combines strength and ductility, measuring how much energy a material absorbs.
gept.example_zh: 韌性結合了強度與延展性，衡量材料吸收能量的多寡。

gept.example_en: Most metals are crystalline solids consisting of many small grains joined together.
gept.example_zh: 大多數金屬是結晶固體，由許多細小晶粒接合而成。

gept.example_en: She used a hot iron to solder tiny components onto the circuit board carefully.
gept.example_zh: 她使用熱烙鐵小心地將微小元件焊接到電路板上。

gept.example_en: Forging shapes hot metal under heavy hammer blows to align internal grain structures.
gept.example_zh: 鍛造在重錘擊打下成形熱金屬，使內部晶粒結構整齊排列。

gept.example_en: Powder metallurgy uses sintering to bond fine particles into dense structural components.
gept.example_zh: 粉末冶金利用燒結將細顆粒結合成緻密的結構元件。

gept.example_en: Aircraft skins use laminate panels combining several layers oriented in different directions.
gept.example_zh: 飛機蒙皮使用層壓板，由幾層方向不同的材料組合而成。

gept.example_en: A thin ceramic coating on the blades protects them from extreme combustion temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 葉片上的薄陶瓷塗層保護它們免於極端的燃燒溫度。

gept.example_en: Salt water causes rapid corrosion of unprotected steel hulls on commercial fishing ships.
gept.example_zh: 海水會對未防護的鋼製船體造成快速腐蝕，影響商業漁船。

gept.example_en: Iron undergoes oxidation in moist air, gradually forming reddish brown rust on surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 鐵在潮濕空氣中發生氧化，表面逐漸形成紅棕色的鐵鏽。

gept.example_en: Iron ore undergoes reduction with carbon in a furnace to yield pure metal.
gept.example_zh: 鐵礦在熔爐中與碳發生還原反應，得到純金屬。

gept.example_en: Engineers wear full coverings in the cleanroom to protect sensitive wafer surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在無塵室中穿著全身防護衣，以保護敏感的晶圓表面。

gept.example_en: Advanced chip features measure just a few nanometers across on the silicon surface.
gept.example_zh: 先進晶片的特徵尺寸在矽表面上僅有幾奈米寬。

gept.example_en: A nanoparticle behaves differently than bulk material due to its enormous relative surface area.
gept.example_zh: 奈米粒子因其相對巨大的表面積而表現出與大塊材料不同的特性。

gept.example_en: Graphene consists of a single atomic layer of carbon arranged in a honeycomb pattern.
gept.example_zh: 石墨烯由單原子層碳以蜂巢狀圖案排列而成。

gept.example_en: The clear resin flowed into the mold and cured overnight into a hard shape.
gept.example_zh: 透明樹脂流入模具中，一夜之間固化成堅硬的形狀。

gept.example_en: Methane is the simplest alkane, with only one carbon bonded to four hydrogens.
gept.example_zh: 甲烷是最簡單的烷類，僅有一個碳原子與四個氫原子鍵結。

gept.example_en: An ether has an oxygen atom linking two carbon containing groups within its structure.
gept.example_zh: 醚分子中有一個氧原子連接兩個含碳基團。

gept.example_en: A bomb calorimeter measures the heat released when food samples burn completely inside.
gept.example_zh: 彈式量熱計用以測量食物樣品在其中完全燃燒時釋放的熱量。

gept.example_en: Fluorescence in certain minerals appears bright green when illuminated by invisible ultraviolet light.
gept.example_zh: 某些礦物在不可見紫外光照射下會發出亮綠色螢光。

gept.example_en: Chemical luminescence powers a glow stick once you bend it to mix reactants.
gept.example_zh: 化學發光在你彎折螢光棒使試劑混合後驅動其發光。

gept.example_en: Fiberoptic cables carry internet data as flashes of light across continents and oceans.
gept.example_zh: 光纖電纜以光的脈衝形式跨越大陸與海洋傳輸網路資料。

gept.example_en: Astronomers use an interferometer to combine signals from telescopes for higher angular resolution.
gept.example_zh: 天文學家使用干涉儀合併望遠鏡訊號，以獲得更高的角解析度。

gept.example_en: Engineers use an oscilloscope to display rapidly varying voltage signals on a screen.
gept.example_zh: 工程師使用示波器在螢幕上顯示快速變化的電壓訊號。

gept.example_en: Water has strong polarity, with one end slightly positive and the other negative.
gept.example_zh: 水具有強烈的極性，一端略帶正電，另一端略帶負電。

gept.example_en: A water molecule acts like a tiny dipole due to its bent geometric structure.
gept.example_zh: 水分子因其彎曲的幾何結構，作用如同微小偶極。

gept.example_en: Blue litmus paper turns red when dipped briefly into any acidic chemical solution.
gept.example_zh: 藍色石蕊試紙短暫浸入任何酸性化學溶液後會變紅。

gept.example_en: Doctors give intravenous saline fluid to patients who become severely dehydrated after surgery.
gept.example_zh: 醫師為手術後嚴重脫水的病患靜脈注射含鹽液體。

gept.example_en: Saturation occurs when no additional solute can dissolve in a solvent at a given temperature.
gept.example_zh: 飽和發生於特定溫度下，溶劑中無法再溶解更多溶質時。

gept.example_en: A permeable membrane lets certain molecules pass while blocking others based on size.
gept.example_zh: 可滲透膜允許某些分子通過，同時依大小阻擋其他分子。

gept.example_en: A radioactive tracer helps doctors map blood flow through arteries during imaging scans.
gept.example_zh: 放射性示蹤劑幫助醫師在影像掃描中繪製血液流經動脈的路徑。

gept.example_en: A centripetal force pulls an orbiting satellite continuously toward the center of Earth.
gept.example_zh: 向心力持續將軌道上的衛星拉向地球中心。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 離心的；遠離中心的
gept.example_en: Passengers feel a centrifugal effect pushing them outward when the car corners sharply.
gept.example_zh: 車輛急轉彎時，乘客會感覺到一股離心效應將他們向外推。

gept.example_en: A spinning gyroscope keeps its orientation, helping aircraft determine which way is level.
gept.example_zh: 旋轉的陀螺儀能保持方向，幫助飛行器判斷哪一面是水平的。

gept.example_en: Each smartphone contains a tiny accelerometer that senses tilting and shaking motion accurately.
gept.example_zh: 每支智慧型手機都包含一個微小的加速度計，能準確感應傾斜與晃動。

gept.example_en: Displacement measures the straight line distance from the starting point to the final position.
gept.example_zh: 位移衡量從起始點到最終位置的直線距離。

gept.example_en: An inertial reference frame moves at constant velocity without any rotational acceleration component.
gept.example_zh: 慣性參考系以恆定速度運動，且不含任何旋轉加速度成分。

gept.example_en: In freefall, both heavy and light objects accelerate downward at exactly the same rate.
gept.example_zh: 在自由落體中，重物與輕物以完全相同的速率向下加速。

gept.example_en: Astronauts feel weightless inside the orbiting space station as it continuously falls forward.
gept.example_zh: 太空人在軌道上的太空站內感到失重，因為它持續向前下墜。

gept.example_en: Builders prefer noncombustible insulation in commercial walls to slow the spread of fire.
gept.example_zh: 建築商偏好在商用牆體中使用不可燃絕緣材料，以延緩火勢蔓延。

gept.example_en: Tribology studies friction, wear, and lubrication in interacting surfaces of mechanical systems.
gept.example_zh: 摩擦學研究機械系統中互相接觸表面之間的摩擦、磨損與潤滑。

gept.example_en: Bricks are porous and slowly absorb water unless they receive protective surface sealing.
gept.example_zh: 磚塊具多孔性，若未經表面密封處理，會緩慢吸水。

gept.example_en: Higher porosity in concrete reduces strength yet improves thermal insulation properties slightly.
gept.example_zh: 混凝土的孔隙率較高會降低強度，但略微改善熱絕緣性能。

gept.example_en: Building codes specify permeance limits to prevent moisture from accumulating inside exterior walls.
gept.example_zh: 建築規範規定滲透量上限，以防止水氣在外牆內部累積。

gept.example_en: Workers tie steel rebar inside forms before they pour concrete for sturdy reinforced foundations.
gept.example_zh: 工人在澆築混凝土製作堅固鋼筋基礎之前，先將鋼筋綁紮在模板內。

gept.example_en: Engineers use ultrasonic testing to detect tiny cracks deep inside metal aircraft parts.
gept.example_zh: 工程師使用超音波檢測來發現金屬飛機零件深處的微小裂紋。

gept.example_en: Sound levels above ninety decibel can damage human hearing after prolonged regular exposure.
gept.example_zh: 音量超過九十分貝在長時間頻繁暴露下可能損害人類聽力。

gept.example_en: Human ears generally detect sound frequencies between twenty and twenty thousand hertz overall.
gept.example_zh: 人耳一般可偵測介於二十赫茲到兩萬赫茲之間的聲音頻率。

gept.example_en: A typical camera flash lasts only a few millisecond before the bright pulse ends.
gept.example_zh: 典型相機閃光僅持續幾毫秒，亮光脈衝便結束。

gept.example_en: The gearbox transmits power from the engine to the wheels through a series of gears.
gept.example_zh: 齒輪箱透過一連串的齒輪將引擎動力傳到車輪。

gept.example_en: A heavy flywheel stores rotational energy and keeps the engine running smoothly between strokes.
gept.example_zh: 沉重的飛輪儲存旋轉能量，使引擎在各衝程之間運轉平穩。

gept.example_en: The mechanic replaced the head gasket to stop coolant from leaking into the cylinders.
gept.example_zh: 技師更換了汽缸頭墊片，以防止冷卻液滲漏進汽缸。

gept.example_en: The two pipes are joined together at the flange using eight high-tensile bolts.
gept.example_zh: 兩根管子在法蘭處用八根高張力螺栓接合。

gept.example_en: A clogged injector can cause rough idling and poor fuel economy in modern engines.
gept.example_zh: 噴油嘴堵塞會造成現代引擎怠速不穩與油耗變差。

gept.example_en: When the alternator fails, the battery will eventually drain and the car will stop.
gept.example_zh: 交流發電機故障時，電瓶最終會耗盡，車子就會熄火。

gept.example_en: Engineers place a resistor in the circuit to limit the current to a safe level.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在電路中放置電阻器以將電流限制在安全範圍內。

gept.example_en: Check the wattage of the appliance before plugging it into the extension cord.
gept.example_zh: 將電器插上延長線前，先確認其瓦數。

gept.example_en: A solar inverter changes the DC from the panels into usable AC for the home.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能逆變器將面板產生的直流電轉換為家中可用的交流電。

gept.example_en: The robotic arm uses a linear actuator to extend and retract with great precision.
gept.example_zh: 機械手臂使用線性致動器以極高精度伸出與收回。

gept.example_en: The new engine produces nearly double the horsepower of the previous generation.
gept.example_zh: 新引擎的馬力幾乎是上一代的兩倍。

gept.example_en: The drill operates most efficiently between two thousand and three thousand rpm.
gept.example_zh: 這台鑽床在每分鐘兩千到三千轉之間運作最有效率。

gept.example_en: The radiator-fan kicks in automatically when the engine reaches a high operating temperature.
gept.example_zh: 當引擎達到高運轉溫度時，散熱風扇會自動啟動。

gept.example_en: The air conditioning compressor needs replacement after years of constant use.
gept.example_zh: 空調壓縮機在多年持續使用後需要更換。
