gept.example_en: The helicopter rotor must be inspected before every flight for cracks or damage.
gept.example_zh: 直升機的轉子在每次飛行前都必須檢查有無裂痕或損傷。

gept.example_en: In an electric motor, the stator remains still while the rotor spins inside it.
gept.example_zh: 在電動馬達中，定子保持不動，轉子在其中旋轉。

gept.example_en: Packages move along the conveyor before being sorted by destination at the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 包裹沿輸送帶移動，再依目的地在倉庫被分類。

gept.example_en: A skilled machinist can shape metal parts to tolerances of just a few microns.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的機械工能將金屬零件加工到僅幾微米的公差。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 製造商；金屬加工者
gept.example_en: The steel fabricator cut, bent, and welded the beams before delivery to the site.
gept.example_zh: 鋼鐵加工廠在送到工地前先切割、彎折並焊接好鋼樑。

gept.example_en: The blacksmith heated the iron and then forged it into a perfectly curved blade.
gept.example_zh: 鐵匠把鐵塊加熱後，鍛造成一把完美彎曲的刀刃。

gept.example_en: Cast-iron pipes were widely used in older buildings because they last for many decades.
gept.example_zh: 鑄鐵管在舊建築中被廣泛使用，因為它們可以撐數十年。

gept.example_en: They anodize aluminum parts to create a hard, colored, corrosion-resistant surface.
gept.example_zh: 他們對鋁件進行陽極處理，形成堅硬、有色且抗腐蝕的表面。

gept.example_en: Chrome plating gives the bumper a shiny, durable, and weather-resistant finish.
gept.example_zh: 鍍鉻使保險桿表面光亮、耐用又耐候。

gept.example_en: This corrosive chemical must be stored in a sealed container made of resistant plastic.
gept.example_zh: 這種腐蝕性化學品必須存放在密封的耐腐蝕塑膠容器中。

gept.example_en: Excessive load caused permanent deformation of the steel column in the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 過大的負載使倉庫內鋼柱出現永久變形。

gept.example_en: Cast iron suffers from brittleness and may shatter rather than bend under impact.
gept.example_zh: 鑄鐵具有脆性，在受到衝擊時可能直接碎裂而非彎折。

gept.example_en: Alloying iron with small amounts of carbon produces the steel used in modern construction.
gept.example_zh: 在鐵中加入少量碳進行合金化，便能製成現代建築用的鋼。

gept.example_en: A specialized adhesive replaced traditional rivets in many parts of the new aircraft.
gept.example_zh: 新型飛機許多部位以特殊黏著劑取代了傳統鉚釘。

gept.example_en: Apply a thin bead of sealant around the window frame to prevent leaks.
gept.example_zh: 沿窗框塗一條細密封劑以防止滲漏。

gept.example_en: Fresh caulking around the bathtub stops water from seeping into the wall.
gept.example_zh: 浴缸周圍重新填縫可防止水滲入牆內。

gept.example_en: A massive steel girder spans the entire width of the bridge above the river.
gept.example_zh: 一根巨大的鋼樑跨越整座橋面，橫越河流。

gept.example_en: A steel lintel carries the weight of the wall above the new doorway.
gept.example_zh: 鋼製過樑承載新門口上方牆體的重量。

gept.example_en: Never remove a load-bearing wall without consulting a qualified structural engineer.
gept.example_zh: 未經合格的結構工程師評估，切勿拆除承重牆。

gept.example_en: The subfloor must be perfectly level before the finished hardwood is installed on top.
gept.example_zh: 底層地板必須完全水平，才能在上方鋪設成品實木地板。

gept.example_en: All outdoor electrical boxes must be weatherproof to prevent water damage to the wiring.
gept.example_zh: 所有戶外電氣盒都必須防風雨，以免線路受潮損壞。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 防水的；不漏水的
gept.example_en: Divers carry their cameras inside a watertight housing rated for great depths.
gept.example_zh: 潛水員把相機放在可承受深水的防水殼裡。

gept.example_en: The sample chamber must be airtight so that outside contaminants cannot affect the test.
gept.example_zh: 試樣腔必須密閉，使外界污染物無法影響測試結果。

gept.example_en: Engineers vacuum-seal the components to prevent oxidation during long-term storage.
gept.example_zh: 工程師將零件真空密封，以防長期儲存時氧化。

gept.example_en: Technicians pressurize the cabin before takeoff so passengers can breathe at high altitude.
gept.example_zh: 技師在起飛前對機艙加壓，使乘客在高空仍能呼吸。

gept.example_en: The airframe of the bomber was inspected for cracks after every long mission.
gept.example_zh: 轟炸機的機身骨架在每次長任務後都會檢查有無裂紋。

gept.example_en: A small movement of the rudder causes the boat to swing in a different direction.
gept.example_zh: 方向舵稍微一動，船便會朝不同方向偏移。

gept.example_en: Modern avionics allow a single pilot to safely operate aircraft that once required three.
gept.example_zh: 現代航空電子使單一飛行員就能安全操作以前需要三人駕駛的飛機。

gept.example_en: The payload-bay carried two communication satellites into low Earth orbit.
gept.example_zh: 酬載艙將兩顆通訊衛星送入低地球軌道。

gept.example_en: Researchers are exploring new forms of propulsion that may one day reach distant stars.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員正在探索新型推進方式，有朝一日或許能抵達遙遠的恆星。

gept.example_en: Strict emission-control standards have greatly reduced air pollution from new vehicles.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的排放控制標準大幅降低了新車造成的空氣污染。

gept.example_en: A new muffler significantly reduces the loud rumble coming from under the truck.
gept.example_zh: 新消音器顯著減少了卡車底下傳出的低沉轟鳴聲。

gept.example_en: Front-wheel-drive cars combine the gearbox and differential into a single transaxle unit.
gept.example_zh: 前輪驅動車將變速箱與差速器結合成單一變速差速器。

gept.example_en: A bent driveshaft caused the rear of the truck to vibrate badly at highway speeds.
gept.example_zh: 傳動軸彎曲使這輛卡車在高速公路上後段嚴重抖動。

gept.example_en: Trucks must not exceed the legal axle-load limit when crossing the bridge.
gept.example_zh: 卡車過橋時不得超過法定的軸載重上限。

gept.example_en: A cracked suspension-arm can make the steering feel loose and unpredictable at speed.
gept.example_zh: 懸吊臂出現裂痕會讓高速時的轉向感覺鬆散且難以預測。

gept.example_en: A worn shock-absorber lets the car bounce repeatedly after hitting a small bump.
gept.example_zh: 避震器磨損後，車子過小坑洞後會反覆彈跳。

gept.example_en: A squealing noise often means the brake-pad has worn down and needs replacement.
gept.example_zh: 刺耳聲響通常表示煞車片已磨損，需要更換。

gept.example_en: The mechanic used a digital caliper to measure the thickness of the brake rotor.
gept.example_zh: 技師使用數位卡尺測量煞車盤的厚度。

gept.example_en: A warped rotor-disc causes the steering wheel to shake when the driver brakes.
gept.example_zh: 變形的煞車碟盤會使駕駛踩煞車時方向盤抖動。

gept.example_en: The abs-system pulses the brakes rapidly to prevent the wheels from locking up.
gept.example_zh: 防鎖死煞車系統會快速點放煞車，防止車輪鎖死。

gept.example_en: The driver-side airbag deployed instantly and reduced the impact during the collision.
gept.example_zh: 駕駛側安全氣囊在碰撞當下立刻彈出，減輕了衝擊。

gept.example_en: The crumple-zone at the front of the car absorbs energy and protects the passengers.
gept.example_zh: 車頭的潰縮區能吸收能量，保護車內乘客。

gept.example_en: Race cars are fitted with a heavy steel rollcage to protect drivers during accidents.
gept.example_zh: 賽車裝有沉重的鋼製防滾架，以在事故中保護車手。

gept.example_en: The chassis-frame must be perfectly aligned, or the vehicle will not drive straight.
gept.example_zh: 底盤車架必須完全對齊，否則車輛無法直行。

gept.example_en: Most modern cars use a unibody construction that combines body and frame into one.
gept.example_zh: 多數現代汽車採用整體式車身，將車體與車架合為一體。

gept.example_en: The hybrid powertrain combines a small gasoline engine with two electric motors.
gept.example_zh: 這套油電動力傳動系統結合了小型汽油引擎與兩具電動馬達。

gept.example_en: A four-wheel drivetrain provides better traction on muddy and uneven surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 四輪傳動系統在泥濘與不平的路面上能提供更佳抓地力。

gept.example_en: The odometer-reading showed that the used truck had traveled over three hundred thousand miles.
gept.example_zh: 里程表讀數顯示這輛中古卡車已行駛超過三十萬英里。

gept.example_en: An ultrasonic transducer converts electrical signals into sound waves used for sonar imaging.
gept.example_zh: 超音波換能器將電訊號轉成聲波，用於聲納成像。

gept.example_en: The infrared-sensor detects body heat and turns on the corridor lights automatically.
gept.example_zh: 紅外線感測器偵測到體溫後會自動開啟走廊燈光。

gept.example_en: The operator clamped the metal block to the milling-machine and began cutting precise slots.
gept.example_zh: 操作員將金屬塊夾在銑床上，開始切削精準的溝槽。

gept.example_en: A skilled machinist used the lathe to turn the steel rod into a perfect cylinder.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的機械工用車床將鋼棒車成完美的圓柱體。

gept.example_en: A wood router-tool can carve decorative grooves along the edge of a tabletop.
gept.example_zh: 木工修邊機可沿桌面邊緣雕出裝飾性凹槽。

gept.example_en: A vise-grip locks tightly onto a stripped bolt that ordinary wrenches can no longer turn.
gept.example_zh: 萬能鉗能緊緊夾住一般扳手已轉不動的滑牙螺栓。

gept.example_en: Use a torque-wrench so each wheel nut is tightened to exactly the right specification.
gept.example_zh: 使用扭力扳手將每顆車輪螺母鎖到正確的規定值。

gept.example_en: A socket-wrench with a long handle gives plenty of leverage on stubborn rusted bolts.
gept.example_zh: 長柄套筒扳手能對頑固生鏽的螺栓提供足夠的施力。

gept.example_en: Inspectors use a caliper-gauge to verify that each part meets the specified dimensions.
gept.example_zh: 檢驗員使用卡尺量規確認每個零件符合規定尺寸。

gept.example_en: A precision micrometer can measure thickness down to a thousandth of a millimeter.
gept.example_zh: 精密測微計可量測到千分之一毫米的厚度。

gept.example_en: The surveyor used a theodolite to measure precise angles across the construction site.
gept.example_zh: 測量員用經緯儀在工地測量精確的角度。

gept.example_en: Careful surveying is essential before any tunnel or large bridge can be designed.
gept.example_zh: 在設計任何隧道或大型橋樑之前，仔細的測量都不可或缺。

gept.example_en: A sturdy retaining-wall holds back the slope above the new highway.
gept.example_zh: 一道堅固的擋土牆擋住新公路上方的邊坡。

gept.example_en: The embankment alongside the river protects nearby fields from seasonal flooding.
gept.example_zh: 沿河的路堤保護附近農田免受季節性洪水侵襲。

gept.example_en: The new reservoir provides drinking water for nearly half a million residents.
gept.example_zh: 這座新水庫為將近五十萬居民提供飲用水。

gept.example_en: A worker climbed down through the manhole to inspect the sewer pipes below.
gept.example_zh: 一名工人從人孔爬下去檢查下方的下水道管線。

gept.example_en: Engineers designed wider channels to handle stormwater during typhoon season.
gept.example_zh: 工程師設計了更寬的渠道，以處理颱風季節的雨水徑流。

gept.example_en: Sealed ductwork-system improves energy efficiency by preventing conditioned air from leaking.
gept.example_zh: 密封的風管系統可防止調節後的空氣外洩，提升能源效率。

gept.example_en: A ceiling diffuser spreads cool air evenly across the entire conference room.
gept.example_zh: 天花板上的散流器讓冷空氣均勻分布到整間會議室。

gept.example_en: The processor sits beneath a large heatsink that carries excess heat away from the chip.
gept.example_zh: 處理器下方裝有大型散熱片，將晶片多餘的熱量帶走。

gept.example_en: Apply a thin layer of thermal-paste between the chip and the heatsink for better cooling.
gept.example_zh: 在晶片與散熱片之間塗上一層薄薄的散熱膏，以提升散熱效果。

gept.example_en: The sample reached its breakpoint after the testing machine applied a slowly increasing force.
gept.example_zh: 試樣在測試機緩慢加力下達到斷裂點。

gept.example_en: The quality-assurance team rejects any product that fails the strict company standards.
gept.example_zh: 品質保證團隊會退回任何未達公司嚴格標準的產品。

gept.example_en: Check the specification-sheet to confirm the component meets your circuit's voltage requirements.
gept.example_zh: 查閱規格表，確認該元件符合電路的電壓要求。

gept.example_en: The schematic shows how each component connects within the larger electronic system.
gept.example_zh: 電路圖顯示每個元件如何在較大的電子系統中相互連接。

gept.example_en: A helical gear is quieter and stronger than a comparable straight-tooth gear.
gept.example_zh: 螺旋齒輪比同等規格的直齒齒輪更安靜也更耐用。

gept.example_en: Drive out the hinge-pin gently if you want to remove the door from its frame.
gept.example_zh: 如果要把門從門框上拆下，輕輕將鉸鏈銷敲出。

gept.example_en: A small swivel allows the camera to rotate freely without tangling its cable.
gept.example_zh: 小型轉環讓相機能自由旋轉而不會纏繞電線。

gept.example_en: A ratchet wrench lets the user tighten a bolt without lifting the tool off it.
gept.example_zh: 棘輪扳手讓使用者可以鎖緊螺栓而不必把工具拿開。

gept.example_en: The firewall-panel separates the engine compartment from the passenger area of the vehicle.
gept.example_zh: 防火板將車輛的引擎室與乘客空間分隔開來。

gept.example_en: Inspect the undercarriage carefully because winter road salt accelerates rusting from below.
gept.example_zh: 仔細檢查底盤，因為冬天的道路鹽會加速車底生鏽。

gept.example_en: The pilot lowered the landing-gear several minutes before the aircraft began its final approach.
gept.example_zh: 飛行員在飛機進入最後進場前幾分鐘放下了起落架。

gept.example_en: Ground crew guided the aircraft slowly across the tarmac toward the assigned gate.
gept.example_zh: 地勤人員引導飛機緩緩駛過機坪，前往指定登機門。

gept.example_en: The captain followed the taxiway markings carefully on the way to the long main runway.
gept.example_zh: 機長沿著滑行道標線小心駛向長長的主跑道。

gept.example_en: Mechanics rolled the small jet into the hangar for a complete overnight inspection.
gept.example_zh: 機師將這架小型噴射機推進飛機庫，進行整夜的全面檢查。

gept.example_en: Modern airliners use satcom to communicate over remote oceans far from any ground station.
gept.example_zh: 現代客機在遠離地面站的遠洋上以衛星通訊聯絡。

gept.example_en: A large radar-array on the roof of the ship scans the surrounding airspace continuously.
gept.example_zh: 船頂上的大型雷達陣列持續掃描周圍的空域。

gept.example_en: A firmware-update can fix bugs in the sensor's behavior without changing any hardware.
gept.example_zh: 韌體更新可在不更動硬體的情況下修正感測器行為的錯誤。

gept.example_en: The reactor includes failsafe systems that shut it down automatically during any abnormal event.
gept.example_zh: 反應爐配有故障保險系統，在任何異常情況下都會自動關機。

gept.example_en: The packaging area became the main bottleneck after the assembly line was upgraded.
gept.example_zh: 裝配線升級之後，包裝區變成了主要瓶頸。

gept.example_en: A custom jig holds the workpiece steady while the drill makes a perfect series of holes.
gept.example_zh: 客製化治具固定工件，讓鑽床能鑽出完美一致的孔。

gept.example_en: Stable work-holding is essential for high-accuracy machining of complex parts.
gept.example_zh: 穩定的工件夾持對複雜零件的高精度加工至關重要。

gept.example_en: Every powertool on the bench is checked for proper grounding before use.
gept.example_zh: 工作台上的每件電動工具在使用前都會檢查接地是否正確。

gept.example_en: An impact-driver delivers powerful bursts of torque to drive long screws quickly.
gept.example_zh: 衝擊起子能短時間爆發強大扭力，快速旋入長螺絲。

gept.example_en: Wear safety goggles whenever you use an angle-grinder to cut metal or polish welds.
gept.example_zh: 使用角磨機切割金屬或拋光焊道時都要戴安全護目鏡。

gept.example_en: The intake-pipe was clogged with debris and had to be cleared before operation could resume.
gept.example_zh: 進水管被雜物堵塞，必須清通後才能恢復運轉。

gept.example_en: Tidal energy projects harness ocean currents to produce clean and predictable electricity.
gept.example_zh: 潮汐能源計畫利用洋流產生乾淨且可預測的電力。

gept.example_en: City authorities issued a smog-alert advising residents with asthma to stay indoors.
gept.example_zh: 市政當局發布霧霾警報，建議氣喘患者待在室內。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 經查證的；驗證過的
gept.example_en: Only verified carbon credits from accredited projects can be sold in the regulated market.
gept.example_zh: 只有來自認證計畫的查證碳權才能在管制市場銷售。

gept.example_en: Crossing a climate tipping-point could destabilize weather patterns for centuries to come.
gept.example_zh: 跨越氣候臨界點可能使天氣模式在未來數世紀失去穩定。

gept.example_en: Volcanic aerosols can linger in the stratosphere and temporarily cool the planet.
gept.example_zh: 火山氣溶膠可能在平流層停留並暫時冷卻地球。

gept.example_en: Industrial aerosol particles can scatter sunlight and influence regional precipitation patterns.
gept.example_zh: 工業氣溶膠粒子可散射陽光並影響區域降水模式。

gept.example_en: Engineers inspect the flue regularly to ensure exhaust is vented safely outside.
gept.example_zh: 工程師定期檢查煙道以確保廢氣安全排出室外。

gept.example_en: The new incinerator reduces waste volume while generating electricity for the local grid.
gept.example_zh: 新焚化爐減少廢棄物體積，同時為地方電網發電。

gept.example_en: Oil extraction in fragile environments carries significant ecological and social risks.
gept.example_zh: 在脆弱環境中採油帶來重大的生態與社會風險。

gept.example_en: Offshore drilling permits face increasing opposition from environmental advocacy groups.
gept.example_zh: 海上鑽探許可面臨環保倡議團體日益增加的反對。

gept.example_en: Investors funded a wildcat in the remote basin hoping to strike commercial oil reserves.
gept.example_zh: 投資者資助偏遠盆地的探勘油井，希望發現商業油藏。

gept.example_en: A pipeline-leak in the wildlife reserve required months of remediation and biological monitoring.
gept.example_zh: 野生保護區內的管線洩漏需要數月的整治與生態監測。

gept.example_en: An aging tanker ran aground and released crude oil across miles of fragile coastline.
gept.example_zh: 一艘老舊油輪擱淺，沿數英里脆弱海岸線釋放原油。

gept.example_en: The coastal refinery processes millions of barrels each year despite local environmental concerns.
gept.example_zh: 儘管當地有環境疑慮，這座沿海煉油廠每年仍處理數百萬桶。

gept.example_en: A barrel of crude oil contains about 159 liters of unrefined petroleum.
gept.example_zh: 一桶原油約含一百五十九公升未精煉的石油。

gept.example_en: Crude prices fluctuated sharply after producers announced sudden production cuts overnight.
gept.example_zh: 在生產國一夜宣布突然減產後，原油價格劇烈波動。

gept.example_en: Upstream-energy operations include exploration, drilling, and initial extraction of fossil fuels.
gept.example_zh: 能源上游業務包括化石燃料的勘探、鑽探與初步開採。

gept.example_en: Grid-tied solar arrays can feed surplus electricity back into the local distribution network.
gept.example_zh: 併網太陽能陣列可將多餘電力回饋至當地配電網。

gept.example_en: The substation stepped down high-voltage current for safe delivery to neighborhood transformers.
gept.example_zh: 變電站將高壓電降壓，安全地輸送至社區變壓器。

gept.example_en: Severe heatwaves forced utilities to schedule load-shedding throughout densely populated suburbs.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重熱浪迫使公用事業在人口密集的郊區安排分區限電。

gept.example_en: Pumped-hydro storage moves water uphill at night and generates electricity during peak hours.
gept.example_zh: 抽蓄水力發電於夜間將水抽往高處，並在尖峰時段發電。

gept.example_en: Each rooftop solar-panel converts sunlight into direct current for household appliances.
gept.example_zh: 每片屋頂太陽能板將陽光轉換成直流電供家電使用。

gept.example_en: Thin-film solar cells can be applied to curved surfaces such as backpacks and roofs.
gept.example_zh: 薄膜太陽能電池可貼附於背包與屋頂等曲面。

gept.example_en: Electric vehicles often travel four to six kilometers on every kilowatt-hour stored.
gept.example_zh: 電動車每儲存一度電通常可行駛四至六公里。

gept.example_en: Solar thermal collectors heat water directly without first generating electrical current.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能熱集熱器直接加熱水，不需先產生電流。

gept.example_en: Building owners can retrofit older offices with insulation to dramatically cut heating bills.
gept.example_zh: 建築業主可為老舊辦公室加裝隔熱，大幅削減暖氣費用。

gept.example_en: Coffee shops now offer discounts when customers bring a reusable-cup for their drinks.
gept.example_zh: 現在咖啡店對自帶環保杯的顧客提供折扣。

gept.example_en: Shoppers carry a sturdy tote instead of accepting plastic bags at checkout counters.
gept.example_zh: 購物者攜帶結實的大手提袋，而非在結帳櫃台接受塑膠袋。

gept.example_en: Shipping companies are exploring ammonia as a low-carbon fuel for long ocean voyages.
gept.example_zh: 航運公司正探索氨作為長程海上航行的低碳燃料。

gept.example_en: Ethanol blended into gasoline can reduce emissions but raises concerns about food crops.
gept.example_zh: 摻入汽油的乙醇可減少排放，但引發對糧食作物的疑慮。

gept.example_en: Aviation kerosene generates large emissions, prompting the search for sustainable aviation fuels.
gept.example_zh: 航空煤油產生大量排放，促使業界尋找永續航空燃料。

gept.example_en: Hotels are installing EV-charger stations to attract increasingly eco-conscious traveling guests.
gept.example_zh: 飯店正安裝電動車充電器以吸引越來越具環保意識的旅客。

gept.example_en: Drivers can fast-charge their cars to eighty percent in under thirty minutes.
gept.example_zh: 駕駛人可在三十分鐘內將車輛快速充電至八成。

gept.example_en: A roadside supercharger network makes long electric road trips much more practical today.
gept.example_zh: 路邊的超級充電器網絡使如今長程電動公路旅行更加可行。

gept.example_en: Solid-state batteries could deliver longer ranges and faster charging within the coming decade.
gept.example_zh: 固態電池有望在未來十年內提供更長續航與更快充電。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 再生的；回收能量的
gept.example_en: Regenerative braking captures kinetic energy and returns it to the vehicle's battery.
gept.example_zh: 再生制動回收動能並將其返回車輛的電池。

gept.example_en: Electrified bus fleets are quieter and cleaner than diesel models in dense city centers.
gept.example_zh: 電氣化巴士車隊比柴油車型更安靜、更乾淨，適合擁擠的市中心。

gept.example_en: A plug-in hybrid-vehicle combines a small battery with a backup gasoline engine.
gept.example_zh: 插電式混合動力車結合小型電池與備用汽油引擎。

gept.example_en: Only low-emission vehicles can enter the downtown clean air zone during weekday hours.
gept.example_zh: 週間時段僅低排放車輛可進入市中心的清淨空氣區。

gept.example_en: The port set a goal to become entirely zero-emission for cargo handling by 2035.
gept.example_zh: 該港口設定到 2035 年其貨物裝卸完全零排放的目標。

gept.example_en: Bees and butterflies serve as essential pollinator species for global food production.
gept.example_zh: 蜜蜂與蝴蝶是全球糧食生產不可或缺的授粉者物種。

gept.example_en: Vast monoculture plantations harm soil health and reduce biodiversity over time.
gept.example_zh: 大面積單一栽培園隨時間損害土壤健康並降低生物多樣性。

gept.example_en: Mass bleaching events devastated colorful reefs once teeming with tropical marine life.
gept.example_zh: 大規模白化事件摧毀了曾經充滿熱帶海洋生命的繽紛珊瑚礁。

gept.example_en: Rising salinity in farmland soils makes growing staple crops increasingly difficult.
gept.example_zh: 農地土壤鹽度上升使種植主要作物日益困難。

gept.example_en: Severe storms accelerated coastal-erosion, threatening homes built too near the shore.
gept.example_zh: 強烈風暴加速海岸侵蝕，威脅建於距海岸過近的住宅。

gept.example_en: Healthy mangrove forests protect coastlines from storm surges and store enormous carbon stocks.
gept.example_zh: 健康的紅樹林森林保護海岸免受暴潮侵襲，並儲存大量碳。

gept.example_en: Seagrass meadows shelter young fish and absorb carbon up to thirty-five times faster than rainforests.
gept.example_zh: 海草草地庇護幼魚，吸碳速率可達雨林的三十五倍。

gept.example_en: A new marine-protected area now restricts fishing and shields fragile underwater habitats.
gept.example_zh: 新設立的海洋保護區現在限制漁撈並庇護脆弱的水下棲地。

gept.example_en: Bottom-trawler activity disturbs seabeds and releases stored carbon back into ocean waters.
gept.example_zh: 底拖網漁船活動擾動海床並將儲存的碳釋回海洋水中。

gept.example_en: Sustainable aquaculture can supply protein while reducing pressure on wild fish populations.
gept.example_zh: 永續水產養殖可提供蛋白質，同時減輕野生魚群的壓力。

gept.example_en: A salmon hatchery releases millions of fingerlings each spring into the local river.
gept.example_zh: 鮭魚孵化場每年春天向當地河流釋放數百萬尾魚苗。

gept.example_en: Volunteers help count each fingerling before release into the upstream creek.
gept.example_zh: 志工協助在魚苗放流至上游小溪前一一清點。

gept.example_en: A fish-ladder helps migrating salmon climb past dams during the autumn spawning season.
gept.example_zh: 魚梯協助洄游鮭魚在秋季產卵季越過水壩。

gept.example_en: Peatland ecosystems store vast amounts of carbon and must be carefully protected.
gept.example_zh: 泥炭地生態系統儲存大量碳，必須加以仔細保護。

gept.example_en: A rain-garden filters pollutants from runoff while supporting native flowering plants.
gept.example_zh: 雨水花園過濾逕流中的污染物，並支持原生開花植物。

gept.example_en: Painting buildings with a cool-roof coating reflects sunlight and lowers urban temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 在建築物塗上涼屋頂塗層可反射陽光並降低都市溫度。

gept.example_en: Expanding the urban-canopy with street trees can cool neighborhoods by several degrees.
gept.example_zh: 以行道樹擴大都市樹冠覆蓋可使社區降溫數度。

gept.example_en: Dense pavement and dark roofs create an urban heat-island that intensifies summer warmth.
gept.example_zh: 密集鋪面與深色屋頂造成都市熱島效應，加劇夏季暑熱。

gept.example_en: A protected bike-lane separates cyclists from speeding cars on busy avenues.
gept.example_zh: 受保護的自行車道將自行車騎士與繁忙大道上的疾駛車輛分隔。

gept.example_en: Strong walkability raises property values and improves the everyday well-being of residents.
gept.example_zh: 良好的步行友善度提升房產價值，並改善居民的日常福祉。

gept.example_en: Responsible ecotourism funds conservation work and provides livelihoods for nearby rural communities.
gept.example_zh: 負責任的生態旅遊資助保育工作，並為鄰近農村社區提供生計。

gept.example_en: The hotel claims to be carbon-neutral through extensive renewable energy and certified offsets.
gept.example_zh: 該飯店宣稱透過大量再生能源與認證抵銷達到碳中和。

gept.example_en: Workers will decommission the aging coal plant and convert the site for solar generation.
gept.example_zh: 工人將為老舊燃煤電廠除役，並將場址改作太陽能發電。

gept.example_en: Many fossil fuel reserves may become a stranded-asset under stricter climate regulations.
gept.example_zh: 在更嚴格的氣候法規下，許多化石燃料儲量可能成為擱淺資產。

gept.example_en: The city issued a green-bond to finance solar installations and energy-efficient public buildings.
gept.example_zh: 市府發行綠色債券以資助太陽能設置與節能公共建築。

gept.example_en: Banks must now disclose climate-risk exposure across their lending and investment portfolios.
gept.example_zh: 銀行現在必須揭露其放款與投資組合的氣候風險暴險。

gept.example_en: Energy-poverty forces millions to choose between heating their homes and buying food.
gept.example_zh: 能源貧窮迫使數百萬人在取暖與買食物之間做出選擇。

gept.example_en: A just-transition retrains coal workers for new jobs in solar and wind industries.
gept.example_zh: 公正轉型為煤礦工人提供再訓練，轉入太陽能與風能產業的新工作。

gept.example_en: Climate-justice activists argue that wealthy nations must lead emission reductions and aid.
gept.example_zh: 氣候正義倡議者主張富裕國家必須帶頭減排並提供援助。

gept.example_en: Vulnerable countries demand a loss-and-damage fund to help recover from climate disasters.
gept.example_zh: 脆弱國家要求設立損失與損害基金，協助從氣候災害中復原。

gept.example_en: The Paris-agreement set an ambitious global goal of limiting warming to 1.5 degrees.
gept.example_zh: 巴黎協定設定了將暖化控制在 1.5 度的雄心勃勃全球目標。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 政府間氣候變遷專門委員會
gept.example_en: The IPCC publishes comprehensive reports summarizing the latest peer-reviewed climate science.
gept.example_zh: IPCC 發布綜合報告，彙整最新經同儕審查的氣候科學。

gept.example_en: World leaders gather at COP meetings to negotiate updates to international climate commitments.
gept.example_zh: 世界領袖在 COP 會議上協商更新國際氣候承諾。

gept.example_en: Denmark's energy-mix shifted dramatically toward wind power over the last two decades.
gept.example_zh: 過去二十年來丹麥的能源組合大幅轉向風力發電。

gept.example_en: Hydrocarbons still beat batteries in energy-density, which complicates aviation electrification efforts.
gept.example_zh: 碳氫化合物在能量密度上仍勝過電池，使航空電氣化更加複雜。

gept.example_en: Shoppers compare each appliance efficiency-rating before purchasing to lower monthly energy bills.
gept.example_zh: 購物者購買前比較每件家電的能效等級，以降低每月能源帳單。

gept.example_en: Look for an Energy-Star label when buying refrigerators, washers, or air conditioning units.
gept.example_zh: 購買冰箱、洗衣機或空調時，請尋找能源之星標章。

gept.example_en: Time-of-use rates charge customers more for electricity used during the busiest evening hours.
gept.example_zh: 時間電價在最繁忙的傍晚時段對客戶用電收取較高費用。

gept.example_en: A prosumer both consumes and produces electricity, often via rooftop solar at home.
gept.example_zh: 產消合一者既消費電力又生產電力，通常透過家中屋頂太陽能。

gept.example_en: Shoppers visit a refill-station to fill personal containers with soap, shampoo, and detergent.
gept.example_zh: 購物者前往補充裝填站，用個人容器裝填肥皂、洗髮精與洗衣精。

gept.example_en: A zero-waste lifestyle aims to send almost nothing to landfill in daily living.
gept.example_zh: 零廢棄生活方式旨在日常生活中幾乎不將任何物品送往掩埋場。

gept.example_en: Each laundry cycle releases countless microfiber fragments that escape into the ocean.
gept.example_zh: 每次洗衣循環釋出無數微纖維碎片，逸入海洋。

gept.example_en: Conservationists added the rare frog to the endangered-list after its habitat shrank dramatically.
gept.example_zh: 在棲地大幅縮減後，保育人士將這種稀有青蛙加入瀕危名單。

gept.example_en: Rangers risk their lives to stop poaching of elephants, rhinos, and other vulnerable wildlife.
gept.example_zh: 巡護員冒著生命危險阻止盜獵象、犀牛與其他脆弱野生動物。

gept.example_en: A vegetated buffer-zone along streams filters runoff and keeps water clean for fish.
gept.example_zh: 沿溪流的植被緩衝區過濾逕流，使水保持乾淨供魚類使用。

gept.example_en: A drone-survey quickly mapped flood damage and helped responders prioritize urgent repairs.
gept.example_zh: 無人機調查快速繪製水災損害，協助應變人員優先處理緊急修復。

gept.example_en: An early-warning system alerted coastal villagers hours before the destructive tsunami arrived.
gept.example_zh: 預警系統在毀滅性海嘯抵達前數小時警示沿海村民。

gept.example_en: Each evacuee received emergency supplies after the wildfires destroyed homes in the valley.
gept.example_zh: 野火摧毀山谷家園後，每位撤離者都收到緊急物資。

gept.example_en: Pacific island governments must resettle communities from islands threatened by rising seas.
gept.example_zh: 太平洋島國政府必須將社區從受海平面上升威脅的島嶼重新安置。

gept.example_en: Drought and flooding have driven thousands to become a climate-refugee in recent years.
gept.example_zh: 乾旱與洪水近年來迫使數千人成為氣候難民。

gept.example_en: Buying local produce reduces food-miles and supports nearby farmers throughout the seasons.
gept.example_zh: 購買在地農產品可減少食物里程，並四季支持鄰近農民。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 從農場到餐桌的
gept.example_en: The restaurant follows a farm-to-table philosophy emphasizing fresh ingredients from local growers.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳遵循從農場到餐桌的理念，強調來自在地農戶的新鮮食材。

gept.example_en: Rural homes rely on a septic system to safely break down household waste underground.
gept.example_zh: 鄉村家庭依賴化糞池系統在地下安全分解家庭廢棄物。

gept.example_en: Treated wastewater can irrigate parks and golf courses without straining freshwater supplies.
gept.example_zh: 經處理的廢水可灌溉公園與高爾夫球場，不會耗用淡水供應。

gept.example_en: Reclaimed water flows through purple pipes to clearly distinguish it from drinking supplies.
gept.example_zh: 回收再利用水流經紫色管線，以與飲用水供應明確區分。

gept.example_en: Engineers test potable water frequently to ensure it meets all strict national health standards.
gept.example_zh: 工程師頻繁測試可飲用水，以確保符合所有嚴格的國家衛生標準。

gept.example_en: Over-pumping has caused the aquifer to drop more than fifty meters in just one decade.
gept.example_zh: 過度抽水已使該含水層在短短十年內下降超過五十公尺。

gept.example_en: Countries phased out CFC use after scientists linked them to severe ozone depletion.
gept.example_zh: 在科學家將氟氯碳化物與嚴重臭氧損耗連結後，各國逐步淘汰其使用。

gept.example_en: HFC refrigerants replaced ozone-damaging chemicals but still trap significant greenhouse heat.
gept.example_zh: 氫氟碳化物冷媒取代了損害臭氧的化學物，但仍會困住大量溫室熱。

gept.example_en: The panel was asked to adjudicate the boundary dispute between the two neighboring provinces.
gept.example_zh: 該小組被要求裁決兩個鄰省之間的邊界糾紛。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers worked to codify the rules that had long governed local fishing rights.
gept.example_zh: 立法者努力將長期管理當地漁權的規則編入法典。

gept.example_en: Parliament voted to enact stricter measures against corporate tax evasion this year.
gept.example_zh: 議會今年投票通過針對企業逃稅的更嚴格措施。

gept.example_en: The enactment of the consumer protection bill was widely praised by advocacy groups.
gept.example_zh: 消費者保護法案的通過獲得倡議團體的廣泛讚揚。

gept.example_en: Activists campaigned for years to repeal the law that they considered discriminatory.
gept.example_zh: 倡議人士多年來持續推動廢除他們認為具歧視性的法律。

gept.example_en: The president signed a decree granting emergency aid to flood-affected coastal districts.
gept.example_zh: 總統簽署一項法令，向受洪水影響的沿海地區發放緊急援助。

gept.example_en: The royal edict ordered all citizens to register their property within sixty days.
gept.example_zh: 皇家敕令命令所有公民在六十天內登記其財產。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 內部章程；地方規章
gept.example_en: Our community bylaw prohibits the operation of commercial businesses from a private home.
gept.example_zh: 我們的社區規章禁止在私人住宅內經營商業業務。

gept.example_en: The international covenant on civil rights was signed by more than one hundred nations.
gept.example_zh: 該國際公民權利公約由一百多個國家簽署。

gept.example_en: Both ministries signed a memorandum to share information about cross-border financial crimes.
gept.example_zh: 兩部會簽署備忘錄，分享有關跨境金融犯罪的資訊。

gept.example_en: Investigators compiled a thick dossier of evidence before presenting the case to prosecutors.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員彙整了一份厚厚的證據卷宗，才將案件提交檢察官。

gept.example_en: Her lawyer filed a writ demanding immediate release pending the appeal hearing.
gept.example_zh: 她的律師提交了一份令狀，要求在上訴聽證前立即釋放。

gept.example_en: The course examines tort claims arising from product defects and negligent professional advice.
gept.example_zh: 該課程探討因產品瑕疵與專業過失建議所引發的侵權訴訟。

gept.example_en: The contract includes an indemnity clause covering legal costs incurred by either contracting party.
gept.example_zh: 該合約包含賠償條款，涵蓋任一締約方所產生的法律費用。

gept.example_en: The judge ordered the defendant to pay restitution to every victim of the fraud.
gept.example_zh: 法官命令被告向所有詐騙受害者支付賠償。

gept.example_en: The court added punitive damages because the corporation knowingly concealed the safety defect.
gept.example_zh: 法院加判懲罰性賠償金，因為該公司明知卻隱瞞安全瑕疵。

gept.example_en: Compensatory awards cover the actual economic losses suffered as a result of the breach.
gept.example_zh: 補償性裁定涵蓋因違約而實際遭受的經濟損失。

gept.example_en: Both litigants agreed to attend a settlement conference before the trial date was set.
gept.example_zh: 雙方訴訟當事人同意在訂定開庭日期前先參加和解會議。

gept.example_en: The petitioner asked the high court to review the lower court's controversial ruling.
gept.example_zh: 申訴人請求高等法院審查下級法院具爭議性的判決。

gept.example_en: The respondent filed a detailed brief denying every allegation raised in the original complaint.
gept.example_zh: 被告提交了一份詳盡的書面意見，否認原告訴狀中提出的每項指控。

gept.example_en: The appellant argued that key evidence had been improperly excluded during the original trial.
gept.example_zh: 上訴人主張關鍵證據在原審時被不當排除。

gept.example_en: Small businesses often cannot afford to litigate disputes against much larger corporate competitors.
gept.example_zh: 小企業通常無力與規模大得多的企業競爭對手打官司。

gept.example_en: Defense-counsel objected to the introduction of evidence obtained without a valid search warrant.
gept.example_zh: 辯護律師反對採用未經有效搜索票取得的證據。

gept.example_en: During cross-examination, the witness contradicted several statements made in her direct testimony.
gept.example_zh: 在交叉詰問中，證人與她直接陳述中的多項說法相互矛盾。

gept.example_en: Each volunteer signed an affidavit confirming that they had personally observed the counting process.
gept.example_zh: 每位志工都簽署了宣誓書，確認他們親自觀察了計票過程。

gept.example_en: A notary must witness your signature before the property transfer document becomes legally valid.
gept.example_zh: 在不動產移轉文件取得法律效力前，必須由公證人見證你的簽名。

gept.example_en: The judge's long tenancy on the bench gave her broad knowledge of constitutional questions.
gept.example_zh: 這位法官在法庭上長期任職，使她對憲法問題具有廣泛的了解。

gept.example_en: His tenure as foreign minister was marked by several historic bilateral agreements.
gept.example_zh: 他擔任外交部長的任期內促成了數項具歷史意義的雙邊協議。

gept.example_en: The retiring chief justice announced her successor at a press conference last Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 即將退休的首席大法官在上週五下午的記者會上宣布她的繼任者。

gept.example_en: She inherited several unresolved diplomatic disputes from her predecessor's two-term administration.
gept.example_zh: 她從前任的兩屆政府那裡接手了數項尚未解決的外交爭端。

gept.example_en: The president sent a special envoy to mediate between the rival political factions.
gept.example_zh: 總統派出特使，在敵對的政治派系間進行調解。

gept.example_en: The new ambassador formally presented her credentials to the host country's head of state.
gept.example_zh: 新任大使正式向駐在國國家元首遞交國書。

gept.example_en: Diplomatic-immunity prevented local courts from prosecuting the visiting consul for the traffic violation.
gept.example_zh: 外交豁免權使地方法院無法因該交通違規而起訴來訪的領事。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 領事的；領事館的
gept.example_en: Travelers should check consular notices before visiting countries with unstable security conditions.
gept.example_zh: 旅客在前往安全狀況不穩定的國家前，應查閱領事公告。

gept.example_en: The geopolitical landscape shifted significantly after the discovery of large offshore gas reserves.
gept.example_zh: 在發現大量離岸天然氣儲量後，地緣政治格局發生了重大變化。

gept.example_en: Critics warned that economic hegemony often leads smaller trading partners to lose policy autonomy.
gept.example_zh: 批評者警告，經濟霸權常導致較小貿易夥伴失去政策自主性。

gept.example_en: The coalition declared a no-fly-zone to protect civilians from indiscriminate aerial attacks.
gept.example_zh: 聯軍宣布設立禁航區，以保護平民免受無差別空襲。

gept.example_en: The narrow demilitarized strip along the border has been closely monitored for many decades.
gept.example_zh: 沿邊界的這條狹長非軍事化地帶已受到密切監控數十年。

gept.example_en: Residents of the borderland often speak both national languages with comparable fluency.
gept.example_zh: 邊疆地區的居民通常能以相當的流利度說兩種國家語言。

gept.example_en: Talks of secession alarmed business leaders who feared major disruption to regional supply chains.
gept.example_zh: 脫離的議論令商界領袖警覺，他們擔心區域供應鏈將遭重大破壞。

gept.example_en: Several provinces threatened to secede if the federal government refused to renegotiate revenue sharing.
gept.example_zh: 若聯邦政府拒絕重新協商收入分配，多省威脅要脫離。

gept.example_en: The proposed annexation drew international condemnation and triggered emergency meetings at the Security Council.
gept.example_zh: 該擬議的兼併引起國際譴責，並觸發安理會緊急會議。

gept.example_en: Residents quietly resisted the occupier through small daily acts of noncooperation and protest.
gept.example_zh: 居民透過日常的小規模不合作與抗議，靜靜地反抗佔領者。

gept.example_en: Volunteers helped liberate hundreds of detained activists by paying their court-imposed fines.
gept.example_zh: 志工協助繳清法院罰款，使數百名被拘留的倡議人士獲釋。

gept.example_en: Each autonomous region elects its own assembly to handle internal administrative matters.
gept.example_zh: 每個自治區自行選舉議會以處理內部行政事務。

gept.example_en: Federalism allows different states to experiment with policies that suit their local circumstances.
gept.example_zh: 聯邦制讓各州能依其在地情況試行不同的政策。

gept.example_en: The loose confederation eventually broke apart because the member states could not coordinate effectively.
gept.example_zh: 由於成員國無法有效協調，這個鬆散的邦聯最終解體。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 單一制的；單一的
gept.example_en: In a unitary system, the central government retains most lawmaking and administrative authority.
gept.example_zh: 在單一制體系中，中央政府掌握大部分立法與行政權力。

gept.example_en: Devolution gave the regional assembly greater control over transportation and rural development funding.
gept.example_zh: 權力下放讓區域議會對交通與農村發展經費擁有更大的掌控權。

gept.example_en: Checks-and-balances prevent any single branch of government from accumulating excessive unchecked power.
gept.example_zh: 權力制衡防止政府任何單一部門累積過度且不受監督的權力。

gept.example_en: Separation-of-powers ensures that legislators, judges, and executives operate within clearly defined constitutional boundaries.
gept.example_zh: 權力分立確保立法者、法官與行政首長都在清楚界定的憲法範圍內運作。

gept.example_en: Judicial-review allows courts to strike down statutes that violate fundamental constitutional protections.
gept.example_zh: 司法審查讓法院得以撤銷違反基本憲法保障的法令。

gept.example_en: Scholars debated the constitutionality of the surveillance program in numerous law-review articles.
gept.example_zh: 學者們在多篇法律評論文章中辯論該監控計畫的合憲性。

gept.example_en: The court ruled the ban on peaceful assembly was unconstitutional under the bill of rights.
gept.example_zh: 法院裁定該項禁止和平集會的規定在權利法案下違憲。

gept.example_en: The preamble to the constitution describes the broad goals the founders hoped to achieve.
gept.example_zh: 憲法前言闡述了開國者所希望達成的廣泛目標。

gept.example_en: The governor exercised her veto over the controversial budget passed by the divided assembly.
gept.example_zh: 州長對立場分歧的議會所通過具爭議性的預算行使了否決權。

gept.example_en: The legislature voted to override the veto by a narrow two-thirds supermajority margin.
gept.example_zh: 立法機關以勉強超過三分之二的多數票推翻了否決。

gept.example_en: A leading watchdog-group published quarterly reports tracking lobbying expenditures across all major industries.
gept.example_zh: 一個主要的監督團體每季發布報告，追蹤各主要產業的遊說支出。

gept.example_en: The prolonged intervention became a political quagmire from which no easy exit could be found.
gept.example_zh: 這場曠日持久的干預成了一個難以全身而退的政治泥沼。

gept.example_en: International observers condemned the military coup and demanded a swift restoration of civilian rule.
gept.example_zh: 國際觀察員譴責這場軍事政變，並要求迅速恢復文人統治。

gept.example_en: The authoritarian leader silenced critics by tightly restricting both broadcast and online media outlets.
gept.example_zh: 這位威權領導人透過嚴格限制廣播與網路媒體來壓制批評者。

gept.example_en: Decades of dictatorship left the country with weak institutions and limited civic political experience.
gept.example_zh: 數十年的獨裁統治使該國的制度薄弱、公民政治經驗有限。

gept.example_en: Voters disenchanted with traditional politicians sometimes prefer a candidate seen as a genuine outsider.
gept.example_zh: 對傳統政客感到失望的選民有時偏好被視為真正圈外人的候選人。

gept.example_en: Opponents dismissed her speeches as empty demagoguery designed only to maximize short-term electoral gains.
gept.example_zh: 對手將她的演說斥為空洞的民粹煽動術，只為了將短期選舉收益最大化。

gept.example_en: The pardon-presidential drew sharp criticism because it was granted shortly before his term ended.
gept.example_zh: 由於這項總統特赦是在他卸任前不久作出的，因而引發尖銳批評。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 組織犯罪；敲詐勒索
gept.example_en: Federal agents charged eleven defendants with racketeering connected to an interstate illegal gambling operation.
gept.example_zh: 聯邦探員以與跨州非法賭博活動相關的組織犯罪罪名起訴了十一名被告。

gept.example_en: International agencies estimate that millions still live as a stateless-person, lacking any formal nationality.
gept.example_zh: 國際機構估計仍有數百萬人以無國籍人士的身份生活，缺乏任何正式國籍。

gept.example_en: Citizens of partner countries benefited from a reciprocal visa-waiver arrangement for short tourist visits.
gept.example_zh: 夥伴國公民享有互惠的免簽證安排，可進行短期觀光訪問。

gept.example_en: Each political-action-committee must disclose its donors and expenditures according to detailed federal election reporting rules.
gept.example_zh: 每個政治行動委員會都必須依照詳細的聯邦選舉申報規定，揭露其捐款人與支出。

gept.example_en: An interagency task-force coordinated the response to suspicious financial transactions across several different regulatory bodies.
gept.example_zh: 一個跨機構專案小組協調了多個監管機構對可疑金融交易的回應。

gept.example_en: A vibrant civil-society-org sector helps amplify the concerns of communities often overlooked by formal political channels.
gept.example_zh: 蓬勃的公民社會組織部門有助於放大常被正式政治管道忽視的社區關切。

gept.example_en: A grassroots-movement of parents and teachers pushed for stronger nutrition standards in every public school cafeteria.
gept.example_zh: 由家長與教師發起的草根運動，推動所有公立學校自助餐廳實施更嚴格的營養標準。

gept.example_en: An advocacy-group for caregivers lobbied lawmakers to expand paid family medical leave benefits this year.
gept.example_zh: 一個照顧者倡議團體向立法者遊說，要求今年擴大有薪家庭醫療假福利。

gept.example_en: Teachers emphasized civic-virtue by encouraging students to participate in community service throughout the school year.
gept.example_zh: 教師透過鼓勵學生在學年中參與社區服務來強調公民美德。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 公共利益；共同福祉
gept.example_en: Policymakers must weigh narrow private benefits against the broader common-good when allocating finite public resources.
gept.example_zh: 決策者在分配有限的公共資源時，必須權衡狹隘的私人利益與更廣泛的公共利益。

gept.example_en: Investigative journalism in the public-interest often exposes wrongdoing that powerful institutions would prefer to keep quiet.
gept.example_zh: 為公共利益所做的調查報導常常揭露有權勢機構寧可保持沉默的不法行為。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 將特殊生融入普通班；(形容詞) 主流的
gept.example_en: The school decided to mainstream the student so she could learn alongside her peers.
gept.example_zh: 校方決定將這位學生融入普通班，讓她能與同儕一起學習。

gept.example_en: The ego attempts to balance basic urges with real-world demands and moral standards.
gept.example_zh: 自我試圖在基本衝動、現實要求與道德標準之間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: The student preferred acrylic over oil paint because it dries quickly and is easy to clean.
gept.example_zh: 這位學生比較喜歡壓克力顏料勝過油畫顏料，因為它乾得快又容易清洗。

gept.example_en: The film features an ensemble-cast where no single actor dominates the story.
gept.example_zh: 這部電影採用群戲卡司，沒有任何單一演員主導故事。

gept.example_en: Van Gogh's impasto gives his sunflowers a thick, sculptural quality on the canvas.
gept.example_zh: 梵谷的厚塗法讓他的向日葵在畫布上呈現厚實的雕塑感。

gept.example_en: The musical-score added emotional weight to scenes that had very little dialogue.
gept.example_zh: 電影配樂為那些對白極少的場景增添了情感分量。

gept.example_en: The clever set-design transformed the small stage into three completely different rooms.
gept.example_zh: 巧妙的場景設計把小小的舞台轉化為三個完全不同的房間。

gept.example_en: Surrealism combines familiar objects in strange ways to evoke the logic of dreams.
gept.example_zh: 超現實主義以奇異方式組合熟悉物件，喚起夢境般的邏輯。

gept.example_en: The wedding videographer captured candid moments throughout the entire evening reception.
gept.example_zh: 婚禮錄影師在整晚的喜宴中捕捉了許多自然的瞬間。

gept.example_en: The voiceover-artist created six distinct character voices for the animated children's show.
gept.example_zh: 這位配音員為這部動畫兒童節目創造了六個不同的角色聲音。

gept.example_en: The wardrobe-stylist chose every outfit to reflect the lead character's emotional journey.
gept.example_zh: 造型師為每套服裝精心挑選，反映主角的情感旋律。

gept.example_en: The museum displayed a Victorian zoetrope that creates a galloping horse from still images.
gept.example_zh: 博物館展示了一台維多利亞時期的走馬畫筒，能用靜止圖像營造奔馬效果。

gept.example_en: A dedicated stagehand moved heavy set pieces silently between every dramatic scene change.
gept.example_zh: 敬業的舞台助手在每次戲劇性場景轉換間默默搬動沉重的布景。

gept.example_en: The blackbox-theater allowed flexible seating arrangements for each new experimental production.
gept.example_zh: 黑盒子劇場讓每齣新的實驗作品都能彈性安排觀眾席。

gept.example_en: An independent appraiser-art examined the canvas closely before confirming its true historical age.
gept.example_zh: 一位獨立的藝術品鑑定師仔細檢查畫布，才確認它真正的年代。

gept.example_en: Experts unmasked the famous forgery-art only after using new x-ray imaging technology.
gept.example_zh: 專家在使用新的 X 光成像技術後才揭穿那件知名贗品。

gept.example_en: The museum conservator spent two years stabilizing the fragile medieval tapestry before display.
gept.example_zh: 博物館的文物修復師花了兩年穩固這幅脆弱的中世紀織錦才得以展出。

gept.example_en: The ancient amphitheatre-arts still hosts summer plays just as it did two millennia ago.
gept.example_zh: 這座古老的露天劇場至今仍如兩千年前那樣舉辦夏季戲劇演出。

gept.example_en: The traveling stagecoach carried both actors and props across rural towns and villages.
gept.example_zh: 巡演車隊載著演員與道具穿梭於鄉村小鎮之間。

gept.example_en: Actors waited nervously in the wings-stage area for their important entrance cue.
gept.example_zh: 演員緊張地在舞台側翼等候重要的上場提示。

gept.example_en: The fly-system lifts heavy curtains and scenery up out of sight above the stage.
gept.example_zh: 吊桿系統把沉重的布幕與布景升到舞台上方看不到的位置。

gept.example_en: The kinetic-sculpture in the lobby slowly rotates whenever a gentle breeze passes by.
gept.example_zh: 大廳裡的這件動態雕塑只要有微風吹過就會緩緩旋轉。

gept.example_en: The mixing-desk had over forty channels to handle the huge live orchestral recording session.
gept.example_zh: 這台混音器有超過四十個聲道，足以應付大型的管弦樂現場錄音。

gept.example_en: Professional mastering balances every track so the album sounds consistent on any audio system.
gept.example_zh: 專業的母帶後製平衡每首曲目，讓整張專輯在各種音響上聽起來一致。

gept.example_en: Her playwriting class taught students how to build tension through carefully crafted dialogue.
gept.example_zh: 她的劇本創作課程教學生如何透過精心鋪陳的對話建立張力。

gept.example_en: She wrote a detailed treatment-script outlining every major scene before drafting any dialogue.
gept.example_zh: 她寫了一份詳細的劇本綱要，列出每個主要場景，之後才動筆寫對白。

gept.example_en: She trained for seven years at the famous conservatory-music before her professional debut.
gept.example_zh: 她在那所知名音樂學院受訓七年才正式登台演出。

gept.example_en: The composer considered his final symphony the true magnum-opus of his long career.
gept.example_zh: 作曲家把最後這首交響曲視為他漫長生涯中真正的代表作。

gept.example_en: The young violin virtuoso amazed listeners with both technical brilliance and deep emotional warmth.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕的小提琴名家以高超技巧與深厚情感震撼聽眾。

gept.example_en: The opera's prima-donna received roses on stage after the dramatic final curtain call.
gept.example_zh: 戲劇性的最後謝幕後，歌劇首席女歌手在舞台上收到了玫瑰。

gept.example_en: The traveling troupe performs traditional folk dances at festivals around the entire region.
gept.example_zh: 這個巡演劇團在整個地區的節慶上演傳統民俗舞蹈。

gept.example_en: The orchestra's repertoire ranges from Baroque chamber pieces to contemporary experimental works.
gept.example_zh: 這個樂團的演出曲目集從巴洛克室內樂到當代實驗作品皆有涵蓋。

gept.example_en: The establishing-shot of the lighthouse signaled where the next dramatic scene would take place.
gept.example_zh: 燈塔的定場鏡頭暗示了接下來戲劇性場景的發生地點。

gept.example_en: Subtle color-grading gave the entire film a faded vintage look reminiscent of old photographs.
gept.example_zh: 細膩的調色讓整部電影呈現宛如舊照片般的褪色復古感。

gept.example_en: The photographer used a softly tinted-lens to add a peachy glow to the sunset shots.
gept.example_zh: 攝影師使用柔和的染色濾鏡，為日落照片增添蜜桃般的光暈。

gept.example_en: Each handmade darkroom-print has subtle differences that mass-produced digital photos can never match.
gept.example_zh: 每張手工暗房沖印的照片都有大量複製的數位照片無法複製的細微差異。

gept.example_en: The band released their experimental longplay only on vinyl and a few cassette tapes.
gept.example_zh: 樂團這張實驗性的長時間錄音作品只發行黑膠與幾捲卡帶。

gept.example_en: A respected playlist-curator can launch an unknown song into worldwide popularity overnight.
gept.example_zh: 受敬重的歌單編輯可以讓無名歌曲一夜之間在世界各地爆紅。

gept.example_en: The museum's antiquities department safeguards thousands of fragile objects from ancient civilizations.
gept.example_zh: 博物館的古文物部門守護著數千件來自古代文明的脆弱物件。

gept.example_en: The carved totem outside the longhouse tells a story important to the local community.
gept.example_zh: 長屋外雕刻的圖騰述說著對當地社群來說重要的故事。

gept.example_en: Backstage, a long costume-rack held all the elaborate outfits needed for the show.
gept.example_zh: 後台的長長戲服衣架掛滿了演出所需的精緻服裝。

gept.example_en: She received a callback-casting after impressing the director during the first audition round.
gept.example_zh: 她在第一輪試鏡讓導演印象深刻後收到了二次試鏡通知。

gept.example_en: The full cast gathered for a table-read so the writer could hear his dialogue spoken aloud.
gept.example_zh: 全體演員集合進行圍讀劇本，讓編劇能聽到他寫的對白被唸出來。

gept.example_en: The script included precise stage-direction notes describing each character's movement and emotion.
gept.example_zh: 劇本附有精確的舞台指示，描述每位角色的動作與情感。

gept.example_en: The host glanced briefly at a cue-card before delivering the next joke to the audience.
gept.example_zh: 主持人短暫瞄了一下提詞卡，再對觀眾說下一個笑話。

gept.example_en: The newscaster read smoothly from the teleprompter while still appearing entirely natural on camera.
gept.example_zh: 新聞主播流暢地讀著提詞機上的稿子，同時在鏡頭前仍顯得十分自然。

gept.example_en: A red light blinks atop the broadcasting-tower to warn passing aircraft at night.
gept.example_zh: 廣播電塔頂端閃著紅燈，警示夜間飛過的飛機。

gept.example_en: Listeners loved the weekly mystery radio-play with its eerie music and clever twists.
gept.example_zh: 聽眾喜愛這個每週推出的推理廣播劇，配上詭異的音樂與巧妙的轉折。

gept.example_en: The voice-coach helped the singer protect her vocal cords during the long international tour.
gept.example_zh: 發聲教練協助歌手在長達國際的巡演中保護聲帶。

gept.example_en: The dialect-coach trained the actor to speak with a believable rural English accent.
gept.example_zh: 方言教練訓練演員說出可信的英國鄉村口音。

gept.example_en: A skilled movement-director taught the cast how to fight convincingly without ever hurting one another.
gept.example_zh: 技藝精湛的動作指導教導演員們既能逼真打鬥又能互不受傷。

gept.example_en: The thrilling fight-choreography combined ballet-like grace with brutal-looking action and clever camera angles.
gept.example_zh: 刺激的武打設計結合芭蕾般的優雅、看似殘酷的動作與巧妙的攝影機角度。

gept.example_en: The dance-troupe rehearsed late into the night to perfect a difficult new piece.
gept.example_zh: 舞團排練到深夜，只為磨練一支困難的新作。

gept.example_en: The strict ballet-master corrected every dancer's posture during morning rehearsal classes.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的芭蕾舞蹈大師在早晨排練課中糾正每位舞者的姿勢。

gept.example_en: The carved wooden marionette danced gracefully whenever the puppeteer pulled the slender strings.
gept.example_zh: 每當操偶師拉動細細的線，那個木雕提線木偶就會優雅地舞動。

gept.example_en: Traditional shadow-puppet performances entertained villagers long before electricity or modern technology arrived.
gept.example_zh: 傳統皮影戲在電力或現代科技到來前就已娛樂村民。

gept.example_en: Visitors received a glossy catalog-art listing every piece in the temporary special exhibition.
gept.example_zh: 訪客拿到一本光面的藝術圖錄，列出臨時特展裡的每件作品。

gept.example_en: The monthly art-walk encourages residents to explore many small galleries on a single evening.
gept.example_zh: 每月的藝術散步活動鼓勵居民在同一晚上探索眾多小型畫廊。

gept.example_en: A stage-pass let her wander behind the scenes and meet several of her favorite performers.
gept.example_zh: 後台通行證讓她能在幕後走動，並見到幾位她喜愛的表演者。

gept.example_en: The band arrived early for soundcheck and adjusted their microphones and amplifier settings carefully.
gept.example_zh: 樂團提早抵達進行試音，仔細調整麥克風與擴大機設定。

gept.example_en: Each art-fair-booth displayed a small but carefully chosen selection of each gallery's artists.
gept.example_zh: 每個藝博會展位都展示精挑細選但數量不多的代理藝術家作品。

gept.example_en: The gallery's showpiece was a massive sculpture that visitors could walk completely around.
gept.example_zh: 這間畫廊的鎮店之作是一件巨大的雕塑，訪客可以繞著它走一整圈。

gept.example_en: The author used hyperbole to exaggerate the hero's hunger after the long journey.
gept.example_zh: 作者使用誇飾法來放大主角在長途旅行後的飢餓感。

gept.example_en: Through personification the wind became a restless traveler whispering at every window.
gept.example_zh: 透過擬人化，風變成一個在每扇窗邊低語的不安旅人。

gept.example_en: Students practice scansion to mark stressed syllables and reveal a poem's meter.
gept.example_zh: 學生練習詩律分析以標記重音節並揭示詩的音步。

gept.example_en: The essayist is admired for blending personal memory with sharp social analysis.
gept.example_zh: 這位散文作家因將個人記憶與犀利的社會分析交融而備受推崇。

gept.example_en: A patient biographer spent ten years interviewing the painter's surviving friends.
gept.example_zh: 一位有耐心的傳記作家花了十年訪問這位畫家還在世的朋友。

gept.example_en: The celebrity hired a ghostwriter to shape years of journals into a memoir.
gept.example_zh: 這位名人聘請了一位代筆作家把多年的日記整理成回憶錄。

gept.example_en: The dramatist polished every monologue until the actors begged him to stop.
gept.example_zh: 這位劇作家不斷打磨每段獨白，直到演員們求他停手為止。

gept.example_en: Her tragicomedy lets the audience laugh and grieve within the same scene.
gept.example_zh: 她的悲喜劇讓觀眾在同一場景中又笑又哭。

gept.example_en: Critics dismissed the play as melodrama because every emotion was turned up loud.
gept.example_zh: 評論家把這齣戲斥為煽情劇，因為每種情緒都被放大到誇張。

gept.example_en: Good exposition slips background facts into action without halting the story.
gept.example_zh: 好的說明會把背景資料融入動作中，而不打斷故事。

gept.example_en: Sharp characterization turns the cook into the most memorable figure in the book.
gept.example_zh: 鮮明的角色塑造讓那位廚師成為書中最令人難忘的人物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 老套手法；常見比喻
gept.example_en: The novel cleverly subverts the trope of the chosen savior child.
gept.example_zh: 這本小說巧妙顛覆了被選中的救世孩童這一老套手法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 象徵主義；象徵手法
gept.example_en: The red door in the painting carries deep symbolism about hidden longing.
gept.example_zh: 畫中那扇紅門承載著對隱藏渴望的深刻象徵。

gept.example_en: Her imagery-rich prose makes ordinary kitchens feel like sacred temples.
gept.example_zh: 她意象豐富的散文讓平凡的廚房感覺像神聖殿堂。

gept.example_en: His debut is a pastiche of detective styles from three different decades.
gept.example_zh: 他的處女作是模仿三個不同年代偵探風格的拼貼之作。

gept.example_en: Her formal diction makes the village seem grand and almost mythical.
gept.example_zh: 她正式的用字遣詞讓那座村莊顯得宏偉，幾近神話色彩。

gept.example_en: She wrote dialogue in the local vernacular to honor her grandmother's town.
gept.example_zh: 她用當地方言寫對白，以向祖母的小鎮致敬。

gept.example_en: His slangy dialogue captures how teenagers really talk on the train.
gept.example_zh: 他俚語味重的對白捕捉到青少年在火車上真實的說話方式。

gept.example_en: The article explained legal jargon in plain words for the general reader.
gept.example_zh: 這篇文章用淺白的話為一般讀者解釋法律行話。

gept.example_en: Each profession builds a lexicon that signals belonging to insiders.
gept.example_zh: 每種職業都建立起一套詞彙集，向圈內人表明身份。

gept.example_en: Their discourse-analysis revealed hidden power moves inside ordinary office chats.
gept.example_zh: 他們的言談分析揭露了平凡辦公室聊天中隱藏的權力動作。

gept.example_en: The speech relied on rhetorical questions to draw listeners deeper into the argument.
gept.example_zh: 這篇演講運用反問句把聽眾更深地拉進論點之中。

gept.example_en: He spent twenty years writing a treatise on the music of forgotten poets.
gept.example_zh: 他花了二十年寫一本論述被遺忘詩人音樂的專著。

gept.example_en: The literary almanac lists every prize, festival, and notable book from the year.
gept.example_zh: 這本文學年鑑列出當年每一個獎項、節慶與重要書籍。

gept.example_en: She subscribed to a small periodical devoted to rural craft and writing.
gept.example_zh: 她訂閱一本專門介紹鄉村工藝與寫作的小型期刊。

gept.example_en: She works as a freelance-reporter, selling stories to several rival magazines.
gept.example_zh: 她身為自由撰稿記者，將稿件賣給好幾家彼此競爭的雜誌。

gept.example_en: The crime beat-reporter spent years building trust with local detectives.
gept.example_zh: 這位犯罪路線記者花了多年與本地刑警建立信任。

gept.example_en: A sharp copy-editor caught the factual error just before the morning deadline.
gept.example_zh: 一位敏銳的校對編輯在清晨截稿前抓到了那個事實錯誤。

gept.example_en: The subeditor trimmed three paragraphs without losing the heart of the article.
gept.example_zh: 副編輯刪去了三個段落，卻未失去文章的核心。

gept.example_en: The managing-editor coordinates reporters, photographers, and a hungry web team.
gept.example_zh: 執行編輯協調記者、攝影師以及一支求稿若渴的網路團隊。

gept.example_en: The fact-checker verified every name, date, and quote before publication.
gept.example_zh: 事實查核員在出版前核實每一個名字、日期與引文。

gept.example_en: Stories from the newswire often appear in five regional papers by morning.
gept.example_zh: 新聞專線上的稿件常在早晨出現於五家地方報紙上。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不可公開引述的
gept.example_en: The mayor agreed to speak off-the-record about the messy contract talks.
gept.example_zh: 市長同意以不可公開引述的方式談論那場棘手的合約談判。

gept.example_en: Every great political scandal seems to need its own deep-throat figure.
gept.example_zh: 每樁重大政治醜聞似乎都需要一位匿名重大爆料者。

gept.example_en: The newsroom celebrated the exclusive-story that other papers had missed.
gept.example_zh: 新聞編輯部慶祝這篇其他報紙錯過的獨家報導。

gept.example_en: The sidebar offered a quick timeline of the company's earlier scandals.
gept.example_zh: 邊欄補充報導提供了該公司早期醜聞的快速時間軸。

gept.example_en: The listicle ranked ten classic novels that newcomers should try this summer.
gept.example_zh: 這篇條列式文章排出新讀者今夏應該嘗試的十部經典小說。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 人情趣味的；軟性新聞的
gept.example_en: The paper balanced hard politics with a human-interest story about street musicians.
gept.example_zh: 這家報紙以一則關於街頭音樂家的人情趣味故事平衡硬政治新聞。

gept.example_en: Their investigative-piece exposed years of unsafe conditions inside the factory.
gept.example_zh: 他們的調查報導揭發了工廠多年的不安全工作環境。

gept.example_en: The feature-writer profiled a librarian who had served the village for fifty years.
gept.example_zh: 這位特寫作家為一位在村裡服務五十年的圖書館員撰寫人物特寫。

gept.example_en: Her literary-agent matched the manuscript with a small but daring publisher.
gept.example_zh: 她的文學經紀人把那份手稿介紹給一家小而大膽的出版社。

gept.example_en: A sharp query-letter convinced the agent to request the full manuscript.
gept.example_zh: 一封犀利的投稿諮詢信說服經紀人索取完整手稿。

gept.example_en: She kept every rejection-slip pinned to her wall like badges of honor.
gept.example_zh: 她把每一張退稿通知釘在牆上，像榮譽徽章一樣。

gept.example_en: The small advance-payment let her quit her job and finish the novel.
gept.example_zh: 那筆小額預付稿酬讓她得以辭職並完成小說。

gept.example_en: The contract set a modest royalty-rate plus bonuses for translated editions.
gept.example_zh: 合約訂出適中的版稅率，並加上譯本版本的獎金。

gept.example_en: Once a work enters the public-domain anyone can adapt it without permission.
gept.example_zh: 一旦作品進入公共領域，任何人都可未經許可加以改編。

gept.example_en: The critic quoted three lines under the principle of fair-use in scholarship.
gept.example_zh: 這位評論家在學術研究中根據合理使用原則引用了三行。

gept.example_en: The play waited months for clearance from a strict censor-board upstairs.
gept.example_zh: 這齣戲等了好幾個月，才從樓上嚴格的審查委員會獲得放行。

gept.example_en: Publishers localize jokes so foreign readers actually laugh at the same lines.
gept.example_zh: 出版社將笑話加以在地化，讓外國讀者真的能笑出來。

gept.example_en: Tight subtitling compresses each line so viewers can read while watching faces.
gept.example_zh: 緊湊的字幕翻譯壓縮每行字句，讓觀眾能邊讀字邊看表情。

gept.example_en: She decided to self-publish after three traditional houses passed on the manuscript.
gept.example_zh: 在三家傳統出版社婉拒手稿後，她決定自費出版。

gept.example_en: Patient worldbuilding gave the fantasy a sense of believable history and weather.
gept.example_zh: 耐心的世界觀建構為這部奇幻作品帶來可信的歷史與氣候感。

gept.example_en: The novella is a quiet tear-jerker about brothers separated by an old quarrel.
gept.example_zh: 這部中篇是一部安靜的賺人熱淚之作，講述因舊爭執而分離的兄弟。

gept.example_en: Two outside scholars handled the manuscript-review for the academic press.
gept.example_zh: 兩位外部學者為那家學術出版社進行了稿件審閱。

gept.example_en: An aphorism about silence opens her essay on long marriages.
gept.example_zh: 一句關於沉默的格言為她那篇談論長久婚姻的散文揭開序幕。

gept.example_en: An old bookbinder repaired the cracked spine with linen thread and patience.
gept.example_zh: 一位老裝幀師用亞麻線和耐心修補了那本書裂開的書脊。

gept.example_en: The painted dust-jacket showed a quiet harbor that hinted at the plot.
gept.example_zh: 繪有寧靜港口的書衣暗示了故事情節。

gept.example_en: An afterword explains how a small archive sparked the entire novel.
gept.example_zh: 一篇後記說明了一個小檔案庫如何點燃了整部小說。

gept.example_en: Brunch is a familiar portmanteau combining breakfast and lunch into one meal.
gept.example_zh: brunch 是一個熟悉的混合詞，把早餐和午餐合而為一。

gept.example_en: The pun depends on a single homograph that means two unrelated things.
gept.example_zh: 這個雙關語仰賴一個同形異義字，它指的是兩件無關的事物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 雙關語；模稜兩可語
gept.example_en: A discreet double-entendre let the playwright slip in adult humor.
gept.example_zh: 一句巧妙的雙關語讓劇作家偷偷塞進了成人式幽默。

gept.example_en: Activists pushed to expand the literary-canon beyond a narrow list of names.
gept.example_zh: 倡議者推動將文學經典體系擴展到一份狹窄名單之外。

gept.example_en: Her novel is now considered canonical in survey courses on modern literature.
gept.example_zh: 在現代文學概論課中，她的小說如今被視為正典。

gept.example_en: The literary-prize brought the quiet poet a flood of unwanted attention.
gept.example_zh: 這個文學獎讓那位安靜的詩人遭遇一波他並不想要的關注。

gept.example_en: Her debut was shortlisted for a major prize beside three veteran novelists.
gept.example_zh: 她的處女作與三位資深小說家一同入圍一項重要大獎決選。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 入圍初選名單的
gept.example_en: Even being long-listed boosted sales at the small independent publisher.
gept.example_zh: 光是入圍初選名單就提升了這家小型獨立出版社的銷量。

gept.example_en: She skipped a long book-tour and instead answered fan letters by hand.
gept.example_zh: 她略過漫長的巡迴新書活動，改為親手回覆讀者來信。

gept.example_en: He fought writer-block by retyping a favorite chapter from another novel.
gept.example_zh: 他靠著重新打字抄寫另一本小說的最愛章節來對抗寫作瓶頸。

gept.example_en: Her developmental-edit reordered three chapters and removed a dull subplot.
gept.example_zh: 她的結構性編修重排了三個章節並刪除了一條乏味的副線。

gept.example_en: A patient proofreader caught the misplaced apostrophe on the very last page.
gept.example_zh: 一位有耐心的校對員在最後一頁抓到了位置錯誤的撇號。

gept.example_en: A single embarrassing typo on the cover forced a quick second printing.
gept.example_zh: 封面上一個尷尬的錯字逼著出版社匆匆進行第二次印刷。

gept.example_en: The literary-review section gave her novella a thoughtful three-page spread.
gept.example_zh: 文學評論版用三頁的篇幅深入評析她的中篇小說。

gept.example_en: A patient close-reading uncovered three biblical echoes in one short paragraph.
gept.example_zh: 耐心的細讀在一個短短段落中挖出三處聖經的迴響。

gept.example_en: Deconstruction exposes the hidden contradictions inside seemingly stable texts.
gept.example_zh: 解構主義揭露看似穩定的文本內部隱藏的矛盾。

gept.example_en: The postmodern novel mixes genres until every category begins to dissolve.
gept.example_zh: 這部後現代小說將各種類型混合，直到每個分類開始溶解。

gept.example_en: Magical-realism lets a grieving family share dinner with a polite, see through ghost.
gept.example_zh: 魔幻寫實主義讓一個悲傷的家庭與一位禮貌的透明鬼魂共進晚餐。

gept.example_en: The epistolary novel tells its story entirely through letters between two cousins.
gept.example_zh: 這部書信體小說完全透過兩位表親之間的信件來敘述。

gept.example_en: Each flash-fiction piece fits on one screen yet carries a complete story.
gept.example_zh: 每篇極短篇小說只占一個螢幕，卻承載著完整的故事。

gept.example_en: Her prose-poem about morning fog reads like a paragraph that secretly sings.
gept.example_zh: 她那首關於晨霧的散文詩讀來像一段暗地裡歌唱的段落。

gept.example_en: Many great plays from earlier centuries are written entirely in blank-verse.
gept.example_zh: 前幾個世紀許多偉大的劇作完全以無韻詩寫成。

gept.example_en: Her free-verse lets each line breathe at its own emotional pace.
gept.example_zh: 她的自由詩讓每一行依其情感節奏自由呼吸。

gept.example_en: Slam-poetry rewards fierce delivery as much as careful word choice.
gept.example_zh: 詩歌擂台同樣看重激烈的表演與字斟句酌。

gept.example_en: The spoken-word-artist held the room silent for an entire breathless minute.
gept.example_zh: 這位口語詩表演者讓整個房間屏息靜默了整整一分鐘。

gept.example_en: A patient scribe copied the family chronicles in elegant slanting letters.
gept.example_zh: 一位有耐心的抄寫員以優雅斜體抄寫家族編年史。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 文書助手；口述代寫者
gept.example_en: The blind philosopher dictated his last book to a devoted young amanuensis.
gept.example_zh: 這位失明的哲學家把他最後一本書口述給一位虔誠的年輕文書助手。

gept.example_en: Our pastry-chef trained in Paris and creates exquisite desserts that customers travel across the city to taste.
gept.example_zh: 我們的糕點師傅在巴黎受訓，創作出讓顧客跨城而來品嚐的精緻甜點。

gept.example_en: Each line-cook handles a specific station such as grill, fryer, or saute during dinner service.
gept.example_zh: 每位廚房線上廚師在晚餐時段負責特定的工作站，例如烤爐、油炸鍋或炒台。

gept.example_en: The prep-cook arrives early each morning to chop vegetables and portion proteins before service begins.
gept.example_zh: 備料廚師每天清晨抵達，在出餐前切好蔬菜並分裝肉類。

gept.example_en: The sommelier recommended a crisp white wine to pair beautifully with our grilled fish dishes.
gept.example_zh: 侍酒師推薦一款清爽的白酒，與我們的烤魚料理完美搭配。

gept.example_en: A skilled barista can pour intricate latte art while remembering each regular customer's preferred order.
gept.example_zh: 技藝高超的咖啡師能拉出複雜的拿鐵拉花，同時記住每位常客的偏好點單。

gept.example_en: The local butcher cuts custom portions of beef and offers cooking tips to every customer.
gept.example_zh: 當地的肉販會切製客製化的牛肉份量，並向每位顧客提供烹飪建議。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 使發酵；(名詞) 酵母
gept.example_en: Bakers use yeast to leaven the dough so the bread rises properly during baking.
gept.example_zh: 麵包師使用酵母讓麵團發酵，使麵包在烘烤時適當膨脹。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 收汁；以液體溶解鍋底焦香
gept.example_en: Deglaze the pan with white wine to capture all the flavorful brown bits stuck to the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 用白酒收汁，將鍋底所有美味的焦香都溶入醬汁中。

gept.example_en: Blanch the green beans for two minutes then plunge them into ice water to preserve their color.
gept.example_zh: 將四季豆汆燙兩分鐘，然後浸入冰水中以保持鮮綠色澤。

gept.example_en: Parboil the potatoes briefly before roasting them to achieve a crispy exterior and fluffy interior.
gept.example_zh: 將馬鈴薯先半煮熟再烘烤，便能做到外酥內鬆軟。

gept.example_en: Let the herbs infuse in the warm oil for thirty minutes to develop a fragrant aroma.
gept.example_zh: 讓香草在溫油中浸泡三十分鐘，以發展出芬芳的香氣。

gept.example_en: Sear the steak in a hot pan to lock in juices and create a flavorful crust.
gept.example_zh: 在熱鍋中大火煎封牛排，鎖住肉汁並形成美味的焦脆外皮。

gept.example_en: Pour the mixture into a deep casserole-dish and bake until the top is golden and bubbly.
gept.example_zh: 將混合物倒入深烤盤，烘烤至表面金黃冒泡。

gept.example_en: Heat the milk in a small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly to prevent scorching.
gept.example_zh: 用小醬汁鍋以小火加熱牛奶，持續攪拌以防焦底。

gept.example_en: She simmered chicken bones in the large stockpot for eight hours to make rich broth.
gept.example_zh: 她在大高湯鍋中將雞骨慢燉八小時，熬製濃郁的高湯。

gept.example_en: Pour the custard into each ramekin and bake them in a water bath until set.
gept.example_zh: 將卡士達倒入每個小烤盅，隔水烘烤至凝固。

gept.example_en: Use a food-processor to quickly chop vegetables or grind nuts for various recipes.
gept.example_zh: 使用食物調理機可快速切碎蔬菜或磨碎堅果，用於各種食譜。

gept.example_en: The restaurant's deep-fryer maintains a precise temperature to ensure perfectly crispy results every time.
gept.example_zh: 餐廳的油炸鍋維持精準的溫度，確保每次都能炸出完美酥脆的成品。

gept.example_en: An induction-cooktop heats pots directly using magnetic fields rather than radiant heat.
gept.example_zh: 電磁爐利用磁場直接加熱鍋具，而非透過輻射熱。

gept.example_en: His backyard smoker produces tender brisket with a deep mahogany crust and smoky aroma.
gept.example_zh: 他後院的燻烤箱能做出軟嫩的牛胸肉，帶有深紅褐色的外皮和煙燻香氣。

gept.example_en: A mandoline slices vegetables paper-thin much faster than using a regular kitchen knife.
gept.example_zh: 蔬果切片器能比一般廚刀更快地將蔬菜切得薄如紙片。

gept.example_en: I bring a thermos of hot soup to the office every winter morning to warm me up.
gept.example_zh: 每個冬天的早晨，我都帶一瓶保溫瓶裝的熱湯到辦公室暖身。

gept.example_en: The reformed recipe is far more palatable than the original version, which many guests found bland.
gept.example_zh: 改良版的食譜比原版可口許多，許多客人覺得原版太平淡。

gept.example_en: Every bite of the delectable chocolate cake melted slowly on my tongue with rich flavors.
gept.example_zh: 美味極了的巧克力蛋糕每一口都在舌尖緩緩融化，散發濃郁風味。

gept.example_en: A piquant salsa adds a refreshing kick to grilled fish or roasted vegetables.
gept.example_zh: 辛辣開胃的莎莎醬為烤魚或烤蔬菜增添清爽的刺激感。

gept.example_en: This aged red wine has a robust-flavor that pairs perfectly with rich beef dishes.
gept.example_zh: 這款陳年紅酒擁有濃郁的風味，與豐盛的牛肉料理完美搭配。

gept.example_en: The cheese develops a mellow taste after aging in the cave for over twelve months.
gept.example_zh: 這款起司在洞穴中陳年超過十二個月後，發展出醇厚溫和的口感。

gept.example_en: Grate the lemon zest finely and sprinkle it over the pasta just before serving.
gept.example_zh: 將檸檬皮細細磨碎，在上菜前撒在義大利麵上。

gept.example_en: Peel back the corn husk carefully and remove all the silky threads before grilling.
gept.example_zh: 小心剝開玉米殼，並在燒烤前去除所有絲狀鬚。

gept.example_en: Bran is the outer layer of grain that contains most of the fiber and many nutrients.
gept.example_zh: 麥麩是穀物的外層，含有大部分的纖維和許多營養素。

gept.example_en: Vast fields of golden wheat stretch across the plains during the late summer harvest.
gept.example_zh: 晚夏收成時節，金黃色的小麥田綿延整片平原。

gept.example_en: Quinoa contains all nine essential amino acids, making it a complete plant-based protein source.
gept.example_zh: 藜麥含有全部九種必需胺基酸，是完整的植物性蛋白質來源。

gept.example_en: Japanese soba noodles are traditionally made from buckwheat flour and water.
gept.example_zh: 日式蕎麥麵傳統上用蕎麥粉和水製成。

gept.example_en: Sorghum is used both as livestock feed and to produce gluten-free flour and syrup.
gept.example_zh: 高粱既可作為家畜飼料，也用於製造無麩質麵粉和糖漿。

gept.example_en: Crispy roasted chickpea snacks have become popular as a healthier alternative to potato chips.
gept.example_zh: 酥脆的烤鷹嘴豆點心已成為比洋芋片更健康的替代品。

gept.example_en: Soybean is processed into many products including tofu, soy milk, and traditional miso paste.
gept.example_zh: 黃豆被加工成許多產品，包括豆腐、豆漿和傳統的味噌醬。

gept.example_en: Fresh snap-pea pods make a sweet and crunchy addition to any stir-fry or salad.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮的甜豆莢為任何炒菜或沙拉增添甜脆口感。

gept.example_en: Kidney-bean is a key ingredient in chili con carne and many Latin American stews.
gept.example_zh: 腰豆是辣肉醬和許多拉丁美洲燉菜的關鍵食材。

gept.example_en: Black-bean burgers are a popular vegetarian alternative at many casual dining restaurants.
gept.example_zh: 黑豆漢堡是許多休閒餐廳受歡迎的素食替代品。

gept.example_en: Warm a fresh tortilla in a dry skillet before filling it with seasoned beef and salsa.
gept.example_zh: 在乾鍋中將新鮮的墨西哥薄餅加熱，再填入調味牛肉和莎莎醬。

gept.example_en: My aunt's lasagna features layers of pasta, meat sauce, and three different cheeses.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨的千層麵以麵皮、肉醬和三種不同起司層層堆疊。

gept.example_en: A bowl of authentic Japanese ramen features springy noodles in a deeply flavorful pork broth.
gept.example_zh: 一碗道地的日式拉麵有著彈牙的麵條，泡在濃郁的豬骨湯中。

gept.example_en: The terraced rice-paddy stretched up the mountainside in shimmering green steps.
gept.example_zh: 梯田式的水稻田沿著山坡向上延伸，閃爍著層層綠光。

gept.example_en: Workers wade through the flooded paddy-field, transplanting young rice seedlings by hand.
gept.example_zh: 農工們涉水穿過淹水的稻田，用手栽植幼小的稻苗。

gept.example_en: The autumn harvest of apples in the orchard begins as soon as the morning dew evaporates.
gept.example_zh: 果園裡的秋季蘋果收成在晨露蒸發後便開始進行。

gept.example_en: Modern combines can thresh grain and separate it from the chaff in a single operation.
gept.example_zh: 現代聯合收割機能在單一步驟中脫穀並將穀粒與穀糠分離。

gept.example_en: He used a traditional horse-drawn plow to turn the heavy clay soil before planting.
gept.example_zh: 他在種植前使用傳統馬拉犁來翻動厚重的黏土。

gept.example_en: Modern irrigation systems deliver precise amounts of water directly to each plant's root zone.
gept.example_zh: 現代灌溉系統將精準的水量直接送到每株植物的根部。

gept.example_en: Permaculture design mimics natural ecosystems to create sustainable and productive food gardens.
gept.example_zh: 永續農法的設計模仿自然生態系統，創造可持續且高產的食物園。

gept.example_en: Aeroponics suspends plant roots in air and sprays them periodically with nutrient solution.
gept.example_zh: 氣耕栽培將植物根部懸於空中，並定期噴灑營養液。

gept.example_en: A young heifer that has not yet given birth typically produces milk for the first time at two years.
gept.example_zh: 尚未生產過的小母牛通常在兩歲時首次產乳。

gept.example_en: Silage is fermented green fodder stored in airtight silos to feed livestock during winter months.
gept.example_zh: 青貯飼料是發酵的綠色飼料，儲存於密封的青貯塔中，供家畜冬季食用。

gept.example_en: Many critics argue that large feedlot operations raise serious concerns regarding animal welfare standards.
gept.example_zh: 許多批評者認為大型飼育場的營運對動物福利標準造成嚴重問題。

gept.example_en: The small creamery produces artisan butter and cheese using milk from a single Jersey herd.
gept.example_zh: 這家小型乳製品廠使用來自單一澤西牛群的鮮乳，製作手工奶油和起司。

gept.example_en: They left the city to establish a self-sufficient homestead on twenty acres of rural land.
gept.example_zh: 他們離開城市，在二十英畝的鄉村土地上建立自給自足的農莊。

gept.example_en: Modern agronomy combines plant science, soil analysis, and climate data to maximize crop yields.
gept.example_zh: 現代農藝學結合植物科學、土壤分析和氣候資料，以最大化作物產量。

gept.example_en: The region's mineral-rich soil and gentle climate make it ideal for premium viticulture and winemaking.
gept.example_zh: 該地區礦物質豐富的土壤和溫和的氣候，使其成為頂級葡萄栽培和釀酒的理想地點。

gept.example_en: Proper cellar-aging allows the tannins in red wine to soften and the flavors to integrate.
gept.example_zh: 適當的酒窖陳年能讓紅酒的單寧軟化，並使各種風味融合。

gept.example_en: The 2018 vintage from this estate received exceptionally high scores from leading wine critics.
gept.example_zh: 這個莊園 2018 年份的酒獲得頂尖葡萄酒評論家極高的評分。

gept.example_en: Grape growers apply fungicide carefully to protect against mildew during humid summer weather.
gept.example_zh: 葡萄農在潮濕的夏季謹慎施用殺真菌劑，以防止霉菌侵害。

gept.example_en: We keep a compost-bin in the backyard for vegetable scraps, coffee grounds, and dried leaves.
gept.example_zh: 我們在後院放一個堆肥箱，存放蔬菜廚餘、咖啡渣和乾葉。

gept.example_en: Decomposed organic matter creates humus, which dramatically improves soil structure and water retention.
gept.example_zh: 分解後的有機質形成腐殖質，能大幅改善土壤結構和水分保持力。

gept.example_en: Till-no farming preserves soil structure and reduces erosion while still producing competitive yields.
gept.example_zh: 免耕農法能保護土壤結構並減少侵蝕，同時仍維持具競爭力的產量。

gept.example_en: Large agribusiness corporations now control much of the global food supply and distribution chains.
gept.example_zh: 大型農業綜合企業現今控制了全球大部分的食品供應和分銷鏈。

gept.example_en: Smallholder farmers produce roughly one third of the world's food on tiny family plots.
gept.example_zh: 小農在小型家庭農地上生產全球約三分之一的食物。

gept.example_en: Many rural villages still depend on subsistence-farming to feed their families throughout the year.
gept.example_zh: 許多偏鄉村莊仍依賴自給農業全年餵養他們的家庭。

gept.example_en: Coffee remains the most important cash-crop for several developing countries in Central America.
gept.example_zh: 咖啡仍是中美洲幾個開發中國家最重要的經濟作物。

gept.example_en: Cattle awaiting auction were kept in the dusty stockyard near the rural railway station.
gept.example_zh: 等待拍賣的牛隻被關在鄉間火車站附近塵土飛揚的牲畜飼養場裡。

gept.example_en: Strict regulations govern hygiene practices at every modern abattoir to ensure consumer safety.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的法規規範現代每間屠宰場的衛生作業，以確保消費者安全。

gept.example_en: An unbroken cold-chain ensures that frozen seafood arrives at restaurants in perfect condition.
gept.example_zh: 不間斷的冷鏈確保冷凍海產以完美的狀態送達餐廳。

gept.example_en: Perishable items like fresh fish must be shipped overnight on ice to prevent spoilage.
gept.example_zh: 易腐爛的商品如新鮮魚類必須以冰塊隔夜運送，以防止變質。

gept.example_en: Vacuum sealing significantly extends the shelf-life of cured meats and aged cheeses.
gept.example_zh: 真空密封大幅延長醃肉和陳年起司的保存期限。

gept.example_en: The cooking oil had turned rancid after sitting in the warm cupboard for many months.
gept.example_zh: 食用油在溫暖的櫥櫃中存放數月後已變得腐臭。

gept.example_en: Stale bread can be transformed into delicious croutons or breadcrumbs with minimal extra effort.
gept.example_zh: 不新鮮的麵包只需少許工夫就能變成美味的麵包丁或麵包粉。

gept.example_en: People with lactose intolerance often struggle to digest regular milk and many soft cheeses.
gept.example_zh: 乳糖不耐症的人通常難以消化普通牛奶和許多軟質起司。

gept.example_en: Wheat flour contains gluten, which gives bread its chewy texture and helps it rise properly.
gept.example_zh: 麥粉含有麩質，這賦予麵包其有嚼勁的口感並幫助適當膨脹。

gept.example_en: This brand promises additive-free sausages made with only meat, salt, and traditional spices.
gept.example_zh: 這個品牌承諾其香腸不含添加物，僅以肉類、鹽和傳統香料製成。

gept.example_en: Each micronutrient plays a specific role, from supporting immune function to producing healthy red blood cells.
gept.example_zh: 每種微量營養素都扮演特定角色，從支持免疫功能到製造健康的紅血球。

gept.example_en: Brightly colored fruits and vegetables contain a phytonutrient mix that supports long-term cellular health.
gept.example_zh: 色彩鮮豔的蔬果含有多種植化素，能支持長期的細胞健康。

gept.example_en: Prebiotic fibers feed the beneficial gut bacteria already present in your digestive system.
gept.example_zh: 益生質纖維能餵養消化系統中已存在的有益腸道細菌。

gept.example_en: Nuts and avocados are calorie-dense foods that provide concentrated energy in small portions.
gept.example_zh: 堅果和酪梨是高熱量密度的食物，能在小份量中提供濃縮能量。

gept.example_en: Leafy greens are nutrient-dense, delivering many vitamins and minerals with very few calories.
gept.example_zh: 葉菜類是高營養密度的食物，以極少的熱量提供豐富的維生素和礦物質。

gept.example_en: Protein and fiber increase satiety, helping you feel full for longer periods after eating.
gept.example_zh: 蛋白質和纖維能增加飽足感，幫助你在進食後感到飽足更長的時間。

gept.example_en: The aroma of freshly baked bread immediately stimulated everyone's appetite at the small dinner gathering.
gept.example_zh: 現烤麵包的香氣立刻刺激了小型晚餐聚會上每個人的食慾。

gept.example_en: The local foodbank distributes groceries to over five hundred struggling families each week.
gept.example_zh: 當地的食物銀行每週向超過五百個困苦家庭發放食物雜貨。

gept.example_en: Volunteers prepare hot meals at the soup-kitchen for anyone in the community who needs them.
gept.example_zh: 志工們在流動施食處為社區中任何需要的人準備熱食。

gept.example_en: As a self-proclaimed foodie, he travels great distances to try every famous regional specialty.
gept.example_zh: 身為自稱的美食家，他會長途跋涉去品嚐每一道著名的地方特色料理。

gept.example_en: She is a true epicure who carefully selects every ingredient based on origin and seasonality.
gept.example_zh: 她是個真正講究飲食者，會根據產地和時令仔細挑選每一種食材。

gept.example_en: Molecular-cuisine uses scientific techniques to create surprising textures, foams, and elegant edible spheres.
gept.example_zh: 分子料理運用科學技術，創造出令人驚奇的口感、泡沫和精緻的可食用球體。

gept.example_en: His fusion-cuisine restaurant blends Japanese techniques with classic French ingredients and Latin flavors.
gept.example_zh: 他的創意融合料理餐廳將日式技法與經典法式食材及拉丁風味結合。

gept.example_en: A dedicated locavore eats only foods grown or produced within a hundred miles of home.
gept.example_zh: 堅定的在地飲食者只吃距家百英里內種植或生產的食物。

gept.example_en: Modern hybrid-seed varieties often produce higher yields but cannot be saved for next year's planting.
gept.example_zh: 現代雜交種子品種通常產量較高，但無法保留種子供明年種植。

gept.example_en: Apiculture has become increasingly popular among hobbyists who want to harvest their own raw honey.
gept.example_zh: 養蜂業在希望採收自家原始蜂蜜的業餘愛好者間變得越來越受歡迎。

gept.example_en: His small apiary contains twelve hives that produce raw wildflower honey each summer season.
gept.example_zh: 他的小養蜂場裡有十二個蜂巢，每年夏季都生產原始野花蜂蜜。

gept.example_en: The orchard-keeper prunes the apple trees carefully each winter to maximize next year's fruit production.
gept.example_zh: 果園管理員每年冬天仔細修剪蘋果樹，以使來年果實產量最大化。

gept.example_en: The roadside produce-stand sells fresh tomatoes, sweet corn, and homemade jams in the summer.
gept.example_zh: 路邊的蔬果攤夏天販售新鮮番茄、甜玉米和自製果醬。

gept.example_en: Every Saturday morning we visit the farmers-market to buy seasonal vegetables directly from local growers.
gept.example_zh: 每週六早上我們都去農夫市集，直接向當地農戶購買當季蔬菜。

gept.example_en: Joining a csa program provides weekly boxes of farm-fresh vegetables throughout the entire growing season.
gept.example_zh: 加入社區支持農業計畫可在整個生長季節每週收到一箱新鮮農場蔬菜。

gept.example_en: The corner deli sells excellent sandwiches piled high with cured meats and pickled vegetables.
gept.example_zh: 街角的熟食店販售絕佳的三明治，堆滿了醃肉和醃漬蔬菜。

gept.example_en: The cozy neighborhood bistro serves classic French dishes in a warm and casual atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 這家溫馨的鄰里小餐廳以溫暖輕鬆的氛圍供應經典法式料理。

gept.example_en: A Parisian brasserie typically serves hearty meals all day in a lively and convivial setting.
gept.example_zh: 巴黎啤酒餐館通常全天供應豐盛餐點，氛圍活潑熱鬧。

gept.example_en: The popular taco food-truck parks outside the office tower every Tuesday during lunchtime hours.
gept.example_zh: 這台受歡迎的墨西哥夾餅餐車每週二午餐時段都停在辦公大樓外。

gept.example_en: Customers can either dine-in at the restaurant or order takeaway through the mobile app.
gept.example_zh: 顧客可以在餐廳內用，也可以透過手機應用程式訂購外帶。

gept.example_en: Our meal began with a tiny amuse-bouche of smoked salmon mousse served on crispy toast points.
gept.example_zh: 我們的餐點以一份小巧的開胃小點開始，那是放在酥脆吐司角上的煙燻鮭魚慕斯。

gept.example_en: Guests enjoyed a sparkling aperitif while reviewing the elegant menu and chatting before dinner began.
gept.example_zh: 客人們享用著氣泡餐前酒，一邊瀏覽精緻的菜單，一邊在晚餐前閒聊。

gept.example_en: After the meal, he offered each guest a small glass of herbal digestif to aid digestion.
gept.example_zh: 用餐後，他為每位客人遞上一小杯草本餐後酒以助消化。

gept.example_en: We attended a vintner-tasting last weekend and sampled six different wines from a celebrated estate.
gept.example_zh: 我們上週末參加了釀酒師品酒會，品嚐了一個著名莊園的六款不同葡萄酒。

gept.example_en: Carefully decant the wine to leave the natural sediment behind in the bottom of the bottle.
gept.example_zh: 小心地將葡萄酒倒入醒酒瓶，把天然沉澱物留在瓶底。

gept.example_en: The waiter brought a chilled carafe of house wine to our table immediately after we sat down.
gept.example_zh: 我們一坐下，服務生立刻為我們的桌子送來一瓶冰鎮的店家招牌酒。

gept.example_en: The old pub served frothy local ale in a heavy pewter tankard with a sturdy handle.
gept.example_zh: 這家老酒館用一個有著穩固把手的厚實錫鑞大酒杯供應冒泡的本地麥酒。

gept.example_en: Classical haute-cuisine emphasizes precise techniques, premium ingredients, and elaborate presentation on the plate.
gept.example_zh: 古典高級料理強調精準的技術、頂級的食材和精緻的擺盤呈現。

gept.example_en: On rainy days, nothing beats a bowl of warm comfort-food like macaroni and cheese.
