gept.example_zh: 在雨天，沒有什麼比一碗溫暖的療癒系食物如焗烤通心粉更棒了。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 美國南方傳統料理
gept.example_en: Southern soul-food traditions include fried chicken, collard greens, and slow-cooked black-eyed peas.
gept.example_zh: 南方靈魂料理傳統包括炸雞、羽衣甘藍和慢燉黑眼豆。

gept.example_en: Nutritionists warn that frequent junk-food consumption can lead to many serious long-term health problems.
gept.example_zh: 營養師警告，經常食用垃圾食物會導致許多嚴重的長期健康問題。

gept.example_en: The buttery-pastry shattered into delicate flakes with every bite of the freshly baked croissant.
gept.example_zh: 現烤可頌的奶油酥皮每咬一口就碎成細緻的薄片。

gept.example_en: Serve the hot tomato soup with thick slices of crusty-bread for dipping into the rich broth.
gept.example_zh: 將熱番茄湯搭配厚片硬皮麵包，沾取濃郁的湯汁享用。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 麵糰狀的；未熟的
gept.example_en: The center of the bread was still doughy because it had not baked long enough.
gept.example_zh: 麵包中心仍呈麵糰狀，因為烘烤時間不夠長。

gept.example_en: Heavy winter puddings can feel stodgy if served in portions that are too large.
gept.example_zh: 厚重的冬季布丁若份量過大，會讓人感到厚重難消化。

gept.example_en: The classic French velouté sauce uses a light blond roux thinned with delicate chicken stock.
gept.example_zh: 經典法式天鵝絨醬使用淺色奶油麵糊以細緻的雞高湯調稀。

gept.example_en: Garlicky aioli pairs wonderfully with grilled fish, crispy fries, or freshly roasted vegetables.
gept.example_zh: 蒜香蒜泥蛋黃醬與烤魚、酥脆薯條或現烤蔬菜搭配絕佳。

gept.example_en: Tahini made from toasted sesame seeds adds a nutty depth to hummus and salad dressings.
gept.example_zh: 用烘烤芝麻製成的芝麻醬為鷹嘴豆泥和沙拉醬增添堅果香氣。

gept.example_en: A spoonful of miso-paste dissolved in warm broth creates a deeply savory and umami soup base.
gept.example_zh: 一匙味噌醬溶於溫熱的高湯中，能調出極為鹹鮮的鮮味湯底。

gept.example_en: Tie fresh thyme, parsley, and bay leaves into a small bouquet-garni for flavoring stews.
gept.example_zh: 將新鮮百里香、巴西利和月桂葉綁成小香草束，為燉菜增添風味。

gept.example_en: The neighborhood doughnut-shop opens before dawn so commuters can grab fresh treats on the way to work.
gept.example_zh: 社區的甜甜圈店在天亮前開門，讓通勤族能在上班路上買到新鮮甜點。

gept.example_en: The window of the Parisian patisserie displayed colorful macarons and elegantly layered fruit tarts.
gept.example_zh: 巴黎法式糕點店的櫥窗陳列著色彩繽紛的馬卡龍和優雅的水果千層塔。

gept.example_en: Locals visit the corner boulangerie every morning to buy fresh baguettes for their family breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 當地居民每天早上到街角的法式麵包店，為家人買新鮮的法棍麵包當早餐。

gept.example_en: The small creperie near the train station serves both savory galettes and sweet dessert crepes.
gept.example_zh: 火車站附近的小可麗餅店供應鹹味蕎麥薄餅和甜味可麗餅。

gept.example_en: Every Italian gelateria offers dozens of seasonal flavors made fresh each morning using local ingredients.
gept.example_zh: 每家義式冰淇淋店都提供數十種當季口味，每天早上用當地食材新鮮製作。

gept.example_en: The exclusive supper-club hosts intimate multi-course dinners cooked by guest chefs in private homes.
gept.example_zh: 這個獨家私人晚宴俱樂部由客座主廚在私人住家烹調親密的多道菜晚餐。

gept.example_en: Smart menu-engineering boosts restaurant profit by strategically placing high-margin items in prime visual positions.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的菜單設計學透過將高利潤項目策略性地放在顯眼位置來提升餐廳利潤。

gept.example_en: The front-of-house staff greets every guest warmly and manages all the seating arrangements throughout the evening.
gept.example_zh: 外場員工熱情迎接每位客人，並在整個晚上負責所有座位安排。

gept.example_en: The back-of-house team includes the chefs, dishwashers, and prep cooks who keep the kitchen running.
gept.example_zh: 內場團隊包括維持廚房運作的廚師、洗碗工和備料廚師。

gept.example_en: The classic food-pyramid model encourages eating plenty of grains, fruits, and fresh vegetables daily.
gept.example_zh: 經典的飲食金字塔模型鼓勵每日大量攝取穀物、水果和新鮮蔬菜。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 食物沙漠（缺乏新鮮食物的地區）
gept.example_en: Residents of a food-desert struggle to find affordable fresh produce within reasonable walking distance.
gept.example_zh: 食物沙漠地區的居民難以在合理的步行距離內找到平價的新鮮農產品。

gept.example_en: Eating local produce reduces food-mile impact and supports nearby farmers and the regional economy.
gept.example_zh: 食用當地農產品能減少食物里程的影響，並支持鄰近的農民和地方經濟。

gept.example_en: Wild mushroom foraging requires expert knowledge to safely distinguish edible species from poisonous look-alikes.
gept.example_zh: 野菇採集需要專業知識，才能安全地分辨可食用品種與外觀相似的毒菇。

gept.example_en: Local chefs wildcraft seasonal herbs and edible flowers from the surrounding forests and open meadows.
gept.example_zh: 當地廚師從周圍森林和開闊草地採集野生時令香草和可食用花卉。

gept.example_en: Commercial longline fishing uses thousands of baited hooks to catch tuna in deep ocean waters.
gept.example_zh: 商業延繩釣使用數千個帶餌魚鉤在深海中捕捉鮪魚。

gept.example_en: The pantry stores all our dry-goods including rice, flour, dried beans, and various spice jars.
gept.example_zh: 食物儲藏室存放我們所有的乾貨，包括米、麵粉、乾豆和各種香料罐。

gept.example_en: Customers scoop nuts and dried fruits from the bulk-bin section into reusable cloth bags.
gept.example_zh: 顧客在散裝箱區舀取堅果和果乾，裝進可重複使用的布袋。

gept.example_en: Producers shrink-wrap fresh meat trays to prevent leaks and extend the refrigerated shelf-life.
gept.example_zh: 生產者用收縮膜包裝新鮮肉類托盤，以防漏液並延長冷藏保存期限。

gept.example_en: Sous-vide cooking gently maintains meat at a precise low temperature for hours, producing tender results.
gept.example_zh: 真空低溫烹調以精準的低溫將肉類保溫數小時，做出軟嫩的成品。

gept.example_en: Our charcuterie board featured prosciutto, salami, aged cheese, olives, and warm crusty bread.
gept.example_zh: 我們的熟食拼盤包含義式生火腿、薩拉米、陳年起司、橄欖和溫熱的硬皮麵包。

gept.example_en: Spoon warm berry compote over vanilla ice cream for a simple yet elegant homemade dessert.
gept.example_zh: 將溫熱的莓果糖煮水果舀在香草冰淇淋上，做成簡單卻優雅的自製甜點。

gept.example_en: Spicy mango chutney pairs beautifully with grilled chicken or as a side for sharp aged cheddar.
gept.example_zh: 辛辣的芒果甜辣醬與烤雞或濃郁陳年切達起司搭配絕佳。

gept.example_en: Pickled cucumber relish adds a tangy crunch to any classic hot dog or grilled sausage.
gept.example_zh: 醃漬黃瓜調味料為任何經典熱狗或烤香腸增添酸脆口感。

gept.example_en: Homemade strawberry preserve captures summer's flavor in jars to enjoy throughout the cold winter months.
gept.example_zh: 自製草莓果醬將夏天的風味裝在罐中，可在寒冷的冬季享用。

gept.example_en: She makes raspberry jam every July using berries picked fresh from her own backyard patch.
gept.example_zh: 她每年七月用自家後院剛摘的覆盆子製作果醬。

gept.example_en: Spread homemade grape jelly thickly on warm toast for a sweet and nostalgic breakfast treat.
gept.example_zh: 在溫熱吐司上厚塗自製葡萄果凍醬，享用一份甜蜜懷舊的早餐。

gept.example_en: Indian cooks use ghee for high-heat sauteing because it has a much higher smoke point than butter.
gept.example_zh: 印度廚師使用澄清奶油進行高溫炒菜，因為它的發煙點比奶油高出許多。

gept.example_en: Traditional pie crust made with lard becomes exceptionally flaky and tender after baking properly.
gept.example_zh: 用豬油製作的傳統派皮在正確烘烤後會變得格外酥脆和柔軟。

gept.example_en: Many old-style chip shops fry their potatoes in beef tallow for an unmistakably rich flavor.
gept.example_zh: 許多老式炸薯條店用牛油脂炸薯條，賦予獨特的濃郁風味。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 探險頭盔（轉指農場工具）
gept.example_en: The orchard worker wore a wide pith-helmet to shield his face from the harsh midday sun.
gept.example_zh: 果園工人戴著寬大的探險頭盔，以遮擋正午烈日。

gept.example_en: The orchard's small cidery presses heritage apples each autumn to produce dry sparkling cider.
gept.example_zh: 果園的小型蘋果酒廠每年秋天壓榨傳統蘋果，製造不甜的氣泡蘋果酒。

gept.example_en: Soaking the chicken in buttermilk overnight tenderizes the meat and creates a wonderfully crispy fried coating.
gept.example_zh: 將雞肉浸泡在白脫牛奶中過夜可使肉質軟嫩，並做出格外酥脆的炸雞外皮。

gept.example_en: Fresh ricotta drizzled with honey and topped with fresh figs makes an effortless and elegant dessert.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮瑞可塔起司淋上蜂蜜並放上新鮮無花果，輕鬆做出優雅的甜點。

gept.example_en: Mascarpone is the rich Italian cream cheese that gives classic tiramisu its luxurious silky texture.
gept.example_zh: 馬斯卡彭是濃郁的義式奶油起司，賦予經典提拉米蘇奢華的絲滑質地。

gept.example_en: Halloumi is a Cypriot cheese with such a high melting point that you can grill it whole.
gept.example_zh: 哈羅米是賽普勒斯的起司，熔點極高，可整塊烤製。

gept.example_en: Cut into the creamy center of fresh burrata to release the rich, milky liquid inside.
gept.example_zh: 切開新鮮布拉塔起司的滑順中心，釋放出裡面濃郁的乳白汁液。

gept.example_en: Sharp cheddar-aged for over three years develops complex crystalline crunches and an intense nutty flavor.
gept.example_zh: 陳年三年以上的濃郁切達起司會發展出複雜的結晶脆度和濃烈的堅果香氣。

gept.example_en: A rind-washed cheese develops its distinctive orange exterior and pungent aroma from repeated brine baths.
gept.example_zh: 洗皮起司透過反覆鹽水洗浴，發展出獨特的橙色外皮和強烈香氣。

gept.example_en: Traditional raw-milk cheeses retain more complex flavors than versions made from pasteurized milk.
gept.example_zh: 傳統的生乳起司比用巴氏殺菌奶製成的起司保留更複雜的風味。

gept.example_en: Add a splash of acid to the warm milk and watch it curdle into delicate cheese clumps.
gept.example_zh: 在溫熱的牛奶中加入少許酸液，觀察它凝結成精緻的起司凝塊。

gept.example_en: The watery whey left over from making cheese can be used to bake exceptionally moist bread loaves.
gept.example_zh: 製作起司後剩餘的液態乳清，可用來烘焙特別濕潤的麵包。

gept.example_en: Casein is the main protein in milk and forms the solid curds during cheese production.
gept.example_zh: 酪蛋白是牛奶的主要蛋白質，在起司製作過程中形成固體凝乳。

gept.example_en: A live culture-starter introduces beneficial bacteria that transform fresh milk into tangy yogurt overnight.
gept.example_zh: 活性發酵菌種引入有益菌，將新鮮牛奶在一夜之間轉化為酸味優格。

gept.example_en: Artisanal bread bakers shape every loaf by hand and bake them in traditional wood-fired ovens.
gept.example_zh: 手工麵包師傅以手工塑形每一條麵包，並在傳統的柴燒烤爐中烘烤。

gept.example_en: This small-batch chocolate maker produces only a hundred bars each week using single-origin cacao beans.
gept.example_zh: 這家小批量巧克力製造商每週只用單一產區可可豆生產一百片巧克力。

gept.example_en: Single-origin coffee beans from a specific farm let you taste the unique flavor of that terroir.
gept.example_zh: 來自特定農場的單一產區咖啡豆，讓你品嚐到該地風土的獨特風味。

gept.example_en: Buying fair-trade chocolate ensures that the cocoa farmers receive a living wage for their labor.
gept.example_zh: 購買公平貿易巧克力可確保可可農獲得足夠維持生活的薪資。

gept.example_en: Many consumers actively seek out non-gmo labels when purchasing corn, soy, or canola-based products.
gept.example_zh: 許多消費者在購買玉米、大豆或芥花籽相關產品時，會積極尋找非基改的標示。

gept.example_en: Biodynamic farming treats the entire farm as one living organism and follows specific lunar cycles.
gept.example_zh: 生物動力農法將整個農場視為一個有機生命體，並遵循特定的月相週期。

gept.example_en: Healthy farmland enables impressive carbon-sequestration that can help mitigate global climate change effects.
gept.example_zh: 健康的農地能進行可觀的碳封存，有助於緩解全球氣候變遷的影響。

gept.example_en: Farmers plant rows of tall trees as a windbreak to protect crops from harsh prevailing winds.
gept.example_zh: 農民種植成排的高大樹木作為防風林，以保護作物免受強勁盛行風的影響。

gept.example_en: Ancient terracing techniques allowed farmers to cultivate steep mountainsides without losing precious topsoil to erosion.
gept.example_zh: 古老的梯田化技術讓農民能在陡峭山坡上耕作，而不會因侵蝕失去珍貴的表土。

gept.example_en: Traditional hedgerow-farming creates important wildlife corridors and natural shelter for many pollinator species.
gept.example_zh: 傳統樹籬農法創造了重要的野生動物廊道，並為許多授粉物種提供天然庇護。

gept.example_en: This valley has loam-rich soil that produces some of the finest wine grapes in the entire country.
gept.example_zh: 這個山谷擁有富含壤土的土壤，孕育出全國最優質的釀酒葡萄。

gept.example_en: The new irrigation system boosted the yield-per-acre by nearly forty percent last growing season.
gept.example_zh: 新的灌溉系統在上個生長季使每英畝產量提升了近百分之四十。

gept.example_en: At halftime the coach changed the lineup and the team came out with renewed energy and focus.
gept.example_zh: 中場休息時教練更換了陣容，球隊以全新的活力和專注度回到場上。

gept.example_en: The young goalkeeper recorded his first career shutout in last night's tense playoff game.
gept.example_zh: 年輕守門員在昨晚緊張的季後賽中拿下他職業生涯的第一場零封。

gept.example_en: He curled a brilliant freekick around the wall and into the top corner of the net.
gept.example_zh: 他踢出一記精彩的任意球，越過人牆飛入球網死角。

gept.example_en: The corner-kick was delivered perfectly and a tall striker headed the ball into the net.
gept.example_zh: 角球傳球極為精準，一名高大的前鋒頭球破門。

gept.example_en: Her powerful header from a corner gave the team a crucial late lead in the match.
gept.example_zh: 她在角球中強而有力的頭球為球隊在比賽末段取得關鍵領先。

gept.example_en: He generates incredible topspin on his forehand thanks to his explosive hip rotation.
gept.example_zh: 他憑藉爆發性的轉髖在正手拍上製造出驚人的上旋。

gept.example_en: Heavy topspin causes the ball to dip suddenly and kick up high after bouncing on clay.
gept.example_zh: 強烈的上旋讓球突然下沉，在紅土上彈起後又高高竄起。

gept.example_en: Players use backspin to keep the ball low and force opponents to lift their returns.
gept.example_zh: 選手利用下旋讓球保持低彈跳，迫使對手把回球挑高。

gept.example_en: They have been an unbeaten doubles pair on the senior circuit for three consecutive seasons.
gept.example_zh: 他們在資深巡迴賽連續三季是不敗的雙打組合。

gept.example_en: A perfectly disguised drop-shot caught the baseliner flat-footed and won the point.
gept.example_zh: 一記偽裝得近乎完美的切球，讓底線型選手猝不及防而失分。

gept.example_en: His walk-off homerun in the bottom of the ninth sent the entire stadium into delirium.
gept.example_zh: 他在九局下半的再見全壘打讓整座球場陷入瘋狂。

gept.example_en: The rookie pitcher hit ninety-eight miles per hour with his rising fastball.
gept.example_zh: 這位新秀投手的伸卡速球時速達到了九十八英里。

gept.example_en: He froze the batter with a sharp twelve-six curveball that broke straight down.
gept.example_zh: 他用一記由上往下急墜的犀利曲球，讓打者完全僵住。

gept.example_en: Her slider darts away from right-handed hitters at the last possible moment.
gept.example_zh: 她的滑球會在最後一刻急速逃離右打者。

gept.example_en: A good knuckleball floats unpredictably and is notoriously difficult for catchers to handle.
gept.example_zh: 好的蝴蝶球路飄忽不定，對捕手而言極難接捕。

gept.example_en: The umpire's strike-zone seemed inconsistent throughout the game, frustrating both pitchers.
gept.example_zh: 整場比賽主審的好球帶似乎不一致，讓兩隊投手都很挫折。

gept.example_en: The point guard finished the fast break with a thunderous slam-dunk over two defenders.
gept.example_zh: 控衛在快攻中對兩名防守者完成一記雷霆灌籃。

gept.example_en: Her puckhandling has improved dramatically since she joined the developmental squad last spring.
gept.example_zh: 自從去年春天加入培訓隊以來，她的控球技術進步神速。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (冰球) 開球爭球；對峙
gept.example_en: The center won every faceoff in the offensive zone during the opening period.
gept.example_zh: 中鋒在第一節的進攻區所有開球爭球全部獲勝。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (公路自行車) 主車群；集團
gept.example_en: Two riders broke away from the peloton on the steep climb up the mountain.
gept.example_zh: 在陡峭的山路爬坡時，兩名車手從主車群中脫離。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 脫離主車群；單騎逃脫
gept.example_en: The breakaway managed to hold off the chasing pack and finished a minute ahead.
gept.example_zh: 脫離集團的車手成功擋住追擊組，最終以一分鐘的差距完賽。

gept.example_en: She set the fastest split in the individual timetrial and moved into the leader's jersey.
gept.example_zh: 她在個人計時賽中跑出最快分段，搶下總成績領先衫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (自行車) 室內賽車場
gept.example_en: Olympic track cyclists train year-round inside the climate-controlled velodrome.
gept.example_zh: 奧運場地自行車選手全年都在恆溫控制的賽車場內訓練。

gept.example_en: He won gold in the two-hundred-meter breaststroke by less than a tenth of a second.
gept.example_zh: 他以不到十分之一秒的差距贏得兩百公尺蛙式金牌。

gept.example_en: Backstroke swimmers rely on the lane ropes and ceiling flags to judge their position.
gept.example_zh: 仰式選手依靠水道繩和天花板上的旗子判斷自己的位置。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 混合式接力；混合泳
gept.example_en: She anchored the medley relay team that broke the longstanding national record.
gept.example_zh: 她擔任混合式接力的最後一棒，幫助球隊打破長年的全國紀錄。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 短跑選手；衝刺型選手
gept.example_en: The sprinter dropped his hands at the finish and was caught right at the tape.
gept.example_zh: 短跑選手在終點前放鬆雙手，結果剛好在終點線被超過。

gept.example_en: Her final longjump attempt exceeded the eight-meter mark and secured the gold medal.
gept.example_zh: 她最後一次跳遠超過八公尺大關，鎖定金牌。

gept.example_en: He cleared the world-record bar in the highjump on his very first attempt.
gept.example_zh: 他在跳高項目第一次試跳就越過世界紀錄高度。

gept.example_en: The polevault requires sprint speed, gymnastic strength, and absolute fearlessness.
gept.example_zh: 撐竿跳需要短跑速度、體操般的力量以及絕對的勇氣。

gept.example_en: He spun three times and launched the discus more than seventy meters down the field.
gept.example_zh: 他旋轉三圈後將鐵餅擲出超過七十公尺。

gept.example_en: The shotputter weighed over a hundred kilograms but moved across the circle with surprising grace.
gept.example_zh: 鉛球選手體重超過一百公斤，但在投擲圈中移動卻意外地優雅。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 左撇子拳手；左手拳手
gept.example_en: Right-handed boxers often struggle against a quick southpaw with a strong straight left.
gept.example_zh: 右手拳手往往很難對付出拳快、左直拳強的左撇子。

gept.example_en: Once the chokehold was locked in, his opponent had only seconds to tap out.
gept.example_zh: 鎖喉技一旦鎖定，對手只有幾秒鐘的時間能拍墊認輸。

gept.example_en: Kendo practitioners use bamboo swords that simulate the weight of a real katana.
gept.example_zh: 劍道練習者使用模擬真正武士刀重量的竹劍。

gept.example_en: Kendo emphasizes both physical skill and the mental discipline of traditional samurai culture.
gept.example_zh: 劍道同時強調身體技藝和傳統武士文化的精神修養。

gept.example_en: In epee the entire body is a valid target and double touches are allowed.
gept.example_zh: 在重劍項目中全身皆為有效得分區，並允許雙方同時得分。

gept.example_en: He waxed the bowstring carefully before every competition to maintain its consistency.
gept.example_zh: 每次比賽前他都會仔細為弓弦上蠟以維持其穩定性。

gept.example_en: The colorful fletching helps stabilize the arrow's flight toward the distant target.
gept.example_zh: 色彩繽紛的箭羽能幫助箭朝遠處的靶心穩定飛行。

gept.example_en: The Olympic recurve event has been part of the Summer Games since the nineteen seventies.
gept.example_zh: 奧運反曲弓項目自一九七零年代起就是夏季奧運的一部分。

gept.example_en: Hunters favor the compound-bow because its pulleys reduce the holding weight at full draw.
gept.example_zh: 獵人偏愛複合弓，因為其滑輪能在完全拉滿時減輕持弓重量。

gept.example_en: Matchplay format rewards aggressive play because each hole is scored separately.
gept.example_zh: 比洞賽的賽制鼓勵積極打法，因為每洞單獨計分。

gept.example_en: Most professional tournaments use the strokeplay format over four eighteen-hole rounds.
gept.example_zh: 多數職業賽事採用四輪十八洞的比桿賽制。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 短拍牆球；壁球的一種
gept.example_en: Racquetball is played inside an enclosed court using all four walls for shots.
gept.example_zh: 短拍牆球是在封閉場地中進行，球員可利用四面牆壁擊球。

gept.example_en: Pickleball has exploded in popularity among older adults thanks to its forgiving rules.
gept.example_zh: 匹克球因規則平易近人而在年長族群間人氣爆增。

gept.example_en: He scored the winning goal with a sidearm shot during the overtime period of lacrosse.
gept.example_zh: 他在長曲棍球的延長賽以側臂射門攻入致勝一球。

gept.example_en: Futsal develops close ball control and quick decision-making in tight spaces.
gept.example_zh: 五人制足球能訓練在狹窄空間中緊密控球與快速決策的能力。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (滑雪) 障礙轉彎賽；曲道
gept.example_en: Slalom skiing demands lightning reflexes to weave between closely spaced colored gates.
gept.example_zh: 曲道滑雪需要閃電般的反應來在密集的彩色旗門之間穿梭。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (滑雪) 雪包；自由式雪包賽
gept.example_en: Moguls skiers absorb the bumps with their knees while completing twisting aerial jumps.
gept.example_zh: 雪包滑雪選手用膝蓋吸收雪包衝擊，同時完成扭轉騰空動作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (滑板/單板) 半管賽道
gept.example_en: He launched ten feet above the halfpipe lip and landed a perfect double cork.
gept.example_zh: 他在半管賽道邊緣騰空十英尺，完美完成雙翻轉動作。

gept.example_en: The zamboni resurfaced the rink between periods so the ice stayed fast and smooth.
gept.example_zh: 整冰車在節與節之間重新整理冰面，讓冰場保持快速平滑。

gept.example_en: On clear afternoons she likes to paraglide off the ridge above the alpine valley.
gept.example_zh: 在晴朗的午後，她喜歡從高山谷地上方的山脊起飛滑翔傘。

gept.example_en: A bright red hangglider circled lazily on rising thermals above the coastal cliffs.
gept.example_zh: 一架亮紅色的懸掛式滑翔機在海岸懸崖上方的上升氣流中悠然盤旋。

gept.example_en: He celebrated his fortieth birthday with a bungee jump off a famous canyon bridge.
gept.example_zh: 他從一座著名峽谷大橋上高空彈跳，慶祝四十歲生日。

gept.example_en: Search teams rappel down the cliff face to reach injured climbers below the ridge.
gept.example_zh: 搜救隊沿著崖壁垂降，前往救援山脊下方的受傷登山者。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞/名詞) (攀岩) 確保；確保員
gept.example_en: Always check that your partner is ready to belay before you start to climb upward.
gept.example_zh: 在開始向上攀爬之前，務必確認你的同伴已準備好做確保。

gept.example_en: She clipped the rope into the carabiner attached securely to the anchor bolt.
gept.example_zh: 她把繩子扣進固定在岩釘上的鉤環中。

gept.example_en: Indoor bouldering gyms have grown rapidly in popularity among urban fitness enthusiasts.
gept.example_zh: 室內抱石館在都市健身愛好者間人氣迅速攀升。

gept.example_en: Strap your crampon firmly to each boot before stepping onto the glacier surface.
gept.example_zh: 踏上冰川表面前，先把冰爪牢牢綁在兩隻登山靴上。

gept.example_en: She drove her icepick into the slope and used it to arrest her sliding fall.
gept.example_zh: 她將冰斧砸進雪坡，利用它阻止自己滑落。

gept.example_en: A pair of trekkingpole sticks can reduce knee strain on long descending trails.
gept.example_zh: 一對登山杖能在漫長的下坡步道中減輕膝蓋負擔。

gept.example_en: They paddled their raft through class-four whitewater on the upper section of the river.
gept.example_zh: 他們划著橡皮艇穿越河流上游的四級激流。

gept.example_en: He obtained his scuba certification during a two-week dive course in tropical Thailand.
gept.example_zh: 他在熱帶泰國參加兩週潛水課程後取得了水肺潛水證照。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自由潛水；閉氣潛水
gept.example_en: Competitive freediving athletes can hold their breath for more than eight straight minutes.
gept.example_zh: 競技自由潛水選手能連續閉氣超過八分鐘。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 漁槍捕魚；魚槍狩獵
gept.example_en: Local spearfishing tradition has fed coastal villages along this island for many generations.
gept.example_zh: 當地漁槍捕魚傳統已養活這座島嶼的沿海村莊好幾個世代。

gept.example_en: He launched off the wake on his wakeboard and rotated a perfect three-sixty grab.
gept.example_zh: 他駕著尾波滑板從尾流上騰空，完美完成抓板三百六十度旋轉。

gept.example_en: Strong steady winds along the lagoon make it ideal to kitesurf in the early afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 潟湖沿岸穩定的強風讓午後初時段成為風箏衝浪的理想時機。

gept.example_en: The annual regatta on the river attracts university crews from across the country.
gept.example_zh: 河上一年一度的划船賽吸引全國各地大學船隊參與。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) (船舶) 舷外浮材；舷外浮架
gept.example_en: Pacific cultures developed the outrigger canoe to cross open ocean safely and reliably.
gept.example_zh: 太平洋各民族發展出舷外浮架獨木舟，以安全可靠地橫渡開闊海洋。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 尋寶遊戲；地理藏寶
gept.example_en: Geocaching combines hiking, navigation, and a treasure hunt using GPS coordinates worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 尋寶遊戲結合了健行、定位以及利用全球GPS座標的尋寶活動。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 定向越野；越野定向運動
gept.example_en: Orienteering competitors race to find checkpoints using only a paper map and compass.
gept.example_zh: 定向越野選手只憑紙本地圖和指北針爭相找出各個檢查點。

gept.example_en: Parkour athletes vault over walls and roll through landings in flowing fluid movements.
gept.example_zh: 跑酷選手以流暢自然的動作翻越牆壁，並以翻滾完成著地。

gept.example_en: Freerunning adds acrobatic flips and creative flourishes to traditional parkour movements.
gept.example_zh: 自由跑酷在傳統跑酷動作上加入空翻和富有創意的花式技巧。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 徒手健身操；柔軟體操
gept.example_en: Calisthenics builds full-body strength using only body weight and minimal equipment.
gept.example_zh: 徒手健身操僅以自身體重和極少器材就能鍛鍊全身力量。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 增強式訓練的；爆發式的
gept.example_en: Plyometric box jumps develop explosive lower-body power needed for sprinting and jumping events.
gept.example_zh: 增強式跳箱訓練能發展短跑與跳躍項目所需的下肢爆發力。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 等長收縮的；等長運動的
gept.example_en: Holding a plank position is a classic isometric exercise for the core muscles.
gept.example_zh: 保持棒式是針對核心肌群的經典等長收縮運動。

gept.example_en: The snatch is the most technically demanding lift in competitive Olympic weightlifting.
gept.example_zh: 抓舉是競技奧林匹克舉重中技術要求最高的一項動作。

gept.example_en: Her successful clean-and-jerk attempt secured the world championship gold medal that evening.
gept.example_zh: 她成功的挺舉試舉為她奪下當晚的世界冠軍金牌。

gept.example_en: Twenty minutes on the rowingmachine works nearly every major muscle group in the body.
gept.example_zh: 划船機運動二十分鐘幾乎能鍛鍊到身體每個主要肌群。

gept.example_en: The ellipticaltrainer provides a low-impact alternative to running for people with sore joints.
gept.example_zh: 橢圓機為關節疼痛的人提供了取代跑步的低衝擊運動選擇。

gept.example_en: Hikers preparing for big climbs often log long sessions on a steep stairmaster.
gept.example_zh: 準備大型登山的人經常在陡峭的階梯機上進行長時間訓練。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 滾筒；筋膜按摩滾筒
gept.example_en: Using a foamroller after workouts can ease muscle tightness and improve overall flexibility.
gept.example_zh: 運動後使用滾筒能緩解肌肉緊繃並提升整體柔軟度。

gept.example_en: Ashtanga practitioners follow a fixed series of poses six mornings every single week.
gept.example_zh: 阿斯坦加瑜珈練習者每週六個早晨依固定順序練習一套體式。

gept.example_en: Senior citizens gathered in the park each morning to practice gentle qigong together.
gept.example_zh: 每天清晨長輩們在公園聚集，一起練習柔和的氣功。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 脛骨疼痛；脛骨內側壓力症候群
gept.example_en: New runners often develop shinsplints from increasing their weekly mileage too quickly.
gept.example_zh: 新手跑者經常因為每週里程數提升過快而出現脛骨疼痛。

gept.example_en: Stretching the calves each morning helps manage stubborn plantar-fasciitis heel pain.
gept.example_zh: 每天早晨伸展小腿能幫助緩解頑固的足底筋膜炎腳跟疼痛。

gept.example_en: Pitchers must train their rotatorcuff muscles diligently to avoid long-term shoulder injuries.
gept.example_zh: 投手必須認真訓練旋轉肌袖肌群，以避免長期肩部傷害。

gept.example_en: Footwork drills with an agility-ladder improve coordination and quick lateral movement.
gept.example_zh: 用敏捷梯做腳步訓練能提升協調性和快速橫向移動能力。

gept.example_en: A simple cone-drill teaches young athletes how to plant and change direction quickly.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的三角錐訓練教導年輕選手如何踩穩並快速變換方向。

gept.example_en: The team coach finished every practice with a brutal series of timed shuttle-run sets.
gept.example_zh: 教練每次練習都以一連串殘酷的計時折返跑作結束。

gept.example_en: Elite endurance athletes record some of the highest VO2max values ever measured in humans.
gept.example_zh: 頂尖耐力運動員擁有人類所測得最高的最大攝氧量數值之一。

gept.example_en: Training just below your lactate-threshold improves long-distance racing performance significantly.
gept.example_zh: 在略低於乳酸閾值的強度訓練可顯著提升長距離比賽表現。

gept.example_en: The veteran alpinist had summited every continent's highest peak before he turned forty.
gept.example_zh: 這位經驗豐富的高山攀登者在四十歲前已登上每個大陸的最高峰。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鐵索攀登路線；鐵索道
gept.example_en: The Italian via-ferrata routes allow novice climbers to enjoy steep alpine terrain safely.
gept.example_zh: 義大利的鐵索攀登路線讓新手攀登者能安全享受陡峭的高山地形。

gept.example_en: In southern France retirees gather to play petanque in dusty village squares each afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 在法國南部，退休族每天下午聚集在塵土飛揚的村莊廣場玩法式滾球。

gept.example_en: Beginners try spelunking in well-mapped caves with experienced certified guide leaders.
gept.example_zh: 新手會在已詳細測繪的洞穴中由經驗豐富的合格嚮導帶領嘗試洞穴探險。

gept.example_en: Serious caving requires technical rope work and sometimes squeezing through extremely tight passages.
gept.example_zh: 認真的洞穴探索需要技術性繩索操作，有時還得鑽過極為狹窄的通道。

gept.example_en: The veteran spelunker has mapped over twenty miles of underground passages in the region.
gept.example_zh: 這位經驗豐富的洞穴探險者已測繪該地區超過二十英里的地下通道。

gept.example_en: A typical duathlon includes a five-kilometer run, a long bike leg, then another run.
gept.example_zh: 典型的兩項全能包含五公里跑步、一段長距離自行車，再加一段跑步。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 生物力學；運動力學
gept.example_en: Modern biomechanics research helps coaches design safer and more efficient training programs.
gept.example_zh: 現代運動力學研究幫助教練設計更安全、更有效率的訓練課程。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 運動學；人體運動學
gept.example_en: Her kinesiology degree opened doors to careers in physical therapy and sports performance.
gept.example_zh: 她的運動學學位為她打開了通往物理治療和運動表現相關職業的大門。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 測力計；運動測力器
gept.example_en: Rowing crews log winter training hours indoors on an ergometer monitored by their coach.
gept.example_zh: 划船隊冬季的訓練時數記錄在室內測力計上，並由教練監控。

gept.example_en: Many trekkers in the Himalayas suffer altitude sickness when they ascend too quickly without acclimatizing.
gept.example_zh: 許多在喜馬拉雅山健行的人因為太快上升而未適應而患上高山症。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 適應新環境或氣候
gept.example_en: Climbers must acclimatize at base camp for several days before attempting to reach the summit.
gept.example_zh: 登山者必須在基地營適應幾天才能嘗試攻頂。

gept.example_en: Her wanderlust took her to more than fifty countries before she turned thirty years old.
gept.example_zh: 她的旅行癖在三十歲前帶她去過五十多個國家。

gept.example_en: The famous globetrotter shared stories from every continent on his popular travel podcast.
gept.example_zh: 這位著名的環球旅行者在他熱門的旅遊播客上分享了來自每個大陸的故事。

gept.example_en: The ethnographer lived among the tribe for two years to document their daily rituals and beliefs.
gept.example_zh: 這位民族誌學者在部落中生活兩年以記錄他們的日常儀式和信仰。

gept.example_en: During the harvest festival, kinsfolk from distant villages gather to celebrate their shared heritage.
gept.example_zh: 在收穫節期間，來自遠方村莊的親屬聚在一起慶祝共同的傳統。

gept.example_en: In matrilineal societies, family lineage and inheritance are traced through the mother's side.
gept.example_zh: 在母系社會中，家族血統和繼承是通過母親那邊追溯的。

gept.example_en: Most traditional East Asian cultures follow patrilineal customs where surnames pass from father to son.
gept.example_zh: 大多數傳統東亞文化遵循父系習俗，姓氏從父親傳給兒子。

gept.example_en: The village shaman performed ancient healing rituals using herbs and chants passed down for centuries.
gept.example_zh: 村裡的薩滿用傳承了幾個世紀的草藥和咒語進行古老的治療儀式。

gept.example_en: The coming-of-age ceremony serves as a rite of passage marking the transition into adulthood.
gept.example_zh: 成年禮作為一個通過儀式，標誌著向成年的轉變。

gept.example_en: Singapore serves as a major stopover hub for travelers flying between Europe and Australia.
gept.example_zh: 新加坡是歐洲和澳洲之間旅客的主要中轉樞紐。

gept.example_en: Agritourism allows urban visitors to experience farm life, pick fresh produce, and learn about rural traditions.
gept.example_zh: 農業旅遊讓城市訪客體驗農場生活、採摘新鮮農產品並了解鄉村傳統。

gept.example_en: She combined her vacation with voluntourism, teaching English at a small village school for two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她將假期與志工旅遊結合，在一所小村學校教英文兩週。

gept.example_en: The city's grand esplanade hosts weekly markets, street performers, and outdoor concerts during summer.
gept.example_zh: 這座城市的宏偉海濱大道在夏季舉辦每週市集、街頭表演者和戶外音樂會。

gept.example_en: Every evening, locals gather in the central piazza to chat, drink coffee, and watch the world go by.
gept.example_zh: 每天晚上，當地人聚集在中央廣場聊天、喝咖啡，看著人來人往。

gept.example_en: Wandering through the labyrinthine souk in Marrakech, we found rare spices and beautiful leather goods.
gept.example_zh: 穿梭於馬拉喀什迷宮般的露天集市，我們發現了珍稀香料和精美的皮革製品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 象形文字；圖畫文字
gept.example_en: Ancient pictographs on cave walls offer scholars vital clues about prehistoric communication and beliefs.
gept.example_zh: 洞穴牆上的古代象形文字為學者提供了關於史前溝通和信仰的重要線索。

gept.example_en: Stonehenge remains one of the most studied megalith sites and continues to puzzle archaeologists today.
gept.example_zh: 巨石陣仍是被研究最多的巨石遺址之一，至今仍讓考古學家困惑。

gept.example_en: The ancient Egyptian obelisk standing in the square was transported from Luxor over a century ago.
gept.example_zh: 矗立在廣場上的古埃及方尖碑於一個多世紀前從盧克索運來。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 古代美索不達米亞塔廟
gept.example_en: The ancient Mesopotamian ziggurat served as both a religious temple and an astronomical observation platform.
gept.example_zh: 古代美索不達米亞的塔廟既作為宗教神廟，也作為天文觀測平台。

gept.example_en: The Roman catacombs beneath the city stretch for miles and contain thousands of ancient burial niches.
gept.example_zh: 城市底下的羅馬地下墓穴綿延數英里，內有數千個古老的墓穴壁龕。

gept.example_en: The marble mausoleum was built by the grieving emperor to honor his late beloved wife.
gept.example_zh: 這座大理石陵墓是悲痛的皇帝為紀念已故的愛妻而建造的。

gept.example_en: Archaeologists carefully opened the stone sarcophagus to reveal artifacts preserved for thousands of years.
gept.example_zh: 考古學家小心地打開石棺，揭示了保存數千年的文物。

gept.example_en: The ductwork in the attic was inspected for leaks during the energy audit.
gept.example_zh: 在能源稽核時檢查了閣樓裡的管道系統是否漏氣。

gept.example_en: Rural homes often rely on a septic tank for waste disposal.
gept.example_zh: 鄉村住家常常依靠化糞池來處理廢物。

gept.example_en: Scope creep is a common reason for missed deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 範圍蔓延是錯過期限的常見原因。

gept.example_en: The estuary is where the river meets the sea and mixes with salt water.
gept.example_zh: 河口是河水與海水相遇並與鹹水混合的地方。

gept.example_en: The exhilaration of crossing the finish line made all the training worthwhile.
gept.example_zh: 跨越終點線的興奮感讓所有的訓練都值得了。

gept.example_en: The parents experienced terrible anguish during the long search for their missing daughter.
gept.example_zh: 在尋找失蹤女兒的漫長過程中，父母經歷了極度的痛苦。

gept.example_en: A wave of euphoria swept through the crowd when the team scored.
gept.example_zh: 當隊伍進球時，一股狂喜的浪潮席捲了整個觀眾席。

gept.example_en: His agitation grew as he waited for news about his grandfather's surgery.
gept.example_zh: 等待祖父手術消息時他的焦躁逐漸加深。

gept.example_en: She widened the aperture to let more light into the camera lens.
gept.example_zh: 她把光圈調大，讓更多光線進入相機鏡頭。

gept.example_en: Wear a thimble to protect your finger while pushing the needle through.
gept.example_zh: 穿針時戴上頂針以保護你的手指。

gept.example_en: He practiced calligraphy with an ink brush every morning before breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 他每天早餐前都用毛筆練習書法。

gept.example_en: The optometrist examined her eyes and prescribed her first pair of glasses.
gept.example_zh: 驗光師檢查了她的眼睛並為她配了第一副眼鏡。

gept.example_en: The archipelago consists of more than two hundred small tropical islands.
gept.example_zh: 這個群島由超過兩百個熱帶小島組成。

gept.example_en: Critics argued the country had drifted from democracy toward an oligarchy of wealthy elites.
gept.example_zh: 批評者認為該國已從民主漂流向富裕菁英的寡頭政治。

gept.example_en: Some scholars warn that growing wealth gaps may transform democracies into plutocracies.
gept.example_zh: 一些學者警告，日益擴大的財富差距可能將民主轉變為富豪統治。

gept.example_en: The country slowly slid from a fragile democracy into an authoritarian autocracy.
gept.example_zh: 該國緩慢地從脆弱的民主滑落為威權獨裁政治。

gept.example_en: Understanding intersectionality helps explain how multiple identities shape an individual's experiences of discrimination.
gept.example_zh: 理解交織性有助於解釋多重身分如何形塑個人遭受歧視的經驗。

gept.example_en: Existentialism emphasizes individual freedom and the responsibility of creating one's own meaning.
gept.example_zh: 存在主義強調個人自由以及創造自我意義的責任。

gept.example_en: Utilitarianism judges actions by whether they produce the greatest good for the most people.
gept.example_zh: 功利主義依據行為是否為最多人帶來最大利益來進行判斷。

gept.example_en: Deontology holds that certain actions are morally required regardless of their consequences.
gept.example_zh: 義務論認為某些行為在道德上是必要的，無論其後果如何。

gept.example_en: Epistemology examines fundamental questions about what we can truly know and how.
gept.example_zh: 知識論探討關於我們真正能知道什麼以及如何知道的根本問題。

gept.example_en: Some critics misuse the term misandry to dismiss legitimate concerns raised by feminist commentators.
gept.example_zh: 一些批評者誤用厭男症一詞來駁回女性主義評論者提出的合理關切。

gept.example_en: Reformers attacked the cronyism that handed lucrative contracts to politically connected business friends.
gept.example_zh: 改革者抨擊將利潤豐厚的合約交給有政治關係的商業朋友的任用親信行為。

gept.example_en: Do not construe her silence as approval of the controversial proposal.
gept.example_zh: 不要將她的沉默解讀為對該具爭議提案的認同。

gept.example_en: The argument presupposes that every participant acts with complete honesty.
gept.example_zh: 該論點預設每位參與者都以完全的誠實行事。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 歡樂的；好交際的
gept.example_en: The convivial atmosphere of the reception encouraged guests to mingle freely.
gept.example_zh: 歡聚的招待會氣氛鼓勵賓客自在地相互交流。

gept.example_en: Henceforward, all expense claims must be submitted within ten working days.
gept.example_zh: 從此以後，所有費用核銷必須在十個工作日內提出。

gept.example_en: Hitherto, the team has avoided commenting publicly on the pending case.
gept.example_zh: 迄今為止，該團隊一直避免對該未決案件公開發表評論。

gept.example_en: His diffidence in meetings often masked an unusually sharp analytical mind.
gept.example_zh: 他在會議中缺乏自信的表現，常常掩蓋了異常敏銳的分析頭腦。

gept.example_en: The contract requires the contractor to indemnify the client against any third-party claims.
gept.example_zh: 合約要求承包商就任何第三方索賠對客戶進行補償。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 是…的縮影；典型代表
gept.example_en: This neighborhood epitomizes the rapid changes sweeping the entire city.
gept.example_zh: 這個街區是席捲整座城市的迅速變遷的縮影。

gept.example_en: Years of unchallenged practice have entrenched the habit across the entire industry.
gept.example_zh: 多年未受挑戰的做法已使這個習慣在整個產業中根深柢固。

gept.example_en: The board voted to reinstate the program that had been suspended last summer.
gept.example_zh: 董事會投票通過恢復去年夏天暫停的計畫。

gept.example_en: The new administration plans to abrogate several outdated trade agreements.
gept.example_zh: 新政府計畫廢除數項過時的貿易協定。

gept.example_en: The court agreed to rescind the controversial ruling within a week.
gept.example_zh: 法院同意在一週內撤回該具爭議的判決。

gept.example_en: A judge may annul a contract obtained through clear fraud.
gept.example_zh: 法官可宣告以明顯欺詐手段取得的合約無效。

gept.example_en: A single procedural error could nullify months of careful negotiation.
gept.example_zh: 單一程序上的疏失便可能使數月的審慎協商歸於無效。

gept.example_en: The committee plans to bestow a special award on the volunteer coordinator.
gept.example_zh: 委員會計畫向志工統籌人頒發一項特別獎。

gept.example_en: A generous donor endowed the institute with funds for ten new scholarships.
gept.example_zh: 一位慷慨的捐贈者捐款設立十項新獎學金。

gept.example_en: He chose to bequeath his entire art collection to the national museum.
gept.example_zh: 他選擇將他全部的藝術收藏遺贈給國立博物館。

gept.example_en: The wise mentor is a familiar archetype across many storytelling traditions.
gept.example_zh: 睿智的導師是許多敘事傳統中常見的典型人物。

gept.example_en: She is considered a paragon of professional integrity in the legal community.
gept.example_zh: 她在法律界被視為專業誠信的典範。

gept.example_en: Meticulous craftsmanship has long been a hallmark of this old family workshop.
gept.example_zh: 精細的工藝一向是這家老字號家族工坊的特徵。

gept.example_en: This small device was the forerunner of today's high-end medical scanners.
gept.example_zh: 這款小型裝置是當今高階醫療掃描儀的前驅。

gept.example_en: Rising bond yields can be a precursor to wider economic adjustments.
gept.example_zh: 債券殖利率上升可能是更廣泛經濟調整的前兆。

gept.example_en: The cool morning breeze was a harbinger of the approaching autumn.
gept.example_zh: 清涼的晨風是秋天即將到來的預兆。

gept.example_en: Only a few vestiges of the medieval wall remain visible today.
gept.example_zh: 今日只剩中世紀城牆的少數殘跡仍清晰可見。

gept.example_en: This rusted typewriter is a relic of a very different working era.
gept.example_zh: 這台生鏽的打字機是一個截然不同工作年代的遺物。

gept.example_en: The report saliently identifies leadership turnover as the chief risk factor.
gept.example_zh: 該報告顯著地將領導層更替指為主要的風險因素。

gept.example_en: The meeting was ostensibly about logistics but really about internal politics.
gept.example_zh: 那場會議表面上是討論物流，實際上談的是內部政治。

gept.example_en: The document was purportedly written by a high-ranking former official.
gept.example_zh: 這份文件據稱是由一位前任高階官員所撰寫。

gept.example_en: The restaurant is reputedly the oldest of its kind in the city.
gept.example_zh: 這家餐廳據說是這座城市同類餐廳中歷史最悠久的。

gept.example_en: Reviewers questioned the plausibility of several assumptions in the model.
gept.example_zh: 審稿人質疑模型中數項假設的合理性。

gept.example_en: A small wooden gable decorated the roof of the charming country cottage perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 一面小木山牆裝飾著這棟迷人鄉村小屋的屋頂，恰到好處。

gept.example_en: Wooden rafters supported the heavy tile roof of the traditional farmhouse for decades.
gept.example_zh: 木椽撐起了這棟傳統農舍沉重的瓦頂達數十年之久。

gept.example_en: The medieval church's stone buttress prevented the heavy walls from collapsing outward.
gept.example_zh: 中世紀教堂的石扶壁阻止了厚重牆面向外倒塌。

gept.example_en: The tall church spire could be seen from miles away across the green valley.
gept.example_zh: 高聳的教堂尖塔從數英里外的綠色山谷對面就能看見。

gept.example_en: Each corner of the old castle had a round turret with narrow arrow slits.
gept.example_zh: 古堡的每個角落都有一座圓形塔樓，上面開著狹窄的箭眼。

gept.example_en: He cut a large sheet of plywood to build shelves for his garage workshop.
gept.example_zh: 他裁切了一大張膠合板，為車庫工作室製作層架。

gept.example_en: The contractor installed drywall across every interior wall before painting could finally begin.
gept.example_zh: 承包商在每面內牆裝上石膏板，油漆工程才終於可以開始。

gept.example_en: The mechanic discovered the rear axle was bent after the truck hit a deep pothole.
gept.example_zh: 卡車撞上深坑後，技師發現後車軸已經彎曲。

gept.example_en: The car's aluminum chassis makes it lighter and more fuel-efficient than older models.
gept.example_zh: 這款車的鋁製底盤讓它比舊款更輕、更省油。

gept.example_en: Check the tread on your tires before driving through heavy rain on long trips.
gept.example_zh: 長途行車於大雨前，請檢查輪胎的胎面磨耗。

gept.example_en: One shiny hubcap fell off and rolled noisily down the empty parking lot.
gept.example_zh: 一個閃亮的輪轂蓋掉下來，吵雜地滾過空蕩的停車場。

gept.example_en: He tapped the wooden joint together gently with a heavy rubber mallet.
gept.example_zh: 他用一支沉重的橡膠槌輕敲，把木接頭敲合起來。

gept.example_en: Firefighters used a crowbar to pry open the door and rescue the trapped family.
gept.example_zh: 消防員用撬棍把門撬開，救出受困的一家人。

gept.example_en: The leather worker punched neat holes with a sharp awl before stitching the wallet.
gept.example_zh: 皮革師傅在縫製錢包前，用鋒利的錐子穿出整齊的洞。

gept.example_en: The workers used a sandblaster to strip layers of old paint from the bridge railings.
gept.example_zh: 工人用噴砂機把橋欄上一層層舊漆剝除乾淨。

gept.example_en: A bright red sash tied around her waist completed the elegant traditional outfit perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 繫在腰間的鮮紅腰帶讓這套優雅的傳統服飾更加完美。

gept.example_en: A heart-shaped silver pendant hung from her thin necklace on a special chain.
gept.example_zh: 一個心形銀墜飾掛在她細頸鍊上一條特別的鏈子上。

gept.example_en: Grandma's antique brooch shaped like a butterfly sparkled brightly under the dining room lights.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶那只蝴蝶形古董胸針，在餐廳燈光下閃閃發亮。

gept.example_en: He fastened his silver cufflinks carefully before leaving for the important business dinner.
gept.example_zh: 他在出發參加重要商務晚宴前，小心地扣好銀製袖扣。

gept.example_en: Inside the old locket was a tiny photograph of her grandparents on their wedding day.
gept.example_zh: 那個老舊紀念盒裡放著她祖父母婚禮當天的一張小照片。

gept.example_en: She wore a thin gold anklet that sparkled in the sunlight at the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她戴著一條細金腳鍊，在海邊陽光下閃閃發亮。

gept.example_en: The little princess proudly wore a sparkling plastic tiara to her birthday tea party.
gept.example_zh: 小公主驕傲地戴著閃亮的塑膠頭冠去參加她的生日下午茶會。

gept.example_en: Grandmother draped a warm woolen shawl over her shoulders before stepping out for evening walks.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶在外出晚間散步前，把暖呼呼的羊毛披肩披在肩上。

gept.example_en: Bright yellow daffodils bloomed early along the garden wall after the long cold winter.
gept.example_zh: 漫長寒冬過後，鮮黃的水仙花沿著花園牆邊早早綻放。

gept.example_en: Pink peonies filled the entire flowerbed with their sweet fragrance every May morning.
gept.example_zh: 每個五月的早晨，粉色牡丹的甜香瀰漫整個花圃。

gept.example_en: Red poppies swayed gently in the breeze along the edges of the wheat field.
gept.example_zh: 紅色的罌粟花在麥田邊緣隨著微風輕輕搖曳。

gept.example_en: Blue hydrangeas grew abundantly outside the country house facing the gentle morning sun.
gept.example_zh: 鄉間屋外朝著柔和晨光生長的繡球花開得茂盛。

gept.example_en: Tall pink foxgloves bloomed beside the stone wall throughout the entire month of June.
gept.example_zh: 高大的粉色毛地黃整個六月都沿著石牆綻放。

gept.example_en: A large stingray glided gracefully over the sandy ocean floor during our snorkeling trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們浮潛時，一隻巨大的魟魚優雅地在沙質海床上方滑行。

gept.example_en: Sharp barnacles covered the bottom of the old fishing boat that had been abandoned.
gept.example_zh: 尖銳的藤壺布滿了那艘被遺棄已久的老漁船船底。

gept.example_en: Tiny plankton glow brightly in the dark waves of the bay on summer nights.
gept.example_zh: 夏夜時，微小的浮游生物在海灣昏暗的浪花中發出明亮光芒。

gept.example_en: A narrow rocky ravine separated the two hiking trails on the wooded mountainside.
gept.example_zh: 一條狹窄的岩石溪谷把林木山腰上的兩條健行步道隔開。

gept.example_en: Wild horses roamed freely across the misty highland during the long quiet summer months.
gept.example_zh: 漫長寧靜的夏季裡，野馬在霧氣繚繞的高地上自由奔馳。

gept.example_en: The fertile lowland near the river produces rich harvests of rice every year.
gept.example_zh: 河流附近肥沃的低地每年都生產豐盛的稻米收成。

gept.example_en: The old wooden barometer in the hallway helped my grandfather predict tomorrow's weather accurately.
gept.example_zh: 走廊上那個老木製氣壓計幫助我爺爺準確預測明天的天氣。

gept.example_en: The weather station's anemometer measured wind speeds exceeding ninety kilometers per hour yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 氣象站的風速計昨日測得超過每小時九十公里的風速。

gept.example_en: A small hygrometer in the greenhouse displayed humidity levels for the delicate orchids.
gept.example_zh: 溫室裡的一個小濕度計顯示著嬌嫩蘭花所需的濕度。

gept.example_en: The rusty weather vane on the barn roof spun rapidly during the windy autumn afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 穀倉屋頂上鏽蝕的風向標在多風的秋日午後快速旋轉。

gept.example_en: Our school's rain gauge showed thirty millimeters of rainfall after last weekend's heavy storms.
gept.example_zh: 上週末暴雨過後，我們學校的雨量計顯示降下了三十毫米的雨。

gept.example_en: A colorful nebula appeared clearly in the photographs taken by the space observatory yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 昨日太空觀測站拍攝的照片中，清晰呈現出一片色彩繽紛的星雲。

gept.example_en: Students poured the blue liquid carefully into a clean glass beaker during the chemistry lesson.
gept.example_zh: 化學課上，學生們小心地把藍色液體倒入乾淨的玻璃燒杯中。

gept.example_en: Bacteria grew rapidly inside the warm petri dish over the weekend in the laboratory.
gept.example_zh: 細菌週末在實驗室內溫暖的培養皿中迅速繁殖。

gept.example_en: Use the pipette to transfer exactly two milliliters of solution into each test tube.
gept.example_zh: 請用移液管把恰好兩毫升的溶液移入每支試管中。

gept.example_en: Each test tube on the rack contained a different colored liquid for the experiment.
gept.example_zh: 架上每支試管都裝著一種不同顏色的液體，供實驗使用。

gept.example_en: The chemist heated a small crucible over the flame until the metal began melting completely.
gept.example_zh: 化學家把小坩堝放在火焰上加熱，直到金屬完全開始熔化。

gept.example_en: Add a few drops of the reagent and observe how the solution changes color.
gept.example_zh: 加入幾滴試劑並觀察溶液如何變色。

gept.example_en: Use a wooden rolling pin to flatten the chilled pastry dough on the floured countertop.
gept.example_zh: 用木製擀麵棍在撒了麵粉的檯面上把冷藏麵團擀平。

gept.example_en: Warm scones with strawberry jam and clotted cream make any afternoon tea wonderful.
gept.example_zh: 溫熱的司康餅配草莓果醬和凝脂奶油，能讓任何下午茶都變得美好。

gept.example_en: He carried a fresh warm baguette home from the corner bakery every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 他每個週六早上都從街角麵包店帶一條新鮮溫熱的法棍回家。

gept.example_en: The restaurant offers creative mocktails for guests who prefer to avoid all alcoholic drinks.
gept.example_zh: 這間餐廳為偏好避開所有酒精飲料的客人提供創意無酒精雞尾酒。

gept.example_en: She prepared a colorful smoothie bowl topped with sliced banana, granola, and fresh berries.
gept.example_zh: 她做了一碗繽紛的冰沙碗，上面鋪了香蕉片、燕麥和新鮮莓果。

gept.example_en: Snorkeling near the coral reef gave us breathtaking views of colorful tropical fish today.
gept.example_zh: 今天在珊瑚礁附近浮潛讓我們看到了令人嘆為觀止的熱帶魚景觀。

gept.example_en: Passionate flamenco dancers stamped their feet rhythmically to the Spanish guitar music tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚熱情的佛朗明哥舞者隨著西班牙吉他樂節奏地踏著腳步。

gept.example_en: She practiced tap dance for two hours daily before her important audition next weekend.
gept.example_zh: 在下週末重要試鏡之前，她每天練習兩小時的踢踏舞。

gept.example_en: Street performers wowed the crowd with impressive break dance moves outside the busy train station.
gept.example_zh: 街頭表演者在繁忙火車站外以令人讚嘆的霹靂舞動作驚艷人群。

gept.example_en: The complex choreography for the musical took months of practice before opening night arrived.
gept.example_zh: 這齣音樂劇複雜的編舞在開演夜之前花了好幾個月排練。

gept.example_en: The compass needle pointed steadily northward as we hiked deeper into the misty woods.
gept.example_zh: 我們深入霧氣繚繞的樹林時，指南針的指針穩定地指向北方。

gept.example_en: Tourists watched eagerly as the powerful geyser erupted high into the clear morning sky.
gept.example_zh: 遊客熱切地觀看著強大的間歇泉噴向晴朗的清晨天空。

gept.example_en: Tourists travel from many countries each year to see Norway's deep dramatic fjord landscapes.
gept.example_zh: 每年都有來自許多國家的遊客前往挪威觀賞壯麗的深邃峽灣景觀。

gept.example_en: A small tributary joined the main river just past the wooden footbridge in the valley.
gept.example_zh: 一條小支流在山谷裡的木橋過後不久便匯入了主要河流。

gept.example_en: The mountain region has remarkably diverse flora found nowhere else in the entire country.
gept.example_zh: 這個山區的植物群極為多樣，全國其他地方都找不到。

gept.example_en: The protected forest contains unique fauna including several rare endangered birds and small mammals.
gept.example_zh: 這片受保護的森林裡有獨特的動物群，包括幾種稀有的瀕危鳥類和小型哺乳動物。

gept.example_en: Small wild birds nested safely inside the thick green hedgerow at the field's edge.
gept.example_zh: 小野鳥在田地邊緣濃密的綠色樹籬中安全地築巢。

gept.example_en: A small flower pinned to his suit lapel completed his elegant wedding outfit perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 一朵別在西裝翻領上的小花，讓他優雅的婚禮裝扮更加完美。

gept.example_en: She wrapped herself in a colorful woolen poncho during the chilly mountain evenings.
gept.example_zh: 她在寒冷的山區夜晚把自己裹在一件色彩繽紛的羊毛斗篷裡。

gept.example_en: The actress wore a tight corset under her elaborate Victorian-era stage costume for hours.
gept.example_zh: 女演員在精緻的維多利亞時代戲服底下穿了好幾個小時的緊身胸衣。

gept.example_en: Ancient warriors often wore only a simple loincloth during fierce traditional ceremonial dances.
gept.example_zh: 古代戰士在激烈的傳統儀式舞蹈時通常只穿一條簡單的腰布。

gept.example_en: The garden sprinkler system turned on automatically every morning before sunrise during the dry summer.
gept.example_zh: 乾燥的夏季裡，花園灑水系統每天日出前都自動開啟。

gept.example_en: A yellow excavator dug deep into the soft ground to prepare the new building's foundation.
gept.example_zh: 一台黃色挖土機在鬆軟的地面挖得很深，以準備新建築的地基。

gept.example_en: The loud jackhammer broke up the old concrete sidewalk all morning outside our apartment.
gept.example_zh: 喧鬧的風鑽整個早上都在我們公寓外把舊水泥人行道敲碎。

gept.example_en: The playful kitten batted a soft yarn ball across the wooden living room floor.
gept.example_zh: 頑皮的小貓把柔軟的毛線球拍打過客廳的木地板。

gept.example_en: She held a small crochet hook carefully while making her first patterned baby blanket.
gept.example_zh: 她小心地握著小鉤針，編織她第一件有花樣的嬰兒毯。

gept.example_en: An elegant compass rose was drawn neatly in the corner of the old paper map.
gept.example_zh: 老舊紙地圖的角落整齊地繪有一個典雅的羅盤花圖案。

gept.example_en: Strange creatures live near deep-sea thermal vents where boiling water rises from beneath the ocean floor.
gept.example_zh: 奇特的生物生活在深海熱液噴口附近，沸水從那裡的海床下方湧出。

gept.example_en: Children examined tiny creatures inside the small tide pool left behind by the receding ocean.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們仔細觀察退潮後留下的小潮池裡的微小生物。

gept.example_en: Crabs, lobsters, and shrimp all belong to the wide and fascinating crustacean family group.
gept.example_zh: 螃蟹、龍蝦和蝦子都屬於廣大而迷人的甲殼類動物家族。

gept.example_en: Snails, clams, and squid are all common mollusk species studied during the biology semester.
gept.example_zh: 蝸牛、蛤蜊和魷魚都是生物學期間研究的常見軟體動物物種。

gept.example_en: The bear stayed inside its lair throughout the entire long and snowy winter season.
gept.example_zh: 那隻熊整個漫長多雪的冬季都待在巢穴裡。

gept.example_en: Heavy fog covered the entire valley floor early every morning during autumn months.
gept.example_zh: 秋季的每個清晨，濃霧都會覆蓋整個谷底。

gept.example_en: A wooden model of an old Spanish galleon sat proudly on his desk for years.
gept.example_zh: 一艘古老西班牙大帆船的木製模型多年來驕傲地擺在他的書桌上。

gept.example_en: The fast hovercraft service connects the two coastal towns across the busy harbor channel.
gept.example_zh: 快速的氣墊船航線連接著繁忙海港水道兩岸的兩座濱海城鎮。

gept.example_en: We took a romantic gondola ride through the narrow canals of Venice last spring vacation.
gept.example_zh: 上次春假我們在威尼斯狹窄的運河上搭乘了浪漫的鳳尾船遊覽。

gept.example_en: The patient old carriage horse pulled tourists through the old town every quiet weekend afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那匹有耐心的老馬車馬在每個寧靜的週末下午都拉著遊客穿過古城。

gept.example_en: She used a stone pestle to crush the garlic cloves into a smooth paste.
gept.example_zh: 她用石杵把蒜瓣搗成滑順的泥。

gept.example_en: Pour the beaten eggs into a hot skillet and stir them with a wooden spoon.
gept.example_zh: 把打散的蛋倒入熱平底鍋，用木匙拌炒。

gept.example_en: Pancakes cook evenly on the cast iron griddle if you wait until bubbles form.
gept.example_zh: 在鑄鐵煎盤上等氣泡出現再翻面，鬆餅就熟得均勻。

gept.example_en: The chef chopped through the bone with a single swing of his heavy cleaver.
gept.example_zh: 廚師一刀就用他沉重的剁刀劈穿了骨頭。

gept.example_en: Use a sharp paring knife to remove the eyes from each potato.
gept.example_zh: 用鋒利的削皮小刀挖掉每顆馬鈴薯上的芽眼。

gept.example_en: In winter we use a thick goose-down duvet that keeps the whole bed warm.
gept.example_zh: 冬天我們用厚厚的鵝絨羽絨被，能讓整張床都很溫暖。

gept.example_en: Wash the duvet cover in warm water and tumble dry it on a low setting.
gept.example_zh: 用溫水清洗羽絨被套，並用低溫滾筒烘乾。

gept.example_en: The wooden headboard has small shelves for books and a reading lamp.
gept.example_zh: 木製床頭板上有放書和檯燈的小架子。

gept.example_en: The leather watchband cracked after five years of daily wear.
gept.example_zh: 那條皮質錶帶天天戴了五年後出現裂痕。

gept.example_en: The inspector found termite damage inside the wooden beams of the old house.
gept.example_zh: 檢查員在老房子的木樑內發現白蟻啃食的痕跡。

gept.example_en: Never disturb a hornet nest hanging from the eaves of your house.
gept.example_zh: 千萬不要去驚動掛在屋簷下的大黃蜂巢。

gept.example_en: A large centipede crawled out from under the bathroom mat this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今早一隻大蜈蚣從浴室腳踏墊下爬了出來。

gept.example_en: A tiny gecko clung to the ceiling and watched the mosquitoes circle the lamp.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小壁虎攀在天花板上，看著蚊子繞著燈飛。

gept.example_en: The pet store sold a green iguana that grew nearly a meter long.
gept.example_zh: 那間寵物店賣過一隻長到近一公尺的綠鬣蜥。

gept.example_en: We found a spotted salamander hiding beneath a damp, mossy log.
gept.example_zh: 我們在潮濕長滿苔蘚的木頭下發現一隻斑點蠑螈。

gept.example_en: The science teacher kept three small newts in a freshwater tank.
gept.example_zh: 自然老師在淡水缸裡養了三隻小蠑螈。

gept.example_en: Hikers were warned about a viper that had been seen near the trail.
gept.example_zh: 健行者被警告步道附近曾出現一條蝰蛇。

gept.example_en: Several yellow finches gathered at the thistle seed feeder all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 好幾隻黃雀整個下午都聚在薊草籽餵食器旁。

gept.example_en: Baked cod with lemon and butter is a simple but elegant dinner.
gept.example_zh: 用檸檬奶油烤鱈魚是一道簡單卻優雅的晚餐。

gept.example_en: Grilled mackerel served with grated radish is a Japanese household favorite.
gept.example_zh: 烤鯖魚配蘿蔔泥是日本家庭最愛的料理之一。

gept.example_en: Smoked haddock makes a wonderful base for a creamy fish chowder.
gept.example_zh: 燻黑線鱈是製作奶香魚雜燴湯的絕佳基底。

gept.example_en: Pacific halibut is prized for its mild flavor and firm white flesh.
gept.example_zh: 太平洋大比目魚以風味溫和、肉質白嫩緊實聞名。

gept.example_en: Just one anchovy melted into the pasta sauce adds incredible depth of flavor.
gept.example_zh: 在義大利麵醬裡融入一條鯷魚就能增添驚人的層次。

gept.example_en: Pickled herring is served on dark bread as a traditional Scandinavian breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 醃漬鯡魚搭配黑麵包是傳統的斯堪地那維亞早餐。

gept.example_en: Tilapia is an affordable freshwater fish that takes on the flavors of its seasoning.
gept.example_zh: 吳郭魚是價格實惠的淡水魚，能吸收調味的風味。

gept.example_en: Abalone is considered a luxury ingredient at traditional Chinese banquets.
gept.example_zh: 鮑魚在傳統中式宴席中被視為奢華食材。

gept.example_en: Yellow chrysanthemums brightened the entire autumn garden.
gept.example_zh: 黃色的菊花點亮了整個秋天的花園。

gept.example_en: The smell of gardenia in summer is rich enough to fill an entire room.
gept.example_zh: 夏天梔子花的香氣濃郁到能充滿整個房間。

gept.example_en: Gardeners plant marigolds near tomatoes to keep harmful insects away.
gept.example_zh: 園丁會在番茄旁種金盞花以驅趕害蟲。

gept.example_en: The azalea bush exploded into pink blooms throughout the entire month of April.
gept.example_zh: 那叢杜鵑花在整個四月綻放成滿樹的粉紅花海。

gept.example_en: The huge sycamore in the park sheds bark in irregular patches every summer.
gept.example_zh: 公園裡那棵巨大的美國梧桐每年夏天都會掉下不規則的樹皮。

gept.example_en: A row of tall poplars whispered loudly whenever a strong wind passed through.
gept.example_zh: 一排高大的楊樹只要強風吹過就會大聲沙沙作響。

gept.example_en: A giant sequoia can grow taller than a thirty-story building.
gept.example_zh: 巨杉能長得比三十層樓的建築還高。

gept.example_en: Sprinkle thinly sliced scallions over the noodles right before serving.
gept.example_zh: 上桌前在麵上撒上細切的蔥花。

gept.example_en: Roasted parsnips become wonderfully sweet when caramelized at high heat.
gept.example_zh: 歐防風用高溫烤至焦糖化後會變得非常香甜。

gept.example_en: Sliced okra thickens a southern gumbo into a rich, glossy stew.
gept.example_zh: 切片秋葵能讓南方什錦濃湯變得濃稠油亮。

gept.example_en: Fresh longans taste similar to lychees but with a slightly mellower sweetness.
gept.example_zh: 新鮮龍眼的味道類似荔枝，但甜味更溫潤一些。

gept.example_en: Pink begonias filled the hanging baskets along the entire porch.
gept.example_zh: 粉紅秋海棠開滿了整個門廊的吊籃。

gept.example_en: A single white camellia floated on the surface of the tea ceremony bowl.
gept.example_zh: 一朵白山茶花漂浮在茶道的茶碗水面上。

gept.example_en: The sweet smell of hyacinth filled the entire kitchen for a whole week.
gept.example_zh: 風信子的甜香整整一週都瀰漫在廚房裡。

gept.example_en: A graceful weeping willow leaned over the small wooden footbridge.
gept.example_zh: 一株優雅的垂柳斜垂在小木橋上方。

gept.example_en: Juniper berries give gin its distinctive piney aroma.
gept.example_zh: 杜松子讓琴酒擁有獨特的松木香氣。

gept.example_en: Each ladder back chair was hand-carved from a single piece of oak.
gept.example_zh: 每一張梯背椅都是用整塊橡木手工雕刻而成。

gept.example_en: The woodlark sang from the very top of the tallest pine.
gept.example_zh: 林雲雀從最高大的松樹頂端唱起歌來。

gept.example_en: A small horned toad scurried across the hot, dusty desert path.
gept.example_zh: 一隻小角蜥快速地穿越炎熱的沙塵小徑。

gept.example_en: Her methodical approach to research impressed the entire academic committee.
gept.example_zh: 她對研究有條理的做法令整個學術委員會印象深刻。

gept.example_en: She was so high-strung before exams that her hands trembled while writing.
gept.example_zh: 她考前神經太緊繃，書寫時雙手都在發抖。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 一絲不苟的；正直的
gept.example_en: The auditor was scrupulous about documenting every transaction in proper detail.
gept.example_zh: 那位審計員對每筆交易都一絲不苟地詳細記錄。

gept.example_en: He was fastidious about cleanliness and could not stand a single dish in the sink.
gept.example_zh: 他對清潔極為挑剔，連水槽裡一個碗都受不了。

gept.example_en: A conscientious worker, she stayed late to finish what others had abandoned.
gept.example_zh: 她是個認真盡責的員工，總是留下來完成別人放棄的工作。

gept.example_en: Her tenacious pursuit of the story uncovered corruption few journalists had suspected.
gept.example_zh: 她堅韌不拔地追查那則新聞，揭發了少有記者懷疑的貪腐。

gept.example_en: The gullible tourist paid triple the normal price without questioning the vendor.
gept.example_zh: 那位易受騙的遊客毫不質疑就付了三倍的正常價格。

gept.example_en: The inquisitive child asked dozens of questions during the museum tour.
gept.example_zh: 那位好奇的孩子在博物館導覽期間問了數十個問題。

gept.example_en: A tactful manager delivers criticism in ways that protect dignity and motivation.
gept.example_zh: 圓融的經理在傳達批評時會兼顧員工的尊嚴和工作動力。

gept.example_en: His haughty manner alienated potential clients during the early business meetings.
gept.example_zh: 他傲慢的態度在初期的商業會議中疏遠了潛在客戶。

gept.example_en: The conceited actor refused to share the spotlight with any costar.
gept.example_zh: 那位自負的演員拒絕與任何合演者分享鎂光燈。

gept.example_en: Excessive narcissism in leadership often leads to poor decisions and team turnover.
gept.example_zh: 領導者過度自戀經常導致錯誤的決策和團隊流動。

gept.example_en: Her quiet altruism led her to donate most of her bonus to local charities.
gept.example_zh: 她默默的利他精神讓她將大部分獎金捐給當地慈善機構。

gept.example_en: The philanthropist funded scholarships for first-generation college students nationwide.
gept.example_zh: 那位慈善家資助全國第一代大學生的獎學金。

gept.example_en: A growing sense of unease made him glance repeatedly over his shoulder.
gept.example_zh: 日益增長的不安感使他不斷回頭張望。

gept.example_en: Her elation at receiving the scholarship was visible to everyone in the room.
gept.example_zh: 她獲得獎學金時的興高采烈，房裡每個人都看得見。

gept.example_en: She made no effort to hide her contempt for dishonest business practices.
gept.example_zh: 她毫不掩飾自己對不誠實商業行為的蔑視。

gept.example_en: The tourists stood awe-struck before the towering ancient cathedral.
gept.example_zh: 遊客們在高聳的古老大教堂前感到敬畏。

gept.example_en: He gave a wistful smile as he flipped through the old yearbook.
gept.example_zh: 他翻著舊畢業紀念冊時露出惆悵的微笑。

gept.example_en: Saying goodbye to her students was a bittersweet end to her teaching career.
gept.example_zh: 向學生告別是她教學生涯苦樂參半的結束。

gept.example_en: The estrangement between father and son lasted nearly twenty painful years.
gept.example_zh: 父子之間的疏遠持續了將近二十年痛苦的歲月。

gept.example_en: After months of mediation, a quiet reconciliation finally took place at Thanksgiving.
gept.example_zh: 經過數個月的調解，感恩節時雙方終於悄悄和解。

gept.example_en: Many teenagers experience a feeling of alienation when moving to a new city.
gept.example_zh: 許多青少年在搬到新城市時會經歷疏離感。

gept.example_en: What began as a teenage infatuation eventually grew into a lasting marriage.
gept.example_zh: 最初青少年時期的迷戀最終發展成一段長久的婚姻。

gept.example_en: Their courtship lasted three years before he finally proposed at the lighthouse.
gept.example_zh: 他們求愛三年後，他終於在燈塔向她求婚。

gept.example_en: The couple entered matrimony in a small ceremony with only close family present.
gept.example_zh: 那對伴侶在一場只有近親出席的小型儀式中步入婚姻。

gept.example_en: She felt an immediate affinity with the new neighbor who shared her love of jazz.
gept.example_zh: 她對同樣熱愛爵士樂的新鄰居立刻產生親近感。

gept.example_en: She tended to ruminate over small mistakes long after others had forgotten them.
gept.example_zh: 她常會在別人早已遺忘後，仍反覆思索那些小錯誤。

gept.example_en: It is easier to empathize with someone after experiencing similar hardship yourself.
gept.example_zh: 自己經歷過類似困境後，比較容易同理他人。

gept.example_en: He learned to introspect daily through journaling and quiet meditation.
gept.example_zh: 他透過寫日記和靜坐冥想學會每天內省。

gept.example_en: Experienced nurses can often intuit when a patient's condition is about to change.
gept.example_zh: 經驗豐富的護士通常能憑直覺感知到病人病情即將變化。

gept.example_en: The senator visited her constituency every other weekend to hear voter concerns.
gept.example_zh: 那位參議員每隔週末都會回選區傾聽選民的擔憂。

gept.example_en: The revolution promised to free the people from generations of tyranny.
gept.example_zh: 那場革命承諾將人民從世代的暴政中解放。

gept.example_en: The senator launched a filibuster to delay the vote on the controversial bill.
gept.example_zh: 那位參議員發動冗長辯論以拖延有爭議法案的表決。

gept.example_en: Universal suffrage was achieved only after long campaigns by determined activists.
gept.example_zh: 普及投票權是經過決心堅定的活動人士長期奔走才實現的。

gept.example_en: In Britain, a barrister typically represents clients in higher courts during trials.
gept.example_zh: 在英國，出庭律師通常在審判時於高等法院代表客戶。

gept.example_en: They consulted a local solicitor before signing the lengthy property agreement.
gept.example_zh: 在簽署冗長的不動產協議前，他們先諮詢了當地的事務律師。

gept.example_en: The bailiff escorted the witness to the stand and announced the judge's entrance.
gept.example_zh: 法警引領證人到證人席，並宣布法官進場。

gept.example_en: She took the witness-stand and answered every question with calm composure.
gept.example_zh: 她走上證人席，以鎮定的態度回答每個問題。

gept.example_en: The judge struck the gavel sharply to restore order in the noisy courtroom.
gept.example_zh: 法官重重敲下法槌，恢復吵雜法庭的秩序。

gept.example_en: The judge dismissed the statement as hearsay and instructed the jury to ignore it.
gept.example_zh: 法官將該陳述視為傳聞而駁回，並指示陪審團不予理會。

gept.example_en: He was charged with a misdemeanor that carried only a small fine.
gept.example_zh: 他被控告一項輕罪，只需繳交小額罰款。

gept.example_en: The governor granted clemency to the prisoner who had shown remarkable rehabilitation.
gept.example_zh: 州長對那位展現出非凡更生表現的囚犯施予寬大赦免。

gept.example_en: The paralegal prepared the contracts and briefed the attorney before each meeting.
gept.example_zh: 法務助理在每場會議前準備合約並向律師簡報。

gept.example_en: The magistrate handles minor offenses and preliminary hearings in this district.
gept.example_zh: 治安法官在此區處理輕微罪行和預備聽證。

gept.example_en: The appellate-court reviewed the trial transcript before issuing its ruling.
gept.example_zh: 上訴法院在作出裁決前審閱了審判紀錄。

gept.example_en: An international tribunal was established to investigate war crimes in the region.
gept.example_zh: 國際法庭成立以調查該地區的戰爭罪行。

gept.example_en: The priest performed the sacrament of baptism for the infant on Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 神父在週日為那名嬰兒舉行洗禮聖事。

gept.example_en: The Sunday liturgy has remained largely unchanged for several centuries.
gept.example_zh: 週日的禮拜儀式幾個世紀以來大致維持不變。

gept.example_en: The convent had operated continuously since the early seventeenth century.
gept.example_zh: 那座女修道院自十七世紀初便持續運作。

gept.example_en: The medieval abbey now serves as both a museum and a working monastery.
gept.example_zh: 那座中世紀修道院如今既是博物館，也是運作中的修院。

gept.example_en: Basic numeracy is essential for managing personal finances and household budgets.
gept.example_zh: 基本算術能力對管理個人財務和家庭預算來說不可或缺。

gept.example_en: The recall-test measured how many words students remembered after a brief delay.
gept.example_zh: 記憶測驗測量學生在短暫延遲後能記住多少單字。

gept.example_en: Nursing licensure requires both an accredited degree and a passing exam score.
gept.example_zh: 護理師執照的取得需要認可的學位和及格的考試成績。

gept.example_en: The medical externship gave her exposure to rural healthcare for the first time.
gept.example_zh: 那次醫療校外實習讓她首次接觸到鄉村醫療。

gept.example_en: The weekly colloquium featured visiting researchers from universities around the world.
gept.example_zh: 每週的研討會邀請來自世界各地大學的訪問研究員演講。

gept.example_en: Group facilitation skills are increasingly valued in modern collaborative workplaces.
gept.example_zh: 在現代協作型職場中，團體引導技巧愈來愈受到重視。

gept.example_en: The committee rarely achieved unanimity, but they always reached workable compromises.
gept.example_zh: 委員會很少達成一致同意，但總能找到可行的妥協方案。

gept.example_en: His resourcefulness solved the supply problem when conventional approaches failed.
gept.example_zh: 當傳統方法失敗時，他的機智解決了供應問題。

gept.example_en: Groupthink can lead even talented teams to overlook obvious risks.
gept.example_zh: 團體迷思可能讓即使是優秀的團隊也忽略明顯的風險。

gept.example_en: Many investors jumped on the bandwagon just before the market suddenly cooled.
gept.example_zh: 許多投資者在市場突然降溫前才趕上了這波從眾風潮。

gept.example_en: His professional demeanor impressed clients during the first consultation.
gept.example_zh: 首次諮詢時，他的專業舉止令客戶印象深刻。

gept.example_en: The young pianist showed remarkable poise during her first international competition.
gept.example_zh: 那位年輕的鋼琴家在首次國際比賽中展現出非凡的沉著。

gept.example_en: She found long walks meditative and used them to process workplace stress.
gept.example_zh: 她覺得長距離散步具有冥想效果，並用來消化職場壓力。

gept.example_en: The candidate's earnestness during the interview impressed the entire hiring panel.
gept.example_zh: 那位求職者面試時的認真，令整個招聘小組印象深刻。

gept.example_en: Her genuineness made strangers feel comfortable opening up almost immediately.
gept.example_zh: 她的真誠讓陌生人幾乎立刻就能放心敞開心扉。

gept.example_en: Her candor during performance reviews helped employees grow more rapidly.
gept.example_zh: 她在績效考核時的直率幫助員工成長得更快。

gept.example_en: The team appreciated her frankness about the challenging financial outlook.
gept.example_zh: 團隊感激她對艱困財務前景的坦率說明。

gept.example_en: His discreetness in handling personal matters earned widespread trust among colleagues.
gept.example_zh: 他在處理個人事務上的謹慎，贏得同事們普遍的信任。

gept.example_en: She handled the awkward conversation with finesse no one expected from a newcomer.
gept.example_zh: 她以新人罕見的巧妙處理了那場尷尬的對話。

gept.example_en: His shrewdness in reading markets made him a sought-after investment adviser.
gept.example_zh: 他解讀市場的精明使他成為炙手可熱的投資顧問。

gept.example_en: Honesty is a core tenet of the company's professional code of conduct.
gept.example_zh: 誠實是該公司專業行為守則的核心信條。

gept.example_en: Her personal creed centered on lifelong learning and steady kindness toward strangers.
gept.example_zh: 她個人的信條圍繞著終生學習與對陌生人始終如一的善意。

gept.example_en: Questioning the orthodoxy of established economic theory can be professionally risky.
gept.example_zh: 質疑既有經濟理論的正統可能對職業生涯帶來風險。

gept.example_en: He faced the difficult diagnosis with a quiet stoicism his family deeply admired.
gept.example_zh: 他以家人深感敬佩的沉穩堅忍面對艱難的診斷。

gept.example_en: The officiant guided the couple through their wedding vows with warmth and grace.
gept.example_zh: 主婚人以溫暖優雅的方式引導新人完成婚禮誓詞。

gept.example_en: Their matrimonial bond grew stronger after surviving many years of shared struggles.
gept.example_zh: 在共同經歷多年的奮鬥後，他們的婚姻紐帶變得更加堅固。

gept.example_en: His daughter delivered a moving eulogy that celebrated her late father's remarkable life.
gept.example_zh: 他的女兒發表了一篇動人的悼詞，緬懷她已故父親非凡的一生。

gept.example_en: The polished wooden casket was carried slowly into the church by six pallbearers.
gept.example_zh: 那具拋光的木製棺木由六位扶棺者緩緩抬進教堂。

gept.example_en: His four sons proudly served as pallbearers at the dignified graveside service yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 昨日他的四個兒子在莊嚴的墓邊儀式上自豪地擔任扶棺者。

gept.example_en: The interment will take place at the family cemetery this coming Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 安葬儀式將於本週日早晨在家族墓園舉行。

gept.example_en: The newborn slept peacefully in a wicker bassinet placed beside the parents' bed.
gept.example_zh: 新生兒安詳地睡在放置於父母床邊的藤編搖籃中。

gept.example_en: The nurse gently swaddled the newborn in a soft cotton blanket to calm him.
gept.example_zh: 護士輕柔地用柔軟的棉毯包裹新生兒以安撫他。

gept.example_en: During the teething phase, babies often drool excessively and chew on everything available.
gept.example_zh: 在長牙期，嬰兒經常會大量流口水並咬任何手邊的東西。

gept.example_en: Their newborn suffered from severe colic and cried for hours every single evening.
gept.example_zh: 他們的新生兒患有嚴重的腹絞痛，每晚都哭鬧好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: The town held a grand jubilee to mark its two-hundredth founding anniversary celebration.
gept.example_zh: 小鎮舉行盛大的週年慶典以紀念其建鎮兩百週年。

gept.example_en: The annual neighborhood jamboree featured live music, free food, and games for kids.
gept.example_zh: 年度社區歡慶聚會有現場音樂、免費食物以及給孩子們的遊戲。

gept.example_en: The underwriter carefully reviewed his medical history before approving the new policy application.
gept.example_zh: 承保人在核准新保單申請前仔細審查了他的病史。

gept.example_en: Each doctor visit requires a twenty-dollar copayment under our family health plan.
gept.example_zh: 根據我們的家庭健康計畫，每次看診需支付二十美元的共付額。

gept.example_en: An actuary calculates risk and helps insurance companies determine appropriate premium pricing structures.
gept.example_zh: 精算師計算風險並協助保險公司決定適當的保費定價結構。

gept.example_en: He left a generous bequest to the local children's hospital in his final will.
gept.example_zh: 他在最後的遺囑中留下一筆慷慨的遺贈給當地兒童醫院。

gept.example_en: The probate process can take many months before assets are finally distributed to heirs.
gept.example_zh: 遺囑認證程序可能需要數月時間才能將資產最終分配給繼承人。

gept.example_en: He died intestate, causing significant legal complications for his surviving family members.
gept.example_zh: 他未立遺囑就過世了，給在世的家庭成員帶來嚴重的法律問題。

gept.example_en: She added a codicil to her will to include her newborn grandson as beneficiary.
gept.example_zh: 她在遺囑中加上附錄，將剛出生的孫子列為受益人。

gept.example_en: The drywall installer finished hanging panels throughout the entire second floor by Friday.
gept.example_zh: 石膏板安裝工在週五前完成了整個二樓的板材安裝。

gept.example_en: He used silicone caulk to seal gaps around the bathtub and shower tiles.
gept.example_zh: 他使用矽利康密封劑來封住浴缸與淋浴磁磚周圍的縫隙。

gept.example_en: We decided to spay our female cat before she reached reproductive maturity.
gept.example_zh: 我們決定在母貓達到生育年齡前為牠絕育。

gept.example_en: They hired a French au pair to help care for their twins this summer.
gept.example_zh: 他們聘請了一位法國互惠生在今年夏天協助照顧他們的雙胞胎。

gept.example_en: Annual eye examinations help detect glaucoma early before significant vision loss occurs permanently.
gept.example_zh: 每年的眼科檢查有助於及早發現青光眼，避免發生永久性視力喪失。

gept.example_en: Many elderly patients undergo simple surgery to remove cataracts and restore their clear vision.
gept.example_zh: 許多年長病患接受簡單的手術以摘除白內障並恢復清晰的視力。

gept.example_en: His astigmatism causes blurry vision at all distances without his corrective prescription lenses.
gept.example_zh: 他的散光在沒戴矯正眼鏡時會導致各種距離的視線模糊。

gept.example_en: After the exhausting hike, she fell into a deep peaceful slumber within minutes.
gept.example_zh: 經過疲憊的徒步旅行後，她在幾分鐘內就進入了深沉安寧的睡眠。

gept.example_en: As a child, he was a frequent sleepwalker who roamed around the house nightly.
gept.example_zh: 他小時候經常夢遊，每晚都會在屋子裡四處走動。

gept.example_en: Most vivid and memorable dreams occur during the REM sleep stage of the cycle.
gept.example_zh: 最生動且令人印象深刻的夢通常發生在睡眠週期中的快速動眼睡眠階段。

gept.example_en: Detectives conducted a long stakeout outside the suspect's apartment for three consecutive nights.
gept.example_zh: 刑警在嫌犯公寓外連續三晚進行長時間的監視守候。

gept.example_en: Automated defibrillators are now installed in many public places including shopping malls everywhere.
gept.example_zh: 自動心臟去顫器現在已安裝在許多公共場所，包括各地的購物中心。

gept.example_en: A tourniquet should only be applied to stop severe bleeding when other methods fail.
gept.example_zh: 止血帶只應在其他方法無效時用於止住嚴重出血。

gept.example_en: In the old days, ladies kept smelling salts to revive themselves from sudden fainting.
gept.example_zh: 在過去，女士們會隨身帶著嗅鹽以便在突然昏厥時甦醒。

gept.example_en: They signed a detailed prenup before getting married to protect their individual assets.
gept.example_zh: 他們在結婚前簽署了詳細的婚前協議以保障各自的資產。

gept.example_en: The mother of the bride wore a beautiful corsage made of white roses.
gept.example_zh: 新娘的母親佩戴了一朵由白玫瑰製成的美麗胸花。

gept.example_en: Each groomsman wore a small white boutonniere matching the bridal bouquet's delicate flowers.
gept.example_zh: 每位伴郎都佩戴一朵與新娘花束相配的小白色襟花。

gept.example_en: The black hearse led the slow funeral procession toward the family cemetery plot.
gept.example_zh: 黑色靈車緩緩引領著送葬隊伍前往家族墓地。

gept.example_en: His epitaph reads, "Loving father, faithful friend, and devoted husband to his beloved wife."
gept.example_zh: 他的墓誌銘寫著：「慈愛的父親、忠誠的朋友，以及深愛妻子的丈夫。」

gept.example_en: The family gathered at the crematorium for a private and intimate farewell ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 家屬聚集在火葬場舉行私人且親密的告別儀式。

gept.example_en: She bought several comfortable nursing bras to wear during her breastfeeding postpartum months.
gept.example_zh: 她買了幾件舒適的哺乳內衣，在產後哺乳的幾個月內穿著。

gept.example_en: The fisheye photograph made the small skate park look surprisingly vast.
gept.example_zh: 魚眼照片讓那個小滑板場看起來意外地廣闊。

gept.example_en: The flashbulb fired brightly and momentarily startled the small sleeping kitten.
gept.example_zh: 閃光燈明亮地閃了一下，瞬間嚇到熟睡的小貓。

gept.example_en: Old family portraits in sepia give the photographs a nostalgic warm feeling.
gept.example_zh: 棕褐色調的舊家族肖像為照片帶來懷舊溫暖的感覺。

gept.example_en: He prefers reading the broadsheet for its in-depth international analysis each morning.
gept.example_zh: 他偏愛每早讀大報的深度國際分析。

gept.example_en: The muckraker uncovered a major corruption scandal at the city hall last year.
gept.example_zh: 那位揭弊記者去年揭發了市政府的重大貪污醜聞。

gept.example_en: The dateline at the top showed the story was filed from a remote village.
gept.example_zh: 頂部的電頭顯示這則報導是從一個偏遠村莊發稿的。

gept.example_en: Many netizens criticized the company's decision in a heated online discussion.
gept.example_zh: 許多網民在熱烈的網路討論中批評該公司的決定。

gept.example_en: Soft potato gnocchi served with butter and sage is a classic Italian comfort dish.
gept.example_zh: 軟綿綿的馬鈴薯麵疙瘩配奶油鼠尾草是經典的義式療癒菜餚。

gept.example_en: Hungarian goulash is a hearty stew flavored with paprika and slow-cooked beef.
gept.example_zh: 匈牙利燉牛肉是用紅椒粉和慢燉牛肉調味的豐盛燉菜。

gept.example_en: A bowl of warm borscht topped with sour cream is perfect on cold winter days.
gept.example_zh: 一碗溫熱羅宋湯加上酸奶油，最適合寒冬享用。

gept.example_en: A steaming bowl of beef pho is the perfect breakfast on a chilly Vietnamese morning.
gept.example_zh: 在寒冷的越南清晨，一碗熱騰騰的牛肉河粉是完美的早餐。

gept.example_en: Polish pierogi can be stuffed with potato, cheese, or sweet fruit fillings.
gept.example_zh: 波蘭餃子可以包入馬鈴薯、起司或甜果內餡。

gept.example_en: Warm apple strudel dusted with sugar is a traditional Viennese dessert.
gept.example_zh: 撒上糖粉的溫熱蘋果果餡卷是傳統的維也納甜點。

gept.example_en: The steeplechase combines running, hurdles, and water jumps over three thousand meters.
gept.example_zh: 障礙賽在三千公尺距離內結合跑步、跨欄和跨越水池。

gept.example_en: The heptathlon tests an athlete in seven different events over two intense days.
gept.example_zh: 七項全能在兩天激烈賽程中考驗運動員七種不同項目。

gept.example_en: Winning the decathlon is considered the ultimate test of all-around athletic ability.
gept.example_zh: 贏得十項全能被視為全方位運動能力的終極考驗。

gept.example_en: The luge athlete reaches incredible speeds while lying flat on her small sled.
gept.example_zh: 無舵雪橇選手平躺在她的小雪橇上達到驚人速度。

gept.example_en: The bobsled team pushed hard at the start before jumping inside their sleek vehicle.
gept.example_zh: 雪車隊伍在起點奮力推動後跳進他們流線型的車內。

gept.example_en: The biathlon combines cross-country skiing with extremely precise target rifle shooting.
gept.example_zh: 冬季兩項結合越野滑雪與極為精準的步槍射擊。

gept.example_en: The horse performed elegant dressage movements that earned the rider top marks.
gept.example_zh: 那匹馬完成優雅的盛裝舞步動作，為騎士贏得最高分。

gept.example_en: The mournful sound of the bagpipe echoed across the misty Scottish hillside.
gept.example_zh: 風笛哀傷的聲音迴盪在霧氣繚繞的蘇格蘭山坡上。

gept.example_en: The Indian sitar player plucked the strings to create a deeply meditative atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 那位印度西塔琴手撥動琴弦，營造深沉靜謐的氛圍。

gept.example_en: The wooden bars of the marimba produce a warmer tone than a metal vibraphone.
gept.example_zh: 馬林巴琴的木製琴條比金屬鐵琴發出更溫暖的音色。

gept.example_en: The bassoon adds a deep voice to the woodwind section of the orchestra.
gept.example_zh: 巴松管為管弦樂團的木管組增添深沉的聲音。

gept.example_en: The weaver sat at her old wooden spinning-wheel for hours every single afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 織工每天下午都在她那台舊木紡車前坐上好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: Watching glassblowing is fascinating as the artist shapes glowing molten glass quickly.
gept.example_zh: 觀看玻璃吹製令人著迷，藝術家迅速塑形熾熱的熔融玻璃。

gept.example_en: The elegant red cheongsam suited her perfectly at the traditional wedding banquet.
gept.example_zh: 那件優雅的紅色旗袍在傳統婚宴上非常適合她。

gept.example_en: The waiter wore a traditional red fez at the historic Turkish restaurant downtown.
gept.example_zh: 在市中心的歷史悠久土耳其餐廳裡，服務生戴著傳統的紅色土耳其帽。

gept.example_en: Modern astrophysics tries to explain how galaxies first formed in the early universe.
gept.example_zh: 現代天體物理學試圖解釋星系如何在早期宇宙中首次形成。

gept.example_en: Epidemiology investigates how diseases spread through populations and how to stop them.
gept.example_zh: 流行病學研究疾病如何在人群中傳播以及如何阻止它們。

gept.example_en: Demography helps the government predict how many new schools the city will need.
gept.example_zh: 人口統計學幫助政府預測該市需要多少新學校。

gept.example_en: The etymology of this word can be traced back to ancient Greek roots.
gept.example_zh: 這個字的詞源可追溯到古希臘字根。

gept.example_en: Musicology examines how musical styles have evolved across different cultures and centuries.
gept.example_zh: 音樂學研究音樂風格如何在不同文化和世紀中演變。

gept.example_en: Ancient Greek philosophers used dialectic discussion to sharpen ideas through structured debate.
gept.example_zh: 古希臘哲學家透過有結構的辯論用辯證法磨利思想。

gept.example_en: Ontology asks fundamental questions about what truly exists in the world.
gept.example_zh: 本體論提出關於世界中真正存在什麼的根本問題。

gept.example_en: Phenomenology examines how people actually experience the world from their own perspective.
gept.example_zh: 現象學研究人們如何從自己的觀點實際體驗世界。

gept.example_en: The Nobel laureate delivered an inspiring lecture about her decades of patient research.
gept.example_zh: 那位諾貝爾桂冠得主就她數十年耐心研究發表了鼓舞人心的演講。

gept.example_en: The consecration of the new chapel will take place this Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 新教堂的祝聖典禮將於本週日下午舉行。

gept.example_en: The colorful beadwork on her handbag took the artist over forty patient hours.
gept.example_zh: 她手提包上的彩色串珠工藝花了藝術家四十多個耐心的小時。

gept.example_en: A handmade dreamcatcher hung above the bed to protect the child from nightmares.
gept.example_zh: 床上方掛著一個手工捕夢網以保護孩子免於惡夢。

gept.example_en: He wrapped a traditional keffiyeh around his head to protect himself from the desert sun.
gept.example_zh: 他在頭上裹著傳統的阿拉伯頭巾以抵擋沙漠陽光。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 密文（加密後的文字）
gept.example_en: The ciphertext looked like random noise until we applied the correct key.
gept.example_zh: 在套用正確金鑰之前，那段密文看起來就像隨機雜訊。

gept.example_en: She became the youngest byliner ever on the magazine's front page.
gept.example_zh: 她成為這本雜誌封面有史以來最年輕的署名作者。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 墊片；相容層程式碼
gept.example_en: We added a small shim so the new library could work on old browsers.
gept.example_zh: 我們加了一小段相容層程式碼，讓新函式庫能在舊瀏覽器上運作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 相容性補丁（補上瀏覽器缺的功能）
gept.example_en: The polyfill provides modern array methods for users on older browsers.
gept.example_zh: 這個相容性補丁讓使用舊瀏覽器的用戶也能用上新的陣列方法。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 轉譯（一種程式語言轉成另一種）
gept.example_en: We transpile TypeScript into JavaScript before deploying to production.
gept.example_zh: 我們會先把 TypeScript 轉譯成 JavaScript，再部署到正式環境。

gept.example_en: Dopamine is a neurotransmitter linked to motivation and reward.
gept.example_zh: 多巴胺是一種與動機和獎勵有關的神經傳導物質。

gept.example_en: Damage to the vasculature can lead to serious circulation problems.
gept.example_zh: 血管系統受損可能造成嚴重的循環問題。

gept.example_en: The narrow isthmus connects the peninsula to the mainland.
gept.example_zh: 這條狹窄的地峽將半島與大陸相連。

gept.example_en: Modern pedagogy encourages students to ask questions and think critically.
gept.example_zh: 現代教育學鼓勵學生提問並批判性思考。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 助記符號；幫助記憶的
gept.example_en: She used a clever mnemonic to remember all the planets in order.
gept.example_zh: 她運用巧妙的助記法依序記住所有行星。

gept.example_en: Sailors stayed in the harbor because a strong gale was forecast.
gept.example_zh: 由於預報強風來襲，水手們留在港內。

gept.example_en: A small meteorite landed in the field without injuring anyone.
gept.example_zh: 一顆小隕石落在田野中，沒有造成任何人受傷。

gept.example_en: Hundreds of puffin nests dot the rocky cliffs each summer.
gept.example_zh: 每年夏天數百個海鸚巢散布在岩石懸崖上。

gept.example_en: A bright blue kingfisher dove into the stream to catch a fish.
gept.example_zh: 一隻亮藍色的翠鳥俯衝進溪流捕捉小魚。

gept.example_en: The loud song of the cicada filled the warm summer afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 蟬鳴洪亮的歌聲充滿了溫暖的夏日午後。
