gept.example_en: A porcupine raises its sharp quills when it feels threatened.
gept.example_zh: 豪豬在感到威脅時會豎起尖銳的刺。

gept.example_en: A deque supports fast push and pop from both ends, which suits sliding window problems.
gept.example_zh: 雙端佇列在兩端都能快速推入與彈出，很適合滑動視窗問題。

gept.example_en: We built a trie of product names to power fast autocomplete on the search bar.
gept.example_zh: 我們用商品名稱建了一棵字典樹，為搜尋列提供快速自動完成。

gept.example_en: The burndown chart flattened mid-sprint, hinting that we underestimated the integration work.
gept.example_zh: 燃盡圖在衝刺中段變平，暗示我們低估了整合工作。

gept.example_en: Stories with the same estimation-point should feel similar in complexity, not just in duration.
gept.example_zh: 估算點數相同的故事，應在複雜度上感覺相近，而不只是耗時相近。

gept.example_en: The definition-of-done includes tests, documentation, and a clean deploy to the staging cluster.
gept.example_zh: 完成定義包含測試、文件，以及在預備叢集乾淨部署。

gept.example_en: Sketch the user-flow on a whiteboard before writing code, even for tiny new features.
gept.example_zh: 在動手寫程式前，先在白板上畫好使用者流程，再小的新功能也不例外。

gept.example_en: A black-and-white wireframe is enough to align the team on layout before adding visual polish.
gept.example_zh: 黑白線框圖就足以讓團隊在加入視覺修飾前先對齊版面。

gept.example_en: The accessibility-audit found low color contrast on the checkout button and missing aria labels.
gept.example_zh: 無障礙稽核發現結帳按鈕對比過低，且缺少 ARIA 標籤。

gept.example_en: Internationalization separates user-facing strings from code so translators can work in parallel.
gept.example_zh: 國際化把面向使用者的字串從程式中抽離，譯者就能平行作業。

gept.example_en: We added rtl-layout support so the app reads naturally in arabic and hebrew without surprise.
gept.example_zh: 我們加入右到左版面支援，讓 app 在阿拉伯文和希伯來文中閱讀自然無意外。

gept.example_en: The feature-spec lists the goals, edge cases, and metrics we will track after launching.
gept.example_zh: 功能規格列出目標、邊界情況，以及上線後要追蹤的指標。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 提案文件（徵求意見稿）
gept.example_en: Anyone can publish an rfc proposing a major change, and the team comments before approving.
gept.example_zh: 任何人都能發佈 RFC 提出重大變更，團隊會在核可前評論。

gept.example_en: Ignoring tech-debt feels efficient short term but slows every future feature down significantly.
gept.example_zh: 忽視技術債短期看似有效率，長期卻會大幅拖慢每個後續功能。

gept.example_en: Yagni reminds engineers to avoid building speculative features without clear, current demand.
gept.example_zh: YAGNI 提醒工程師不要在沒有明確當下需求時，建造臆測性的功能。

gept.example_en: The dry-principle pushes us to extract shared logic instead of copying code across modules.
gept.example_zh: DRY 原則推著我們抽出共用邏輯，而不是在各模組間複製貼上程式。

gept.example_en: The kiss-principle reminds us that boring, simple code usually outlives the cleverest tricks.
gept.example_zh: KISS 原則提醒我們，無聊而簡單的程式碼通常比最巧妙的技巧活得久。

gept.example_en: Break each refactoring-step into a tiny commit so reviewers can follow the reasoning easily.
gept.example_zh: 把每個重構步驟拆成一個小提交，審查者就能輕鬆跟上推理過程。

gept.example_en: Wrap the legacy-code with thorough tests before touching it, otherwise tiny edits become risky.
gept.example_zh: 在動遺留程式前先用完整測試把它包起來，否則小改動就會變得危險。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 全新專案（無歷史包袱）
gept.example_en: Starting a greenfield project felt liberating, but the team also had to make every decision.
gept.example_zh: 啟動全新專案令人振奮，但團隊也必須做每一個決定。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 既有專案（含歷史包袱）
gept.example_en: Brownfield migrations are harder because real users depend on the system every single day.
gept.example_zh: 既有專案的遷移更難，因為真實使用者每天都在依賴這個系統。

gept.example_en: Tdd encourages writing the failing test first, watching it fail, and then fixing the code.
gept.example_zh: TDD 鼓勵先寫失敗測試，看它失敗，再修補程式碼。

gept.example_en: Bdd uses plain language scenarios so business stakeholders can read the tests themselves.
gept.example_zh: BDD 用自然語言描述情境，讓業務利害關係人也能直接讀懂測試。

gept.example_en: A feature-file groups related scenarios and serves as living documentation for the whole module.
gept.example_zh: 功能描述檔聚合相關情境，並作為整個模組的活文件。

gept.example_en: Stick to the given-when-then style so every reader can parse the test at a single glance.
gept.example_zh: 堅持使用 given-when-then 風格，讓每位讀者都能一眼讀懂測試。

gept.example_en: Customer success uses the release-notes to prepare support agents before every product launch.
gept.example_zh: 客戶成功團隊用發佈說明在每次產品上線前準備好客服人員。

gept.example_en: Keep the changelog updated with every notable change so future archaeologists understand history.
gept.example_zh: 把每個值得記錄的變更寫進更新紀錄，讓未來的考古者讀懂歷史。

gept.example_en: Following semver tells consumers that a major bump may break their existing integrations badly.
gept.example_zh: 遵循語意化版本能告訴使用者主版號跳升可能會嚴重破壞他們的整合。

gept.example_en: Good monorepo-tooling caches build outputs aggressively and shares them across the whole team.
gept.example_zh: 好的單一倉庫工具鏈會積極快取建置產物，並在全團隊間共享。

gept.example_en: Announce the deprecation a full quarter ahead so customers have time to migrate to the new api.
gept.example_zh: 提前一整季宣佈棄用，讓顧客有時間遷移到新 API。

gept.example_en: A breaking-change must include a migration guide and a deprecation period before final removal.
gept.example_zh: 破壞性變更必須附上遷移指南，並在最終移除前留有棄用期。

gept.example_en: Add a shim-layer between the old api and the new one so customers can migrate at their own pace.
gept.example_zh: 在新舊 API 之間加上墊片層，讓顧客能依自己的節奏遷移。

gept.example_en: Rate-limiting protects shared services from one noisy client that suddenly behaves abusively.
gept.example_zh: 流量限制能保護共享服務不被某個突然濫用的雜訊客戶端拖垮。

gept.example_en: Apply a throttling-rule per api key so abusive users do not degrade service for everyone else.
gept.example_zh: 對每個 API 金鑰套用節流規則，讓濫用者無法拖累其他人的服務品質。

gept.example_en: A live telemetry-stream lets engineers watch a release roll out and react within seconds.
gept.example_zh: 即時遙測資料流讓工程師能觀察發佈過程，並在幾秒內反應。

gept.example_en: The deploy-key has read-only access to the repository so it can fetch code at deployment time.
gept.example_zh: 部署金鑰只有對倉庫的唯讀權限，能在部署時拉取程式碼。

gept.example_en: Each backend uses its own service-account so audit logs can trace actions back to a single team.
gept.example_zh: 每個後端用自己的服務帳號，審計日誌就能把行為追回到單一團隊。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 透過範本產生的專案
gept.example_en: Every scaffolded-project ships with linting, tests, and ci preconfigured for the team standards.
gept.example_zh: 每個透過範本產生的專案，都已預設好符合團隊標準的檢查、測試與 CI。

gept.example_en: The shared build-cache reuses results across machines, dropping pipeline times from twenty to four minutes.
gept.example_zh: 共享建置快取在多台機器間重用結果，把管線時間從二十分鐘降到四分鐘。

gept.example_en: An incremental-build skips modules that never changed, making local development much faster.
gept.example_zh: 增量建置跳過沒有改動的模組，讓本機開發快上許多。

gept.example_en: Hotmodule reloading swaps updated code into the running app without losing your scroll position.
gept.example_zh: 熱模組替換把更新後的程式換進正在執行的 app，捲動位置都不會丟失。

gept.example_en: A source-map lets the browser show your original code in the debugger instead of minified output.
gept.example_zh: 原始碼對應檔讓瀏覽器在除錯器中顯示原始程式，而不是壓縮後的輸出。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 程式壓縮（去空白／改名）
gept.example_en: Minification renames variables and strips whitespace to shrink the file before sending to users.
gept.example_zh: 壓縮會重新命名變數並去除空白，縮小檔案後再送給使用者。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 轉譯器（將高階語法降級）
gept.example_en: The transpiler converts modern javascript features into syntax older browsers still understand.
gept.example_zh: 轉譯器把新版 JavaScript 特性轉成舊瀏覽器也看得懂的語法。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 已補強相容性的
gept.example_en: A polyfilled bundle adds missing methods so the same code works on browsers from many eras.
gept.example_zh: 已補強相容性的包檔補上缺少的方法，讓同一段程式能跑在不同時代的瀏覽器。

gept.example_en: A service-worker caches assets so the app keeps working even when the device loses connectivity.
gept.example_zh: 服務工作者會快取資源，即使裝置失去連線，app 也能繼續運作。

gept.example_en: A progressive-web app feels almost native and installs to the home screen with a single tap.
gept.example_zh: 漸進式網頁應用感覺近乎原生，輕輕一點就能安裝到主畫面。

gept.example_en: The mobile shell embeds a webview so most screens can be updated without releasing a new build.
gept.example_zh: 行動殼層內嵌網頁元件，多數畫面不用發新版就能更新。

gept.example_en: When performance matters, drop into a native-module written in a lower-level language directly.
gept.example_zh: 當效能重要時，直接改用以較低階語言撰寫的原生模組。

gept.example_en: An ffi binding lets python call functions written in rust without rewriting them from scratch.
gept.example_zh: FFI 綁定讓 Python 直接呼叫 Rust 寫的函式，不必從頭重寫。

gept.example_en: Engineers favor an rpc framework when they want strongly typed contracts between services.
gept.example_zh: 當工程師想在服務間使用強型別契約時，會偏好 RPC 框架。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) gRPC 高效能 RPC 框架
gept.example_en: Grpc uses http2 and protobuf so requests stay compact and connections multiplex very efficiently.
gept.example_zh: gRPC 使用 HTTP2 與 Protobuf，請求精簡、連線多工也非常高效。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Protocol Buffers 序列化格式
gept.example_en: Updating the protobuf definition forces every consumer to regenerate types before the deploy.
gept.example_zh: 更新 protobuf 定義會強制每個消費者在部署前重新產生型別。

gept.example_en: Publish the openapi document so partners can generate client sdks in their preferred language.
gept.example_zh: 發佈 OpenAPI 文件，合作夥伴就能用偏好語言產生客戶端 SDK。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Swagger API 文件工具
gept.example_en: The swagger ui makes it easy to try every endpoint right from the documentation page itself.
gept.example_zh: Swagger UI 讓人能直接在文件頁面試用每個端點。

gept.example_en: Our sdk wraps the rest api with retries, logging, and helpful error messages out of the box.
gept.example_zh: 我們的 SDK 為 REST API 內建重試、紀錄與友善錯誤訊息。

gept.example_en: Rotate the api-key regularly and never paste it into a public repository by mistake.
gept.example_zh: 定期輪替 API 金鑰，也絕對不要不小心貼到公開倉庫裡。

gept.example_en: The parser will tokenize the input string before applying any of the higher-level grammar rules.
gept.example_zh: 解析器會先把輸入字串切成權杖，再套用更高階的文法規則。

gept.example_en: The lexer reads characters and emits tokens that the parser then arranges into a syntax tree.
gept.example_zh: 詞法分析器讀入字元並產出權杖，解析器再把它們組成語法樹。

gept.example_en: Many lint rules walk the ast looking for patterns like missing returns or unused parameters.
gept.example_zh: 許多 lint 規則會走訪抽象語法樹，找出像缺漏 return 或未使用參數的樣式。

gept.example_en: Keep each statement-line short so the diff stays readable and bugs become easy to localize.
gept.example_zh: 讓每個陳述句行保持簡短，差異才會好讀，問題也更容易定位。

gept.example_en: Use parentheses generously so operator-precedence rules never surprise a future reader.
gept.example_zh: 大方使用括號，運算子優先順序就不會在未來嚇到讀者。

gept.example_en: We refactored the deeply nested callback-hell into a flat chain of clean async functions.
gept.example_zh: 我們把巢狀過深的回呼地獄重構成一串扁平、乾淨的非同步函式。

gept.example_en: Self-attention allows each token to weigh its relationship with every other token in the input sequence.
gept.example_zh: 自注意力讓每個詞元能衡量自身與輸入序列中所有其他詞元的關聯。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 多頭的（注意力機制）
gept.example_en: Multi-head attention runs several attention operations in parallel to capture different linguistic patterns simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 多頭注意力並行執行多個注意力運算以同時捕捉不同的語言模式。

gept.example_en: Word embeddings map semantically similar terms to nearby points in a high-dimensional vector space.
gept.example_zh: 詞嵌入向量將語義相似的詞語映射到高維向量空間中相近的點。

gept.example_en: High dimensionality can lead to the curse of dimensionality, making nearest-neighbor methods less effective.
gept.example_zh: 高維度性會導致維度詛咒，使最近鄰方法效用降低。

gept.example_en: Without nonlinearity between layers, stacking neurons would collapse into a single linear transformation.
gept.example_zh: 若層間缺乏非線性，堆疊神經元會塌陷成單一線性變換。

gept.example_en: The single perceptron was the earliest neural model but could not solve nonlinearly separable problems.
gept.example_zh: 單一感知器是最早的神經模型，但無法解決非線性可分問題。

gept.example_en: In a feedforward network, information flows in one direction from input through hidden layers to output.
gept.example_zh: 在前饋網路中，資訊從輸入經隱藏層單向流向輸出。

gept.example_en: Convolutional networks excel at image recognition by sliding learnable filters over spatial pixel grids.
gept.example_zh: 卷積網路透過在空間像素網格上滑動可學習濾波器，在影像辨識上表現優異。

gept.example_en: The convolution operation aggregates local features by multiplying a kernel with overlapping pixel patches.
gept.example_zh: 卷積運算透過將核函數與重疊像素區塊相乘來聚合局部特徵。

gept.example_en: Backpropagation computes gradients of the loss with respect to each parameter using the chain rule.
gept.example_zh: 反向傳播利用鏈式法則計算損失對每個參數的梯度。

gept.example_en: Tuning the learning-rate carefully prevents both painfully slow convergence and unstable oscillating updates.
gept.example_zh: 謹慎調整學習率可避免收斂過慢與更新震盪不穩。

gept.example_en: Mini-batch gradient descent balances the stability of full-batch and the speed of single-sample updates.
gept.example_zh: 小批次梯度下降在全批次的穩定性與單一樣本更新的速度之間取得平衡。

gept.example_en: Regularization techniques penalize complex weights to prevent the model from memorizing the training set.
gept.example_zh: 正則化技術懲罰複雜的權重，防止模型死記訓練集。

gept.example_en: Engineers reserved a holdout sample to evaluate the final model without any contamination from training.
gept.example_zh: 工程師保留一份保留樣本以評估最終模型，避免任何來自訓練的污染。

gept.example_en: Five-fold cross-validation rotates the validation set across partitions for more reliable performance estimates.
gept.example_zh: 五折交叉驗證輪換各分區作為驗證集，以獲得更可靠的效能估計。

gept.example_en: Each hyperparameter such as depth or width must be selected before training rather than learned.
gept.example_zh: 深度或寬度等每個超參數必須在訓練前選定，而非透過學習得出。

gept.example_en: Higher throughput-token metrics indicate the system can serve more requests per second under load.
gept.example_zh: 更高的詞元吞吐量指標代表系統在負載下每秒可服務更多請求。

gept.example_en: Fine-tuning adapts a pretrained foundation model to your specific domain with a small labeled dataset.
gept.example_zh: 微調以小型標註資料集將預訓練的基礎模型適配到你的特定領域。

gept.example_en: Starting from a pretrained checkpoint typically converges faster than training from random initialization.
gept.example_zh: 從預訓練檢查點開始通常比從隨機初始化訓練收斂更快。

gept.example_en: Large-scale pretraining on web text gives language models broad world knowledge before downstream tasks.
gept.example_zh: 在網路文字上的大規模預訓練讓語言模型在下游任務前獲得廣泛的世界知識。

gept.example_en: Transfer-learning reuses features learned on one task to accelerate training on a related but distinct task.
gept.example_zh: 遷移學習重用在某任務上學到的特徵，以加速相關但不同任務的訓練。

gept.example_en: A zero-shot classifier handles new categories purely through natural language descriptions without labeled examples.
gept.example_zh: 零樣本分類器僅透過自然語言描述處理新類別，無需任何標註樣本。

gept.example_en: Few-shot prompting provides a handful of examples in context so the model can mimic the pattern.
gept.example_zh: 少樣本提示在上下文中提供少量範例，使模型能模仿該模式。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 上下文中的；情境中的
gept.example_en: In-context learning lets the model adapt behavior based on examples placed inside the prompt itself.
gept.example_zh: 上下文學習讓模型根據放在提示中的範例調整行為。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 提示工程；提示輸入
gept.example_en: Careful prompting can dramatically change output quality even when the underlying model remains unchanged.
gept.example_zh: 即使底層模型不變，謹慎的提示工程也能大幅改變輸出品質。

gept.example_en: Chain-of-thought prompting asks the model to write intermediate reasoning steps before producing a final answer.
gept.example_zh: 思維鏈提示要求模型在給出最終答案前寫出中間推理步驟。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 具代理能力的；自主行動的
gept.example_en: Agentic workflows let language models call tools, browse pages, and take multi-step actions autonomously.
gept.example_zh: 代理式工作流程讓語言模型自主呼叫工具、瀏覽頁面並執行多步驟動作。

gept.example_en: Tool-use capabilities allow the model to invoke calculators, search APIs, or run code when needed.
gept.example_zh: 工具使用能力允許模型在需要時呼叫計算機、搜尋 API 或執行程式碼。

gept.example_en: Function-calling returns structured JSON that downstream code can parse without fragile string matching.
gept.example_zh: 函式呼叫回傳結構化 JSON，下游程式可解析而不需脆弱的字串比對。

gept.example_en: Effective chunking splits long documents into semantically coherent pieces that fit within embedding limits.
gept.example_zh: 有效的分塊將長文件切成語義連貫且符合嵌入長度限制的片段。

gept.example_en: A reranker re-scores the top candidate passages to push the most relevant content closer to the top.
gept.example_zh: 重新排序器重新評分頂端候選段落，將最相關內容推向更前列。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 近似最近鄰搜尋 ANN
gept.example_en: Approximate nearest neighbor algorithms trade tiny accuracy losses for huge speedups in vector retrieval.
gept.example_zh: 近似最近鄰演算法以微小的準確度損失換取向量檢索的巨大加速。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) K 最近鄰演算法 KNN
gept.example_en: The knn classifier predicts a label by majority vote among the k closest training points.
gept.example_zh: KNN 分類器以最近 k 個訓練點的多數票來預測標籤。

gept.example_en: Each centroid moves toward the mean of its assigned points until cluster assignments stabilize.
gept.example_zh: 每個質心移向其指派點的平均值，直到分群指派穩定。

gept.example_en: Kmeans partitions the dataset into k clusters by iteratively updating centroids and reassigning samples.
gept.example_zh: K 均值演算法透過反覆更新質心並重新指派樣本，將資料集分成 k 群。

gept.example_en: Dbscan finds clusters of arbitrary shape and labels sparse outliers as noise rather than members.
gept.example_zh: DBSCAN 能找出任意形狀的群集，並將稀疏離群值標為雜訊而非成員。

gept.example_en: Median imputation replaces missing numerical entries with the column median to avoid dropping useful rows.
gept.example_zh: 中位數填補以欄位中位數取代缺失數值，避免捨棄有用資料列。

gept.example_en: Standardization centers each feature to zero mean and unit variance before training distance-based models.
gept.example_zh: 標準化在訓練基於距離的模型前，將每個特徵置中為零均值與單位變異數。

gept.example_en: Each annotator labeled five thousand sentences and we measured inter-annotator agreement using kappa scores.
gept.example_zh: 每位標註者標註五千個句子，我們以 kappa 分數衡量標註者間一致性。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 真實標籤；基準真值
gept.example_en: We compared predictions against groundtruth labels collected by domain experts over several painstaking months.
gept.example_zh: 我們將預測與領域專家在數個月細心收集的真實標籤進行比對。

gept.example_en: Softmax converts raw logits into a probability distribution where each class score sums to one.
gept.example_zh: Softmax 將原始 logits 轉換為各類別分數加總為一的機率分佈。

gept.example_en: Each logit represents the unnormalized score the model assigns to one specific output class.
gept.example_zh: 每個 logit 代表模型指派給某特定輸出類別的未正規化分數。

gept.example_en: The sigmoid function squashes any real number into the unit interval between zero and one.
gept.example_zh: Sigmoid 函數將任意實數壓縮至零到一之間的單位區間。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 修正線性單元 ReLU
gept.example_en: Relu zeroes out negative inputs and passes positive values through unchanged for fast efficient training.
gept.example_zh: ReLU 將負輸入歸零並讓正值原樣通過，達成快速高效的訓練。

gept.example_en: Lower perplexity on held-out text means the language model finds the corpus less surprising overall.
gept.example_zh: 在保留文字上較低的困惑度意味著語言模型整體上對該語料較不感意外。

gept.example_en: High precision-metric means most of the positive predictions returned by the model are actually correct.
gept.example_zh: 高精確率意味著模型回傳的多數正向預測實際上是正確的。

gept.example_en: The f1 score harmonically combines precision and recall into a single balanced classification metric.
gept.example_zh: F1 分數以調和方式結合精確率與召回率為單一平衡的分類指標。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) ROC 曲線下面積 AUC
gept.example_en: An auc near one indicates the classifier ranks positive cases consistently above negative ones.
gept.example_zh: 接近一的 AUC 表示分類器持續將正例排在負例之上。

gept.example_en: The roc plot traces true positive rate against false positive rate across all decision thresholds.
gept.example_zh: ROC 圖在所有決策閾值上繪製真正例率對假正例率的關係。

gept.example_en: Each false-positive in the spam filter sends a legitimate email straight to the junk folder unfairly.
gept.example_zh: 垃圾郵件過濾器中每個偽陽性都不公平地把正當郵件直接送進垃圾匣。

gept.example_en: Medical screening tools prioritize reducing false-negative rates because missing diagnoses can endanger patient lives.
gept.example_zh: 醫療篩檢工具優先降低偽陰性率，因為遺漏診斷可能危及病人生命。

gept.example_en: We oversample the minority class with synthetic examples so the model pays attention to it adequately.
gept.example_zh: 我們以合成樣本對少數類別過採樣，讓模型對它給予充分注意。

gept.example_en: Engineers undersample the dominant class to create a balanced subset for faster experimental iterations.
gept.example_zh: 工程師對主導類別進行欠採樣，建立平衡的子集以加速實驗迭代。

gept.example_en: Boosting sequentially trains weak learners so each new one focuses on examples its predecessors got wrong.
gept.example_zh: 提升法依序訓練弱學習器，每個新學習器專注於前者答錯的樣本。

gept.example_en: Bagging trains many models on bootstrap samples and averages their predictions to reduce overall variance.
gept.example_zh: Bagging 在自助樣本上訓練多個模型並平均預測，以降低整體變異數。

gept.example_en: Xgboost remains a go-to choice for tabular competitions due to its speed and regularization features.
gept.example_zh: XGBoost 因其速度與正則化特性，仍是表格類競賽的首選工具。

gept.example_en: Gradient-boosting fits each new tree to the negative gradient of the loss with respect to predictions.
gept.example_zh: 梯度提升讓每棵新樹擬合損失對預測的負梯度。

gept.example_en: Naive-bayes assumes feature independence and remains surprisingly effective for simple text classification baselines.
gept.example_zh: 樸素貝氏假設特徵獨立，在簡單文字分類基線上意外有效。

gept.example_en: The svm finds a maximum-margin hyperplane that separates classes with the widest possible buffer zone.
gept.example_zh: SVM 尋找最大邊界的超平面，以盡可能寬的緩衝區分隔類別。

gept.example_en: The separating hyperplane lives in a high-dimensional feature space invisible to direct human visualization.
gept.example_zh: 分隔超平面存在於高維特徵空間中，無法被人類直接視覺化。

gept.example_en: Real-world data often lies on a low-dimensional manifold embedded inside the much larger ambient space.
gept.example_zh: 現實世界資料常位於嵌入於更大環境空間中的低維流形上。

gept.example_en: An autoencoder learns useful representations by training to reproduce inputs through a narrow bottleneck.
gept.example_zh: 自動編碼器透過經由窄瓶頸重現輸入來學習有用的表示。

gept.example_en: A discriminative classifier directly models the boundary between classes without modeling input distribution explicitly.
gept.example_zh: 判別式分類器直接建模類別間邊界，不顯式建模輸入分佈。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 生成對抗網路 GAN
gept.example_en: The gan pits a generator against a discriminator until the generated images become nearly indistinguishable.
gept.example_zh: GAN 讓生成器與判別器對抗，直到生成影像幾乎無法分辨。

gept.example_en: Each denoising step removes a small amount of noise predicted by the underlying neural network.
gept.example_zh: 每個去雜訊步驟移除由底層神經網路預測出的少量雜訊。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 變分自動編碼器 VAE
gept.example_en: A vae encodes inputs as probability distributions in latent space rather than deterministic single points.
gept.example_zh: VAE 將輸入編碼為潛在空間中的機率分佈，而非確定性的單點。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 人類反饋強化學習 RLHF
gept.example_en: Rlhf aligns large language models with human preferences using ranked comparisons of candidate model responses.
gept.example_zh: RLHF 利用候選模型回應的排序比較，使大型語言模型與人類偏好對齊。

gept.example_en: Guardrail filters block harmful outputs before they reach end users in customer-facing chat products.
gept.example_zh: 護欄過濾器在面向客戶的聊天產品中於有害輸出觸及終端使用者前將其攔截。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/動詞) 越獄；繞過安全機制
gept.example_en: A clever jailbreak prompt can sometimes bypass safety filters and elicit forbidden responses from models.
gept.example_zh: 一個巧妙的越獄提示有時可繞過安全過濾器並誘使模型給出禁止回應。

gept.example_en: The redteam tries adversarial prompts and unusual edge cases to surface weaknesses before public release.
gept.example_zh: 紅隊嘗試對抗性提示與不尋常邊界案例，以在公開發布前揭露弱點。

gept.example_en: A tiny pixel perturbation invisible to humans can flip a classifier from confident dog to confident cat.
gept.example_zh: 人眼不可見的微小像素擾動可使分類器從自信判定為狗翻轉為自信判定為貓。

gept.example_en: Regulators increasingly demand explainability so users can understand why an automated decision was made.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構越來越要求可解釋性，讓使用者能理解自動化決策的緣由。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 可解釋性；可理解性
gept.example_en: Interpretability tools highlight which input features influenced a prediction the most.
gept.example_zh: 可解釋性工具凸顯哪些輸入特徵對某預測影響最大。

gept.example_en: Shap values fairly distribute each prediction across input features using cooperative game theory principles.
gept.example_zh: SHAP 值運用合作博弈論原理，公平地將每個預測分配給輸入特徵。

gept.example_en: A saliency map highlights image regions the network found most influential for its final classification.
gept.example_zh: 顯著性圖凸顯網路認為對最終分類影響最大的影像區域。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) ELT 資料抽取載入轉換
gept.example_en: Modern elt approaches load raw data first and rely on the warehouse to perform downstream transformations.
gept.example_zh: 現代 ELT 做法先載入原始資料，再依賴資料倉儲執行下游轉換。

gept.example_en: Engineers use kafka topics as durable buffers between producer services and downstream analytical consumers.
gept.example_zh: 工程師使用 Kafka 主題作為生產者服務與下游分析消費者間的持久緩衝。

gept.example_en: Our snowflake-warehouse stores petabytes of historical events queryable through standard sql interfaces.
gept.example_zh: 我們的 Snowflake 資料倉儲儲存可透過標準 SQL 介面查詢的拍位元組歷史事件。

gept.example_en: Each business unit consumes its own datamart curated specifically for that team's analytical needs.
gept.example_zh: 每個業務單位使用專為該團隊分析需求精心策劃的資料市集。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Parquet 欄式檔案格式
gept.example_en: Parquet stores data column by column, enabling much faster scans for analytical aggregation queries.
gept.example_zh: Parquet 逐欄儲存資料，使分析彙總查詢的掃描速度顯著加快。

gept.example_en: Columnar formats compress each column independently and skip irrelevant columns at query execution time.
gept.example_zh: 欄式格式獨立壓縮每個欄位，並在查詢執行時跳過無關欄位。

gept.example_en: Analysts often denormalize wide tables ahead of time so downstream dashboards avoid expensive joins.
gept.example_zh: 分析師常事先反正規化寬表，讓下游儀表板避免高昂的連接運算。

gept.example_en: Robust schema-evolution handling lets producers add fields without breaking existing downstream consumers.
gept.example_zh: 穩健的綱要演化處理使生產者能新增欄位，卻不破壞既有下游消費者。

gept.example_en: Date partitioning lets queries prune entire days from the scan when filters target a recent window.
gept.example_zh: 日期分區讓查詢在過濾器針對近期視窗時從掃描中修剪掉整整數天。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 線上分析處理 OLAP
gept.example_en: Olap engines optimize complex aggregations across billions of rows for analytical reporting workloads.
gept.example_zh: OLAP 引擎針對分析報表工作負載最佳化對數十億筆記錄的複雜彙總。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 線上交易處理 OLTP
gept.example_en: Oltp systems prioritize quick row-level reads and writes for everyday transactional business operations.
gept.example_zh: OLTP 系統優先考量快速的列層級讀寫，服務日常的交易性業務操作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 目標與關鍵結果 OKR
gept.example_en: Our quarterly okr targets a fifteen percent reduction in customer churn driven by personalization improvements.
gept.example_zh: 我們本季的 OKR 目標是透過個人化改進使客戶流失率降低百分之十五。

gept.example_en: Analysts use tableau to build interactive reports that business stakeholders can explore on demand.
gept.example_zh: 分析師使用 Tableau 建立可供商業利害關係人隨需探索的互動式報表。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Power BI 商業分析工具
gept.example_en: Powerbi integrates tightly with the microsoft stack and powers most reporting at large enterprises.
gept.example_zh: Power BI 與微軟生態緊密整合，並為大型企業多數報表提供支援。

gept.example_en: High kurtosis signals heavy tails and a sharper peak compared to a normal Gaussian distribution.
gept.example_zh: 高峰度表示厚尾與相較常態高斯分佈更尖銳的峰值。

gept.example_en: Reporting stddev alongside the mean gives a much fuller picture of how spread out values are.
gept.example_zh: 在平均值旁同時報告標準差，能更完整呈現數值的分散程度。

gept.example_en: A bernoulli trial captures a single binary event such as a coin flip landing heads or tails.
gept.example_zh: 伯努利試驗刻畫單一二元事件，例如擲硬幣正面或反面落地。

gept.example_en: Maximum likelihood-function estimation chooses parameters that make the observed data most probable.
gept.example_zh: 最大似然函數估計選擇使觀察資料最為可能的參數。

gept.example_en: An ab-test randomly splits users into two groups to measure whether a new feature lifts conversion.
gept.example_zh: A/B 測試將使用者隨機分為兩組，衡量新功能是否提升轉換率。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 提升效益（增量影響）
gept.example_en: Uplift modeling estimates the incremental effect of treatment on each individual user rather than averages.
gept.example_zh: 提升效益建模估計處置對每位個別使用者的增量效應，而非平均值。

gept.example_en: An unmeasured confounder can secretly drive both treatment assignment and outcome, biasing naive comparisons.
gept.example_zh: 未測量的混淆因子可暗中同時驅動處置指派與結果，使簡單比較產生偏差。

gept.example_en: A low p-value suggests the observed effect would be unlikely under the null hypothesis of no difference.
gept.example_zh: 低 p 值表示在無差異的虛無假設下，觀察到的效應不太可能出現。

gept.example_en: A wide confidence-interval signals high uncertainty and suggests we should gather more samples before deciding.
gept.example_zh: 寬廣的信賴區間意味著高度不確定，建議在決策前收集更多樣本。

gept.example_en: The bootstrap-stat resamples the dataset with replacement to estimate uncertainty without parametric assumptions.
gept.example_zh: 自助抽樣法以放回方式重新抽樣資料集，不需參數假設即可估計不確定性。

gept.example_en: Linear regression-stat fits the line that minimizes the sum of squared errors between predictions and observations.
gept.example_zh: 線性迴歸擬合使預測與觀察值間平方誤差總和最小的直線。

gept.example_en: Lasso regression encourages sparsity by driving many coefficients exactly to zero during model fitting.
gept.example_zh: Lasso 迴歸在模型擬合時將許多係數精確壓至零，促成稀疏性。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 彈性網路（迴歸正則化）
gept.example_en: Elasticnet blends ridge and lasso penalties to balance shrinkage and sparsity within a single model.
gept.example_zh: 彈性網路混合嶺與 Lasso 懲罰項，在單一模型中平衡收縮與稀疏性。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) MLOps 機器學習維運
gept.example_en: Mature mlops practices automate model training, deployment, monitoring, and retraining across the entire lifecycle.
gept.example_zh: 成熟的 MLOps 實踐自動化整個生命週期內的模型訓練、部署、監控與重新訓練。

gept.example_en: Each model is deployed behind a versioned endpoint-api so clients can pin to a specific revision.
gept.example_zh: 每個模型部署在版本化的 API 端點後方，讓客戶端能固定到特定修訂版本。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 機器學習可觀測性
gept.example_en: Strong observability-ml practices surface drift and silent failures long before customers actually complain.
gept.example_zh: 完善的機器學習可觀測性實踐能在客戶實際抱怨前，及早揭示漂移與靜默失敗。

gept.example_en: A central feature-store guarantees identical feature computation between offline training and online serving.
gept.example_zh: 中央特徵儲存保證離線訓練與線上服務之間的特徵計算完全一致。

gept.example_en: Offline-features are computed in batch over historical data and reused for both training and analysis.
gept.example_zh: 離線特徵在歷史資料上以批次方式計算，可重複用於訓練與分析。

gept.example_en: Online-features must be served within milliseconds at inference time to meet strict latency budgets.
gept.example_zh: 線上特徵在推論時必須於毫秒內送達，以滿足嚴格的延遲預算。

gept.example_en: The nightly batch-pipeline recomputes user features from scratch and refreshes downstream recommendation tables.
gept.example_zh: 夜間批次資料管線從頭重新計算使用者特徵並更新下游推薦表。

gept.example_en: An orchestrator like airflow schedules dependent tasks and retries failures with configurable backoff strategies.
gept.example_zh: 如 Airflow 等流程編排器排程相依任務，並以可設定的退避策略重試失敗。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Apache Airflow 編排工具
gept.example_en: Engineers define data workflows as python directed acyclic graphs and let airflow handle execution.
gept.example_zh: 工程師以 Python 有向無環圖定義資料工作流，由 Airflow 處理執行。

gept.example_en: Each dag captures task dependencies so the scheduler runs steps only after all prerequisites succeed.
gept.example_zh: 每個 DAG 刻畫任務依賴，使排程器在所有前置條件成功後才執行步驟。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) dbt 資料轉換工具
gept.example_en: Analysts write dbt models in sql and the tool handles dependencies, tests, and incremental rebuilds.
gept.example_zh: 分析師以 SQL 撰寫 dbt 模型，工具則處理依賴、測試與增量重建。

gept.example_en: The warehouse-dw consolidates data from dozens of source systems into a single queryable analytics layer.
gept.example_zh: 資料倉儲將數十個來源系統的資料合併為單一可查詢的分析層。

gept.example_en: Legacy hadoop clusters still process enormous historical archives at many traditional enterprises today.
gept.example_zh: 傳統 Hadoop 叢集如今在許多傳統企業仍處理龐大的歷史檔案。

gept.example_en: Data engineers prefer pyspark because it combines spark's scale with familiar python syntax and libraries.
gept.example_zh: 資料工程師偏好 PySpark，因其結合 Spark 的規模與熟悉的 Python 語法與函式庫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) pandas 資料分析函式庫
gept.example_en: Pandas dataframes provide a flexible in-memory abstraction for everyday tabular data exploration and manipulation.
gept.example_zh: pandas DataFrame 為日常表格資料探索與操作提供靈活的記憶體內抽象。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) NumPy 數值計算函式庫
gept.example_en: Numpy arrays power most python scientific computing through vectorized operations and broadcasting semantics.
gept.example_zh: NumPy 陣列透過向量化運算與廣播語義驅動大部分 Python 科學運算。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) scikit-learn 機器學習函式庫
gept.example_en: Scikit provides consistent fit and predict apis for dozens of classical machine learning algorithms.
gept.example_zh: scikit-learn 為數十種傳統機器學習演算法提供一致的 fit 與 predict API。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) PyTorch 深度學習框架
gept.example_en: Pytorch dominates research because its dynamic graph makes debugging neural network code surprisingly straightforward.
gept.example_zh: PyTorch 在研究界佔主導地位，因為其動態圖讓神經網路程式偵錯出乎意料地直接。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) TensorFlow 深度學習框架
gept.example_en: Tensorflow targets production deployment on a wide range of devices from servers down to mobile phones.
gept.example_zh: TensorFlow 鎖定從伺服器到手機等各種裝置上的生產部署。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Hugging Face 模型平台
gept.example_en: Huggingface hosts tens of thousands of pretrained models that anyone can download with a single command.
gept.example_zh: Hugging Face 託管數以萬計的預訓練模型，任何人都能用一行指令下載。

gept.example_en: Frequent checkpointing during long training runs protects weeks of compute from sudden hardware failures.
gept.example_zh: 長時間訓練過程中頻繁的檢查點儲存能保護數週運算成果免於突發硬體故障。

gept.example_en: Knowledge distillation trains a small student model to mimic the outputs of a larger teacher model.
gept.example_zh: 知識蒸餾訓練小型學生模型模仿大型教師模型的輸出。

gept.example_en: Eight-bit quantization shrinks model size and speeds up inference with only minor accuracy degradation.
gept.example_zh: 八位元量化在僅有少量準確度退化下縮小模型大小並加速推論。

gept.example_en: Edge-ai runs models directly on phones or sensors, eliminating round-trip latency to remote cloud servers.
gept.example_zh: 邊緣 AI 直接在手機或感測器上執行模型，消除往返遠端雲端伺服器的延遲。

gept.example_en: A single high-end gpu can train models that would take cpu clusters many weeks to finish.
gept.example_zh: 單顆高階 GPU 可訓練 CPU 叢集需數週才能完成的模型。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 張量處理單元 TPU
gept.example_en: Tpu accelerators from google specialize in massive matrix multiplications central to deep learning workloads.
gept.example_zh: Google 的 TPU 加速器專門處理深度學習工作負載核心的大型矩陣乘法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) CUDA 並行運算平台
gept.example_en: Nvidia's cuda toolkit lets developers offload heavy numerical computations from cpus onto powerful gpus.
gept.example_zh: Nvidia 的 CUDA 工具包讓開發者將繁重的數值運算從 CPU 卸載到強大的 GPU。

gept.example_en: Empirical scaling-law studies predict how loss decreases when compute, data, and parameters all grow together.
gept.example_zh: 經驗規模法則研究預測算力、資料與參數一同增長時損失如何下降。

gept.example_en: Researchers experiment with checkpoint-merge techniques to blend skills from multiple fine-tuned model variants together.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員實驗檢查點合併技術，以融合多個微調模型變體的能力。

gept.example_en: Lora adds small trainable matrices on top of frozen weights for cheap parameter-efficient fine-tuning.
gept.example_zh: LoRA 在凍結權重之上加入小型可訓練矩陣，達成廉價且參數高效的微調。

gept.example_en: A larger context-window lets the model attend to entire documents instead of fragmented isolated passages.
gept.example_zh: 更大的上下文視窗讓模型能關注整份文件而非破碎孤立的段落。

gept.example_en: Subword tokenization handles rare words gracefully by splitting them into meaningful smaller learnable pieces.
gept.example_zh: 子詞分詞透過將罕見詞切成有意義的較小可學習片段來優雅處理。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Byte Pair Encoding 編碼
gept.example_en: Bpe iteratively merges the most frequent character pairs to build a compact yet expressive vocabulary.
gept.example_zh: BPE 反覆合併最頻繁的字元配對，以建立精簡但表達力強的詞彙表。

gept.example_en: Topk sampling restricts choices to the k most likely next tokens to keep outputs reasonably coherent.
gept.example_zh: Top-k 採樣將候選限制在最可能的 k 個下一詞元，以維持輸出大致連貫。

gept.example_en: Topp sampling dynamically adapts the candidate pool size based on the actual probability distribution shape.
gept.example_zh: Top-p 採樣依實際機率分佈形狀動態調整候選池大小。

gept.example_en: Beam-search keeps the top several partial sequences alive and finally returns the one with highest score.
gept.example_zh: 束搜尋同時保留多個最佳部分序列，最終回傳分數最高者。

gept.example_en: Removing each stopword like the or and helps simple bag-of-words classifiers focus on meaningful terms.
gept.example_zh: 移除如 the 或 and 等每個停用詞，可協助簡單的詞袋分類器聚焦於有意義詞語。

gept.example_en: Lemmatize each inflected form back to its dictionary base so analyses count related variants together.
gept.example_zh: 將每個屈折形式詞形還原回字典原形，使分析將相關變體一同計算。

gept.example_en: An ngram model estimates the probability of a word given the previous n minus one tokens.
gept.example_zh: n-gram 模型估計給定前 n 減一個詞元下某詞出現的機率。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) TF-IDF 詞頻逆文件頻率
gept.example_en: Tfidf scores rare informative terms higher and downweights common words appearing across many documents broadly.
gept.example_zh: TF-IDF 給予罕見且資訊豐富的詞語較高分數，並降低跨許多文件普遍出現的常見詞權重。

gept.example_en: Word2vec trains shallow networks to predict surrounding context and famously produces meaningful word arithmetic.
gept.example_zh: Word2Vec 訓練淺層網路預測周圍上下文，並以產出有意義的詞向量算術而聞名。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) BERT 預訓練語言模型
gept.example_en: Bert reads sequences bidirectionally during pretraining, making it strong on classification and span extraction tasks.
gept.example_zh: BERT 在預訓練時雙向讀取序列，使其在分類與片段抽取任務上表現強勁。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) GPT 生成式預訓練模型
gept.example_en: Each gpt generation predicts the next token autoregressively after consuming all previous context tokens.
gept.example_zh: 每個 GPT 在消化所有先前上下文詞元後，以自迴歸方式預測下一個詞元。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大型語言模型 LLM
gept.example_en: An llm trained on web-scale text can summarize, translate, and code without any task-specific fine-tuning.
gept.example_zh: 在網路規模文字上訓練的 LLM 無需任何任務特定微調，即可摘要、翻譯與寫程式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 小型語言模型 SLM
gept.example_en: A well-trained slm can match larger model quality on narrow domains while costing far less to run.
gept.example_zh: 訓練良好的 SLM 可在窄領域上匹敵大型模型品質，且運行成本低廉得多。

gept.example_en: Each foundation-model is pretrained once on vast data and then adapted to many specific downstream tasks.
gept.example_zh: 每個基礎模型在海量資料上預訓練一次，然後適配至許多特定下游任務。

gept.example_en: A multimodal model jointly understands text, images, audio, and sometimes video inside a single network.
gept.example_zh: 多模態模型在單一網路內聯合理解文字、影像、音訊，有時還包含影片。

gept.example_en: A vision-llm can describe photos, answer questions about charts, and read text embedded inside images.
gept.example_zh: 視覺語言模型可描述照片、回答圖表問題並讀取嵌入影像中的文字。

gept.example_en: Modern speech-to-text systems transcribe meetings in real time across dozens of supported languages.
gept.example_zh: 現代語音轉文字系統能在數十種支援語言中即時轉錄會議。

gept.example_en: Neural text-to-speech voices now sound remarkably natural with proper intonation and emotional expressiveness.
gept.example_zh: 神經文字轉語音的聲音如今聽來極為自然，具有適切的語調與情緒表現力。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自動語音辨識 ASR
gept.example_en: Asr accuracy depends heavily on microphone quality, background noise, and speaker accent variability.
gept.example_zh: ASR 準確度高度仰賴麥克風品質、背景雜訊與說話者口音變異。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 光學字元辨識 OCR
gept.example_en: Ocr extracts machine-readable text from scanned documents, receipts, and handwritten notes for downstream processing.
gept.example_zh: OCR 從掃描文件、收據與手寫筆記中抽取機器可讀的文字以供下游處理。

gept.example_en: Object detectors output a bounding-box and confidence score around each recognized item in the image.
gept.example_zh: 物體偵測器為影像中每個識別到的物件輸出邊界框與信心分數。

gept.example_en: A modern recommender mixes collaborative filtering with content embeddings to suggest items the user likely loves.
gept.example_zh: 現代推薦系統將協同過濾與內容嵌入結合，建議使用者很可能喜愛的項目。

gept.example_en: Collaborative-filter algorithms recommend items by leveraging patterns across many users with similar historical behavior.
gept.example_zh: 協同過濾演算法借助許多具類似歷史行為使用者的模式來推薦項目。

gept.example_en: Cold-start is challenging because new users have no behavior history to ground initial recommendations on.
gept.example_zh: 冷啟動具挑戰性，因為新使用者缺乏行為歷史可作為初始推薦依據。

gept.example_en: Predicted ctr feeds directly into the advertising auction to determine which ads users see first.
gept.example_zh: 預測點擊率直接餵入廣告競價，決定使用者首先看到哪些廣告。

gept.example_en: An embedding-model maps each text snippet into a fixed-dimensional vector preserving semantic similarity structure.
gept.example_zh: 嵌入模型將每段文字片段映射為固定維度向量，保留語義相似度結構。

gept.example_en: A vectordb indexes millions of embeddings and serves nearest-neighbor queries with millisecond response times.
gept.example_zh: 向量資料庫為數百萬個嵌入向量建立索引，並以毫秒級回應時間提供最近鄰查詢。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) Pinecone 向量資料庫服務
gept.example_en: Engineers often choose pinecone for managed vector search because it handles scaling and replication invisibly.
gept.example_zh: 工程師常選用 Pinecone 作為受管向量搜尋服務，因其能無形地處理擴容與複寫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) FAISS 向量索引函式庫
gept.example_en: Meta's faiss library performs efficient similarity search over enormous embedding collections on single machines.
gept.example_zh: Meta 的 FAISS 函式庫能在單機上對龐大嵌入集合執行高效相似度搜尋。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) HNSW 圖索引演算法
gept.example_en: Hnsw builds a layered proximity graph that delivers logarithmic search complexity over high-dimensional vector spaces.
gept.example_zh: HNSW 建立分層鄰近圖，在高維向量空間提供對數級搜尋複雜度。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 倒排檔案索引 IVF
gept.example_en: Ivf clusters vectors into cells so search only inspects a handful of relevant cells per query.
gept.example_zh: IVF 將向量分群成各分區，使每次查詢只檢視少數相關分區。

gept.example_en: Before indexing, we vectorize every document through the same embedding model used at search time.
gept.example_zh: 在索引之前，我們透過與搜尋時相同的嵌入模型將每份文件向量化。

gept.example_en: Hybrid-search blends sparse keyword matching with dense semantic vectors for noticeably better retrieval quality overall.
gept.example_zh: 混合搜尋將稀疏的關鍵字匹配與密集的語義向量結合，整體獲得明顯更佳的檢索品質。

gept.example_en: A knowledge-graph stores entities and relationships explicitly, enabling reasoning that pure text embeddings cannot easily perform.
gept.example_zh: 知識圖譜顯式儲存實體與關係，能進行純文字嵌入難以執行的推理。

gept.example_en: Each knowledge-graph fact is stored as a subject-predicate-object triplet ready for symbolic graph queries.
gept.example_zh: 每個知識圖譜事實以主詞-謂詞-受詞三元組儲存，可供符號式圖查詢。

gept.example_en: Browser fingerprinting identifies you using subtle differences in fonts, screen size, and plugins.
gept.example_zh: 瀏覽器指紋識別利用字型、螢幕大小與外掛的細微差異來識別你。

gept.example_en: Lawyers must redact personal details before publishing court documents on the public website.
gept.example_zh: 律師在將法院文件公布到公開網站前必須塗黑遮蔽個人細節。

gept.example_en: Poor redaction left victim names readable through a thin black bar on the PDF.
gept.example_zh: 糟糕的內容遮蔽使受害者姓名透過 PDF 上薄薄的黑條仍可被讀出。

gept.example_en: Attackers tried to exfiltrate gigabytes of design files through a hidden cloud channel.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者試圖透過隱藏的雲端通道竊取數 GB 的設計檔案。

gept.example_en: Network monitoring tools detected unusual exfiltration patterns late on a Sunday night.
gept.example_zh: 網路監控工具在週日深夜偵測到異常的資料外傳模式。

gept.example_en: Good segmentation-network design stops malware from spreading freely across all internal hosts.
gept.example_zh: 良好的網路分段設計可阻止惡意程式在所有內部主機間自由擴散。

gept.example_en: The antivirus moved the infected document into quarantine-file storage for later review.
gept.example_zh: 防毒軟體將受感染的文件移入檔案隔離區以便日後審查。

gept.example_en: Researchers set up a honeypot to study how attackers behave once they break in.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員設置蜜罐以研究攻擊者入侵後的行為。

gept.example_en: Smishing messages often pretend to be delivery notifications asking for a small fee.
gept.example_zh: 簡訊釣魚訊息通常偽裝成要求小額費用的包裹送達通知。

gept.example_en: In a vishing call, a fake bank officer pressures the victim to confirm sensitive details.
gept.example_zh: 在語音釣魚電話中，假冒的銀行人員會施壓受害者確認敏感資料。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鯨釣（針對高階主管的釣魚）
gept.example_en: Whaling attacks aim at top executives because their accounts unlock the most valuable data.
gept.example_zh: 鯨釣攻擊鎖定高階主管，因為他們的帳號能解鎖最有價值的資料。

gept.example_en: A rootkit hides deep in the operating system and is very hard to detect.
gept.example_zh: 隱蔽程式包深藏在作業系統內部，非常難以偵測。

gept.example_en: A hidden keylogger silently records every keystroke, including passwords typed into a banking site.
gept.example_zh: 隱藏的鍵盤側錄程式默默記錄每一次按鍵，包括輸入到銀行網站的密碼。

gept.example_en: Aggressive adware bundled with free downloads can slow your computer to a crawl.
gept.example_zh: 與免費下載軟體一起安裝的侵略性廣告程式可能拖慢你的電腦。

gept.example_en: Scareware shows fake virus alerts to pressure users into buying useless security products.
gept.example_zh: 恐嚇軟體顯示假的病毒警示，逼使用者購買毫無用處的安全產品。

gept.example_en: Hackers cryptojack idle servers to mine digital coins without the owner ever knowing.
gept.example_zh: 駭客挖礦劫持閒置伺服器來挖掘數位貨幣，主人完全不知情。

gept.example_en: The denial-of-service attack knocked the online shop offline during a major sale event.
gept.example_zh: 該阻斷服務攻擊在大型促銷活動期間使網路商店無法上線。

gept.example_en: A reflection-attack uses innocent servers to bounce traffic toward the actual target.
gept.example_zh: 反射型攻擊利用無辜的伺服器將流量反彈到實際目標。

gept.example_en: A counterfeit-site copies the bank's logo perfectly but uses a slightly different web address.
gept.example_zh: 假冒網站完美複製銀行的標誌，但使用略有不同的網址。

gept.example_en: Criminals typosquat popular domains to catch users who mistype a single letter.
gept.example_zh: 犯罪分子搶註熱門網域的誤拼版本，以捕獲打錯一個字母的使用者。

gept.example_en: The dropper waits silently for hours before downloading its main payload-attack module.
gept.example_zh: 投放程式靜悄悄等待數小時，然後才下載其主要攻擊酬載模組。

gept.example_en: A small dropper hides inside the macro and fetches the real malware from the internet.
gept.example_zh: 小型投放器藏在巨集中，從網路抓取真正的惡意程式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 命令與控制伺服器
gept.example_en: Blocking the command-and-control address neutralizes the malware on infected company laptops.
gept.example_zh: 封鎖命令與控制伺服器位址可使公司受感染筆電上的惡意程式失效。

gept.example_en: An unpatched kernel bug let the attacker escalate-privilege from guest to system administrator.
gept.example_zh: 一個未修補的核心漏洞讓攻擊者從訪客提升權限至系統管理員。

gept.example_en: The least-privilege principle says each account should hold only the rights it truly needs.
gept.example_zh: 最小權限原則表示每個帳號只應持有其真正需要的權限。

gept.example_en: Single-sign-on lets employees use one login for email, chat, and dozens of other apps.
gept.example_zh: 單一簽入讓員工以一組登入存取電子郵件、聊天及數十個其他應用程式。

gept.example_en: Always deprovision accounts on the day a contractor's project officially ends.
gept.example_zh: 務必在約聘人員專案正式結束當日移除其帳號權限。

gept.example_en: Without good key-management practices, even the strongest cipher becomes useless quickly.
gept.example_zh: 若無良好的金鑰管理實務，再強的加密演算法都會很快變得毫無用處。

gept.example_en: A self-signed certificate is fine for testing but should never appear on a public site.
gept.example_zh: 自簽憑證用於測試沒問題，但絕不應出現在公開網站上。

gept.example_en: A trusted authority-ca signs certificates so that browsers know they can be verified.
gept.example_zh: 受信任的憑證授權機構簽署憑證，讓瀏覽器知道憑證可被驗證。

gept.example_en: A man-in-the-middle attacker quietly relays and may modify the messages between two parties.
gept.example_zh: 中間人攻擊者悄悄轉送並可能修改雙方之間的訊息。

gept.example_en: Nonces prevent a replay-attack by ensuring each request can be accepted only once.
gept.example_zh: 一次性隨機數可防止重放攻擊，確保每個請求只能被接受一次。

gept.example_en: The server sends a fresh nonce that the client must include in its signed reply.
gept.example_zh: 伺服器傳送一個新鮮的一次性數值，用戶端必須將其包含在簽章回覆中。

gept.example_en: Always sanitize-input from forms before placing it into a database query or web page.
gept.example_zh: 在將表單輸入放入資料庫查詢或網頁前，務必過濾輸入。

gept.example_en: Cross-site request-forgery tricks a logged-in user's browser into performing an unwanted action.
gept.example_zh: 跨網站偽造請求攻擊誘使已登入使用者的瀏覽器執行不情願的動作。

gept.example_en: A buffer-overflow in old C code can let an attacker overwrite the return address.
gept.example_zh: 舊 C 程式碼中的緩衝區溢位可讓攻擊者覆寫返回位址。

gept.example_en: A subtle buffer underrun may corrupt memory just before the start of an array.
gept.example_zh: 微妙的緩衝區下溢可能會在陣列開頭之前損壞記憶體。

gept.example_en: Languages with strong memory-safety guarantees prevent many classic exploitation techniques outright.
gept.example_zh: 具有強記憶體安全保證的語言可直接防止許多典型的攻擊技巧。

gept.example_en: Discounts could be stacked endlessly because of a logic-flaw in the checkout flow.
gept.example_zh: 由於結帳流程中的邏輯漏洞，折扣可被無止盡地疊加。

gept.example_en: Every new laptop is set up using the company's approved baseline-security image.
gept.example_zh: 每台新筆電都使用公司核可的基準安全組態映像進行設定。

gept.example_en: If the update breaks production, a clean rollback-patch should restore the previous version.
gept.example_zh: 若更新導致正式環境出問題，乾淨的還原修補應可恢復舊版本。

gept.example_en: Each new feature usually adds a little more attack-surface for security teams to defend.
gept.example_zh: 每個新功能通常會為資安團隊增加一點需要防守的攻擊表面。

gept.example_en: A state-sponsored threat-actor often has more patience and resources than ordinary criminals.
gept.example_zh: 由國家支持的威脅行為者通常比一般罪犯更有耐心且資源更多。

gept.example_en: A hacktivist group defaced the website to protest the firm's environmental policies.
gept.example_zh: 一個駭客行動主義團體污損網站，以抗議該公司的環境政策。

gept.example_en: Engineering-social tricks exploit human kindness and urgency rather than software bugs.
gept.example_zh: 社交工程伎倆利用人類的善意與緊迫感，而非軟體漏洞。

gept.example_en: A watering-hole attack infects a website that the targeted community visits regularly.
gept.example_zh: 水坑式攻擊感染目標社群定期造訪的網站。

gept.example_en: Vendor-risk questionnaires help buyers understand how their partners protect shared information.
gept.example_zh: 供應商風險問卷有助於買方了解合作夥伴如何保護共享資訊。

gept.example_en: A surprise drill-security event tests how quickly the help desk recognizes phishing attempts.
gept.example_zh: 突擊式安全演習測試客服中心辨識釣魚嘗試的速度。

gept.example_en: Full eradication means removing every backdoor the attacker left behind on the system.
gept.example_zh: 完全根除威脅意味著移除攻擊者在系統上留下的每一個後門。

gept.example_en: A post-incident review captures lessons learned so similar mistakes do not happen again.
gept.example_zh: 事故後的檢討會擷取經驗教訓，避免類似錯誤再次發生。

gept.example_en: Each lesson-learned becomes a small change in tools, training, or written procedures.
gept.example_zh: 每一項經驗教訓都會成為工具、訓練或書面程序中的一個小調整。

gept.example_en: An unusual log-event at three in the morning often deserves a closer human review.
gept.example_zh: 凌晨三點的異常日誌事件通常值得人工進一步審視。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 資安資訊與事件管理平台
gept.example_en: A modern siem correlates events across many systems to highlight the most worrying patterns.
gept.example_zh: 現代資安資訊與事件管理平台會跨多個系統關聯事件，凸顯最值得擔心的模式。

gept.example_en: Analysts in the soc-center monitor alerts around the clock from a central command room.
gept.example_zh: 資安維運中心的分析師在中央指揮室全天候監看警示。

gept.example_en: Skilled analysts threat-hunt by chasing small clues rather than waiting for loud alarms.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的分析師透過追查微小線索進行主動威脅獵捕，而非等待大聲警報。

gept.example_en: Good intelligence-cti tells you not just what is happening but why and to whom.
gept.example_zh: 良好的威脅情資不僅告訴你發生了什麼，還告訴你為何及對誰發生。

gept.example_en: Breaking the kill-chain at any early step usually stops the rest of the attack.
gept.example_zh: 在攻擊鏈早期任何一步將其打斷，通常就能阻止後續的攻擊。

gept.example_en: Attackers scan-port ranges of the internet looking for forgotten machines with weak services.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者掃描網際網路的連接埠範圍，尋找帶有弱服務的被遺忘機器。

gept.example_en: Your online footprint-cyber includes every post, photo, and account you ever created.
gept.example_zh: 你的數位足跡包含你曾建立的每一篇貼文、每張照片與每個帳號。

gept.example_en: Doxxing publishes private details to encourage strangers to harass the target person.
gept.example_zh: 起底公開個資是將私人細節公開，鼓勵陌生人騷擾目標人物。

gept.example_en: Swatting sends armed police to an innocent home by making fake emergency calls.
gept.example_zh: 假報警騷擾是透過撥打假緊急電話讓武裝警察前往無辜民宅。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 網路誘騙未成年人
gept.example_en: Schools warn parents to watch for grooming-online behavior in gaming chat rooms.
gept.example_zh: 學校警告家長注意遊戲聊天室中的網路誘騙未成年人行為。

gept.example_en: Privacy law gives each subject-data the right to know what is stored about them.
gept.example_zh: 隱私法賦予每位資料當事人知曉自身被儲存資料的權利。

gept.example_en: The controller-data decides why personal information is collected and how it will be used.
gept.example_zh: 資料控管者決定為何收集個人資訊以及將如何使用。

gept.example_en: A cloud processor-data only handles records on behalf of the original controller of the data.
gept.example_zh: 雲端資料處理者僅代表原始資料控管者處理資料。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 歐盟一般資料保護規範
gept.example_en: Any service offering products to EU residents must follow gdpr rules carefully.
gept.example_zh: 任何向歐盟居民提供產品的服務都必須仔細遵守歐盟一般資料保護規範。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 加州消費者隱私法
gept.example_en: Under ccpa, California consumers can ask businesses which categories of data have been collected.
gept.example_zh: 依加州消費者隱私法，加州消費者可詢問企業已收集了哪些類別的資料。

gept.example_en: A regulator-privacy may issue heavy fines after a serious breach of personal data.
gept.example_zh: 隱私主管機關可在嚴重個資外洩事件後處以巨額罰款。

gept.example_en: The company faces a fine-regulatory worth several percent of its global yearly revenue.
gept.example_zh: 該公司面臨相當於其全球年營收數個百分比的監管罰款。

gept.example_en: Digital signatures provide non-repudiation so a sender cannot later deny their messages.
gept.example_zh: 數位簽章提供不可否認性，使寄件者日後無法否認自己的訊息。

gept.example_en: Cyber resilience-cyber assumes attacks will happen and focuses on bouncing back quickly.
gept.example_zh: 資安韌性假設攻擊必然發生，並專注於快速恢復。

gept.example_en: A password manager works like a small vault-digital protected by one strong master key.
gept.example_zh: 密碼管理工具就像是受一把強大主金鑰保護的小型數位金庫。

gept.example_en: Passwordless login uses your device and biometrics instead of a memorized secret string.
gept.example_zh: 無密碼登入使用你的裝置與生物特徵，取代需要記憶的秘密字串。

gept.example_en: A passkey lives only on your phone and cannot be phished like a regular password.
gept.example_zh: 通行金鑰僅存在於你的手機上，無法像一般密碼那樣被釣魚。

gept.example_en: Some banks verify callers using a voiceprint computed from a short spoken phrase.
gept.example_zh: 有些銀行使用從一句簡短話語計算出的聲紋來驗證來電者。

gept.example_en: A geofence around the office building can block sensitive logins from any other location.
gept.example_zh: 圍繞辦公大樓的地理圍欄可阻擋來自任何其他地點的敏感登入。

gept.example_en: Even without reading messages, metadata-privacy can reveal who talks to whom and when.
gept.example_zh: 即使不讀取訊息內容，隱私中繼資料也能揭露誰在何時與誰交談。

gept.example_en: Pseudonymization replaces names with random codes but the mapping table must be guarded carefully.
gept.example_zh: 假名化處理以隨機代碼取代姓名，但對照表必須小心守護。

gept.example_en: Re-identification attacks combine public datasets until a supposedly anonymous record points to one person.
gept.example_zh: 重新識別攻擊結合公開資料集，直到一筆原以為匿名的紀錄指向特定人物。

gept.example_en: Stalkerware hides on a phone and quietly forwards location, messages, and photos to an abuser.
gept.example_zh: 跟蹤軟體藏在手機上，悄悄將位置、訊息與照片轉發給施虐者。

gept.example_en: Creepware can secretly turn on a webcam without lighting up the indicator light.
gept.example_zh: 偷窺軟體可秘密開啟網路攝影機，且不會點亮指示燈。

gept.example_en: A clipboard-attack swaps copied wallet addresses with one belonging to the criminal.
gept.example_zh: 剪貼簿攻擊將已複製的錢包地址換成屬於罪犯的地址。

gept.example_en: Splitting accounts by team limits the blast-radius if a single one is ever compromised.
gept.example_zh: 依團隊區分帳號可在單一帳號淪陷時限縮影響範圍。

gept.example_en: A network blast-zone keeps risky systems away from sensitive financial databases.
gept.example_zh: 網路衝擊區域使高風險系統遠離敏感的財務資料庫。

gept.example_en: A fail-open firewall lets traffic pass during outages, which is rarely the safer choice.
gept.example_zh: 故障開放型防火牆在故障期間放行流量，這通常不是較安全的選擇。

gept.example_en: Zero-trust networks ask each request to prove itself instead of trusting based on location.
gept.example_zh: 零信任網路要求每個請求自證身分，而非基於位置來信任。

gept.example_en: A trust-broker decides which apps an employee may reach from a particular personal device.
gept.example_zh: 信任代理決定員工可從特定個人裝置存取哪些應用程式。

gept.example_en: Many organizations align their controls with the framework-nist cybersecurity guidelines.
gept.example_zh: 許多組織將其控制措施與 NIST 框架的網路安全準則對齊。

gept.example_en: An iso-27001 certificate signals that the company runs a recognized security management system.
gept.example_zh: ISO 27001 標準的證書代表公司運行一套受認可的資安管理系統。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 支付卡資料安全標準
gept.example_en: Any merchant accepting credit cards must follow pci-dss rules for storing cardholder data.
gept.example_zh: 任何接受信用卡的商家都必須遵守支付卡資料安全標準有關儲存持卡人資料的規定。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 美國健康保險可攜性與責任法
gept.example_en: Hospitals follow hipaa rules when storing or sharing American patient health information.
gept.example_zh: 醫院在儲存或分享美國病患健康資訊時遵循美國健康保險可攜性與責任法的規定。

gept.example_en: Public US companies must follow sox controls around how their financial systems are accessed.
gept.example_zh: 美國上市公司必須遵循沙賓法有關財務系統存取方式的控管要求。

gept.example_en: A soc-2 report describes how a cloud provider protects customer data and proves it externally.
gept.example_zh: SOC 2 報告描述雲端供應商如何保護客戶資料並對外證明這一點。

gept.example_en: The board sets the company's appetite-risk so security leaders know what to accept or block.
gept.example_zh: 董事會設定公司的風險偏好，讓資安主管知道該接受或封鎖哪些風險。

gept.example_en: A specialist negotiator-ransom communicates with the attackers to buy time and reduce demands.
gept.example_zh: 專業的贖金談判專家與攻擊者溝通，為己方爭取時間並降低要求。

gept.example_en: Police sometimes release a free decryptor when researchers recover keys from old ransomware.
gept.example_zh: 當研究人員從舊勒索軟體中還原金鑰時，警方有時會釋出免費的解密工具。

gept.example_en: Carding crews test stolen numbers by making small online purchases first to confirm validity.
gept.example_zh: 盜刷信用卡集團先進行小額網路採購測試被竊號碼，以確認其有效性。

gept.example_en: Avoid letting strangers shoulder-surf when you type a PIN into a payment terminal.
gept.example_zh: 在支付終端輸入個人識別碼時，避免讓陌生人在你肩後肩窺取。

gept.example_en: A small token-otp displays a fresh six-digit code that changes every thirty seconds.
gept.example_zh: 小型一次性密碼裝置顯示每三十秒變更一次的六位數新代碼。

gept.example_en: A yubikey plugged into the laptop confirms login attempts that scammers cannot fake remotely.
gept.example_zh: 插入筆電的硬體安全金鑰可確認登入嘗試，騙徒無法遠端偽造。

gept.example_en: Fido standards let websites accept hardware keys instead of relying on shared secret strings.
gept.example_zh: FIDO 標準讓網站接受硬體金鑰，而非依賴共享的秘密字串。

gept.example_en: Run risky tools inside a container-secure that can be destroyed and replaced in seconds.
gept.example_zh: 在數秒內可被銷毀並重建的安全容器中執行高風險工具。

gept.example_en: Banks store master keys inside a tamper-resistant hsm rather than on regular file servers.
gept.example_zh: 銀行將主金鑰存放於防竄改的硬體安全模組中，而非一般檔案伺服器上。

gept.example_en: A tpm chip helps prove that the laptop's boot software has not been quietly modified.
gept.example_zh: 可信賴平台模組晶片可協助證明筆電的開機軟體未被悄悄修改。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 整合可延伸韌體介面
gept.example_en: Most modern computers boot using uefi software rather than the older legacy startup code.
gept.example_zh: 大多數現代電腦使用整合可延伸韌體介面軟體啟動，而非較舊的傳統啟動程式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 端點偵測與回應工具
gept.example_en: An edr agent watches each laptop for unusual behavior and can isolate it from the network.
gept.example_zh: 端點偵測與回應工具代理程式監看每台筆電的異常行為，並可將其從網路中隔離。

gept.example_en: Ndr tools study traffic patterns and flag connections that look unusual for the company.
gept.example_zh: 網路偵測與回應工具研究流量模式，並標記公司中看似異常的連線。

gept.example_en: An xdr platform combines signals from endpoints, networks, and cloud apps in one screen.
gept.example_zh: 延伸偵測與回應平台在一個畫面中整合來自端點、網路與雲端應用的訊號。

gept.example_en: Shadow-it tools used outside official approval can quietly hold valuable customer information.
gept.example_zh: 未經正式核可而使用的影子資訊系統工具可能悄悄保有寶貴的客戶資訊。

gept.example_en: Strict byod policies require personal phones to use a managed work profile before accessing email.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的自帶裝置政策要求個人手機在存取電子郵件前須使用受管控的工作設定檔。

gept.example_en: An mdm tool can remotely wipe a stolen phone before its data falls into other hands.
gept.example_zh: 行動裝置管理工具可在被竊手機的資料落入他人手中前，遠端清除其資料。

gept.example_en: Geofencing policies block sensitive logins when an employee phone leaves the country.
gept.example_zh: 區域圍欄管控政策會在員工手機離境時封鎖敏感登入。

gept.example_en: Each browser ships with a list of trust-anchor certificates from well-known authorities.
gept.example_zh: 每個瀏覽器都隨附一份來自知名授權機構的信任錨點憑證清單。

gept.example_en: Regular key-rotation limits how much data is exposed if one key is ever stolen.
gept.example_zh: 定期金鑰輪替可在金鑰遭竊時限縮被暴露的資料量。

gept.example_en: Use secret-management tools instead of hard-coding passwords inside application source code.
gept.example_zh: 使用機密資訊管理工具，而非在應用程式原始碼中硬寫入密碼。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 靜態應用程式安全測試
gept.example_en: Sast tools read source code automatically to highlight common dangerous patterns to developers.
gept.example_zh: 靜態應用程式安全測試工具自動讀取原始碼，向開發者凸顯常見的危險寫法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 動態應用程式安全測試
gept.example_en: Dast scanners probe a running website the same way an attacker might from outside.
gept.example_zh: 動態應用程式安全測試掃描器以攻擊者從外部進攻的方式探測運行中的網站。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 軟體組成成分分析
gept.example_en: Sca tools list every open-source library used and warn about known flaws inside them.
gept.example_zh: 軟體組成成分分析工具列出每一個所用的開源函式庫，並就其中已知漏洞發出警告。

gept.example_en: An sbom lets customers check whether a critical bug affects components in their product.
gept.example_zh: 軟體物料清單讓客戶能檢查關鍵漏洞是否影響其產品中的元件。

gept.example_en: Teams shift-left by checking security during design rather than only before final release.
gept.example_zh: 團隊以提前左移處理的方式在設計階段就檢查資安，而非只在最終發布前才檢查。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 開發資安維運整合
gept.example_en: Devsecops weaves security checks into every step of the build, test, and deploy pipeline.
gept.example_zh: 開發資安維運整合將資安檢查融入建置、測試與部署管道的每一個步驟。

gept.example_en: Responsible-disclosure means giving the vendor a fair chance to patch before going public.
gept.example_zh: 負責任揭露意指在公開漏洞前給予廠商合理的時間進行修補。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 通用漏洞揭露編號
gept.example_en: Each published flaw receives a unique cve identifier that researchers worldwide can reference.
gept.example_zh: 每個公開的漏洞都會獲得一個獨特的通用漏洞揭露編號，供全球研究員引用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 通用漏洞評分系統
gept.example_en: A cvss score helps teams rank fixes from the most critical to the least urgent.
gept.example_zh: 通用漏洞評分系統分數可幫助團隊將修補從最關鍵到最不緊急地排序。

gept.example_en: High exploitability flaws should be patched first since attackers will reach them quickly.
gept.example_zh: 高可利用性的漏洞應優先修補，因為攻擊者會很快利用它們。

gept.example_en: A purple-team session brings attackers and defenders together to share knowledge openly.
gept.example_zh: 紫隊協作演練讓攻擊方與防禦方齊聚一堂，公開分享知識。

gept.example_en: A yearly pentest checks whether new features have introduced exploitable bugs into production.
gept.example_zh: 每年的滲透測試檢查新功能是否將可被利用的漏洞引入正式環境。

gept.example_en: A skilled tester-pen documents every step so developers can reproduce and fix issues.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的滲透測試員記錄每一個步驟，以便開發者重現並修補問題。

gept.example_en: A fuzzer throws random unusual input at a program to discover unexpected crashes.
gept.example_zh: 模糊測試器向程式丟入隨機異常輸入，以發現意料之外的當機。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 動態掃描的
gept.example_en: A dynamic-scan watches the application in action and notices vulnerable real-world behavior.
gept.example_zh: 動態掃描觀察應用程式運作中的行為，留意有漏洞的真實情境行為。

gept.example_en: Yara rules describe patterns in files so investigators can quickly hunt for malware variants.
gept.example_zh: YARA 規則描述檔案中的模式，使調查人員能快速獵捕惡意程式變種。

gept.example_en: A network trace-network captured during the incident helped explain how the attacker moved.
gept.example_zh: 事故期間擷取的網路追蹤封包有助於解釋攻擊者如何移動。

gept.example_en: A clear chain-of-custody keeps digital evidence admissible in a possible future court case.
gept.example_zh: 清楚的證據監管鏈使數位證據在未來可能的法庭案件中仍具可採性。

gept.example_en: Tuning rules carefully helps reduce alert-fatigue and keeps analysts focused on real issues.
gept.example_zh: 仔細調整規則有助於降低警示疲勞，讓分析師專注在真正的問題上。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 使用者實體行為分析
gept.example_en: Ueba tools look for accounts logging in at strange hours from unusual countries silently.
gept.example_zh: 使用者實體行為分析工具靜悄悄尋找在異常時段從異常國家登入的帳號。

gept.example_en: Dlp policies block large file uploads that contain customer credit card numbers to personal mail.
gept.example_zh: 資料外洩防護政策會封鎖含有客戶信用卡號至個人信箱的大型檔案上傳。

gept.example_en: Attackers sometimes hide secrets using stego inside ordinary holiday photos posted online.
gept.example_zh: 攻擊者有時使用隱寫術將機密隱藏在線上發布的普通假期照片中。

gept.example_en: Researchers built a covert-channel that leaked data through tiny variations in fan speed.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員建立了一個透過風扇轉速微小變化來外洩資料的隱蔽通道。

gept.example_en: A timing-attack compares response delays to slowly recover characters of a hidden password.
gept.example_zh: 時序攻擊比較回應延遲，慢慢還原隱藏密碼的字元。

gept.example_en: Fault-injection on a chip can make it skip a step that normally checks a signature.
gept.example_zh: 對晶片進行故障注入可使其略過原本檢查簽章的步驟。

gept.example_en: Supply-side risk includes any party who writes, builds, or ships code reaching your servers.
gept.example_zh: 供應端風險包括任何撰寫、建置或運送程式碼到你伺服器的相關方。

gept.example_en: Sign every artifact at the end of the build-pipeline so tampering cannot pass unnoticed.
gept.example_zh: 在建置管道末端為每個產出物簽章，使竄改無法不被察覺地通過。

gept.example_en: An artifact-signed release proves the file came from the official build server itself.
gept.example_zh: 簽章產出物的發行版證明該檔案來自官方建置伺服器本身。

gept.example_en: Reproducible-build practices help confirm that nobody slipped extra code into the binary file.
gept.example_zh: 可重現建置做法有助於確認沒有人偷偷將額外的程式碼加入二進位檔案。

gept.example_en: Compare the fingerprint-file on the download page to detect tampering before installing the app.
gept.example_zh: 比對下載頁面上的檔案指紋，可在安裝應用程式前偵測竄改。

gept.example_en: Rich telemetry-sec data feeds analytics that flag suspicious behavior long before damage occurs.
gept.example_zh: 豐富的資安遙測資料供應分析機制，可在損害發生前很久標記可疑行為。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 資安自動化編排與回應
gept.example_en: A soar platform automates routine response steps so analysts focus on harder decisions.
gept.example_zh: 資安自動化編排與回應平台自動化例行回應步驟，使分析師專注於較困難的決策。

gept.example_en: Scripts orchestrate-sec multiple tools to quarantine a host, disable its account, and notify staff.
gept.example_zh: 腳本進行資安流程編排，呼叫多個工具來隔離主機、停用其帳號並通知員工。

gept.example_en: Defenders use an ml-model trained on past attacks to predict where the next one may land.
gept.example_zh: 防禦者使用以過往攻擊訓練的機器學習模型，預測下一波攻擊可能落腳之處。

gept.example_en: A fileless attack lives only in memory so traditional disk scans never see it.
gept.example_zh: 無檔案的攻擊只存在於記憶體中，因此傳統磁碟掃描永遠看不見它。

gept.example_en: Living-off-the-land tactics use built-in admin tools so they blend in with normal work.
gept.example_zh: 就地取材式的戰術使用內建的管理員工具，使其與正常工作融為一體。

gept.example_en: A polished phish-kit can clone the login page of a major bank within minutes.
gept.example_zh: 精緻的釣魚套件能在數分鐘內複製一間大型銀行的登入頁面。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) SPF 寄件者政策框架
gept.example_en: Spf records list which servers may legitimately send email for a given internet domain.
gept.example_zh: SPF 紀錄列出哪些伺服器可合法地代表特定網際網路網域寄送電子郵件。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) DKIM 網域金鑰識別郵件
gept.example_en: Dkim signs each outgoing email so receivers can confirm it was not modified in transit.
gept.example_zh: DKIM 為每封外寄郵件簽章，使收件方能確認郵件在傳輸過程中未被修改。

gept.example_en: A strict dmarc policy tells inbox providers to reject email that fails spf and dkim checks.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的 DMARC 政策告訴信箱供應商拒絕未通過 SPF 與 DKIM 檢查的郵件。

gept.example_en: Some services geoblock countries where they have no customers but where attacks often originate.
gept.example_zh: 有些服務會地理封鎖沒有客戶但攻擊常從中發起的國家。

gept.example_en: A hotel captive-portal asks you to log in before any internet traffic is allowed.
gept.example_zh: 飯店的強制入口頁要求你先登入，然後才允許任何網際網路流量通過。

gept.example_en: Beware of a rogue-ap with a name copying the cafe wifi but run by a nearby attacker.
gept.example_zh: 當心名稱模仿咖啡店無線網路、但由附近攻擊者經營的流氓基地台。

gept.example_en: An evil-twin hotspot lets attackers read every page you visit while connected to it.
gept.example_zh: 邪惡雙胞胎熱點讓攻擊者在你連線時讀取你造訪的每個頁面。

gept.example_en: A deauth attack kicks devices off a wifi network so they reconnect to a fake one.
gept.example_zh: 解除驗證攻擊將裝置踢離 wifi 網路，使其重新連到假冒網路。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) WPA3 無線安全標準
gept.example_en: Wpa3 provides stronger protection for home wifi than the older versions of the standard.
gept.example_zh: WPA3 為家用無線網路提供比舊版標準更強的保護。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 工業作業技術安全
gept.example_en: Ot-security focuses on factory machines and other equipment that must keep running safely.
gept.example_zh: 工業作業技術安全聚焦在工廠機台與其他必須安全持續運轉的設備。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 監控與資料擷取系統
gept.example_en: Scada systems run power plants and water treatment facilities around the clock all year.
gept.example_zh: 監控與資料擷取系統全年無休地運轉發電廠與水處理設施。

gept.example_en: Attacks on ics infrastructure can have very serious physical consequences for entire cities.
gept.example_zh: 對工業控制系統基礎設施的攻擊可能對整座城市造成非常嚴重的實體後果。

gept.example_en: Highly sensitive networks may use an air-gap with no physical link to the public internet.
gept.example_zh: 高度敏感的網路可能採用實體隔離，沒有任何實體連結到公共網際網路。

gept.example_en: Each team picks a champion-sec who helps colleagues understand security guidance in plain language.
gept.example_zh: 每個團隊都選出一位資安小尖兵，以平易語言協助同事理解資安指引。

gept.example_en: A healthy culture-sec rewards people who report mistakes early instead of hiding them.
gept.example_zh: 健康的資安文化獎勵那些及早回報錯誤而非隱藏錯誤的人。

gept.example_en: Most privacy laws set tight deadlines for breach notification-breach to affected customers.
gept.example_zh: 大多數隱私法律對受影響客戶的外洩通知設有嚴格期限。

gept.example_en: A step-up challenge asks for biometrics when a user tries an unusually large transfer.
gept.example_zh: 當使用者嘗試異常大額轉帳時，增強驗證會要求生物特徵。

gept.example_en: Each login receives a risk-score and only high scores trigger extra verification steps.
gept.example_zh: 每次登入會獲得一個風險分數，僅高分會觸發額外的驗證步驟。

gept.example_en: Adaptive-auth changes its demands based on location, device, and recent account activity.
gept.example_zh: 自適應驗證依據位置、裝置與近期帳號活動調整其要求。

gept.example_en: A zero-day-attack uses a flaw the vendor has not yet patched or even fully understood.
gept.example_zh: 零日攻擊利用廠商尚未修補甚至尚未完全了解的漏洞。

gept.example_en: Most real-world breaches use n-day flaws against organizations that simply never installed the patch.
gept.example_zh: 大多數現實世界的外洩使用已知漏洞攻擊，鎖定根本未安裝修補的組織。

gept.example_en: Patch-tuesday refers to the monthly day when many vendors release security updates together.
gept.example_zh: 修補星期二指許多廠商每月一起發布安全更新的當日。

gept.example_en: Shrinking the exposure-window between patch release and rollout greatly reduces real attack risk.
gept.example_zh: 縮短從修補發布到部署的暴露時間窗可大幅降低真實攻擊風險。

gept.example_en: Products should be secure-by-default so customers do not have to remember dozens of toggles.
gept.example_zh: 產品應預設安全，使客戶無需記住數十個切換開關。

gept.example_en: Privacy-by-design bakes data protection into a feature from the very first sketch.
gept.example_zh: 隱私設計從最初的草圖階段就將資料保護融入功能中。

gept.example_en: A warrant-canary statement is removed if the company secretly receives certain legal orders.
gept.example_zh: 若公司秘密收到特定法律命令，警示金絲雀聲明就會被移除。

gept.example_en: The CEO unveiled a five-year blueprint-strategy to expand operations into emerging Asian markets.
gept.example_zh: 執行長公布了一份五年策略藍圖，計畫將營運擴展至新興亞洲市場。

gept.example_en: The HR department developed a competency-framework that defines key skills required for each role.
gept.example_zh: 人資部門開發了一套職能架構，明確定義各職位所需的關鍵技能。

gept.example_en: Strong relationships with downstream-partners ensure our products reach end customers smoothly and reliably.
gept.example_zh: 與下游夥伴的良好關係確保我們的產品能順暢可靠地送達終端客戶。

gept.example_en: Investors closely watched the earnings-call to gauge management's outlook for the upcoming fiscal year.
gept.example_zh: 投資人密切關注財報電話會議，以衡量管理層對下個會計年度的展望。

gept.example_en: Building strong ecosystem-partners around our platform creates more value than competing alone could.
gept.example_zh: 圍繞我們的平台建立強健的生態系夥伴，比獨自競爭創造更多價值。

gept.example_en: Recent surveys show that employee-engagement scores improved significantly after the new flexible policy.
gept.example_zh: 最新調查顯示，實施新彈性政策後員工敬業度分數顯著提升。

gept.example_en: Our new enterprise-resource system integrates finance, inventory, and human resources into one platform.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新企業資源系統將財務、庫存和人力資源整合到單一平台上。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 上報路徑；升級流程
gept.example_en: Every customer complaint follows a clear escalation-path to ensure issues get resolved properly.
gept.example_zh: 每件客訴都遵循明確的上報路徑，以確保問題獲得妥善解決。

gept.example_en: Many tech startups prefer a flat-hierarchy because it encourages open communication and faster decisions.
gept.example_zh: 許多科技新創公司偏好扁平階層，因為它能促進開放溝通並加快決策。

gept.example_en: Front-office staff interact directly with clients and significantly shape the company's public image.
gept.example_zh: 前台部門員工直接與客戶互動，並大幅形塑公司的公眾形象。

gept.example_en: The smaller firm defended itself against a hostile-takeover by finding a friendly white knight.
gept.example_zh: 這家小公司藉由尋找友善的白衣騎士來抵禦敵意併購。

gept.example_en: During the incubation-period, startups receive mentoring, workspace, and seed funding from program sponsors.
gept.example_zh: 在育成期內，新創公司可獲得計畫贊助方提供的輔導、辦公空間與種子資金。

gept.example_en: Our team uses a kanban-board to visualize task progress and quickly identify any bottlenecks.
gept.example_zh: 我們團隊使用看板來視覺化任務進度，並迅速找出任何瓶頸。

gept.example_en: Building a strong leadership-pipeline ensures the company can promote from within when senior roles open.
gept.example_zh: 建立強健的領導人才庫，能確保資深職位出缺時公司可從內部晉升。

gept.example_en: Both parties signed a letter-of-intent outlining the broad terms of the proposed partnership.
gept.example_zh: 雙方簽署了意向書，概述擬議合作關係的主要條款。

gept.example_en: Working in a matrix-organization means employees report to multiple managers across different functions.
gept.example_zh: 在矩陣式組織工作意味著員工要向多位不同職能的主管報告。

gept.example_en: Operational-excellence requires both disciplined processes and a culture of continuous improvement across teams.
gept.example_zh: 卓越營運需要兼具嚴謹的流程與跨團隊的持續改善文化。

gept.example_en: Successful post-merger integration depends on aligning two very different corporate cultures within months.
gept.example_zh: 成功的併購後整合，取決於能否在數月內讓兩種截然不同的企業文化趨於一致。

gept.example_en: The project-charter defines scope, budget, timeline, and the names of all key contributors involved.
gept.example_zh: 專案章程定義了範圍、預算、時程，以及所有關鍵參與者的名單。

gept.example_en: Stakeholder-mapping helps project managers identify whose support is critical before launching any major change.
gept.example_zh: 利害關係人分析能幫助專案經理在啟動重大變革前，找出誰的支持至關重要。

gept.example_en: A strong succession-plan reduces disruption when senior executives unexpectedly leave or retire early.
gept.example_zh: 完善的接班計畫能在資深主管意外離職或提早退休時減少衝擊。

gept.example_en: The two companies pursued a synergistic merger that combined complementary strengths in different regions.
gept.example_zh: 這兩家公司進行具綜效的合併，結合了不同區域的互補優勢。

gept.example_en: Publishing original research builds thought-leadership and attracts both top talent and premium clients.
gept.example_zh: 發表原創研究能建立思想領導力，並同時吸引頂尖人才與優質客戶。

gept.example_en: The new chief executive presented an ambitious turnaround-plan to restore profitability within eighteen months.
gept.example_zh: 新任執行長提出了雄心勃勃的轉虧為盈計畫，要在十八個月內恢復獲利。

gept.example_en: Senior managers had a vested-interest in keeping the old structure that protected their authority.
gept.example_zh: 資深主管在保留舊架構上有既得利益，因為那能保護他們的權力。

gept.example_en: Effective workforce-planning anticipates skill gaps long before they become critical operational problems.
gept.example_zh: 有效的人力規劃能在技能缺口成為嚴重營運問題前提早預見。

gept.example_en: Switching to a zero-based-budget forced every department to justify expenses from scratch each year.
gept.example_zh: 改用零基預算迫使每個部門每年都得從零開始為支出辯護。

gept.example_en: Managers must appraise-talent fairly using consistent criteria across teams and clearly documented examples.
gept.example_zh: 經理人必須以跨團隊一致的標準與清楚記錄的事例公平地評核人才。

gept.example_en: Our back-office handles payroll, accounting, and compliance while sales staff focus on customer relationships.
gept.example_zh: 我們的後勤部門處理薪資、會計與法遵，讓業務人員專注於客戶關係。

gept.example_en: She prefers working at a boutique-firm where every consultant works directly with senior partners.
gept.example_zh: 她偏好在精品公司工作，那裡每位顧問都能與資深合夥人直接共事。

gept.example_en: Investors grew nervous when the startup's monthly cash-burn exceeded its original projections by thirty percent.
gept.example_zh: 當新創公司每月現金消耗超出原預估百分之三十時，投資人變得緊張。

gept.example_en: The bank accepted the warehouse as a collateral-asset to secure the long-term business loan.
gept.example_zh: 銀行接受倉庫作為擔保資產，以保障這筆長期商業貸款。

gept.example_en: Strong deal-flow gives venture investors access to many promising startups before public attention arrives.
gept.example_zh: 充沛的交易機會流量讓創投投資人能在大眾關注前接觸到許多有潛力的新創。

gept.example_en: Accountants depreciate-asset values over several years to reflect gradual wear and economic usage.
gept.example_zh: 會計師將資產價值在數年間折舊，以反映其逐漸耗損與經濟使用情況。

gept.example_en: We agreed to expedite-delivery for the urgent client order using overnight air freight services.
gept.example_zh: 我們同意以隔夜航空貨運服務為這位客戶的急件訂單加快交付。

gept.example_en: Strong free-cashflow allows the company to pay dividends and invest in research simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 充裕的自由現金流讓公司能同時支付股利並投資研究。

gept.example_en: The aggressive pricing campaign helped our brand gain-share rapidly in the competitive household appliance segment.
gept.example_zh: 積極的定價活動讓我們的品牌在競爭激烈的家電市場迅速取得市占。

gept.example_en: Making a lateral-move into a new function can broaden your skills and accelerate future promotions.
gept.example_zh: 平調至新職能能拓展你的技能，並加速未來的升遷機會。

gept.example_en: Months of preparation lay-the-groundwork for a smooth product launch in three new countries.
gept.example_zh: 數月的準備為新產品在三個新國家順利上市打好基礎。

gept.example_en: A learning-organization treats every mistake as valuable data to improve future decisions and processes.
gept.example_zh: 學習型組織將每個錯誤視為改善未來決策與流程的寶貴資料。

gept.example_en: The management-buyout was financed with a combination of personal savings and significant private equity support.
gept.example_zh: 這次管理層收購由個人積蓄與大量私募股權支持的資金組合來融資。

gept.example_en: The construction contract specifies milestone-payment terms tied to inspection results at each completed phase.
gept.example_zh: 建築合約規定里程碑付款條件，須與每階段完工後的檢驗結果掛鉤。

gept.example_en: Our net-promoter score improved twenty points after we redesigned the entire customer onboarding experience.
gept.example_zh: 在我們重新設計整個客戶入門體驗後，淨推薦分數提升了二十分。

gept.example_en: Smart org-design aligns reporting structures with strategy and removes unnecessary handoffs between specialized teams.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的組織設計使報告結構與策略一致，並消除各專業團隊間不必要的交接。

gept.example_en: Negotiators must read the power-dynamic in the room before deciding whether to push aggressively.
gept.example_zh: 談判者必須在決定是否強勢推進前，先讀懂會議室中的權力關係。

gept.example_en: The expensive rebrand-effort updated the logo, messaging, and entire website over eighteen demanding months.
gept.example_zh: 這次昂貴的品牌重塑努力，在艱難的十八個月內更新了商標、訊息傳達與整個網站。

gept.example_en: Larger volumes create a scale-economy that reduces unit costs and improves our overall pricing flexibility.
gept.example_zh: 更大的產量創造規模經濟，能降低單位成本並提升我們整體的定價彈性。

gept.example_en: The cultural clash between two firms after the merger was writ-large in every weekly meeting.
gept.example_zh: 合併後兩家公司的文化衝突在每週會議中充分顯現。

gept.example_en: Every transaction must be completely above-board to maintain trust with regulators and the wider investor community.
gept.example_zh: 每筆交易都必須完全光明正大，以維持監管機構與廣大投資人社群的信任。

gept.example_en: My accountability-partner reviews my weekly goals and provides honest feedback when progress slows down.
gept.example_zh: 我的當責夥伴會檢視我每週的目標，並在進度放慢時給予誠實的回饋。

gept.example_en: Adaptive-leadership thrives in uncertain environments where rules and customer expectations change very quickly.
gept.example_zh: 適應性領導在規則與客戶期望快速變化的不確定環境中能蓬勃發展。

gept.example_en: An honest after-action review allows the team to celebrate successes while addressing painful mistakes openly.
gept.example_zh: 誠實的事後檢討讓團隊能慶祝成功，同時公開面對痛苦的錯誤。

gept.example_en: Reviewing employee compensation is generally outside the ambit of the operations manager's responsibilities.
gept.example_zh: 審查員工薪酬通常不在營運經理職責範圍之內。

gept.example_en: Finding a blue-ocean market with little direct competition gave the firm a head start of years.
gept.example_zh: 找到一個少有直接競爭的藍海市場，讓這家公司領先了多年。

gept.example_en: The sprint burn-down chart shows whether the team will likely complete all planned work on time.
gept.example_zh: 衝刺燃盡圖顯示團隊是否有可能準時完成所有計畫好的工作。

gept.example_en: Higher capacity-utilization reduced per-unit costs and significantly improved factory profitability throughout the year.
gept.example_zh: 較高的產能利用率降低了單位成本，並在全年內大幅改善工廠的獲利能力。

gept.example_en: Diversifying her client-portfolio reduced revenue risk when one large account decided to switch providers.
gept.example_zh: 她的客戶組合多元化，在一個大客戶決定更換服務商時降低了營收風險。

gept.example_en: The fund manager plans to deploy-capital primarily into renewable energy and emerging market healthcare ventures.
gept.example_zh: 基金經理人計畫將資金主要部署於再生能源與新興市場醫療保健事業。

gept.example_en: Board members have a fiduciary-duty to act in the long-term best interests of shareholders.
gept.example_zh: 董事會成員負有受託責任，須以股東長期最大利益為行動依據。

gept.example_en: Every front-line-manager profoundly shapes the daily experience and engagement of every employee on the team.
gept.example_zh: 每位第一線主管都深深形塑團隊每位員工的日常體驗與敬業度。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 進行或不進行的
gept.example_en: Before final launch, the leadership team conducts a strict go-no-go meeting to confirm complete readiness.
gept.example_zh: 在最終上市前，領導團隊會進行嚴格的進行或不進行會議以確認完全準備就緒。

gept.example_en: Every ideation-session begins with no judgment, encouraging participants to share even seemingly impractical creative ideas.
gept.example_zh: 每次構想發想會議都從不評判開始，鼓勵參與者分享即使看似不切實際的點子。
