gept.example_en: Strong inflow-funds during the third quarter allowed the asset manager to launch two additional new products.
gept.example_zh: 第三季強勁的資金流入讓資產經理人得以推出另外兩項新產品。

gept.example_en: International buyers often use a letter-of-credit to guarantee payment to overseas suppliers upon delivery confirmation.
gept.example_zh: 國際買家經常使用信用狀，於確認交貨時向海外供應商擔保付款。

gept.example_en: The liaison-officer coordinates communication between our company and the local regulatory authorities daily.
gept.example_zh: 這位聯絡官每天協調我們公司與當地監管機關之間的溝通。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 帶路貨；低價招徠商品
gept.example_en: The supermarket prices milk as a loss-leader to attract customers who then buy more profitable items.
gept.example_zh: 這家超市將牛奶定為帶路貨，以吸引接著購買更高利潤商品的顧客。

gept.example_en: A careful pacing-strategy prevents the team from exhausting itself during a multi-year transformation program.
gept.example_zh: 謹慎的步調策略可防止團隊在多年轉型計畫中精疲力盡。

gept.example_en: The fund actively supports each portfolio-company with strategic advice, hiring help, and access to important industry contacts.
gept.example_zh: 該基金以策略建議、招聘協助與接觸重要產業人脈，積極支援每家投資組合公司。

gept.example_en: Strong sell-through rates at retail partners indicate genuine consumer demand rather than channel inventory buildup.
gept.example_zh: 零售合作夥伴強勁的售罄率顯示真實的消費者需求，而非通路庫存堆積。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 臭鼬工廠；秘密研發小組
gept.example_en: The CEO created a small skunkworks team free from bureaucracy to invent breakthrough next-generation products.
gept.example_zh: 執行長成立一支不受官僚束縛的小型臭鼬工廠團隊，以發明突破性的次世代產品。

gept.example_en: Negotiating a fair term-sheet requires founders to understand both valuation and the rights given to investors.
gept.example_zh: 談判公平的投資條件書，需要創辦人理解估值與授予投資人的權利。

gept.example_en: The amortization schedule shows exactly how much interest and principal you pay monthly.
gept.example_zh: 攤銷表清楚顯示你每月支付的利息與本金金額。

gept.example_en: A fixed-rate mortgage protects borrowers from unexpected jumps in market interest rates.
gept.example_zh: 固定利率房貸可保護借款人免受市場利率突然上升影響。

gept.example_en: A clearinghouse stands between buyers and sellers to guarantee that trades are honored.
gept.example_zh: 清算所介於買賣雙方之間以保證交易得以履行。

gept.example_en: The custodian holds the fund's assets for safekeeping and tracks every transaction.
gept.example_zh: 保管機構為基金保管資產並追蹤每一筆交易。

gept.example_en: Financial advisors have a fiduciary duty to act in their clients' best interests.
gept.example_zh: 理財顧問負有以客戶最佳利益行事的受託義務。

gept.example_en: Buyers always perform due diligence before completing any large business acquisition.
gept.example_zh: 買方在完成任何大型企業收購前皆會進行盡職調查。

gept.example_en: A discounted cash flow analysis estimates value by projecting future earnings into today.
gept.example_zh: 折現現金流量分析透過預測未來盈餘並折算至今日來估值。

gept.example_en: An internal rate of return higher than the cost of capital generally signals a good project.
gept.example_zh: 內部報酬率高於資金成本通常代表是好的投資專案。

gept.example_en: Securitization bundles many loans together and sells them as tradable financial assets.
gept.example_zh: 證券化將許多貸款打包並作為可交易金融資產出售。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不動產抵押貸款證券
gept.example_en: A mortgage-backed security pays investors from the cash flow of many home loans.
gept.example_zh: 不動產抵押貸款證券以許多房貸的現金流支付給投資人。

gept.example_en: Each tranche of the bond offering carries a different level of risk and return.
gept.example_zh: 債券發行的每個分券具有不同的風險與報酬水準。

gept.example_en: A credit default swap pays the buyer if a specific bond issuer fails to honor its debt.
gept.example_zh: 若特定債券發行人違約，信用違約交換將賠付買方。

gept.example_en: Tier-one capital represents the safest layer of a bank's financial cushion.
gept.example_zh: 第一類資本代表銀行最安全的財務緩衝層。

gept.example_en: The Basel accords set international standards for how much capital banks must hold.
gept.example_zh: 巴塞爾協定設定國際標準，規範銀行須持有多少資本。

gept.example_en: Members of a monetary union share a single currency and a common central bank.
gept.example_zh: 貨幣聯盟成員共用單一貨幣與共同的中央銀行。

gept.example_en: A fixed exchange rate ties one currency to another at an officially set value.
gept.example_zh: 固定匯率將一國貨幣以官方訂定的比價綁定另一貨幣。

gept.example_en: Front office staff work directly with clients to win new business and execute trades.
gept.example_zh: 前台部門員工直接與客戶往來以爭取新業務並執行交易。

gept.example_en: An arbitrageur profits from small price gaps between related financial markets quickly.
gept.example_zh: 套利者透過快速利用相關金融市場間的小幅價差獲利。

gept.example_en: A carry trade borrows cheaply in one currency to invest in higher-yielding assets.
gept.example_zh: 套息交易以某種貨幣低成本借入資金，再投資於較高殖利率資產。

gept.example_en: The Bretton Woods system fixed major currencies to the United States dollar after the war.
gept.example_zh: 布列敦森林體系在戰後將主要貨幣固定釘住美元。

gept.example_en: Under the gold standard each country agreed to back its money with physical gold.
gept.example_zh: 在金本位制下，各國同意以實體黃金支撐其貨幣。

gept.example_en: Microfinance lends small amounts to entrepreneurs who cannot reach traditional banks.
gept.example_zh: 微型金融向無法接觸傳統銀行的創業者提供小額貸款。

gept.example_en: Shadow banking offers loans outside the regulated traditional banking system entirely.
gept.example_zh: 影子銀行在受監管的傳統銀行體系之外提供放款。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 金融服務不足的
gept.example_en: Many underbanked households rely on cash because they lack reliable financial services.
gept.example_zh: 許多金融服務不足的家庭因缺乏可靠金融服務而仰賴現金。

gept.example_en: Every major advertiser wanted a slot during the championship final broadcast last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 每位主要廣告主都想在上週末冠軍決賽轉播期間取得廣告時段。

gept.example_en: Premium snacks placed on the endcap generated triple the impulse purchases this quarter.
gept.example_zh: 本季放在端架陳列區的高檔零食衝動購買量增加為三倍。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 商品陳列圖；陳列規劃
gept.example_en: The planogram dictates exactly where each product should sit on the supermarket shelf.
gept.example_zh: 陳列規劃圖明確指定每項商品在超市貨架上的擺放位置。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 商品陳列員；採購商
gept.example_en: The visiting merchandiser rearranged the cosmetics display to highlight seasonal launches.
gept.example_zh: 巡店的商品陳列員重新整理化妝品展示，以突顯季節新品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 快閃店；彈出式
gept.example_en: The brand launched a pop-up shop in Tokyo to test consumer reactions abroad.
gept.example_zh: 該品牌在東京開設快閃店，以測試海外消費者反應。

gept.example_en: The mall kiosk lets shoppers customize their phone cases with their favorite illustrations.
gept.example_zh: 商場攤位讓顧客自行客製化手機殼上喜愛的插畫。

gept.example_en: The brand opened its first flagship on the busiest shopping street in Paris.
gept.example_zh: 該品牌在巴黎最繁華的購物街開設了第一家旗艦店。

gept.example_en: The youthful spokesmodel appears in every commercial promoting the new skincare collection.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕代言模特兒出現在每支新護膚系列的廣告中。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 風潮引領者；潮流影響者
gept.example_en: Local tastemakers were invited to the gallery preview before the public launch date.
gept.example_zh: 本地潮流引領者受邀參加正式公開前的畫廊預展。

gept.example_en: Many readers find a pop-up-ad annoying when it interrupts their article reading.
gept.example_zh: 許多讀者覺得彈出式廣告打斷他們閱讀文章時很惱人。

gept.example_en: An interstitial appears briefly between mobile game levels to encourage premium upgrades.
gept.example_zh: 插頁式廣告在手遊關卡之間短暫出現，鼓勵升級為付費版本。

gept.example_en: Skippable preroll ads must capture attention within the critical first five seconds.
gept.example_zh: 可略過的影片開頭廣告必須在關鍵的前五秒內抓住觀眾注意力。

gept.example_en: A well-placed midroll ad performs especially well during long-form podcast episodes today.
gept.example_zh: 如今放置得當的中段廣告在長篇 podcast 節目中表現特別出色。

gept.example_en: The co-branded credit card offers double points at both partner retailers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 這張聯名品牌信用卡在兩家合作零售商全球門市可享雙倍點數。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 白牌的；貼牌生產的
gept.example_en: The startup launched with white-labeled software while building its own platform quietly.
gept.example_zh: 這家新創公司先以白牌軟體上市，同時悄悄建立自家平台。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 自有品牌（商店自製）
gept.example_en: The supermarket's private-label snacks cost less but match major brands on quality.
gept.example_zh: 這家超市的自有品牌零食價格較低，品質卻可媲美大品牌。

gept.example_en: Shoppers increasingly trust the house-brand line for everyday essentials at fair prices.
gept.example_zh: 顧客越來越信任以合理價格供應日常必需品的自家品牌系列。

gept.example_en: The brand moved from boutique exclusivity into mass-market retail with affordable basics.
gept.example_zh: 該品牌從精品獨家走向大眾市場零售，推出價格親民的基本款。

gept.example_en: The demographic-profile shows that core buyers earn middle incomes and live in cities.
gept.example_zh: 人口統計輪廓顯示核心買家收入中等且居住於都市。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 心理變數分析；消費心理特徵
gept.example_en: Psychographics reveal customer values and lifestyles beyond simple age and income data.
gept.example_zh: 心理變數分析揭示超越年齡與收入資料的顧客價值觀與生活型態。

gept.example_en: Precise targeting reduces wasted ad spend by reaching only relevant potential buyers.
gept.example_zh: 精準鎖定可僅觸及相關潛在買家，減少浪費的廣告支出。

gept.example_en: Retargeting ads remind visitors of products they viewed but didn't end up purchasing.
gept.example_zh: 再行銷廣告會提醒訪客他們瀏覽過但最終未購買的商品。

gept.example_en: An effective remarketing email recovered nearly twenty percent of abandoned shopping carts.
gept.example_zh: 成功的再行銷郵件挽回了將近兩成的棄置購物車。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 漏斗頂端；認知階段
gept.example_en: Top-of-funnel content focuses on awareness rather than directly pushing a sale.
gept.example_zh: 漏斗頂端內容著重提升認知，而非直接推動銷售。

gept.example_en: A thoughtful follow-up-email after the demo helped the prospect feel heard and valued.
gept.example_zh: 示範後一封貼心的追蹤郵件讓潛在客戶感到被聆聽與重視。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 名單磁鐵；引流贈品
gept.example_en: An ebook can serve as an excellent lead-magnet to grow your subscriber list quickly.
gept.example_zh: 電子書可作為絕佳的引流贈品，快速擴大訂閱名單。

gept.example_en: A bold call-to-action button improved the click-through-rate across all email segments.
gept.example_zh: 醒目的行動呼籲按鈕提升了所有電郵區隔的點擊率。

gept.example_en: Short-form videos delivered the highest engagement-rate across every social channel last quarter.
gept.example_zh: 上一季短影音在每個社群管道都帶來最高的互動率。

gept.example_en: Our share-of-voice in industry conversations grew steadily after the podcast partnership launched.
gept.example_zh: podcast 合作上線後，我們在產業話題中的聲量佔比穩定成長。

gept.example_en: The startup gained meaningful market-share within twelve months of its quiet launch.
gept.example_zh: 這家新創公司在低調上市後十二個月內取得了可觀的市佔率。

gept.example_en: The penetration of mobile payments now exceeds eighty percent across urban households.
gept.example_zh: 行動支付在都市家庭的滲透率現已超過八成。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) SWOT 分析（優勢劣勢機會威脅）
gept.example_en: The workshop used a SWOT exercise to map current strengths against emerging market threats.
gept.example_zh: 工作坊運用 SWOT 分析將現有優勢與新興市場威脅對照盤點。

gept.example_en: A clear positioning-statement guides every marketing decision from packaging to commercial scripts.
gept.example_zh: 明確的定位陳述指引從包裝到廣告腳本的每項行銷決策。

gept.example_en: Decades of consistent quality have built remarkable brand-equity for the heritage watchmaker.
gept.example_zh: 數十年的一貫品質為這家老牌製錶商建立了驚人的品牌資產。

gept.example_en: The refreshed brand-identity includes a new wordmark, color palette, and tone of voice.
gept.example_zh: 更新後的品牌識別包含全新字標、色彩與語調風格。

gept.example_en: A friendly, slightly witty brand-voice runs through every customer touchpoint we own.
gept.example_zh: 親切又帶點機智的品牌語調貫穿我們所有的顧客接觸點。

gept.example_en: The internal style guide standardizes tone-of-voice for every customer-facing communication.
gept.example_zh: 內部風格指南將所有面向顧客溝通的語氣風格加以標準化。

gept.example_en: The minimalist wordmark replaced the cluttered emblem from the company's earlier decades.
gept.example_zh: 極簡的文字商標取代了公司早期幾十年來繁雜的徽章。

gept.example_en: The luxury monogram appears subtly on every handbag stitched in the Italian atelier.
gept.example_zh: 這個奢華字母組合圖案巧妙出現在義大利工坊縫製的每只手提包上。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 標誌字體；商標字樣
gept.example_en: The new logotype was hand-drawn to feel both timeless and quietly contemporary today.
gept.example_zh: 新標誌字體採手繪設計，散發既經典又低調當代的氣息。

gept.example_en: A warm color-palette helps the children's brand feel inviting and emotionally safe.
gept.example_zh: 暖色系的色彩配置讓這個兒童品牌顯得親切且令人安心。

gept.example_en: Thoughtful typography sets the entire emotional tone of any printed advertising piece.
gept.example_zh: 細膩的字體設計奠定任何印刷廣告作品的整體情感基調。

gept.example_en: Consistent iconography across the app makes navigation feel intuitive even for new users.
gept.example_zh: App 中一致的圖像符號系統讓新用戶也能直覺地操作導覽。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 情緒板；靈感拼貼板
gept.example_en: The designer arranged the moodboard to capture the romantic atmosphere of coastal Italy.
gept.example_zh: 設計師排出這塊情緒板，捕捉義大利沿海浪漫的氛圍。

gept.example_en: Every project begins with a tight creative-brief that aligns the team on objectives.
gept.example_zh: 每個案子都以一份精準的創意簡報展開，讓團隊對齊目標。

gept.example_en: Strong art-direction unifies every campaign image regardless of which photographer was hired.
gept.example_zh: 出色的美術指導讓每張活動影像保持一致，無論聘用哪位攝影師。

gept.example_en: A senior copywriter reviews every advertisement before it leaves the creative department.
gept.example_zh: 資深文案撰稿人會在廣告離開創意部前審閱每一則。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訊息策略；溝通內容
gept.example_en: Consistent messaging across channels reinforces what the brand stands for in customers minds.
gept.example_zh: 跨通路一致的訊息策略強化品牌在顧客心中的形象。

gept.example_en: Brand storytelling creates emotional connections that pure feature listings simply cannot replicate.
gept.example_zh: 品牌說故事行銷能建立純功能條列所無法複製的情感連結。

gept.example_en: User-generated-content feels more trustworthy than polished promotional photographs to most online shoppers.
gept.example_zh: 對多數線上購物者而言，使用者生成內容比精緻宣傳照更值得信賴。

gept.example_en: Our editorial-calendar aligns blog topics with major industry events and seasonal interests.
gept.example_zh: 我們的編輯行事曆讓部落格主題與重大產業活動與季節興趣同步。

gept.example_en: Evergreen-content continues attracting traffic months or even years after its initial publication.
gept.example_zh: 長青內容在初次發布後數月甚至數年仍持續帶來流量。

gept.example_en: Our longform guides attract serious researchers and consistently outperform brief blog posts.
gept.example_zh: 我們的長篇深度指南吸引認真的研究者，表現也持續勝過簡短部落格文。

gept.example_en: Shortform videos under sixty seconds dominate engagement on most mobile-first platforms today.
gept.example_zh: 六十秒內的短影音在多數行動優先平台上主導互動表現。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 說明影片；解說影片
gept.example_en: A two-minute explainer animation clarified the complex insurance product for confused first-time buyers.
gept.example_zh: 兩分鐘的解說動畫為困惑的首購者釐清了複雜的保險商品。

gept.example_en: The voiceover-script went through eight revisions before the final recording session began.
gept.example_zh: 旁白腳本經過八次修改才開始最終的錄音作業。

gept.example_en: Each stage of the buyer-journey requires different content matched to evolving information needs.
gept.example_zh: 購買者旅程每個階段都需要符合不斷變化資訊需求的不同內容。

gept.example_en: Awareness-stage content introduces the problem without aggressively promoting any specific brand solution.
gept.example_zh: 認知階段的內容引介問題，而不積極推銷任何特定品牌的解方。

gept.example_en: Consideration-stage shoppers compare options carefully and value honest, in-depth side-by-side reviews.
gept.example_zh: 評估階段的購物者會仔細比較選項，重視誠實深入的並排評測。

gept.example_en: Decision-stage offers should remove final doubts and make checkout feel completely effortless.
gept.example_zh: 決策階段的優惠應消除最後疑慮，並讓結帳過程毫不費力。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 售後的；購後階段的
gept.example_en: A thoughtful post-purchase email increases repeat orders and reduces unnecessary refund requests.
gept.example_zh: 貼心的售後郵件能提升回購率並減少不必要的退費請求。

gept.example_en: A targeted win-back email reactivated nearly fifteen percent of dormant former customers.
gept.example_zh: 一封精準的喚回郵件讓近一成五的休眠舊客重新活躍。

gept.example_en: Our reactivation campaign offered a special discount tailored to each customer's past purchases.
gept.example_zh: 我們的再啟動活動依據每位顧客過往消費提供量身打造的優惠。

gept.example_en: A relevant upsell-offer at checkout boosted average order value by almost eighteen percent.
gept.example_zh: 結帳時提出相關升級銷售方案讓平均訂單金額增加近一成八。

gept.example_en: A cross-sell-bundle pairs the camera with a compatible lens and a travel-friendly case.
gept.example_zh: 交叉銷售組合將相機搭配相容鏡頭與便於旅行的相機包一起販售。

gept.example_en: Subscription customers tend to have a far higher lifetime-value than one-time buyers.
gept.example_zh: 訂閱型顧客的終身價值往往遠高於一次性購買者。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 首次接觸；首觸歸因
gept.example_en: First-touch attribution often credits search ads even when social posts truly drove discovery.
gept.example_zh: 首觸歸因常將功勞給予搜尋廣告，即使真正帶來發現的是社群貼文。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 最後一次點擊；末擊歸因
gept.example_en: Relying solely on last-click data hides the true value of brand-building channels.
gept.example_zh: 完全依賴末擊資料會掩蓋品牌建立通路的真正價值。

gept.example_en: Mapping every click-to-conversion path uncovered surprising bottlenecks within the mobile checkout.
gept.example_zh: 繪製每條點擊至轉換的路徑揭露行動結帳中意想不到的瓶頸。

gept.example_en: Our cost-per-click dropped after refining the keyword list to focus on intent-rich phrases.
gept.example_zh: 縮減關鍵字並聚焦高意向詞組後，我們的每次點擊成本下降。

gept.example_en: Lowering cost-per-acquisition by even five percent meaningfully improved overall campaign profitability levels.
gept.example_zh: 將每次獲客成本降低哪怕五個百分點，整體活動獲利能力都會明顯改善。

gept.example_en: Display networks usually price inventory on a cost-per-mille basis rather than per click.
gept.example_zh: 聯播網通常以千次曝光成本而非每次點擊計價。

gept.example_en: A return-on-ad-spend above four indicates that the campaign generated strong incremental sales.
gept.example_zh: 廣告投資報酬率高於四代表此活動帶來了強勁的增量銷售。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) ROAS（廣告投資報酬率縮寫）
gept.example_en: ROAS dashboards refresh hourly so media buyers can pause underperforming campaigns immediately.
gept.example_zh: ROAS 儀表板每小時更新，讓媒體採購可立即暫停表現不佳的活動。

gept.example_en: Ranking near the top of the SERP brings far more clicks than appearing on page two.
gept.example_zh: 在搜尋結果頁面靠前的排名帶來的點擊遠多於出現在第二頁。

gept.example_en: Descriptive anchor-text helps both readers and search engines understand the link's destination clearly.
gept.example_zh: 描述性的錨點文字幫助讀者與搜尋引擎清楚理解連結的目的地。

gept.example_en: Targeting long-tail-keyword phrases captures buyers with very specific purchase intent.
gept.example_zh: 鎖定長尾關鍵字片語可抓住具有非常明確購買意向的買家。

gept.example_en: Dayparting concentrates ad spend during the hours when target customers shop most.
gept.example_zh: 分時段投放將廣告預算集中於目標顧客最常購物的時段。

gept.example_en: A lookalike-audience modeled on top spenders often outperforms broader cold targeting segments.
gept.example_zh: 以高消費者為樣本建立的相似受眾，表現常勝過更廣泛的冷流量受眾。

gept.example_en: Privacy regulations have made owning rich first-party-data more valuable than ever before.
gept.example_zh: 隱私法規讓擁有豐富的第一方資料比以往任何時候都更有價值。

gept.example_en: Marketers are racing to replace third-party-cookie tracking with consent-based identity solutions.
gept.example_zh: 行銷人員正搶著以基於同意的身分方案取代第三方 cookie 追蹤。

gept.example_en: A multivariate-test on the signup page identified the most powerful headline-image combination quickly.
gept.example_zh: 在註冊頁的多變數測試迅速找出最有效的標題與圖片組合。

gept.example_en: The scrollmap showed only thirty percent of readers reached our final paragraph.
gept.example_zh: 滑動深度圖顯示只有三成讀者讀到我們的最後一段。

gept.example_en: Click-tracking surfaced one button that customers consistently mistook for a static page graphic.
gept.example_zh: 點擊追蹤揭示有個按鈕經常被顧客誤認為靜態頁面圖像。

gept.example_en: Funnel-analysis identifies exactly where promising shoppers drop off before completing their purchase.
gept.example_zh: 漏斗分析能精確找出有潛力的購物者在完成購買前流失的環節。

gept.example_en: Tracking NPS quarterly helps the team spot loyalty trends before they affect revenue.
gept.example_zh: 每季追蹤 NPS 有助團隊在忠誠度趨勢影響營收前提早發現。

gept.example_en: Post-chat CSAT surveys give immediate feedback about each support agent's customer interaction.
gept.example_zh: 對談後的 CSAT 問卷立即回饋每位客服與顧客互動的表現。

gept.example_en: Field-research in neighborhood markets surfaced needs the online surveys had completely missed.
gept.example_zh: 在社區市場的田野調查發現了線上問卷完全錯過的需求。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 民族誌式的（消費者觀察）
gept.example_en: An ethnographic study followed shoppers throughout their entire weekend grocery routine.
gept.example_zh: 民族誌式研究跟隨顧客度過整個週末的雜貨採購流程。

gept.example_en: A mystery-shopper visit revealed that staff often skipped offering the loyalty signup.
gept.example_zh: 神祕客訪查發現店員常常省略邀請加入會員的步驟。

gept.example_en: Greater shelf-share in convenience stores correlated strongly with quarterly category sales growth.
gept.example_zh: 便利商店的貨架佔有率提升與該類別季度銷售成長高度相關。

gept.example_en: Doubling the facing-count of the new flavor accelerated trial among first-time buyers.
gept.example_zh: 新口味的正面陳列數加倍後，加快了首次購買者的試用速度。

gept.example_en: A high stockout-rate quickly erodes brand trust earned through years of careful messaging.
gept.example_zh: 高缺貨率會迅速侵蝕多年細心宣傳所建立的品牌信任。

gept.example_en: Just five key-account clients contribute nearly half of our entire annual revenue currently.
gept.example_zh: 目前僅五位重點客戶就貢獻我們將近一半的年度營收。

gept.example_en: The creator-economy lets independent voices build entire businesses around their devoted niche audiences.
gept.example_zh: 創作者經濟讓獨立聲音圍繞自己忠實的小眾受眾打造完整事業。

gept.example_en: A micro-influencer with engaged followers often outperforms celebrities for niche product launches.
gept.example_zh: 擁有高互動粉絲的微型網紅在小眾產品上市時的表現常勝過名人。

gept.example_en: A nano-influencer typically has fewer than ten thousand highly loyal community followers.
gept.example_zh: 奈米網紅通常擁有不到一萬名高度忠誠的社群粉絲。

gept.example_en: Affinity-marketing partnerships connect brands with passionate communities around shared interests.
gept.example_zh: 同好行銷合作將品牌與圍繞共同興趣的熱情社群串連起來。

gept.example_en: A clever guerrilla-marketing stunt downtown generated nationwide news coverage within hours.
gept.example_zh: 市中心一場機智的游擊式行銷活動在數小時內引發全國新聞報導。

gept.example_en: Ambient-advertising transforms ordinary public spaces into surprising brand experiences for everyday passersby.
gept.example_zh: 環境氛圍廣告把普通公共空間轉化為路人意想不到的品牌體驗。

gept.example_en: The experiential pop-up offered visitors a free guided tasting and personalized fragrance blending.
gept.example_zh: 這場體驗式快閃活動為訪客提供免費的導覽試吃與個人化香氛調配。

gept.example_en: Successful stunt-marketing demands creativity, careful timing, and a clear connection to brand values.
gept.example_zh: 成功的噱頭行銷需要創意、精準時機與和品牌價值的清楚連結。

gept.example_en: Journalists agreed to honor the embargo-date and publish their reviews simultaneously next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 記者同意遵守新聞解禁日期，於下週一同步發表評測。

gept.example_en: The chief executive launched a press-tour visiting key business publications in five cities.
gept.example_zh: 執行長展開媒體巡迴宣傳，造訪五座城市的重要商業媒體。

gept.example_en: A rehearsed crisis-communications plan helps brands respond quickly and credibly when problems arise.
gept.example_zh: 事先演練的危機公關溝通計畫能讓品牌在問題出現時迅速且可信地回應。

gept.example_en: Ignoring negative reviews online quickly becomes a serious reputation-risk for any consumer brand.
gept.example_zh: 忽略網路負評對任何消費品牌而言都會迅速變成嚴重的聲譽風險。

gept.example_en: Predicting virality reliably remains nearly impossible despite years of data-driven marketing analysis.
gept.example_zh: 儘管多年的數據驅動行銷分析，可靠地預測爆紅潛力依然幾乎不可能。

gept.example_en: Platforms increasingly demote obvious engagement-bait posts that ask readers to comment for engagement.
gept.example_zh: 平台越來越會降低明顯互動誘餌貼文的觸及，這類貼文只為了拉留言而要讀者互動。

gept.example_en: Scarcity-marketing tactics like only twelve left in stock subtly increase perceived product desirability.
gept.example_zh: 像「僅剩十二件」這類稀缺感行銷手法會微妙地提升商品的渴望感。

gept.example_en: Patients with multiple comorbidities require more careful monitoring during any surgical procedure.
gept.example_zh: 有多重共病的病患在任何手術過程中都需要更謹慎的監測。

gept.example_en: Doctors performed an emergency tracheotomy to help the patient breathe after the severe accident.
gept.example_zh: 醫師為嚴重事故的病患進行緊急氣管切開術以協助呼吸。

gept.example_en: He underwent an appendectomy last night after arriving at the emergency room with severe pain.
gept.example_zh: 他昨晚因劇痛抵達急診室後接受了闌尾切除術。

gept.example_en: The gynecologist recommended a hysterectomy to treat the patient's recurring uterine fibroids.
gept.example_zh: 婦科醫師建議透過子宮切除術治療病患反覆發作的子宮肌瘤。

gept.example_en: Following her diagnosis, she chose a double mastectomy to reduce her risk of cancer recurrence.
gept.example_zh: 確診後她選擇雙側乳房切除術以降低癌症復發風險。

gept.example_en: The pathology report confirmed that the suspicious lump was completely benign and required no further treatment.
gept.example_zh: 病理報告確認可疑腫塊完全是良性的，不需要進一步治療。

gept.example_en: Histology examination of the tissue sample revealed unusual cellular patterns under the microscope.
gept.example_zh: 對組織樣本的組織學檢查在顯微鏡下顯示出異常的細胞型態。

gept.example_en: Cytology screening helps detect abnormal cervical cells long before they develop into cancer.
gept.example_zh: 細胞學篩檢有助於在子宮頸異常細胞發展成癌症之前很早就被發現。

gept.example_en: An electrocardiogram measures the electrical activity of the heart to detect rhythm abnormalities.
gept.example_zh: 心電圖測量心臟的電氣活動以偵測心律異常。

gept.example_en: The nurse wrapped the sphygmomanometer cuff around his arm to measure his blood pressure.
gept.example_zh: 護理師將血壓計的袖帶包在他的手臂上測量血壓。

gept.example_en: Diabetic patients use a glucometer several times daily to monitor their blood sugar levels.
gept.example_zh: 糖尿病患者每天使用血糖機數次監測血糖濃度。

gept.example_en: A pulse-oximeter clipped to the finger measures both heart rate and blood oxygen saturation.
gept.example_zh: 夾在手指上的脈搏血氧儀可同時測量心率和血氧飽和度。

gept.example_en: The nebulizer converts liquid medicine into a fine mist that can be easily inhaled.
gept.example_zh: 噴霧器將液體藥物轉化為可輕鬆吸入的細霧。

gept.example_en: Antipsychotic medications can help manage severe symptoms of schizophrenia and bipolar disorder effectively.
gept.example_zh: 抗精神病藥物有助於有效控制思覺失調症和雙相情緒障礙的嚴重症狀。

gept.example_en: Patients with atrial fibrillation often take an anticoagulant to reduce their risk of stroke.
gept.example_zh: 心房顫動的病患通常服用抗凝血劑以降低中風風險。

gept.example_en: A vasodilator was prescribed to widen his blood vessels and lower his elevated blood pressure.
gept.example_zh: 處方了血管擴張劑來擴張他的血管並降低升高的血壓。

gept.example_en: A short course of corticosteroid can quickly reduce severe inflammation in autoimmune conditions.
gept.example_zh: 短期使用皮質類固醇可迅速減輕自體免疫疾病的嚴重發炎。

gept.example_en: Doctors feared the tumor might metastasize to nearby lymph nodes if surgery was delayed further.
gept.example_zh: 醫師擔心若手術再延遲，腫瘤可能轉移到附近的淋巴結。

gept.example_en: The anesthesiologist met with the patient before surgery to review her medical history and allergies.
gept.example_zh: 麻醉科醫師在手術前與病患會面，檢視她的病史和過敏紀錄。

gept.example_en: Neurosurgery requires extreme precision because even small mistakes can cause lasting neurological damage.
gept.example_zh: 神經外科手術需要極高的精確度，因為即使小錯誤也可能造成永久性神經損傷。

gept.example_en: The endocrinologist diagnosed her with a thyroid disorder and started her on hormone replacement therapy.
gept.example_zh: 內分泌科醫師診斷她患有甲狀腺疾病，並開始為她進行荷爾蒙替代療法。

gept.example_en: A gastroenterologist specializes in disorders of the digestive tract including the stomach and intestines.
gept.example_zh: 腸胃科醫師專精於消化道疾病，包括胃和腸的問題。

gept.example_en: The rheumatologist suspected lupus based on her joint pain and characteristic facial rash patterns.
gept.example_zh: 風濕免疫科醫師根據她的關節疼痛和典型臉部紅疹懷疑是紅斑性狼瘡。

gept.example_en: His nephrologist monitored kidney function carefully after the long course of medication ended.
gept.example_zh: 在長期療程結束後，他的腎臟科醫師仔細監測腎臟功能。

gept.example_en: The urologist examined him for an enlarged prostate after several months of urinary difficulties.
gept.example_zh: 在數月的排尿困難後，泌尿科醫師為他檢查是否有攝護腺肥大。

gept.example_en: A geriatrician specializes in the unique medical needs of elderly patients with multiple conditions.
gept.example_zh: 老年醫學科醫師專精於有多重疾病的高齡病患的獨特醫療需求。

gept.example_en: Strong narcotic medications are tightly regulated to prevent abuse and unauthorized distribution.
gept.example_zh: 強效麻醉藥物受到嚴格管制以防止濫用和未經授權的分發。

gept.example_en: Modern medications can successfully control epilepsy and prevent seizures in most patients with the condition.
gept.example_zh: 現代藥物可有效控制癲癇，並預防大多數患者發作。

gept.example_en: A myocardial infarction occurs when blood flow to part of the heart muscle becomes blocked.
gept.example_zh: 當心臟肌肉某部分的血流被阻塞時，就會發生心肌梗塞。

gept.example_en: Atherosclerosis develops slowly as plaque builds up inside artery walls, restricting normal blood flow.
gept.example_zh: 動脈粥狀硬化隨著動脈內壁斑塊累積緩慢發展，限制正常血流。

gept.example_en: Regular exercise and reducing sugar intake can help lower elevated triglycerides over time.
gept.example_zh: 規律運動和減少糖分攝取可隨時間降低偏高的三酸甘油酯。

gept.example_en: Rheumatoid arthritis is an autoimmune disease that causes inflammation and damage to joint linings.
gept.example_zh: 類風濕關節炎是一種自體免疫疾病，會導致關節內襯發炎和損傷。

gept.example_en: Repetitive typing motions over many years finally caused tendonitis in his right wrist.
gept.example_zh: 多年重複打字動作最終導致他右手腕罹患肌腱炎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 義肢；人工的
gept.example_en: Modern prosthetic limbs use advanced sensors to respond to muscle signals from the user.
gept.example_zh: 現代義肢使用先進的感應器來回應使用者的肌肉訊號。

gept.example_en: The family had difficult conversations about her end-of-life wishes and preferred place of care.
gept.example_zh: 這家人就她的臨終願望和偏好的照護地點進行了艱難的對話。

gept.example_en: Gene-therapy can now successfully treat several rare inherited disorders that had no previous treatment options.
gept.example_zh: 基因治療現在能夠成功治療數種以往沒有治療選項的罕見遺傳疾病。

gept.example_en: The baby was born with a congenital heart defect that required surgery in his first month.
gept.example_zh: 這名嬰兒出生時有先天性心臟缺陷，需要在出生第一個月內進行手術。

gept.example_en: The surgeon worked rapidly to stop the internal hemorrhage before the patient lost too much blood.
gept.example_zh: 外科醫師迅速止住內出血，以免病患失去過多血液。

gept.example_en: A pulmonary embolism can be life-threatening when a blood clot blocks an artery in the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 當血栓堵塞肺部動脈時，肺栓塞可能危及生命。

gept.example_en: Deep vein thrombosis can form during long flights when passengers remain seated and motionless for hours.
gept.example_zh: 深層靜脈血栓可能在長途飛行中乘客久坐不動數小時時形成。

gept.example_en: Severe diabetic complications can sometimes lead to lower limb amputation if circulation cannot be restored.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的糖尿病併發症若無法恢復血液循環，有時可能導致下肢截肢。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 漸凍症；肌萎縮性側索硬化症
gept.example_en: ALS gradually weakens muscles throughout the body and ultimately affects breathing and swallowing function.
gept.example_zh: 漸凍症逐漸使全身肌肉無力，最終影響呼吸和吞嚥功能。

gept.example_en: Children with cerebral-palsy benefit from early intervention including physical, occupational, and speech therapies.
gept.example_zh: 腦性麻痺兒童受惠於早期介入，包括物理、職能和語言治療。

gept.example_en: Muscular-dystrophy is a group of inherited diseases that progressively weaken muscles over time.
gept.example_zh: 肌肉萎縮症是一群遺傳性疾病，會隨時間逐漸使肌肉無力。

gept.example_en: Cystic-fibrosis causes thick mucus to build up in the lungs, making breathing increasingly difficult.
gept.example_zh: 囊狀纖維化導致濃稠黏液在肺部累積，使呼吸越來越困難。

gept.example_en: Surgery to remove gallstones along with the gallbladder is one of the most common procedures performed.
gept.example_zh: 切除膽結石及膽囊的手術是最常見的手術之一。

gept.example_en: GERD causes stomach acid to flow back into the esophagus, creating an uncomfortable burning sensation.
gept.example_zh: 胃食道逆流導致胃酸倒流到食道，造成不舒服的灼熱感。

gept.example_en: IBS symptoms vary widely between individuals and often worsen during periods of significant emotional stress.
gept.example_zh: 大腸激躁症的症狀因人而異，並且在情緒壓力大時常常加劇。

gept.example_en: Crohn's disease causes painful inflammation anywhere along the digestive tract, often requiring lifelong management.
gept.example_zh: 克隆氏症在消化道任何位置引起疼痛性發炎，通常需要終身管理。

gept.example_en: Bacterial meningitis progresses rapidly and requires emergency antibiotic treatment to prevent serious complications.
gept.example_zh: 細菌性腦膜炎進展迅速，需要緊急抗生素治療以防嚴重併發症。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 抗真菌藥；抗真菌的
gept.example_en: Antifungal cream effectively treats most common skin infections caused by yeast and other fungi.
gept.example_zh: 抗真菌乳膏能有效治療大多數由酵母菌和其他真菌引起的常見皮膚感染。

gept.example_en: Sepsis is a life-threatening condition that occurs when the body's response to infection damages its own tissues.
gept.example_zh: 敗血症是一種危及生命的狀況，發生於身體對感染的反應損傷自身組織時。

gept.example_en: The epidemiologist traced the foodborne outbreak back to a single contaminated produce supplier.
gept.example_zh: 流行病學家將這起食物中毒疫情追溯到單一受污染的農產品供應商。

gept.example_en: Malaria remains endemic in many tropical regions despite ongoing efforts to control mosquito populations.
gept.example_zh: 儘管持續努力控制蚊蟲數量，瘧疾在許多熱帶地區仍是地方性流行病。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 人畜共通傳染的
gept.example_en: Many emerging zoonotic diseases originate in wildlife before crossing the species barrier to infect humans.
gept.example_zh: 許多新興人畜共通傳染病源自野生動物，後來跨越物種屏障感染人類。

gept.example_en: The drug-recall was issued after several batches were found to contain unsafe levels of contamination.
gept.example_zh: 在發現數批藥品含有不安全程度的污染後，發布了藥物回收公告。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 生物製藥；生技製藥的
gept.example_en: The biopharmaceutical company developed a groundbreaking treatment for a previously untreatable rare disease.
gept.example_zh: 這家生技製藥公司開發出一種突破性的治療，能治療以往無法治療的罕見疾病。

gept.example_en: Drug-resistant tuberculosis strains pose a significant treatment challenge requiring longer and more complex therapy.
gept.example_zh: 抗藥性結核菌株對治療造成重大挑戰，需要更長且更複雜的療程。

gept.example_en: Her convalescence after the major surgery required six weeks of rest before returning to work.
gept.example_zh: 她在大手術後的康復期需要休息六週才能回到工作崗位。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 預防措施；預防治療
gept.example_en: Travelers heading to malaria zones often take prophylaxis medication starting before their departure.
gept.example_zh: 前往瘧疾流行區的旅客通常在出發前就開始服用預防性藥物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 脊骨神經醫學；脊椎按摩療法的
gept.example_en: Chiropractic adjustment helped reduce his recurring neck stiffness after months of working at a computer.
gept.example_zh: 在電腦前工作數月後，脊椎按摩療法的調整幫助減輕了他反覆發作的頸部僵硬。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 醫師對病人的態度
gept.example_en: Her new doctor's excellent bedside-manner made even the most difficult conversations feel manageable and supportive.
gept.example_zh: 她新醫師絕佳的態度讓即使是最困難的對話也感覺可以承受且充滿支持。

gept.example_en: The skilled phlebotomist drew several vials of blood quickly and painlessly for her annual screening.
gept.example_zh: 熟練的抽血師為她年度健檢迅速且無痛地抽取了數管血液。

gept.example_en: The surgeon requested a consult from cardiology before scheduling her for the upcoming major operation.
gept.example_zh: 外科醫師在為她安排即將進行的大手術前請心臟科會診。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 副作用特徵；副作用組合
gept.example_en: The newer medication has a better side-effect-profile and is generally easier for patients to tolerate.
gept.example_zh: 較新的藥物有較好的副作用特徵，一般病患較容易耐受。

gept.example_en: He volunteered for a drug-trial testing a promising new treatment for his rare autoimmune condition.
gept.example_zh: 他自願參加一項藥物試驗，測試針對他罕見自體免疫疾病的有前景新療法。

gept.example_en: The chloroplast inside plant cells converts sunlight into chemical energy through photosynthesis.
gept.example_zh: 植物細胞內的葉綠體透過光合作用將陽光轉化為化學能量。

gept.example_en: The mitochondrion is often called the powerhouse of the cell because it generates energy.
gept.example_zh: 粒線體常被稱為細胞的發電廠，因為它能產生能量。

gept.example_en: The nucleus of a eukaryotic cell stores most of the genetic material in compact form.
gept.example_zh: 真核細胞的細胞核以緊密形式儲存大部分遺傳物質。

gept.example_en: Many chemical reactions essential to life occur within the cytoplasm of living cells.
gept.example_zh: 許多維持生命所需的化學反應發生在活細胞的細胞質中。

gept.example_en: Every organelle inside a cell performs a specialized function necessary for survival.
gept.example_zh: 細胞內的每個細胞器都執行維持生存所需的特定功能。

gept.example_en: A single nucleotide is the basic building block of DNA and RNA molecules.
gept.example_zh: 單個核苷酸是 DNA 和 RNA 分子的基本構成單位。

gept.example_en: Watson and Crick described the famous double helix structure of DNA in 1953.
gept.example_zh: 華生與克里克於 1953 年描述了著名的 DNA 雙螺旋結構。

gept.example_en: A homozygous individual carries two identical alleles for a specific gene location.
gept.example_zh: 同型合子個體在特定基因位置攜帶兩個相同的等位基因。

gept.example_en: A heterozygous plant carries two different alleles for the same gene.
gept.example_zh: 異型合子植物在同一基因上攜帶兩個不同的等位基因。

gept.example_en: A gamete is a reproductive cell that fuses with another during sexual reproduction.
gept.example_zh: 配子是有性生殖過程中與另一個細胞融合的生殖細胞。

gept.example_en: Ultrasound images allow doctors to monitor the growth of the fetus in real time.
gept.example_zh: 超音波影像讓醫師能即時監測胎兒的成長。

gept.example_en: Mitosis produces two genetically identical daughter cells from a single parent cell.
gept.example_zh: 有絲分裂從單一母細胞產生兩個基因完全相同的子細胞。

gept.example_en: Cellular respiration releases energy stored in glucose for use by living cells.
gept.example_zh: 細胞呼吸釋放儲存在葡萄糖中的能量供活細胞使用。

gept.example_en: The left ventricle pumps oxygenated blood out of the heart into the aorta.
gept.example_zh: 左心室將含氧血液從心臟泵出進入主動脈。

gept.example_en: The right atrium receives deoxygenated blood returning from the entire body.
gept.example_zh: 右心房接收從全身回流的去氧血液。

gept.example_en: Each tiny alveolus in the lungs facilitates the exchange of oxygen and carbon dioxide.
gept.example_zh: 肺部的每個小肺泡都促進氧氣和二氧化碳的交換。

gept.example_en: Each bronchus branches into smaller tubes that distribute air throughout the lungs.
gept.example_zh: 每條支氣管分支成較小的管道，將空氣分送到整個肺部。

gept.example_en: The spleen filters blood and helps the immune system fight off infections.
gept.example_zh: 脾臟過濾血液並幫助免疫系統對抗感染。

gept.example_en: Each gland in the endocrine system releases hormones that regulate body functions.
gept.example_zh: 內分泌系統中的每個腺體都釋放調節身體功能的激素。

gept.example_en: Dopamine is a brain chemical linked to motivation, reward, and pleasure feelings.
gept.example_zh: 多巴胺是與動機、獎勵和愉悅感受相關的大腦化學物質。

gept.example_en: Low serotonin levels in the brain are often associated with mood disorders.
gept.example_zh: 大腦中低血清素水平通常與情緒障礙有關。

gept.example_en: Exercise triggers the release of endorphin chemicals that reduce pain and boost mood.
gept.example_zh: 運動會觸發腦內啡的釋放，減輕疼痛並提升情緒。

gept.example_en: Rapid neurotransmission allows the brain to coordinate movements within milliseconds.
gept.example_zh: 快速的神經傳導讓大腦能在毫秒內協調動作。

gept.example_en: The myelin sheath insulates nerve fibers and speeds up signal transmission greatly.
gept.example_zh: 髓鞘絕緣神經纖維並大幅加快訊號傳導。

gept.example_en: The cerebellum coordinates voluntary movements and helps maintain balance and posture.
gept.example_zh: 小腦協調隨意動作並幫助維持平衡和姿勢。

gept.example_en: The cerebrum is the largest part of the brain and controls conscious thought.
gept.example_zh: 大腦是腦部最大的部分，控制有意識的思考。

gept.example_en: The hippocampus plays a critical role in forming new long-term memories.
gept.example_zh: 海馬體在形成新的長期記憶中扮演關鍵角色。

gept.example_en: Each tissue type in the body consists of cells with similar functions.
gept.example_zh: 體內的每種組織類型都由功能相似的細胞組成。

gept.example_en: The epidermis is the outermost protective layer of skin on the human body.
gept.example_zh: 表皮是人體皮膚最外層的保護層。

gept.example_en: An amino acid is the basic building block of every protein molecule.
gept.example_zh: 胺基酸是每個蛋白質分子的基本構成單位。

gept.example_en: Fructose is a natural sugar found in fruits, honey, and various plant juices.
gept.example_zh: 果糖是存在於水果、蜂蜜和各種植物汁液中的天然糖。

gept.example_en: Cellulose forms the rigid cell walls that give plants their structural strength.
gept.example_zh: 纖維素形成堅硬的細胞壁，賦予植物結構強度。

gept.example_en: An enzyme binds to its substrate at a specific active site on its surface.
gept.example_zh: 酶在其表面的特定活性位點與底物結合。

gept.example_en: Fermentation by bacteria converts milk into yogurt over several controlled hours.
gept.example_zh: 細菌的發酵作用在數小時的受控條件下將牛奶轉化為優格。

gept.example_en: A fungus reproduces by releasing tiny spores into the surrounding air or water.
gept.example_zh: 真菌透過將微小的孢子釋放到周圍的空氣或水中來繁殖。

gept.example_en: Each spore can survive harsh conditions and grow into a new organism.
gept.example_zh: 每個孢子都能在惡劣條件下生存並成長為新的生物體。

gept.example_en: Protozoa are single-celled organisms that often live in freshwater habitats.
gept.example_zh: 原生動物是單細胞生物，通常生活在淡水棲息地。

gept.example_en: Mosquitoes act as a host for the parasite that causes malaria in humans.
gept.example_zh: 蚊子是引起人類瘧疾的寄生蟲的宿主。

gept.example_en: Mutualism describes a relationship where both organisms gain clear benefits.
gept.example_zh: 互利共生描述兩種生物都獲得明顯利益的關係。

gept.example_en: Every decomposer plays a crucial role in recycling nutrients through the ecosystem.
gept.example_zh: 每個分解者在生態系統的養分循環中扮演關鍵角色。

gept.example_en: Each trophic level transfers only a fraction of the energy from the previous level.
gept.example_zh: 每個營養級僅傳遞前一級能量的一小部分。

gept.example_en: The biosphere includes every living organism and the environments they inhabit.
gept.example_zh: 生物圈包括所有生物及其棲息的環境。

gept.example_en: The biota of a coral reef includes thousands of interconnected marine species.
gept.example_zh: 珊瑚礁的生物群包括成千上萬相互關聯的海洋物種。

gept.example_en: The diverse flora-set of the Amazon supports an incredible range of insect life.
gept.example_zh: 亞馬遜多樣的植物相支持令人驚嘆的昆蟲生命。

gept.example_en: The cactus shows remarkable adaptation to survive in extremely dry desert conditions.
gept.example_zh: 仙人掌展現了在極度乾燥沙漠條件下生存的顯著適應。

gept.example_en: Natural selection favors organisms whose traits help them survive and reproduce.
gept.example_zh: 天擇有利於那些具有幫助生存和繁殖性狀的生物。

gept.example_en: Speciation occurs when populations become genetically isolated and evolve separately.
gept.example_zh: 當族群在基因上被隔離並各自演化時，就會發生物種形成。

gept.example_en: A hybrid-organism inherits genetic material from two different parent species.
gept.example_zh: 雜交種從兩個不同的親本物種繼承遺傳物質。

gept.example_en: Birds share a common ancestor-bio with certain small dinosaurs from long ago.
gept.example_zh: 鳥類與遠古某些小型恐龍有共同的祖先。

gept.example_en: A well-preserved fossil can reveal much about creatures from millions of years ago.
gept.example_zh: 保存良好的化石可以揭示數百萬年前生物的許多訊息。

gept.example_en: The fossilized dinosaur skeleton was carefully reconstructed for a museum display.
gept.example_zh: 化石化的恐龍骨架被仔細重建以供博物館展示。

gept.example_en: Every invertebrate lacks a backbone but still plays a vital role in nature.
gept.example_zh: 每種無脊椎動物都沒有脊柱，但在自然界中仍扮演重要角色。

gept.example_en: A vertebrate has an internal skeleton built around a flexible spinal column.
gept.example_zh: 脊椎動物有以靈活脊柱為核心的內部骨架。

gept.example_en: Insects must shed their exoskeleton periodically to allow further body growth.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲必須定期脫去外骨骼才能進一步成長。

gept.example_en: The shiny scales of a fish help protect its body from injury and infection.
gept.example_zh: 魚閃亮的鱗片幫助保護身體免受傷害和感染。

gept.example_en: The colorful plumage of a male peacock attracts mates during the breeding season.
gept.example_zh: 雄孔雀色彩繽紛的羽衣在繁殖季節吸引配偶。

gept.example_en: Bears hibernate through the winter, slowing their heart rate dramatically to save energy.
gept.example_zh: 熊在冬季冬眠，大幅減緩心率以節省能量。

gept.example_en: Diurnal animals are active during daylight hours and rest at nightfall.
gept.example_zh: 日行性動物在白天活動，在夜幕降臨時休息。

gept.example_en: The chameleon's camouflage allows it to blend perfectly into nearby leafy branches.
gept.example_zh: 變色龍的偽裝讓牠完美地融入附近的葉子和樹枝。

gept.example_en: Snake venom can paralyze prey within seconds of a successful strike.
gept.example_zh: 蛇的毒液可以在成功攻擊後幾秒內使獵物癱瘓。

gept.example_en: A healthy immune system protects the body from countless harmful invaders daily.
gept.example_zh: 健康的免疫系統每天保護身體免受無數有害入侵者的侵害。

gept.example_en: A phagocyte engulfs harmful bacteria and digests them inside its cellular membrane.
gept.example_zh: 吞噬細胞包圍有害細菌並在細胞膜內消化它們。

gept.example_en: Washing hands thoroughly removes most germ particles before they can cause illness.
gept.example_zh: 徹底洗手可以去除大多數病菌顆粒，避免它們引起疾病。

gept.example_en: Surgeons must work in a sterile environment to prevent post-operative infections.
gept.example_zh: 外科醫生必須在無菌環境中工作以防止術後感染。

gept.example_en: A centrifuge separates blood components by spinning them at very high speeds.
gept.example_zh: 離心機透過高速旋轉來分離血液成分。

gept.example_en: She used a precise pipette-tool to transfer one milliliter of solution between flasks.
gept.example_zh: 她使用精確的移液管在燒瓶之間轉移一毫升的溶液。

gept.example_en: A biopsy-bio of the suspicious tissue confirmed that the growth was completely harmless.
gept.example_zh: 可疑組織的切片檢查確認生長物完全無害。

gept.example_en: RNA splicing removes non-coding regions before translation begins in the cell.
gept.example_zh: RNA 剪接在細胞翻譯開始前去除非編碼區域。

gept.example_en: Animal cloning became famous when scientists successfully cloned the sheep named Dolly.
gept.example_zh: 當科學家成功複製名為桃莉的羊時，動物克隆變得著名。

gept.example_en: Transgenic crops contain genes transferred from another species to improve their traits.
gept.example_zh: 轉基因作物含有從其他物種轉移而來以改良性狀的基因。

gept.example_en: Cell differentiation transforms identical stem cells into specialized tissues during development.
gept.example_zh: 細胞分化在發育過程中將相同的幹細胞轉化為特化組織。

gept.example_en: An anatomical drawing helps medical students learn the location of every internal organ.
gept.example_zh: 解剖圖幫助醫學生學習每個內部器官的位置。

gept.example_en: Biology students dissect a frog to study its internal organs in great detail.
gept.example_zh: 生物學學生解剖青蛙以詳細研究其內部器官。

gept.example_en: Human physiology explores how the body's organs function and interact with each other.
gept.example_zh: 人類生理學探討身體器官如何運作以及彼此如何互動。

gept.example_en: The knee-jerk reflex is a quick automatic response controlled by the spinal cord.
gept.example_zh: 膝跳反射是由脊髓控制的快速自動反應。

gept.example_en: Loud noises can damage the delicate eardrum and lead to permanent hearing loss.
gept.example_zh: 巨大的噪音可能損壞脆弱的鼓膜，導致永久性聽力損失。

gept.example_en: Tactile receptors in the fingertips allow people to detect texture and temperature changes.
gept.example_zh: 指尖的觸覺受體讓人能夠偵測紋理和溫度變化。

gept.example_en: Human saliva contains enzymes that begin the digestion of starchy foods.
gept.example_zh: 人類唾液含有開始消化澱粉食物的酶。

gept.example_en: Beneficial intestinal flora helps digest food and produce essential vitamins inside us.
gept.example_zh: 有益的腸道菌群幫助消化食物，並在體內產生重要的維生素。

gept.example_en: Hepatic cells filter toxins from the blood and break down many drugs.
gept.example_zh: 肝臟細胞從血液中過濾毒素並分解許多藥物。

gept.example_en: The pulmonary artery carries blood from the heart to the lungs for oxygenation.
gept.example_zh: 肺動脈將血液從心臟輸送到肺部進行氧合。

gept.example_en: Cardiac muscle contracts rhythmically throughout a person's entire lifetime without resting.
gept.example_zh: 心肌在一個人的整個生命中有節奏地收縮，從不休息。

gept.example_en: Bees collect pollen from flowers and accidentally transfer it to other blossoms.
gept.example_zh: 蜜蜂從花朵收集花粉，並意外地將其轉移到其他花朵。

gept.example_en: Successful pollination is essential for the production of fruits and viable seeds.
gept.example_zh: 成功的授粉對於水果和有活力種子的生產至關重要。

gept.example_en: The stamen is the male reproductive structure of a typical flowering plant.
gept.example_zh: 雄蕊是典型開花植物的雄性生殖結構。

gept.example_en: Pollen lands on the sticky tip of the pistil to begin the fertilization process.
gept.example_zh: 花粉落在雌蕊黏性的頂端，以開始受精過程。

gept.example_en: Germination usually requires steady moisture and temperatures within a specific narrow range.
gept.example_zh: 發芽通常需要穩定的濕度和在特定狹窄範圍內的溫度。

gept.example_en: A potato is actually a tuber that stores starch underground for future regrowth.
gept.example_zh: 馬鈴薯實際上是一種塊莖，在地下儲存澱粉以供未來再生長。

gept.example_en: A perennial plant continues to grow and bloom each spring for many consecutive years.
gept.example_zh: 多年生植物連續多年每個春天繼續生長和開花。

gept.example_en: An evergreen-tree keeps its green needles throughout every season of the year.
gept.example_zh: 常綠樹在一年中的每個季節都保持綠色針葉。

gept.example_en: Tiny stomata on a leaf surface allow gases to move in and out of the plant.
gept.example_zh: 葉子表面的微小氣孔讓氣體在植物內外移動。

gept.example_en: Transpiration helps pull water from a plant's roots all the way up to its leaves.
gept.example_zh: 蒸散作用幫助將水分從植物的根部一路向上拉到葉子。

gept.example_en: The xylem inside a plant transports water from the roots up to every leaf.
gept.example_zh: 植物內部的木質部將水分從根部運送到每一片葉子。

gept.example_en: Phloem tissue carries sugars made in the leaves down to the rest of the plant.
gept.example_zh: 韌皮部組織將葉子產生的糖分往下運送到植物的其他部位。

gept.example_en: The anther is the part of a stamen where pollen grains are produced.
gept.example_zh: 花藥是雄蕊上產生花粉粒的部分。

gept.example_en: Each sepal protects the developing flower bud before its petals open up.
gept.example_zh: 每片萼片在花瓣打開之前保護發育中的花蕾。

gept.example_en: The green calyx of a flower consists of all the sepals taken together.
gept.example_zh: 花朵的綠色花萼由所有萼片合在一起組成。

gept.example_en: A single ovum is released from the ovary roughly once every menstrual cycle.
gept.example_zh: 卵巢大約每個月經週期釋放一個卵子。

gept.example_en: Each sperm cell carries genetic material from the father to a waiting egg cell.
gept.example_zh: 每個精子細胞將父親的遺傳物質帶到等待中的卵細胞。

gept.example_en: A marine-bio biologist studies the various organisms that live in the oceans.
gept.example_zh: 海洋生物學家研究生活在海洋中的各種生物。

gept.example_en: Entomology has revealed surprising social behaviors in ants, bees, and termites.
gept.example_zh: 昆蟲學揭示了螞蟻、蜜蜂和白蟻令人驚訝的社會行為。

gept.example_en: Ichthyology focuses on the diversity, behavior, and conservation of fish species.
gept.example_zh: 魚類學專注於魚類的多樣性、行為和保育。

gept.example_en: Herpetology covers the scientific study of reptiles and amphibians around the world.
gept.example_zh: 兩棲爬蟲學涵蓋對世界各地爬蟲類和兩棲類的科學研究。

gept.example_en: Mycology explores the lifecycle and ecological role of mushrooms and other fungi.
gept.example_zh: 真菌學探討蘑菇和其他真菌的生命週期和生態角色。

gept.example_en: Microbiology has helped doctors understand and treat countless infectious diseases successfully.
gept.example_zh: 微生物學幫助醫生成功理解和治療無數的傳染病。

gept.example_en: Virology focuses on how viruses infect cells and how the body fights back.
gept.example_zh: 病毒學專注於病毒如何感染細胞以及身體如何反擊。

gept.example_en: Immunology investigates the body's defense mechanisms against bacteria, viruses, and parasites.
gept.example_zh: 免疫學研究身體對抗細菌、病毒和寄生蟲的防禦機制。

gept.example_en: Embryology traces how a single fertilized cell becomes a complex multicellular organism.
gept.example_zh: 胚胎學追蹤一個受精細胞如何變成複雜的多細胞生物。

gept.example_en: Ecological studies help us predict the long-term impact of climate change on species.
gept.example_zh: 生態學研究幫助我們預測氣候變遷對物種的長期影響。

gept.example_en: An ant releases a pheromone trail to guide nestmates to a newly discovered food source.
gept.example_zh: 螞蟻釋放費洛蒙痕跡，引導巢友到新發現的食物源。

gept.example_en: Many bioluminescent organisms in the deep sea produce their own greenish-blue light.
gept.example_zh: 深海中許多生物發光生物會自行產生綠藍色的光。

gept.example_en: Each biome-bio supports a unique community of plants and animals adapted to it.
gept.example_zh: 每個生物群系都支持適應該環境的獨特動植物群落。

gept.example_en: The watercycle moves moisture between the oceans, the atmosphere, and the land.
gept.example_zh: 水循環在海洋、大氣和陸地之間移動水分。

gept.example_en: The nitrogen-cycle relies on bacteria to convert atmospheric gas into usable forms.
gept.example_zh: 氮循環依靠細菌將大氣中的氣體轉化為可用的形式。

gept.example_en: Burning fossil fuels has disrupted the natural carbon-cycle on our planet.
gept.example_zh: 燃燒化石燃料已經擾亂了我們星球上的自然碳循環。

gept.example_en: The total biomass of insects on Earth far exceeds that of all wild mammals.
gept.example_zh: 地球上昆蟲的總生物量遠遠超過所有野生哺乳動物的總和。

gept.example_en: When a population exceeds the carrying-capacity, individuals begin to compete fiercely for resources.
gept.example_zh: 當族群超過環境承載量時，個體會開始激烈地競爭資源。

gept.example_en: Water is often the main limiting-factor that controls how many plants can grow.
gept.example_zh: 水通常是控制有多少植物能生長的主要限制因子。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 生物的；有生命的
gept.example_en: Biotic factors include all the living organisms that interact within an ecosystem.
gept.example_zh: 生物因子包括在生態系統中相互作用的所有生物。

gept.example_en: Abiotic factors such as temperature and sunlight shape habitats for living organisms.
gept.example_zh: 溫度和陽光等非生物因子塑造了生物的棲息地。

gept.example_en: Fungi and bacteria decompose-bio dead leaves into nutrients that enrich the soil.
gept.example_zh: 真菌和細菌將枯葉分解成豐富土壤的養分。

gept.example_en: Ectothermic reptiles rely on external sources like sunlight to regulate their body heat.
gept.example_zh: 外溫爬蟲類依靠陽光等外部來源調節體溫。

gept.example_en: Biotechnology has produced new medicines, improved crops, and innovative diagnostic tools.
gept.example_zh: 生物技術已經產生了新藥物、改良作物和創新的診斷工具。

gept.example_en: The botanist mounted each plant specimen-bio on paper for long-term archival storage.
gept.example_zh: 植物學家將每個植物標本固定在紙上以便長期存檔保存。

gept.example_en: A genus contains one or more related species sharing common ancestors and traits.
gept.example_zh: 一個屬包含一個或多個共享祖先和性狀的相關物種。

gept.example_en: Water molecules form because hydrogen and oxygen share electrons through strong covalent bonds.
gept.example_zh: 水分子之所以形成，是因為氫和氧透過強共價鍵共用電子。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 離子的（鍵結方式）
gept.example_en: Table salt is held together by ionic attractions between positively and negatively charged ions.
gept.example_zh: 食鹽是由帶正電與帶負電離子之間的離子吸引力結合在一起的。

gept.example_en: The valence of carbon allows it to bond with up to four other atoms simultaneously.
gept.example_zh: 碳的價數讓它能同時與多達四個其他原子鍵結。

gept.example_en: Each electron orbits the nucleus at specific energy levels that determine chemical behavior.
gept.example_zh: 每個電子在特定能階上繞核運行，這決定了化學行為。

gept.example_en: Glucose and fructose are isomers sharing the same molecular formula but different structures.
gept.example_zh: 葡萄糖和果糖是同分異構物，擁有相同分子式卻有不同結構。

gept.example_en: A polymer chain may contain thousands of repeating monomer units linked together.
gept.example_zh: 高分子鏈可能包含數千個重複單體連結在一起。

gept.example_en: When sugar dissolves in water, the sugar is the solute and water the solvent.
gept.example_zh: 當糖溶於水中時，糖是溶質，而水是溶劑。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 沉澱物；(動詞) 沉澱
gept.example_en: Mixing the two clear liquids produced a white precipitate that slowly settled downward.
gept.example_zh: 混合這兩種透明液體後產生了白色沉澱，緩慢向下沉降。

gept.example_en: Gas chromatography separates volatile mixtures by passing them through a heated column.
gept.example_zh: 氣相層析法透過將揮發性混合物通過加熱管柱來進行分離。

gept.example_en: Acid base titration determines unknown concentrations by carefully measuring the neutralization endpoint.
gept.example_zh: 酸鹼滴定透過仔細測量中和終點來確定未知濃度。

gept.example_en: She slowly released base from the buret until the indicator turned faint pink.
gept.example_zh: 她緩慢地從滴定管釋出鹼液，直到指示劑變成淡粉紅色。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有刻度的；分度的
gept.example_en: A graduated cylinder allows accurate measurement of liquid volumes during careful laboratory procedures.
gept.example_zh: 有刻度的量筒在仔細的實驗操作中能精確測量液體體積。

gept.example_en: Stoichiometry uses balanced equations to predict exact quantities of products formed.
gept.example_zh: 化學計量學利用平衡方程式來預測所生成產物的精確數量。

gept.example_en: Combustion is a strongly exothermic reaction that releases heat and bright light.
gept.example_zh: 燃燒是強烈放熱的反應，會釋放熱與明亮光線。

gept.example_en: Photosynthesis is endothermic because plants absorb sunlight energy to synthesize glucose molecules.
gept.example_zh: 光合作用是吸熱的，因為植物吸收陽光能量來合成葡萄糖分子。

gept.example_en: A moving baseball possesses kinetic energy proportional to its mass and velocity squared.
gept.example_zh: 移動中的棒球擁有與質量及速度平方成正比的動能。

gept.example_en: An adiabatic compression occurs without any heat transfer between the gas and surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 絕熱壓縮過程中氣體與外界之間沒有任何熱量傳遞。

gept.example_en: Honey has higher viscosity than water and flows much more slowly downhill.
gept.example_zh: 蜂蜜的黏度高於水，沿坡向下流動慢得多。

gept.example_en: Refraction makes a straight straw appear bent at the surface of a glass.
gept.example_zh: 折射使筆直的吸管在玻璃杯水面處看起來彎曲。

gept.example_en: A fermion obeys the exclusion principle preventing two of them from sharing states.
gept.example_zh: 費米子遵守不相容原理，禁止兩個費米子處於相同狀態。

gept.example_en: The photon is a boson and many of them can occupy the same state.
gept.example_zh: 光子是玻色子，許多光子可以佔據相同的狀態。

gept.example_en: A proton contains three quarks bound tightly together by the strong nuclear force.
gept.example_zh: 質子包含三個被強核力緊密束縛在一起的夸克。

gept.example_en: A hadron is any composite particle held together by the strong interaction force.
gept.example_zh: 強子是任何由強交互作用結合在一起的複合粒子。

gept.example_en: An electron is the most familiar lepton encountered in everyday electrical phenomena.
gept.example_zh: 電子是日常電現象中最熟悉的輕子。

gept.example_en: When matter meets antimatter they annihilate, releasing energy according to Einstein's equation.
gept.example_zh: 當物質遇到反物質時會湮滅，依愛因斯坦方程式釋放出能量。

gept.example_en: Each nuclide is defined by specific numbers of protons and neutrons it contains.
gept.example_zh: 每個核種由其所含的特定質子和中子數定義。

gept.example_en: Unstable nuclei decay spontaneously, emitting particles and gradually transforming into different elements.
gept.example_zh: 不穩定的核會自發衰變，發射出粒子並逐漸轉變成不同的元素。

gept.example_en: Gamma radiation can penetrate thick lead shielding and requires careful handling protocols.
gept.example_zh: γ 輻射能穿透厚的鉛屏蔽，需要謹慎的處理程序。

gept.example_en: The study of magnetism examines how moving charges and aligned spins create fields.
gept.example_zh: 磁學研究移動電荷與排列自旋如何產生磁場。

gept.example_en: Magnetic flux through a coil changes whenever the surrounding field strength varies suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 當周圍磁場強度突然變化時，通過線圈的磁通量也會改變。

gept.example_en: The permittivity of a material determines how easily electric fields pass through it.
gept.example_zh: 材料的介電常數決定電場通過該材料的難易程度。

gept.example_en: Iron has high permeability, which makes it useful for cores of efficient transformers.
gept.example_zh: 鐵的磁導率高，因此適合用作高效變壓器的鐵芯。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 延展性的；可拉成細絲的
gept.example_en: Gold is highly ductile and can be drawn into incredibly thin wires easily.
gept.example_zh: 黃金延展性極高，可以輕易地拉成極細的金絲。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可鍛造的；可塑的
gept.example_en: Lead is so malleable that craftsmen can hammer it into sheets without cracking.
gept.example_zh: 鉛的可鍛造性極高，工匠能將其敲打成薄片而不會碎裂。

gept.example_en: Engineers measured the tensile strength to find when the steel cable would snap.
gept.example_zh: 工程師測量抗拉強度以判斷鋼索何時會斷裂。

gept.example_en: Mechanical stress in beams must stay below the safe limit specified by codes.
gept.example_zh: 梁中的機械應力必須維持在規範規定的安全限值以下。

gept.example_en: Atoms in a crystal arrange themselves in a repeating three dimensional lattice pattern.
gept.example_zh: 晶體中的原子以重複的三維晶格排列方式自我組織。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 非晶質的；無定形的
gept.example_en: Glass is amorphous because its atoms lack any long range orderly arrangement.
gept.example_zh: 玻璃是非晶質的，因為其原子缺乏任何長程的有序排列。

gept.example_en: Workers anneal copper wire by heating then cooling slowly to remove internal stresses.
gept.example_zh: 工人透過加熱再緩慢冷卻來退火銅線，以消除內部應力。

gept.example_en: Blacksmiths quench red hot steel in oil to make tools become extremely hard.
gept.example_zh: 鐵匠將通紅的鋼浸入油中淬火，使工具變得極為堅硬。

gept.example_en: After quenching, smiths temper the steel to reduce brittleness while keeping much hardness.
gept.example_zh: 淬火後鐵匠對鋼進行回火，以降低脆性同時保留大部分硬度。

gept.example_en: Aluminum extrusion pushes heated billets through dies to form long uniform cross sections.
gept.example_zh: 鋁擠製將加熱的胚料推過模具，形成均勻一致的長截面。

gept.example_en: Injection molding rapidly produces millions of identical plastic parts at relatively low cost.
gept.example_zh: 射出成型能以相對低的成本快速生產數百萬個一致的塑膠零件。

gept.example_en: Carbon fiber composite offers high strength yet remains much lighter than steel beams.
gept.example_zh: 碳纖維複合材料強度高，卻比鋼梁輕得多。

gept.example_en: A battery electrolyte allows ions to migrate between the positive and negative electrodes.
gept.example_zh: 電池的電解質允許離子在正負電極之間遷移。

gept.example_en: Each electrode in the cell either gains or loses electrons during electrochemical reactions.
gept.example_zh: 電池中的每個電極在電化學反應中分別獲得或失去電子。

gept.example_en: Oxidation happens at the anode, where electrons leave the electrochemical cell externally.
gept.example_zh: 氧化反應發生在陽極，電子從電化學電池外部離開該處。

gept.example_en: Reduction takes place at the cathode, where positive ions arrive and gain electrons.
gept.example_zh: 還原反應發生在陰極，正離子到達該處並獲得電子。

gept.example_en: Workers galvanize steel by coating it with zinc to prevent rust on outdoor structures.
gept.example_zh: 工人透過鍍鋅來在鋼上塗覆鋅層，以防止戶外結構生鏽。

gept.example_en: Jewelers electroplate cheap metals with thin gold layers to create attractive shiny finishes.
gept.example_zh: 珠寶商在廉價金屬上電鍍薄薄一層金，以打造亮麗的外觀。

gept.example_en: A silicon wafer hosts hundreds of identical microchips before being cut into pieces.
gept.example_zh: 一片矽晶圓在被切割之前承載著數百顆相同的微晶片。

gept.example_en: Adding tiny amounts of boron via doping changes silicon into a p type semiconductor.
gept.example_zh: 透過摻雜微量硼，可將矽改變為 p 型半導體。

gept.example_en: Chemical etching removes selected silicon regions to define tiny transistor circuit patterns.
gept.example_zh: 化學蝕刻去除選定的矽區域，以定義微小的電晶體電路圖案。

gept.example_en: Photolithography projects circuit patterns onto silicon wafers using ultraviolet exposure through masks.
gept.example_zh: 光刻透過光罩以紫外線曝光，將電路圖案投射到矽晶圓上。

gept.example_en: Modern chip fabrication occurs inside cleanrooms where airborne dust is strictly limited.
gept.example_zh: 現代晶片製造在無塵室中進行，空氣中的灰塵受到嚴格限制。

gept.example_en: A fullerene molecule contains sixty carbon atoms arranged like a tiny soccer ball.
gept.example_zh: 一個富勒烯分子含有六十個碳原子，排列成如同小型足球的形狀。

gept.example_en: A carbon nanotube has remarkable strength and excellent electrical conductivity along its long axis.
gept.example_zh: 碳奈米管沿其長軸具有驚人的強度與優異的導電性。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 生物高分子；生物聚合物
gept.example_en: Cellulose is a natural biopolymer that gives strength to plant cell wall structures.
gept.example_zh: 纖維素是天然的生物高分子，為植物細胞壁結構提供強度。

gept.example_en: A thermoplastic softens upon heating and can be remelted many times for recycling.
gept.example_zh: 熱塑性塑膠加熱後變軟，可多次重新熔化以利回收。

gept.example_en: Once cured, a thermoset resin cannot be melted again or easily reshaped afterward.
gept.example_zh: 熱固性樹脂一旦固化後便無法再次熔化，也難以重新塑形。

gept.example_en: Two part epoxy cures into a strong bond useful for joining many different materials.
gept.example_zh: 兩劑型環氧樹脂固化後形成牢固黏接，適用於接合多種不同材料。

gept.example_en: Each alkene contains at least one carbon double bond enabling many addition reactions.
gept.example_zh: 每種烯類至少含有一個碳碳雙鍵，能進行多種加成反應。

gept.example_en: Acetylene is the most familiar alkyne, used in hot welding torches and lamps.
gept.example_zh: 乙炔是最常見的炔類，用於高溫焊接火炬與燈具中。

gept.example_en: An aliphatic compound has carbon atoms arranged in chains rather than aromatic rings.
gept.example_zh: 脂肪族化合物的碳原子以鏈狀排列，而非芳香族的環狀結構。

gept.example_en: Every alcohol contains a hydroxyl group attached to a saturated carbon atom directly.
gept.example_zh: 每種醇類都含有一個直接連接於飽和碳原子上的羥基。

gept.example_en: Acetone is a common ketone widely used as a solvent in nail polish removers.
gept.example_zh: 丙酮是常見的酮類，廣泛用作去光水中的溶劑。

gept.example_en: Many fruit flavors come from ester compounds formed by combining alcohols with acids.
gept.example_zh: 許多水果香氣來自由醇與酸結合所形成的酯類化合物。

gept.example_en: Each amide bond links amino acids together to form long protein chains in cells.
gept.example_zh: 每個醯胺鍵將胺基酸彼此連接，在細胞中形成長長的蛋白質鏈。

gept.example_en: The carboxyl group on acetic acid gives vinegar its sharp characteristic sour smell.
gept.example_zh: 醋酸上的羧基使醋帶有特徵性的刺鼻酸味。

gept.example_en: A hydroxyl group consists of one oxygen bonded directly to a single hydrogen.
gept.example_zh: 羥基由一個氧原子直接與一個氫原子鍵結組成。

gept.example_en: A halogen reacts vigorously with metals to form salts such as common table salt.
gept.example_zh: 鹵素與金屬劇烈反應，生成如食鹽般的鹽類。

gept.example_en: A noble gas resists chemical reactions because its outermost electron shell is full.
gept.example_zh: 惰性氣體因最外層電子殼層已滿，難以發生化學反應。

gept.example_en: A lanthanide is used in strong magnets, lasers, and many advanced electronic components today.
gept.example_zh: 鑭系元素今日用於強力磁鐵、雷射，以及許多先進電子元件中。

gept.example_en: A transition metal forms colorful compounds because of unfilled inner electron orbital shells.
gept.example_zh: 過渡金屬因內部電子軌域未填滿，會形成色彩鮮豔的化合物。

gept.example_en: Iron chelate fertilizers deliver nutrients to plants more effectively than simpler iron salts.
gept.example_zh: 鐵螯合物肥料比簡單的鐵鹽更有效地將養分傳遞到植物中。

gept.example_en: Engineers mixed stoichiometric quantities of reactants to maximize the yield of pure product.
gept.example_zh: 工程師按化學計量比例混合反應物，以最大化純產物的產率。

gept.example_en: The yield-rate of the new catalyst exceeded ninety percent under mild laboratory conditions.
gept.example_zh: 在溫和的實驗條件下，新催化劑的反應產率超過百分之九十。

gept.example_en: Engineers use a viscometer to ensure motor oil flows correctly across operating temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 工程師使用黏度計確保機油在各操作溫度下能正確流動。

gept.example_en: A simple manometer uses a U shaped tube of mercury to measure gas pressure.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的壓力計使用 U 形水銀管來測量氣體壓力。

gept.example_en: Infrared spectroscopy reveals which chemical bonds are present in an unknown organic sample.
gept.example_zh: 紅外光譜學能揭示未知有機樣品中存在哪些化學鍵。

gept.example_en: Phosphorescence lets glow in the dark stickers continue shining minutes after lights go off.
gept.example_zh: 磷光使夜光貼紙在關燈後仍能持續發光數分鐘。

gept.example_en: An old incandescent bulb wastes most electricity as heat rather than visible light.
gept.example_zh: 舊式白熾燈泡將大部分電力以熱能而非可見光浪費掉。

gept.example_en: A laser emits a tightly focused beam of light with a single well defined color.
gept.example_zh: 雷射發出一道高度聚焦、色彩單一明確的光束。

gept.example_en: A magnetron tube generates the microwaves that heat food rapidly in modern ovens.
gept.example_zh: 磁控管產生微波，使現代微波爐中的食物迅速被加熱。

gept.example_en: A cyclotron accelerates charged particles in a spiral path using a strong magnetic field.
gept.example_zh: 迴旋加速器利用強磁場使帶電粒子沿螺旋路徑加速。

gept.example_en: The collider smashes proton beams at nearly light speed to probe fundamental particle physics.
gept.example_zh: 對撞機以接近光速使質子束碰撞，以探究基本粒子物理。

gept.example_en: A synchrotron produces intense X-rays used to study atomic structures of advanced materials.
gept.example_zh: 同步輻射加速器產生強烈 X 射線，用以研究先進材料的原子結構。

gept.example_en: Cryogenics studies extreme cold needed for superconductors and liquid hydrogen rocket propellants.
gept.example_zh: 低溫學研究超導體與液氫火箭推進劑所需的極低溫狀態。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 低溫恆溫器；冷凍恆溫設備
gept.example_en: The sample sat inside a cryostat cooled to just a few degrees above absolute zero.
gept.example_zh: 樣品置於低溫恆溫器中，被冷卻至絕對零度以上僅幾度。

gept.example_en: A handheld magnetometer detects buried iron objects by measuring small magnetic field anomalies.
gept.example_zh: 手持磁力計透過測量微小磁場異常來偵測埋藏的鐵製物體。

gept.example_en: She connected a voltmeter across the resistor to measure the voltage drop directly.
gept.example_zh: 她在電阻器兩端連接伏特計，以直接測量電壓降。

gept.example_en: An ammeter is wired in series so all current flows through it for measurement.
gept.example_zh: 電流計以串聯方式接入，使所有電流通過它以進行測量。

gept.example_en: Turning the rheostat changed the lamp brightness by adjusting electrical resistance smoothly.
gept.example_zh: 轉動變阻器透過平滑調整電阻來改變燈的亮度。

gept.example_en: A potentiometer divides voltage to provide finely adjustable control of an output signal.
gept.example_zh: 電位計將電壓分壓，以提供輸出訊號的精細可調控制。

gept.example_en: An open circuit prevents current from flowing because the conducting path is broken.
gept.example_zh: 開路電路因導電路徑斷開，使電流無法流動。

gept.example_en: A chloride anion carries one negative charge after gaining a single extra electron.
gept.example_zh: 氯離子在獲得一個額外電子後帶有一個負電荷，是陰離子。

gept.example_en: A sodium cation forms when a neutral sodium atom loses its single outer electron.
gept.example_zh: 中性鈉原子失去其唯一外層電子時，便形成鈉陽離子。

gept.example_en: The valency of oxygen is two, since it readily forms two chemical bonds.
gept.example_zh: 氧的化合價為二，因為它很容易形成兩個化學鍵。

gept.example_en: Baking soda can neutralize spilled acid before the chemical damages a laboratory floor.
gept.example_zh: 在化學品損壞實驗室地板之前，小蘇打可以中和潑灑的酸。

gept.example_en: Sodium hydroxide is a strong alkali used widely to make soap from animal fat.
gept.example_zh: 氫氧化鈉是強鹼，廣泛用於由動物脂肪製造肥皂。

gept.example_en: Rotational motion describes how rigid bodies spin around fixed axes within mechanical systems.
gept.example_zh: 旋轉運動描述剛體在機械系統中繞固定軸自轉的方式。

gept.example_en: Translational motion moves the entire object without any rotation about its own center.
gept.example_zh: 平移運動使整個物體位移，而不繞自身中心發生任何轉動。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 耐火的；耐高溫的
gept.example_en: Industrial furnaces are lined with refractory bricks that withstand extreme operating temperatures.
gept.example_zh: 工業熔爐內襯耐火磚，能承受極端的操作溫度。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 磨蝕的；磨料
gept.example_en: Sand paper uses an abrasive surface to remove thin layers from wooden boards.
gept.example_zh: 砂紙利用磨蝕表面從木板上去除薄薄一層材料。

gept.example_en: A good lubricant reduces friction between moving parts and extends engine service life.
gept.example_zh: 良好的潤滑劑能減少運動部件之間的摩擦，延長引擎使用壽命。

gept.example_en: Repeated abrasion eventually wears down brake pads until they need full replacement soon.
gept.example_zh: 反覆磨損最終會耗盡煞車片，使其很快需要完全更換。

gept.example_en: The ductility of copper allows it to stretch into wires without easily breaking apart.
gept.example_zh: 銅的延展性使其能拉成導線而不易斷裂。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 聚合作用；聚合反應
gept.example_en: Polymerization joins small monomer units into long chains during plastic manufacturing processes.
gept.example_zh: 聚合作用在塑膠製造過程中將小單體單元連接成長鏈。

gept.example_en: Vulcanization cross links rubber chains with sulfur, producing tougher tires and stronger seals.
gept.example_zh: 硫化作用以硫使橡膠鏈交聯，產生更堅韌的輪胎和更牢固的密封件。

gept.example_en: Each elastomer can stretch significantly under load and then snap back to its original shape.
gept.example_zh: 每種彈性體在負載下可大幅延展，然後迅速回彈到原始形狀。

gept.example_en: Crushed stone aggregate gives concrete much of its compressive strength when bound by cement.
gept.example_zh: 碎石骨料在水泥膠結下，為混凝土提供大部分的抗壓強度。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 繞射光柵；衍射光柵
gept.example_en: A diffraction-grating spreads light into precise spectral lines for chemical analytical instruments.
gept.example_zh: 繞射光柵將光分散成精確的光譜線，供化學分析儀器使用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 光譜攝譜儀；分光儀
gept.example_en: Astronomers attach a spectrograph to telescopes to record stellar spectra in fine detail.
gept.example_zh: 天文學家將分光儀接到望遠鏡上，以精細記錄恆星光譜。

gept.example_en: Engineers coat a wafer with photoresist before exposing it through a patterned mask carefully.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在晶圓上塗覆光阻劑後，再透過圖案光罩仔細曝光。

gept.example_en: A phosphorus dopant introduces extra free electrons into silicon to create n type conductivity.
gept.example_zh: 磷摻雜劑將額外的自由電子引入矽中，以形成 n 型導電性。

gept.example_en: Wafering slices large silicon ingots into thin disks used for chip manufacturing afterward.
gept.example_zh: 晶圓切割將大型矽錠切成薄圓盤，供後續晶片製造使用。

gept.example_en: A long silicon ingot is grown slowly from a pure molten bath under careful control.
gept.example_zh: 長矽錠在嚴格控制下，從純熔融液中緩慢生長而成。

gept.example_en: Post implant annealing repairs lattice damage caused by ion bombardment during chip fabrication.
gept.example_zh: 離子植入後的退火處理可修復晶片製造中離子轟擊所造成的晶格損傷。

gept.example_en: Ion implantation precisely introduces dopants into specific depths within silicon device regions.
gept.example_zh: 離子植入精確地將摻雜原子引入矽元件區域內的特定深度。

gept.example_en: A passivation layer protects sensitive chip surfaces from moisture and chemical contamination effectively.
gept.example_zh: 鈍化層有效保護敏感的晶片表面免受水氣與化學污染。

gept.example_en: Plastic encapsulation seals microchips inside packages with protective lead frames and electrical pins.
gept.example_zh: 塑膠封裝將微晶片密封於含保護導線架與電氣接腳的封裝體內。

gept.example_en: A thermoelectric module converts temperature differences into useful direct current electrical power directly.
gept.example_zh: 熱電模組可直接將溫差轉換為實用的直流電力。

gept.example_en: A piezoelectric crystal generates a voltage when squeezed by mechanical pressure from outside.
gept.example_zh: 壓電晶體在外部機械壓力擠壓下會產生電壓。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 光伏電池；太陽能電池
gept.example_en: A photovoltaic-cell converts incoming sunlight directly into clean usable electric current immediately.
gept.example_zh: 光伏電池將射入的陽光直接立即轉換成乾淨可用的電流。

gept.example_en: The luminosity of a distant star depends on both its size and surface temperature.
gept.example_zh: 遙遠恆星的光度取決於它的大小與表面溫度。

gept.example_en: Solar irradiance varies with cloud cover, latitude, and angle of the sun overhead.
gept.example_zh: 太陽輻照度隨雲量、緯度與頭頂太陽的角度而變化。

gept.example_en: Building inspectors use thermography to locate hidden heat leaks behind exterior wall surfaces.
gept.example_zh: 建築檢查員使用熱像技術找出隱藏於外牆表面後方的熱漏點。

gept.example_en: Submarines use sonar to detect nearby objects underwater by sending and receiving sound pulses.
gept.example_zh: 潛艦使用聲納，透過發射並接收聲波脈衝來偵測水下附近的物體。

gept.example_en: A worn camshaft can cause the engine to lose power and run unevenly at high speeds.
gept.example_zh: 凸輪軸磨損會讓引擎在高速下喪失動力且運轉不順。

gept.example_en: The crankshaft converts the up-and-down motion of the pistons into rotation.
gept.example_zh: 曲軸將活塞的上下運動轉換為旋轉運動。

gept.example_en: The chain slipped because the sprocket teeth had worn down after years of use.
gept.example_zh: 鏈條打滑了，因為鏈輪的齒在多年使用後已經磨損。

gept.example_en: A rubber bushing reduces vibration between the metal parts of the suspension system.
gept.example_zh: 橡膠軸襯能減少懸吊系統金屬零件之間的震動。

gept.example_en: A rubber grommet protects the wires where they pass through the metal panel.
gept.example_zh: 橡膠護套保護電線穿過金屬面板時不被磨損。

gept.example_en: Older motorcycles still use a carburetor to mix fuel with air before combustion.
gept.example_zh: 較舊的機車仍使用化油器在燃燒前混合燃料與空氣。

gept.example_en: The breaker tripped because the amperage exceeded the rated limit for that circuit.
gept.example_zh: 由於電流超過該電路的額定上限，斷路器跳脫了。

gept.example_en: The impedance of the speaker must match the output of the amplifier for best sound.
gept.example_zh: 喇叭的阻抗必須與擴大機的輸出匹配，才能達到最佳音質。

gept.example_en: Copper has higher conductance than steel, which is why it is preferred for wiring.
gept.example_zh: 銅的電導比鋼高，因此較常用於電線。

gept.example_en: The intricate circuitry inside the phone is far smaller than a single fingernail.
gept.example_zh: 手機內部複雜的電路系統遠比一片指甲還小。

gept.example_en: A damaged wiring-harness can cause multiple electrical faults throughout the vehicle.
gept.example_zh: 線束受損可能導致整輛車多處電氣故障。

gept.example_en: Loose wires at the terminal-block can cause intermittent power failures in industrial equipment.
gept.example_zh: 端子台的電線鬆動可能造成工業設備間歇性斷電。

gept.example_en: The rectifier converts alternating current into the direct current the device requires.
gept.example_zh: 整流器將交流電轉換成裝置所需的直流電。

gept.example_en: Before touching the wire, check it with a multimeter to confirm the power is off.
gept.example_zh: 觸碰電線前，先用三用電表確認電源已關閉。

gept.example_en: Each joint of the small robot is driven by a precisely controlled servo motor.
gept.example_zh: 這個小型機器人的每個關節都由精確控制的伺服馬達驅動。

gept.example_en: Modern excavators rely on powerful hydraulics to lift heavy loads of soil and rock.
gept.example_zh: 現代挖土機依靠強大的液壓系統來抬起沉重的土石。

gept.example_en: Factory robots often use pneumatics because compressed air is clean and fast acting.
gept.example_zh: 工廠機器人常使用氣動，因為壓縮空氣乾淨且反應迅速。

gept.example_en: The armature winding inside the motor was burnt out and had to be rewound.
gept.example_zh: 馬達內的電樞繞組已燒毀，必須重新繞線。

gept.example_en: The commutator allows direct current to flow through the rotating armature of the motor.
gept.example_zh: 換向器讓直流電通過旋轉中的電樞。

gept.example_en: Raw material is loaded into the hopper and fed into the machine by gravity.
gept.example_zh: 原料倒入漏斗料斗後，依靠重力送入機器。

gept.example_en: Steel rivets hold the aircraft skin tightly to the underlying frame.
gept.example_zh: 鋼鉚釘將飛機外殼緊緊固定在內部骨架上。

gept.example_en: They spread fresh grout between the tiles and wiped off the excess with a damp sponge.
gept.example_zh: 他們在磁磚間填上新的填縫劑，再用濕海綿擦掉多餘的部分。

gept.example_en: The formwork must be sturdy enough to hold the concrete until it fully hardens.
gept.example_zh: 模板必須夠堅固，才能撐住混凝土直到完全硬化。

gept.example_en: The wooden truss supports the roof and distributes the load to the outer walls.
gept.example_zh: 木桁架支撐屋頂並將載重分散至外牆。

gept.example_en: The balcony cantilevers out three meters from the side of the building.
gept.example_zh: 陽台以懸臂方式從建築側面伸出三公尺。

gept.example_en: A foam underlayment beneath the laminate reduces noise and adds a slight cushioning effect.
gept.example_zh: 層壓地板下的泡棉底襯能降低噪音並提供些許緩衝。

gept.example_en: Always depressurize the system before opening any valve to avoid sudden fluid release.
gept.example_zh: 打開任何閥門前都要先將系統減壓，以免液體突然噴出。

gept.example_en: Pilots monitor manifold-pressure to ensure the engine produces the expected amount of power.
gept.example_zh: 飛行員監控歧管壓力，確保引擎輸出預期的功率。

gept.example_en: The new car has a sleek, aerodynamic body that improves both speed and efficiency.
gept.example_zh: 新車擁有流線型、符合空氣動力學的車身，可提升速度與效率。

gept.example_en: Passengers sit inside the long, cylindrical fuselage of the commercial jet.
gept.example_zh: 乘客坐在商用客機長而圓筒狀的機身內。

gept.example_en: The empennage at the rear of the aircraft provides both stability and control.
gept.example_zh: 位於機尾的尾翼總成提供穩定性與操控能力。

gept.example_en: The pilot moved the aileron to roll the aircraft gently into a controlled turn.
gept.example_zh: 飛行員操作副翼，讓飛機平緩地滾轉進入受控的轉彎。

gept.example_en: Engineers analyzed the telemetry-data from the rocket to find the cause of the malfunction.
gept.example_zh: 工程師分析火箭的遙測資料，以找出故障原因。

gept.example_en: Workers spent weeks preparing the launchpad for the next major rocket mission.
gept.example_zh: 工人花了好幾週準備發射台，迎接下一次重大火箭任務。

gept.example_en: The catalytic-converter changes harmful gases into less toxic substances before they exit the exhaust.
gept.example_zh: 觸媒轉化器將有害氣體轉換成毒性較低的物質，才從排氣管排出。

gept.example_en: Glance at the tachometer to confirm the engine speed before shifting up a gear.
gept.example_zh: 換高檔前先看一下轉速計，確認引擎轉速。

gept.example_en: A thermocouple measures temperatures inside the furnace far higher than any standard thermometer can read.
gept.example_zh: 熱電偶能測量爐內遠高於一般溫度計量測範圍的溫度。

gept.example_en: The factory uses a laser-cutter to slice precise shapes out of thick steel plate.
gept.example_zh: 這間工廠使用雷射切割機從厚鋼板切出精準的形狀。

gept.example_en: A plasma-cutter slices through heavy metal much faster than traditional cutting tools.
gept.example_zh: 電漿切割機切割厚重金屬比傳統切割工具快得多。

gept.example_en: The caliper-vernier allowed the apprentice to read the dimension with great accuracy.
gept.example_zh: 游標卡尺讓學徒能以高準度讀出尺寸。

gept.example_en: The bricklayer used a plumb-line to make sure the wall rose perfectly vertical.
gept.example_zh: 砌磚工以鉛垂線確保牆面完全垂直地砌起。

gept.example_en: Set the spirit-level on the shelf to check whether it is mounted truly horizontal.
gept.example_zh: 把水平儀放在層板上，檢查是否真正水平。

gept.example_en: A geotechnical report describes how the soil at the site will behave under heavy loads.
gept.example_zh: 大地工程報告說明工地土壤在重載下的行為。

gept.example_en: Engineers drilled a deep borehole to study the soil layers beneath the proposed tower.
gept.example_zh: 工程師鑽了一個深鑽孔，研究預定塔樓下方的土層。

gept.example_en: Deep piling was needed to support the heavy building on the soft riverbank.
gept.example_zh: 在鬆軟的河岸上建造重型建築需要深層打樁。

gept.example_en: Workers poured a thick foundation-slab in a single continuous operation.
gept.example_zh: 工人以單次連續作業澆灌出一塊厚厚的基礎板。

gept.example_en: A large culvert beneath the road carries the small stream from one side to the other.
gept.example_zh: 道路下方的大涵洞將小溪從一側引到另一側。

gept.example_en: The ancient aqueduct still carries fresh water across the valley to nearby villages.
gept.example_zh: 古老的引水道至今仍將淡水跨越山谷送到附近的村莊。

gept.example_en: Water rushes down the penstock from the reservoir to the turbines deep inside the dam.
gept.example_zh: 水從水庫沿壓力水管沖入大壩深處的渦輪。

gept.example_en: The dam spillway opened automatically when heavy rainfall raised the reservoir level.
gept.example_zh: 當豪雨使水庫水位上升時，大壩溢洪道自動開啟。

gept.example_en: Operators opened the sluice slowly to let irrigation water flow into the canal.
gept.example_zh: 操作員緩慢開啟水閘，讓灌溉水流入溝渠。

gept.example_en: The building's hvac system maintains a comfortable temperature throughout all four seasons.
gept.example_zh: 這棟建築的暖通空調系統維持四季都舒適的溫度。

gept.example_en: A metal baffle inside the silencer redirects exhaust gases and reduces engine noise.
gept.example_zh: 消音器內的金屬擋板能改變排氣方向並降低引擎噪音。

gept.example_en: Crystallography reveals the precise arrangement of atoms inside a solid material.
gept.example_zh: 晶體學揭示固體材料內部原子排列的精準方式。

gept.example_en: Modern metallurgy combines chemistry, physics, and engineering to create stronger alloys.
gept.example_zh: 現代冶金學結合化學、物理與工程，製造出更堅韌的合金。

gept.example_en: The smelting of iron ore separates the metal from the surrounding rock and impurities.
gept.example_zh: 熔煉鐵礦能將金屬從周圍的岩石與雜質中分離出來。

gept.example_en: Most small plastic parts are produced using high-speed injection-molding machines.
gept.example_zh: 大多數小型塑膠零件是以高速射出成型機生產的。

gept.example_en: Plastic packaging is often made by thermoforming a heated sheet over a shaped mold.
gept.example_zh: 塑膠包裝常透過將加熱的塑膠片以熱成型方式覆蓋在模具上製成。

gept.example_en: Modern cnc machines cut intricate metal parts based on a digital design file.
gept.example_zh: 現代電腦數控機台可依據數位設計檔切削出複雜的金屬零件。

gept.example_en: Engineers create detailed three-dimensional models using cad software before manufacturing begins.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在製造開始前以電腦輔助設計軟體建立詳細的三維模型。

gept.example_en: A finite-element analysis predicts how the bridge will behave under different loads.
gept.example_zh: 有限元素分析能預測橋樑在不同荷重下的反應。

gept.example_en: Each new race car spends weeks in the wind-tunnel to improve its aerodynamic performance.
gept.example_zh: 每款新賽車都會在風洞中測試數週，以改善其空氣動力性能。

gept.example_en: The yield-strength of this steel is high enough for use in load-bearing columns.
gept.example_zh: 這款鋼材的降伏強度足以用於承重柱。
