gept.example_en: Engineers measured the flexural strength of the beam by bending it under a heavy load.
gept.example_zh: 工程師以重載彎曲樑材，量測其彎曲強度。

gept.example_en: Non-destructive testing finds hidden cracks without damaging the inspected part.
gept.example_zh: 非破壞性檢測能找出內部裂紋而不損及受檢零件。

gept.example_en: Inspectors use an ultrasonic-test to detect internal flaws inside the welded joint.
gept.example_zh: 檢驗員使用超音波檢測來發現焊接接頭內部的缺陷。

gept.example_en: Industrial radiography reveals tiny voids inside thick metal castings.
gept.example_zh: 工業射線照相術可顯示厚金屬鑄件中的微小空洞。

gept.example_en: Every engineer reads the datasheet carefully before designing a circuit with a new chip.
gept.example_zh: 每位工程師在使用新晶片設計電路前都會仔細閱讀資料表。

gept.example_en: All electronic components are soldered onto the pcb to form a complete working circuit.
gept.example_zh: 所有電子元件都焊接到印刷電路板上，組成完整可運作的電路。

gept.example_en: Students prototype circuits on a breadboard before transferring the design to a permanent pcb.
gept.example_zh: 學生先在麵包板上製作電路原型，再將設計轉移到正式的印刷電路板上。

gept.example_en: The team tried to reverse-engineer the device to understand how its sensor worked.
gept.example_zh: 團隊嘗試對該裝置進行逆向工程，以了解其感測器運作原理。

gept.example_en: Carbon fiber prepreg is cut to shape and then cured inside a high-pressure autoclave.
gept.example_zh: 碳纖維預浸料先裁切成型，再放入高壓釜中固化。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 高壓滅菌器；高壓釜
gept.example_en: The autoclave cures composite parts under both high heat and high pressure.
gept.example_zh: 高壓釜在高溫高壓下使複合材料零件固化。

gept.example_en: Manufacturers vulcanize rubber by heating it with sulfur to improve elasticity and strength.
gept.example_zh: 製造商以硫加熱橡膠進行硫化，以改善其彈性與強度。

gept.example_en: They powder-coat the steel frame to give it a tough, even, weather-resistant finish.
gept.example_zh: 他們對鋼架進行粉體塗裝，使其表面堅韌、均勻且耐候。

gept.example_en: Workers sandblast old paint off the bridge before applying a fresh coat of protective primer.
gept.example_zh: 工人先以噴砂處理去除橋上的舊漆，再塗上一層新的保護底漆。

gept.example_en: Operators carefully deburr each machined edge before the part moves to the next station.
gept.example_zh: 操作員仔細去除每個加工邊緣的毛邊，零件才會送到下一站。

gept.example_en: A small chamfer along the edge makes the part safer to handle and easier to assemble.
gept.example_zh: 沿邊緣加上小小的倒角，讓零件更安全好拿，也更容易組裝。

gept.example_en: You should countersink the holes so that screw heads sit flush with the surface.
gept.example_zh: 應該將孔鑽鍃下去，讓螺絲頭與表面齊平。

gept.example_en: Mismatched thread-pitch is a common reason that a bolt refuses to enter its nut.
gept.example_zh: 螺紋牙距不符是螺栓無法旋入螺帽的常見原因。

gept.example_en: An automatic transmission uses a planetary-gear set to shift smoothly between ratios.
gept.example_zh: 自動變速箱以行星齒輪組在不同齒比間平順切換。

gept.example_en: A simple camlock secures the panel quickly without the need for any tools.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的凸輪鎖無需工具即可快速固定面板。

gept.example_en: A linkage connects the pedal to the throttle so the engine responds to the driver.
gept.example_zh: 連桿機構將踏板連到節氣門，讓引擎對駕駛者的動作作出反應。

gept.example_en: The slider-mechanism allows the panel to glide smoothly along the rail without friction.
gept.example_zh: 滑塊機構讓面板沿著導軌平順滑動而幾乎沒有摩擦。

gept.example_en: A mechanical watch keeps time using a finely tuned escapement and a balance wheel.
gept.example_zh: 機械錶透過精心調校的擒縱機構與擺輪來計時。

gept.example_en: A small detent in the lever clicks into place at each selected gear position.
gept.example_zh: 撥桿上的小定位栓會在每個選定的檔位卡入定位。

gept.example_en: The pawl drops into the teeth of the ratchet and prevents it from spinning backward.
gept.example_zh: 棘爪卡入棘輪齒中，防止其反向旋轉。

gept.example_en: A large cogwheel turns slowly inside the old factory clock above the front gate.
gept.example_zh: 工廠大門上方的舊鐘裡有一個大齒輪緩慢轉動。

gept.example_en: The chassis-rail bent slightly during the crash and had to be replaced entirely.
gept.example_zh: 碰撞中底盤縱樑略為彎曲，必須整根更換。

gept.example_en: Air traffic controllers in the control-tower direct every takeoff and landing at the airport.
gept.example_zh: 塔台中的航管人員指揮機場每一次的起飛與降落。

gept.example_en: Lidar sensors help self-driving cars build a detailed three-dimensional map of their surroundings.
gept.example_zh: 光達感測器幫助自駕車建立周圍環境的詳細三維地圖。

gept.example_en: The telemetry-link sends live performance data from the race car to the engineers in the pit.
gept.example_zh: 遙測連結將賽車的即時性能資料傳送給維修區的工程師。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 可程式邏輯控制器
gept.example_en: A plc controls the conveyor speed and the timing of each station on the factory line.
gept.example_zh: 可程式邏輯控制器控制工廠生產線上輸送帶速度與各站時序。

gept.example_en: A safety interlock stops the machine instantly if the protective guard is opened.
gept.example_zh: 安全連鎖裝置會在防護罩被打開時立刻停下機器。

gept.example_en: Aircraft use redundant-system designs so a single failure does not endanger the flight.
gept.example_zh: 飛機採用冗餘系統設計，使單一故障不致危及飛行安全。

gept.example_en: Good ergonomics in the cockpit reduces pilot fatigue during very long flights.
gept.example_zh: 駕駛艙良好的人因工程設計能減輕飛行員在長程飛行中的疲勞。

gept.example_en: Engineers improved the throughput-rate-line by adjusting station timing and reducing bottlenecks.
gept.example_zh: 工程師透過調整各站時序與減少瓶頸來提升生產線產出率。

gept.example_en: Lean-manufacturing principles eliminate waste at every stage of the production process.
gept.example_zh: 精實生產的原則消除生產過程每個階段的浪費。

gept.example_en: The team holds weekly kaizen meetings to identify small but useful workflow improvements.
gept.example_zh: 團隊每週召開持續改善會議，找出細小但有用的流程改進。

gept.example_en: Six-sigma methods reduce defects to fewer than four parts per million in mass production.
gept.example_zh: 六標準差方法將量產缺陷降低到百萬分之四以下。

gept.example_en: The robot's end-effector can be swapped quickly to handle different production tasks.
gept.example_zh: 機器人的末端執行器可快速更換，以處理不同的生產任務。

gept.example_en: A soft rubber gripper picks up the fragile glass bottles without scratching their surface.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的橡膠夾爪能夾起易碎的玻璃瓶且不刮傷其表面。

gept.example_en: A cobot works safely alongside human operators in many modern small factories.
gept.example_zh: 協作機器人能在許多現代小型工廠中與人類操作員安全共事。

gept.example_en: An agv moves heavy parts between workstations without any human driver involved.
gept.example_zh: 自動導引車能在各工作站之間搬運重型零件，無需任何人類駕駛。

gept.example_en: An oxyacetylene torch produces a flame hot enough to cut through thick steel plate.
gept.example_zh: 氧乙炔焊炬產生的火焰熱到足以切穿厚鋼板。

gept.example_en: Engineers inspected the reactor-vessel walls for any sign of corrosion or stress cracking.
gept.example_zh: 工程師檢查反應器槽體壁面，看有無腐蝕或應力裂紋。

gept.example_en: Effective catalysis speeds up the reaction without being consumed in the process.
gept.example_zh: 有效的催化作用能加速反應，本身又不在過程中被消耗掉。

gept.example_en: The mine pumps a thick slurry of water and ore particles through a long pipeline.
gept.example_zh: 礦場將濃稠的水與礦粒漿料透過長管線輸送出去。

gept.example_en: All factory effluent must be treated thoroughly before it returns to the local river.
gept.example_zh: 所有工廠廢水都必須徹底處理，才能排回當地河流。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 脫碳；減少二氧化碳排放
gept.example_en: Many corporations have pledged to decarbonize their supply chains within the next two decades.
gept.example_zh: 許多企業承諾在未來二十年內讓供應鏈脫碳。

gept.example_en: Sustainable feedstock such as agricultural waste can replace petroleum in many plastic products.
gept.example_zh: 農業廢料等永續原料可在許多塑膠製品中取代石油。

gept.example_en: Airlines are increasingly using biofuel-blend mixtures to reduce emissions on long-haul flights.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司日益使用生質燃料混合物以減少長程航班的排放。

gept.example_en: Fine particulates from diesel exhaust contribute significantly to respiratory illnesses in urban areas.
gept.example_zh: 柴油廢氣中的細懸浮微粒大幅造成都市地區的呼吸道疾病。

gept.example_en: The government introduced a carbon-tax to discourage heavy emitters and fund renewable projects.
gept.example_zh: 政府推出碳稅以遏止高排放者並資助再生能源計畫。

gept.example_en: The cap-and-trade system allows companies to buy and sell emission allowances on the market.
gept.example_zh: 總量管制與交易制度允許公司在市場上買賣排放配額。

gept.example_en: Forests provide natural carbon sequestration by absorbing carbon dioxide through photosynthesis.
gept.example_zh: 森林透過光合作用吸收二氧化碳提供天然碳封存。

gept.example_en: Large-scale afforestation projects could help offset emissions while restoring degraded land.
gept.example_zh: 大規模造林計畫可協助抵銷排放並復育退化土地。

gept.example_en: Rewilding initiatives reintroduce native species to restore balance in damaged ecosystems.
gept.example_zh: 野化復育倡議重新引入原生物種以恢復受損生態系統的平衡。

gept.example_en: Melting permafrost releases methane that further accelerates global climate warming.
gept.example_zh: 永凍土融化釋放甲烷，進一步加速全球氣候暖化。

gept.example_en: Polar ice sheets have high albedo and reflect significant solar radiation back into space.
gept.example_zh: 極地冰原具有高反照率，能將大量太陽輻射反射回太空。

gept.example_en: Most scientists agree that recent warming is largely anthropogenic in origin.
gept.example_zh: 多數科學家同意近期暖化主要起因於人為活動。

gept.example_en: Most weather phenomena occur in the troposphere, the lowest layer of the atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 大多數天氣現象發生在對流層，即大氣最低層。

gept.example_en: New filters on every smokestack significantly reduced sulfur emissions from the refinery.
gept.example_zh: 每根煙囪上的新濾網大幅降低煉油廠的硫排放。

gept.example_en: Treatment plants dewater sludge before transporting it to authorized disposal sites.
gept.example_zh: 處理廠在將污泥運往認可處置場前會先脫水。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 滲出液；垃圾滲漏液
gept.example_en: Modern landfills capture leachate to prevent toxic chemicals from contaminating groundwater.
gept.example_zh: 現代垃圾掩埋場會收集滲漏液以防有毒化學物污染地下水。

gept.example_en: Steel mills are finding new ways to recycle slag as construction aggregate.
gept.example_zh: 煉鋼廠正尋找新方法將爐渣作為建築骨料回收利用。

gept.example_en: Mining tailings often contain heavy metals that threaten nearby rivers and wetlands.
gept.example_zh: 採礦尾礦常含有重金屬，威脅鄰近河流與濕地。

gept.example_en: Communities near fracking sites complain about water contamination and minor seismic activity.
gept.example_zh: 水力壓裂場址附近的社區抱怨水污染及輕微地震活動。

gept.example_en: Shale formations hold vast natural gas reserves accessible through advanced drilling techniques.
gept.example_zh: 頁岩層蘊藏可透過先進鑽探技術開採的龐大天然氣儲量。

gept.example_en: Midstream companies operate the pipelines and storage tanks that move oil and gas.
gept.example_zh: 中游公司營運運輸石油與天然氣的管線及儲槽。

gept.example_en: Downstream-energy activities focus on refining crude oil and distributing fuel to end consumers.
gept.example_zh: 能源下游業務專注於精煉原油並將燃料配送給終端消費者。

gept.example_en: Generous feed-in tariffs accelerated rooftop solar adoption across many European nations.
gept.example_zh: 豐厚的躉購電價加速許多歐洲國家屋頂太陽能的普及。

gept.example_en: Many remote villages now run on off-grid solar systems with battery backup.
gept.example_zh: 許多偏遠村莊現以離網太陽能系統搭配電池備援運作。

gept.example_en: A community microgrid kept hospitals operating during the regional power outage.
gept.example_zh: 社區微電網讓醫院在區域性停電期間持續運作。

gept.example_en: A smart-meter helps households track real-time electricity usage and reduce monthly bills.
gept.example_zh: 智慧電表協助家庭追蹤即時用電並降低每月帳單。

gept.example_en: Regional operators interconnect grids to share renewable power across long distances.
gept.example_zh: 區域業者將電網互聯，以便長距離分享再生能源電力。

gept.example_en: High-voltage transmission-line upgrades reduce losses when moving electricity over hundreds of kilometers.
gept.example_zh: 高壓輸電線路升級可減少電力傳輸數百公里時的損耗。

gept.example_en: Operators rehearse blackstart procedures to restore the grid after a total system failure.
gept.example_zh: 業者演練黑啟動程序，以便在系統全面故障後恢復電網。

gept.example_en: Offshore wind farms boast a high capacity-factor thanks to strong and steady marine winds.
gept.example_zh: 離岸風場因強勁穩定的海風而擁有高容量因子。

gept.example_en: Nuclear plants traditionally supply baseload power that runs around the clock.
gept.example_zh: 核能電廠傳統上提供全天候運轉的基載電力。

gept.example_en: Battery storage systems are replacing fossil peaker units during evening demand surges.
gept.example_zh: 電池儲能系統正在傍晚需求飆升時取代化石燃料尖峰電廠。

gept.example_en: Technicians climb inside the nacelle to perform routine maintenance on the generator.
gept.example_zh: 技術人員爬入機艙對發電機進行例行維護。

gept.example_en: Onshore turbines are cheaper to install but often face local opposition over noise.
gept.example_zh: 陸上風機安裝成本較低，但常因噪音遭當地反對。

gept.example_en: Workers drove a steel monopile into the seabed to anchor the offshore wind turbine.
gept.example_zh: 工人將鋼製單樁打入海床以錨定離岸風機。

gept.example_en: A jacket-foundation supports each turbine in waters too deep for monopiles.
gept.example_zh: 在水深過大不適合單樁的海域，套管式基座支撐每台風機。

gept.example_en: Perovskite materials promise cheaper and more efficient solar cells in coming years.
gept.example_zh: 鈣鈦礦材料有望在未來幾年帶來更便宜、效率更高的太陽能電池。

gept.example_en: A solar concentrator uses mirrors to focus sunlight onto a small high-efficiency cell.
gept.example_zh: 太陽能聚光器使用反射鏡將陽光聚焦至小型高效電池上。

gept.example_en: The country added five gigawatt of solar capacity in a single record-breaking year.
gept.example_zh: 該國在創紀錄的一年中新增了五千兆瓦的太陽能裝置容量。

gept.example_en: Global solar capacity is approaching one terawatt thanks to falling panel costs.
gept.example_zh: 由於面板成本下降，全球太陽能裝置容量正接近一兆瓦。

gept.example_en: Every joule of energy saved at home reduces strain on local power generation.
gept.example_zh: 家中每節省一焦耳能源都能減輕地方發電的壓力。

gept.example_en: Engineers measure heating output in BTU when comparing furnaces and air conditioning systems.
gept.example_zh: 工程師在比較暖爐與空調系統時以英熱單位衡量供熱輸出。

gept.example_en: A modern heatpump can replace both furnaces and air conditioners while saving energy.
gept.example_zh: 現代熱泵可同時取代暖爐與空調並節省能源。

gept.example_en: Volunteers helped low-income families weatherize their homes before the coldest winter months.
gept.example_zh: 志工協助低收入家庭在最冷月份前為住家加強耐候性。

gept.example_en: A passive-house design uses superior insulation and ventilation to minimize energy demand.
gept.example_zh: 被動式節能住宅設計利用優質隔熱與通風將能源需求降到最低。

gept.example_en: The new headquarters earned LEED platinum certification thanks to its sustainable features.
gept.example_zh: 新總部因其永續特性獲得 LEED 白金級認證。

gept.example_en: British developers often pursue BREEAM ratings to demonstrate environmental performance.
gept.example_zh: 英國開發商常追求 BREEAM 評等以展現環保表現。

gept.example_en: Concrete and steel contain high embodied-carbon levels compared with timber alternatives.
gept.example_zh: 與木材替代品相比，混凝土與鋼鐵含有高隱含碳。

gept.example_en: A lifecycle-assessment measures environmental impact from raw extraction to product disposal.
gept.example_zh: 生命週期評估衡量從原料開採到產品處置的環境衝擊。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 從搖籃到搖籃的
gept.example_en: Cradle-to-cradle design ensures every product component can be safely reused or composted.
gept.example_zh: 從搖籃到搖籃的設計確保每個產品組件都能安全再利用或堆肥。

gept.example_en: A circular-economy model keeps resources in use through repair, reuse, and recycling.
gept.example_zh: 循環經濟模式透過維修、再利用與回收讓資源持續使用。

gept.example_en: Many cities have banned single-use cutlery to reduce plastic pollution in waterways.
gept.example_zh: 許多城市禁止一次性餐具以減少水道中的塑膠污染。

gept.example_en: Some bioplastics biodegrade only in industrial composters, not in household compost piles.
gept.example_zh: 某些生質塑膠只能在工業堆肥設施中分解，而非家用堆肥堆。

gept.example_en: Researchers developed a bioplastic made from cornstarch that fully decomposes within weeks.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員研發一種由玉米澱粉製成的生物塑膠，可在數週內完全分解。

gept.example_en: Polystyrene foam containers persist in landfills and oceans for hundreds of years.
gept.example_zh: 聚苯乙烯泡棉容器在掩埋場與海洋中可殘留數百年。

gept.example_en: Polyethylene bags floating in the ocean entangle marine animals and choke seabirds.
gept.example_zh: 漂浮在海洋中的聚乙烯袋纏住海洋動物並使海鳥窒息。

gept.example_en: Many household containers are made of polypropylene that can be recycled curbside.
gept.example_zh: 許多家用容器由可路邊回收的聚丙烯製成。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 聚對苯二甲酸乙二酯
gept.example_en: Most clear beverage bottles are made from PET, which is widely recyclable worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 大多數透明飲料瓶由 PET 製成，在全球可廣泛回收。

gept.example_en: Compostable utensils break down in commercial composting facilities within several weeks.
gept.example_zh: 可堆肥餐具能在商業堆肥設施內數週內分解。

gept.example_en: Vermicompost made by worms enriches garden soil with valuable nutrients and microbes.
gept.example_zh: 由蚯蚓製成的蚯蚓堆肥以寶貴的養分與微生物豐富花園土壤。

gept.example_en: Anaerobic digesters convert food waste and manure into biogas and nutrient-rich fertilizer.
gept.example_zh: 厭氧消化槽將廚餘與糞便轉化為沼氣與富含養分的肥料。

gept.example_en: Farmers capture biogas from manure pits and use it to heat their buildings.
gept.example_zh: 農民從糞便槽收集沼氣並用來為建築物供暖。

gept.example_en: Gasification turns solid waste into syngas that fuels industrial heat applications.
gept.example_zh: 氣化將固體廢棄物轉化為合成氣，可作為工業熱應用的燃料。

gept.example_en: A hydrogen fuel-cell vehicle emits only water vapor as it drives down the highway.
gept.example_zh: 氫燃料電池車在高速公路上行駛時僅排放水蒸氣。

gept.example_en: Green methanol can power retrofitted ship engines without major design changes.
gept.example_zh: 綠色甲醇可為改造後的船舶引擎提供動力，無需重大設計變更。

gept.example_en: Range-anxiety still deters some drivers from buying an electric vehicle for daily commutes.
gept.example_zh: 里程焦慮仍使部分駕駛人不願購買電動車用於日常通勤。

gept.example_en: Retired EV batteries find a second-life storing solar power for community microgrids.
gept.example_zh: 退役的電動車電池可獲得二次生命，用於儲存社區微電網的太陽能。

gept.example_en: Fleet telematics track fuel use and idle time to identify efficiency improvements.
gept.example_zh: 車隊車載資通訊追蹤燃料用量與怠速時間，以找出效率改善之處。

gept.example_en: City anti-idling rules cut harmful emissions near hospitals, schools, and bus terminals.
gept.example_zh: 市政的反怠速規定降低了醫院、學校與巴士總站附近的有害排放。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 油井到車輪的（全程）
gept.example_en: Well-to-wheel analysis evaluates fuel emissions from extraction through the moment of combustion.
gept.example_zh: 油井到車輪的分析評估從開採到燃燒瞬間的燃料排放。

gept.example_en: Companies struggle to measure scope-three emissions from suppliers and downstream customers.
gept.example_zh: 公司難以衡量來自供應商與下游客戶的範疇三排放。

gept.example_en: An ESG materiality assessment helps companies focus disclosures on what truly matters.
gept.example_zh: ESG 重大性評估協助公司將揭露聚焦於真正重要的議題。

gept.example_en: Regulators fined the company after finding it had greenwashed its marketing claims.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構發現該公司對行銷宣稱進行漂綠後對其開罰。

gept.example_en: Critics accuse some airlines of trying to carbonwash flights through dubious offset programs.
gept.example_zh: 批評者指控部分航空公司試圖透過可疑的抵銷方案對航班進行碳漂洗。

gept.example_en: Many nations now consume natural resources faster than their biocapacity can regenerate annually.
gept.example_zh: 許多國家如今消耗自然資源的速度超過其生態承載力每年的再生能力。

gept.example_en: Earth overshoot day moves earlier each year as humanity demands more from the planet.
gept.example_zh: 隨著人類向地球索取更多，地球超載日逐年提前。

gept.example_en: Agroforestry combines crops and trees to increase yields and store more carbon.
gept.example_zh: 農林混合經營將作物與樹木結合，以增加產量並儲存更多碳。

gept.example_en: Regenerative-farming practices restore soil carbon while improving long-term agricultural productivity.
gept.example_zh: 再生農業實務恢復土壤碳並同時提升長期農業生產力。

gept.example_en: No-till farming preserves soil structure and reduces erosion across large grain fields.
gept.example_zh: 免耕農法保護土壤結構，並減少廣大穀物田的侵蝕。

gept.example_en: Farmers plant a winter cover-crop to prevent runoff and improve overall soil fertility.
gept.example_zh: 農民種植冬季覆蓋作物以防止逕流並改善整體土壤肥力。

gept.example_en: A toxic algal-bloom forced authorities to ban swimming and shellfish harvesting in the bay.
gept.example_zh: 毒性藻華爆發迫使當局禁止在海灣游泳與採收貝類。

gept.example_en: Eutrophication starves lakes of oxygen and kills fish in massive seasonal die-offs.
gept.example_zh: 優養化使湖泊缺氧並在大規模季節性死亡中殺死魚類。

gept.example_en: Coastal hypoxia creates dead zones where fish, crabs, and shrimp cannot survive.
gept.example_zh: 沿海缺氧形成死區，使魚、蟹與蝦無法存活。

gept.example_en: An expanding dead-zone in the gulf threatens commercial fisheries and coastal livelihoods.
gept.example_zh: 海灣中不斷擴大的死區威脅商業漁業與沿海生計。

gept.example_en: Ocean acidification weakens shells of mollusks and threatens marine food chains globally.
gept.example_zh: 海洋酸化削弱軟體動物的殼，並威脅全球海洋食物鏈。

gept.example_en: Rising seas cause saltwater-intrusion that contaminates drinking water in coastal cities.
gept.example_zh: 海平面上升造成鹽水入侵，污染沿海城市的飲用水。

gept.example_en: Conservationists drop reef-ball structures into the sea to encourage new coral colonies.
gept.example_zh: 保育人士將人工魚礁球結構投入海中，以鼓勵新珊瑚群落生長。

gept.example_en: Inside no-take zones, all fishing and harvesting are completely banned year-round.
gept.example_zh: 在禁採區內，所有漁撈與採集全年完全禁止。

gept.example_en: Fishermen accidentally pull in significant bycatch including endangered turtles and small dolphins.
gept.example_zh: 漁民意外捕到大量混獲，包括瀕危的海龜與小型海豚。

gept.example_en: Wetland-restoration projects reduce flood damage while providing habitats for migratory birds.
gept.example_zh: 濕地復育計畫減輕洪災損失，同時為候鳥提供棲地。

gept.example_en: Biochar locks carbon into soil for centuries while improving moisture and nutrient retention.
gept.example_zh: 生物炭將碳鎖入土壤數百年，同時改善水分與養分保持。

gept.example_en: A roadside bioswale slows stormwater and removes oils and metals before reaching streams.
gept.example_zh: 路邊的生物滯留草溝減緩雨水流速，並在流入溪流前去除油脂與金屬。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 大眾運輸導向的
gept.example_en: Transit-oriented development clusters housing and jobs near busy rail and bus stations.
gept.example_zh: 大眾運輸導向開發將住宅與工作集中於繁忙的鐵路與巴士站附近。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 十五分鐘的（生活圈）
gept.example_en: A fifteen-minute neighborhood ensures most daily services lie within a short walk.
gept.example_zh: 十五分鐘生活圈確保大多數日常服務都在步行可及範圍內。

gept.example_en: Encouraging a modal-shift toward cycling cuts emissions and eases congestion in busy cities.
gept.example_zh: 鼓勵向自行車的運輸方式轉變可減少排放並緩解繁忙城市的擁塞。

gept.example_en: Banks now offer transition-finance loans to help heavy industries shift toward cleaner technologies.
gept.example_zh: 銀行現在提供轉型金融貸款，協助重工業轉向更乾淨的技術。

gept.example_en: Coastal infrastructure faces growing physical-risk from rising seas and stronger seasonal storms.
gept.example_zh: 沿海基礎建設面臨海平面上升與更強季節性風暴帶來日益升高的實體風險。

gept.example_en: Oil majors increasingly worry about litigation-risk from communities harmed by climate impacts.
gept.example_zh: 石油巨頭日益擔心受氣候衝擊影響的社區帶來的訴訟風險。

gept.example_en: Many universities have pledged to fossil-divest from coal, oil, and gas company holdings.
gept.example_zh: 許多大學承諾從煤、石油與天然氣公司持股中撤資化石燃料。

gept.example_en: Aging refineries face the threat of becoming stranded-capital as electric vehicles spread.
gept.example_zh: 隨著電動車普及，老舊煉油廠面臨成為擱淺資本的威脅。

gept.example_en: Each country submits a nationally-determined contribution outlining its climate targets and policies.
gept.example_zh: 每個國家提交國家自定貢獻，闡述其氣候目標與政策。

gept.example_en: The pledge-gap describes the difference between current promises and emissions cuts truly required.
gept.example_zh: 承諾差距描述現有承諾與真正所需減排量之間的差距。

gept.example_en: Companies use a shadow-price on carbon when evaluating long-term project economics.
gept.example_zh: 公司在評估長期計畫經濟效益時使用碳的影子價格。

gept.example_en: The remaining carbon-budget for limiting warming to 1.5 degrees is rapidly shrinking.
gept.example_zh: 將暖化控制在 1.5 度的剩餘碳預算正迅速縮減。

gept.example_en: Unplugging chargers eliminates phantom-load and saves money on annual electricity bills.
gept.example_zh: 拔掉充電器可消除待機耗電，並節省每年的電費。

gept.example_en: Smart power strips cut vampire-power from idle electronics throughout the home.
gept.example_zh: 智慧電源延長線切斷家中閒置電子裝置的吸血鬼耗電。

gept.example_en: Demand-response programs reward customers who reduce electricity use during peak grid stress.
gept.example_zh: 需量反應計畫獎勵在電網尖峰壓力期間減少用電的客戶。

gept.example_en: Net-metering credits homeowners for the surplus solar electricity they export to the grid.
gept.example_zh: 淨計量電價為屋主出口至電網的多餘太陽能電力給予帳單抵減。

gept.example_en: Behind-the-meter batteries help homes store solar power for use after sunset.
gept.example_zh: 電表後端的電池協助家庭儲存太陽能電力供日落後使用。

gept.example_en: Renters subscribe to a community-solar project to benefit from clean power without installation.
gept.example_zh: 租屋者訂閱社區共享太陽能計畫，無需安裝即可享有乾淨電力。

gept.example_en: An energy-cooperative gives residents shared ownership of a small local wind project.
gept.example_zh: 能源合作社讓居民共同擁有當地小型風力計畫的股權。

gept.example_en: EPR laws require manufacturers to handle and pay for the disposal of their products.
gept.example_zh: 延伸生產者責任法律要求製造商負責並支付其產品的處置費用。

gept.example_en: A deposit-return scheme refunds consumers when they bring empty bottles back to the store.
gept.example_zh: 押金退還制在消費者將空瓶送回商店時退還押金。

gept.example_en: Mixed plastics often downcycle into low-value goods rather than being truly recycled.
gept.example_zh: 混合塑膠常被降級回收為低價值產品，而非真正被回收再利用。

gept.example_en: She wears upcycled jeans crafted from old fabric scraps and faded denim shirts.
gept.example_zh: 她穿著由舊布料碎片與褪色丹寧襯衫升級再造的牛仔褲。

gept.example_en: Volunteer divers retrieve a tangled ghost-net that had trapped fish for many months.
gept.example_zh: 志工潛水員打撈出一張纏結的幽靈漁網，已困住魚群好幾個月。

gept.example_en: International rules now limit drift-fishing nets that indiscriminately catch endangered marine wildlife.
gept.example_zh: 國際規則現在限制無差別捕捉瀕危海洋野生動物的漂流式漁網。

gept.example_en: A wildlife-corridor lets bears and wolves move safely across roads and farmland boundaries.
gept.example_zh: 野生動物廊道讓熊與狼安全跨越道路與農地邊界。

gept.example_en: Healthy rangeland supports both livestock grazing and diverse populations of wild grassland species.
gept.example_zh: 健康的放牧地既支持牲畜放牧，也支持多樣化的野生草原物種族群。

gept.example_en: Rotational-grazing builds healthier soils and stores more carbon than continuous grazing methods.
gept.example_zh: 與連續放牧方法相比，輪牧能形成更健康的土壤並儲存更多碳。

gept.example_en: Silvopasture combines pasture with widely spaced trees to benefit both livestock and timber yields.
gept.example_zh: 林下放牧將牧場與間隔較寬的樹木結合，使牲畜與木材產量同時受益。

gept.example_en: Healthy riparian forests stabilize riverbanks and shelter spawning fish during the hot summer months.
gept.example_zh: 健康的河岸森林穩定河岸，並在炎熱夏季月份庇護產卵的魚類。

gept.example_en: Ecologists conduct a fauna-survey before construction to identify protected species in the area.
gept.example_zh: 生態學家在施工前進行動物相調查，以識別該地區的受保護物種。

gept.example_en: Gleaning programs collect leftover produce after harvest and donate it to food banks.
gept.example_zh: 拾穗計畫在採收後收集剩餘農產品，並捐贈給食物銀行。

gept.example_en: A vertical-farm uses stacked indoor trays and LED lighting to grow crops year-round.
gept.example_zh: 垂直農場使用堆疊式室內托盤與 LED 照明全年種植作物。

gept.example_en: A hydroponic system grows lettuce without soil while using just a fraction of usual water.
gept.example_zh: 水耕系統不需土壤即可種植萵苣，且僅使用一小部分平常的水量。

gept.example_en: An aquaponic farm raises fish and vegetables together in a tightly closed water loop.
gept.example_zh: 魚菜共生農場在緊密封閉的水循環中同時養殖魚與蔬菜。

gept.example_en: Drip-irrigation delivers water straight to plant roots, dramatically reducing waste from evaporation.
gept.example_zh: 滴灌將水直接送到植物根部，大幅減少蒸發造成的浪費。

gept.example_en: Homes reuse greywater from showers and sinks to irrigate gardens and flush toilets.
gept.example_zh: 家中將淋浴與水槽的中水再利用於澆灌花園與沖洗馬桶。

gept.example_en: Blackwater contains sewage and must be treated thoroughly before any safe environmental release.
gept.example_zh: 黑水含有污水，在安全排放至環境前必須徹底處理。

gept.example_en: Watershed-protection efforts safeguard the drinking water supply for millions of downstream urban residents.
gept.example_zh: 集水區保護工作保障數百萬下游都市居民的飲用水供應。

gept.example_en: Mountain snowpack levels determine summer river flows for many western farms and cities.
gept.example_zh: 山區積雪量決定許多西部農場與城市的夏季河流流量。

gept.example_en: Rising temperatures push the alpine tree-line higher up many remote mountain ranges.
gept.example_zh: 氣溫上升將許多偏遠山脈的高山樹線推得更高。

gept.example_en: Methane has a GWP much higher than carbon dioxide over twenty-year averaging periods.
gept.example_zh: 在二十年平均期間內，甲烷的全球暖化潛勢遠高於二氧化碳。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 再生能源組合標準
gept.example_en: A state renewable-portfolio standard requires utilities to source set percentages from clean energy.
gept.example_zh: 州的再生能源組合標準要求公用事業從乾淨能源取得指定比例。

gept.example_en: Formal adjudication of the contract claim took nearly two years to complete.
gept.example_zh: 該合約索賠的正式裁決花了將近兩年才完成。

gept.example_en: Officials promulgated new traffic regulations that take effect at the start of next month.
gept.example_zh: 官員們頒布了將於下月初生效的新交通規則。

gept.example_en: The promulgation of the privacy law surprised many companies that handle personal data.
gept.example_zh: 隱私法的頒布讓許多處理個人資料的公司感到意外。

gept.example_en: The codification of administrative procedure made the agency easier for citizens to navigate.
gept.example_zh: 行政程序的法典化讓民眾更容易與該機構打交道。

gept.example_en: A concordat between the church and the new government clarified each side's authority.
gept.example_zh: 教會與新政府之間的協約釐清了雙方的權限。

gept.example_en: The summit closed with a joint communiqué outlining shared priorities on climate action.
gept.example_zh: 峰會以聯合公報結束，概述在氣候行動上的共同優先事項。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 案件清單；待審案件表
gept.example_en: The appellate court's docket is so crowded that hearings are scheduled months in advance.
gept.example_zh: 上訴法院的案件清單十分擁擠，聽證會須提前數月排定。

gept.example_en: The detainees filed a habeas-corpus petition challenging the legality of their indefinite detention.
gept.example_zh: 被拘留者提出人身保護令申請，質疑他們無限期拘留的合法性。

gept.example_en: The appellee asked the panel to uphold the favorable verdict reached by the trial court.
gept.example_zh: 被上訴人請求合議庭維持原審法院所作的有利判決。

gept.example_en: Her recorded deposition-testimony was played at trial because she had since moved overseas.
gept.example_zh: 她錄製的庭外宣誓證詞在審判時播放，因為她之後已移居海外。

gept.example_en: You will need to notarize the affidavit before submitting it to the regional court.
gept.example_zh: 你需要先將宣誓書公證，才能提交給該區法院。

gept.example_en: Voters often reward incumbency when the economy has performed reasonably well during recent years.
gept.example_zh: 當經濟在近年來表現尚可時，選民通常會傾向支持現任者。

gept.example_en: An emissary delivered the proposal personally to avoid leaks through normal diplomatic channels.
gept.example_zh: 特使親自遞交提案，以免透過正常外交管道走漏消息。

gept.example_en: The cultural attaché organized exhibitions to promote the country's arts and historical heritage.
gept.example_zh: 文化隨員舉辦展覽，推廣該國的藝術與歷史文化遺產。

gept.example_en: While the ambassador was abroad, the chargé-d-affaires represented the embassy at the ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 大使出國期間，由代辦代表大使館出席該典禮。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 治外法權的；域外的
gept.example_en: The treaty granted extraterritorial protection to staff working at the international research station.
gept.example_zh: 該條約賦予在國際研究站工作的人員治外法權的保護。

gept.example_en: Analysts welcomed the rapprochement between two former rivals that had not spoken for decades.
gept.example_zh: 分析人士歡迎兩個數十年不相往來的舊敵之間的邦交恢復。

gept.example_en: Years of careful negotiation produced a fragile detente in the long-running regional conflict.
gept.example_zh: 多年來謹慎的談判促成了這場長期區域衝突中脆弱的緩和。

gept.example_en: Their informal entente allowed the two governments to coordinate quietly on counterterrorism issues.
gept.example_zh: 兩國政府的非正式諒解使他們能在反恐議題上低調協調。

gept.example_en: During the Cold War, several nonaligned states refused to side with either superpower bloc.
gept.example_zh: 冷戰期間，多個不結盟國家拒絕加入任何一個超級強權集團。

gept.example_en: Energy supply routes have become a central concern in regional geopolitics this decade.
gept.example_zh: 能源供應路線已成為這十年來區域地緣政治的核心關切。

gept.example_en: Some scholars argue that hegemonic powers eventually decline because of overstretched military commitments abroad.
gept.example_zh: 一些學者主張，霸權勢力最終會因海外軍事承諾過度延伸而衰落。

gept.example_en: During that era the country functioned essentially as a satellite-state controlled from the capital abroad.
gept.example_zh: 在那個時代，該國基本上扮演著由外國首都所控制的附庸國角色。

gept.example_en: Travel between the mainland and the exclave requires crossing through a neighboring sovereign state.
gept.example_zh: 往返本土與外飛地之間必須經過一個鄰近的主權國家。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers agreed to devolve substantial planning authority to the newly elected municipal councils.
gept.example_zh: 立法者同意將大量規劃權限下放給新當選的市議會。

gept.example_en: The session was postponed because the committee could not reach the required quorum.
gept.example_zh: 由於委員會未能達到法定人數，會議因而延期。

gept.example_en: Her abstention from the final vote signaled discomfort with both available legislative options.
gept.example_zh: 她在最終表決中棄權，顯示她對兩項可行的立法選項都感到不安。

gept.example_en: Citizens voted in a plebiscite to decide whether the region should adopt a new flag.
gept.example_zh: 公民透過公民投票決定該地區是否採用新國旗。

gept.example_en: A successful ballot-initiative forced the legislature to consider stricter limits on plastic packaging.
gept.example_zh: 一項成功的公民提案迫使立法機關考量更嚴格的塑膠包裝限制。

gept.example_en: Voters launched a recall-election after the mayor was implicated in a serious bribery scandal.
gept.example_zh: 在市長被牽連入一宗嚴重的賄賂醜聞後，選民發起了罷免選舉。

gept.example_en: A two-term term-limit prevents any single executive from dominating the political scene indefinitely.
gept.example_zh: 兩任的任期限制防止任何單一行政首長無限期主宰政治舞台。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 跛腳鴨；任期將屆者
gept.example_en: As a lame-duck president, he struggled to push major reforms through a hostile legislature.
gept.example_zh: 作為一位跛腳鴨總統，他難以在敵對的立法機關中推動重大改革。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 透明法案；資訊公開法
gept.example_en: The new transparency-law requires officials to publish detailed records of meetings with private lobbyists.
gept.example_zh: 新的透明法案要求官員公布與私人遊說者會議的詳細紀錄。

gept.example_en: Reporters filed freedom-of-information requests seeking documents related to the agency's environmental impact reviews.
gept.example_zh: 記者依資訊自由提出申請，索取與該機構環境影響審查相關的文件。

gept.example_en: Advocates of open-government emphasize that public access to data strengthens democratic accountability.
gept.example_zh: 開放政府的倡議者強調，民眾取得資料能強化民主問責。

gept.example_en: Rule-of-law requires that even the highest officials remain fully subject to the same statutes.
gept.example_zh: 法治要求即使是最高層官員也完全受到相同法令的約束。

gept.example_en: Equal-protection challenges have shaped many landmark civil rights rulings in recent legal history.
gept.example_zh: 近年法律史上，許多具里程碑意義的民權判決都源自平等保護的挑戰。

gept.example_en: Civil-liberties advocates challenged the emergency regulations that restricted gathering in public spaces.
gept.example_zh: 公民自由權倡議者挑戰限制在公共場所集會的緊急法規。

gept.example_en: Acts of civil-disobedience drew global attention to the country's restrictive new media law.
gept.example_zh: 公民不服從的行動引起國際對該國新限制性媒體法的關注。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 因良心拒服兵役者
gept.example_en: As a conscientious-objector, he performed alternative civilian service rather than join the armed forces.
gept.example_zh: 身為因良心拒服兵役者，他從事替代性民間服務，而非加入武裝部隊。

gept.example_en: The movement remained committed to strict non-violence even when met with harsh police responses.
gept.example_zh: 即使遭遇警方嚴厲的應對，該運動仍堅守嚴格的非暴力原則。

gept.example_en: Thousands joined the peaceful march in support of stronger protections for migrant workers.
gept.example_zh: 數千人加入和平遊行，支持加強對移工的保障。

gept.example_en: Consumers organized a boycott of the brand after its supplier was linked to forced labor.
gept.example_zh: 在該品牌的供應商被指控與強迫勞動有關後，消費者發起了抵制行動。

gept.example_en: The naval blockade prevented essential medical supplies from reaching civilians trapped along the coast.
gept.example_zh: 海上封鎖使必要的醫療物資無法送達受困於沿海的平民。

gept.example_en: Negotiations between the two parties reached a stalemate-political that lasted nearly six months.
gept.example_zh: 兩黨間的協商陷入了長達近六個月的政治僵局。

gept.example_en: Severe gridlock-legislative made it nearly impossible to pass even routine annual budget bills.
gept.example_zh: 嚴重的立法僵局使得連例行的年度預算案都幾乎無法通過。

gept.example_en: Rare bipartisanship allowed the infrastructure bill to pass with broad support from both parties.
gept.example_zh: 罕見的兩黨合作使該基礎建設法案在兩黨廣泛支持下獲得通過。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 黨派偏見；黨派之爭
gept.example_en: Rising partisanship has made compromise on major policy issues increasingly difficult to achieve.
gept.example_zh: 日益加劇的黨派偏見使得就重大政策議題達成妥協變得愈加困難。

gept.example_en: The party's revised platform-political emphasized affordable housing and stronger public transit investment.
gept.example_zh: 該黨修訂後的政綱強調可負擔住房與更強的公共運輸投資。

gept.example_en: Her stump-speech focused on rural broadband expansion and improved healthcare for elderly residents.
gept.example_zh: 她的競選演說聚焦於擴展鄉村寬頻與提升長者醫療照護。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 中間選民；游離選民
gept.example_en: Campaign strategists targeted the swing-voter in the suburbs of the contested coastal districts.
gept.example_zh: 競選策略家鎖定爭奪激烈沿海選區郊區裡的中間選民。

gept.example_en: Both campaigns concentrated their final advertising budgets on a handful of crucial swing-state markets.
gept.example_zh: 兩個競選團隊將最後的廣告預算集中投放在幾個關鍵搖擺州市場。

gept.example_en: Early exit-poll results suggested an extremely close finish in the gubernatorial race.
gept.example_zh: 初步出口民調結果顯示州長選戰將相當接近。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 軍政府；軍人執政團
gept.example_en: The junta promised elections within eighteen months but repeatedly postponed the proposed dates.
gept.example_zh: 軍政府承諾在十八個月內舉行選舉，但屢次延後預定日期。

gept.example_en: Totalitarian regimes attempt to control political, economic, social, and cultural aspects of citizens' lives.
gept.example_zh: 極權政權試圖控制公民生活的政治、經濟、社會與文化各方面。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 威權主義；獨裁主義
gept.example_en: Scholars warn that creeping authoritarianism can survive even within formally democratic institutional frameworks.
gept.example_zh: 學者警告，潛伏的威權主義即使在形式上民主的制度框架內也可能延續。

gept.example_en: Historians described him as a despot who jailed opponents and dismantled independent courts entirely.
gept.example_zh: 歷史學家將他描述為一個監禁對手、徹底拆解獨立法院的暴君。

gept.example_en: The autocrat surrounded himself with loyalists and silenced dissent through extensive surveillance networks.
gept.example_zh: 這位獨裁者身邊圍繞著親信，並透過廣泛的監控網絡壓制異議。

gept.example_en: Historians warn that a skilled demagogue can exploit economic anxiety to undermine democratic norms.
gept.example_zh: 歷史學家警告，老練的煽動家能利用經濟焦慮來破壞民主規範。

gept.example_en: Critics accused the politician of demagogy, claiming his speeches deliberately stoked fear and resentment.
gept.example_zh: 批評者指責這位政治人物搞煽動政治，稱其演說刻意激起恐懼與怨恨。

gept.example_en: An entrenched elite-political resisted reforms that might have weakened their long-standing financial advantages.
gept.example_zh: 根深柢固的政治菁英抵制可能削弱其長期金融優勢的改革。

gept.example_en: Outsider candidates often campaign by attacking the perceived complacency of the political establishment.
gept.example_zh: 圈外候選人經常透過抨擊政治體制被認為的自滿來進行競選。

gept.example_en: An international tribunal-court was established to prosecute crimes committed during the prolonged civil conflict.
gept.example_zh: 為起訴在這場長期內戰中犯下的罪行，設立了國際裁判庭。

gept.example_en: Investigators documented multiple incidents that could potentially qualify as a war-crime under international law.
gept.example_zh: 調查員記錄了多起在國際法下可能構成戰爭罪的事件。

gept.example_en: Senior officials were charged with crime-against-humanity for their role in the forced relocation campaign.
gept.example_zh: 高層官員因在強迫遷徙行動中所扮演的角色而被控反人類罪。

gept.example_en: Survivors gave painful testimony about the atrocity they had witnessed in their devastated home villages.
gept.example_zh: 倖存者就他們在被摧毀的家鄉村莊所目睹的暴行作出令人心痛的證詞。

gept.example_en: The treaty included reparations for displaced communities whose ancestral lands had been confiscated.
gept.example_zh: 該條約包含對其祖先土地被沒收的流離失所社區的賠償。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 國際特赦（組織）/ 大赦
gept.example_en: A formal amnesty-international was offered to combatants who voluntarily surrendered their weapons within thirty days.
gept.example_zh: 對在三十天內自願繳械的戰鬥人員提供正式的大赦。

gept.example_en: New DNA evidence helped exonerate several individuals who had been wrongfully convicted long ago.
gept.example_zh: 新的DNA證據幫助多名長久前被錯誤定罪的人洗清冤屈。

gept.example_en: Her formal exoneration came almost two decades after her original wrongful conviction.
gept.example_zh: 她的正式昭雪在原先錯誤定罪將近二十年後才到來。

gept.example_en: Investigative journalists exposed several wrongful-conviction cases stemming from faulty forensic laboratory practices.
gept.example_zh: 調查記者揭露多起因錯誤的鑑識實驗室作業所造成的冤獄案件。

gept.example_en: Reformers called for an independent review board to identify possible miscarriage-of-justice in older cases.
gept.example_zh: 改革者呼籲成立獨立審查委員會，以辨識舊案中可能的司法不公。

gept.example_en: The ombudsperson investigates citizen complaints about unfair treatment by public administrative agencies.
gept.example_zh: 申訴專員調查民眾關於公共行政機構不公平待遇的投訴。

gept.example_en: The auditor-general examines whether public spending complies with the approved budget and appropriations law.
gept.example_zh: 審計長檢查公共支出是否符合已核准的預算與撥款法律。

gept.example_en: The comptroller flagged unusual procurement patterns that warranted further independent investigation by external auditors.
gept.example_zh: 主計長標示了異常的採購模式，需要由外部審計人員進行進一步獨立調查。

gept.example_en: Multinational firms have long routed profits through low-rate jurisdictions classified as a tax-haven.
gept.example_zh: 跨國公司長期以來將利潤轉移到被歸類為避稅天堂的低稅率管轄區。

gept.example_en: Regulators introduced stricter banking rules aimed at detecting money-laundering through layered shell company structures.
gept.example_zh: 監管機構推出更嚴格的銀行規定，旨在偵測透過層層空殼公司結構的洗錢行為。

gept.example_en: Investigators traced the missing funds through a complex web of shell-company structures spanning many jurisdictions.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員透過跨多個管轄區的複雜空殼公司結構追蹤這筆失蹤的資金。

gept.example_en: Critics described the regime as a kleptocracy where officials systematically diverted public funds for personal enrichment.
gept.example_zh: 批評者將該政權描述為盜賊統治，官員們有系統地將公款挪用為個人致富。

gept.example_en: Prosecutors alleged the contractor paid a kickback to officials in exchange for favorable contract terms.
gept.example_zh: 檢察官指控承包商向官員支付回扣，以換取有利的合約條件。

gept.example_en: The owner reported repeated extortion attempts by criminals demanding payment for so-called protection services.
gept.example_zh: 該店主舉報罪犯多次企圖敲詐，要求為所謂的保護服務付款。

gept.example_en: Special task forces target organized-crime networks involved in human trafficking and drug smuggling.
gept.example_zh: 特別工作小組鎖定涉及人口販運與毒品走私的組織犯罪網絡。

gept.example_en: Coastal patrols intercepted several boats engaged in smuggling untaxed cigarettes across the maritime border.
gept.example_zh: 沿海巡邏隊攔截了多艘涉及走私未繳稅香菸越過海上邊界的船隻。

gept.example_en: Inspectors discovered considerable contraband hidden inside what had appeared to be ordinary agricultural shipments.
gept.example_zh: 稽查員在原本看似普通的農產品貨運中發現大量隱藏的違禁品。

gept.example_en: International cooperation against drug-trafficking has produced significant joint arrests in the past several years.
gept.example_zh: 近年來，國際打擊毒品走私的合作已促成多起重大聯合逮捕行動。

gept.example_en: Each asylum-seeker is entitled to a hearing before being returned to a potentially dangerous country.
gept.example_zh: 每位尋求庇護者在被遣返可能有危險的國家前，都有權獲得聽證機會。

gept.example_en: The court suspended the deportation order pending a fuller review of her humanitarian claim.
gept.example_zh: 法院暫停執行該驅逐出境命令，等待對她人道主義申訴的更完整審查。

gept.example_en: The agencies coordinated the voluntary repatriation of refugees once the conflict had clearly subsided.
gept.example_zh: 在衝突明顯平息後，各機構協調了難民的自願遣返。

gept.example_en: The diaspora-community organized fundraising drives to support reconstruction efforts in their original homeland regions.
gept.example_zh: 海外僑民社群發起募款活動，以支援其原鄉地區的重建工作。

gept.example_en: The growing expatriate population in the capital launched its own monthly community newspaper.
gept.example_zh: 首都不斷增加的僑民人口創辦了自己的月刊社區報紙。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers debated whether a stricter asylum-policy would meaningfully reduce arrivals at the southern border.
gept.example_zh: 立法者辯論更嚴格的庇護政策是否會有意義地減少南部邊境的入境人數。

gept.example_en: Improved border-control technology allowed inspectors to process travelers more quickly without compromising overall security.
gept.example_zh: 改進的邊境管制技術讓檢查人員能在不影響整體安全的情況下更快處理旅客。

gept.example_en: The expanding trade-bloc negotiated common standards that simplified exports for member country manufacturers.
gept.example_zh: 不斷擴展的貿易集團協商出共同標準，簡化了成員國製造商的出口。

gept.example_en: Membership in the customs-union eliminates tariffs between participating states while maintaining shared external duties.
gept.example_zh: 加入關稅同盟可消除參與國之間的關稅，並維持共同的對外關稅。

gept.example_en: Within the single-market, professionals can practice in any member country with greatly reduced regulatory friction.
gept.example_zh: 在單一市場內，專業人士可在任何成員國執業，行政摩擦大幅降低。

gept.example_en: Negotiators finalized a comprehensive free-trade-agreement covering services, intellectual property, and standardized digital regulations.
gept.example_zh: 談判代表完成了一項涵蓋服務、智慧財產與標準化數位法規的全面自由貿易協定。

gept.example_en: Both sides extended most-favored-nation status to ensure equal access for their respective export industries.
gept.example_zh: 雙方互相給予最惠國待遇，以確保各自出口產業享有平等的市場進入。

gept.example_en: Domestic producers requested anti-dumping duties on imported steel sold below the market production cost.
gept.example_zh: 國內生產商要求對以低於市場生產成本出售的進口鋼材徵收反傾銷稅。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 反補貼的；抵銷的
gept.example_en: Investigators recommended countervailing duties to offset substantial production subsidies received by foreign solar panel manufacturers.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員建議課徵反補貼稅，以抵銷外國太陽能板製造商所獲得的大量生產補貼。

gept.example_en: A persistent trade-deficit prompted lawmakers to reconsider longstanding currency and industrial policy assumptions.
gept.example_zh: 持續性的貿易逆差促使立法者重新審視長期的貨幣與產業政策假設。

gept.example_en: The trade-surplus widened as electronics exports continued growing faster than imports of raw materials.
gept.example_zh: 由於電子產品出口持續比原物料進口成長得更快，貿易順差不斷擴大。

gept.example_en: Economists analyzed the country's balance-of-payments to assess the sustainability of its current external borrowing.
gept.example_zh: 經濟學家分析該國的國際收支平衡，以評估其當前對外借款的可持續性。

gept.example_en: Through cultural exchanges and scholarships, the country steadily built considerable soft-power influence abroad.
gept.example_zh: 該國透過文化交流與獎學金，逐步在海外建立了相當的軟實力影響力。

gept.example_en: Analysts distinguish soft persuasion strategies from hard-power capabilities such as military and economic coercion.
gept.example_zh: 分析家將軟性說服策略與軍事和經濟脅迫等硬實力能力區分開來。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 巧實力（軟硬實力的結合）
gept.example_en: Effective foreign policy often combines diplomacy, aid, and selective force in a balanced smart-power approach.
gept.example_zh: 有效的外交政策往往以平衡的巧實力方式結合外交、援助與選擇性使用武力。

gept.example_en: The historic alliance-treaty obligates each member to assist the others if a partner faces attack.
gept.example_zh: 這項具歷史意義的同盟條約規定，若有夥伴遭受攻擊，每個成員都有義務協助他國。

gept.example_en: Their mutual-defense pact remained the foundation of regional security throughout decades of changing leadership.
gept.example_zh: 在數十年領導層更迭中，他們的共同防禦協定始終是區域安全的基礎。

gept.example_en: The principle of collective-security depends on members reliably honoring obligations during severe international crises.
gept.example_zh: 集體安全原則的有效運作有賴成員在嚴重國際危機中可靠地履行義務。

gept.example_en: An accelerating arms-race in the region forced neighboring states to increase their own defense expenditures considerably.
gept.example_zh: 該地區持續升級的軍備競賽迫使鄰國大幅增加自身的國防支出。

gept.example_en: Negotiators discussed verifiable disarmament steps that could reduce stockpiles without compromising national defense needs.
gept.example_zh: 談判代表討論了可驗證的裁軍步驟，以減少儲備而不影響國家防禦需求。

gept.example_en: International inspectors monitor the stockpile-weapons declared under the verification protocols of the disarmament treaty.
gept.example_zh: 國際稽查員依裁軍條約的核查議定書，監督所申報的武器儲備。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大規模毀滅性武器
gept.example_en: Any use of a weapon-of-mass-destruction would trigger immediate condemnation and probable international military response.
gept.example_zh: 任何使用大規模毀滅性武器的行為都將引發立即譴責及可能的國際軍事回應。

gept.example_en: Non-proliferation efforts focus on preventing additional states from acquiring nuclear weapons technology and material.
gept.example_zh: 防擴散工作的重點是防止更多國家取得核武技術與材料。

gept.example_en: Embassy-staff worked around the clock to assist citizens stranded after the sudden flight cancellations.
gept.example_zh: 大使館人員日夜不停地工作，協助因突然航班取消而滯留的公民。

gept.example_en: Documents sent in a diplomatic-pouch cannot be opened or inspected by host country customs authorities.
gept.example_zh: 以外交郵袋寄送的文件不得由駐在國海關當局拆閱或檢查。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不受歡迎的人物（外交）
gept.example_en: The minister declared the diplomat persona-non-grata after the alleged interference in domestic political affairs.
gept.example_zh: 在涉嫌干預內政事務後，部長宣布該外交官為不受歡迎人物。

gept.example_en: Officials moved to expel-diplomat figures suspected of intelligence gathering beyond their official mission responsibilities.
gept.example_zh: 官員著手驅逐那些被懷疑超越其官方任務職責進行情報蒐集的外交人員。

gept.example_en: Formal diplomatic-recognition allowed the two countries to exchange ambassadors and establish embassies in each other's capitals.
gept.example_zh: 正式的外交承認使兩國得以互派大使並在彼此首都設立大使館。

gept.example_en: Civil-rights organizations documented patterns of unequal treatment in housing and small-business lending decisions.
gept.example_zh: 公民權利組織記錄了住房與小企業貸款決策中的不平等待遇模式。

gept.example_en: Volunteers staffed each polling-station from early morning until the last voter had cast a ballot.
gept.example_zh: 志工從清晨到最後一位選民投票完畢為止，駐守每一個投票所。

gept.example_en: Each ballot-paper listed every candidate in alphabetical order to avoid any appearance of unfair advantage.
gept.example_zh: 每張選票按字母順序列出所有候選人，以避免任何不公平優勢的觀感。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 競選資金；競選財務
gept.example_en: Strict campaign-finance rules limit how much any single donor may contribute during one election cycle.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的競選財務規定限制了任何單一捐款人在一個選舉週期內可捐贈的金額。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 暗錢；不透明政治獻金
gept.example_en: Reformers worry that dark-money flowing through nonprofits distorts political competition and obscures genuine donor identities.
gept.example_zh: 改革者擔心透過非營利組織流動的暗錢扭曲政治競爭，並掩蓋真正捐款人的身份。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 超級政治行動委員會
gept.example_en: A well-funded super-pac released advertisements supporting candidates aligned with its founders' policy preferences.
gept.example_zh: 一個資金充裕的超級政治行動委員會發布廣告，支持與其創辦人政策偏好一致的候選人。

gept.example_en: Aggressive lobbying by industry groups slowed the progress of stricter regulations on emerging financial technology products.
gept.example_zh: 業界團體的積極遊說減緩了對新興金融科技產品實施更嚴格法規的進程。

gept.example_en: The think tank issued a policy-brief summarizing options for reforming the country's complex tax incentive system.
gept.example_zh: 該智庫發布了一份政策簡報，總結改革該國複雜稅收激勵制度的各種選項。

gept.example_en: A consultative green-paper invited public comment before the government drafted the final legislative proposal.
gept.example_zh: 在政府草擬最終立法提案前，諮詢性綠皮書邀請公眾提出意見。

gept.example_en: A blue-ribbon-panel of retired judges reviewed the agency's controversial procedures and recommended several reforms.
gept.example_zh: 一個由退休法官組成的精英調查小組審查了該機構具爭議性的程序，並提出了若干改革建議。

gept.example_en: A senior policy-analyst presented projections showing how proposed pension changes would affect different generational groups.
gept.example_zh: 一位資深政策分析師提出推估數據，說明擬議的退休金改革將如何影響不同世代群體。

gept.example_en: Evidence-based policymaking depends on reliable data, independent analysis, and genuine willingness to revise prior assumptions.
gept.example_zh: 以證據為基礎的政策制定有賴可靠的資料、獨立的分析以及真正願意修正先前假設。

gept.example_en: A stakeholders-meeting included representatives from labor unions, employer associations, and affected community advocacy groups.
gept.example_zh: 利害關係人會議納入工會、雇主協會與受影響社區倡議團體的代表。

gept.example_en: Residents addressed the council during a public-hearing on the proposed expansion of the regional landfill.
gept.example_zh: 居民在針對擬議擴建區域垃圾掩埋場的公聽會上向議會發言。

gept.example_en: Many lawmakers consider effective constituent-services essential to building trust with voters in their home districts.
gept.example_zh: 許多立法者認為有效的選民服務對於與本選區選民建立信任至關重要。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 指定撥款；專款專用
gept.example_en: Critics complained that the earmark allocated millions to a project chiefly benefiting one well-connected community.
gept.example_zh: 批評者抱怨該指定撥款將數百萬資金分配給主要惠及某個關係深厚社區的計畫。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 政治分肥；地方建設專款
gept.example_en: Reformers introduced rules to curb pork-barrel spending that primarily benefited the home districts of senior lawmakers.
gept.example_zh: 改革者引入了規定，以遏制主要使資深立法委員家鄉選區受益的政治分肥支出。

gept.example_en: Expansionary fiscal-policy can stimulate the economy during downturns but may also raise sovereign debt significantly.
gept.example_zh: 擴張性財政政策可在景氣下行時刺激經濟，但也可能顯著增加國家債務。

gept.example_en: The central bank tightened monetary-policy by raising interest rates to address rising inflationary pressures.
gept.example_zh: 中央銀行透過調升利率收緊貨幣政策，以因應升高的通膨壓力。

gept.example_en: The central-bank operates independently of elected officials to insulate interest rate decisions from political pressure.
gept.example_zh: 中央銀行獨立於民選官員運作，以使利率決策免受政治壓力的影響。

gept.example_en: Congress passed the annual appropriations bill funding federal agencies through the end of the fiscal year.
gept.example_zh: 國會通過了年度撥款法案，提供聯邦機構直至會計年度結束的經費。

gept.example_en: Lawmakers approved a supplemental-budget to cover unexpected disaster relief costs after the destructive autumn storms.
gept.example_zh: 立法者通過追加預算，以支應毀滅性秋季風暴後意料之外的災害救助費用。

gept.example_en: The regulatory-agency issued updated guidelines clarifying how new fintech products fit within existing consumer protection law.
gept.example_zh: 該監管機構發布了更新後的指引，釐清新型金融科技產品如何符合現行消費者保護法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 規則制定；法規制定
gept.example_en: Public participation during rulemaking helps agencies design regulations that respond effectively to real practical concerns.
gept.example_zh: 在法規制定期間的公眾參與有助於機構設計能有效因應實際關切的法規。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 解除管制；放鬆管制
gept.example_en: Critics argued that deregulation of the energy sector contributed directly to subsequent reliability and pricing problems.
gept.example_zh: 批評者主張能源業的解除管制直接促成了後續的可靠性與價格問題。

gept.example_en: Every regulated bank now employs a senior compliance-officer responsible for monitoring transactions and reporting violations.
gept.example_zh: 如今每家受監管的銀行都聘有資深法令遵循專員，負責監測交易並通報違規。

gept.example_en: Investigators uncovered a price-fixing cartel that had quietly coordinated bids on government infrastructure contracts.
gept.example_zh: 調查人員揭發一個價格操縱的卡特爾，該組織暗中串謀政府基礎建設合約的投標。

gept.example_en: The startup faced a lawsuit alleging infringement of three different patents held by a major competitor.
gept.example_zh: 這家新創公司面臨一宗訴訟，指控其侵犯一家主要競爭對手所持有的三項不同專利。

gept.example_en: A licensing-agreement allows another firm to manufacture and sell the patented technology in defined regional markets.
gept.example_zh: 授權合約讓另一家公司能在指定區域市場內製造並銷售該專利技術。

gept.example_en: Whistleblower-protection laws shield employees who report violations from retaliation and unjustified workplace dismissal.
gept.example_zh: 吹哨者保護法保障舉報違規行為的員工免於遭受報復與不當解雇。

gept.example_en: An ethics-committee reviewed gifts received by senior officials to ensure no conflicts of interest arose.
gept.example_zh: 倫理委員會審查高層官員所收受的禮物，以確保未產生任何利益衝突。

gept.example_en: The judge recused herself due to a clear conflict-of-interest involving a former corporate client of hers.
gept.example_zh: 由於存在涉及她前一位企業客戶的明確利益衝突，這位法官迴避該案。

gept.example_en: Two justices chose to recuse themselves from a case involving a company in which they owned shares.
gept.example_zh: 兩位大法官選擇對一宗涉及他們持股公司的案件自請迴避。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 陽光法案；公開會議法
gept.example_en: The state's sunshine-law requires advance public notice and open access for almost every official agency meeting.
gept.example_zh: 該州的陽光法案要求幾乎所有正式機關會議都須提前公告並對外開放。

gept.example_en: Citizens used open-records requests to learn how the agency spent the recently approved emergency funds.
gept.example_zh: 公民透過公開紀錄申請，了解該機構如何使用近期核准的緊急基金。

gept.example_en: The universal-declaration of human rights set out principles that have guided international standards for many decades.
gept.example_zh: 世界人權宣言訂立的原則指導國際標準數十年。

gept.example_en: Freedom-of-assembly allows citizens to gather peacefully and express their views on matters of public concern.
gept.example_zh: 集會自由讓公民得以和平聚集，並就公共關切議題表達意見。

gept.example_en: Freedom-of-religion guarantees individuals the right to practice their faith without unwarranted state interference.
gept.example_zh: 宗教自由保障個人能在不受無理由國家干預的情況下實踐其信仰。

gept.example_en: The convention on rights-of-the-child establishes minimum standards for protection, education, and meaningful participation in society.
gept.example_zh: 兒童權利公約訂定了保護、教育以及在社會中有意義參與的最低標準。

gept.example_en: Indigenous-rights advocates push for recognition of traditional land claims and meaningful participation in resource decisions.
gept.example_zh: 原住民權利倡議者推動傳統土地主張的承認與在資源決策中的有意義參與。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 土地索取權；土地請求
gept.example_en: The tribe filed a land-claim seeking recognition of territory historically inhabited by their ancestors.
gept.example_zh: 該部落提出土地請求，尋求認可其祖先歷史上所居住的領域。

gept.example_en: Courts upheld the community's treaty-rights to fish in seasonal waters their ancestors had used historically.
gept.example_zh: 法院維護該社區於其祖先歷史上使用的季節性水域捕魚的條約權利。

gept.example_en: The principle of self-determination recognizes the right of peoples to choose their own political future.
gept.example_zh: 民族自決原則承認各民族選擇自身政治未來的權利。

gept.example_en: A regional non-governmental-organization coordinated the distribution of emergency supplies to remote villages affected by flooding.
gept.example_zh: 一個區域性非政府組織協調將緊急物資分發給受洪災影響的偏遠村莊。

gept.example_en: Voting in local elections is widely seen as an important civic-duty for engaged community members.
gept.example_zh: 在地方選舉中投票被普遍視為積極參與社區成員的重要公民義務。

gept.example_en: Clean air, national defense, and basic scientific research are classic examples of essential public-goods.
gept.example_zh: 乾淨的空氣、國防與基礎科學研究都是必要公共財的典型例子。

gept.example_en: Political philosophers describe the social-contract as the implicit agreement underlying legitimate exercise of government authority.
gept.example_zh: 政治哲學家將社會契約描述為合法行使政府權力背後的隱含協議。

gept.example_en: A government's legitimacy ultimately depends on continued consent and acceptance from a substantial majority of citizens.
gept.example_zh: 政府的正當性最終取決於絕大多數公民持續的同意與接受。

gept.example_en: Democratic theorists insist that just authority requires the genuine consent-of-the-governed expressed through free and fair elections.
gept.example_zh: 民主理論家堅持，正當的權威需要透過自由公正選舉所表達之被治理者的真正同意。

gept.example_en: Andragogy focuses on how adults learn differently from children through experience and self-direction.
gept.example_zh: 成人教育學關注成人如何透過經驗和自我引導以不同於兒童的方式學習。

gept.example_en: Constructivism holds that learners build knowledge through active exploration rather than passive reception.
gept.example_zh: 建構主義主張學習者透過主動探索而非被動接收來建立知識。

gept.example_en: Behaviorism emphasizes observable actions and the role of reinforcement in shaping student behavior.
gept.example_zh: 行為主義強調可觀察的行為以及增強在塑造學生行為中的作用。

gept.example_en: Cognitivism studies how mental processes like memory and attention influence the way we learn.
gept.example_zh: 認知主義研究記憶與注意力等心智歷程如何影響我們的學習方式。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 後設認知；對思考的思考
gept.example_en: Strong metacognition skills help students monitor their own understanding and adjust strategies accordingly.
gept.example_zh: 強大的後設認知能力幫助學生監控自己的理解並相應調整策略。

gept.example_en: Through habituation, infants stop reacting to a sound they have heard many times.
gept.example_zh: 透過習慣化，嬰兒會停止對已聽過多次的聲音做出反應。

gept.example_en: Classical conditioning links a neutral stimulus to a meaningful one to produce a learned response.
gept.example_zh: 古典制約將中性刺激與有意義的刺激連結以產生習得反應。

gept.example_en: Sociologists examine deviance to understand why some individuals break established social norms.
gept.example_zh: 社會學家研究偏差行為以理解某些人為何打破既定的社會規範。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 失範；社會規範解體
gept.example_en: Durkheim used anomie to describe the breakdown of shared values during rapid social change.
gept.example_zh: 涂爾幹用失範一詞描述社會劇變時期共同價值觀的瓦解。

gept.example_en: Primary socialization within the family shapes a child's earliest values and behaviors.
gept.example_zh: 家庭中的初級社會化塑造孩童最早期的價值觀與行為。

gept.example_en: Through enculturation, children absorb the language, customs, and worldview of their society.
gept.example_zh: 透過濡化，兒童吸收所屬社會的語言、習俗與世界觀。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 文化涵化；跨文化適應
gept.example_en: New immigrants experience acculturation as they adopt aspects of the host country culture.
gept.example_zh: 新移民在採納東道國文化要素時會經歷文化涵化。

gept.example_en: Ethnocentrism leads people to judge other cultures by the standards of their own.
gept.example_zh: 民族中心主義使人以自身文化的標準評斷其他文化。

gept.example_en: Cultural relativism asks researchers to understand a practice within its own social context.
gept.example_zh: 文化相對主義要求研究者在自身社會脈絡中理解某項習俗。

gept.example_en: The skateboarding subculture has its own slang, fashion, and shared sense of identity.
gept.example_zh: 滑板次文化擁有自己的俚語、時尚和共同的身份認同感。

gept.example_en: The 1960s counterculture openly rejected mainstream norms regarding war and consumerism.
gept.example_zh: 1960年代的反主流文化公開拒斥主流的戰爭與消費主義規範。

gept.example_en: Social stratification ranks groups based on wealth, prestige, and access to power.
gept.example_zh: 社會階層化依財富、聲望和取得權力的途徑對群體進行排序。

gept.example_en: A rigid caste system limits which occupations and marriages individuals are allowed to pursue.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的種姓制度限制個人能從事的職業與婚配對象。

gept.example_en: The persistent underclass often lacks access to quality schools and stable employment.
gept.example_zh: 長期存在的底層階級通常缺乏優質學校與穩定就業的管道。

gept.example_en: Marx argued that the bourgeoisie owned the means of production and exploited workers.
gept.example_zh: 馬克思主張資產階級擁有生產工具並剝削工人。

gept.example_en: The proletariat sells its labor in exchange for wages that may not cover basic needs.
gept.example_zh: 無產階級出賣勞動力換取可能無法支付基本需求的工資。

gept.example_en: The ideologue refused to consider any evidence that contradicted his core political beliefs.
gept.example_zh: 這位意識形態家拒絕考慮任何與其核心政治信念相牴觸的證據。

gept.example_en: Bourdieu's habitus describes the durable dispositions shaped by one's upbringing and social position.
gept.example_zh: 布迪厄的慣習指由成長環境和社會位置所形塑的持久性情。

gept.example_en: In a patriarchal society, men typically hold most positions of formal and informal power.
gept.example_zh: 在父權社會中，男性通常掌握大部分正式與非正式權力位置。

gept.example_en: Some matriarchal communities pass property and family names through the mother's line.
gept.example_zh: 某些母系社群透過母親的血脈傳承財產與家族姓氏。

gept.example_en: An egalitarian classroom treats every student's voice as equally important and worth hearing.
gept.example_zh: 平等主義的教室將每位學生的聲音都視為同等重要、值得聆聽。

gept.example_en: Long-term marginalization of rural students leaves them with fewer opportunities for advanced study.
gept.example_zh: 對鄉村學生的長期邊緣化使他們深造的機會更少。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 象徵性點綴；做做樣子
gept.example_en: Hiring a single minority candidate can be tokenism if no systemic change accompanies it.
gept.example_zh: 若沒有伴隨體制改革，僱用單一少數族群候選人可能只是象徵性點綴。

gept.example_en: A casual microaggression can deeply hurt someone even when no harm was intended.
gept.example_zh: 即使無心傷害，隨口而出的微歧視也可能深深傷害他人。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 補救的；補救教學的
gept.example_en: Remedial classes help struggling students catch up to their grade-level expectations.
gept.example_zh: 補救課程幫助學習困難的學生跟上同年級的學習進度。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 充實課程；補充學習
gept.example_en: Enrichment programs offer advanced learners deeper exploration beyond the standard curriculum.
gept.example_zh: 充實課程為進階學習者提供超越標準課綱的深入探索。

gept.example_en: The gifted program challenges high-ability students with projects that promote creative problem solving.
gept.example_zh: 資優生計畫透過促進創意解題的專案來挑戰高能力學生。

gept.example_en: Special education provides tailored support for students with learning, physical, or emotional needs.
gept.example_zh: 特殊教育為有學習、身體或情緒需求的學生提供量身訂做的支持。

gept.example_en: An individualized education plan sets specific goals for each student with special needs.
gept.example_zh: 個別化教育計畫為每位特殊需求學生設定具體目標。

gept.example_en: An inclusion classroom welcomes learners with diverse abilities into a shared learning environment.
gept.example_zh: 融合教室歡迎各種能力的學習者進入共同的學習環境。

gept.example_en: Children with dyslexia may need extra time to decode words while reading aloud.
gept.example_zh: 閱讀障礙的孩童朗讀時可能需要額外時間來解碼文字。

gept.example_en: A student with dysgraphia struggles to form letters even when ideas come quickly.
gept.example_zh: 患有書寫障礙的學生即使想法湧現，書寫字母仍感困難。

gept.example_en: Dyscalculia makes arithmetic and number sense unusually difficult for otherwise capable children.
gept.example_zh: 計算障礙讓在其他方面能力良好的兒童在算術與數感上特別困難。

gept.example_en: Some people with Asperger characteristics show intense focus on narrow areas of interest.
gept.example_zh: 具有亞斯伯格特徵的人在狹窄興趣領域上常表現出強烈專注。

gept.example_en: A neurodiverse classroom celebrates a wide range of cognitive styles and strengths.
gept.example_zh: 神經多樣的教室讚揚廣泛的認知風格與優勢。

gept.example_en: Parents and teachers meet annually to update the student's IEP and review progress.
gept.example_zh: 家長與老師每年會面更新學生的IEP並檢視進展。

gept.example_en: The teacher shared a rubric so students understood exactly how their essays would be scored.
gept.example_zh: 老師分享評分準則表，讓學生清楚知道作文將如何被評分。

gept.example_en: Portfolio assessment tracks student growth across many projects rather than a single exam.
gept.example_zh: 檔案評量透過多項作品而非單一考試來追蹤學生的成長。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 形成性的；形成性評量的
gept.example_en: Formative quizzes give teachers quick feedback so they can adjust instruction immediately.
gept.example_zh: 形成性小考讓老師獲得即時回饋，得以立刻調整教學。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 總結性的；終結性評量的
gept.example_en: The final exam serves as a summative assessment of everything covered during the semester.
gept.example_zh: 期末考試是學期所有內容的總結性評量。

gept.example_en: A diagnostic test before the unit reveals which concepts each learner already knows.
gept.example_zh: 單元前的診斷測驗顯示每位學習者已掌握哪些概念。

gept.example_en: Norm-referenced tests compare a student's performance to the scores of a larger sample.
gept.example_zh: 常模參照測驗將學生表現與較大樣本的分數進行比較。

gept.example_en: Criterion-referenced exams measure whether students have met specific learning targets.
gept.example_zh: 標準參照考試測量學生是否達到具體的學習目標。

gept.example_en: The norming study established reference scores for students of different age groups.
gept.example_zh: 建立常模的研究為不同年齡組學生確立了參照分數。

gept.example_en: Researchers standardize the test so that every student answers under identical conditions.
gept.example_zh: 研究人員將測驗標準化，讓每位學生在相同條件下作答。

gept.example_en: A test has high reliability when it produces consistent results across repeated administrations.
gept.example_zh: 若測驗在重複施測下產生一致的結果，便具有高信度。

gept.example_en: The validity of an exam depends on whether it really measures what it claims to measure.
gept.example_zh: 考試的效度取決於它是否真的測量了它宣稱要測量的內容。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 證照制度；資格認定
gept.example_en: Strict credentialing ensures that only qualified teachers are placed in classrooms.
gept.example_zh: 嚴格的證照制度確保只有合格教師被安排到教室。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 實踐；理論結合行動
gept.example_en: Critical pedagogy emphasizes praxis, where reflection and social action inform each other.
gept.example_zh: 批判教育學強調實踐，反思與社會行動相互啟發。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 經驗法則；啟發式策略
gept.example_en: People often rely on heuristics to make quick decisions under uncertainty.
gept.example_zh: 人們在不確定下常依賴經驗法則做出快速決定。

gept.example_en: Sleep loss impairs cognition skill, slowing reaction time and weakening memory.
gept.example_zh: 睡眠不足損害認知能力，減慢反應時間並削弱記憶。

gept.example_en: Executive function helps children plan, focus, and switch between school tasks effectively.
gept.example_zh: 執行功能幫助孩子有效計劃、專注並在學校任務間切換。

gept.example_en: Self-regulation skills let students manage frustration and stay engaged during difficult work.
gept.example_zh: 自我調節能力讓學生在艱難的功課中管理挫折並保持投入。

gept.example_en: Bandura argued that self-efficacy strongly predicts how persistently we pursue challenging goals.
gept.example_zh: 班杜拉主張自我效能能強烈預測我們追求具挑戰性目標的堅持程度。

gept.example_en: Adopting a growth mindset helps learners view mistakes as opportunities to improve.
gept.example_zh: 採取成長型心態幫助學習者將錯誤視為改進的機會。

gept.example_en: A fixed mindset can stop students from trying new tasks they fear they will fail.
gept.example_zh: 定型心態可能讓學生不敢嘗試他們害怕會失敗的新任務。

gept.example_en: Intrinsic motivation arises when students find a task genuinely interesting or meaningful.
gept.example_zh: 當學生覺得任務真正有趣或有意義時，便產生內在動機。

gept.example_en: Stickers and grades are extrinsic rewards that may shape behavior in the short term.
gept.example_zh: 貼紙和分數屬於外在獎勵，可能在短期內塑造行為。

gept.example_en: Skinner explored operant conditioning by reinforcing rats for pressing a small lever.
gept.example_zh: 史金納透過增強老鼠按下小桿來研究操作制約。

gept.example_en: Verbal praise can act as a powerful reinforcer for young children completing chores.
gept.example_zh: 口頭讚美對完成家務的幼童可作為強而有力的增強物。

gept.example_en: Losing screen time served as a punisher that discouraged the child from yelling again.
gept.example_zh: 失去看螢幕時間作為懲罰物，使孩子不再大喊大叫。

gept.example_en: Shaping teaches a new skill by rewarding small steps that approach the desired behavior.
gept.example_zh: 行為塑造透過獎勵接近目標行為的小步驟來教導新技能。

gept.example_en: Teachers use modeling behavior to show students how to disagree without being rude.
gept.example_zh: 老師用行為示範向學生展示如何不失禮地表達不同意。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 替代性的；間接體驗的
gept.example_en: Children often learn safety rules through vicarious experience of seeing others get hurt.
gept.example_zh: 孩子常透過看到別人受傷的替代性經驗學習安全規則。

gept.example_en: Attachment theory explains how early bonds with caregivers influence later relationships.
gept.example_zh: 依附理論解釋早期與照顧者的連結如何影響日後的人際關係。

gept.example_en: Children with secure attachment use their caregiver as a safe base for exploring the world.
gept.example_zh: 具安全依附的孩子以照顧者為安全基地來探索世界。

gept.example_en: Adults with avoidant patterns may distance themselves when relationships become emotionally close.
gept.example_zh: 迴避型成人在關係變得情感親密時可能會拉開距離。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 矛盾型的；猶疑的
gept.example_en: Ambivalent attachment can make someone seek closeness while also fearing rejection.
gept.example_zh: 矛盾型依附可能讓人既渴望親密又害怕被拒絕。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 混亂型的；紊亂的
gept.example_en: Disorganized attachment often follows unpredictable or frightening caregiving experiences.
gept.example_zh: 混亂型依附常源於不可預測或令人害怕的照顧經驗。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 發展的；發展學的
gept.example_en: Developmental psychologists study how thinking and behavior change across the lifespan.
gept.example_zh: 發展心理學家研究思考和行為如何在整個人生中變化。

gept.example_en: Walking and speaking first words are typical milestone development markers around age one.
gept.example_zh: 走路和說出第一個字詞是約一歲時典型的發展里程碑指標。

gept.example_en: Infants achieve object permanence when they realize hidden toys still exist out of sight.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒在意識到看不見的玩具仍然存在時便達到了物體恆存概念。

gept.example_en: Pouring water into a taller glass tests whether a child has grasped conservation.
gept.example_zh: 把水倒入較高的杯子可測試孩子是否掌握了守恆概念。

gept.example_en: Young children are often egocentric and struggle to imagine someone else's viewpoint.
gept.example_zh: 幼童常以自我為中心，難以設想他人的觀點。

gept.example_en: In the preoperational stage, children use symbols but cannot yet think logically about transformations.
gept.example_zh: 在前運思期，兒童會使用符號但尚無法邏輯地思考變化。

gept.example_en: Concrete operational thinkers can sort objects but reason mainly about tangible situations.
gept.example_zh: 具體運思期的思考者能分類物品，但主要針對具體情境推理。

gept.example_en: Formal operational reasoning lets adolescents handle abstract hypotheses and systematic problem solving.
gept.example_zh: 形式運思期的推理讓青少年能處理抽象假設與系統化解題。

gept.example_en: Teaching within the zone of proximal development helps learners reach the next achievable step.
gept.example_zh: 在最近發展區內教學幫助學習者達到下一個可達成的階段。

gept.example_en: Young learners often use private speech to guide themselves through challenging tasks.
gept.example_zh: 幼童常用私語引導自己完成具挑戰性的任務。

gept.example_en: Brain lateralization gives each hemisphere certain specialized functions like language or spatial skill.
gept.example_zh: 大腦側化使每個半球擁有語言或空間能力等特定的專門功能。

gept.example_en: Increased myelination during adolescence speeds up communication between brain regions.
gept.example_zh: 青春期髓鞘化的增加加速了腦區之間的訊息傳遞。

gept.example_en: Exercise and learning encourage neurogenesis in certain regions of the adult brain.
gept.example_zh: 運動與學習能在成人大腦的特定區域促進神經新生。

gept.example_en: Freudian theory emphasized the role of the unconscious in shaping daily behavior.
gept.example_zh: 佛洛伊德學說強調潛意識在塑造日常行為中的角色。

gept.example_en: A strong superego pushes a person to follow internalized rules about right and wrong.
gept.example_zh: 強烈的超我推動一個人遵循內化的是非規則。

gept.example_en: Freud described the id as the source of instinctive desires demanding immediate gratification.
gept.example_zh: 佛洛伊德將本我描述為要求立即滿足的本能慾望來源。

gept.example_en: Repression pushes painful memories into the unconscious where they continue to influence behavior.
gept.example_zh: 壓抑將痛苦記憶推入潛意識，但這些記憶仍持續影響行為。

gept.example_en: Rationalization helps people invent acceptable reasons for behavior driven by hidden motives.
gept.example_zh: 合理化幫助人們為受隱藏動機驅動的行為編造可接受的理由。

gept.example_en: Through sublimation, aggressive energy can be channeled into sports or competitive work.
gept.example_zh: 透過昇華，攻擊性能量可以被導向運動或競爭性工作。

gept.example_en: Transference can lead a client to feel toward the therapist as they felt toward a parent.
gept.example_zh: 移情作用可能讓個案對治療師產生像對父母般的感受。

gept.example_en: Therapists monitor their own countertransference to keep personal feelings from clouding judgment.
gept.example_zh: 治療師會留意自身的反移情，以免個人情緒影響判斷。

gept.example_en: Classical psychoanalysis often explored childhood memories through free association on the couch.
gept.example_zh: 古典精神分析常透過躺椅上的自由聯想來探索童年記憶。

gept.example_en: Humanistic approaches focus on personal growth, dignity, and the search for meaning.
gept.example_zh: 人本主義取向關注個人成長、尊嚴和對意義的追尋。

gept.example_en: In client-centered therapy, the counselor offers empathy without directing the conversation.
gept.example_zh: 在個案中心治療中，諮商師提供同理而不引導對話方向。

gept.example_en: Rogers believed that unconditional positive regard helps clients accept themselves more fully.
gept.example_zh: 羅傑斯認為無條件的正向關懷幫助個案更全面地接納自己。

gept.example_en: Maslow saw self-actualization as the human drive to realize one's fullest potential.
gept.example_zh: 馬斯洛將自我實現視為人類發揮最大潛能的內在動力。

gept.example_en: Maslow's hierarchy of needs ranges from physical survival to higher psychological growth.
gept.example_zh: 馬斯洛的需求層次從生理生存延伸到較高層次的心理成長。

gept.example_en: Rational emotive therapy challenges irrational beliefs that produce intense negative emotions.
gept.example_zh: 理性情緒治療挑戰那些產生強烈負面情緒的非理性信念。

gept.example_en: Exposure therapy gradually confronts patients with feared situations to reduce avoidance.
gept.example_zh: 暴露療法讓病人逐步面對所畏懼的情境以減少迴避。

gept.example_en: Systematic desensitization pairs relaxation with imagined fears to weaken anxiety responses.
gept.example_zh: 系統減敏感法將放鬆與想像中的恐懼配對，以削弱焦慮反應。

gept.example_en: Habit reversal training helps people replace nail biting with a competing harmless movement.
gept.example_zh: 習慣翻轉訓練幫助人們用一個競爭性的無害動作取代咬指甲。

gept.example_en: Mindfulness therapy invites clients to observe thoughts and feelings without rushing to judge them.
gept.example_zh: 正念療法邀請個案觀察思緒與感受，而不急於評斷它們。

gept.example_en: Group therapy helps members realize that others share similar struggles and coping strategies.
gept.example_zh: 團體治療幫助成員意識到他人也有相似的困擾和應對方式。

gept.example_en: Family therapy treats the family as a system rather than focusing only on one person.
gept.example_zh: 家族治療把家庭視為一個系統，而非只聚焦於某一個人。

gept.example_en: Play therapy lets young children express difficult feelings through toys and storytelling.
gept.example_zh: 遊戲治療讓幼兒透過玩具和故事表達困難的情緒。

gept.example_en: Art therapy uses drawing and painting to help clients process experiences words cannot capture.
gept.example_zh: 藝術治療運用繪畫幫助個案處理言語無法表達的經歷。

gept.example_en: Music therapy can reduce agitation in patients with dementia and promote emotional connection.
gept.example_zh: 音樂治療可減少失智症患者的躁動並促進情感連結。

gept.example_en: The hospital offers psychiatric care for adolescents experiencing severe depression or psychosis.
gept.example_zh: 醫院為患有重度憂鬱或精神病性症狀的青少年提供精神醫學照護。

gept.example_en: A careful diagnosis of mental health needs guides decisions about therapy and medication.
gept.example_zh: 對心理健康需求的審慎診斷指引治療與用藥的決定。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 神經官能症；神經質
gept.example_en: Earlier writers used neurosis as a broad label for anxiety-related psychological distress.
gept.example_zh: 早期作者用神經官能症泛指與焦慮相關的心理困擾。

gept.example_en: Obsessive thoughts about contamination drove him to wash his hands dozens of times daily.
gept.example_zh: 對污染的強迫性想法驅使他每天洗手數十次。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 強迫衝動的；無法控制的
gept.example_en: Compulsive checking of locks brings only brief relief before the worry returns.
gept.example_zh: 強迫性反覆檢查門鎖只能帶來短暫的安心，擔憂隨即又回來。

gept.example_en: A panic attack can produce racing heartbeat, dizziness, and an overwhelming sense of doom.
gept.example_zh: 恐慌發作可能引發心跳加速、頭暈及一種強烈的災難感。

gept.example_en: Agoraphobia makes leaving home or entering crowded places extremely distressing.
gept.example_zh: 廣場恐懼症讓離開家門或進入擁擠場所變得極度令人痛苦。

gept.example_en: Social anxiety can make even small conversations feel exhausting and threatening.
gept.example_zh: 社交焦慮會讓即使是小小的交談都感到耗竭與具威脅感。

gept.example_en: An eating disorder often involves deep distress about body image and unhealthy eating patterns.
gept.example_zh: 飲食障礙通常涉及對身體形象的深刻痛苦和不健康的飲食模式。

gept.example_en: Anorexia is a serious illness in which a person restricts food despite being underweight.
gept.example_zh: 厭食症是一種嚴重疾病，患者雖然體重過輕仍限制進食。

gept.example_en: Bulimia involves cycles of binge eating followed by purging or extreme exercise.
gept.example_zh: 暴食症涉及暴飲暴食後催吐或極端運動的循環。

gept.example_en: Some adolescents use self-harm as a way to cope with overwhelming emotional pain.
gept.example_zh: 一些青少年用自傷行為作為應對巨大情緒痛苦的方式。

gept.example_en: Schools train staff to recognize warning signs of suicidality and connect students to help.
gept.example_zh: 學校訓練教職員辨識自殺傾向的警訊並將學生連結到協助資源。

gept.example_en: Counselors help children build resilience skill by reflecting on past challenges overcome.
gept.example_zh: 諮商師透過回顧過去克服的挑戰幫助孩子建立復原力。

gept.example_en: Healthy coping mechanisms include exercise, journaling, and reaching out to trusted friends.
gept.example_zh: 健康的因應機制包括運動、寫日記和向信任的朋友求助。

gept.example_en: Schools now teach stress management alongside traditional academic subjects.
gept.example_zh: 學校如今將壓力管理與傳統學科一同教授。

gept.example_en: Long hours and emotional demands left the caregivers experiencing severe burnout emotional.
gept.example_zh: 長時間工作與情感需求讓照顧者經歷嚴重的情緒耗竭。

gept.example_en: Therapists who work with trauma victims must watch carefully for compassion fatigue.
gept.example_zh: 與創傷受害者工作的治療師必須小心留意同情疲乏。

gept.example_en: Aid workers sometimes develop vicarious trauma after hearing repeated disaster stories.
gept.example_zh: 救援工作者在反覆聽聞災難故事後有時會發展出替代性創傷。

gept.example_en: After receiving the diagnosis, he remained in the denial stage for several weeks.
gept.example_zh: 得知診斷結果後，他在否認階段停留了好幾個星期。

gept.example_en: Reaching the acceptance stage of loss does not erase pain but allows life to continue.
gept.example_zh: 達到失落的接受階段並不會抹去痛苦，但讓生活得以繼續。

gept.example_en: Strong rapport building during the first session helps clients open up about sensitive topics.
gept.example_zh: 首次晤談中良好的關係建立幫助個案敞開談論敏感話題。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 事後說明；研究後解說
gept.example_en: Debriefing after the experiment clarified its purpose and addressed lingering concerns.
gept.example_zh: 實驗後的事後說明釐清研究目的並處理殘留的疑慮。

gept.example_en: Ethnography requires researchers to live with the community they hope to understand.
gept.example_zh: 民族誌研究要求研究者與其希望理解的社群共同生活。

gept.example_en: Acting as a participant observer, she joined daily classes while taking detailed notes.
gept.example_zh: 她以參與觀察者身分加入日常課程，同時做詳盡的筆記。

gept.example_en: A longitudinal study followed the same students from kindergarten through high school graduation.
gept.example_zh: 一項縱貫研究追蹤同一批學生從幼稚園到高中畢業。

gept.example_en: The Hawthorne effect warns that people may behave differently simply because they are observed.
gept.example_zh: 霍桑效應提醒人們可能僅因為被觀察而表現出不同的行為。

gept.example_en: The bystander effect explains why people may not help when many others are present.
gept.example_zh: 旁觀者效應解釋為何在許多人在場時人們可能不會伸出援手。

gept.example_en: Asch's classic study revealed surprising levels of conformity social to obvious wrong answers.
gept.example_zh: 阿希的經典研究揭示了人們對明顯錯誤答案出乎意料的從眾程度。

gept.example_en: Milgram studied obedience to authority by asking volunteers to deliver supposedly painful shocks.
gept.example_zh: 米爾格倫透過要求志願者施加看似痛苦的電擊來研究對權威的服從。

gept.example_en: Deindividuation in large crowds can encourage people to act in ways they would normally avoid.
gept.example_zh: 在大群體中的去個性化可能促使人們做出他們平常會避免的行為。

gept.example_en: Social loafing tempts members to contribute less when their individual effort cannot be tracked.
gept.example_zh: 當個人努力無法被追蹤時，社會性懈怠會誘使成員貢獻較少。

gept.example_en: Diffusion of responsibility lets each onlooker assume someone else will step in to help.
gept.example_zh: 責任分散讓每位旁觀者都假定別人會出手相助。

gept.example_en: Members of an in-group often show greater trust and warmth toward each other.
gept.example_zh: 內團體成員彼此之間通常表現出更高的信任與親近感。

gept.example_en: Negative stereotypes commonly form about an out-group seen as different or threatening.
gept.example_zh: 對於被視為不同或具威脅的外團體，常會形成負面的刻板印象。

gept.example_en: Labeling theory suggests that being called a troublemaker can push a teen toward delinquency.
gept.example_zh: 標籤理論指出被稱為麻煩製造者可能將青少年推向偏差行為。
