gept.example_en: Breakfast time at my home is always seven thirty in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我家的早餐時間總是早上七點半。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 晨間例行公事
gept.example_en: My morning routine is to wash, dress, eat, and brush my teeth.
gept.example_zh: 我的晨間例行公事是洗臉、穿衣、吃飯和刷牙。

gept.example_en: I pack my schoolbag the night before to save time in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我前一晚就會把書包整理好，這樣早上可以省時間。

gept.example_en: Mom puts rice and chicken into my lunchbox every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個工作日都會把飯和雞肉放進我的便當盒。

gept.example_en: I wear my blue school uniform from Monday to Friday every week.
gept.example_zh: 我每週從星期一到星期五都穿藍色的學校制服。

gept.example_en: I leave home at seven fifteen to catch the early school bus.
gept.example_zh: 我七點十五分離開家去趕早班校車。

gept.example_en: I wait for the yellow school bus at the corner near my home.
gept.example_zh: 我在我家附近的轉角等黃色校車。

gept.example_en: I ride my bike to school every sunny day in the spring.
gept.example_zh: 春天天氣晴朗時，我每天都騎腳踏車上學。

gept.example_en: My little sister and I walk to school together every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 我和妹妹每個工作日都一起走路上學。

gept.example_en: A school day for me usually starts at eight in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我的上學日通常從早上八點開始。

gept.example_en: After school I play in the backyard with my dog and my brother.
gept.example_zh: 放學後我會和狗、弟弟一起在後院玩。

gept.example_en: I come home from school at four o'clock every weekday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我每個工作日下午四點從學校回家。

gept.example_en: Snack time at home is around four every weekday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 在家的點心時間大約是每個工作日下午四點。

gept.example_en: Each kid in my family does a small chore at home every day.
gept.example_zh: 我家每個小孩每天都要做一件小家事。

gept.example_en: My family shares the housework on Saturday mornings together.
gept.example_zh: 我家在星期六早上會一起分擔家事。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 整理；收拾乾淨
gept.example_en: Please tidy up your toys before you sit down for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 坐下來吃晚餐前請把你的玩具收拾乾淨。

gept.example_en: There is a big basket of laundry next to the washing machine.
gept.example_zh: 洗衣機旁邊有一大籃待洗的衣服。

gept.example_en: Mom puts our dirty clothes in the washing machine every Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個星期六都把我們的髒衣服放進洗衣機。

gept.example_en: I use a small clothes peg to keep my shirt on the line.
gept.example_zh: 我用一個小曬衣夾把襯衫固定在曬衣繩上。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 把垃圾拿出去丟
gept.example_en: I take out the trash every Tuesday and Friday after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我每個星期二和星期五晚餐後都會把垃圾拿出去丟。

gept.example_en: I feed the dog twice a day, once before school and once after.
gept.example_zh: 我一天餵狗兩次，一次上學前，一次放學後。

gept.example_en: Cooking is my mother's favorite hobby on quiet Sunday afternoons.
gept.example_zh: 在安靜的星期日下午，烹飪是我媽媽最愛的興趣。

gept.example_en: Please stir the soup gently with a wooden spoon for me.
gept.example_zh: 請用一根木湯匙幫我輕輕攪拌湯。

gept.example_en: Please pour the milk into my cup slowly so it does not spill.
gept.example_zh: 請慢慢把牛奶倒進我的杯子，這樣才不會灑出來。

gept.example_en: Please taste the soup and tell me if it needs more salt.
gept.example_zh: 請嚐嚐這湯，告訴我是不是需要再加點鹽。

gept.example_en: Mom buys the grocery for the family every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個星期六早上都為家人買食品雜貨。

gept.example_en: Dad writes a grocery list before he goes shopping at the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸去超市購物前會先寫購物清單。

gept.example_en: Dinnertime at my home is always at six thirty on weekdays.
gept.example_zh: 我家的晚餐時間在平日總是六點半。

gept.example_en: Mealtime in our family is a happy time to talk together.
gept.example_zh: 在我們家，用餐時間是大家一起聊天的快樂時刻。

gept.example_en: My grandma's homemade soup is the best in the whole world.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶自己做的湯是全世界最好喝的。

gept.example_en: Bedtime for my little sister is at nine o'clock every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹平日的就寢時間是晚上九點。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞片語) 把人塞進被窩；蓋好被子
gept.example_en: Mom tucks me in and reads a short story every night.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每天晚上都會幫我蓋好被子，並念一個短故事。

gept.example_en: I fall asleep quickly because I am tired from school.
gept.example_zh: 我很快就睡著了，因為上學讓我很累。

gept.example_en: I dream about flying in the sky every now and then.
gept.example_zh: 我偶爾會夢到自己在天空飛翔。

gept.example_en: Story time at our house is at eight thirty every weekday night.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每個平日晚上八點半是故事時間。

gept.example_en: My father reads me a bedtime story almost every night.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸幾乎每天晚上都會念床邊故事給我聽。

gept.example_en: I keep a small blue nightlight on next to my bed at night.
gept.example_zh: 我晚上會在床邊開一盞藍色的小夜燈。

gept.example_en: I say good night to my parents before I close my bedroom door.
gept.example_zh: 我關上臥室門前會跟父母說晚安。

gept.example_en: On Saturday morning we eat pancakes and drink fresh orange juice.
gept.example_zh: 星期六早上我們吃煎餅和喝新鮮的柳橙汁。

gept.example_en: Sunday afternoon is when we visit my grandparents in their home.
gept.example_zh: 星期日下午是我們去爺爺奶奶家的時候。

gept.example_en: Family time on Sunday is the part of the week I love most.
gept.example_zh: 星期天的家庭時間是我一週中最喜歡的部分。

gept.example_en: Playtime with my baby brother is always loud and very fun.
gept.example_zh: 和我的弟弟一起玩的時間總是吵鬧又非常有趣。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 桌遊；棋盤遊戲
gept.example_en: We play a board game on the carpet every Friday night together.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個星期五晚上都一起在地毯上玩桌遊。

gept.example_en: We watch TV together in the living room after dinner each night.
gept.example_zh: 我們每天晚餐後都會一起在客廳看電視。

gept.example_en: Friday is our movie night and we eat popcorn on the couch.
gept.example_zh: 星期五是我們的電影之夜，我們會在沙發上吃爆米花。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 整天窩在沙發看電視的人
gept.example_en: My brother is a couch potato every rainy Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥每個下雨的星期天下午都窩在沙發上不動。

gept.example_en: My grandmother is a warm-hearted woman who hugs every guest.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶是個熱心親切的女人，她會擁抱每位客人。

gept.example_en: My family dinner is sometimes very noisy because we all talk.
gept.example_zh: 我們家的晚餐有時候很吵，因為大家都在說話。

gept.example_en: Our house is peaceful in the early morning before everyone wakes up.
gept.example_zh: 在大家還沒起床的清晨，我們的房子非常寧靜。

gept.example_en: There is a small lamp and a clock on my bedside table.
gept.example_zh: 我的床頭櫃上有一盞小燈和一個時鐘。

gept.example_en: Please turn off the ceiling light when you leave the room.
gept.example_zh: 離開房間時請關掉吸頂燈。

gept.example_en: The switch for the bathroom light is on the wall by the door.
gept.example_zh: 浴室燈的開關在門邊的牆上。

gept.example_en: There is an outlet behind the sofa for the lamp and the TV.
gept.example_zh: 沙發後面有一個給檯燈和電視用的插座。

gept.example_en: I leave my phone charger on the bedside table every night.
gept.example_zh: 我每天晚上都把手機充電器放在床頭櫃上。

gept.example_en: There is a big round clock on the kitchen wall above the door.
gept.example_zh: 廚房門上方的牆上有一個大圓形時鐘。

gept.example_en: Grandma puts our family photo frame on the small bookshelf.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶把我們的家庭相框放在小書架上。

gept.example_en: Grandma has a small bird ornament on the wooden shelf.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶在木頭架子上有一個小鳥裝飾品。

gept.example_en: We put up the decoration in the living room before the new year.
gept.example_zh: 我們在新年前在客廳掛上裝飾品。

gept.example_en: Our small houseplant in the corner makes the room feel fresh.
gept.example_zh: 角落裡的小盆栽讓房間感覺清新。

gept.example_en: Mom lights a candle on the dinner table for my birthday.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽在晚餐桌上為我的生日點了一根蠟燭。

gept.example_en: My older cousin babysits us when our parents go to dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我的大表哥在我父母去吃晚餐時照顧我們。

gept.example_en: I look after my little brother while my mom cooks dinner.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽煮晚餐時，我會照顧我的弟弟。

gept.example_en: I take care of my pet rabbit every day after I come home.
gept.example_zh: 我每天回家後都會照顧我的寵物兔子。

gept.example_en: My grandparents and my parents live together in one big house.
gept.example_zh: 我的祖父母和父母住在一棟大房子裡。

gept.example_en: We have a guest from the country staying with us this week.
gept.example_zh: 本週有一位來自鄉下的客人住在我們家。

gept.example_en: Please knock on the door before you come into my bedroom.
gept.example_zh: 進我臥室前請敲門。

gept.example_en: I run to answer the door when I hear the doorbell ring.
gept.example_zh: 我聽到門鈴響時會跑去應門。

gept.example_en: I unlock the door with my key when I come home from school.
gept.example_zh: 我放學回家時用鑰匙開門。

gept.example_en: Please open the window so the room can get some fresh air.
gept.example_zh: 請打開窗戶，讓房間有一些新鮮空氣。

gept.example_en: Please close the window because it is raining hard outside now.
gept.example_zh: 請關上窗戶，因為外面下大雨了。

gept.example_en: Please switch on the lamp because I want to read my new book.
gept.example_zh: 請打開檯燈，因為我想看我的新書。

gept.example_en: Our new puppy sleeps in a small basket near the front door.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新小狗在前門旁的小籃子裡睡覺。

gept.example_en: The kitten plays with a yellow ball in the living room.
gept.example_zh: 小貓在客廳玩一顆黃色的球。

gept.example_en: I keep a goldfish in a small glass bowl on my desk.
gept.example_zh: 我在書桌上的一個小玻璃碗裡養了一隻金魚。

gept.example_en: My little brother has a hamster that runs in a wheel every night.
gept.example_zh: 我的弟弟有一隻倉鼠，每晚都在輪子上跑。

gept.example_en: The bird sings inside its cage near the kitchen window every day.
gept.example_zh: 鳥兒每天都在廚房窗邊的籠子裡唱歌。

gept.example_en: We buy a big bag of pet food at the store every weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個週末都會在店裡買一大袋寵物食物。

gept.example_en: I feel tired after a long school day and want to sleep early.
gept.example_zh: 上了一整天的學後我很累，想早點睡。

gept.example_en: I feel sleepy in the car after my swimming class on Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 星期六上完游泳課後，我在車上感到很睏。

gept.example_en: I am hungry after school and eat a sandwich for a snack.
gept.example_zh: 我放學後肚子餓，就吃一個三明治當點心。

gept.example_en: I am thirsty after I play in the yard with my brother.
gept.example_zh: 我和弟弟在院子玩完後感到很口渴。

gept.example_en: I am full after dinner so I cannot eat any ice cream tonight.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後我很飽，所以今晚不能再吃冰淇淋了。

gept.example_en: I put on clean clothes after I take a warm shower each night.
gept.example_zh: 我每晚洗完熱水澡後都會換上乾淨的衣服。

gept.example_en: My shoes are dirty so I take them off at the front door.
gept.example_zh: 我的鞋子很髒，所以我在前門把它們脫掉。

gept.example_en: My grandmother always keeps her kitchen very neat and clean.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶總是把廚房保持得非常整潔乾淨。

gept.example_en: My bedroom is messy so my mom tells me to clean it now.
gept.example_zh: 我的臥室很凌亂，所以媽媽叫我現在去整理。

gept.example_en: My new bed is very comfortable and helps me sleep all night.
gept.example_zh: 我的新床很舒服，讓我能睡一整晚。

gept.example_en: Please make less noise because the baby is sleeping in the next room.
gept.example_zh: 請小聲一點，因為寶寶正在隔壁房間睡覺。

gept.example_en: We have quiet time at home from one to two on Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 星期日下午一點到兩點是我們家的安靜時間。

gept.example_en: In my free time I help my mom in the small kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 在我的空閒時間，我會在小廚房裡幫媽媽。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 興趣活動時間
gept.example_en: Hobby time on Sunday afternoon is when I paint with my dad.
gept.example_zh: 星期日下午的興趣活動時間是我和爸爸一起畫畫的時候。

gept.example_en: Homework time at our home is from six to seven every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 我們家平日的寫作業時間是六點到七點。

gept.example_en: My books and pencils are on my small study desk by the window.
gept.example_zh: 我的書和鉛筆都在窗邊的小書桌上。

gept.example_en: I keep my pencils and eraser in a yellow pencil case.
gept.example_zh: 我把鉛筆和橡皮擦放在一個黃色的鉛筆盒裡。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 家庭作業聯絡簿
gept.example_en: I write my homework in a homework diary every weekday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我每個平日下午都會把功課寫進家庭作業聯絡簿。

gept.example_en: Reading time at home is twenty minutes every weekday evening.
gept.example_zh: 在家裡的閱讀時間是每個平日晚上二十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Cleaning the bathroom is my weekly chore on Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 清潔浴室是我星期六早上每週的家事。

gept.example_en: Mom writes a shopping list before we go to the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽在我們去超市前會寫一份購物清單。

gept.example_en: I push the shopping cart for my mother at the supermarket.
gept.example_zh: 我在超市幫媽媽推購物車。

gept.example_en: Our family chat after dinner is always full of laughter and stories.
gept.example_zh: 我們家晚餐後的聊天總是充滿歡笑和故事。

gept.example_en: We have a video call with grandma every Sunday afternoon at three.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個星期天下午三點都會和奶奶視訊通話。

gept.example_en: Mom makes a phone call to grandma every weekday evening at seven.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個平日晚上七點都會打電話給奶奶。

gept.example_en: Mom keeps a small umbrella stand near the front door for rainy days.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽在前門旁放了一個雨傘架以應付下雨天。

gept.example_en: Dad hangs his keys on the key holder by the front door.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸把鑰匙掛在前門旁的鑰匙架上。

gept.example_en: Please hang your jacket on the coat hanger by the door.
gept.example_zh: 請把你的夾克掛在門邊的衣架上。

gept.example_en: Dad uses the garden hose to water the flowers in the front yard.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸用花園水管澆前院的花。

gept.example_en: Please put the empty bottle into the trash bin under the sink.
gept.example_zh: 請把空瓶子丟到水槽下的垃圾桶裡。

gept.example_en: The drawer handle is loose so my dad will fix it tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 抽屜的把手鬆了，所以我爸爸明天會修。

gept.example_en: My great-grandfather is ninety years old and still walks every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我的曾祖父九十歲了，每天早上還是會去散步。

gept.example_en: My great-grandmother tells me funny stories about her old village.
gept.example_zh: 我的曾祖母會跟我講她舊村莊的有趣故事。

gept.example_en: Grandma cooks special meals for each grandkid every Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶每個星期天都會為每個孫子做特別的餐點。

gept.example_en: All of my kinfolk meet at grandma's house for the new year.
gept.example_zh: 我所有的親屬都會在奶奶家聚會慶祝新年。

gept.example_en: We watch movies in the lounge after dinner every Friday night.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個星期五晚上都在客廳看電影。

gept.example_en: My cousin sleeps in the guestroom when she stays for the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我的表妹週末過夜時會睡在客房裡。

gept.example_en: We keep boxes and old toys in the storage room next to the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 我們把箱子和舊玩具放在廚房旁的儲藏室。

gept.example_en: A rooftile fell off our house during the strong storm last night.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚的強烈暴風雨中，我們家的一塊屋瓦掉下來了。

gept.example_en: Dad cleans the gutter on our roof every autumn.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每年秋天都會清理我們屋頂的排水溝。

gept.example_en: My dog sits by the front gate and waits for me every afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我的狗每天下午都坐在大門口等我。

gept.example_en: The postman puts our letters into the letterbox every morning.
gept.example_zh: 郵差每天早上都會把我們的信投入信箱口。

gept.example_en: My aunt rocks the baby gently in the wooden cradle.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨輕輕地搖著木製搖籃裡的寶寶。

gept.example_en: The baby sits in the high chair at the dinner table every night.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶每晚都坐在餐桌旁的兒童高腳椅上。

gept.example_en: My little cousin uses the small blue potty in the bathroom.
gept.example_zh: 我的小表弟在浴室裡使用藍色的小便盆。

gept.example_en: Mom fills the baby bottle with warm milk three times a day.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽一天三次把溫牛奶裝進奶瓶。

gept.example_en: I sleep with my brown teddy bear every night since I was small.
gept.example_zh: 我從小到大每晚都和我的棕色玩具熊一起睡。

gept.example_en: My sister has many stuffed animals on her bed every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹每天早上床上都有很多絨毛玩偶。

gept.example_en: There is a glass of water on the side table next to my bed.
gept.example_zh: 我床邊的邊桌上放著一杯水。

gept.example_en: We use the dining room only when we have guests for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 只有客人來吃晚餐時，我們才會使用飯廳。

gept.example_en: Our cat sleeps on the living-room rug every cold winter afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們的貓每個寒冷的冬天下午都睡在客廳地毯上。

gept.example_en: I read my book under the soft yellow light of my table lamp.
gept.example_zh: 我在桌燈柔和的黃色燈光下看書。

gept.example_en: There is a tall floor lamp in the corner of our living room.
gept.example_zh: 我們客廳的角落有一盞高大的落地燈。

gept.example_en: The wall clock in our kitchen plays a soft song every hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們廚房的掛鐘每小時都會播放一首輕柔的歌。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 桌上型電風扇
gept.example_en: I turn on the small table fan when I do my homework in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天寫作業時我會開小桌扇。

gept.example_en: We use an electric fan in the living room when summer is hot.
gept.example_zh: 夏天炎熱時我們會在客廳使用電風扇。

gept.example_en: Grandma uses a feather duster to clean the photo frames.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶用雞毛撢子清潔相框。

gept.example_en: I clean the pan with a small scouring pad after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後我用一塊小菜瓜布清洗鍋子。

gept.example_en: We use a little dish soap to wash the plates after every meal.
gept.example_zh: 每餐後我們都用一些洗碗精洗盤子。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 洗衣皂；洗衣精
gept.example_en: Mom adds laundry soap to the washing machine each Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個星期六都會在洗衣機裡加洗衣精。

gept.example_en: We keep a fresh bar of soap by the sink in the bathroom.
gept.example_zh: 我們在浴室洗手台旁放著一塊新鮮的肥皂。

gept.example_en: Mom uses hand cream every night before she goes to bed.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每晚睡前都會擦護手霜。

gept.example_en: I use body wash with a sweet smell when I take a shower.
gept.example_zh: 我洗澡時用一種有香甜味道的沐浴乳。

gept.example_en: My morning routine chart is taped on my bedroom wall.
gept.example_zh: 我的晨間例行表貼在我臥室的牆上。

gept.example_en: Every school morning at our home starts with hot oatmeal.
gept.example_zh: 在我們家每個上學的早晨都從熱燕麥粥開始。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 上學日的晚上
gept.example_en: On a school night I usually go to bed before nine o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 在上學日的晚上，我通常九點前就睡覺。

gept.example_en: My grandfather is an early bird and wakes up before sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 我爺爺是個早起的人，太陽出來前就起床了。

gept.example_en: My older sister is a night owl and reads books late at night.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊是個夜貓子，喜歡半夜看書。

gept.example_en: Mom says rise and shine to wake me up every weekday morning.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每個工作日早上都會說「起床囉」叫我起床。

gept.example_en: I will hit the hay early tonight because I feel very tired.
gept.example_zh: 我今晚會早點睡，因為我覺得很累。

gept.example_en: Grandma and I have morning tea on the porch every Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶和我每個星期天都在門廊喝早茶。

gept.example_en: We share afternoon tea with cake at three on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 我們週末三點會一起享用下午茶和蛋糕。

gept.example_en: Grandpa watches the evening news on TV after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺晚餐後會看電視上的晚間新聞。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 星期六的家事
gept.example_en: My Saturday chore is to mop the living-room floor.
gept.example_zh: 我星期六的家事是拖客廳的地板。

gept.example_en: Our family does spring cleaning together every March.
gept.example_zh: 我們家每年三月都會一起做大掃除。

gept.example_en: Tidying up my room takes me about half an hour each Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 我每個星期六整理房間大約要花半小時。

gept.example_en: Mom hands me a soft duster to clean the bookshelf.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽遞給我一塊軟撢子去擦書架。

gept.example_en: I fill the mop bucket with warm water and a little soap.
gept.example_zh: 我在拖地水桶裡裝了溫水和一點肥皂。

gept.example_en: We eat the leftovers from yesterday for our lunch today.
gept.example_zh: 我們今天午餐吃的是昨天的剩飯剩菜。

gept.example_en: Mom keeps all her cookware in the cupboard near the stove.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把所有廚具放在爐子旁的櫥櫃裡。

gept.example_en: Our family tableware is on a tall shelf in the dining room.
gept.example_zh: 我們家的餐具放在飯廳的高架上。

gept.example_en: I help Mom wash the silverware after every big family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 每次大型家庭晚餐後我都會幫媽媽洗刀叉湯匙。

gept.example_en: I dry the cups with a clean tea towel after I wash them.
gept.example_zh: 我洗完杯子後用一塊乾淨的擦碗布把它們擦乾。

gept.example_en: Mom puts the hot pan on a pot holder on the kitchen table.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把熱鍋放在廚房桌上的鍋墊上。

gept.example_en: I keep my drawing under a small fridge magnet on the door.
gept.example_zh: 我用一個小冰箱磁鐵把我的畫貼在冰箱門上。

gept.example_en: Mom sets the kitchen timer for ten minutes when she boils eggs.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽煮蛋時把廚房計時器設定為十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Dad keeps salt, sugar, and pepper on the small spice rack.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸把鹽、糖和胡椒放在小香料架上。

gept.example_en: There is a fruit basket with apples and oranges on our dining table.
gept.example_zh: 我們的餐桌上有一個裝著蘋果和橘子的水果籃。

gept.example_en: I eat my cereal bowl with cold milk every weekday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每個工作日早上都用麥片碗加冷牛奶。

gept.example_en: Mom puts a clean dinner plate in front of each family member.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽在每位家人面前放一個乾淨的餐盤。

gept.example_en: I eat hot soup with a big silver soup spoon at dinner.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐時我用一支大銀色湯匙喝熱湯。

gept.example_en: Please pass me a clean drinking glass for some cold water.
gept.example_zh: 請遞給我一個乾淨的玻璃杯，我要喝一些冷水。

gept.example_en: I take a water bottle to school every day in my schoolbag.
gept.example_zh: 我每天都會在書包裡帶一個水瓶去學校。

gept.example_en: I wash my face in the wash basin before bed every night.
gept.example_zh: 我每晚睡前都會在洗手台洗臉。

gept.example_en: I drink a glass of hot water before breakfast every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上吃早餐前都會喝一杯熱水。

gept.example_en: I splash cold water on my face to wake up in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我早上會用冷水潑臉讓自己清醒。

gept.example_en: Bath time for my little brother is at seven every evening.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟的洗澡時間是每天晚上七點。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 睡前例行公事
gept.example_en: My bedtime routine is bath, story, and lights off at nine.
gept.example_zh: 我的睡前例行公事是洗澡、聽故事，然後九點關燈。

gept.example_en: My sister has a long pink nightgown for cool summer nights.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊有一件粉紅色長睡袍，適合涼爽的夏夜。

gept.example_en: We put our slippers on the slipper rack by the front door.
gept.example_zh: 我們把拖鞋放在前門旁的拖鞋架上。

gept.example_en: I keep my doorkey inside my schoolbag at all times.
gept.example_zh: 我把門鑰匙隨時放在書包裡。

gept.example_en: Mom hides a spare key under a flowerpot near the front door.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把一把備用鑰匙藏在前門旁的花盆下。

gept.example_en: One house rule is that everyone helps with the dishes.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家規之一是大家都要幫忙洗碗。

gept.example_en: Our family rule is no phones at the dinner table.
gept.example_zh: 我們的家庭規定是吃飯時不能用手機。

gept.example_en: We have a chore chart on the fridge so everyone knows their jobs.
gept.example_zh: 我們冰箱上有一張家事分配表，讓大家都知道自己的工作。

gept.example_en: We have a short family meeting every Sunday after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個星期天晚餐後都會有一個短暫的家庭會議。

gept.example_en: I always wear my house key on a string around my neck.
gept.example_zh: 我總是把家裡的鑰匙用一條繩子掛在脖子上。

gept.example_en: Moving day for our family is on a sunny Saturday in May.
gept.example_zh: 我們家的搬家日是五月一個晴朗的星期六。

gept.example_en: My morning hug from my mom is the best part of every day.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽早上給我的擁抱是我每天最棒的部分。

gept.example_en: We say good morning at the breakfast table every weekday.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個工作日都會在早餐桌上互道早安。

gept.example_en: I say see you later to my mom when I leave for school.
gept.example_zh: 我上學出門時會跟媽媽說「待會見」。

gept.example_en: Mom says have a nice day when I get on the school bus.
gept.example_zh: 我上校車時媽媽會對我說「祝你今天愉快」。

gept.example_en: Our dog says welcome home with a happy bark every afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們的狗每天下午都會用開心的吠叫聲說「歡迎回家」。

gept.example_en: I say see you tomorrow to my dad before I go to sleep.
gept.example_zh: 我睡覺前會跟爸爸說「明天見」。

gept.meaning_zh: (慣用語) 好好睡覺；睡個好覺
gept.example_en: Mom says sleep tight to me every night before she turns off the light.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每晚關燈前都會跟我說「好好睡覺」。

gept.example_en: Please put your dirty clothes into the wash basket in the corner.
gept.example_zh: 請把你的髒衣服放進角落的洗衣籃裡。

gept.example_en: My brother and I build a blanket fort in the living room.
gept.example_zh: 我和弟弟在客廳裡用毯子搭城堡。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞片語) 茶歇；喝茶休息
gept.example_en: We take a short tea break with Grandma every weekend afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個週末下午都會和奶奶一起短暫地喝茶休息。

gept.example_en: Dad and I take an after-dinner walk around our quiet street.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸和我在我們安靜的街道上散步飯後。

gept.example_en: I love the food at this small restaurant near my house.
gept.example_zh: 我很喜歡我家附近這間小餐廳的食物。

gept.example_en: We eat breakfast together every morning at seven.
gept.example_zh: 我們每天早上七點一起吃早餐。

gept.example_en: Please drink more water when the weather is hot.
gept.example_zh: 天氣熱的時候請多喝水。

gept.example_en: My dad will cook a big dinner for us tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我爸今晚會為我們煮一頓豐盛的晚餐。

gept.example_en: We had a nice meal at a small place by the lake.
gept.example_zh: 我們在湖邊的小店享用了美好的一餐。

gept.example_en: I usually eat eggs and toast for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 我早餐通常吃蛋和吐司。

gept.example_en: What did you have for lunch at school today?
gept.example_zh: 你今天在學校午餐吃了什麼？

gept.example_en: Mom made fish and rice for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽做了魚和飯當晚餐。

gept.example_en: Mom is making cake in the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽正在廚房裡做蛋糕。

gept.example_en: There is a new restaurant in our neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 我們社區開了一間新餐廳。

gept.example_en: I eat one apple every day after school.
gept.example_zh: 我每天放學後吃一顆蘋果。

gept.example_en: Monkeys at the zoo love to eat bananas.
gept.example_zh: 動物園的猴子很愛吃香蕉。

gept.example_en: An orange is sweet and full of juice.
gept.example_zh: 柳橙又甜又多汁。

gept.example_en: She washed the grapes before putting them on the table.
gept.example_zh: 她把葡萄洗好才放到桌上。

gept.example_en: I like to add lemon to my hot tea.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在熱茶裡加檸檬。

gept.example_en: The peach felt soft and smelled very sweet.
gept.example_zh: 這顆桃子摸起來軟軟的，聞起來很香甜。

gept.example_en: She gave me a green pear from the garden.
gept.example_zh: 她從花園裡拿了一顆青梨給我。

gept.example_en: The cake has a small red cherry on top.
gept.example_zh: 蛋糕上面有一顆小小的紅櫻桃。

gept.example_en: We bought a big melon at the market today.
gept.example_zh: 我們今天在市場買了一顆大瓜。

gept.example_en: We should eat more fruit and less candy.
gept.example_zh: 我們應該多吃水果，少吃糖果。

gept.example_en: Green vegetables are good for your body.
gept.example_zh: 綠色蔬菜對身體很好。

gept.example_en: Mom puts tomato in our salad every night.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每晚都會在我們的沙拉裡放番茄。

gept.example_en: I want potato soup for dinner tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我今晚晚餐想喝馬鈴薯湯。

gept.example_en: Rabbits love to eat fresh orange carrots.
gept.example_zh: 兔子愛吃新鮮的橘色紅蘿蔔。

gept.example_en: We use cabbage to make a simple stir-fry.
gept.example_zh: 我們用高麗菜做簡單的炒菜。

gept.example_en: Please wash the lettuce before making the salad.
gept.example_zh: 做沙拉之前請先洗萵苣。

gept.example_en: I add mushroom to my noodles for more taste.
gept.example_zh: 我會在麵裡加蘑菇，讓味道更好。

gept.example_en: The little boy hid the peas under his rice.
gept.example_zh: 小男孩把豌豆藏在飯下面。

gept.example_en: We had rice and beans for lunch yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 我們昨天午餐吃了飯和豆子。

gept.example_en: You should drink eight cups of water a day.
gept.example_zh: 你一天應該喝八杯水。

gept.example_en: Many kids like to drink warm milk before bed.
gept.example_zh: 很多小孩睡前喜歡喝溫牛奶。

gept.example_en: Grandma drinks green tea every afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶每天下午都喝綠茶。

gept.example_en: My dad cannot start his day without coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我爸沒有咖啡就沒辦法開始一天。

gept.example_en: I would like a glass of cold apple juice, please.
gept.example_zh: 請給我一杯冰蘋果汁。

gept.example_en: Try not to drink too much soda every day.
gept.example_zh: 盡量不要每天喝太多汽水。

gept.example_en: He ordered a small cola with his burger.
gept.example_zh: 他點了一小杯可樂配漢堡。

gept.example_en: My parents drink red wine on special nights.
gept.example_zh: 我父母在特別的夜晚會喝紅酒。

gept.example_en: Uncle Wang drank a glass of cold beer.
gept.example_zh: 王叔叔喝了一杯冰啤酒。

gept.example_en: I want two fried eggs for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 我早餐想要兩顆煎蛋。

gept.example_en: Some people do not eat meat at all.
gept.example_zh: 有些人完全不吃肉。

gept.example_en: Fried chicken is my little brother's favorite food.
gept.example_zh: 炸雞是我弟弟最愛的食物。

gept.example_en: We had grilled fish and rice for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們晚餐吃了烤魚和飯。

gept.example_en: Roast duck is a famous dish in Beijing.
gept.example_zh: 烤鴨是北京有名的菜。

gept.example_en: Americans eat turkey on Thanksgiving Day.
gept.example_zh: 美國人在感恩節吃火雞。

gept.example_en: He fried two strips of bacon for me.
gept.example_zh: 他煎了兩條培根給我。

gept.example_en: She put ham and cheese into her sandwich.
gept.example_zh: 她把火腿和起司放進三明治。

gept.example_en: I want a hot dog with two sausages.
gept.example_zh: 我要一個有兩條香腸的熱狗。

gept.example_en: Dad ordered a juicy steak for his birthday dinner.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸生日晚餐點了一份多汁的牛排。

gept.example_en: Hot beef noodles taste great on cold days.
gept.example_zh: 冷天吃熱熱的牛肉麵真好。

gept.example_en: Let us order a big cheese pizza for the party.
gept.example_zh: 我們派對叫一個大的起司披薩吧。

gept.example_en: I had a hamburger and fries for lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我午餐吃了漢堡和薯條。

gept.example_en: This shop sells the best burger in town.
gept.example_zh: 這家店賣的漢堡是鎮上最好吃的。

gept.example_en: I made a tuna sandwich for my school lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我做了一個鮪魚三明治當學校午餐。

gept.example_en: Kids love to eat hotdogs at the baseball game.
gept.example_zh: 小孩很喜歡在棒球賽上吃熱狗。

gept.example_en: The fries are hot and very crispy.
gept.example_zh: 薯條又熱又脆。

gept.example_en: We finished a whole bag of chips watching movies.
gept.example_zh: 我們看電影時把一整包洋芋片吃光了。

gept.example_en: She bought a big bucket of popcorn at the cinema.
gept.example_zh: 她在電影院買了一大桶爆米花。

gept.example_en: He picked a chocolate donut from the box.
gept.example_zh: 他從盒子裡挑了一個巧克力甜甜圈。

gept.example_en: Grandma baked an apple pie for the holiday.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶為了節日烤了一個蘋果派。

gept.example_en: The children shared a small egg pudding.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們分享了一個小小的雞蛋布丁。

gept.example_en: We had cake and ice cream at her party.
gept.example_zh: 我們在她的派對上吃了蛋糕和冰淇淋。

gept.example_en: Do not eat too much candy before dinner.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐前不要吃太多糖果。

gept.example_en: He gave her a small box of chocolates.
gept.example_zh: 他送她一小盒巧克力。

gept.example_en: I add honey to my tea every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上會在茶裡加蜂蜜。

gept.example_en: We had fruit salad before the main dish.
gept.example_zh: 我們在主菜前吃了水果沙拉。

gept.example_en: Indian curry can be very spicy and rich.
gept.example_zh: 印度咖哩可能會很辣又很濃。

gept.example_en: We ate sushi at the small Japanese place.
gept.example_zh: 我們在那間小日式料理店吃壽司。

gept.example_en: She drank a cup of warm milk before bed.
gept.example_zh: 她睡前喝了一杯溫牛奶。

gept.example_en: Please bring a bottle of water on the trip.
gept.example_zh: 請帶一瓶水去旅行。

gept.example_en: He opened a can of soda and drank it fast.
gept.example_zh: 他打開一罐汽水，很快就喝完。

gept.example_en: I bought a box of chocolate for my mom.
gept.example_zh: 我買了一盒巧克力給媽媽。

gept.example_en: She came home with two bags of fruit.
gept.example_zh: 她拿著兩袋水果回家。

gept.example_en: The cake my aunt made was very tasty.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨做的蛋糕非常美味。

gept.example_en: Everything on the table looks delicious.
gept.example_zh: 桌上每道菜看起來都很好吃。

gept.example_en: The kids said the cookies were yummy.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們說餅乾很好吃。

gept.example_en: She thinks raw onion tastes yucky.
gept.example_zh: 她覺得生洋蔥很難吃。

gept.example_en: Do not eat raw chicken; it is not safe.
gept.example_zh: 不要吃生雞肉，那不安全。

gept.example_en: These bananas are not ripe yet.
gept.example_zh: 這些香蕉還沒熟。

gept.example_en: I threw the rotten apple into the trash.
gept.example_zh: 我把爛掉的蘋果丟到垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: I love thick chocolate milkshakes in summer.
gept.example_zh: 我夏天喜歡濃濃的巧克力奶昔。

gept.example_en: She cut the bread into very thin slices.
gept.example_zh: 她把麵包切成很薄的片。

gept.example_en: Be careful, the soup is very hot.
gept.example_zh: 小心，這湯很燙。

gept.example_en: Can I have a cold drink, please?
gept.example_zh: 可以給我一杯冷飲嗎？

gept.example_en: She made me a cup of warm milk.
gept.example_zh: 她給我泡了一杯溫牛奶。

gept.example_en: The bread smells wonderful from the oven.
gept.example_zh: 麵包從烤箱裡飄出香氣。

gept.example_en: Chew your food slowly before you swallow.
gept.example_zh: 吞下去之前先把食物慢慢咀嚼。

gept.example_en: Can I have a bite of your sandwich?
gept.example_zh: 我可以咬一口你的三明治嗎？

gept.example_en: Always wash your hands before you eat.
gept.example_zh: 吃飯前一定要洗手。

gept.example_en: Mix the eggs and milk in a big bowl.
gept.example_zh: 把蛋和牛奶放進大碗裡攪拌。

gept.example_en: Heat the milk on the stove for two minutes.
gept.example_zh: 把牛奶在爐子上加熱兩分鐘。

gept.example_en: We freeze the meat to keep it fresh.
gept.example_zh: 我們把肉冷凍起來，讓它保持新鮮。

gept.example_en: The ice cream will melt in the sun.
gept.example_zh: 冰淇淋在太陽下會融化。

gept.example_en: Cut the cake into eight equal pieces.
gept.example_zh: 把蛋糕切成八等份。

gept.example_en: She wrapped the sandwich in some paper.
gept.example_zh: 她用紙把三明治包起來。

gept.example_en: Fill the cup with hot tea, please.
gept.example_zh: 請把杯子裝滿熱茶。

gept.example_en: Please open the bottle of milk for me.
gept.example_zh: 請幫我打開那瓶牛奶。

gept.example_en: Shake the bottle of juice before opening.
gept.example_zh: 打開果汁瓶之前先搖一搖。

gept.example_en: Dip the fries in ketchup before you eat.
gept.example_zh: 吃之前把薯條沾番茄醬。

gept.example_en: We bought snacks for the long car trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們為長途車程買了零食。

gept.example_en: Ice cream is a nice summer treat.
gept.example_zh: 冰淇淋是夏天美好的點心。

gept.example_en: Try to drink less sugary water at school.
gept.example_zh: 在學校盡量少喝含糖飲料。

gept.example_en: Yum, this chocolate cake is amazing.
gept.example_zh: 好吃，這巧克力蛋糕太棒了。

gept.example_en: Too much snacking will spoil your dinner.
gept.example_zh: 吃太多零食會吃不下晚餐。

gept.example_en: Add one tablespoon of oil to the pan.
gept.example_zh: 在鍋裡加一大匙油。

gept.example_en: Use a teaspoon to add sugar to the tea.
gept.example_zh: 用一支茶匙把糖加進茶裡。

gept.example_en: The water is at a rolling boil now.
gept.example_zh: 水現在已經滾開了。

gept.example_en: Mom uses a hand mixer to make cookies.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽用手持攪拌器做餅乾。

gept.example_en: We had pancakes at a diner near the highway.
gept.example_zh: 我們在公路旁的小餐館吃鬆餅。

gept.example_en: There is a cute cafe near my school.
gept.example_zh: 我學校附近有一間可愛的咖啡館。

gept.example_en: The bakery on Main Street smells wonderful.
gept.example_zh: 主街上的麵包店聞起來很香。

gept.example_en: Please add some ice to my drink.
gept.example_zh: 請在我的飲料裡加一些冰塊。

gept.example_en: I love an icy drink on a hot day.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在熱天喝冰冰涼涼的飲料。

gept.example_en: I enjoy the warmth of fresh bread.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡剛出爐麵包的溫暖。

gept.example_en: Some kids will not eat smelly tofu.
gept.example_zh: 有些小孩不敢吃臭豆腐。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 高雅的；有品味的
gept.example_en: The cafe had a tasteful country look.
gept.example_zh: 那間咖啡館有著高雅的鄉村風格。

gept.example_en: I love the sweetness of fresh peaches.
gept.example_zh: 我愛新鮮桃子的甜味。

gept.example_en: The sourness of lemon wakes me up.
gept.example_zh: 檸檬的酸味讓我清醒。

gept.example_en: This soup is spicier than yesterday's.
gept.example_zh: 這湯比昨天的還要辣。

gept.example_en: I like milky tea with a little sugar.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡加一點糖的奶茶。

gept.example_en: This juice has a strong fruity taste.
gept.example_zh: 這果汁有很濃的水果味。

gept.example_en: Keep stirring the sauce until it is smooth.
gept.example_zh: 持續攪拌醬汁直到變得滑順。

gept.example_en: Frying chicken takes about ten minutes.
gept.example_zh: 炸雞大約要花十分鐘。

gept.example_en: Dad is roasting a chicken in the oven.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸正在烤箱裡烤一隻雞。

gept.example_en: I had a grilled cheese sandwich for lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我中午吃了一份烤起司三明治。

gept.example_en: Fried rice is one of my favorite dishes.
gept.example_zh: 炒飯是我最愛的菜之一。

gept.example_en: I love freshly baked bread in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡早上現烤的麵包。

gept.example_en: She had a boiled egg with her toast.
gept.example_zh: 她吃了一顆水煮蛋配吐司。

gept.example_en: Steamed vegetables are healthier than fried ones.
gept.example_zh: 蒸過的蔬菜比炸過的健康。

gept.example_en: We had a light supper with soup and bread.
gept.example_zh: 我們吃了清淡的晚餐，有湯和麵包。

gept.example_en: The chef invited us to a wine tasting.
gept.example_zh: 主廚邀請我們去品酒會。

gept.example_en: He had to spit out the burning chili.
gept.example_zh: 他不得不把辣到不行的辣椒吐出來。

gept.example_en: The little boy licked his ice cream cone.
gept.example_zh: 小男孩舔著他的甜筒。

gept.example_en: He smeared jam all over his bread.
gept.example_zh: 他在麵包上塗滿了果醬。

gept.example_en: Add a pinch of salt to the eggs.
gept.example_zh: 加一小撮鹽到蛋裡。

gept.example_en: He spread butter on his warm dinner roll.
gept.example_zh: 他在熱熱的餐包上塗了奶油。

gept.example_en: My brother eats cereal with milk every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我哥每天早上都吃麥片配牛奶。

gept.example_en: Please pass me the soy sauce.
gept.example_zh: 請把醬油遞給我。

gept.example_en: Baked yam is sweet and very tasty.
gept.example_zh: 烤地瓜又甜又好吃。

gept.example_en: I added chives to my fried rice.
gept.example_zh: 我在炒飯裡加了韭菜。

gept.example_en: Throw the candy wrapper into the bin.
gept.example_zh: 把糖果紙丟進垃圾桶。

gept.example_en: These cookies are soft and warm.
gept.example_zh: 這些餅乾又軟又溫熱。

gept.example_en: The candy is hard, so be careful with your teeth.
gept.example_zh: 這糖果很硬，吃的時候小心牙齒。

gept.example_en: The bread became dry after one day.
gept.example_zh: 麵包放了一天就變乾了。

gept.example_en: The toast is a little burnt on the side.
gept.example_zh: 吐司的邊邊有點烤焦了。

gept.example_en: Mom likes the kitchen to look spotless.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽喜歡廚房看起來一塵不染。

gept.example_en: Cleanup after dinner is my job.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後的清理是我的工作。

gept.example_en: Turn off the burner when the rice is done.
gept.example_zh: 飯煮好後請把爐火關掉。

gept.example_en: Keep burnable paper away from the stove.
gept.example_zh: 把易燃的紙張遠離爐子。

gept.example_en: Plain water is tasteless but very healthy.
gept.example_zh: 白開水沒味道，但是非常健康。

gept.example_en: Let us sit at the corner booth.
gept.example_zh: 我們坐在角落的卡座吧。

gept.example_en: I dropped some coins in the tip-jar.
gept.example_zh: 我把一些零錢投進小費罐裡。

gept.example_en: The menu-board is high on the wall.
gept.example_zh: 菜單看板掛在牆上高處。

gept.example_en: I ordered the chicken combo with fries.
gept.example_zh: 我點了雞肉套餐配薯條。

gept.example_en: The breakfast set includes coffee and toast.
gept.example_zh: 早餐套餐包含咖啡和吐司。

gept.example_en: Cheese is my favorite pizza topping.
gept.example_zh: 起司是我最愛的披薩配料。

gept.example_en: I want extra cheese on my pizza.
gept.example_zh: 我披薩要多加起司。

gept.example_en: The side of fries comes with the burger.
gept.example_zh: 薯條是漢堡附的配菜。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 主餐；主要的
gept.example_en: The main is grilled chicken with rice.
gept.example_zh: 主餐是烤雞配飯。

gept.example_en: We had soup as our starter.
gept.example_zh: 我們的前菜是湯。

gept.example_en: Each menu-item has a small picture.
gept.example_zh: 每個菜單品項都有一張小圖片。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 特餐；特別的
gept.example_en: Today's special is grilled fish.
gept.example_zh: 今天的特餐是烤魚。

gept.example_en: Is the water from this tap drinkable?
gept.example_zh: 這個水龍頭的水可以喝嗎？

gept.example_en: These flowers are edible and very pretty.
gept.example_zh: 這些花可以吃，而且非常漂亮。

gept.example_en: We make stuffing with bread and onions.
gept.example_zh: 我們用麵包和洋蔥做填料。

gept.example_en: I love crackers with cheese.
gept.example_zh: 我愛蘇打餅配起司。

gept.example_en: I dip biscotti into my coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我會把義式脆餅沾進咖啡裡。

gept.example_en: Egg tarts are a popular Hong Kong treat.
gept.example_zh: 蛋塔是香港很受歡迎的點心。

gept.example_en: She got a colorful box of macarons.
gept.example_zh: 她拿到了一盒色彩繽紛的馬卡龍。

gept.example_en: The doctor gave my brother a lollipop.
gept.example_zh: 醫生給了我弟弟一支棒棒糖。

gept.example_en: The icing on this cake is too sweet.
gept.example_zh: 這蛋糕上的糖霜太甜了。

gept.example_en: She put pink frosting on the cupcakes.
gept.example_zh: 她在杯子蛋糕上抹了粉紅色糖霜。

gept.example_en: We shared a chocolate sundae after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 晚餐後我們一起吃了一個巧克力聖代。

gept.example_en: Can I have my ice cream in a cone?
gept.example_zh: 可以幫我把冰淇淋裝在甜筒裡嗎？

gept.example_en: She gave me a big scoopful of rice.
gept.example_zh: 她給了我一大勺飯。

gept.example_en: Add a spoonful of honey to your tea.
gept.example_zh: 在茶裡加一湯匙蜂蜜。

gept.example_en: He grabbed a handful of nuts.
gept.example_zh: 他抓了一把堅果。

gept.example_en: She took a mouthful of cold juice.
gept.example_zh: 她喝了一口冰果汁。

gept.example_en: We cook special food on every feast-day.
gept.example_zh: 我們在每個節日都會煮特別的食物。

gept.example_en: Our family eats hotpot on cold winter nights.
gept.example_zh: 我們家在冬天的冷夜裡吃火鍋。

gept.example_en: Please show me your menu-card.
gept.example_zh: 請給我看你們的菜單。

gept.example_en: I ordered a to-go bag of food.
gept.example_zh: 我點了一份外帶的食物。

gept.example_en: We dine with grandma every Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週日和奶奶一起吃飯。

gept.example_en: A nut is small but full of energy.
gept.example_zh: 堅果雖小，但充滿能量。

gept.example_en: I eat peanuts when I watch movies.
gept.example_zh: 我看電影時喜歡吃花生。

gept.example_en: She holds a small teacup with both hands.
gept.example_zh: 她用雙手捧著一個小茶杯。

gept.example_en: The grocer keeps his fruit fresh every day.
gept.example_zh: 雜貨商每天讓水果保持新鮮。

gept.example_en: Please grate some cheese on the pasta.
gept.example_zh: 請在義大利麵上刨一些起司。

gept.example_en: Sift the flour before adding the eggs.
gept.example_zh: 加蛋之前先把麵粉過篩。

gept.example_en: Drain the noodles before adding the sauce.
gept.example_zh: 加醬料前先把麵條瀝乾。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 多肉的；有肉味的
gept.example_en: This soup has a strong, meaty taste.
gept.example_zh: 這湯有著濃厚的肉味。

gept.example_en: Add ginger to remove the fishy smell.
gept.example_zh: 加薑可以去掉魚腥味。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 結霜的；上糖霜的
gept.example_en: I love the frosted cookies at Christmas.
gept.example_zh: 我愛聖誕節的糖霜餅乾。

gept.example_en: I will have iced coffee, please.
gept.example_zh: 我要一杯冰咖啡，謝謝。

gept.example_en: I had poached eggs on toast for breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 我早餐吃了水波蛋配吐司。

gept.example_en: Mom made scrambled eggs for the kids.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽做了炒蛋給孩子們吃。

gept.example_en: He made a cheese omelet for lunch.
gept.example_zh: 他做了起司歐姆蛋當午餐。

gept.example_en: Beef jerky is a salty, chewy snack.
gept.example_zh: 牛肉乾是又鹹又有嚼勁的零食。

gept.example_en: I ate sliced apple with honey.
gept.example_zh: 我吃了切片蘋果配蜂蜜。

gept.example_en: Add chopped onion to the soup.
gept.example_zh: 在湯裡加切碎的洋蔥。

gept.example_en: She gave me a peeled orange.
gept.example_zh: 她給了我一顆剝好皮的柳橙。

gept.example_en: Set the timer for ten minutes.
gept.example_zh: 把計時器設成十分鐘。

gept.example_en: I added sweetcorn to my salad.
gept.example_zh: 我在沙拉裡加了甜玉米。

gept.example_en: The kids set up a lemonade-stand.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們開了一個檸檬水攤。

gept.example_en: I love a cup of warm milky-tea.
gept.example_zh: 我愛喝一杯溫熱的奶茶。

gept.example_en: Iced-tea is great on hot days.
gept.example_zh: 冰紅茶在熱天很棒。

gept.example_en: Drop one tea-bag into the hot water.
gept.example_zh: 把一個茶包丟進熱水裡。

gept.example_en: Mom has many books on her cookbook-shelf.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽的食譜書架上有很多書。

gept.example_en: We had lunch at the mall food-court.
gept.example_zh: 我們在商場的美食街吃午餐。

gept.example_en: Taiwan is famous for its street-food.
gept.example_zh: 台灣以街頭小吃聞名。

gept.example_en: I miss home-cooked meals at college.
gept.example_zh: 我在大學很想念家裡煮的飯。

gept.example_en: The bell rings at lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 午餐時間鐘聲會響起。

gept.example_en: Snacktime is at three in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 點心時間是下午三點。

gept.example_en: In England, teatime is around four.
gept.example_zh: 在英國，茶點時間大約是四點。

gept.example_en: Let us take a short coffee-break.
gept.example_zh: 我們來短暫的咖啡休息一下吧。

gept.example_en: I made a meal-plan for next week.
gept.example_zh: 我為下週做了飲食計畫。

gept.example_en: The foodtruck sells warm tacos.
gept.example_zh: 這台餐車賣熱熱的塔可餅。

gept.example_en: She likes a milky-coffee in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 她早上喜歡喝牛奶咖啡。

gept.example_en: Mom uses the rice-cooker every day.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每天都用電鍋。

gept.example_en: We had ramen at a small noodle-bar.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一家小麵店吃了拉麵。

gept.example_en: The snack-bar sells hot dogs and drinks.
gept.example_zh: 小吃店賣熱狗和飲料。

gept.example_en: She filled the frosting-bag with pink cream.
gept.example_zh: 她把粉紅色奶油裝進擠花袋裡。

gept.example_en: Every new student wears a name tag during the first week of school.
gept.example_zh: 每位新生在開學第一週都會戴名牌。

gept.example_en: My mom waits for me at the school gate every day at four.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽每天四點都在校門口等我。

gept.example_en: The kids run and play games in the school yard during recess.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在下課時間在校園裡跑跳玩遊戲。

gept.example_en: My math teacher draws funny pictures on the board to help us remember.
gept.example_zh: 我的數學老師在黑板上畫有趣的圖幫助我們記憶。

gept.example_en: Every student must finish the homework before class on Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 每位學生必須在週一早上上課前完成作業。

gept.example_en: Our English class has twenty kids and one very kind teacher.
gept.example_zh: 我們英文班有二十個孩子和一位非常和善的老師。

gept.example_en: I go to school five days a week and rest on the weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我每週上學五天，週末休息。

gept.example_en: Our first lesson today is about animals in the jungle and the sea.
gept.example_zh: 我們今天的第一堂課是關於叢林和海洋裡的動物。

gept.example_en: I like math because numbers are fun and games for my brain.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡數學，因為數字對我的大腦來說是好玩的遊戲。

gept.example_en: In science class we learn about plants, animals, and the weather.
gept.example_zh: 在科學課上我們學習植物、動物和天氣。

gept.example_en: I love art class because I can paint and draw with my friends.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡美術課，因為我可以和朋友一起畫畫。

gept.example_en: Our music teacher plays the piano and we sing songs together.
gept.example_zh: 我們的音樂老師彈鋼琴，我們一起唱歌。

gept.example_en: I eat with my best friend during lunch break in the school hall.
gept.example_zh: 午休時間我和最好的朋友在學校大廳一起吃飯。

gept.example_en: We must be in our seats before the morning bell at eight o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 我們必須在八點早晨上課鈴前坐在座位上。

gept.example_en: When the school bell rings, all the kids run out to play.
gept.example_zh: 當上下課鈴響起時，所有孩子都跑出去玩。

gept.example_en: Our class will go on a field trip to the zoo next Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我們班下週五要去動物園校外教學。

gept.example_en: Please sit down quietly and open your math book to page ten.
gept.example_zh: 請安靜坐下，並把數學課本翻到第十頁。

gept.example_en: Stand up and tell the class your name and your favorite color.
gept.example_zh: 站起來告訴全班你的名字和最喜歡的顏色。

gept.example_en: Please raise your hand if you know the answer to this question.
gept.example_zh: 如果你知道這題答案，請舉手。

gept.example_en: Listen carefully because the teacher will say each new word only once.
gept.example_zh: 請仔細聽，因為老師每個新單字只會說一次。

gept.example_en: Please speak loudly so all the kids in the back can hear.
gept.example_zh: 請大聲說，這樣後面的孩子才能聽到。

gept.example_en: Now read aloud the first sentence on page five with me.
gept.example_zh: 現在和我一起大聲朗讀第五頁的第一句。

gept.example_en: Write down the new word in your notebook three times to remember it.
gept.example_zh: 把新單字在筆記本上寫三次來記住它。

gept.example_en: Circle the correct answer in your workbook with a red pen.
gept.example_zh: 用紅筆在練習本上圈出正確答案。

gept.example_en: Please fill in your name and class number on the top of the test.
gept.example_zh: 請在考卷上方填入你的姓名和班級號碼。

gept.example_en: Match each picture with the right word on the next page.
gept.example_zh: 把每張圖片和下一頁正確的單字配對。

gept.example_en: Let's count from one to twenty together in English class today.
gept.example_zh: 今天英文課讓我們一起從一數到二十。

gept.example_en: Color the sun yellow and the leaves green on this picture.
gept.example_zh: 把這張圖上的太陽塗黃色，葉子塗綠色。

gept.example_en: Draw a picture of your family on this big white paper.
gept.example_zh: 在這張大白紙上畫一張你家人的畫。

gept.example_en: Can you spell your last name slowly for the new teacher?
gept.example_zh: 你能慢慢拼出你的姓給新老師聽嗎？

gept.example_en: We have a spelling test every Friday morning in English class.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週五早上英文課都有拼字測驗。

gept.example_en: The English alphabet has twenty-six letters from A to Z.
gept.example_zh: 英文字母從A到Z總共有二十六個字母。

gept.example_en: I write each new word ten times to help me remember it.
gept.example_zh: 我把每個新單字寫十次來幫助記憶。

gept.example_en: Write your phone number on this paper so I can call you.
gept.example_zh: 把你的電話號碼寫在這張紙上，我才能打給你。

gept.example_en: Open your book to page twenty and look at the picture.
gept.example_zh: 把書翻到第二十頁，看看圖片。

gept.example_en: Please write your answer on the first line of this page.
gept.example_zh: 請把答案寫在這一頁的第一行上。

gept.example_en: Cross out the wrong word and write the right one above it.
gept.example_zh: 把錯的字劃掉，在上面寫上正確的字。

gept.example_en: Tell me the main idea of the short story in one sentence.
gept.example_zh: 用一句話告訴我這個短篇故事的大意。

gept.example_en: Let's sing the days of the week song together one more time.
gept.example_zh: 我們再一起唱一次星期的歌。

gept.example_en: We sing a happy good morning song before class every day.
gept.example_zh: 我們每天上課前都唱一首快樂的早安歌。

gept.example_en: The teacher plays a word game with us at the end of class.
gept.example_zh: 老師在下課前和我們玩單字遊戲。

gept.example_en: After lunch the kids play together on the school playground.
gept.example_zh: 午餐後孩子們一起在學校操場上玩。

gept.example_en: I want to win the math game and get a small gold star.
gept.example_zh: 我想贏得數學遊戲並得到一個小金星。

gept.example_en: Our team has five kids and we win the spelling contest today.
gept.example_zh: 我們這隊有五個孩子，我們今天贏了拼字比賽。

gept.example_en: I sit in the front row right next to the teacher's desk.
gept.example_zh: 我坐在最前面一排，就在老師桌子旁邊。

gept.example_en: Please go back to your seat and take out your math book.
gept.example_zh: 請回到你的座位並拿出你的數學課本。

gept.example_en: Keep your desk clean and put your pens in the small drawer.
gept.example_zh: 保持你的書桌乾淨，把筆放在小抽屜裡。

gept.example_en: Push your chair under the desk before you leave the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 離開教室前把椅子推到桌子下面。

gept.example_en: Use the blackboard eraser to clean the board before the next class.
gept.example_zh: 下節課前用黑板擦把黑板擦乾淨。

gept.example_en: Use a pencil so you can erase a wrong word later.
gept.example_zh: 用鉛筆，這樣你之後可以擦掉寫錯的字。

gept.example_en: Please open your book to the first page of chapter three.
gept.example_zh: 請把書翻到第三章的第一頁。

gept.example_en: My new bookbag is blue with big yellow stars on the side.
gept.example_zh: 我的新書包是藍色的，側面有大大的黃星星。

gept.example_en: I forgot my schoolbook at home and had to share with my friend.
gept.example_zh: 我把課本忘在家裡，必須和朋友一起看。

gept.example_en: My mom buys new school supplies every August before school starts.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽每年八月開學前都會買新的文具用品。

gept.example_en: I draw a big red apple with my new crayon in art class.
gept.example_zh: 我在美術課上用新蠟筆畫了一個大紅蘋果。

gept.example_en: She has twelve color pencils in her small white pencil case.
gept.example_zh: 她的小白色鉛筆盒裡有十二支彩色鉛筆。

gept.example_en: Wash your paintbrush in the water after you finish your picture.
gept.example_zh: 畫完圖後把畫筆放在水裡洗乾淨。

gept.example_en: Finish your schoolwork first and then you can play video games.
gept.example_zh: 先完成你的學校功課，然後才可以玩電玩。

gept.example_en: The big study room next to the library has many quiet seats.
gept.example_zh: 圖書館旁邊的大自習室有很多安靜的座位。

gept.example_en: Reading every day helps me learn new words and good ideas.
gept.example_zh: 每天閱讀幫助我學新單字和好想法。

gept.example_en: Writing a short story is hard but very fun for me.
gept.example_zh: 寫一篇短篇故事很難但對我來說很有趣。

gept.example_en: Our English test has reading, writing, listening, and speaking parts.
gept.example_zh: 我們的英文測驗有閱讀、寫作、聽力和口說的部分。

gept.example_en: The listening part of the test has ten short questions.
gept.example_zh: 測驗的聽力部分有十個簡短問題。

gept.example_en: Show me your finished homework before you go out to play.
gept.example_zh: 出去玩之前把完成的作業給我看。

gept.example_en: Tell me a short story about your weekend in three sentences.
gept.example_zh: 用三句話告訴我你週末的小故事。

gept.example_en: Please ask the teacher if you do not understand the question.
gept.example_zh: 如果你不懂這個問題，請問老師。

gept.example_en: Say good morning to your classmates with a big friendly smile.
gept.example_zh: 用大大的友善微笑向同學說早安。

gept.example_en: Repeat after me class: A is for apple and B is for ball.
gept.example_zh: 全班跟我念：A是蘋果，B是球。

gept.example_en: Good job everyone, you all got the right answer on this test.
gept.example_zh: 大家做得好，這次測驗你們都答對了。

gept.example_en: Well done on your perfect score in the math test today.
gept.example_zh: 今天的數學測驗你考滿分，做得好。

gept.example_en: You got the right answer, so you can have a gold star.
gept.example_zh: 你答對了，所以可以得到一個金色貼紙。

gept.example_en: Don't worry if your answer is wrong, just try the next one.
gept.example_zh: 如果答錯不要擔心，試試下一題。

gept.example_en: Try your best in every class and you will get better.
gept.example_zh: 每一堂課都盡力嘗試，你會越來越進步。

gept.example_en: Do your best on the test and don't worry about the score.
gept.example_zh: 考試盡力而為就好，不要擔心分數。

gept.example_en: Quiet please, the test is starting in about one minute.
gept.example_zh: 請安靜，考試大約一分鐘後開始。

gept.example_en: Stand in line at the door before we walk to the library.
gept.example_zh: 去圖書館前先在門邊排隊。

gept.example_en: Line up by the door before the teacher takes us outside.
gept.example_zh: 在老師帶我們出去前在門邊排成一列。

gept.example_en: Please turn in your homework on my desk before you leave.
gept.example_zh: 離開前請把作業交到我的桌上。

gept.example_en: I will hand out the test papers in just a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 我幾分鐘後就會發放考卷。

gept.example_en: Please pass back the papers to the kids behind you.
gept.example_zh: 請把考卷傳回去給你後面的同學。

gept.example_en: I was late for class today because the school bus was slow.
gept.example_zh: 我今天上課遲到，因為校車很慢。

gept.example_en: Try to be on time for class every single day this week.
gept.example_zh: 這週每天都試著準時上課。

gept.example_en: Tom is absent today because he has a small cold at home.
gept.example_zh: 湯姆今天缺席，因為他在家有點小感冒。

gept.example_en: The teacher does roll call every morning right after the bell.
gept.example_zh: 老師每天早上鈴響後馬上點名。

gept.example_en: Write today's date on the top of your homework book.
gept.example_zh: 在作業本上方寫上今天的日期。

gept.example_en: I write a short diary about my school day before bed each night.
gept.example_zh: 我每晚睡前都寫一篇關於上學日的小日記。

gept.example_en: Our class timetable is on the wall next to the door.
gept.example_zh: 我們的班級課表在門旁邊的牆上。

gept.example_en: We have four morning classes and two afternoon classes today.
gept.example_zh: 我們今天有四堂早晨課程和兩堂下午課。

gept.example_en: Our afternoon class is short, only thirty minutes after lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我們的下午課很短，午餐後只有三十分鐘。

gept.example_en: We have a short break time of ten minutes between classes.
gept.example_zh: 我們在課間有十分鐘的短休息時間。

gept.meaning_zh: (片語) 帶東西到學校分享
gept.example_en: On Friday we have show and tell, so bring a favorite toy.
gept.example_zh: 週五我們有「帶東西分享」，所以帶一個喜歡的玩具來。

gept.example_en: The school fair is on Saturday and there will be many games.
gept.example_zh: 校園園遊會在週六，會有很多遊戲。

gept.example_en: On sports day we run races and parents come to watch.
gept.example_zh: 運動會那天我們賽跑，家長們會來觀看。

gept.example_en: Every parent will get a short letter from the teacher today.
gept.example_zh: 今天每位家長都會收到老師的一封短信。

gept.example_en: Go see the school nurse if you do not feel well in class.
gept.example_zh: 如果你上課覺得不舒服，去看學校護士。

gept.example_en: The school doctor visits our school every Wednesday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 校醫每週三下午到我們學校。

gept.example_en: Please give your sick note to the teacher first thing tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天一進教室就把病假單交給老師。

gept.example_en: My dad signed a leave of absence so I can visit grandma.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸簽了請假單，這樣我才能去看奶奶。

gept.example_en: Bring the permission slip back tomorrow so you can join the trip.
gept.example_zh: 明天把同意書帶回來，才能參加校外教學。

gept.example_en: The first school rule is to be kind to your classmates.
gept.example_zh: 第一條校規就是要對同學友善。

gept.example_en: The sign in the hall says no running between the classrooms.
gept.example_zh: 走廊的牌子寫著教室之間禁止奔跑。

gept.example_en: There is no eating in the school library at any time.
gept.example_zh: 學校圖書館裡任何時候都禁止飲食。

gept.example_en: Be careful with the scissors and don't run with them.
gept.example_zh: 使用剪刀要小心，不要拿著剪刀奔跑。

gept.example_en: Look at the board, kids, and read the new words with me.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們，看黑板，和我一起念新單字。

gept.example_en: Don't point at other kids, it is not polite at school.
gept.example_zh: 不要用手指指別的孩子，那在學校不禮貌。

gept.example_en: Please share with your partner when you only have one book.
gept.example_zh: 當你只有一本書時，請和你的同伴分享。

gept.example_en: We take turns to read the new story aloud in class.
gept.example_zh: 我們在班上輪流大聲朗讀新故事。

gept.example_en: Work in pairs and ask your partner three short questions.
gept.example_zh: 兩人一組，問你的同伴三個簡短問題。

gept.example_en: Today we will work in groups of four for the science project.
gept.example_zh: 今天科學作業我們將四人一組進行。

gept.example_en: My best friend at school is a kind boy named Leo.
gept.example_zh: 我學校最好的朋友是一個叫里歐的善良男孩。

gept.example_en: Please be kind to the new kid in our class today.
gept.example_zh: 請對我們班今天的新同學友善。

gept.example_en: The school librarian helps us find good books for our reports.
gept.example_zh: 學校圖書管理員幫我們找報告需要的好書。

gept.example_en: Show your library card to borrow books from the school library.
gept.example_zh: 出示你的圖書證才能在學校圖書館借書。

gept.example_en: I want to borrow a book about dinosaurs from the library today.
gept.example_zh: 我今天想從圖書館借一本關於恐龍的書。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to return a book to the library within two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了兩週內把書還給圖書館。

gept.example_en: Little kids love picture books with bright colors and short words.
gept.example_zh: 小朋友喜歡有鮮豔顏色和簡短文字的繪本。

gept.example_en: Mom reads me a storybook every night before I go to sleep.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每晚睡前都會讀一本故事書給我聽。

gept.example_en: We can read a comic book in the library during the lunch break.
gept.example_zh: 午休時間我們可以在圖書館看漫畫書。

gept.example_en: Wear a clean white sneaker for the basketball game on Friday.
gept.example_zh: 週五籃球比賽要穿乾淨的白色運動鞋。

gept.example_en: The whole school joins the morning meeting in the big hall.
gept.example_zh: 全校在大禮堂一起參加晨會。

gept.example_en: Our school hall has a big stage and many wooden chairs.
gept.example_zh: 我們的學校禮堂有一個大舞台和許多木椅。

gept.example_en: Go to the school office if you need a new student card.
gept.example_zh: 如果你需要新的學生證，請到學校辦公室。

gept.example_en: I bring my homework to the teacher's office every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每週一早上把作業送到老師辦公室。

gept.example_en: The art room smells like fresh paint and new colored paper.
gept.example_zh: 美術教室聞起來有新鮮顏料和新色紙的味道。

gept.example_en: The music room has a piano and many small drums.
gept.example_zh: 音樂教室有一架鋼琴和許多小鼓。

gept.example_en: In the computer room each kid has one screen and a keyboard.
gept.example_zh: 電腦教室裡每個孩子都有一台螢幕和一個鍵盤。

gept.example_en: I went to the school clinic because my tooth hurt at lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 我午餐時間牙齒痛所以去了學校保健室。

gept.example_en: The school nurse gave me first aid for my small cut.
gept.example_zh: 學校護士幫我的小傷口做急救。

gept.example_en: The nurse put a band-aid on my finger and I felt better.
gept.example_zh: 護士在我的手指貼上OK繃，我就覺得好多了。

gept.example_en: I show my report card to my parents at the end of the term.
gept.example_zh: 我在學期末把成績單拿給父母看。

gept.example_en: We have a long break at the end of every term.
gept.example_zh: 每個學期結束時我們都有長假。

gept.example_en: Our midterm test is next Friday in math and English.
gept.example_zh: 我們下週五有數學和英文的期中考。

gept.example_en: The final test is next month so I study a little each day.
gept.example_zh: 期末考下個月，所以我每天稍微讀一點書。

gept.example_en: My mom tells me to study hard for the math test tonight.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽叫我今晚為數學考試努力念書。

gept.example_en: I want to get a good grade on this big spelling test.
gept.example_zh: 我想在這次大拼字考試得到好成績。

gept.example_en: It is okay to make a mistake because we all learn from it.
gept.example_zh: 犯錯沒關係，因為我們都會從中學習。

gept.example_en: Always raise hand before you speak in our class.
gept.example_zh: 在我們班上發言前一定要先舉手。

gept.example_en: The answer key is at the back of the workbook on page eighty.
gept.example_zh: 解答本在練習本後面第八十頁。

gept.example_en: Write your name on the test paper before you start.
gept.example_zh: 開始答題前在考卷上寫上名字。

gept.example_en: Write the correct word in the blank to finish the sentence.
gept.example_zh: 在空格裡寫上正確單字以完成句子。

gept.example_en: Mark T if the sentence is true and F if it is false.
gept.example_zh: 如果句子是正確的就標T，錯的就標F。

gept.example_en: This sentence is false because dogs cannot fly in the sky.
gept.example_zh: 這個句子是錯的，因為狗不能在天空飛。

gept.example_en: Choose the best answer from A, B, C, or D.
gept.example_zh: 從A、B、C或D中選出最佳答案。

gept.example_en: Make a smart choice and read the question two times.
gept.example_zh: 做聰明的選擇，把題目讀兩次。

gept.example_en: This is an easy question and every kid in class knows it.
gept.example_zh: 這是個簡單問題，班上每個孩子都會。

gept.example_en: I asked the teacher because the last hard question was very tricky.
gept.example_zh: 我問了老師，因為最後一道難題很狡猾。

gept.example_en: Lily is a smart girl who reads many books on her own.
gept.example_zh: 莉莉是個聰明的女孩，自己讀很多書。

gept.example_en: Our teacher is kind to every student in our small class.
gept.example_zh: 我們老師對小班裡每個學生都很友善。

gept.example_en: She is helpful and always shares her pencils with classmates.
gept.example_zh: 她樂於助人，總是把鉛筆分給同學。

gept.example_en: Wash hands before lunch and after you go to the bathroom.
gept.example_zh: 午餐前和上完廁所後要洗手。

gept.example_en: May I go to the bathroom please, my teacher?
gept.example_zh: 老師，我可以去廁所嗎？

gept.example_en: The restroom is just down the hall on the left side.
gept.example_zh: 洗手間就在走廊左邊。

gept.example_en: There is a drinking fountain next to the science classroom.
gept.example_zh: 科學教室旁邊有一台飲水機。

gept.example_en: Please close the classroom door softly when you come in.
gept.example_zh: 進來時請輕輕關上教室門。

gept.example_en: Open the classroom window to let some fresh air in.
gept.example_zh: 打開教室窗戶讓一些新鮮空氣進來。

gept.example_en: We hang our art on the wall next to the door.
gept.example_zh: 我們把美術作品掛在門旁邊的牆上。

gept.example_en: Pick up the paper on the floor and put it in the bin.
gept.example_zh: 把地板上的紙撿起來放到垃圾桶裡。

gept.example_en: Throw the empty bottle in the bin near the classroom door.
gept.example_zh: 把空瓶子丟到教室門邊的垃圾桶裡。

gept.example_en: Could you wipe the board for me, please, before next class?
gept.example_zh: 可以請你在下節課前幫我擦黑板嗎？

gept.example_en: After class we sweep the floor and put the brooms away.
gept.example_zh: 下課後我們掃地並把掃帚收好。

gept.example_en: Now open the book to page twelve, please.
gept.example_zh: 請現在把書翻到第十二頁。

gept.example_en: Close the book and look up at the board for one minute.
gept.example_zh: 把書闔上，抬頭看黑板一分鐘。

gept.example_en: Turn the page when you finish reading the short story.
gept.example_zh: 讀完這篇短篇故事後翻到下一頁。

gept.example_en: Please get out your reading book and a sharp pencil.
gept.example_zh: 請拿出你的閱讀書和一支削好的鉛筆。

gept.example_en: Use a sharp pencil for art class so your lines look neat.
gept.example_zh: 美術課用削好的鉛筆，這樣線條才整齊。

gept.example_en: Sharpen your pencil at the front of the room very quietly.
gept.example_zh: 在教室前面安靜地削你的鉛筆。

gept.example_en: Erase the wrong word and write the right one above.
gept.example_zh: 把錯字擦掉，在上面寫正確的字。

gept.example_en: Please use a loud voice so the kids in the back can hear.
gept.example_zh: 請用大聲音，這樣後面的孩子才能聽到。

gept.example_en: Use your inside voice when you talk in the classroom.
gept.example_zh: 在教室裡說話用室內音量。

gept.example_en: Your outside voice is too loud for our small reading corner.
gept.example_zh: 你的室外音量在我們小閱讀角落太大聲。

gept.example_en: Read this short poem loud and clear for the whole class.
gept.example_zh: 把這首小詩大聲清楚地念給全班聽。

gept.example_en: Please stand in a line before we walk to the lunch room.
gept.example_zh: 在我們走到午餐室之前請站成一排。

gept.example_en: We eat in the lunch room with the third and fourth graders.
gept.example_zh: 我們和三、四年級的孩子一起在午餐室用餐。

gept.example_en: Today's school lunch is rice, chicken, and a small fruit cup.
gept.example_zh: 今天學校午餐是飯、雞肉和一小杯水果。

gept.example_en: Each kid gets one small milk box at the lunch table.
gept.example_zh: 每個孩子在午餐桌上拿到一小盒牛奶。

gept.example_en: Our teacher writes math problems on the smart board with a special pen.
gept.example_zh: 我們的老師用特殊筆在互動電子白板上寫數學題。

gept.example_en: Look at the big screen and watch the short video about animals.
gept.example_zh: 看大螢幕，看關於動物的小影片。

gept.example_en: We use an ipad in class to play word games together.
gept.example_zh: 我們在班上用iPad一起玩單字遊戲。

gept.example_en: Put on your headphones for the listening part of the test.
gept.example_zh: 考試聽力部分時請戴上耳機。

gept.example_en: A world map hangs above the back wall of our classroom.
gept.example_zh: 我們教室後牆上方掛著一幅世界地圖。

gept.example_en: Summer vacation is two months long and very, very hot.
gept.example_zh: 暑假有兩個月，而且非常非常熱。

gept.example_en: My little brother is in first grade and just six years old.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟讀一年級，剛滿六歲。

gept.example_en: In second grade we begin to write simple short stories.
gept.example_zh: 二年級時我們開始寫簡單的小故事。

gept.example_en: Third grade kids start to learn a little English at our school.
gept.example_zh: 三年級的孩子在我們學校開始學一點英文。

gept.example_en: In fourth grade we read books with many more new words.
gept.example_zh: 四年級時我們讀有更多新單字的書。

gept.example_en: My older sister is in fifth grade and helps me with math.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊讀五年級，會幫我做數學。

gept.example_en: Sixth grade is the last year of our small primary school.
gept.example_zh: 六年級是我們小型小學的最後一年。

gept.example_en: Next year I will go to a junior high near my house.
gept.example_zh: 明年我會去離家不遠的國中。

gept.example_en: My big brother is in high school and reads very thick books.
gept.example_zh: 我哥讀高中，看很厚的書。

gept.example_en: My primary school has a big playground and a small library.
gept.example_zh: 我的小學有一個大操場和一個小圖書館。

gept.example_en: I will join the English speech contest at school next month.
gept.example_zh: 我下個月會參加學校的英文演講比賽。

gept.example_en: She won first place in the school drawing contest last year.
gept.example_zh: 她去年在學校繪畫比賽中得到第一名。

gept.example_en: Tom got first place in the spelling contest this Friday.
gept.example_zh: 湯姆在這週五的拼字比賽中得到第一名。

gept.example_en: I got a gold star on my homework today and felt happy.
gept.example_zh: 今天我的作業得到一個金色星星貼紙，感到很開心。

gept.example_en: The teacher gives a fun sticker to every kid with a good score.
gept.example_zh: 老師給每個分數好的孩子一張有趣的貼紙。

gept.example_en: Write the new words five times each in your exercise book.
gept.example_zh: 把新單字在練習簿上各寫五次。

gept.example_en: Wave goodbye to your friends at the end of the school day.
gept.example_zh: 放學時向朋友揮手再見。

gept.example_en: The school cafeteria has hot rice and warm soup every day.
gept.example_zh: 學校自助餐廳每天都有熱飯熱湯。

gept.example_en: Many kids go to cram school after their regular school day.
gept.example_zh: 許多孩子放學後會去補習班。

gept.example_en: Excuse me teacher, may I please go to the bathroom?
gept.example_zh: 對不起老師，請問我可以去廁所嗎？

gept.example_en: Every pupil in our class wants to win the spelling game on Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我們班每個小學生都想在週五的拼字遊戲中獲勝。

gept.example_en: We have english class three times a week to learn new words.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週上三次英文課學習新單字。

gept.example_en: In pe lesson we play soccer and run on the green field.
gept.example_zh: 體育課我們在綠色操場上踢足球和跑步。

gept.example_en: Little kids learn the abc song before they read real books.
gept.example_zh: 小孩學ABC字母歌之後才讀真正的書。

gept.example_en: Please copy down the words from the board into your book.
gept.example_zh: 請把黑板上的字抄到你的本子上。

gept.example_en: Put a small tick mark next to the right answer please.
gept.example_zh: 請在正確答案旁邊打個小勾號。

gept.example_en: Underline word that you do not know with a red pen.
gept.example_zh: 用紅筆在你不認識的單字下畫線。

gept.example_en: We read a short story about a brave little mouse in class.
gept.example_zh: 我們在課堂上讀一個關於勇敢小老鼠的短篇故事。

gept.example_en: The teacher marks the test paper with a bright red pen.
gept.example_zh: 老師用鮮紅色的筆批改考卷。

gept.example_en: In art class we use finger paint to make colorful pictures.
gept.example_zh: 美術課我們用手指畫顏料做出彩色圖畫。

gept.example_en: You must show up to class every day to learn well.
gept.example_zh: 你必須每天出席上課才能學好。

gept.example_en: Look at the class schedule to see what is after lunch today.
gept.example_zh: 看班級課表，看看今天午餐後是什麼課。

gept.example_en: On parents day, families come to visit our classroom.
gept.example_zh: 家長日時，家庭會來參觀我們的教室。

gept.example_en: Pick a school partner to do the reading task with you.
gept.example_zh: 選一位學伴和你一起做閱讀作業。

gept.example_en: My class buddy and I sit together during every lesson.
gept.example_zh: 我和我的班上好搭檔每堂課都坐在一起。

gept.example_en: The turn in date for the book report is next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 讀書心得報告的繳交日是下週一。

gept.example_en: Be polite to your teacher and your classmates every day.
gept.example_zh: 每天要對老師和同學有禮貌。

gept.example_en: Walk slowly in the class hallway and do not push others.
gept.example_zh: 在教室走廊慢慢走，不要推擠別人。

gept.example_en: Throw away trash in the bin and keep the classroom clean.
gept.example_zh: 把垃圾丟到垃圾桶並保持教室乾淨。

gept.example_en: My class duty today is to clean the blackboard and the desk.
gept.example_zh: 我今天的班級值日工作是擦黑板和桌子。

gept.example_en: Put away book before you take out your math notebook.
gept.example_zh: 拿出數學筆記本前先把書收好。

gept.example_en: Hold your lunch fork with your right hand please.
gept.example_zh: 請用右手拿午餐叉子。

gept.example_en: We watch a short school video about safety in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 早上我們看一部關於安全的學校影片。

gept.example_en: The class globe shows the world in many bright colors.
gept.example_zh: 教室地球儀用很多鮮豔的顏色顯示世界。

gept.example_en: Write the story title in big letters on top of the page.
gept.example_zh: 用大字把故事標題寫在頁面上方。

gept.example_en: Pay full attention during the listening part of the test.
gept.example_zh: 考試聽力部分要全神貫注。

gept.example_en: My school graduation will take place in the big school hall.
gept.example_zh: 我的學校畢業典禮將在大禮堂舉行。

gept.example_en: Please put on deodorant under each armpit after you take a shower.
gept.example_zh: 洗完澡後請在兩邊腋下塗上止汗劑。

gept.example_en: The baby was fast asleep in his mother's arms after lunch.
gept.example_zh: 午餐後寶寶在媽媽懷裡睡得很熟。

gept.example_en: I stayed awake all night because my tooth hurt very badly.
gept.example_zh: 我整晚都沒睡，因為牙齒痛得很厲害。

gept.example_en: The backbone helps your body stand up straight every single day.
gept.example_zh: 脊椎幫助你的身體每天都能挺直站立。

gept.example_en: My mom put a small bandaid on my finger after I got cut.
gept.example_zh: 我手指被割傷後，媽媽幫我貼了一個小OK繃。

gept.example_en: The barber gave my dad a short and neat haircut this morning.
gept.example_zh: 理髮師今天早上幫我爸剪了一個整齊的短髮。

gept.example_en: My grandfather has a long white beard that I like to touch.
gept.example_zh: 我爺爺有一把長長的白鬍子，我喜歡摸它。

gept.example_en: After eating too much cake, my belly felt very round and full.
gept.example_zh: 吃了太多蛋糕後，我的肚子感覺又圓又脹。

gept.example_en: He lifts weights every day to make his biceps bigger and stronger.
gept.example_zh: 他每天舉重，好讓二頭肌變得更大更強壯。

gept.example_en: My nose started to bleed after I bumped it on the door.
gept.example_zh: 我撞到門後鼻子開始流血。

gept.example_en: I got a blister on my foot from wearing new shoes all day.
gept.example_zh: 穿了一整天新鞋讓我腳上長了一個水泡。

gept.example_en: Eating fruit every morning is good for your bowel and your tummy.
gept.example_zh: 每天早上吃水果對腸子和肚子都很好。

gept.example_en: Take a deep breath and try to calm down before the test.
gept.example_zh: 考試前深呼吸一下，試著讓自己冷靜下來。

gept.example_en: The boy has a broken arm and must wear a cast for weeks.
gept.example_zh: 那個男孩手臂骨折，必須打石膏好幾個星期。

gept.example_en: My knee feels bruised and sore after I fell off the bike.
gept.example_zh: 從腳踏車上跌下來後，我的膝蓋瘀青又痠痛。

gept.example_en: Be careful not to burn your hand on the hot tea pot.
gept.example_zh: 小心不要被熱茶壺燙到手。

gept.example_en: Sitting on hard chairs for hours can make your buttocks feel sore.
gept.example_zh: 在硬椅子上坐好幾個小時會讓你的屁股痠痛。

gept.example_en: My grandmother uses a cane to help her walk to the market.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶用拐杖幫助她走到市場。

gept.example_en: The baby has lovely chubby-cheeks that everyone wants to gently touch.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶有可愛胖胖的臉頰，每個人都想輕輕摸一下。

gept.example_en: My sister has a fair complexion because she drinks lots of water.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊膚色白皙，因為她喝很多水。

gept.example_en: She wears a contact-lens in each eye instead of normal glasses.
gept.example_zh: 她兩眼都戴隱形眼鏡，不戴一般眼鏡。

gept.example_en: Use a clean cotton-swab to gently dry inside your ear after showering.
gept.example_zh: 洗完澡後用乾淨的棉花棒輕輕擦乾耳朵內部。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 歪的；不直的（指牙齒）
gept.example_en: My front tooth is a little crooked, so I need to wear braces.
gept.example_zh: 我的門牙有點歪，所以我需要戴牙套。

gept.example_en: Your little brother is so cute with his big round eyes.
gept.example_zh: 你弟弟有圓圓大大的眼睛，真是可愛。

gept.example_en: I have a dental appointment after school on Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我星期五下課後有牙科預約。

gept.example_en: The dentist told me to brush my teeth twice every day.
gept.example_zh: 牙醫叫我每天刷兩次牙。

gept.example_en: A healthy diet should include fruit, vegetables, and lots of water.
gept.example_zh: 健康的飲食應包含水果、蔬菜和大量的水。

gept.example_en: I felt dizzy after I stood up too quickly from my chair.
gept.example_zh: 我從椅子上太快站起來後覺得頭暈。

gept.example_en: The baby starts to drool whenever she sees food on the table.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶一看到桌上有食物就開始流口水。

gept.example_en: This cold medicine may make you feel drowsy after lunch.
gept.example_zh: 這種感冒藥午餐後可能會讓你想睡覺。

gept.example_en: Never put a sharp object into your ear-canal, even when it itches.
gept.example_zh: 不要把尖銳的東西放進耳道，即使它在發癢。

gept.example_en: Tina has had a bad earache since she went swimming last weekend.
gept.example_zh: Tina上週末去游泳後就一直耳朵痛。

gept.example_en: Try not to rub your eyeball when something tiny gets into your eye.
gept.example_zh: 眼睛裡有小東西時，盡量不要揉眼球。

gept.example_en: Reading in bad light is not good for your eyesight at all.
gept.example_zh: 在昏暗的光線下看書對視力一點都不好。

gept.example_en: She felt so hot and tired that she almost did faint.
gept.example_zh: 她又熱又累，差點就昏倒了。

gept.example_en: The little vampire toy has two long white fangs in its mouth.
gept.example_zh: 那個小吸血鬼玩偶嘴裡有兩顆長長的白色尖牙。

gept.example_en: My son feels feverish, so I will take him to the doctor.
gept.example_zh: 我兒子有點發燒，我要帶他去看醫生。

gept.example_en: My fingertip got cold while I waited outside in the snow.
gept.example_zh: 我在雪地裡等待時，指尖都凍僵了。

gept.example_en: He made a tight fist and gave the wall a small punch.
gept.example_zh: 他緊握拳頭，輕輕地打了一下牆。

gept.example_en: Remember to floss your teeth every night before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 記得每晚睡覺前用牙線清潔牙齒。

gept.example_en: The nurse cleaned my forearm before giving me the small injection.
gept.example_zh: 護士在幫我打小針前先擦乾淨我的前臂。

gept.example_en: I want to freshen up before we go out to dinner tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚出去吃飯前，我想先梳洗一下。

gept.example_en: Wash your hands with soap to kill all the dirty germs.
gept.example_zh: 用肥皂洗手，把髒髒的細菌都殺光。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 好看的；長相好的
gept.example_en: Your new haircut makes you look very good-looking today.
gept.example_zh: 你今天的新髮型讓你看起來很好看。

gept.example_en: I got a short haircut just before the summer holidays began.
gept.example_zh: 暑假開始前我剪了一個短頭髮。

gept.example_en: My mother goes to the same hairdresser every month for a trim.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽每個月都去同一個美髮師那裡修頭髮。

gept.example_en: She held back her bangs with a pretty pink hairpin today.
gept.example_zh: 她今天用一個漂亮的粉紅色髮夾夾住瀏海。

gept.example_en: My brother sneezes a lot in spring because of his hay-fever.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟春天因為花粉熱而打很多噴嚏。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 復原中的；治癒
gept.example_en: The cut on my knee is healing well after only three days.
gept.example_zh: 我膝蓋上的傷口才三天就復原得很好。

gept.example_en: The nurse measured my height and weight at the school checkup.
gept.example_zh: 護士在學校健檢時量了我的身高和體重。

gept.example_en: Try holding your breath if you have a hiccup that will not stop.
gept.example_zh: 如果打嗝停不下來，試試憋氣看看。

gept.example_en: Grandpa is in the hospital, but he will be home soon.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺在醫院，但他很快就會回家了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 巨大的（描述體型）
gept.example_en: The big dog has huge paws that are bigger than my hand.
gept.example_zh: 那隻大狗的腳掌很大，比我的手還大。

gept.example_en: Tell the doctor where it hurts and how bad the pain is.
gept.example_zh: 告訴醫生哪裡痛、痛得多嚴重。

gept.example_en: Put an icepack on your forehead to bring the fever down.
gept.example_zh: 把冰敷袋放在額頭上來退燒。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 生病的；不舒服的
gept.example_en: Lily looks ill today, so she should rest at home and sleep.
gept.example_zh: Lily今天看起來不太舒服，她應該在家裡休息睡覺。

gept.example_en: Do not share cups, because germs can easily infect other people.
gept.example_zh: 不要共用杯子，因為細菌很容易傳染給別人。

gept.example_en: Slowly inhale through your nose and then breathe out through your mouth.
gept.example_zh: 用鼻子慢慢吸氣，然後用嘴巴呼氣。

gept.example_en: I fell off my bike and hurt my kneecap very badly.
gept.example_zh: 我從腳踏車上摔下來，膝蓋骨傷得很重。

gept.example_en: That medicine will not knock-out the pain, but it should help.
gept.example_zh: 那種藥不會完全止痛，但應該會有幫助。

gept.example_en: A tiny dust on my lash made my eye water all morning.
gept.example_zh: 睫毛上的一粒小灰塵讓我整個早上眼睛流淚。

gept.example_en: Try to stretch all four of your limbs before you go running.
gept.example_zh: 跑步前盡量把四肢都伸展一下。

gept.example_en: He had to limp home because his right ankle was hurt.
gept.example_zh: 他右腳踝受傷了，只好一瘸一拐地走回家。

gept.example_en: My older cousin has long-hair that almost touches her waist now.
gept.example_zh: 我表姊有一頭長髮，幾乎快垂到腰了。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 鬆動的牙齒（指乳牙）
gept.example_en: I have a wiggly loose-tooth and it might fall out today.
gept.example_zh: 我有一顆會動的鬆牙，今天可能就會掉了。

gept.example_en: My sister keeps her brushes inside a small pink makeup-bag.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊把她的刷具放在一個粉紅色的小化妝包裡。

gept.example_en: Please wear a clean mask when you are sick at school.
gept.example_zh: 你在學校生病時請戴乾淨的口罩。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 藥（medicine 的口語縮寫）
gept.example_en: Did you take your cold med before lunch this afternoon?
gept.example_zh: 你今天下午吃飯前有吃感冒藥了嗎？

gept.example_en: Her new shirt shows her midriff, which her mother does not like.
gept.example_zh: 她的新上衣露出腰腹，她媽媽不太喜歡。

gept.example_en: There is a small brown mole on the back of my neck.
gept.example_zh: 我脖子後面有一顆棕色的小痣。

gept.example_en: My uncle has a thick black moustache and a big warm smile.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔有濃黑的八字鬍和溫暖的笑容。

gept.example_en: My legs have a muscle-ache from playing soccer all weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我整個週末踢足球，腿都肌肉痠痛了。

gept.example_en: Where is the nail-clipper? My fingernails are getting too long.
gept.example_zh: 指甲剪在哪裡？我的指甲變太長了。

gept.example_en: My aunt wears pink nail-polish on her toes during the summer.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨夏天會在腳趾甲上塗粉紅色指甲油。

gept.example_en: I am near-sighted, so I cannot read the words on the board.
gept.example_zh: 我近視，看不清楚黑板上的字。

gept.example_en: Stay calm and tilt your head forward when you get a nosebleed.
gept.example_zh: 流鼻血時要冷靜，把頭往前傾。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 照護的；護理
gept.example_en: My aunt works in the nursing room at our school every day.
gept.example_zh: 我阿姨每天在我們學校的護理室工作。

gept.example_en: I have oily-skin, so I wash my face two times every day.
gept.example_zh: 我是油性肌膚，所以每天洗兩次臉。

gept.example_en: We have a physical health class twice every week at our school.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校每週上兩次身體健康課。

gept.example_en: I have a red pimple on my chin and it really hurts.
gept.example_zh: 我下巴上有一顆紅紅的青春痘，真的很痛。

gept.example_en: The baby has plump little arms and a cute happy smile.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶有圓胖的小手臂和可愛快樂的笑容。

gept.example_en: She tied her hair in a high ponytail before P.E. class.
gept.example_zh: 她在體育課前把頭髮綁成高高的馬尾。

gept.example_en: Mom uses some powder on her face before going to work.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽上班前會在臉上撲一點蜜粉。

gept.example_en: My eyes look puffy this morning because I cried last night.
gept.example_zh: 我今天早上眼睛浮浮的，因為昨晚哭過了。

gept.example_en: The nurse checked my pulse and my temperature very carefully.
gept.example_zh: 護士仔細地量了我的脈搏和體溫。

gept.example_en: Sue has a round-face and big bright eyes that everyone likes.
gept.example_zh: Sue有一張圓臉和明亮的大眼睛，大家都喜歡。

gept.example_en: I have a bad runny-nose and need many tissues today.
gept.example_zh: 我今天流鼻水流得很厲害，需要很多衛生紙。

gept.example_en: The nurse used a safety-pin to fix the small bandage tightly.
gept.example_zh: 護士用安全別針把小繃帶牢牢固定住。

gept.example_en: Do not pick the scab on your knee; let it heal alone.
gept.example_zh: 不要摳膝蓋上的痂，讓它自己癒合。

gept.example_en: Step on the scale, please, and we will check your weight.
gept.example_zh: 請站到體重計上，我們來量一下你的體重。

gept.example_en: We have five sense organs to help us learn about the world.
gept.example_zh: 我們有五種感官，幫助我們認識這個世界。

gept.example_en: My dad got a new electric shaver for his birthday present.
gept.example_zh: 我爸生日得到了一台新的電動刮鬍刀當禮物。

gept.example_en: My new short-hair feels cool and is much easier to wash.
gept.example_zh: 我新剪的短髮覺得很涼快，也好洗多了。

gept.example_en: Please touch your shoulder-blade with your right hand if you can.
gept.example_zh: 如果可以的話，請用右手摸到你的肩胛骨。

gept.example_en: Wash your hands often to keep sickness away from your family.
gept.example_zh: 勤洗手，讓家人遠離疾病。

gept.example_en: Do ten sit-up exercises every night to build a strong belly.
gept.example_zh: 每晚做十下仰臥起坐，能讓肚子變結實。

gept.example_en: Skipping is fun and a great way to do daily exercise.
gept.example_zh: 跳繩很好玩，也是很棒的每日運動方式。

gept.example_en: Don't slap your hand on the hot pot; you will burn yourself.
gept.example_zh: 別把手拍在熱鍋上，你會燙到自己的。

gept.example_en: He wore an arm sling for six weeks after the accident.
gept.example_zh: 出意外後他手臂掛吊帶掛了六個星期。

gept.example_en: Always wear a slipper on each foot inside the hospital.
gept.example_zh: 在醫院裡兩腳都要穿拖鞋。

gept.example_en: My grandpa has small-eyes and a kind smile on his face.
gept.example_zh: 我爺爺有小小的眼睛和臉上慈祥的笑容。

gept.example_en: Use a fresh soap-bar to wash your hands before every meal.
gept.example_zh: 每餐前用新的肥皂塊洗手。

gept.example_en: The doctor said it was only a small soft-tissue injury.
gept.example_zh: 醫生說只是輕微的軟組織受傷。

gept.example_en: Warm milk can soothe a sore throat before you go to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前喝溫牛奶可以舒緩喉嚨痛。

gept.example_en: I cannot find my new specs anywhere on my messy desk.
gept.example_zh: 我亂亂的桌上到處都找不到我的新眼鏡。

gept.example_en: I like to splash cold water on my face to wake up.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡用冷水潑臉來提神。

gept.example_en: The coach asked us to squat ten times for stronger legs.
gept.example_zh: 教練要我們深蹲十下，好讓腿更有力。

gept.example_en: My neck feels stiff after sleeping on a hard pillow last night.
