gept.example_zh: 昨晚睡硬枕頭，我脖子僵硬。

gept.example_en: My mom showed me a small stretch-mark on her side.
gept.example_zh: 我媽給我看她身體側邊一道小小的妊娠紋。

gept.example_en: My uncle's stubble felt scratchy when he gave me a hug.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔抱我時，他的鬍渣感覺刺刺的。

gept.example_en: I got a sty in my left eye and it really hurts.
gept.example_zh: 我左眼長針眼，真的很痛。

gept.example_en: He got a nice suntan after the family trip to the beach.
gept.example_zh: 全家去海邊玩之後，他曬出了健康的小麥膚色。

gept.example_en: I felt very sweaty after running ten times around the playground.
gept.example_zh: 繞操場跑十圈後我滿身大汗。

gept.example_en: The basketball player is tall-and-slim, just like his older brother.
gept.example_zh: 那位籃球選手又高又瘦，就像他哥哥一樣。

gept.example_en: A small tear ran down her face when she said goodbye.
gept.example_zh: 她說再見時，一滴眼淚從臉上滑落。

gept.example_en: I broke my thumbnail while I was opening the heavy box.
gept.example_zh: 我打開那個重重的箱子時，弄斷了拇指甲。

gept.example_en: My little cousin loves to tickle my feet to make me laugh.
gept.example_zh: 我小表妹很愛搔我腳底心讓我大笑。

gept.example_en: The baby has tiny fingers and ten tiny soft pink toes.
gept.example_zh: 寶寶有小小的手指和十根粉嫩的小腳趾。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 結實的；線條好的
gept.example_en: Her arms look toned because she lifts light weights every day.
gept.example_zh: 她的手臂線條好，因為她每天舉輕重量。

gept.example_en: I was so nervous I felt tongue-tied during the school speech.
gept.example_zh: 我太緊張了，在學校演講時說不出話來。

gept.example_en: Use a clean toothpick to take the food from between your teeth.
gept.example_zh: 用乾淨的牙籤把牙縫裡的食物挑掉。

gept.example_en: Bend your torso to the left and then back to the right.
gept.example_zh: 把上半身向左彎，再彎回右邊。

gept.example_en: My little brother says his tummy hurts after eating too much candy.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟吃太多糖後說他肚子痛。

gept.example_en: Use a small tweezer to take out the splinter from your finger.
gept.example_zh: 用小鑷子把刺從手指拔出來。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞/形容詞) 腋下；腋窩的
gept.example_en: The nurse checked my underarm temperature with a small thermometer.
gept.example_zh: 護士用小體溫計量我的腋下體溫。

gept.example_en: She has been feeling unwell since the field trip last Friday.
gept.example_zh: 她自從上週五校外教學後就一直不太舒服。

gept.example_en: Open your mouth wide so I can see your tongue and uvula.
gept.example_zh: 嘴巴張大讓我看到你的舌頭和小舌。

gept.example_en: Carrots are very good for your eyes and clear vision.
gept.example_zh: 胡蘿蔔對眼睛和清晰的視力很有幫助。

gept.example_en: Oranges have lots of vitamin-c and help us stay healthy.
gept.example_zh: 柳橙含有很多維他命C，幫助我們保持健康。

gept.example_en: I have a small wart on my finger and it does not hurt.
gept.example_zh: 我手指上有一顆小小的疣，不會痛。

gept.example_en: Wet a soft wash-cloth and put it on the baby's hot forehead.
gept.example_zh: 把柔軟的洗臉巾沾濕，放在寶寶發燙的額頭上。

gept.example_en: Cutting onions gives me red and watering-eyes every single time.
gept.example_zh: 每次切洋蔥都讓我的眼睛又紅又流淚。

gept.example_en: My cousin has long brown wavy-hair like her pretty mom.
gept.example_zh: 我表姊有一頭棕色的波浪長髮，就像她漂亮的媽媽。

gept.example_en: The nurse is weighing each student in our class this morning.
gept.example_zh: 護士今天早上正在幫我們班每位同學量體重。

gept.example_en: She wore a long pink wig to the school costume party.
gept.example_zh: 她戴了一頂長長的粉紅色假髮去學校化裝舞會。

gept.example_en: Mom always carries baby wipes in her bag when we go out.
gept.example_zh: 我們出門時，媽媽總是會在包包裡帶著嬰兒濕紙巾。

gept.example_en: My older sister had her wisdom-tooth taken out last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊上週末把智齒拔掉了。

gept.example_en: Dad does a short workout in the living room every night.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每晚都在客廳做一段短短的運動。

gept.example_en: My grandmother has a soft wrinkle on each side of her smile.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶笑起來時臉的兩邊都有柔和的皺紋。

gept.example_en: My uncle is young-and-healthy because he runs every single morning.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔年輕又健康，因為他每天早上都跑步。

gept.example_en: He does sit-ups to make his ab muscles look stronger.
gept.example_zh: 他做仰臥起坐讓腹肌看起來更結實。

gept.example_en: Place each elbow on the armrest while the dentist looks inside.
gept.example_zh: 牙醫看牙時兩手肘放在扶手上。

gept.example_en: My little cousin still has some cute babyfat on her round cheeks.
gept.example_zh: 我小表妹圓圓的臉頰上還有可愛的嬰兒肥。

gept.example_en: I keep one bandage-roll in my school bag just in case.
gept.example_zh: 我書包裡放著一卷繃帶，以防萬一。

gept.example_en: Do not walk barefoot inside the public shower room at the gym.
gept.example_zh: 不要赤腳走進健身房的公共淋浴間。

gept.example_en: Step on the soft bath-mat before you put on your slippers.
gept.example_zh: 穿拖鞋前先踩在柔軟的浴室踏墊上。

gept.example_en: The doctor said three days of bedrest should help her recover.
gept.example_zh: 醫生說臥床休息三天應該能幫助她復原。

gept.example_en: The puppy has big-eyes that look at us with so much love.
gept.example_zh: 小狗有一雙充滿愛意看著我們的大眼睛。

gept.example_en: I have a small heart-shaped birthmark on my left arm.
gept.example_zh: 我左手臂上有一個小小的心形胎記。

gept.example_en: Do you know your bloodtype? Mine is type O positive.
gept.example_zh: 你知道你的血型嗎？我是O型陽性。

gept.example_en: Squeeze a little body-wash onto the sponge before showering.
gept.example_zh: 洗澡前在沐浴海綿上擠一點沐浴乳。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 結實的；肌肉發達的
gept.example_en: After a year at the gym, my older brother looks really buff.
gept.example_zh: 去健身房一年後，我哥看起來真的很壯。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 拇趾外翻；腳趾凸塊
gept.example_en: She had a bunion on her foot and could not wear tight shoes.
gept.example_zh: 她腳上有一塊拇趾外翻，沒辦法穿緊的鞋。

gept.example_en: Jumping rope is great for calorie-burn in only ten minutes.
gept.example_zh: 跳繩只要十分鐘，消耗卡路里效果很好。

gept.example_en: Her cheekbone looked red after she fell on the school playground.
gept.example_zh: 她在學校操場跌倒後顴骨看起來紅紅的。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 夾式的（指甲、髮飾）
gept.example_en: She wore a small clip-on bow in her hair for the show.
gept.example_zh: 她在表演時頭髮上夾了一個小蝴蝶結。

gept.example_en: My little brother got a short crew-cut for the hot summer.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟為了熱熱的夏天剪了個短短的平頭。

gept.example_en: Take a deep-breath in and let it out very slowly.
gept.example_zh: 深吸一口氣，然後慢慢吐出來。

gept.example_en: My sister had her first ear-piercing done on her birthday.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊生日當天第一次去打耳洞。

gept.example_en: I have an eye-bag under each eye from staying up late.
gept.example_zh: 我熬夜熬到兩眼下面都有眼袋了。

gept.example_en: We will have a fit-test in P.E. class next Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 下星期一早上體育課我們有體能測驗。

gept.example_en: I wish all my family members good-health and lots of happiness.
gept.example_zh: 我祝家人們身體健康，幸福快樂。

gept.example_en: My little brother said his legs have a growing-pain at night.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟說他晚上腿有生長痛。

gept.example_en: I always keep a hair-tie around my wrist during gym class.
gept.example_zh: 上體育課時，我手腕上總是戴著一條髮圈。

gept.example_en: Press the bottle once to get enough handwash for both hands.
gept.example_zh: 按一下瓶子，就有足夠兩手用的洗手乳。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 頭部感冒；鼻塞感冒
gept.example_en: I have a head-cold and my nose feels really stuffy today.
gept.example_zh: 我頭部感冒，今天鼻子塞得很厲害。

gept.example_en: After running fast, you can feel your heart-rate go up.
gept.example_zh: 跑得快之後，你可以感覺到心率變快。

gept.example_en: Place an ice-pack on the bump for ten minutes, please.
gept.example_zh: 請把冰敷袋敷在腫包上十分鐘。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 適合孩子的（醫療/個人護理）
gept.example_en: This toothpaste is kid-friendly and tastes like sweet strawberries.
gept.example_zh: 這款牙膏適合小朋友，吃起來像甜甜的草莓。

gept.example_en: Wear a knee-pad on each leg before you start skating.
gept.example_zh: 開始溜冰前每隻腳的膝蓋上都戴上護膝。

gept.example_en: Do twenty slow leg-lift moves to make your thighs stronger.
gept.example_zh: 做二十下慢慢的抬腿動作，能讓大腿更有力。

gept.example_en: I put on lip-balm before going outside in cold winter air.
gept.example_zh: 冬天冷空氣裡出門前我會擦護唇膏。

gept.example_en: Tina has long-legs and runs faster than the other kids.
gept.example_zh: Tina有長長的腿，跑得比其他小孩都快。

gept.example_en: A gentle neck-rub from my mom always makes me feel better.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽輕輕幫我按摩脖子總是讓我感覺好多了。

gept.example_en: Use the nose-spray two times each day until you feel better.
gept.example_zh: 鼻噴劑每天用兩次，直到你感覺好一些。

gept.example_en: I got a small paper-cut on my finger from a school book.
gept.example_zh: 我被學校的書割到手指，劃了一個小小的紙割傷。

gept.example_en: My pinkie finger got caught in the door, but it is okay now.
gept.example_zh: 我的小指被門夾到，不過現在沒事了。

gept.example_en: My sister likes to pluck her eyebrows in front of the mirror.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊喜歡對著鏡子拔眉毛。

gept.example_en: Dad does ten pushup moves on the floor every morning.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每天早上在地板上做十下伏地挺身。

gept.example_en: After a run, her cheeks looked rosy and healthy.
gept.example_zh: 跑步之後，她的臉頰看起來紅潤又健康。

gept.example_en: Rub a little cream on your dry hands before going to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡前在乾燥的雙手上抹一點乳液揉一揉。

gept.example_en: Salty-sweat ran down my face during the hot afternoon game.
gept.example_zh: 炎熱下午的比賽中，鹹鹹的汗從我臉上流下來。

gept.example_en: Sit straight on each sit-bone to keep your back healthy.
gept.example_zh: 坐直時讓兩邊坐骨平均受力，能讓背部更健康。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有臭味的（運動後）
gept.example_en: My socks are stinky after a long basketball game today.
gept.example_zh: 今天打完籃球後，我的襪子臭臭的。

gept.example_en: Put sun-cream on your arms before we go to the beach.
gept.example_zh: 我們去海邊前在手臂上擦防曬乳。

gept.example_en: Her thick-hair takes a long time to dry after washing.
gept.example_zh: 她濃密的頭髮洗完要花很久才會乾。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/動詞) 伸出舌頭的
gept.example_en: Open wide with tongue-out so the doctor can look inside.
gept.example_zh: 嘴巴張開把舌頭伸出來，這樣醫生才能看到裡面。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 極柔軟的（個人護理用品）
gept.example_en: I use an ultra-soft toothbrush because my gums are sensitive.
gept.example_zh: 我用超柔軟的牙刷，因為我的牙齦很敏感。

gept.example_en: The doctor said I am a little underweight for my age.
gept.example_zh: 醫生說以我的年紀來看，我有點過輕。

gept.example_en: The nurse weighed every kid in our class this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上護士幫我們班每個小朋友量了體重。

gept.example_en: I was wide-awake at five in the morning because of the bird songs.
gept.example_zh: 我早上五點就完全醒了，因為鳥兒的叫聲。

gept.example_en: Mom keeps yawning today because the baby woke up so often.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽今天一直在打哈欠，因為寶寶常常醒過來。

gept.example_en: Drinking water is one easy way to keep your young-skin healthy.
gept.example_zh: 多喝水是保持年輕肌膚健康的一個簡單方法。

gept.example_en: My father wears a white shirt to work every day.
gept.example_zh: 我爸爸每天穿白襯衫去上班。

gept.example_en: These black pants are too long for my little brother.
gept.example_zh: 這條黑色長褲對我弟弟來說太長了。

gept.example_en: She bought a new pair of blue jeans last Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 她上週日買了一條新的藍色牛仔褲。

gept.example_en: My sister likes to wear a pink skirt to the park.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊喜歡穿粉紅色的裙子去公園。

gept.example_en: Please put on your coat before going outside today.
gept.example_zh: 請在出門前穿上你的外套。

gept.example_en: His new jacket has many big pockets for keys.
gept.example_zh: 他的新夾克有許多放鑰匙的大口袋。

gept.example_en: Grandma made me a warm sweater for my birthday.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶為我生日做了一件溫暖的毛衣。

gept.example_en: Boys often wear shorts when they play basketball in summer.
gept.example_zh: 男孩們在夏天打籃球時常穿短褲。

gept.example_en: He has many cool t-shirts with cartoon pictures on them.
gept.example_zh: 他有許多印著卡通圖案的酷 T 恤。

gept.example_en: My mother's blouse looks very pretty with that long skirt.
gept.example_zh: 我媽媽的襯衫配那條長裙看起來很漂亮。

gept.example_en: Dad needs to buy new gray trousers for his office job.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸需要為他的辦公室工作買新的灰色西裝褲。

gept.example_en: She put on a big yellow hat to play at the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她戴上一頂大黃帽去海邊玩。

gept.example_en: I cannot find my left shoe under the bed.
gept.example_zh: 我在床底下找不到我的左腳鞋子。

gept.example_en: These new shoes feel very comfortable on my feet.
gept.example_zh: 這雙新鞋穿在我腳上感覺很舒服。

gept.example_en: There is a small hole in my old red sock.
gept.example_zh: 我那隻舊的紅襪子有一個小洞。

gept.example_en: Please wash these dirty socks before you go to bed.
gept.example_zh: 請在睡前把這些髒襪子洗一洗。

gept.example_en: My brown belt is on the chair next to the door.
gept.example_zh: 我的棕色腰帶在門邊的椅子上。

gept.example_en: Look, there is a small spider inside your right boot.
gept.example_zh: 看，你右邊靴子裡有一隻小蜘蛛。

gept.example_en: I prefer one new sandal over an old sock today.
gept.example_zh: 我今天比較想穿一隻新涼鞋而不是舊襪子。

gept.example_en: Where are my reading glasses? I cannot see this book.
gept.example_zh: 我的老花眼鏡在哪？我看不到這本書。

gept.example_en: My father gave me a nice watch for my tenth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 我爸爸送我一支漂亮的手錶當作十歲生日禮物。

gept.example_en: She wears a small gold ring on her left hand.
gept.example_zh: 她左手戴著一只小小的金戒指。

gept.example_en: Her new handbag matches her brown leather shoes very well.
gept.example_zh: 她的新手提包跟她的棕色皮鞋很搭。

gept.example_en: Mom wore her pearl necklace to the family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽戴她的珍珠項鍊去參加家庭晚餐。

gept.example_en: My sister bought small silver earrings at the night market.
gept.example_zh: 我姊姊在夜市買了小銀耳環。

gept.example_en: You should wear warm clothes when you go out today.
gept.example_zh: 你今天出門時應該穿暖一點的衣服。

gept.example_en: Please put your dirty clothes in the basket near the door.
gept.example_zh: 請把你的髒衣服放進門邊的籃子裡。

gept.example_en: The store sells many kinds of children's clothing.
gept.example_zh: 這家店賣很多種兒童服裝。

gept.example_en: What size of shoes do you usually wear?
gept.example_zh: 你通常穿幾號的鞋子？

gept.example_en: This shirt is too small for my big brother.
gept.example_zh: 這件襯衫對我哥哥來說太小了。

gept.example_en: I usually buy a medium size jacket from this shop.
gept.example_zh: 我通常在這家店買中號夾克。

gept.example_en: These large socks are great for my tall uncle.
gept.example_zh: 這雙大號襪子很適合我高高的叔叔。

gept.example_en: These red shoes don't fit my little sister anymore.
gept.example_zh: 這雙紅色鞋子已經不適合我妹妹了。

gept.example_en: Please put on your hat before going out into the cold wind.
gept.example_zh: 出去吹冷風前請戴上你的帽子。

gept.example_en: Take off your wet shoes before you come into the house.
gept.example_zh: 進屋之前請脫掉你的濕鞋子。

gept.example_en: I need to change my clothes after running in the park.
gept.example_zh: 我在公園跑步之後需要換衣服。

gept.example_en: I got a new pink dress from my aunt.
gept.example_zh: 我從阿姨那裡得到一件新的粉紅色洋裝。

gept.example_en: My old brown jacket still looks great in winter.
gept.example_zh: 我的舊棕色夾克在冬天看起來還是很好看。

gept.example_en: She has a beautiful long coat for snowy days.
gept.example_zh: 她有一件漂亮的長外套可以在下雪天穿。

gept.example_en: Apples are usually red, but some can be yellow.
gept.example_zh: 蘋果通常是紅色的，但有些可能是黃色的。

gept.example_en: The school bus is bright yellow and easy to see.
gept.example_zh: 校車是亮黃色的，很容易看到。

gept.example_en: The sky looks blue and clear this morning.
gept.example_zh: 今天早上天空看起來又藍又晴朗。

gept.example_en: She picked some pretty purple flowers in the garden.
gept.example_zh: 她在花園裡摘了一些漂亮的紫色花朵。

gept.example_en: My baby cousin loves her pink toy bear very much.
gept.example_zh: 我的小表妹非常喜歡她的粉紅色玩具熊。

gept.example_en: The black cat is sleeping on the warm sofa.
gept.example_zh: 黑貓正在溫暖的沙發上睡覺。

gept.example_en: Look at the white clouds in the sky today.
gept.example_zh: 看看今天天空中的白雲。

gept.example_en: His brown hair looks nice in the afternoon sun.
gept.example_zh: 他的棕色頭髮在下午的陽光下看起來很好看。

gept.example_en: The sky was gray, so I took my umbrella.
gept.example_zh: 天空灰灰的，所以我帶了我的雨傘。

gept.example_en: Grandma's gold ring is very old but still pretty.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶的金戒指很老舊但仍然很漂亮。

gept.example_en: I love this small silver bracelet on my wrist.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡手腕上這只小銀手環。

gept.example_en: He likes to wear dark blue jeans on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在週末穿深藍色的牛仔褲。

gept.example_en: Her bright red coat is easy to see in the snow.
gept.example_zh: 她那鮮紅色的外套在雪中很容易看到。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 多彩的；色彩繽紛的
gept.example_en: The park is full of colorful flowers in spring.
gept.example_zh: 公園在春天充滿了色彩繽紛的花朵。

gept.example_en: I have a math test on Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我星期一早上有數學考試。

gept.example_en: We always play basketball on Tuesday after school.
gept.example_zh: 我們總是在星期二放學後打籃球。

gept.example_en: Dad goes to the gym every Wednesday evening.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸每個星期三晚上都去健身房。

gept.example_en: There is no school on Thursday next week.
gept.example_zh: 下星期四沒有學校（不用上學）。

gept.example_en: On Friday night, we often watch a movie at home.
gept.example_zh: 星期五晚上，我們常常在家看電影。

gept.example_en: My family goes shopping every Saturday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我家每個星期六下午都去逛街。

gept.example_en: We visit our grandparents on Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們星期日早上會去拜訪祖父母。

gept.example_en: My birthday is on the fifth of January.
gept.example_zh: 我的生日是一月五日。

gept.example_en: February is usually the shortest month of the year.
gept.example_zh: 二月通常是一年中最短的月份。

gept.example_en: April brings warm days and beautiful flowers.
gept.example_zh: 四月帶來溫暖的日子和美麗的花朵。

gept.example_en: Mother's Day is in May in many countries.
gept.example_zh: 在許多國家，母親節是在五月。

gept.example_en: School ends in late June every year.
gept.example_zh: 學校每年都在六月底結束。

gept.example_en: We go to the beach almost every weekend in July.
gept.example_zh: 我們七月幾乎每個週末都去海邊。

gept.example_en: August is often the hottest month here.
gept.example_zh: 八月經常是這裡最熱的月份。

gept.example_en: The new school year starts in September.
gept.example_zh: 新的學年在九月開始。

gept.example_en: Leaves turn red and yellow in October.
gept.example_zh: 葉子在十月轉成紅色和黃色。

gept.example_en: It gets colder every day in November here.
gept.example_zh: 這裡十一月一天比一天冷。

gept.example_en: Children love December because of the long holiday.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡十二月，因為有長假。

gept.example_en: There are twelve months in one year.
gept.example_zh: 一年有十二個月。

gept.example_en: My little sister is only one year old.
gept.example_zh: 我的小妹妹只有一歲。

gept.example_en: Today is a beautiful day for a picnic.
gept.example_zh: 今天是個適合野餐的美好日子。

gept.example_en: There are seven days in a week.
gept.example_zh: 一週有七天。

gept.example_en: Today is my best friend's birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 今天是我最好朋友的生日派對。

gept.example_en: We will go to the zoo tomorrow morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們明天早上要去動物園。

gept.example_en: Yesterday I helped my mother in the kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 昨天我在廚房幫媽媽。

gept.example_en: Let's watch a fun movie together tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我們今晚一起看部好玩的電影吧。

gept.example_en: I drink a glass of milk every morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。

gept.example_en: We have music class in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們下午有音樂課。

gept.example_en: My family eats dinner together every evening.
gept.example_zh: 我家每天晚上一起吃晚餐。

gept.example_en: The stars look very bright at night.
gept.example_zh: 星星在夜晚看起來非常明亮。

gept.example_en: It takes me one hour to go to school by bus.
gept.example_zh: 我搭公車去學校要一個小時。

gept.example_en: Please wait for me just one minute.
gept.example_zh: 請等我一分鐘就好。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 秒；(形容詞) 第二的
gept.example_en: There are sixty seconds in one minute.
gept.example_zh: 一分鐘有六十秒。

gept.example_en: What time do you usually go to bed?
gept.example_zh: 你通常什麼時間睡覺？

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/副詞) 早的；早早地
gept.example_en: My dad goes to work very early in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我爸爸早上很早就去上班。

gept.example_en: Please come downstairs now; dinner is ready.
gept.example_zh: 請你現在下樓，晚餐好了。

gept.example_en: First wash your hands, and then sit at the table.
gept.example_zh: 先洗手，然後坐到餐桌旁。

gept.example_en: Brush your teeth before you go to bed.
gept.example_zh: 睡覺前要刷牙。

gept.example_en: We do our homework after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們晚餐後做作業。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 秋天；(動詞) 掉落
gept.example_en: The leaves turn red in the fall.
gept.example_zh: 葉子在秋天會變紅。

gept.example_en: How is the weather today in your town?
gept.example_zh: 今天你們鎮上的天氣如何？

gept.example_en: The rain made our garden green and fresh.
gept.example_zh: 雨讓我們的花園變得又綠又新鮮。

gept.example_en: The children played happily in the snow.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在雪中快樂地玩耍。

gept.example_en: The wind blew my hat off my head.
gept.example_zh: 風把我的帽子從頭上吹掉了。

gept.example_en: That cloud looks just like a big white dog.
gept.example_zh: 那朵雲看起來就像一隻大白狗。

gept.example_en: The sun shines brightly in the summer sky.
gept.example_zh: 太陽在夏天的天空中閃耀著。

gept.example_en: I love walking in the warm sunshine.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡在溫暖的陽光下散步。

gept.example_en: The sky is very blue and clear today.
gept.example_zh: 今天的天空又藍又清澈。

gept.example_en: I can see one bright star in the dark sky.
gept.example_zh: 我可以在黑色天空中看到一顆明亮的星星。

gept.example_en: The full moon looks very big and round tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚的滿月看起來又大又圓。

gept.example_en: The wind feels cool on my face after running.
gept.example_zh: 跑步後風吹在臉上感覺很涼快。

gept.example_en: My shoes got wet in the heavy rain.
gept.example_zh: 我的鞋子在大雨中濕掉了。

gept.example_en: It is a rainy day, so we stay at home.
gept.example_zh: 今天是個下雨天，所以我們待在家。

gept.example_en: I built a snowman on this snowy morning.
gept.example_zh: 我在這個下雪的早晨堆了一個雪人。

gept.example_en: We stayed inside because of the stormy weather.
gept.example_zh: 因為暴風雨天氣，我們待在屋裡。

gept.example_en: Our school holds a yearly sports day in October.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校每年十月舉辦運動會。

gept.example_en: Today is the first day of January.
gept.example_zh: 今天是一月的第一天。

gept.example_en: December is the last month of the year.
gept.example_zh: 十二月是一年的最後一個月。

gept.example_en: I will see my grandma next Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 我下個星期日要去看我奶奶。

gept.example_en: Winter-time is great for drinking hot soup at home.
gept.example_zh: 冬季時節很適合在家喝熱湯。

gept.example_en: Summertime is the best time for ice cream.
gept.example_zh: 夏季時節是吃冰淇淋的最佳時光。

gept.example_en: Many flowers open up during springtime.
gept.example_zh: 許多花在春季時節綻放。

gept.example_en: She picked a nice outfit for the school show.
gept.example_zh: 她為學校表演挑了一套不錯的服裝。

gept.example_en: I like the style of your new red dress.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡你新紅洋裝的樣式。

gept.example_en: Yellow is my favorite color for clothes.
gept.example_zh: 黃色是我最喜歡的衣服顏色。

gept.example_en: She wore a pretty white dress to the party.
gept.example_zh: 她穿了一件漂亮的白色洋裝去派對。

gept.example_en: Some people think this hat is ugly, but I like it.
gept.example_zh: 有些人覺得這頂帽子很醜，但我喜歡。

gept.example_en: She wore a small round hat on her head.
gept.example_zh: 她頭上戴了一頂小圓帽。

gept.example_en: These shoes are too tight for my feet now.
gept.example_zh: 這雙鞋現在對我的腳來說太緊了。

gept.example_en: His pants are a little loose around his waist.
gept.example_zh: 他的褲子腰部有點鬆。

gept.example_en: The shop sells children's swimwear in many colors.
gept.example_zh: 這家店賣許多顏色的兒童泳裝。

gept.example_en: Please change your underwear every day.
gept.example_zh: 請每天換內衣褲。

gept.example_en: My school uniform is navy and white.
gept.example_zh: 我的校服是海軍藍和白色的。

gept.example_en: Her beige coat looks nice with brown boots.
gept.example_zh: 她的米色外套配棕色靴子很好看。

gept.example_en: He bought a pair of tan leather shoes.
gept.example_zh: 他買了一雙棕褐色的皮鞋。

gept.example_en: I love your sky-blue dress.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡你那件天藍色的洋裝。

gept.example_en: He bought shiny black shoes for the wedding.
gept.example_zh: 他買了閃亮的黑皮鞋去參加婚禮。

gept.example_en: I like the red stripe on his blue shirt.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡他藍襯衫上的紅色條紋。

gept.example_en: Her white skirt has many small black dots.
gept.example_zh: 她的白色裙子上有許多小黑點。

gept.example_en: This shirt has a nice flower pattern on it.
gept.example_zh: 這件襯衫上有一個漂亮的花朵圖案。

gept.example_en: It is very hot at midday in July.
gept.example_zh: 七月正午很熱。

gept.example_en: Please wait a moment; I am almost ready.
gept.example_zh: 請等我一下，我快準備好了。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 適合穿雨衣的日子
gept.example_en: Today is a real raincoat-day, look at the sky.
gept.example_zh: 今天真是個要穿雨衣的日子，看看那天空。

gept.example_en: We collect rainwater for the garden plants.
gept.example_zh: 我們收集雨水給花園的植物用。

gept.example_en: I love the raindrop-sound on the window at night.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡晚上窗上的雨滴聲。

gept.example_en: The weatherman said it will rain tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 氣象播報員說明天會下雨。

gept.example_en: Please put your wet umbrella in the umbrella-stand.
gept.example_zh: 請把你的濕雨傘放進傘架。

gept.example_en: Leave your jacket in the coatroom before the show.
gept.example_zh: 看表演前請把外套留在衣帽間。

gept.example_en: Brushing teeth is an everyday habit.
gept.example_zh: 刷牙是一個日常的習慣。

gept.example_en: I make a weekly-plan every Sunday night.
gept.example_zh: 我每個星期日晚上做週計畫。

gept.example_en: I have a doctor's appointment on Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我星期五有個看醫生的約。

gept.example_en: I saw him five minutes ago.
gept.example_zh: 我五分鐘前看到他。

gept.example_en: I will call you back later tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我今晚稍後回你電話。

gept.example_en: Don't talk during the music class.
gept.example_zh: 音樂課期間不要說話。

gept.example_en: I will wait here until you come back.
gept.example_zh: 我會在這裡等到你回來。

gept.example_en: She always wears red shoes to school.
gept.example_zh: 她總是穿紅鞋去學校。

gept.example_en: We often go hiking on Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 我們經常在星期日去健行。

gept.example_en: Sometimes it snows here in December.
gept.example_zh: 這裡有時候十二月會下雪。

gept.example_en: I never wear shorts in winter.
gept.example_zh: 我從不在冬天穿短褲。

gept.example_en: I usually go to bed at ten o'clock.
gept.example_zh: 我通常十點上床睡覺。

gept.example_en: He put on his coat quickly and ran outside.
gept.example_zh: 他快速穿上外套就跑了出去。

gept.example_en: The sun rises slowly in winter.
gept.example_zh: 太陽在冬天升起得很慢。

gept.example_en: It is almost time for our music class.
gept.example_zh: 差不多到我們的音樂課時間了。

gept.example_en: I am already wearing my warm coat.
gept.example_zh: 我已經穿上溫暖的外套了。

gept.example_en: It is not winter yet, but it feels cold.
gept.example_zh: 還沒到冬天，但感覺很冷。

gept.example_en: It is still raining outside, so stay inside.
gept.example_zh: 外面仍然在下雨，所以待在屋裡。

gept.example_en: Look! It is snowing again this morning.
gept.example_zh: 看！今天早上又下雪了。

gept.example_en: We have art class twice a week.
gept.example_zh: 我們一週上兩次美術課。

gept.example_en: I visit my grandparents once a month.
gept.example_zh: 我每個月去看祖父母一次。

gept.example_en: In the future, I want to be a doctor.
gept.example_zh: 未來我想成為醫生。

gept.example_en: Grandma told us many stories about the past.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶告訴我們許多過去的故事。

gept.example_en: Today is a bright-day for playing outside.
gept.example_zh: 今天是個適合在外面玩的明亮日子。

gept.example_en: I added an iron-on star to my t-shirt.
gept.example_zh: 我在我的 T 恤上燙了一顆星星貼片。

gept.example_en: Wear a sun-hat at the beach today.
gept.example_zh: 今天在海邊請戴遮陽帽。

gept.example_en: Grandma made me a warm-hat for the snow.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶為我做了一頂保暖帽過雪天。

gept.example_en: I need new winter-boots before December.
gept.example_zh: 我十二月之前需要新的冬靴。

gept.example_en: My rain-boots are yellow with black dots.
gept.example_zh: 我的雨靴是黃色帶黑點。

gept.example_en: We had a snow-day, so school was closed.
gept.example_zh: 今天是雪天放假日，所以學校沒開。

gept.example_en: Books are great for a rainy-day at home.
gept.example_zh: 書本最適合在家度過雨天。

gept.example_en: We put a big sunshade on the beach.
gept.example_zh: 我們在海灘上撐了一把大遮陽傘。

gept.example_en: Kids love to puddle-jump after a rain.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們喜歡雨後踩水坑。

gept.example_en: I love a strawberry snow-cone in summer.
gept.example_zh: 我喜歡夏天吃草莓剉冰。

gept.example_en: I go to summer-camp every July.
gept.example_zh: 我每年七月去參加夏令營。

gept.example_en: Our winter-break starts next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 我們的寒假從下星期一開始。

gept.example_en: We visit grandma during spring-break.
gept.example_zh: 我們春假時去看奶奶。

gept.example_en: The autumn-leaves cover the park path.
gept.example_zh: 秋葉覆蓋了公園的小路。

gept.example_en: Our class held a small fashion-show today.
gept.example_zh: 我們班今天辦了一個小型時裝秀。

gept.example_en: If it rains today, our raindate is Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 如果今天下雨，我們的雨備日是星期日。

gept.example_en: Monday is the first schoolday of the week.
gept.example_zh: 星期一是一週的第一個上學日。

gept.example_en: We have a playdate at the park on Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 我們星期六在公園有個玩耍的約會。

gept.example_en: A dark raincloud is coming over the hill.
gept.example_zh: 一朵黑色的雨雲正越過山頭。

gept.example_en: We were caught in a sudden cloudburst.
gept.example_zh: 我們遇到一場突然的傾盆大雨。

gept.example_en: A tiny dewdrop sat on the green leaf.
gept.example_zh: 一顆小露珠停在綠色葉子上。

gept.example_en: We took a weekend-trip to the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 我們做了一次週末山區旅行。

gept.example_en: The hotel gave us a six o'clock morning-call.
gept.example_zh: 飯店給我們六點的晨間叫醒電話。

gept.example_en: My school-uniform is blue and white.
gept.example_zh: 我的校服是藍色和白色。

gept.example_en: She wears a pink ribbon-tie with her uniform.
gept.example_zh: 她搭配校服戴一個粉紅蝴蝶結領帶。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 適合戴圍巾的天氣
gept.example_en: It feels cold; today is a real scarf-day.
gept.example_zh: 感覺很冷，今天真是個適合戴圍巾的日子。

gept.example_en: What a perfect sun-day for the beach trip.
gept.example_zh: 去海邊旅行的完美晴天。

gept.example_en: We sang songs together on a snowy-night.
gept.example_zh: 我們在雪夜一起唱歌。

gept.example_en: On a hot-day we drink lots of cold water.
gept.example_zh: 炎熱的日子我們喝很多冷水。

gept.example_en: We sit by the fire on a cold-night.
gept.example_zh: 寒冷的夜晚我們坐在火爐旁。

gept.example_en: A gentle spring-rain helps the flowers grow.
gept.example_zh: 溫柔的春雨幫助花朵生長。

gept.example_en: She drew a rainbow with her color-pencil set.
gept.example_zh: 她用她的彩色鉛筆畫了一道彩虹。

gept.example_en: Her color-block dress has red and white parts.
gept.example_zh: 她的色塊洋裝有紅色和白色部分。

gept.example_en: We had a fun pajama-party at my friend's house.
gept.example_zh: 我們在朋友家辦了一個好玩的睡衣派對。

gept.example_en: Pack your warm-clothes for the mountain trip.
gept.example_zh: 山區旅行請帶上保暖衣物。

gept.example_en: Her light summer-dress feels very cool.
gept.example_zh: 她那輕薄的夏季洋裝穿起來很涼快。

gept.example_en: I need a thick winter-coat for January.
gept.example_zh: 我一月份需要一件厚的冬季外套。

gept.example_en: He wore a yellow rain-hat to school today.
gept.example_zh: 他今天戴一頂黃色防雨帽去學校。

gept.example_en: Put on your snow-pants before we go sledding.
gept.example_zh: 我們去滑雪橇前穿上你的雪褲。

gept.example_en: A light spring-jacket is good for cool mornings.
gept.example_zh: 輕薄的春季夾克適合涼爽的早晨。

gept.example_en: Don't forget your summer-hat for the picnic.
gept.example_zh: 野餐時別忘了你的夏季帽。

gept.example_en: We saw a big weather-map on the TV news.
gept.example_zh: 我們在電視新聞上看到一張大氣象圖。

gept.example_en: I keep my reading glasses in a glasses-case.
gept.example_zh: 我把老花眼鏡放在眼鏡盒裡。

gept.example_en: He wore rain-pants while walking to school.
gept.example_zh: 他走路上學時穿了雨褲。

gept.example_en: Mom keeps her jewelry in a small box.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把她的首飾放在一個小盒子裡。

gept.example_en: I put my old toys in a brown shoebox.
gept.example_zh: 我把舊玩具放在一個棕色鞋盒裡。

gept.example_en: We bought sneakers at the new shoe-store.
gept.example_zh: 我們在新開的鞋店買了球鞋。

gept.example_en: Her favorite clothes-shop has summer dresses on sale.
gept.example_zh: 她最愛的服裝店正在特價夏季洋裝。

gept.example_en: The color-mix on this shirt is very pretty.
gept.example_zh: 這件襯衫的顏色混合很漂亮。

gept.example_en: The bright summer-sun made everyone wear a hat.
gept.example_zh: 明亮的夏日陽光讓每個人都戴上帽子。

gept.example_en: Grandpa gave me a small snow-globe for Christmas.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺給我一個小雪花玻璃球當聖誕禮物。

gept.example_en: The first snow-fall of the year was very light.
gept.example_zh: 今年的第一場降雪很小。

gept.example_en: The rainy-season in May brings lots of rain.
gept.example_zh: 五月的雨季帶來很多雨水。

gept.example_en: Many leaves fall during the dry-season.
gept.example_zh: 乾季時許多葉子會掉落。

gept.example_en: I wear a thick wool-hat in winter.
gept.example_zh: 我冬天戴一頂厚羊毛帽。

gept.example_en: She has a beautiful red silk-scarf from Paris.
gept.example_zh: 她有一條來自巴黎的漂亮紅色絲巾。

gept.example_en: The teacher showed us a color-chart in art class.
gept.example_zh: 老師在美術課上給我們看一張色卡。

gept.example_en: The white rabbit eats carrots and fresh green leaves every day.
gept.example_zh: 那隻白兔每天吃紅蘿蔔和新鮮的綠葉。

gept.example_en: He keeps a small turtle pet in a glass tank by the window.
gept.example_zh: 他在窗邊的玻璃箱裡養著一隻小寵物烏龜。

gept.example_en: The fish tank has many colorful stones and a tiny toy castle inside.
gept.example_zh: 魚缸裡有許多彩色石頭和一個小小的玩具城堡。

gept.example_en: Please fill the dog's water bowl before you leave for school today.
gept.example_zh: 請在你今天去上學之前先把狗碗的水裝滿。

gept.example_en: The cat sat next to the empty food bowl and looked at me sadly.
gept.example_zh: 貓坐在空食物碗旁邊，難過地看著我。

gept.example_en: We saw many cute puppies and birds at the new pet shop downtown.
gept.example_zh: 我們在市中心的新寵物店看到許多可愛的小狗和鳥。

gept.example_en: My cat has soft gray fur and bright green eyes.
gept.example_zh: 我的貓有柔軟的灰毛和明亮的綠眼睛。

gept.example_en: The puppy lifted its small paw and put it on my hand.
gept.example_zh: 小狗抬起牠的小爪子放在我的手上。

gept.example_en: My dog wags its tail very fast when I come home from school.
gept.example_zh: 我放學回家時，我的狗會快速地搖著尾巴。

gept.example_en: The rabbit's long ear is soft and warm when I gently touch it.
gept.example_zh: 輕輕摸的時候，兔子的長耳朵又軟又暖。

gept.example_en: Happy dogs always wag their tails when they see their friends.
gept.example_zh: 快樂的狗看到朋友時總是會搖尾巴。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 吠叫；(名詞) 吠聲
gept.example_en: The neighbor's dog likes to bark at the postman in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居的狗喜歡在早上對郵差吠叫。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 喵喵叫；(名詞) 喵聲
gept.example_en: Kittens meow loudly when they are hungry or want some attention.
gept.example_zh: 小貓肚子餓或想要人陪時會大聲喵喵叫。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 啾啾叫；(名詞) 鳥叫聲
gept.example_en: Little birds chirp outside my window very early in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 小鳥一大早就在我的窗外啾啾叫。

gept.example_en: The cat starts to purr when she sits on my warm lap.
gept.example_zh: 那隻貓坐在我溫暖的腿上時就開始咕嚕咕嚕叫。

gept.example_en: The little rabbit can hop across the garden in just a few seconds.
gept.example_zh: 那隻小兔子可以在幾秒內跳過整個花園。

gept.example_en: My dog loves to fetch the small yellow ball in the park.
gept.example_zh: 我的狗喜歡在公園裡撿回小黃球。

gept.example_en: The dog likes to sniff every new tree along the street.
gept.example_zh: 那隻狗喜歡聞街上每一棵新的樹。

gept.example_en: My cat loves to chase a little red dot from a small toy.
gept.example_zh: 我的貓喜歡追一個小玩具射出的紅點。

gept.example_en: My little brother loves to cuddle his new puppy on the soft sofa.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟喜歡在軟沙發上抱著他的新小狗。

gept.example_en: We take our cat to the vet for a checkup once every year.
gept.example_zh: 我們每年帶貓去獸醫那裡做一次健康檢查。

gept.example_en: The little bird shakes its wing and flies up to the high tree.
gept.example_zh: 小鳥拍動翅膀，飛上高高的樹。

gept.example_en: She rides her blue bicycle to school every sunny morning.
gept.example_zh: 她每個晴朗的早晨都騎著藍色腳踏車上學。

gept.example_en: Many people run around the park every morning before going to work.
gept.example_zh: 許多人每天上班前都會繞著公園跑步。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 走路；(名詞) 散步
gept.example_en: We walk to the small park near our house every evening after dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們每天晚餐後都走路到家附近的小公園。

gept.example_en: Many kids skip rope on the playground during their lunch break.
gept.example_zh: 許多小朋友會在午休時間在操場上跳繩。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 跳繩；(動詞片語) 跳繩
gept.example_en: She bought a pink jump rope at the small toy shop yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 她昨天在小玩具店買了一條粉紅色的跳繩。

gept.example_en: We fly a colorful kite in the open field on a windy Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 我們在多風的星期天，在空地上放一支彩色風箏。

gept.example_en: Dad and I always fly a kite together at the beach in summer.
gept.example_zh: 夏天時，爸爸總是和我一起在海邊放風箏。

gept.example_en: My little brother loves the new toy he got for his birthday.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟很喜歡他生日時拿到的新玩具。

gept.example_en: My sister has a small doll with long brown hair and a pink dress.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹有一個小洋娃娃，留著長棕髮，穿著粉紅洋裝。

gept.example_en: We hang many red balloons in the room for the birthday party.
gept.example_zh: 我們在房間裡掛了許多紅氣球來辦生日派對。

gept.example_en: My father has a large box of old stamps from many different countries.
gept.example_zh: 我爸爸有一大盒來自不同國家的舊郵票。

gept.example_en: Many children love to collect small toy cars or pretty stickers.
gept.example_zh: 許多孩子喜歡收集小玩具車或漂亮的貼紙。

gept.example_en: He shows me his big stamp collection every time I visit his home.
gept.example_zh: 每次我去他家，他都拿出他龐大的郵票收藏給我看。

gept.example_en: Reading comic books is my favorite hobby on rainy weekend afternoons.
gept.example_zh: 在下雨的週末下午看漫畫書是我最喜愛的嗜好。

gept.example_en: Mom reads a short story book to my little sister every night.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽每晚都讀一本短短的故事書給我妹妹聽。

gept.example_en: We watch a fun movie together as a family every Friday night.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週五晚上全家一起看一部好玩的電影。

gept.example_en: My little brother turns on the cartoon channel before breakfast every day.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟每天早餐前都會打開卡通頻道。

gept.example_en: We do not watch tv during dinner because it is our family rule.
gept.example_zh: 吃晚餐時我們不看電視，因為這是我們家的規定。

gept.example_en: The art teacher gave each child a new paint brush and a white paper.
gept.example_zh: 美術老師給每個孩子一支新畫筆和一張白紙。

gept.example_en: We finish a hundred-piece puzzle game together on a quiet Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們在安靜的週日下午一起拼完一百片的拼圖。

gept.example_en: My family plays a simple card game on holiday nights together.
gept.example_zh: 我家在假日的晚上會一起玩簡單的紙牌遊戲。

gept.example_en: We watched an exciting ball game on tv after school yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 昨天放學後我們看了一場精彩的球賽。

gept.example_en: He bought a new black and white soccer ball at the small sports shop.
gept.example_zh: 他在那家小運動用品店買了一顆全新的黑白足球。

gept.example_en: The basketball court near my school is open from early morning to night.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校附近的籃球場從清晨開到晚上。

gept.example_en: Basketball is a fun team game that needs five players on each side.
gept.example_zh: 籃球是一項有趣的團體運動，每隊需要五位球員。

gept.example_en: Every soccer player on our team works hard during training each week.
gept.example_zh: 我們隊上每一位足球員每週都很努力訓練。

gept.example_en: The winner of the running race got a small gold medal from the teacher.
gept.example_zh: 賽跑的冠軍從老師那裡拿到了一面小金牌。

gept.example_en: Even the loser of the friendly game smiled and shook hands at the end.
gept.example_zh: 就連友誼賽的輸家最後也帶著微笑握手。

gept.example_en: Our team got the last point and won the basketball game by two.
gept.example_zh: 我們隊拿下最後一分，以兩分之差贏了那場籃球賽。

gept.example_en: The small child wears a big swim ring in the shallow water.
gept.example_zh: 那個小小孩在淺水區裡戴著一個大游泳圈。

gept.example_en: We often visit the public swim pool in our city on hot summer days.
gept.example_zh: 炎熱的夏日，我們常去市裡的公共游泳池。

gept.example_en: She packed her new blue swim suit and a big towel for the beach.
gept.example_zh: 她把新的藍色泳衣和一條大毛巾打包到海邊去。

gept.example_en: The children play with a big colorful beach ball on the soft sand.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在柔軟的沙地上玩一顆又大又彩色的沙灘球。

gept.example_en: We build a small sandcastle with my little sister near the gentle waves.
gept.example_zh: 我們和小妹妹在和緩的海浪邊堆了一座小沙堡。

gept.example_en: He uses a small plastic shovel toy to dig holes in the soft sand.
gept.example_zh: 他用一支小塑膠玩具鏟子在軟沙裡挖洞。

gept.example_en: Boys love to kick ball in the open field after school each day.
gept.example_zh: 男孩們每天放學後喜歡在空地上踢球。

gept.example_en: Please throw the ball to me and I will throw it back to you.
gept.example_zh: 請把球丟給我，我會再把球丟回給你。

gept.example_en: He tries to catch the small ball with both hands every single time.
gept.example_zh: 他每一次都試著用雙手接住那顆小球。

gept.example_en: The new ball can bounce very high on the hard road.
gept.example_zh: 這顆新球可以在硬路面上彈得很高。

gept.example_en: Mom bought me a pair of light running shoes for my new gym class.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽為我新的體育課買了一雙輕便的跑鞋。

gept.example_en: He puts on his blue sportswear before going to morning football practice.
gept.example_zh: 他在早上的足球練習前穿上藍色的運動服。

gept.example_en: Please stretch out your arms and legs before you start to run.
gept.example_zh: 在你開始跑步之前，請先把手臂和腿伸展開來。

gept.example_en: We do sports at school three times every week with our gym teacher.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週和體育老師在學校做三次運動。

gept.example_en: The kids play game after game on the playground all afternoon long.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們整個下午都在操場上一場接一場地玩遊戲。

gept.example_en: An old man sits on a park bench and reads his newspaper quietly.
gept.example_zh: 一位老先生坐在公園長椅上安靜地看報紙。

gept.example_en: Many small fish swim in the round pond at the center of the park.
gept.example_zh: 公園中央的圓池塘裡有許多小魚在游。

gept.example_en: We feed the ducks at the duck pond every Saturday morning together.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個星期六早上一起在鴨子池塘餵鴨子。

gept.example_en: My little sister loves to sit on the swing park near our home.
gept.example_zh: 我妹妹喜歡坐在我們家附近的公園鞦韆上。

gept.example_en: The slide park is yellow and red and very popular with young kids.
gept.example_zh: 那個公園滑梯是黃紅色的，很受小朋友歡迎。

gept.example_en: Two children sit on the seesaw and go up and down for fun.
gept.example_zh: 兩個孩子坐在翹翹板上開心地上下擺動。

gept.example_en: The merry-go-round in the park plays soft music for the children.
gept.example_zh: 公園裡的旋轉木馬會播放輕柔的音樂給小朋友聽。

gept.example_en: We spread a red picnic mat on the grass and started to eat lunch.
gept.example_zh: 我們在草地上鋪了一塊紅色野餐墊，然後開始吃午餐。

gept.example_en: Mom packed sandwiches and juice into a big brown picnic basket.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽把三明治和果汁裝進一個棕色的大野餐籃裡。

gept.example_en: We visit the zoo on the first Saturday of every month with grandpa.
gept.example_zh: 我們每個月的第一個星期六都和爺爺一起去動物園。

gept.example_en: My uncle has a small farm with many sheep and two big cows.
gept.example_zh: 我叔叔有一座小農場，養了許多綿羊和兩頭大牛。

gept.example_en: The garden park has many beautiful flowers in the spring and summer.
gept.example_zh: 這個花園公園在春夏兩季有許多漂亮的花。

gept.example_en: We go to the beach with our friends every summer for two long weeks.
gept.example_zh: 我們每年夏天都和朋友一起去海灘待整整兩個星期。

gept.example_en: A small river runs slowly through the green countryside near my hometown.
gept.example_zh: 一條小河緩緩地流過我家鄉附近的綠色鄉間。

gept.example_en: The lake near our school looks blue and calm in the warm sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校附近的湖在溫暖的陽光下又藍又安靜。

gept.example_en: We can see the bright blue sea from our hotel window.
gept.example_zh: 我們可以從旅館窗戶看到湛藍的大海。

gept.example_en: The ocean is very wide and full of many different kinds of fish.
gept.example_zh: 海洋非常寬廣，裡面有許多不同種類的魚。

gept.example_en: From my bedroom window I can see a tall green mountain in the distance.
gept.example_zh: 從我的臥室窗戶可以看到遠方一座高大的綠山。

gept.example_en: We walk up the small hill behind our house every Sunday morning.
gept.example_zh: 每個星期天早上我們都會爬上家後面的那座小山。

gept.example_en: A small green forest stands behind the village near a clear river.
gept.example_zh: 村子後面有一片小綠林，旁邊有一條清澈的河。

gept.example_en: My grandparents live in a quiet small village far from the big city.
gept.example_zh: 我祖父母住在離大城市很遠的一座寧靜小村莊裡。

gept.example_en: The company uses applicant tracking to organize hundreds of resumes for each job posting.
gept.example_zh: 公司使用應徵者追蹤系統來整理每個職缺的數百份履歷。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 求職網／職缺公告版
gept.example_en: I found this opening on a popular job board last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我上週末在一個熱門的求職網上找到這個職缺。

gept.example_en: Please read the job posting carefully before sending your application.
gept.example_zh: 請在送出申請前仔細閱讀職缺公告。

gept.example_en: Many job seekers attend the career fair to meet potential employers.
gept.example_zh: 許多求職者參加就業博覽會以結識潛在雇主。

gept.example_en: She accepted the job offer after thinking about it for two days.
gept.example_zh: 她考慮了兩天後接受了那份工作邀約。

gept.example_en: Please explain your job role and main duties in detail.
gept.example_zh: 請詳細說明你的工作角色與主要職責。

gept.example_en: The job market for software engineers is very strong this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年軟體工程師的就業市場非常強勁。

gept.example_en: Many people choose government jobs for the job security they provide.
gept.example_zh: 許多人選擇公職是為了它提供的工作保障。

gept.example_en: Good colleagues and fair pay greatly improve job satisfaction at any company.
gept.example_zh: 好同事與合理薪資能大幅提升任何公司的工作滿意度。

gept.example_en: He planned a clear career path before applying to graduate school.
gept.example_zh: 他在申請研究所之前規劃了清晰的職業路徑。

gept.example_en: After ten years in banking, she made a career change to teaching.
gept.example_zh: 在銀行業工作十年後，她轉行去教書。

gept.example_en: Setting clear career goals helps young workers stay motivated and focused.
gept.example_zh: 設定明確的職業目標有助於年輕工作者保持動力與專注。

gept.example_en: The university provides a career counselor to help students find suitable jobs.
gept.example_zh: 大學提供職涯顧問來協助學生找到合適的工作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 工作文化／職場文化
gept.example_en: The new manager wants to build a positive work culture in our team.
gept.example_zh: 新主管想要在我們團隊中建立正向的工作文化。

gept.example_en: A clean and quiet work environment helps employees concentrate on their tasks.
gept.example_zh: 乾淨安靜的工作環境有助於員工專注於工作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 職業道德／敬業精神
gept.example_en: Her strong work ethic impressed everyone during her first month.
gept.example_zh: 她強烈的敬業精神在第一個月就讓所有人印象深刻。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 工作經歷／工作經驗
gept.example_en: List your relevant work experience at the top of your resume.
gept.example_zh: 把相關工作經歷列在履歷最上方。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 工作經歷／職場歷程
gept.example_en: The interviewer asked about my work history for the past five years.
gept.example_zh: 面試官詢問了我過去五年的工作經歷。

gept.example_en: Foreign engineers must apply for a work permit before starting their job.
gept.example_zh: 外籍工程師必須在開始工作前申請工作許可。

gept.example_en: Our working hours are from nine in the morning until six in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 我們的工作時間是早上九點到傍晚六點。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 上班時間／辦公時間
gept.example_en: Please call during office hours if you need to speak with the manager.
gept.example_zh: 如果你需要與經理通話，請在辦公時間打電話。

gept.example_en: The bank's business hours are listed clearly on the front door.
gept.example_zh: 銀行的營業時間清楚地寫在大門上。

gept.example_en: Let's continue this discussion after a short coffee break.
gept.example_zh: 讓我們在短暫的咖啡休息後繼續這個討論。

gept.example_en: She took two days of sick leave because of a high fever.
gept.example_zh: 因為發高燒，她請了兩天病假。

gept.example_en: Employees receive fifteen days of annual leave after one year of service.
gept.example_zh: 員工服務滿一年後可獲得十五天的年假。

gept.example_en: Most full-time workers get two weeks of paid leave every year.
gept.example_zh: 大多數全職員工每年有兩週的有薪假。

gept.example_en: He requested unpaid leave to care for his elderly mother.
gept.example_zh: 他申請無薪假以照顧年邁的母親。

gept.example_en: Both mothers and fathers are entitled to parental leave at our company.
gept.example_zh: 在我們公司，父親和母親都有權申請育嬰假。

gept.example_en: She will return to work after her three-month maternity leave.
gept.example_zh: 她在三個月的產假結束後會回來工作。

gept.example_en: He took paternity leave to help with his newborn son.
gept.example_zh: 他請了陪產假來幫忙照顧剛出生的兒子。

gept.example_en: I have a day off tomorrow, so let's go hiking together.
gept.example_zh: 我明天放假，我們一起去健行吧。

gept.example_en: She needs some time off after that long and stressful project.
gept.example_zh: 在那個漫長又緊張的專案之後，她需要一些休假時間。

gept.example_en: He used a personal day to handle some family business.
gept.example_zh: 他請了一天事假來處理家裡的事。

gept.example_en: Workers receive overtime pay for hours beyond their normal schedule.
gept.example_zh: 員工超過正常工時的部分可以領加班費。

gept.example_en: His base salary is reasonable, but the bonuses make it really attractive.
gept.example_zh: 他的底薪合理，但獎金讓整體待遇相當吸引人。

gept.example_en: The starting salary for new graduates has risen slightly this year.
gept.example_zh: 今年新畢業生的起薪略有上升。

gept.example_en: Her monthly salary is enough to cover rent and basic expenses.
gept.example_zh: 她的月薪足以支付房租和基本開銷。

gept.example_en: His yearly salary increased after he was promoted to senior engineer.
gept.example_zh: 他升為資深工程師後年薪增加了。

gept.example_en: Please write down your annual income before tax on this form.
gept.example_zh: 請在這份表格上寫下你稅前的年收入。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 實領薪資／到手薪資
gept.example_en: After tax and insurance, her take-home pay is about forty thousand.
gept.example_zh: 扣除稅金和保險後，她的實領薪資大約四萬元。

gept.example_en: She got a small pay raise after working hard for the whole year.
gept.example_zh: 辛苦工作一整年後，她獲得了一點小幅加薪。

gept.example_en: The company asked everyone to accept a temporary pay cut last spring.
gept.example_zh: 去年春天公司要求大家暫時接受減薪。

gept.example_en: The salary range for this position is clearly listed in the advertisement.
gept.example_zh: 這個職位的薪資範圍清楚地列在廣告上。

gept.example_en: Salary negotiation can feel uncomfortable, but it is a very important skill.
gept.example_zh: 薪資談判可能讓人不自在，但卻是非常重要的技能。

gept.example_en: The interviewer asked about my salary expectation near the end.
gept.example_zh: 面試官在快結束時詢問了我的期望薪資。

gept.example_en: Part-time staff are paid at an hourly rate set by the manager.
gept.example_zh: 兼職人員依經理設定的時薪領薪水。

gept.example_en: Many students work jobs that pay an hourly wage during summer break.
gept.example_zh: 許多學生暑假期間做按時計酬的工作。

gept.example_en: Construction workers here usually receive a daily wage paid in cash.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的建築工人通常領取現金支付的日薪。

gept.example_en: Her monthly wage is just enough to support her small family.
gept.example_zh: 她的月薪剛好夠養活她的小家庭。

gept.example_en: Everyone is excited about the year-end bonus this December.
gept.example_zh: 大家對今年十二月的年終獎金都很期待。

gept.example_en: Sales staff can earn a large performance bonus when they exceed targets.
gept.example_zh: 業務人員超過目標時可以賺到豐厚的績效獎金。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 節日獎金／節慶紅利
gept.example_en: The boss gave out holiday bonuses to thank everyone for their hard work.
gept.example_zh: 老闆發放節日獎金，感謝大家辛勤的付出。

gept.example_en: Good employee benefits often matter more than slightly higher pay.
gept.example_zh: 良好的員工福利往往比稍高的薪水更重要。

gept.example_en: Free meals and gym access are common fringe benefits at tech firms.
gept.example_zh: 免費餐點和健身房使用權是科技公司常見的附加福利。

gept.example_en: Our company offers a small meal allowance for staff who work late.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司為加班員工提供少量的餐費津貼。

gept.example_en: He receives a monthly transportation allowance because he visits clients often.
gept.example_zh: 因為他經常拜訪客戶，每月會領取交通津貼。

gept.example_en: Some companies offer a housing allowance to employees relocating from abroad.
gept.example_zh: 有些公司會提供住房津貼給從國外調職而來的員工。

gept.example_en: The travel allowance covers your flights, hotel, and daily meals.
gept.example_zh: 這份差旅津貼包含你的機票、飯店與每日餐費。

gept.example_en: Dental insurance covers cleanings, fillings, and most basic procedures.
gept.example_zh: 牙科保險涵蓋洗牙、補牙以及大多數基本療程。

gept.example_en: The labor union met with managers to discuss safer working conditions.
gept.example_zh: 工會與管理層會面討論更安全的工作條件。

gept.example_en: Labor law protects workers from unfair dismissal and unsafe conditions.
gept.example_zh: 勞動法保護勞工免於不公平解雇和不安全的工作環境。

gept.example_en: The restaurant industry is facing a serious labor shortage this year.
gept.example_zh: 餐飲業今年面臨嚴重的勞動力短缺。

gept.example_en: Many factories report a growing workforce gap for skilled technicians.
gept.example_zh: 許多工廠回報技術人員的勞動力缺口正在擴大。

gept.example_en: Universities help companies build a strong talent pipeline for the future.
gept.example_zh: 大學協助公司為未來建立強大的人才管道。

gept.example_en: Engineering firms often complain about the talent shortage in this region.
gept.example_zh: 工程公司經常抱怨這個地區的人才短缺。

gept.example_en: Our HR team is doing a global talent search for the new lab.
gept.example_zh: 我們的人資團隊正在為新實驗室進行全球人才搜尋。

gept.example_en: Please send your contract questions to the human resources department.
gept.example_zh: 請將合約相關問題寄到人力資源部門。

gept.example_en: The HR manager will contact you to schedule a second interview.
gept.example_zh: 人資經理會聯絡你安排第二次面試。

gept.example_en: The hiring committee will review all resumes by the end of this week.
gept.example_zh: 招聘委員會將在本週末前審閱所有履歷。

gept.example_en: Our hiring process usually takes about three to four weeks total.
gept.example_zh: 我們的招募流程通常總共需要約三到四週。

gept.example_en: The company announced a hiring freeze due to falling sales.
gept.example_zh: 公司因銷售下滑宣布凍結招聘。

gept.example_en: The screening interview is usually a short phone call with a recruiter.
gept.example_zh: 初步篩選面試通常是與招募人員的短暫電話通話。

gept.example_en: My phone screen lasted about thirty minutes and felt quite friendly.
gept.example_zh: 我的電話初試持續了約三十分鐘，感覺相當友善。

gept.example_en: Make sure your internet works well before the video interview begins.
gept.example_zh: 在視訊面試開始前，請確認你的網路穩定。

gept.example_en: A panel interview means several managers ask you questions at once.
gept.example_zh: 多人小組面試表示幾位主管同時對你提問。

gept.example_en: The group interview tested how well candidates worked with each other.
gept.example_zh: 團體面試測試了應徵者之間的合作能力。

gept.example_en: I have a second-round interview with the senior director next Tuesday.
gept.example_zh: 下週二我和資深主管有第二輪面試。

gept.example_en: Only three candidates made it to the final interview round.
gept.example_zh: 只有三位候選人進入最終面試。

gept.example_en: A mock interview with a friend can boost your confidence a lot.
gept.example_zh: 與朋友進行模擬面試可以大大提升你的信心。

gept.example_en: Prepare honest answers to common interview questions before the big day.
gept.example_zh: 在重要日子之前，先針對常見面試問題準備誠實的答案。

gept.example_en: One useful interview tip is to arrive ten minutes early.
gept.example_zh: 一個實用的面試小訣竅是提早十分鐘到達。

gept.example_en: The interview panel included two managers and the team leader.
gept.example_zh: 面試評審團包含兩位主管和團隊組長。

gept.example_en: Choose an interview outfit that looks neat and professional.
gept.example_zh: 選擇看起來整潔且專業的面試服裝。

gept.example_en: Proper interview attire shows respect for the company and the interviewer.
gept.example_zh: 得體的面試穿著顯示出對公司與面試官的尊重。

gept.example_en: He ironed a clean dress shirt the night before his interview.
gept.example_zh: 面試前一晚他把乾淨的正裝襯衫熨好。

gept.example_en: His silver tie clip matched the buttons on his jacket perfectly.
gept.example_zh: 他的銀色領帶夾與外套上的鈕扣完美搭配。

gept.example_en: She handed me her name card with both hands at the meeting.
gept.example_zh: 她在會議上用雙手把名片遞給我。

gept.example_en: Please attach a cover sheet that lists all enclosed documents.
gept.example_zh: 請附上一張列出所有附件的封面表單。

gept.example_en: Fill out the application form completely before submitting it online.
gept.example_zh: 在線上送出前，請完整填寫申請表。

gept.example_en: There is a small application fee for processing your documents.
gept.example_zh: 處理你的文件需要一筆小額申請費。

gept.example_en: You can check your application status anytime through the company website.
gept.example_zh: 你隨時可以透過公司網站查詢申請狀態。

gept.example_en: Most companies now require an online application instead of paper forms.
gept.example_zh: 大多數公司現在要求線上申請而非紙本表格。

gept.example_en: A free resume builder online can help you create a clean layout.
gept.example_zh: 網路上免費的履歷產生器可以幫你做出乾淨的版面。

gept.example_en: She used a simple resume template to highlight her main skills.
gept.example_zh: 她使用一個簡潔的履歷模板來突出她的主要技能。

gept.example_en: Be ready to explain any resume gap in a positive and honest way.
gept.example_zh: 準備好以正面誠實的方式解釋履歷中的空白期。

gept.example_en: She used her work gap to learn new skills and travel a little.
gept.example_zh: 她利用職涯空窗期學習新技能並稍微旅行。

gept.example_en: A short career gap is not always a problem in modern hiring.
gept.example_zh: 在現代招聘中，短暫的職涯中斷並不一定是問題。

gept.example_en: His skill set includes coding, design, and basic accounting.
gept.example_zh: 他的技能組合包括程式設計、設計與基本會計。

gept.example_en: Training programs help workers close the skill gap quickly.
gept.example_zh: 培訓計畫協助員工快速彌補技能落差。

gept.example_en: Strong soft skills like communication can help you stand out at work.
gept.example_zh: 良好的軟技能例如溝通能力可以讓你在職場中脫穎而出。

gept.example_en: Programming and accounting are typical hard skills for many jobs.
gept.example_zh: 程式設計和會計是許多工作典型的硬實力。

gept.example_en: List your technical skill levels honestly in your application.
gept.example_zh: 在申請中誠實列出你的技術能力等級。

gept.example_en: Good people skills are essential for anyone working in customer service.
gept.example_zh: 良好的人際技巧對任何從事客服工作的人都是必需的。

gept.example_en: Her excellent language skill in French helped her get the position.
gept.example_zh: 她出色的法語能力幫助她得到了這個職位。

gept.example_en: Strong writing skill is important for almost every office job today.
gept.example_zh: 良好的寫作能力對今日幾乎每個辦公室工作都很重要。

gept.example_en: Basic computer skill is now required even in many traditional industries.
gept.example_zh: 基本電腦能力現在連許多傳統產業都要求。

gept.example_en: Volunteering for school clubs helped him develop early leadership skill.
gept.example_zh: 在學校社團當志工幫他早期培養了領導能力。

gept.example_en: Good time management is the secret of meeting tight deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 良好的時間管理是趕上緊湊截止日期的祕訣。

gept.example_en: I use a free app for task management at work and at home.
gept.example_zh: 我用一個免費的應用程式在工作和家裡進行任務管理。

gept.example_en: Our company offered a workshop on stress management last month.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司上個月舉辦了一場壓力管理工作坊。

gept.example_en: Good conflict management keeps small problems from becoming big ones.
gept.example_zh: 良好的衝突管理能避免小問題變成大問題。

gept.example_en: Effective team management requires both planning and listening skills.
gept.example_zh: 有效的團隊管理同時需要規劃和傾聽的能力。

gept.example_en: The team finished the project plan after three long meetings.
gept.example_zh: 團隊經過三場冗長會議後完成了專案計畫。

gept.example_en: Please update the project schedule when any task is delayed.
gept.example_zh: 任何任務有延誤時，請更新專案時程。

gept.example_en: I send a short project update to the manager every Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我每週五下午寄一份簡短的專案進度更新給經理。

gept.example_en: All team members must submit a weekly report by Friday noon.
gept.example_zh: 所有團隊成員必須在週五中午前繳交週報。

gept.example_en: The monthly report shows our sales numbers and key activities.
gept.example_zh: 月報顯示我們的銷售數字與主要活動。

gept.example_en: Each team gave a short progress report at the morning meeting.
gept.example_zh: 每個團隊在晨會上做了簡短的進度報告。

gept.example_en: Please send a quick status update before you leave today.
gept.example_zh: 今天下班前請寄一份快速的狀態更新。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 狀態會議／例行進度會
gept.example_en: We hold a short status meeting every Monday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週一早上開一場簡短的狀態會議。

gept.example_en: Expect a follow-up call from our sales team within two days.
gept.example_zh: 預計兩天內會收到我們業務團隊的後續電話。

gept.example_en: Send a polite follow-up email if you do not hear back soon.
gept.example_zh: 如果遲遲沒有回音，請發一封禮貌的後續電子郵件。

gept.example_en: A short thank-you note after the interview can leave a good impression.
gept.example_zh: 面試後一封簡短的感謝函可以留下好印象。

gept.example_en: She sent a thank-you email to each interviewer that same afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 她當天下午就寄了感謝郵件給每位面試官。

gept.example_en: Bring three recent pay stubs when you apply for the loan.
gept.example_zh: 申請貸款時請帶最近三張薪資存根。

gept.example_en: HR will send the tax form to you in early February.
gept.example_zh: 人資會在二月初把報稅表寄給你。

gept.example_en: Many people hire an accountant to help with their tax filing.
gept.example_zh: 許多人會聘請會計師協助他們報稅。

gept.example_en: She filed her tax return online to save time and paper.
gept.example_zh: 她在線上申報退稅以節省時間和紙張。

gept.example_en: Accountants are extremely busy during tax season every spring.
gept.example_zh: 會計師每年春天的報稅季都非常忙碌。

gept.example_en: Sales jumped sharply in the last fiscal quarter of the year.
gept.example_zh: 本年度最後一個財務季度銷售額大幅躍升。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 上班族／辦公室職員
gept.example_en: Most office workers in this city use the subway every day.
gept.example_zh: 這個城市大多數的上班族每天都搭地鐵。

gept.example_en: After college she found a steady office job near her home.
gept.example_zh: 大學畢業後，她在家附近找到一份穩定的辦公室工作。

gept.example_en: The startup needs more office space as the team grows.
gept.example_zh: 隨著團隊壯大，這家新創公司需要更多辦公空間。

gept.example_en: Please leave your guest pass at the front desk before leaving.
gept.example_zh: 離開前請將訪客證留在前台。

gept.example_en: Sign in at the reception desk to get your visitor badge.
gept.example_zh: 請在接待櫃台簽到以領取訪客識別證。

gept.example_en: Our new meeting room has a big screen and comfortable chairs.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新會議室有一個大螢幕和舒適的椅子。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 會議室／大型會議廳
gept.example_en: The conference room can hold up to twenty people for a workshop.
gept.example_zh: 這間大型會議廳可以容納至多二十人開工作坊。

gept.example_en: The CEO presented the yearly report at the board meeting yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 執行長昨天在董事會議上報告年度報告。

gept.example_en: The CEO will share the new vision at the town hall meeting tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 執行長明天會在全員大會上分享新願景。

gept.example_en: An all-hands meeting is planned for early next month.
gept.example_zh: 預計下個月初舉辦一場全體員工會議。

gept.example_en: We need to order more office supplies before the end of the month.
gept.example_zh: 月底前我們需要再訂購一些辦公文具用品。

gept.example_en: Set up a clear filing system to find documents in seconds.
gept.example_zh: 建立清楚的歸檔系統，幾秒鐘內就能找到文件。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 費用申報／報銷申請
gept.example_en: My expense claim was approved by the finance team this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我的費用申報今天下午被財務團隊核准了。

gept.example_en: Please attach the purchase order before sending the goods to the warehouse.
gept.example_zh: 請在將商品送往倉庫前附上採購單。

gept.example_en: Our client list has grown by twenty percent since last year.
gept.example_zh: 我們的客戶名單自去年以來成長了百分之二十。

gept.example_en: I will be out of the office due to a client meeting this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 今天下午我因為一場客戶會議不在辦公室。

gept.example_en: The whole team worked hard and met the sales target last month.
gept.example_zh: 整個團隊辛勤工作，上個月達成了銷售目標。

gept.example_en: Her sales pitch was clear, short, and very convincing.
gept.example_zh: 她的銷售簡報清楚、簡短而且非常有說服力。

gept.example_en: The sales report shows steady growth in three different regions.
gept.example_zh: 銷售報告顯示三個不同區域都有穩定成長。

gept.example_en: Our sales team will visit three cities during this trip.
gept.example_zh: 我們的業務團隊這趟出差會走訪三個城市。

gept.example_en: The marketing team designed a fresh campaign for the spring season.
gept.example_zh: 行銷團隊為春季設計了一波全新的活動。

gept.example_en: Our support team replies to most messages within one business hour.
gept.example_zh: 我們的支援團隊大多在一個營業小時內回覆訊息。

gept.example_en: The design team is busy preparing new logos for the rebrand.
gept.example_zh: 設計團隊正忙著為品牌更新準備新的標誌。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 訓練課程／培訓時段
gept.example_en: New staff must attend a safety training session in the first week.
gept.example_zh: 新進員工必須在第一週參加安全培訓課程。

gept.example_en: The training program lasts three months and ends with a small test.
gept.example_zh: 培訓計畫為期三個月，最後會有一個小考。

gept.example_en: She signed up for a short training course in customer service.
gept.example_zh: 她報名了一個簡短的客戶服務培訓課程。

gept.example_en: Read the training manual carefully before operating the new machines.
gept.example_zh: 在操作新機器之前請仔細閱讀培訓手冊。

gept.example_en: Company policy requires everyone to wear an ID badge at all times.
gept.example_zh: 公司政策要求所有人都要隨時佩戴識別證。

gept.example_en: Please read the company handbook in your first week of work.
gept.example_zh: 請在上班第一週閱讀員工手冊。

gept.example_en: The new company logo appears on every email signature.
gept.example_zh: 新的公司商標出現在每封郵件的簽名檔上。

gept.example_en: More information about our products is on the company website.
gept.example_zh: 關於我們產品的更多資訊都在公司網站上。

gept.example_en: Final decisions are made at the head office in another city.
gept.example_zh: 最終決定是在另一個城市的總部做出。

gept.example_en: The bank opened a new branch office in our neighborhood last month.
gept.example_zh: 銀行上個月在我們社區開了一家新的分行。

gept.example_en: The regional manager visits each store at least once a month.
gept.example_zh: 區域經理每月至少巡視每家店一次。

gept.example_en: Our general manager has more than twenty years of industry experience.
gept.example_zh: 我們的總經理在業界有超過二十年的經驗。

gept.example_en: Each department head meets the CEO once every two weeks.
gept.example_zh: 每位部門主管每兩週與執行長開一次會。

gept.example_en: She was promoted to team leader after just one year here.
gept.example_zh: 她在這裡只待一年就升任團隊組長。

gept.example_en: Please ask your team lead before making any changes to the schedule.
gept.example_zh: 在更動行程前請先詢問你的組長。

gept.example_en: The shift leader assigns tasks at the start of every shift.
gept.example_zh: 班次組長在每班開始時分派任務。

gept.example_en: Nurses often do shift work and switch between days and nights.
gept.example_zh: 護理師經常輪班，會在日夜班之間切換。

gept.example_en: He prefers the night shift because the pay is slightly higher.
gept.example_zh: 他偏好夜班，因為薪水稍微比較高。

gept.example_en: Most office staff work the day shift from morning to evening.
gept.example_zh: 大多數辦公室員工從早到晚上日班。

gept.example_en: A split shift means a long break in the middle of the workday.
gept.example_zh: 分段班次是指在工作日中間有很長的休息時間。

gept.example_en: He worked a double shift on Saturday and was very tired afterward.
gept.example_zh: 他週六連上了雙班，之後非常疲累。

gept.example_en: Please check the work schedule before requesting any time off.
gept.example_zh: 請假前請先查看工作時間表。

gept.example_en: Our official clock-in time is half past eight in the morning.
gept.example_zh: 我們正式的上班打卡時間是早上八點半。

gept.example_en: The old factory still uses a paper punch card for attendance.
gept.example_zh: 這家老工廠考勤仍然使用紙本打卡卡片。

gept.example_en: Workers must punch in before they enter the production area.
gept.example_zh: 工人進入生產區之前必須打卡。

gept.example_en: Don't forget to punch out before you leave the building.
gept.example_zh: 離開大樓之前別忘了打卡下班。

gept.example_en: He always shows up to work on time, even during snowy weather.
gept.example_zh: 即使下雪天他也總是準時到班。

gept.example_en: I am running late for the meeting because of heavy traffic.
gept.example_zh: 因為塞車嚴重，我開會快遲到了。

gept.example_en: Try not to show up late on your first day at the new job.
gept.example_zh: 在新工作的第一天盡量不要遲到。

gept.example_en: May I leave early today for a doctor's appointment?
gept.example_zh: 我今天可以提早下班去看醫生嗎？

gept.example_en: I had to stay late last night to finish the urgent report.
gept.example_zh: 我昨晚必須留下加班才能完成那份緊急報告。

gept.example_en: She works late almost every Thursday to prepare weekly reports.
gept.example_zh: 她幾乎每個週四都加班到很晚以準備週報。

gept.example_en: Many employees here work overtime to meet tight deadlines.
gept.example_zh: 這裡許多員工為了趕上緊湊的截止日期會加班。

gept.example_en: Let's take a break and continue this conversation in fifteen minutes.
gept.example_zh: 我們休息一下，十五分鐘後再繼續這個對話。

gept.example_en: Please take notes during the meeting so we can review them later.
gept.example_zh: 請在會議中做筆記，這樣我們之後可以回顧。

gept.example_en: Can you set up a meeting with the supplier sometime next week?
gept.example_zh: 你可以安排下週與供應商開個會嗎？

gept.example_en: Let me schedule a call with the customer for Thursday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我來安排週四下午與客戶的通話。

gept.example_en: Please send out an email to everyone about the time change.
gept.example_zh: 請發送電子郵件通知所有人時間變更的事。

gept.example_en: Be careful before you click reply all to a long thread.
gept.example_zh: 對於一長串郵件，點選回覆全部前要小心。

gept.example_en: Please cc the manager when you send the final version.
gept.example_zh: 寄出最終版本時請副本通知經理。

gept.example_en: I will loop you in on the next email about the budget.
gept.example_zh: 下一封關於預算的郵件我會把你也加入討論。

gept.example_en: Drop me a line when you arrive at the airport tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 明天到機場時請傳個訊息給我。

gept.example_en: He will give a presentation about the new product to the whole team.
gept.example_zh: 他將向整個團隊做新產品的簡報。

gept.example_en: She offered to lead a meeting on improving team communication.
gept.example_zh: 她主動表示願意主持一場關於改善團隊溝通的會議。

gept.example_en: Please raise a question if you don't understand any step.
gept.example_zh: 如果你有任何一步不理解請提出問題。

gept.example_en: Several staff raised concerns about the new safety rules.
gept.example_zh: 幾位員工對新的安全規定提出疑慮。

gept.example_en: Anyone is welcome to share an idea during our morning meetings.
gept.example_zh: 晨會期間歡迎任何人分享想法。

gept.example_en: May I make a suggestion about the meeting layout?
gept.example_zh: 關於會議的安排我可以提出一個建議嗎？

gept.example_en: Please give feedback on this draft by Wednesday morning.
gept.example_zh: 請在週三早上前針對這份草稿給予回饋。

gept.example_en: It is smart to ask for feedback at the end of every project.
gept.example_zh: 在每個專案結束時徵求回饋是明智的做法。

gept.example_en: Always answer politely, even when the customer sounds upset.
gept.example_zh: 即使客戶聽起來生氣，也要禮貌地回答。

gept.example_en: Speak confidently in an interview, but never sound arrogant.
gept.example_zh: 面試時要自信地說話，但絕不要顯得傲慢。

gept.example_en: A neat haircut helps you look professional at job interviews.
gept.example_zh: 整潔的髮型能讓你在面試時顯得專業。

gept.example_en: It is important to be punctual on the first day of work.
gept.example_zh: 上班第一天準時非常重要。

gept.example_en: Make eye contact with the interviewer to show you are confident.
gept.example_zh: 與面試官眼神接觸以展現你的自信。

gept.example_en: A firm handshake often leaves a good first impression.
gept.example_zh: 堅定的握手通常會留下良好的第一印象。

gept.example_en: You only get one chance to make a strong first impression.
gept.example_zh: 你只有一次機會留下強烈的第一印象。

gept.example_en: Your body language can show interest even when you stay silent.
gept.example_zh: 即使你保持沉默，肢體語言也能展現興趣。

gept.example_en: A warm tone of voice helps callers feel respected and heard.
gept.example_zh: 溫暖的語氣讓來電者感到受尊重且被傾聽。

gept.example_en: Don't be afraid to speak up if you disagree with the plan.
gept.example_zh: 如果你不同意這個計畫，請勇於發言。

gept.example_en: She did not back down when defending her project idea.
gept.example_zh: 在捍衛她的專案構想時，她並未退讓。

gept.example_en: Good workers always follow through on what they promise.
gept.example_zh: 優秀的員工總是會貫徹他們所承諾的事。

gept.example_en: He had to step in when the team leader fell sick suddenly.
gept.example_zh: 當組長突然生病時，他必須挺身接手。

gept.example_en: The founder will step aside next year to focus on new ventures.
gept.example_zh: 創辦人明年將讓位，以專注於新的事業。

gept.example_en: Try not to fall behind on weekly tasks, or stress will grow.
gept.example_zh: 盡量不要在每週任務上落後，否則壓力會越來越大。

gept.example_en: I plan to catch up on work this weekend after the holiday.
gept.example_zh: 假期過後，我打算這個週末趕工。

gept.example_en: She got the meeting because her uncle was willing to pull strings.
gept.example_zh: 她能爭取到那場會議，是因為她叔叔願意幫忙拉關係。

gept.example_en: He climbed the ladder quickly thanks to hard work and clear goals.
gept.example_zh: 靠著努力與明確的目標，他在公司步步高升。

gept.example_en: She is now in charge of the entire customer support department.
gept.example_zh: 她現在負責整個客戶支援部門。

gept.example_en: I report to the head of marketing every Friday morning.
gept.example_zh: 我每週五早上向行銷主管匯報。

gept.example_en: Every project manager has to answer to the director of operations.
gept.example_zh: 每位專案經理都必須對營運總監負責。

gept.example_en: Can you fill in for me on Friday while I am away?
gept.example_zh: 我週五不在的時候，你可以幫我代班嗎？

gept.example_en: She covered for her sick colleague during the busy afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 在繁忙的下午，她替生病的同事頂班。

gept.example_en: On your first day, an experienced staff member will show the ropes.
gept.example_zh: 你第一天上班時，會有資深員工帶你入門。

gept.example_en: It takes about a month to fully learn the ropes here.
gept.example_zh: 在這裡大約需要一個月才能完全熟悉工作流程。

gept.example_en: Most of my skills were gained on the job, not in school.
gept.example_zh: 我大部分的技能是在工作中學到的，不是在學校。

gept.example_en: I will be out of office from Monday to Wednesday next week.
gept.example_zh: 下週一到週三我將不在辦公室。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 不在辦公室自動回覆
gept.example_en: Set an out-of-office reply before you start your vacation.
gept.example_zh: 在開始休假前設定好不在辦公室自動回覆。

gept.example_en: Please don't call colleagues for work questions off the clock.
gept.example_zh: 請不要在下班時間因工作問題打給同事。

gept.example_en: All personal calls should wait until you are not on the clock.
gept.example_zh: 所有私人電話都應該等到下班後再撥打。

gept.example_en: Don't pay anything out of pocket without checking the policy first.
gept.example_zh: 未先確認公司規定前，請勿自掏腰包支付任何費用。

gept.example_en: She is out on leave this week, but will reply soon.
gept.example_zh: 她這週請假中，但很快會回覆。

gept.example_en: Our new designer comes on board next Monday.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新設計師下週一加入。

gept.example_en: We want to bring a senior developer on board this quarter.
gept.example_zh: 我們希望這一季能引進一位資深開發人員加入團隊。

gept.meaning_zh: (片語) 一開始就全力以赴
gept.example_en: New hires are expected to hit the ground running after the orientation.
gept.example_zh: 新進員工在新人訓練後就被期待要全力上手。

gept.example_en: Customers love this brand because the designers think outside the box.
gept.example_zh: 顧客喜愛這個品牌，是因為設計師跳出框架思考。

gept.example_en: Her clients love her because she goes the extra mile every time.
gept.example_zh: 她的客戶喜愛她，因為她每次都多付出一些努力。

gept.example_en: Please keep me in the loop on the contract negotiation.
gept.example_zh: 合約談判請讓我隨時知情。

gept.example_en: I felt completely out of the loop after my long vacation.
gept.example_zh: 我長假回來後感覺完全狀況外。

gept.meaning_zh: (片語) 重新開始／回到起點
gept.example_en: Our first proposal was rejected, so it's back to the drawing board.
gept.example_zh: 我們的第一份提案被否決，所以要重頭開始。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 大致數字／概略估計
gept.example_en: Could you give me a ballpark figure for the project budget?
gept.example_zh: 你可以給我這個專案預算的大致數字嗎？

gept.example_en: Here is a rough estimate of the total cost for next quarter.
gept.example_zh: 這是下一季總成本的粗略估算。

gept.example_en: Moving forward, we will hold weekly checkpoints with the client.
gept.example_zh: 接下來我們將每週與客戶舉行一次進度確認。

gept.word: at the end of the day
gept.example_en: At the end of the day, customer trust matters more than profit.
gept.example_zh: 歸根究底，客戶的信任比利潤更重要。

gept.example_en: The young voyager kept a small journal of every city she visited that summer.
gept.example_zh: 那位年輕旅行者把那年夏天造訪過的每座城市都記在小日記裡。

gept.example_en: Their brief sojourn in the mountain town gave them a real taste of village life.
gept.example_zh: 他們在山城短暫的旅居讓他們真正體驗到鄉村生活。

gept.example_en: We booked a weekend getaway to the coast to escape the busy city for a while.
gept.example_zh: 我們訂了週末海邊小旅行，暫時逃離繁忙的城市。

gept.example_en: The reporters joined a press junket to cover the new resort's grand opening.
gept.example_zh: 記者們參加公費採訪行程，報導新度假村的盛大開幕。

gept.example_en: After picking up the rental car, we took a joyride along the scenic coastal road.
gept.example_zh: 領了租車後，我們沿著風景優美的海岸公路兜風。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 徒步旅行者；行旅之人
gept.example_en: The old inn has welcomed tired wayfarers for more than two hundred years.
gept.example_zh: 這家老旅店兩百多年來一直接待疲倦的旅人。

gept.example_en: Some retirees prefer to globehop instead of settling down in one quiet place.
gept.example_zh: 有些退休族喜歡環遊世界，而不是定居在一個安靜的地方。

gept.example_en: The agent quoted us a fair price for a roundtrip flight to Bangkok next month.
gept.example_zh: 業務員給我們下個月飛曼谷的來回機票報了個合理價。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 單程的；單程票
gept.example_en: Since I plan to move there, I only need to buy a one-way ticket this time.
gept.example_zh: 既然我打算搬過去，這次我只需要買單程票。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 過夜旅程；過夜旅客
gept.example_en: We took an overnighter to the hot spring town and came back on the early train.
gept.example_zh: 我們做了一趟過夜的溫泉小旅行，搭最早班車回來。

gept.example_en: On Sunday we took a daytrip to a fishing village just one hour from the city.
gept.example_zh: 週日我們去離市區只有一小時車程的漁村做了一日遊。

gept.example_en: A small group of pilgrims walks this ancient route every autumn for spiritual reasons.
gept.example_zh: 每年秋天都有一小群朝聖者基於信仰走這條古老路線。

gept.example_en: Foreign tourists often line up early to get the best photo at the famous bridge.
gept.example_zh: 外國觀光客常常很早就在著名橋樑前排隊取最佳拍照位置。

gept.example_en: Several sightseers asked the guide if they could stop briefly to take photos.
gept.example_zh: 幾位遊客問導遊能不能短暫停下來拍照。

gept.example_en: The hostel posted clear guidelines about quiet hours and shared kitchen rules.
gept.example_zh: 青年旅館貼出了安靜時段和共用廚房規則的清楚準則。

gept.example_en: A quiet wanderer with a backpack stopped to ask the way to the train station.
gept.example_zh: 一位背著背包的安靜漫遊者停下來問去火車站的路。

gept.example_en: A kind passerby helped me carry my heavy suitcase up the subway stairs.
gept.example_zh: 一位好心路人幫我把沉重的行李箱搬上地鐵階梯。

gept.example_en: A friendly hitchhiker stood by the highway holding a sign for the next town.
gept.example_zh: 一位友善的搭車客站在公路邊舉著前往下個城鎮的牌子。

gept.example_en: The crew found a frightened stowaway hiding behind the cargo on the ship.
gept.example_zh: 船員在貨物後面發現了一名害怕的偷渡者。

gept.example_en: The line at passport-control was long, but the officers worked through it quickly.
gept.example_zh: 護照查驗處排隊很長，但官員處理得很快。

gept.example_en: At the border-crossing we had to show our passports and open one suitcase.
gept.example_zh: 在邊境通關口，我們得出示護照並打開一個行李箱。

gept.example_en: The duty-paid items were marked clearly so the inspector could check them fast.
gept.example_zh: 已繳稅的物品都清楚標示，方便檢查人員快速查驗。

gept.example_en: Tourists can claim a tax-refund on certain purchases before leaving the country.
gept.example_zh: 觀光客在離境前可以針對特定購物申請退稅。

gept.example_en: Fill out this rebate-form at the counter and keep your original purchase receipts.
gept.example_zh: 請在櫃台填寫這份退款申請表，並保留原始購買收據。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 快速通道；快速車道
gept.example_en: Frequent travelers can pay extra to use the fast-lane at busy airports.
gept.example_zh: 常旅客可以多付費用，使用繁忙機場的快速通道。

gept.example_en: Most adult passport holders can simply use the e-gate to clear immigration.
gept.example_zh: 多數成人護照持有者可以直接使用自動通關閘門過移民關。

gept.example_en: Save time by using a kiosk-checkin if you have only carry-on baggage today.
gept.example_zh: 今天若只有隨身行李，用自助報到機可以節省時間。

gept.example_en: After printing the tag, head to the self-bagdrop counter and follow the screen.
gept.example_zh: 印好行李條後，請到自助行李託運櫃台依照螢幕操作。

gept.example_en: Always check that the luggage-tag shows the correct destination airport code.
gept.example_zh: 請務必確認行李條上顯示的目的地機場代碼正確。

gept.example_en: Look at the seat-map online and pick a window seat before someone else takes it.
gept.example_zh: 上網查看座位圖，趁別人還沒選之前挑一個靠窗座位。

gept.example_en: Passengers sitting near the emergency-exit must be ready to help the cabin crew.
gept.example_zh: 坐在緊急出口附近的乘客必須準備好協助機組人員。

gept.example_en: We heard the final boarding-call and quickly finished our coffee at the gate.
gept.example_zh: 我們聽到最後一次登機廣播，趕緊在登機口喝完咖啡。

gept.example_en: A late gate-change forced everyone to rush to the other end of the terminal.
gept.example_zh: 臨時的登機門變更迫使大家衝到航廈的另一端。

gept.example_en: Keep an eye on the flight-board because boarding times sometimes shift earlier.
gept.example_zh: 請留意航班顯示板，因為登機時間有時會提前。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 飛行期間的；機上的
gept.example_en: The in-flight movie selection was great, but the meal was a bit disappointing.
gept.example_zh: 機上電影選擇很棒，但餐點稍微讓人失望。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 摺疊餐桌；機艙小桌
gept.example_en: Please return your tray-table to the upright position before we land.
gept.example_zh: 請在降落前將您的摺疊餐桌收回直立位置。

gept.example_en: She placed her bag in the overhead-bin and slid into the middle seat carefully.
gept.example_zh: 她把包包放進機艙上方置物箱，小心地坐進中間座位。

gept.example_en: The lavatory at the back was busy, so I waited a few minutes in my seat.
gept.example_zh: 後方的廁所很多人在用，所以我在座位上等了幾分鐘。

gept.example_en: Our stopover-city was Tokyo, and we had enough time to explore one busy district.
gept.example_zh: 我們的中停城市是東京，足夠時間逛一個熱鬧的街區。

gept.example_en: Passengers without a visa must stay in the transit-area until the next flight.
gept.example_zh: 沒有簽證的旅客必須留在過境區，直到下一班飛機。

gept.example_en: Some countries require a short transit-visa even if you never leave the airport.
gept.example_zh: 有些國家即使你不離開機場，也需要短期過境簽證。

gept.example_en: He applied for a tourist-visa online and received approval within three working days.
gept.example_zh: 他線上申請觀光簽證，三個工作天內就收到核准。

gept.example_en: The officer added a clear entry-stamp on the page next to my old visas.
gept.example_zh: 官員在我舊簽證旁的那一頁清楚蓋上入境章。

gept.example_en: Don't lose your boarding pass before you receive the exit-stamp at the counter.
gept.example_zh: 在櫃台拿到出境章之前，別把登機證弄丟。

gept.example_en: Fill out the arrival-card on the plane to save time when you land.
gept.example_zh: 請在飛機上填好入境卡，降落後可以節省時間。

gept.example_en: Hand in the small departure-card with your passport before passing the gate.
gept.example_zh: 通過閘門前，請連同護照一起交出小張的出境卡。

gept.example_en: Please complete the customs-form honestly to avoid any extra inspection at the desk.
gept.example_zh: 請誠實填寫海關申報單，以免在櫃台被加強檢查。

gept.example_en: Travelers must declare-item such as plants, meat products, or large amounts of cash.
gept.example_zh: 旅客必須申報像植物、肉類製品或大量現金等物品。

gept.example_en: If you have nothing-to-declare, simply walk through the green channel at the airport.
gept.example_zh: 如果沒有需申報的物品，直接走機場綠色通道即可。

gept.example_en: Most family vacationers take the green-channel after picking up their baggage.
gept.example_zh: 大多數家庭遊客領了行李後走綠色通道出關。

gept.example_en: Travelers carrying restricted goods must take the red-channel for inspection.
gept.example_zh: 攜帶受限物品的旅客必須走紅色通道接受檢查。

gept.example_en: Place laptops in a separate tray on the x-ray-belt at the security check.
gept.example_zh: 安檢時請把筆電放在X光輸送帶上的另一個托盤裡。

gept.example_en: He walked through the metal-detector slowly because of the pins in his knee.
gept.example_zh: 他因為膝蓋裡有金屬釘，慢慢走過金屬探測器。

gept.example_en: Some passengers are chosen for a quick pat-down before boarding international flights.
gept.example_zh: 有些旅客在登國際航班前會被選中接受快速拍身檢查。

gept.example_en: Remember the liquid-limit when packing toiletries in your carry-on luggage.
gept.example_zh: 把盥洗用品放進隨身行李時，記得液體限制規定。

gept.example_en: Put small bottles inside a clear ziplock-bag to pass the security check quickly.
gept.example_zh: 把小瓶子裝進透明密封袋，能快速通過安檢。

gept.example_en: Always keep your power-bank in your carry-on, never inside checked luggage.
gept.example_zh: 請務必把行動電源放在隨身行李，千萬別放託運行李。

gept.example_en: A soft neck-pillow can make a long overnight flight much more comfortable.
gept.example_zh: 一個柔軟的頸枕能讓長途夜班飛行舒適許多。

gept.example_en: The eye-shade and earplugs from the cabin crew helped me sleep on the plane.
gept.example_zh: 機組人員給的眼罩和耳塞讓我能在飛機上睡覺。

gept.example_en: I packed a fresh pair of earplugs in case the bus terminal was noisy at night.
gept.example_zh: 我準備了一副新耳塞，以防晚上巴士站很吵。

gept.example_en: Don't forget the travel-pillow if you plan to nap on the long train ride home.
gept.example_zh: 如果想在回家的長途火車上小睡，別忘了帶旅行枕。

gept.example_en: Hide cash and important documents inside a money-belt when you walk in crowds.
gept.example_zh: 在人群中走動時，把現金與重要文件藏在防盜腰包裡。
