gept.example_en: She bought a thin leather passport-cover to keep her travel papers neat.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一個薄薄的皮製護照套，讓旅行文件保持整齊。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 語言學習應用程式
gept.example_en: I used a language-app to learn basic greetings before my trip to Vietnam.
gept.example_zh: 去越南旅行前，我用語言學習應用程式學了基本招呼語。

gept.example_en: A small phrasebook helped us order food and ask for directions in the village.
gept.example_zh: 一本小的旅遊用語手冊讓我們在村裡能點餐和問路。

gept.example_en: We used a translation-app to chat with the friendly shopkeeper in the old market.
gept.example_zh: 我們用翻譯應用程式和老市場那位親切的店主聊天。

gept.example_en: Always download an offline-map before going hiking in areas with no signal.
gept.example_zh: 去訊號不佳的山區健行前，務必先下載離線地圖。

gept.example_en: The hotel gave us a small guidemap with the best photo spots circled in red.
gept.example_zh: 飯店給了我們一張小導覽地圖，最佳拍照點都用紅圈標示。

gept.example_en: Mark each museum on the tourmap so we don't accidentally skip one tomorrow.
gept.example_zh: 把每間博物館都標在旅遊地圖上，免得明天不小心漏掉。

gept.example_en: The compass-app on my phone helped us find the trail when the path split.
gept.example_zh: 手機上的指南針應用程式幫我們在岔路時找到正確小徑。

gept.example_en: Let's pin-location of our hostel so we can find it again after dinner tonight.
gept.example_zh: 我們先標記青年旅館的位置，今晚吃完飯才找得回來。

gept.meaning_zh: (動詞) 在地圖上放置定位
gept.example_en: Drop-pin where the bus picks us up so the driver knows our exact spot.
gept.example_zh: 在巴士接我們的位置放置定位，司機就知道我們確切地點。

gept.example_en: A simple online trip-planner saved us hours of work when arranging the itinerary.
gept.example_zh: 一個簡單的線上行程規劃工具讓我們安排行程省下好幾小時。

gept.example_en: A popular travel-blogger recommended this quiet beach in her latest video diary.
gept.example_zh: 一位人氣旅遊部落客在最新影片日誌中推薦了這個寧靜海灘。

gept.example_en: He started vlogging his road trip and gained many followers in only a few months.
gept.example_zh: 他開始為公路旅行做影音紀錄，短短幾個月就吸引許多粉絲。

gept.example_en: The tour-package included hotels, breakfasts, and a guide for two of the four days.
gept.example_zh: 套裝行程包含飯店、早餐，以及四天裡兩天的導遊服務。

gept.example_en: Joining a group-tour is cheaper, but you have less freedom to change the plan.
gept.example_zh: 參加團體旅遊比較便宜，但更改計畫的自由度較少。

gept.example_en: We treated ourselves to a private-tour of the old palace at sunset hours.
gept.example_zh: 我們犒賞自己參加了夕陽時段的古宮殿私人導覽。

gept.example_en: A free guided-walk leaves the town square at ten o'clock every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 每週六上午十點，鎮上廣場都有一場免費導覽步行行程。

gept.example_en: We took a half-day city-tour by bus to get a quick view of the main sights.
gept.example_zh: 我們搭巴士參加半日市區觀光，快速看了主要景點。

gept.example_en: Our evening food-tour included six small tastings and stories about each dish.
gept.example_zh: 我們的傍晚美食巡禮包含六道小份試吃及每道菜的故事。

gept.example_en: The morning market-tour was a wonderful way to learn about local ingredients.
gept.example_zh: 早晨的市場巡禮是認識當地食材的絕佳方式。

gept.example_en: On the night-tour we saw the old castle lit up with warm golden lights.
gept.example_zh: 夜遊行程中我們看到古堡打上溫暖的金色燈光。

gept.example_en: The ghost-tour through the old town was scary but also surprisingly funny.
gept.example_zh: 穿越舊城區的鬼怪導覽既嚇人又意外地好笑。

gept.example_en: We took a sunset boat-tour along the river and saw many old stone bridges.
gept.example_zh: 我們搭夕陽遊船沿河而行，看了許多古老的石橋。

gept.example_en: The open-top bus-tour was a relaxing way to see the city in two hours.
gept.example_zh: 敞篷巴士觀光是兩小時內輕鬆看完這座城市的好方法。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 隨上隨下式（觀光巴士）
gept.example_en: Buy a hop-on-hop-off ticket to visit the main attractions at your own pace.
gept.example_zh: 買一張隨上隨下的票，以自己的步調參觀主要景點。

gept.example_en: Rent an audioguide at the entrance to hear short stories about each painting.
gept.example_zh: 在入口租一台語音導覽機，可以聽到每幅畫的小故事。

gept.example_en: A quiet headphone-tour let us hear the guide clearly even with traffic noise.
gept.example_zh: 安靜的耳機導覽團讓我們即使在車流聲中也能清楚聽到導遊。

gept.example_en: Ask the friendly staff at the info-desk for a free city map and bus pass.
gept.example_zh: 向服務台親切的工作人員索取免費市區地圖與巴士票卡。

gept.example_en: The visitor-center has clean restrooms, free wifi, and helpful tour leaflets.
gept.example_zh: 遊客中心有乾淨的洗手間、免費無線網路和有用的旅遊摺頁。

gept.example_en: Check the station's lost-and-found if you think you left your bag on the train.
gept.example_zh: 如果你覺得包包忘在火車上，請去車站的失物招領處詢問。

gept.example_en: I filed a short report about my lost-property at the small office near the gate.
gept.example_zh: 我在閘門旁的小辦公室為遺失物品填了簡短報告。

gept.example_en: Lost-baggage forms must be completed at the counter before leaving the airport.
gept.example_zh: 離開機場前，行李遺失表單必須在櫃台填妥。

gept.example_en: Airlines often deliver delayed-baggage to your hotel later the same day.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司通常會在當天稍晚把延遲行李送到你的飯店。

gept.example_en: Report any damaged-bag right away at the airline desk inside the baggage hall.
gept.example_zh: 若有任何破損行李，請立即在行李提領大廳的航空公司櫃台申報。

gept.example_en: Keep the claim-tag from check-in until you walk out of the airport with your bag.
gept.example_zh: 請保留報到時的行李提領票根，直到提了行李走出機場。

gept.example_en: The carousel-area was crowded, so we waited near the wall for our suitcase.
gept.example_zh: 行李轉盤區人很多，所以我們靠牆邊等行李箱。

gept.example_en: A friendly porter helped us carry four heavy bags from the train to the taxi.
gept.example_zh: 一位友善的行李搬運員幫我們把四件重行李從火車搬到計程車。

gept.example_en: Read the tipping-rule for each country so you don't offend anyone by mistake.
gept.example_zh: 讀一下各國的小費規則，免得不小心冒犯到別人。

gept.example_en: Add a small service-tip when the restaurant doesn't include it on the bill.
gept.example_zh: 餐廳沒把服務費加在帳單上時，請多加一點服務小費。

gept.example_en: We paid a small rental-deposit for the bikes and got it back at the end.
gept.example_zh: 我們付了一小筆腳踏車租用押金，最後拿回來了。

gept.example_en: The bike-rental shop near the beach gives you a free helmet and a small map.
gept.example_zh: 海灘旁的自行車租借店免費提供安全帽和小地圖。

gept.example_en: Compare prices online for car-rental before you arrive at the airport pickup desk.
gept.example_zh: 在抵達機場領車櫃台前，先上網比較汽車租賃的價格。

gept.example_en: Scooter-rental is popular on the island, but always wear a helmet for safety.
gept.example_zh: 島上機車租借很受歡迎，但騎乘時務必戴安全帽。

gept.example_en: A small campervan gave us the freedom to sleep next to lakes and quiet beaches.
gept.example_zh: 一輛小露營車讓我們能自由地在湖邊和寧靜海灘旁過夜。

gept.example_en: Renting an rv allowed our family of five to travel cheaply across the national park.
gept.example_zh: 租一輛休旅露營車讓我們五口之家便宜地穿越國家公園。

gept.example_en: Each campsite-spot included a fire ring, a table, and a clean water tap.
gept.example_zh: 每個露營地點位都包含一個火爐圈、一張桌子和乾淨水龍頭。

gept.example_en: We chose a flat tent-pitch under the trees to stay cool during the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我們選了樹下平坦的紮營處，下午能保持涼爽。

gept.example_en: Children sat around the fire-pit roasting marshmallows late into the cool evening.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們圍著營火坑烤棉花糖，一直待到涼爽的傍晚。

gept.example_en: The tour-bus picked us up at six and dropped us back at the hotel at nine.
gept.example_zh: 旅遊巴士六點來接我們，九點送我們回飯店。

gept.example_en: A bright orange minibus connects the village to the main train station hourly.
gept.example_zh: 一輛亮橙色的小巴士每小時連接村莊與主要火車站。

gept.example_en: Our two-day coach-trip stopped at three small towns and one quiet lakeside.
gept.example_zh: 我們的兩日長途遊覽車之旅停了三個小鎮和一個寧靜湖畔。

gept.example_en: A sleeper-train saved us a hotel night and got us to the city by sunrise.
gept.example_zh: 臥鋪列車省了我們一晚住宿，日出時就到城裡。

gept.example_en: Our small sleeper-cabin had two narrow beds and a tiny window over the desk.
gept.example_zh: 我們的小臥鋪車廂有兩張窄床和書桌上方的一扇小窗。

gept.example_en: I booked an upper berth on the night train because it was a little cheaper.
gept.example_zh: 我訂了夜班火車的上鋪，因為比較便宜一點。

gept.example_en: A six-person couchette was crowded but felt warm and friendly during the long ride.
gept.example_zh: 六人簡易臥鋪雖然擁擠，但長途旅行中感覺溫暖友善。

gept.example_en: He used air miles to upgrade to a comfortable first-class-seat for the long flight.
gept.example_zh: 他用飛行哩數升級到舒適的頭等艙座位飛長途。

gept.example_en: Economy-class seats are smaller, but the company always paid the lowest fares.
gept.example_zh: 經濟艙座位較小，但公司總是付最低票價。

gept.example_en: She slept well in business-class and arrived at the meeting ready to present.
gept.example_zh: 她在商務艙睡得好，抵達會議時神清氣爽準備上台。

gept.example_en: A premium-seat with extra legroom is worth it on flights longer than six hours.
gept.example_zh: 六小時以上航班，加大腿部空間的升級座位很值得。

gept.example_en: Taller passengers often choose seats with extra-legroom near the emergency rows.
gept.example_zh: 身材高大的旅客常選擇緊急出口排附近有加大腿部空間的座位。

gept.example_en: A bulkhead-seat has no seat in front, which feels open but limits storage space.
gept.example_zh: 隔板前座位前方沒有座椅，感覺開闊但儲物空間受限。

gept.example_en: A friendly redcap helped my grandmother with her bags at the busy train station.
gept.example_zh: 一位友善的車站行李工幫我奶奶在繁忙的火車站搬行李。

gept.example_en: The ticket-window opens an hour before the first train leaves the platform.
gept.example_zh: 售票窗口在第一班火車離站前一小時開放。

gept.example_en: The ticket-machine accepts coins, small notes, and most international credit cards.
gept.example_zh: 售票機接受硬幣、小面額紙鈔和大多數國際信用卡。

gept.example_en: A stored-value card is the easiest way to ride buses and trains in this city.
gept.example_zh: 儲值卡是在這座城市搭巴士和火車最方便的方式。

gept.example_en: Top up your metro-card before rush hour to avoid long lines at the machine.
gept.example_zh: 尖峰前先儲值地鐵卡，可避免在機台前大排長龍。

gept.example_en: Buy a day-pass for unlimited rides if you plan to visit several neighborhoods.
gept.example_zh: 如果你打算逛好幾個街區，買張一日通票無限次搭乘最划算。

gept.example_en: A week-pass costs much less than buying single tickets every single day.
gept.example_zh: 週票比每天買單張票便宜很多。

gept.example_en: The city-pass included free entry to ten museums and unlimited public transport.
gept.example_zh: 這張城市通行卡包含十間博物館免費入場與無限制大眾運輸。

gept.example_en: A rail-pass lets you travel across the country on most regional trains for a week.
gept.example_zh: 鐵路通票讓你一週內可搭乘全國大部分區域火車。

gept.example_en: Check the platform-number again ten minutes before the train is scheduled to leave.
gept.example_zh: 火車預定發車前十分鐘，請再確認一次月台號碼。

gept.example_en: Please stay behind the yellow line while the high-speed train passes the track.
gept.example_zh: 高速列車經過軌道時，請站在黃線後方。

gept.example_en: The new rail-line connects the small island town to the busy capital city.
gept.example_zh: 新鐵路線連接小島城鎮與繁忙的首都。

gept.example_en: Bus-route number twelve passes the old market and stops near our hotel.
gept.example_zh: 十二號公車路線經過舊市場，並在我們飯店附近停靠。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 直達公車；快速巴士
gept.example_en: Take the express-bus from the airport to save time during heavy evening traffic.
gept.example_zh: 傍晚交通繁忙時，搭機場直達巴士可以省時間。

gept.example_en: The slow local-bus is cheaper, but it stops at every small village along the way.
gept.example_zh: 速度慢的普通公車便宜，但沿途每個小村莊都會停。

gept.example_en: The old wooden tram climbs the hill slowly and offers beautiful harbor views.
gept.example_zh: 古老的木製路面電車緩慢爬坡，欣賞美麗的港灣景色。

gept.example_en: We rode a colorful trolley across the city's old downtown for only one dollar.
gept.example_zh: 我們花一美元搭彩色有軌電車穿越市區舊城區。

gept.example_en: The monorail circles the theme park and connects all four main hotel resorts.
gept.example_zh: 單軌列車繞主題樂園一圈，連接所有四個主要度假村。

gept.example_en: The modern skytrain offers fast travel above the busy streets of the city.
gept.example_zh: 現代的空鐵能在繁忙街道上方快速通行。

gept.example_en: A new lightrail line opened last year and made commuting much easier for everyone.
gept.example_zh: 新輕軌路線去年開通，讓大家通勤方便許多。

gept.example_en: Tourists should use the cab-stand outside the station to avoid unlicensed drivers.
gept.example_zh: 觀光客應使用車站外的計程車招呼站，避免遇到無照司機。

gept.example_en: The taxi-rank near the hotel always has a few cars waiting for late arrivals.
gept.example_zh: 飯店附近的計程車排班處總有幾輛車等晚到的旅客。

gept.example_en: Ask the driver to turn on the fare-meter before the car starts moving.
gept.example_zh: 請司機在車子開動前打開計費表。

gept.example_en: A flat-fare from the airport saves visitors from being overcharged at night.
gept.example_zh: 機場固定票價讓遊客晚上免於被多收費。

gept.example_en: Avoid the peak-fare by taking the train after nine in the morning if possible.
gept.example_zh: 如果可以，盡量在早上九點後搭火車避開尖峰時段票價。

gept.example_en: Off-peak train tickets are usually cheaper, so plan your sightseeing around them.
gept.example_zh: 離峰火車票通常較便宜，可以據此安排觀光行程。

gept.example_en: The rush-period on weekdays makes buses very full between seven and nine.
gept.example_zh: 平日通勤尖峰時段使公車在七點到九點間非常擁擠。

gept.example_en: The hotel arranged a minivan-shuttle to take guests to the train station on time.
gept.example_zh: 飯店安排小型接駁車準時送客人到火車站。

gept.example_en: Our airport-bus stopped at three downtown hotels before reaching our own.
gept.example_zh: 我們的機場巴士在抵達我們飯店前先停了三間市區飯店。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 豪華轎車接送服務
gept.example_en: Their wedding package included a limo-service from the airport for the bride's family.
gept.example_zh: 他們的婚禮方案包含機場到府的豪華轎車接送服務，給新娘家人使用。

gept.example_en: Hiring a private-driver for the day made our wine country trip very smooth.
gept.example_zh: 請一日私人司機讓我們的酒鄉旅行非常順暢。

gept.example_en: Our tour-driver knew shortcuts that helped us avoid the long midday traffic jams.
gept.example_zh: 我們的旅遊司機知道捷徑，幫我們避開漫長的中午塞車。

gept.example_en: Our friendly tour-leader counted heads carefully after every museum stop.
gept.example_zh: 我們親切的領隊每次離開博物館後都會仔細點人數。

gept.example_en: A small local tour-operator offered better value than a large international chain.
gept.example_zh: 一家當地小型旅行業者比大型國際連鎖提供更划算的方案。

gept.example_en: Compare the total trip-cost, including taxes and tips, before booking online.
gept.example_zh: 線上預訂前，請比較含稅及小費的旅行總費用。

gept.example_en: I started a small travel-fund last year and now I can afford a family trip.
gept.example_zh: 去年我開始存一小筆旅行基金，現在能負擔得起家庭旅行。

gept.example_en: Plan a clear travel-budget for food, transport, and any extra activities along the way.
gept.example_zh: 請為食物、交通和沿途任何額外活動規劃明確的旅行預算。

gept.example_en: Their luxury-trip included a private chef and beautiful villas by the ocean.
gept.example_zh: 他們的奢華旅行包含私人主廚和海邊的美麗別墅。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 平價旅行；省錢之旅
gept.example_en: Our two-week budget-trip cost less than one weekend at a fancy beach resort.
gept.example_zh: 我們兩週的省錢之旅比在高級海灘度假村度週末還便宜。

gept.example_en: She traveled across Europe on a shoestring budget by staying in hostels and walking.
gept.example_zh: 她以極省錢的預算穿越歐洲，住青年旅館並徒步代步。

gept.example_en: The neighborhood is famous for cheap-eats that locals enjoy for lunch every day.
gept.example_zh: 這個社區以當地人天天午餐享用的平價美食聞名。

gept.example_en: The busy night-market is full of small stalls selling food, clothes, and toys.
gept.example_zh: 熱鬧的夜市裡擠滿販賣食物、衣服和玩具的小攤。

gept.example_en: We found beautiful old postcards at the weekend flea-market downtown.
gept.example_zh: 我們在週末市中心的跳蚤市場找到漂亮的舊明信片。

gept.example_en: A small craft-market filled the town square with paintings and handmade jewelry.
gept.example_zh: 一個小型手工藝市集讓鎮上廣場滿是畫作與手工首飾。

gept.example_en: The open-air-market in the village starts at dawn and closes around lunchtime.
gept.example_zh: 村裡的露天市集天剛亮開始，中午左右結束。

gept.example_en: A tiny souvenir-stand near the temple sold beautiful handmade paper fans.
gept.example_zh: 寺廟附近的小紀念品攤賣著漂亮的手工紙扇。

gept.example_en: I always send postcards from a postcard-shop near each major attraction I visit.
gept.example_zh: 我總在每個主要景點附近的明信片商店買明信片寄回家。

gept.example_en: She collects a small fridge-magnet from every country she travels to with friends.
gept.example_zh: 她每和朋友去一個國家旅行，就收集一個小冰箱磁鐵。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 雪花玻璃球（紀念品）
gept.example_en: He bought a tiny snowglobe of the famous tower as a gift for his little sister.
gept.example_zh: 他買了一個著名鐵塔的小雪花玻璃球送給妹妹當禮物。

gept.example_en: Each child received a small tour-badge after finishing the museum walking activity.
gept.example_zh: 每個孩子完成博物館步行活動後都拿到一枚小旅遊徽章。

gept.example_en: Our small guesthouse-room had a window facing the garden and a comfortable bed.
gept.example_zh: 我們的小民宿房間窗戶面對花園，床鋪舒適。

gept.example_en: A friendly bed-breakfast in the countryside offered homemade jam every morning.
gept.example_zh: 鄉間一家親切的含早餐住宿每天早上供應自製果醬。

gept.example_en: Our kind homestay-host taught us how to cook a simple local soup for dinner.
gept.example_zh: 我們親切的民宿主人教我們做晚餐用的簡單當地湯品。

gept.example_en: A weekend rural-stay let the kids feed sheep and pick fresh fruit in the orchard.
gept.example_zh: 週末的鄉村住宿體驗讓孩子們餵羊，並到果園採摘新鮮水果。

gept.example_en: On our farm-stay we helped feed the goats and gathered eggs from the small henhouse.
gept.example_zh: 在農場住宿期間，我們幫忙餵山羊，並從小雞舍收集雞蛋。

gept.example_en: We spent one night in a treehouse-stay and listened to the rain on the leaves.
gept.example_zh: 我們在樹屋住了一晚，聆聽雨打在樹葉上的聲音。

gept.example_en: A quiet boutique-inn down the alley offered free coffee and warm fresh bread.
gept.example_zh: 巷子裡有一家安靜的精品旅店，提供免費咖啡和溫熱新鮮麵包。

gept.example_en: The luxury-resort had three pools and a private path leading down to the beach.
gept.example_zh: 豪華度假村有三座泳池和一條通往海灘的私人小徑。

gept.example_en: We celebrated our anniversary at a quiet spa-resort with hot springs in the mountains.
gept.example_zh: 我們在山中一家安靜的溫泉度假村慶祝結婚紀念日。

gept.example_en: The ski-resort offered beginner lessons every morning at the small bunny slope.
gept.example_zh: 滑雪度假村每天早上在小型新手坡提供初學者課程。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 海灘旁的；面海的
gept.example_en: Our small beachfront cottage faced the sunset and had soft sand right at the door.
gept.example_zh: 我們的海灘旁小屋面對夕陽，門口就是柔軟的沙灘。

gept.example_en: We rented a quiet lakeside cabin where we could fish from the wooden dock.
gept.example_zh: 我們租了一間湖畔小屋，可以從木製碼頭釣魚。

gept.example_en: The riverfront hotel had wide windows facing the calm water and old stone bridge.
gept.example_zh: 河畔飯店有寬敞的窗戶面對平靜河面與古老石橋。

gept.example_en: A small village on the mountainside grows tea and welcomes tired walkers each year.
gept.example_zh: 山腰上的小村莊種茶，每年歡迎疲倦的步行者前來。

gept.example_en: A short walk uphill leads to a lookout-point with amazing sunset views every day.
gept.example_zh: 往上走一小段路就是一個瞭望點，每天都能看到驚人的夕陽。

gept.example_en: The observation-deck on the top floor offered a clear view of the busy harbor.
gept.example_zh: 頂樓的觀景台能清楚看到繁忙港口的景色。

gept.example_en: The driver made a quick photo-stop at the lake so we could take group pictures.
gept.example_zh: 司機在湖邊做了短暫的拍照停留，讓我們拍團體照。

gept.example_en: A popular selfie-spot near the colorful wall was busy with tourists all afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 彩色牆旁的人氣自拍點整個下午都擠滿了觀光客。

gept.example_en: We followed the scenic-route along the coast even though it took an extra hour.
gept.example_zh: 雖然多花一小時，我們還是選擇沿海岸的風景路線。

gept.example_en: The scenic-drive through the mountains was the highlight of our entire week.
gept.example_zh: 穿越山區的觀景駕車路線是我們一整週的亮點。

gept.example_en: A summer road-trip with old friends is one of my favorite memories from college.
gept.example_zh: 和老朋友一起的夏日公路旅行是我大學時最愛的回憶之一。

gept.example_en: We made a quick pit-stop at a small diner for coffee and warm apple pie.
gept.example_zh: 我們在一家小餐館短暫休息，喝咖啡並吃溫熱的蘋果派。

gept.example_en: The rest-stop on the highway had clean restrooms, vending machines, and picnic tables.
gept.example_zh: 高速公路上的休息站有乾淨洗手間、自動販賣機和野餐桌。

gept.example_en: Most highway service-area locations sell hot meals and have play spaces for kids.
gept.example_zh: 大多數高速公路服務區販賣熱食，並有兒童遊戲區。

gept.example_en: Top up the tank at the next fuel-station because the road ahead is very empty.
gept.example_zh: 下一個加油站要加滿油，因為前面的路非常空曠。

gept.example_en: She paid at the gas-pump with her card and was back on the road in five minutes.
gept.example_zh: 她在加油泵用卡片付款，五分鐘就再次上路。

gept.example_en: We planned a quick ev-charge break at the highway stop while we ate breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 我們在高速公路休息站邊吃早餐邊安排短暫的電動車充電。

gept.example_en: A modern charging-station near the rest area now serves both electric cars and bikes.
gept.example_zh: 休息站附近一座現代充電站現在同時服務電動車與電動自行車。

gept.example_en: Finding a parking-space near the old town center can be very difficult on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 週末在舊市中心附近找停車位非常困難。

gept.example_en: The hotel covered the parking-fee for guests who stayed at least two nights.
gept.example_zh: 飯店為入住至少兩晚的客人負擔停車費。

gept.example_en: Hang the parking-pass on the mirror or guards may give your car a paper ticket.
gept.example_zh: 請把停車通行證掛在後視鏡上，否則警衛可能給你的車開罰單。

gept.example_en: The hotel offered free valet-service for guests arriving in their own cars.
gept.example_zh: 飯店為自駕到達的客人提供免費代客泊車服務。

gept.example_en: Use the short drop-off-area in front of the terminal if you just want to wave goodbye.
gept.example_zh: 如果只是要送人揮手道別，請使用航廈前短暫的下車區。

gept.example_en: Wait in the pick-up-area outside the arrivals hall and watch for our blue minivan.
gept.example_zh: 請在入境大廳外的接客區等候，留意我們的藍色小巴士。

gept.example_en: Drop me off at the kerbside near the lights and I can walk the rest of the way.
gept.example_zh: 在紅綠燈附近的路邊讓我下車就好，剩下的路我可以自己走。

gept.example_en: The taxi-fare from the airport to downtown can change a lot during rush hours.
gept.example_zh: 從機場到市區的計程車費在尖峰時段會差異很大。

gept.example_en: A popular ride-app gave us a clear fare estimate before we confirmed the trip.
gept.example_zh: 一款人氣叫車應用程式在我們確認行程前提供了清楚的車資估算。

gept.example_en: City residents often use carshare instead of buying a private car for daily travel.
gept.example_zh: 城市居民日常代步常用共乘汽車服務，而非自己買私家車。

gept.example_en: Try the bikeshare system to explore small streets that buses cannot easily enter.
gept.example_zh: 試試共享單車，能探索公車不容易進入的小巷。

gept.example_en: An ebike makes long uphill rides much easier for visitors who are not very fit.
gept.example_zh: 電動自行車讓體力不佳的遊客長距離上坡輕鬆許多。

gept.example_en: A bright yellow tuk-tuk took us through narrow alleys to a quiet local temple.
gept.example_zh: 一輛亮黃色嘟嘟車載我們穿過小巷，到一座安靜的當地寺廟。

gept.example_en: A friendly driver pulled the wooden rickshaw slowly through the old market streets.
gept.example_zh: 一位友善的車伕慢慢地拉著木製人力車穿過舊市場街道。

gept.example_en: A short ride on a horse-cart around the square was a fun memory for the children.
gept.example_zh: 搭馬車繞廣場一圈，成為孩子們有趣的回憶。

gept.example_en: The small ferry-port has just one ticket window and a tiny waiting room inside.
gept.example_zh: 小型渡輪碼頭只有一個售票窗口和裡面一間小小的候船室。

gept.example_en: Wait on the boarding-deck and follow the crew when they open the heavy steel door.
gept.example_zh: 請在登船甲板等候，當船員打開沉重的鋼門時跟著進入。

gept.example_en: Our cruise-ship visited four islands in one week and had three restaurants on board.
gept.example_zh: 我們的郵輪一週造訪四個島嶼，船上有三間餐廳。

gept.example_en: Some families return to the same cruise-line every year because the children love it.
gept.example_zh: 有些家庭因為孩子喜歡，每年都搭乘同一家郵輪公司。

gept.example_en: The morning shore-excursion included a guided tour of an ancient stone village.
gept.example_zh: 早上的岸上觀光行程包含導覽參觀一座古老的石頭村莊。

gept.example_en: Embarkation begins at noon, but please arrive an hour earlier to drop your bags.
gept.example_zh: 登船從中午開始，但請提前一小時抵達寄放行李。

gept.example_en: Passengers in the front rows will disembark first when the door is finally open.
gept.example_zh: 門打開時，前排乘客會先下機。

gept.example_en: Hold the railing on the gangway because the steps can be slippery after rain.
gept.example_zh: 走上下船舷梯時請抓著扶手，雨後階梯可能很滑。

gept.example_en: Guests napped quietly on every deckchair while the ship sailed across calm blue water.
gept.example_zh: 船在平靜藍色海面上航行時，每張甲板躺椅都有客人安靜地小睡。

gept.example_en: The crew showed us how to use the lifejacket as soon as we found our seats.
gept.example_zh: 我們一找到座位，船員就示範救生衣的使用方式。

gept.example_en: Each lifeboat hangs along the side of the ship and is ready to lower at any time.
gept.example_zh: 每艘救生艇都懸掛在船身兩側，隨時準備放下。

gept.example_en: I felt seasick during the rough ferry ride and could not enjoy the views outside.
gept.example_zh: 渡輪顛簸的航行中我覺得暈船，無法享受窗外景色。

gept.example_en: The winding mountain road made my little brother feel carsick for the whole hour.
gept.example_zh: 蜿蜒的山路讓我弟弟整整一小時都暈車。

gept.example_en: She felt airsick during the bumpy flight and asked the crew for a small paper bag.
gept.example_zh: 顛簸的航行中她感到暈機，向機組要了一個小紙袋。

gept.example_en: Visit a travel-doctor before your trip to discuss vaccines for the country you visit.
gept.example_zh: 出發前請拜訪旅遊醫師，討論前往國家需要的疫苗。

gept.example_en: Keep a small first-aid-kit in your bag with bandages and basic painkillers.
gept.example_zh: 請在包包裡放一個小急救包，內含繃帶與基本止痛藥。

gept.example_en: Many tropical guesthouses provide a mosquito-net over each bed for extra safety.
gept.example_zh: 許多熱帶民宿在每張床上都掛蚊帳，提供額外的安全。

gept.example_en: Apply strong bug-spray before walking into the forest to avoid itchy insect bites.
gept.example_zh: 進入森林前請噴上強效防蚊噴霧，避免被叮得發癢。

gept.example_en: A light rain-poncho fits easily in a pocket and is perfect for sudden showers.
gept.example_zh: 輕便雨披可輕鬆放入口袋，最適合突如其來的陣雨。

gept.example_en: Break in your hiking-boots at home before you wear them on the long mountain trail.
gept.example_zh: 在家先把登山靴磨合好，再穿上長長的山徑。

gept.example_en: An old wooden walking-stick helped my grandfather climb the steep temple steps slowly.
gept.example_zh: 一根舊木登山杖幫我爺爺慢慢地爬上陡峭的寺廟階梯。

gept.example_en: Carry a small day-bag with water, snacks, and a light jacket for your walk.
gept.example_zh: 步行時請帶上裝水、零食和輕外套的隨身小背包。

gept.example_en: A simple fanny-pack is a hands-free way to carry cash and a small phone outdoors.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的腰包是戶外活動時免持帶現金和手機的方便選擇。

gept.example_en: A small crossbody-bag with a thick strap is harder for pickpockets to grab quickly.
gept.example_zh: 粗背帶的小斜背包讓扒手不容易快速搶走。

gept.example_en: Use an anti-theft backpack with hidden zippers when you walk in crowded tourist areas.
gept.example_zh: 在擁擠的觀光區步行時，請使用拉鍊隱藏式的防盜背包。

gept.example_en: I locked my suitcase to the seat with a padlock-cable on the long overnight bus ride.
gept.example_zh: 在長途夜班巴士上，我用鎖鏈把行李箱鎖在座位上。

gept.example_en: A small luggage-lock can stop a casual thief from opening your bag at the airport.
gept.example_zh: 一個小行李鎖能阻止隨機小偷在機場打開你的包包。

gept.example_en: Every passenger may bring one checked-bag under twenty-three kilograms in total.
gept.example_zh: 每位乘客可攜帶一件總重不超過二十三公斤的託運行李。

gept.example_en: Keep medicine and one change of clothes in your cabin-bag for emergencies.
gept.example_zh: 請把藥品和一套換洗衣物放在隨身手提行李裡，以備不時之需。

gept.example_en: A soft duffel is easier to fit into small overhead bins than a hard suitcase.
gept.example_zh: 柔軟的圓筒袋比硬殼行李箱更容易塞進小的機艙置物箱。

gept.example_en: A medium rolling-suitcase is perfect for a one-week trip with simple casual clothes.
gept.example_zh: 中型拉桿行李箱最適合帶簡單便服的一週旅行。

gept.example_en: A few colorful packing-cube sets keep my clothes neat and easy to find every day.
gept.example_zh: 幾組彩色收納袋讓我的衣服每天都整齊好找。

gept.example_en: Pour shampoo into a small travel-bottle so you can pass airport security easily.
gept.example_zh: 把洗髮精倒入小型旅行分裝瓶，方便輕鬆通過機場安檢。

gept.example_en: Pack a universal adapter-plug because different countries use different power outlets.
gept.example_zh: 請帶一個萬用轉接插頭，因為不同國家插座規格不同。

gept.example_en: Use a voltage-converter for hair tools if the country has a different power system.
gept.example_zh: 若該國電力系統不同，使用美髮工具時請接電壓轉換器。

gept.example_en: An esim-card from a travel app gave me data the moment my plane landed safely.
gept.example_zh: 旅行應用程式的電子SIM卡讓我飛機一落地就有網路。

gept.example_en: Turn off data-roaming in your phone settings to avoid surprising bills later.
gept.example_zh: 請在手機設定關閉數據漫遊，免得日後收到驚人帳單。

gept.example_en: Most cafes and stations offer a free wifi-hotspot, but the signal can be slow.
gept.example_zh: 多數咖啡店與車站提供免費無線網路熱點，但訊號可能緩慢。

gept.example_en: We rented a pocket-wifi at the airport so all four of us could share fast internet.
gept.example_zh: 我們在機場租了一台隨身網路機，讓四個人都能共享高速網路。

gept.example_en: Always check what your trip-insurance covers before paying for an expensive vacation.
gept.example_zh: 在付昂貴度假費用前，請先確認旅遊保險的保障範圍。

gept.example_en: Fill in the claim-form with clear receipts to get money back for the canceled flight.
gept.example_zh: 請用清楚收據填寫理賠申請表，以取回取消航班的費用。

gept.example_en: Write the name of your emergency-contact inside your passport just in case.
gept.example_zh: 請在護照內側寫下緊急聯絡人姓名，以備不時之需。

gept.example_en: Call your embassy-help line right away if you lose your passport while abroad.
gept.example_zh: 若在國外遺失護照，請立刻撥打大使館協助專線。

gept.example_en: You need a police-report from the local station to request a new passport quickly.
gept.example_zh: 你需要當地警局的報警紀錄才能快速申請新護照。

gept.example_en: Many cities have a friendly tourist-police office near the main attractions for help.
gept.example_zh: 許多城市在主要景點附近設有親切的旅遊警察辦事處提供協助。

gept.example_en: A short consulate-visit can solve passport problems much faster than you might expect.
gept.example_zh: 短暫拜訪領事館能比你想像中更快解決護照問題。

gept.example_en: Read the evacuation-route map in your hotel room as soon as you check in safely.
gept.example_zh: 辦理入住後請立刻閱讀房間裡的疏散路線地圖。

gept.example_en: Look at the safety-card in the seat pocket before the airplane begins to taxi.
gept.example_zh: 飛機開始滑行前，請看一下座位前袋裡的安全須知卡。

gept.example_en: Boarding-time begins thirty minutes before departure, so do not wander too far away.
gept.example_zh: 登機時間從起飛前三十分鐘開始，請勿走得太遠。

gept.example_en: Our departure-time changed by an hour, so we had time for one more coffee.
gept.example_zh: 我們的出發時間調動了一小時，所以還能再喝一杯咖啡。

gept.example_en: Send your arrival-time to the hotel so the driver can wait for you outside.
gept.example_zh: 請把到達時間傳給飯店，司機才能在外面等你。

gept.example_en: Change your watch to the new time-zone right after you land, not later that night.
gept.example_zh: 降落後請立刻把手錶調到新時區，別等到當晚才調。

gept.example_en: Don't forget that daylight-saving may change your flight time by one whole hour.
gept.example_zh: 別忘了日光節約時間可能會讓你的航班時間整整差一小時。

gept.example_en: Learn a few local-customs before your trip to show respect to the people you meet.
gept.example_zh: 出發前學一些當地習俗，向遇見的人表示尊重。

gept.example_en: Follow the dress-norm at religious sites and cover your shoulders and knees politely.
gept.example_zh: 在宗教場所請遵守服裝規範，禮貌地遮住肩膀和膝蓋。

gept.example_en: A quiet shrine-visit early in the morning was the most peaceful part of our trip.
gept.example_zh: 清晨安靜的神社參觀是我們旅程中最寧靜的部分。

gept.example_en: Get lost on purpose in the old-quarter to find small shops and quiet courtyards.
gept.example_zh: 故意在舊城區迷路，能發現小店家和安靜的庭院。

gept.example_en: The narrow streets of the old-town are lined with bakeries, cafes, and tiny shops.
gept.example_zh: 老城狹窄的街道兩旁排列著麵包店、咖啡館和小商店。

gept.example_en: Locals and visitors gathered in the town-square to watch the evening street musicians.
gept.example_zh: 當地居民與遊客聚集在城鎮廣場觀看傍晚的街頭音樂家。

gept.example_en: A simple village-stay let us share meals with a family and learn their traditions.
gept.example_zh: 簡單的鄉村住宿之旅讓我們與一個家庭共餐並學習他們的傳統。

gept.example_en: Booking early often gives you a tour-discount of about fifteen percent off the price.
gept.example_zh: 提早預訂常常能享有約一五折扣的旅遊優惠。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞/名詞) 早鳥的；早鳥優惠
gept.example_en: An early-bird booking saved us about thirty dollars on each museum ticket today.
gept.example_zh: 早鳥訂票讓我們今天每張博物館門票省下約三十美元。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 最後一刻的；臨時的
gept.example_en: Some travel websites offer big last-minute deals for unsold hotel rooms each evening.
gept.example_zh: 有些旅遊網站每晚為未售出的飯店房間提供超大臨時優惠。

gept.example_en: She used her loyalty-points to get one free hotel night after a long business week.
gept.example_zh: 她用會員點數換到忙碌出差週後的一晚免費飯店住宿。

gept.example_en: Join a miles-program if you fly often, so each trip helps pay for the next one.
gept.example_zh: 若常搭飛機，請加入飛行哩程計畫，讓每次旅行協助支付下一次。

gept.example_en: We were lucky to receive a free-upgrade to a room with a beautiful sea view.
gept.example_zh: 我們很幸運獲得免費升等到一間有美麗海景的房間。

gept.example_en: The hotel offered each guest a cold welcome-drink in the lobby after a long flight.
gept.example_zh: 飯店在大廳為每位長途航班後的客人提供一杯冰涼的迎賓飲品。

gept.example_en: Drinks from the minibar can be quite expensive, so I bought water from a shop nearby.
gept.example_zh: 客房小冰箱的飲料可能相當貴，所以我從附近商店買水。

gept.example_en: We ordered a late dinner from room-service after exploring the city all evening.
gept.example_zh: 整晚探索城市後，我們從客房服務點了一份晚到的晚餐。

gept.example_en: Ask the front desk for a six o'clock wake-up-call so you don't miss your bus.
gept.example_zh: 請櫃台幫你安排六點的晨喚服務，以免錯過巴士。

gept.example_en: Check-out-time is at eleven, but the staff can store your bags for the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 退房時間是十一點，但工作人員可以幫你保管行李到下午。

gept.example_en: If you ask kindly, the hotel sometimes allows an early-checkin without an extra fee.
gept.example_zh: 若禮貌詢問，飯店有時會允許提早入住而不加收費用。

gept.example_en: Members of the loyalty club can enjoy free late-checkout up to two in the afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 會員可享免費延後退房至下午兩點。

gept.example_en: The hotel's concierge-desk booked a quiet restaurant for our small family dinner.
gept.example_zh: 飯店禮賓服務台為我們小家庭晚餐預訂了一家安靜的餐廳。

gept.example_en: Most train stations have a paid luggage-storage room for travelers between long trips.
gept.example_zh: 多數火車站都有付費行李寄存室，供長途旅客中間使用。

gept.example_en: The locker-room-station near the exit was the cheapest way to store our bags today.
gept.example_zh: 出口附近的車站置物櫃區是今天最便宜的行李寄存方式。

gept.example_en: A small coin-locker at the station kept our day bags safe while we toured the city.
gept.example_zh: 車站的小投幣式置物櫃幫我們在遊覽城市時保管隨身包。

gept.example_en: Drop your bags at the left-luggage office and pick them up later before your train.
gept.example_zh: 請把包包寄放在行李寄物處，搭火車前再回來領取。

gept.example_en: Our tour-refund came through quickly once we submitted the canceled flight documents.
gept.example_zh: 我們提交取消航班文件後，旅遊退款很快就核發下來。

gept.example_en: You can reschedule-flight online without paying any fee within twenty-four hours of booking.
gept.example_zh: 訂位後二十四小時內可在線上免費改簽航班。

gept.example_en: Hotels sometimes charge a full night for a no-show guest who never calls to cancel.
gept.example_zh: 對於不取消又未到的爽約客人，飯店有時會收一整晚費用。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 臨櫃住客；無預訂客人
gept.example_en: Small inns often accept a walk-in-guest if rooms are still empty by late evening.
gept.example_zh: 若到傍晚仍有空房，小旅館常接受臨櫃住客。

gept.example_en: Always confirm by email to prevent a stressful double-booking on your arrival day.
gept.example_zh: 請務必以電郵確認，避免抵達當天緊張的重複預訂狀況。

gept.example_en: Airlines sometimes face overbooking and may offer money for guests to take a later flight.
gept.example_zh: 航空公司有時會超賣訂位，並提供費用給願意改搭下班機的乘客。

gept.example_en: Enter the voucher-code at checkout to apply your special twenty-percent travel discount.
gept.example_zh: 請在結帳時輸入折扣碼，享受八折特別旅遊優惠。

gept.example_en: Listen carefully for your boarding-zone before joining the line at the gate.
gept.example_zh: 在登機口排隊前，請仔細留意自己的登機區段廣播。

gept.example_en: Frequent flyers can use the short priority-line at busy security checkpoints.
gept.example_zh: 常旅客可以在繁忙安檢處使用短的優先通道。

gept.example_en: Lounge-access at the airport made our four-hour layover much more pleasant.
gept.example_zh: 機場貴賓室進入權讓我們四小時的轉機等候舒服許多。

gept.example_en: We rested in the quiet airline-lounge with free snacks and very fast wifi.
gept.example_zh: 我們在安靜的航空公司貴賓室休息，享受免費點心與高速無線網路。

gept.example_en: The airport had a paid shower-room which felt wonderful after a long overnight flight.
gept.example_zh: 機場有付費淋浴間，長途夜班飛行後使用感覺非常舒服。

gept.example_en: She made a small book of her favorite trip-photo to share with her grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 她把最愛的旅行照片做成一本小書，要分享給奶奶。

gept.example_en: Bring a spare memory-card on your trip so you don't have to delete photos later.
gept.example_zh: 旅行請多帶一張記憶卡，才不必之後刪掉照片。

gept.example_en: A small rain-cover for your backpack is a smart idea on every outdoor sightseeing day.
gept.example_zh: 戶外觀光的每一天為背包準備小防雨罩都是聰明的選擇。

gept.example_en: A free museum guide-app played short stories at each painting through my headphones.
gept.example_zh: 一款免費博物館導覽應用程式透過耳機在每幅畫播放小故事。

gept.example_en: Show the qr-ticket on your phone screen at the gate to enter the theme park.
gept.example_zh: 請在閘門出示手機螢幕上的QR碼門票，進入主題樂園。

gept.example_en: Save your e-ticket as a screenshot in case the wifi is too slow at the entrance.
gept.example_zh: 請把電子票存成截圖，以防入口無線網路太慢。

gept.example_en: A traditional paper-ticket is still required by some small countryside train stations.
gept.example_zh: 有些鄉間小火車站至今仍要求傳統紙本票。

gept.example_en: Ask the friendly staff at the ticket-counter about today's group discount tickets.
gept.example_zh: 請向售票櫃台親切的工作人員詢問今天的團體優惠票。

gept.example_en: Ten or more people qualify for a special group-rate on the boat ride this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 十人以上可享下午遊船的團體特惠票價。

gept.example_en: The child-rate is half price for visitors between three and twelve years of age.
gept.example_zh: 兒童票價為三至十二歲遊客票價的一半。

gept.example_en: A friendly clerk reminded my mother to ask for the senior-rate at every museum.
gept.example_zh: 一位親切的售票員提醒我媽媽，每家博物館都要詢問敬老票價。

gept.example_en: Bring your international student card to get a cheaper student-rate at major sights.
gept.example_zh: 請攜帶國際學生證，在主要景點可享較便宜的學生票價。

gept.example_en: The aquarium offered a family-rate for two adults and up to three small children.
gept.example_zh: 水族館為兩位大人和最多三位小朋友提供家庭優惠價。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 常看電影的人；影迷
gept.example_en: As a regular moviegoer, she watches at least two new releases every single month.
gept.example_zh: 身為一位常看電影的人，她每個月至少觀看兩部新上映的電影。

gept.example_en: Breaking into showbiz takes years of training, networking, and a great deal of luck.
gept.example_zh: 想打入演藝圈需要多年的訓練、人脈經營，以及相當多的運氣。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 螢幕使用時間；上鏡時間
gept.example_en: Doctors recommend limiting children's daily screen time to protect their developing eyes.
gept.example_zh: 醫生建議限制兒童每日的螢幕使用時間，以保護他們發育中的眼睛。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 影迷會；歌迷俱樂部
gept.example_en: The singer's official fanclub organizes exclusive meet-and-greet events twice every year.
gept.example_zh: 這位歌手的官方歌迷俱樂部每年舉辦兩次獨家見面會活動。

gept.example_en: Thousands of concertgoers waited patiently in line despite the heavy afternoon rain.
gept.example_zh: 儘管下午雨勢很大，數千名觀眾仍耐心地排隊等候演唱會。

gept.example_en: She created a special playlist filled with calm songs for studying late at night.
gept.example_zh: 她製作了一個充滿舒緩歌曲的特別播放清單，用來深夜讀書時聽。

gept.example_en: He lost one of his wireless earbuds while jogging through the busy city park.
gept.example_zh: 他在繁忙的城市公園慢跑時，弄丟了其中一個無線入耳式耳機。

gept.example_en: The principal made an announcement through the loudspeaker about tomorrow's special school event.
gept.example_zh: 校長透過擴音器宣布了明天學校特別活動的相關事項。

gept.example_en: His embarrassing ringtone went off loudly in the middle of the silent library.
gept.example_zh: 在安靜的圖書館中，他那令人尷尬的鈴聲突然大聲響起。

gept.example_en: Her latest hit song stayed at the top of the charts for eight straight weeks.
gept.example_zh: 她最新的熱門歌曲連續八週穩坐排行榜冠軍寶座。

gept.example_en: Their newest single quickly became a worldwide chart-topper within just three weeks.
gept.example_zh: 他們最新的單曲在短短三週內就成為全球排行榜冠軍。

gept.example_en: The cheering audience demanded an encore performance from the talented young pianist tonight.
gept.example_zh: 歡呼的觀眾今晚要求這位才華洋溢的年輕鋼琴家加演一場。

gept.example_en: He has been performing stand-up comedy at small clubs for nearly five years.
gept.example_zh: 他在小型俱樂部表演單口喜劇已將近五年了。

gept.example_en: The comedian delivered the punchline so perfectly that the whole crowd burst out laughing.
gept.example_zh: 這位喜劇演員把笑話的妙語講得太完美，整個觀眾都爆笑出聲。

gept.example_en: Improv classes can really help shy people become more confident in social situations.
gept.example_zh: 即興表演課程確實能幫助害羞的人在社交場合中變得更有自信。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 短劇喜劇；情境喜劇
gept.example_en: Their weekly sketch comedy show often pokes fun at recent political and social events.
gept.example_zh: 他們每週的短劇喜劇節目經常拿近期的政治和社會事件來開玩笑。

gept.example_en: My grandmother still watches reruns of her favorite sitcom from the late nineties.
gept.example_zh: 我奶奶仍會重看她最喜歡的九十年代後期情境喜劇。

gept.example_en: She has been following the same soap opera for over two decades now.
gept.example_zh: 她已經連續追看同一部肥皂劇超過二十年了。

gept.example_en: Many young people dream of becoming famous by appearing on a popular reality show.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人夢想透過參加熱門真人實境秀而一夜成名。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 電視益智節目；遊戲節目
gept.example_en: Contestants on this game show can win huge cash prizes for answering trivia questions.
gept.example_zh: 這個遊戲節目的參賽者可以靠回答常識問題贏得高額現金獎品。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 才藝表演；選秀節目
gept.example_en: Our school holds an annual talent show where students perform music, dance, and magic.
gept.example_zh: 我們學校每年舉辦一次才藝表演，學生們會表演音樂、舞蹈和魔術。

gept.example_en: Korean variety shows have gained millions of loyal fans all across Asia recently.
gept.example_zh: 韓國綜藝節目近年來在亞洲各地吸引了數百萬忠實粉絲。

gept.example_en: The two co-hosts have wonderful chemistry, which makes their morning show very entertaining.
gept.example_zh: 兩位共同主持人之間默契極佳，讓他們的晨間節目變得非常有趣。

gept.example_en: The veteran sportscaster has covered every major championship game for over thirty years.
gept.example_zh: 這位資深體育播報員報導過超過三十年的每一場重要冠軍賽事。

gept.example_en: I subscribe to a weekly magazine that covers international news and cultural trends.
gept.example_zh: 我訂閱了一份報導國際新聞和文化趨勢的週刊雜誌。

gept.example_en: The new monthly issue features a long interview with a famous fashion designer.
gept.example_zh: 新一期的月刊以一篇與知名時裝設計師的長篇專訪為特色。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 封面故事；頭條報導
gept.example_en: This week's cover story focuses on rising young artists in the local music scene.
gept.example_zh: 本週的封面故事聚焦於本地音樂圈中崛起的年輕藝術家。

gept.example_en: The shocking discovery made the front page of every major newspaper the next morning.
gept.example_zh: 這個驚人的發現隔天早上成為各大報紙的頭版新聞。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 政治漫畫；社論漫畫
gept.example_en: The editorial cartoon clearly mocked the mayor's recent decision about the public transportation system.
gept.example_zh: 這幅社論漫畫明顯地嘲諷了市長近期關於公共運輸系統的決定。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 連環漫畫；報紙漫畫
gept.example_en: He still reads the daily comic strip in the newspaper while eating his breakfast.
gept.example_zh: 他仍會邊吃早餐邊閱讀報紙上每日的連環漫畫。

gept.example_en: This graphic novel uses beautiful artwork to tell a powerful story about family bonds.
gept.example_zh: 這本圖像小說以優美的畫風述說一個關於家庭情感的動人故事。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 立體書；翻頁立體書
gept.example_en: The children gasped in amazement when they opened the magical pop-up book about dinosaurs.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們翻開那本關於恐龍的奇幻立體書時，驚訝得倒抽一口氣。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 書蟲；極愛讀書的人
gept.example_en: She is such a bookworm that she finishes three or four novels every single week.
gept.example_zh: 她是個十足的書蟲，每週能讀完三到四本小說。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 過期未還的；逾期的
gept.example_en: Three of my library books are now overdue, and I really need to return them.
gept.example_zh: 我借的三本圖書館書籍都已逾期，我真的得歸還它們了。

gept.example_en: I requested a renewal of the book online because I had not finished reading it.
gept.example_zh: 我在網路上申請續借這本書，因為我還沒讀完。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 閱讀角；舒適閱讀區
gept.example_en: She turned the corner by the window into a quiet reading nook filled with cushions.
gept.example_zh: 她把窗邊的角落改造成一個擺滿靠墊的安靜閱讀角。

gept.example_en: Around the campfire, my uncle told us a terrifying ghost story he heard as a child.
gept.example_zh: 在營火旁，叔叔講了一個他小時候聽過的可怕鬼故事給我們聽。

gept.example_en: Every fairy tale she read as a child seemed to end with the same happy ending.
gept.example_zh: 她小時候讀過的每個童話故事似乎都有同樣的幸福結局。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 民間故事；民間傳說
gept.example_en: This ancient folktale has been passed down through several generations in our village.
gept.example_zh: 這個古老的民間故事已經在我們村裡傳承了好幾個世代。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 誇張不可信的故事
gept.example_en: Grandpa loves telling tall tales about catching enormous fish during his fishing trips.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺很愛講些誇張不可信的故事，說他釣魚時釣到了巨大的魚。

gept.example_en: The scouts sang familiar campfire songs and roasted marshmallows under the starry sky.
gept.example_zh: 童子軍們在星空下唱著熟悉的營火歌曲，烤著棉花糖。

gept.example_en: We celebrated her birthday by going to a karaoke bar and singing for hours.
gept.example_zh: 我們在卡拉OK吧為她慶生，連續唱了好幾個小時。

gept.example_en: Our company hosts a fun karaoke night every other Friday after working hours.
gept.example_zh: 我們公司每隔一週的星期五下班後都會舉辦有趣的卡拉OK之夜。

gept.example_en: The band rented a soundproof studio to record their first independent album last spring.
gept.example_zh: 這支樂團去年春天租了一間隔音錄音室，錄製了他們的第一張獨立專輯。

gept.example_en: The theater group rents a small rehearsal space downtown three nights every week.
gept.example_zh: 這個劇團每週三個晚上會在市中心租用一個小型排練空間。

gept.example_en: She enrolled in a famous music school to develop her natural talent for violin.
gept.example_zh: 她進入一所知名的音樂學校就讀，以培養她與生俱來的小提琴天賦。

gept.example_en: The hotel's grand ballroom can comfortably hold up to five hundred wedding guests.
gept.example_zh: 飯店的大宴會廳可以舒適地容納多達五百位婚禮賓客。

gept.example_en: After the speeches, all the guests gathered onto the dance floor for the celebration.
gept.example_zh: 致詞結束後，所有賓客都聚集到舞池上慶祝。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 迪斯可舞廳；迪斯可音樂
gept.example_en: My parents met at a popular disco back in the early nineteen eighties.
gept.example_zh: 我父母在一九八〇年代初期的一家熱門迪斯可舞廳相識。

gept.example_en: The new nightclub downtown features live DJs from various countries every single weekend.
gept.example_zh: 市中心新開的夜店每個週末都會邀請來自不同國家的DJ現場表演。

gept.example_en: This cozy little cafe hosts live music every Thursday, Friday, and Saturday evening.
gept.example_zh: 這家溫馨的小咖啡館每週四、五、六晚上都會有現場音樂表演。

gept.example_en: Local musicians often gather for a friendly jam session in the basement on Sunday afternoons.
gept.example_zh: 當地音樂家經常在週日下午聚集在地下室進行友好的即興演奏會。

gept.example_en: My younger brother takes piano music lessons every Tuesday afternoon after school.
gept.example_zh: 我弟弟每週二下午放學後都會去上鋼琴音樂課。

gept.example_en: She placed the music sheet on the stand and began playing the classical piece.
gept.example_zh: 她把樂譜放在譜架上，開始演奏這首古典樂曲。

gept.example_en: He hit every note perfectly during his solo performance at last night's concert.
gept.example_zh: 他在昨晚音樂會的獨奏表演中，每個音符都演奏得很完美。

gept.example_en: The catchy beat of this song makes everyone want to get up and dance.
gept.example_zh: 這首歌朗朗上口的節拍讓每個人都想站起來跳舞。

gept.example_en: The piano intro of this love ballad gives me goosebumps every time I listen.
gept.example_zh: 這首抒情情歌的鋼琴前奏每次都讓我起雞皮疙瘩。

gept.example_en: The long outro of the song slowly fades into complete silence in the end.
gept.example_zh: 這首歌冗長的尾奏最後緩緩淡出，歸於完全的寂靜。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 混音版；重混 vt. 重混
gept.example_en: The dance remix of this old hit became very popular at clubs this summer.
gept.example_zh: 這首老歌的舞曲混音版在今年夏天的夜店中相當受歡迎。

gept.example_en: Her acoustic cover version of the rock song received millions of views on social media.
gept.example_zh: 她翻唱這首搖滾歌曲的木吉他版本，在社群媒體上獲得了數百萬的觀看次數。

gept.example_en: The colorful music video features beautiful scenes filmed across several European cities.
gept.example_zh: 這支色彩繽紛的音樂錄影帶呈現了在歐洲幾個城市拍攝的美麗場景。

gept.example_en: Her debut single climbed to number three on the national music chart this week.
gept.example_zh: 她的首張單曲本週攀升至全國音樂排行榜第三名。

gept.example_en: The young singer won three major music awards at last month's ceremony.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕歌手在上個月的頒獎典禮上獲得了三項主要音樂獎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 男子團體；男孩團體
gept.example_en: That boy band from the nineties is going on tour again to celebrate their reunion.
gept.example_zh: 那個來自九十年代的男孩團體將再度展開巡迴演出，慶祝他們的重聚。

gept.example_en: The Korean girl group has become incredibly popular across many countries in Asia.
gept.example_zh: 這個韓國女子團體在亞洲許多國家變得極為熱門。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 獨立歌手；個人藝人
gept.example_en: After leaving the band, he started a successful career as a solo artist.
gept.example_zh: 離開樂團後，他展開了成功的個人歌手生涯。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 和聲歌手；伴唱歌手
gept.example_en: The three backup singers added rich harmonies to every song in the live show.
gept.example_zh: 三位和聲歌手為現場表演中的每首歌曲增添了豐富的和聲。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 經紀公司；藝人經紀公司
gept.example_en: She signed a five-year contract with a famous talent agency in Tokyo last month.
gept.example_zh: 她上個月與東京一家知名經紀公司簽下了一份為期五年的合約。

gept.example_en: Tickets to the fan meeting sold out within just five minutes of going online.
gept.example_zh: 粉絲見面會的門票上線後短短五分鐘內就銷售一空。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 親筆簽名 vt. 簽名
gept.example_en: She waited two hours after the concert just to get the singer's autograph.
gept.example_zh: 她在演唱會結束後等了兩小時，只為了得到那位歌手的親筆簽名。

gept.example_en: Many fans took a quick selfie with their favorite actor outside the theater entrance.
gept.example_zh: 許多粉絲在劇院門口與他們最喜歡的演員快速合拍了自拍照。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 同人創作；粉絲藝術作品
gept.example_en: She posts her amazing fan art of popular cartoon characters online every weekend.
gept.example_zh: 她每個週末都會在網路上發布她精美的熱門卡通角色同人創作。

gept.example_en: She spent six months making her detailed cosplay outfit for the anime convention.
gept.example_zh: 她花了六個月製作她參加動漫展所穿的精緻角色扮演服裝。

gept.example_en: Thousands of comic fans gather at the annual comic convention dressed as their heroes.
gept.example_zh: 數千名漫畫迷打扮成他們的英雄角色，齊聚一年一度的漫畫展。

gept.example_en: Japanese anime has become extremely popular among teenagers in many Western countries.
gept.example_zh: 日本動畫在許多西方國家的青少年中變得極為受歡迎。

gept.example_en: She borrowed three volumes of the popular manga series from the public library.
gept.example_zh: 她從公共圖書館借了這套熱門日本漫畫系列的三本。

gept.example_en: Mickey Mouse is probably the most famous cartoon character in the entire world.
gept.example_zh: 米老鼠大概是全世界最有名的卡通角色。

gept.example_en: His bedroom shelves are completely covered with action figures from various superhero films.
gept.example_zh: 他臥室的架子上完全被各種超級英雄電影的公仔擺滿了。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 收藏品 adj. 值得收藏的
gept.example_en: These rare collectibles from the seventies can sell for thousands of dollars today.
gept.example_zh: 這些七十年代的稀有收藏品如今可以賣到數千美元。

gept.example_en: Only five hundred copies of this limited edition album were printed worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 這張限量版專輯全球只印製了五百張。

gept.example_en: He has been collecting vintage movie posters for almost twenty years now.
gept.example_zh: 他收集復古電影海報已經將近二十年了。

gept.example_en: The early screening of the new film starts at seven thirty tonight downtown.
gept.example_zh: 這部新電影的早場放映今晚七點半在市中心開始。

gept.example_en: Many famous celebrities walked the red carpet on the film's grand premiere night.
gept.example_zh: 許多名人在這部電影的盛大首映之夜走上紅毯。

gept.example_en: She landed her first leading role in a major Hollywood film at age sixteen.
gept.example_zh: 她在十六歲時拿下了她在好萊塢大片中的第一個主角。

gept.example_en: Although he played a supporting role, his performance stole the entire show.
gept.example_zh: 雖然他扮演的是配角，他的表演卻搶盡了整部戲的鋒頭。

gept.example_en: Becoming a successful voice actor requires years of training and a very flexible voice.
gept.example_zh: 想成為成功的配音員需要多年的訓練和極富變化的嗓音。

gept.example_en: Many former child actors struggle to find new roles when they grow up.
gept.example_zh: 許多前童星在長大後很難找到新的角色。

gept.example_en: A professional stuntman performed all the dangerous action scenes in the new film.
gept.example_zh: 一位專業的特技替身演員在這部新電影中完成了所有危險的動作場面。

gept.example_en: My favorite movie scene shows the two friends finally meeting again after many years.
gept.example_zh: 我最喜歡的電影場景是兩位朋友多年後終於再次相遇的畫面。

gept.example_en: The remote island became a popular tourist spot after being used as a filming location.
gept.example_zh: 這座偏遠的小島在成為電影拍攝地點後變成了熱門的觀光景點。

gept.example_en: Devoted filmgoers will travel hundreds of miles to attend an exclusive film festival.
gept.example_zh: 忠實的影迷會跋涉數百英里去參加一場獨家電影節。

gept.example_en: I always read a movie review before deciding whether to spend money on tickets.
gept.example_zh: 我總是會先看電影評論，再決定是否要花錢買票。

gept.example_en: Please do not post any spoilers about the new film until everyone has watched it.
gept.example_zh: 請不要發布任何關於這部新電影的劇透，直到大家都看過為止。

gept.example_en: Spoiler alert: the surprising twist at the end completely changes everything you thought.
gept.example_zh: 劇透警告：結局令人意外的轉折完全顛覆你原本的想法。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 粉絲理論；同人推測
gept.example_en: There is a popular fan theory online that explains the hidden meaning of the ending.
gept.example_zh: 網路上有一個流行的粉絲理論解釋了結局背後的隱藏含義。

gept.example_en: I spent the entire rainy Sunday binge-watching the whole new mystery series.
gept.example_zh: 我把整個下雨的星期天都拿來一口氣追完那部全新的懸疑劇集。

gept.example_en: This tv channel only shows classic movies from the nineteen sixties and seventies.
gept.example_zh: 這個電視頻道只播放一九六〇和七〇年代的經典電影。

gept.example_en: We canceled our cable tv subscription last year and switched to online streaming services.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年取消了有線電視訂閱，改用網路串流服務。

gept.example_en: Most popular streaming services offer a free trial period for new subscribers.
gept.example_zh: 大多數熱門串流服務都會為新訂戶提供免費試用期。

gept.example_en: As a true movie buff, he can name every Oscar winner since nineteen seventy.
gept.example_zh: 身為一個真正的電影迷，他能說出自一九七〇年以來每一位奧斯卡得獎者的名字。

gept.example_en: Any serious music lover should definitely listen to this beautiful new symphony recording.
gept.example_zh: 任何認真的音樂愛好者都絕對應該聽聽這張優美的新交響樂錄音。

gept.example_en: Every art lover in town visited the special exhibition during its short opening week.
gept.example_zh: 城裡每位藝術愛好者都在那個短短的開幕週參觀了這場特別展覽。

gept.example_en: The city art museum displays paintings from many different centuries and famous artists.
gept.example_zh: 市立美術館展出來自不同世紀和知名藝術家的畫作。

gept.example_en: Our class visited the history museum to learn about ancient civilizations last Friday.
gept.example_zh: 我們班上週五參觀了歷史博物館，學習關於古代文明的知識。

gept.example_en: Children love the science museum because they can touch and try many interactive exhibits.
gept.example_zh: 小孩很喜歡科學博物館，因為他們可以觸摸並嘗試許多互動展品。

gept.example_en: We took photos with lifelike wax figures of famous people at the wax museum.
gept.example_zh: 我們在蠟像館與栩栩如生的名人蠟像合照。

gept.example_en: The new aquarium has a tunnel where sharks swim above the visitors' heads.
gept.example_zh: 新水族館有一條隧道，鯊魚會從遊客頭頂上方游過。

gept.example_en: We rode every single roller coaster at the amusement park during the long weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我們在長假期間搭遍了遊樂園裡每一座雲霄飛車。

gept.example_en: The new theme park has rides, shows, and parades based on classic fairy tales.
gept.example_zh: 新主題樂園有以經典童話故事為主題的遊樂設施、表演和遊行。

gept.example_en: Our whole family loves visiting the local water park during summer school vacation.
gept.example_zh: 我們全家都喜歡在暑假期間造訪當地的水上樂園。

gept.example_en: The tallest roller coaster in this park reaches speeds of over one hundred kilometers.
gept.example_zh: 這座樂園裡最高的雲霄飛車時速超過一百公里。

gept.example_en: You can see the whole bay from the top of the giant ferris wheel.
gept.example_zh: 你可以從巨大摩天輪的頂端看到整個海灣。

gept.example_en: The kids drove the bumper cars wildly, crashing into each other and giggling.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們瘋狂地開著碰碰車，互相碰撞並咯咯地笑。

gept.example_en: The fairground was filled with bright lights, loud music, and delicious smelling food.
gept.example_zh: 遊樂場裡充滿了明亮的燈光、響亮的音樂和香噴噴的食物。

gept.example_en: The annual fireworks display over the harbor attracts thousands of tourists every year.
gept.example_zh: 在港口上空舉行的年度煙火表演每年都吸引數千名遊客。

gept.example_en: Colorful floats and dancers fill the streets during the holiday festive parade tonight.
gept.example_zh: 今晚假日節慶遊行中，色彩繽紛的花車和舞者擠滿了街道。

gept.example_en: The high school marching band practices outside on the football field every Wednesday.
gept.example_zh: 高中行進樂隊每週三都會在足球場外練習。

gept.example_en: The drum line led the parade with powerful and energetic rhythms down Main Street.
gept.example_zh: 鼓隊以強而有力又充滿活力的節奏，帶領遊行隊伍走過主街。

gept.example_en: The Brazilian carnival features colorful costumes, samba dancers, and amazing street performances.
gept.example_zh: 巴西嘉年華以色彩繽紛的服裝、森巴舞者和精彩的街頭表演為特色。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 街頭慶典；街頭節慶
gept.example_en: The weekend street festival offers live music, food stalls, and craft booths everywhere.
gept.example_zh: 週末街頭慶典提供現場音樂、美食攤位和到處都有的工藝品攤位。

gept.example_en: During the lantern festival, families release floating lanterns and eat sweet rice dumplings.
gept.example_zh: 元宵節期間，家人會放天燈並吃甜湯圓。

gept.example_en: Many Asian families gather on rooftops to admire the full moon festival night.
gept.example_zh: 許多亞洲家庭會聚集在屋頂上欣賞中秋節的滿月之夜。

gept.example_en: The colorful dragon dance kicked off the lively Lunar New Year celebrations in Chinatown.
gept.example_zh: 色彩鮮豔的舞龍開啟了唐人街熱鬧的農曆新年慶祝活動。

gept.example_en: The energetic lion dance performance impressed everyone with its loud drums and quick movements.
gept.example_zh: 充滿活力的舞獅表演以響亮的鼓聲和敏捷的動作令所有人印象深刻。

gept.example_en: The village holds a harvest festival every autumn to thank nature for plentiful crops.
gept.example_zh: 村裡每年秋天都會舉辦豐收節，感謝大自然賜予豐盛的農作物。

gept.example_en: Beautiful red and gold fireworks lit up the sky above the crowded city center.
gept.example_zh: 美麗的紅金煙火照亮了擁擠市中心上方的夜空。

gept.example_en: The loud firecracker noises kept echoing through the narrow alleys all night long.
gept.example_zh: 響亮的鞭炮聲整夜不斷在狹窄的巷弄中迴盪。

gept.example_en: Each child held a tiny glowing sparkler and waved it happily in the dark.
gept.example_zh: 每個小孩手裡都拿著一支發光的小仙女棒，在黑暗中開心地揮舞。

gept.example_en: We took a romantic hot air balloon ride above the colorful tulip fields at dawn.
gept.example_zh: 我們在黎明時分搭乘了一趟浪漫的熱氣球之旅，飛越色彩繽紛的鬱金香花田。

gept.example_en: Dozens of colorful balloons rose into the morning sky during the annual balloon festival.
gept.example_zh: 在一年一度的熱氣球節期間，數十顆色彩繽紛的氣球升上了晨空。

gept.example_en: Camping at the three-day music fest was the highlight of my entire summer break.
gept.example_zh: 在為期三天的音樂節露營是我整個暑假最棒的回憶。

gept.example_en: The free outdoor concert in the park drew families from all over the neighborhood.
gept.example_zh: 公園裡的免費戶外音樂會吸引了附近所有家庭前來。

gept.example_en: The grand new concert hall opened with a special performance by the national orchestra.
gept.example_zh: 宏偉的新音樂廳以國家管絃樂團的特別演出隆重開幕。

gept.example_en: Tickets to the famous opera house are usually expensive but absolutely worth every penny.
gept.example_zh: 這間知名歌劇院的票通常價格不菲，但絕對物超所值。

gept.example_en: We watched a moving Shakespeare play at the historic open-air theater last summer.
gept.example_zh: 我們去年夏天在那座歷史悠久的露天劇場觀賞了一場感人的莎士比亞戲劇。

gept.example_en: The huge new multiplex has fifteen screens, several restaurants, and a video arcade.
gept.example_zh: 這座龐大的新多廳電影院有十五個影廳、好幾家餐廳和一個電玩遊樂場。

gept.example_en: When I was younger, I spent all my pocket money at the local video arcade.
gept.example_zh: 我小時候會把所有零用錢都花在當地的電玩遊樂場。

gept.example_en: She tried six times before finally winning a small stuffed bear from the claw machine.
gept.example_zh: 她試了六次才終於從夾娃娃機裡夾到一隻小玩偶熊。

gept.example_en: The old pinball machine at the corner cafe still works perfectly after thirty years.
gept.example_zh: 那家轉角咖啡館的老彈珠台在三十年後仍能完美運作。

gept.example_en: He prefers traditional console games over mobile games on his smartphone any day.
gept.example_zh: 他無論何時都比較喜歡傳統主機遊戲，而不是手機上的行動遊戲。

gept.example_en: This addictive mobile game has been downloaded more than fifty million times globally.
gept.example_zh: 這款令人上癮的手機遊戲在全球已被下載超過五千萬次。

gept.example_en: My cousin can spend entire weekends playing his favorite online racing game with friends.
gept.example_zh: 我表弟可以整個週末和朋友們玩他最喜歡的線上賽車遊戲。

gept.example_en: Many parents worry about how shooting games might influence their teenager's daily behavior.
gept.example_zh: 許多家長擔心射擊遊戲可能會如何影響他們青少年子女的日常行為。

gept.example_en: I have been deeply addicted to this fantasy role-playing game for over three months now.
gept.example_zh: 我深深沉迷於這款奇幻角色扮演遊戲已經三個多月了。

gept.example_en: She joined an online community of writers to share her short stories and poems.
gept.example_zh: 她加入了一個作家線上社群，分享她的短篇故事和詩作。

gept.example_en: Members of the discussion board often share helpful tips about old film techniques.
gept.example_zh: 討論版的成員經常分享關於老電影技巧的實用秘訣。

gept.example_en: The band's official fan page already has over two million dedicated followers worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 這個樂團的官方粉絲專頁已經擁有全球超過兩百萬名忠實追蹤者。

gept.example_en: She uploaded a short video clip of her cat playing piano onto social media.
gept.example_zh: 她在社群媒體上傳了一段她的貓彈鋼琴的短片。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 預告片合輯網頁；露營車公園
gept.example_en: The movie company released a new trailer park containing six exciting upcoming films.
gept.example_zh: 電影公司發布了一個全新的預告片合輯網頁，收錄六部令人期待的即將上映電影。

gept.example_en: Fans love watching behind the scenes footage from the filming of action movies.
gept.example_zh: 影迷喜歡觀看動作片拍攝過程中的幕後花絮。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 製作特輯；幕後紀錄
gept.example_en: The director released an interesting making-of video showing all the special effects techniques.
gept.example_zh: 導演發布了一支有趣的製作特輯影片，展示了所有的特效技巧。

gept.example_en: The dramatic voice over at the beginning of the film sets a mysterious atmosphere.
gept.example_zh: 電影開頭那段戲劇性的旁白營造出一種神秘的氛圍。

gept.example_en: Soft background music helps create a relaxing atmosphere inside the cozy little bookshop.
gept.example_zh: 輕柔的背景音樂為這家溫馨小書店營造出放鬆的氛圍。

gept.example_en: Everyone in our generation can still recognize the theme song from that classic show.
gept.example_zh: 我們這個世代的每個人仍能認出那部經典節目的主題曲。

gept.example_en: The opening credits roll over beautiful aerial shots of snowy European mountain ranges.
gept.example_zh: 片頭字幕伴隨著歐洲雪山山脈優美的空拍鏡頭一同呈現。

gept.example_en: Always stay until the closing credits because superhero films often hide bonus scenes.
gept.example_zh: 一定要看完片尾字幕，因為超級英雄電影常會藏有彩蛋片段。

gept.example_en: The exciting post-credits scene hints at a possible sequel coming next summer.
gept.example_zh: 這段令人興奮的片尾彩蛋暗示了明年夏天可能會推出續集。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 季終集；季末大結局
gept.example_en: The shocking season finale left millions of fans desperately waiting for the next chapter.
gept.example_zh: 這集令人震驚的季終集讓數百萬粉絲焦急地等待下一季的到來。

gept.example_en: The long-awaited season premiere will finally air at nine o'clock this coming Sunday.
gept.example_zh: 眾所期待的開播首集終於將在這個星期天晚上九點播出。

gept.example_en: The new spinoff series follows the most popular character from the original drama.
gept.example_zh: 這部新的衍生劇追隨原劇中最受歡迎角色的故事發展。

gept.example_en: This four-part miniseries about a famous painter received excellent reviews from critics everywhere.
gept.example_zh: 這部由四集組成、講述知名畫家的迷你影集獲得各界影評人的一致好評。

gept.example_en: This independent web series became surprisingly popular after going viral on social media.
gept.example_zh: 這部獨立網路影集在社群媒體上爆紅後意外地受歡迎。

gept.example_en: People watch more online videos every day than they do traditional television programs.
gept.example_zh: 人們每天看線上影片的時間比看傳統電視節目還要多。

gept.example_en: Her award-winning short film tells a touching story about a lonely elderly man.
gept.example_zh: 她得獎的短片講述了一個關於孤獨老人的感人故事。

gept.example_en: The young director made his first feature film with a very small budget.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕導演用極少的預算拍攝了他的第一部劇情長片。

gept.example_en: I cannot watch a horror movie alone at night, especially during stormy weather.
gept.example_zh: 我沒辦法在夜裡獨自看恐怖電影，尤其是在暴風雨的天氣裡。

gept.example_en: My older brother only watches action movies with car chases and big explosions.
gept.example_zh: 我哥只看那種有飛車追逐和大爆炸場面的動作片。

gept.example_en: She always cries when she watches a sad romance movie, even one she's seen.
gept.example_zh: 她每次看悲傷的愛情片總會哭，即使是看過的片也一樣。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 浪漫喜劇；愛情喜劇
gept.example_en: A good romantic comedy is the perfect movie choice for a relaxing date night.
gept.example_zh: 一部好的浪漫喜劇是輕鬆約會夜晚的完美電影選擇。

gept.example_en: He loves any sci-fi movie about space travel and contact with alien civilizations.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡任何關於太空旅行與外星文明接觸的科幻電影。

gept.example_en: This fantasy film features magical creatures, ancient kingdoms, and incredible visual effects.
gept.example_zh: 這部奇幻電影呈現了神奇的生物、古代王國和驚人的視覺特效。

gept.example_en: The powerful war film made many viewers think deeply about the cost of conflict.
gept.example_zh: 這部震撼的戰爭電影讓許多觀眾深刻思考戰爭所付出的代價。

gept.example_en: My grandfather still enjoys watching a classic western film almost every weekend afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我爺爺幾乎每個週末下午都還喜歡看一部經典西部片。

gept.example_en: This new spy movie has exciting chase scenes set in five different beautiful cities.
gept.example_zh: 這部新間諜片有發生在五個不同美麗城市的精彩追逐場面。

gept.example_en: The new crime drama follows two detectives investigating a series of mysterious disappearances.
gept.example_zh: 這部新犯罪劇講述兩位偵探調查一連串神秘失蹤案件的故事。

gept.example_en: Many viewers love a tense courtroom drama with surprising twists and emotional speeches.
gept.example_zh: 許多觀眾喜歡有出人意料的轉折和感人陳詞的緊張法庭劇。

gept.example_en: This emotional drama is based on a true story about a doctor in rural Africa.
gept.example_zh: 這部感人的戲劇改編自一位非洲鄉間醫生的真人真事。

gept.example_en: The hit musical is based on a popular fantasy novel from the nineteen nineties.
gept.example_zh: 這部熱門音樂劇改編自一九九〇年代的暢銷奇幻小說。

gept.example_en: This novel adaptation stayed remarkably faithful to the events in the original book.
gept.example_zh: 這部小說改編作品對原著書中的事件出乎意料地忠實呈現。

gept.example_en: Her popular book series for teenagers has now sold over twenty million copies worldwide.
gept.example_zh: 她那部受歡迎的青少年書籍系列至今在全球已售出超過兩千萬冊。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 寫作社團；寫作俱樂部
gept.example_en: She joined a creative writing club to improve her storytelling and meet other writers.
gept.example_zh: 她加入了一個創意寫作社團，以提升她的說故事能力並結識其他寫作者。

gept.example_en: He won first place in the national writing contest with his original short story.
gept.example_zh: 他以原創短篇故事在全國寫作比賽中贏得第一名。

gept.example_en: Her wildlife picture was selected as the top winner in the international photo contest.
gept.example_zh: 她的野生動物照片在國際攝影比賽中被選為首獎。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 藝術比賽；美術比賽
gept.example_en: Children from twelve schools entered drawings in the citywide annual art contest yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 來自十二所學校的孩子們昨天在全市年度藝術比賽中投稿了他們的畫作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 藝術工作坊；美術研習班
gept.example_en: I attended a weekend art workshop and learned how to paint beautiful watercolor landscapes.
gept.example_zh: 我參加了一個週末藝術工作坊，學會了如何畫出優美的水彩風景畫。

gept.example_en: Sign up for our Italian cooking class to learn how to make homemade fresh pasta.
gept.example_zh: 報名參加我們的義式烹飪課，學習如何製作自製新鮮義大利麵。

gept.example_en: We meet weekly for a language exchange where I teach Mandarin and learn Spanish.
gept.example_zh: 我們每週見面進行語言交換，我教中文並學習西班牙文。

gept.example_en: The author will hold a book signing at the downtown bookstore this coming Saturday.
gept.example_zh: 這位作家將於本週六在市中心的書店舉辦簽書會。

gept.example_en: The annual book fair attracts publishers, authors, and readers from over thirty countries.
gept.example_zh: 一年一度的書展吸引了來自三十多個國家的出版商、作家和讀者。

gept.example_en: Famous writers from around the world gathered at the popular literary festival this week.
gept.example_zh: 來自世界各地的知名作家本週齊聚於這場熱門文學節。

gept.example_en: She gave a moving poetry reading about her childhood memories of her late grandmother.
gept.example_zh: 她進行了一場感人的詩歌朗誦會，內容是關於她對已故祖母童年時的回憶。

gept.example_en: Anyone can perform a song, poem, or short comedy piece during open mic night.
gept.example_zh: 任何人都可以在開放麥克風之夜表演歌曲、詩作或一段短喜劇。

gept.example_en: His upcoming stand-up show at the city's largest comedy club sold out completely.
gept.example_zh: 他即將在市內最大喜劇俱樂部舉行的單口喜劇秀，門票已完全售罄。

gept.example_en: This small underground comedy club has launched the careers of several famous comedians.
gept.example_zh: 這家小型地下喜劇俱樂部曾經造就了數位知名喜劇演員的演藝事業。

gept.example_en: The street performer amazed everyone with a clever magic trick involving three playing cards.
gept.example_zh: 這位街頭表演者用一個牽涉到三張撲克牌的巧妙魔術讓所有人都驚奇不已。

gept.example_en: The famous magician will perform amazing illusions on a large outdoor stage tonight.
gept.example_zh: 這位知名魔術師今晚將在大型戶外舞台上表演驚人的幻術。

gept.example_en: The world-famous illusionist made an entire elephant disappear from the bright stage tonight.
gept.example_zh: 這位世界知名的幻術師今晚讓一整頭大象從明亮的舞台上消失。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 雜技演員；特技演員
gept.example_en: The young acrobat performed an impressive backflip while balanced on a moving bicycle.
gept.example_zh: 這位年輕雜技演員在移動的腳踏車上保持平衡，並完成了一個令人印象深刻的後空翻。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 空中飛人；高空鞦韆藝人
gept.example_en: The graceful trapeze artist swung high above the crowd without any safety net below.
gept.example_zh: 這位優雅的空中飛人在觀眾頭頂上方擺盪，下方沒有任何安全網。

gept.example_en: The friendly clown made colorful balloon animals for all the children at the party.
gept.example_zh: 親切的小丑為派對上所有孩子做了五彩繽紛的氣球動物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 馬戲團指揮；主持人
gept.example_en: The booming voice of the ringmaster introduced each new act to the excited audience.
gept.example_zh: 馬戲團指揮響亮的聲音向興奮的觀眾介紹了每一個新節目。

gept.example_en: The clown twisted a long pink balloon into a clever balloon animal shaped like a giraffe.
gept.example_zh: 小丑把一個長長的粉紅色氣球扭成一個巧妙的長頸鹿造型氣球動物。

gept.example_en: Many children lined up patiently to get colorful tiger face painting at the festival.
gept.example_zh: 許多孩子耐心地排隊，在節慶活動中得到色彩鮮豔的老虎臉部彩繪。

gept.example_en: A talented street performer played beautiful guitar music in the busy square last evening.
gept.example_zh: 昨晚一位才華洋溢的街頭藝人在熱鬧的廣場上彈奏著優美的吉他音樂。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 街頭表演者；賣藝者
gept.example_en: The skilled busker collected enough coins in his hat to buy lunch each day.
gept.example_zh: 這位技藝高超的街頭表演者每天都能在帽子裡收到夠買午餐的零錢。

gept.example_en: The traditional marionette show told an old folk story using cleverly crafted wooden puppets.
gept.example_zh: 這場傳統的提線木偶戲利用巧妙製作的木偶演繹了一個古老的民間故事。

gept.example_en: The small puppet theater downtown holds shows for young children every Saturday morning.
gept.example_zh: 市中心的小型木偶劇場每週六早上都會為幼童舉辦演出。

gept.example_en: We watched a fascinating shadow play featuring an ancient legend about a brave warrior.
gept.example_zh: 我們觀賞了一場精彩的皮影戲，內容是關於一位勇敢戰士的古老傳說。

gept.example_en: The mysterious fortune teller at the fair claimed she could read futures in tea leaves.
gept.example_zh: 園遊會上那位神秘的算命師宣稱她可以從茶葉中看出未來。

gept.example_en: She gave me a careful tarot card reading and shared what each beautiful card meant.
gept.example_zh: 她仔細為我占了塔羅牌，並解釋每張美麗牌卡的含義。

gept.example_en: She reads her daily horoscope every morning before getting out of bed.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上起床前都會看當天的星座運勢。

gept.example_en: What is your zodiac sign? I am a Libra, born in early October each year.
gept.example_zh: 你的星座是什麼？我是天秤座，每年十月初出生。

gept.example_en: She doodled cute cartoon characters on a piece of scrap paper during the boring meeting.
gept.example_zh: 她在無聊的會議中用一張廢紙隨手畫些可愛的卡通人物。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 隨手塗鴉 vi. 信手塗鴉
gept.example_en: He likes to doodle little flowers and stars in the margins of his notebook.
gept.example_zh: 他喜歡在筆記本邊緣信手塗鴉一些小花和星星。

gept.example_en: Adult coloring books have become a popular way to relax after a stressful day.
gept.example_zh: 成人著色本已成為紓解一天壓力的熱門方式。

gept.example_en: My little niece carries her favorite sticker book everywhere she goes these days.
gept.example_zh: 我小姪女最近不管去哪裡都帶著她最喜歡的貼紙本。

gept.example_en: Mom made a beautiful scrapbook filled with photos from our family's summer vacation.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽做了一本漂亮的剪貼簿，貼滿了我們家暑假旅行的照片。

gept.example_en: We sat together looking through the old photo album, laughing at our childhood haircuts.
gept.example_zh: 我們坐在一起翻閱舊相簿，對著小時候的髮型大笑。

gept.example_en: She hung dozens of small polaroids of her closest friends on her bedroom wall.
gept.example_zh: 她在臥室牆上掛了幾十張她最親密朋友的小拍立得相片。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 拍立得相機；即時相機
gept.example_en: She received a pink instant camera as a surprise gift for her sixteenth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 她在十六歲生日時收到一台粉紅色的拍立得相機作為驚喜禮物。

gept.example_en: Many tourists carry a selfie stick to take group photos in front of famous landmarks.
gept.example_zh: 許多遊客會帶著自拍棒在著名地標前拍團體照。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 藝術版畫；藝術印刷品
gept.example_en: She bought a small art print of a sunflower painting for her new office wall.
gept.example_zh: 她買了一幅小型向日葵畫作的藝術版畫，掛在新辦公室的牆上。

gept.example_en: The small art gallery downtown features paintings by emerging local artists each month.
gept.example_zh: 市中心的小型畫廊每月都會展出當地新銳藝術家的畫作。

gept.example_en: Her bright art studio is filled with canvases, paint tubes, and large dusty brushes.
gept.example_zh: 她明亮的藝術工作室裡擺滿了畫布、顏料管和又大又有灰塵的畫筆。

gept.example_en: She is preparing twenty new paintings for her upcoming art show next month.
gept.example_zh: 她正為下個月即將舉辦的藝術展準備二十幅新畫作。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 藝術展覽品；美術展品
gept.example_en: The new art exhibit features sculptures made entirely from recycled household plastic items.
gept.example_zh: 這個新藝術展覽品系列以完全用回收家用塑膠製成的雕塑為特色。

gept.example_en: A well-known art critic praised the young painter's bold use of color and texture.
gept.example_zh: 一位知名藝術評論家讚揚這位年輕畫家對色彩和質感的大膽運用。

gept.example_en: Our art teacher taught us how to mix watercolors to paint a peaceful sunset scene.
gept.example_zh: 我們的美術老師教我們如何調水彩，畫出寧靜的日落景色。

gept.example_en: My patient music teacher helped me prepare for my first piano performance last weekend.
gept.example_zh: 我那位有耐心的音樂老師幫我準備了上週末的第一場鋼琴表演。

gept.example_en: Her dance teacher always reminds the students to keep their posture tall and graceful.
gept.example_zh: 她的舞蹈老師總是提醒學生保持挺拔優雅的姿勢。

gept.example_en: She joined the school drama club to gain more confidence in public speaking.
gept.example_zh: 她加入了學校戲劇社，希望在公開演講時能更有自信。

gept.example_en: My webcam stopped working right before the important video meeting started.
gept.example_zh: 我的網路攝影機在重要的視訊會議開始前剛好壞掉了。

gept.example_en: The travel vlogger posts a new video about food every Friday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 那位旅遊影音部落客每週五下午都會上傳一支美食影片。

gept.example_en: She became a famous fashion blogger after sharing her daily outfits online.
gept.example_zh: 她在網路上分享日常穿搭後，成為知名的時尚部落客。

gept.example_en: I decided to unfollow accounts that always posted negative or boring content.
gept.example_zh: 我決定取消追蹤那些總是發負面或無聊內容的帳號。

gept.example_en: You can unsubscribe from the email newsletter by clicking the link at the bottom.
gept.example_zh: 你可以點擊底部的連結來取消訂閱電子報。

gept.example_en: Many users repost funny videos to share with their friends on social media.
gept.example_zh: 許多使用者轉發有趣的影片，與社群媒體上的朋友分享。

gept.example_en: Please send me a screenshot of the error message so I can help you.
gept.example_zh: 請傳一張錯誤訊息的螢幕截圖給我，我才能幫你。

gept.example_en: I left a voicemail because she did not answer her phone all morning.
gept.example_zh: 因為她整個早上都沒接電話，我留了一則語音信箱訊息。

gept.example_en: Put the call on speakerphone so the whole team can hear the client.
gept.example_zh: 把電話切到擴音模式，讓整個團隊都能聽到客戶說話。

gept.example_en: Open the phone dialer and type the international number with the country code.
gept.example_zh: 打開電話撥號程式，輸入含國碼的國際號碼。

gept.example_en: I lost all my contacts when my old phone suddenly stopped turning on.
gept.example_zh: 我的舊手機突然開不了機時，我失去了所有的聯絡人資料。

gept.example_en: The keypad on this old phone is sticky, so the numbers are hard to press.
gept.example_zh: 這支舊手機的數字鍵盤很黏，數字很難按。

gept.example_en: Tap the dialpad icon at the bottom to enter the conference room number.
gept.example_zh: 點擊底部的撥號鍵盤圖示來輸入會議室號碼。

gept.example_en: Doctors used to carry a pager before everyone had a personal smartphone.
gept.example_zh: 在每個人都有個人智慧型手機之前，醫生過去都會攜帶呼叫器。

gept.example_en: To call from abroad, first dial the country code and then the number.
gept.example_zh: 要從國外打電話，請先撥國碼再輸入號碼。

gept.example_en: If the line is busy, please hang up and redial after a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 如果線路忙線，請掛斷並在幾分鐘後重撥。

gept.example_en: You need a small dongle to connect this old laptop to a modern screen.
gept.example_zh: 你需要一個小轉接器才能把這台舊筆電連到現代螢幕。

gept.example_en: A small powerbank is very useful when you travel and cannot find an outlet.
gept.example_zh: 當你旅行找不到插座時，一個小行動電源非常實用。

gept.example_en: Save your homework on a flashdrive in case your computer crashes again.
gept.example_zh: 把作業存到隨身碟裡，以防你的電腦再次當機。

gept.example_en: My old harddrive failed last night and I lost many family photos.
gept.example_zh: 我的舊硬碟昨晚壞了，我失去了許多家庭照片。

gept.example_en: His new earphones cancel almost all the noise from the busy street outside.
gept.example_zh: 他的新耳機幾乎能消除外面繁忙街道的所有噪音。

gept.example_en: Artists often use a stylus to draw on a tablet with great control.
gept.example_zh: 藝術家經常使用觸控筆在平板上繪畫，能精準地掌控細節。

gept.example_en: The trackpad on this laptop is huge and supports many useful finger gestures.
gept.example_zh: 這台筆電的觸控板很大，支援許多實用的手指手勢。

gept.example_en: You can turn off the touchpad when you use an external mouse for work.
gept.example_zh: 當你使用外接滑鼠工作時，可以把觸控板關掉。

gept.example_en: The new ticket machines have a clear touchscreen and instructions in many languages.
gept.example_zh: 新型售票機有清晰的觸控螢幕和多種語言的操作說明。

gept.example_en: This video file is over one gigabyte, so it will take time to upload.
gept.example_zh: 這個影片檔案超過一個 GB，所以上傳會花一些時間。

gept.example_en: Each photo is about three megabyte in size on this phone camera.
gept.example_zh: 這支手機相機拍的每張照片大約三 MB 大小。

gept.example_en: A short text message uses only a few kilobyte of mobile data per minute.
gept.example_zh: 一則簡短的文字訊息每分鐘只使用幾 KB 的行動數據。

gept.example_en: My new computer has a one terabyte drive for movies and family videos.
gept.example_zh: 我的新電腦有一個 1 TB 的硬碟，用來存放電影和家庭影片。

gept.example_en: A single byte of data is much too small to hold a whole word.
gept.example_zh: 一個位元組的資料太小了，無法存下一整個英文單字。

gept.example_en: Please sync your phone with your laptop to share the latest contacts.
gept.example_zh: 請把手機和筆電同步，以分享最新的聯絡人資料。

gept.example_en: Syncing your photos to the cloud may take a few minutes on slow wifi.
gept.example_zh: 在慢速 wifi 下，將照片同步到雲端可能需要幾分鐘。

gept.example_en: You should format the new memory card before using it in your camera.
gept.example_zh: 在相機裡使用新記憶卡之前，你應該先把它格式化。

gept.example_en: You can restore your phone settings from a backup if something goes wrong.
gept.example_zh: 如果出問題，你可以從備份還原你的手機設定。

gept.example_en: Please turn off data roaming overseas to avoid surprisingly high mobile bills.
gept.example_zh: 在國外請關閉數據漫遊，以免出現驚人的高額手機帳單。

gept.example_en: My friend shared her phone hotspot so we could check the train schedule.
gept.example_zh: 我朋友分享了她的手機熱點，這樣我們才能查火車時刻表。

gept.example_en: Tethering through your phone uses a lot of mobile data very quickly.
gept.example_zh: 透過手機進行網路共享會很快用掉大量的行動數據。

gept.example_en: The phone signal here is weak, so I keep getting disconnected from the call.
gept.example_zh: 這裡的手機訊號很弱，所以我一直在通話中被斷線。

gept.example_en: Most new keyboards are wireless, so you do not need any cables on your desk.
gept.example_zh: 大多數新鍵盤都是無線的，所以你的桌上不需要任何電線。

gept.example_en: Connect the bluetooth speaker to your phone before starting the music for the party.
gept.example_zh: 派對開始播放音樂前，先把藍牙喇叭連到你的手機。

gept.example_en: For online games, an ethernet cable is more stable than wireless internet.
gept.example_zh: 打線上遊戲時，乙太網路線比無線網路更穩定。

gept.example_en: We added a wifi repeater upstairs so the signal reaches the bedrooms.
gept.example_zh: 我們在樓上加裝了一台 wifi 中繼器，讓訊號能傳到臥室。

gept.example_en: My grandfather still remembers the loud sound of dialup internet from the 1990s.
gept.example_zh: 我爺爺仍然記得 1990 年代撥接上網時發出的吵雜聲音。

gept.example_en: Our new broadband connection is much faster than the old one we had.
gept.example_zh: 我們新的寬頻連線比舊的快很多。

gept.example_en: Tap the small camera icon at the top right to take a quick photo.
gept.example_zh: 點擊右上角的小相機圖示來快速拍張照。

gept.example_en: I added a weather widget to my home screen for quick daily updates.
gept.example_zh: 我在我的主畫面加了天氣小工具，方便每天快速查看更新。

gept.example_en: Choose your country from the dropdown menu before clicking the submit button.
gept.example_zh: 在點擊送出按鈕之前，從下拉式選單中選擇你的國家。

gept.example_en: The save button is usually on the top toolbar in most writing programs.
gept.example_zh: 在大多數寫作程式中，儲存按鈕通常位於上方工具列。

gept.example_en: The new website layout makes it much easier to find the contact page.
gept.example_zh: 新網站的版面配置讓人更容易找到聯絡頁面。

gept.example_en: Always preview your message before sending it to avoid embarrassing little mistakes.
gept.example_zh: 傳送訊息前一定要先預覽，以免出現尷尬的小錯誤。

gept.example_en: My screensaver shows a slideshow of photos from our family vacation last year.
gept.example_zh: 我的螢幕保護程式會播放去年家庭旅遊照片的幻燈片。

gept.example_en: I changed my phone theme to dark mode to protect my eyes at night.
gept.example_zh: 我把手機主題改成深色模式，以便晚上保護眼睛。

gept.example_en: Move the cursor to the search bar and type the name of the song.
gept.example_zh: 把游標移到搜尋列，輸入那首歌的名字。

gept.example_en: Use the scrollbar on the right side to read the rest of the article.
gept.example_zh: 使用右側的捲軸來閱讀文章的其餘部分。

gept.example_en: I usually keep too many tab windows open in my web browser at once.
gept.example_zh: 我常常一次在瀏覽器裡開太多分頁視窗。

gept.example_en: Please refresh the page if the new prices are not showing up yet.
gept.example_zh: 如果新價格還沒顯示出來，請重新整理頁面。

gept.example_en: Sometimes you just need to reload the website to fix a small loading error.
gept.example_zh: 有時候你只需要重新載入網站，就能解決小小的載入錯誤。

gept.example_en: This link will redirect you to the official store to complete the order.
gept.example_zh: 這個連結會把你重新導向到官方商店完成訂單。

gept.example_en: Try to restart your computer first when an app suddenly stops responding.
gept.example_zh: 當應用程式突然沒有回應時，先試著重新啟動你的電腦。

gept.example_en: Please shutdown the computer properly instead of just pulling out the power cord.
gept.example_zh: 請好好把電腦關機，不要直接拔掉電源線。

gept.example_en: You can signin with your email or use your social media account directly.
gept.example_zh: 你可以用電子郵件登入，或直接使用你的社群媒體帳號。

gept.example_en: Please signup for a free account to receive our weekly product news.
gept.example_zh: 請註冊一個免費帳號以接收我們每週的產品消息。

gept.example_en: Always signout from public computers to keep your personal information safe.
gept.example_zh: 使用公用電腦時一定要登出，以保護你的個人資料安全。

gept.example_en: You need to enable notifications if you want to hear new message alerts.
gept.example_zh: 如果你想聽到新訊息提示，你需要啟用通知。

gept.example_en: I disable the camera every time after I finish my online video class.
gept.example_zh: 每次線上視訊課結束後，我都會把相機停用。

gept.example_en: You must activate the new SIM card with the carrier before making any calls.
