gept.example_zh: 你必須先向電信業者啟用新 SIM 卡，才能撥打任何電話。

gept.example_en: You can deactivate your old account if you no longer use it for messaging.
gept.example_zh: 如果你不再用舊帳號傳訊息，可以把它停用。

gept.example_en: You can customize the home screen by moving icons into different folders.
gept.example_zh: 你可以把圖示移到不同的資料夾來自訂主畫面。

gept.example_en: Many apps let you personalize colors, fonts, and sounds to suit your taste.
gept.example_zh: 許多應用程式讓你能個人化顏色、字型和音效以符合你的喜好。

gept.example_en: Pair the wireless headphones with your phone before starting your morning workout.
gept.example_zh: 開始晨間運動前先把無線耳機和手機配對。

gept.example_en: Please connect your laptop to the projector so we can all see the slides.
gept.example_zh: 請把你的筆電連接投影機，讓我們都能看到投影片。

gept.example_en: If you disconnect from the internet now, you will lose your unsaved progress.
gept.example_zh: 如果你現在中斷網路連線，你會失去尚未儲存的進度。

gept.example_en: Wait a moment and the device should reconnect to the wifi automatically.
gept.example_zh: 稍等片刻，裝置應該會自動重新連線到 wifi。

gept.example_en: Swipe up from the bottom of the screen to close any open apps quickly.
gept.example_zh: 從螢幕底部向上滑動，就能快速關閉所有打開的應用程式。

gept.example_en: You can zoom in on any photo by spreading two fingers apart on the screen.
gept.example_zh: 你可以在螢幕上張開兩根手指，把任何照片放大來看。

gept.example_en: Copy the link from the chat and paste it into the search bar above.
gept.example_zh: 從聊天室裡複製連結，然後貼上到上面的搜尋列。

gept.example_en: They love to stream live concerts from their phones in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 他們喜歡在傍晚用手機串流播放現場演唱會。

gept.example_en: Press the red button to record the meeting for those who could not attend.
gept.example_zh: 按紅色按鈕來錄製會議，給那些無法出席的人。

gept.example_en: Please mute your microphone when someone else is speaking on the call.
gept.example_zh: 當其他人在通話中發言時，請把你的麥克風靜音。

gept.example_en: You need to unmute yourself before answering the teacher's question online.
gept.example_zh: 在線上回答老師的問題前，你需要先取消自己的靜音。

gept.example_en: Please check the email recipient field before clicking the send button this time.
gept.example_zh: 這次點擊傳送按鈕前，請先檢查電子郵件的收件人欄位。

gept.example_en: I do not know the sender, so I will not open that strange email.
gept.example_zh: 我不認識這位寄件人，所以我不會打開那封奇怪的電子郵件。

gept.example_en: You can archive old emails to clean up the inbox without deleting them.
gept.example_zh: 你可以把舊郵件封存來清理收件匣，而不必把它們刪掉。

gept.example_en: Add managers to the bcc field if they do not need to reply directly.
gept.example_zh: 如果經理們不需要直接回覆，就把他們加進密件副本欄位。

gept.example_en: Please cc the assistant on every email about the upcoming project schedule.
gept.example_zh: 請把每封關於即將到來的專案行程的郵件副本給助理。

gept.example_en: Important messages sometimes end up in the junk folder by accident.
gept.example_zh: 重要訊息有時會不小心被丟進垃圾郵件資料夾。

gept.example_en: This app will encrypt your messages so nobody else can read them.
gept.example_zh: 這款應用程式會把你的訊息加密，這樣別人就無法讀取。

gept.example_en: Only the right key can decrypt the protected file on your phone.
gept.example_zh: 只有正確的金鑰才能解密你手機上受保護的檔案。

gept.example_en: The bank app will authenticate you with your fingerprint before showing any account details.
gept.example_zh: 銀行 App 會在顯示任何帳戶資料前用你的指紋來驗證身分。

gept.example_en: An ad blocker can make your browsing experience much cleaner and faster.
gept.example_zh: 廣告阻擋程式能讓你的瀏覽體驗更乾淨也更快速。

gept.example_en: This browser extension translates any foreign webpage with a single click.
gept.example_zh: 這個瀏覽器擴充功能只需點一下就能翻譯任何外國網頁。

gept.example_en: The marketing team checks the metrics every morning to see daily visitor numbers.
gept.example_zh: 行銷團隊每天早上都會檢查數據指標，以了解每日訪客數量。

gept.example_en: Website analytics show that most of our readers come from mobile devices now.
gept.example_zh: 網站數據分析顯示，我們大多數讀者現在都來自行動裝置。

gept.example_en: You can automate replies to common questions so you save time every week.
gept.example_zh: 你可以把常見問題的回覆自動化，這樣每週都能節省時間。

gept.example_en: I keep a wishlist of games to buy when they go on sale online.
gept.example_zh: 我會保留一份願望清單，等遊戲在網路上特價時再購買。

gept.example_en: Enter the promo code at checkout to get ten percent off your order.
gept.example_zh: 結帳時輸入優惠代碼，可享訂單九折優惠。

gept.example_en: This seller has very good reviews, so I feel safe ordering from her shop.
gept.example_zh: 這位賣家有很好的評價，所以我對在她的店裡下單感到安心。

gept.example_en: The buyer asked many questions about size before placing the final order.
gept.example_zh: 買家在下最終訂單前問了很多關於尺寸的問題。

gept.example_en: Shipping is free for orders over fifty dollars in our online store.
gept.example_zh: 在我們的線上商店，訂單滿五十元即可享免運費。

gept.example_en: You can use the tracking number to see where your package is right now.
gept.example_zh: 你可以用追蹤碼來查看你的包裹目前在哪裡。

gept.example_en: The courier left the package at our front door early this morning.
gept.example_zh: 快遞員今天一大早就把包裹放在我們的前門。

gept.example_en: Higher resolution videos look sharper but they also use more mobile data.
gept.example_zh: 高解析度的影片看起來更清晰，但也會耗用更多行動數據。

gept.example_en: This old photo is so small that you can almost see each pixel.
gept.example_zh: 這張舊照片太小了，幾乎可以看到每一個像素。

gept.example_en: The video will not play because the computer is missing the right codec.
gept.example_zh: 影片無法播放，因為電腦缺少正確的編解碼器。

gept.example_en: The video keeps buffering because our wifi is very slow this evening.
gept.example_zh: 影片一直在緩衝，因為我們今晚的 wifi 非常慢。

gept.example_en: Turn on captions if you find the speaker's accent difficult to understand.
gept.example_zh: 如果你覺得講者的口音很難理解，請開啟字幕。

gept.example_en: My favorite cooking channel uploads new recipes every Sunday afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 我最喜歡的烹飪頻道每週日下午都會上傳新食譜。

gept.example_en: Many young people dream of becoming a popular online content creator someday.
gept.example_zh: 許多年輕人夢想有一天能成為熱門的網路內容創作者。

gept.example_en: Our latest post got thousands of impressions on the first day alone.
gept.example_zh: 我們最新的貼文光是第一天就獲得了數千次觸及。

gept.example_en: A small glitch in the app made all my saved photos disappear briefly.
gept.example_zh: 應用程式裡的一個小故障讓我所有儲存的照片短暫消失了。

gept.example_en: There is too much lag during the video call to have a smooth conversation.
gept.example_zh: 視訊通話時延遲太嚴重，無法進行順暢的對話。

gept.example_en: Phones can overheat quickly when you play games under strong direct sunlight.
gept.example_zh: 在強烈陽光直射下玩遊戲時，手機可能會很快過熱。

gept.example_en: Go to settings and choose a stronger password to protect your online account.
gept.example_zh: 進入設定並選擇較強的密碼來保護你的線上帳號。

gept.example_en: This app has an option to receive only important notifications during work hours.
gept.example_zh: 這款應用程式有一個只在工作時間接收重要通知的選項。

gept.example_en: You can change your language preference from the small menu near the top.
gept.example_zh: 你可以從上方附近的小選單中變更你的語言偏好設定。

gept.example_en: I got a notification about a new comment on my recent travel photo.
gept.example_zh: 我收到一則通知，是關於我最近旅遊照片上有新留言。

gept.example_en: This digital planner reminds me about every meeting and exam during the week.
gept.example_zh: 這個數位行程規劃工具會提醒我這週每場會議和考試。

gept.example_en: My wireless mouse needs new batteries because it is moving very slowly now.
gept.example_zh: 我的無線滑鼠需要換新電池了，因為它現在移動得很慢。

gept.example_en: He prefers using a joystick over a keyboard for older flight simulator games.
gept.example_zh: 他玩較舊的飛行模擬遊戲時偏好使用搖桿勝過鍵盤。

gept.example_en: The car navigator suggested a faster route to avoid the heavy morning traffic.
gept.example_zh: 汽車導航建議了一條較快的路線，以避開繁忙的早晨車流。

gept.example_en: He always wears his headphone on the bus to listen to language podcasts.
gept.example_zh: 他在公車上總是戴著耳機聽語言播客節目。

gept.example_en: My earphone fell out while I was running quickly to catch the train.
gept.example_zh: 我快速跑著趕火車時，我的耳塞式耳機掉出來了。

gept.example_en: Online gaming has become a popular way for friends to spend time together.
gept.example_zh: 線上電玩遊戲已成為朋友們一起打發時間的熱門方式。

gept.example_en: We spent the rainy afternoon at the arcade playing classic racing games.
gept.example_zh: 我們在下雨的下午到電子遊樂場玩經典的賽車遊戲。

gept.example_en: Cybercrime is rising quickly, so we must protect our personal data online.
gept.example_zh: 網路犯罪正快速增加，所以我們必須在網路上保護個人資料。

gept.example_en: It is important to report anyone who tries to cyberbully other students online.
gept.example_zh: 舉報任何在網路上試圖霸凌其他學生的人非常重要。

gept.example_en: The company website went offline yesterday because of a serious cyberattack.
gept.example_zh: 由於一場嚴重的網路攻擊，公司網站昨天無法連線。

gept.example_en: Trolling other users in the forum can lead to a permanent account ban.
gept.example_zh: 在論壇裡挑釁其他使用者可能會導致帳號被永久停權。

gept.example_en: Please do not feed the troll by replying to those rude comments online.
gept.example_zh: 請不要回覆網路上那些粗魯的留言，免得餵養酸民。

gept.example_en: My brother is a real techie and loves to try every new gadget first.
gept.example_zh: 我哥哥是個十足的科技迷，總愛搶先嘗試每件新玩意兒。

gept.example_en: My phone fell into water yesterday, so the screen no longer turns on.
gept.example_zh: 我的電話昨天掉進水裡，所以螢幕再也打不開了。

gept.example_en: The school website was updated with the latest news about exam schedules.
gept.example_zh: 學校網站更新了關於考試行程的最新消息。

gept.example_en: The internet at the hotel is too slow for video calls back home.
gept.example_zh: 旅館的網際網路太慢，無法視訊通話回家。

gept.example_en: Try turning off the modem for ten seconds if the internet is acting strange.
gept.example_zh: 如果網路怪怪的，試著把數據機關閉十秒鐘。

gept.example_en: Movies look much better on a widescreen monitor with bright vivid colors.
gept.example_zh: 電影在色彩鮮豔的寬螢幕顯示器上看起來好得多。

gept.example_en: Press F11 to watch the lesson in fullscreen mode without any distractions.
gept.example_zh: 按 F11 以全螢幕模式觀看課程，不受任何干擾。

gept.example_en: The control panel of this app is simple even for older people to use.
gept.example_zh: 這個應用程式的控制面板很簡單，即使是長者也能使用。

gept.example_en: Click the blue link below to read the full article on our website.
gept.example_zh: 點擊下方的藍色連結，在我們網站上閱讀完整文章。

gept.example_en: Add a hyperlink to your name so readers can visit your personal page.
gept.example_zh: 在你的名字上加一個超連結，讓讀者可以造訪你的個人頁面。

gept.example_en: You can flag suspicious emails so the system learns to filter them better.
gept.example_zh: 你可以標記可疑的電子郵件，讓系統學會更好地過濾它們。

gept.example_en: Choose a photo preset to apply the same lighting style to all images.
gept.example_zh: 選擇一個照片預設，將相同的光影風格套用到所有影像上。

gept.example_en: Doing a factory reset will erase all your data from the old phone.
gept.example_zh: 執行原廠設定重置會抹除你舊手機上的所有資料。

gept.example_en: A small voice helper on my phone can set alarms and read out messages.
gept.example_zh: 我手機上的小語音助理能設定鬧鐘並讀出訊息。

gept.example_en: This e-book reader lets you store hundreds of novels in your school bag.
gept.example_zh: 這台電子書閱讀器讓你能在書包裡儲存數百本小說。

gept.example_en: This online converter changes documents into many different file types for free.
gept.example_zh: 這個線上轉換器能免費把文件轉換成許多不同的檔案格式。

gept.example_en: A strong password generator creates safer passwords than most people can imagine.
gept.example_zh: 強密碼產生器能建立比多數人想像中更安全的密碼。

gept.example_en: This little extractor pulls all the photos out of a single zip file.
gept.example_zh: 這個小擷取程式能把所有照片從一個壓縮檔中取出來。

gept.example_en: A digital organizer helps me plan my homework and remember every test date.
gept.example_zh: 數位整理工具幫我規劃功課，記住每個考試日期。

gept.example_en: Create a new directory for each subject to keep your school files tidy.
gept.example_zh: 為每個科目建立新的資料夾，讓你的學校檔案保持整齊。

gept.example_en: You can group your photos by category, such as travel, food, or family.
gept.example_zh: 你可以依分類將照片分組，例如旅行、美食或家庭。

gept.example_en: Use the search bar at the top to find any product in the store.
gept.example_zh: 使用上方的搜尋列來尋找店裡的任何商品。

gept.example_en: You can sort the emails by date so the newest ones appear at the top.
gept.example_zh: 你可以依日期排序郵件，這樣最新的就會出現在最上面。

gept.example_en: The app will rank the videos based on how many people watch them daily.
gept.example_zh: 這款應用程式會根據每天的觀看人數來把影片排名。

gept.example_en: Each online merchant has its own rules about returns and shipping costs.
gept.example_zh: 每位網路商家對退貨和運費都有自己的規則。

gept.example_en: Many small retailer shops now sell their products through large online platforms.
gept.example_zh: 許多小型零售商現在透過大型網路平台販售他們的商品。

gept.example_en: A smart shopper always compares prices on several websites before placing an order.
gept.example_zh: 聰明的購物者下訂單前總會在好幾個網站比價。

gept.example_en: Become a member to enjoy free shipping on every weekend order.
gept.example_zh: 成為會員，每筆週末訂單都享免運費優惠。

gept.example_en: Every new user receives a free week of premium features with this app.
gept.example_zh: 這款應用程式給每位新使用者免費一週的進階功能。

gept.example_en: Only the group admin can change the chat name and add new members.
gept.example_zh: 只有群組管理員能變更聊天名稱並加入新成員。

gept.example_en: During the flashsale, popular items often sell out in only a few minutes.
gept.example_zh: 限時搶購期間，熱門商品經常在短短幾分鐘內就賣完。

gept.example_en: The app gives a small hint if you have trouble finishing a puzzle level.
gept.example_zh: 如果你無法通過拼圖關卡，這款應用程式會給一個小提示。

gept.example_en: Read the manual carefully before using any new electronic kitchen device at home.
gept.example_zh: 在家使用任何新的電子廚房裝置前，請仔細閱讀使用手冊。

gept.example_en: The phone comes with a small handbook for older users who are new to smartphones.
gept.example_zh: 這支手機附有一本小手冊，給剛接觸智慧型手機的長者使用。

gept.example_en: Check the faq page first because most simple questions are answered there.
gept.example_zh: 先查看常見問答頁面，因為大部分簡單問題在那裡都有解答。

gept.example_en: Contact the helpdesk if you cannot reset your password by yourself.
gept.example_zh: 如果你無法自行重設密碼，請聯絡客服中心。

gept.example_en: There is a free hotline open all night for urgent customer service questions.
gept.example_zh: 有一條全夜開放的免費服務專線可解答緊急客戶問題。

gept.example_en: Most users on this forum prefer to chat under a friendly funny nickname.
gept.example_zh: 這個論壇上大多數使用者偏好用親切又有趣的暱稱聊天。

gept.example_en: Write a short bio about your hobbies on your social media profile page.
gept.example_zh: 在你的社群媒體個人頁面寫一段關於你興趣的簡短個人簡介。

gept.example_en: Students share useful study tips on the class online discussion board.
gept.example_zh: 學生們在班上的線上討論留言板分享有用的讀書技巧。

gept.example_en: Use a headphone splitter so two people can watch the same movie together.
gept.example_zh: 使用耳機分接器，這樣兩個人就能一起看同一部電影。

gept.example_en: You need the correct smtp settings to send emails from this old account.
gept.example_zh: 你需要正確的 smtp 設定才能從這個舊帳號寄出郵件。

gept.example_en: Most modern email apps use imap so you see the same inbox everywhere.
gept.example_zh: 大多數現代郵件應用程式使用 imap，這樣你在哪裡都能看到同一個收件匣。

gept.example_en: If the dns is wrong, even the simplest website may fail to load.
gept.example_zh: 如果 dns 設定錯誤，連最簡單的網站都可能無法載入。

gept.example_en: Copy the full url and send it to me so I can read the article.
gept.example_zh: 複製完整網址寄給我，我才能讀那篇文章。

gept.example_en: All the office computers share files quickly through the same office lan.
gept.example_zh: 辦公室的所有電腦都透過同一個區域網路快速分享檔案。

gept.example_en: Check the sent folder to confirm the email actually went out this morning.
gept.example_zh: 檢查寄件備份匣，確認郵件今早確實寄出去了。

gept.example_en: You can find old emails in the trash for thirty days before they disappear.
gept.example_zh: 刪除的舊郵件會在垃圾桶資料夾保留三十天才會消失。

gept.example_en: Important emails are easy to find when you keep them in the starred list.
gept.example_zh: 把重要郵件放在加星號清單裡，就很容易找到。

gept.example_en: All flagged messages appear together in one folder for easy daily review.
gept.example_zh: 所有標記的訊息會集中在一個資料夾，方便每天檢視。

gept.example_en: I have many unread emails because I was on vacation for ten days.
gept.example_zh: 我有許多未讀郵件，因為我去度假了十天。

gept.example_en: The message is already marked as read, but I do not remember opening it.
gept.example_zh: 那則訊息已經被標示為已讀，但我不記得我有打開過。

gept.example_en: Please detach the photos before sending this email because the file is too big.
gept.example_zh: 請先解除附加照片再寄出這封郵件，因為檔案太大了。

gept.example_en: Compress the files into one folder so the upload finishes much faster.
gept.example_zh: 把檔案壓縮成一個資料夾，這樣上傳會快很多。

gept.example_en: Right click the zip file and choose extract to see the documents inside.
gept.example_zh: 在壓縮檔上按右鍵並選擇解壓縮，就能看到裡面的文件。

gept.example_en: Unzip the file first before trying to open any document inside it.
gept.example_zh: 在嘗試打開裡面的任何文件之前，先解開壓縮檔。

gept.example_en: Add this website to your bookmark list so you can visit it later quickly.
gept.example_zh: 把這個網站加到書籤清單，這樣你之後就能快速造訪。

gept.example_en: You will find the new movie inside your downloads folder after the file finishes.
gept.example_zh: 檔案下載完成後，你會在下載資料夾裡找到新電影。

gept.example_en: Check the recents list to find the document you opened earlier this afternoon.
gept.example_zh: 查看最近項目清單，找出你今天下午稍早打開的文件。

gept.example_en: Our online meeting starts at three, so please test the camera before that.
gept.example_zh: 我們的線上會議三點開始，所以請先在那之前測試相機。

gept.example_en: The salesperson gave a quick demo of the app on a large bright screen.
gept.example_zh: 業務員在明亮的大螢幕上對這款應用程式做了快速試用展示。

gept.example_en: This walkthrough shows you how to set up the new email account step by step.
gept.example_zh: 這份操作說明會一步一步教你如何設定新的電子郵件帳號。

gept.example_en: You can unblock that contact whenever you feel ready to talk to them again.
gept.example_zh: 當你覺得準備好再次和那位聯絡人說話時，就可以解除封鎖。

gept.example_en: The phone is recharging on the table near the kitchen window right now.
gept.example_zh: 那支手機正在廚房窗戶旁的桌上充電中。

gept.example_en: The laptop is plugged in but the battery icon is still showing zero percent.
gept.example_zh: 筆電已經接上電源，但電池圖示仍然顯示零電量。

gept.example_en: Modern phones are great at multitasking many apps at the same time smoothly.
gept.example_zh: 現代手機能順暢地同時多工處理多個應用程式。

gept.example_en: A small overlay shows the speaker's name during the live video conference.
gept.example_zh: 視訊會議直播中有個小浮動視窗顯示講者的名字。

gept.example_en: Splitscreen mode lets you read notes and watch a video at the same time.
gept.example_zh: 分割畫面模式讓你能同時讀筆記又看影片。

gept.example_en: This streamer plays games every weekend and chats with thousands of online fans.
gept.example_zh: 這位直播主每個週末玩遊戲，並和數千名線上粉絲聊天。

gept.example_en: The post has many new liker accounts from countries all around the world.
gept.example_zh: 那則貼文有許多來自世界各國的新按讚者帳號。

gept.example_en: Block this spammer so they cannot send any more unwanted advertising messages.
gept.example_zh: 封鎖這個垃圾訊息散佈者，他們就無法再傳更多廣告訊息。

gept.example_en: Never share your password with a scammer who pretends to work at your bank.
gept.example_zh: 絕對不要把密碼分享給假裝在你銀行工作的詐騙者。

gept.example_en: News spreads through cyberspace much faster than through traditional newspapers these days.
gept.example_zh: 如今新聞透過網路空間傳播得比傳統報紙快多了。

gept.example_en: He made a fun mashup of two popular songs and shared it online.
gept.example_zh: 他把兩首熱門歌曲做成有趣的混搭作品並分享到網路上。

gept.example_en: Always download apps from the official store to avoid hidden harmful programs.
gept.example_zh: 一定要從官方商店下載應用程式，以免下載到藏有惡意的程式。

gept.example_en: I was tagged in many vacation photos by my cousin on social media yesterday.
gept.example_zh: 昨天我被表親在社群媒體上的許多旅行照片裡標記。

gept.example_en: You can crosspost the same video to several platforms with just one click.
gept.example_zh: 你只需點一下就能把同一部影片跨平台轉貼到好幾個平台。

gept.example_en: The system is rebooting now, so please wait two minutes before logging in.
gept.example_zh: 系統正在重新開機中，請等兩分鐘再登入。

gept.example_en: The app is still installing, so please leave the phone connected to power.
gept.example_zh: 應用程式還在安裝中，所以請讓手機保持連著電源。

gept.example_en: Downloading the update may take time if your home internet speed is slow.
gept.example_zh: 如果你家的網路速度很慢，下載更新可能會花一點時間。

gept.example_en: Uploading the video to the cloud is much faster on a strong wifi network.
gept.example_zh: 在強的 wifi 網路下，上傳影片到雲端會快很多。

gept.example_en: A small popup keeps appearing on the website and blocks the reading area.
gept.example_zh: 網站上一直出現一個小彈出視窗，擋住了閱讀區域。

gept.example_en: This free game shows a short ad after every two or three game rounds.
gept.example_zh: 這款免費遊戲每玩兩三回合就會播放一段短廣告。

gept.example_en: Just click the button below to confirm your seat for the online class.
gept.example_zh: 只要點擊下方按鈕，就能確認你線上課程的座位。

gept.example_en: Endless scrolling on social media can easily waste an entire quiet evening.
gept.example_zh: 在社群媒體上沒完沒了的滑動瀏覽很容易浪費一整個安靜的夜晚。

gept.example_en: Dragging the icon to the trash will delete the app from your phone.
gept.example_zh: 把圖示拖曳到垃圾桶就會把應用程式從你的手機上刪除。

gept.example_en: This free toolkit helps small business owners build a website in one day.
gept.example_zh: 這套免費工具組能幫助小企業主在一天內建好網站。

gept.example_en: A phablet is bigger than a normal phone but smaller than a regular tablet.
gept.example_zh: 大螢幕手機比一般手機大，但比一般平板小。

gept.example_en: Her new smartwatch can track her sleep and heart rate during the night.
gept.example_zh: 她的新智慧型手錶能在晚上追蹤她的睡眠和心跳。

gept.example_en: A smartband is lighter than a smartwatch and usually has a longer battery life.
gept.example_zh: 智慧手環比智慧型手錶輕，而且通常電池續航更長。

gept.example_en: Some companies are testing smart eyewear that can show maps right in front of you.
gept.example_zh: 有些公司正在測試能在你眼前顯示地圖的智慧眼鏡裝置。

gept.example_en: At the concert, a hologram of the singer appeared above the bright stage.
gept.example_zh: 在演唱會上，那位歌手的全像投影出現在明亮的舞台上方。

gept.example_en: I put the weather and clock widgets on my homescreen for quick daily checks.
gept.example_zh: 我把天氣和時鐘小工具放在主畫面上，方便每天快速查看。

gept.example_en: The phone locator helped me find my phone after I dropped it in the park.
gept.example_zh: 我在公園掉了手機後，手機定位工具幫我找到了它。

gept.example_en: Let me acquaint you with the neighbors before the welcome party starts tonight.
gept.example_zh: 讓我在今晚的歡迎會開始前，介紹你認識鄰居。

gept.example_en: Several bystanders rushed to help the elderly man who had fallen on the sidewalk.
gept.example_zh: 幾個旁觀者立刻衝過去幫助跌倒在人行道上的老人。

gept.example_en: Sharing tools and small favors is a neighborly habit on our quiet street.
gept.example_zh: 互借工具和小幫忙是我們這條安靜街道上鄰里間的習慣。

gept.example_en: The townsfolk gathered in the square to celebrate the annual harvest weekend.
gept.example_zh: 鎮民們聚集在廣場上慶祝一年一度的豐收週末。

gept.example_en: Every villager contributed something to the community kitchen during the storm.
gept.example_zh: 暴風雨期間，每位村民都為社區廚房貢獻了東西。

gept.example_en: My fellow club members organized a small farewell dinner for the retiring coach.
gept.example_zh: 我的俱樂部夥伴們為退休教練辦了一個小型歡送晚餐。

gept.example_en: He still meets his old army comrade every spring for a long walk.
gept.example_zh: 他每年春天仍會和老戰友見面散長長的步。

gept.example_en: The book club always invites newcomers to share what they enjoy reading.
gept.example_zh: 讀書會總會邀請新成員分享他們喜歡讀的書。

gept.example_en: Our kindhearted neighbor always brings soup when someone on the block is sick.
gept.example_zh: 我們好心的鄰居總會在街坊上有人生病時送湯來。

gept.example_en: She gave us a warmhearted welcome the very first day we moved in.
gept.example_zh: 我們搬進來的第一天，她就給了我們熱情的歡迎。

gept.example_en: His openhearted apology helped end the long argument between the two friends.
gept.example_zh: 他真摯的道歉幫助結束了兩位朋友之間長久的爭吵。

gept.example_en: She is too softhearted to say no when a stray animal needs help.
gept.example_zh: 她太心軟了，遇到流浪動物需要幫助時無法拒絕。

gept.example_en: Only a hardhearted person would ignore a friend in such serious trouble.
gept.example_zh: 只有無情的人才會忽視陷入這種嚴重困境的朋友。

gept.example_en: Their lighthearted teasing made the long bus ride feel much shorter.
gept.example_zh: 他們輕鬆愉快的玩笑讓漫長的公車旅程感覺短了許多。

gept.example_en: She felt downhearted when her closest friend moved to another city.
gept.example_zh: 當最好的朋友搬到另一個城市時，她感到很沮喪。

gept.example_en: Public speaking is not for the fainthearted, but practice makes it easier.
gept.example_zh: 公開演講不適合膽小的人，但練習會讓它變得更容易。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 全心全意的；衷心的
gept.example_en: The volunteers gave their wholehearted support to the new shelter project.
gept.example_zh: 志工們全心全意地支持新的庇護所計畫。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不熱情的；敷衍的
gept.example_en: His halfhearted apology only made his sister feel worse about the quarrel.
gept.example_zh: 他敷衍的道歉只讓他妹妹對這場爭吵感覺更糟。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 支持的；給予鼓勵的
gept.example_en: Having a supportive family helped him recover from the difficult breakup.
gept.example_zh: 擁有支持的家人幫助他從這段艱難的分手中恢復過來。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 關懷的；照顧人的
gept.example_en: Her caring nature made her perfect for working with elderly people.
gept.example_zh: 她關懷他人的天性讓她非常適合與老年人一起工作。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不關心的；冷淡的
gept.example_en: He seemed uncaring at first, but he is actually quite shy with new people.
gept.example_zh: 他一開始顯得冷淡，但其實他對陌生人相當害羞。

gept.example_en: Our new neighbor is so approachable that the kids already call her by name.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新鄰居非常平易近人，孩子們已經直接叫她的名字了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 難以接近的；冷漠的
gept.example_en: He looks unapproachable at first glance, but he loves chatting once you start.
gept.example_zh: 他乍看之下難以接近，但一旦聊起來他就很喜歡。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 腳踏實地的；務實的
gept.example_en: She is famous in the neighborhood for being down-to-earth and very practical.
gept.example_zh: 她在街坊間以腳踏實地和務實出名。

gept.example_en: His easy-going attitude makes him a favorite at every community event.
gept.example_zh: 他隨和的態度讓他在每個社區活動上都很受歡迎。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 兩面派的；虛偽的
gept.example_en: Nobody trusts a two-faced friend who shares secrets behind your back.
gept.example_zh: 沒有人會信任在背後洩漏祕密的兩面派朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 慷慨的；寬宏大量的
gept.example_en: Her big-hearted gesture of free meals helped many struggling neighbors that winter.
gept.example_zh: 她慷慨提供免費餐點的舉動幫助了那年冬天許多困苦的鄰居。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣好的；性情溫和的
gept.example_en: His good-natured laugh always lifts the mood at the family dinner table.
gept.example_zh: 他開朗的笑聲總能在家庭晚餐桌上振奮氣氛。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣壞的；易怒的
gept.example_en: He gets ill-tempered when he is tired, so we let him rest first.
gept.example_zh: 他累的時候會脾氣很壞，所以我們先讓他休息。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沒禮貌的；粗魯的
gept.example_en: The teacher gently corrected the ill-mannered child during the school assembly.
gept.example_zh: 老師在校會上溫和地糾正那個沒禮貌的孩子。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有禮貌的；舉止得體的
gept.example_en: Her well-mannered children always thank the host before leaving a party.
gept.example_zh: 她有禮貌的孩子們離開派對前總會感謝主人。

gept.example_en: His well-meaning advice came at a difficult moment and surprisingly helped.
gept.example_zh: 他善意的建議在艱難時刻送來，意外地幫上了忙。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 行為端正的；乖巧的
gept.example_en: The well-behaved teenagers volunteered to clean up after the street festival ended.
gept.example_zh: 那些乖巧的青少年自願在街頭慶典結束後幫忙打掃。

gept.example_en: She stays level-headed even when the family argument grows very loud.
gept.example_zh: 即使家裡爭吵變得很大聲，她仍然能保持冷靜。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 心胸開闊的；坦誠的
gept.example_en: An open-hearted conversation with mom resolved my long-standing worry.
gept.example_zh: 與媽媽一次坦誠的對話解決了我長久以來的擔憂。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不易動怒的；不在乎批評的
gept.example_en: You need to be thick-skinned when joining a competitive sports team.
gept.example_zh: 加入競爭激烈的運動隊伍時需要不在乎批評。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 易受傷的；敏感的
gept.example_en: He is so thin-skinned that any small comment can hurt his feelings.
gept.example_zh: 他非常敏感，任何小評語都會傷他的感情。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 自我中心的；自私的
gept.example_en: Her self-centered behavior caused her group of friends to slowly drift away.
gept.example_zh: 她以自我為中心的行為讓朋友圈慢慢疏遠她。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 自信的；有把握的
gept.example_en: She gave a self-assured speech at her best friend's wedding reception.
gept.example_zh: 她在最好朋友的婚禮上發表了自信的演說。

gept.example_en: Being self-controlled during arguments helps families avoid words they may regret.
gept.example_zh: 爭吵時懂得自制能幫助家人避免說出將來會後悔的話。

gept.example_en: He gets absent-minded when worried about his sister's health problems.
gept.example_zh: 他擔心妹妹的健康問題時就會變得心不在焉。

gept.example_en: She is a dear friend who has stood by me through many tough years.
gept.example_zh: 她是一位陪伴我度過許多艱難歲月的好朋友。

gept.example_en: The beloved grandmother was surrounded by family at her ninetieth birthday.
gept.example_zh: 心愛的奶奶在九十大壽當天被家人圍繞。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可愛的；討人喜歡的
gept.example_en: Our new puppy is so lovable that even the grumpy neighbor smiles at him.
gept.example_zh: 我們的新小狗實在太可愛了，連脾氣壞的鄰居都對牠微笑。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可愛的；惹人喜愛的
gept.example_en: The adorable toddler waved at every passing dog on the busy street.
gept.example_zh: 那個可愛的小孩對熱鬧街上每隻經過的狗揮手。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 想擁抱的；可親的
gept.example_en: Grandpa has a huggable, comforting presence that makes everyone feel safe.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺有種讓人想擁抱、帶來安心感的氣質，讓大家都覺得安全。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 想親吻的；惹人疼愛的
gept.example_en: The baby's kissable cheeks were impossible to resist for any visiting relative.
gept.example_zh: 嬰兒那讓人想親的臉頰，任何來訪的親戚都抗拒不了。

gept.example_en: He proudly introduced his spouse-to-be to all his college friends.
gept.example_zh: 他自豪地向所有大學朋友介紹他未來的配偶。

gept.example_en: After ten years of marriage, she still calls her husband her soulmate.
gept.example_zh: 結婚十年後，她仍然稱丈夫是她的靈魂伴侶。

gept.example_en: He brought flowers home for his sweetheart on their fifth anniversary.
gept.example_zh: 他在他們的五週年紀念日帶花回家送給心愛的人。

gept.example_en: She calls her youngest grandson her darling whenever he visits on weekends.
gept.example_zh: 每當她最小的孫子週末來訪時，她都叫他寶貝。

gept.example_en: She writes a postcard to her dear-one every week while traveling for work.
gept.example_zh: 她出差時每週都會寫一張明信片給她心愛的人。

gept.example_en: Losing a loved-one is one of the hardest emotional experiences in life.
gept.example_zh: 失去摯愛是人生中最艱難的情感經歷之一。

gept.example_en: She has had the same pen-pal in Canada since middle school days.
gept.example_zh: 她從國中就有同一位住在加拿大的筆友。

gept.example_en: My friendly workmate covered my shift when my mother needed urgent care.
gept.example_zh: 在我母親急需照顧時，友善的同事替我代了班。

gept.example_en: She found a true soul-friend in her book club within just a few months.
gept.example_zh: 她在讀書會內幾個月就找到了真正的知心好友。

gept.example_en: They became lifelong friends after volunteering together during the summer floods.
gept.example_zh: 夏季水災期間一起當志工後，他們成了一輩子的朋友。

gept.example_en: Their long-lasting friendship survived several long-distance moves between countries.
gept.example_zh: 他們長久的友誼經歷了多次跨國長距離搬遷仍持續著。

gept.example_en: My longtime mentor still sends me thoughtful birthday notes every single year.
gept.example_zh: 我多年的良師至今每年仍會寄貼心的生日卡片給我。

gept.example_en: She wrote a song about her everlasting love for her late grandfather.
gept.example_zh: 她寫了一首歌，紀念她對已故祖父永恆的愛。

gept.example_en: Their summer romance was fleeting, but they still recall it with warmth.
gept.example_zh: 他們夏日的戀情雖短暫，但仍以溫情回憶它。

gept.example_en: His passing mood will fade once he gets a good night of sleep.
gept.example_zh: 他短暫的情緒在好好睡一覺後就會消退。

gept.example_en: A momentary smile crossed her face when she heard her son's voice.
gept.example_zh: 聽到兒子的聲音時，她臉上閃過一抹短暫的微笑。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人安慰的；撫慰的
gept.example_en: Her comforting words helped me get through the lonely first week away from home.
gept.example_zh: 她令人安慰的話讓我度過了離家後孤單的第一週。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 撫慰的；令人平靜的
gept.example_en: His soothing voice on the phone made the long evening feel less scary.
gept.example_zh: 他在電話那頭撫慰人心的聲音讓漫長的夜晚不那麼可怕。

gept.example_en: It was reassuring to know my best friend lived just two blocks away.
gept.example_zh: 得知最好的朋友就住在兩個街區外令人安心。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 鼓舞人心的；振奮的
gept.example_en: The uplifting community concert raised funds for the local children's hospital.
gept.example_zh: 這場振奮人心的社區音樂會為當地兒童醫院募款。

gept.example_en: It was heartwarming to see strangers help the elderly woman with her bags.
gept.example_zh: 看到陌生人幫助老婦人提袋子真令人暖心。

gept.example_en: The heartbreaking news about her grandfather brought the whole family closer.
gept.example_zh: 關於祖父令人心碎的消息讓全家更加緊密。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 推心置腹的；坦誠的
gept.example_en: They had a long heart-to-heart talk after years of silence between them.
gept.example_zh: 在多年的沉默之後，他們進行了一次長時間的促膝長談。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 令人反感的；掃興的
gept.example_en: His off-putting comments at the dinner table made the new guest uncomfortable.
gept.example_zh: 他在餐桌上令人反感的評論讓新客人感到不自在。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 充滿善意的；祝福的
gept.example_en: Hundreds of well-wishing neighbors signed the get-well card for the injured firefighter.
gept.example_zh: 數百位送上祝福的鄰居在卡片上簽名，慰問受傷的消防員。

gept.example_en: His respectful attitude toward elders made everyone trust him quickly at gatherings.
gept.example_zh: 他對長輩恭敬的態度讓大家在聚會上很快就信任他。

gept.example_en: It is considered disrespectful to interrupt elders during a family discussion.
gept.example_zh: 在家庭討論中打斷長輩被視為不敬。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 心胸寬廣的；豁達的
gept.example_en: A broad-minded leader listens to opinions before making any major decision.
gept.example_zh: 心胸寬廣的領導者會在做任何重大決定前先聽取意見。

gept.example_en: His small-minded jokes about new neighbors hurt the spirit of the community.
gept.example_zh: 他關於新鄰居心胸狹窄的玩笑傷害了社區的氣氛。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 一心一意的；專注的
gept.example_en: She is single-minded about helping homeless youth find safe places to sleep.
gept.example_zh: 她一心一意地幫助無家可歸的年輕人找到安全的睡眠處所。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 公正的；不偏不倚的
gept.example_en: A fair-minded judge listens to both neighbors before resolving the noise complaint.
gept.example_zh: 公正的法官會在解決噪音投訴前聆聽雙方鄰居的說法。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 心地溫柔的；多情的
gept.example_en: Our tender-hearted teacher cried during the farewell song from the graduating class.
gept.example_zh: 我們心地溫柔的老師在畢業班合唱告別歌時哭了。

gept.example_en: He is a good-hearted man who never refuses a request from his neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 他是個心地善良的人，從不拒絕鄰居的請求。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣壞的；惡意的
gept.example_en: Her ill-natured comments at the gathering pushed several friends to leave early.
gept.example_zh: 她在聚會上惡意的評論讓幾位朋友提早離席。

gept.example_en: Our good-tempered uncle is the favorite chaperone at every family reunion.
gept.example_zh: 我們性情溫和的叔叔是每次家庭聚會最受歡迎的陪伴者。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣壞的；易怒的
gept.example_en: He gets bad-tempered when he is hungry, so we always pack a snack.
gept.example_zh: 他餓的時候會脾氣壞，所以我們總會帶點點心。

gept.example_en: Teenagers can sometimes be moody, especially during stressful school weeks.
gept.example_zh: 青少年有時會喜怒無常，特別是壓力大的學校週。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 脾氣壞的；不悅的
gept.example_en: Dad gets grumpy on Monday mornings until he finishes his strong coffee.
gept.example_zh: 爸爸星期一早上喝完濃咖啡前都會悶悶不樂。

gept.example_en: She felt crabby after a long week of arguments with her noisy roommate.
gept.example_zh: 經歷一週與吵鬧室友爭執後，她感到很煩躁。

gept.example_en: The baby was cranky all morning because she missed her usual nap time.
gept.example_zh: 因為錯過了平常的午睡時間，寶寶整個上午都很煩躁。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沒耐心的；發脾氣的
gept.example_en: Sorry I was snappy earlier, I had a terrible argument with my sister.
gept.example_zh: 抱歉我剛剛口氣不好，我和姊姊吵了一場很糟的架。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 緊張不安的；煩躁的
gept.example_en: She felt edgy waiting for her parents' reaction to the engagement news.
gept.example_zh: 她在等父母對訂婚消息的反應時感到緊張不安。

gept.example_en: He felt jittery before meeting his girlfriend's parents for the first time.
gept.example_zh: 第一次見女友父母前，他感到很緊張。

gept.example_en: She was shaken by the unexpected news about her close friend's illness.
gept.example_zh: 她對好友生病的突發消息感到震驚。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 震驚的；目瞪口呆的
gept.example_en: Everyone was stunned when grandpa announced he would remarry at age seventy.
gept.example_zh: 當爺爺宣布他七十歲要再婚時，大家都驚呆了。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 說不出話的；目瞪口呆的
gept.example_en: She was speechless when she opened the surprise birthday gift from her brother.
gept.example_zh: 當她打開哥哥的生日驚喜禮物時，她驚訝得說不出話。

gept.example_en: I was flabbergasted when my quiet cousin gave the funniest wedding speech.
gept.example_zh: 當我安靜的表親發表了最有趣的婚禮致詞時，我大為驚訝。

gept.example_en: She was dumbfounded by her best friend's sudden decision to move overseas.
gept.example_zh: 她對好友突然決定搬到海外感到啞口無言。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 睜大眼睛的；驚奇的
gept.example_en: The wide-eyed children watched the magician at the community center stage.
gept.example_zh: 睜大眼睛的孩子們看著社區中心舞台上的魔術師。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 著迷的；不切實際的
gept.example_en: He was starry-eyed about marriage until he learned how much hard work it takes.
gept.example_zh: 他對婚姻抱有不切實際的幻想，直到他知道這需要多少努力。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 眼眶含淚的；感動的
gept.example_en: She got teary-eyed when her best friend finished her wedding speech.
gept.example_zh: 她最好的朋友講完婚禮致詞時，她眼眶含淚。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 淚眼朦朧的；感傷的
gept.example_en: Grandma got misty-eyed looking at the old photographs from her childhood village.
gept.example_zh: 奶奶看著她童年村莊的老照片時，眼眶泛起淚水。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 眼睛浮腫的（哭過）
gept.example_en: She arrived puffy-eyed at school the morning after her grandfather passed away.
gept.example_zh: 她祖父過世後的隔天早上，眼睛浮腫地來到學校。

gept.example_en: She gets weepy whenever she watches old wedding videos with her family.
gept.example_zh: 她和家人一起看舊婚禮影片時總會想哭。

gept.example_en: Their tearful goodbye at the train station moved every passing stranger.
gept.example_zh: 他們在火車站含淚的道別感動了每個路過的陌生人。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沒有眼淚的；冷靜的
gept.example_en: She stood tearless at the funeral, calmly comforting all her younger siblings.
gept.example_zh: 她在喪禮上沒掉一滴淚，冷靜地安撫所有的弟妹。

gept.example_en: The joyous celebration in the neighborhood lasted late into the warm evening.
gept.example_zh: 社區裡歡樂的慶祝持續到溫暖的深夜。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無樂趣的；憂鬱的
gept.example_en: The joyless dinner ended early because everyone was still upset about the argument.
gept.example_zh: 因為大家對爭吵還耿耿於懷，這頓索然無味的晚餐很早就結束了。

gept.example_en: He felt truly sorry for forgetting his sister's important birthday last week.
gept.example_zh: 他對上週忘了妹妹重要的生日感到真心抱歉。

gept.example_en: She felt regretful about not visiting her ailing aunt more often last year.
gept.example_zh: 她後悔去年沒有更常去探望生病的阿姨。

gept.example_en: He was apologetic about arriving late to the welcoming dinner with his in-laws.
gept.example_zh: 他對於遲到參加和岳父母的歡迎晚餐感到很抱歉。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不道歉的；不悔改的
gept.example_en: She is unapologetic about choosing family over a job promotion.
gept.example_zh: 她毫不歉疚地選擇家人勝過工作升遷。

gept.example_en: He showed clear remorse for the cruel words he said during the family fight.
gept.example_zh: 他對家庭爭吵時說的刻薄話表現出明顯的悔恨。

gept.example_en: His boastful stories about his job soon bored his old high school friends.
gept.example_zh: 他自誇工作的故事很快讓老同學感到厭煩。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 愛炫耀的；浮華的
gept.example_en: She avoided the showy guest who only wanted to talk about his money.
gept.example_zh: 她避開了那位愛炫耀、只想聊錢的客人。

gept.example_en: His snobbish remarks at the family gathering offended several relatives.
gept.example_zh: 他在家庭聚會上勢利的言論冒犯了幾位親戚。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 自命不凡的；高傲的
gept.example_en: Some classmates called her stuck-up, but she was just very shy at first.
gept.example_zh: 有些同學說她高傲，其實她只是一開始很害羞。

gept.example_en: Don't be a show-off at the party; just enjoy chatting with old friends.
gept.example_zh: 派對上別當愛炫耀的人，好好和老朋友聊天就好。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 善於與人相處的人
gept.example_en: She is a real people-person and quickly becomes friends with everyone at work.
gept.example_zh: 她真的很擅長與人相處，很快就和工作上的每個人成了朋友。

gept.example_en: He is known as a team-player who supports his colleagues during stressful weeks.
gept.example_zh: 他以團隊合作著稱，會在壓力大的週裡支持同事。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 中間人；居中協調者
gept.example_en: She acted as a go-between when her two best friends were not speaking.
gept.example_zh: 當她兩位好友彼此不說話時，她擔任居中協調者。

gept.example_en: Aunt Mei is famous in our town for being a successful matchmaker.
gept.example_zh: 美姑姑在我們鎮上以成功的媒人聞名。

gept.example_en: Neighbors take turns acting as a lookout during the late evening street walks.
gept.example_zh: 鄰居們在深夜街上散步時輪流擔任守望者。

gept.example_en: She is a sincere do-gooder who spends every weekend at the soup kitchen.
gept.example_zh: 她是個真誠熱心公益的人，每個週末都在施粥所幫忙。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 害羞不參與的人；壁花
gept.example_en: I was a wallflower at my first school dance, but I made friends later.
gept.example_zh: 我第一次參加學校舞會時是壁花，但後來交到了朋友。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 守舊的人；掃興的人
gept.example_en: Don't be a stick-in-the-mud; come join us for the community karaoke night.
gept.example_zh: 別當掃興鬼，來和我們一起參加社區卡拉OK之夜吧。

gept.example_en: She is a social-butterfly who knows everyone in the apartment complex by name.
gept.example_zh: 她是社交達人，認識整棟公寓裡每個人的名字。

gept.example_en: He is more of a homebody and prefers cozy evenings with his close friends.
gept.example_zh: 他比較像是個喜歡待在家的人，偏好和好友共度溫馨的夜晚。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 整天坐在沙發上的人
gept.example_en: He used to be a couch-potato until his friend invited him to weekly hikes.
gept.example_zh: 他以前是個整天躺沙發的人，直到朋友每週邀他爬山。

gept.example_en: As a night-owl, she prefers chatting with friends online after midnight.
gept.example_zh: 身為夜貓子，她偏好午夜後和朋友線上聊天。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 話多的人；多嘴的人
gept.example_en: My little cousin is such a chatterbox that even the dog seems to listen.
gept.example_zh: 我的小表妹話多到連狗似乎都在聽。

gept.example_en: The neighborhood busybody knows every detail about everyone's family life.
gept.example_zh: 社區裡愛管閒事的人對每個家庭的生活細節都瞭若指掌。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 惹麻煩的人；搗蛋者
gept.example_en: He had a reputation as a troublemaker in school but became a kind teacher.
gept.example_zh: 他在學校以搗蛋出名，但後來成為一位仁慈的老師。

gept.example_en: Mom has always been the family peacemaker during heated holiday arguments.
gept.example_zh: 媽媽一直是家裡假日激烈爭執時的和事佬。

gept.meaning_zh: (名詞) 破冰活動；打破僵局之物
gept.example_en: A funny icebreaker game helped the new club members feel comfortable quickly.
gept.example_zh: 一個有趣的破冰遊戲讓新社員很快就感到自在。

gept.example_en: The shopkeeper kindly explained to the tourist where to find the festival.
gept.example_zh: 店主和藹地向遊客解釋去哪裡找到節慶活動。

gept.example_en: She warmly welcomed every guest at her grandmother's eightieth birthday gathering.
gept.example_zh: 她在祖母八十歲生日聚會上熱情地歡迎每位賓客。

gept.example_en: He greeted his ex-roommate coldly, still upset about their last argument.
gept.example_zh: 他冷淡地向前室友打招呼，仍對上次爭吵感到不悅。

gept.example_en: She fondly remembers the summer evenings spent on her grandparents' front porch.
gept.example_zh: 她深情地回憶在祖父母前廊上度過的夏日夜晚。

gept.example_en: He lovingly placed the family photo on the new shelf in his living room.
gept.example_zh: 他溫柔地將全家福放在客廳新的層架上。

gept.example_en: She tenderly hugged her brother before he left for his long overseas trip.
gept.example_zh: 她在弟弟啟程長途海外旅行前，溫柔地擁抱了他。

gept.example_en: Grandpa gently held the baby while singing an old folk song from his village.
gept.example_zh: 爺爺輕輕地抱著嬰兒，唱著家鄉的老民謠。

gept.example_en: He spoke harshly during the argument and later apologized to his wife.
gept.example_zh: 他在爭吵時說話嚴厲，事後向妻子道歉。

gept.example_en: She mildly disagreed with her father but did not want to start an argument.
gept.example_zh: 她溫和地不同意父親的看法，但不想引發爭執。

gept.example_en: He rudely interrupted his cousin during the wedding toast and was scolded later.
gept.example_zh: 他在婚禮致詞時無禮地打斷表親，事後被責備。

gept.example_en: She politely declined the third helping of cake from her generous aunt.
gept.example_zh: 她有禮貌地拒絕了慷慨的阿姨第三次送來的蛋糕。

gept.example_en: He gave a scornful look when he heard the gossip about the new neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 聽到關於新鄰居的八卦時，他露出鄙視的眼神。

gept.example_en: His mocking tone hurt her feelings during the casual family game night.
gept.example_zh: 他嘲弄的語氣在輕鬆的家庭遊戲夜傷了她的感情。

gept.example_en: Her sarcastic reply at the dinner table made everyone fall silent for a moment.
gept.example_zh: 她在晚餐桌上諷刺的回答讓大家一時都沉默了。

gept.example_en: Their playful teasing has been a family tradition since they were kids.
gept.example_zh: 他們嬉鬧的逗弄方式從小就是家中的傳統。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 心情愉快的；幽默的
gept.example_en: Grandpa stays good-humored even when the grandchildren make a huge mess.
gept.example_zh: 即使孫子們搞得一團亂，爺爺仍保持愉快的心情。

gept.example_en: Their merry laughter filled the small backyard during the spring barbecue.
gept.example_zh: 他們歡樂的笑聲在春日烤肉時充滿了小後院。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 興高采烈的；快活的
gept.example_en: Her cheery hello every morning makes the whole apartment hallway feel warmer.
gept.example_zh: 她每天早上歡快的問候讓整個公寓走廊變得溫暖。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 活潑的；精神飽滿的
gept.example_en: She is always perky in the morning, no matter how busy the previous day was.
gept.example_zh: 無論前一天多忙，她早上總是精神飽滿。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 活潑開朗的；充滿活力的
gept.example_en: My bubbly aunt makes every family gathering feel like a real celebration.
gept.example_zh: 我活潑開朗的阿姨讓每次家庭聚會都像真正的慶典。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 充滿活力的；雀躍的
gept.example_en: The kids were bouncy with excitement before the neighborhood Easter egg hunt.
gept.example_zh: 孩子們在社區復活節彩蛋活動前興奮得跳來跳去。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 有活力的；熱情的
gept.example_en: The spirited debate at the town meeting lasted until late in the evening.
gept.example_zh: 鎮民大會上熱烈的辯論持續到深夜。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沮喪的；意志消沉的
gept.example_en: He looked dispirited after his closest friend turned down his invitation.
gept.example_zh: 他最親近的朋友拒絕他的邀請後，他顯得意志消沉。

gept.example_en: She felt low-spirited after the holiday gathering ended and the cousins left.
gept.example_zh: 在假期聚會結束、表兄妹們離開後，她感到心情低落。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 興致勃勃的；精力充沛的
gept.example_en: The high-spirited children helped decorate the community center for the spring festival.
gept.example_zh: 興致勃勃的孩子們幫忙裝飾社區中心迎接春節。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 沮喪的；垂頭喪氣的
gept.example_en: He looked downcast when his best friend forgot about their lunch plan.
gept.example_zh: 當最好的朋友忘了他們的午餐約會時，他顯得垂頭喪氣。

gept.example_en: He sat glum at the family dinner, still thinking about his recent breakup.
gept.example_zh: 他在家庭晚餐上鬱悶地坐著，仍想著最近的分手。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 慍怒的；繃著臉的
gept.example_en: The sulky teenager refused to talk to anyone after the curfew argument.
gept.example_zh: 慍怒的青少年在門禁爭吵後拒絕和任何人說話。

gept.example_en: The little girl looked pouty until her grandfather offered her some warm cocoa.
gept.example_zh: 小女孩一直撅著嘴，直到爺爺給她一杯熱可可。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無生氣的；陰沉的
gept.example_en: The cheerless living room came alive once the family gathered for tea.
gept.example_zh: 當全家聚在一起喝茶時，原本陰沉的客廳變得生氣勃勃。

gept.example_en: After the heart-to-heart talk, she felt hopeful about saving their friendship.
gept.example_zh: 在那次坦誠的談話後，她對挽救友誼充滿希望。

gept.example_en: He felt hopeless after the third argument with his roommate that week.
gept.example_zh: 在那週和室友第三次爭吵後，他感到絕望。

gept.example_en: She was fearful of being rejected when she finally confessed her feelings.
gept.example_zh: 當她終於表白心意時，她害怕被拒絕。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 懷疑的；不確定的
gept.example_en: She was doubtful about meeting her new in-laws for the first time alone.
gept.example_zh: 她對於第一次獨自見新岳父母感到不確定。

gept.example_en: He has a trusting nature and always believes the best about his neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 他天性容易信任他人，總是把鄰居想得很好。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 不信任的；多疑的
gept.example_en: After being deceived twice, she became distrustful of online dating sites.
gept.example_zh: 被欺騙兩次後，她對網路交友網站變得不信任。

gept.example_en: He turned out to be an untrustworthy friend who shared private stories.
gept.example_zh: 他原來是個不可信任的朋友，會洩漏私事。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 可靠的；可信賴的
gept.example_en: She is the most dependable person in our extended family during an emergency.
gept.example_zh: 她是我們大家族中緊急時刻最可靠的人。

gept.example_en: He is friendly but undependable, often canceling plans at the last minute.
gept.example_zh: 他人很友善但不可靠，常在最後一刻取消約定。

gept.example_en: Their carefree childhood summers were spent at grandma's quiet seaside home.
gept.example_zh: 他們無憂無慮的童年夏天都在奶奶安靜的海邊家中度過。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無憂無慮的；自由自在的
gept.example_en: Her carefree-spirited grandmother loved organizing surprise picnics for the family.
gept.example_zh: 她無憂無慮的奶奶喜歡為家人安排驚喜野餐。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無汽車的；不顧後果的
gept.example_en: Living in a carless neighborhood encouraged everyone to walk and chat with neighbors.
gept.example_zh: 住在無車的社區鼓勵大家走路並和鄰居聊天。

gept.example_en: He was merciless in his criticism, which damaged the close friendship deeply.
gept.example_zh: 他無情的批評嚴重傷害了那份親密的友誼。

gept.example_en: Her ruthless words in the argument were something she could not take back.
gept.example_zh: 她在爭吵中無情的話語是無法收回的。

gept.example_en: He ruthlessly cut ties with the friends who had let him down repeatedly.
gept.example_zh: 他冷酷地與多次讓他失望的朋友斷絕了關係。

gept.example_en: She felt guiltless about taking a break from her demanding family role.
gept.example_zh: 她對於暫時休息一下繁重的家庭角色感到問心無愧。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 無可指責的；無過失的
gept.example_en: The blameless toddler was caught between his parents' loud weekend argument.
gept.example_zh: 無辜的幼兒被夾在父母週末激烈的爭吵之間。

gept.meaning_zh: (形容詞) 該受責備的；指責的
gept.example_en: His blameful tone after the misunderstanding pushed his sister to leave the room.
gept.example_zh: 誤會後他指責的語氣讓他妹妹離開了房間。
